sanskrit: कथयामि घटीलग्नं सृनु त्वं द्विजसत्तम । सूर्योदयत् समारभ्य जन्मकालावधि क्रमात् ॥६॥
transliteration: kathayāmi ghaṭīlagnaṃ sṛnu tvaṃ dvijasattama . sūryodayat samārabhya janmakālāvadhi kramāt.
separated_sandhi: kathayāmi ghaṭīlagnaṃ sṛṇu tvaṃ dvijasattamasūryodayāt samārabhya janmakālāvavdhi kramāt
english: O best among brahmins (dvija), listen! I will explain the Ghaṭī-Lagna, which is calculated sequentially from sunrise up to the time of birth.

sanskrit: एकैकघटिकामानात् लग्नं यद्याति भादिकम् । तदेव घटिकालग्नं कथितं नारदादिभिः ॥७॥
transliteration: ekaikaghaṭikāmānāt lagnaṃ yadyāti bhādikam . tadeva ghaṭikālagnaṃ kathitaṃ nāradādibhiḥ.
separated_sandhi: ekaika ghaṭikāmānāt lagnaṃ yadi yāti bhādikamtat eva ghaṭikālagnaṃ kathitaṃ nāradādibhiḥ
english: If the ascendant progresses through the zodiacal signs (rāśi) by the measure of each Ghaṭī, then that alone is declared to be the Ghaṭī-Lagna by Nārada and others.

sanskrit: राशयस्तु घटीतुल्याः पलार्धप्रमितांशकाः । योज्यमौदयिके भनौ घटीलग्नं स्फुटं हि तत् ॥८॥
transliteration: rāśayastu ghaṭītulyāḥ palārdhapramitāṃśakāḥ . yojyamaudayike bhanau ghaṭīlagnaṃ sphuṭaṃ hi tat.
separated_sandhi: rāśayaḥ tu ghaṭītulyāḥ palārdhapramitāṃśakāḥyojyam audayike bhānau ghaṭīlagnaṃ sphuṭaṃ hi tat
english: The zodiacal signs (rāśi) are equivalent to a Ghaṭī (24 minutes), with their divisions (aṃśaka) measured by half a pala (12 seconds). This calculation should be applied to the rising Sun (bhānu), and that indeed will give the precise Ghaṭī-Lagna.

sanskrit: क्रमादेषां च लग्नानां भावकोष्ठं पृथक् लिखेत् । ये ग्रहा यत्र भे तत्र ते स्थाप्या राशिलग्नवत् ॥९॥
transliteration: kramādeṣāṃ ca lagnānāṃ bhāvakoṣṭhaṃ pṛthak likhet . ye grahā yatra bhe tatra te sthāpyā rāśilagnavat.
separated_sandhi: kramāt eṣām ca lagnānām bhāvakoṣṭhaṃ pṛthak likhetye grahā yatra bhe tatra te sthāpyā rāśilagnavat
english: One should separately draw the house charts (bhāva-koṣṭha) for these sequential Lagnas. Whichever planets are in which sign (bhā), they should be placed there, just as they are positioned in the Rāśi-Lagna chart.

sanskrit: वर्णदाख्यदशां भानां कथयाम्यथ तेऽग्रतः । यस्य विज्ञानमात्रेण वदेदायुर्भवं फलम् ॥१०॥
transliteration: varṇadākhyadaśāṃ bhānāṃ kathayāmyatha te'grataḥ . yasya vijñānamātreṇa vadedāyurbhavaṃ phalam.
separated_sandhi: varṇadākhyadaśāṃ bhānām kathayāmi atha te agrataḥyasya vijñānamātreṇa vadet āyurbhavaṃ phalam
english: Now, I shall explain to you the Varṇadā daśā (planetary period) of the zodiacal signs (bhā). Merely by understanding this, one can declare the results pertaining to life (āyus) and existence (bhāva).

sanskrit: ओजलग्नप्रसूतानां मेषादेर्गणयेत् क्रमात् । समलग्नप्रसूतानाम् मीनादेरपसव्यतः ॥११॥
transliteration: ojalagnaprasūtānāṃ meṣādergaṇayet kramāt . samalagnaprasūtānām mīnāderapasavyataḥ.
separated_sandhi: ojalagnaprasūtānām meṣādeḥ gaṇayet kramātsamalagnaprasūtānām mīnādeḥ apasavyataḥ
english: For those born with an odd ascending sign (lagna), one should count in direct order starting from Aries. For those born with an even ascending sign, one should count in reverse order starting from Pisces.

sanskrit: मेषमीनादितो जन्मलग्नान्तं गणयेत् सुधीः । तथैव होरालग्नान्तं गणयित्वा ततः परम् ॥१२॥
transliteration: meṣamīnādito janmalagnāntaṃ gaṇayet sudhīḥ . tathaiva horālagnāntaṃ gaṇayitvā tataḥ param.
separated_sandhi: meṣamīnāditaḥ janmalagnāntam gaṇayet sudhīḥtathaiva horālagnāntam gaṇayitvā tataḥ param
english: An intelligent person should count from Aries or Pisces (as determined by the previous rule) up to the birth ascendant (lagna). Similarly, having counted up to the Horā-lagna, thereafter (the process continues).

sanskrit: ओजत्वेन समत्वेन सयातीये उभे यदि । तर्हि संख्ये योजयीत वैजात्ये तु वियोजयेत् ॥१३॥
transliteration: ojatvena samatvena sayātīye ubhe yadi . tarhi saṃkhye yojayīta vaijātye tu viyojayet.
separated_sandhi: ojatvena samatvena sajātīye ubhe yadi tarhisaṅkhye yojayīta vaijātye tu viyojayet
english: If both (the counts derived for the birth ascendant and Horā-lagna) are of the same nature, meaning both are derived from odd signs or both from even signs, then one should add the two numbers. However, if they are of different natures (one from an odd sign, one from an even), one should subtract them.

sanskrit: मेषमीनादितः पश्चाद्यो राशिः स तु वर्णदः । एतत्प्रयोजनं वक्ष्ये सृणु त्वं द्विजपुंगवः । होरालग्नभयोर्नेया सबलाद्वर्णदा दशा ॥१४॥
transliteration: meṣamīnāditaḥ paścādyo rāśiḥ sa tu varṇadaḥ . etatprayojanaṃ vakṣye sṛṇu tvaṃ dvijapuṃgavaḥ . horālagnabhayorneyā sabalādvarṇadā daśā.
separated_sandhi: meṣamīnāditaḥ paścāt yaḥ rāśiḥ saḥtu varṇadaḥ etat prayojanam vakṣyeśṛṇu tvam dvijapuṅgavaḥhorālagnabhayoḥ neyā sabalāt varṇadā daśā
english: The sign determined by counting (from Aries or Pisces as per the rules in 137896-137898) is the one that assigns the specific varṇa (letter/category). I shall now explain the purpose of this; please listen, O best among the twice-born (dvija). The varṇa-giving planetary period (dasha) should be derived from whichever is stronger between the Horā-lagna and the birth ascendant (lagna).

sanskrit: यत्संख्ये वर्णदो लग्नात् तत्तत्संख्याक्रमेण तु । क्रमयुत्क्रमभेदेन दशा स्यादोजयुग्मयो ॥१५॥
transliteration: yatsaṃkhye varṇado lagnāt tattatsaṃkhyākrameṇa tu . kramayutkramabhedena daśā syādojayugmayo.
separated_sandhi: yat saṅkhye varṇadaḥ lagnāt tat tat saṅkhyā krameṇatu kramayutkramabhedena daśā syāt ojayugmayoḥ
english: The planetary period (dasha) that determines the varṇa (category) is derived from the number corresponding to the stronger of the two relevant ascendants (lagna or Horā-lagna). This derivation follows the sequence of that number, distinguishing between direct and reverse counting for odd and even signs respectively.

sanskrit: पापदृष्टिः पापयोगो वर्ण्दस्य त्रिकोणके । यदि स्यात् तर्हि तद्राशिपर्यन्तं तस्य जीवनं ॥१६॥
transliteration: pāpadṛṣṭiḥ pāpayogo varṇdasya trikoṇake . yadi syāt tarhi tadrāśiparyantaṃ tasya jīvanaṃ.
separated_sandhi: pāpadṛṣṭiḥ pāpayogaḥ varṇadasya trikoṇake yadisyāt tarhi tadrāśiparyantam tasya jīvanam
english: If there is a malefic aspect or a malefic conjunction in the trines (5th or 9th houses) from the varṇada (indicator of vitality), then that person's life extends only up to the period of that particular sign.

sanskrit: रुद्रशूले यथैवायुर्मरणादि निरूप्यते । तथैव वर्णदस्यपि त्रिकोणे पापसंगमे ॥१७॥
transliteration: rudraśūle yathaivāyurmaraṇādi nirūpyate . tathaiva varṇadasyapi trikoṇe pāpasaṃgame.
separated_sandhi: rudraśūle yathā eva āyuḥ maraṇa-ādi nirūpyatetathā eva varṇadasya api trikoṇe pāpasaṅgame
english: Just as longevity and the timing of death (maraṇādi) are determined using the Rudra Śūla system, similarly, one should consider the effect on the varṇada if there is a malefic conjunction in its trine houses.

sanskrit: वर्णदादपि भो विप्र लग्नवच्चिन्तयेत् फलम् । वर्णदात् सप्तमाद् भावत् कलत्रायुर्विचिन्तयेत् ॥१८॥
transliteration: varṇadādapi bho vipra lagnavaccintayet phalam . varṇadāt saptamād bhāvat kalatrāyurvicintayet.
separated_sandhi: varṇadāt api bho vipra lagnavat cintayet phalamvarṇadāt saptamāt bhāvāt kalatrāyuḥ vicintayet
english: O Brahmin, one should consider the effects (phal) from the varṇada just as one would from the Lagna (ascendant). From the seventh house (bhāva) from the varṇada, one should consider the longevity (āyuḥ) of the spouse.

sanskrit: एकादशादग्रजस्य तृतीयात्तु यवीयसः । सुतस्य पंचमे विद्यान्मातुश्चतुर्थभावत् ॥१९॥
transliteration: ekādaśādagrajasya tṛtīyāttu yavīyasaḥ . sutasya paṃcame vidyānmātuścaturthabhāvat.
separated_sandhi: ekādaśāt agrajasya tṛtīyāt tu yavīyasaḥsutasya pañcame vidyāt mātuḥ caturthabhāvāt
english: One should understand the longevity of the elder sibling from the eleventh house, and for the younger sibling from the third house. For the son, it is known from the fifth house, and for the mother, from the fourth house.

sanskrit: पितुश्च नवमाद् भावादयुरीवं विचिन्तयेत् । शूलराशिदशायां वै प्रवलायामरिष्टकम् ॥२०॥
transliteration: pituśca navamād bhāvādayurīvaṃ vicintayet . śūlarāśidaśāyāṃ vai pravalāyāmariṣṭakam.
separated_sandhi: pituḥ ca navamāt bhāvāt āyuḥ evam vicintayetśūlarāśidaśāyām vai pravalāyām ariṣṭakam
english: And for the father, one should similarly consider longevity from the ninth house. Indeed, calamity (ariṣṭa) manifests significantly during the predominant period (daśā) of the śūlarāśi.

sanskrit: एवं तन्वादिभावानां कर्तव्या वर्णा दशा । पूर्ववच्च फलं ज्ञेयं देहिनां च शुभाशुभम् ॥२१॥
transliteration: evaṃ tanvādibhāvānāṃ kartavyā varṇā daśā . pūrvavacca phalaṃ jñeyaṃ dehināṃ ca śubhāśubham.
separated_sandhi: evam tanvādibhāvānām kartavyā varṇā daśāpūrvavat ca phalam jñeyam dehinām ca śubhāśubham
english: In this manner, the Varna daśās should be applied to the houses (bhāvas) starting from the first. And just as before, the auspicious and inauspicious results for embodied beings should be understood.

sanskrit: ग्रहनां वर्णदा नैव राशीनां वर्ण्दा दशा । कृत्वार्कधा राशिदशां क्रमादन्तर्दशां वदेत् ॥२२॥
transliteration: grahanāṃ varṇadā naiva rāśīnāṃ varṇdā daśā . kṛtvārkadhā rāśidaśāṃ kramādantardaśāṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: grahānām varṇadā na eva rāśīnām varṇadā daśākṛtvā arkadhā rāśidaśām kramāt antardaśām vadet
english: The Varna daśā is not associated with planets (grahas), but rather with the signs (rāśis). Having calculated the Rāśi daśā in twelve ways, one should then declare the antardaśā (sub-period) in their proper sequence.

sanskrit: एवमन्तर्दशादिं च कृत्वा तेन फलं वदेत् । क्रमव्युत्क्रमभेदेन लिखेदन्तर्दशामपि ॥२३॥
transliteration: evamantardaśādiṃ ca kṛtvā tena phalaṃ vadet . kramavyutkramabhedena likhedantardaśāmapi.
separated_sandhi: evam antardaśā ādim ca kṛtvā tena phalam vadetkramavyutkramabhedena likhet antardaśām api
english: Thus, having calculated the antardaśā (sub-periods) and so on, one should declare the results accordingly. One should also delineate the antardaśā (sub-periods) by distinguishing between direct and reverse sequences.

sanskrit: स्वस्वदेशोद्भवं लग्नं जन्मलग्नमिमिहोच्यते । भावहोरादिलग्नानां सर्वत्रैव समक्रिया ॥२४॥
transliteration: svasvadeśodbhavaṃ lagnaṃ janmalagnamimihocyate . bhāvahorādilagnānāṃ sarvatraiva samakriyā.
separated_sandhi: svasvadeśa udbhavam lagnam janmalagnam iti ihaucyate bhāvahorā ādi lagnānām sarvatra eva samakriyā
english: The ascendant (lagna) determined according to one's own country or region is here referred to as the natal ascendant (janma lagna). For the ascendants of the houses (bhāvas), horās, and so on, the rules of operation are the same everywhere.

sanskrit: श्रुता ग्रहगुणास्त्वत्तस्तथा राशिगुण मुने । श्रोतमिच्छामि भावानां भेदांस्तान् कृपया वद ॥१॥
transliteration: śrutā grahaguṇāstvattastathā rāśiguṇa mune . śrotamicchāmi bhāvānāṃ bhedāṃstān kṛpayā vada.
separated_sandhi: śrutāḥ grahaguṇāḥ tvattaḥ tathā rāśiguṇān muneśrotum icchāmi bhāvānām bhedān tān kṛpayā vada
english: O sage, I have heard from you about the qualities of the planets (grahas) and similarly the qualities of the signs (rāśis). I now desire to hear about the distinctions of the houses (bhāvas); please kindly explain them.

sanskrit: वर्गान् षोडश यानाह ब्रह्मा लोकपितामहः । तानहं सम्प्रवक्ष्यामि मैत्रेय स्रूयतामिति ॥२॥
transliteration: vargān ṣoḍaśa yānāha brahmā lokapitāmahaḥ . tānahaṃ sampravakṣyāmi maitreya srūyatāmiti.
separated_sandhi: vargān ṣoḍaśa yān āha brahmā lokapitāmahaḥtān aham sampravakṣyāmi maitreya śrūyatām iti
english: O Maitreya, I will now thoroughly explain those sixteen divisional charts (vargas) which Brahmā, the grandfather of the worlds, has described. Listen to this.

sanskrit: क्षेत्रं होरा च द्रेष्काणस्तुर्यांशः सप्तमांशकः । नवांशो दशमांशश्च सूर्याम्शः षोडशांशकः ॥३॥
transliteration: kṣetraṃ horā ca dreṣkāṇasturyāṃśaḥ saptamāṃśakaḥ . navāṃśo daśamāṃśaśca sūryāmśaḥ ṣoḍaśāṃśakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: kṣetram horā ca dreṣkāṇaḥ turyāṃśaḥ saptamāṃśakaḥnavāṃśaḥ daśamāṃśaḥ ca sūryāṃśaḥ ṣoḍaśāṃśakaḥ
english: These are the divisional charts: the sign (kṣetra), the horā, the dreṣkāṇa, the turyāṃśa, the saptamāṃśaka, the navāṃśa, the daśamāṃśa, the sūryāṃśa, and the ṣoḍaśāṃśaka.

sanskrit: विंशांशो वेदवाह्वंशो भांशस्त्रिंशांशकस्ततः । खवेदांशोऽक्षवेदांशः षष्ठ्यंशश्च ततः परम् ॥४॥
transliteration: viṃśāṃśo vedavāhvaṃśo bhāṃśastriṃśāṃśakastataḥ . khavedāṃśo'kṣavedāṃśaḥ ṣaṣṭhyaṃśaśca tataḥ param.
separated_sandhi: viṃśāṃśaḥ vedabāhvaṃśaḥ bhāṃśaḥ triṃśāṃśakaḥ tataḥkhavedāṃśaḥ akṣavedāṃśaḥ ṣaṣṭhyaṃśaḥ ca tataḥ param
english: Following these are the viṃśāṃśa (D20), the caturviṃśāṃśa (vedabāhvāṃśa, D24), the bhāṃśa (D27), the triṃśāṃśaka (D30); then the khavedāṃśa (D40), the akṣavedāṃśa (D45), and after that, the ṣaṣṭhyaṃśa (D60).

sanskrit: तत्क्षेत्रं तस्य खेटस्य राशेर्यो यस्य नायकः । सूर्येन्द्वोर्विषमे राशौ समे तद्विपरीतकम् ॥५॥
transliteration: tatkṣetraṃ tasya kheṭasya rāśeryo yasya nāyakaḥ . sūryendvorviṣame rāśau same tadviparītakam.
separated_sandhi: tat kṣetram tasya kheṭasya rāśeḥ yaḥ yasya nāyakaḥsūryendvoḥ viṣame rāśau same tat viparītakam
english: That sign (kṣetra) belongs to the planet who is its lord. For the Sun and Moon, if the sign is odd, the rule applies one way, and if the sign is even, it is the opposite.

sanskrit: पितरश्चन्द्रहोरेशा देवाः सूर्यस्य कीर्तिताः । राशेरर्द्धं भवेद्धोरा ताश्चतुर्विंशतिः स्मृता । मेषादि तासां होराणां परिवृत्तिद्वयं भवेत् ॥६॥
transliteration: pitaraścandrahoreśā devāḥ sūryasya kīrtitāḥ . rāśerarddhaṃ bhaveddhorā tāścaturviṃśatiḥ smṛtā . meṣādi tāsāṃ horāṇāṃ parivṛttidvayaṃ bhavet.
separated_sandhi: pitaraḥ candrahorāīśāḥ devāḥ sūryasyakīrtitāḥ rāśeḥ arddham bhavet horātāḥ caturviṃśatiḥ smṛtā meṣaāditāsām horāṇām parivṛttidvayam bhavet
english: The ancestors (pitaraḥ) are said to preside over the Moon's horā, while the deities (devāḥ) are declared to preside over the Sun's horā. A horā is half of a zodiacal sign, and there are twenty-four such horās in total. Starting from Aries, there are two recurring cycles for the rulership of these horās.

sanskrit: राशित्रिभागाद्रेष्काणास्ते च षट्त्रिंशदीरिताः । परिवृत्तित्रयं तेषां मेषादेः क्रमशो भवेत् ॥७॥
transliteration: rāśitribhāgādreṣkāṇāste ca ṣaṭtriṃśadīritāḥ . parivṛttitrayaṃ teṣāṃ meṣādeḥ kramaśo bhavet.
separated_sandhi: rāśitribhāgāt dreṣkāṇāḥ te ca ṣaṭtriṃśat īritāḥparivṛttitrayam teṣām meṣādeḥ kramaśaḥ bhavet
english: Decanates (dreṣkāṇa) are said to be the three parts of a zodiacal sign, and there are thirty-six of them. Their three cycles occur in order, starting from Aries.

sanskrit: स्वपंचनवमानां च राशीनां क्रमशश्च ते । नारदाऽगस्तिदुर्वासा द्रेष्काणेशाश्चरादिषु ॥८॥
transliteration: svapaṃcanavamānāṃ ca rāśīnāṃ kramaśaśca te . nāradā'gastidurvāsā dreṣkāṇeśāścarādiṣu.
separated_sandhi: svapañcanavamānām ca rāśīnām kramaśaḥ ca tenāradāgastidurvāsāḥ dreṣkāṇeśāḥ carādiṣu
english: The decanates (dreṣkāṇa) belong to the respective sign itself, its fifth sign, and its ninth sign, in order. The lords of the decanates (dreṣkāṇeśa) in movable (cara), fixed (sthira), and dual (dvi-svabhāva) signs are Nārada, Agastya, and Durvāsā, respectively.

sanskrit: स्वर्क्षादिकेन्द्रपतयस्तुर्यांशेशाः क्रियादिषु । सनकश्च सनन्दश्च कुमारश्च सनातनः ॥९॥
transliteration: svarkṣādikendrapatayasturyāṃśeśāḥ kriyādiṣu . sanakaśca sanandaśca kumāraśca sanātanaḥ.
separated_sandhi: svarkṣādikendrapatayaḥ turyāṃśeśāḥ kriyādiṣusanakaḥ ca sanandaḥ ca kumāraḥ ca sanātanaḥ
english: In Aries (kriyā) and other signs, the lords of the quadrangular divisions (turyaṃśas) are the lords of the sign itself and its angular houses (kendras) (4th, 7th, and 10th houses), respectively. Sanaka, Sananda, Kumāra, and Sanātana are (the presiding deities).

sanskrit: सप्तांशपास्त्वोजगृहे गणनीया निजेशतः । युग्मराशौ तु विज्ञेयाः सप्तमर्क्षादिनायकात् ॥१०॥
transliteration: saptāṃśapāstvojagṛhe gaṇanīyā nijeśataḥ . yugmarāśau tu vijñeyāḥ saptamarkṣādināyakāt.
separated_sandhi: saptāṃśapāḥ tu ojagṛhe gaṇanīyāḥ nijeśataḥyugmarāśau tu vijñeyāḥ saptamarkṣādināyakāt
english: The lords of the Saptāṃśa (sevenfold divisions) in odd signs are to be reckoned from the lord of the sign itself. However, in even signs, they are to be known from the lord of the seventh sign onwards.

sanskrit: क्षारक्षीरौ च दध्याज्यौ तथेक्षुरससम्भवः । मध्यशुद्धजलावोजे समे शुद्धजलादिकाः ॥११॥
transliteration: kṣārakṣīrau ca dadhyājyau tathekṣurasasambhavaḥ . madhyaśuddhajalāvoje same śuddhajalādikāḥ.
separated_sandhi: kṣārakṣīrau ca dadhyājyau tathā ikṣurasasambhavaḥmadhyaśuddhajalau auje same śuddhajalādikāḥ
english: For odd signs, the sequence of dravyas (substances) for the Saptāṃśas is salt water, milk, curd, ghee, sugarcane juice, wine, and pure water. In even signs, the sequence starts with pure water (and reverses).

sanskrit: नवांशेशाश्चरे तस्मात्स्थिरे तन्नवमादितः । उभये तत्पंचमादेरिति चिन्त्यं विचक्षणौः । देवा नृराक्षसाश्चैव चरादिषु गृहेषु च ॥१२॥
transliteration: navāṃśeśāścare tasmātsthire tannavamāditaḥ . ubhaye tatpaṃcamāderiti cintyaṃ vicakṣaṇauḥ . devā nṛrākṣasāścaiva carādiṣu gṛheṣu ca.
separated_sandhi: navāṃśeśāḥ care tasmāt sthire tatnavamāt āditaḥ ubhaye tat pañcamātādeḥ iti cintyam vicakṣaṇaiḥ devāḥnṛ-rākṣasāḥ ca eva cara-ādiṣu gṛheṣu ca
english: The lords of the navamsha (ninth divisional chart) begin from the movable sign itself when the sign is movable. For fixed signs, they begin from its ninth house. For dual signs, they begin from its fifth house. This is how it should be understood by the discerning. Furthermore, deities, humans, and demons are associated with movable and other signs, respectively.

sanskrit: दशमांशाः स्वतश्चैजे युग्म तन्नवमात् स्मृताः । दश पूर्वादिदिक्पाला इन्द्राऽग्नियमराक्षसाः ॥१३॥
transliteration: daśamāṃśāḥ svataścaije yugma tannavamāt smṛtāḥ . daśa pūrvādidikpālā indrā'gniyamarākṣasāḥ.
separated_sandhi: daśamāṃśāḥ svataḥ ca ije yugme tat navamāt smṛtāḥdaśa pūrva-ādi-dikpālāḥ indra agni yama rākṣasāḥ
english: The Dashamamshas (tenth divisional chart) are considered to begin from the sign itself when the sign is odd. For even signs, they are considered to begin from its ninth house. The ten guardians of the directions (dikpālāḥ), starting from the east, are Indra, Agni, Yama, and Rakshasa (Nirṛti).

sanskrit: वरुणो मारुतश्चैव कुबेरेशानपद्मजाः । अनन्तश्च क्रमादीये समे वा व्युत्क्रमेण तु ॥१४॥
transliteration: varuṇo mārutaścaiva kubereśānapadmajāḥ . anantaśca kramādīye same vā vyutkrameṇa tu.
separated_sandhi: varuṇaḥ mārutaḥ ca eva kubera īśāna padmajāḥanantaḥ ca kramāt āye same vā vyutkrameṇa tu
english: Varuṇa, Maruta (Vāyu), Kubera, Īśāna, and Padmaja (Brahmā), and Ananta are the remaining (guardians). Their assignment is in regular order for odd signs, or in reverse order for even signs.

sanskrit: द्वादशांशस्य गणना तत्तत्क्षेत्राद्विनिर्दिशेत् । तेषामघीशाः क्रमशो गणेशाऽश्वियमाहयाः ॥१५॥
transliteration: dvādaśāṃśasya gaṇanā tattatkṣetrādvinirdiśet . teṣāmaghīśāḥ kramaśo gaṇeśā'śviyamāhayāḥ.
separated_sandhi: dvādaśāṃśasya gaṇanā tat-tat-kṣetrāt vinirdiśetteṣām adhīśāḥ kramaśaḥ gaṇeśāḥ aśvi yama āhayāḥ
english: The calculation of the Dvadashamsha (twelfth divisional chart) should be determined from its own respective sign. Their presiding deities, in sequence, are Gaṇeśa, the Aśvinī-kumāras, Yama, and others (indicated by the suffix 'āhayāḥ').

sanskrit: अजसिंहाऽश्वितो ज्ञेया षोडशांशाश्चरादिषु । अजविष्णू हरः सूर्ये ह्योजे युग्मे प्रतीपकम् ॥१६॥
transliteration: ajasiṃhā'śvito jñeyā ṣoḍaśāṃśāścarādiṣu . ajaviṣṇū haraḥ sūrye hyoje yugme pratīpakam.
separated_sandhi: aja-siṃha-aśvitas jñeyāḥ ṣoḍaśāṃśāḥ cara-ādiṣuaja-viṣṇū haraḥ sūrye hi oje yugme pratīpakam
english: The Shodashamshas (sixteenth divisional chart) for movable and other signs should be known (to start) from Aja (Brahmā), Siṃha (Viṣṇu), and the Aśvinī-kumāras, respectively. For odd signs, the rulers are Aja (Brahmā), Viṣṇu, Hara (Śiva), and Sūrya. For even signs, the order is indeed reversed.

sanskrit: अथ विंशतिभागानामधिपा ब्रह्मणोदिताः । क्रियाच्चरे स्थिरे चापान् मृगुन्द्राद् द्विस्वभावके ॥१७॥
transliteration: atha viṃśatibhāgānāmadhipā brahmaṇoditāḥ . kriyāccare sthire cāpān mṛgundrād dvisvabhāvake.
separated_sandhi: atha viṃśatibhāgānām adhipāḥ brahmaṇā uditāḥkriyāt care sthire ca apān mṛgundrāt dvisvabhāvake
english: Now, the lords of the twenty divisions (Vimshāmsha) have been declared by Brahmā (brahman). In movable signs, (the starting point is) from Aries (kriyā). In fixed signs, (it is) from water signs and from Leo (mṛgundra). In dual-natured signs...

sanskrit: काली गौरी लक्ष्मीविजया विमला सती । तारा ज्वालामुखी श्वेता ललिता बगलामुखी ॥१८॥
transliteration: kālī gaurī lakṣmīvijayā vimalā satī . tārā jvālāmukhī śvetā lalitā bagalāmukhī.
separated_sandhi: kālī gaurī lakṣmīvijayā vimalā satī tārājvālāmukhī śvetā lalitā bagalāmukhī
english: Kālī, Gaurī, Lakṣmī, Vijayā, Vimalā, Satī, Tārā, Jvālāmukhī, Śvetā, Lalitā, and Bagalāmukhī (these are names of divine feminine powers (śakti)).

sanskrit: प्रत्यङ्गिरा शची रौद्री भवानी वरदा जया । त्रिपुरा सुमुखी चेति विषमे परिचिन्तयेत् ॥१९॥
transliteration: pratyaṅgirā śacī raudrī bhavānī varadā jayā . tripurā sumukhī ceti viṣame paricintayet.
separated_sandhi: pratyaṅgirā śacī raudrī bhavānī varadā jayātripurā sumukhī ca iti viṣame paricintayet
english: Pratyaṅgirā, Śacī, Raudrī, Bhavānī, Varadā, Jayā, Tripurā, and Sumukhī (these are divine feminine powers (śakti)) – thus one should contemplate (these deities) in odd (signs or divisions).

sanskrit: समराशौ दया मेधा छिन्नशीर्षा पिशाचिनी । धूमावती च मातङ्गी बाला भद्रऽरुणानला ॥२०॥
transliteration: samarāśau dayā medhā chinnaśīrṣā piśācinī . dhūmāvatī ca mātaṅgī bālā bhadra'ruṇānalā.
separated_sandhi: samarāśau dayā medhā chinnaśīrṣā piśācinīdhūmāvatī ca mātaṅgī bālā bhadrā aruṇā analā
english: In even signs, (one should contemplate) Dayā, Medhā, Chinnaśīrṣā, Piśācinī, Dhūmāvatī, Mātaṅgī, Bālā, Bhadrā, Aruṇā, and Analā (these are divine feminine powers (śakti)).

sanskrit: पिङ्गला छुच्छुका घोरा वाराही वैष्णवी सिता । भुवनेशी भैरवी च मङ्गला ह्यपराजिता ॥२१॥
transliteration: piṅgalā chucchukā ghorā vārāhī vaiṣṇavī sitā . bhuvaneśī bhairavī ca maṅgalā hyaparājitā.
separated_sandhi: piṅgalā chucchukā ghorā vārāhī vaiṣṇavī sitābhuvaneśī bhairavī ca maṅgalā hi aparājitā
english: Piṅgalā, Chucchukā, Ghorā, Vārāhī, Vaiṣṇavī, Sitā, Bhuvaneśī, Bhairavī, Maṅgalā, and indeed Aparājitā (these are divine feminine powers (śakti)).

sanskrit: सिद्धांशकानामधिपाः सिंहादोजभगे ग्रहे । कर्कद्युग्मभगे खेटे स्कन्दः पर्शुधरोऽनलः ॥२२॥
transliteration: siddhāṃśakānāmadhipāḥ siṃhādojabhage grahe . karkadyugmabhage kheṭe skandaḥ parśudharo'nalaḥ.
separated_sandhi: siddhāṃśakānām adhipāḥ siṃhāt ojabhage grahekarkadyugmabhage kheṭe skandaḥ parśudharaḥ analaḥ
english: The lords of the Siddha-aṃśas are, starting from Leo for odd signs and Cancer for even signs, Skanda, Parashurama (the axe-bearer), and Agni (fire).

sanskrit: विश्वकर्मा भगो मित्रो मयोऽन्तकवृषध्वजाः । गोविन्दो मदनो भीमः सिंहादौ विषमे क्रमात् । कर्कादौ समभे भीमाद्विलोमेन विचिन्तयेत् ॥२३॥
transliteration: viśvakarmā bhago mitro mayo'ntakavṛṣadhvajāḥ . govindo madano bhīmaḥ siṃhādau viṣame kramāt . karkādau samabhe bhīmādvilomena vicintayet.
separated_sandhi: viśvakarmā bhagaḥ mitraḥ mayaḥantakavṛṣadhvajāḥ govindaḥ madanaḥbhīmaḥ siṃhādau viṣame kramāt karkādausamabhe bhīmāt vilomena vicintayet
english: Vishwakarma, Bhaga, Mitra, Maya, Antaka (Yama), and Vṛṣadhvaja (Shiva), Govinda (Vishnu), Madana (Kamadeva), and Bhima are the remaining lords. One should consider these sequentially from Leo for odd signs. For even signs, starting from Cancer, one should consider them in reverse order, beginning from Bhima.

sanskrit: भांशाधिपाः क्रमाद्दस्रयमवह्निपितामहाः । चन्द्रेशादितिजीवाहिपितरो भगसंज्ञिताः ॥२४॥
transliteration: bhāṃśādhipāḥ kramāddasrayamavahnipitāmahāḥ . candreśāditijīvāhipitaro bhagasaṃjñitāḥ.
separated_sandhi: bhāṃśādhipāḥ kramāt dasrayamavahnipitāmahāḥcandreśāditijīvāhipitaraḥ bhagasaṃjñitāḥ
english: The lords of the Bhāṃśas (divisional charts) are, in sequence: Dasra (Ashvinikumars), Yama, Vahni (Agni), Pitāmaha (Brahma); Chandra (Moon), Īśa (Shiva), Aditi, Jīva (Brihaspati), Ahi (Nāga), and Pitaraḥ (Ancestors); and those named Bhaga.

sanskrit: अर्यमार्कत्वष्ट्टमरुच्छक्राग्निमित्रवासवाः । निरृत्युदकविश्वेऽजगोविन्दो वसवोऽम्बुपः ॥२५॥
transliteration: aryamārkatvaṣṭṭamarucchakrāgnimitravāsavāḥ . nirṛtyudakaviśve'jagovindo vasavo'mbupaḥ.
separated_sandhi: aryamārkatvaṣṭṭamaruccakrāgnimitravāsavaḥnirṛtyudakaviśve ajagovindaḥ vasavaḥ ambupaḥ
english: ... and then Aryaman, Arka (Sun), Tvaṣṭṛ, Marut, Śakra (Indra), Agni, Mitra, the Vasus; Nirṛti, Udaka (Varuṇa), the Viśvedevas, Aja, Govinda (Vishnu); the Vasus again, and Ambupa (Varuṇa).

sanskrit: ततोऽजपादहिर्बुध्न्यः पूषा चैव प्रकीर्तिताः । नक्षत्रेशास्तु भांशेशा मेषादिचरभक्रमात् ॥२६॥
transliteration: tato'japādahirbudhnyaḥ pūṣā caiva prakīrtitāḥ . nakṣatreśāstu bhāṃśeśā meṣādicarabhakramāt.
separated_sandhi: tataḥ ajapādahirbudhnyaḥ pūṣā ca eva prakīrtitāḥnakṣatreśāḥ tu bhāṃśeśāḥ meṣādicarabhakramāt
english: Thereafter, Ajapāda, Ahirbudhnya, and Pūṣan are also proclaimed (as lords). Indeed, the lords of the Nakshatras are the lords of the Bhāṃśas, [reckoned] in sequence from Aries, considering the movable signs.

sanskrit: त्रिंशांशेशाश्च विषमे कुजर्कीज्यज्ञभार्गवाः । पंचपंचाष्टसप्ताक्षभागानां व्यत्ययात् समे ॥२७॥
transliteration: triṃśāṃśeśāśca viṣame kujarkījyajñabhārgavāḥ . paṃcapaṃcāṣṭasaptākṣabhāgānāṃ vyatyayāt same.
separated_sandhi: triṃśāṃśeśāḥ ca viṣame kujarkījñabhārgavāḥpañcapañcāṣṭasaptākṣabhāgānām vyatyayāt same
english: In odd signs, the lords of the thirtieth parts (triṃśāṃśa) are Mars, Saturn, Jupiter, Mercury, and Venus, with their respective portions being five, five, eight, seven, and five degrees. In even signs, these portions are assigned in the reverse order.

sanskrit: वह्निः समीरशक्रौ च धनदो जलदस्तथा । विषमेषु क्रमाज्ज्ञेयाः समराशौ विपर्ययात् ॥२८॥
transliteration: vahniḥ samīraśakrau ca dhanado jaladastathā . viṣameṣu kramājjñeyāḥ samarāśau viparyayāt.
separated_sandhi: vahniḥ samīraśakrau ca dhanadaḥ jaladaḥ tathāviṣameṣu kramāt jñeyāḥ samarāśau viparyayāt
english: Agni, Vayu, and Indra, along with Kubera and Varuna (Jala), are to be understood sequentially in odd signs, and in reverse order in even signs.

sanskrit: चत्वारिंशद्विभागानामधिपा विषमे क्रियात् । समभे तुलतो ज्ञेयाः स्वस्वाधिपसमन्विताः ॥२९॥
transliteration: catvāriṃśadvibhāgānāmadhipā viṣame kriyāt . samabhe tulato jñeyāḥ svasvādhipasamanvitāḥ.
separated_sandhi: catvāriṃśat vibhāgānām adhipāḥ viṣame kriyātsamabhe tulataḥ jñeyāḥ svasvādhipasamanvitāḥ
english: The lords of the fortieth divisions (catvāriṃśāṃśa) in odd signs are to be known starting from Aries. In even signs, they are to be known starting from Libra, and these lords are associated with their respective sign lords.

sanskrit: विष्णुश्चन्द्रो मरीचिश्च त्वष्टा धाता शिवो रविः । यमो यक्षश्च गन्धर्वः कालो वरुण एव च ॥३०॥
transliteration: viṣṇuścandro marīciśca tvaṣṭā dhātā śivo raviḥ . yamo yakṣaśca gandharvaḥ kālo varuṇa eva ca.
separated_sandhi: viṣṇuḥ candraḥ marīciḥ ca tvaṣṭā dhātā śivaḥ raviḥyamaḥ yakṣaḥ ca gandharvaḥ kālaḥ varuṇaḥ eva ca
english: Vishnu, Chandra (Moon), Marichi, Tvashta, Dhata, Shiva, Ravi (Sun), Yama, Yaksha, Gandharva, Kala (Time), and Varuna - these are also (some of the lords).

sanskrit: तथाक्षवेदभागानामधिपाश्चरभे क्रियात् । स्थिरे सिंहाद् द्विभेचापात् विधीशविष्णवश्चरे ॥३१॥
transliteration: tathākṣavedabhāgānāmadhipāścarabhe kriyāt . sthire siṃhād dvibhecāpāt vidhīśaviṣṇavaścare.
separated_sandhi: tathā akṣavedabhāgānām adhipāḥ carabhe kriyātsthire siṃhāt dvibhe cāpāt vidhīśaviṣṇavaścare
english: Similarly, the lords of the nine-part divisions (navamāṃśa) in movable signs begin from Aries, in fixed signs from Leo, and in dual signs from Sagittarius. Brahma, Shiva, and Vishnu are the presiding deities (for these divisions).

sanskrit: ईशाच्युतसुरज्येष्ठा विष्णुकेशाः स्थिरे द्विभे । देवाः पंचदशावृत्त्या विज्ञेया द्विजसत्तम ॥३२॥
transliteration: īśācyutasurajyeṣṭhā viṣṇukeśāḥ sthire dvibhe . devāḥ paṃcadaśāvṛttyā vijñeyā dvijasattama.
separated_sandhi: īśācyutasurajyeṣṭhā viṣṇukeśāḥ sthire dvibhedevāḥ paṃcadaśa āvṛttyā vijñeyā dvijasattama
english: O best of the twice-born (dvija), Īśa (Shiva), Acyuta (Vishnu), Surajyeṣṭha (Brahma), Viṣṇu, and Keśa (Krishna) are the deities for the fixed and dual signs. The fifteen deities should be understood through their rotational application.

sanskrit: राशीन् विहाय खेटस्य द्विघ्नमंशाद्यमर्कहृत् । शेषं सैकं तद्राशेर्भपाः षष्ट्यंशापाः स्मृताः ॥३३॥
transliteration: rāśīn vihāya kheṭasya dvighnamaṃśādyamarkahṛt . śeṣaṃ saikaṃ tadrāśerbhapāḥ ṣaṣṭyaṃśāpāḥ smṛtāḥ.
separated_sandhi: rāśīn vihāya kheṭasya dvighnam aṃśādyam arkahṛtśeṣam saikam tat rāśeḥ bhapāḥ ṣaṣṭyaṃśāpāḥ smṛtāḥ
english: Ignoring the zodiacal signs (rāśi), double the planet's degrees and other divisions (such as minutes and seconds), then divide the result by twelve. The remainder, increased by one, indicates the sign whose ruler (bhapā) is designated as the lord of the Shashtiamsha.

sanskrit: घोरश्च राक्षशो देवः कुबेरो यक्षकिन्नरौ । भ्रष्टः कुलघ्नो गरलो वह्निर्माया पुरीषकः ॥३४॥
transliteration: ghoraśca rākṣaśo devaḥ kubero yakṣakinnarau . bhraṣṭaḥ kulaghno garalo vahnirmāyā purīṣakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: ghoraḥ ca rākṣasaḥ devaḥ kuberaḥ yakṣakinnaraubhraṣṭaḥ kulaghnaḥ garalaḥ vahniḥ māyā purīṣakaḥ
english: Ghora, Rakshasa, Deva, Kubera, Yaksha, Kinnara, Bhrashta, Kulaghna, Garala, Vahni, Māyā (māyā), and Purishaka [are among the deities].

sanskrit: अपाम्पतिर्मरुत्वांश्च कालः सर्पामृतेन्दुकाः । मृदुः कोमलहेरम्बब्रह्मविष्णुमहेश्वराः ॥३५॥
transliteration: apāmpatirmarutvāṃśca kālaḥ sarpāmṛtendukāḥ . mṛduḥ komalaherambabrahmaviṣṇumaheśvarāḥ.
separated_sandhi: apām patiḥ marutvān ca kālaḥ sarpāmṛtendukāḥmṛduḥ komala herambabrahma viṣṇumaheśvarāḥ
english: Apampati (Varuna), Marutvan (Indra), Kala, Sarpa, Amrita, Induka, Mridu, Komala, Heramba (Ganesha), Brahma, Vishnu, and Maheśvara (Shiva) [are also among the deities].

sanskrit: देवार्द्रौ कलिनाशश्च क्षितीशकमलाकरौ । गुलिको मृत्युकालश्च दावाग्निर्घोरसंज्ञकः ॥३६॥
transliteration: devārdrau kalināśaśca kṣitīśakamalākarau . guliko mṛtyukālaśca dāvāgnirghorasaṃjñakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: devārdrau kalināśaḥ ca kṣitīśakamalākaraugulikaḥ mṛtyukālaḥ ca dāvāgniḥ ghorasaṃjñakaḥ
english: Deva, Ardra, Kalinasha, Kshitisha, Kamalākara, Gulika, Mrityukala, Davagni, and Ghorasaṃjñaka (the one named Ghora) [are also among the deities].

sanskrit: यमश्च कण्टकसुधाऽमृतौ पूर्णनिशाकरः । विषदग्धकुलान्तश्च मुख्यो वंशक्षयस्तथा ॥३७॥
transliteration: yamaśca kaṇṭakasudhā'mṛtau pūrṇaniśākaraḥ . viṣadagdhakulāntaśca mukhyo vaṃśakṣayastathā.
separated_sandhi: yamaḥ ca kaṇṭakasudhāmṛtau pūrṇaniśākaraḥviṣadagdhakulāntaḥ ca mukhyaḥ vaṃśakṣayaḥ tathā
english: Yama (the controller of death), Kaṇṭakasudhāmṛta (a compound name meaning thorn, nectar, and immortality), Pūrṇaniśākara (the full moon), Viṣadagdhakulānta (the ending of a family scorched by poison), Mukhya (the chief), and Vaṃśakṣaya (the destruction of lineage) – these are similarly (names of specific sixty-parts).

sanskrit: उत्पातकालसौम्याख्याः कोमलः शीतलाभिधः । करालदंष्ट्रचन्द्रास्यौ प्रवीणः कालपावकः ॥३८॥
transliteration: utpātakālasaumyākhyāḥ komalaḥ śītalābhidhaḥ . karāladaṃṣṭracandrāsyau pravīṇaḥ kālapāvakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: utpātakālasaumyākhyāḥ komalaḥ śītalābhidhaḥkarāladaṃṣṭracandrāsyau pravīṇaḥ kālapāvakaḥ
english: Utpāta (calamity), Kāla (time), and Saumya (benevolent) are the named (sixty-parts). Komala (delicate), Śītala (cool), Karāladaṃṣṭracandrāsya (the dreadful-fanged and moon-faced pair), Pravīṇa (skilled), and Kālapāvaka (the fire of time or death) (are also names).

sanskrit: दण्डभृन्निर्मलः सौम्यः क्रूरोऽतिशीतलोऽमृतः । पयोधिभ्रमणाख्यौ च चन्द्ररेखा त्वयुग्मपाः ॥३९॥
transliteration: daṇḍabhṛnnirmalaḥ saumyaḥ krūro'tiśītalo'mṛtaḥ . payodhibhramaṇākhyau ca candrarekhā tvayugmapāḥ.
separated_sandhi: daṇḍabhṛt nirmalaḥ saumyaḥ krūraḥ atiśītalaḥ amṛtaḥpayodhibhramaṇākhyau ca candrarekhā tu ayugmapāḥ
english: Daṇḍabhṛt (the staff-bearer), Nirmala (the pure), Saumya (the benevolent), Krūra (the cruel), Atiśītala (the very cool), and Amṛta (the immortal) (are names). And the two named Payodhibhramaṇa (ocean-wanderer) and Candrarekhā (moon-line) (are also names). Indeed, there are also Ayugmapā (those with odd divisions).

sanskrit: समे भे व्यत्ययाज्ज्ञेयाः षष्ट्यंशेशाः प्रकीर्तिताः । षष्ट्यांशस्वामिनस्त्वोजे तदीशादव्यत्पयः समे ॥४०॥
transliteration: same bhe vyatyayājjñeyāḥ ṣaṣṭyaṃśeśāḥ prakīrtitāḥ . ṣaṣṭyāṃśasvāminastvoje tadīśādavyatpayaḥ same.
separated_sandhi: same bhe vyatyayāt jñeyāḥ ṣaṣṭyaṃśeśāḥ prakīrtitāḥṣaṣṭyāṃśasvāminaḥ tu oje tat īśāt avyatyayaḥ same
english: In even signs, the lords of the sixty-parts (ṣaṣṭyaṃśa) are declared to be known by reversal. However, in odd signs, the lords of the sixty-parts are (determined) from the lord of that (odd) sign, not by reversal (as in) even (signs).

sanskrit: शुभषष्टयंशसंयुक्ता ग्रहाः शुभफलप्रदाः । क्रूरषष्ट्यंशासंयुक्ता नाशयन्ति खचारिणः ॥४१॥
transliteration: śubhaṣaṣṭayaṃśasaṃyuktā grahāḥ śubhaphalapradāḥ . krūraṣaṣṭyaṃśāsaṃyuktā nāśayanti khacāriṇaḥ.
separated_sandhi: śubhaṣaṣṭyaṃśasaṃyuktāḥ grahāḥ śubhaphala-pradāḥkrūraṣaṣṭyaṃśasaṃyuktāḥ nāśayanti khacāriṇaḥ
english: Planets joined with auspicious sixty-parts (ṣaṣṭyaṃśa) bestow auspicious results. (Conversely,) planets joined with inauspicious sixty-parts destroy (their indications or effects).

sanskrit: वर्गभेदानहं वक्ष्ये मैत्रेय त्वं विधारय । षड्वर्गाः सप्तवर्गाश्च दिग्वर्गा नृपवर्गकाः ॥४२॥
transliteration: vargabhedānahaṃ vakṣye maitreya tvaṃ vidhāraya . ṣaḍvargāḥ saptavargāśca digvargā nṛpavargakāḥ.
separated_sandhi: vargabhedān aham vakṣye maitreya tvam vidhārayaṣaḍvargāḥ saptavargāḥ ca digvargāḥ nṛpavargakāḥ
english: O Maitreya, I will now explain the various types of divisional charts (vargas); please understand them clearly. These include the six-fold divisions (ṣaḍvargāḥ), the seven-fold divisions (saptavargāḥ), the ten-fold divisions (digvargāḥ), and the royal divisions (nṛpavargakāḥ).

sanskrit: भवन्ति वर्गसंयोगे षडवर्गे किंशुकादयः । द्वाभ्यां किंशुकनामा च त्रिभिर्व्यञ्जनमुच्यते ॥४३॥
transliteration: bhavanti vargasaṃyoge ṣaḍavarge kiṃśukādayaḥ . dvābhyāṃ kiṃśukanāmā ca tribhirvyañjanamucyate.
separated_sandhi: bhavanti vargasaṃyoge ṣaḍvarge kiṃśukādayaḥdvābhyām kiṃśukanāmā ca tribhiḥ vyañjanam ucyate
english: In the combination of divisional charts (vargas) within the six-fold system (ṣaḍvarga), classifications like "kiṃśuka" and others arise. By the combination of two, it is named "kiṃśuka"; and by three, it is called "vyañjana".

sanskrit: चतुर्भिश्चामराख्यं च छत्रं पञ्चभिरेव च । षड्भिः कुण्डलयोगः स्यान्मुकुटाख्यं च सप्तभिः ॥४४॥
transliteration: caturbhiścāmarākhyaṃ ca chatraṃ pañcabhireva ca . ṣaḍbhiḥ kuṇḍalayogaḥ syānmukuṭākhyaṃ ca saptabhiḥ.
separated_sandhi: caturbhiḥ cāmarākhyam ca chatram pañcabhiḥ eva caṣaḍbhiḥ kuṇḍalayogaḥ syāt mukuṭākhyam ca saptabhiḥ
english: By four (vargas), it is called "cāmara"; and by five, it is indeed "chatra". By six, it becomes "kuṇḍalayoga"; and by seven, it is named "mukuṭa".

sanskrit: सप्तवर्गेऽथ दिग्वर्गे पारिजातादिसंज्ञकाः । पारिजातं भवेद्द्वाभ्यामुत्तमं त्रिभिरुच्यते ॥४५॥
transliteration: saptavarge'tha digvarge pārijātādisaṃjñakāḥ . pārijātaṃ bhaveddvābhyāmuttamaṃ tribhirucyate.
separated_sandhi: saptavarge atha digvarge pārijātādisaṃjñakāḥpārijātam bhavet dvābhyām uttamam tribhiḥ ucyate
english: Now, in the seven-fold divisions (saptavarga) and the ten-fold divisions (digvarga), designations like "pārijāta" and so on are used. By the combination of two, it becomes "pārijāta"; and by three, it is called "uttama".

sanskrit: चतुर्भिर्गोपुराख्यं स्याच्छरौः सिंहासनं तथा । पारावतं भवेत् षड्भिर्देवलोकं च सप्तभिः ॥४६॥
transliteration: caturbhirgopurākhyaṃ syāccharauḥ siṃhāsanaṃ tathā . pārāvataṃ bhavet ṣaḍbhirdevalokaṃ ca saptabhiḥ.
separated_sandhi: caturbhiḥ gopurākhyam syāt śaraiḥ siṃhāsanam tathāpārāvatam bhavet ṣaḍbhiḥ devalokam ca saptabhiḥ
english: By four (vargas), it becomes "gopura"; and similarly, by five (indicated by "śaraiḥ", arrows), it is "siṃhāsana". By six, it becomes "pārāvata"; and by seven, it is "devaloka".

sanskrit: वसुभिर्ब्रह्मलोकाख्यं नवभिः शक्रवाहनम् । दिग्भिः श्रीधामयोगः स्यादथ षोडशवर्गके ॥४७॥
transliteration: vasubhirbrahmalokākhyaṃ navabhiḥ śakravāhanam . digbhiḥ śrīdhāmayogaḥ syādatha ṣoḍaśavargake.
separated_sandhi: vasubhiḥ brahmalokākhyam navabhiḥ śakravāhanamdigbhiḥ śrīdhāmayogaḥ syāt atha ṣoḍaśavargake
english: Now, concerning the sixteenth varga (chart): The division indicated by the eight Vasus (eighth division) is called Brahmaloka. The division indicated by the number nine (ninth division) is Śakravāhana. The division indicated by the ten directions (tenth division) is Śrīdhāmayoga.

sanskrit: भेदकं च भवेद्द्वाभ्यां त्रिभिः स्यात् कुमुमाख्यकम् । चतुर्भिर्नागपुष्पं स्यात् पंचभिः कन्दुकाह्वयम् ॥४८॥
transliteration: bhedakaṃ ca bhaveddvābhyāṃ tribhiḥ syāt kumumākhyakam . caturbhirnāgapuṣpaṃ syāt paṃcabhiḥ kandukāhvayam.
separated_sandhi: bhedakam ca bhavet dvābhyām tribhiḥ syāt kumumākhyakamcaturbhiḥ nāgapuṣpam syāt pañcabhiḥ kandukāhvayam
english: And the second (division) becomes Bhedaka, the third is Kumuma. The fourth becomes Nāgapuṣpa, and the fifth is called Kanduka.

sanskrit: केरलाख्यं भवेत् षड्भिः सप्तभिः कल्पवृक्षकम् । अष्टभिश्चन्दनवं नवभिः पूर्णचन्द्रकम् ॥४९॥
transliteration: keralākhyaṃ bhavet ṣaḍbhiḥ saptabhiḥ kalpavṛkṣakam . aṣṭabhiścandanavaṃ navabhiḥ pūrṇacandrakam.
separated_sandhi: keralākhyam bhavet ṣaḍbhiḥ saptabhiḥ kalpavṛkṣakamaṣṭabhiḥ candravanam navabhiḥ pūrṇacandrakam
english: The sixth (division) becomes named Kerala, the seventh (becomes) Kalpavṛkṣaka. The eighth (becomes) Candravana, and the ninth (becomes) Pūrṇacandraka.

sanskrit: दिग्भिरुच्चैःश्रवा नाम रुद्रैर्धन्वन्तरिर्भवेत् । सूर्यकान्तं भवेद् सूर्यैर्विश्वैः स्याद्विद्रुमाख्यकम् ॥५०॥
transliteration: digbhiruccaiḥśravā nāma rudrairdhanvantarirbhavet . sūryakāntaṃ bhaved sūryairviśvaiḥ syādvidrumākhyakam.
separated_sandhi: digbhiḥ uccaiḥśravā nāma rudraiḥ dhanvantariḥ bhavetsūryakāntam bhavet sūryaiḥ viśvaiḥ syāt vidrumākhyakam
english: The tenth (division, indicated by the directions) is named Uccaiḥśravas. The eleventh (indicated by the Rudras) becomes Dhanvantari. The twelfth (indicated by the Suns) becomes Sūryakānta, and the thirteenth (indicated by the Viśvedevas) is Vidrumākhyaka.

sanskrit: शक्रसिंहासनं शक्रैर्गोलोकं तिथिभिर्भवेत् । भूपैः स्रीवल्लभाख्यं स्याद्वर्गा भेदैरुदाहृताः ॥५१॥
transliteration: śakrasiṃhāsanaṃ śakrairgolokaṃ tithibhirbhavet . bhūpaiḥ srīvallabhākhyaṃ syādvargā bhedairudāhṛtāḥ.
separated_sandhi: śakrasiṃhāsanam śakraiḥ golokam tithibhiḥ bhavetbhūpaiḥ strīvallabhākhyam syāt vargā bhedaiḥ udāhṛtāḥ
english: The fourteenth (division, indicated by the Śakras) is Śakrasiṃhāsana. The fifteenth (indicated by the Tithis) becomes Goloka. The sixteenth (indicated by the kings) is named Strīvallabha. Thus, these divisions have been enumerated by their distinctions.

sanskrit: स्वोच्चमूलत्रिकोणस्वभवनाधिपतेः शुभाः । स्वारुढात् केन्द्रनाथानां वर्गा ग्राह्याः सुधीमता ॥५२॥
transliteration: svoccamūlatrikoṇasvabhavanādhipateḥ śubhāḥ . svāruḍhāt kendranāthānāṃ vargā grāhyāḥ sudhīmatā.
separated_sandhi: svoccamūlatrikoṇasvabhavanādhipateḥ śubhāḥsvāruḍhāt kendranāthānām vargāḥ grāhyāḥ sudhīmatā
english: The wise should consider the auspicious divisional charts (vargas) belonging to the lords of a planet's exaltation sign, mūlatrikoṇa sign, and own sign, as well as those of the lords of the quadrants (kendras) reckoned from the Aruḍha lagna.

sanskrit: अस्तंगता ग्रहजिता नीचगा दुर्बलाश्च ये । शयनादिगतास्तेभ्य उत्पन्ना योगनाशकाः ॥५३॥
transliteration: astaṃgatā grahajitā nīcagā durbalāśca ye . śayanādigatāstebhya utpannā yoganāśakāḥ.
separated_sandhi: astaṃgatāḥ grahajitāḥ nīcagāḥ durbalāḥ ca yeśayanādigatāḥ tebhyaḥ utpannāḥ yoganāśakāḥ
english: Those planets that are combust (astaṃgatāḥ), defeated in planetary war (grahajitāḥ), debilitated (nīcagāḥ), or weak (durbalāḥ), and also those found in states such as "śayana" (lying down) – the planetary combinations (yogas) formed by such planets become destroyers of those (beneficial) yogas.

sanskrit: अथ षोडशवर्गेषु विवेकं च वदाम्यहम् । लग्ने देहस्य विज्ञानं होरायां सम्पदादिकम् ॥१॥
transliteration: atha ṣoḍaśavargeṣu vivekaṃ ca vadāmyaham . lagne dehasya vijñānaṃ horāyāṃ sampadādikam.
separated_sandhi: atha ṣoḍaśavargeṣu vivekam ca vadāmi ahamlagne dehasya vijñānam horāyām sampadādikam
english: Now I shall explain the distinction (viveka) concerning the sixteen divisional charts (vargas). In the Lagna chart, the knowledge (vijñāna) of the body is ascertained; in the Hora (D2) chart, wealth (sampad) and similar matters are considered.

sanskrit: द्रेष्काणे भ्रातृजं सौख्यं तुर्यांशे भाग्यचिन्तनम् । पुत्रपौत्रादिकानां चै चिन्तनं सप्तमांशके ॥२॥
transliteration: dreṣkāṇe bhrātṛjaṃ saukhyaṃ turyāṃśe bhāgyacintanam . putrapautrādikānāṃ cai cintanaṃ saptamāṃśake.
separated_sandhi: dreṣkāṇe bhrātṛjam saukhyam turyāṃśe bhāgyacintanamputrapautrādikānām ca eva cintanam saptamāṃśake
english: Happiness related to siblings is seen in the Dreṣkāṇa (D3) chart; matters of fortune (bhāgya) are considered in the Turīyāṃśa (D4) chart. And indeed, the consideration of children (putra), grandchildren (pautra), and so on, is done in the Saptamāṃśa (D7) chart.

sanskrit: नवमांशे कलत्राणां दशमांशे महत्फलम् । द्वादशांशे तथा पित्रोश्चिन्तनं षोडशांशके ॥३॥
transliteration: navamāṃśe kalatrāṇāṃ daśamāṃśe mahatphalam . dvādaśāṃśe tathā pitrościntanaṃ ṣoḍaśāṃśake.
separated_sandhi: navamāṃśe kalatrāṇām daśamāṃśe mahat phalamdvādaśāṃśe tathā pitroḥ cintanam ṣoḍaśāṃśake
english: Matters of spouses (kalatra) are considered in the Navamāṃśa (D9) chart; in the Daśamāṃśa (D10) chart, great results (mahat phala) are observed. Similarly (tathā), the consideration of parents (pitṛ) is done in the Dvādaśāṃśa (D12) chart, and also those pertaining to the Ṣoḍaśāṃśa (D16) chart.

sanskrit: सुखाऽसुखस्य विज्ञानं वाहनानां तथैव च । उपासनाया विज्ञानं साध्यं विंशतिभागके ॥४॥
transliteration: sukhā'sukhasya vijñānaṃ vāhanānāṃ tathaiva ca . upāsanāyā vijñānaṃ sādhyaṃ viṃśatibhāgake.
separated_sandhi: sukha-asukhasya vijñānam vāhanānām tatha evaca upāsanāyāḥ vijñānam sādhyam viṃśatibhāgake
english: The knowledge of happiness and unhappiness, and similarly, the knowledge of conveyances and worship (upāsanā), should be ascertained from the Vimśāmśa (the twentyfold divisional chart).

sanskrit: विद्याया वेदबाह्वंशे भांशे चैव बलाऽबलम् । त्रिंशांशके रिष्टफलं खवेदांशे शुभाऽशुभम् ॥५॥
transliteration: vidyāyā vedabāhvaṃśe bhāṃśe caiva balā'balam . triṃśāṃśake riṣṭaphalaṃ khavedāṃśe śubhā'śubham.
separated_sandhi: vidyāyāḥ vedabāhvaṃśe bhāṃśe ca eva bala-abalamtriṃśāṃśake riṣṭaphalam khavedāṃśe śubha-aśubham
english: The knowledge of learning should be ascertained from the Caturvimśāmśa (D-24 chart). Strength and weakness (of planets) are to be seen in the Navāmśa (D-9 chart). The effects of misfortunes are to be seen in the Triṃśāmśa (D-30 chart), and auspicious and inauspicious results in the Khavedāṃśa (D-40 chart).

sanskrit: अक्षवेदांशके चैव षष्ट्यंशेऽखिलमीक्षयेत् । यत्र कुत्रापि सम्प्राप्तः क्रूरषष्ट्यंशकाधिपः ॥६॥
transliteration: akṣavedāṃśake caiva ṣaṣṭyaṃśe'khilamīkṣayet . yatra kutrāpi samprāptaḥ krūraṣaṣṭyaṃśakādhipaḥ.
separated_sandhi: akṣavedāṃśake ca eva ṣaṣṭyaṃśe akhilam īkṣayetyatra kutrāpi samprāptaḥ krūraṣaṣṭyaṃśakādhipaḥ
english: One should examine everything from the Akṣavedāṃśa (D-48 chart) and indeed from the Ṣaṣṭyāmśa (D-60 chart). Wherever the lord of a cruel Ṣaṣṭyāmśa (a harmful sixtieth division) is situated...

sanskrit: तत्र नाशो न सन्दे हो गर्गादीनां वचो यथा । यत्र कुत्रापि सम्प्राप्तः कलांशाधिपतिः शुभः ॥७॥
transliteration: tatra nāśo na sande ho gargādīnāṃ vaco yathā . yatra kutrāpi samprāptaḥ kalāṃśādhipatiḥ śubhaḥ.
separated_sandhi: tatra nāśaḥ na sandehaḥ gargādīnām vacaḥ yathāyatra kutrāpi samprāptaḥ kalāṃśādhipatiḥ śubhaḥ
english: In that situation (where a cruel Ṣaṣṭyāmśa lord is located), there is certainly destruction; there is no doubt, just as per the teachings of Garga and other sages. Wherever an auspicious divisional lord (kalāṃśādhipati) is found...

sanskrit: तत्र वृद्धिश्च पुष्टिश्च गर्गादिनां वचो यथा । इति षोडशवर्गाणां भेदास्ते प्रतिपादिताः ॥८॥
transliteration: tatra vṛddhiśca puṣṭiśca gargādināṃ vaco yathā . iti ṣoḍaśavargāṇāṃ bhedāste pratipāditāḥ.
separated_sandhi: tatra vṛddhiḥ ca puṣṭiḥ ca gargādīnām vacaḥyathā iti ṣoḍaśavargāṇām bhedāḥ te pratipāditāḥ
english: In that situation (where an auspicious divisional lord is found), there is growth and prosperity, just as per the teachings of Garga and other sages. Thus, these distinctions of the sixteen vargas (divisional charts) have been explained.

sanskrit: उदयादिषु भावेषु खेटस्य भवनेषु वा । वर्गविंशोपकं वीक्ष्य ज्ञेयं तेषां शुभाऽशुभम् ॥९॥
transliteration: udayādiṣu bhāveṣu kheṭasya bhavaneṣu vā . vargaviṃśopakaṃ vīkṣya jñeyaṃ teṣāṃ śubhā'śubham.
separated_sandhi: udayādiṣu bhāveṣu kheṭasya bhavaneṣu vāvargaviṃśopakaṃ vīkṣya jñeyaṃ teṣāṃ śubhāśubham
english: By observing the vargaviṃśopaka (divisional strength) of a planet, whether it is positioned in the ascendant (lagna) and other houses or in its own specific signs, one should understand its auspicious and inauspicious effects.

sanskrit: अथातः सम्प्रवक्ष्यामि वर्गविंशोपकं बलम् । यस्य विज्ञानमार्तेण विपाकं दृष्टिगोचरम् ॥१०॥
transliteration: athātaḥ sampravakṣyāmi vargaviṃśopakaṃ balam . yasya vijñānamārteṇa vipākaṃ dṛṣṭigocaram.
separated_sandhi: athātaḥ sampravakṣyāmi vargaviṃśopakaṃ balamyasya vijñānam ārteṇa vipākaṃ dṛṣṭigocaram
english: Now, I will fully explain the vargaviṃśopaka (divisional) strength, the knowledge of which makes the results (vipāka) directly discernible, even for those who are distressed.

sanskrit: गृहविंशोपकं वीक्ष्यं सूर्यादीनां खचारिणाम् । स्वगृहोच्चे बलं पूर्णं शून्यं तत्सप्तमस्थिते ॥११॥
transliteration: gṛhaviṃśopakaṃ vīkṣyaṃ sūryādīnāṃ khacāriṇām . svagṛhocce balaṃ pūrṇaṃ śūnyaṃ tatsaptamasthite.
separated_sandhi: gṛhaviṃśopakaṃ vīkṣyaṃ sūryādīnāṃ khacāriṇāmsvagṛhocce balam pūrṇaṃ śūnyaṃ tat saptamasthite
english: One should examine the gṛhaviṃśopaka (house strength) of the Sun and other planets. A planet has full strength when it is in its own sign or exaltation sign. It has zero strength when it is in the seventh sign from that position (its debilitation sign or sign opposite to its own).

sanskrit: ग्रहस्थितिवशाज्ज्ञेयं द्विराश्यधिपतिस्तथा । मध्येऽनुपाततो ज्ञेयं ओजयुग्मर्क्षभेदतः ॥१२॥
transliteration: grahasthitivaśājjñeyaṃ dvirāśyadhipatistathā . madhye'nupātato jñeyaṃ ojayugmarkṣabhedataḥ.
separated_sandhi: grahasthitivāt jñeyaṃ dvirāśyadhipatiḥ tathāmadhye anupātataḥ jñeyaṃ ojayugmarkṣabhedataḥ
english: The strength (of a planet) should be determined based on its position, and similarly, for the lord of two signs. The strength (in intermediate positions) should be known by interpolation, considering the distinction between odd and even signs.

sanskrit: सूर्यहोराफलं दद्युर्जीवार्कवसुधात्मजाः । चन्द्रास्फुजिदर्कपुत्राश्चन्द्रहोराफलप्रदाः ॥१३॥
transliteration: sūryahorāphalaṃ dadyurjīvārkavasudhātmajāḥ . candrāsphujidarkaputrāścandrahorāphalapradāḥ.
separated_sandhi: sūryahorāphalaṃ dadyuḥ jīvārkavasudhātmajāḥcandrāsphujidarkaputrāḥ candrahorāphalapradāḥ
english: Jupiter, the Sun, and Mars grant the results (phala) of the Sun's hora. The Moon, Venus, and Saturn bestow the results (phala) of the Moon's hora.

sanskrit: फलद्वयं बुधो दद्यात् समे चान्द्रं तदन्यके । रवेः फलं स्वहोरादौ फलहीनं विरामके ॥१४॥
transliteration: phaladvayaṃ budho dadyāt same cāndraṃ tadanyake . raveḥ phalaṃ svahorādau phalahīnaṃ virāmake.
separated_sandhi: phala-dvayam budhaḥ dadyāt same cāndram tat-anyakeraveḥ phalam sva-horā-ādau phala-hīnam virāmake
english: Mercury (budha) bestows two types of results. In even signs, it yields the result of the Moon, while in other (odd) signs, it gives its own result. In its own hora division, it produces the result of the Sun, and it is devoid of results during a cessation (virāmaka).

sanskrit: मध्येऽनुपातात् सर्वत्र द्रेष्काणेऽपि विचिन्तयेत् । गृहवत् तुर्यभागेपि नवांशादावपि स्वयम् ॥१५॥
transliteration: madhye'nupātāt sarvatra dreṣkāṇe'pi vicintayet . gṛhavat turyabhāgepi navāṃśādāvapi svayam.
separated_sandhi: madhye anupātāt sarvatra dreṣkāṇe api vicintayetgṛhavat turya-bhāge api navāṃśa-ādau api svayam
english: One should similarly consider this everywhere, by proportion, in the middle parts (madhye anupātāt), and also in the Drekkaṇa (dreṣkāṇa). This applies to the Chaturthāṃśa (turya-bhāga) as well, just like a whole sign (gṛhavat), and similarly in the Navāṃśa (navāṃśa) and other such divisions.

sanskrit: सूर्यः कुजफलं धत्ते भार्गवस्य निशापतिः । त्रिंशांशके विचिन्त्यौवमत्रापि गृहवत् स्मृतम् ॥१६॥
transliteration: sūryaḥ kujaphalaṃ dhatte bhārgavasya niśāpatiḥ . triṃśāṃśake vicintyauvamatrāpi gṛhavat smṛtam.
separated_sandhi: sūryaḥ kuja-phalam dhatte bhārgavasya niśā-patiḥtriṃśāṃśake vicintya eva atra api gṛhavat smṛtam
english: The Sun bestows the result of Mars (kuja), and the Moon (niśāpati) bestows the result of Venus (bhārgava). This principle should be considered similarly in the Triṃśāṃśa (triṃśāṃśaka) as well, where it is regarded just like a full sign (gṛhavat).

sanskrit: लग्नहोरादृकाणांकभागसूर्यका इति । त्रिंशांशकश्च षड्वर्गा अत्र विंशोपकाः क्रमात् ॥१७॥
transliteration: lagnahorādṛkāṇāṃkabhāgasūryakā iti . triṃśāṃśakaśca ṣaḍvargā atra viṃśopakāḥ kramāt.
separated_sandhi: lagna-horā-dṛkāṇa-aṅka-bhāga-sūryakā ititriṃśāṃśakaḥ ca ṣaḍ-vargāḥ atra viṃśopakāḥ kramāt
english: The divisions (vargas) are Lagna, Hora (D2), Drekkaṇa (D3), Navāṃśa (D9, implied by aṅka-bhāga), Dvādaśāṃśa (D12, implied by sūryakā), and Triṃśāṃśaka (D30). These are the six (ṣaḍvarga) divisions. The Viṃśopaka (viṃśopaka) values for them are given here in sequential order.

sanskrit: रमनेत्राबिधपंचाश्विभूमयः सप्तवर्गके । ससप्तमांशके तत्र विश्वकाः पंच लोचनम् ॥१८॥
transliteration: ramanetrābidhapaṃcāśvibhūmayaḥ saptavargake . sasaptamāṃśake tatra viśvakāḥ paṃca locanam.
separated_sandhi: rama-netra-abidha-pañca-aśvi-bhūmayaḥ sapta-vargakesa-saptamāṃśake tatra viśvakāḥ pañca locanam
english: The Viṃśopaka points for Lagna, Hora, Drekkaṇa, Navāṃśa (aṅka-bhāga), Dvādaśāṃśa (sūryakā), and Triṃśāṃśaka are Rama (3), Netra (2), Abdhi (4, implied by abidha), Pañca (5), Aśvin (2), and Bhūmayaḥ (7), respectively. For the Saptāṃśa (D7) within the group of seven vargas, the Viṃśopaka points are five and two.

sanskrit: त्रयः सार्द्धं द्वयं सार्द्धवेदा द्वौ रात्रिनायकः । स्थूलं फलं च संस्थाप्य तत्सूक्ष्मं च ततस्ततः ॥१९॥
transliteration: trayaḥ sārddhaṃ dvayaṃ sārddhavedā dvau rātrināyakaḥ . sthūlaṃ phalaṃ ca saṃsthāpya tatsūkṣmaṃ ca tatastataḥ.
separated_sandhi: trayaḥ sārdham dvayam sārdhavedā dvau rātrināyakaḥsthūlam phalam ca saṃsthāpya tat sūkṣmam ca tataḥ tataḥ
english: The numerical values are three and a half (3.5), two (2), four and a half (4.5), two (2), and one (assigned to the Moon). One should establish the gross result (sthūla phala) using these, and then calculate its subtle part (sūkṣma phala) from that.

sanskrit: दशवर्गां दिगंशाढ्याः कलांशाः षष्टिभागकाः । त्रयं क्षेत्रस्य विज्ञेयः पंचषष्ट्यंशकस्य च ॥२०॥
transliteration: daśavargāṃ digaṃśāḍhyāḥ kalāṃśāḥ ṣaṣṭibhāgakāḥ . trayaṃ kṣetrasya vijñeyaḥ paṃcaṣaṣṭyaṃśakasya ca.
separated_sandhi: daśavargān digaṃśāḍhyāḥ kalāṃśāḥ ṣaṣṭibhāgakāḥtrayam kṣetrasya vijñeyaḥ pañcaṣaṣṭyaṃśakasya ca
english: The ten vargas (daśavargā), along with the digamsas, kalamsas, and ṣaṣṭyāṃśas, are specified. Three points are to be understood for the rāśi (kṣetra) and also for the pañcaṣaṣṭyāṃśa.

sanskrit: सार्द्धौकभागाः शेषाणां विश्वकाः परिकीर्तिता । अथ वक्ष्ये विशेषेण बलं विंशोपकाह्वयम् ॥२१॥
transliteration: sārddhaukabhāgāḥ śeṣāṇāṃ viśvakāḥ parikīrtitā . atha vakṣye viśeṣeṇa balaṃ viṃśopakāhvayam.
separated_sandhi: sārdhaikabhāgāḥ śeṣāṇām viśvakāḥ parikīrtitāḥatha vakṣye viśeṣeṇa balam viṃśopakāhvayam
english: One and a half parts (1.5) are declared for the remaining (vargas), and "viśva" (thirteen) parts. Now, I shall explain in particular the strength (bala) known as "viṃśopaka".

sanskrit: क्रमात् षोडशवर्गाणां क्षेत्रादीनां पृथक् पृथक् । होरात्रिंशांशदृक्काणे कुचन्द्रशशिनः क्रमात् ॥२२॥
transliteration: kramāt ṣoḍaśavargāṇāṃ kṣetrādīnāṃ pṛthak pṛthak . horātriṃśāṃśadṛkkāṇe kucandraśaśinaḥ kramāt.
separated_sandhi: kramāt ṣoḍaśavargāṇām kṣetrādīnām pṛthak pṛthakhorātriṃśāṃśadṛkkāṇe kucandraśaśinaḥ kramāt
english: Separately for each of the sixteen vargas (divisional charts) starting with the rāśi (kṣetra), in the horā, triṃśāṃśa, and dṛkkāṇa divisions, the points are assigned in order for Mars, Moon, and Moon, respectively.

sanskrit: कलांशस्य द्वयं ज्ञेयं त्रयं नन्दांशकस्य च । क्षेत्रे सार्द्धं च त्रितयं वेदाः षष्ट्यंशकस्य हि ॥२३॥
transliteration: kalāṃśasya dvayaṃ jñeyaṃ trayaṃ nandāṃśakasya ca . kṣetre sārddhaṃ ca tritayaṃ vedāḥ ṣaṣṭyaṃśakasya hi.
separated_sandhi: kalāṃśasya dvayam jñeyam trayam nandāṃśakasya cakṣetre sārdham ca tritayam vedāḥ ṣaṣṭyaṃśakasya hi
english: Two points are to be known for the kalāṃśa, and three for the nandāṃśaka. In the rāśi (kṣetra), three and a half points are assigned, and indeed, four for the ṣaṣṭyāṃśa.

sanskrit: अर्द्धमर्धं तु शेषाणां ह्येतत् स्वीयमुदाहृतम् । पूर्णं विंशोपकं विंशो धृतिः स्यादधिमित्रके ॥२४॥
transliteration: arddhamardhaṃ tu śeṣāṇāṃ hyetat svīyamudāhṛtam . pūrṇaṃ viṃśopakaṃ viṃśo dhṛtiḥ syādadhimitrake.
separated_sandhi: ardham ardham tu śeṣāṇām hi etat svīyam udāhṛtampūrṇam viṃśopakam viṃśaḥ dhṛtiḥ syāt adimitrake
english: Indeed, a full share (literally, 'half and half') is declared for one's own (sign). A full twentieth-part, that is twenty (units) of steady strength, should be for an exceedingly friendly (sign).

sanskrit: मित्रे पंचदश प्रोक्तं समे दश प्रकीर्तितम् । शत्रौ सप्ताधिशत्रौ च पंचविंशोपकं भवेत् ॥२५॥
transliteration: mitre paṃcadaśa proktaṃ same daśa prakīrtitam . śatrau saptādhiśatrau ca paṃcaviṃśopakaṃ bhavet.
separated_sandhi: mitre pañcadaśa proktam same daśa prakīrtitamśatrau sapta adhiśatrau ca pañca viṃśopakam bhavet
english: Fifteen (units) are stated for a friendly (planet), and ten (units) are proclaimed for a neutral (planet). For an inimical (planet), seven, and for a greatly inimical (planet), five twentieth-parts (units) should be.

sanskrit: वर्गविश्वाः स्वविश्वघ्नाः पुनर्विंशतिभाजिताः । विश्वाफलोपयोग्यं तत्पञ्चोनं फलदो न हि ॥२६॥
transliteration: vargaviśvāḥ svaviśvaghnāḥ punarviṃśatibhājitāḥ . viśvāphalopayogyaṃ tatpañconaṃ phalado na hi.
separated_sandhi: vargaviśvāḥ svaviśvaghnaḥ punarviṃśatibhājitāḥviśvaphala upayogyam tat pañca ūnam phaladaḥ na hi
english: The scores (units) obtained in the divisional charts (vargas), when multiplied by their own twenty and then again divided by twenty, represent the applicable twenty-fold result. If that (result) is less than five, it certainly does not yield results.

sanskrit: तदूर्ध्वं स्वल्पफलदं दशोर्ध्वं मध्यमं स्मृतम् । तिय्यूर्धं पूर्णफलदं बोध्यं सर्वं खचारिणाम् ॥२७॥
transliteration: tadūrdhvaṃ svalpaphaladaṃ daśordhvaṃ madhyamaṃ smṛtam . tiyyūrdhaṃ pūrṇaphaladaṃ bodhyaṃ sarvaṃ khacāriṇām.
separated_sandhi: tat ūrdhvam svalpaphala dam daśa ūrdhvam madhyamam smṛtamtriṃśat ūrdhvam pūrṇaphala dam bodhyam sarvam khacāriṇām
english: Above that (five units), it gives meager results. Above ten (units), it is considered moderate. Above thirty (units), it gives full results. All this should be understood for the celestial bodies (planets).

sanskrit: अथाऽन्यदपि वक्ष्येऽहं मैत्रेय त्वं विधारय । खेताः पूर्णफलं दद्युः सूर्यात् सप्तमके स्थिताः ॥२८॥
transliteration: athā'nyadapi vakṣye'haṃ maitreya tvaṃ vidhāraya . khetāḥ pūrṇaphalaṃ dadyuḥ sūryāt saptamake sthitāḥ.
separated_sandhi: atha anyat api vakṣye aham maitreya tvam vidhārayakhetāḥ pūrṇaphalam dadyuḥ sūryāt saptamake sthitāḥ
english: Now, I will also explain something else, O Maitreya; you should comprehend it. Planets situated in the seventh (house) from the Sun yield full results.

sanskrit: फलाभावं विजानीयात् समे सूर्यनभश्चरे । मध्येऽनुपातात् सर्वत्र ह्युदयास्तविंशोपकाः ॥२९॥
transliteration: phalābhāvaṃ vijānīyāt same sūryanabhaścare . madhye'nupātāt sarvatra hyudayāstaviṃśopakāḥ.
separated_sandhi: phala-abhāvam vijānīyāt same sūrya-nabhaścaremadhye anupātāt sarvatra hi udayāsta-viṃśopakāḥ
english: One should understand that there is an absence of results when the Sun and a planet are at the same degree. In all other cases, the "udayāsta-viṃśopaka" (a strength calculation based on heliacal rising and setting) should be determined proportionally in the intermediate positions.

sanskrit: वर्गविंशोपकं ज्ञेयं फलमस्य द्विजर्षभ । यच्च यत्र फलं बुद्ध्वा तत्फलं परिकीर्तितम् ॥३०॥
transliteration: vargaviṃśopakaṃ jñeyaṃ phalamasya dvijarṣabha . yacca yatra phalaṃ buddhvā tatphalaṃ parikīrtitam.
separated_sandhi: varga-viṃśopakam jñeyam phalam asya dvija-ṛṣabhayat ca yatra phalam buddhvā tat phalam parikīrtitam
english: O best among the twice-born (dvija-ṛṣabha)! The "varga-viṃśopaka" (strength related to divisional charts) should be understood as its result. And having understood what result is applicable in which specific context, that particular result is (thus) declared.

sanskrit: वर्गविंशोपकं चादावुदयास्तमतः परम् । पूर्णं पूर्णेतिपूर्नंस्यात् सर्वदौवं विचिन्तयेत् ॥३१॥
transliteration: vargaviṃśopakaṃ cādāvudayāstamataḥ param . pūrṇaṃ pūrṇetipūrnaṃsyāt sarvadauvaṃ vicintayet.
separated_sandhi: varga-viṃśopakam ca ādau udayāstam ataḥ param pūrṇampūrṇa-iti-pūrṇam syāt sarvam daivam vicintayet
english: And first, the "varga-viṃśopaka" (strength related to divisional charts), then the "udayāsta" (strength related to heliacal rising and setting). A result becomes 'fully full'. One should thus consider all (aspects of) destiny.

sanskrit: हीनं हीनेतिहीनं स्यात् स्वल्पेल्पात्यल्पकं स्मृतम् । मध्यं मध्येतिमध्यं स्याद्यावत्तस्य दशास्थितिः ॥३२॥
transliteration: hīnaṃ hīnetihīnaṃ syāt svalpelpātyalpakaṃ smṛtam . madhyaṃ madhyetimadhyaṃ syādyāvattasya daśāsthitiḥ.
separated_sandhi: hīnam hīna-iti-hīnam syāt svalpa-alpa-atyalpakam smṛtammadhyam madhya-iti-madhyam syāt yāvat tasya daśā-sthitiḥ
english: A deficient result becomes 'very deficient'. A 'small to extremely small' result is remembered (or considered). A moderate result becomes 'very moderate', for as long as its (planetary) period (daśā) lasts.

sanskrit: अथाऽन्यदपि वक्ष्यामि मैत्रेय स्रृणु सुव्रत् । लग्नतुर्यास्तवियतां केन्द्रसंज्ञा विशेषतः ॥३३॥
transliteration: athā'nyadapi vakṣyāmi maitreya srṛṇu suvrat . lagnaturyāstaviyatāṃ kendrasaṃjñā viśeṣataḥ.
separated_sandhi: atha anyat api vakṣyāmi maitreya srṛṇu suvratlagna-turya-asta-viyatām kendra-saṃjñā viśeṣataḥ
english: Now I shall also speak of another topic, O Maitreya, listen, O virtuous one. Specifically, I will explain the designation of "kendra" (angular houses) for the first (lagna), fourth, seventh, and tenth houses.

sanskrit: द्विपंचरन्ध्रलाभानां ज्ञेयं पणफराभिधम् । त्रिषष्ठभाग्यरिष्फानामापोक्लिममिति द्विज ॥३४॥
transliteration: dvipaṃcarandhralābhānāṃ jñeyaṃ paṇapharābhidham . triṣaṣṭhabhāgyariṣphānāmāpoklimamiti dvija.
separated_sandhi: dvi pañca randhra lābhānām jñeyam paṇapharābhidhamtri ṣaṣṭha bhāgya riṣphānām āpoklimam iti dvija
english: O twice-born (dvija), the 2nd, 5th, 8th, and 11th houses are known as Panaphara. The 3rd, 6th, 9th, and 12th houses are known as Apoklima.

sanskrit: लग्नात् पंचमभाग्यस्य कोणसंज्ञा विधीयते । षष्ठाष्टव्ययभाबानां दुःसंज्ञास्त्रिकसंज्ञकाः ॥३५॥
transliteration: lagnāt paṃcamabhāgyasya koṇasaṃjñā vidhīyate . ṣaṣṭhāṣṭavyayabhābānāṃ duḥsaṃjñāstrikasaṃjñakāḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagnāt pañcama bhāgyasya koṇa saṃjñā vidhīyate ṣaṣṭhaaṣṭa vyaya bhāvānām duḥ saṃjñāḥ trika saṃjñakāḥ
english: From the ascendant (lagna), the 5th and 9th houses are designated as Koṇa (trine). The 6th, 8th, and 12th houses are known as Duḥsthana (evil houses) and are also designated as Trik.

sanskrit: चतुरस्रं तुर्यरन्ध्रं कथयान्ते द्विजोत्तम । स्वस्थादुपचयर्क्षाणि त्रिषडायाम्बराणि हि ॥३६॥
transliteration: caturasraṃ turyarandhraṃ kathayānte dvijottama . svasthādupacayarkṣāṇi triṣaḍāyāmbarāṇi hi.
separated_sandhi: caturasram turya randhram kathayante dvijottamasvasthāt upacaya ṛkṣāṇi tri ṣaṭ āya ambarāṇi hi
english: O excellent brahmin (dvijottama), the 4th and 8th houses are said to be Caturasra (quadrants). Indeed, the 3rd, 6th, 11th, and 10th houses are Upacaya houses from the lagna.

sanskrit: तनुर्धनं च सहजो बन्धुपुत्रारयस्तथा । युवतीरन्ध्रधर्माख्यकर्मालाभव्ययाः क्रमात् ॥३७॥
transliteration: tanurdhanaṃ ca sahajo bandhuputrārayastathā . yuvatīrandhradharmākhyakarmālābhavyayāḥ kramāt.
separated_sandhi: tanuḥ dhanam ca sahajaḥ bandhu putra arayaḥ tathāyuvatī randhra dharma ākhya karma lābha vyayāḥ kramāt
english: Body/Self (1st house), wealth (2nd house), and siblings/courage (3rd house); similarly, relatives (4th house), children (5th house), and enemies (6th house); and then spouse (7th house), longevity/calamity (8th house), fortune/natural law (dharma) (9th house), profession/action (karma) (10th house), gains (11th house), and expenditures/loss (12th house) - these are the houses respectively.

sanskrit: संक्षेपेणौतदुदितमन्यद् बुद्ध्यनुसारतः । किञ्चिद्विशेषं वक्ष्यामि यथा भह्ममुखार्च्छुतम् ॥३८॥
transliteration: saṃkṣepeṇautaduditamanyad buddhyanusārataḥ . kiñcidviśeṣaṃ vakṣyāmi yathā bhahmamukhārcchutam.
separated_sandhi: saṃkṣepeṇa etat uditam anyat buddhi anusārataḥkiñcit viśeṣam vakṣyāmi yathā bhahmamukha ārcchutam
english: This has been told briefly; other matters should be understood according to one's own intellect. I will explain some special points as heard from the mouth of Brahmā.

sanskrit: नवमेऽपि पितुर्ज्ञानं सूर्याच्च नवमेऽथवा । यत्किञ्चिद्दशमे लाभे तत्सूर्याद्दशमे भवे ॥३९॥
transliteration: navame'pi piturjñānaṃ sūryācca navame'thavā . yatkiñciddaśame lābhe tatsūryāddaśame bhave.
separated_sandhi: navame api pituḥ jñānam sūryāt ca navame athavāyat kiñcit daśame lābhe tat sūryāt daśame bhavet
english: Knowledge concerning the father is to be determined from the ninth house from the ascendant, or alternatively, from the ninth house from the Sun. Whatever gains are indicated by the tenth house from the ascendant should likewise be considered from the tenth house from the Sun.

sanskrit: तुर्ये तनौ धने लाभे भाग्ये यच्चिन्तनं च तत् । चन्द्रात्तुर्ये तनौ लाभे भग्ये तच्चिन्तयेद् ध्रुवम् ॥४०॥
transliteration: turye tanau dhane lābhe bhāgye yaccintanaṃ ca tat . candrātturye tanau lābhe bhagye taccintayed dhruvam.
separated_sandhi: turye tanau dhane lābhe bhāgye yat cintanam ca tatcandrāt turye tanau lābhe bhāgye tat cintayet dhruvam
english: Whatever analysis is made concerning the fourth house (home), the first house (self), the second house (wealth), the eleventh house (gains), and the ninth house (fortune) from the ascendant, that same analysis should definitely be conducted for the fourth house, first house, eleventh house, and ninth house from the Moon.

sanskrit: लग्नाद् दुश्चिक्यभवने यत्कुजाद्विक्रमेऽखिलम् । विचार्यं षष्ठभावस्य बुधात् षष्ठे विलोकयेत् ॥४१॥
transliteration: lagnād duścikyabhavane yatkujādvikrame'khilam . vicāryaṃ ṣaṣṭhabhāvasya budhāt ṣaṣṭhe vilokayet.
separated_sandhi: lagnāt duścikyabhavane yat kujāt vikrame akhilamvicāryam ṣaṣṭhabhāvasya budhāt ṣaṣṭhe vilokayet
english: Whatever pertains to the third house (siblings, courage) from the ascendant, or to the third house from Mars, all of that should be thoroughly examined. Similarly, whatever is to be analyzed concerning the sixth house (enemies, debts, diseases) from the ascendant, that should be observed from the sixth house from Mercury.

sanskrit: पुत्रस्य च गुरोः पुत्रे जायायाः सप्तमे भृगोः । अष्टमस्य व्ययस्यापि मन्दान्मृत्यौ व्यये तथा ॥४२॥
transliteration: putrasya ca guroḥ putre jāyāyāḥ saptame bhṛgoḥ . aṣṭamasya vyayasyāpi mandānmṛtyau vyaye tathā.
separated_sandhi: putrasya ca guroḥ putre jāyāyāḥ saptame bhṛgoḥaṣṭamasya vyayasyāpi mandāt mṛtyau vyaye tathā
english: The analysis for the fifth house (children) should also be conducted from the fifth house from Jupiter. For the seventh house (spouse), it should also be done from the seventh house from Venus. Similarly, for the eighth house (longevity) and the twelfth house (expenditure), these analyses should be conducted from the eighth house (death) and the twelfth house (expenditure) from Saturn.

sanskrit: यद्भावाद्यत्फलं चिन्त्यं तदीशात्तत्फलं विदुः । ज्ञेयं तस्य फलं तद्धि तत्र चिन्त्यं शुभाऽशुभम् ॥४३॥
transliteration: yadbhāvādyatphalaṃ cintyaṃ tadīśāttatphalaṃ viduḥ . jñeyaṃ tasya phalaṃ taddhi tatra cintyaṃ śubhā'śubham.
separated_sandhi: yat bhāvāt yat phalam cintyam tadīśāt tat phalam viduḥjñeyam tasya phalam tat hi tatra cintyam śubhāśubham
english: Whatever result is to be considered from a particular house, astrologers understand that the same result should also be considered from the lord of that house. Indeed, the result (from both the house and its lord) should be known; the auspicious and inauspicious effects must be contemplated in that context.

sanskrit: अथ मेषादिराशीनां चरादीनां पृथक् पृथक् । दृष्टिभेदं प्रवक्ष्यामि श‍ृणु त्वं द्विजसत्तम ॥१॥
transliteration: atha meṣādirāśīnāṃ carādīnāṃ pṛthak pṛthak . dṛṣṭibhedaṃ pravakṣyāmi śa‍ृṇu tvaṃ dvijasattama.
separated_sandhi: atha meṣādirāśīnām carādīnām pṛthak pṛthakdṛṣṭibhedam pravakṣyāmi śṛṇu tvam dvijasattama
english: Now, I will explain the distinct differences in aspects of the signs, such as Aries and others, and the movable (cara) and other types of signs. O best among the twice-born (dvija), please listen.

sanskrit: राशयोऽभिमुखं विप्र तथा पश्यन्ति पार्श्वभे । यथा चरः स्थिरानेवं स्थिरः पश्यति वै चरान् ॥२॥
transliteration: rāśayo'bhimukhaṃ vipra tathā paśyanti pārśvabhe . yathā caraḥ sthirānevaṃ sthiraḥ paśyati vai carān.
separated_sandhi: rāśayaḥ abhimukham vipra tathā paśyanti pārśvabheyathā caraḥ sthirān evam sthiraḥ paśyati vai carān
english: O brāhmaṇa (vipra), the signs aspect those facing them directly (the 7th house), and also those in the adjacent (4th and 8th) positions. Just as a movable (cara) sign aspects fixed (sthira) signs, similarly, a fixed (sthira) sign indeed aspects movable (cara) signs.

sanskrit: द्विस्वभावो विनाऽत्मानां द्विस्वभावान् प्रपश्यति । समीपस्थं परित्यज्य खेटास्तत्र गतास्तथा ॥३॥
transliteration: dvisvabhāvo vinā'tmānāṃ dvisvabhāvān prapaśyati . samīpasthaṃ parityajya kheṭāstatra gatāstathā.
separated_sandhi: dvisvabhāvaḥ vinā ātmānām dvisvabhāvān prapaśyatisamīpastham parityajya kheṭāḥ tatra gatāḥ tathā
english: A dual sign (dvisvabhāva) aspects other dual signs, excluding its own self (ātman). Similarly, celestial bodies, disregarding the immediately adjacent positions, aspect those (dual signs) that are located there.

sanskrit: चरेषु संस्थिताः खेटाः पश्यन्ति स्थिरसङ्गतान् । स्थिरेषु संस्थिता एवं पश्यन्ति चरसंस्थितान् ॥४॥
transliteration: careṣu saṃsthitāḥ kheṭāḥ paśyanti sthirasaṅgatān . sthireṣu saṃsthitā evaṃ paśyanti carasaṃsthitān.
separated_sandhi: careṣu saṃsthitāḥ kheṭāḥ paśyanti sthirasaṅgatānsthireṣu saṃsthitāḥ evam paśyanti carasaṃsthitān
english: Planets situated in movable (cara) signs aspect those (planets) situated in fixed (sthira) signs. Similarly, (planets) situated in fixed (sthira) signs aspect those (planets) situated in movable (cara) signs.

sanskrit: उभयस्थास्तु सूर्याद्या पश्यन्युभयसंस्थितान् । निकटस्थं विना खेटाः पश्यन्तीत्ययमागमः ॥५॥
transliteration: ubhayasthāstu sūryādyā paśyanyubhayasaṃsthitān . nikaṭasthaṃ vinā kheṭāḥ paśyantītyayamāgamaḥ.
separated_sandhi: ubhayasthāḥ tu sūryādyāḥ paśyanti ubhayasaṃsthitānnikaṭastham vinā kheṭāḥ paśyanti iti ayam āgamaḥ
english: But planets, beginning with the Sun (Sūrya), situated in dual signs indeed aspect those (planets) situated in dual signs. This is the traditional doctrine (āgama) that celestial bodies aspect, excluding the immediately adjacent position.

sanskrit: दृष्टिचक्रमहं वक्ष्ये ययावद् ब्रह्मणोदितम् । तस्य विन्यासमात्रेण दृष्टिभेदः प्रकाश्यते ॥६॥
transliteration: dṛṣṭicakramahaṃ vakṣye yayāvad brahmaṇoditam . tasya vinyāsamātreṇa dṛṣṭibhedaḥ prakāśyate.
separated_sandhi: dṛṣṭicakram aham vakṣye yayāvat brahmaṇā uditamtasya vinyāsamātreṇa dṛṣṭibhedaḥ prakāśyate
english: I will now explain the planetary aspect chart (dṛṣṭi-cakra) exactly as it was taught by Brahmā. Merely by its arrangement, the distinctions of planetary aspects (dṛṣṭi) become clear.

sanskrit: प्राचि मीषवृषौ लेख्यौ कर्कसिंहौ तथोत्तरे । तुलाऽली पश्चिमे विप्र मृगकुम्भौ च दक्षिणे ॥७॥
transliteration: prāci mīṣavṛṣau lekhyau karkasiṃhau tathottare . tulā'lī paścime vipra mṛgakumbhau ca dakṣiṇe.
separated_sandhi: prāci meṣavṛṣau lekhyau karkasiṃhau tathā uttaretulā alī paścime vipra mṛgakumbhau ca dakṣiṇe
english: O Brahmin, Aries and Taurus should be inscribed in the East, Cancer and Leo likewise in the North, Libra and Scorpio in the West, and Capricorn and Aquarius in the South.

sanskrit: ईशकोणे तु मिथुनं वायव्ये कन्यकां तथा । नौरृर्त्यां चापमालिख्य वह्निकोणे छषं लिखेत् ॥८॥
transliteration: īśakoṇe tu mithunaṃ vāyavye kanyakāṃ tathā . naurṛrtyāṃ cāpamālikhya vahnikoṇe chaṣaṃ likhet.
separated_sandhi: īśakoṇe tu mithunam vāyavye kanyakām tathānairṛtyām cāpam ālikhya vahnikoṇe chaṣam likhet
english: And in the Northeast corner, Gemini (mithuna), and likewise Virgo (kanyakā) in the Northwest. Having inscribed Sagittarius (cāpa) in the Southwest, one should then inscribe Pisces (chaṣa) in the Southeast corner.

sanskrit: एवं चतुर्भुजाकारं वृत्ताकारमथापि वा । दृष्टिचक्रं प्रविन्यस्यैवं ततो दृष्टिं विचारयेत् ॥९॥
transliteration: evaṃ caturbhujākāraṃ vṛttākāramathāpi vā . dṛṣṭicakraṃ pravinyasyaivaṃ tato dṛṣṭiṃ vicārayet.
separated_sandhi: evam caturbhujākāram vṛttākāram atha api vādṛṣṭicakram pravinyasya evam tataḥ dṛṣṭim vicārayet
english: Therefore, having arranged the aspect chart (dṛṣṭi-cakra) in this manner, either square or circular in shape, one should then consider the planetary aspects (dṛṣṭi).

sanskrit: आदौ जन्माङ्गतो विप्र रिष्टाऽरिष्टं विचारयेत् । ततस्तन्वादिभावानां जातकस्य फलं वदेत् ॥१॥
transliteration: ādau janmāṅgato vipra riṣṭā'riṣṭaṃ vicārayet . tatastanvādibhāvānāṃ jātakasya phalaṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: ādau janmāṅgataḥ vipra riṣṭāriṣṭam vicārayettataḥ tanvādibhāvānām jātakasya phalam vadet
english: First, O Brahmin, one should examine the auspicious and inauspicious indications from the birth ascendant. Then, one should declare the effects for the native concerning the twelve houses (bhāva), starting with the first house (tanu bhāva).

sanskrit: चतुर्विंशतिवर्षाणि यावद् गच्छन्ति जन्मतः । जन्मारिष्टं तु तावत् स्यादायुर्दायुं न चिन्तयेत् ॥२॥
transliteration: caturviṃśativarṣāṇi yāvad gacchanti janmataḥ . janmāriṣṭaṃ tu tāvat syādāyurdāyuṃ na cintayet.
separated_sandhi: caturviṃśativarṣāṇi yāvat gacchanti janmataḥjanmāriṣṭam tu tāvat syāt āyurdāyum na cintayet
english: For the first twenty-four years from birth, the danger (ariṣṭa) associated with birth prevails. During this period, one should not consider the calculation of longevity (āyurdāya).

sanskrit: षष्ठाष्टरिष्फगश्चन्द्रः क्रूरौः खेटैश्च वीक्षितः । जातस्य मृत्युदः सद्यस्त्वष्टर्षैः शुभक्षितः ॥३॥
transliteration: ṣaṣṭhāṣṭariṣphagaścandraḥ krūrauḥ kheṭaiśca vīkṣitaḥ . jātasya mṛtyudaḥ sadyastvaṣṭarṣaiḥ śubhakṣitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: ṣaṣṭhāṣṭariṣphagaḥ candraḥ krūraiḥ kheṭaiḥ ca vīkṣitaḥjātasya mṛtyudaḥ sadyaḥ tu aṣṭarṣaiḥ śubhakṣitaḥ
english: When the Moon is in the 6th, 8th, or 12th house and is aspected by malefic planets, it causes immediate death for the native. However, if it is aspected by auspicious planets, death occurs in the eighth year.

sanskrit: शशिवन्मृत्युदाः सौम्याश्चेद्वक्राः क्रूरवीक्षिताः । शिशोर्जातस्य मासेन लग्ने सौम्यविवर्जिते ॥४॥
transliteration: śaśivanmṛtyudāḥ saumyāścedvakrāḥ krūravīkṣitāḥ . śiśorjātasya māsena lagne saumyavivarjite.
separated_sandhi: śaśivat mṛtyudāḥ saumyāḥ cet vakrāḥ krūravīkṣitāḥśiśoḥ jātasya māsena lagne saumyavivarjite
english: If benefic planets become retrograde and are aspected by malefic planets, they cause death to the newborn infant within a month, just as the Moon does [under malefic influence], especially when the ascendant is devoid of benefics.

sanskrit: यस्य जन्मनि धीस्थाः स्युः सूर्यार्कीन्दुकुजाभधाः । तस्य त्वाशु जनित्री च भ्राता च निधनं व्रजेत् ॥५॥
transliteration: yasya janmani dhīsthāḥ syuḥ sūryārkīndukujābhadhāḥ . tasya tvāśu janitrī ca bhrātā ca nidhanaṃ vrajet.
separated_sandhi: yasya janmani dhīsthāḥ syuḥ sūryārkīndukujābhadhāḥtasya tu āśu janitrī ca bhrātā ca nidhanam vrajet
english: If the Sun, Saturn, Moon, and Mars are situated in the 5th house at one's birth, then quickly both the mother and the brother of that native will meet their end (nidhana).

sanskrit: पापेक्षितो युतो भौमो लग्नगो न शुभेक्षितः । मृत्युदस्त्वष्टमस्थोऽपि सौरेणार्केण वा युतः ॥६॥
transliteration: pāpekṣito yuto bhaumo lagnago na śubhekṣitaḥ . mṛtyudastvaṣṭamastho'pi saureṇārkeṇa vā yutaḥ.
separated_sandhi: pāpekṣitaḥ yutaḥ bhaumaḥ lagnagaḥ na śubhekṣitaḥmṛtyudaḥ tu aṣṭamasthaḥ api saureṇa arkeṇa vā yutaḥ
english: If Mars is in the ascendant (lagna), and is either aspected by malefic planets or conjoined with them, and is not aspected by benefic planets, it causes death. Additionally, if Mars is in the 8th house and conjoined with Saturn or the Sun, it also causes death.

sanskrit: चन्द्रसूर्यग्रहे राहुश्चन्द्रसूर्ययुतो यदि । सौरिभौमेक्षितं लग्नं पक्षमेकं स जीवति ॥७॥
transliteration: candrasūryagrahe rāhuścandrasūryayuto yadi . sauribhaumekṣitaṃ lagnaṃ pakṣamekaṃ sa jīvati.
separated_sandhi: candra-sūrya-grahe rāhuḥ candra-sūrya-yutaḥ yadisauri-bhauma-īkṣitam lagnaṃ pakṣam ekam saḥ jīvati
english: If Rahu is involved in a lunar or solar eclipse and is conjoined with the Moon and Sun, and if the ascendant is aspected by Saturn and Mars, that person lives for only one fortnight.

sanskrit: कर्मस्थाने स्थितः सौरिः शत्रुस्थाने कलानिधिः । क्षितिजः सप्तमस्थाने सह मात्रा विपद्यते ॥८॥
transliteration: karmasthāne sthitaḥ sauriḥ śatrusthāne kalānidhiḥ . kṣitijaḥ saptamasthāne saha mātrā vipadyate.
separated_sandhi: karma-sthāne sthitaḥ sauriḥ śatru-sthāne kalā-nidhiḥkṣitijaḥ saptama-sthāne saha mātrā vipadyate
english: If Saturn is situated in the tenth house, the Moon in the sixth house, and Mars in the seventh house, then the person perishes along with their mother.

sanskrit: लग्ने भास्करपुत्रश्च निधने चन्द्रमा यदि । तृतीयस्थो यदा जीवः स याति यममन्दिरम् ॥९॥
transliteration: lagne bhāskaraputraśca nidhane candramā yadi . tṛtīyastho yadā jīvaḥ sa yāti yamamandiram.
separated_sandhi: lagne bhāskara-putraḥ ca nidhane candramā yaditṛtīya-sthaḥ yadā jīvaḥ saḥ yāti yama-mandiram
english: If Saturn is in the ascendant and the Moon is in the eighth house, and if Jupiter is situated in the third house, then that person goes to the abode of Yama (lord of death).

sanskrit: होरायां नवमे सूर्यः सप्तमस्थः शनैश्चरः । एकादशे गुरुः सुक्रो मासमेकं स जीवति ॥१०॥
transliteration: horāyāṃ navame sūryaḥ saptamasthaḥ śanaiścaraḥ . ekādaśe guruḥ sukro māsamekaṃ sa jīvati.
separated_sandhi: horāyām navame sūryaḥ saptama-sthaḥ śanaiścaraḥekādaśe guruḥ śukraḥ māsam ekam saḥ jīvati
english: If the Sun is in the ninth house (from the ascendant), Saturn is situated in the seventh house, and Jupiter and Venus are in the eleventh house, then that person lives for only one month.

sanskrit: व्यये सर्वे ग्रहा नेष्टाः सूर्येशुक्रेन्दुराहवः । विशेषान्नाशकर्तारो दृष्ट्या वा भङ्गकारिणः ॥११॥
transliteration: vyaye sarve grahā neṣṭāḥ sūryeśukrendurāhavaḥ . viśeṣānnāśakartāro dṛṣṭyā vā bhaṅgakāriṇaḥ.
separated_sandhi: vyaye sarve grahāḥ na iṣṭāḥ sūryaśukrendurāhavaḥviśeṣāt nāśa-kartāraḥ dṛṣṭyā vā bhaṅga-kāriṇaḥ
english: All planets in the twelfth house are inauspicious. Especially the Sun, Venus, Moon, and Rahu cause destruction, or cause misfortune through their aspect.

sanskrit: पापान्वितः शशी धर्मे द्यूनलग्नगतो यदि । शुभैरवेक्षितयुतस्तदा मृत्युप्रदः शिशोः ॥१२॥
transliteration: pāpānvitaḥ śaśī dharme dyūnalagnagato yadi . śubhairavekṣitayutastadā mṛtyupradaḥ śiśoḥ.
separated_sandhi: pāpa-anvitaḥ śaśī dharme dyūna-lagna-gataḥ yadiśubhaiḥ avekṣita-yutaḥ tadā mṛtyu-pradaḥ śiśoḥ
english: If the Moon, afflicted by malefic planets, is located in the house of natural law (dharma) (9th house), the 7th house, or the ascendant (Lagna), and is also aspected or conjoined by benefic planets, then it causes the death of the child.

sanskrit: सन्ध्यायां चन्द्रहोरायां गण्डान्ते निधनाय वै । प्रत्येकं चन्द्रपापैश्च केन्द्रगैः स्याद्विनाशनम् ॥१३॥
transliteration: sandhyāyāṃ candrahorāyāṃ gaṇḍānte nidhanāya vai . pratyekaṃ candrapāpaiśca kendragaiḥ syādvināśanam.
separated_sandhi: sandhyāyām candra-horāyām gaṇḍānte nidhanāya vaipratyekam candra-pāpaiḥ ca kendra-gaiḥ syāt vināśanam
english: Death certainly occurs if a birth takes place during twilight, in the hora of the Moon, or in a gaṇḍānta. Furthermore, if the Moon and malefic planets are both located in angular houses (kendras), it also leads to destruction.

sanskrit: रवेस्तु मण्डलार्द्धास्तात् सायं संध्या त्रिनाडिका । तथैवार्द्धोदयात् पूर्वं प्रातः संध्या त्रिनाडिका ॥१४॥
transliteration: ravestu maṇḍalārddhāstāt sāyaṃ saṃdhyā trināḍikā . tathaivārddhodayāt pūrvaṃ prātaḥ saṃdhyā trināḍikā.
separated_sandhi: raveḥ tu maṇḍala-ardha-astāt sāyam sandhyā tri-nāḍikātathā eva ardha-udayāt pūrvam prātaḥ sandhyā tri-nāḍikā
english: The evening twilight (sandhyā) lasts for three nāḍikās (approximately 72 minutes), commencing from when half of the Sun's disk has set. Similarly, the morning twilight (sandhyā) also lasts for three nāḍikās, concluding when half of the Sun's disk has risen.

sanskrit: चक्रपूर्वापरार्द्धेषु क्रूरसौम्येषु कीटभे । लग्नगे निधनं याति नाऽत्र कार्या विचारणा ॥१५॥
transliteration: cakrapūrvāparārddheṣu krūrasaumyeṣu kīṭabhe . lagnage nidhanaṃ yāti nā'tra kāryā vicāraṇā.
separated_sandhi: cakra-pūrva-apara-ardheṣu krūra-saumyeṣu kīṭa-bhelagna-ge nidhanam yāti na atra kāryā vicāraṇā
english: If the ascendant (Lagna) is in a Scorpio sign, and malefic and benefic planets are positioned in the eastern and western halves of the zodiacal chart, then death occurs; no further deliberation is necessary in this matter.

sanskrit: व्ययशत्रुगतैः क्रूरैर्मृत्युद्रव्यगतैरपि । पापमध्यगते लग्ने सत्यमेव मृतिं वदेत् ॥१६॥
transliteration: vyayaśatrugataiḥ krūrairmṛtyudravyagatairapi . pāpamadhyagate lagne satyameva mṛtiṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: vyaya-śatru-gataiḥ krūraiḥ mṛtyu-dravya-gataiḥapi pāpa-madhya-gate lagne satyam eva mṛtim vadet
english: If malefic planets are located in the 12th house (house of loss), the 6th house (house of enemies), the 8th house (house of death), and also the 2nd house (house of wealth), and furthermore, if the ascendant (Lagna) is situated between malefic planets, one should certainly declare death.

sanskrit: लग्नसप्तमगौ पापौ चन्द्रोऽपि क्रूरसंयुतः । यदा नावेक्षितः सौम्यैः शीघ्रान्मृत्युर्भवेत्तदा ॥१७॥
transliteration: lagnasaptamagau pāpau candro'pi krūrasaṃyutaḥ . yadā nāvekṣitaḥ saumyaiḥ śīghrānmṛtyurbhavettadā.
separated_sandhi: lagna-saptamagau pāpau candraḥ api krūrasaṃyutaḥ yadāna avekṣitaḥ saumyaiḥ śīghrāt mṛtyuḥ bhavet tadā
english: If malefic planets are situated in the first (lagna) and seventh houses, and the Moon is also conjoined with malefic planets, and these are not aspected by benefic planets, then death (mṛtyu) occurs quickly.

sanskrit: क्षीणे शशिनि लग्नस्थे पापैः केन्द्राष्टसंस्थितैः । यो जातो मृत्युमाप्नोति स विप्रेश न संशयः ॥१८॥
transliteration: kṣīṇe śaśini lagnasthe pāpaiḥ kendrāṣṭasaṃsthitaiḥ . yo jāto mṛtyumāpnoti sa vipreśa na saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: kṣīṇe śaśini lagna-sthe pāpaiḥ kendrāṣṭasaṃsthitaiḥyaḥ jātaḥ mṛtyum āpnoti sa vipreśa na saṃśayaḥ
english: O best of Brahmins, if a person is born when the Moon is waning and located in the first house (lagna), and malefic planets are situated in the quadrant (kendra) and eighth houses, that person undoubtedly attains death (mṛtyu).

sanskrit: पापयोर्मध्यगश्चन्द्रो लग्नाष्टान्तिमसप्तमः । अचिरान्मृत्युमाप्नोति यो जातः स शिशुस्तदा ॥१९॥
transliteration: pāpayormadhyagaścandro lagnāṣṭāntimasaptamaḥ . acirānmṛtyumāpnoti yo jātaḥ sa śiśustadā.
separated_sandhi: pāpayoḥ madhyagaḥ candraḥ lagna-aṣṭa-antima-saptamaḥacirāt mṛtyum āpnoti yaḥ jātaḥ sa śiśuḥ tadā
