english: If the Moon is situated between two malefic planets and is also located in the first (lagna), eighth, twelfth (antima), or seventh house, then the infant who is born under such conditions quickly attains death (mṛtyu).

sanskrit: पापद्वयमध्यगते चन्द्रे लग्नसमाश्रिते । सप्ताष्टमेन पापेन मात्रा सह मृतः शिशुः ॥२०॥
transliteration: pāpadvayamadhyagate candre lagnasamāśrite . saptāṣṭamena pāpena mātrā saha mṛtaḥ śiśuḥ.
separated_sandhi: pāpadvayamadhyagate candre lagna-samāśritesapta-aṣṭamena pāpena mātrā saha mṛtaḥ śiśuḥ
english: When the Moon is situated between two malefic planets and also located in the first house (lagna), and if there is a malefic planet in the seventh or eighth house, then the infant dies along with the mother.

sanskrit: शनैश्चरार्कभौमेषु रिष्फधर्माष्टमेषु च । शभैरवीक्ष्यमाणेषु यो जातो निधनंगतः ॥२१॥
transliteration: śanaiścarārkabhaumeṣu riṣphadharmāṣṭameṣu ca . śabhairavīkṣyamāṇeṣu yo jāto nidhanaṃgataḥ.
separated_sandhi: śanaiścara-arka-bhaumeṣu riṣpha-dharma-aṣṭameṣuca śubhaiḥ avīkṣyamāṇeṣu yaḥ jātaḥ nidhanam gataḥ
english: If Saturn, the Sun, and Mars are situated in the twelfth (riṣpha), ninth (dharma), and eighth houses respectively, and are unaspected by benefic planets, then the one who is born under such circumstances attains death (nidhana).

sanskrit: यद्द्रेष्काणे च यामित्रे यस्य स्याद्दारुणो ग्रहः । क्षीणचन्द्रो विलग्नस्थः सद्यो हरति जीवतम् ॥२२॥
transliteration: yaddreṣkāṇe ca yāmitre yasya syāddāruṇo grahaḥ . kṣīṇacandro vilagnasthaḥ sadyo harati jīvatam.
separated_sandhi: yat dreṣkāṇe ca yāmitre yasya syāt dāruṇaḥ grahaḥkṣīṇacandraḥ vilagnasthaḥ sadyaḥ harati jīvatam
english: If a malefic planet is situated in the dreṣkāṇa and also in the seventh house, and a debilitated (waning) Moon is in the ascendant, it immediately takes away the life of that person.

sanskrit: आपोक्लिमस्थिताः सर्वे ग्रहा बलविवर्जिताः । षण्मासं व द्विमासं व तस्यायुः समुदाहृतम् ॥२३॥
transliteration: āpoklimasthitāḥ sarve grahā balavivarjitāḥ . ṣaṇmāsaṃ va dvimāsaṃ va tasyāyuḥ samudāhṛtam.
separated_sandhi: āpoklimasthitāḥ sarve grahāḥ balavivarjitāḥṣaṇmāsam va dvimāsam va tasya āyuḥ samudāhṛtam
english: If all planets are situated in apoklima houses (3rd, 6th, 9th, and 12th) and are devoid of strength, then the person's lifespan is declared to be either six months or two months.

sanskrit: त्रिभिः पापग्रहैः सूतौ चन्द्रमा यदि दृश्यते । मातृनाशो भवेत्तस्य शुभर्दृष्टे शुभं वदेत्/ ॥२४॥
transliteration: tribhiḥ pāpagrahaiḥ sūtau candramā yadi dṛśyate . mātṛnāśo bhavettasya śubhardṛṣṭe śubhaṃ vadet/.
separated_sandhi: tribhiḥ pāpagrahaiḥ sūtau candramāḥ yadi dṛśyatemātṛnāśaḥ bhavet tasya śubhaiḥ dṛṣṭe śubham vadet
english: If, at the time of birth, the Moon is aspected by three malefic planets, then there will be a loss of the mother for that native. However, if the Moon is aspected by benefic planets, one should predict auspicious results.

sanskrit: धने राहुर्बुधः शुक्रः सौरिः सूर्यो यदा स्थितः । तस्य मातुर्भवेन्मृत्युर्मृते पितरि जायते ॥२५॥
transliteration: dhane rāhurbudhaḥ śukraḥ sauriḥ sūryo yadā sthitaḥ . tasya māturbhavenmṛtyurmṛte pitari jāyate.
separated_sandhi: dhane rāhuḥ budhaḥ śukraḥ sauriḥ sūryaḥ yadāsthitaḥ tasya mātuḥ bhavet mṛtyuḥ mṛte pitari jāyate
english: If Rāhu, Mercury, Venus, Saturn, and the Sun are situated in the second house, then the native's mother will die after his father's demise.

sanskrit: पापात्सप्तमरन्ध्रस्थे चन्द्रे पापसमन्विते । बलिभिः पापकैर्दृष्टे जातो भवति मातृहा ॥२६॥
transliteration: pāpātsaptamarandhrasthe candre pāpasamanvite . balibhiḥ pāpakairdṛṣṭe jāto bhavati mātṛhā.
separated_sandhi: pāpāt saptamarandhrasthe candre pāpasamanvitebalibhiḥ pāpakaiḥ dṛṣṭe jātaḥ bhavati mātṛhā
english: When the Moon is situated in the seventh or eighth house from a malefic planet, and is conjoined with a malefic, and is aspected by powerful malefic planets, the native becomes a matricide (killer of his mother).

sanskrit: उच्चस्थो वाऽथ नीचस्थः सप्तमस्थो यदारविः । पानहीनो भवेद्बाल अजाक्षीरेण जीवति ॥२७॥
transliteration: uccastho vā'tha nīcasthaḥ saptamastho yadāraviḥ . pānahīno bhavedbāla ajākṣīreṇa jīvati.
separated_sandhi: uccasthaḥ vā atha nīcasthaḥ saptamasthaḥ yadāraviḥ pānahīnaḥ bhavet bālaḥ ajākṣīreṇa jīvati
english: When the Sun is either exalted, debilitated, or situated in the seventh house, the child will be deprived of milk and will survive by drinking goat's milk.

sanskrit: चन्द्राच्चतुर्थगः पापो रिपुक्षेत्रे यदा भवेत् । तदा मातृवधं कुर्यात् केन्द्रे यदि शुभो न चेत् ॥२८॥
transliteration: candrāccaturthagaḥ pāpo ripukṣetre yadā bhavet . tadā mātṛvadhaṃ kuryāt kendre yadi śubho na cet.
separated_sandhi: candrāt caturthagaḥ pāpaḥ ripukṣetre yadā bhavettadā mātṛvadhaṃ kuryāt kendre yadi śubhaḥ na cet
english: When a malefic planet is situated in the fourth house from the Moon and is in an enemy's sign, then it causes the death of the mother, particularly if there is no benefic planet in a kendra house.

sanskrit: द्वादशे रिपुभावे च यदा पापग्रहो भवेत् । तदा मातुर्भयं विद्याच्चतुर्थे दशमे पितुः ॥२९॥
transliteration: dvādaśe ripubhāve ca yadā pāpagraho bhavet . tadā māturbhayaṃ vidyāccaturthe daśame pituḥ.
separated_sandhi: dvādaśe ripubhāve ca yadā pāpagrahaḥ bhavettadā māturbhayaṃ vidyāt caturthe daśame pituḥ
english: When a malefic planet is situated in the twelfth house and also in the sixth house (ripubhāva), then one should understand that there is danger to the mother. If it is in the fourth or tenth house, it indicates danger to the father.

sanskrit: लग्ने क्रूरो व्यये क्रूरो धने सौम्यस्तथैव च । सप्तमे भवने क्रूरः परिवारक्षयंकरः ॥३०॥
transliteration: lagne krūro vyaye krūro dhane saumyastathaiva ca . saptame bhavane krūraḥ parivārakṣayaṃkaraḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagne krūraḥ vyaye krūraḥ dhane saumyaḥ tathāeva ca saptame bhavane krūraḥ parivārakṣayaṃkaraḥ
english: If a malefic planet is in the ascendant (lagna), another malefic planet is in the twelfth house (vyaya), a benefic planet is in the second house (dhana), and similarly a malefic planet is in the seventh house, then this configuration leads to the destruction of the family.

sanskrit: लग्नस्थे च गुरौ सौरौ धने राहौ तृतीयगे । इति चेञ्जन्मकाले स्यान्माता तस्य न जीवति ॥३१॥
transliteration: lagnasthe ca gurau saurau dhane rāhau tṛtīyage . iti ceñjanmakāle syānmātā tasya na jīvati.
separated_sandhi: lagnasthe ca gurau saurau dhane rāhau tṛtīyageiti cet janmakāle syāt mātā tasya na jīvati
english: If, at the time of birth (janmakāla), Jupiter and Saturn are both in the ascendant (lagna), Rahu is in the second house (dhana), and a planet is in the third house, then his mother does not live.

sanskrit: क्षीणचन्द्रात्त्रिकोणस्थैः पापैः सौम्यविवर्जितैः । माता परित्यजेद्बलं षण्मासाच्च न संशयः ॥३२॥
transliteration: kṣīṇacandrāttrikoṇasthaiḥ pāpaiḥ saumyavivarjitaiḥ . mātā parityajedbalaṃ ṣaṇmāsācca na saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: kṣīṇacandrāt trikoṇasthāiḥ pāpaiḥ saumyavivarjitāiḥmātā parityajet bālam ṣaṇmāsāt ca na saṃśayaḥ
english: If malefic planets, devoid of any benefic influence, are situated in trinal houses from a weak Moon, the mother will undoubtedly abandon the child within six months.

sanskrit: एकांशकस्थौ मन्दारौ यत्र कुत्रस्थितौ यदा । शशिकेन्द्रगतौ तौ वा द्विमातृभ्यां न जीवति ॥३३॥
transliteration: ekāṃśakasthau mandārau yatra kutrasthitau yadā . śaśikendragatau tau vā dvimātṛbhyāṃ na jīvati.
separated_sandhi: ekāṃśakasthāu mandārāu yatra kutrasthitāu yadāśaśikendragatāu tāu vā dvimātṛbhyām na jīvati
english: If Saturn and Mars are situated in the same Navamsha, wherever they may be placed in the main chart, or if both of them are in an angular house (Kendra) from the Moon, the native born of two mothers will not survive.

sanskrit: लग्ने सन्दो मदे भौमः षष्ठस्थाने च चन्द्रमाः । इति चेज्जन्मकाले स्यात् पिता तस्य न जीवति ॥३४॥
transliteration: lagne sando made bhaumaḥ ṣaṣṭhasthāne ca candramāḥ . iti cejjanmakāle syāt pitā tasya na jīvati.
separated_sandhi: lagne sandaḥ made bhaumaḥ ṣaṣṭhasthāne ca candramāḥiti cet janmakāle syāt pitā tasya na jīvati
english: If, at the time of birth, Saturn is in the Ascendant, Mars is in the seventh house, and the Moon is in the sixth house, then the father of that native will not survive.

sanskrit: लग्ने जीवो धने मन्दरविभौमबुधास्तथा । विवाहसमये तस्य बालस्य म्रियते पिता ॥३५॥
transliteration: lagne jīvo dhane mandaravibhaumabudhāstathā . vivāhasamaye tasya bālasya mriyate pitā.
separated_sandhi: lagne jīvaḥ dhane mandaravibhaumabudhāḥtathā vivāhasamaye tasya bālasya mriyate pitā
english: If Jupiter is in the Ascendant, and Saturn, the Sun, Mars, and Mercury are in the second house, then the father of that child will die at the time of the child's marriage.

sanskrit: सूर्यः पापेन संयुक्तो ह्यथवा पापमध्यगः । सूर्यात् सप्तमगः पापस्तदा पितृवधो भवेत् ॥३६॥
transliteration: sūryaḥ pāpena saṃyukto hyathavā pāpamadhyagaḥ . sūryāt saptamagaḥ pāpastadā pitṛvadho bhavet.
separated_sandhi: sūryaḥ pāpena saṃyuktaḥ hi athavā pāpamadhyagaḥsūryāt saptamagaḥ pāpaḥ tadā pitṛvadhaḥ bhavet
english: If the Sun is conjoined with a malefic planet, or situated between two malefic planets, or if a malefic planet is in the seventh house from the Sun, then the father will die.

sanskrit: सप्तमे भवने सूर्यः कर्मस्थो भूमनन्दनः । राहुर्व्यये च युस्यैव पिता कष्टेन जीवति ॥३७॥
transliteration: saptame bhavane sūryaḥ karmastho bhūmanandanaḥ . rāhurvyaye ca yusyaiva pitā kaṣṭena jīvati.
separated_sandhi: saptame bhavane sūryaḥ karmasthaḥ bhūmanandanaḥrāhuḥ vyaye ca yasya eva pitā kaṣṭena jīvati
english: If the Sun is in the seventh house, Mars (bhūmanandana) is situated in the tenth house (karma), and Rāhu is in the twelfth house (vyaya), then that person's father lives a life of difficulty.

sanskrit: दशमस्थो यदा भौमः शत्रुक्षेत्रसमास्रितः । म्रियते तस्य जातस्य पिता शीघ्रं न संशयः ॥३८॥
transliteration: daśamastho yadā bhaumaḥ śatrukṣetrasamāsritaḥ . mriyate tasya jātasya pitā śīghraṃ na saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: daśamasthaḥ yadā bhaumaḥ śatrukṣetrasamāśritaḥmriyate tasya jātasya pitā śīghram na saṃśayaḥ
english: If Mars (bhauma) is in the tenth house and situated in an enemy's sign, then the father of that person dies quickly, without a doubt.

sanskrit: रिपुस्थाने यदा चन्द्रो लग्नस्थाने शनैश्चरः । कुजश्च सप्तमे स्थाने पिता तस्य न जीवति ॥३९॥
transliteration: ripusthāne yadā candro lagnasthāne śanaiścaraḥ . kujaśca saptame sthāne pitā tasya na jīvati.
separated_sandhi: ripusthāne yadā candraḥ lagnasthāne śanaiścaraḥkujaḥ ca saptame sthāne pitā tasya na jīvati
english: If the Moon is in the sixth house (ripusthāna), Saturn (śanaiścara) is in the ascendant (lagna), and Mars (kuja) is in the seventh house, then his father does not survive.

sanskrit: भौमांशकस्थिते भानौ शनिना च निरीक्षिते । प्राग्जन्मनो निवृत्तिः स्यान्मृत्युर्वाऽपि शिशोः पितुः ॥४०॥
transliteration: bhaumāṃśakasthite bhānau śaninā ca nirīkṣite . prāgjanmano nivṛttiḥ syānmṛtyurvā'pi śiśoḥ pituḥ.
separated_sandhi: bhaumāṃśakasthite bhānau śaninā ca nirīkṣiteprāgjanmanaḥ nivṛttiḥ syāt mṛtyuḥ vā api śiśoḥ pituḥ
english: If the Sun (bhānu) is situated in a *bhauṃśaka* (a division of Mars) and is also aspected by Saturn (śani), then there would be a cessation of the effects of previous births or the death of the child's father.

sanskrit: चतुर्थे दशमे पापौ द्वादशे च यदा स्थितौ । पितरं मातरं हत्वा देशाद्देशान्तरं व्रजेत् ॥४१॥
transliteration: caturthe daśame pāpau dvādaśe ca yadā sthitau . pitaraṃ mātaraṃ hatvā deśāddeśāntaraṃ vrajet.
separated_sandhi: caturthe daśame pāpau dvādaśe ca yadā sthitaupitaram mātaram hatvā deśāt deśāntaram vrajet
english: If malefic planets are situated in the fourth, tenth, and twelfth houses, a person, having killed their father and mother, will wander from one country to another.

sanskrit: राहुजीवौ रिपुक्षेत्रे लग्ने वाऽथ चतुर्थके । त्रयोविंशतिमे वर्षे पुत्रस्तातं न पश्यति ॥४२॥
transliteration: rāhujīvau ripukṣetre lagne vā'tha caturthake . trayoviṃśatime varṣe putrastātaṃ na paśyati.
separated_sandhi: rāhujīvau ripukṣetre lagne vā atha caturthaketrayoviṃśatime varṣe putraḥ tātam na paśyati
english: If Rāhu and Jupiter are located in the sixth house (the house of enemies), or in the first house (ascendant), or in the fourth house, then in the twenty-third year, the son will not see his father (indicating the father's passing or separation).

sanskrit: भानुः पिता च जन्तूनां चन्द्रो माता तथैव च । पापदृष्टियुतो भानुः पापमध्यगतोऽपि वा ॥४३॥
transliteration: bhānuḥ pitā ca jantūnāṃ candro mātā tathaiva ca . pāpadṛṣṭiyuto bhānuḥ pāpamadhyagato'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: bhānuḥ pitā ca jantūnām candraḥ mātā tathā evaca pāpadṛṣṭiyutaḥ bhānuḥ pāpamadhyagataḥ api vā
english: The Sun (Bhānu) is the father of all beings, and the Moon (Candra) is similarly the mother. If the Sun (Bhānu) is aspected by malefics, or is situated between malefic planets...

sanskrit: पित्ररिष्टं विजानीयाच्छिशोर्जातस्य निश्चितम् । भानोः षष्ठष्टमर्क्षस्थैः पापैः सौम्यविवर्जितैः । सुखभावगतैर्वाऽपि पित्ररिष्टं विनिर्दिशेत् ॥४४॥
transliteration: pitrariṣṭaṃ vijānīyācchiśorjātasya niścitam . bhānoḥ ṣaṣṭhaṣṭamarkṣasthaiḥ pāpaiḥ saumyavivarjitaiḥ . sukhabhāvagatairvā'pi pitrariṣṭaṃ vinirdiśet.
separated_sandhi: pitrariṣṭam vijānīyāt śiśoḥ jātasyaniścitam bhānoḥ ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamarkṣasthaiḥpāpaiḥ saumyavivarjitaiḥ sukhabhāvagataihvā api pitrariṣṭam vinirdiśet
english: One should certainly know of danger to the father for the newborn child (if the previous conditions apply). Or, if malefic planets, devoid of benefic influence, are situated in the sixth or eighth houses from the Sun, or if they are located in the fourth house (house of happiness/comfort), then one should declare danger to the father.

sanskrit: एवं चन्द्रात् स्थितैः पापैर्मातु कष्टं विचारयेत् । बलाऽबलविवेकेन कष्टं वा मृत्युमादिशेत् ॥४५॥
transliteration: evaṃ candrāt sthitaiḥ pāpairmātu kaṣṭaṃ vicārayet . balā'balavivekena kaṣṭaṃ vā mṛtyumādiśet.
separated_sandhi: evam candrāt sthitaiḥ pāpaiḥ mātuḥ kaṣṭamvicārayet balābalavivekena kaṣṭam vā mṛtyum ādiśet
english: Similarly, by malefics situated from the Moon, one should consider suffering for the mother. By discerning the strength and weakness (of the planets/houses), one should declare either suffering or even death.

sanskrit: इत्यरिष्टं मया प्रोक्तं तद्भङ्गश्चापि कथ्यते । यत् समालोक्यं जातानां रिष्ताऽरिष्टं वदेद्बुधः ॥१॥
transliteration: ityariṣṭaṃ mayā proktaṃ tadbhaṅgaścāpi kathyate . yat samālokyaṃ jātānāṃ riṣtā'riṣṭaṃ vadedbudhaḥ.
separated_sandhi: iti ariṣṭam mayā proktam tat bhangaḥ ca api kathyateyat samālokyam jātānām riṣṭā ariṣṭam vadet budhaḥ
english: Thus, I have declared the indications of misfortune (ariṣṭa), and now its cancellation will also be explained. Having observed these points for those born, a wise astrologer should declare both auspicious and inauspicious outcomes.

sanskrit: एकोऽपि ज्ञार्यशुक्राणां लग्नात् केन्द्रगतो यदि । अरिष्टं निखिलं हन्ति तिमिरं भास्करो यथा ॥२॥
transliteration: eko'pi jñāryaśukrāṇāṃ lagnāt kendragato yadi . ariṣṭaṃ nikhilaṃ hanti timiraṃ bhāskaro yathā.
separated_sandhi: ekaḥ api jñāryaśukrāṇām lagnāt kendragataḥ yadiariṣṭam nikhilam hanti timiram bhāskaraḥ yathā
english: If even one of Mercury, Jupiter, or Venus is situated in an angular house (Kendra) from the ascendant, it completely destroys all misfortunes, just as the sun dispels darkness.

sanskrit: एक एव बली जीवो लग्नस्थो रिष्टसंचयम् । हन्ति पापक्षयं भक्त्या प्रणाम इव शूलिनः ॥३॥
transliteration: eka eva balī jīvo lagnastho riṣṭasaṃcayam . hanti pāpakṣayaṃ bhaktyā praṇāma iva śūlinaḥ.
separated_sandhi: ekaḥ eva balī jīvaḥ lagnasthaḥ riṣṭasaṃcayamhanti pāpakṣayam bhaktyā praṇāmaḥ iva śūlinaḥ
english: A single, powerful Jupiter (jīva) situated in the ascendant destroys the entire accumulation of misfortunes and the dissipation of evils, just as a salutation (praṇāma) offered with devotion (bhakti) to Śiva (Śūlin) removes sins.

sanskrit: एक एव विलग्नेशः केन्द्रसंस्थो बलान्वितः । अरिष्टं निखिलं हन्ति पिनाकी त्रिपुरं यथा ॥४॥
transliteration: eka eva vilagneśaḥ kendrasaṃstho balānvitaḥ . ariṣṭaṃ nikhilaṃ hanti pinākī tripuraṃ yathā.
separated_sandhi: ekaḥ eva vilagneśaḥ kendrasaṃsthaḥ balānvitaḥariṣṭam nikhilam hanti pinākī tripuram yathā
english: A single, powerful lord of the ascendant, if situated in an angular house (Kendra), destroys all misfortunes, just as Pinākin (Śiva) destroyed the three cities (Tripura).

sanskrit: शुक्लपक्षे क्षपाजन्म लग्ने सौम्यनिरीक्षिते । विपरीतं कृष्णपक्षे तथारिष्टविनाशनं ॥५॥
transliteration: śuklapakṣe kṣapājanma lagne saumyanirīkṣite . viparītaṃ kṛṣṇapakṣe tathāriṣṭavināśanaṃ.
separated_sandhi: śuklapakṣe kṣapājanma lagne saumyanirīkṣiteviparītam kṛṣṇapakṣe tathā ariṣṭavināśanam
english: If there is a night birth in the bright fortnight, with the ascendant aspected by benefics, it causes the destruction of misfortune. Similarly, the opposite condition in the dark fortnight (i.e., a day birth in the dark fortnight, with the ascendant aspected by benefics) also leads to the destruction of misfortune.

sanskrit: व्ययस्थाने यदा सूर्यस्तुलालग्ने तु जायते । जीवेत् स शतवर्षाणि दीर्घायुर्बालको भवेत् ॥६॥
transliteration: vyayasthāne yadā sūryastulālagne tu jāyate . jīvet sa śatavarṣāṇi dīrghāyurbālako bhavet.
separated_sandhi: vyayasthāne yadā sūryaḥ tulālagne tu jāyatejīvet sa śatavarṣāṇi dīrghāyuḥ bālakaḥ bhavet
english: When the Sun is in the twelfth house (vyayasthāna) and it is the Libra ascendant, the child lives for a hundred years and becomes long-lived.

sanskrit: गुरुभौमौ यदा युक्तौ गुरुदृऋटोऽथवा कुजः । हत्वाऽरिष्टमशेषं च जनन्याः शुभक्रद्भवेत् ॥७॥
transliteration: gurubhaumau yadā yuktau gurudṛṛṭo'thavā kujaḥ . hatvā'riṣṭamaśeṣaṃ ca jananyāḥ śubhakradbhavet.
separated_sandhi: gurubhaumau yadā yuktau gurudṛṣṭaḥ athavā kujaḥhatvā ariṣṭam aśeṣam ca jananyāḥ śubhakṛt bhavet
english: When Jupiter and Mars are conjoined, or when Mars is aspected by Jupiter, then, having destroyed all misfortune, it brings good fortune to the mother.

sanskrit: चतुर्थदशमे पापः सौम्यमध्ये यदा भवेत् । पितुः सौख्यकरो योगः शुभैः केन्द्रत्रिकोणगैः ॥८॥
transliteration: caturthadaśame pāpaḥ saumyamadhye yadā bhavet . pituḥ saukhyakaro yogaḥ śubhaiḥ kendratrikoṇagaiḥ.
separated_sandhi: caturthadaśame pāpaḥ saumyamadhye yadā bhavetpituḥ saukhyakaraḥ yogaḥ śubhaiḥ kendratrikoṇagaiḥ
english: When a malefic planet is situated in the fourth and tenth houses, (and is) hemmed between benefics, this planetary combination (yoga) brings happiness to the father, especially when benefics are in angular (kendra) and trinal (trikoṇa) houses.

sanskrit: सौम्यान्तरगतैः पापैः शुभैः केन्द्रत्रिकोणगैः । सद्यो नाशयतेऽरिष्टं तद्भावोत्थफलं न तत् ॥९॥
transliteration: saumyāntaragataiḥ pāpaiḥ śubhaiḥ kendratrikoṇagaiḥ . sadyo nāśayate'riṣṭaṃ tadbhāvotthaphalaṃ na tat.
separated_sandhi: saumyāntaragataih pāpaiḥ śubhaiḥ kendratrikoṇagaiḥsadyaḥ nāśayate ariṣṭam tatbhāvotthaphalam na tat
english: When malefics are hemmed between benefics, and benefics are situated in angular (kendra) and trinal (trikoṇa) houses, then misfortune is immediately destroyed, and the adverse results produced by that house (bhāva) do not manifest.

sanskrit: अरिष्टं तत्प्रभङ्गं च श्रुतं त्वत्तो मया मुने । कस्माद् भावात् फलं किं किं विचार्यमिति मे वद ॥१॥
transliteration: ariṣṭaṃ tatprabhaṅgaṃ ca śrutaṃ tvatto mayā mune . kasmād bhāvāt phalaṃ kiṃ kiṃ vicāryamiti me vada.
separated_sandhi: ariṣṭam tatprabhaṅgam ca śrutam tvattaḥ mayā munekasmāt bhāvāt phalam kim kim vicāryam iti me vada
english: O sage, I have heard from you about misfortunes and their destruction. Now, please tell me what specific results should be considered from which particular house (bhāva).

sanskrit: देहं रूपं च ज्ञानं च वर्णं चैव बलाबलम् । सुखं दुःखं स्वभावञ्च लग्नभावान्निरीक्षयेत् ॥२॥
transliteration: dehaṃ rūpaṃ ca jñānaṃ ca varṇaṃ caiva balābalam . sukhaṃ duḥkhaṃ svabhāvañca lagnabhāvānnirīkṣayet.
separated_sandhi: deham rūpam ca jñānam ca varṇam ca eva balābalamsukham duḥkham svabhāvam ca lagnabhāvāt nirīkṣayet
english: One should examine the body, physical appearance, knowledge, complexion, one's strengths and weaknesses, happiness, sorrow, and inherent nature from the Ascendant house (lagna-bhāva).

sanskrit: धनधान्यं कुटुम्बांश्च मृत्युजालममित्रकम् । धातुरत्नादिकं सर्वं धनस्थानान्निरीक्षयेत् ॥३॥
transliteration: dhanadhānyaṃ kuṭumbāṃśca mṛtyujālamamitrakam . dhāturatnādikaṃ sarvaṃ dhanasthānānnirīkṣayet.
separated_sandhi: dhanadhānyam kuṭumbān ca mṛtyujālam amitrakamdhātu ratna ādikam sarvam dhanasthānāt nirīkṣayet
english: One should examine wealth, grains, family members, the causes of death, enemies, metals, jewels, and all such matters from the second house (house of wealth).

sanskrit: विक्रमं भृत्यभ्रात्रादि चोपदेशप्रयाणकम् । पित्रोर्वै मरणं विज्ञो दुश्चिक्याच्च निरीक्षयेत् ॥४॥
transliteration: vikramaṃ bhṛtyabhrātrādi copadeśaprayāṇakam . pitrorvai maraṇaṃ vijño duścikyācca nirīkṣayet.
separated_sandhi: vikramam bhṛtyabhrātrādi ca upadeśaprayāṇakampitroḥ vai maraṇam vijñaḥ duścikyāt ca nirīkṣayet
english: The wise person should examine valor, courage, servants, younger siblings, instructions, journeys, and also the death of parents, all from the third house.

sanskrit: वाहनान्यथ बन्धूंश्च मातृसौख्यादिकान्यपि । निधि क्षेत्रं गृहं चापि चतुर्थात् परिचिन्तयेत् ॥५॥
transliteration: vāhanānyatha bandhūṃśca mātṛsaukhyādikānyapi . nidhi kṣetraṃ gṛhaṃ cāpi caturthāt paricintayet.
separated_sandhi: vāhanāni atha bandhūn ca mātṛsaukhyādikāni apinidhi kṣetram gṛham ca api caturthāt paricintayet
english: One should consider vehicles, relatives, the happiness of the mother, and all such matters, as well as hidden treasures, land, and houses, from the fourth house.

sanskrit: यन्त्रमन्त्रौ तथा विद्यां बुद्धेश्चैव प्रबन्धकम् । पुत्रराज्यापभ्रांशादीन् पश्येत् पुत्रालयाद् बुधः ॥६॥
transliteration: yantramantrau tathā vidyāṃ buddheścaiva prabandhakam . putrarājyāpabhrāṃśādīn paśyet putrālayād budhaḥ.
separated_sandhi: yantramantrau tathā vidyām buddheḥ ca eva prabandhakamputrarājyāpabhrāṃśādīn paśyet putrālayāt budhaḥ
english: The wise person should observe Yantras, Mantras, knowledge, intellectual management, children, kingship, downfall, and other such matters from the fifth house (the house of children).

sanskrit: मातुलान्तकशंकानां शत्रूंश्चैव व्रणादिकान् । सपत्नीमातरं चापि षष्ठभावान्निरीक्षयेत् ॥७॥
transliteration: mātulāntakaśaṃkānāṃ śatrūṃścaiva vraṇādikān . sapatnīmātaraṃ cāpi ṣaṣṭhabhāvānnirīkṣayet.
separated_sandhi: mātula antaka śaṅkānām śatrūn ca eva vraṇa ādikānsapatnīmātaram ca api ṣaṣṭhabhāvāt nirīkṣayet
english: One should examine maternal uncles, causes of death, fears (śaṅkā), enemies, wounds, and other such matters, as well as the stepmother, from the sixth house.

sanskrit: जायामध्वप्रयाणं च वाणिज्यं नष्टवीक्षणम् । मरणं च स्वदेहस्य जायाभावान्निरीक्षयेत् ॥८॥
transliteration: jāyāmadhvaprayāṇaṃ ca vāṇijyaṃ naṣṭavīkṣaṇam . maraṇaṃ ca svadehasya jāyābhāvānnirīkṣayet.
separated_sandhi: jāyām adhvaprayāṇam ca vāṇijyam naṣṭavīkṣaṇammaraṇam ca svadehasya jāyābhāvāt nirīkṣayet
english: One should examine matters related to the spouse, journeys, trade, the recovery of lost articles, and the death of one's own body from the seventh house (jāyābhāva).

sanskrit: आयु रणं रिपुं चापि दुर्गं मृतधनं तथा । गत्यनुकादिकं सर्वं पश्येद्रन्ध्राद्विचक्षणः ॥९॥
transliteration: āyu raṇaṃ ripuṃ cāpi durgaṃ mṛtadhanaṃ tathā . gatyanukādikaṃ sarvaṃ paśyedrandhrādvicakṣaṇaḥ.
separated_sandhi: āyu raṇam ripum ca api durgam mṛtadhananam tathāgatyanukādikam sarvam paśyet randhrāt vicakṣaṇaḥ
english: The wise astrologer should examine longevity, battles, enemies, fortifications, inherited wealth (mṛtadhana), and all matters related to one's ultimate state and subsequent developments (gati), from the eighth house (randhra).

sanskrit: भाग्यं श्यालं च धर्मं च भ्रातृपत्न्यादिकांस्तथा । तीर्थयात्रादिकं सर्वं धर्मस्थानान्निरीक्षयेत् ॥१०॥
transliteration: bhāgyaṃ śyālaṃ ca dharmaṃ ca bhrātṛpatnyādikāṃstathā . tīrthayātrādikaṃ sarvaṃ dharmasthānānnirīkṣayet.
separated_sandhi: bhāgyam śyālam ca dharmam ca bhrātṛpatnyādikāḥ tathātīrthayātrādikam sarvam dharmasthānāt nirīkṣayet
english: One should examine fortune, brothers-in-law, and one's intrinsic nature or natural law (dharma), as well as sisters-in-law (bhrātṛpatnī) and other similar relations, pilgrimages (tīrthayātrā), and all such matters from the ninth house (dharmasthāna).

sanskrit: राज्यं चाकाशंवृत्तिं च मानं चैव पितुस्तथा । प्रवासस्य ऋणस्यापि व्योमस्थानान्निरीक्षणम् ॥११॥
transliteration: rājyaṃ cākāśaṃvṛttiṃ ca mānaṃ caiva pitustathā . pravāsasya ṛṇasyāpi vyomasthānānnirīkṣaṇam.
separated_sandhi: rājyam ca ākāśavṛttim ca mānam ca eva pituḥ tathāpravāsasya ṛṇasya api vyomasthānāt nirīkṣaṇam
english: The observation of one's kingdom or government (rājya), livelihood or public reputation (ākāśavṛtti), honor, and likewise the father, as well as foreign residence (pravāsa) and debts (ṛṇa), should be made from the tenth house (vyomasthāna).

sanskrit: नानावस्तुभवस्यापि पुत्रजायादिकस्य च । आयं वृद्धिं पशूनां च भवस्थानान्निरीक्षणम् ॥१२॥
transliteration: nānāvastubhavasyāpi putrajāyādikasya ca . āyaṃ vṛddhiṃ paśūnāṃ ca bhavasthānānnirīkṣaṇam.
separated_sandhi: nānāvastubhavasya api putrajāyādikasya ca āyamvṛddhim paśūnām ca bhavasthānāt nirīkṣaṇam
english: The examination of various sources of gain (vastubhava), as well as matters concerning children (putra), spouses (jāyā), and others, along with income (āya), increase (vṛddhi), and livestock (paśu), should be done from the eleventh house (bhavasthāna).

sanskrit: व्ययं च वैरिवृत्तान्तरिःफमन्त्यादिकं तथा । व्ययाच्चैष हि ज्ञातव्यमिनि सर्वत्र धीमता ॥१३॥
transliteration: vyayaṃ ca vairivṛttāntariḥphamantyādikaṃ tathā . vyayāccaiṣa hi jñātavyamini sarvatra dhīmatā.
separated_sandhi: vyayam ca vairivṛttāntariḥpham antyādikam tathāvyayāt ca eṣa hi jñātavyam iti sarvatra dhīmatā
english: Expenditure (12th house), and matters concerning enemies (6th house), misfortunes (8th house), and losses (12th house), along with other similar concerns related to the last house (12th house) - all these should indeed be understood from the 12th house by the intelligent astrologer in all situations.

sanskrit: यो यो शुभैर्युतो दृष्टो भावो वा पतिदृष्टयुक् । युवा प्रवृद्धो राज्यस्थः कुमारो वाऽपि यत्पतिः ॥१४॥
transliteration: yo yo śubhairyuto dṛṣṭo bhāvo vā patidṛṣṭayuk . yuvā pravṛddho rājyasthaḥ kumāro vā'pi yatpatiḥ.
separated_sandhi: yaḥ yaḥ śubhaiḥ yutaḥ dṛṣṭaḥ bhāvaḥ vā patidṛṣṭiyukyuvā pravṛddhaḥ rājyasthaḥ kumāraḥ vā api yatpatiḥ
english: Whichever astrological house (bhāva) is conjoined with or aspected by auspicious planets, or is aspected by its own lord, and whose lord is in a strong state (yuvā), fully mature (pravṛddha), or well-placed (rājyastha), or even in a youthful state (kumāra)...

sanskrit: तदीक्षणवशात् तत्तद्भाबसौख्यं वदेद् बुधः । यद्यद् भावपतिर्नष्टस्त्रिकेशाद्यैश्च संयुतः ॥१५॥
transliteration: tadīkṣaṇavaśāt tattadbhābasaukhyaṃ vaded budhaḥ . yadyad bhāvapatirnaṣṭastrikeśādyaiśca saṃyutaḥ.
separated_sandhi: tatīkṣaṇavaśāt tattadbhāvasaukhyam vadet budhaḥyadyad bhāvapatis naṣṭaḥ trikeśādyaiḥ ca saṃyutaḥ
english: Due to the influence of such aspects and strengths, the wise astrologer should declare the prosperity of that particular house. Conversely, if whichever lord of a house is weakened and conjoined with the lords of the "trika" houses (6, 8, 12) and other similar influences...

sanskrit: भावं न वीक्षते सम्यक् सुप्तो वृद्धोमृतोऽथवा । पीडितो वाऽस्य भावस्य फलं नष्टं वदेद् ध्रुवम् ॥१६॥
transliteration: bhāvaṃ na vīkṣate samyak supto vṛddhomṛto'thavā . pīḍito vā'sya bhāvasya phalaṃ naṣṭaṃ vaded dhruvam.
separated_sandhi: bhāvam na vīkṣate samyak suptaḥ vṛddhaḥ mṛtaḥ athavāpīḍitaḥ vā asya bhāvasya phalam naṣṭam vadet dhruvam
english: If that house's lord does not properly aspect it, or if the lord is in a dormant (supta), aged (vṛddha), or dead (mṛta) state, or is afflicted, then the wise astrologer should certainly declare the results of this house to be lost.

sanskrit: सपापो देहपोऽष्टारिव्ययगो देहसौख्यहृत् । केन्द्रे कोणे स्थितोऽङ्गेशः सदा देहसुखं दिशेत् ॥१॥
transliteration: sapāpo dehapo'ṣṭārivyayago dehasaukhyahṛt . kendre koṇe sthito'ṅgeśaḥ sadā dehasukhaṃ diśet.
separated_sandhi: sapāpaḥ dehapaḥ aṣṭārivyayagaḥ dehasaukhyahṛtkendre koṇe sthitaḥ aṅgeśaḥ sadā dehasukham diśet
english: If the lord of the Ascendant (dehapati) is associated with malefic planets and located in the 8th, 6th, or 12th houses, it deprives one of bodily happiness. Conversely, if the lord of the Ascendant (aṅgeśa) is situated in an angular house (Kendra) or a trinal house (Kona), it always bestows bodily happiness.

sanskrit: लग्नपोऽस्तङ्गतो नीचे शत्रुभे रोगकृद् भवेत् । शुभः केन्द्रत्रिकोणस्था सर्वरोगहराः स्मृताः ॥२॥
transliteration: lagnapo'staṅgato nīce śatrubhe rogakṛd bhavet . śubhaḥ kendratrikoṇasthā sarvarogaharāḥ smṛtāḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagna-paḥ astaṅgataḥ nīce śatrubhe rogakṛt bhavetśubhaḥ kendra-trikoṇa-sthāḥ sarva-roga-harāḥ smṛtāḥ
english: If the lord of the ascendant is debilitated, fallen, or located in an enemy's sign, it will cause illness. However, (planets) situated in quadrant (kendra) or trine (trikoṇa) houses are considered removers of all diseases, and an auspicious planet (śubhaḥ) among them further enhances this effect.

sanskrit: लग्ने चन्द्रेऽथव क्रूरग्रहैर्दृष्टेऽथवा युते । शुभदृष्टिविहीने च जन्तोर्देहसुखं न हि ॥३॥
transliteration: lagne candre'thava krūragrahairdṛṣṭe'thavā yute . śubhadṛṣṭivihīne ca jantordehasukhaṃ na hi.
separated_sandhi: lagne candre athava krūra-grahaiḥ dṛṣṭe athavā yuteśubha-dṛṣṭi-vihīne ca jantoḥ deha-sukham na hi
english: If the Moon is in the ascendant and is aspected or conjoined by malefic planets, and is also devoid of benefic aspect, then indeed there is no bodily comfort or happiness for the native.

sanskrit: लग्ने सौम्ये सुरूपः स्यात् क्रूरेरूपविवर्जितः । सौम्यखेटैर्युते दृष्टे लग्ने देहसुखान्वितः ॥४॥
transliteration: lagne saumye surūpaḥ syāt krūrerūpavivarjitaḥ . saumyakheṭairyute dṛṣṭe lagne dehasukhānvitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagne saumye surūpaḥ syāt krūre rūpa-vivarjitaḥsaumya-kheṭaiḥ yute dṛṣṭe lagne deha-sukha-anvitaḥ
english: If a benefic planet is in the ascendant, the native will be handsome. If a malefic planet is in the ascendant, the native will be devoid of good form. If the ascendant itself is conjoined or aspected by benefic planets, the native will be endowed with bodily comfort.

sanskrit: लग्नेशो ज्ञा गुरुर्वाऽपि शुक्रो वा केन्द्रकोणगः । दीर्घायुर्धनवान् जातो बुद्धिमान् राजवल्लभः ॥५॥
transliteration: lagneśo jñā gururvā'pi śukro vā kendrakoṇagaḥ . dīrghāyurdhanavān jāto buddhimān rājavallabhaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagna-īśaḥ jñā guruḥ vā api śukraḥ vā kendra-koṇa-gaḥdīrgha-āyuḥ dhana-vān jātaḥ buddhi-mān rāja-vallabhaḥ
english: If the lord of the ascendant is Mercury, Jupiter, or Venus, and is situated in a quadrant (kendra) or trine (koṇa) house, the native born will be long-lived, wealthy, intelligent, and favored by rulers.

sanskrit: लग्नेशे चरराशिस्थे शुभग्रहनिरीक्षिते । कीर्तिश्रीमान् महाभोगी देहसौख्यसमन्वितः ॥६॥
transliteration: lagneśe cararāśisthe śubhagrahanirīkṣite . kīrtiśrīmān mahābhogī dehasaukhyasamanvitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagna-īśe cara-rāśi-sthe śubha-graha-nirīkṣitekīrti-śrī-mān mahā-bhogī deha-saukhya-samanvitaḥ
english: If the lord of the ascendant is in a movable (cara) sign and aspected by benefic planets, the native will be famous, prosperous, enjoy great luxuries, and be endowed with bodily comfort.

sanskrit: बुधो जीवोऽथवा शुक्रो लग्ने चन्द्रसमन्वितः । लग्नात् केन्द्रगतो वाऽपि राजलक्षणसंयुतः ॥७॥
transliteration: budho jīvo'thavā śukro lagne candrasamanvitaḥ . lagnāt kendragato vā'pi rājalakṣaṇasaṃyutaḥ.
separated_sandhi: budhaḥ jīvaḥ athavā śukraḥ lagne candrasamanvitaḥlagnāt kendragataḥ vā api rājalakṣaṇasaṃyutaḥ
english: If Mercury, Jupiter, or Venus is in the ascendant (lagna) along with the Moon, or if any of these planets are located in a Kendra house from the ascendant, then the person born possesses characteristics of a king.

sanskrit: ससौरे सकुजे वापि लग्ने मेषे वृषे हरौ । राश्यंशसदृशौ गात्रे स जातो नालविष्टितः ॥८॥
transliteration: sasaure sakuje vāpi lagne meṣe vṛṣe harau . rāśyaṃśasadṛśau gātre sa jāto nālaviṣṭitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: sasauraḥ sakujaḥ vā api lagne meṣe vṛṣe haraurāśyaṃśasadṛśau gātre sa jātaḥ na ālavisṭitaḥ
english: If the ascendant (lagna) is Aries (Meṣa), Taurus (Vṛṣa), or Leo (Hari) and it contains Saturn or Mars, then the physical body resembles the characteristics of that sign and its subdivisions (aṃśa), and the person is born without the umbilical cord wrapped around them.

sanskrit: चतुष्पदगतो भानुः परे वीर्यसमन्विताः । द्विस्वभावगता जातौ यमलाविति निर्दिशेत् ॥९॥
transliteration: catuṣpadagato bhānuḥ pare vīryasamanvitāḥ . dvisvabhāvagatā jātau yamalāviti nirdiśet.
separated_sandhi: catuṣpadagataḥ bhānuḥ pare vīryasamanvitāḥdvisvabhāvagatā jātau yamalau iti nirdiśet
english: If the Sun is located in a quadruped sign, and other planets are strong, and the ascendant (lagna) is a dual sign at the time of birth, then one should predict twins.

sanskrit: रवौन्दू एकभावस्थावेकंशकसमन्वितौ । त्रिमात्रा च थिभिर्मासैः पित्रा भ्रात्रा च पोषितः ॥१०॥
transliteration: ravaundū ekabhāvasthāvekaṃśakasamanvitau . trimātrā ca thibhirmāsaiḥ pitrā bhrātrā ca poṣitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: raviḥ induḥ ekabhāvasthau ekaṃśakasamanvitautrimātrā ca tribhiḥ māsaiḥ pitrā bhrātrā ca poṣitaḥ
english: If the Sun and Moon are in the same house and associated with the same navamsha, then the child is nourished by the father and brother for three months.

sanskrit: एवमेव फलं वाच्यं चन्द्रादपि सदा बुधैः । अथ जातनरस्याङ्गे व्रणचिह्नादिकं ब्रुवे ॥११॥
transliteration: evameva phalaṃ vācyaṃ candrādapi sadā budhaiḥ . atha jātanarasyāṅge vraṇacihnādikaṃ bruve.
separated_sandhi: evam eva phalaṃ vācyaṃ candrāt api sadā budhaiḥatha jātanarasya aṅge vraṇacihnādikaṃ bruve
english: In the same manner, the wise should always declare the results considering the Moon (Candrāt) as well. Now, I shall describe the marks, scars, and such on the body of the born person.

sanskrit: शिरो नेत्रे तथ कर्णौ नासिके च कपोलकौ । हनूर्मुखं च लग्नाद्या तनावाद्यदृकाणके ॥१२॥
transliteration: śiro netre tatha karṇau nāsike ca kapolakau . hanūrmukhaṃ ca lagnādyā tanāvādyadṛkāṇake.
separated_sandhi: śiraḥ netre tathā karṇau nāsike ca kapolakauhanū mukhaṃ ca lagnādyā tanau ādya dṛkāṇake
english: The head, eyes, ears, nose, cheeks, jaw, and mouth are associated with the first decanate (dṛkāṇa) of the ascendant (lagna) or the first house.

sanskrit: मध्यद्रेष्काणगे लग्ने कण्ठोंऽसौ च भुजौ तथा । पार्श्वे च हृदये क्रोडे नाभिश्चेति यथाक्रमम् ॥१३॥
transliteration: madhyadreṣkāṇage lagne kaṇṭhoṃ'sau ca bhujau tathā . pārśve ca hṛdaye kroḍe nābhiśceti yathākramam.
separated_sandhi: madhyadreṣkāṇage lagne kaṇṭhaḥ aṃsau ca bhujau tathāpārśve ca hṛdaye kroḍe nābhiḥ ca iti yathākramam
english: When the ascendant (lagna) falls in the middle decanate (dṛkāṇa), then the neck, shoulders, arms, sides, heart, chest, and navel are designated in due order.

sanskrit: वस्तिर्लिङ्गगुदे मुष्कावूरू जानू च जंघके । पादश्चेत्युदितैर्वाममङ्गं ज्ञेयं तृतीयके ॥१४॥
transliteration: vastirliṅgagude muṣkāvūrū jānū ca jaṃghake . pādaścetyuditairvāmamaṅgaṃ jñeyaṃ tṛtīyake.
separated_sandhi: vastiḥ liṅgagude muṣkau ūrū jānū ca jaṃghakepādaḥ ca iti uditaiḥ vāmam aṅgaṃ jñeyaṃ tṛtīyake
english: The bladder, genitals, anus, testicles, thighs, knees, shanks, and feet - these body parts are understood to be on the left side, as mentioned for the third decanate (dṛkāṇa).

sanskrit: यस्मिन्नङ्गे स्थितः पापो व्रणं तत्र समादिशेत् । नियतं सबुधैः क्रूरैः सौम्यैर्लक्ष्म वदेद् बुधः ॥१५॥
transliteration: yasminnaṅge sthitaḥ pāpo vraṇaṃ tatra samādiśet . niyataṃ sabudhaiḥ krūraiḥ saumyairlakṣma vaded budhaḥ.
separated_sandhi: yasmin aṅge sthitaḥ pāpaḥ vraṇaṃ tatra samādiśetniyatam sabudhaiḥ krūraiḥ saumyaiḥ lakṣma vadet budhaḥ
english: If a malefic planet (pāpa) is situated in a specific limb (aṅga), one should predict a wound there. But when (the limb is influenced by) both malefics (krūra) and benefics (saumya), including Mercury (budha), then the learned (astrologer) should certainly predict a mark (lakṣma).

sanskrit: धनभावफलं वच्मि स्रृणु त्वं द्विजसत्तम । धनेशो धनभावस्थः केन्द्रकोणगतोऽपि वा ॥१॥
transliteration: dhanabhāvaphalaṃ vacmi srṛṇu tvaṃ dvijasattama . dhaneśo dhanabhāvasthaḥ kendrakoṇagato'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: dhanabhāvaphalaṃ vacmi sṛṇu tvaṃ dvijasattamadhaneśaḥ dhanabhāvasthaḥ kendrakoṇagataḥ api vā
english: O best among the twice-born (dvija), listen! I will now explain the results concerning the house of wealth (dhana bhāva). (This occurs) when the lord of wealth (dhaneśa) is situated in the house of wealth (dhana bhāva), or even if it is located in a quadrant (kendra) or a trine (koṇa).

sanskrit: धनवृद्धिकरो ज्ञेयस्त्रिकस्थो धनहानिकृत् । धनदश्च धने सौम्यः पापो धनविनाशकृत् ॥२॥
transliteration: dhanavṛddhikaro jñeyastrikastho dhanahānikṛt . dhanadaśca dhane saumyaḥ pāpo dhanavināśakṛt.
separated_sandhi: dhanavṛddhikaraḥ jñeyaḥ trikasthaḥ dhanahānikṛt| dhanadaḥ ca dhane saumyaḥ pāpaḥ dhanavināśakṛt
english: It should be understood that a planet which typically increases wealth, if situated in a *trika* house (6th, 8th, or 12th), causes a loss of wealth. Furthermore, a benefic planet in the second house (house of wealth) grants wealth, whereas a malefic planet causes the destruction of wealth.

sanskrit: धनाधिपो गुरुर्यस्य धनभावगतो भवेत् । भौमेन सहितो वाऽपि धनवान् स नरो भवेत् ॥३॥
transliteration: dhanādhipo gururyasya dhanabhāvagato bhavet . bhaumena sahito vā'pi dhanavān sa naro bhavet.
separated_sandhi: dhanādhipaḥ guruḥ yasya dhanabhāvagataḥ bhavet |bhaumena sahitaḥ vā api dhanavān sa naraḥ bhavet
english: That person becomes wealthy if, for them, the lord of the house of wealth (dhanādhipaḥ) is situated in the house of wealth (the second house), or if Jupiter (guru) is located there, or if the lord of wealth is conjoined with Mars.

sanskrit: धनेशे लाभभावस्थे लाभेशे वा धनं गते । तावुभौ केन्द्रकोणस्थौ धनवान् स नरो भवेत् ॥४॥
transliteration: dhaneśe lābhabhāvasthe lābheśe vā dhanaṃ gate . tāvubhau kendrakoṇasthau dhanavān sa naro bhavet.
separated_sandhi: dhaneśe lābhabhāvasthe lābheśe vā dhanaṃ gate |tau ubhau kendrakoṇasthau dhanavān sa naraḥ bhavet
english: If the lord of the second house (dhaneśa) is situated in the eleventh house (house of gain), or if the lord of the eleventh house (lābheśa) is located in the second house, and both these lords are positioned in either angular (kendra) or trinal (koṇa) houses, then that person becomes wealthy.

sanskrit: धनेशे केन्द्रराशिस्थे लाभेशे तत्त्रिकोणगे । गुरुशुक्रयुते दृष्टे धनलाभमुदीरयेत् ॥५॥
transliteration: dhaneśe kendrarāśisthe lābheśe tattrikoṇage . guruśukrayute dṛṣṭe dhanalābhamudīrayet.
separated_sandhi: dhaneśe kendrarāśisthe lābheśe tat trikoṇage| guruśukrayute dṛṣṭe dhanalābham udīrayet
english: If the lord of the second house (dhaneśa) is in an angular (kendra) house, and the lord of the eleventh house (lābheśa) is in a trinal (koṇa) house, and both are conjoined with or aspected by Jupiter (guru) and Venus (śukra), one should predict financial gain.

sanskrit: धनेशो रिपुभावस्थो लाभेशस्तद्गतो यदि । धनायौ पापयुक्तौ वा दृष्टौ निर्धन एव सः ॥६॥
transliteration: dhaneśo ripubhāvastho lābheśastadgato yadi . dhanāyau pāpayuktau vā dṛṣṭau nirdhana eva saḥ.
separated_sandhi: dhaneśaḥ ripubhāvasthaḥ lābheśaḥ tadgataḥ yadi |dhanāyau pāpayuktau vā dṛṣṭau nirdhanaḥ eva saḥ
english: If the lord of the second house (dhaneśa) is situated in the sixth house (house of enemies), and the lord of the eleventh house (lābheśa) is also located in that same (sixth) house, OR if both the lords of wealth and gain (dhana and āya) are conjoined with or aspected by malefic planets, then that person is indeed poor.

sanskrit: धनलाभाधिपावस्तौ पापग्रहसमन्वितौ । जन्मप्रभृतिदारिद्रं भिक्षान्नं लभते नरः ॥७॥
transliteration: dhanalābhādhipāvastau pāpagrahasamanvitau . janmaprabhṛtidāridraṃ bhikṣānnaṃ labhate naraḥ.
separated_sandhi: dhanalābhādhipau astau pāpagrahasamanvitaujanmaprabhṛtidāridram bhikṣānnam labhate naraḥ
english: If the lords of the houses of wealth and gains are debilitated or combust and conjoined with malefic planets, a person will experience poverty from birth and subsist on alms.

sanskrit: षष्ठेऽष्टमे व्यये वाऽपि धनलाभाधिपौ यदि । लाभे कुजोधने राहू राजदण्डाद् धनक्षयः ॥८॥
transliteration: ṣaṣṭhe'ṣṭame vyaye vā'pi dhanalābhādhipau yadi . lābhe kujodhane rāhū rājadaṇḍād dhanakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: ṣaṣṭhe aṣṭame vyaye vā api dhanalābhādhipau yadilābhe kujaḥ dhane rāhū rājadaṇḍāt dhanakṣayaḥ
english: If the lords of the houses of wealth and gains are situated in the 6th, 8th, or 12th houses, and if Mars is in the house of gains (11th) while Rahu is in the house of wealth (2nd), then there will be a loss of wealth due to royal or government punishment.

sanskrit: लाभे जीवे धने शुक्रे धनेशे शुभसंयुते । व्यये च शुभसंयुक्ते धर्मकार्ये धनव्ययः ॥९॥
transliteration: lābhe jīve dhane śukre dhaneśe śubhasaṃyute . vyaye ca śubhasaṃyukte dharmakārye dhanavyayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lābhe jīve dhane śukre dhaneśe śubhasaṃyutevyaye ca śubhasaṃyukte dharmakārye dhanavyayaḥ
english: If Jupiter is in the house of gains (11th) and Venus is in the house of wealth (2nd), and if the lord of wealth (2nd house) is conjoined with benefics, and the lord of the house of expenditure (12th) is also conjoined with benefics, then there will be an expenditure of wealth for religious (dharma) and virtuous activities.

sanskrit: स्वभोच्चस्थे धनाधीशे जातको जनपोषकः । परोपकारी ख्यातश्च विज्ञेयो द्विजसत्तम ॥१०॥
transliteration: svabhoccasthe dhanādhīśe jātako janapoṣakaḥ . paropakārī khyātaśca vijñeyo dvijasattama.
separated_sandhi: svabhoccatsthe dhanādhīśe jātakaḥ janapoṣakaḥparopakārī khyātaḥ ca vijñeyaḥ dvijasattama
english: O best among the twice-born (dvija), if the lord of wealth (2nd house) is situated in its own sign or its sign of exaltation, the native is known to be a benefactor of people, helpful to others, and renowned.

sanskrit: स्थिते पारावतांशादौ धनेशे शुभसंयुते । तद्गृहे सर्वसम्पत्तिर्विनाऽयासेन जायते ॥११॥
transliteration: sthite pārāvatāṃśādau dhaneśe śubhasaṃyute . tadgṛhe sarvasampattirvinā'yāsena jāyate.
separated_sandhi: sthite pārāvatāṃśādau dhaneśe śubhasaṃyutetat gṛhe sarvasampattiḥ vinā āyāsena jāyate
english: When the lord of wealth (2nd house) is situated in a Pārāvatāṃśa (divisional chart) or similar auspicious divisional charts and is conjoined with benefics, all prosperity manifests in that person's household without any effort.

sanskrit: नेत्रेशे बलसंयुक्ते शोभनाक्षो भवेन्नरः । षष्ठाष्टमव्ययस्थे च नेत्रवैकल्यवान् भवेत् ॥१२॥
transliteration: netreśe balasaṃyukte śobhanākṣo bhavennaraḥ . ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyayasthe ca netravaikalyavān bhavet.
separated_sandhi: netreśe balasaṃyukte śobhanākṣaḥ bhavet naraḥṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyayasthe ca netravaikalyavān bhavet
english: If the lord of the eyes (netreśa) is strong, a person will have beautiful eyes. If it is situated in the sixth, eighth, or twelfth house, however, the person will suffer from eye defects.

sanskrit: धनेशे पापसंयुक्ते धने पापसमन्विते । पिशुनोऽसत्यवादी च वातव्याधिसमन्वितः ॥१३॥
transliteration: dhaneśe pāpasaṃyukte dhane pāpasamanvite . piśuno'satyavādī ca vātavyādhisamanvitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: dhaneśe pāpasaṃyukte dhane pāpasamanvitepiśunaḥ asatyavādī ca vātavyādhisamanvitaḥ
english: If the lord of wealth (dhaneśa), which rules the second house, is associated with malefic planets, and the second house itself is occupied by malefic planets, the person will be a slanderer, a liar, and afflicted by diseases caused by an imbalance of the wind (vāta) humor.

sanskrit: अथ विक्रमभावस्य फलं वक्ष्यामि भो द्विज । सहजे सौम्ययुग्दृष्टे भ्रातृमान् विक्रमी नरः ॥१॥
transliteration: atha vikramabhāvasya phalaṃ vakṣyāmi bho dvija . sahaje saumyayugdṛṣṭe bhrātṛmān vikramī naraḥ.
separated_sandhi: atha vikramabhāvasya phalam vakṣyāmi bho dvijasahaje saumyayugdṛṣṭe bhrātṛmān vikramī naraḥ
english: Now, O Brahmin (dvija), I will explain the results of the house of valor (vikramabhāva), meaning the third house. If the third house (sahaja) is conjoined with or aspected by benefic planets, the person will have brothers and be valiant.

sanskrit: सभौमो भ्रातृभावेशो भ्रातृभावं प्रपश्यति । भ्रात्र्/क्षेत्रगतो वाऽपि भ्रातृभावं विनिर्दिशेत् ॥२॥
transliteration: sabhaumo bhrātṛbhāveśo bhrātṛbhāvaṃ prapaśyati . bhrātr/kṣetragato vā'pi bhrātṛbhāvaṃ vinirdiśet.
separated_sandhi: sabhaumaḥ bhrātṛbhāveśaḥ bhrātṛbhāvam prapaśyatibhrātṛkṣetragataḥ vā api bhrātṛbhāvam vinirdiśet
english: If the lord of the house of brothers (bhrātṛbhāveśa) is conjoined with Mars (sabhauma) and aspects the house of brothers (bhrātṛbhāva), or if (Mars itself) is situated in the house of brothers (bhrātṛkṣetragata), then it indicates (the presence of) brothers.

sanskrit: पापयोगेन तौ पापक्षेत्रयोगेन वा पुनः । उत्पाट्य सहजान् सद्यो निहन्तरौ न संशयः ॥३॥
transliteration: pāpayogena tau pāpakṣetrayogena vā punaḥ . utpāṭya sahajān sadyo nihantarau na saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: pāpayogena tau pāpakṣetrayogena vā punaḥutpāṭya sahajān sadyaḥ nihantarau na saṃśayaḥ
english: If those two (the lord of the house of brothers and Mars) are afflicted by malefic conjunctions (pāpayogena) or malefic signs (pāpakṣetrayogena), then, without doubt, they immediately become the two who uproot and destroy (nihantarau) brothers (sahaja).

sanskrit: स्त्रीग्रहो भ्रातृभावेशः स्त्रीग्रहो भ्रातृभावगः । भगिनी स्यात् तथा भ्राता पुंगृहे पुंग्रहो यदि ॥४॥
transliteration: strīgraho bhrātṛbhāveśaḥ strīgraho bhrātṛbhāvagaḥ . bhaginī syāt tathā bhrātā puṃgṛhe puṃgraho yadi.
separated_sandhi: strīgrahaḥ bhrātṛbhāveśaḥ strīgrahaḥ bhrātṛbhāvagaḥbhaginī syāt tathā bhrātā puṃgṛhe puṃgrahaḥ yadi
english: If a feminine planet is the lord of the third house, and a feminine planet is also situated in the third house, then a sister is indicated. Similarly, if the third house is a masculine sign and a masculine planet is located there, then a brother is indicated.

sanskrit: मिश्रे मिश्रफलं वाच्यं बलाबलविनिर्णयात् । मृतौ कुजतृतीयेशौ सहोदरविनाशकौ ॥५॥
transliteration: miśre miśraphalaṃ vācyaṃ balābalavinirṇayāt . mṛtau kujatṛtīyeśau sahodaravināśakau.
separated_sandhi: miśre miśraphalam vācyam balābalavinirṇayātmṛtau kujatṛtīyeśau sahodaravināśakau
english: If there is a mixed influence of planets (on the third house and its lord), a mixed result regarding siblings should be declared, after determining the relative strengths and weaknesses of those planets. If indicating death or loss, Mars and the lord of the third house are considered destroyers of co-born siblings.

sanskrit: केन्द्रत्रिकोणगे वाऽपि स्वोच्चमित्रस्ववर्गगे । कारके सहजेशे या भ्रातृसौख्यं विनिर्दिशेत् ॥६॥
transliteration: kendratrikoṇage vā'pi svoccamitrasvavargage . kārake sahajeśe yā bhrātṛsaukhyaṃ vinirdiśet.
separated_sandhi: kendratrikoṇage vā api svoccamitrasvavargagekārake sahajeśe yā bhrātṛsaukhyam vinirdiśet
english: When the significator (for siblings) and the lord of the third house are situated in angular (kendra) or trine (trikona) houses, or are in their own sign of exaltation, a friendly sign, or their own divisional chart (varga), then one should predict happiness for siblings.

sanskrit: भ्रातृभे बुधसंयुक्ते तदीशे चन्द्रसंयुते । कारके मन्दसंयुक्ते भगिन्येकाग्रतो भवेत् ॥७॥
transliteration: bhrātṛbhe budhasaṃyukte tadīśe candrasaṃyute . kārake mandasaṃyukte bhaginyekāgrato bhavet.
separated_sandhi: bhrātṛbhe budhasaṃyukte tadīśe candrasaṃyutekārake mandasaṃyukte bhaginī ekā agrataḥ bhavet
english: If the third house is associated with Mercury, its lord (the lord of the third house) is associated with the Moon, and the significator (for siblings) is associated with Saturn, then a single sister will be born first.

sanskrit: पश्चात् सहोदरोऽप्येकस्तृतीयस्तु मृतो भवेत् । कारके राहुसंयुक्ते सहजेशे तु नीचगे ॥८॥
transliteration: paścāt sahodaro'pyekastṛtīyastu mṛto bhavet . kārake rāhusaṃyukte sahajeśe tu nīcage.
separated_sandhi: paścāt sahodaraḥ api ekaḥ tṛtīyaḥ tu mṛtaḥbhavet kārake rāhusaṃyukte sahajeśe tu nīcage
english: Subsequently, one brother will also be born, but a third sibling will die. This specific outcome occurs when the significator (for siblings) is associated with Rahu, and the lord of the third house is situated in its sign of debilitation.

sanskrit: पश्चात् सहोदराभावं पूर्वं तु तत्त्रयं वदेत् । भ्रातृस्थानाधिपे केन्द्रे कारके तत्त्रिकोणगे ॥९॥
transliteration: paścāt sahodarābhāvaṃ pūrvaṃ tu tattrayaṃ vadet . bhrātṛsthānādhipe kendre kārake tattrikoṇage.
separated_sandhi: paścāt sahodarābhāvam pūrvam tu tat-trayam vadetbhrātṛ-sthānādhipe kendre kārake tat-trikoṇage
english: First, one should predict three siblings, and later a deficiency of siblings. This occurs when the lord of the third house is in a Kendra (angular house) and the significator (karaka) for siblings is located in a Trikoṇa (trine house).

sanskrit: जीवेन सहिते चोच्चे ज्ञेया द्वादश सोदराः । तत्र ज्येष्ठद्वियं तद्वज्जातकाच्च तृतीयकम् ॥१०॥
transliteration: jīvena sahite cocce jñeyā dvādaśa sodarāḥ . tatra jyeṣṭhadviyaṃ tadvajjātakācca tṛtīyakam.
separated_sandhi: jīvena sahite ca ucche jñeyā dvādaśa sodarāḥtatra jyeṣṭha-dvayam tadvat jātakāt ca tṛtīyakam
english: When the (lord of the third house or significator for siblings) is accompanied by Jupiter (guru) and is in its exaltation sign, then twelve siblings are to be predicted. Among them, the elder two, and likewise the third (born child)...

sanskrit: सप्तमं नवमं चैव द्वादशं च मृतं वदेत् । शेषाः सहोदराः षड् वै भवेयुर्दीर्घजीवनाः ॥११॥
transliteration: saptamaṃ navamaṃ caiva dvādaśaṃ ca mṛtaṃ vadet . śeṣāḥ sahodarāḥ ṣaḍ vai bhaveyurdīrghajīvanāḥ.
separated_sandhi: saptamam navamam ca eva dvādaśam ca mṛtam vadetśeṣāḥ sahodarāḥ ṣaṭ vai bhaveyuḥ dīrgha-jīvanāḥ
english: Among them (the twelve predicted siblings), one should declare the elder two, and similarly the third (born child), as well as the seventh, ninth, and twelfth (born children), to be deceased. The remaining six siblings would indeed have long lives.

sanskrit: व्ययेशेन युतो भौमो गुरुणा सहितोऽपि वा । भ्रातृभावे स्थिते चन्द्रे सप्तसंख्यास्तु सोदराः ॥१२॥
transliteration: vyayeśena yuto bhaumo guruṇā sahito'pi vā . bhrātṛbhāve sthite candre saptasaṃkhyāstu sodarāḥ.
separated_sandhi: vyayeśena yutaḥ bhaumaḥ guruṇā sahitaḥ api vābhrātṛ-bhāve sthite candre sapta-saṅkhyāḥ tu sodarāḥ
english: If Mars (Bhauma) is conjoined with the lord of the twelfth house, or even accompanied by Jupiter (guru), and if the Moon (Chandra) is situated in the house of siblings (the third house), then seven siblings are predicted.

sanskrit: भ्रातृस्थाने शशियुते केवलं पुङ्ग्रहेक्षिते । सहजा भ्रातरो ज्ञेयाः शुक्रयुक्तेक्षितेऽन्यथा ॥१३॥
transliteration: bhrātṛsthāne śaśiyute kevalaṃ puṅgrahekṣite . sahajā bhrātaro jñeyāḥ śukrayuktekṣite'nyathā.
separated_sandhi: bhrātṛ-sthāne śaśi-yute kevalam puṅgraha-īkṣitesahajāḥ bhrātaraḥ jñeyāḥ śukra-yukta-īkṣite anyathā
english: If the house of siblings (the third house) is conjoined with the Moon (śaśi) and is aspected only by male planets (puṅgraha), then co-born brothers (male siblings) should be predicted. Otherwise, if it (the house of siblings) is conjoined with or aspected by Venus (śukra), (then female siblings are predicted).

sanskrit: अग्रे जातं रविर्हन्ति पृष्ठे जातं शनैश्चरः । अग्रजं पृष्ठजं हन्ति सहजस्थो धरासुतः ॥१४॥
transliteration: agre jātaṃ ravirhanti pṛṣṭhe jātaṃ śanaiścaraḥ . agrajaṃ pṛṣṭhajaṃ hanti sahajastho dharāsutaḥ.
separated_sandhi: agre jātam raviḥ hanti pṛṣṭhe jātam śanaiścaraḥagrajam pṛṣṭhajam hanti sahajasthaḥ dharāsutaḥ
english: The Sun (ravi) afflicts the elder sibling. Saturn (śanaiścara) afflicts the younger sibling. When Mars (dharāsuta) is located in the third house (sahaja), it afflicts both the elder (agraja) and the younger (pṛṣṭhaja) siblings.

sanskrit: एतेषां विप्र योगानां बलाबलविनिर्णयात् । भ्रातृणां भगिनीनां वा जातकस्य फलं वदेत् ॥१५॥
transliteration: eteṣāṃ vipra yogānāṃ balābalavinirṇayāt . bhrātṛṇāṃ bhaginīnāṃ vā jātakasya phalaṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: eteṣām vipra yogānām balābalavinirṇayātbhrātṛṇām bhaginīnām vā jātakasya phalam vadet
english: O Brahmin (vipra), from a clear assessment of the strengths and weaknesses of these planetary combinations (yoga), one should declare the results for the native concerning their brothers or sisters.

sanskrit: उक्तं तृतीयभावस्य फलं संक्षेपतो मया । सुखभावफलं चाऽथ कथयामि द्विजोत्तम ॥१॥
transliteration: uktaṃ tṛtīyabhāvasya phalaṃ saṃkṣepato mayā . sukhabhāvaphalaṃ cā'tha kathayāmi dvijottama.
separated_sandhi: uktam tṛtīyabhāvasya phalam saṃkṣepataḥ mayāsukhabhāvaphalam ca atha kathayāmi dvijottama
english: I have briefly explained the results pertaining to the third house. Now, O best of Brahmins (dvijottama), I will describe the results of the house of happiness.

sanskrit: सुखेशे सुखभावस्थे लग्नेशे तद्गतेऽपि वा । शुभदृष्टे च जातस्य पूर्णं गृहसुखं वदेत् ॥२॥
transliteration: sukheśe sukhabhāvasthe lagneśe tadgate'pi vā . śubhadṛṣṭe ca jātasya pūrṇaṃ gṛhasukhaṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: sukheśe sukhabhāvasthe lagneśe tat gate api vāśubhadṛṣṭe ca jātasya pūrṇam gṛhasukham vadet
english: If the lord of the house of happiness is situated in the house of happiness itself, or if the lord of the ascendant (lagna) is also located there, and (the house) is aspected by auspicious planets, then one should declare complete domestic happiness for the native.

sanskrit: स्वगेहे स्वांशके स्वोच्चे सुखस्थानाधिपो यदि । भूमियानगृहादीनां सुखं वाद्यभवं तथा ॥३॥
transliteration: svagehe svāṃśake svocce sukhasthānādhipo yadi . bhūmiyānagṛhādīnāṃ sukhaṃ vādyabhavaṃ tathā.
separated_sandhi: svagehe svāṃśake svocce sukhasthānādhipaḥ yadibhūmiyānagṛhādīnām sukham vādyabhavam tathā
english: If the lord of the house of happiness is in its own sign (sva-geha), its own navāṃśa (sva-aṃśaka), or its exaltation sign (sva-ucca), then the native will attain happiness regarding land, conveyances, and houses, as well as happiness derived from musical instruments.

sanskrit: कर्माधिपेन संयुक्ते केन्द्रे कोणे गृहाधिपे । विचित्रसौधप्राकारैर्मण्डितं तद्गृहं वदेत् ॥४॥
transliteration: karmādhipena saṃyukte kendre koṇe gṛhādhipe . vicitrasaudhaprākārairmaṇḍitaṃ tadgṛhaṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: karmādhipena saṃyukte kendre koṇe gṛhādhipevicitrasaudhaprākāraiḥ maṇḍitam tat gṛham vadet
english: When the lord of a house is conjoined with the lord of the 10th house (karma) in either an angular (kendra) or trinal (kona) house, one should predict that the native's dwelling will be adorned with wonderful mansions and fortified walls.

sanskrit: बन्धुस्थानेश्वरे सौम्ये शुभग्रहयुतेक्षिते । शशिजे लग्नसंयुक्ते बन्धुपूज्यो भवेन्नरः ॥५॥
transliteration: bandhusthāneśvare saumye śubhagrahayutekṣite . śaśije lagnasaṃyukte bandhupūjyo bhavennaraḥ.
separated_sandhi: bandhusthāneśvare saumye śubhagrahayutekṣiteśaśije lagnasaṃyukte bandhupūjyaḥ bhavet naraḥ
english: When the lord of the 4th house (bandhu sthāna) is a benefic planet, and is conjoined with or aspected by benefic planets, and when Mercury (śaśija) is conjoined with the ascendant, the native becomes respected by their relatives.

sanskrit: मातुःस्थाने शुभयुते तदीशे स्वोच्चराशिगे । कारके बलसंयुक्ते मातुर्दीर्घायुरादिशेत् ॥६॥
transliteration: mātuḥsthāne śubhayute tadīśe svoccarāśige . kārake balasaṃyukte māturdīrghāyurādiśet.
separated_sandhi: mātuḥsthāne śubhayute tadīśe svoccarāśigekārake balasaṃyukte mātuḥ dīrghāyuḥ ādiśet
english: When the 4th house (mother's house) is conjoined with benefic planets, and its lord is situated in its exaltation sign, and the significator (kāraka) for mother (Moon) is endowed with strength, one should predict a long life for the mother.

sanskrit: सुखेशे केन्द्रभावस्थे तथ केन्द्रस्थितो भृगुः । शशिजे स्वोच्चराशिस्थे मातुः पूर्णं सुखं वदेत् ॥७॥
transliteration: sukheśe kendrabhāvasthe tatha kendrasthito bhṛguḥ . śaśije svoccarāśisthe mātuḥ pūrṇaṃ sukhaṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: sukheśe kendrabhāvasthe tathā kendrasthitaḥ bhṛguḥśaśije svoccarāśisthe mātuḥ pūrṇam sukham vadet
english: When the lord of the 4th house (sukha) is situated in an angular (kendra) house, and Venus (bhṛgu) is also in an angular house, and Mercury (śaśija) is situated in its exaltation sign, one should predict complete happiness for the mother.

sanskrit: सुखे रवियुते मन्दे चन्द्रे भाग्यगते सति । लाभस्थानगतो भौमो गोमहिष्यादिलाभकृत् ॥८॥
transliteration: sukhe raviyute mande candre bhāgyagate sati . lābhasthānagato bhaumo gomahiṣyādilābhakṛt.
separated_sandhi: sukhe raviyute mande candre bhāgyagate satilābhasthānagataḥ bhaumaḥ gomahiṣyādilābhakṛt
english: When Saturn (manda) is conjoined with the Sun (ravi) in the 4th house (sukha), and the Moon (candra) is in the 9th house (bhāgya), and Mars (bhauma) is in the 11th house (lābha sthāna), the native acquires cows, buffaloes, and similar gains.

sanskrit: चरगेहसमायुक्तो सुखे तद्राशिनायके । षष्ठे व्यये स्थिते भौमे नरः प्राप्नोति मूकताम् ॥९॥
transliteration: caragehasamāyukto sukhe tadrāśināyake . ṣaṣṭhe vyaye sthite bhaume naraḥ prāpnoti mūkatām.
separated_sandhi: carageha-samāyuktaḥ sukhe tad-rāśi-nāyake ṣaṣṭhevyaye sthite bhaume naraḥ prāpnoti mūkatām
english: If the lord of the fourth house, associated with a movable sign, is situated in the fourth house, and Mars is located in the sixth or twelfth house, the person experiences muteness.

sanskrit: लग्नस्थानाधिपे सौम्ये सुखेशे नीचराशिगे । कारके व्ययभावस्थे सुखेशे लाभसङ्गते ॥१०॥
transliteration: lagnasthānādhipe saumye sukheśe nīcarāśige . kārake vyayabhāvasthe sukheśe lābhasaṅgate.
separated_sandhi: lagna-sthāna-adhipe saumye sukheśe nīca-rāśi-gekārake vyaya-bhāva-sthe sukheśe lābha-saṅgate
english: When the lord of the Ascendant is Mercury; when the lord of the fourth house is in a debilitated sign; when the significator (karaka) is situated in the twelfth house; or when the lord of the fourth house is conjoined with the lord of the eleventh house (house of gain).

sanskrit: द्वदशे वत्सरे प्राप्ते वाहनस्य सुखं वदेत् । वाहने सूर्यसंयुक्ते स्वोच्चे तद्भावनायके ॥११॥
transliteration: dvadaśe vatsare prāpte vāhanasya sukhaṃ vadet . vāhane sūryasaṃyukte svocce tadbhāvanāyake.
separated_sandhi: dvādaśe vatsare prāpte vāhanasya sukhaṃ vadetvāhane sūrya-saṃyukte svocce tad-bhāva-nāyake
english: One should predict comfort from vehicles in the twelfth year of life. This also occurs if the lord of the fourth house (house of vehicles) is situated in the fourth house itself, conjoined with the Sun, and placed in its own sign of exaltation.

sanskrit: शुक्रेण सण्युते वर्षे द्वात्रिंशे वाहनं भवेत् । कर्मेशेन युते बन्धुनाथे तुङ्गांशसंयुते ॥१२॥
transliteration: śukreṇa saṇyute varṣe dvātriṃśe vāhanaṃ bhavet . karmeśena yute bandhunāthe tuṅgāṃśasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: śukreṇa saṃyukte varṣe dvātriṃśe vāhanaṃ bhavetkarmeśena yute bandhu-nāthe tuṅgāṃśa-saṃyute
english: A vehicle will be acquired in the thirty-second year, if there is a connection with Venus. Additionally, when the lord of the fourth house is conjoined with the lord of the tenth house and associated with an exalted planetary division (aṃśa), a vehicle will also be acquired.

sanskrit: द्विचत्वारिंशके वर्षे नरो वाहनभाग् भवेत् । लाभेशे सुखराशिस्थे सुखेशे लाभसंयुते ॥१३॥
transliteration: dvicatvāriṃśake varṣe naro vāhanabhāg bhavet . lābheśe sukharāśisthe sukheśe lābhasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: dvi-catvāriṃśake varṣe naraḥ vāhana-bhāk bhavetlābheśe sukha-rāśi-sthe sukheśe lābha-saṃyute
english: A person will acquire a vehicle in the forty-second year of life. This also occurs when the lord of the eleventh house (house of gain) is situated in the fourth house (house of comforts/vehicles), or when the lord of the fourth house is conjoined with the lord of the eleventh house (house of gain).

sanskrit: द्वादशे वस्तरे प्राप्ते जातो वाहनभाग् भवेत् । शुभं शुभत्वे भावस्य पापत्वे फलमन्यथा ॥१४॥
transliteration: dvādaśe vastare prāpte jāto vāhanabhāg bhavet . śubhaṃ śubhatve bhāvasya pāpatve phalamanyathā.
separated_sandhi: dvādaśe vastare prāpte jātaḥ vāhanabhāg bhavetśubham śubhatve bhāvasya pāpatve phalam anyathā
english: Upon reaching the twelfth year, the native obtains a vehicle. If the astrological house (bhāva) is auspicious, the result is good; if it is inauspicious, the outcome is unfavorable.

sanskrit: अथ पञ्चमभावस्य कथयामि फलं द्विज । लग्नपे सुतभावस्थे सुतपे च सुते स्थिते ॥१॥
transliteration: atha pañcamabhāvasya kathayāmi phalaṃ dvija . lagnape sutabhāvasthe sutape ca sute sthite.
separated_sandhi: atha pañcamabhāvasya kathayāmi phalam dvijalagnape sutabhāvasthe sutape ca sute sthite
english: Now, O twice-born (dvija), I will explain the results concerning the fifth house. This is when the lord of the ascendant (lagna-pa) is in the house of children (suta-bhāva), and the lord of children (suta-pa) is also situated in the house of children (suta).

sanskrit: केन्द्रत्रिकोणसंस्थे वा पूर्णं पुत्रसुखं वदेत् । षष्ठाष्टमव्ययस्थे तु सुताधीशे त्वपुत्रता ॥२॥
transliteration: kendratrikoṇasaṃsthe vā pūrṇaṃ putrasukhaṃ vadet . ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyayasthe tu sutādhīśe tvaputratā.
separated_sandhi: kendratrikoṇasaṃsthe vā pūrṇam putrasukham vadetṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyayasthe tu sutādhīśe tu aputratā
english: Alternatively, if (the lord of children) is situated in an angular (kendra) or trinal (trikona) house, one should declare complete happiness regarding children. However, if the lord of children (suta-adhīśa) is situated in the sixth, eighth, or twelfth (vyaya) house, there will be childlessness.

sanskrit: सुतेशेस्तंगते वाऽपि पापाक्रान्ते च निर्बले । तदा न जायते पुत्रो जातो वा म्रियते ध्रुवम् ॥३॥
transliteration: suteśestaṃgate vā'pi pāpākrānte ca nirbale . tadā na jāyate putro jāto vā mriyate dhruvam.
separated_sandhi: suteśe astamgate vā api pāpākrānte ca nirbaletadā na jāyate putraḥ jātaḥ vā mriyate dhruvam
english: Furthermore, if the lord of children (suta-īśa) is combust, or afflicted by malefic planets, or weak, then a son is not born. If a son is born, he certainly dies.

sanskrit: षष्ठस्थाने सुताधीशे लग्नेशे कुजसंयुते । म्रियते प्रथमापत्यं काकबन्ध्या च गेहिनी ॥४॥
transliteration: ṣaṣṭhasthāne sutādhīśe lagneśe kujasaṃyute . mriyate prathamāpatyaṃ kākabandhyā ca gehinī.
separated_sandhi: ṣaṣṭhasthāne sutādhīśe lagneśe kujasaṃyutemriyate prathamāpatyam kākabandhyā ca gehinī
english: If the lord of children (suta-adhīśa) is in the sixth house, and the lord of the ascendant (lagna-īśa) is conjoined with Mars, then the first child dies, and the wife becomes barren like a crow (kāka-bandhyā).

sanskrit: सुताधीशो हि नीचस्थो व्ययषष्ठाष्टमस्थितः । काकबन्ध्या भवेन्नारी सुते केतुबुधौ यदि ॥५॥
transliteration: sutādhīśo hi nīcastho vyayaṣaṣṭhāṣṭamasthitaḥ . kākabandhyā bhavennārī sute ketubudhau yadi.
separated_sandhi: sutādhīśaḥ hi nīcasthaḥ vyayaṣaṣṭhāṣṭamasthitaḥkākabandhyā bhavet nārī sute ketubudhau yadi
english: If the lord of the fifth house is debilitated and located in the sixth, eighth, or twelfth house, and if Ketu and Mercury are situated in the fifth house, then the woman will bear only one child (kākabandhyā).

sanskrit: सुतेशो नीचगो यत्र सुतस्थान न पश्यति । तत्र सौरिबुधौ स्यातां काकबन्ध्यात्वमाप्नुयात् ॥६॥
transliteration: suteśo nīcago yatra sutasthāna na paśyati . tatra sauribudhau syātāṃ kākabandhyātvamāpnuyāt.
separated_sandhi: suteśaḥ nīcagaḥ yatra sutasthānam na paśyatitatra sauribudhau syātām kākabandhyātvam āpnuyāt
english: If the lord of the fifth house is debilitated and does not aspect the fifth house, and if Saturn and Mercury are situated there (in the fifth house), then the woman will become a "kākabandhyā" (one who bears only one child).

sanskrit: भाग्येशो मूर्तिवर्ती चेत् सुतेशो नीचगो यदि । सुते केतुबुधौ स्यातां सुतं कष्टाद् विनिर्दिशेत् ॥७॥
transliteration: bhāgyeśo mūrtivartī cet suteśo nīcago yadi . sute ketubudhau syātāṃ sutaṃ kaṣṭād vinirdiśet.
separated_sandhi: bhāgyeśaḥ mūrtivartī cet suteśaḥ nīcagaḥ yadisute ketubudhau syātām sutam kaṣṭāt vinirdiśet
english: If the lord of the ninth house is in the ascendant, and if the lord of the fifth house is debilitated, and if Ketu and Mercury are situated in the fifth house, then one should predict a child will be born with great difficulty.

sanskrit: षष्ठाष्टमव्ययस्थो वा नीचो वा शत्रुराशिगः । सुतेशश्च सुते तस्य कष्टाद् पुत्रं विनिर्दिशेत् ॥८॥
transliteration: ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyayastho vā nīco vā śatrurāśigaḥ . suteśaśca sute tasya kaṣṭād putraṃ vinirdiśet.
separated_sandhi: ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyayasthaḥ vā nīcaḥ vā śatrurāśigaḥsuteśaḥ ca sute tasya kaṣṭāt putram vinirdiśet
english: If the lord of the fifth house is located in the sixth, eighth, or twelfth house, or is debilitated, or is in an enemy sign; and if there is also an affliction in the fifth house, then one should predict a child with difficulty for that person.

sanskrit: पुत्रभावे बुधक्षेत्रे मन्दक्षेत्रेऽथवा पुनः । मन्दे मान्दियुतौ दृष्टे तदा दत्तादयः सुताः ॥९॥
transliteration: putrabhāve budhakṣetre mandakṣetre'thavā punaḥ . mande māndiyutau dṛṣṭe tadā dattādayaḥ sutāḥ.
separated_sandhi: putrabhāve budhakṣetre mandakṣetre athavā punaḥmande māndiyutau dṛṣṭe tadā dattādayaḥ sutāḥ
english: If the fifth house is either a sign of Mercury or a sign of Saturn, and if Saturn and Mandi are conjoined and (Saturn is) aspected, then one will have adopted children or children through other means.

sanskrit: रविचन्द्रौ यदैकस्थावेकांशकसमन्वितौ । त्रिमातृभिरसौ याद्वा द्विपित्राऽपि च पोषितः ॥१०॥
transliteration: ravicandrau yadaikasthāvekāṃśakasamanvitau . trimātṛbhirasau yādvā dvipitrā'pi ca poṣitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: ravicandrau yadā ekasthau ekāṃśakamanvitautrimātṛbhiḥ asau yādvā dvipitrā api ca poṣitaḥ
english: When the Sun and Moon are in the same sign and possess the same divisional position (aṃśaka), this individual is brought up by three mothers or even by two fathers.

sanskrit: पञ्चमे षड्ग्रहैर्युक्ते तदीशे व्ययराशिगे । लग्नेशेन्दू बलाढयौ चेत् तदा दत्तसुतोद्भवः ॥११॥
transliteration: pañcame ṣaḍgrahairyukte tadīśe vyayarāśige . lagneśendū balāḍhayau cet tadā dattasutodbhavaḥ.
separated_sandhi: pañcame ṣaḍgrahaiḥ yukte tadīśe vyayarāśigelagneśendū balāḍhyau cet tadā dattasutodbhavaḥ
english: If the fifth house is associated with six planets and its lord is situated in the twelfth house (vyaya), and if the lord of the ascendant and the Moon are strong, then the birth of an adopted son (datta suta) occurs.

sanskrit: सुते ज्ञजीवशुक्रैश्च सबलैरवलोकिते । भवन्ति बहवः पुत्राः सुतेशे हि बलान्विते ॥१२॥
transliteration: sute jñajīvaśukraiśca sabalairavalokite . bhavanti bahavaḥ putrāḥ suteśe hi balānvite.
separated_sandhi: sute jñajīvaśukraiḥ ca sabalaiḥ avalokitebhavanti bahavaḥ putrāḥ suteśe hi balānvite
english: Many sons are born if the fifth house is aspected by powerful Mercury, Jupiter, and Venus, and if the lord of the fifth house is also indeed strong.

sanskrit: सुतेशे चन्द्रसंयुक्ते तद्द्रेष्काणगतेऽपि वा । तदा हि कन्यकोत्पत्तिः प्रवदेद् दैवचिन्तकः ॥१३॥
transliteration: suteśe candrasaṃyukte taddreṣkāṇagate'pi vā . tadā hi kanyakotpattiḥ pravaded daivacintakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: suteśe candrasaṃyukte taddreṣkāṇagate api vātadā hi kanyakā utpattiḥ pravadet daivacintakaḥ
english: If the lord of the fifth house is conjoined with the Moon, or if it is situated in the same decanate (dreṣkāṇa) as the Moon, then the astrologer (daivācintaka) should certainly predict the birth of a daughter.

sanskrit: सुतेशे चरराशिस्थे राहुणा सहिते विधौ । पुत्रस्थानः गते मन्दे परजातं वदेच्छिशुम् ॥१४॥
transliteration: suteśe cararāśisthe rāhuṇā sahite vidhau . putrasthānaḥ gate mande parajātaṃ vadecchiśum.
separated_sandhi: suteśe cararāśisthe rāhuṇā sahite vidhauputrasthānaḥ gate mande parajātam vadet śiśum
english: If the lord of the fifth house is in a movable sign, and the Moon is conjoined with Rāhu, and Saturn is situated in the fifth house, then one should predict a child born of another (parajāta śiśu).

sanskrit: लग्नादष्टमगे चन्द्रे चन्द्रादष्टमगे गुरौ । पापग्रहैर्युते दृष्टे परजातो न संशयः ॥१५॥
transliteration: lagnādaṣṭamage candre candrādaṣṭamage gurau . pāpagrahairyute dṛṣṭe parajāto na saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagnāt aṣṭamage candre candrāt aṣṭamage guraupāpagrahaiḥ yute dṛṣṭe parajātaḥ na saṃśayaḥ
english: When the Moon is in the eighth house from the ascendant (lagna), and Jupiter is in the eighth house from the Moon, and if this combination is conjoined with or aspected by malefic planets, then, undoubtedly, the child is born of another person.

sanskrit: पुत्रस्थानाधिपे स्वोच्चे लग्नाद्वा द्वित्रिकोणगे । गुरुणा संयुते दृष्टे पुत्रभाग्यमुपैति सः ॥१६॥
transliteration: putrasthānādhipe svocce lagnādvā dvitrikoṇage . guruṇā saṃyute dṛṣṭe putrabhāgyamupaiti saḥ.
separated_sandhi: putrasthānādhipe svocce lagnāt vā dvitrikoṇageguruṇā saṃyute dṛṣṭe putrabhāgyam upaiti saḥ
english: When the lord of the fifth house (house of children) is in its own exaltation sign, or in the second, third, or a trine house (fifth or ninth) from the ascendant (lagna), and if it is conjoined with or aspected by Jupiter, that person attains the fortune of children.

sanskrit: त्रिचतुःपापसंयुक्ते सुते सौम्याविविर्जिते । सुतेशे नीचराशिस्थे नीचसंस्थौ भवेच्छिशुः ॥१७॥
transliteration: tricatuḥpāpasaṃyukte sute saumyāvivirjite . suteśe nīcarāśisthe nīcasaṃsthau bhavecchiśuḥ.
separated_sandhi: tricatuḥ pāpasaṃyukte sute saumyāvivirjitesuteśe nīcarāśisthe nīcasaṃsthau bhavet śiśuḥ
english: When the fifth house (house of children) is conjoined with three or four malefic planets, and not devoid of benefics, and the lord of the fifth house is situated in a debilitation sign, then the child will be of low status.

sanskrit: पुत्रस्थानं गते जीवे तदीशे भृगुसंयुते । द्वात्रिंशे च त्रयस्त्रिंशे वत्सरे पुत्रसंभवः ॥१८॥
transliteration: putrasthānaṃ gate jīve tadīśe bhṛgusaṃyute . dvātriṃśe ca trayastriṃśe vatsare putrasaṃbhavaḥ.
separated_sandhi: putrasthānam gate jīve tat īśe bhṛgusaṃyutedvātriṃśe ca trayastriṃśe vatsare putrasaṃbhavaḥ
english: When Jupiter is in the fifth house (house of children), and its lord is conjoined with Venus (Bhṛgu), the birth of a child occurs in the 32nd and 33rd year.

sanskrit: सुतेशे केन्द्रभावस्थे कारकेण समन्विते । षड्त्रिंशे त्रिंशदब्दे च पुत्रोत्पत्तिं विनिर्दिशेत् ॥१९॥
transliteration: suteśe kendrabhāvasthe kārakeṇa samanvite . ṣaḍtriṃśe triṃśadabde ca putrotpattiṃ vinirdiśet.
separated_sandhi: suteśe kendrabhāvasthe kārakeṇa samanvite ṣaṭtriṃśe triṃśat abde ca putrotpattim vinirdiśet
english: When the lord of the fifth house (house of children) is situated in an angular house (kendra bhāva) and conjoined with the significator (for children, Jupiter), one should predict the birth of a child in the 36th and 30th year.

sanskrit: लग्नाद् भाग्यगते जीवे जीवाद् भाग्यगते भृगौ । लग्नेशे भृगुयुक्ते वा चत्वारिंशे सुतं वदेत् ॥२०॥
transliteration: lagnād bhāgyagate jīve jīvād bhāgyagate bhṛgau . lagneśe bhṛguyukte vā catvāriṃśe sutaṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: lagnaāt bhāgyagate jīve jīvaāt bhāgyagate bhṛgaulagneśe bhṛguyukte vā catvāriṃśe sutam vadet
english: When Jupiter is situated in the ninth house from the Ascendant, and Venus is situated in the ninth house from Jupiter, or if the lord of the Ascendant is conjoined with Venus, one should predict the birth of a son in the fortieth year.

sanskrit: पुत्रस्थानं गते राहौ तदीशे पापसंयुते । नीचराशिगतो जीवो द्वात्रिंशे पुत्रमृत्युदः ॥२१॥
transliteration: putrasthānaṃ gate rāhau tadīśe pāpasaṃyute . nīcarāśigato jīvo dvātriṃśe putramṛtyudaḥ.
separated_sandhi: putrasthānam gate rāhau tat-īśe pāpasaṃyutenīcarāśigataḥ jīvaḥ dvātriṃśe putramṛtyudaḥ
english: If Rāhu is in the fifth house (the house of progeny), its lord is conjoined with a malefic planet, and Jupiter is debilitated, then this combination indicates the death of a son in the thirty-second year.

sanskrit: जीवात् पञ्चमगे पापे लग्नात् पञ्चमगेऽपि च । षड्त्रिंशे च त्रयस्त्रिंशे चत्वारिंशे सुतक्षयः ॥२२॥
transliteration: jīvāt pañcamage pāpe lagnāt pañcamage'pi ca . ṣaḍtriṃśe ca trayastriṃśe catvāriṃśe sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: jīvāt pañcamagate pāpe lagnāt pañcamagate api caṣaṭtriṃśe ca trayastriṃśe catvāriṃśe sutakṣayaḥ
english: If a malefic planet is in the fifth house from Jupiter, and also in the fifth house from the Ascendant, then the loss of a son is indicated in the thirty-sixth, thirty-third, or fortieth year.

sanskrit: लग्ने मान्दितमायुक्ते लग्नेशे नीचराशिगे । षड्पञ्चाशत्तमेऽब्दे च पुत्रशोकसमाकुकः ॥२३॥
transliteration: lagne mānditamāyukte lagneśe nīcarāśige . ṣaḍpañcāśattame'bde ca putraśokasamākukaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagne mānditam āyukte lagneśe nīcarāśigeṣaṭpañcāśattame abde ca putraśokasamākukaḥ
english: If the Ascendant is conjoined with Māndi, and the lord of the Ascendant is debilitated, then sorrow concerning a son will occur in the fifty-sixth year.

sanskrit: चतुर्थे पापसंयुक्ते षष्ठभावे तथैव हि । सुतेशे परमोच्चस्थे लग्नेशेन समन्विते ॥२४॥
transliteration: caturthe pāpasaṃyukte ṣaṣṭhabhāve tathaiva hi . suteśe paramoccasthe lagneśena samanvite.
separated_sandhi: caturthe pāpasaṃyute ṣaṣṭhabhāve tathā evahi suteśe paramoccaste lagneśena samanvite
english: When the fourth house is occupied by a malefic planet, and likewise the sixth house; and when the lord of the fifth house (house of progeny) is in its highest exaltation and conjoined with the lord of the Ascendant, (then a particular astrological prediction follows, which is not stated in this verse).

sanskrit: कारके शुभसंयुक्ते दशसंख्यास्तु सूनवः । परमोच्चगते जीवे धनेशे राहुसंयुते ॥२५॥
transliteration: kārake śubhasaṃyukte daśasaṃkhyāstu sūnavaḥ . paramoccagate jīve dhaneśe rāhusaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: kārake śubhasaṃyukte daśasaṃkhyāḥ tu sūnavaḥparamoccagate jīve dhaneśe rāhusaṃyute
english: When the significator for progeny is conjoined with benefics, there are indeed ten sons. Consider the conditions when Jupiter (jīva) is in its highest exaltation, and the lord of the second house is conjoined with Rahu.

sanskrit: भाग्येशे भाग्यसंयुक्ते संख्याता नव सूनवः । पुत्रभाग्यगते जीवे सुतेशे बलसंयुते ॥२६॥
transliteration: bhāgyeśe bhāgyasaṃyukte saṃkhyātā nava sūnavaḥ . putrabhāgyagate jīve suteśe balasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: bhāgyeśe bhāgyasaṃyukte saṃkhyātāḥ navasūnavaḥ putrabhāgagate jīve suteśe balasaṃyute
english: When the lord of the ninth house is conjoined with the ninth house, nine sons are stated. Consider the conditions when Jupiter (jīva) is situated in the fifth house, and the lord of the fifth house is endowed with strength.

sanskrit: धनेशे कर्मभावस्थे वसुसंख्यास्तु सूनवः । पञ्चमात् पञ्चमे मन्दे सुतस्थे च तदीश्वरे ॥२७॥
transliteration: dhaneśe karmabhāvasthe vasusaṃkhyāstu sūnavaḥ . pañcamāt pañcame mande sutasthe ca tadīśvare.
separated_sandhi: dhaneśe karmabhāvasthe vasusaṃkhyāḥ tu sūnavaḥpañcamāt pañcame mande sutasthe ca tadīśvare
english: When the lord of the second house is situated in the tenth house (karma), there are indeed eight sons. Consider the conditions when Saturn (manda) is in the ninth house (the fifth from the fifth), and the lord of the fifth house is situated in the fifth house.

sanskrit: सूनवः सप्तसंख्यश्च द्विगर्भे यमलौ वदेत् । वित्तेशे पञ्चमस्थाने सतस्थे च सुताधिपे ॥२८॥
transliteration: sūnavaḥ saptasaṃkhyaśca dvigarbhe yamalau vadet . vitteśe pañcamasthāne satasthe ca sutādhipe.
separated_sandhi: sūnavaḥ saptasaṃkhyaḥ ca dvigarbhe yamalau vadetvitteśe pañcamasthāne sutasthe ca sutādhipe
english: And seven sons are indicated; one should declare twins when there are two conceptions. Consider the conditions when the lord of the second house is in the fifth house, and the lord of the fifth house is situated in the fifth house.

sanskrit: जायन्ते षट् सुतास्तस्य तेषां च त्रिप्रजामृतिः । मन्दात् पञ्चमगे जीवे जीवात् पञ्चमगे शनौ ॥२९॥
transliteration: jāyante ṣaṭ sutāstasya teṣāṃ ca triprajāmṛtiḥ . mandāt pañcamage jīve jīvāt pañcamage śanau.
separated_sandhi: jāyante ṣaṭ sutāḥ tasya teṣām ca triprajāmṛtiḥmandāt pañcamage jīve jīvāt pañcamage śanau
english: Six sons are born to him, and among them, three offspring will die. Consider the conditions when Jupiter (jīva) is in the fifth house from Saturn (manda), and Saturn (śani) is in the fifth house from Jupiter (jīva).

sanskrit: सुतभे पापसंयुक्ते पुत्रमेकं विनिर्दिशेत् । पञ्चमे पापयुक्ते वा जीवात् पञ्चमगे शनौ ॥३०॥
transliteration: sutabhe pāpasaṃyukte putramekaṃ vinirdiśet . pañcame pāpayukte vā jīvāt pañcamage śanau.
separated_sandhi: sutabhe pāpasaṃyukte putram ekam vinirdiśetpañcame pāpayukte vā jīvāt pañcamage śanau
english: If the fifth house (sutabha) is conjoined with a malefic planet, or if Saturn is in the fifth house from Jupiter, one should predict only one son.

sanskrit: पत्न्यन्तरे पुत्रलाभं कलत्रत्रयभाग् भवेत् । पञ्चमे पापसंयुक्ते जीवात् पञ्चमगे शनौ ॥३१॥
transliteration: patnyantare putralābhaṃ kalatratrayabhāg bhavet . pañcame pāpasaṃyukte jīvāt pañcamage śanau.
separated_sandhi: patnī antare putralābham kalatratrayabhāk bhavetpañcame pāpasaṃyukte jīvāt pañcamage śanau
english: If the fifth house is conjoined with a malefic planet, or if Saturn is in the fifth house from Jupiter, there will be gain of a son from another wife, and the person will have three wives.

sanskrit: लग्नेशे धनभावस्थे सुतेशो भौमसंयुतः । जातं जातं शिशुंहन्ति दीर्घायुश्च स्वयं भवेत् ॥३२॥
transliteration: lagneśe dhanabhāvasthe suteśo bhaumasaṃyutaḥ . jātaṃ jātaṃ śiśuṃhanti dīrghāyuśca svayaṃ bhavet.
separated_sandhi: lagneśe dhanabhāvasthe suteśaḥ bhaumasaṃyutaḥjātam jātam śiśum hanti dīrghāyuḥ ca svayam bhavet
english: If the lord of the ascendant is situated in the house of wealth (dhanabhava), and the lord of the fifth house is conjoined with Mars, then every child born will die, but the native himself will be long-lived.

sanskrit: अथ विप्र फलं वक्ष्ये षष्ठभावसमुद्भवम् । देहे रोगव्रणाद्यं तत् श्रूयतामेकचेतसा ॥१॥
transliteration: atha vipra phalaṃ vakṣye ṣaṣṭhabhāvasamudbhavam . dehe rogavraṇādyaṃ tat śrūyatāmekacetasā.
separated_sandhi: atha vipra phalam vakṣye ṣaṣṭhabhāvasamudbhavamdehe rogavraṇādyam tat śrūyatām ekacetasā
english: Now, O Brahmin, I shall describe the results arising from the sixth house. Let that, which manifests as diseases, wounds, and so forth in the body, be heard with single-minded attention.

sanskrit: षष्ठाधिपः स्वगेहे वा देहे वाऽप्यष्टमे स्थितः । तदा व्रणा भवेद्देहे षष्ठराशिसमाश्रते ॥२॥
transliteration: ṣaṣṭhādhipaḥ svagehe vā dehe vā'pyaṣṭame sthitaḥ . tadā vraṇā bhaveddehe ṣaṣṭharāśisamāśrate.
separated_sandhi: ṣaṣṭhādhipaḥ svagehe vā dehe vā api aṣṭame sthitaḥtadā vraṇāḥ bhavet dehe ṣaṣṭharāśisamāśrite
english: If the lord of the sixth house is situated in his own house, or in the ascendant (deha), or even in the eighth house, then wounds will arise in the body in the part indicated by the sixth sign.

sanskrit: एवं पित्रादिभावेशास्तत्तत्कारकसंयुताः । व्रणाधिपयुताश्चापि षष्ठाष्टमयुता यदि ॥३॥
transliteration: evaṃ pitrādibhāveśāstattatkārakasaṃyutāḥ . vraṇādhipayutāścāpi ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamayutā yadi.
separated_sandhi: evam pitṛ-ādi-bhāva-īśāḥ tat-tat-kāraka-saṃyutāḥ |vraṇa-adhipa-yutāḥ ca api ṣaṣṭha-aṣṭama-yutāḥ yadi
english: Thus, if the lords of the houses representing father and others are associated with their respective significators (kārakas), and also with the lord of wounds, or if they are situated in the 6th or 8th house...

sanskrit: तेषामपि व्रणं वाच्यमादित्ये न शिरोव्रणम् । इन्दुना च मुखे कण्ठे भौमेन ज्ञेन नाभिषु ॥४॥
transliteration: teṣāmapi vraṇaṃ vācyamāditye na śirovraṇam . indunā ca mukhe kaṇṭhe bhaumena jñena nābhiṣu.
separated_sandhi: teṣām api vraṇam vācyam āditye na śiraḥ-vraṇam| indunā ca mukhe kaṇṭhe bhaumena jñena nābhiṣu
english: Then a wound (vraṇa) should be predicted for them. With the Sun (āditya), a wound (vraṇa) on the head should not be predicted. However, with the Moon (indu), a wound (vraṇa) on the face or throat; and with Mars (bhauma) or Mercury (jña), on the navel.

sanskrit: गुरुणा नासिकायां च भृगुणा नयने पदे । शनिना राहुणा कुक्षौ केतुना च तथा भवेत् ॥५॥
transliteration: guruṇā nāsikāyāṃ ca bhṛguṇā nayane pade . śaninā rāhuṇā kukṣau ketunā ca tathā bhavet.
separated_sandhi: guruṇā nāsikāyām ca bhṛguṇā nayane pade |śaninā rāhuṇā kukṣau ketunā ca tathā bhavet
