english: With Jupiter (guru), a wound (vraṇa) would occur on the nose; with Venus (bhṛgu), on the eyes and feet; and with Saturn (śani) or Rahu, on the abdomen (kukṣi); and similarly, with Ketu.

sanskrit: लग्नाधिपः कुजक्षेत्रे बुधभे यदि संस्थितः । यत्र कुत्र स्थितो ज्ञेन वीक्षितो मुखरुक्प्रदः ॥६॥
transliteration: lagnādhipaḥ kujakṣetre budhabhe yadi saṃsthitaḥ . yatra kutra sthito jñena vīkṣito mukharukpradaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagna-adhipaḥ kuja-kṣetre budha-bhe yadi saṃsthitaḥ| yatra kutra sthitaḥ jñena vīkṣitaḥ mukha-ruk-pradaḥ
english: If the lord of the ascendant (lagna) is situated in the sign of Mars (kuja-kṣetra) or the sign of Mercury (budha-bha), and wherever else it may be located, if aspected by Mercury (jña), it causes disease of the face.

sanskrit: लग्नाधिपौ कुजबुधौ चन्द्रेण यदि संयुतौ । राहुणा शनिना सार्द्धं कुष्ठं तत्र विनिर्दिशेत् ॥७॥
transliteration: lagnādhipau kujabudhau candreṇa yadi saṃyutau . rāhuṇā śaninā sārddhaṃ kuṣṭhaṃ tatra vinirdiśet.
separated_sandhi: lagna-adhipau kuja-budhau candreṇa yadi saṃyutau| rāhuṇā śaninā sārdham kuṣṭham tatra vinirdiśet
english: If Mars (kuja) and Mercury (budha), acting as the lords of the ascendant, are conjoined with the Moon (candra), Rahu, and Saturn (śani), then leprosy (kuṣṭha) should be predicted.

sanskrit: लग्नाधिपं विना लग्ने स्थितश्चेत्तमसा शशी । स्वेतकुष्ठं तदा कृष्णकुष्ठं च शनिना सह ॥८॥
transliteration: lagnādhipaṃ vinā lagne sthitaścettamasā śaśī . svetakuṣṭhaṃ tadā kṛṣṇakuṣṭhaṃ ca śaninā saha.
separated_sandhi: lagnādhipam vinā lagne sthitaḥ cet tamasā śaśīśvetakuṣṭham tadā kṛṣṇakuṣṭham ca śaninā saha
english: If the Moon (śaśin) is situated in the Lagna (ascendant) with Rahu (tamas) but without the Lagna lord, then white leprosy (śvetakuṣṭha) is indicated. If the Moon is with Saturn (śani), black leprosy (kṛṣṇakuṣṭha) is indicated.

sanskrit: कुजेन रक्तकुष्ठं स्यात्तत्तदेवं विचारयेत् । लग्ने षष्ठाष्टमाधोशौ रविणा यदि संयुतौ ॥९॥
transliteration: kujena raktakuṣṭhaṃ syāttattadevaṃ vicārayet . lagne ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamādhośau raviṇā yadi saṃyutau.
separated_sandhi: kujena raktakuṣṭham syāt tat tat evam vicārayetlagne ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamādhīśau raviṇā yadi saṃyutau
english: By Mars (kuja), red leprosy (raktakuṣṭha) would occur. One should consider these afflictions in this way. Furthermore, if the lords of the 6th and 8th houses (ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamādhīśa) are conjoined with the Sun (ravi) in the Lagna (ascendant)...

sanskrit: ज्वरगण्डः कुजे ग्रन्थिः शस्त्रव्रणमथापि वा । बुधेन पित्तं गुरुणा रोगाभावं विनिर्दिशेत् ॥१०॥
transliteration: jvaragaṇḍaḥ kuje granthiḥ śastravraṇamathāpi vā . budhena pittaṃ guruṇā rogābhāvaṃ vinirdiśet.
separated_sandhi: jvaragaṇḍaḥ kuje granthiḥ śastravraṇam athāpivā budhena pittam guruṇā rogābhāvam vinirdiśet
english: Then fever boils (jvaragaṇḍa) are indicated. If (the relevant planetary influence is) with Mars (kuja), glandular swellings (granthi) or wounds from weapons (śastravraṇa) are indicated. If with Mercury (budha), bilious diseases (pitta) are indicated. By Jupiter (guru), one should predict the absence of disease (rogābhāva).

sanskrit: स्त्रीभिः शुक्रेण शशिना वायुना संयुतो यदि । गण्डश्चाण्डालतो नाभौ तमःकेतुयुते भयम् ॥११॥
transliteration: strībhiḥ śukreṇa śaśinā vāyunā saṃyuto yadi . gaṇḍaścāṇḍālato nābhau tamaḥketuyute bhayam.
separated_sandhi: strībhiḥ śukreṇa śaśinā vāyunā saṃyutaḥ yadigaṇḍaḥ caṇḍālataḥ nābhau tamaḥketuyute bhayam
english: If (the relevant planetary influence is) with Venus (śukra), (diseases) from women (strī) are indicated. If with the Moon (śaśin), disorders of wind/Vata (vāyu) are indicated. There might be boils (gaṇḍa) in the navel (nābhi) due to outcastes (caṇḍāla). If Rahu (tamas) and Ketu are conjoined (tamaḥketuyuta), fear (bhaya) is indicated.

sanskrit: चन्द्रेण गण्डः सलिलैः कफश्लेष्मादिना भवेत् । एवं पित्रादिभानां तत्तत्कारकयोगतः ॥१२॥
transliteration: candreṇa gaṇḍaḥ salilaiḥ kaphaśleṣmādinā bhavet . evaṃ pitrādibhānāṃ tattatkārakayogataḥ.
separated_sandhi: candreṇa gaṇḍaḥ salilaiḥ kaphaśleṣmādinā bhavetevam pitrādi bhānām tat tat kārakayogataḥ
english: By the Moon (candra), boils (gaṇḍa) may occur due to watery elements (salila) and Kapha-phlegm (kaphaśleṣman) disorders. In this manner, (afflictions) should be considered for the houses (bhāva) of father (pitṛ) and others, based on the conjunctions of their respective significators (kāraka).

sanskrit: गण्डं तेषां वदेदेवमुह्यमत्र मनीषिभिः । रोगस्थानगते पापे तदीशे पापसंयुते ॥१३॥
transliteration: gaṇḍaṃ teṣāṃ vadedevamuhyamatra manīṣibhiḥ . rogasthānagate pāpe tadīśe pāpasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: gaṇḍam teṣām vadet evam ūhyam atra manīṣibhiḥrogasthānagate pāpe tadīśe pāpasaṃyute
english: The wise should thus infer a critical period (gaṇḍam) for such individuals. This occurs when a malefic planet is situated in the house of disease (6th house), and the lord of that house is conjoined with another malefic planet.

sanskrit: राहुणा संयुते मन्दे सर्वदा रोगसंयुतः । रोगस्थानगते भौमे तदीशे रंध्रसंयुते ॥१४॥
transliteration: rāhuṇā saṃyute mande sarvadā rogasaṃyutaḥ . rogasthānagate bhaume tadīśe raṃdhrasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: rāhuṇā saṃyute mande sarvadā rogasaṃyutaḥrogasthānagate bhaume tadīśe randhrasaṃyute
english: When Saturn (Manda) is conjoined with Rahu, the native is always afflicted by disease. And when Mars is situated in the house of disease (6th house), while the lord of that house is conjoined with the lord of the eighth house (randhra).

sanskrit: षड्वर्षे द्वादशे वर्षे ज्वररोगी भवेन्नरः । षष्ठस्थानगते जीवे तद्गृहे चन्द्रसंयुते ॥१५॥
transliteration: ṣaḍvarṣe dvādaśe varṣe jvararogī bhavennaraḥ . ṣaṣṭhasthānagate jīve tadgṛhe candrasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: ṣaḍvarṣe dvādaśe varṣe jvararogī bhavet naraḥṣaṣṭhasthānagate jīve tadgṛhe candrasaṃyute
english: A person will suffer from fever in the sixth or twelfth year. This occurs when Jupiter is situated in the sixth house, and its (Jupiter's) house is conjoined with the Moon.

sanskrit: द्वाविंशौकोनविंशेऽब्दे कुष्ठरोगं विनिर्दिशेत् । रोगस्थानं गतो राहुः केन्द्रे मान्दिसमन्विते ॥१६॥
transliteration: dvāviṃśaukonaviṃśe'bde kuṣṭharogaṃ vinirdiśet . rogasthānaṃ gato rāhuḥ kendre māndisamanvite.
separated_sandhi: dvāviṃśe ūnavimśe abde kuṣṭharogaṃ vinirdiśetrogasthānaṃ gataḥ rāhuḥ kendre māndisammanvite
english: One should predict leprosy in the nineteenth or twenty-second year. This occurs when Rahu is situated in the house of disease (6th house), and a (planet) in an angular house (kendra) is conjoined with Mandi.

sanskrit: लग्नेशे नाशराशिस्थे षड्विंशे क्षयरोगता । व्ययेशे रोगराशिस्थे तदीशे व्ययराशिगे ॥१७॥
transliteration: lagneśe nāśarāśisthe ṣaḍviṃśe kṣayarogatā . vyayeśe rogarāśisthe tadīśe vyayarāśige.
separated_sandhi: lagneśe nāśarāśisthe ṣaḍviṃśe kṣayarogatāvyayeśe rogarāśisthe tadīśe vyayarāśige
english: A person will suffer from consumption (kṣayarogatā) in the twenty-sixth year when the lord of the ascendant (lagna) is situated in the house of loss (12th house). Additionally, this condition also arises when the lord of the twelfth house is in the house of disease (6th house), and the lord of that house of disease (6th) is situated in the house of loss (12th house).

sanskrit: त्रिंशद्वर्षैकोनवर्षे गुल्मरोगं विनिर्दिशेत् । रिपुस्थेनगते चन्द्रे शशिना संयुते सति ॥१८॥
transliteration: triṃśadvarṣaikonavarṣe gulmarogaṃ vinirdiśet . ripusthenagate candre śaśinā saṃyute sati.
separated_sandhi: triṃśadvarṣaikonavarṣe gulmarogaṃ vinirdiśetripusthenagate candre śaśinā saṃyute sati
english: In the 29th or 30th year, one should predict "gulma disease" (abdominal tumor) when the Moon is situated in the sixth house (the house of enemies) and when a planet is conjoined by the Moon.

sanskrit: पञ्चपञ्चाशदब्देषु रक्तकुष्ठं विनिर्दिशेत् । लग्नेशे लग्नराशिस्थे मन्दे शत्रुसमन्विते ॥१९॥
transliteration: pañcapañcāśadabdeṣu raktakuṣṭhaṃ vinirdiśet . lagneśe lagnarāśisthe mande śatrusamanvite.
separated_sandhi: pañcapañcāśadabdeṣu raktakuṣṭhaṃ vinirdiśetlagneśe lagnerāśisthe mande śatrusaṃanvite
english: In the 55th year, one should predict "raktakuṣṭha" (blood leprosy) when the Lord of the Ascendant (lagneśa) is situated in the Ascendant sign and when Saturn (manda) is conjoined with an enemy planet.

sanskrit: एकोनषष्टिवर्षे तु वातरोगार्दितो भवेत् । रंध्रेशे रिपुराशिस्थे व्ययेशे लग्नसंस्थिते ॥२०॥
transliteration: ekonaṣaṣṭivarṣe tu vātarogārdito bhavet . raṃdhreśe ripurāśisthe vyayeśe lagnasaṃsthite.
separated_sandhi: ekonaṣaṣṭivarṣe tu vātarogārditaḥ bhavetrandhreśe ripurāśisthe vyayeśe lagnasaṃsthite
english: In the 59th year, one would be afflicted by "vāta disease" (rheumatic/nervous disorder) when the Lord of the 8th house is situated in the 6th house (house of enemies) and when the Lord of the 12th house is situated in the Ascendant.

sanskrit: चन्द्रे षष्ठेश्संयुक्ते वसुवर्षे मॄगाद्भयम् । षष्ठाष्टमगतो रहुस्तस्मादष्टगते शनौ ॥२१॥
transliteration: candre ṣaṣṭheśsaṃyukte vasuvarṣe mṝgādbhayam . ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamagato rahustasmādaṣṭagate śanau.
separated_sandhi: candre ṣaṣṭheśasaṃyukte vasuvarṣe mṛgāt bhayamṣaṣṭhāṣṭamagataḥ rāhuḥ tasmāt aṣṭagate śanau
english: In the 8th year, there is fear from animals, when the Moon is conjoined with the Lord of the 6th house. This also applies when Rahu is situated in the 6th or 8th house, and Saturn is in the 8th house from Rahu's position.

sanskrit: जातस्य जन्मतो विप्र प्रथमे च द्वितीयके । वस्तरेऽग्निभयं तस्य त्रिवर्षे पक्षिदोषभाक् ॥२२॥
transliteration: jātasya janmato vipra prathame ca dvitīyake . vastare'gnibhayaṃ tasya trivarṣe pakṣidoṣabhāk.
separated_sandhi: jātasya janmataḥ vipra prathame ca dvitīyakevatsare agnibhayam tasya trivarṣe pakṣidoṣabhāk
english: O Brahmin, for the native from birth, there is fear of fire in the first and second years. In the third year, there is harm from birds.

sanskrit: षष्ठाष्टमगते सूर्ये तद्व्यये चन्द्रसंयुतः । पंचमे नवमेऽब्दे तु जलभीतिं विनिर्दिशेत् ॥२३॥
transliteration: ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamagate sūrye tadvyaye candrasaṃyutaḥ . paṃcame navame'bde tu jalabhītiṃ vinirdiśet.
separated_sandhi: ṣaṣṭāṣṭamagate sūrye tat vyaye candra saṃyutaḥpañcame navame abde tu jalabhītiṃ vinirdiśet
english: When the Sun is situated in the 6th or 8th house, and the Moon is located in the 12th house from that Sun's position, then in the 5th or 9th year of life, one should predict danger from water.

sanskrit: अष्टमे मन्दसंयुक्ते तस्माद्वा द्वादशे कुजः । त्रिंशाब्दे दशमेऽब्दे तु स्फोटकादि विनिर्दिशेत् ॥२४॥
transliteration: aṣṭame mandasaṃyukte tasmādvā dvādaśe kujaḥ . triṃśābde daśame'bde tu sphoṭakādi vinirdiśet.
separated_sandhi: aṣṭame manda saṃyukte tasmāt vā dvādaśe kujaḥtriṃśābde daśame abde tu sphoṭakādi vinirdiśet
english: When Saturn (manda) is in the 8th house, or Mars (kuja) is in the 12th house from that (8th house), then in the 30th or 10th year of life, one should predict afflictions like boils and similar ailments.

sanskrit: रंध्रेशे राहुसंयुक्ते तदंशे रंध्रकोणगे । द्वाविंशेऽष्टादशे वर्षे ग्रन्थिमेहादिपीडनम् ॥२५॥
transliteration: raṃdhreśe rāhusaṃyukte tadaṃśe raṃdhrakoṇage . dvāviṃśe'ṣṭādaśe varṣe granthimehādipīḍanam.
separated_sandhi: randhreśe rāhu saṃyukte tat aṃśe randhrakoṇagedvāviṃśe aṣṭādaśe varṣe granthimehādipīḍanam
english: When the lord of the 8th house is conjoined with Rāhu, and that (lord) is in its own navāṃśa, and also located in a trine from the 8th house (i.e., in the 4th, 8th, or 12th house from the ascendant), then in the 22nd or 18th year of life, one experiences afflictions like glandular swelling and diabetes.

sanskrit: लाभेशे रिपुभावस्थे रोगेशे लाभराशिगे । एकत्रिंशत्समे वर्षे शत्रुमूलाद्धनव्ययः ॥२६॥
transliteration: lābheśe ripubhāvasthe rogeśe lābharāśige . ekatriṃśatsame varṣe śatrumūlāddhanavyayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lābheśe ripubhāvasthe rogeśe lābharāśigeekatriṃśatsame varṣe śatrumūlāt dhana vyayaḥ
english: When the lord of the 11th house is situated in the 6th house, and the lord of the 6th house is situated in the 11th house, then in the 31st year, there is a loss of wealth due to enemies.

sanskrit: सुतेशे रिपुभावस्थे षष्ठेशे गुरुसंयुते । व्ययेशे लग्नभावस्थे तस्य पुत्रो रिपुर्भवेत् ॥२७॥
transliteration: suteśe ripubhāvasthe ṣaṣṭheśe gurusaṃyute . vyayeśe lagnabhāvasthe tasya putro ripurbhavet.
separated_sandhi: suteśe ripubhāvasthe ṣaṣṭheśe guru saṃyutevyayeśe lagna bhāvasthe tasya putraḥ ripuḥ bhavet
english: When the lord of the 5th house is situated in the 6th house, and the lord of the 6th house is conjoined with Jupiter, and the lord of the 12th house is situated in the 1st house, then his son becomes an enemy.

sanskrit: लग्नेशे षष्ठराशिस्थे तदीशे षष्ठराशिगे । दशमैकोनविंशेऽब्दे शुनकाद्भीतिरुच्यते ॥२८॥
transliteration: lagneśe ṣaṣṭharāśisthe tadīśe ṣaṣṭharāśige . daśamaikonaviṃśe'bde śunakādbhītirucyate.
separated_sandhi: lagneśe ṣaṣṭharāśisthe tadīśe ṣaṣṭharāśigedaśamaikonāviṃśe abde śunakāt bhītiḥ ucyate
english: When the lord of the ascendant is located in the sixth house, and the lord of that sixth house is also located in the sixth house, fear from a dog is predicted in the tenth or nineteenth year of life.

sanskrit: जायाभावफलं वक्ष्ये स्रृणु त्वं द्विजसत्तम । जायाधिपे स्वभे स्वोच्चे स्त्रीसुखं पूर्णमादिशेत् ॥१॥
transliteration: jāyābhāvaphalaṃ vakṣye srṛṇu tvaṃ dvijasattama . jāyādhipe svabhe svocce strīsukhaṃ pūrṇamādiśet.
separated_sandhi: jāyābhāvaphalam vakṣye śṛṇu tvam dvijasattamajāyādhipe svabhe svocce strīsukham pūrṇam ādiśet
english: O best among the twice-born (dvija), listen! I shall describe the results concerning the house of the spouse. If the lord of the seventh house is in its own sign or in its sign of exaltation, one should predict complete happiness from one's wife.

sanskrit: कलत्रपो विना स्वर्क्षं व्ययषष्ठाष्टमस्थितः । रोगिणीं कुरुते नारीं तथा तुङ्गादिकं विना ॥२॥
transliteration: kalatrapo vinā svarkṣaṃ vyayaṣaṣṭhāṣṭamasthitaḥ . rogiṇīṃ kurute nārīṃ tathā tuṅgādikaṃ vinā.
separated_sandhi: kalatrapaḥ vinā svarakṣam vyayaṣaṣṭhāṣṭamasthitaḥrogiṇīm kurute nārīm tathā tuṅgādikaṃ vinā
english: If the lord of the seventh house (kalatrapa) is situated in the twelfth, sixth, or eighth house, and is not in its own sign or its sign of exaltation, it causes the wife to be sickly.

sanskrit: सप्तमे तु स्थिते शुक्रेऽतीवकामी भवेन्नरः । यत्रकुत्रस्थिते पापयुते स्त्रीमरणं भवेत् ॥३॥
transliteration: saptame tu sthite śukre'tīvakāmī bhavennaraḥ . yatrakutrasthite pāpayute strīmaraṇaṃ bhavet.
separated_sandhi: saptame tu sthite śukre atīvakāmī bhavet naraḥyatrakutrasthite pāpayute strīmaraṇam bhavet
english: Indeed, if Venus is situated in the seventh house, the man becomes very lustful. If, however, (the seventh lord or Venus is) situated anywhere and conjoined with a malefic, the death of the wife occurs.

sanskrit: जायाधीशः शुभैर्युक्तो दृष्टो वा बलसंयुतः । तदा जातो धनी मानी सुखसौभाग्यसंयुतः ॥४॥
transliteration: jāyādhīśaḥ śubhairyukto dṛṣṭo vā balasaṃyutaḥ . tadā jāto dhanī mānī sukhasaubhāgyasaṃyutaḥ.
separated_sandhi: jāyādhīśaḥ śubhaiḥ yuktaḥ dṛṣṭaḥ vā balasaṃyutaḥtadā jātaḥ dhanī mānī sukhasaubhāgyasaṃyutaḥ
english: If the lord of the seventh house (jāyādhīśa) is conjoined with or aspected by benefic planets, or is endowed with strength, then the native will be wealthy, respected, and endowed with happiness and good fortune.

sanskrit: नीचे शत्रुगृहेऽस्ते वा निर्बले च कलत्रपे । तस्यापि रोगिणी भार्या बहुभार्यो नरो भवेत् ॥५॥
transliteration: nīce śatrugṛhe'ste vā nirbale ca kalatrape . tasyāpi rogiṇī bhāryā bahubhāryo naro bhavet.
separated_sandhi: nīce śatrugṛhe aste vā nirbale ca kalatrapetasya api rogiṇī bhāryā bahubhāryaḥ naraḥ bhavet
english: If the lord of the seventh house is in its sign of debilitation, in an enemy's sign, or situated in the seventh house, or is otherwise weak, then his wife will be sickly, and the man will have many wives.

sanskrit: मन्दभे शुक्रगेहे वा जायाधीशे शुभेक्षिते । स्वोच्चगे तु विशेषेण बहुभार्यो नरो भवेत् ॥६॥
transliteration: mandabhe śukragehe vā jāyādhīśe śubhekṣite . svoccage tu viśeṣeṇa bahubhāryo naro bhavet.
separated_sandhi: mandabhe śukragehe vā jāyādhīśe śubhekṣitesvoccage tu viśeṣeṇa bahubhāryaḥ naraḥ bhavet
english: If the lord of the seventh house is in a malefic's sign or in Venus's sign, and is aspected by benefics, or especially if it is in its own sign of exaltation, the man will have many wives.

sanskrit: वन्ध्यासङ्गो मदे भानौ चन्द्रे राशिसमस्त्रियः । कुजे रजस्वलासङ्गो वन्ध्यासङ्गश्च कीर्तितः ॥७॥
transliteration: vandhyāsaṅgo made bhānau candre rāśisamastriyaḥ . kuje rajasvalāsaṅgo vandhyāsaṅgaśca kīrtitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: vandhyāsaṅgaḥ made bhānau candre rāśisamastriyaḥkuje rajasvalāsaṅgaḥ vandhyāsaṅgaḥ ca kīrtitaḥ
english: If the Sun is in the seventh house, there will be association with a barren woman. If the Moon is in the seventh house, there will be a wife from a similar social standing or one belonging to the same zodiacal sign. If Mars is in the seventh house, association with a menstruating woman and also with a barren woman is declared.

sanskrit: बुधे वेश्या च हीना च वणिक् स्त्री वा प्रकीर्तिता । गुरौ ब्राह्मणभार्या स्याद्गर्भिणीसङ्ग एव च ॥८॥
transliteration: budhe veśyā ca hīnā ca vaṇik strī vā prakīrtitā . gurau brāhmaṇabhāryā syādgarbhiṇīsaṅga eva ca.
separated_sandhi: budhe veśyā ca hīnā ca vaṇik strī vā prakīrtitāgurau brāhmaṇabhāryā syāt garbhiṇīsaṅgaḥ eva ca
english: If Mercury is in the seventh house, a prostitute, a low-class woman, or a merchant woman is declared (as a partner). If Jupiter is in the seventh house, there will be a Brahmin wife, and also association with a pregnant woman.

sanskrit: हीना च पुष्पिणी वाच्या मन्दराहुफणीश्वरैः । कुजेऽथ सुस्तनी मन्दे व्याधिदौर्बल्यसंयुता ॥९॥
transliteration: hīnā ca puṣpiṇī vācyā mandarāhuphaṇīśvaraiḥ . kuje'tha sustanī mande vyādhidaurbalyasaṃyutā.
separated_sandhi: hīnā ca puṣpiṇī vācyā mandarāhuphaṇīśvaraiḥkuje atha sustanī mande vyādhidaurbalyasaṃyutā
english: If Saturn, Rahu, or Ketu are in the seventh house, a low-class woman or a menstruating woman is declared (as a partner). Furthermore, if Mars is in the seventh house, the wife will be well-breasted. If Saturn is (again) in the seventh house, she will be afflicted with disease and weakness.

sanskrit: कठिनोर्ध्वकुचार्ये च शुक्रे स्थूलोत्तमस्तनी । पापे द्वादशकामस्थे क्षीणचन्द्रस्तु पञ्चमे ॥१०॥
transliteration: kaṭhinordhvakucārye ca śukre sthūlottamastanī . pāpe dvādaśakāmasthe kṣīṇacandrastu pañcame.
separated_sandhi: kaṭhina-ūrdhva-kuca-cārye ca śukre sthūla-uttama-stanīpāpe dvādaśa-kāma-sthe kṣīṇa-candraḥ tu pañcame
english: A woman is born with firm, uplifted, and beautiful breasts, and also excellent large breasts, when Venus (śukra) is in a particular condition, and when a malefic planet is in the 12th and 7th houses, and a waning Moon (kṣīṇacandra) is in the 5th house.

sanskrit: जातश्च भार्यावश्यः स्यादिति जातिविरोधकृत् । जामित्रे मन्दभौमे च तदीशे मन्दभूमिजे ॥११॥
transliteration: jātaśca bhāryāvaśyaḥ syāditi jātivirodhakṛt . jāmitre mandabhaume ca tadīśe mandabhūmije.
separated_sandhi: jātaḥ ca bhāryā-vaśyaḥ syāt iti jāti-virodha-kṛtjāmitre manda-bhaume ca tad-īśe manda-bhūmije
english: The person born would be dominated by his wife, thereby causing discord in his family or social standing, if Saturn (śani) and Mars (maṅgala) are in the 7th house (jāmitra), and the lord of that 7th house (tadīśa) is also associated with Saturn and Mars.

sanskrit: वेश्या वा जारिणी वाऽपि तस्य भार्या न संशयः । भौमांशकगते शुक्रे भौमक्षेत्रगतेऽथवा ॥१२॥
transliteration: veśyā vā jāriṇī vā'pi tasya bhāryā na saṃśayaḥ . bhaumāṃśakagate śukre bhaumakṣetragate'thavā.
separated_sandhi: veśyā vā jāriṇī vā api tasya bhāryā na saṃśayaḥbhauma-aṃśaka-gate śukre bhauma-kṣetra-gate athavā
english: His wife will undoubtedly be either a prostitute or an adulteress, when Venus (śukra) is situated in a varga (divisional chart position) of Mars (maṅgala), or when it is situated in a sign (rāśi) of Mars (maṅgala).

sanskrit: भौमयुक्ते च दृष्टे वा भगचुम्बनभाग् भवेत् । मन्दांशकगते शुक्रे मन्दक्षेत्रगतेऽपि च ॥१३॥
transliteration: bhaumayukte ca dṛṣṭe vā bhagacumbanabhāg bhavet . mandāṃśakagate śukre mandakṣetragate'pi ca.
separated_sandhi: bhauma-yukte ca dṛṣṭe vā bhaga-cumbana-bhāg bhavetmanda-aṃśaka-gate śukre manda-kṣetra-gate api ca
english: He would be one who engages in kissing the female genitals if (Venus) is conjoined with or aspected by Mars (maṅgala). Also, when Venus (śukra) is in a varga (divisional chart position) of Saturn (śani), or situated in a sign (rāśi) of Saturn (śani)...

sanskrit: मन्दयुक्ते च दृष्टे च शिश्नचुम्बनतत्परः । दारेशे स्वोच्चराशिस्थे मदे शुभसमन्विते ॥१४॥
transliteration: mandayukte ca dṛṣṭe ca śiśnacumbanatatparaḥ . dāreśe svoccarāśisthe made śubhasamanvite.
separated_sandhi: manda-yukte ca dṛṣṭe ca śiśna-cumbana-tatparaḥdāra-īśe sva-ucca-rāśi-sthe made śubha-samanvite
english: And if (Venus) is conjoined with or aspected by Saturn (śani), he is intent on kissing the penis. When the lord of the 7th house (dāreśa) is situated in its own sign of exaltation, and (it) is associated with benefic planets in the 7th house (mada)...

sanskrit: लग्नेशो बलसंयुक्तः कलत्रस्थानसंयुतः । तद्भार्या सद्गुणोपेता पुत्रपौत्रप्रवर्धिनी ॥१५॥
transliteration: lagneśo balasaṃyuktaḥ kalatrasthānasaṃyutaḥ . tadbhāryā sadguṇopetā putrapautrapravardhinī.
separated_sandhi: lagn-īśaḥ bala-saṃyuktaḥ kalatra-sthāna-saṃyutaḥtat-bhāryā sadguṇa upetā putra-pautra-pravardhinī
english: If the lord of the ascendant (lagna) is strong and associated with the house of spouse (kalatra sthāna), then his wife will be endowed with good qualities and will promote the growth of sons and grandsons.

sanskrit: कलत्रे तत्पतौ वापि पापग्रहसमन्विते । भार्याहानिं वदेत् तस्य निर्बले च विशेषतः ॥१६॥
transliteration: kalatre tatpatau vāpi pāpagrahasamanvite . bhāryāhāniṃ vadet tasya nirbale ca viśeṣataḥ.
separated_sandhi: kalatre tat-patau vā api pāpa-graha-sam-anvitebhāryā-hānim vadet tasya nirbale ca viśeṣataḥ
english: One should predict the loss of a wife for that person if the house of spouse (kalatra sthāna) or its lord is associated with a malefic planet, especially when it is weak.

sanskrit: षष्ठाष्टमव्ययस्थाने मन्देशो दुर्बलो यदि । नीचराशिगतो वापि दारनाशं विनिर्दिशेत् ॥१७॥
transliteration: ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyayasthāne mandeśo durbalo yadi . nīcarāśigato vāpi dāranāśaṃ vinirdiśet.
separated_sandhi: ṣaṣṭha-aṣṭama-vyaya-sthāne manda-īśaḥ durbalaḥyadi nīca-rāśi-gataḥ vā api dāra-nāśam vinirdiśet
english: If the lord of the seventh house is weak and situated in the 6th, 8th, or 12th house, or even in its debilitation sign, one should predict the loss of a wife.

sanskrit: कलत्रस्थानगे चन्द्रे तदीशे व्ययराशिगे । कारको बलहीनश्च दारसौख्यं न विद्यते ॥१८॥
transliteration: kalatrasthānage candre tadīśe vyayarāśige . kārako balahīnaśca dārasaukhyaṃ na vidyate.
separated_sandhi: kalatra-sthāna-ge candre tat-īśe vyaya-rāśi-gekārakaḥ bala-hīnaḥ ca dāra-saukhyam na vidyate
english: If the Moon is situated in the house of spouse (kalatra sthāna), its lord (the seventh lord) is situated in the 12th house, and the significator (for marriage, i.e., Venus) is weak, then marital happiness will not exist.

sanskrit: सप्तमेशे स्वनीचस्थे पापर्क्षे पापसंयुते । सप्तमे क्लीवराश्यंशे द्विभार्यो जातको भवेत् ॥१९॥
transliteration: saptameśe svanīcasthe pāparkṣe pāpasaṃyute . saptame klīvarāśyaṃśe dvibhāryo jātako bhavet.
separated_sandhi: saptama-īśe sva-nīca-sthe pāpa-ṛkṣe pāpa-saṃyutesaptame klīva-rāśi-aṃśe dvi-bhāryaḥ jātakaḥ bhavet
english: If the lord of the seventh house is situated in its own debilitation sign, or in a malefic sign, or conjoined with a malefic planet, and if the seventh house is in a eunuch sign or navāṃśa, the native will have two wives.

sanskrit: कलत्र्स्थानगे भौमे शुक्रे जातमित्रगे शनौ । लग्नेशे रन्ध्रराशिस्थे कलत्रत्रयवान् भवेत् ॥२०॥
transliteration: kalatrsthānage bhaume śukre jātamitrage śanau . lagneśe randhrarāśisthe kalatratrayavān bhavet.
separated_sandhi: kalatra-sthānage bhaume śukre jātamitrage śanaulagna-īśe randhra-rāśi-sthe kalatra-traya-vān bhavet
english: When Mars is in the house of spouse (7th house), Venus and Saturn are in the house of friends/gains (11th house), and the lord of the ascendant is in the house of weaknesses (8th house), then one will have three spouses.

sanskrit: द्विस्वभावगते शुक्रे स्वोच्चे तद्राशिनायके । दारेशे बलसंयुक्ते बहुदारसमन्वितः ॥२१॥
transliteration: dvisvabhāvagate śukre svocce tadrāśināyake . dāreśe balasaṃyukte bahudārasamanvitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: dvi-svabhāva-gate śukre sva-ucce tad-rāśi-nāyakedāra-īśe bala-saṃyukte bahu-dāra-samanvitaḥ
english: When Venus is in a dual sign and exalted (in Pisces), and the lord of that sign (Jupiter) is strong, and the lord of the house of spouse (7th house) is endowed with strength, then one will be endowed with many spouses.

sanskrit: दारेशे शुभराशिस्थे स्वोच्चस्वर्क्षगतो भृगुः । पञ्चमे नवमेऽब्दे तु विवाहः प्रायशो भवेत् ॥२२॥
transliteration: dāreśe śubharāśisthe svoccasvarkṣagato bhṛguḥ . pañcame navame'bde tu vivāhaḥ prāyaśo bhavet.
separated_sandhi: dāra-īśe śubha-rāśi-sthe sva-ucca-sva-ṛkṣa-gataḥbhṛguḥ pañcame navame abde tu vivāhaḥ prāyaśaḥ bhavet
english: When the lord of the house of spouse (7th house) is in an auspicious sign, and Venus is in its own exaltation sign or own sign, then marriage will mostly happen in the fifth or ninth year (of age).

sanskrit: दारस्तानं गते सूर्ये तदीशे भृगुसंयुते । सप्तमैकादशे वर्षे विवाहः प्रायशो भवेत् ॥२३॥
transliteration: dārastānaṃ gate sūrye tadīśe bhṛgusaṃyute . saptamaikādaśe varṣe vivāhaḥ prāyaśo bhavet.
separated_sandhi: dāra-sthānam gate sūrye tad-īśe bhṛgu-saṃyutesaptama-ekādaśe varṣe vivāhaḥ prāyaśaḥ bhavet
english: When the Sun is in the house of spouse (7th house), and the lord of that house (7th house lord) is conjoined with Venus, then marriage will mostly happen in the seventh or eleventh year (of age).

sanskrit: कुटुम्बस्थानगे शुक्रे दारेशे लाभराशिगे । दशमे षोडशाऽब्दे च विवाहः प्रायशो भवेत् ॥२४॥
transliteration: kuṭumbasthānage śukre dāreśe lābharāśige . daśame ṣoḍaśā'bde ca vivāhaḥ prāyaśo bhavet.
separated_sandhi: kuṭumba-sthānage śukre dāra-īśe lābha-rāśi-gedaśame ṣoḍaśa-abde ca vivāhaḥ prāyaśaḥ bhavet
english: When Venus is in the house of family/wealth (2nd house), and the lord of the house of spouse (7th house) is in the house of gains (11th house), then marriage will mostly happen in the tenth or sixteenth year (of age).

sanskrit: लग्नकेन्द्रगते शुक्रे लग्नेशे मन्दराशिगे । वत्सरैकादशे प्राप्ते विवाहं लभते नरः ॥२५॥
transliteration: lagnakendragate śukre lagneśe mandarāśige . vatsaraikādaśe prāpte vivāhaṃ labhate naraḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagna-kendra-gate śukre lagneśe manda-rāśi-gevatsaraikādaśe prāpte vivāham labhate naraḥ
english: When Venus is in an angular house (kendra) from the ascendant (lagna), and the lord of the ascendant is situated in a sign of Saturn, a person obtains marriage upon reaching the eleventh year.

sanskrit: लग्नात् केन्द्रगते शुक्रे तस्मात् कामगते शनौ । द्वादशैकोनविंशे च विवाहः प्रायशो भवेत् ॥२६॥
transliteration: lagnāt kendragate śukre tasmāt kāmagate śanau . dvādaśaikonaviṃśe ca vivāhaḥ prāyaśo bhavet.
separated_sandhi: lagnāt kendra-gate śukre tasmāt kāma-gate śanaudvādaśaika-ūnavimśe ca vivāhaḥ prāyaśaḥ bhavet
english: When Venus is in an angular house (kendra) from the ascendant (lagna), and Saturn is in the house of marriage (kāma) from that Venus, a marriage usually occurs in the twelfth or nineteenth year.

sanskrit: चन्द्राज्जामित्रगे शुक्रे शुक्राज्जामित्रगे शनौ । वत्सरेऽष्टादशे प्राप्ते विवाहं लभते नरः ॥२७॥
transliteration: candrājjāmitrage śukre śukrājjāmitrage śanau . vatsare'ṣṭādaśe prāpte vivāhaṃ labhate naraḥ.
separated_sandhi: candrāt jāmitra-ge śukre śukrāt jāmitra-ge śanauvatsare aṣṭādaśe prāpte vivāham labhate naraḥ
english: When Venus is in the seventh house (jāmitra) from the Moon, and Saturn is in the seventh house (jāmitra) from Venus, a person obtains marriage upon reaching the eighteenth year.

sanskrit: धनेशे लाभराशिस्थे लग्नेशे कर्मराशिगे । अब्दे पञ्चदशे प्राप्ते विवाहं लभते नरः ॥२८॥
transliteration: dhaneśe lābharāśisthe lagneśe karmarāśige . abde pañcadaśe prāpte vivāhaṃ labhate naraḥ.
separated_sandhi: dhaneśe lābha-rāśi-sthe lagneśe karma-rāśi-geabde pañcadaśe prāpte vivāham labhate naraḥ
english: When the lord of the second house (dhanesha) is situated in the eleventh house (labha rāśi), and the lord of the ascendant (lagneśa) is in the tenth house (karma rāśi), a person obtains marriage upon reaching the fifteenth year.

sanskrit: धनेशे लाभराशिश्ते लाभेशे धनराशिगे । अब्दे त्रयोदशे प्राप्ते विवाहं लभते नरः ॥२९॥
transliteration: dhaneśe lābharāśiśte lābheśe dhanarāśige . abde trayodaśe prāpte vivāhaṃ labhate naraḥ.
separated_sandhi: dhaneśe lābha-rāśi-śte lābheśe dhana-rāśi-geabde trayodaśe prāpte vivāham labhate naraḥ
english: When the lord of the second house (dhanesha) is situated in the eleventh house (labha rāśi), and the lord of the eleventh house (labheśa) is in the second house (dhana rāśi), a person obtains marriage upon reaching the thirteenth year.

sanskrit: रन्ध्राज्जामित्रगे शुक्रे तदीशे भौमसंयुते । द्वाविंशे सप्तविंशेऽब्दे विवाहं लभते नरः ॥३०॥
transliteration: randhrājjāmitrage śukre tadīśe bhaumasaṃyute . dvāviṃśe saptaviṃśe'bde vivāhaṃ labhate naraḥ.
separated_sandhi: randhrāt jāmitrage śukre tadīśe bhaumasaṃyutedvāviṃśe saptaviṃśe abde vivāhaṃ labhate naraḥ
english: When Venus is located in the seventh house counted from the eighth house (i.e., in the second house from the ascendant), and the lord of that house (the second house lord) is conjoined with Mars, a person obtains marriage in their twenty-second or twenty-seventh year.

sanskrit: दारांशकगते लग्ननाथे दारेश्वरे व्यये । त्रयोविंशे च षड्विंशे विवाहं लभते नरः ॥३१॥
transliteration: dārāṃśakagate lagnanāthe dāreśvare vyaye . trayoviṃśe ca ṣaḍviṃśe vivāhaṃ labhate naraḥ.
separated_sandhi: dārāṃśakagate lagnanāthe dāreśvare vyayetrayoviṃśe ca ṣaḍviṃśe vivāhaṃ labhate naraḥ
english: When the lord of the ascendant is in the navāṃśa of the seventh house, and the lord of the seventh house is in the twelfth house, a person obtains marriage in their twenty-third or twenty-sixth year.

sanskrit: रन्ध्रेशे दारराशिस्थे लग्नांशे भृगुसंयुते । पञ्चविंशे त्रयस्त्रिंशे विवाहं लभते नरः ॥३२॥
transliteration: randhreśe dārarāśisthe lagnāṃśe bhṛgusaṃyute . pañcaviṃśe trayastriṃśe vivāhaṃ labhate naraḥ.
separated_sandhi: randhreśe dārarāśisthe lagnāṃśe bhṛgusaṃyutepañcaviṃśe trayastriṃśe vivāhaṃ labhate naraḥ
english: When the lord of the eighth house is located in the sign of the seventh house, and the ascendant navāṃśa is conjoined with Venus, a person obtains marriage in their twenty-fifth or thirty-third year.

sanskrit: भाग्याद्भाग्यगते शुक्रे तद्द्वये राहुसंयुते । एकत्रिंशास्त्रयस्त्रिंशे दारलाभं विनिर्दिशेत् ॥३३॥
transliteration: bhāgyādbhāgyagate śukre taddvaye rāhusaṃyute . ekatriṃśāstrayastriṃśe dāralābhaṃ vinirdiśet.
separated_sandhi: bhāgyāt bhāgyagate śukre tad-dvaye rāhusaṃyuteekatriṃśāt trayastriṃśe dāralābhaṃ vinirdiśet
english: When Venus is in the ninth house counted from the ninth house (i.e., in the fifth house from the ascendant), and the lords of both the ninth house and the fifth house are conjoined with Rāhu, one should predict the acquisition of a wife (marriage) in the thirty-first or thirty-third year.

sanskrit: भाग्याज्जामित्रगे शुक्रे तद्द्वूने दारनायके । त्रिंशे वा सप्तविंशाब्दे विवाहं लभते नरः ॥३४॥
transliteration: bhāgyājjāmitrage śukre taddvūne dāranāyake . triṃśe vā saptaviṃśābde vivāhaṃ labhate naraḥ.
separated_sandhi: bhāgyāt jāmitrage śukre tad-dvūne dāranāyaketriṃśe vā saptaviṃśābde vivāhaṃ labhate naraḥ
english: When Venus is in the seventh house counted from the ninth house (i.e., in the third house from the ascendant), and the lord of the seventh house (from the ascendant) is in its second house (i.e., the eighth house from the ascendant), a person obtains marriage in their thirtieth or twenty-seventh year.

sanskrit: दारेशे नीचराशिस्थे शुक्रे रन्ध्रारिसंयुते । अष्टादशे त्रयस्त्रिंशे वत्सरे दारनाशनम् ॥३५॥
transliteration: dāreśe nīcarāśisthe śukre randhrārisaṃyute . aṣṭādaśe trayastriṃśe vatsare dāranāśanam.
separated_sandhi: dāreśe nīcarāśisthe śukre randhrārisaṃyuteaṣṭādaśe trayastriṃśe vatsare dāranāśanam
english: If the lord of the seventh house (for spouse) is in a debilitated sign, and Venus (Śukra) is associated with the lord of the eighth house (randhra) or sixth house (ari), then the spouse will be lost in the eighteenth or thirty-third year.

sanskrit: मदेशे नाशराशिस्थे व्ययेशे मदराशिगे । तस्य चैकोनविंशाब्दे दारनाशं विनिर्दिशेत् ॥३६॥
transliteration: madeśe nāśarāśisthe vyayeśe madarāśige . tasya caikonaviṃśābde dāranāśaṃ vinirdiśet.
separated_sandhi: madeśe nāśarāśisthe vyayeśe madarāśigetasya ca ekonaviṃśābde dāranāśaṃ vinirdiśet
english: If the lord of the seventh house is situated in the eighth house, and the lord of the twelfth house is in the seventh house, one should predict the loss of the spouse in the native's nineteenth year.

sanskrit: कुटुम्बस्थानगो राहुः कलत्रे भौमसंयुते । पाणिग्रहे च त्रिदिने सर्पदष्टे वधूमृतिः ॥३७॥
transliteration: kuṭumbasthānago rāhuḥ kalatre bhaumasaṃyute . pāṇigrahe ca tridine sarpadaṣṭe vadhūmṛtiḥ.
separated_sandhi: kuṭumbasthānago rāhuḥ kalatre bhaumasaṃyutepāṇigrahe ca tridine sarpadaṣṭe vadhūmṛtiḥ
english: If Rahu is situated in the second house (kuṭumba) and the seventh house (kalatra) is conjoined with Mars (Bhauma), then the bride will die, bitten by a snake, on the third day after the wedding (pāṇigraha).

sanskrit: रन्ध्रस्थानगते शुक्रे तदीशे सौरिराशिगे । द्वादशैकोनविंशाब्दे दारनाशं विनिर्दिशेत् ॥३८॥
transliteration: randhrasthānagate śukre tadīśe saurirāśige . dvādaśaikonaviṃśābde dāranāśaṃ vinirdiśet.
separated_sandhi: randhrasthānagate śukre tadīśe saurirāśigedvādaśa ekonaviṃśābde dāranāśaṃ vinirdiśet
english: If Venus (Śukra) is situated in the eighth house (randhra sthāna), and its lord (the lord of the eighth house) is in a sign owned by Saturn (Sauri), one should predict the loss of the spouse in the twelfth or nineteenth year.

sanskrit: लग्नेशे नीचराशिस्थे धनेशे निधनं गते । त्रयोदशे तु सम्प्राप्ते कलत्रस्य मृतिर्भवेत् ॥३९॥
transliteration: lagneśe nīcarāśisthe dhaneśe nidhanaṃ gate . trayodaśe tu samprāpte kalatrasya mṛtirbhavet.
separated_sandhi: lagneśe nīcarāśisthe dhaneśe nidhanaṃ gatetrayodaśe tu samprāpte kalatrasya mṛtiḥ bhavet
english: If the lord of the ascendant is in a debilitated sign, and the lord of the second house is situated in the eighth house (nidhana), then the death of the spouse will occur upon the arrival of the thirteenth year.

sanskrit: शुक्राज्जामित्रगे चन्द्रे चन्द्राज्जामित्रगे बुधे । रन्ध्रेशे सुतभावस्थे प्रथमं दशमाब्दिकम् ॥४०॥
transliteration: śukrājjāmitrage candre candrājjāmitrage budhe . randhreśe sutabhāvasthe prathamaṃ daśamābdikam.
separated_sandhi: śukrāt jāmitrage candre candrāt jāmitrage budherandhreśe sutabhāvasthe prathamam daśamābdikam
english: When the Moon is in the seventh house from Venus, and Mercury is in the seventh house from the Moon, and the lord of the eighth house (randhra) is situated in the fifth house (sutabhāva), the first marriage occurs in the tenth year of life.

sanskrit: द्वाविंशे च द्वितीयं च त्रयस्त्रिंशे तृतीयकम् । विवाहं लभते मर्त्यो नाऽत्र कार्या विचारणा ॥४१॥
transliteration: dvāviṃśe ca dvitīyaṃ ca trayastriṃśe tṛtīyakam . vivāhaṃ labhate martyo nā'tra kāryā vicāraṇā.
separated_sandhi: dvāviṃśe ca dvitīyam ca trayastriṃśe tṛtīyakamvivāham labhate martyaḥ na atra kāryā vicāraṇā
english: And the second marriage occurs in the twenty-second year, and the third in the thirty-third year. A person obtains these marriages; there should be no doubt about this.

sanskrit: षष्ठे च भवने भौमः सप्तमे राहुसंस्थितिः । अष्टमे च यदा सौरिस्तस्य भार्या न जीवति ॥४२॥
transliteration: ṣaṣṭhe ca bhavane bhaumaḥ saptame rāhusaṃsthitiḥ . aṣṭame ca yadā sauristasya bhāryā na jīvati.
separated_sandhi: ṣaṣṭhe ca bhavane bhaumaḥ saptame rāhusaṃsthitiḥaṣṭame ca yadā sauriḥ tasya bhāryā na jīvati
english: When Mars (bhauma) is in the sixth house, Rahu (rāhu) is situated in the seventh house, and Saturn (sauri) is in the eighth house, his wife does not live long (i.e., dies).

sanskrit: आयुर्भावफलं चाऽथ कथयामि द्विजोत्तम । आयुःस्थानाधिपः केन्द्रे दीर्घमायुः प्रयच्छति ॥१॥
transliteration: āyurbhāvaphalaṃ cā'tha kathayāmi dvijottama . āyuḥsthānādhipaḥ kendre dīrghamāyuḥ prayacchati.
separated_sandhi: āyurbhāvaphalam ca atha kathayāmi dvijottamaāyuḥsthānādhipaḥ kendre dīrgham āyuḥ prayacchati
english: And now, O best among the twice-born (dvijottama), I will explain the results concerning the house of longevity (āyurbhāva). When the lord of the house of longevity is in an angular house (kendra), he bestows a long life.

sanskrit: आयुस्थानाधिपः पापैः सह तत्रैव संस्थितः । करोत्यल्पायुषं जातं लग्नेशोऽप्यत्र संस्थितः ॥२॥
transliteration: āyusthānādhipaḥ pāpaiḥ saha tatraiva saṃsthitaḥ . karotyalpāyuṣaṃ jātaṃ lagneśo'pyatra saṃsthitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: āyuḥsthānādhipaḥ pāpaiḥ saha tatra eva saṃsthitaḥkaroti alpāyuṣam jātam lagneśaḥ api atra saṃsthitaḥ
english: If the lord of the house of longevity is situated in that very house (the eighth house) along with malefic planets (pāpa), the native (jāta) becomes short-lived. This outcome also applies if the lord of the ascendant (lagneśa) is situated there.

sanskrit: एवं हि शनिना चिन्ता कार्या तर्कैर्विचक्षणैः । कर्माधिपेन च तथा चिन्तनं कार्यमायुषः ॥३॥
transliteration: evaṃ hi śaninā cintā kāryā tarkairvicakṣaṇaiḥ . karmādhipena ca tathā cintanaṃ kāryamāyuṣaḥ.
separated_sandhi: evaṃ hi śaninā cintā kāryā tarkaiḥ vicakṣaṇaiḥkarmādhipena ca tathā cintanam kāryam āyuṣaḥ
english: Indeed, wise astrologers should assess longevity (āyuṣ) by means of reasoning concerning Saturn, and similarly, by considering the lord of the 10th house (karma bhava).

sanskrit: षष्ठे व्ययेऽपि षष्ठेशो व्ययाधीशो रिपौ व्यये । लग्नेऽष्टमे स्थितो वाऽपि दीर्घमायुः प्रयच्छति ॥४॥
transliteration: ṣaṣṭhe vyaye'pi ṣaṣṭheśo vyayādhīśo ripau vyaye . lagne'ṣṭame sthito vā'pi dīrghamāyuḥ prayacchati.
separated_sandhi: ṣaṣṭhe vyaye api ṣaṣṭheśaḥ vyayādhīśaḥ ripau vyayelagne aṣṭame sthitaḥ vā api dīrgham āyuḥ prayacchati
english: When the lord of the sixth house is in the sixth or even in the twelfth (vyaya) house, or when the lord of the twelfth house is in the enemy's (ripu) house or in the twelfth house, or even if [either of these lords is] situated in the lagna (ascendant) or the eighth house, it grants long life (āyuṣ).

sanskrit: स्वस्थाने स्वांशके वाऽपि मित्रेशे मित्रमन्दिरे । दीर्घायुषं करोत्येव लग्नेशोऽष्टमपः पुनः ॥५॥
transliteration: svasthāne svāṃśake vā'pi mitreśe mitramandire . dīrghāyuṣaṃ karotyeva lagneśo'ṣṭamapaḥ punaḥ.
separated_sandhi: svasthāne svāṃśake vā api mitreśe mitramandiredīrghāyuṣam karoti eva lagneśaḥ aṣṭamapaḥ punaḥ
english: Moreover, when the lord of the lagna (ascendant) and the lord of the eighth house are situated in their own house, or in their own navamśa, or even in a friendly sign or a friend's house, they certainly grant long life (āyuṣ).

sanskrit: लग्नाष्टमपकर्मेशमन्दाः केन्द्रत्रिकोणयोः । लाभे वा संस्थितास्तद्वद् दिशेयुर्दीर्घमायुषम् ॥६॥
transliteration: lagnāṣṭamapakarmeśamandāḥ kendratrikoṇayoḥ . lābhe vā saṃsthitāstadvad diśeyurdīrghamāyuṣam.
separated_sandhi: lagnāṣṭamapa-karmeśa-mandāḥ kendratrikoṇayoḥlābhe vā saṃsthitāḥ tadvat diśeyuḥ dīrgham āyuṣam
english: Similarly, if the lord of the lagna (ascendant), the lord of the eighth house, the lord of the tenth house (karma bhava), and Saturn are situated in quadrants (kendra) or trines (trikoṇa), or in the eleventh house (lābha bhava), they would indicate long life (āyuṣ).

sanskrit: एवं बहुविधा विद्वन्नायुर्योगाः प्रकीर्तिताः । एषु यो बलवांस्तस्याऽनुसारादायुरादिशेत् ॥७॥
transliteration: evaṃ bahuvidhā vidvannāyuryogāḥ prakīrtitāḥ . eṣu yo balavāṃstasyā'nusārādāyurādiśet.
separated_sandhi: evaṃ bahuvidhāḥ vidvan āyuryogāḥ prakīrtitāḥeṣu yaḥ balavān tasya anusārāt āyuḥ ādiśet
english: Thus, O wise one, many kinds of longevity (āyuṣ) combinations (yoga) have been enumerated. Among these, one should predict the longevity (āyuṣ) based on which one is the strongest.

sanskrit: अष्टमाधिपतौ केन्द्रे लग्नेशे बलवर्जते । विंशद्वर्षाण्यसौ जीवेद् द्वात्रिंशत्परमायुषम् ॥८॥
transliteration: aṣṭamādhipatau kendre lagneśe balavarjate . viṃśadvarṣāṇyasau jīved dvātriṃśatparamāyuṣam.
separated_sandhi: aṣṭamādhipatau kendre lagneśe balavarjateviṃśadvarṣāṇi asau jīvet dvātriṃśatparamāyuṣam
english: If the lord of the eighth house is in a quadrant (kendra) and the lord of the ascendant lacks strength, such a person lives for twenty years, with a maximum lifespan of thirty-two years.

sanskrit: रन्ध्रेशे नीचराशिस्थे रन्ध्रे पापग्रहैर्युते । लग्नेशे दुर्बले जन्तुरल्पायुर्भवति ध्रुवम् ॥९॥
transliteration: randhreśe nīcarāśisthe randhre pāpagrahairyute . lagneśe durbale janturalpāyurbhavati dhruvam.
separated_sandhi: randhreśe nīcarāśisthe randhre pāpagraḥaiḥ yutelagneśe durbale jantuḥ alpāyuḥ bhavati dhruvam
english: If the lord of the eighth house is in a debilitated sign, the eighth house is conjoined with malefic planets, and the lord of the ascendant is weak, then the native will certainly have a short lifespan.

sanskrit: रन्ध्रेशे पापसंयुक्ते रन्ध्रे पापग्रहैर्युते । व्यये क्रूरग्रहाक्रान्ते जातमात्रं मृतिर्भवेत् ॥१०॥
transliteration: randhreśe pāpasaṃyukte randhre pāpagrahairyute . vyaye krūragrahākrānte jātamātraṃ mṛtirbhavet.
separated_sandhi: randhreśe pāpasaṃyukte randhre pāpagraḥaiḥ yutevyaye krūragrahākrānte jātamātram mṛtiḥ bhavet
english: If the lord of the eighth house is conjoined with a malefic planet, the eighth house is conjoined with malefic planets, and the twelfth house is afflicted by malefic planets, then death occurs immediately after birth.

sanskrit: केन्द्रत्रिकोणगाः पापाः शुभाः षष्ठाष्टगा यदि । लग्ने नीचस्थरन्ध्रेशो जातः सद्यो मृतो भवेत् ॥११॥
transliteration: kendratrikoṇagāḥ pāpāḥ śubhāḥ ṣaṣṭhāṣṭagā yadi . lagne nīcastharandhreśo jātaḥ sadyo mṛto bhavet.
separated_sandhi: kendratrikoṇagāḥ pāpāḥ śubhāḥ ṣaṣṭhāṣṭagā yadilagne nīcastharandhreśaḥ jātaḥ sadyaḥ mṛtaḥ bhavet
english: If malefic planets are in quadrant (kendra) and trine (trikoṇa) houses, benefics are in the sixth and eighth houses, and the debilitated lord of the eighth house is in the ascendant, then the native dies immediately.

sanskrit: पञ्चमे पापसंयुक्ते रन्ध्रेशे पापसंयुते । रन्ध्रे पापग्रहैर्युक्ते स्वल्पमायुः प्रजायते ॥१२॥
transliteration: pañcame pāpasaṃyukte randhreśe pāpasaṃyute . randhre pāpagrahairyukte svalpamāyuḥ prajāyate.
separated_sandhi: pañcame pāpasaṃyukte randhreśe pāpasaṃyukterandhre pāpagraḥaiḥ yukte svalpam āyuḥ prajāyate
english: If the fifth house is conjoined with a malefic planet, the lord of the eighth house is conjoined with a malefic planet, and the eighth house is conjoined with malefic planets, then a very short lifespan is produced.

sanskrit: रन्ध्रेशे रन्ध्रराशिस्थे चन्द्रे पापसमन्विते । शुभदृष्टिविहीने च मासान्ते च मृतिर्भवेत् ॥१३॥
transliteration: randhreśe randhrarāśisthe candre pāpasamanvite . śubhadṛṣṭivihīne ca māsānte ca mṛtirbhavet.
separated_sandhi: randhreśe randrarāśisthe candre pāpasamanviteśubhadr̥ṣṭivihīne ca māsānte ca mṛtiḥ bhavet
english: If the lord of the 8th house is situated in the 8th sign, and the Moon is conjoined with malefic planets and devoid of auspicious aspect, then death will occur at the end of the month.

sanskrit: लग्नेशे स्वोच्चराशिस्थे चन्द्रे लाभसमन्विते । रन्ध्रस्थानगते जीवे दीर्घमायुर्न संशयः ॥१४॥
transliteration: lagneśe svoccarāśisthe candre lābhasamanvite . randhrasthānagate jīve dīrghamāyurna saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagneśe svoccarāśisthe candre lābhasamanviterandrasthānagate jīve dīrgham āyuḥ na saṃśayaḥ
english: If the lord of the ascendant is situated in its exaltation sign, and the Moon is associated with gains, and Jupiter is situated in the 8th house, then there is indeed long life, without a doubt.

sanskrit: लग्नेशोऽतिबली दृष्टः केन्द्रसंस्थैः शुभग्रहैः । धनैः सर्वगुणैः सार्धं दीर्घमायुः प्रयच्छति ॥१५॥
transliteration: lagneśo'tibalī dṛṣṭaḥ kendrasaṃsthaiḥ śubhagrahaiḥ . dhanaiḥ sarvaguṇaiḥ sārdhaṃ dīrghamāyuḥ prayacchati.
separated_sandhi: lagneśaḥ atibalī dr̥ṣṭaḥ kendrasaṃsthaiḥ śubhagrahaíḥdhanaiḥ sarvaguṇaíḥ sārdham dīrgham āyuḥ prayacchati
english: If the lord of the ascendant is exceedingly strong and aspected by auspicious planets situated in quadrant houses (kendras), it grants long life along with wealth and all virtues.

sanskrit: अथ भाग्यभावं विप्र फलं वक्ष्ये तवाऽग्रतः । सबलो भाग्यपे भाग्ये जातो भाग्ययुतो भवेत् ॥१॥
transliteration: atha bhāgyabhāvaṃ vipra phalaṃ vakṣye tavā'grataḥ . sabalo bhāgyape bhāgye jāto bhāgyayuto bhavet.
separated_sandhi: atha bhāgyabhāvam vipra phalam vakṣye tava agrataḥsabalaḥ bhāgyape bhāgye jātaḥ bhāgyayutaḥ bhavet
english: Now, O Brahmin, I shall declare before you the results concerning the house of fortune (bhāgya bhāva). If the lord of the 9th house is strong and situated in the 9th house, one born (under such a configuration) becomes endowed with great fortune.

sanskrit: भाग्यस्थानगते जीवे यदीशे केन्द्रसंअस्थिते । लग्नेशे बलसंयुक्ते बहुभाग्ययुतो भवेत् ॥२॥
transliteration: bhāgyasthānagate jīve yadīśe kendrasaṃasthite . lagneśe balasaṃyukte bahubhāgyayuto bhavet.
separated_sandhi: bhāgyasthānagate jīve yadi īśe kendrasaṃsthitelagneśe balasaṃyukte bahubhāgyayutaḥ bhavet
english: If Jupiter is situated in the house of fortune (bhāgya sthāna), and its lord is in a quadrant house (kendra), and the lord of the ascendant is endowed with strength, then one becomes greatly fortunate.

sanskrit: भाग्येशे बलसंयुक्ते भाग्ये भृगुसमन्विते । लग्नात् केन्द्रगते जीवे पिता भाग्यसमन्वितः ॥३॥
transliteration: bhāgyeśe balasaṃyukte bhāgye bhṛgusamanvite . lagnāt kendragate jīve pitā bhāgyasamanvitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: bhāgyeśe balasaṃyukte bhāgye bhṛgusamannvitelagnāt kendragate jīve pitā bhāgyasamannvitaḥ
english: If the lord of the house of fortune (bhāgya) is endowed with strength, the house of fortune (bhāgya) is associated with Venus, and Jupiter is located in an angular house (kendra) from the ascendant, then the father will be endowed with good fortune.

sanskrit: भाग्यस्थानाद् द्वितीये वा सुखे भौमसमन्विते । भाग्येशे नीचराशिस्थे पिता निर्धन एव हि ॥४॥
transliteration: bhāgyasthānād dvitīye vā sukhe bhaumasamanvite . bhāgyeśe nīcarāśisthe pitā nirdhana eva hi.
separated_sandhi: bhāgyasthānāt dvitīye vā sukhe bhaumasamannvitebhāgyeśe nīcarāśisthe pitā nirdhanaḥ eva hi
english: If the lord of the house of fortune (bhāgya) is located in the second house from the house of fortune, or if the fourth house (house of comfort) is associated with Mars, or if the lord of the house of fortune (bhāgya) is situated in a debilitated sign, then the father will surely be poor.

sanskrit: भाग्येशे परमोच्चस्थे भाग्यांशे जीवसंयुते । लग्नाच्चतुष्टये शुक्रे तत्पिता दीर्घजीवनः ॥५॥
transliteration: bhāgyeśe paramoccasthe bhāgyāṃśe jīvasaṃyute . lagnāccatuṣṭaye śukre tatpitā dīrghajīvanaḥ.
separated_sandhi: bhāgyeśe paramoccaste bhāgyāṃśe jīvasaṃyutelagnāt catuṣṭaye śukre tatpitā dīrghajīvanaḥ
english: If the lord of the house of fortune (bhāgya) is in its highest exaltation (paramoccaste), the ninth house (bhāgya)'s divisional chart (bhāgyāṃśa) is associated with Jupiter, and Venus is in an angular house (kendra) from the ascendant, then his father will have a long life.

sanskrit: भाग्येशे केन्द्रभावस्ये गुरुणा च निरीक्षिते । तत्पिता वाहनैर्युक्तो राजा वा तत्समो भवेत् ॥६॥
transliteration: bhāgyeśe kendrabhāvasye guruṇā ca nirīkṣite . tatpitā vāhanairyukto rājā vā tatsamo bhavet.
separated_sandhi: bhāgyeśe kendrabhāvasye guruṇā ca nirīkṣitetatpitā vāhanaiḥ yuktaḥ rājā vā tatsamaḥ bhavet
english: If the lord of the house of fortune (bhāgya) is situated in an angular house (kendra bhāva) and is aspected by Jupiter, then his father will possess conveyances and will be a king or equal to a king.

sanskrit: भाग्येशे कर्मभावस्थे कर्मेशे भाग्यराशिगे । शुभदृष्टे धनाढ्यश्च कीर्तिमांस्तत्पिता भवेत् ॥७॥
transliteration: bhāgyeśe karmabhāvasthe karmeśe bhāgyarāśige . śubhadṛṣṭe dhanāḍhyaśca kīrtimāṃstatpitā bhavet.
separated_sandhi: bhāgyeśe karmabhāvasthe karmeśe bhāgyarāśigeśubhadṛṣṭe dhanāḍhyaḥ ca kīrtimān tatpitā bhavet
english: If the lord of the house of fortune (bhāgya) is situated in the house of action/profession (karma bhāva), and the lord of the house of action (karma) is in the house of fortune (bhāgya rāśi), and these are aspected by benefics, then his father will be wealthy and famous.

sanskrit: परमोच्चांशगे सूर्ये भाग्येशे लाभसंस्थिते । धर्मष्ठो नृपवात्सल्यः पितृभक्तो भवेन्नरः ॥८॥
transliteration: paramoccāṃśage sūrye bhāgyeśe lābhasaṃsthite . dharmaṣṭho nṛpavātsalyaḥ pitṛbhakto bhavennaraḥ.
separated_sandhi: paramoccāṃśage sūrye bhāgyeśe lābhasaṃsthitedharmaṣṭhaḥ nṛpavātsalyaḥ pitṛbhaktaḥ bhavet naraḥ
english: When the Sun (sūrya) is in its highest exaltation and the lord of the ninth house (bhāgyeśa) is situated in the eleventh house, the person (nara) will be devoted to righteousness (dharma), affectionate towards the king, and dedicated to his father (pitṛbhakta).

sanskrit: लग्नात्त्रिकोणगे सूर्ये भाग्येशे सप्तमस्थिते । गुरुणा सहिते दृष्टे पितृभक्तिसमन्वितः ॥९॥
transliteration: lagnāttrikoṇage sūrye bhāgyeśe saptamasthite . guruṇā sahite dṛṣṭe pitṛbhaktisamanvitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagnāt trikoṇage sūrye bhāgyeśe saptamasthiteguruṇā sahite dṛṣṭe pitṛbhaktisamanvitaḥ
english: When the Sun (sūrya) is in a trine house (trikoṇa) from the ascendant (lagna), and the lord of the ninth house (bhāgyeśa) is situated in the seventh house, being conjoined with or aspected by Jupiter (guru), the person will be endowed with devotion to his father (pitṛbhakti).

sanskrit: भाग्येशे धनभावस्थे धनेशे भाग्यराशिगे । द्वात्रिंशात्परतो भाग्यं वाहनं कीर्तिसम्भवः ॥१०॥
transliteration: bhāgyeśe dhanabhāvasthe dhaneśe bhāgyarāśige . dvātriṃśātparato bhāgyaṃ vāhanaṃ kīrtisambhavaḥ.
separated_sandhi: bhāgyeśe dhanabhāvasthite dhaneśe bhāgyarāśigedvātriṃśāt parataḥ bhāgyam vāhanam kīrtisambhavaḥ
english: When the lord of the ninth house (bhāgyeśa) is situated in the second house and the lord of the second house (dhaneśa) is situated in the ninth house (bhāgya-rāśi), fortune (bhāgya) will arise after the age of thirty-two, along with the acquisition of vehicles and fame (kīrti).

sanskrit: लग्नेशे भाग्यराशिस्थे षष्ठेशेन समन्विते । अन्योन्यवैरं ब्रुवते जनकः कुत्सितो भवेत् ॥११॥
transliteration: lagneśe bhāgyarāśisthe ṣaṣṭheśena samanvite . anyonyavairaṃ bruvate janakaḥ kutsito bhavet.
separated_sandhi: lagneśe bhāgyarāśisthe ṣaṣṭheśena samanviteanyonyavairam bruvate janakaḥ kutsitaḥ bhavet
english: When the lord of the ascendant (lagneśa) is situated in the ninth house (bhāgya-rāśi) and is conjoined with the lord of the sixth house, astrologers declare that there will be mutual enmity, and the father will be contemptible.

sanskrit: कर्माधिपेन सहितो विक्रमेशोऽपि निर्बलः । भाग्यपो नीचमूढस्थो योगो भिक्षाशनप्रदः ॥१२॥
transliteration: karmādhipena sahito vikrameśo'pi nirbalaḥ . bhāgyapo nīcamūḍhastho yogo bhikṣāśanapradaḥ.
separated_sandhi: karmādhipena sahitaḥ vikrameśaḥ api nirbalaḥbhāgyapaḥ nīcamūḍhasthaḥ yogaḥ bhikṣāśanapradaḥ
english: If the lord of the third house (vikrameśa) is weak and conjoined with the lord of the tenth house, and the lord of the ninth house (bhāgyapa) is in its debilitation sign and combust (mūḍha), this combination (yoga) leads to a life of begging for food.

sanskrit: षष्ठाष्टमव्यये भानू रन्ध्रेशे भाग्यसंयुते । व्ययेशे लग्नराशिस्थे षष्ठेशे पञ्चमे स्थिते ॥१३॥
transliteration: ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyaye bhānū randhreśe bhāgyasaṃyute . vyayeśe lagnarāśisthe ṣaṣṭheśe pañcame sthite.
separated_sandhi: ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyaye bhānū randhreśe bhāgyasaṃyutevyayeśe lagnarāśisthe ṣaṣṭheśe pañcame sthite
english: If the Sun is in the 6th, 8th, or 12th house, and the lord of the 8th house is associated with the lord of the 9th house, and the lord of the 12th house is in the ascendant, and the lord of the 6th house is in the 5th house (this indicates a specific astrological condition, with the prediction to follow in subsequent verses).

sanskrit: जातस्य जननात्पूर्वं जनकस्य मृतिर्भवेत् । रन्ध्रस्थानगते सूर्ये रन्ध्रेशे भाग्यभावगे ॥१४॥
transliteration: jātasya jananātpūrvaṃ janakasya mṛtirbhavet . randhrasthānagate sūrye randhreśe bhāgyabhāvage.
separated_sandhi: jātasya jananāt pūrvaṃ janakasya mṛtiḥ bhavetrandhrasthānagate sūrye randhreśe bhāgyabhāvage
english: If the Sun is in the 8th house, and the lord of the 8th house is situated in the 9th house, then the native's father will die before the native's birth.

sanskrit: जातस्य प्रथमाब्दे तु पितुर्मरणमादिशेत् । व्ययेशे भाग्यराशिस्थे नीचांशे भाग्यनायके ॥१५॥
transliteration: jātasya prathamābde tu piturmaraṇamādiśet . vyayeśe bhāgyarāśisthe nīcāṃśe bhāgyanāyake.
separated_sandhi: jātasya prathamābde tu pituḥ maraṇam ādiśetvyayeśe bhāgyarāśisthe nīcāṃśe bhāgyanāyake
english: One should predict the death of the native's father in the native's first year of life if the lord of the 12th house is situated in the 9th house, and the lord of the 9th house is in a debilitated sign.

sanskrit: तृतीये षोडशे वर्षे जनकस्य मृतिर्भवेत् । लग्नेशे नाशराशिस्थे रन्ध्रेशे भानुसंयुते ॥१६॥
transliteration: tṛtīye ṣoḍaśe varṣe janakasya mṛtirbhavet . lagneśe nāśarāśisthe randhreśe bhānusaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: tṛtīye ṣoḍaśe varṣe janakasya mṛtiḥ bhavetlagneśe nāśarāśisthe randhreśe bhānusaṃyute
english: The father's death will occur in the 3rd or 16th year if the ascendant lord is situated in the 8th house and the lord of the 8th house is conjoined with the Sun.

sanskrit: द्वितीये द्वादशे वर्षे पितुर्मरणमादिशेत् । भाग्याद्रन्ध्रगते राहौ भाग्याद्भाग्यगते रवौ ॥१७॥
transliteration: dvitīye dvādaśe varṣe piturmaraṇamādiśet . bhāgyādrandhragate rāhau bhāgyādbhāgyagate ravau.
separated_sandhi: dvitīye dvādaśe varṣe pituḥ maraṇam ādiśetbhāgyāt randhragate rāhau bhāgyāt bhāgyagate ravau
english: One should predict the father's death in the 2nd or 12th year if Rāhu is situated in the 4th house (8th from the 9th), and the Sun is situated in the 5th house (9th from the 9th).

sanskrit: षोडशेऽष्टादशे वर्षे जनकस्य मृतिर्भवेत् । राहुणा सहिते सूर्ये चन्द्राद्भाग्यगते शनौ ॥१८॥
transliteration: ṣoḍaśe'ṣṭādaśe varṣe janakasya mṛtirbhavet . rāhuṇā sahite sūrye candrādbhāgyagate śanau.
separated_sandhi: ṣoḍaśe aṣṭādaśe varṣe janakasya mṛtiḥ bhavetrāhuṇā sahite sūrye candrāt bhāgyagate śanau
english: The death of the father will occur in the sixteenth or eighteenth year, when the Sun is conjoined with Rahu and Saturn is in the ninth house from the Moon.

sanskrit: सप्तमैकोनविंशाब्दे तातस्य मरणं ध्रुवम् । भाग्येशे व्ययराशिस्थे व्ययेशे भाग्यराशिगे ॥१९॥
transliteration: saptamaikonaviṃśābde tātasya maraṇaṃ dhruvam . bhāgyeśe vyayarāśisthe vyayeśe bhāgyarāśige.
separated_sandhi: saptama ekonaviṃśa abde tātasya maraṇam dhruvambhāgyeśe vyayarāśisthe vyayeśe bhāgyarāśige
english: The father's death is certain in the seventh or nineteenth year, when the lord of the ninth house is situated in the twelfth house, and the lord of the twelfth house is situated in the ninth house.

sanskrit: वदाब्धिमितवर्षाच्च पितुर्मरणमादिशेत् । रव्यंशे च स्थिते चन्द्रे लग्नेशे रन्ध्रसंयुते ॥२०॥
transliteration: vadābdhimitavarṣācca piturmaraṇamādiśet . ravyaṃśe ca sthite candre lagneśe randhrasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: vada abdhi mita varṣāt ca pituḥ maraṇam ādiśet raviaṃśe ca sthite candre lagna īśe randhra saṃyute
english: One should predict the death of the father from the forty-fourth year, and when the Moon is situated in the navamsha of the Sun, and the lord of the ascendant is conjoined with the eighth house.

sanskrit: पञ्चत्रिंशैकचत्वारिंशद्वर्षे मरणं पितुः । पितृस्थानाधिपे सूर्ये मन्दभौमसमन्विते ॥२१॥
transliteration: pañcatriṃśaikacatvāriṃśadvarṣe maraṇaṃ pituḥ . pitṛsthānādhipe sūrye mandabhaumasamanvite.
separated_sandhi: pañcatriṃśa ekacatvāriṃśat varṣe maraṇam pituḥpitṛ sthāna adhipe sūrye manda bhauma samanvite
english: The father's death occurs in the thirty-fifth or forty-first year, when the Sun, being the lord of the house of the father (the ninth house), is conjoined with Saturn and Mars.

sanskrit: पञ्चाशद्वत्सरे प्राप्ते जनकस्य मृतिर्भवेत् । भाग्यात् सप्तमगे सूर्ये भ्रातृसप्तमगस्तमः ॥२२॥
transliteration: pañcāśadvatsare prāpte janakasya mṛtirbhavet . bhāgyāt saptamage sūrye bhrātṛsaptamagastamaḥ.
separated_sandhi: pañcāśat vatsare prāpte janakasya mṛtiḥ bhavetbhāgyāt saptamage sūrye bhrātṛ saptama gaḥ tamaḥ
english: The father's death will occur when the fiftieth year is attained, and the Sun is in the seventh house from the ninth (i.e., the third house from the ascendant), and Rahu (tamas) is in the seventh house from the third house (i.e., the ninth house from the ascendant).

sanskrit: षष्ठेऽब्दे पञ्चविंशाब्दे पितुर्मरणमादिशेत् । रन्ध्रजामित्रगे मन्दे मन्दाज्जामित्रगे रवौ ॥२३॥
transliteration: ṣaṣṭhe'bde pañcaviṃśābde piturmaraṇamādiśet . randhrajāmitrage mande mandājjāmitrage ravau.
separated_sandhi: ṣaṣṭhe abde pañcaviṃśābde pituḥ maraṇam ādiśetrandhrajāmitrage mande mandāt jāmitrage ravau
english: One should predict the father's death in the sixth or twenty-fifth year if Saturn (manda) is located in the eighth house or the seventh house, or if the Sun (ravi) is located in the seventh house from Saturn.

sanskrit: त्रिंशैकविंशे षड्विंशे जनकस्य मृतिर्भवेत् । भाग्येशे नीचराशिस्थे तदीशे भाग्यराशिगे ॥२४॥
transliteration: triṃśaikaviṃśe ṣaḍviṃśe janakasya mṛtirbhavet . bhāgyeśe nīcarāśisthe tadīśe bhāgyarāśige.
separated_sandhi: triṃśaikaviṃśe ṣaḍviṃśe janakasya mṛtiḥ bhavetbhāgyeśe nīcarāśisthe tadīśe bhāgyarāśige
english: The death of the father may occur in the thirty-first or twenty-sixth year if the lord of the ninth house (bhāgyeśa) is situated in a debilitated sign, and the lord of that debilitated sign is located in the ninth house.

sanskrit: षड्विंशेऽब्दे त्रयस्त्रिंशे पितुर्मरणमादिशेत् । एवं जातस्य दैवज्ञो फलं ज्ञात्वा विनिर्दिशेत् ॥२५॥
transliteration: ṣaḍviṃśe'bde trayastriṃśe piturmaraṇamādiśet . evaṃ jātasya daivajño phalaṃ jñātvā vinirdiśet.
separated_sandhi: ṣaḍviṃśe abde trayastriṃśe pituḥ maraṇam ādiśetevam jātasya daivajñaḥ phalam jñātvā vinirdiśet
english: One should predict the father's death in the twenty-sixth or thirty-third year. An astrologer (daivajña) should, in this manner, ascertain the outcome for the native and then declare it.

sanskrit: परमोच्चांशगे शुक्रे भाग्येशेन समन्विते । भ्रातृस्थाने शनियुते बहुभाग्याधिपो भवेत् ॥२६॥
transliteration: paramoccāṃśage śukre bhāgyeśena samanvite . bhrātṛsthāne śaniyute bahubhāgyādhipo bhavet.
separated_sandhi: paramoccāṃśage śukre bhāgyeśena samanvitebhrātṛsthāne śaniyute bahubhāgyādhipaḥ bhavet
english: When Venus (śukra) is in its highest exaltation degree and associated with the lord of the ninth house (bhāgyeśa), and when the third house (bhrātṛsthāna) is conjoined with Saturn (śani), the native will possess great fortune.

sanskrit: गुरुणा संयुते भाग्ये तदीशे केन्द्रराशिगे । विंशद्वर्षात् परं चैव बहुभाग्यं विनिर्दिशेत् ॥२७॥
transliteration: guruṇā saṃyute bhāgye tadīśe kendrarāśige . viṃśadvarṣāt paraṃ caiva bahubhāgyaṃ vinirdiśet.
separated_sandhi: guruṇā saṃyute bhāgye tadīśe kendrarāśige viṃśatvarṣāt param ca eva bahubhāgyam vinirdiśet
english: One should predict abundant fortune after twenty years if the ninth house (bhāgya) is conjoined with Jupiter (guru), and the lord of that ninth house is located in a quadrant house (kendra).

sanskrit: परमोच्चांशगे सौम्ये भाग्येशे भाग्यराशिगे । षट्त्रिंशाच्च परं चैव बहुभाग्यं विनिर्दिशेत् ॥२८॥
transliteration: paramoccāṃśage saumye bhāgyeśe bhāgyarāśige . ṣaṭtriṃśācca paraṃ caiva bahubhāgyaṃ vinirdiśet.
separated_sandhi: paramoccāṃśage saumye bhāgyeśe bhāgyarāśigeṣaṭtriṃśāt ca param ca eva bahubhāgyam vinirdiśet
english: When Mercury is in its highest exaltation, and the lord of the ninth house is situated in the ninth house itself, one should predict great prosperity and much good fortune from the age of thirty-six onwards.

sanskrit: लग्नेशे भाग्यराशिस्थे भाग्येशे लग्नसंयुते । गुरुणा संयुते द्यूने धनवाहनलाभकृत् ॥२९॥
transliteration: lagneśe bhāgyarāśisthe bhāgyeśe lagnasaṃyute . guruṇā saṃyute dyūne dhanavāhanalābhakṛt.
separated_sandhi: lagneśe bhāgyarāśisthe bhāgyeśe lagnasaṃyuteguruṇā saṃyute dyūne dhanavāhanalābhakṛt
english: When the lord of the ascendant is situated in the house of fortune (the ninth house), and the lord of the ninth house is conjoined with the ascendant (lord), and Jupiter is conjoined in the seventh house, then one gains wealth and conveyances.

sanskrit: भाग्याद्भाग्यवतो राहुस्तदीशे निधनं गते । भाग्येशे नीचराशिस्थे भाग्यहीनो भवेन्नरः ॥३०॥
transliteration: bhāgyādbhāgyavato rāhustadīśe nidhanaṃ gate . bhāgyeśe nīcarāśisthe bhāgyahīno bhavennaraḥ.
separated_sandhi: bhāgyāt bhāgyavataḥ rāhuḥ tat-īśe nidhanam gatebhāgyeśe nīcarāśisthe bhāgyahīnaḥ bhavet naraḥ
english: When Rahu is in the ninth house, and the lord of the ninth house has gone to the eighth house, and also when the lord of the ninth house is situated in a debilitated sign, then the person becomes devoid of good fortune.

sanskrit: भाग्यस्थानगते मन्दे शशिना च समन्विते । लग्नेशे नीचराशिस्थे भिक्षाशी च नरो भवेत् ॥३१॥
transliteration: bhāgyasthānagate mande śaśinā ca samanvite . lagneśe nīcarāśisthe bhikṣāśī ca naro bhavet.
separated_sandhi: bhāgyasthānagate mande śaśinā ca samanvitelagneśe nīcarāśisthe bhikṣāśī ca naraḥ bhavet
english: When Saturn is situated in the house of fortune (the ninth house) and accompanied by the Moon, and when the lord of the ascendant is situated in a debilitated sign, then the person becomes a beggar.

sanskrit: एवं भाग्यफलं विप्र संक्षेपात् कथितं मया । लग्नेशभाग्यभावेशस्थित्याऽन्यदपि निर्दिशेत् ॥३२॥
transliteration: evaṃ bhāgyaphalaṃ vipra saṃkṣepāt kathitaṃ mayā . lagneśabhāgyabhāveśasthityā'nyadapi nirdiśet.
separated_sandhi: evam bhāgyaphalam vipra saṃkṣepāt kathitam mayālagneśabhāgyabhāveśasthityā anyat api nirdiśet
english: O Brahmin, thus have I briefly explained the results of fortune. One should also predict other outcomes based on the positions of the lord of the ascendant and the lord of the ninth house.

sanskrit: कर्मभावफलं चाऽथ कथयामि तवाग्रतः । सृणु मैत्रेय तत्त्वेन ब्रह्मगर्गादिभाषितम् ॥१॥
transliteration: karmabhāvaphalaṃ cā'tha kathayāmi tavāgrataḥ . sṛṇu maitreya tattvena brahmagargādibhāṣitam.
separated_sandhi: karma-bhāva-phalam ca atha kathayāmi tava agrataḥśṛṇu Maitreya tattvena brahma-garga-ādi-bhāṣitam
english: And now, I will explain to you the results pertaining to the house of action (karma). Listen carefully, Maitreya, to the essence of what has been spoken by Brahmā, Garga, and other sages.

sanskrit: सबले कर्मभावेशे स्वोच्चे स्वांशे स्वराशिगे । जातस्तातसुखेनाढ्यो यशस्वी शुभकर्मकृत् ॥२॥
transliteration: sabale karmabhāveśe svocce svāṃśe svarāśige . jātastātasukhenāḍhyo yaśasvī śubhakarmakṛt.
separated_sandhi: sabale karma-bhāva-īśe sva-ucche sva-aṃśe sva-rāśi-gejātaḥ tāta-sukhena-āḍhyaḥ yaśasvī śubha-karma-kṛt
english: If the lord of the house of action (karma) is strong, situated in its sign of exaltation, its own divisional chart position (varga), or its own zodiacal sign, the native born will be blessed with happiness from their father, be famous, and perform auspicious deeds.

sanskrit: कर्माधिपो बलोनश्चेत् कर्मवैकल्यमादिशेत् । सैहिः केन्द्रत्रिकोणस्थो ज्योतिष्टोमादियागकृत् ॥३॥
transliteration: karmādhipo balonaścet karmavaikalyamādiśet . saihiḥ kendratrikoṇastho jyotiṣṭomādiyāgakṛt.
separated_sandhi: karma-adhipaḥ bala-ūnaḥ cet karma-vaikalyaṃ ādiśetsaihiḥ kendra-trikoṇa-sthaḥ jyotiṣṭoma-ādi-yāga-kṛt
english: If the lord of one's actions (karma) or profession is weak, it indicates a deficiency or fault in one's profession. If Rahu is situated in an angular (kendra) or trinal (trikoṇa) house, one performs elaborate Vedic rituals (yajña) like the Jyotiṣṭoma.

sanskrit: कर्मेशे शुभसंयुक्ते शुभस्थानगते तथा । राजद्वारे च वाणिज्ये सदा लाभोऽन्यथान्यथा ॥४॥
transliteration: karmeśe śubhasaṃyukte śubhasthānagate tathā . rājadvāre ca vāṇijye sadā lābho'nyathānyathā.
separated_sandhi: karma-īśe śubha-saṃyukte śubha-sthāna-gate tathārāja-dvāre ca vāṇijye sadā lābhaḥ anyathā anyathā
english: If the lord of the house of action (karma) is associated with benefics and is also situated in an auspicious house, then there will always be gain in government affairs and trade. Otherwise, the results will be contrary.

sanskrit: दशमे पापसंयुक्ते लाभे पापसमन्विते । दुष्कृतिं लभते मर्त्यः स्वजनानां विदूषकः ॥५॥
transliteration: daśame pāpasaṃyukte lābhe pāpasamanvite . duṣkṛtiṃ labhate martyaḥ svajanānāṃ vidūṣakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: daśame pāpa-saṃyukte lābhe pāpa-samanviteduṣkṛtim labhate martyaḥ sva-janānām vidūṣakaḥ
english: If the 10th house is associated with malefic planets, and the 11th house (lābha, house of gains) is also connected with malefics, the native commits evil deeds and becomes a slanderer of their own relatives.

sanskrit: कर्मेशे नाशराशिस्थे राहुणा संयुते तथा । जनद्वेषी महामूर्खो दुष्कृतिं लभते नरः ॥६॥
transliteration: karmeśe nāśarāśisthe rāhuṇā saṃyute tathā . janadveṣī mahāmūrkho duṣkṛtiṃ labhate naraḥ.
separated_sandhi: karmeśe nāśarāśisthe rāhuṇā saṃyute tathājanadveṣī mahāmūrkhaḥ duṣkṛtim labhate naraḥ
english: If the lord of the 10th house is situated in the 12th house (nāśarāśi) and conjoined with Rahu, then the person becomes hateful towards people, a great fool, and prone to committing misdeeds.

sanskrit: कर्मेशे द्यूनराशिस्थे मन्दभौमसमन्विते । द्यूनेशे पापसंयुते शिश्नोदरपरायणः ॥७॥
transliteration: karmeśe dyūnarāśisthe mandabhaumasamanvite . dyūneśe pāpasaṃyute śiśnodaraparāyaṇaḥ.
separated_sandhi: karmeśe dyūnarāśisthe mandabhaumasamanvitedyūneśe pāpasaṃyute śiśnodaraparāyaṇaḥ
english: If the lord of the 10th house is situated in the 7th house (dyūnarāśi) and conjoined with Saturn (Manda) and Mars (Bhauma), and the lord of the 7th house is also conjoined with malefic planets, the person becomes excessively devoted to sensual and gastronomical pleasures.

sanskrit: तुङ्गराशिं समाश्रित्य कर्मेशे गुरुसंयुते । भाग्येशे कर्मराशिस्थे मानैश्वर्यप्रतापवान् ॥८॥
transliteration: tuṅgarāśiṃ samāśritya karmeśe gurusaṃyute . bhāgyeśe karmarāśisthe mānaiśvaryapratāpavān.
separated_sandhi: tuṅgarāśim samāśritya karmeśe gurusaṃyutebhāgyeśe karmarāśisthe mānāiśvaryapratāpavān
english: If the lord of the 10th house occupies its exaltation sign (tuṅgarāśi) and is conjoined with Jupiter (guru), and simultaneously the lord of the 9th house (bhāgya bhava) is situated in the 10th house (karma rāśi), the person becomes endowed with honor, prosperity, and great influence.

sanskrit: लाभेशे कर्मराशिस्थे कर्मेशे लग्नसंयुते । तावुभौ केन्द्रगौ वापि सुखजीवनभाग् भवेत् ॥९॥
transliteration: lābheśe karmarāśisthe karmeśe lagnasaṃyute . tāvubhau kendragau vāpi sukhajīvanabhāg bhavet.
separated_sandhi: lābheśe karmarāśisthe karmeśe lagnasaṃyute tauubhau kendragau vā api sukhajīvanabhāk bhavet
english: If the lord of the 11th house is situated in the 10th house, and the lord of the 10th house is conjoined with the ascendant (lagna), or if both these lords are in angular houses (kendra), then the person will certainly lead a happy life.

sanskrit: कर्मेशे बलसंयुक्ते मीने गुरुसमन्विते । वस्त्राभरणसौख्यादि लभते नात्र संशयः ॥१०॥
transliteration: karmeśe balasaṃyukte mīne gurusamanvite . vastrābharaṇasaukhyādi labhate nātra saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: karmeśe balasaṃyukte mīne gurusamanvitevastrābharaṇasaukhyādi labhate na atra saṃśayaḥ
english: If the lord of the 10th house is endowed with strength and is conjoined with Jupiter (guru) in the sign of Pisces (Mīna), the person will obtain clothes, ornaments, and various forms of happiness; there is no doubt about this.

sanskrit: लाभस्थानगते सूर्ये राहुभौमसमन्विते । रविपुत्रेण संयुक्ते कर्मच्छेत्ता भवेन्नरः ॥११॥
transliteration: lābhasthānagate sūrye rāhubhaumasamanvite . raviputreṇa saṃyukte karmacchettā bhavennaraḥ.
separated_sandhi: lābhasthānagate sūrye rāhu bhauma samanviteraviputreṇa saṃyukte karmacchettā bhavet naraḥ
english: When the Sun is situated in the house of gain, accompanied by Rahu and Mars, and conjoined with Saturn, that person becomes one who destroys (past) actions (karma).

sanskrit: मीने जीवे भृगुयुते लग्नेशे बलसंयुते । स्वोच्चराशिगते चन्द्रे सम्यग्ज्ञानार्थवान् भवेत् ॥१२॥
transliteration: mīne jīve bhṛguyute lagneśe balasaṃyute . svoccarāśigate candre samyagjñānārthavān bhavet.
separated_sandhi: mīne jīve bhṛgu yute lagneśe bala saṃyute svoccarāśigate candre samyak jñāna arthavān bhavet
english: When Jupiter is in Pisces, accompanied by Venus, and the lord of the Ascendant is endowed with strength, and the Moon is situated in its sign of exaltation, that person becomes endowed with perfect knowledge and wealth.

sanskrit: केन्द्रेशे लाभराशिस्थे लाभेशे लग्नसंस्थिते । कर्मराशिस्थिते शुक्रे रत्नवान् स नरो भवेत् ॥१३॥
transliteration: kendreśe lābharāśisthe lābheśe lagnasaṃsthite . karmarāśisthite śukre ratnavān sa naro bhavet.
separated_sandhi: kendreśe lābharāśisthe lābheśe lagna saṃsthitekarma rāśisthe śukre ratnavān sa naraḥ bhavet
english: When the lord of an angular house (kendra) is situated in the house of gain, and the lord of gain is positioned in the Ascendant, and Venus is in the house of action (karma), that person becomes endowed with jewels.

sanskrit: केन्द्रत्रिकोणगे कर्मनाथे स्वोच्चसमाश्रिते । गुरुणा सहिते दृष्टे स कर्मसहितो भवेत् ॥१४॥
transliteration: kendratrikoṇage karmanāthe svoccasamāśrite . guruṇā sahite dṛṣṭe sa karmasahito bhavet.
separated_sandhi: kendra trikoṇage karmanāthe svocca samāśriteguruṇā sahite dṛṣṭe sa karma sahitaḥ bhavet
english: When the lord of action (karma) is situated in an angular (kendra) or trine (trikoṇa) house, occupying its sign of exaltation, and is conjoined with Jupiter and aspected by Jupiter, that person becomes one engaged in significant actions (karma).

sanskrit: कर्मेशे लग्नभावस्थे लग्नेशेन समन्विते । केन्द्रत्रिकोणगे चन्द्रे सत्कर्मनिरतो भवेत् ॥१५॥
transliteration: karmeśe lagnabhāvasthe lagneśena samanvite . kendratrikoṇage candre satkarmanirato bhavet.
separated_sandhi: karmeśe lagnabhāvasthe lagneśena samanvitekendra trikoṇage candre sat karma nirataḥ bhavet
english: When the lord of action (karma) is situated in the Ascendant house, accompanied by the lord of the Ascendant, and the Moon is in an angular (kendra) or trine (trikoṇa) house, that person becomes devoted to virtuous actions (karma).

sanskrit: कर्मस्थानगते मन्दे नीचखेचरसंयुते । कर्मांशे पापसंयुक्ते कर्महीनो भवेन्नरः ॥१६॥
transliteration: karmasthānagate mande nīcakhecarasaṃyute . karmāṃśe pāpasaṃyukte karmahīno bhavennaraḥ.
separated_sandhi: karmasthānagate mande nīcakhecarasaṃyutekarmāṃśe pāpasaṃyukte karmahīnaḥ bhavet naraḥ
english: If Saturn (manda) is in the house of action (karmasthāna) and conjoined with a debilitated planet, and if the tenth house Navāṃśa (karmāṃśa) is associated with a malefic planet, then the person will be devoid of livelihood (karma).

sanskrit: कर्मेशे नाशराशिस्थे रन्ध्रेशे कर्मसंस्थिते । पापग्रहेण संयुक्ते दुष्कर्म निरतो भवेत् ॥१७॥
transliteration: karmeśe nāśarāśisthe randhreśe karmasaṃsthite . pāpagraheṇa saṃyukte duṣkarma nirato bhavet.
separated_sandhi: karmeśe nāśarāśisthe randhreśe karmasaṃsthitepāpagraheṇa saṃyukte duṣkarma nirataḥ bhavet
english: If the lord of the house of action (karmeśa) is situated in the twelfth house (nāśarāśistha), and the lord of the eighth house (randhreśa) is located in the house of action (karma), and this combination is associated with a malefic planet, then the person will be engaged in wicked deeds (duṣkarma).

sanskrit: कर्मेशे नीचराशिस्थे कर्मस्थे पापखेचरे । कर्मभात्कर्मगे पापे कर्मवैकल्यमादिशेत् ॥१८॥
transliteration: karmeśe nīcarāśisthe karmasthe pāpakhecare . karmabhātkarmage pāpe karmavaikalyamādiśet.
separated_sandhi: karmeśe nīcarāśisthe karmasthe pāpakhecarekarmabhāt karmage pāpe karmavaikalyaṃ ādiśet
english: If the lord of the house of action (karmeśa) is in a debilitated sign (nīcarāśistha), and a malefic planet (pāpakhecara) is situated in the house of action (karma), and another malefic is located in the seventh house (which is the tenth house from the tenth house of action), then one should predict a deficiency in livelihood (karma).

sanskrit: कर्मस्थानगते चन्द्रे तदीशे तत्त्रिकोणगे । लग्नेशे केन्द्रभावस्थे सत्कीर्तिसहितो भवेत् ॥१९॥
transliteration: karmasthānagate candre tadīśe tattrikoṇage . lagneśe kendrabhāvasthe satkīrtisahito bhavet.
separated_sandhi: karmasthānagate candre tadīśe tattrikoṇagelagneśe kendrabhāvasthe satkīrtisahitaḥ bhavet
english: If the Moon (candra) is in the house of action (karmasthāna), and its lord (tadīśa) is in a trine (trikoṇa) from it, and the lord of the ascendant (lagneśa) is situated in an angular house (kendrabhāvastha), then the person will be endowed with good fame (satkīrti).

sanskrit: लाभेशे कर्मभावस्थे कर्मेशे बलसंयुक्ते । देवेन्द्रगुरुणा दृष्टे सत्कीर्तिसहितो भवेत् ॥२०॥
transliteration: lābheśe karmabhāvasthe karmeśe balasaṃyukte . devendraguruṇā dṛṣṭe satkīrtisahito bhavet.
separated_sandhi: lābheśe karmabhāvasthe karmeśe balasaṃyuktedevendraguruṇā dṛṣṭe satkīrtisahitaḥ bhavet
english: If the lord of the house of gain (lābheśa) is situated in the house of action (karmabhāva), and the lord of the house of action (karmeśa) is endowed with strength, and this combination is aspected by Jupiter (devendraguru), then the person will possess good fame (satkīrti).

sanskrit: कर्मस्थानाधिपे भाग्ये लग्नेशे कर्मसंयुते । लग्नात् पञ्चमगे चन्द्रे ख्यातनामा नरो भवेत् ॥२१॥
transliteration: karmasthānādhipe bhāgye lagneśe karmasaṃyute . lagnāt pañcamage candre khyātanāmā naro bhavet.
separated_sandhi: karmasthānādhipe bhāgye lagneśe karmasaṃyutelagnāt pañcamage candre khyātanāmā naraḥ bhavet
english: If the lord of the 10th house (karma-sthāna) is situated in the 9th house (bhāgya-sthāna), and the lord of the ascendant (lagna-īśa) is associated with the 10th house, and the Moon is in the 5th house from the ascendant, then a person becomes renowned.

sanskrit: इति कर्मफलं प्रोक्तं संक्षेपेण द्विजोत्तम । लग्नकर्मेशसम्बन्धादूह्यमन्यदपि स्वयम् ॥२२॥
transliteration: iti karmaphalaṃ proktaṃ saṃkṣepeṇa dvijottama . lagnakarmeśasambandhādūhyamanyadapi svayam.
separated_sandhi: iti karmaphalam proktam saṃkṣepeṇa dvijottamalagnakarmesasambandhāt ūhyam anyat api svayam
english: Thus, O best among the twice-born (dvijottama), the results of actions (karma-phalam) have been briefly explained. One should also infer other outcomes oneself from the connections of the ascendant (lagna) and the lord of the 10th house (karma-īśa).

sanskrit: लाभभावफलञ्चाथ कथयामि द्विजोत्तम । श्रूयतां जातको लोके यच्छुभत्वे सदा सुखी ॥१॥
transliteration: lābhabhāvaphalañcātha kathayāmi dvijottama . śrūyatāṃ jātako loke yacchubhatve sadā sukhī.
separated_sandhi: lābhabhāvaphalam ca atha kathayāmi dvijottamaśrūyatām jātakaḥ loke yat śubhatve sadā sukhī
english: Now, O best among the twice-born (dvijottama), I will speak of the results pertaining to the house of gain (lābha-bhāva). Listen! The native (jātaka) in the world, when auspicious conditions (śubhatva) prevail, is always happy.

sanskrit: लाभाधिपो यदा लाभे तिष्टेत् केन्द्रत्रिकोणयोः । बहुलाभं तदा कुर्यादुच्चे सूर्यांशगोऽपि वा ॥२॥
transliteration: lābhādhipo yadā lābhe tiṣṭet kendratrikoṇayoḥ . bahulābhaṃ tadā kuryāducce sūryāṃśago'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: lābhādhipaḥ yadā lābhe tiṣṭhet kendratrikoṇayoḥbahulābham tadā kuryāt ucce sūryāṃśagaḥ api vā
english: When the lord of the house of gain (lābha-adhipa) is situated in the house of gain, or in an angular house (kendra) or a trinal house (trikona), then the native will achieve much gain (bahulābha). This also applies if that lord is exalted (ucca) or is in a division (aṃśa) ruled by the Sun (sūryāṃśa-ga).

sanskrit: लाभेशे धनराशिस्थे धनेशे केन्द्रसंस्थिते । गुरुणा सहिते भावे गुरुलाभं विनिर्दिशेत् ॥३॥
transliteration: lābheśe dhanarāśisthe dhaneśe kendrasaṃsthite . guruṇā sahite bhāve gurulābhaṃ vinirdiśet.
separated_sandhi: lābheśe dhanarāsisthite dhaneśe kendrasaṃsthiteguruṇā sahite bhāve gurulābham vinirdiśet
english: When the lord of the 11th house (lābha-īśa) is situated in the 2nd house (dhana-rāśi), and the lord of the 2nd house (dhana-īśa) is situated in an angular house (kendra-saṃsthita), and if Jupiter (guru) is associated with that house (bhāva), then it indicates significant gains (gurulābha).

sanskrit: लाभेशे विक्रमे भावे शुभग्रहसमन्विते । षट्त्रिंशे वत्सरे प्राप्ते सहस्रद्वयनिष्कभाक् ॥४॥
transliteration: lābheśe vikrame bhāve śubhagrahasamanvite . ṣaṭtriṃśe vatsare prāpte sahasradvayaniṣkabhāk.
separated_sandhi: lābheśe vikrame bhāve śubhagrahsammanviteṣaṭtriṃśe vatsare prāpte sahasradvayaniṣkabhāk
english: If the lord of the eleventh house (gains) is situated in the third house (valor) and is associated with auspicious planets, then in the thirty-sixth year, the native will enjoy two thousand niṣkas (units of wealth).

sanskrit: केन्द्रत्रिकोणगे लाभनाथे शुभसमन्विते । चत्वारिंशे तु सम्प्राप्ते सहस्रार्धसुनिष्कभाक् ॥५॥
transliteration: kendratrikoṇage lābhanāthe śubhasamanvite . catvāriṃśe tu samprāpte sahasrārdhasuniṣkabhāk.
separated_sandhi: kendratrikoṇage lābhanāthe śubhasamanvitecatvāriṃśe tu samprāpte sahasrārdhasuniṣkabhāk
english: If the lord of the eleventh house (gains) is situated in a kendra (angular) or trikoṇa (trine) house and is associated with auspicious planets, then upon reaching the fortieth year, the native will enjoy five hundred good niṣkas (units of wealth).

sanskrit: लाभस्थाने गुरुयुते धने चन्द्रसमन्विते । भाग्यस्थानगते शुक्रे षट्सहस्राधिपो भवेत् ॥६॥
transliteration: lābhasthāne guruyute dhane candrasamanvite . bhāgyasthānagate śukre ṣaṭsahasrādhipo bhavet.
separated_sandhi: lābhasthāne guruyute dhane candrasamanvitebhāgyasthānagate śukre ṣaṭsahasrādhipaḥ bhavet
english: If Jupiter is in the eleventh house (gains), the Moon is associated with the second house (wealth), and Venus is situated in the ninth house (fortune), the native will become the owner of six thousand (units of wealth).

sanskrit: लाभाच्च लाभगे जीवे बुधचन्द्रसमन्विते । धनधान्याधिपः श्रीमान्त्रत्नाद्याभरणैर्युतः ॥७॥
transliteration: lābhācca lābhage jīve budhacandrasamanvite . dhanadhānyādhipaḥ śrīmāntratnādyābharaṇairyutaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lābhāt ca lābhage jīve budhacandrasamanvitedhanadhānyādhipaḥ śrīmān ratnādyābharaṇaiḥ yutaḥ
english: If Jupiter is situated in the eleventh house (gains) and is conjoined with Mercury and the Moon, then the native becomes the lord of wealth and grain, prosperous, and endowed with jewels and other ornaments.

sanskrit: लाभेशे लग्नभावस्थे लग्नेशे लाभसंयुते । त्रयस्त्रिंशे तु सम्प्राप्ते सहस्रनिष्कभाग् भवेत् ॥८॥
transliteration: lābheśe lagnabhāvasthe lagneśe lābhasaṃyute . trayastriṃśe tu samprāpte sahasraniṣkabhāg bhavet.
separated_sandhi: lābheśe lagṇabhāvasthite lagṇeśe lābhasaṃyutetrayastriṃśe tu samprāpte sahasraniṣkabhāk bhavet
english: If the lord of the eleventh house (gains) is situated in the first house (ascendant), and the lord of the ascendant is conjoined with the eleventh house, then upon reaching the thirty-third year, the native will enjoy a thousand niṣkas (units of wealth).

sanskrit: धनेशे लाभराशिस्थे लाभेशे धनराशिगे । विवाहात्परतश्चैव बहुभाग्यं समादिशेत् ॥९॥
transliteration: dhaneśe lābharāśisthe lābheśe dhanarāśige . vivāhātparataścaiva bahubhāgyaṃ samādiśet.
separated_sandhi: dhaneśe lābharāśisthe lābheśe dhanarāśigevivāhāt parataḥ ca eva bahubhāgyam samādiśet
english: When the lord of the house of wealth (2nd house) is located in the house of gains (11th house), and the lord of the house of gains (11th house) moves into the house of wealth (2nd house), one should predict great fortune after marriage.

sanskrit: भ्रातृपे लाभराशिस्थे लाभेशे भ्रातृसंस्थिते । भ्रातृभावाद्धनप्राप्तिदिव्याभरणसंयुतः ॥१०॥
transliteration: bhrātṛpe lābharāśisthe lābheśe bhrātṛsaṃsthite . bhrātṛbhāvāddhanaprāptidivyābharaṇasaṃyutaḥ.
separated_sandhi: bhrātṛpe lābharāśisthe lābheśe bhrātṛsaṃsthitebhrātṛbhāvāt dhanaprāpti divyābharaṇasaṃyutaḥ
