sanskrit: लभेशे भाग्यभावस्थे भाग्यवान् जायते नरः । चतुरः सत्यवादी च राजपुज्यो धनाधिपः ॥१२९॥
transliteration: labheśe bhāgyabhāvasthe bhāgyavān jāyate naraḥ . caturaḥ satyavādī ca rājapujyo dhanādhipaḥ.
separated_sandhi: labheśe bhāgyabhāvasthe bhāgyavān jāyate naraḥcaturaḥ satyavādī ca rājapujyaḥ dhanādhipaḥ
english: When the lord of the house of gains is located in the house of fortune, a person is born fortunate. He becomes clever, truthful, honored by rulers, and a master of wealth.

sanskrit: लाभेशे कर्मभावस्थे भूपवन्द्यो गुणान्वितः । निजधर्मरतो धीमान् सत्यवादी जितेन्द्रियः ॥१३०॥
transliteration: lābheśe karmabhāvasthe bhūpavandyo guṇānvitaḥ . nijadharmarato dhīmān satyavādī jitendriyaḥ.
separated_sandhi: labheśe karmabhāvasthe bhūpavandyaḥ guṇānvitaḥnijadharmarataḥ dhīmān satyavādī jitendriyaḥ
english: When the lord of the house of gains is located in the house of action (karma), the person is honored by kings, endowed with good qualities, devoted to his own intrinsic nature (dharma), intelligent, truthful, and has conquered his senses.

sanskrit: लाभेशे लाभभावस्थे लाभः सर्वेषु कर्मसु । पण्डित्यं च सुखं तस्य वर्द्धते च दिने दिने ॥१३१॥
transliteration: lābheśe lābhabhāvasthe lābhaḥ sarveṣu karmasu . paṇḍityaṃ ca sukhaṃ tasya varddhate ca dine dine.
separated_sandhi: labheśe lābhabhāvasthe lābhaḥ sarveṣu karmasupaṇḍityaṃ ca sukhaṃ tasya varddhate ca dine dine
english: When the lord of the house of gains (lābha-bhāva) is situated in the house of gains, the person achieves profit in all undertakings (karma). His wisdom and happiness also increase day by day.

sanskrit: लाभेशे व्ययभावस्थे सत्कार्येषु व्ययः सदा । कामुको बहुपत्नीको म्लेच्छसंसर्गकारकः ॥१३२॥
transliteration: lābheśe vyayabhāvasthe satkāryeṣu vyayaḥ sadā . kāmuko bahupatnīko mlecchasaṃsargakārakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: labheśe vyayabhāvasthe satkāryeṣu vyayaḥ sadākāmukaḥ bahupatnīkaḥ mlecchasaṃsargakārakaḥ
english: When the lord of the house of gains is situated in the house of loss (vyaya-bhāva), there is always expenditure on virtuous actions. Such a person is lustful, has many wives, and associates with people outside of traditional social order (mleccha).

sanskrit: व्ययेशे लग्नगे जातो व्ययशीलो जतो भवेत् । दुर्बलः कफरोगी च धनविद्याविवर्जितः ॥१३३॥
transliteration: vyayeśe lagnage jāto vyayaśīlo jato bhavet . durbalaḥ kapharogī ca dhanavidyāvivarjitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: vyayeśe lagnage jātaḥ vyayaśīlaḥ jātaḥ bhavetdurbalaḥ kapharogī ca dhanavidyāvivarjitaḥ
english: When the lord of the house of loss is in the Ascendant, the person born becomes extravagant. He is weak, prone to phlegm-related ailments, and devoid of both wealth and knowledge.

sanskrit: व्ययेशे धनभावस्थे शुभकार्ये व्ययः सदा । धार्मिकः प्रियवादी च गुणसौख्यसमन्वितः ॥१३४॥
transliteration: vyayeśe dhanabhāvasthe śubhakārye vyayaḥ sadā . dhārmikaḥ priyavādī ca guṇasaukhyasamanvitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: vyayeśe dhanabhāvasthe śubhakārye vyayaḥ sadādhārmikaḥ priyavādī ca guṇasaukhyasamanvitaḥ
english: When the lord of the twelfth house is situated in the second house, there is always expenditure on auspicious activities. Such a person is righteous (dharma), speaks pleasantly, and is endowed with good qualities and happiness.

sanskrit: व्ययेशे सहजे जातो भ्रातृसौक्यविवर्जितः । भवेदन्यजनद्वेषी स्वशरीरस्य पोषकः ॥१३५॥
transliteration: vyayeśe sahaje jāto bhrātṛsaukyavivarjitaḥ . bhavedanyajanadveṣī svaśarīrasya poṣakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: vyayeśe sahaje jātaḥ bhrātṛsaukhyavivarjitaḥbhavet anyajanadveṣī svaśarīrasya poṣakaḥ
english: When the lord of the twelfth house is situated in the third house, the person is deprived of happiness from siblings. He becomes hostile to other people and is a caretaker of his own body.

sanskrit: व्ययेशे सुखभावस्थे मातुः सुखविवर्जितः । भूमियानगृहादीनां हानिस्तस्य दिनेदिने ॥१३६॥
transliteration: vyayeśe sukhabhāvasthe mātuḥ sukhavivarjitaḥ . bhūmiyānagṛhādīnāṃ hānistasya dinedine.
separated_sandhi: vyayeśe sukhabhāvasthe mātuḥ sukhavivarjitaḥbhūmiyānagṛhādīnām hāniḥ tasya dinedine
english: When the lord of the twelfth house is situated in the fourth house, the person is deprived of happiness from his mother. There is a daily loss for him concerning land, conveyances, and houses.

sanskrit: व्ययेशे सुतभावस्थे सुतविद्याविवर्जितः । पुत्रार्थे च व्ययस्तस्य तीर्थाटनपरो नरः ॥१३७॥
transliteration: vyayeśe sutabhāvasthe sutavidyāvivarjitaḥ . putrārthe ca vyayastasya tīrthāṭanaparo naraḥ.
separated_sandhi: vyayeśe sutabhāvasthe sutavidyāvivarjitaḥputrārthe ca vyayaḥ tasya tīrthāṭanaparaḥ naraḥ
english: When the lord of the twelfth house is situated in the fifth house, the person is deprived of children and education. He incurs expenses for the sake of his son, and this man is devoted to pilgrimage.

sanskrit: व्ययेशे रिपुभावस्थे जातः स्वजनवैरकृत् । क्रोधी पापी च दुःखी च परजायारतो नरः ॥१३८॥
transliteration: vyayeśe ripubhāvasthe jātaḥ svajanavairakṛt . krodhī pāpī ca duḥkhī ca parajāyārato naraḥ.
separated_sandhi: vyayeśe ripubhāvasthe jātaḥ svajanavairakṛtkrodhī pāpī ca duḥkhī ca parajāyārataḥ naraḥ
english: When the lord of the twelfth house is situated in the sixth house, the person creates hostility with his own people. He is angry, sinful, and unhappy, and this man is attached to other men's wives.

sanskrit: व्ययेशे दारभावस्थे व्ययो दारकृतः सदा । तस्य भार्यासुखं नैव बलविद्याविवर्जितः ॥१३९॥
transliteration: vyayeśe dārabhāvasthe vyayo dārakṛtaḥ sadā . tasya bhāryāsukhaṃ naiva balavidyāvivarjitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: vyayeśe dārabhāvasthe vyayaḥ dārakṛtaḥ sadātasya bhāryāsukhaṃ na eva balavidyāvivarjitaḥ
english: If the lord of the twelfth house (house of expenditure) is located in the seventh house (house of spouse), there will always be expenses caused by the spouse. Such a person will lack marital happiness and will be devoid of strength and knowledge.

sanskrit: व्ययेशे मृत्युभावस्थे जातो लाभान्वितः सदा । प्रियवाङ् मध्यमायुश्च सम्पूर्णगुणसंयुतः ॥१४०॥
transliteration: vyayeśe mṛtyubhāvasthe jāto lābhānvitaḥ sadā . priyavāṅ madhyamāyuśca sampūrṇaguṇasaṃyutaḥ.
separated_sandhi: vyayeśe mṛtyubhāvasthe jātaḥ lābhānvitaḥ sadāpriyavāk madhyamāyuḥ ca sampūrṇaguṇasaṃyutaḥ
english: If the lord of the twelfth house (house of expenditure) is in the eighth house (house of death/longevity), the native will always be blessed with gains, be sweet-spoken, have a medium lifespan, and possess complete virtues.

sanskrit: व्ययेशे भाग्यभावस्थे गुरुद्वेषी भवेन्नरः । मित्रैरपि भवेद्वैरं स्वार्थसाधनतत्परः ॥१४१॥
transliteration: vyayeśe bhāgyabhāvasthe gurudveṣī bhavennaraḥ . mitrairapi bhavedvairaṃ svārthasādhanatatparaḥ.
separated_sandhi: vyayeśe bhāgyabhāvasthe gurudveṣī bhavet naraḥmitraiḥ api bhavet vairaṃ svārthasādhanatatparaḥ
english: If the lord of the twelfth house (house of expenditure) is in the ninth house (house of fortune), the person becomes hateful towards teachers (guru). There will be enmity even with friends, and the individual will be solely intent on achieving their own self-interest.

sanskrit: व्ययेशे राज्यभावस्थे व्ययो राजकुलाद्भवेत् । पितृतोऽपि सुखं तस्य स्वल्पमेव हि जायते ॥१४२॥
transliteration: vyayeśe rājyabhāvasthe vyayo rājakulādbhavet . pitṛto'pi sukhaṃ tasya svalpameva hi jāyate.
separated_sandhi: vyayeśe rājyabhāvasthe vyayaḥ rājakulāt bhavetpitṛtaḥ api sukhaṃ tasya svalpam eva hi jāyate
english: If the lord of the twelfth house (house of expenditure) is in the tenth house (house of kingdom/profession), expenses will arise from the government or authorities. Such a person will indeed receive very little happiness even from their father.

sanskrit: व्ययेशे लाभभावस्थे लाभे हानिः प्रजायते । परेण रक्षितं द्रव्यं कदाचिल्लभते नरः ॥१४३॥
transliteration: vyayeśe lābhabhāvasthe lābhe hāniḥ prajāyate . pareṇa rakṣitaṃ dravyaṃ kadācillabhate naraḥ.
separated_sandhi: vyayeśe lābhabhāvasthe lābhe hāniḥ prajāyatepareṇa rakṣitaṃ dravyaṃ kadācit labhate naraḥ
english: If the lord of the twelfth house (house of expenditure) is in the eleventh house (house of gains), there will be losses concerning gains. The person may sometimes obtain wealth that was protected or kept by others.

sanskrit: व्ययेशे व्ययभावस्थे व्ययाधिक्यं हि जायते । न शरीरसुखं तस्य क्रोधी द्वेषपरो नृणाम् ॥१४४॥
transliteration: vyayeśe vyayabhāvasthe vyayādhikyaṃ hi jāyate . na śarīrasukhaṃ tasya krodhī dveṣaparo nṛṇām.
separated_sandhi: vyayeśe vyayabhāvasthe vyayādhikyam hi jāyate| na śarīrasukham tasya krodhī dveṣaparaḥ nṛṇām
english: When the lord of the twelfth house (vyayeśa) is situated in the twelfth house (vyayabhāva), there is indeed excessive expenditure. That person experiences no physical comfort; he is angry and hostile towards people.

sanskrit: इति ते कथितं विप्र भावेशानां च यत् फलम् । बलाबलविवेकेन सर्वेषं तत्समादिशेत् ॥१४५॥
transliteration: iti te kathitaṃ vipra bhāveśānāṃ ca yat phalam . balābalavivekena sarveṣaṃ tatsamādiśet.
separated_sandhi: iti te kathitam vipra bhāveśānām ca yat phalam| balābalavivekena sarveṣām tat samādiśet
english: O Brahmin (vipra), thus has been explained to you the effect of the lords of the houses. One should declare all these effects by discerning their strengths and weaknesses.

sanskrit: द्विराशीशस्य खेटस्य विदित्वोभयथा फलम् । विरोधे तुल्यफलयोर्द्वयोर्नाशः प्रजायते ॥१४६॥
transliteration: dvirāśīśasya kheṭasya viditvobhayathā phalam . virodhe tulyaphalayordvayornāśaḥ prajāyate.
separated_sandhi: dvirāśīśasya kheṭasya viditvā ubhayathā phalam| virodhe tulyaphalayoḥ dvayoḥ nāśaḥ prajāyate
english: Having known the two-fold effects of a planet that is the lord of two signs, if the two effects are equal and contradictory, both will be destroyed.

sanskrit: विभिन्नयोस्तु फलयोर्द्वयोः प्राप्तिर्भवेद्ध्रुवम् । ग्रहे पूर्णबले पुर्णमर्धमर्धबले फलम् ॥१४७॥
transliteration: vibhinnayostu phalayordvayoḥ prāptirbhaveddhruvam . grahe pūrṇabale purṇamardhamardhabale phalam.
separated_sandhi: vibhinnayoḥ tu phalayoḥ dvayoḥ prāptiḥ bhavet dhruvam| grahe pūrṇabale pūrṇam ardham ardhabale phalam
english: However, if the two effects are different, then certainly both will be obtained. If the planet has full strength, the full effect manifests; if it has half strength, half the effect manifests.

sanskrit: पादं हीनबले खेटे ज्ञेयमित्थं बुधैरिति । उक्तं भावस्थितानां ते भावेशानां पलं मया ॥१४८॥
transliteration: pādaṃ hīnabale kheṭe jñeyamitthaṃ budhairiti . uktaṃ bhāvasthitānāṃ te bhāveśānāṃ palaṃ mayā.
separated_sandhi: pādam hīnabale kheṭe jñeyam ittham budhaiḥ iti| uktam bhāvasthitānām te bhāveśānām phalam mayā
english: Similarly, a quarter (pāda) effect should be known when the planet has weak strength – this is what the wise ones say. Thus, I have explained to you the effects of the lords of the houses situated in various houses.

sanskrit: रव्यादिसप्तखेटानां प्रोक्तं भावफलं मया । अप्रकाशग्रहाणां च फलानि कथयाम्यहम् ॥१॥
transliteration: ravyādisaptakheṭānāṃ proktaṃ bhāvaphalaṃ mayā . aprakāśagrahāṇāṃ ca phalāni kathayāmyaham.
separated_sandhi: ravyādisaptakheṭānām proktam bhāvaphalam mayāaprakāśagrahāṇām ca phalāni kathayāmi aham
english: I have already explained the house-specific results of the seven planets, beginning with the Sun. Now, I will describe the results of the invisible planets.

sanskrit: शूरो विमलनेत्रांशः सुस्तब्धो निर्घृणः खलः । मूर्तिस्थे धूमसंज्ञे च गाढरोषो नरः सदा ॥२॥
transliteration: śūro vimalanetrāṃśaḥ sustabdho nirghṛṇaḥ khalaḥ . mūrtisthe dhūmasaṃjñe ca gāḍharoṣo naraḥ sadā.
separated_sandhi: śūraḥ vimalanetrāṃśaḥ sustabdhaḥ nirghṛṇaḥ khalaḥmūrtisthe dhūmasaṃjñe ca gāḍharoṣaḥ naraḥ sadā
english: When the planet Dhūma (dhūma) is situated in the first house (mūrti), the person will always be brave, clear-eyed, very obstinate, merciless, wicked, and exceedingly wrathful.

sanskrit: रोगी धनी तु हीनाङ्गो राज्यापहृतमानसः । धूमे द्वितीये सम्प्राप्ते मन्दप्रज्ञो नपुंसकः ॥३॥
transliteration: rogī dhanī tu hīnāṅgo rājyāpahṛtamānasaḥ . dhūme dvitīye samprāpte mandaprajño napuṃsakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: rogī dhanī tu hīnāṅgaḥ rājyāpahṛtamānasaḥdhūme dvitīye samprāpte mandaprajñaḥ napuṃsakaḥ
english: When Dhūma (dhūma) is situated in the second house, the person will be sickly, wealthy yet having defective limbs, with a mind stolen by the state (i.e., serving the ruler), dull-witted, and impotent.

sanskrit: मतिमान् शौर्यसम्पन्न इष्टचितः प्रियंवदः । धूमे सहजभावस्थे जनाढ्यो धनवान् भवेत् ॥४॥
transliteration: matimān śauryasampanna iṣṭacitaḥ priyaṃvadaḥ . dhūme sahajabhāvasthe janāḍhyo dhanavān bhavet.
separated_sandhi: matimān śauryasampannaḥ iṣṭacitaḥ priyaṃvadaḥdhūme sahajabhāvasthe janāḍhyaḥ dhanavān bhavet
english: When Dhūma (dhūma) is situated in the third house (sahajabhāva), the person will be intelligent, endowed with valor, of agreeable disposition, a kind speaker, surrounded by many people, and wealthy.

sanskrit: कलत्राङ्गपरित्यक्तो नित्यं मनसि दुःखितः । धूमे चतुर्थे सम्प्राप्ते सर्वशास्त्रार्थचिन्तकः ॥५॥
transliteration: kalatrāṅgaparityakto nityaṃ manasi duḥkhitaḥ . dhūme caturthe samprāpte sarvaśāstrārthacintakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: kalatrāṅgaparityaktaḥ nityam manasi duḥkhitaḥdhūme caturthe samprāpte sarvaśāstrārthacintakaḥ
english: When Dhūma (dhūma) is situated in the fourth house, the person will be abandoned by their spouse and physically frail, constantly distressed in mind, and a contemplator of the meanings of all scriptures.

sanskrit: स्वल्पापत्यो धनैर्हीनो धूमे पञ्चमसंस्थिते । गुरुत सर्वभक्षं च सुहृन्मन्त्रविवर्जितः ॥६॥
transliteration: svalpāpatyo dhanairhīno dhūme pañcamasaṃsthite . guruta sarvabhakṣaṃ ca suhṛnmantravivarjitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: svalpāpatyaḥ dhanaiḥ hīnaḥ dhūme pañcamasaṃsthiteguruta sarvabhakṣam ca suhṛnmantravivarjitaḥ
english: When Dhūma is situated in the fifth house, the person has few children, is devoid of wealth, is greedy towards elders, and is deprived of friends and guidance (mantra).

sanskrit: बलवाञ्छत्रुवधको धूमे च रिपुभावगे । बहुतेजोयुतः ख्यातः सदा रोगविवर्जितः ॥७॥
transliteration: balavāñchatruvadhako dhūme ca ripubhāvage . bahutejoyutaḥ khyātaḥ sadā rogavivarjitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: balavān śatruvadhakaḥ dhūme ca ripubhāvagebahutejoyutaḥ khyātaḥ sadā rogavivarjitaḥ
english: When Dhūma is in the sixth house (the house of enemies), the person is strong, a slayer of enemies, endowed with great splendor, famous, and always free from disease.

sanskrit: निर्धनः सततं कामी परदारेषु कोविदः । धूमे सप्तमगे जातो निस्तेजाः सर्वदा भवेत् ॥८॥
transliteration: nirdhanaḥ satataṃ kāmī paradāreṣu kovidaḥ . dhūme saptamage jāto nistejāḥ sarvadā bhavet.
separated_sandhi: nirdhanaḥ satataṃ kāmī paradāreṣu kovidaḥdhūme saptamage jātaḥ nistejāḥ sarvadā bhavet
english: When Dhūma is in the seventh house, the native is born without wealth, is constantly lustful, skilled in approaching other men's wives, and always devoid of splendor.

sanskrit: विक्रमेण परित्यक्तः सोत्साहो सत्यसङ्गरः । अप्रियो निष्ठुरः स्वार्थी धूमे मृत्युगते सति ॥९॥
transliteration: vikrameṇa parityaktaḥ sotsāho satyasaṅgaraḥ . apriyo niṣṭhuraḥ svārthī dhūme mṛtyugate sati.
separated_sandhi: vikrameṇa parityaktaḥ sa-utsāhaḥ satyasaṅgaraḥapriyaḥ niṣṭhuraḥ svārthī dhūme mṛtyugate sati
english: When Dhūma is situated in the eighth house (the house of death), the person is forsaken by valor, but is enthusiastic and truthful in his commitments; he is also unliked, harsh, and selfish.

sanskrit: सुतसौभाग्यसम्पन्नो धनी मानी दयान्वितः । धर्मस्थाने स्थिते धूमे धर्मवान् बन्धुवत्सलः ॥१०॥
transliteration: sutasaubhāgyasampanno dhanī mānī dayānvitaḥ . dharmasthāne sthite dhūme dharmavān bandhuvatsalaḥ.
separated_sandhi: sutasaubhāgyasampannaḥ dhanī mānī dayānvitaḥdharmasthāne sthite dhūme dharmavān bandhuvatsalaḥ
english: When Dhūma is situated in the ninth house (the house of dharma), the person is endowed with children and good fortune, is wealthy, honorable, compassionate, righteous (dharmavān), and affectionate towards relatives.

sanskrit: सुतसौभाग्यसंयुक्तः सन्तोषी मतिमान् सुखी । कर्मस्थे मानवो नित्यं धूमे सत्यपदस्थितः ॥११॥
transliteration: sutasaubhāgyasaṃyuktaḥ santoṣī matimān sukhī . karmasthe mānavo nityaṃ dhūme satyapadasthitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: sutasubhāgyasaṃyuktaḥ santoṣī matimān sukhīkarmasthe mānavaḥ nityam dhūme satyapadasthitaḥ
english: When Dhūma is in the tenth house (karma), a person is always endowed with good fortune concerning children, contented, intelligent, happy, and established on the path of truth.

sanskrit: धनधान्यहिरण्याढ्यो रूपवांश्च कलान्वितः । धूमे लाभगते चैव विनीतो गीतकोविदः ॥१२॥
transliteration: dhanadhānyahiraṇyāḍhyo rūpavāṃśca kalānvitaḥ . dhūme lābhagate caiva vinīto gītakovidaḥ.
separated_sandhi: dhanadhānyahiraṇyāḍhyaḥ rūpavān ca kalānvitaḥdhūme lābhagate ca eva vinītaḥ gītakovidaḥ
english: When Dhūma is in the house of gain, a person is rich in wealth, grains, and gold; handsome and endowed with various arts; also humble and skilled in music.

sanskrit: पतितः पापकर्मा च धूमे द्वादशसङ्गते । परदारेषु संसक्तो व्यसनी निर्घृणः शठः ॥१३॥
transliteration: patitaḥ pāpakarmā ca dhūme dvādaśasaṅgate . paradāreṣu saṃsakto vyasanī nirghṛṇaḥ śaṭhaḥ.
separated_sandhi: patitaḥ pāpakarmā ca dhūme dvādaśasaṅgateparadāreṣu saṃsaktaḥ vyasanī nirghṛṇaḥ śaṭhaḥ
english: When Dhūma is associated with the twelfth house, a person becomes fallen, one who performs sinful deeds (karma), addicted to other men's wives, given to vices, merciless, and deceitful.

sanskrit: लग्ने पाते च सम्प्राप्ते जातको दुःखीपीडितः । क्रूरो घातकरो मूर्खो द्वेषी बन्धुजनस्य च ॥१४॥
transliteration: lagne pāte ca samprāpte jātako duḥkhīpīḍitaḥ . krūro ghātakaro mūrkho dveṣī bandhujanasya ca.
separated_sandhi: lagne pāte ca samprāpte jātakaḥ duḥkhīpīḍitaḥkrūraḥ ghātakaraḥ mūrkhaḥ dveṣī bandhujanasya ca
english: When both Lagna (ascendant) and Pāta (an astrological point) are present, the native is afflicted with sorrow, cruel, harmful, foolish, and hateful towards relatives.

sanskrit: जिह्मोऽतिपित्तवान् भोगी धनस्थे पातसंज्ञके । निर्घृणश्चाऽकृतज्ञश्च दुष्टात्मा पापकृत्तथा ॥१५॥
transliteration: jihmo'tipittavān bhogī dhanasthe pātasaṃjñake . nirghṛṇaścā'kṛtajñaśca duṣṭātmā pāpakṛttathā.
separated_sandhi: jihmaḥ atipittavān bhogī dhanasthe pātasaṃjñakenirghṛṇaḥ ca akṛtajñaḥ ca duṣṭātmā pāpakṛt tathā
english: When Pāta is situated in the house of wealth, the person is crooked, prone to excessive bile, a pleasure-seeker, merciless, ungrateful, evil-minded (duṣṭātman), and also a perpetrator of sinful deeds.

sanskrit: स्थिरप्रज्ञो रणी दाता धनाढ्यो राजवल्लभः । सम्प्राप्ते सहजे पाते सेनाधीशो भवेन्नरः ॥१६॥
transliteration: sthiraprajño raṇī dātā dhanāḍhyo rājavallabhaḥ . samprāpte sahaje pāte senādhīśo bhavennaraḥ.
separated_sandhi: sthira-prajñaḥ raṇī dātā dhana-āḍhyaḥ rāja-vallabhaḥsamprāpte sahaje pāte senā-adhīśaḥ bhavet naraḥ
english: When (an astrological configuration called) pāta occurs in the third house (sahaja), a person becomes firm in intellect, a warrior, generous, wealthy, dear to the king, and an army commander.

sanskrit: बन्धव्याधिसमायुक्तः सुतसौभाग्यवर्जितः । चतुर्थगो यदा पातस्तदा स्यान्मनुजश्च सः ॥१७॥
transliteration: bandhavyādhisamāyuktaḥ sutasaubhāgyavarjitaḥ . caturthago yadā pātastadā syānmanujaśca saḥ.
separated_sandhi: bandha-vyādhi-samāyuktaḥ suta-saubhāgya-varjitaḥcaturtha-gaḥ yadā pātaḥ tadā syāt manu-jaḥ ca saḥ
english: When that pāta is located in the fourth house (caturthaga), then that person becomes afflicted with imprisonment and diseases, and deprived of children and good fortune.

sanskrit: दरिद्रो रूपसंयुक्तः पाते पञ्चमगे सति । कफपित्तानिलैर्युक्तो निष्ठुरो निरपत्रपः ॥१८॥
transliteration: daridro rūpasaṃyuktaḥ pāte pañcamage sati . kaphapittānilairyukto niṣṭhuro nirapatrapaḥ.
separated_sandhi: daridraḥ rūpa-saṃyuktaḥ pāte pañcama-ge satikapha-pitta-anilaiḥ yuktaḥ niṣṭhuraḥ nirapatrapaḥ
english: When pāta is in the fifth house (pañcamage), a person is poor, handsome, afflicted by phlegm (kapha), bile (pitta), and wind (anila) (doshas), harsh, and shameless.

sanskrit: शत्रुहन्ता सुपुष्टश्च सर्वास्त्राणां च चालकः । कलासु निपुणः शान्तः पाते शत्रुगते सति ॥१९॥
transliteration: śatruhantā supuṣṭaśca sarvāstrāṇāṃ ca cālakaḥ . kalāsu nipuṇaḥ śāntaḥ pāte śatrugate sati.
separated_sandhi: śatru-hantā supuṣṭaḥ ca sarva-astrāṇām ca cālakaḥkalāsu nipuṇaḥ śāntaḥ pāte śatru-gate sati
english: When pāta is located in the sixth house (śatru-gata), a person becomes a slayer of enemies, very robust, a wielder of all weapons, proficient in arts, and peaceful.

sanskrit: धनदारसुतैस्त्यक्तः स्त्रीजितो दुःखसंयुतः । पाते कलत्रगे कामी निर्लज्जः परसौहृदः ॥२०॥
transliteration: dhanadārasutaistyaktaḥ strījito duḥkhasaṃyutaḥ . pāte kalatrage kāmī nirlajjaḥ parasauhṛdaḥ.
separated_sandhi: dhana-dāra-sutaiḥ tyaktaḥ strī-jitaḥ duḥkha-saṃyutaḥpāte kalatra-ge kāmī nirlajjaḥ para-sauhṛdaḥ
english: When pāta is located in the seventh house (kalatra-gata), a person is abandoned by wealth, wife, and children, dominated by women, afflicted by misery, lustful, shameless, and friendly towards others (possibly implying infidelity).

sanskrit: विकलाक्षो विरूपश्च दुर्भगो द्विजनिन्दकः । मृत्युस्थाने स्थिते पाते रक्तपीडापरिप्लुतः ॥२१॥
transliteration: vikalākṣo virūpaśca durbhago dvijanindakaḥ . mṛtyusthāne sthite pāte raktapīḍāpariplutaḥ.
separated_sandhi: vikala-akṣaḥ virūpaḥ ca durbhagaḥ dvija-nindakaḥmṛtyu-sthāne sthite pāte rakta-pīḍā-pariplutaḥ
english: If Pāta (the celestial body) is situated in the eighth house (the house of death), the person will have defective eyes, be deformed, unfortunate, censure the twice-born (dvija), and be afflicted by blood-related diseases.

sanskrit: बहुव्यापारको नित्यं बहुमित्रो बहुश्रुतः । धर्मभे पातखेटे च स्त्रीप्रियश्च प्रियंवदः ॥२२॥
transliteration: bahuvyāpārako nityaṃ bahumitro bahuśrutaḥ . dharmabhe pātakheṭe ca strīpriyaśca priyaṃvadaḥ.
separated_sandhi: bahu-vyāpārakaḥ nityaṃ bahu-mitraḥ bahu-śrutaḥdharma-bhe pāta-kheṭe ca strī-priyaḥ ca priyaṃ-vadaḥ
english: If Pāta (the celestial body) is in the ninth house (the house of dharma), the person will always be engaged in many undertakings, have many friends, be very learned, be fond of women, and speak pleasantly.

sanskrit: सश्रीको धर्मकृछान्तो धर्मकार्येषु कोविदः । कर्मस्थे पातसंज्ञे हि महाप्राज्ञो विचक्षणः ॥२३॥
transliteration: saśrīko dharmakṛchānto dharmakāryeṣu kovidaḥ . karmasthe pātasaṃjñe hi mahāprājño vicakṣaṇaḥ.
separated_sandhi: sa-śrīkaḥ dharma-kṛt śāntaḥ dharma-kāryeṣu kovidaḥkarma-sthe pāta-saṃjñe hi mahā-prājñaḥ vicakṣaṇaḥ
english: Indeed, when the celestial body (Pāta) is situated in the tenth house (the house of action or karma), the person is endowed with prosperity, performs righteous deeds (dharma), is peaceful, skilled in (dharma) activities, very wise, and discerning.

sanskrit: प्रभूतधनवान् मानी सत्यवादी दृढव्रतः । अश्वढ्यो गीतसंसक्तः पाते लाभगते सति ॥२४॥
transliteration: prabhūtadhanavān mānī satyavādī dṛḍhavrataḥ . aśvaḍhyo gītasaṃsaktaḥ pāte lābhagate sati.
separated_sandhi: prabhūta-dhanavān mānī satya-vādī dṛḍha-vrataḥaśva-āḍhyaḥ gīta-saṃsaktaḥ pāte lābha-gate sati
english: If Pāta is present in the eleventh house (the house of gains), the person will possess abundant wealth, be honorable, truthful, steadfast in their vows, rich in horses, and fond of music.

sanskrit: कोपी च बहुकर्माढयो व्यंगो धर्मस्य दूषकः । व्ययस्थाने गते पाते विद्वेषी निजबन्धुषु ॥२५॥
transliteration: kopī ca bahukarmāḍhayo vyaṃgo dharmasya dūṣakaḥ . vyayasthāne gate pāte vidveṣī nijabandhuṣu.
separated_sandhi: kopī ca bahu-karma-āḍhyaḥ vyaṅgaḥ dharmasya dūṣakaḥvyaya-sthāne gate pāte vidveṣī nija-bandhuṣu
english: If Pāta is present in the twelfth house (the house of expenditure or loss), the person will be wrathful, engaged in numerous undertakings, deformed, a defiler of (dharma), and hostile towards their own relatives.

sanskrit: विद्वान् सत्यरतः शान्तो धनवान् पुत्रवाञ्छुचिः । परिधो तनुगे दाता जायते गुरुवत्सलः ॥२६॥
transliteration: vidvān satyarataḥ śānto dhanavān putravāñchuciḥ . paridho tanuge dātā jāyate guruvatsalaḥ.
separated_sandhi: vidvān satyarataḥ śāntaḥ dhanavān putravān śuciḥ| paridhau tanu-ge dātā jāyate guruvatsalaḥ
english: When Paridhi is in the first house (tanu-ge), a person becomes learned, devoted to truth, peaceful, wealthy, blessed with children, pure, generous, and affectionate towards teachers (guru).

sanskrit: ईश्वरो रूपवान् भोगी सुखी धर्मपरायणः । धनस्थे परिधौ जातः प्रभुर्भवति मानवः ॥२७॥
transliteration: īśvaro rūpavān bhogī sukhī dharmaparāyaṇaḥ . dhanasthe paridhau jātaḥ prabhurbhavati mānavaḥ.
separated_sandhi: īśvaraḥ rūpavān bhogī sukhī dharmaparāyaṇaḥ |dhanasthe paridhau jātaḥ prabhuḥ bhavati mānavaḥ
english: When Paridhi is in the second house (house of wealth), a person becomes powerful, handsome, an enjoyer, happy, devoted to natural law (dharma), and a master.

sanskrit: स्त्रीवल्लभः सुरूपांगो देवस्वजनसंगतः । तृतीये परिधौ भृत्यो गुरुभक्तिसमन्वितः ॥२८॥
transliteration: strīvallabhaḥ surūpāṃgo devasvajanasaṃgataḥ . tṛtīye paridhau bhṛtyo gurubhaktisamanvitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: strīvallabhaḥ surūpāṅgaḥ devasvajanasaṅgataḥ| tṛtīye paridhau bhṛtyaḥ gurubhaktisamanvitaḥ
english: When Paridhi is in the third house, a person is beloved by women, possesses a handsome physique, is connected with deities and relatives, serves others, and is endowed with devotion (bhakti) to teachers (guru).

sanskrit: परिधौ सुखभावस्थे विस्मितं त्वरिमंगलम् । अक्रूरं त्वथ सम्पूर्णं कुरुते गीतकोविदम् ॥२९॥
transliteration: paridhau sukhabhāvasthe vismitaṃ tvarimaṃgalam . akrūraṃ tvatha sampūrṇaṃ kurute gītakovidam.
separated_sandhi: paridhau sukhabhāvasthe vismitam tu arimangalam| akrūram tu atha sampūrṇam kurute gītakovidam
english: When Paridhi is in the fourth house (house of happiness), it makes the person filled with wonder, brings auspiciousness regarding enemies, makes them not cruel, complete, and expert in music.

sanskrit: लक्ष्मीवान् शीलवान् कान्तः प्रियवान् धर्मवत्सलः । पञ्चमे परिधौ जातः स्त्रीणां भवति वल्लभः ॥३०॥
transliteration: lakṣmīvān śīlavān kāntaḥ priyavān dharmavatsalaḥ . pañcame paridhau jātaḥ strīṇāṃ bhavati vallabhaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lakṣmīvān śīlavān kāntaḥ priyavān dharmavatsalaḥ| pañcame paridhau jātaḥ strīṇām bhavati vallabhaḥ
english: When Paridhi is in the fifth house, a person becomes fortunate and prosperous, virtuous, attractive, possesses loved ones, is affectionate towards natural law (dharma), and is beloved by women.

sanskrit: व्यक्तोऽर्थपुत्रवान् भोगी सर्वसत्त्वहिते रतः । परिधौ रिपुभावस्थे शत्रुहा जायते नरः ॥३१॥
transliteration: vyakto'rthaputravān bhogī sarvasattvahite rataḥ . paridhau ripubhāvasthe śatruhā jāyate naraḥ.
separated_sandhi: vyaktaḥ arthaputravān bhogī sarvasattvahite rataḥ| paridhau ripubhāvasthe śatruhā jāyate naraḥ
english: When Paridhi is situated in the house of enemies (the 6th house), a person becomes renowned, possesses wealth and sons, is an enjoyer, is devoted to the welfare of all beings, and becomes a vanquisher of foes.

sanskrit: स्वल्पापत्यः सुखैर्हीनो मन्दप्रज्ञः सुनिष्ठुरः । परिधौ द्यूनभावस्थे स्त्रीणां व्याधिश्च जायते ॥३२॥
transliteration: svalpāpatyaḥ sukhairhīno mandaprajñaḥ suniṣṭhuraḥ . paridhau dyūnabhāvasthe strīṇāṃ vyādhiśca jāyate.
separated_sandhi: svalpāpatyaḥ sukhaiḥ hīnaḥ mandaprajñaḥ suniṣṭhuraḥ| paridhau dyūnabhāvasthe strīṇām vyādhiḥ ca jāyate
english: When Paridhi is situated in the house of partners (the 7th house), a person has few children, is deprived of happiness, is slow-witted, and very cruel. Also, diseases afflict women (specifically, the spouse).

sanskrit: अध्यात्मचिन्तकः शान्तो दृढकायो दृढव्रतः । धर्मवांश्च ससत्त्वश्च परिधौ रन्ध्रसंस्थिते ॥३३॥
transliteration: adhyātmacintakaḥ śānto dṛḍhakāyo dṛḍhavrataḥ . dharmavāṃśca sasattvaśca paridhau randhrasaṃsthite.
separated_sandhi: adhyātmacintakaḥ śāntaḥ dṛḍhakāyaḥ dṛḍhavrataḥ |dharmavān ca sasattvaḥ ca paridhau randhrasaṃsthite
english: When Paridhi is situated in the house of longevity (the 8th house), a person becomes a spiritual thinker (ātman), peaceful, possesses a strong body, has firm vows, is righteous (dharma), and is virtuous.

sanskrit: पुत्रान्वितः सुखी कान्तो धनाढयो लौल्यवर्जितः । परिधौ धर्मगे मानी स्वल्पसन्तुष्टमानसः ॥३४॥
transliteration: putrānvitaḥ sukhī kānto dhanāḍhayo laulyavarjitaḥ . paridhau dharmage mānī svalpasantuṣṭamānasaḥ.
separated_sandhi: putrānvitaḥ sukhī kāntaḥ dhanāḍhyaḥ laulyavarjitaḥ| paridhau dharmage mānī svalpasantuṣṭamānasaḥ
english: When Paridhi is situated in the house of righteousness (dharma) (the 9th house), a person is endowed with sons, happy, charming, wealthy, free from fickleness, honorable, and has a mind content with little.

sanskrit: कलाभिज्ञस्तथा भोगी दृढकायो ह्यमत्सरः । परिधौ दशमे प्राप्ते सर्वशास्त्रार्थपारगः ॥३५॥
transliteration: kalābhijñastathā bhogī dṛḍhakāyo hyamatsaraḥ . paridhau daśame prāpte sarvaśāstrārthapāragaḥ.
separated_sandhi: kalābhijñaḥ tathā bhogī dṛḍhakāyaḥ hi amatsaraḥ| paridhau daśame prāpte sarvaśāstrārthapāragaḥ
english: When Paridhi is situated in the 10th house, a person is skilled in various arts, an enjoyer, possesses a strong body, is free from envy, and indeed, proficient in the meanings of all scriptures.

sanskrit: स्त्रीभोगी गुणवांश्चैव मतिमान् स्वजनप्रियः । लाभगे परिधौ जातो मन्दाग्निरूपपद्यते ॥३६॥
transliteration: strībhogī guṇavāṃścaiva matimān svajanapriyaḥ . lābhage paridhau jāto mandāgnirūpapadyate.
separated_sandhi: strībhogī guṇavān ca eva matimān svajanapriyaḥlābhage paridhau jātaḥ mandāgniḥ upapadyate
english: When Paridhi is in the house of gain (lābha-bhāva), the person born is one who enjoys women, is virtuous, intelligent, and dear to his own people. He also suffers from weak digestion (mandāgni).

sanskrit: व्ययस्ते परिधौ जातो व्ययकृत् मानवः सदा । दुःखभाग् दुष्टबुद्धिश्च गुरुनिन्दापरायणः ॥३७॥
transliteration: vyayaste paridhau jāto vyayakṛt mānavaḥ sadā . duḥkhabhāg duṣṭabuddhiśca gurunindāparāyaṇaḥ.
separated_sandhi: vyayasthe paridhau jātaḥ vyayakṛt mānavaḥ sadāduḥkhabhāk duṣṭabuddhiḥ ca gurunindāparāyaṇaḥ
english: When Paridhi is in the house of expenditure (vyaya-bhāva), the person born is always extravagant. He experiences sorrow, has a wicked intellect, and is devoted to criticizing his teachers (guru).

sanskrit: धनधान्यहिरण्याढ्यः कृतज्ञः सम्मतः सताम् । सर्वदोषपरित्यक्तश्चापे तनुगते नरः ॥३८॥
transliteration: dhanadhānyahiraṇyāḍhyaḥ kṛtajñaḥ sammataḥ satām . sarvadoṣaparityaktaścāpe tanugate naraḥ.
separated_sandhi: dhanadhānyahiraṇyāḍhyaḥ kṛtajñaḥ sammataḥsatām sarvadoṣaparityaktaḥ cāpe tanugate naraḥ
english: When the sign Sagittarius (cāpa) is in the Ascendant (tanu-bhāva), the person is rich in wealth, grains, and gold. He is grateful, respected by the virtuous, and free from all faults.

sanskrit: प्रियंवदः प्र्गल्भाढ्यो विनीतो विद्ययाऽन्वितः । धनस्थे चापखेटे च रूपवान् धर्मतत्परः ॥३९॥
transliteration: priyaṃvadaḥ prgalbhāḍhyo vinīto vidyayā'nvitaḥ . dhanasthe cāpakheṭe ca rūpavān dharmatatparaḥ.
separated_sandhi: priyaṃvadaḥ pragalbhāḍhyaḥ vinītaḥ vidyayā anvitaḥdhanasthe cāpakheṭe ca rūpavān dharmatatparaḥ
english: When a planet (kheṭa) located in Sagittarius (cāpa) is situated in the house of wealth (dhana-bhāva), the person is sweet-spoken, endowed with confidence, humble, and learned. He is also handsome and dedicated to his natural law (dharma).

sanskrit: कृपणोऽतिकलाभिज्ञश्चौर्यकर्मरतः सदा । सहजे धनुषि प्राप्ते हीनाङ्गो गतसौहृदः ॥४०॥
transliteration: kṛpaṇo'tikalābhijñaścauryakarmarataḥ sadā . sahaje dhanuṣi prāpte hīnāṅgo gatasauhṛdaḥ.
separated_sandhi: kṛpaṇaḥ atikalābhijñaḥ ca cauryakarmarataḥ sadāsahaje dhanuṣi prāpte hīnāṅgaḥ gatasauhṛdaḥ
english: When Sagittarius (dhanuṣa) is situated in the third house (sahaja-bhāva), the person is miserly, very knowledgeable in various arts, and always engaged in acts of theft. He has defective limbs and is deprived of friends.

sanskrit: सुखी गोधनधान्याद्यै राजसन्मानपूजितः । कार्मुके सुखसंस्थे तु नीरोगो तनु जायते ॥४१॥
transliteration: sukhī godhanadhānyādyai rājasanmānapūjitaḥ . kārmuke sukhasaṃsthe tu nīrogo tanu jāyate.
separated_sandhi: sukhī godhanadhānyādyai rājasammānapūjitaḥkārmuke sukhasaṃsthe tu nīrogaḥ tanu jāyate
english: When Sagittarius is favorably situated, the person becomes happy, endowed with cows, wealth, and grains, honored with royal respect, and has a healthy body.

sanskrit: रुचिमान् दीर्घदर्शो च देवभक्तः प्रियंवदः । चापे पञ्चमगे जातो विवृद्धः सर्वकर्मसु ॥४२॥
transliteration: rucimān dīrghadarśo ca devabhaktaḥ priyaṃvadaḥ . cāpe pañcamage jāto vivṛddhaḥ sarvakarmasu.
separated_sandhi: rucīmān dīrghadarśī ca devabhaktaḥ priyaṃvadaḥcāpe pañcamage jātaḥ vivṛddhaḥ sarvakarmasu
english: When Sagittarius is in the fifth house, the person born is attractive, far-sighted, devoted to the gods (bhakti), speaks amiably, and prospers in all undertakings.

sanskrit: शत्रुहन्ताऽतिधर्तश्च सुखी प्रीतिरुचिः शुचिः । षष्ठस्थानगते चापे सर्वकर्मसमृद्धिभाक् ॥४३॥
transliteration: śatruhantā'tidhartaśca sukhī prītiruciḥ śuciḥ . ṣaṣṭhasthānagate cāpe sarvakarmasamṛddhibhāk.
separated_sandhi: śatruhantā atidhartaḥ ca sukhī prītiruciḥ śuciḥṣaṣṭhasthānagate cāpe sarvakarmasamṛddhibhāk
english: When Sagittarius is situated in the sixth house, the person is a slayer of enemies, very bold, happy, pure, delightful, and attains prosperity in all undertakings (karma).

sanskrit: ईश्वरो गुणसम्पूर्णः शास्त्रबिद्धार्भिकः प्रियः । चापे सप्तमभावस्थे भवतीति न संशयः ॥४४॥
transliteration: īśvaro guṇasampūrṇaḥ śāstrabiddhārbhikaḥ priyaḥ . cāpe saptamabhāvasthe bhavatīti na saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: īśvaraḥ guṇasampūrṇaḥ śāstrabiddhārbhikaḥ priyaḥcāpe saptamabhāvasthe bhavati iti na saṃśayaḥ
english: When Sagittarius is situated in the seventh house, the person becomes capable, full of good qualities, deeply learned in scriptures (śāstra), wealthy, and beloved. Of this, there is no doubt.

sanskrit: परकर्मरतः क्रूरः परदारपरायणः । अष्टमस्थानगते चापे जायते विकलांगकः ॥४५॥
transliteration: parakarmarataḥ krūraḥ paradāraparāyaṇaḥ . aṣṭamasthānagate cāpe jāyate vikalāṃgakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: parakarmarataḥ krūraḥ paradārapārāyaṇaḥaṣṭamasthānagate cāpe jāyate vikalaṅgakaḥ
english: When Sagittarius is situated in the eighth house, the person becomes engaged in others' affairs, cruel, devoted to others' wives, and is born with physical defects.

sanskrit: तपस्वी व्रतचर्यासु निरतो विद्ययाऽधिकः । धर्मस्थे जायते चापे मानवो लोकविश्रुतः ॥४६॥
transliteration: tapasvī vratacaryāsu nirato vidyayā'dhikaḥ . dharmasthe jāyate cāpe mānavo lokaviśrutaḥ.
separated_sandhi: tapasvī vratacaryāsu nirataḥ vidyayā adhikaḥ| dharmasthe jāyate cāpe mānavaḥ lokaviśrutaḥ
english: When Sagittarius (cāpa) is situated in a house of natural law (dharma), a person is born who is an ascetic (tapasvī), devoted to practicing sacred vows, superior through knowledge, and renowned in the world.

sanskrit: बहुपुत्रधनैश्वर्यो गोमहिष्यादिमान् भवेत् । कर्मभे चापसंयुक्ते जायते लोकविश्रुतः ॥४७॥
transliteration: bahuputradhanaiśvaryo gomahiṣyādimān bhavet . karmabhe cāpasaṃyukte jāyate lokaviśrutaḥ.
separated_sandhi: bahuputradhanaiśvaryaḥ gomahiṣyādimān bhavet| karmabhe cāpasaṃyukte jāyate lokaviśrutaḥ
english: When Sagittarius (cāpa) is associated with the house of action (karma-bha), a person will possess many sons, much wealth, and great prosperity, and own cows, buffaloes, and similar animals. Such a person becomes renowned in the world.

sanskrit: लाभगे चपखेटे च लाभयुक्तो भवेन्नरः । निरोगो दृढकोपाग्निर्मन्त्रस्त्रीपरमास्त्रवित् ॥४८॥
transliteration: lābhage capakheṭe ca lābhayukto bhavennaraḥ . nirogo dṛḍhakopāgnirmantrastrīparamāstravit.
separated_sandhi: lābhage cāpakheṭe ca lābhayuktaḥ bhavet naraḥ| nirogaḥ dṛḍhakopāgniḥ mantrastrīparamāstravit
english: When a planet in Sagittarius (cāpa) is in the house of gains (lābha-bha), a person becomes wealthy, free from disease, possesses strong anger, and is knowledgeable in incantations (mantra), women, and supreme weapons (astra).

sanskrit: खलोऽतिमानी दुर्बुद्धिर्निर्लज्जो व्ययसंस्थिते । चापे परस्त्रीसंयुक्तो जायते निर्धनः सदा ॥४९॥
transliteration: khalo'timānī durbuddhirnirlajjo vyayasaṃsthite . cāpe parastrīsaṃyukto jāyate nirdhanaḥ sadā.
separated_sandhi: khalaḥ atimānī durbuddhiḥ nirlajjaḥ vyayasaṃsthite| cāpe parastrīsaṃyuktaḥ jāyate nirdhanaḥ sadā
english: When Sagittarius (cāpa) is situated in the house of expenditure (vyaya-bha), a person is born wicked, very proud, foolish, shameless, associated with other women, and always poor.

sanskrit: कुशलः सर्वविद्यासु सुखी वाङ्निपुनः प्रियः । तनौ शिखिनि सञ्जातः सर्वकामान्वितो भवेत् ॥५०॥
transliteration: kuśalaḥ sarvavidyāsu sukhī vāṅnipunaḥ priyaḥ . tanau śikhini sañjātaḥ sarvakāmānvito bhavet.
separated_sandhi: kuśalaḥ sarvavidyāsu sukhī vāknipunaḥ priyaḥ |tanau śikhini sañjātaḥ sarvakāmānvitaḥ bhavet
english: When Ketu (śikhin) is situated in the Ascendant (tanu-bhāva), a person becomes skilled in all branches of knowledge, happy, eloquent, beloved, and endowed with all desires.

sanskrit: वक्ता प्रियंवदः कान्तो धनस्थानगते ध्वजे । काव्यकृत् पण्डितो मानी विनीतो वाहनान्वितः ॥५१॥
transliteration: vaktā priyaṃvadaḥ kānto dhanasthānagate dhvaje . kāvyakṛt paṇḍito mānī vinīto vāhanānvitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: vaktā priyaṃvadaḥ kāntaḥ dhanasthānagate dhvajekāvyakṛt paṇḍitaḥ mānī vinītaḥ vāhanānvitaḥ
english: When Ketu (dhvaja) is situated in the house of wealth (the second house), the native is an eloquent and pleasant speaker, charming, a poet, learned, honorable, humble, and possesses vehicles.

sanskrit: कदर्यः क्रूरकर्ता च कृशाङ्गो धनवर्जितः । सहजस्थे तु शिखिनि तीव्ररोगी प्रजायते ॥५२॥
transliteration: kadaryaḥ krūrakartā ca kṛśāṅgo dhanavarjitaḥ . sahajasthe tu śikhini tīvrarogī prajāyate.
separated_sandhi: kadaryaḥ krūrakartā ca kṛśāṅgaḥ dhanavarjitaḥsahajasthe tu śikhini tīvrarogī prajāyate
english: But when Ketu (śikhin) is situated in the third house, the native becomes miserly, a cruel doer, lean-bodied, devoid of wealth, and severely diseased.

sanskrit: रूपवान् गुणसम्पन्नः सात्त्विकोऽपि स्रुतिप्रियः । सुखसंस्थे तु शिखिनि सदा भवति सौख्यभाक् ॥५३॥
transliteration: rūpavān guṇasampannaḥ sāttviko'pi srutipriyaḥ . sukhasaṃsthe tu śikhini sadā bhavati saukhyabhāk.
separated_sandhi: rūpavān guṇasampannaḥ sāttvikaḥ api sṛtipriyaḥsukhasaṃsthe tu śikhini sadā bhavati saukhyabhāk
english: But when Ketu (śikhin) is situated in the fourth house, the native is always handsome, endowed with good qualities, sāttvika, fond of good conduct, and enjoys happiness.

sanskrit: सुखी भोगी कलाविच्च पञ्चमस्थानगे ध्वजे । युक्तिज्ञो मतिमान् वाग्मी गुरुभक्तिसमन्वितः ॥५४॥
transliteration: sukhī bhogī kalāvicca pañcamasthānage dhvaje . yuktijño matimān vāgmī gurubhaktisamanvitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: sukhī bhogī kalāvit ca pañcamasthānage dhvajeyuktijñaḥ matimān vāgmī gurubhaktisamanvitaḥ
english: When Ketu (dhvaja) is situated in the fifth house, the native is happy, enjoys pleasures, is skilled in arts, sagacious, intelligent, eloquent, and endowed with devotion (bhakti) to a teacher (guru).

sanskrit: मातृपक्षक्षयकरः शत्रुहा बहुवान्धवः । रिपुस्थाने ध्वजे प्राप्ते शूरः कान्तो विचक्षणः ॥५५॥
transliteration: mātṛpakṣakṣayakaraḥ śatruhā bahuvāndhavaḥ . ripusthāne dhvaje prāpte śūraḥ kānto vicakṣaṇaḥ.
separated_sandhi: mātṛpakṣakṣayakaraḥ śatruhā bahubāndhavaḥripusthāne dhvaje prāpte śūraḥ kāntaḥ vicakṣaṇaḥ
english: When Ketu (dhvaja) is situated in the sixth house, the native causes loss to the maternal side, destroys enemies, has many relatives, and is brave, charming, and discerning.

sanskrit: द्यूतक्रीडाष्वभिरतः कामी भोगसमन्वितः । ध्वजे तु सप्तमस्थागे वेश्यासु कृतसौहृदः ॥५६॥
transliteration: dyūtakrīḍāṣvabhirataḥ kāmī bhogasamanvitaḥ . dhvaje tu saptamasthāge veśyāsu kṛtasauhṛdaḥ.
separated_sandhi: dyūtakrīḍāsu abhirataḥ kāmī bhogasamannitaḥdhvaje tu saptamasthāge veśyāsu kṛtasauhṛdaḥ
english: If Ketu is situated in the seventh house, a person will be addicted to gambling, lustful, endowed with material enjoyments, and will befriend prostitutes.

sanskrit: नीचकर्मरतः पापो निर्लज्जो निन्दकः सदा । मृत्युस्थाने ध्वजे प्राप्ते गतस्त्र्यपरपक्षकः ॥५७॥
transliteration: nīcakarmarataḥ pāpo nirlajjo nindakaḥ sadā . mṛtyusthāne dhvaje prāpte gatastryaparapakṣakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: nīcakarmarataḥ pāpaḥ nirlajjaḥ nindakaḥ sadāmṛtyusthāne dhvaje prāpte gataḥ strī aparapakṣakaḥ
english: If Ketu is situated in the eighth house (the house of death), the person will be engaged in base actions, sinful, shameless, always critical, and will lose his wife to another person.

sanskrit: लिङ्गधारी प्रसन्नात्मा सर्वभूतहिते रतः । धर्मभे शिखिनि प्राप्ते धर्मकार्येषु कोविदः ॥५८॥
transliteration: liṅgadhārī prasannātmā sarvabhūtahite rataḥ . dharmabhe śikhini prāpte dharmakāryeṣu kovidaḥ.
separated_sandhi: liṅgadhārī prasannātmā sarvabhūtahite rataḥdharmabhe śikhini prāpte dharmakāryeṣu kovidaḥ
english: If Ketu (śikhin) is situated in the ninth house (the house of dharma), the person will wear religious symbols, possess a cheerful disposition, be devoted to the welfare of all beings, and be skilled in religious (dharma) activities.

sanskrit: सुखसौभाग्यसम्पन्नः कामिनीनां च वल्लभः । दाता द्विजैः समायुक्तः कर्मस्थे शिखिनि द्विज ॥५९॥
transliteration: sukhasaubhāgyasampannaḥ kāminīnāṃ ca vallabhaḥ . dātā dvijaiḥ samāyuktaḥ karmasthe śikhini dvija.
separated_sandhi: sukhasaubhāgyasampannaḥ kāminīnām ca vallabhaḥdātā dvijaiḥ samāyuktaḥ karmasthe śikhini dvija
english: O Brahmin (dvija), if Ketu (śikhin) is situated in the tenth house (the house of action), the person will be endowed with happiness and good fortune, beloved by women, generous, and associated with learned people (dvija).

sanskrit: नित्यलाभः सुधर्मी च लाभे शिखिनि पूजितः । धनाढ्यः सुभगः शूरः सुयज्ञश्चाति कोविदः ॥६०॥
transliteration: nityalābhaḥ sudharmī ca lābhe śikhini pūjitaḥ . dhanāḍhyaḥ subhagaḥ śūraḥ suyajñaścāti kovidaḥ.
separated_sandhi: nitya-lābhaḥ su-dharmī ca lābhe śikhini pūjitaḥdhana-āḍhyaḥ su-bhagaḥ śūraḥ su-yajñaḥ ca ati kovidaḥ
english: One experiences constant gains and is a person of good intrinsic nature (dharma), especially if Ketu is well-placed in the house of gain. Such a person is wealthy, fortunate, brave, performs excellent Vedic rituals (yajña), and is extremely learned.

sanskrit: पापकर्मरतः शूरः श्रद्धाहीनोऽघृणो नरः । परदाररतो रौद्रः शिखिनि व्ययगे सति ॥६१॥
transliteration: pāpakarmarataḥ śūraḥ śraddhāhīno'ghṛṇo naraḥ . paradārarato raudraḥ śikhini vyayage sati.
separated_sandhi: pāpakarmarataḥ śūraḥ śraddhāhīnaḥ aghṛṇaḥ naraḥparadārarataḥ raudraḥ śikhini vyayage sati
english: When Ketu (śikhin) is situated in the twelfth house, the person born is engaged in sinful actions, bold, devoid of faith (śraddhā), merciless, attracted to other men's wives, and fierce.

sanskrit: रोगार्त्तः सततं कामी पापात्माधिगतः शठः । तनुस्थे गुलिके जातः खलभावोऽतिदुःखितः ॥६२॥
transliteration: rogārttaḥ satataṃ kāmī pāpātmādhigataḥ śaṭhaḥ . tanusthe gulike jātaḥ khalabhāvo'tiduḥkhitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: rogārttaḥ satataṃ kāmī pāpātmā adhigataḥ śaṭhaḥtanusthe gulike jātaḥ khalabhāvaḥ atiduḥkhitaḥ
english: When Gulika is situated in the ascendant (lagna), the person born is constantly afflicted by disease, lustful, sinful-souled, a known trickster, evil-natured, and extremely miserable.

sanskrit: विकृतो दुःखितः क्षुद्रो व्यसनी च गतत्रपः । धनस्थे गुलिके जातो निःस्वो भवति मानवः ॥६३॥
transliteration: vikṛto duḥkhitaḥ kṣudro vyasanī ca gatatrapaḥ . dhanasthe gulike jāto niḥsvo bhavati mānavaḥ.
separated_sandhi: vikṛtaḥ duḥkhitaḥ kṣudraḥ vyasanī ca gatatrapaḥdhanasthe gulike jātaḥ niḥsvaḥ bhavati mānavaḥ
english: When Gulika is situated in the second house, the person born is deformed, miserable, mean-spirited, addicted, shameless, and becomes destitute.

sanskrit: चार्वङ्गो ग्रामपः पुण्यसंयुक्तः सज्जनप्रियः । सहजे गुलिके जातो मानवो राजपूजितः ॥६४॥
transliteration: cārvaṅgo grāmapaḥ puṇyasaṃyuktaḥ sajjanapriyaḥ . sahaje gulike jāto mānavo rājapūjitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: cārvaṅgaḥ grāmapaḥ puṇyasaṃyuktaḥ sajjanapriyaḥsahaje gulike jātaḥ mānavaḥ rājapūjitaḥ
english: When Gulika is situated in the third house, the person born has beautiful limbs, is a village head, endowed with merit, dear to virtuous people, and honored by rulers.

sanskrit: रोगी सुखपरित्यक्तः सदा भवति पापकृत् । गुलिके सुखभावस्थे वातपित्ताधिको भवेत् ॥६५॥
transliteration: rogī sukhaparityaktaḥ sadā bhavati pāpakṛt . gulike sukhabhāvasthe vātapittādhiko bhavet.
separated_sandhi: rogī sukhaparityaktaḥ sadā bhavati pāpakṛtgulike sukhabhāvasthe vātapittādhikaḥ bhavet
english: When Gulika is situated in the fourth house (sukhabhāva), the person is always sickly, devoid of happiness, a doer of sinful deeds, and afflicted by an excess of Vata and Pitta.

sanskrit: विस्तुतिर्विधनोऽल्पायुर्द्वेषी क्षुद्रो नपुंसकः । गुलिके सुतभावस्थे स्त्रीजितो नास्तिको भवेत् ॥६६॥
transliteration: vistutirvidhano'lpāyurdveṣī kṣudro napuṃsakaḥ . gulike sutabhāvasthe strījito nāstiko bhavet.
separated_sandhi: vistutiḥ vidhanaḥ alpāyuḥ dveṣī kṣudraḥ napuṃsakaḥgulike sutabhāvasthe strījitaḥ nāstikaḥ bhavet
english: If Gulika is situated in the house of progeny (the 5th house), the person becomes ill-spoken, moneyless, short-lived, hateful, mean, impotent, henpecked, and an atheist.

sanskrit: वीतशत्रुः सुपुष्टाङ्गो रिपुस्थाने यमात्मजे । सुदीप्तः सम्मतः स्त्रीणां सोत्साहः सुदृढो हितः ॥६७॥
transliteration: vītaśatruḥ supuṣṭāṅgo ripusthāne yamātmaje . sudīptaḥ sammataḥ strīṇāṃ sotsāhaḥ sudṛḍho hitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: vītaśatruḥ supuṣṭāṅgaḥ ripusthāne yamātmajesudīptaḥ sammataḥ strīṇām sotsāhaḥ sudṛḍhaḥ hitaḥ
english: If Yamātmaja (Gulika) is situated in the house of enemies (the 6th house), the person is free from enemies, has a well-nourished body, is glorious, respected by women, enthusiastic, very strong, and beneficial (to others).

sanskrit: स्त्रीजितः पापकृज्जारः कृशाङ्गो गतसौहृदः । जीवितः स्त्रीधनेनैव गुलिके सप्तमस्थिते ॥६८॥
transliteration: strījitaḥ pāpakṛjjāraḥ kṛśāṅgo gatasauhṛdaḥ . jīvitaḥ strīdhanenaiva gulike saptamasthite.
separated_sandhi: strījitaḥ pāpakṛt jāraḥ kṛśāṅgaḥ gatasauhṛdaḥjīvitaḥ strīdhanena eva gulike saptamastite
english: If Gulika is situated in the 7th house, the person is henpecked, a sinner, an adulterer, lean-bodied, heartless, and lives only by the wealth of women.

sanskrit: क्षुधालुर्दुःखित क्रूरस्तीक्ष्णरोषोऽतिनिर्घृणः । रन्ध्रगे गुलिके निःस्वो जायते गुणवर्जितः ॥६९॥
transliteration: kṣudhālurduḥkhita krūrastīkṣṇaroṣo'tinirghṛṇaḥ . randhrage gulike niḥsvo jāyate guṇavarjitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: kṣudhāluḥ duḥkhitaḥ krūraḥ tīkṣṇaroṣaḥ atinirghṛṇaḥrandhrage gulike niḥsvaḥ jāyate guṇavarjitaḥ
english: If Gulika is situated in the 8th house (randhra), the person becomes hungry, distressed, cruel, intensely angry, extremely merciless, poor, and devoid of good qualities.

sanskrit: बहुक्लेशः कृशतनुर्दुष्टकर्मातिनिर्घृणः । गुलिके धर्मगे मन्दः पिशुनो बहिराकृतिः ॥७०॥
transliteration: bahukleśaḥ kṛśatanurduṣṭakarmātinirghṛṇaḥ . gulike dharmage mandaḥ piśuno bahirākṛtiḥ.
separated_sandhi: bahukleśaḥ kṛśatanuḥ duṣṭakarmātinirghṛṇaḥgulike dharmage mandaḥ piśunaḥ bahirākṛtiḥ
english: If Gulika is situated in the house of natural law (dharma) (the 9th house), the person experiences much suffering, has a lean body, performs evil deeds (karma), is extremely merciless, slow-witted, slanderous, and hypocritical (having an external appearance not matching inner nature).

sanskrit: पुत्रान्वितः सुखी भोक्ता देवाग्न्यर्चनवत्सलः । दशमे गुलिके जातो योगधर्माश्रितः सुखी ॥७१॥
transliteration: putrānvitaḥ sukhī bhoktā devāgnyarcanavatsalaḥ . daśame gulike jāto yogadharmāśritaḥ sukhī.
separated_sandhi: putrānvitaḥ sukhī bhoktā devāgnyarcanavatsalaḥdaśame gulike jātaḥ yogadharmāśritaḥ sukhī
english: One born with Gulika in the tenth house is blessed with sons, happy, an enjoyer, fond of worshipping deities and fire, and devoted to the practice of spiritual discipline (yoga) and natural law (dharma), and is happy.

sanskrit: सुस्त्रीभोगी प्रजाध्यक्षो बन्धूनां च हिते रतः । लाभस्थे गुलिके जातो नीचाङ्ग सार्वभौमकः ॥७२॥
transliteration: sustrībhogī prajādhyakṣo bandhūnāṃ ca hite rataḥ . lābhasthe gulike jāto nīcāṅga sārvabhaumakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: sustrībhogī prajādhyakṣaḥ bandhūnām ca hite rataḥlābhaste gulike jātaḥ nīcāṅgaḥ sārvabhaumakaḥ
english: One born with Gulika in the house of gain (11th house) enjoys good women, is a leader of people, devoted to the welfare of relatives, has defective limbs, but becomes a universal monarch.

sanskrit: नीचकर्माश्तितः पापो हीनाङ्गो दुर्भगोऽलसः । व्ययगे गुलिके जातो नीचेषु कुरुते रतिम् ॥७३॥
transliteration: nīcakarmāśtitaḥ pāpo hīnāṅgo durbhago'lasaḥ . vyayage gulike jāto nīceṣu kurute ratim.
separated_sandhi: nīcakarmāśritaḥ pāpaḥ hīnāṅgaḥ durbhagaḥ alasaḥvyayage gulike jātaḥ nīceṣu kurute ratim
english: One born with Gulika in the house of expenditure (12th house) engages in base actions (karma), is sinful, has defective limbs, is unfortunate and lazy, and finds pleasure among low-class people.

sanskrit: लग्ने प्राणपदे क्षणो रोगि भवति मानवः । मूकोन्मत्तो जडाङ्गस्तु हीनाङ्गो दुःखित कृशः ॥७४॥
transliteration: lagne prāṇapade kṣaṇo rogi bhavati mānavaḥ . mūkonmatto jaḍāṅgastu hīnāṅgo duḥkhita kṛśaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagne prāṇapade kṣaṇaḥ rogī bhavati mānavaḥ mūkaḥunmattaḥ jaḍāṅgaḥ tu hīnāṅgaḥ duḥkhitaḥ kṛśaḥ
english: When Prāṇapada (a sensitive astrological point) is in the ascendant (lagna) at the moment of birth, the person becomes sickly, dumb, insane, has dull limbs, defective limbs, is miserable, and emaciated.

sanskrit: बहुधान्यो बहुधनो बहुभृत्यो बहुप्रजः । धनस्थानस्थिते प्राणे सुभगो जयते नरः ॥७५॥
transliteration: bahudhānyo bahudhano bahubhṛtyo bahuprajaḥ . dhanasthānasthite prāṇe subhago jayate naraḥ.
separated_sandhi: bahudhānyaḥ bahudhanaḥ bahubhṛtyaḥ bahuprajāḥdhanasthānasthite prāṇe subhagaḥ jāyate naraḥ
english: When Prāṇa (a sensitive astrological point) is located in the house of wealth (2nd house), the person born is endowed with abundant grain, much wealth, many servants, and many children, and is fortunate.

sanskrit: हिंस्रो गर्वसमायुक्तो निष्ठुरोऽतिमलिम्लुचः । तृतीयगे प्राणपदे गुरुभक्तिविवर्जितः ॥७६॥
transliteration: hiṃsro garvasamāyukto niṣṭhuro'timalimlucaḥ . tṛtīyage prāṇapade gurubhaktivivarjitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: hiṃsraḥ garvasamāyuktaḥ niṣṭhuraḥ atimalimlucaḥtṛtīyage prāṇapade gurubhaktivivarjitaḥ
english: When the Prāṇapada is in the third house, the person will be violent, arrogant, harsh, exceedingly thievish, and devoid of devotion (bhakti) to their preceptor (guru).

sanskrit: सुखस्थे तु सुखी कान्तः सुहृद्रमासु वल्लभः । गुरौ परायणः शीतः प्राणे वै सत्यतत्परः ॥७७॥
transliteration: sukhasthe tu sukhī kāntaḥ suhṛdramāsu vallabhaḥ . gurau parāyaṇaḥ śītaḥ prāṇe vai satyatatparaḥ.
separated_sandhi: sukhaste tu sukhī kāntaḥ suhṛdramāsu vallabhaḥgurau parāyaṇaḥ śītaḥ prāṇe vai satyatatparaḥ
english: When the Prāṇapada is in the fourth house (sukha-sthāna), the person will indeed be happy, charming, beloved by friends and beautiful women, solely devoted to their preceptor (guru), peaceful, and truly intent on truth.

sanskrit: सुखिभाक् सुक्रियोपेतस्त्वपचारदयान्वितः । पञ्चमस्थे प्राणपदे सर्वकामसमन्वितः ॥७८॥
transliteration: sukhibhāk sukriyopetastvapacāradayānvitaḥ . pañcamasthe prāṇapade sarvakāmasamanvitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: sukhibhāk sukriyopetaḥ tu apachāradayānvitaḥpañcamasthe prāṇapade sarvakāmasamanvitaḥ
english: When the Prāṇapada is in the fifth house, the person enjoys happiness, is indeed endowed with virtuous actions, possesses compassion towards offenders, and has all their desires fulfilled.

sanskrit: बन्धुशत्रुवशस्तीक्ष्णो मन्दाग्निर्निर्दयः खलः । षष्ठे प्राणपदे रोगी वित्तपोऽल्पायुरेव च ॥७९॥
transliteration: bandhuśatruvaśastīkṣṇo mandāgnirnirdayaḥ khalaḥ . ṣaṣṭhe prāṇapade rogī vittapo'lpāyureva ca.
separated_sandhi: bandhuśatruvaśaḥ tīkṣṇaḥ mandāgniḥ nirdayaḥ khalaḥṣaṣṭhe prāṇapade rogī vittapaḥ alpāyuḥ eva ca
english: When the Prāṇapada is in the sixth house, the person becomes subservient to relatives and enemies, is cruel, suffers from weak digestion, is merciless, wicked, sickly, loses wealth, and is indeed short-lived.

sanskrit: ईर्ष्यालु सततं कामी तीव्ररौद्रवपुर्नरः । सप्तमस्थे प्राणपदे दुराराध्यः कुबुद्धिमान् ॥८०॥
transliteration: īrṣyālu satataṃ kāmī tīvraraudravapurnaraḥ . saptamasthe prāṇapade durārādhyaḥ kubuddhimān.
separated_sandhi: īrṣyāluḥ satatam kāmī tīvrarudravapuḥ naraḥsaptamasthe prāṇapade durārādhyaḥ kubuddhimān
english: When the Prāṇapada is in the seventh house, the person is always envious, lustful, intensely fierce in body or nature, difficult to please, and evil-minded.

sanskrit: रोगसन्तापिताङ्गश्च प्राणपदेऽष्टमे सति । पीडितः पार्थिवैर्दुःखैर्मृत्यबन्धुसुतोद्भवैः ॥८१॥
transliteration: rogasantāpitāṅgaśca prāṇapade'ṣṭame sati . pīḍitaḥ pārthivairduḥkhairmṛtyabandhusutodbhavaiḥ.
separated_sandhi: roga-santāpitāṅgaḥ ca prāṇapade aṣṭame sati pīḍitaḥpārthivaiḥ duḥkhaiḥ mṛtyu-bandhu-sutodbhavaiḥ
english: When the Prāṇapada (a specific astrological point) is situated in the eighth house, the native will have a body afflicted by diseases and will be tormented by worldly sorrows originating from death, relatives, and children.

sanskrit: पुत्रवान् धनसम्पन्नः सुभगः प्रियदर्शनः । प्राणे धर्मस्थिते भृत्यः सदाऽदुष्टो विचक्षणः ॥८२॥
transliteration: putravān dhanasampannaḥ subhagaḥ priyadarśanaḥ . prāṇe dharmasthite bhṛtyaḥ sadā'duṣṭo vicakṣaṇaḥ.
separated_sandhi: putravān dhana-sampannaḥ subhagaḥ priya-darśanaḥprāṇe dharma-sthite bhṛtyaḥ sadā aduṣṭaḥ vicakṣaṇaḥ
english: If the Prāṇapada (a specific astrological point) is situated in the house of natural law (dharma), the native will have children, be endowed with wealth, be fortunate, and possess a pleasing appearance. They will also be a discerning and always virtuous servant (bhṛtya).

sanskrit: वीर्यवान् मतिमान् दक्षो नृपकार्येषु कोविदः । दशमे वै प्राणपदे देवार्चनपरायणः ॥८३॥
transliteration: vīryavān matimān dakṣo nṛpakāryeṣu kovidaḥ . daśame vai prāṇapade devārcanaparāyaṇaḥ.
separated_sandhi: vīryavān matimān dakṣaḥ nṛpa-kāryeṣu kovidaḥdaśame vai prāṇapade devārcana-parāyaṇaḥ
english: Verily, when the Prāṇapada (a specific astrological point) is in the tenth house, the native will be valorous, intelligent, skillful, and knowledgeable in royal affairs. They will also be devoted to the worship of deities.

sanskrit: विख्यातो गुणवान् प्राज्ञो भोगीध नसमन्वितः । लाभस्थानस्थिते प्राणे गौराङ्गो मातृवत्सलः ॥८४॥
transliteration: vikhyāto guṇavān prājño bhogīdha nasamanvitaḥ . lābhasthānasthite prāṇe gaurāṅgo mātṛvatsalaḥ.
separated_sandhi: vikhyātaḥ guṇavān prājñaḥ bhogī dhana-samanvitaḥlābha-sthāna-sthite prāṇe gaurāṅgaḥ mātṛ-vatsalaḥ
english: When the Prāṇapada (a specific astrological point) is situated in the house of gains (lābha-sthāna), the native is famous, virtuous, and wise. They are an enjoyer of pleasures, endowed with wealth, fair-bodied, and devoted to their mother.

sanskrit: क्षुद्रो दुष्टस्तु हीनाङ्गो विद्वेशी द्विजबन्धुषु । व्यये प्राणे नेत्ररोगी काणो वा जायते नरः ॥८५॥
transliteration: kṣudro duṣṭastu hīnāṅgo vidveśī dvijabandhuṣu . vyaye prāṇe netrarogī kāṇo vā jāyate naraḥ.
separated_sandhi: kṣudraḥ duṣṭaḥ tu hīnāṅgaḥ vidveṣin dvija-bandhuṣuvyaye prāṇe netra-rogin kāṇaḥ vā jāyate naraḥ
english: When the Prāṇapada (a specific astrological point) is in the twelfth house (vyaya-sthāna), the native is born mean and wicked, possesses deficient limbs, and is hostile towards Brahmins (dvija) and relatives. Such a person also suffers from eye disease or is one-eyed.

sanskrit: इत्यप्रकाशखेटानां फलान्युक्तानि भूसुर । तथा यानि प्रकाशानां सूर्यादीनां खचारिणाम् ॥८६॥
transliteration: ityaprakāśakheṭānāṃ phalānyuktāni bhūsura . tathā yāni prakāśānāṃ sūryādīnāṃ khacāriṇām.
separated_sandhi: iti aprakāśakheṭānām phalāni uktāni bhūsuratathā yāni prakāśānām sūryādīnām khacāriṇām
english: Thus, O Brahmin, the effects of the non-luminous planets have been stated. Similarly, [I will describe] those of the luminous planets such as the Sun and others, which move in the sky.

sanskrit: तानि स्थितिवशात्तेषां स्फुटदृष्टिवशात् तथा । बलाऽबलविवेकेन वक्तव्यानि शरीरिणाम् ॥८७॥
transliteration: tāni sthitivaśātteṣāṃ sphuṭadṛṣṭivaśāt tathā . balā'balavivekena vaktavyāni śarīriṇām.
separated_sandhi: tāni sthitivaśāt teṣām sphuṭadṛṣṭivaśāttathā balābalavivekena vaktavyāni śarīriṇām
english: Those [results] for embodied beings are to be described based on the planets' positional strength, their precise aspectual strength, and by discriminating between their strength and weakness.

sanskrit: भगवान् कतिधा दृष्टिर्बलं कतिविधं तथा । इति मे संशयो जातस्तं भवान् छेत्तुमर्हिति ॥१॥
transliteration: bhagavān katidhā dṛṣṭirbalaṃ katividhaṃ tathā . iti me saṃśayo jātastaṃ bhavān chettumarhiti.
separated_sandhi: bhagavān katidhā dṛṣṭiḥ balam katividham tathāiti me saṃśayaḥ jātaḥ tam bhavān chettum arhati
english: O revered one, how many kinds of aspects (dṛṣṭi) are there, and how many types of strength (bala)? A doubt has arisen in me regarding this, and you ought to dispel it.

sanskrit: एका राशिवशाद् दृष्टिः पूर्वमुक्ता च या द्विज । अन्या खेटस्वभावोत्था स्फुटा तां कथयाम्यहम् ॥२॥
transliteration: ekā rāśivaśād dṛṣṭiḥ pūrvamuktā ca yā dvija . anyā kheṭasvabhāvotthā sphuṭā tāṃ kathayāmyaham.
separated_sandhi: ekā rāśivaśāt dṛṣṭiḥ pūrvam uktā ca yā dvijaanyā kheṭasvabhāvotthā sphuṭā tām kathayāmi aham
english: O Brahmin, one kind of aspect (dṛṣṭi), which was mentioned previously, is based on the zodiacal sign (rāśi). Another kind, which is precise and arises from the intrinsic nature (dharma) of the planets (kheṭa), I shall now describe.

sanskrit: त्रिदशे च त्रिकोणे च चतुरस्रे च सप्तमे । पादवृद्धया प्रपश्यन्ति प्रयच्छन्ति फलं तथा ॥३॥
transliteration: tridaśe ca trikoṇe ca caturasre ca saptame . pādavṛddhayā prapaśyanti prayacchanti phalaṃ tathā.
separated_sandhi: tridaśe ca trikoṇe ca caturasre ca saptamepādavṛddhayā prapaśyanti prayacchanti phalam tathā
english: Planets aspect the third and tenth (tridaśa) houses, as well as the trine (trikoṇa) houses (fifth and ninth), the quadrant (caturasra) houses (fourth and eighth), and the seventh house. They aspect with increasing quarter strength (pādavṛddhi), and accordingly, they bestow results.

sanskrit: पूर्णं च सप्तमं सर्वे शानिजीवकुजाः पुनः । विशेषतश्च त्रिदशत्रिकोणचतुरष्टमान् ॥४॥
transliteration: pūrṇaṃ ca saptamaṃ sarve śānijīvakujāḥ punaḥ . viśeṣataśca tridaśatrikoṇacaturaṣṭamān.
separated_sandhi: pūrṇam ca saptamam sarve śānijīvakujāḥ punaḥviśeṣataḥ ca tridaśatrikonacaturaṣṭamān
english: All of Saturn, Jupiter, and Mars cast a full aspect on the seventh house. Moreover, they specifically aspect the 3rd, 10th (Saturn), the trine houses (5th and 9th for Jupiter), and the 4th, 8th (Mars).

sanskrit: इति सामान्यतः पूर्वैराचार्यैः प्रतिपादिता । स्फुटान्तरवशाद्या च दृष्टिः साऽतिस्फुटा यथा ॥५॥
transliteration: iti sāmānyataḥ pūrvairācāryaiḥ pratipāditā . sphuṭāntaravaśādyā ca dṛṣṭiḥ sā'tisphuṭā yathā.
separated_sandhi: iti sāmānyataḥ pūrvaiḥ ācāryaiḥ pratipāditāsphuṭāntaravaśāt yā ca dṛṣṭiḥ sā atisphuṭā yathā
english: Thus, these (aspects) have been generally declared by the ancient teachers. But the aspect (dṛṣṭi) which is determined by the precise degree difference is exceedingly accurate, as follows:

sanskrit: दृश्याद् विशोध्य द्रष्टारं षड्राशिभ्योऽधिकान्तरम् । दिगभ्यः संशोध्य तद्भागा द्विभक्ता दृक् स्फुटा भवेत् ॥६॥
transliteration: dṛśyād viśodhya draṣṭāraṃ ṣaḍrāśibhyo'dhikāntaram . digabhyaḥ saṃśodhya tadbhāgā dvibhaktā dṛk sphuṭā bhavet.
separated_sandhi: dṛśyāt viśodhya draṣṭāram ṣaṭ rāśibhyaḥ adhikāntaramdigabhyaḥ saṃśodhya tat bhāgāḥ dvibhaktā dṛk sphuṭā bhavet
english: Subtract the aspecting planet's longitude from the aspected planet's longitude. If this difference exceeds six signs (180 degrees), then subtract that difference from ten signs (300 degrees). The resulting degrees, when divided by two, will be the precise aspect (dṛṣṭi).

sanskrit: पञ्चाधिके विना राशिं भागाद्विघ्नाश्च दृक् स्फुटा । वेदाधिके त्यजेद् भूताद् भागा दृष्टिः त्रिभाधिके ॥७॥
transliteration: pañcādhike vinā rāśiṃ bhāgādvighnāśca dṛk sphuṭā . vedādhike tyajed bhūtād bhāgā dṛṣṭiḥ tribhādhike.
separated_sandhi: pañca adhike vinā rāśim bhāgāt vighnāḥ ca dṛk sphuṭāveda adhike tyajet bhūtāt bhāgāt dṛṣṭiḥ tribhādhike
english: If the difference exceeds five (signs) but is less than six signs (without a full sign), then the degrees are divided by two to obtain the precise aspect (dṛṣṭi). If the difference exceeds four (signs), it should be subtracted from five (signs). If the aspect is more than three parts, it should be divided by three.

sanskrit: विशोध्यार्णवतो द्वाभ्यां लब्धं त्रिंशद्युतं च दृक् । द्व्यधिके तु विना राशिं भागास्तिथियुतास्तथा ॥८॥
transliteration: viśodhyārṇavato dvābhyāṃ labdhaṃ triṃśadyutaṃ ca dṛk . dvyadhike tu vinā rāśiṃ bhāgāstithiyutāstathā.
separated_sandhi: viśodhya arṇavataḥ dvābhyām labdham triṃśat yutam cadṛk dvi adhike tu vinā rāśim bhāgāḥ tithi yutāḥ tathā
english: Subtract (the difference) from four (signs), divide the obtained result by two, and then add thirty; this constitutes the aspect (dṛṣṭi). However, if the difference exceeds two signs but is less than three signs, then the degrees should be added to fifteen in a similar manner.

sanskrit: रूपाधिके विना राशिं भागा द्वयाप्ताश्च दृग् भवेत् । एवं राश्यादिके शेषे शनौ द्रष्टरि भो द्विज ॥९॥
transliteration: rūpādhike vinā rāśiṃ bhāgā dvayāptāśca dṛg bhavet . evaṃ rāśyādike śeṣe śanau draṣṭari bho dvija.
separated_sandhi: rūpādhike vinā rāśim bhāgāḥ dvayāptāḥ ca dṛk bhavet| evam rāśyādike śeṣe śanau draṣṭari bho dvija
english: O Brahmin, when Saturn is the aspecting planet, if there is an excess of degrees (within a sign), without considering the full sign, then those degrees, when divided by two, constitute the aspect. This rule applies similarly to the remaining portions (of degrees or signs).

sanskrit: एकभे नवभे भागा भुक्ता भोग्या द्विसंगुणाः । द्विभेंऽशार्धोनिताः षष्टिरष्टभे खाग्नियुग् लवाः ॥१०॥
transliteration: ekabhe navabhe bhāgā bhuktā bhogyā dvisaṃguṇāḥ . dvibheṃ'śārdhonitāḥ ṣaṣṭiraṣṭabhe khāgniyug lavāḥ.
separated_sandhi: ekabhe navabhe bhāgāḥ bhuktāḥ bhogyāḥ dvisaṃguṇāḥ |dvibhe aṃśārdhonitāḥ ṣaṣṭiḥ aṣṭabhe khāgniyug lavāḥ
english: For the first house and the ninth house, the elapsed and remaining degrees are to be doubled. For the second house, sixty minutes are reduced by half a minute. For the eighth house, thirty minutes are applicable.

sanskrit: त्रिसप्तभे तु भौमस्य षष्टिरत्र लवोनिता । सार्धांशास्तिथिसंयुक्ता द्विभे रूपं सदाऽङ्गभे ॥११॥
transliteration: trisaptabhe tu bhaumasya ṣaṣṭiratra lavonitā . sārdhāṃśāstithisaṃyuktā dvibhe rūpaṃ sadā'ṅgabhe.
separated_sandhi: trisaptabhe tu bhaumasya ṣaṣṭiḥ atra lavonitā |sārdhāṃśāḥ tithisaṃyuktāḥ dvibhe rūpam sadā aṅgabhe
english: However, for Mars, in the third and seventh houses, sixty minutes are reduced by one minute. In the second house, the aspect is one and a half degrees. Always for the first (body) house, it is fifteen degrees.

sanskrit: त्रिसप्तभे तु जीवस्य भागार्धं शरवेदयुक् । द्विगुणैस्तु लवैश्चोनाः खरसाश्चतुरष्टभे ॥१२॥
transliteration: trisaptabhe tu jīvasya bhāgārdhaṃ śaravedayuk . dviguṇaistu lavaiśconāḥ kharasāścaturaṣṭabhe.
separated_sandhi: trisaptabhe tu jīvasya bhāgārdham śaravedayuk |dviguṇaiḥ tu lavaiḥ ca ūnnāḥ kharasāḥ caturaṣṭabhe
english: However, for Jupiter, in the third house, it is half a degree, and in the seventh house, it is forty-five units. And for the fourth and eighth houses, sixty units are decreased by double the minutes.

sanskrit: एवं रव्यादिखेटानां स्फुटा दृष्टिः प्रजायते । तद्वशादेव भावानां जातकस्य फलं वदेत् ॥१३॥
transliteration: evaṃ ravyādikheṭānāṃ sphuṭā dṛṣṭiḥ prajāyate . tadvaśādeva bhāvānāṃ jātakasya phalaṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: evam ravyādikheṭānām sphuṭā dṛṣṭiḥ prajāyate| tadvāśāt eva bhāvānām jātukasya phalam vadet
english: In this manner, the precise aspect of the planets, beginning with the Sun, becomes manifest. Based solely on that, one should declare the results of the houses for the native.

sanskrit: अथ स्पष्टबलं वक्ष्ये स्थानकालादिसम्भवम् । नीचोनां खचरं भार्धाधिक चक्राद् विशोधयेत् ॥१॥
transliteration: atha spaṣṭabalaṃ vakṣye sthānakālādisambhavam . nīconāṃ khacaraṃ bhārdhādhika cakrād viśodhayet.
separated_sandhi: atha spaṣṭabalam vakṣye sthānakālādisaṃbhavamnīconām khacaram bhārdhādhika cakrāt viśodhayet
english: Now, I shall explain the specific strength (spaṣṭabala) arising from position (sthāna), time (kāla), and so forth. One should subtract the planet's (khacara) longitude from its debilitation point (nīconām). If the resulting difference is greater than half the zodiac (bhārdhādhika), one should then subtract it from the full zodiacal circle (cakra).

sanskrit: भागीकृत्य त्रिभिर्भक्तं लब्धमुच्चबलं भवेत् । स्वत्रिकोणस्वगेहाधिमित्रमित्रसमारिषु ॥२॥
transliteration: bhāgīkṛtya tribhirbhaktaṃ labdhamuccabalaṃ bhavet . svatrikoṇasvagehādhimitramitrasamāriṣu.
separated_sandhi: bhāgīkṛtya tribhiḥ bhaktam labdham uccabalambhavet svatrikoṇasvagehādhimitramitrasamāriṣu
english: The value obtained [from the previous calculation], when divided by three, becomes the exaltation strength (ucchabala). [This applies to planets situated] in their own trine, own house, great friend's house, friend's house, neutral's house, or enemy's house.

sanskrit: अधिशत्रुगृहे चापि स्थितानां क्रमशो बलम् । भूताब्धयः खाग्निनखास्तिथ्यो दश युगाः कराः ॥३॥
transliteration: adhiśatrugṛhe cāpi sthitānāṃ kramaśo balam . bhūtābdhayaḥ khāgninakhāstithyo daśa yugāḥ karāḥ.
separated_sandhi: adhiśatrugṛhe ca api sthitānām kramaśaḥ balambhūtābdhayaḥ khāgninakhāḥ tithayaḥ daśa yugāḥ karāḥ
english: ...and also in a great enemy's house (adhiśatru-gṛha). The strength (bala) for these, in respective order, is: five, four, zero, three, twenty, fifteen, ten, four, and two.

sanskrit: एवं होरादृकाणाद्रिभागांकद्वादशांशजम् । त्रिंशांशजं तदैक्यञ्च सप्तवर्गसमुद्भवम् ॥४॥
transliteration: evaṃ horādṛkāṇādribhāgāṃkadvādaśāṃśajam . triṃśāṃśajaṃ tadaikyañca saptavargasamudbhavam.
separated_sandhi: evam horādṛkāṇādribhāgāṅkadvādaśāṃśajamtriṃśāṃśajam tat aikyam ca saptavargasamudbhavam
english: Thus, the strength generated from the Hora, Drekana, Saptamsha (adribhāga), Navamsha (aṅka), and Dwadasamsha divisions, as well as that from the Trimshamsha division, and the combined sum (aikyam) of these, arises from the seven (sapta) divisions (vargas).

sanskrit: शुक्रेन्दू समभांशेऽन्ये विषमेऽङ्घ्रिमितं बलम् । केन्द्रादिषुस्थिताः खेटाः पूर्णाऽर्धाऽङ्घ्रिमितं क्रमात् ॥५॥
transliteration: śukrendū samabhāṃśe'nye viṣame'ṅghrimitaṃ balam . kendrādiṣusthitāḥ kheṭāḥ pūrṇā'rdhā'ṅghrimitaṃ kramāt.
separated_sandhi: śukra indu samabhāṃśe anye viṣame aṅghrimitam balamkendrādiṣusthitāḥ kheṭāḥ pūrṇa ardha aṅghrimitam kramāt
english: Venus (śukra) and Moon (indu) gain a quarter strength (aṅghrimitam balam) in even signs (samabhāṃśe). The other planets (anye) gain a quarter strength in odd signs (viṣame). Planets (kheṭāḥ) situated in angular houses (kendra) and so forth (ādi), receive full, half, and quarter strength, respectively (kramāt).

sanskrit: आद्यमध्यावसानेषु द्रेष्काणेषु स्थिताः क्रमात् । पुंनपुंसकयोषाख्या दद्युरङ्घ्रिमितं बलम् ॥६॥
transliteration: ādyamadhyāvasāneṣu dreṣkāṇeṣu sthitāḥ kramāt . puṃnapuṃsakayoṣākhyā dadyuraṅghrimitaṃ balam.
separated_sandhi: ādya-madhya-avasāneṣu dreṣkāṇeṣu sthitāḥ kramātpuṃ-napuṃsaka-yoṣā-ākhyāḥ dadyuḥ aṅghri-mitam balam
english: Planets situated respectively in the first, middle, and last decanates, which are designated masculine, neuter, and feminine, should grant one-fourth strength.

sanskrit: सूर्यात् कुजात् सुखं जीवाज्ज्ञाच्चाऽस्तं लग्नमार्क्रितः । दशमं च भृगोश्चन्द्राद् हित्वा षड्भाधिके सति ॥७॥
transliteration: sūryāt kujāt sukhaṃ jīvājjñāccā'staṃ lagnamārkritaḥ . daśamaṃ ca bhṛgoścandrād hitvā ṣaḍbhādhike sati.
separated_sandhi: sūryāt kujāt sukham jīvāt jñāt ca astam lagna-mārkritaḥdaśamam ca bhṛgoḥ candrāt hitvā ṣaḍ-bhāga-adhike sati
english: For the Sun and Mars, the fourth house (is a reference point for strength); for Jupiter and Mercury, the seventh house; and for Venus and the Moon, the tenth house. All these calculations are made from the ascendant, by subtracting the shorter arc if the distance exceeds six zodiacal signs.

sanskrit: चक्राद् विशोध्य तद्भागास्त्रिभिर्भक्ताश्च दिग्बलम् । इष्टाधटि निशीथात्तन्नतं त्रिंशच्च्युतं नतम् ॥८॥
transliteration: cakrād viśodhya tadbhāgāstribhirbhaktāśca digbalam . iṣṭādhaṭi niśīthāttannataṃ triṃśaccyutaṃ natam.
separated_sandhi: cakrāt viśodhya tat-bhāgāḥ tribhiḥ bhaktāḥ ca dik-balamiṣṭa-ghaṭi niśīthāt tat natam triṃśat cyutam natam
english: Subtract the relevant degrees from the zodiac (cakra) and divide those parts by three to obtain the directional strength (digbalam). The declination (nata) for the desired time (iṣṭa-ghaṭi), measured from midnight (niśīthāt), when subtracted from thirty, also yields the declination (nata).

sanskrit: चन्द्रभौमशनीनां च नतं द्विघ्नं कलादिकम् । षष्टिशुद्धं तदन्येषां सदा रूपं बुधस्य हि ॥९॥
transliteration: candrabhaumaśanīnāṃ ca nataṃ dvighnaṃ kalādikam . ṣaṣṭiśuddhaṃ tadanyeṣāṃ sadā rūpaṃ budhasya hi.
separated_sandhi: candra-bhauma-śanīnām ca natam dvi-ghnam kalā-ādikamṣaṣṭi-śuddham tat anyeṣām sadā rūpam budhasya hi
english: For the Moon, Mars, and Saturn, the zenith distance (nata), when doubled and converted into minutes (kalā-ādikam), is then subtracted from sixty. For the remaining planets (Sun, Jupiter, and Venus), it is always one unit (rūpa), which is also the case for Mercury.

sanskrit: अथ पक्षबलं वक्ष्ये सूर्ये चन्द्राद् विशोध्य च । षड्भाधिके विशोध्यार्काद् भागीकृत्त्य त्रिभिर्भजेत् ॥१०॥
transliteration: atha pakṣabalaṃ vakṣye sūrye candrād viśodhya ca . ṣaḍbhādhike viśodhyārkād bhāgīkṛttya tribhirbhajet.
separated_sandhi: atha pakṣa-balam vakṣye sūrye candrāt viśodhya caṣaḍ-bhāga-adhike viśodhya arkāt bhāgī-kṛtya tribhiḥ bhajet
english: Next, I will explain lunar fortnight (pakṣa-balam) strength. Calculate the difference by subtracting the Sun's longitude from the Moon's longitude. If this difference exceeds six zodiacal signs (180 degrees), then subtract it from the Sun's longitude (meaning, take the reverse difference to get the shorter arc). Convert this result into degrees and then divide it by three.

sanskrit: पक्षजं बलमिन्दुज्ञशुक्रेज्यानां तु षष्टितः । विशोध्य तब्दलं ज्ञेनं पापानां पक्षसंभवम् ॥११॥
transliteration: pakṣajaṃ balamindujñaśukrejyānāṃ tu ṣaṣṭitaḥ . viśodhya tabdalaṃ jñenaṃ pāpānāṃ pakṣasaṃbhavam.
separated_sandhi: pakṣajam balam indujñaśukrejyānām tu ṣaṣṭitaḥ |viśodhya tat balam jñeyam pāpānām pakṣasaṃbhavam
english: The strength derived from the lunar fortnight for the Moon, Mercury, Venus, and Jupiter is calculated from sixty units. By deducting that (same) strength, the fortnight-born strength of the malefic planets is to be understood.

sanskrit: दिनत्र्यंशेषु सौम्यार्कशनीनां निट्त्रिभागके । चन्द्रशुक्रकुजानां च बलं पूर्णं सदा गुरोः ॥१२॥
transliteration: dinatryaṃśeṣu saumyārkaśanīnāṃ niṭtribhāgake . candraśukrakujānāṃ ca balaṃ pūrṇaṃ sadā guroḥ.
separated_sandhi: dinatryaṃśeṣu saumyārkaśanīnām niṭtribhāgakecandraśukrakujānām ca balam pūrṇam sadā guroḥ
english: O preceptor (guru), Mercury, the Sun, and Saturn possess strength during the three divisions of the day, while the Moon, Venus, and Mars possess strength during the three divisions of the night. Mercury's strength is always full.

sanskrit: वषमासदिनेशानां तिथ्यस्त्रिंशच्छरार्णवां । होरेशस्य बलं षष्टिरुक्तं नैसर्गिकं पुरा ॥१३॥
transliteration: vaṣamāsadineśānāṃ tithyastriṃśaccharārṇavāṃ . horeśasya balaṃ ṣaṣṭiruktaṃ naisargikaṃ purā.
separated_sandhi: varṣamāsadineśānām tithyastriaṃśaccharaarṇavām |horā-īśasya balam ṣaṣṭiḥ uktam naisargikam purā
english: For the lords of the year, month, and day, (the strengths are) thirty, twenty, and ten (units respectively). For the lord of the Hora (hour), (the strength is) five (units). It has been said that the intrinsic (naisargika) strength is sixty (units).

sanskrit: तन्मानां सप्तहृत्षष्टिरेकाद्येकोत्तरैर्हता । शमंबुगुशुचंरादिखेटानां क्रमतो द्विज ॥१४॥
transliteration: tanmānāṃ saptahṛtṣaṣṭirekādyekottarairhatā . śamaṃbuguśucaṃrādikheṭānāṃ kramato dvija.
separated_sandhi: tanmānānām saptahṛtṣaṣṭiḥ ekādyekottaraiḥ hṛtā| śaṃambuguśucamrādi-kheṭānām kramataḥ dvija
english: O twice-born (dvija), those measures (of strength) for the planets, namely Saturn, Moon, Jupiter, Venus, Mercury, Sun, and others, are to be obtained in order by multiplying sixty divided by seven with numbers beginning from one and successively increasing by one.

sanskrit: पञ्चाब्धयः सुराः सूर्याः खण्डकांशाः क्रमादमी । सायनग्रहदोराशितुल्यखण्डयुतिश्च स ॥१५॥
transliteration: pañcābdhayaḥ surāḥ sūryāḥ khaṇḍakāṃśāḥ kramādamī . sāyanagrahadorāśitulyakhaṇḍayutiśca sa.
separated_sandhi: pañca-abdhyayaḥ surāḥ sūryāḥ khaṇḍakāṃśāḥ kramātamī | sāyana-graha-daurāśi-tulya-khaṇḍa-yutiḥ ca saḥ
english: These segmental values are, in order: forty-five, thirty-three, and twelve. And that (Ayana-bala) is the sum of segments (of strength) equivalent to a planet's extent in its tropical sign.

sanskrit: भागादिकहतादेष्यात् त्रिंशल्लब्धयुता लवाः । स्वमृणं तुलमेषादौ शनीन्द्वोश्च त्रिराशिषु ॥१६॥
transliteration: bhāgādikahatādeṣyāt triṃśallabdhayutā lavāḥ . svamṛṇaṃ tulameṣādau śanīndvośca trirāśiṣu.
separated_sandhi: bhāgādika-hatāt eṣyāt triṃśat-labdha-yutā lavāḥsvam ṛṇam tulā-meṣa-ādau śani-indvoḥ ca tri-rāśiṣu
english: The degrees (lavāḥ), which are adjusted by adding the quotient derived from thirty, and are considered either positive (sva) or negative (ṛṇa), are calculated from the product of degrees (bhāgādika) and other factors, and from the remaining portion (eṣyāt). This applies to Saturn and the Moon when they are located in Libra, Aries, and three other specific zodiac signs.

sanskrit: तथाऽरार्केज्यशुक्राणां व्यस्तं ज्ञस्य सदा धनम् । तद्भागाश्च त्रिभिर्भक्ता ज्ञेयमायनजं बलम् ॥१७॥
transliteration: tathā'rārkejyaśukrāṇāṃ vyastaṃ jñasya sadā dhanam . tadbhāgāśca tribhirbhaktā jñeyamāyanajaṃ balam.
separated_sandhi: tathā ara-arka-ijya-śukrāṇām vyastam jñasya sadā dhanamtat-bhāgāḥ ca tribhiḥ bhaktāḥ jñeyam āyanajam balam
english: Similarly, for Mars, the Sun, Jupiter, and Venus, the result (from the previous calculation) is reversed, while for Mercury, it is always considered positive. Those derived degrees (bhāgāḥ), divided by three, should be understood as the strength (bala) arising from declination (ayana).

sanskrit: यद्रवेरायनं वीर्यं चेष्टाख्यं तावदेव हि । विधोः पक्षबलं यावत् तावच्चेष्टाबलं स्मृतम् ॥१८॥
transliteration: yadraverāyanaṃ vīryaṃ ceṣṭākhyaṃ tāvadeva hi . vidhoḥ pakṣabalaṃ yāvat tāvacceṣṭābalaṃ smṛtam.
separated_sandhi: yat raveḥ āyanam vīryam ceṣṭā-ākhyam tāvat eva hi| vidhoḥ pakṣa-balam yāvat tāvat ceṣṭā-balam smṛtam
english: The declinational strength (ayana vīryam) of the Sun, which is termed motional (ceṣṭā), is precisely that much. Similarly, the motional strength (ceṣṭābala) of the Moon is considered to be equivalent to its lunar phase strength (pakṣabala).

sanskrit: पापदृक्पादहीनं तच्छुभदृक्पादयुक् तथा । बलैक्यं ज्ञेज्यदृक्युक्तमेवं खेटबलं भवेत् ॥१९॥
transliteration: pāpadṛkpādahīnaṃ tacchubhadṛkpādayuk tathā . balaikyaṃ jñejyadṛkyuktamevaṃ kheṭabalaṃ bhavet.
separated_sandhi: pāpa-dṛk-pāda-hīnam tat śubha-dṛk-pāda-yuk tathā |bala-aikyam jña-ijya-dṛk-yuktam evam kheṭa-balam bhavet
english: That [strength] is reduced by one quarter for malefic aspects. Similarly, it is augmented by one quarter for benefic aspects. The total strength (bala-aikyam) should thus be calculated, incorporating the aspects of Mercury and Jupiter. This is how the planetary strength (kheṭabala) should be determined.

sanskrit: अथ तारग्रहाणां तु युद्ध्यतोश्च द्वयोर्मिथः । बलान्तरं विजेतुः स्वं निर्जितस्य बले त्वृणम् ॥२०॥
transliteration: atha tāragrahāṇāṃ tu yuddhyatośca dvayormithaḥ . balāntaraṃ vijetuḥ svaṃ nirjitasya bale tvṛṇam.
separated_sandhi: atha tāra-grahāṇām tu yuddhyatoḥ ca dvayoḥ mithaḥ| bala-antaram vijetuḥ svam nirjitasya bale tu ṛṇam
english: Now, concerning the stellar planets (tāra-graha), when two of them are engaged in mutual combat, the difference in strength (balāntaram) is considered positive (sva) for the victor, but negative (ṛṇa) for the defeated planet.

sanskrit: चक्रानुवक्रा विकला मन्दा मन्दतरा समा । चरा चाऽतिचरा चेति ग्रहाणामष्टधा गतिः ॥२१॥
transliteration: cakrānuvakrā vikalā mandā mandatarā samā . carā cā'ticarā ceti grahāṇāmaṣṭadhā gatiḥ.
separated_sandhi: cakrā anuvakrā vikalā mandā mandatarā samācarā ca ati-carā ca iti grahāṇām aṣṭadhā gatiḥ
english: The motions of planets are eight-fold: direct, retrograde, very slow, slow, slower, normal, fast, and very fast.

sanskrit: षष्टिर्वक्रगते वीर्यमनुवक्रगतेर्दलम् । पादो विकलभुक्तेः स्यात् तथा मध्यगतेर्दलम् ॥२२॥
transliteration: ṣaṣṭirvakragate vīryamanuvakragaterdalam . pādo vikalabhukteḥ syāt tathā madhyagaterdalam.
separated_sandhi: ṣaṣṭiḥ vakra-gate vīryam anuvakra-gateḥ dalampādaḥ vikala-bhukteḥ syāt tathā madhya-gateḥ dalam
english: For fully retrograde motion, the strength (vīrya) is sixty units. For the turning (stationary) phase of motion, it is half of that. For very slow motion, it should be one-fourth. Similarly, for normal motion, it is half.

sanskrit: पादो मन्दगतेस्तस्य दलं मन्दतरस्य हि । चरभुक्तेस्तु पादोनां दलं स्यादतिचारिणः ॥२३॥
transliteration: pādo mandagatestasya dalaṃ mandatarasya hi . carabhuktestu pādonāṃ dalaṃ syādaticāriṇaḥ.
separated_sandhi: pādaḥ manda-gateḥ tasya dalam mandatara-sya hicara-bhukteḥ tu pādonam dalam syāt aticāriṇaḥ
english: One-fourth [of the strength] is for slow motion, and indeed, half for slower motion. But for fast motion, it is three-fourths [of the strength], and half should be for very fast motion.

sanskrit: मध्यमस्फुटयोगार्धहीनं स्वस्वचलोच्चकम् । षड्भाधिकं च्युतं चक्राच्चेष्टाकेन्द्रं स्मृतं कुजात् ॥२४॥
transliteration: madhyamasphuṭayogārdhahīnaṃ svasvacaloccakam . ṣaḍbhādhikaṃ cyutaṃ cakrācceṣṭākendraṃ smṛtaṃ kujāt.
separated_sandhi: madhyama-sphuṭa-yoga-ardha-hīnam sva-sva-cala-uccakamṣaḍ-bhāga-adhikam cyutam cakrāt ceṣṭā-kendram smṛtam kujāt
english: For planets starting with Mars, the "ceṣṭā-kendra" (motion center) is understood to be calculated by taking a planet's own movable apogee, subtracting from it half the sum of its mean and true longitudes, then adding six signs (180 degrees), and finally normalizing the result within a single zodiacal cycle (by subtracting multiples of twelve signs).

sanskrit: भागीकृतं त्रिभिर्भक्तं लब्धं चेष्टाबलं त्विति । स्थानदिक्कालदृक्चेष्टानिसर्गोत्थं च षड्विधम् ॥२५॥
transliteration: bhāgīkṛtaṃ tribhirbhaktaṃ labdhaṃ ceṣṭābalaṃ tviti . sthānadikkāladṛkceṣṭānisargotthaṃ ca ṣaḍvidham.
separated_sandhi: bhāgī-kṛtam tribhiḥ bhaktam labdham ceṣṭā-balam tu itisthāna-dik-kāla-dṛk-ceṣṭā-nisarga-uttham ca ṣaḍ-vidham
english: Thus, the "ceṣṭā-bala" (motion strength) is obtained by taking the (previously calculated "ceṣṭā-kendra"), converting it into parts (degrees), and then dividing it by three. Furthermore, there are six kinds of planetary strength, arising from position (sthāna), direction (dik), time (kāla), aspect (dṛk), motion (ceṣṭā), and natural disposition (nisarga).

sanskrit: एवं ग्रहबलं प्रोक्तमथ भावबलं श‍ृणु । कन्यायुग्मतुलाकुम्भचापाद्यार्धाश्च सप्तमम् ॥२६॥
transliteration: evaṃ grahabalaṃ proktamatha bhāvabalaṃ śa‍ृṇu . kanyāyugmatulākumbhacāpādyārdhāśca saptamam.
separated_sandhi: evam grahabalam proktam atha bhāvabalam śṛṇukanyāyugmatulākumbhacāpādyārdhāḥ ca saptamam
english: Thus, the strength of planets has been explained. Now, listen to the strength of the houses. The seventh house is to be considered from the first halves of Virgo, Gemini, Libra, Aquarius, and Sagittarius.

sanskrit: गोऽजसिंहमृगाद्यार्धचापान्त्यार्धात् सुखं त्यजेत् । कर्कवृश्चिकतो लग्नं मृगात्यार्धाज्झषाश्च खम् ॥२७॥
transliteration: go'jasiṃhamṛgādyārdhacāpāntyārdhāt sukhaṃ tyajet . karkavṛścikato lagnaṃ mṛgātyārdhājjhaṣāśca kham.
separated_sandhi: go aja simha mṛga ādyardha cāpa antyārdhāt sukham tyajetkarka vṛścikataḥ lagnam mṛga antyārdhāt jhaṣāḥ ca kham
english: One should disregard the fourth house (sukha) when considering the first halves of Taurus, Aries, Leo, and Capricorn, and the last half of Sagittarius. The ascendant (lagna) is considered for Cancer and Scorpio, while the tenth house (kham) is considered for the last half of Capricorn and Pisces.

sanskrit: शोध्यमङ्गाधिकं चक्राच्च्युतं भागीकृतं त्रिहृत् । सद्दृष्टिपादयुक्पापपापदृष्टिपादविवर्जितम् ॥२८॥
