transliteration: śodhyamaṅgādhikaṃ cakrāccyutaṃ bhāgīkṛtaṃ trihṛt . saddṛṣṭipādayukpāpapāpadṛṣṭipādavivarjitam.
separated_sandhi: śodhyam aṅgādhikam cakrāt cyutam bhāgīkṛtam trihṛtsat dṛṣṭi pāda yuk pāpa pāpa dṛṣṭi pāda vivarjitam
english: It (the house strength) is to be adjusted: any amount in excess of a house's value is to be subtracted from the zodiac, partitioned, and divided by three. It is considered strong when endowed with benefic quarter-aspects and when devoid of malefic quarters and malefic aspect-quarters.

sanskrit: ज्ञेज्यदृष्टियुतं तच्च स्वस्वस्वामिबलान्वितम् । इति भावबलं स्पष्टं सामान्यं च पुरोदितम् ॥२९॥
transliteration: jñejyadṛṣṭiyutaṃ tacca svasvasvāmibalānvitam . iti bhāvabalaṃ spaṣṭaṃ sāmānyaṃ ca puroditam.
separated_sandhi: jña ijya dṛṣṭi yutam tat ca sva sva svāmi balaanvitam iti bhāvabalam spaṣṭam sāmānyam ca purā uditam
english: Furthermore, it (the house strength) is endowed with the aspects of Mercury and Jupiter, and with the strength of its own respective lord. Thus, this general strength of the houses has been clearly explained as stated earlier.

sanskrit: बुधेज्ययुक्तभावस्य बलमेकेन संयुतम् । मन्दाररवियुक्तस्य बलमेकेन वर्जितम् ॥३०॥
transliteration: budhejyayuktabhāvasya balamekena saṃyutam . mandāraraviyuktasya balamekena varjitam.
separated_sandhi: budha ijya yukta bhāvasya balam ekena saṃyutammanda āra ravi yuktasya balam ekena varjitam
english: The strength of a house associated with Mercury and Jupiter is augmented by one unit. The strength of a house associated with Saturn, Mars, and the Sun is diminished by one unit.

sanskrit: दिने शीर्षोदयो भावः सन्ध्यायामुभयोदयः । निशि पृष्ठोदयाख्यश्च दद्यात् पादमितं बलम् ॥३१॥
transliteration: dine śīrṣodayo bhāvaḥ sandhyāyāmubhayodayaḥ . niśi pṛṣṭhodayākhyaśca dadyāt pādamitaṃ balam.
separated_sandhi: dine śīrṣodayaḥ bhāvaḥ sandhyāyām ubhayodayaḥniśi pṛṣṭhodayākhyaḥ ca dadyāt pādamitam balam
english: A head-rising house (bhāva) during the day, a both-rising house during twilight, and a back-rising house at night, each contributes a quarter measure of strength (bala).

sanskrit: अंकाग्नयोऽङ्गरामाश्च खाग्नया करसिन्धवः । नवाग्नयः सुरास्त्रिंशद् दशसंगुणिताः क्रमात् ॥३२॥
transliteration: aṃkāgnayo'ṅgarāmāśca khāgnayā karasindhavaḥ . navāgnayaḥ surāstriṃśad daśasaṃguṇitāḥ kramāt.
separated_sandhi: aṅkāgnayaḥ aṅgarāmāḥ ca khāgnayaḥ karasindhavaḥnavāgnayaḥ surāḥ triṃśat daśasaṃguṇitāḥ kramāt
english: The numbers zero and nine (9), zero and three (3); three and six (36); zero and three (30); two and four (42); zero and nine (9); and three and three (33); and thirty (30), are, in order, multiplied by ten.

sanskrit: रव्यादीनां बलैक्यश्चेत् तदा सुबलिनो मताः । अधिकं पूर्णमेव स्याद् बलं चेद्बलिनो द्विज ॥३३॥
transliteration: ravyādīnāṃ balaikyaścet tadā subalino matāḥ . adhikaṃ pūrṇameva syād balaṃ cedbalino dvija.
separated_sandhi: ravyādīnām bala_aikyaḥ cet tadā subalinaḥ matāḥadhikam pūrṇam eva syāt balam cet balinaḥ dvija
english: O twice-born (dvija), if the combined strength (bala) of the Sun and other planets is achieved, then they are considered very strong. If the strength (bala) is even greater than this, it should indeed be considered full.

sanskrit: गुरुसौम्यरवीणां तु भूतषट्केन्दवो द्विज । पंचाग्नयः खभूतानि करभूमिसुधाकराः ॥३४॥
transliteration: gurusaumyaravīṇāṃ tu bhūtaṣaṭkendavo dvija . paṃcāgnayaḥ khabhūtāni karabhūmisudhākarāḥ.
separated_sandhi: guru-saumya-ravīṇām tu bhūta-ṣaṭka-indavaḥ dvijapañca-agnayaḥ kha-bhūtāni kara-bhūmi-sudhākarāḥ
english: O twice-born (dvija), for Jupiter, Mercury, and the Sun, (the prescribed values are): one-six-five (165); three-five (35); five-zero (50); and two-one-one (112).

sanskrit: खाग्नयश्च क्रमात्स्थानदिक्चेष्टासमयाऽयने । सितेन्द्वोस्त्र्यग्निचन्द्राश्च खेषवः खाग्नयः शतम् ॥३५॥
transliteration: khāgnayaśca kramātsthānadikceṣṭāsamayā'yane . sitendvostryagnicandrāśca kheṣavaḥ khāgnayaḥ śatam.
separated_sandhi: khāgnayaḥ ca kramāt sthāna-dik-ceṣṭā-samaya-ayanesite_indvoḥ tri-agni-candrāḥ ca kha-iṣavaḥ khāgnayaḥ śatam
english: And in order, for positional (sthāna), directional (dik), motional (ceṣṭā), temporal (samaya), and solstitial (ayana) strengths, the values are: thirty (30), one hundred thirty-three (133), fifty (50), thirty (30), and one hundred (100). These are specifically for Venus and Moon.

sanskrit: चत्वारिंशत् कला भौममन्दयोः षण्णव क्रमात् । त्रिंशत् खवेदाः सप्ताङ्गा नखाश्चेत्युदिता द्विज ॥३६॥
transliteration: catvāriṃśat kalā bhaumamandayoḥ ṣaṇṇava kramāt . triṃśat khavedāḥ saptāṅgā nakhāścetyuditā dvija.
separated_sandhi: catvāriṃśat kalā bhaumamandayoḥ ṣaṇṇava kramāttriṃśat khavedāḥ saptāṅgāḥ nakhāḥ ca iti uditā dvija
english: O twice-born (dvija), forty kalās (minutes of arc) are assigned to Mars and ninety-six respectively to Saturn. Thirty, forty, sixty-seven, and twenty [kalās] are also declared thus.

sanskrit: एवं कृत्वा बलैक्यंच ततश्चिन्त्यम् फलं द्विज । भावस्थानग्रहैः प्रोक्तयोगे ये योगहेतवः ॥३७॥
transliteration: evaṃ kṛtvā balaikyaṃca tataścintyam phalaṃ dvija . bhāvasthānagrahaiḥ proktayoge ye yogahetavaḥ.
separated_sandhi: evaṃ kṛtvā balaikyaṃ ca tataḥ cintyaṃ phalaṃdvija bhāvasthānagrahaīḥ proktayoge ye yogahetavaḥ
english: And having thus calculated the total strength, O twice-born (dvija), the results should then be considered. [Consider] those planets situated in houses which are the causes of the declared planetary combinations (yoga).

sanskrit: तेषां मध्ये बली कर्ता स एवाऽस्य फलप्रदः । योगेष्वाप्तेषु बहुषु नीतिरेवं प्रकीर्तिता ॥३८॥
transliteration: teṣāṃ madhye balī kartā sa evā'sya phalapradaḥ . yogeṣvāpteṣu bahuṣu nītirevaṃ prakīrtitā.
separated_sandhi: teṣāṃ madhye balī kartā saḥ eva asya phalapradaḥyogeṣu āpteṣu bahuṣu nītiḥ evaṃ prakīrtitā
english: Among them, the strongest planet is indeed the agent and the giver of its results. When many such planetary combinations (yoga) are present, this rule (nīti) is thus proclaimed.

sanskrit: गणितेषु प्रवीणो यः शब्दशास्त्रे कृतश्रमः । न्यायविद् बुद्धिमान् देशदिक्कालज्ञो जितेन्द्रियः ॥३९॥
transliteration: gaṇiteṣu pravīṇo yaḥ śabdaśāstre kṛtaśramaḥ . nyāyavid buddhimān deśadikkālajño jitendriyaḥ.
separated_sandhi: gaṇiteṣu pravīṇaḥ yaḥ śabdaśāstre kṛtaśramaḥnyāyavid buddhimān deśadikkālajñaḥ jitendriyaḥ
english: That person who is skilled in mathematics and diligent in the science of grammar (śabdaśāstra), knowledgeable in logic, intelligent, aware of place, direction, and time, and who has controlled their senses...

sanskrit: ऊहापोहपटुर्होरास्कन्धश्रवणसम्मतः । मैत्रेय सत्यतां यादि तस्य वाक्यं न संशयः ॥४०॥
transliteration: ūhāpohapaṭurhorāskandhaśravaṇasammataḥ . maitreya satyatāṃ yādi tasya vākyaṃ na saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: ūhāpohapaṭuḥ horāskandhaśravaṇasammataḥmaitreya satyatāṃ yāti tasya vākyaṃ na saṃśayaḥ
english: That person who is adept at deliberation and reasoning, and is well-versed in the teachings of the Hora (astrology) branch – O Maitreya, their words attain truth; there is no doubt.

sanskrit: अथ चेष्टमनिष्टं च ग्रहानां कथयाम्यहम् । यद्वशाच्च प्रयच्छन्ति शुभाऽशुभदशाफलम् ॥१॥
transliteration: atha ceṣṭamaniṣṭaṃ ca grahānāṃ kathayāmyaham . yadvaśācca prayacchanti śubhā'śubhadaśāphalam.
separated_sandhi: atha ca iṣṭam aniṣṭam ca grahāṇām kathayāmi ahamyat vaśāt ca prayacchanti śubhāśubhadaśāphalam
english: Now I will explain the auspicious and inauspicious effects of the planets, by whose influence they grant the results of auspicious and inauspicious planetary periods (daśā).

sanskrit: स्वनीचोनो ग्रह शोध्यः षड्भाधिक्ये भमण्डलात् । सैको राशिर्भवेदुच्चरश्मिर्द्विघ्नांशसंयुतः ॥२॥
transliteration: svanīcono graha śodhyaḥ ṣaḍbhādhikye bhamaṇḍalāt . saiko rāśirbhaveduccaraśmirdvighnāṃśasaṃyutaḥ.
separated_sandhi: svanīcounaḥ grahaḥ śodhyaḥ ṣaḍbhādhikye bhamaṇḍalātsaikaḥ rāśiḥ bhavet uccaraśmiḥ dvighnāṃśasaṃyutaḥ
english: A planet (graha) should be subtracted from its debilitation point. If the result exceeds six signs (bhamaṇḍala), it should be subtracted from the zodiac. The sign (rāśi) thus obtained, plus one, then becomes the exaltation ray (uccaraśmi), combined with double the degrees.

sanskrit: चेष्टाकेन्द्राच्च तद्रश्मिं साधयेदुच्चरश्मिवत् । चेष्टाकेन्द्रं कुजादीनां पूर्वमुक्तं मया द्विज ॥३॥
transliteration: ceṣṭākendrācca tadraśmiṃ sādhayeduccaraśmivat . ceṣṭākendraṃ kujādīnāṃ pūrvamuktaṃ mayā dvija.
separated_sandhi: ceṣṭākendrāt ca tadraśmim sādhayet uccaraśmivatceṣṭākendram kujādīnām pūrvamuktam mayā dvija
english: From the "ceṣṭā-kendra" (motion center) one should calculate its ray in the same way as the "uccaraśmi" (exaltation ray). O twice-born (dvija), I have already explained the "ceṣṭā-kendra" for Mars (kuja) and other planets.

sanskrit: सायनार्कस्त्रिभोऽर्कस्य व्यर्केन्दुश्च विधोस्तथा । चेष्टाकेन्द्रं रसाल्पं तच्चक्राच्छोध्यं रसाधिके ॥४॥
transliteration: sāyanārkastribho'rkasya vyarkenduśca vidhostathā . ceṣṭākendraṃ rasālpaṃ taccakrācchodhyaṃ rasādhike.
separated_sandhi: sāyanārkaḥ tribhaḥ arkasya vyarkenduḥ ca vidhoḥ tathāceṣṭākendram rasālpam taccakrāt śodhyam rasādhike
english: For the Sun (arka), its "ceṣṭā-kendra" (motion center) is the tropical Sun (sāyana-arka) minus three signs. Similarly, for the Moon (vidhu), it is the Moon minus the Sun. If the "ceṣṭā-kendra" is less than six signs, it should be subtracted from the zodiac; if it is more than six signs, it should also be subtracted from the zodiac.

sanskrit: चेष्टोच्चरश्मियोगार्धं शुभरश्मिः प्रकीर्त्यते । अष्टभ्यश्च विशुद्धोऽसाबशुभाख्यश्च कथ्यते ॥५॥
transliteration: ceṣṭoccaraśmiyogārdhaṃ śubharaśmiḥ prakīrtyate . aṣṭabhyaśca viśuddho'sābaśubhākhyaśca kathyate.
separated_sandhi: ceṣṭoccarśmiyogārdham śubharaśmiḥ prakīrtyateaṣṭabhyaḥ ca viśuddhaḥ asau aśubhākhyaḥ ca kathyate
english: Half of the sum of the "ceṣṭā-raśmi" (motion ray) and the "uccaraśmi" (exaltation ray) is declared to be the auspicious ray ("śubharaśmi"). And that (value) which is subtracted from eight is called the inauspicious ray ("aśubhākhyaḥ").

sanskrit: उच्चचेष्टाकरान् व्येकान् दिग्भिर्हत्वा तु योजयेत् । तदर्धमिष्टसंज्ञं स्यात् कष्टं तत्षष्टितश्च्युतम् ॥६॥
transliteration: uccaceṣṭākarān vyekān digbhirhatvā tu yojayet . tadardhamiṣṭasaṃjñaṃ syāt kaṣṭaṃ tatṣaṣṭitaścyutam.
separated_sandhi: ucca-ceṣṭā-karān vi-ekān digbhiḥ hatvā tu yojayettat-ardham iṣṭa-saṃjñam syāt kaṣṭam tat-ṣaṣṭitaḥ cyutam
english: One should multiply the factors indicating high activity (each reduced by one) by ten (the number of directions) and then add them. Half of that sum would be designated as the 'iṣṭa' (favorable) value. The 'kaṣṭa' (unfavorable) value is what remains when that 'iṣṭa' value is subtracted from sixty.

sanskrit: स्वोच्चे मूलत्रिकोणे च स्वभेऽधिसुहृदीष्टभे । समभे शत्रुभे चाधिशत्रुभे नीचभे क्रमात् ॥७॥
transliteration: svocce mūlatrikoṇe ca svabhe'dhisuhṛdīṣṭabhe . samabhe śatrubhe cādhiśatrubhe nīcabhe kramāt.
separated_sandhi: sva-ucce mūla-trikoṇe ca sva-bhe adhi-suhṛdi iṣṭa-bhesama-bhe śatru-bhe ca adhi-śatru-bhe nīca-bhe kramāt
english: In its exaltation sign, its (mūlatrikoṇa) trinal sign, its own sign, the sign of an intimate friend, the sign of a friend, a neutral sign, an enemy's sign, a great enemy's sign, and its debilitation sign – this is the sequence (of planetary strength).

sanskrit: षष्टिरिष्वब्धयस्त्रिंशदाकृतिस्तिथयो गजाः । चत्वारो द्वौ च शून्यं च शुभमेतत्फलं गृहे ॥८॥
transliteration: ṣaṣṭiriṣvabdhayastriṃśadākṛtistithayo gajāḥ . catvāro dvau ca śūnyaṃ ca śubhametatphalaṃ gṛhe.
separated_sandhi: ṣaṣṭiḥ iṣu-abdhayaḥ triṃśat ākṛtiḥ tithayaḥ gajāḥcatvāraḥ dvau ca śūnyam ca śubham etat-phalam gṛhe
english: Sixty, forty-five (arrows and oceans), thirty, twenty (form), fifteen (lunar days), eight (elephants), four, two, and zero – these are the auspicious results (phalas) for a planet in a sign.

sanskrit: षष्टितः पतितं चैतच्छेषं स्यादशुभं गृहे । तदर्धमन्यवर्गेषु ज्ञेयं विप्र शुभाऽशुभम् ॥९॥
transliteration: ṣaṣṭitaḥ patitaṃ caitaccheṣaṃ syādaśubhaṃ gṛhe . tadardhamanyavargeṣu jñeyaṃ vipra śubhā'śubham.
separated_sandhi: ṣaṣṭitaḥ patitam ca etat śeṣam syāt aśubham gṛhetat-ardham anya-vargeṣu jñeyam vipra śubha-aśubham
english: And that which is subtracted from sixty (60 - iṣṭa) would be the inauspicious (aśubha) remainder in a sign. O Brahmin, for other divisional charts (vargas), half of the auspicious and inauspicious values should be known.

sanskrit: पञ्चस्विष्टफलं चाद्यात् समं षष्ठे ततः परम् । अशुभं त्रिषु विज्ञेयमिति शास्त्रेषु निश्चितम् ॥१०॥
transliteration: pañcasviṣṭaphalaṃ cādyāt samaṃ ṣaṣṭhe tataḥ param . aśubhaṃ triṣu vijñeyamiti śāstreṣu niścitam.
separated_sandhi: pañcasu iṣṭa-phalam ca ādyāt samam ṣaṣṭhe tataḥparam aśubham triṣu vijñeyam iti śāstreṣu niścitam
english: Thus, in the first five (dignities), the favorable (iṣṭa) results are applied. In the sixth (dignity), neutral results are applied. Thereafter, in the three (dignities), inauspicious results should be understood. This is conclusively established in the scriptures (śāstras).

sanskrit: दिग्बलं दिक्फलं तस्य तथा दिनफलं भवेत् । तयोः फलं शुभं प्रोक्तमशुभं षष्टितश्च्युतम् ॥११॥
transliteration: digbalaṃ dikphalaṃ tasya tathā dinaphalaṃ bhavet . tayoḥ phalaṃ śubhaṃ proktamaśubhaṃ ṣaṣṭitaścyutam.
separated_sandhi: digbalam dikphalam tasya tathā dinaphalam bhavettayoḥ phalam śubham proktam aśubham ṣaṣṭitaḥ cyutam
english: Its directional strength (digbala) yields directional results, and similarly, diurnal strength (dinabala) also produces results. The auspicious result of these two (strengths) is declared, and the inauspicious result is what remains after subtracting the auspicious part from sixty units.

sanskrit: शुभेऽधिके शुभं ज्ञेयमशुभं त्वशुभेऽधिके । दशाफलं नभोगस्य तथा भावफलं द्विज ॥१२॥
transliteration: śubhe'dhike śubhaṃ jñeyamaśubhaṃ tvaśubhe'dhike . daśāphalaṃ nabhogasya tathā bhāvaphalaṃ dvija.
separated_sandhi: śubhe adhike śubham jñeyam aśubham tu aśubhe adhikedaśāphalam nabhogasya tathā bhāvaphalam dvija
english: If the auspicious (portion) is greater, the result should be understood as auspicious; but if the inauspicious (portion) is greater, it is to be known as inauspicious. O twice-born (dvija), similarly, there are the results of a planet (nabhoga) and the results of a house (bhāva).

sanskrit: बलैः षड्भिः समोधित्वा बलैक्येन भजेत् पृथक् । तत्तद्बलफलानि स्युरशुभानि शुभानि च ॥१३॥
transliteration: balaiḥ ṣaḍbhiḥ samodhitvā balaikyena bhajet pṛthak . tattadbalaphalāni syuraśubhāni śubhāni ca.
separated_sandhi: balaiḥ ṣaḍbhiḥ samodhitvā balaikyena bhajetpṛthak tattadbalaphalāni syuḥ aśubhāni śubhāni ca
english: Having summed up the six strengths (bala), one should then divide (the individual results) separately by the sum of these strengths (bala). The resulting fruits of each strength will thus be both inauspicious and auspicious.

sanskrit: शुभपापफलाभ्यां च हन्याद् दृष्टिं बलं तथा । दृष्टी ते शुभपापाख्ये बले स्यातां तदाह्वये ॥१४॥
transliteration: śubhapāpaphalābhyāṃ ca hanyād dṛṣṭiṃ balaṃ tathā . dṛṣṭī te śubhapāpākhye bale syātāṃ tadāhvaye.
separated_sandhi: śubhapāpaphalābhyām ca hanyāt dṛṣṭim balam tathādṛṣṭī te śubhapāpākhye bale syātām tadāhvaye
english: One should multiply the aspect (dṛṣṭi) and the strength (bala) by the auspicious and inauspicious results. Thus, those two aspects and two strengths become known as auspicious and inauspicious, respectively.

sanskrit: भावानां च फले प्रोक्ते पतीनां च फले उभे । राशौ शुभनभोगश्चेद् भावसाधनसंभवम् ॥१५॥
transliteration: bhāvānāṃ ca phale prokte patīnāṃ ca phale ubhe . rāśau śubhanabhogaśced bhāvasādhanasaṃbhavam.
separated_sandhi: bhāvānām ca phale prokte patīnām ca phale ubherāśau śubhanabhogaḥ cet bhāvasādhanasaṃbhavam
english: Both results for the houses (bhāva) and for their lords are declared. If an auspicious planet (nabhoga) is in a zodiacal sign (rāśi), then the achievement of the house (bhāva) becomes possible.

sanskrit: फलं तस्य शुभे युञ्ज्यादशुभे वर्जयेत् तथा । पापश्चेदन्यथा चैवं बले दृष्ट्यां तथैव च ॥१६॥
transliteration: phalaṃ tasya śubhe yuñjyādaśubhe varjayet tathā . pāpaścedanyathā caivaṃ bale dṛṣṭyāṃ tathaiva ca.
separated_sandhi: phalam tasya śubhe yuñjyāt aśubhe varjayet tathāpāpaḥ cet anyathā ca evam bale dṛṣṭyām tathā eva ca
english: One should attribute a planet's results as auspicious when the planet is benefic, and similarly, one should avoid (attributing auspicious results) when it is malefic. This principle applies to a planet's strength and its aspect.

sanskrit: युञ्ज्यादुच्चादिगे खेटे फलं नीचादिगे त्यजेत् । एवं शुभाऽशुभं ज्ञात्वा जातकस्य फलं वदेत् ॥१७॥
transliteration: yuñjyāduccādige kheṭe phalaṃ nīcādige tyajet . evaṃ śubhā'śubhaṃ jñātvā jātakasya phalaṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: yuñjyāt uccādige kheṭe phalam nīcādige tyajetevam śubhāśubham jñātvā jātakasya phalam vadet
english: One should attribute auspicious results when a planet is in exaltation (ucca) or similar strong positions, and one should disregard (auspicious results) when it is in debilitation (nīca) or similar weak positions. Thus, having understood what is auspicious and inauspicious, one should predict the native's destiny.

sanskrit: अष्टवर्गफलं चैवं स्थाने च करणेऽन्यथा । राशिद्वयगते भावे तद्राश्यधिपतेः क्रिया ॥१८॥
transliteration: aṣṭavargaphalaṃ caivaṃ sthāne ca karaṇe'nyathā . rāśidvayagate bhāve tadrāśyadhipateḥ kriyā.
separated_sandhi: aṣṭavargaphalam ca evam sthāne ca karaṇe anyathārāśidvayagate bhāve tad rāśyadhipateḥ kriyā
english: The results from the aṣṭavarga system are determined in this manner; however, for houses (sthāna) and calculations (karaṇa), the interpretation is different. When a house (bhāva) spans two zodiacal signs (rāśi), the influence (kriyā) is attributed to the lord of that particular sign (rāśi).

sanskrit: स्थानाधिकेन भावेन भावलाभः प्रकीर्तितः । तत्समाने च तद्भावे तदानीं स्थानदान् ग्रहान् ॥१९॥
transliteration: sthānādhikena bhāvena bhāvalābhaḥ prakīrtitaḥ . tatsamāne ca tadbhāve tadānīṃ sthānadān grahān.
separated_sandhi: sthānādhikena bhāvena bhāvalābhaḥ prakīrtitaḥtat samāne ca tad bhāve tadānīm sthānadān grahān
english: The benefic outcome for a house (bhāva) is declared based on the sign in which the greater portion (sthāna) of the house falls. If the house is equally divided between two signs (rāśi), then one should consider the planets (graha) that bestow strength or position.

sanskrit: संयोज्ये स्थानसंख्याया दलमेतत्समं फलं । एवं सखेटभावानां फलं ज्ञेयं शुभाऽशुभम् ॥२०॥
transliteration: saṃyojye sthānasaṃkhyāyā dalametatsamaṃ phalaṃ . evaṃ sakheṭabhāvānāṃ phalaṃ jñeyaṃ śubhā'śubham.
separated_sandhi: saṃyojya sthānasaṃkhyāyāḥ dalam etat samam phalamevam sakheṭabhāvānām phalam jñeyam śubhāśubham
english: One should determine the result by combining half of the total positional strength points; this outcome is considered equivalent. In this way, the auspicious and inauspicious results of houses (bhāva) with their occupying planets (graha) should be understood.

sanskrit: कथ्याम्यथा भावानां खेटानां च पदं द्विज । तद्विशेषफलं ज्ञातुं यथोक्तं प्राङ् महर्षिभिः ॥१॥
transliteration: kathyāmyathā bhāvānāṃ kheṭānāṃ ca padaṃ dvija . tadviśeṣaphalaṃ jñātuṃ yathoktaṃ prāṅ maharṣibhiḥ.
separated_sandhi: kathyāmi athā bhāvānām kheṭānām ca padam dvija |tat viśeṣaphalam jñātum yathā uktam prāk maharṣibhiḥ
english: O Brahmin (dvija), I shall now explain the padas of the houses (bhāvas) and planets (kheṭas). This explanation is given to understand their specific results, as it was previously stated by the great sages (maharṣis).

sanskrit: लग्नाद् यावतिथे राशौ तिष्ठेल्लग्नेश्वरः क्रमात् । ततस्तावतिथे राशौ लग्नस्य पदमुच्यते ॥२॥
transliteration: lagnād yāvatithe rāśau tiṣṭhellagneśvaraḥ kramāt . tatastāvatithe rāśau lagnasya padamucyate.
separated_sandhi: lagnāt yāvatithe rāśau tiṣṭhet lagneśvaraḥ kramāt| tatas tāvatithe rāśau lagnasya padam ucyate
english: From the ascendant (lagna), count the number of houses (rāśis) to the house where the lord of the ascendant (lagneśvara) is situated. Then, counting the same number of houses sequentially from the house of the ascendant lord, that resulting house (rāśi) is called the Lagna pada.

sanskrit: सर्वेषामाप भावानां ज्ञेयमेवं पदं द्विज । तनुभावपदं तत्र बुधा मुख्यपदं विदुः ॥३॥
transliteration: sarveṣāmāpa bhāvānāṃ jñeyamevaṃ padaṃ dvija . tanubhāvapadaṃ tatra budhā mukhyapadaṃ viduḥ.
separated_sandhi: sarveṣām api bhāvānām jñeyam evam padam dvija| tanubhāvapadam tatra budhā mukhyapadam viduḥ
english: O Brahmin (dvija), the pada for all houses (bhāvas) should similarly be known in this way. Among these, the intelligent ones (budhas) consider the Lagna pada (tanubhāvāpada) to be the principal pada.

sanskrit: स्वस्थानं सप्तमं नैवं पदं भवितुमर्हति । तस्मिन् पदत्वे विज्ञेयं मध्यं तुर्यं क्रमात् पदम् ॥४॥
transliteration: svasthānaṃ saptamaṃ naivaṃ padaṃ bhavitumarhati . tasmin padatve vijñeyaṃ madhyaṃ turyaṃ kramāt padam.
separated_sandhi: svasthānam saptamam na evam padam bhavitum arhati |tasmin padatve vijñeyam madhyam turyam kramāt padam
english: The seventh house (saptamaṃ) from a given house cannot be its pada. If the calculated pada falls in the seventh house from itself, then the fourth house (turyaṃ) from that given house should be considered the pada in sequence.

sanskrit: यथा तुर्यस्थिते नाथे तुर्यमेव पदं भवेत् । सप्तमे च स्थिते नाथे विज्ञेयं दशमं पदम् ॥५॥
transliteration: yathā turyasthite nāthe turyameva padaṃ bhavet . saptame ca sthite nāthe vijñeyaṃ daśamaṃ padam.
separated_sandhi: yathā turyasthite nāthe turyam eva padam bhavet| saptame ca sthite nāthe vijñeyam daśamam padam
english: For instance, when the lord (nātha) is situated in the fourth house (turya) from itself, the fourth house itself becomes the pada. And, when the lord (nātha) is situated in the seventh house (saptame) from itself, the tenth house (daśamaṃ) should be understood as the pada.

sanskrit: यस्माद् यावतिथे राशौ खेटात् तद्भवनं द्विज । ततस्तावतिथं राशिं खेटारूढं प्रचक्षते ॥६॥
transliteration: yasmād yāvatithe rāśau kheṭāt tadbhavanaṃ dvija . tatastāvatithaṃ rāśiṃ kheṭārūḍhaṃ pracakṣate.
separated_sandhi: yasmāt yāvatithe rāśau kheṭāt tat bhavanam dvijatataḥ tāvatitham rāśim kheṭārūḍham pracakṣate
english: O Brahmin (dvija), determine the number of signs from a planet (kheṭa) to its own house. Then, counting that same number of signs from the planet itself, the resulting sign is called the 'kheṭārūḍha' (planet-ascendant).

sanskrit: द्विनाथद्विभयोरेवं विज्ञेयं सबलावधि । विगणय्य पदं विप्र ततस्तस्य फलं वदेत् ॥७॥
transliteration: dvināthadvibhayorevaṃ vijñeyaṃ sabalāvadhi . vigaṇayya padaṃ vipra tatastasya phalaṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: dvināthadvibhayos evam vijñeyam sabalāvadhivigaṇayya padam vipra tataḥ tasya phalam vadet
english: O Brahmin (vipra), similarly, this principle should be understood concerning signs with two lords (dvinātha) and their two houses (dvibha), always considering their strength (sabalāvadhi). Having calculated the "pada" (the derived ascendant), one should then declare its results.

sanskrit: अथाऽहं पदमाश्रित्य फलं किञ्चिद् ब्रुवे द्विज । पदादेकादशे स्थाने ग्रहैर्युक्तोऽथवेक्षिते ॥८॥
transliteration: athā'haṃ padamāśritya phalaṃ kiñcid bruve dvija . padādekādaśe sthāne grahairyukto'thavekṣite.
separated_sandhi: atha aham padam āśritya phalam kiñcit bruve dvijapadāt ekādaśe sthāne grahaiḥ yuktaḥ athavā īkṣite
english: Now (atha), O Brahmin (dvija), relying on the "pada" (derived ascendant), I shall declare some results. If a native's eleventh house from the "pada" is conjoined by or aspected by planets...

sanskrit: धनवान् जायते बालस्तथा सुखसमन्वितः । शुभयोगात् सुमार्गेण धनाप्तिः पापतोऽन्तथा ॥९॥
transliteration: dhanavān jāyate bālastathā sukhasamanvitaḥ . śubhayogāt sumārgeṇa dhanāptiḥ pāpato'ntathā.
separated_sandhi: dhanavān jāyate bālaḥ tathā sukhasamanvitaḥśubhayogāt sumārgeṇa dhanāptiḥ pāpataḥ antathā
english: ...that individual (bālaḥ) becomes wealthy and endowed with happiness. Through auspicious planetary combinations (śubhayogāt), wealth is acquired by ethical means (sumārgeṇa); by malefic combinations (pāpataḥ), it is gained through unethical means.

sanskrit: मिश्रैर्मिश्रं फलं ज्ञेयं स्वोच्चमित्रादिगेहगैः । बहुधा जायते लाभो बहुधा च सुखागमः ॥१०॥
transliteration: miśrairmiśraṃ phalaṃ jñeyaṃ svoccamitrādigehagaiḥ . bahudhā jāyate lābho bahudhā ca sukhāgamaḥ.
separated_sandhi: miśraiḥ miśram phalam jñeyam svoccamitrādigehagaiḥbahudhā jāyate lābhaḥ bahudhā ca sukhāgamaḥ
english: If there are mixed influences (miśraiḥ), then mixed results (miśram phalam) should be understood (jñeyam). When planets occupy their own exalted (svocca), friendly (mitra), or similar houses (ādi-gehagaiḥ), there will be manifold gains (lābha) and an abundance of happiness (sukhāgama).

sanskrit: पदाल्लाभगृहं यस्य पश्यन्ति सकला ग्रहाः । राजा वा राजतुल्यो वा स जातो नात्र संशयः ॥११॥
transliteration: padāllābhagṛhaṃ yasya paśyanti sakalā grahāḥ . rājā vā rājatulyo vā sa jāto nātra saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: padāt lābhagṛham yasya paśyanti sakalāḥ grahāḥrājā vā rājatulyaḥ vā saḥ jātaḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ
english: The person whose house of gain (11th house) from the Pada lagna is aspected by all planets (grahas) is born either a king or equal to a king; there is no doubt about this.

sanskrit: पदाल्लाभगृहं पश्येद् व्ययं कश्चिन्न पश्यति । अविध्नेन सदा लाभो जायते द्विजसत्तम ॥१२॥
transliteration: padāllābhagṛhaṃ paśyed vyayaṃ kaścinna paśyati . avidhnena sadā lābho jāyate dvijasattama.
separated_sandhi: padāt lābhagṛham paśyet vyayam kaścit na paśyatiavighnena sadā lābhaḥ jāyate dvijasattama
english: O best among the twice-born (dvijasattama), if planets aspect the house of gain (11th house) from the Pada lagna, but no one aspects the house of expenditure (12th house), then gain always occurs without obstacles.

sanskrit: ग्रहदृग्योगबाहुल्ये पदादेकादशे द्विज । सार्गले चापि तत्रापि बह्वर्गलसमागमे ॥१३॥
transliteration: grahadṛgyogabāhulye padādekādaśe dvija . sārgale cāpi tatrāpi bahvargalasamāgame.
separated_sandhi: grahadṛgyogabāhulye padāt ekādaśe dvijasa-argale ca api tatra api bahvargalasamāgame
english: O Brahmin (dvija), when there is an abundance of planetary aspects and yogas (grahadṛgyogabāhulye) on the eleventh house (ekādaśe) from the Pada lagna, and especially when it is obstructed (sārgale) or when there is a confluence of many obstructions (bahvargalasamāgame) -

sanskrit: शुभग्रहार्गले विप्र तत्राप्युच्चग्रहार्गले । शुभेन स्वामिना दृष्टे लग्नभाग्यादिगेन वा ॥१४॥
transliteration: śubhagrahārgale vipra tatrāpyuccagrahārgale . śubhena svāminā dṛṣṭe lagnabhāgyādigena vā.
separated_sandhi: śubhagrahārgale vipra tatra api ucca-graha-argaleśubhena svāminā dṛṣṭe lagnabhāgyādigena vā
english: O Brahmin (vipra), when there is an Argala from benefic planets (śubhagrahārgale), and especially when there is an Argala from exalted planets (uccagrahārgale); or when it is aspected (dṛṣṭe) by a benefic lord (śubhena svāminā), or by the lord of the Ascendant (lagna), the house of fortune (bhāgya, 9th house), and so on (ādigenavā) -

sanskrit: जातस्य भाग्यप्राबल्यं निर्दिशेदुत्तरोत्तरम् । उक्तयोगेषु चेत् खेटे द्वादशं नैव पश्यति ॥१५॥
transliteration: jātasya bhāgyaprābalyaṃ nirdiśeduttarottaram . uktayogeṣu cet kheṭe dvādaśaṃ naiva paśyati.
separated_sandhi: jātasya bhāgyaprābalyam nirdiśet uttarottaramuktayogeṣu cet kheṭe dvādaśam na eva paśyati
english: In these stated (ukta) combinations (yogas), one should progressively declare the increasing strength of fortune (bhāgyaprābalyam) for the native, if a planet (kheṭa) does not aspect the twelfth house at all.

sanskrit: पदस्थानाद् व्यये विप्र शुभपापयुतेक्षिते । व्ययबाहुल्यमित्येवं विशेषोपार्जनात् सदा ॥१६॥
transliteration: padasthānād vyaye vipra śubhapāpayutekṣite . vyayabāhulyamityevaṃ viśeṣopārjanāt sadā.
separated_sandhi: padasthānāt vyaye vipra śubhapāpayutekṣitevyayabāhulyam iti evam viśeṣopārjanāt sadā
english: O Brahmin, if the twelfth house from the Arudha Lagna (Pada) is conjoined with or aspected by both auspicious and malefic planets, then there will be abundant expenditure. This expenditure will always come from special earnings.

sanskrit: शुभग्रहे सुमार्गेण कुमार्गात् पापखेचरे । मिश्रे मिश्रफलं वाच्यमेवं लाभोऽपि लाभगे ॥१७॥
transliteration: śubhagrahe sumārgeṇa kumārgāt pāpakhecare . miśre miśraphalaṃ vācyamevaṃ lābho'pi lābhage.
separated_sandhi: śubhagrahe sumārgeṇa kumārgāt pāpakhecare miśremiśraphalam vācyam evam lābhaḥ api lābhage
english: If the planet influencing the expenditure is auspicious, the expenditure occurs through proper means. If it is a malefic planet, the expenditure comes from improper means. If there is a mixed influence of planets, a mixed result should be declared. Similarly, this principle also applies to gains in the house of profit (11th house).

sanskrit: पदारूढाद् व्यये शुक्रभानुस्वर्भानुभिर्युते । राजमूलाद् व्ययो वाच्यश्चन्द्रदृष्ट्या विशेषतः ॥१८॥
transliteration: padārūḍhād vyaye śukrabhānusvarbhānubhiryute . rājamūlād vyayo vācyaścandradṛṣṭyā viśeṣataḥ.
separated_sandhi: padārūḍhāt vyaye śukrabhānusvarbhānubhiḥ yuterājamūlāt vyayaḥ vācyaḥ candradṛṣṭyā viśeṣataḥ
english: If the twelfth house from the Arudha Lagna (Pada) is conjoined by Venus, the Sun, and Rāhu, then expenditure originating from the government should be predicted. This is particularly true if it is aspected by the Moon.

sanskrit: पदारूढाद् व्यये सौम्ये शुभखेटयुतेक्षिते । ज्ञातिमध्ये व्ययो नित्यं पापदृक् कलहाद् व्ययः ॥१९॥
transliteration: padārūḍhād vyaye saumye śubhakheṭayutekṣite . jñātimadhye vyayo nityaṃ pāpadṛk kalahād vyayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: padārūḍhāt vyaye saumye śubhakheṭayutekṣitejñātimadhye vyayaḥ nityam pāpadṛk kalahāt vyayaḥ
english: If the twelfth house from the Arudha Lagna (Pada) is influenced by Mercury and is conjoined with or aspected by auspicious planets, then expenditure (vyaya) related to relatives always occurs. If it is aspected by malefic planets, expenditure arises from quarrels.

sanskrit: पदाद् व्यये सुराचार्ये वीक्षिते चान्यखेचरैः । करमूलाद् व्ययो वाच्यः स्वस्यैव द्विजसत्तम ॥२०॥
transliteration: padād vyaye surācārye vīkṣite cānyakhecaraiḥ . karamūlād vyayo vācyaḥ svasyaiva dvijasattama.
separated_sandhi: padāt vyaye surācārye vīkṣite ca anyakhecaraiḥkaramūlāt vyayaḥ vācyaḥ svasya eva dvijasattama
english: O best among the twice-born (dvija), if the twelfth house from the Arudha Lagna (Pada) is aspected by Jupiter and also by other planets, then expenditure from one's own taxes or resources should be predicted.

sanskrit: आरूढाद् द्वादशे सौरे धरापुत्रेण संयुते । अन्यग्रहेक्षिते विप्र भ्रातृवर्गाद् धनव्ययः ॥२१॥
transliteration: ārūḍhād dvādaśe saure dharāputreṇa saṃyute . anyagrahekṣite vipra bhrātṛvargād dhanavyayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: ārūḍhāt dvādaśe saure dharāputreṇa saṃyuteanyagraha īkṣite vipra bhrātṛvargāt dhanavyayaḥ
english: O Brahmin, if Saturn is situated in the twelfth house from the Arudha Lagna, conjoined with Mars and aspected by other planets, there will be an expenditure of wealth on account of siblings.

sanskrit: आरूढाद् द्वादशे स्थाने ये योगाः कथिता यथा । लाभभावे च ते योगा लाभयोगकरास्तथा ॥२२॥
transliteration: ārūḍhād dvādaśe sthāne ye yogāḥ kathitā yathā . lābhabhāve ca te yogā lābhayogakarāstathā.
separated_sandhi: ārūḍhāt dvādaśe sthāne ye yogāḥ kathitāḥ yathālābhabhāve ca te yogāḥ lābhayogakarāḥ tathā
english: The planetary combinations (yoga) that have been described for the twelfth house from the Arudha Lagna, when they occur in the house of gain (the eleventh house), similarly become causes of gain.

sanskrit: आरूढात् सप्तमे राहुरथवा संस्थितः शिखी । कुक्षिव्यथायुतो बालः शिखिना पीडितो`थ वा ॥२३॥
transliteration: ārūḍhāt saptame rāhurathavā saṃsthitaḥ śikhī . kukṣivyathāyuto bālaḥ śikhinā pīḍito`tha vā.
separated_sandhi: ārūḍhāt saptame rāhuḥ athavā saṃsthitaḥ śikhīkukṣivyathā āyutaḥ bālaḥ śikhinā pīḍitaḥ atha vā
english: If Rahu or Ketu is situated in the seventh house from the Arudha, a child will be afflicted with abdominal pain, or (in the case of Ketu) tormented by Ketu.

sanskrit: आरूधात् सप्तमे केतुः पापखेटयुतेक्षितः । साहसी श्वेतकेशी च वृद्धलिङ्गी भवेन्नरः ॥२४॥
transliteration: ārūdhāt saptame ketuḥ pāpakheṭayutekṣitaḥ . sāhasī śvetakeśī ca vṛddhaliṅgī bhavennaraḥ.
separated_sandhi: ārūḍhāt saptame ketuḥ pāpakheṭa yuta īkṣitaḥsāhasī śvetakeśī ca vṛddhaliṅgī bhavet naraḥ
english: If Ketu is in the seventh house from the Arudha Lagna, and is conjoined with or aspected by malefic planets, the person will be courageous, have white hair, and exhibit signs of premature aging.

sanskrit: पदात्तु सप्तमे स्थाने गुरुशुक्रनिशाकराः । त्रयो द्वयमथैकोऽपि लक्ष्मीवान् जायते जनः ॥२५॥
transliteration: padāttu saptame sthāne guruśukraniśākarāḥ . trayo dvayamathaiko'pi lakṣmīvān jāyate janaḥ.
separated_sandhi: padāt tu saptame sthāne guru śukra niśākarāḥtrayaḥ dvayam atha ekaḥ api lakṣmīvān jāyate janaḥ
english: Indeed, if Jupiter, Venus, and the Moon - all three, or two of them, or even just one - are situated in the seventh house from the Arudha Pada, the person becomes wealthy.

sanskrit: स्वतुङ्गे सप्तमे खेटः शुभो वाऽप्यशुभः पदात् । श्रीमान् सोऽपि भवेन्नुनं सत्कीर्तिसहितो द्विज ॥२६॥
transliteration: svatuṅge saptame kheṭaḥ śubho vā'pyaśubhaḥ padāt . śrīmān so'pi bhavennunaṃ satkīrtisahito dvija.
separated_sandhi: svatuṅge saptame kheṭaḥ śubhaḥ vā api aśubhaḥ padātśrīmān saḥ api bhavet nunam satkīrtisahitaḥ dvija
english: O Brahmin (dvija), if an astrological planet, whether benefic or malefic, is situated in its own sign of exaltation in the seventh house from the Arudha Lagna (pada), then that person will surely become prosperous and endowed with good fame.

sanskrit: ये योगाः सप्तमे स्थाने पदाश्च कथिता मया । चिन्त्यास्तथैव ते योगा द्वितीयेऽपि सदा द्विज ॥२७॥
transliteration: ye yogāḥ saptame sthāne padāśca kathitā mayā . cintyāstathaiva te yogā dvitīye'pi sadā dvija.
separated_sandhi: ye yogāḥ saptame sthāne padāt ca kathitā mayācintyāḥ tathā eva te yogāḥ dvitīye api sadā dvija
english: O Brahmin (dvija), the combinations (yoga) which I have described for the seventh house from the Arudha Lagna (pada), those same combinations should likewise always be considered for the second house as well.

sanskrit: उच्चस्थो रौहिणेयो वा जीवो वा शुक्र एव वा । एवो बली धनगतः श्रियं दिशति देहिनः ॥२८॥
transliteration: uccastho rauhiṇeyo vā jīvo vā śukra eva vā . evo balī dhanagataḥ śriyaṃ diśati dehinaḥ.
separated_sandhi: uccasthaḥ rohiṇeyaḥ vā jīvaḥ vā śukraḥ eva vāeṣaḥ balī dhanagataḥ śriyam diśati dehinaḥ
english: If Mercury, Jupiter, or Venus is exalted, and that very planet is strong and situated in the house of wealth (the 2nd house), it bestows prosperity upon the embodied being.

sanskrit: ये योगाश्च पदे लग्ने यथावद् गदिता मया । ते योगाः कारकांशेऽपि विज्ञेया बांधवर्जिताः ॥२९॥
transliteration: ye yogāśca pade lagne yathāvad gaditā mayā . te yogāḥ kārakāṃśe'pi vijñeyā bāṃdhavarjitāḥ.
separated_sandhi: ye yogāḥ ca pade lagne yathāvat gaditā mayā teyogāḥ kārakāṃśe api vijñeyāḥ bāndhavavarjitāḥ
english: Those combinations (yoga) which I have properly described for the Arudha Lagna (pada lagna), those same combinations should also be understood for the Kārakāṃśa Lagna, but without considering relatives.

sanskrit: आरूढाद् वित्तभे सौम्ये सर्वदेशाधिपो भवेत् । सर्वज्ञो यदि वा स स्यात् कविर्वादी च भार्गवे ॥३०॥
transliteration: ārūḍhād vittabhe saumye sarvadeśādhipo bhavet . sarvajño yadi vā sa syāt kavirvādī ca bhārgave.
separated_sandhi: ārūḍhāt vittabhe saumye sarvadeśādhipaḥ bhavetsarvajñaḥ yadi vā saḥ syāt kaviḥ vādī ca bhārgave
english: If a benefic planet is in the house of wealth (the 2nd house) from the Arudha Lagna (ārūḍha), the person becomes the ruler of all regions. If it is Venus, he becomes omniscient and a poet-debater.

sanskrit: आरूधात् केन्द्रकोणेषु स्थिते दारपदे द्विज । लग्नजायापदे वापि सबलग्रहसंयुते ॥३१॥
transliteration: ārūdhāt kendrakoṇeṣu sthite dārapade dvija . lagnajāyāpade vāpi sabalagrahasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: ārūdhāt kendrakoṇeṣu sthite dārapade dvijalagna-jāyā-pade vā api sabala-graha-saṃyute
english: O twice-born (dvija), if the Dāra pada (the ārūḍha of the seventh house, A7) is situated in the quadrants (kendras) or trines (koṇas) from the Ārūḍha (lagna) (A1), or if it (Dāra pada) is in the Lagna (ascendant) or the seventh house, conjoined with a strong planet...

sanskrit: स्र्/ईमांश्च जायते नूनं देशे विख्यातिमान् भवेत् । षष्ठेष्टमे व्ययस्थाने जातो दारपदेऽधनः ॥३२॥
transliteration: sr/īmāṃśca jāyate nūnaṃ deśe vikhyātimān bhavet . ṣaṣṭheṣṭame vyayasthāne jāto dārapade'dhanaḥ.
separated_sandhi: śrīmān ca jāyate nūnaṃ deśe vikhyātimān bhavet| ṣaṣṭeṣṭame vyayasthāne jātaḥ dārapade adhanaḥ
english: Certainly, such a person becomes prosperous and famous in their country. However, if the Dāra pada (A7) is situated in the sixth, eighth, or twelfth house, the person born (under such a configuration) becomes poor.

sanskrit: पदे तत्सप्तमे वापि केन्द्रे वृद्धौ त्रिकोणके । सुवीर्यः संस्थितः खेतः भार्याभर्तृसुखप्रदः ॥३३॥
transliteration: pade tatsaptame vāpi kendre vṛddhau trikoṇake . suvīryaḥ saṃsthitaḥ khetaḥ bhāryābhartṛsukhapradaḥ.
separated_sandhi: pade tat-saptame vā api kendre vṛddhau trikoṇake |suvīryaḥ saṃsthitaḥ khetaḥ bhāryā-bhartṛ-sukha-pradaḥ
english: If a very strong planet (kheta) is situated in the Dāra pada (A7), or in its seventh house, or in a quadrant (kendra), or in a position of strength (like exaltation or Upacaya house), or in a trine (koṇa), then it bestows happiness upon both the wife and the husband.

sanskrit: पदाद्दारपदे चैवं केन्द्रे कोणे च संस्थिते । द्वयोर्मैत्री भवेन्नूनं त्रिके वैरं न संशयः ॥३४॥
transliteration: padāddārapade caivaṃ kendre koṇe ca saṃsthite . dvayormaitrī bhavennūnaṃ trike vairaṃ na saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: padāt dārapade ca evaṃ kendre koṇe ca saṃsthite |dvayoḥ maitrī bhavet nūnaṃ trike vairaṃ na saṃśayaḥ
english: Thus, if the Dāra pada (A7) is situated in a quadrant (kendra) or a trine (koṇa) from the Ārūḍha (lagna) (A1), there will certainly be friendship between the native and their spouse. Conversely, if they (A1 and A7) are in trika (malefic) houses (6th, 8th, or 12th) from each other, there is no doubt of enmity.

sanskrit: एवं लग्नपदाद् विप्र तनयादिपदे स्थिते । मित्रामित्रे विजानीयाल्लाभालाभौ विचक्षणः ॥३५॥
transliteration: evaṃ lagnapadād vipra tanayādipade sthite . mitrāmitre vijānīyāllābhālābhau vicakṣaṇaḥ.
separated_sandhi: evaṃ lagna-padāt vipra tanaya-ādi-pade sthite |mitra-amitre vijānīyāt lābha-alābhau vicakṣaṇaḥ
english: O Brahmin (vipra), similarly, a discerning person (vicakṣaṇa) should understand that if other padas, such as the Tanaya pada (A5) and so on, are situated in quadrants (kendras) or trines (koṇas) from the Lagna pada (A1), there will be friendship and gain; conversely, if they are in trika (malefic) houses (6th, 8th, or 12th) from the Lagna pada (A1), there will be enmity and loss.

sanskrit: लग्नदारपदे विप्र मिथः केन्द्रगते यदि । त्रिलाभयोस्त्रिकोणे वा तथा राजा धराधिपः ॥३६॥
transliteration: lagnadārapade vipra mithaḥ kendragate yadi . trilābhayostrikoṇe vā tathā rājā dharādhipaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagna-dāra-pade vipra mithaḥ kendra-gate yaditri-lābhayos trikoṇe vā tathā rājā dharādhipaḥ
english: O Brahmin, if the Lagna-pada and the Dāra-pada are mutually situated in angular houses (kendras), or in the 3rd or 11th houses (tri-lābhas), or in trine houses (trikoṇas), then the native becomes a king, a ruler of the earth.

sanskrit: एवं लग्नपदादेव धनादिपदतो द्विज । स्थानद्वयं समालोक्य जातकस्य फलं वदेत् ॥३७॥
transliteration: evaṃ lagnapadādeva dhanādipadato dvija . sthānadvayaṃ samālokya jātakasya phalaṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: evam lagna-padāt eva dhana-ādi-padatas dvijasthāna-dvayam samālokya jātakasya phalam vadet
english: Similarly, O Brahmin, by carefully observing these two positions – the Lagna-pada itself and the Dhana-pada (relating to wealth) and other such padas – one should predict the results for the native.

sanskrit: अथोपपदमाश्रित्य कथयामि फलं द्विज । युच्छुभत्वे भवेन्नृणां पुत्रदारादिजं सुखम् ॥१॥
transliteration: athopapadamāśritya kathayāmi phalaṃ dvija . yucchubhatve bhavennṛṇāṃ putradārādijaṃ sukham.
separated_sandhi: atha upapadam āśritya kathayāmi phalam dvija yatśubhatve bhavet nṛṇām putra-dāra-ādi-jam sukham
english: Now, O Brahmin, I shall explain the results based on the Upapada. If it is auspicious, it brings happiness to people, specifically happiness derived from children, spouse, and the like.

sanskrit: तनुभावपदं विप्र प्रधानं पदमुच्यते । तनोरनुचराद्यत् स्यादुपारूढं तदुच्यते ॥२॥
transliteration: tanubhāvapadaṃ vipra pradhānaṃ padamucyate . tanoranucarādyat syādupārūḍhaṃ taducyate.
separated_sandhi: tanu-bhāva-padam vipra pradhānam padam ucyatetanoḥ anucarāt yat syāt upārūḍham tat ucyate
english: O Brahmin, the Aruḍha pada of the first house (Lagna-pada) is considered the principal pada. Whatever is derived from the house following the ascendant (i.e., the 12th house, for Upapada calculation), that is referred to as Upārūḍha.

sanskrit: तदेवोपपदं नाम तथा गौणपदं स्मृतम् । शुभखेटगृहे तस्मिन् शुभग्रहयुतेक्षिते ॥३॥
transliteration: tadevopapadaṃ nāma tathā gauṇapadaṃ smṛtam . śubhakheṭagṛhe tasmin śubhagrahayutekṣite.
separated_sandhi: tat eva upapadam nāma tathā gauṇa-padam smṛtamśubha-kheṭa-gṛhe tasmin śubha-graha-yuta-īkṣite
english: That very thing is named Upapada, and it is also known as the secondary pada. When that (Upapada) is in a house owned by an auspicious planet, or conjoined with or aspected by auspicious planets...

sanskrit: पुत्रदारसुखं पूर्णं जायते द्विजसत्तम । पापग्रहयुते तत्र पापभे पापवीक्षिते ॥४॥
transliteration: putradārasukhaṃ pūrṇaṃ jāyate dvijasattama . pāpagrahayute tatra pāpabhe pāpavīkṣite.
separated_sandhi: putradārasukham pūrṇam jāyate dvijasattamapāpagraha-yute tatra pāpabhe pāpavīkṣite
english: O best among twice-born ones (dvija), complete happiness regarding sons and wife (putradārasukham) arises. However, if the relevant astrological indicator is conjoined with malefic planets (pāpagraha), located in a malefic sign, and aspected by malefic planets (pāpagraha), then this happiness will not fully manifest.

sanskrit: प्रव्राजको भवेज्जतो दारहीनोऽथ वा नरः । शुभदृग्योगतो नैव योगोऽयं दारनाशकः ॥५॥
transliteration: pravrājako bhavejjato dārahīno'tha vā naraḥ . śubhadṛgyogato naiva yogo'yaṃ dāranāśakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: pravrājakaḥ bhavet jātaḥ dārahīnaḥ atha vā naraḥśubhadṛgyogataḥ na eva yogaḥ ayam dāranāśakaḥ
english: Such a native (jāta) becomes a renunciant (pravrājaka) or a wifeless man (dārahīna). However, this combination (yoga) will certainly not lead to the destruction of the wife (dāranāśaka) if there is an aspect or conjunction (yoga) by benefic planets (śubha).

sanskrit: रविर्नैवात्र पापः स्यात् स्वोच्चमित्रस्वभस्थितः । नीचशत्रुगृहस्थश्चेत्तदाऽसौ पाप एव हि ॥६॥
transliteration: ravirnaivātra pāpaḥ syāt svoccamitrasvabhasthitaḥ . nīcaśatrugṛhasthaścettadā'sau pāpa eva hi.
separated_sandhi: raviḥ na eva atra pāpaḥ syāt svoccāmitrasvabhasthitaḥnīcaśatrugṛhasthaḥ cet tadā asau pāpaḥ eva hi
english: The Sun (ravi) is certainly not considered malefic (pāpa) in this context if it is situated in its own exaltation sign, a friendly sign, or its own sign. However, if it is situated in a debilitation sign or an enemy's sign, then it is indeed considered malefic (pāpa).

sanskrit: शुभग्रहाणां दृष्टिश्चेदुपारूढाद् द्वितीयके । शुभर्क्षे शुभयुक्ते च पूर्वोक्तं हि फलं स्मृतम् ॥७॥
transliteration: śubhagrahāṇāṃ dṛṣṭiścedupārūḍhād dvitīyake . śubharkṣe śubhayukte ca pūrvoktaṃ hi phalaṃ smṛtam.
separated_sandhi: śubhagraḥāṇām dṛṣṭiḥ cet upārūḍhāt dvitīyakeśubharḳe śubhayukte ca pūrvoktam hi phalam smṛtam
english: If the second house from the Upapada (Upārūḍha Lagna) is aspected (dṛṣṭi) by benefic planets (śubhagraha), and that house is in an auspicious sign or conjoined with benefic planets (śubha), then the aforementioned positive result (phala) of complete happiness is indeed declared.

sanskrit: उपारूढाद् द्वितीयं च नीचांशे नीचखेटयुक् । क्रूरग्रहसमायुक्तं जातको दारहा भवेत् ॥८॥
transliteration: upārūḍhād dvitīyaṃ ca nīcāṃśe nīcakheṭayuk . krūragrahasamāyuktaṃ jātako dārahā bhavet.
separated_sandhi: upārūḍhāt dvitīyam ca nīcāṃśe nīcakheṭayukkrūragrahasamāyuktam jātakaḥ dārahā bhavet
english: If the second house from the Upapada (Upārūḍha Lagna) is in a debilitated (nīca) sub-division (aṃśa), conjoined with planets in debilitation (nīcakheṭa), and further associated with cruel (malefic) planets (krūragraha), then the native (jātaka) will experience loss of wife (dārahā).

sanskrit: स्वोच्चांशे स्वोच्चसंस्थे वा तुङ्गदृष्टिवशात् तथा । भवन्ति बहवो दारा रूपलक्षणसंयुताः ॥९॥
transliteration: svoccāṃśe svoccasaṃsthe vā tuṅgadṛṣṭivaśāt tathā . bhavanti bahavo dārā rūpalakṣaṇasaṃyutāḥ.
separated_sandhi: svoccāṃśe svoccasaṃsthe vā tuṅgadṛṣṭivaśāttathā bhavanti bahavaḥ dārāḥ rūpalakṣaṇasaṃyutāḥ
english: When (the lord of the seventh house) is in its own exaltation sign or its own exaltation navāṃśa, or if it receives an exalted aspect, then a person will have many wives endowed with beauty and auspicious characteristics.

sanskrit: उपारूढे द्वितीये वा मिथुने संस्थिते सति । तत्र जातनरो विप्र बहुदारयुतो भवेत् ॥१०॥
transliteration: upārūḍhe dvitīye vā mithune saṃsthite sati . tatra jātanaro vipra bahudārayuto bhavet.
separated_sandhi: upārūḍhe dvitīye vā mithune saṃsthite satitatra jātanaraḥ vipra bahudārayutaḥ bhavet
english: O Brahmin (vipra), if the Upapada (upārūḍha) is in the second house, or if it is situated in the sign of Gemini, then a person born with such a configuration will have many wives.

sanskrit: उपारूढे द्वितीयेऽपि स्वस्वामिग्रहसंयुते । स्वर्क्षगे तत्पतौ वापि यत्र कुत्रापि भूसुर ॥११॥
transliteration: upārūḍhe dvitīye'pi svasvāmigrahasaṃyute . svarkṣage tatpatau vāpi yatra kutrāpi bhūsura.
separated_sandhi: upārūḍhe dvitīye api svasvāmimigrahasaṃyutesvarkṣage tatpatau vā api yatra kutrāpi bhūsura
english: O Brahmin (bhūsura), even if the Upapada (upārūḍha) is in the second house and conjoined with its own lord (of the Upapada), or if that lord is situated in its own sign, wherever it may be...

sanskrit: यस्य जन्मनि योगोऽयं स नरो द्विजसत्तम । उत्तरायुषि निर्दारो भवत्येव न संशयः ॥१२॥
transliteration: yasya janmani yogo'yaṃ sa naro dvijasattama . uttarāyuṣi nirdāro bhavatyeva na saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: yasya janmani yogaḥ ayam saḥ naraḥ dvijasattamauttarāyuṣi nirdāraḥ bhavati eva na saṃśayaḥ
english: O best among Brahmins (dvijasattama), a person whose birth chart has this (yogic) combination will certainly be without wives in the latter part of his life; there is no doubt about it.

sanskrit: स्वराशौ संस्थितेऽप्येवं नित्याख्ये दारकारके । उत्तरायुषि निर्दारो भवत्येव न संशयः ॥१३॥
transliteration: svarāśau saṃsthite'pyevaṃ nityākhye dārakārake . uttarāyuṣi nirdāro bhavatyeva na saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: svarāśau saṃsthite api evam nityākhye dārakārakeuttarāyuṣi nirdāraḥ bhavati eva na saṃśayaḥ
english: Similarly, if the permanent significator of wives (dārakāraka), known as Nitya, is situated in its own sign, then that person will certainly be without wives in the latter part of his life; there is no doubt about it.

sanskrit: उपारूढपतिः स्वोच्चे स्थिरस्त्रीकारकोऽथ वा । सुकुलाद् दारलाभः स्यान्नीचस्थे तु विपर्ययात् ॥१४॥
transliteration: upārūḍhapatiḥ svocce sthirastrīkārako'tha vā . sukulād dāralābhaḥ syānnīcasthe tu viparyayāt.
separated_sandhi: upārūḍhapatiḥ svocce sthirastrīkārakaḥ atha vāsukulāt dāralābhaḥ syāt nīcasthite tu viparyayāt
english: If the lord of the Upapada Lagna (UL) is in its exaltation, or if the significator for a stable wife (Venus) is exalted, then a wife will be obtained from a good family. However, if it is debilitated, the opposite will occur.

sanskrit: उपारूढे द्वितीये वा शुभसम्बधतो द्विज । जातस्य सुन्दरी भार्या भव्या रूपगुणान्विता ॥१५॥
transliteration: upārūḍhe dvitīye vā śubhasambadhato dvija . jātasya sundarī bhāryā bhavyā rūpaguṇānvitā.
separated_sandhi: upārūḍhe dvitīye vā śubhasambandhataḥ dvijajātasya sundarī bhāryā bhavyā rūpaguṇānvitā
english: O brahmin, if there is an auspicious connection (of benefics) with the Upapada Lagna (UL) or its second house, then the native will have a beautiful, lovely wife endowed with good looks and qualities.

sanskrit: उपारूढाद् द्वितीये च शनिराहू स्थितौ यदि । उपवादात् स्त्रियस्त्यागो नाशो वा जायते द्विज ॥१६॥
transliteration: upārūḍhād dvitīye ca śanirāhū sthitau yadi . upavādāt striyastyāgo nāśo vā jāyate dvija.
separated_sandhi: upārūḍhāt dvitīye ca śani-rāhū sthitau yadiupavādāt striyāḥ tyāgaḥ nāśaḥ vā jāyate dvija
english: O brahmin, if Saturn and Rahu are situated in the second house from the Upapada Lagna (UL), then there will be abandonment (divorce) or loss (death) of the wife due to scandal.

sanskrit: उपारूढे द्वितीये वा शिखिशुक्रौ यदा स्थितौ । रक्तप्रदररोगार्ता जायते तस्य भामिनी ॥१७॥
transliteration: upārūḍhe dvitīye vā śikhiśukrau yadā sthitau . raktapradararogārtā jāyate tasya bhāminī.
separated_sandhi: upārūḍhe dvitīye vā śikhī-śukrau yadā sthitauraktapradararogā-ārtā jāyate tasya bhāminī
english: When Ketu and Venus are situated in the Upapada Lagna (UL) or in the second house from it, then his wife will be afflicted by the disease of excessive bleeding (menorrhagia or leucorrhoea).

sanskrit: बुधकेतू स्थितौ तत्र तदाऽस्थिस्रावसंयुता । तत्रस्थाः शनिराह्वर्कास्तदाऽस्थिज्वरसंयुता ॥१८॥
transliteration: budhaketū sthitau tatra tadā'sthisrāvasaṃyutā . tatrasthāḥ śanirāhvarkāstadā'sthijvarasaṃyutā.
separated_sandhi: budha-ketū sthitau tatra tadā asthisrāvasaṃyutātatra-sthāḥ śani-rāhu-arkāḥ tadā asthijvarasaṃyutā
english: If Mercury and Ketu are situated in the Upapada Lagna (UL) or in the second house from it, then (the wife) will be associated with a disease involving bone marrow discharge. If Saturn, Rahu, and the Sun are situated there, then (the wife) will be associated with bone fever.

sanskrit: स्थूलाङ्गी बुधराहूभ्यां तत्रस्थाभ्यां द्विजोत्तम । बुधक्षेत्रे कुजार्की चेन्नसिकारोगसंयुता ॥१९॥
transliteration: sthūlāṅgī budharāhūbhyāṃ tatrasthābhyāṃ dvijottama . budhakṣetre kujārkī cennasikārogasaṃyutā.
separated_sandhi: sthūlāṅgī budharāhūbhyām tatrasthābhyām dvijottamabudhakṣetre kujārkī cet nasikārogasaṃyutā
english: O best among the twice-born (dvijottama), if Mercury and Rāhu are situated in a sign ruled by Mercury, and Mars and the Sun are also present in that same Mercury-ruled sign, then the person will have a stout body and be afflicted with nose diseases.

sanskrit: कुजक्षेत्रेऽप्येवमेव फलं ज्ञेयं द्विजोत्तम । बृहस्पतिशनी तत्र कर्णनेत्ररुजान्विता ॥२०॥
transliteration: kujakṣetre'pyevameva phalaṃ jñeyaṃ dvijottama . bṛhaspatiśanī tatra karṇanetrarujānvitā.
separated_sandhi: kujakṣetre api evam eva phalam jñeyam dvijottamabṛhaspatiśanī tatra karṇanetrarujānvitā
english: O best among the twice-born (dvijottama), a similar result should be understood even for a sign ruled by Mars. If Jupiter and Saturn are situated there (in Mars' sign), the individual will be afflicted with diseases of the ear and eye.

sanskrit: तत्रान्यगेहगौ विप्र बुद्धभौमौ स्थितौ यदा । यदा स्वर्भानुदेवेज्यौ भार्या दन्तरुजान्विता ॥२१॥
transliteration: tatrānyagehagau vipra buddhabhaumau sthitau yadā . yadā svarbhānudevejyau bhāryā dantarujānvitā.
separated_sandhi: tatra anyagehagau vipra budhabhaumau sthitau yadāyadā svarbhānudevejyau bhāryā dantarujānvitā
english: O Brahmin (vipra), when Mercury and Mars are situated in that house (sign) which belongs to another planet, and when Rāhu and Jupiter are also present, then the wife will be afflicted with tooth diseases.

sanskrit: शनिराहू शनिक्षेत्रे पङ्गुर्वातरुजान्विता । शुभदृग्योगतो नेति फलं ज्ञेयं विपश्चिता ॥२२॥
transliteration: śanirāhū śanikṣetre paṅgurvātarujānvitā . śubhadṛgyogato neti phalaṃ jñeyaṃ vipaścitā.
separated_sandhi: śanirāhū śanikṣetre paṅguḥ vātarujānvitāśubhadṛgyogataḥ na iti phalam jñeyam vipaścitā
english: When Saturn and Rāhu are in Saturn's sign, the individual becomes lame and afflicted with diseases caused by wind (vāta). However, a wise astrologer (vipaścitā) should understand that this outcome does not occur if there is an aspect or conjunction from benefic planets.

sanskrit: लग्नात् पदादुपारूढाद् यो राशिः सप्तमो द्विज । तस्मात् तत्स्वामिनः खेटात् तदंशाच्च द्विजोत्तम ॥२३॥
transliteration: lagnāt padādupārūḍhād yo rāśiḥ saptamo dvija . tasmāt tatsvāminaḥ kheṭāt tadaṃśācca dvijottama.
separated_sandhi: lagnāt padāt upārūḍhāt yaḥ rāśiḥ saptamaḥ dvijatasmāt tatsvāminaḥ kheṭāt tadaṃśāt ca dvijottama
english: O twice-born (dvija), consider the sign that is the seventh from the Ascendant (lagna), or from the Pada, or from the Upapada. O best among the twice-born (dvijottama), one should also examine that seventh sign itself, its planetary lord, and its Navāṃśa (aṃśa) position.

sanskrit: एवमेव फलं ज्ञेयमित्याहुर्नारदादयः । उक्तेभ्यो नवमे विप्र शनिचन्द्रबुधा यदि ॥२४॥
transliteration: evameva phalaṃ jñeyamityāhurnāradādayaḥ . uktebhyo navame vipra śanicandrabudhā yadi.
separated_sandhi: evam eva phalam jñeyam iti āhuḥ nārada-ādayaḥuktebhyaḥ navame vipra śani-candra-budhā yadi
english: Nārada and others state that the outcome should be understood in this very way. O Brahmin, this applies if Saturn, the Moon, and Mercury are situated in the ninth house from the one previously mentioned (for offspring).

sanskrit: अपुत्रता तथाऽर्केज्यराहुभिर्बहुपुत्रता । चन्द्रेणैकसुतस्तत्र मिश्रैः पुत्रो विलम्बतः ॥२५॥
transliteration: aputratā tathā'rkejyarāhubhirbahuputratā . candreṇaikasutastatra miśraiḥ putro vilambataḥ.
separated_sandhi: aputratā tathā arka-ijya-rāhubhiḥ bahu-putratācandreṇa eka-sutaḥ tatra miśraiḥ putraḥ vilambataḥ
english: Childlessness results (from the planets mentioned in the previous verse). Similarly, if the Sun, Jupiter, and Rāhu are present, there will be many children. If the Moon is present, there will be one son. When there are mixed planets, a son will be born with delay.

sanskrit: रवीय्जराहुयोगेन पुत्रो वीर्यप्रतापवान् । प्रचण्डविजयी विप्र रिपुनिग्रहकारकः ॥२६॥
transliteration: ravīyjarāhuyogena putro vīryapratāpavān . pracaṇḍavijayī vipra ripunigrahakārakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: ravi-ijya-rāhu-yogena putraḥ vīrya-pratāpavānpracaṇḍa-vijayī vipra ripu-nigraha-kārakaḥ
english: O Brahmin, by the combination of the Sun, Jupiter, and Rāhu (in the ninth house), a son will be born who is endowed with valor and prowess, fiercely victorious, and a subjugator of enemies.

sanskrit: उक्तस्थाने कुजार्किभ्यां पुत्रहीनः प्रजायते । दत्त पुत्रयुतो वापि सहोत्थसुतवान् भवेत् ॥२७॥
transliteration: uktasthāne kujārkibhyāṃ putrahīnaḥ prajāyate . datta putrayuto vāpi sahotthasutavān bhavet.
separated_sandhi: ukta-sthāne kuja-arkibhyām putra-hīnaḥ prajāyatedatta-putra-yutaḥ vā api saha-uttha-sutavān bhavet
english: If Mars and Saturn are in the aforementioned house, a person is born without children. Or, he may have an adopted son (dattaputra), or a foster son/step-son (sahotthasuta).

sanskrit: तत्रस्थे विषमे राशौ बहुपुत्र्युतो नरः । स्वल्पापत्यः समे राशौ जायते द्विजसत्तम 1 ॥२८॥
transliteration: tatrasthe viṣame rāśau bahuputryuto naraḥ . svalpāpatyaḥ same rāśau jāyate dvijasattama 1.
separated_sandhi: tatra-sthe viṣame rāśau bahu-putrī-yutaḥ naraḥsu-alpa-apatyaḥ same rāśau jāyate dvija-sattama
english: O best among Brahmins, if a planet is situated in an odd sign in that house, the native will have many daughters. If it is in an even sign, he will have few children.

sanskrit: सिंहे चोपपदे विप्र निशानाथयुतेक्षिते । अल्पप्रजोऽथ कन्यायां जातः कन्याप्रजो भवेत् ॥२९॥
transliteration: siṃhe copapade vipra niśānāthayutekṣite . alpaprajo'tha kanyāyāṃ jātaḥ kanyāprajo bhavet.
separated_sandhi: siṃhe ca upapade vipra niśānāthayutekṣitealpaprajaḥ atha kanyāyām jātaḥ kanyāprajaḥ bhavet
english: O Brahmin, if the upapada [lagna] is in Leo and is conjoined with or aspected by the Moon, the native will have few children. If [the upapada lagna is] in Virgo, the native will have female children.

sanskrit: सुतभावनवांशाच्च स्थिरसन्ततिकारकात् । एवं त्रिशांशकुण्डल्यामपि योगं विचिन्तयेत् ॥३०॥
transliteration: sutabhāvanavāṃśācca sthirasantatikārakāt . evaṃ triśāṃśakuṇḍalyāmapi yogaṃ vicintayet.
separated_sandhi: sutabhāvanavāṃśāt ca sthirasantatikārakātevam triśāṃśakuṇḍalyām api yogam vicintayet
english: One should similarly analyze these astrological combinations (yoga) for progeny in the Triśāṃśa chart as well, considering the Navamsha position of the fifth house and the significator of stable progeny.

sanskrit: शनिराहू त्रिलाभस्थौ पदाद् भ्रातुर्विनाशकौ । ज्येष्ठस्यैकादशे तत्र कनिष्ठस्य तृतीयके ॥३१॥
transliteration: śanirāhū trilābhasthau padād bhrāturvināśakau . jyeṣṭhasyaikādaśe tatra kaniṣṭhasya tṛtīyake.
separated_sandhi: śani rāhū trilābhasthau padāt bhrātuḥ vināśakaujyeṣṭhasya ekādaśe tatra kaniṣṭhasya tṛtīyake
english: If Saturn and Rahu are situated in the third and eleventh houses counted from the "pada" [lagna], they cause the destruction of brothers. The eleventh house is considered for the eldest brother, and the third house for the youngest.

sanskrit: दैतेज्ये तत्र गर्भस्य नाशो व्यवहितस्य च । लग्ने वापि पदे रन्ध्रे दैत्याचार्ययुतेक्षिते ॥३२॥
transliteration: daitejye tatra garbhasya nāśo vyavahitasya ca . lagne vāpi pade randhre daityācāryayutekṣite.
separated_sandhi: daitejye tatra garbhasya nāśaḥ vyavahitasya calagne vā api pade randhre daityācāryayutekṣite
english: There will be destruction of the fetus and interrupted pregnancies if Venus (daitejya) is in an inauspicious condition. Specifically, this occurs if the ascendant, or the "pada" (lagna), or the eighth house is conjoined with or aspected by Venus (daityācārya).

sanskrit: तथैव फलमित्याहुर्निर्विशंकं मुनीश्चराः । तृतीयलाभयोर्विप्र चन्द्रेज्यबुधमङ्गलाः ॥३३॥
transliteration: tathaiva phalamityāhurnirviśaṃkaṃ munīścarāḥ . tṛtīyalābhayorvipra candrejyabudhamaṅgalāḥ.
separated_sandhi: tathā eva phalam iti āhuḥ nirviśaṃkam munīśvarāḥtṛtīyalābhayoḥ vipra candra ijya budha maṅgalāḥ
english: Thus, the great sages declare this outcome without doubt. O Brahmin, [if] the Moon, Jupiter, Mercury, and Mars [are] in the third and eleventh houses...

sanskrit: बहवो भ्रातरस्तस्य बलवन्तः प्रतापिनः । शन्यारसंयुते दृष्टे तृतीयैकादशे द्विज ॥३४॥
transliteration: bahavo bhrātarastasya balavantaḥ pratāpinaḥ . śanyārasaṃyute dṛṣṭe tṛtīyaikādaśe dvija.
separated_sandhi: bahavaḥ bhrātaraḥ tasya balavantaḥ pratāpinaḥśani-āra-saṃyute dṛṣṭe tṛtīya-ekādaśe dvija
english: O twice-born (dvija), when his third or eleventh house is conjoined with and aspected by Saturn (śani) and Mars (āra), he will have many strong and valorous brothers.

sanskrit: कनिष्ठज्येष्ठयोर्नाशो दिवज्ञेयो द्विजसत्तम । शनिरेको यदा विप्र लाभगो वा तृतीयगः ॥३५॥
transliteration: kaniṣṭhajyeṣṭhayornāśo divajñeyo dvijasattama . śanireko yadā vipra lābhago vā tṛtīyagaḥ.
separated_sandhi: kaniṣṭha-jyeṣṭhayoḥ nāśaḥ divajñeyaḥ dvija-sattamaśaniḥ ekaḥ yadā vipra lābha-gaḥ vā tṛtīya-gaḥ
english: O best among the twice-born (dvijasattama), the destruction of younger and elder siblings should be understood. O Brahmin (vipra), this occurs when Saturn (śani) alone is situated in the house of gain (eleventh house) or in the third house.

sanskrit: तदा स्वमात्रशेषः स्यादन्ये नश्यन्ति सोदराः । तृतीये लाभगे केतौ बहुलं भगिनीसुखम् ॥३६॥
transliteration: tadā svamātraśeṣaḥ syādanye naśyanti sodarāḥ . tṛtīye lābhage ketau bahulaṃ bhaginīsukham.
separated_sandhi: tadā sva-mātra-śeṣaḥ syāt anye naśyanti sa-udaraḥtṛtīye lābha-ge ketau bahulam bhaginī-sukham
english: Then only he himself remains, and his other siblings (sodara) perish. When Ketu is in the third house or in the house of gain (eleventh house), there is abundant happiness from sisters.

sanskrit: आरूढात् षष्ठभावस्थे पापाख्ये शुभवर्जिते । शुभसम्बन्धरहिते चौरो भवति जातकः ॥३७॥
transliteration: ārūḍhāt ṣaṣṭhabhāvasthe pāpākhye śubhavarjite . śubhasambandharahite cauro bhavati jātakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: ārūḍhāt ṣaṣṭha-bhāva-sthe pāpa-ākhye śubha-varjiteśubha-sambandha-rahite cauraḥ bhavati jātakaḥ
english: When the sixth house from the Ārūḍha Lagna is occupied by a malefic (pāpa) planet, and is devoid of benefic (śubha) planets and benefic (śubha) associations, the native (jātaka) becomes a thief.

sanskrit: सप्तमे द्वादशे स्थाने सैहिकेययुतेक्षिते । ज्ञानवांश्च भवेद् बालो बहुभाग्ययुतो द्विज ॥३८॥
transliteration: saptame dvādaśe sthāne saihikeyayutekṣite . jñānavāṃśca bhaved bālo bahubhāgyayuto dvija.
separated_sandhi: saptame dvādaśe sthāne saiṃhikeya-yuta-īkṣitejñānavān ca bhavet bālaḥ bahu-bhāgya-yutaḥ dvija
english: O twice-born (dvija), when the seventh or twelfth house is conjoined with and aspected by Rāhu (Saiṃhikeya), the native (bāla) becomes knowledgeable and endowed with much fortune.

sanskrit: आरूढे संस्थिते सौम्ये सर्वदेशाधिपो भवेत् । सर्वज्ञस्तत्र देवेज्ये कविर्वादी च भार्गवे ॥३९॥
transliteration: ārūḍhe saṃsthite saumye sarvadeśādhipo bhavet . sarvajñastatra devejye kavirvādī ca bhārgave.
separated_sandhi: ārūḍhe saṃsthite saumye sarvadeśādhipaḥ bhavetsarvajñaḥ tatra devejye kaviḥ vādī ca bhārgave
english: If a beneficent planet is situated in the Ārūḍha lagna, the person becomes the ruler of all lands. If Jupiter (devejya) is in that position, the person becomes omniscient. And if Venus (Bhārgava) is there, the person becomes a poet and an orator.

sanskrit: उपारूढात् पदाद् वापि धनस्थे शुभखेचरे । सर्वद्रव्याधिपो धीमाञ्जायते द्विजसत्तम ॥४०॥
transliteration: upārūḍhāt padād vāpi dhanasthe śubhakhecare . sarvadravyādhipo dhīmāñjāyate dvijasattama.
separated_sandhi: upārūḍhāt padāt vā api dhanasthe śubhakhecaresarvadravyādhipaḥ dhīmān jāyate dvijasattama
english: O best among the twice-born (dvijasattama), if a beneficent planet is situated in the second house from the Upārūḍha or the Ārūḍha lagna, the person becomes intelligent and the lord of all wealth.

sanskrit: उपारूढाद्धनाधीशे द्वितियभवनस्थिते । पापखेचरसंयुक्ते चौरो भवति निश्चितम् ॥४१॥
transliteration: upārūḍhāddhanādhīśe dvitiyabhavanasthite . pāpakhecarasaṃyukte cauro bhavati niścitam.
separated_sandhi: upārūḍhāt dhanaadhīśe dvitīyabhavanasthitepāpakhecarasaṃyukte cauraḥ bhavati niścitam
english: If the lord of the second house from the Upārūḍha lagna is situated in the second house (from the Upārūḍha) and conjoined with a malefic planet, the person certainly becomes a thief.

sanskrit: तत्सप्तमगृहाधीशाद् राहौ धनगते द्विज । दंष्ट्रावान् जायते बालः स्तब्धवाक् केतुखेचरे ॥४२॥
transliteration: tatsaptamagṛhādhīśād rāhau dhanagate dvija . daṃṣṭrāvān jāyate bālaḥ stabdhavāk ketukhecare.
separated_sandhi: tat saptamagṛha adhīśāt rāhau dhanagate dvijadaṃṣṭrāvān jāyate bālaḥ stabdhavāk ketukhecare
english: O twice-born (dvija), if Rahu is in the second house (from the Upārūḍha) and is influenced by the lord of the seventh house from that (Upārūḍha's second) house, the child is born with prominent teeth. If Ketu is in the second house, the child becomes speechless.

sanskrit: शनैश्चरे कुरूपः स्यात्सप्तमेशाद् द्वितीयगे । मिश्रग्रहसमायुक्ते फलं मिश्रं समादिशेत् ॥४३॥
transliteration: śanaiścare kurūpaḥ syātsaptameśād dvitīyage . miśragrahasamāyukte phalaṃ miśraṃ samādiśet.
separated_sandhi: śanaiścare kurūpaḥ syāt saptameśāt dvitīyagemiśragrahasamāyukte phalam miśram samādiśet
english: If Saturn (Śanaiścara) is situated in the second house (from the Upārūḍha), the person will be deformed. If the lord of the seventh house (saptameśa) is in the second house and conjoined with mixed planets (benefics and malefics), one should declare the results as mixed.

sanskrit: भगवान् याऽर्गला प्रोक्ता शुभदा भवताऽधुना । तामहं स्रोतुमिच्छामि सलक्षणफलं मुने ॥१॥
transliteration: bhagavān yā'rgalā proktā śubhadā bhavatā'dhunā . tāmahaṃ srotumicchāmi salakṣaṇaphalaṃ mune.
separated_sandhi: bhagavān yā argalā proktā śubhadā bhavatā adhunātām aham srotum icchāmi salakṣaṇaphalam mune
english: O revered sage (Muni), I now wish to hear from you about the auspicious "argalā" (planetary obstruction/support) that you have described, including its characteristics and effects.

sanskrit: मैत्रेय सार्गला नाम यया भावफलं दृढम् । स्थिरं खेटफलं च स्यात् साऽधुना कथ्यते मया ॥२॥
transliteration: maitreya sārgalā nāma yayā bhāvaphalaṃ dṛḍham . sthiraṃ kheṭaphalaṃ ca syāt sā'dhunā kathyate mayā.
separated_sandhi: maitreya sa-argalā nāma yayā bhāvaphalam dṛḍhamsthiram kheṭaphalam ca syāt sā adhunā kathyate mayā
english: O Maitreya, I will now explain that which is called "sārgalā" (with argalā), by which the results of the astrological houses become firm and the results indicated by planets become stable.

sanskrit: चतुर्थे च धने लाभे ग्रहे ज्ञेया तदर्गला । तद्बाधकाः क्रमात् खेटा व्योमरिष्फतृतीयगाः ॥३॥
transliteration: caturthe ca dhane lābhe grahe jñeyā tadargalā . tadbādhakāḥ kramāt kheṭā vyomariṣphatṛtīyagāḥ.
separated_sandhi: caturthe ca dhane lābhe grahe jñeyā tad-argalā |tad-bādhakāḥ kramāt kheṭāḥ vyoma-riṣpha-tṛtīya-gāḥ
english: The "argalā" (planetary obstruction/support) for a planet (graha) is known to be formed by planets in the fourth, second, and eleventh houses from it. In corresponding order, the obstructors of this "argalā" are planets situated in the tenth, twelfth, and third houses [from the reference planet].

sanskrit: निर्बला न्यूनसंख्या वा बाधका नैव सम्मताः । तृतीये व्याधिकाः पापा यत्र मैत्रेय बाधकाः ॥४॥
transliteration: nirbalā nyūnasaṃkhyā vā bādhakā naiva sammatāḥ . tṛtīye vyādhikāḥ pāpā yatra maitreya bādhakāḥ.
separated_sandhi: nirbalāḥ nyūna-saṃkhyāḥ vā bādhakāḥ na eva sammatāḥ| tṛtīye vyādhikāḥ pāpāḥ yatra maitreya bādhakāḥ
english: Weak or few in number, obstructors (bādhakāḥ) are indeed not considered [effective]. O Maitreya, where malefic planets (pāpāḥ) in the third house act as obstructors, they are particularly troublesome (vyādhikāḥ).

sanskrit: तत्रापि चार्गला ज्ञेया विपरीता द्विजोत्तम । तथापि खेटभावानां फलमर्गलितं विदुः ॥५॥
transliteration: tatrāpi cārgalā jñeyā viparītā dvijottama . tathāpi kheṭabhāvānāṃ phalamargalitaṃ viduḥ.
separated_sandhi: tatra api ca argalā jñeyā viparītā dvija-uttama| tathā api kheṭa-bhāvānām phalam argalitam viduḥ
english: Even in that case, O best among the twice-born (dvijottama), the "argalā" should be known as reversed (viprīta argalā). Nevertheless, experts understand the results of planets and houses to be influenced (argalitam) by "argalā".

sanskrit: पञ्चमं चार्गलास्थानं नवमं तद्विरोधकृत् । तमोग्रहभवा सा च व्यत्ययाज् ज्ञायते द्विज ॥६॥
transliteration: pañcamaṃ cārgalāsthānaṃ navamaṃ tadvirodhakṛt . tamograhabhavā sā ca vyatyayāj jñāyate dvija.
separated_sandhi: pañcamaṃ ca argalāsthānaṃ navamaṃ tat virodhakṛt| tamograhabhavā sā ca vyatyayāt jñāyate dvija
english: O twice-born (dvija), the fifth position creates an "argala" (planetary intervention), and the ninth position creates an impediment to that. That "argala" is also understood by reversal when caused by the shadow planets (Rahu and Ketu).

sanskrit: एकग्रहा कनिष्ठा सा द्विग्रहा मध्यमा स्मृता । अर्गला द्व्यधिकोत्पन्ना मुनिभिः कथितोत्तमा ॥७॥
transliteration: ekagrahā kaniṣṭhā sā dvigrahā madhyamā smṛtā . argalā dvyadhikotpannā munibhiḥ kathitottamā.
separated_sandhi: ekagrahā kaniṣṭhā sā dvigrahā madhyamā smṛtā| argalā dvyadhikotpannā munibhiḥ kathitottamā
english: That (argala) which is formed by one planet is considered inferior, and that formed by two planets is considered medium. An "argala" that arises from more than two planets is declared excellent by the sages.

sanskrit: राशितो ग्रहतश्चापि विज्ञेया द्विविधाऽर्गला । निर्बाधका सुफलदा विफला च सबाधका ॥८॥
transliteration: rāśito grahataścāpi vijñeyā dvividhā'rgalā . nirbādhakā suphaladā viphalā ca sabādhakā.
separated_sandhi: rāśitaḥ grahataḥ ca api vijñeyā dvividhā argalā| nirbādhakā suphaladā viphalā ca sabādhakā
english: The "argala" (planetary intervention) should be understood as being of two kinds: arising from the zodiac sign (rāśi) and from the planet (graha). The unobstructed "argala" yields good results, while the obstructed one is fruitless.

sanskrit: यत्र राशौ स्थितः खेटस्तस्य पाकान्तरं यदा । तस्मिन् काले फलं ज्ञेयं निर्विशंकं द्विजोत्तम ॥९॥
transliteration: yatra rāśau sthitaḥ kheṭastasya pākāntaraṃ yadā . tasmin kāle phalaṃ jñeyaṃ nirviśaṃkaṃ dvijottama.
separated_sandhi: yatra rāśau sthitaḥ kheṭaḥ tasya pākāntaraṃ yadā| tasmin kāle phalaṃ jñeyaṃ nirviśaṅkaṃ dvijottama
english: O best among twice-born (dvijottama), the results of a planet (graha) should be known without doubt at the time of its maturation (pāka), in whichever zodiac sign (rāśi) it is situated.

sanskrit: अर्गलां प्रतिबन्धञ्च कथमांघ्रिचतुर्थयोः । द्वित्र्यङ्घ्रयोश्च मिथो विप्र चिन्तयेदिति मे मतम् ॥१०॥
transliteration: argalāṃ pratibandhañca kathamāṃghricaturthayoḥ . dvitryaṅghrayośca mitho vipra cintayediti me matam.
separated_sandhi: argalām pratibandham ca katham āṅghricaturthayoḥ |dvitryaṅghrayoś ca mithaḥ vipra cintayet iti me matam
english: O Brahmin (vipra), how "argala" (planetary intervention) and its impediment (pratibandha) should be considered regarding the first and fourth houses (positions), and mutually regarding the second and third houses (positions) - this is my view.

sanskrit: पदे लग्ने मदे वापि निराभासार्गला यदा । तदा जातोऽतिविख्यातो बहुभाग्ययुतो भवेत् ॥११॥
transliteration: pade lagne made vāpi nirābhāsārgalā yadā . tadā jāto'tivikhyāto bahubhāgyayuto bhavet.
separated_sandhi: pade lagne made vā api nirābhāsā argalā yadā |tadā jātaḥ ativikhyātaḥ bahubhāgyayutaḥ bhavet
english: When there is no manifest "argala" (planetary intervention or obstruction) in the ascendant (lagna) house or the seventh house (descendant), the person born then becomes very famous and endowed with great fortune.

sanskrit: यस्य पापः शुभो वापि ग्रहस्तिष्ठेत् शुभार्गले । तेन द्रष्ट्रेक्षितं लग्नं प्राबल्यायोपकल्प्यते ॥१२॥
transliteration: yasya pāpaḥ śubho vāpi grahastiṣṭhet śubhārgale . tena draṣṭrekṣitaṃ lagnaṃ prābalyāyopakalpyate.
separated_sandhi: yasya pāpaḥ śubhaḥ vā api grahaḥ tiṣṭhet śubhārgale| tena draṣṭrā īkṣitam lagnaṁ prābālyāya upakalpyate
english: For whom (the native), if a malefic or benefic planet is situated in an auspicious "argala" (planetary intervention), then the ascendant (lagna) aspected by that planet becomes empowered.

sanskrit: सार्गले च धने विप्र धनधान्यसमन्वितः । तृतीये सोदरादीनां सुखमुक्तं मनीषिभिः ॥१३॥
transliteration: sārgale ca dhane vipra dhanadhānyasamanvitaḥ . tṛtīye sodarādīnāṃ sukhamuktaṃ manīṣibhiḥ.
separated_sandhi: sārgale ca dhane vipra dhanadhānyasamanvitaḥ| tṛtīye sodarādīnāṁ sukham uktam manīṣibhiḥ
english: And O Brahmin, if the second house (of wealth) has an "argala" (planetary intervention), the native will be endowed with wealth and grains. Regarding the third house, the wise declare happiness for siblings and relatives.

sanskrit: चतुर्थे सार्गले गेहपशुबन्धुकुलैर्युतः । पञ्चमे पुत्रपौत्रादिसंयुतो बुद्धिमान्नरः ॥१४॥
transliteration: caturthe sārgale gehapaśubandhukulairyutaḥ . pañcame putrapautrādisaṃyuto buddhimānnaraḥ.
separated_sandhi: caturthe sārgale gehapaśubandhukulaiḥ yutaḥ |pañcame putrapautrādīsaṁyutaḥ buddhimān naraḥ
english: If there is an "argala" (planetary intervention) in the fourth house, the native will be endowed with a house, cattle, relatives, and family. If there is an "argala" in the fifth house, that person will be intelligent and endowed with sons, grandsons, and the like.

sanskrit: षष्ठे रिपुभयं कामे धनदारसुखं बहु । अष्टमे जायते कष्टं धर्मे भाग्योदयो भवेत् ॥१५॥
transliteration: ṣaṣṭhe ripubhayaṃ kāme dhanadārasukhaṃ bahu . aṣṭame jāyate kaṣṭaṃ dharme bhāgyodayo bhavet.
separated_sandhi: ṣaṣṭhe ripubhayaṁ kāme dhanadārasukhaṁ bahu |aṣṭame jāyate kaṣṭaṁ dharme bhāgyodayaḥ bhavet
english: If there is an "argala" (planetary intervention) in the sixth house, there will be fear from enemies. If in the seventh house (kāma), there will be much happiness from wealth and spouse. Hardship arises if it is in the eighth house. If in the ninth house (dharma), there will be a rise of fortune.

sanskrit: दशमे राजसम्मानं लाभे लाभसमन्वितः । सार्गले च व्यये विप्र व्ययाधिक्यं प्रजायते ॥१६॥
transliteration: daśame rājasammānaṃ lābhe lābhasamanvitaḥ . sārgale ca vyaye vipra vyayādhikyaṃ prajāyate.
separated_sandhi: daśame rājasammānam lābhe lābhasamanvitaḥsārgale ca vyaye vipra vyayādhikyam prajāyate
english: In the tenth house, one gains royal honor. In the eleventh house, one is endowed with profits. O Brahmin, if there is an argala (planetary intervention) in the twelfth house (the house of expenditure), an excess of expenses will occur.

sanskrit: शुभग्रहार्गलायां तु सौख्यं बहुविधं भवेत् । मध्यं पापार्गलायां च मिश्रायामपि चोत्तमम् ॥१७॥
transliteration: śubhagrahārgalāyāṃ tu saukhyaṃ bahuvidhaṃ bhavet . madhyaṃ pāpārgalāyāṃ ca miśrāyāmapi cottamam.
separated_sandhi: śubhagraharghalāyām tu saukhyam bahuvidham bhavetmadhyam pāpārgalāyām ca miśrāyām api ca uttamam
english: Indeed, when there is an argala (planetary intervention) from benefic planets, there is happiness of many kinds. When there is an argala from malefic planets, the results are moderate. And even when there is a mixed argala, the outcome is excellent.

sanskrit: लग्नपञ्चमभाग्येषु सार्गलेषु द्विजोत्तम । जातश्च जायते राजा भाग्यवान् नात्र संशयः ॥१८॥
transliteration: lagnapañcamabhāgyeṣu sārgaleṣu dvijottama . jātaśca jāyate rājā bhāgyavān nātra saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagna-pañcama-bhāgyeṣu sārgaleṣu dvijottamajātaḥ ca jāyate rājā bhāgyavān na atra saṃśayaḥ
english: O best among Brahmins, if there are argalas (planetary interventions) in the Ascendant, fifth, and ninth houses, the person born will become a king and be fortunate. There is no doubt about this.

sanskrit: अथाऽहं सम्प्रवक्ष्यामि ग्रहानात्मादिकारकान् । सप्तरव्यादिशन्यन्तान् राह्वन्तान् वाऽष्टसंख्यकान् ॥१॥
transliteration: athā'haṃ sampravakṣyāmi grahānātmādikārakān . saptaravyādiśanyantān rāhvantān vā'ṣṭasaṃkhyakān.
separated_sandhi: atha aham sampravakṣyāmi grahān ātmādikārakānsaptaravyādiśanyantān rāhvantān vā aṣṭasaṃkhyakān
english: Now, I will fully declare the planets that act as significators (kārakas), starting with the significator for the (universal) soul (ātman). These are either the seven planets, beginning with the Sun and ending with Saturn, or eight, if including Rahu.

sanskrit: अंशैः समौग्नहौ द्वौ चेद्राह्वन्तन् चिन्तयेत् तदा । सप्तैव कारकानेवं केचिदष्टौ प्रचक्षते ॥२॥
transliteration: aṃśaiḥ samaugnahau dvau cedrāhvantan cintayet tadā . saptaiva kārakānevaṃ kecidaṣṭau pracakṣate.
separated_sandhi: aṃśaiḥ samau grahau dvau cet rāhvantān cintayettadā sapta eva kārakān evam kecit aṣṭau pracakṣate
english: If two planets have equal degrees, then one should consider the significators (kārakas) as including Rahu (making a total of eight). Thus, some (scholars) declare only seven significators, while others refer to eight in this manner.

sanskrit: अत्मा सूर्यादिखेटानां मध्ये ह्यंशाधिको ग्रहः । अंशसाम्ये कलाधिक्यात् तत्साम्ये विकलाधिकः ॥३॥
transliteration: atmā sūryādikheṭānāṃ madhye hyaṃśādhiko grahaḥ . aṃśasāmye kalādhikyāt tatsāmye vikalādhikaḥ.
separated_sandhi: ātmā sūryādikheṭānām madhye hi aṃśādhikaḥ grahaḥ| aṃśasāmye kalādhikyāt tatsāmye vikalādhikaḥ
english: Among the planets, beginning with the Sun, the significator of the self (ātman) is indeed the planet with the highest degrees. In case of equal degrees, it is the one with more minutes; and if minutes are also equal, it is the one with more seconds.

sanskrit: बुधौ राशिकलाधिक्यत् ग्राह्वो नैवात्मकारकः । अंशाधिकः कारकः स्यादल्पभागोऽन्त्यकारकः ॥४॥
transliteration: budhau rāśikalādhikyat grāhvo naivātmakārakaḥ . aṃśādhikaḥ kārakaḥ syādalpabhāgo'ntyakārakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: buddhau rāśikalādhikyāt grāhyaḥ na eva ātmakārakaḥ| aṃśādhikaḥ kārakaḥ syāt alpabhāgaḥ antyakārakaḥ
english: In discerning (the significators), a planet should certainly not be taken as the significator of the self (ātmakāraka) due to an excess of its signs and minutes (i.e., only degrees within a sign matter). The planet with the highest degrees should be the significator (kāraka), and the one with the lowest degrees is the final significator (antyakāraka).

sanskrit: मध्यांशो मध्यखेटः स्यादुपखेटः स एव हि । विलोमगमनाद्राहोरंशाः शोध्याः खवह्नितः ॥५॥
transliteration: madhyāṃśo madhyakheṭaḥ syādupakheṭaḥ sa eva hi . vilomagamanādrāhoraṃśāḥ śodhyāḥ khavahnitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: madhyāṃśaḥ madhyakheṭaḥ syāt upakheṭaḥ saḥ eva hi| vilomagamanāt rāhoḥ aṃśāḥ śodhyāḥ khavahnitaḥ
english: The planet with intermediate degrees becomes the middle planet or indeed the secondary planet. Due to Rahu's retrograde motion, its degrees should be subtracted from thirty.

sanskrit: अंशक्रमादधोऽधःस्थाश्चराख्याः कारका इति । आत्माख्यकारकस्तेषु प्रधानं कथ्यते द्विज ॥६॥
transliteration: aṃśakramādadho'dhaḥsthāścarākhyāḥ kārakā iti . ātmākhyakārakasteṣu pradhānaṃ kathyate dvija.
separated_sandhi: aṃśakramāt adhaḥ adhaḥsthāḥ carākhyāḥ kārakāḥ iti| ātmākhyakārakaḥ teṣu pradhānam kathyate dvija
english: Thus, the planets positioned successively lower according to their degrees are called the moveable significators ("chara kāraka"). Among these, O Brahmin (dvija), the significator named "ātman" (ātmakāraka) is declared to be the chief.

sanskrit: स एव जातकाधीशो विज्ञेयो द्विजसत्तम । यथा भूमौ प्रसिद्धोऽस्ति नराणां क्षितिपालकः ॥७॥
transliteration: sa eva jātakādhīśo vijñeyo dvijasattama . yathā bhūmau prasiddho'sti narāṇāṃ kṣitipālakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: saḥ eva jātakādhīśaḥ vijñeyaḥ dvijasattama |yathā bhūmau prasiddhaḥ asti narāṇām kṣitipālakaḥ
english: That (ātmakāraka) indeed should be known as the lord of the natal chart, O best among Brahmins (dvijasattama), just as a king (kṣitipālaka) is well-known as the protector of people on earth.

sanskrit: सर्ववार्ताधिकारी चबन्धकृन्मोक्षक्रत् तथा ॥८॥
transliteration: sarvavārtādhikārī cabandhakṛnmokṣakrat tathā.
separated_sandhi: sarvavārtādhikārī cabandhakṛt mokṣakṛt tathā
english: And similarly, [it] is the authority over all matters, causing both bondage and liberation (mokṣa).

sanskrit: यथा राजाज्ञया विप्रा पुत्रामात्यादयो जनाः । समर्था लोककार्येषु तथैवान्येपि कारकाः ॥९॥
transliteration: yathā rājājñayā viprā putrāmātyādayo janāḥ . samarthā lokakāryeṣu tathaivānyepi kārakāḥ.
separated_sandhi: yathā rājājñayā viprā putra amātya ādayaḥ janāḥsamarthāḥ lokakāryeṣu tathā eva anye api kārakāḥ
english: Just as, O Brahmins, people like sons and ministers become effective in worldly affairs due to the king's command, similarly other significators (kārakas) also [do].

sanskrit: आत्मानुकूलमेवात्र भवन्ति फलदायकः । प्रतिकूले यथा भूपे सर्वेऽमात्यादयो द्विज ॥१०॥
transliteration: ātmānukūlamevātra bhavanti phaladāyakaḥ . pratikūle yathā bhūpe sarve'mātyādayo dvija.
separated_sandhi: ātma anukūlam eva atra bhavanti phaladāyakaḥpratikūle yathā bhūpe sarve amātya ādayaḥ dvija
english: Here, [other significators] yield results only when they are favorable to the self-significator (ātmakāraka). Just as, O Brahmin, when the king is unfavorable, all ministers and other [officials]...

sanskrit: कर्य कर्तुं मनुष्यानां न समर्था भवन्ति हि । तथाऽत्मकारके क्रूरे नाऽन्ये स्वशुभदायकः ॥११॥
transliteration: karya kartuṃ manuṣyānāṃ na samarthā bhavanti hi . tathā'tmakārake krūre nā'nye svaśubhadāyakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: kāryam kartum manuṣyāṇām na samarthāḥ bhavanti hitathā ātmakārake krūre na anye sva śubha dāyakaḥ
english: [...] all ministers and other [officials] are indeed not able to perform their duties for human beings. Similarly, when the self-significator (ātmakāraka) is malefic, other [planets] do not bestow their own auspicious results.

sanskrit: अनुकूले नृपे यद्वत् सर्वेऽमात्यादयो द्विज । नाशुभं कुर्वते तद्वनान्ये स्वाशुभदायकाः ॥१२॥
transliteration: anukūle nṛpe yadvat sarve'mātyādayo dvija . nāśubhaṃ kurvate tadvanānye svāśubhadāyakāḥ.
separated_sandhi: anukūle nṛpe yadvat sarve amātya ādayaḥ dvija naaśubham kurvate tadvat na anye sva aśubha dāyakāḥ
english: Just as, O Brahmin, when the king is favorable, all ministers and other [officials] do not cause inauspiciousness. Similarly, other [planets] do not bestow their own inauspicious results.

sanskrit: आत्माकारकभागेभ्यो न्यूनांशोऽमात्यकारकः । तस्मान्न्यूनांशको भ्राता तन्न्यूनोमातृसंज्ञकः ॥१३॥
transliteration: ātmākārakabhāgebhyo nyūnāṃśo'mātyakārakaḥ . tasmānnyūnāṃśako bhrātā tannyūnomātṛsaṃjñakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: ātmakārakabhāgebhyaḥ nyūnāṃśaḥ amātyakārakaḥtasmāt nyūnāṃśakaḥ bhrātā tatnyūnaḥ mātṛsaṃjñakaḥ
english: The planet with the second-highest longitude after the soul-significator (ātmakāraka) is the minister-significator (amatya-kāraka).
