The planet with fewer degrees than that (amatya-kāraka) is the sibling-significator (bhātṛ-kāraka), and the one with fewer degrees than that (bhātṛ-kāraka) is designated as the mother-significator (mātṛ-kāraka).

sanskrit: तन्न्यूनांशः पितातस्मादल्पांशः पुत्रकारकः । पुत्रान्न्यूनांशको ज्ञतिर्ज्ञातेर्न्यूनांशको हि यः ॥१४॥
transliteration: tannyūnāṃśaḥ pitātasmādalpāṃśaḥ putrakārakaḥ . putrānnyūnāṃśako jñatirjñāternyūnāṃśako hi yaḥ.
separated_sandhi: tatnyūnāṃśaḥ pitā tasmāt alpāṃśaḥ putrakārakaḥputrāt nyūnāṃśakaḥ jñatiḥ jñāteḥ nyūnāṃśakaḥ hi yaḥ
english: The planet with fewer degrees than that (mātṛ-kāraka) is the father-significator (pitṛ-kāraka). The one with the next lowest degrees is the child-significator (putra-kāraka). The planet with fewer degrees than the child-significator is the relative-significator (jñāti-kāraka). Indeed, the one who has fewer degrees than the relative-significator...

sanskrit: स दारकारको ज्ञेयो निर्विशंके द्विजोत्तम । चराख्यकारला एते ब्राह्मणा कथिताः पुरा ॥१५॥
transliteration: sa dārakārako jñeyo nirviśaṃke dvijottama . carākhyakāralā ete brāhmaṇā kathitāḥ purā.
separated_sandhi: saḥ dārakārakaḥ jñeyaḥ nirviśaṅke dvijottamacarākhyakārakāḥ ete brāhmaṇāḥ kathitāḥ purā
english: That planet should be known as the spouse-significator (dārakāraka), O best among the twice-born. These are the significators called 'movable' (chara kārakas), O Brahmins, as previously declared.

sanskrit: मातृकारकमेवाऽन्ये वदन्ति सुतकारकम् । द्वौ ग्रहौ भागतुल्यौ चेज्जायेतां यस्य जन्मनि ॥१६॥
transliteration: mātṛkārakamevā'nye vadanti sutakārakam . dvau grahau bhāgatulyau cejjāyetāṃ yasya janmani.
separated_sandhi: mātṛkārakam eva anye vadanti sutakārakam dvaugrahau bhāgatulyau cet jāyetām yasya janmani
english: Some others declare the mother-significator (mātṛ-kāraka) itself as the child-significator (sutakāraka). If two planets happen to be of equal longitude in a person's birth (janma) chart...

sanskrit: तदग्रकारकस्यैवं लोपो ज्ञेयो द्विजोत्तम । स्थिरकारकवशात्तस्य फलं ज्ञेयं शुभाऽशुभम् ॥१७॥
transliteration: tadagrakārakasyaivaṃ lopo jñeyo dvijottama . sthirakārakavaśāttasya phalaṃ jñeyaṃ śubhā'śubham.
separated_sandhi: tadagrakārakasya evam lopaḥ jñeyaḥ dvijottamasthirakārakavaśāt tasya phalam jñeyam śubhāśubham
english: O best among the twice-born, the nullification of the higher-longitude significator (kāraka) should thus be understood. Its auspicious or inauspicious result should be known based on the fixed significator (sthira kāraka) for that relation.

sanskrit: अधुना सम्प्रवक्ष्यामि स्थिराख्यान् करकग्रहान् । स पितृकारको ज्ञेयो यो बली रविशुक्रयोः ॥१८॥
transliteration: adhunā sampravakṣyāmi sthirākhyān karakagrahān . sa pitṛkārako jñeyo yo balī raviśukrayoḥ.
separated_sandhi: adhunā sampravakṣyāmi sthirākhyān karakagrahānsa pitṛkārakaḥ jñeyaḥ yaḥ balī raviśukrayoḥ
english: Now I will fully explain the planetary significators (kārakas) known as "fixed" (Sthira). The planet which is stronger between the Sun and Venus should be known as the significator for the father.

sanskrit: चन्द्रारयोर्बली खेटो मातृकारक उच्यते । भौमतो भगिनी श्यालः कनीयान् जननीत्यपि ॥१९॥
transliteration: candrārayorbalī kheṭo mātṛkāraka ucyate . bhaumato bhaginī śyālaḥ kanīyān jananītyapi.
separated_sandhi: candrārayoḥ balī kheṭaḥ mātṛkārakaḥ ucyatebhaumataḥ bhaginī śyālaḥ kanīyān jananī iti api
english: The planet which is stronger between the Moon and Mars is called the significator for the mother. From Mars, one should consider (among others) sister, brother-in-law, younger brother, and also the mother.

sanskrit: बुधान्मातृसजातीया मातुलाद्याश्च बान्धवाः । गुरोः पितामहः शुक्रात् पितः पुत्रः शनैश्चरात् ॥२०॥
transliteration: budhānmātṛsajātīyā mātulādyāśca bāndhavāḥ . guroḥ pitāmahaḥ śukrāt pitaḥ putraḥ śanaiścarāt.
separated_sandhi: budhāt mātṛsajātīyāḥ mātulādyāḥ ca bāndhavāḥguroḥ pitāmahaḥ śukrāt pitaḥ putraḥ śanaiścarāt
english: From Mercury (are considered) maternal relatives, maternal uncles, and other kinsmen. From Jupiter (is) the paternal grandfather. From Venus (is) father, and from Saturn (is) son.

sanskrit: विप्रान्तेवासिनः पत्नी पितरौ श्वशुरौ तथा । मातामहादयश्चिन्त्या एते च स्थिरकारका ॥२१॥
transliteration: viprāntevāsinaḥ patnī pitarau śvaśurau tathā . mātāmahādayaścintyā ete ca sthirakārakā.
separated_sandhi: viprāntevāsinaḥ patnī pitarau śvaśurau tathāmātāmahādayaḥ cintyāḥ ete ca sthirakārakāḥ
english: The Brahmin's disciple, wife, parents (father and mother), parents-in-law, and similarly, maternal grandfathers and others - these should be considered; these are also the fixed significators (Sthira Kārakas).

sanskrit: अथाऽहं कारकान् वक्ष्ये खेटभाववशाद्द्विज । रवितः पुन्>यभे तातश्चन्द्रान्माता चतुर्थके ॥२२॥
transliteration: athā'haṃ kārakān vakṣye kheṭabhāvavaśāddvija . ravitaḥ pun>yabhe tātaścandrānmātā caturthake.
separated_sandhi: atha aham kārakān vakṣye kheṭabhāvavaśāt dvijaravitaḥ puṇyabhe tātaḥ candrāt mātā caturthake
english: Now, O Brahmin (dvija), I will explain the significators (kārakas) according to the influence of planets and houses. From the Sun, the father is indicated in the ninth house; and from the Moon, the mother is indicated in the fourth house.

sanskrit: कुजात् तृतीयतो भ्राता बुधात् षष्थे च मातुलः । देवेज्यात् पञ्चमात् पुत्रो दाराः शुक्राच्च सप्तमे ॥२३॥
transliteration: kujāt tṛtīyato bhrātā budhāt ṣaṣthe ca mātulaḥ . devejyāt pañcamāt putro dārāḥ śukrācca saptame.
separated_sandhi: kujāt tṛtīyataḥ bhrātā budhāt ṣaṣṭhe ca mātulaḥdevejyāt pañcamāt putraḥ dārāḥ śukrāt ca saptame
english: From Mars, one should consider the third house for brothers. From Mercury, the sixth house indicates the maternal uncle. From Jupiter, the fifth house represents sons, and from Venus, the seventh house signifies wives.

sanskrit: मन्दादष्टमतो मृत्युः पित्रादीनां विचिन्तयेत् । इति सर्व विचार्यैव बुधस्तत्तत् फलं वदेत् ॥२४॥
transliteration: mandādaṣṭamato mṛtyuḥ pitrādīnāṃ vicintayet . iti sarva vicāryaiva budhastattat phalaṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: mandāt aṣṭamataḥ mṛtyuḥ pitrādīnām vicintayet itisarvam vicārya eva budhaḥ tat tat phalam vadet
english: From Saturn, the eighth house should be considered for death, applicable to fathers and other relatives. Therefore, a wise astrologer, after considering all these factors, should declare the respective results.

sanskrit: अथाऽहं सम्प्रवक्ष्यामि प्रसङ्गाद्योगकारकान् । खेटान् जन्मनि जातस्य मिश्रः स्थितिवशाद् द्विज ॥२५॥
transliteration: athā'haṃ sampravakṣyāmi prasaṅgādyogakārakān . kheṭān janmani jātasya miśraḥ sthitivaśād dvija.
separated_sandhi: atha aham sampravakṣyāmi prasaṅgāt yogakārakānkheṭān janmani jātasya miśraḥ sthitivaśāt dvija
english: Now, in this context, I will thoroughly explain the planets that form (auspicious) yoga (yoga) for an individual born, whose effects are mixed depending on their positions, O twice-born (dvija).

sanskrit: स्वर्क्षे स्वोच्चे च मित्रर्क्षे मिथः केन्द्रगता ग्रहाः । ते सर्वे कारकास्तेषु कर्मगस्तु विशेषतः ॥२६॥
transliteration: svarkṣe svocce ca mitrarkṣe mithaḥ kendragatā grahāḥ . te sarve kārakāsteṣu karmagastu viśeṣataḥ.
separated_sandhi: sva ṛkṣe sva ucce ca mitra ṛkṣe mithaḥ kendra gatāḥgrahāḥ te sarve kārakāḥ teṣu karma gaḥ tu viśeṣataḥ
english: Planets positioned in their own sign, in exaltation, or in a friendly sign, and which are also in angular houses (kendras) mutually, are all (auspicious) significators. Among these, the one located in the tenth house (karma) is especially significant.

sanskrit: यथा लग्ने सुखे कामे स्वोर्क्षोच्चस्था ग्रहा द्विज । भवन्ति कारकाख्यास्ते विशेषेण च खे स्थिताः ॥२७॥
transliteration: yathā lagne sukhe kāme svorkṣoccasthā grahā dvija . bhavanti kārakākhyāste viśeṣeṇa ca khe sthitāḥ.
separated_sandhi: yathā lagne sukhe kāme sva ṛkṣa ucca sthāḥ grahāḥdvija bhavanti kāraka ākhyāḥ te viśeṣeṇa ca khe sthitāḥ
english: Just as planets, O twice-born (dvija), when situated in their own sign or exaltation in the Ascendant (lagna), the fourth house (sukha), or the seventh house (kāma), are considered significators; so too, those located in the tenth house (karma) are especially (significant).

sanskrit: स्वमित्रोच्चर्क्षगो हेतुरन्योऽन्यं यदि केन्द्रगः । सुहृत् तद्गुणसम्पन्नः सोऽपि कारक उच्यते ॥२८॥
transliteration: svamitroccarkṣago heturanyo'nyaṃ yadi kendragaḥ . suhṛt tadguṇasampannaḥ so'pi kāraka ucyate.
separated_sandhi: svamitrauccarṣagaḥ hetuḥ anyam anyam yadi kendragaḥsuhṛt tadguṇasampannaḥ saḥ api kārakaḥ ucyate
english: If a significator (planet) is situated in its own sign, a friendly sign, or its exaltation sign, and if it and a friendly planet are mutually in angle (kendra) houses, then that friendly planet, possessing those qualities, is also called a significator (kāraka).

sanskrit: नीचान्वयेऽपि यो जातः विद्यमाने च कारके । सोऽपि राजमनो विप्र धनवान् सुखसंयुतः ॥२९॥
transliteration: nīcānvaye'pi yo jātaḥ vidyamāne ca kārake . so'pi rājamano vipra dhanavān sukhasaṃyutaḥ.
separated_sandhi: nīca anvaye api yaḥ jātaḥ vidyamāne ca kārakesaḥ api rājamanaḥ vipra dhanavān sukhasaṃyutaḥ
english: O Brahmin, even if someone is born in a low lineage, when the significator (kāraka) is present and strong, that person will be esteemed by kings, wealthy, and endowed with happiness.

sanskrit: राजवंशसमुत्पन्नो राजा भवति निश्चयात् । एवं कुलानुसारेण कारकेभ्यः फलं वदेत् ॥३०॥
transliteration: rājavaṃśasamutpanno rājā bhavati niścayāt . evaṃ kulānusāreṇa kārakebhyaḥ phalaṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: rājavanśasamutpannaḥ rājā bhavati niścayātevam kulānusāreṇa kārakebhyaḥ phalam vadet
english: One born in a royal lineage certainly becomes a king. Therefore, one should predict the results from the significators (kārakas) in accordance with the native's family lineage.

sanskrit: अथाऽहं सम्प्रवक्ष्यामि विशेषं भावकारकान् । जनस्य जन्मलग्नं यत् विन्द्यादात्मकारकम् ॥३१॥
transliteration: athā'haṃ sampravakṣyāmi viśeṣaṃ bhāvakārakān . janasya janmalagnaṃ yat vindyādātmakārakam.
separated_sandhi: atha aham sampravakṣyāmi viśeṣam bhāvakārakānjanasya janmalagnam yat vindyāt ātmakārakam
english: Now I will fully explain the specific significators (kārakas) of the houses. One should know that the birth ascendant of a person is the significator of the self (ātman).

sanskrit: धनभावं विजानीयाद् दारकारकमेव हि । एकादशेऽग्रजातस्य तृतीये तु कनीयसः ॥३२॥
transliteration: dhanabhāvaṃ vijānīyād dārakārakameva hi . ekādaśe'grajātasya tṛtīye tu kanīyasaḥ.
separated_sandhi: dhanabhāvam vijānīyāt dārakārakam eva hiekādaśe agrajātasya tṛtīye tu kanīyasaḥ
english: One should verily know the house of wealth (Dhana Bhava) to be the significator of the spouse. The eleventh house is for the elder sibling, and the third house, however, is for the younger sibling.

sanskrit: सुते सुतं विजानीयात् पत्नीं सप्तमभावतः । सुतभवे ग्रहो यः स्यात् सोऽपि कारक उच्यते ॥३३॥
transliteration: sute sutaṃ vijānīyāt patnīṃ saptamabhāvataḥ . sutabhave graho yaḥ syāt so'pi kāraka ucyate.
separated_sandhi: sute sutaṃ vijānīyāt patnīṃ saptamabhāvataḥsutabhave grahaḥ yaḥ syāt saḥ api kārakaḥ ucyate
english: One should ascertain matters concerning children from the fifth house and matters concerning the wife from the seventh house. Furthermore, any planet situated in the fifth house (suta-bhāva) is also considered a significator (kāraka) for children.

sanskrit: सूर्यो गुरुः कुजः सोमो गुरुर्भौभः सितः शनिः । गुरुश्चन्द्रसुतो जीवो मन्दश्च भवकारकाः ॥३४॥
transliteration: sūryo guruḥ kujaḥ somo gururbhaubhaḥ sitaḥ śaniḥ . guruścandrasuto jīvo mandaśca bhavakārakāḥ.
separated_sandhi: sūryaḥ guruḥ kujaḥ somaḥ guruḥ bhaumaḥ sitaḥ śaniḥguruḥ candrasutaḥ jīvaḥ mandaḥ ca bhavakārakāḥ
english: The Sun, Jupiter, Mars, the Moon, Jupiter, Mars, Venus, Saturn; Jupiter, Mercury (Candrasuta), Jupiter, and Saturn (Manda) are considered the significators (kārakas) for the houses.

sanskrit: पुनस्तन्वादयो भावः स्थाप्यास्तेषां शुभाऽशुभम् । लाभस्तृतीयो रन्ध्रश्च शत्रुसंज्ञधनव्ययाः ॥३५॥
transliteration: punastanvādayo bhāvaḥ sthāpyāsteṣāṃ śubhā'śubham . lābhastṛtīyo randhraśca śatrusaṃjñadhanavyayāḥ.
separated_sandhi: punaḥ tanvādayaḥ bhāvaḥ sthāpyāḥ teṣām śubhāśubhamlābhaḥ tṛtīyaḥ randhraḥ ca śatrusaṃjñadhanavyayāḥ
english: Furthermore, the houses starting with the first (tanu bhāva) should be established to assess their auspicious and inauspicious effects. The eleventh house (of gains), the third house, the eighth house (of calamities), and the houses designated as the enemy (the sixth), wealth (the second), and expenditure (the twelfth) are [being discussed].

sanskrit: एते भावाः समाख्याताः क्रूराख्या द्विजसत्तम । एषां योगेन यो भावस्तस्य हानिः प्रजायते ॥३६॥
transliteration: ete bhāvāḥ samākhyātāḥ krūrākhyā dvijasattama . eṣāṃ yogena yo bhāvastasya hāniḥ prajāyate.
separated_sandhi: ete bhāvāḥ samākhyātāḥ krūrākhyā dvijasattamaeṣām yogena yaḥ bhāvaḥ tasya hāniḥ prajāyate
english: These houses, O best among the twice-born (dvijasattama), are declared to be known as malefic (krūra). Due to the association (yoga) with these, whatever house is involved suffers a loss (hāni).

sanskrit: भावा भद्राश्च केन्द्रारव्याः कोणाख्यौ द्विजसत्तम । एषां संयोगमात्रेण ह्वशुभोऽपि शुभो भवेत् ॥३७॥
transliteration: bhāvā bhadrāśca kendrāravyāḥ koṇākhyau dvijasattama . eṣāṃ saṃyogamātreṇa hvaśubho'pi śubho bhavet.
separated_sandhi: bhāvāḥ bhadrāḥ ca kendrākhyāḥ koṇākhyau dvijasattamaeṣām saṃyogamātreṇa ha aśubhaḥ api śubhaḥ bhavet
english: O best among the twice-born (dvijasattama), the houses known as angular (kendrākhyāḥ) and the two houses known as trine (koṇākhyau) are considered propitious (bhadra). Merely by their association (saṃyoga), even an inauspicious entity becomes auspicious.

sanskrit: अथाऽहं सम्प्रवक्ष्यामि कारकांशफलं द्विज । मेषादिराशिगे स्वांशे यथावद् ब्रह्मभाषितम् ॥१॥
transliteration: athā'haṃ sampravakṣyāmi kārakāṃśaphalaṃ dvija . meṣādirāśige svāṃśe yathāvad brahmabhāṣitam.
separated_sandhi: atha aham sampravakṣyāmi kārakāṃśaphalam dvijameṣādirāśige sva aṃśe yathāvat brahmabhāṣitam
english: Now, O twice-born (dvija), I will fully explain the results pertaining to the kārakāṃśa (the Navamsha sign of the ātmakāraka), as it was properly declared by Brahma, when the ātmakāraka is in its own Aṃśa (Navamsha sign) within the zodiac signs starting from Aries.

sanskrit: गृहे मूषकमार्जारा मेषांशे ह्वात्मकारके । सदा भयप्रदा विप्र पापयुक्ते विशेषतः ॥२॥
transliteration: gṛhe mūṣakamārjārā meṣāṃśe hvātmakārake . sadā bhayapradā vipra pāpayukte viśeṣataḥ.
separated_sandhi: gṛhe mūṣakamārjārāḥ meṣa aṃśe ha vā ātmakārakesadā bhayapradāḥ vipra pāpayukte viśeṣataḥ
english: O Brahmin (vipra), when the ātmakāraka is in the Aries Navamsha, mice and cats in the house always cause fear, especially when [the ātmakāraka or Aries Navamsha] is associated with malefic planets.

sanskrit: वृषांशकगते स्वस्मिन् सुखदाश्च चतुष्पदाः । मिथुनांशगते तस्मिन् कण्ड्वादिव्याधिसम्भवः ॥३॥
transliteration: vṛṣāṃśakagate svasmin sukhadāśca catuṣpadāḥ . mithunāṃśagate tasmin kaṇḍvādivyādhisambhavaḥ.
separated_sandhi: vṛṣāṃśakagate sva asmin sukhadāḥ ca catuṣpadāḥmithunāṃśagate tasmin kaṇḍvādivyādhisambhavaḥ
english: When the ātmakāraka is situated in the Taurus Navamsha, quadrupeds are beneficial. And when it is situated in the Gemini Navamsha, there is a possibility of diseases such as itching.

sanskrit: कर्कांशे च जलाद्भीतिः सिम्हांशे श्वपदाद्भयम् । कण्डूः स्थौल्यञ्च कन्यांशे तथा वह्निकणाद्भयम् ॥४॥
transliteration: karkāṃśe ca jalādbhītiḥ simhāṃśe śvapadādbhayam . kaṇḍūḥ sthaulyañca kanyāṃśe tathā vahnikaṇādbhayam.
separated_sandhi: karka aṃśe ca jalāt bhītiḥ siṃha aṃśe śvapadāt bhayamkaṇḍūḥ sthaulyam ca kanyā aṃśe tathā vahnikkaṇāt bhayam
english: When [the ātmakāraka is] in Cancer Navamsha, there is fear from water. And when in Leo Navamsha, there is fear from dogs or beasts. In Virgo Navamsha, there is itching and obesity, and similarly, fear from fire or sparks.

sanskrit: तुलांशे च वणिग् जातो वस्रादिनिर्मितौ पटुः । अल्यंशे सर्पतो भीतिः पीडा मातुः पयोधरे ॥५॥
transliteration: tulāṃśe ca vaṇig jāto vasrādinirmitau paṭuḥ . alyaṃśe sarpato bhītiḥ pīḍā mātuḥ payodhare.
separated_sandhi: tulā aṃśe ca vaṇik jātaḥ vastrādinirmitau paṭuḥali aṃśe sarpataḥ bhītiḥ pīḍā mātuḥ payodhare
english: When [the ātmakāraka is] in Libra Navamsha, one is born as a merchant and is skilled in manufacturing clothes and similar items. In Scorpio Navamsha, there is fear from snakes and pain in the mother's breast.

sanskrit: धनुरंशे क्रमादुच्चात् पतनं वाहनादपि । मरकांशे जलोद्भूतैर्जन्तुभिः खेचरस्तथा ॥६॥
transliteration: dhanuraṃśe kramāduccāt patanaṃ vāhanādapi . marakāṃśe jalodbhūtairjantubhiḥ khecarastathā.
separated_sandhi: dhanuḥ aṃśe kramāt uccāt patanam vāhanāt apimaraka aṃśe jalodbhūtaiḥ jantubhiḥ khecaraḥ tathā
english: If born in the Sagittarius (dhanu) *amsha*, there will be a fall from a height or even from a vehicle, in due course. If born in the Maraka (destroyer) *amsha*, the native (khecara) will face danger from creatures born in water.

sanskrit: शंखमुक्ताप्रवालाद्यैर्लाभो भवति निश्चितः । कुम्भांशे च तडागादिकारको जायते जनः ॥७॥
transliteration: śaṃkhamuktāpravālādyairlābho bhavati niścitaḥ . kumbhāṃśe ca taḍāgādikārako jāyate janaḥ.
separated_sandhi: śaṅkhamuktāpravālādyaiḥ lābhaḥ bhavati niścitaḥkumbha aṃśe ca taḍāgādikārakaḥ jāyate janaḥ
english: There will certainly be gain from conches, pearls, corals, and similar items. If born in the Aquarius (kumbha) *amsha*, the native becomes one who creates or maintains tanks and other water bodies.

sanskrit: मीनांशे कारके जातो मुक्तिभाग् द्विजसत्तम । नाऽशुभं शुभसंदृष्टे न शुभं पापवीक्षिते ॥८॥
transliteration: mīnāṃśe kārake jāto muktibhāg dvijasattama . nā'śubhaṃ śubhasaṃdṛṣṭe na śubhaṃ pāpavīkṣite.
separated_sandhi: mīna aṃśe kārake jātaḥ mukti bhāg dvija sattamana aśubham śubha saṃdṛṣṭe na śubham pāpa vīkṣite
english: O best among Brahmins (dvijasattama)! If a significator (kāraka) is in the Pisces (mīna) *amsha*, the native (jātaḥ) becomes a recipient of final liberation (mokṣa). (A particular planetary indication) is not inauspicious if aspected by an auspicious planet, nor is it auspicious if aspected by a malefic planet.

sanskrit: कारकांशे शुभे विप्र लग्नांशे च शुभग्रहे । शुभसंवीक्षिते जातो राजा भवति निश्चितः ॥९॥
transliteration: kārakāṃśe śubhe vipra lagnāṃśe ca śubhagrahe . śubhasaṃvīkṣite jāto rājā bhavati niścitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: kāraka aṃśe śubhe vipra lagna aṃśe ca śubha graheśubha saṃvīkṣite jātaḥ rājā bhavati niścitaḥ
english: O Brahmin (vipra)! If the *kāraka* (significator) *amsha* is auspicious, and there is an auspicious planet (śubhagraha) in the *lagna* (ascendant) *amsha* which is also aspected by an auspicious planet, then the native certainly becomes a king.

sanskrit: स्वांशाच्छुभग्रहाः केन्द्रे कोणे वा पापवर्जिताः । धनविद्यायुतो जातो मिश्रैर्मिश्रफलं वदेद् ॥१०॥
transliteration: svāṃśācchubhagrahāḥ kendre koṇe vā pāpavarjitāḥ . dhanavidyāyuto jāto miśrairmiśraphalaṃ vaded.
separated_sandhi: sva aṃśāt śubha grahāḥ kendre koṇe vā pāpa varjitāḥdhana vidyā yutaḥ jātaḥ miśraiḥ miśra phalam vadet
english: If auspicious planets (śubhagraha) are in a *kendra* (angular house) or a *koṇa* (trinal house) from one's own *amsha*, and they are free from malefic influence (pāpavarjita), then the native is born endowed with wealth and knowledge. If there are mixed influences, one should declare mixed results.

sanskrit: उपग्रहे च विप्रेन्द्र स्वोच्चस्वर्क्षंसुभर्क्षगे । पापदृग्रहिते चाऽन्त्ये कैवल्यंतस्य निर्दिशेत् ॥११॥
transliteration: upagrahe ca viprendra svoccasvarkṣaṃsubharkṣage . pāpadṛgrahite cā'ntye kaivalyaṃtasya nirdiśet.
separated_sandhi: upagrahe ca viprendra svoccasvarkṣasubharkṣagepāpadṛgrhite ca antye kaivalyam tasya nirdiśet
english: O foremost of Brahmins, if an upagraha (subsidiary planet) is situated in its own sign of exaltation, its own sign, or a friendly sign, and is devoid of malefic aspect, and also in the twelfth house, then one should declare that person attains final liberation (kaivalya).

sanskrit: चन्द्राऽरभृगुवर्गस्थ कारके पारदारिकः । विपर्यस्थेऽन्यथा ज्ञेयं फलं सर्वं विचक्षणैः ॥१२॥
transliteration: candrā'rabhṛguvargastha kārake pāradārikaḥ . viparyasthe'nyathā jñeyaṃ phalaṃ sarvaṃ vicakṣaṇaiḥ.
separated_sandhi: candrārabhrguvargastha kārake pāradārikaḥviparyasthe anyathā jñeyam phalam sarvam vicakṣaṇaiḥ
english: When the significator (kāraka) is situated in the divisional chart (varga) of the Moon, Mars, or Venus, the person becomes an adulterer. If this condition is reversed, then all results should be understood to be otherwise by the wise.

sanskrit: कारकांशे रवौ जातो राजकार्यपरो द्विज । पूर्णेन्द्रौ भोगवान् विद्वान् शुक्रदृष्टे विशेषतः ॥१३॥
transliteration: kārakāṃśe ravau jāto rājakāryaparo dvija . pūrṇendrau bhogavān vidvān śukradṛṣṭe viśeṣataḥ.
separated_sandhi: kārakāmśe ravau jātaḥ rājakāryaparaḥ dvijapūrṇendau bhogavān vidvān śukradṛṣṭe viśeṣataḥ
english: O Brahmin, if the Sun is in the Kāraka Amśa (the Navamśa occupied by the Kāraka planet), the native will be dedicated to government work. If the full Moon (pūrṇendu) is in the Kāraka Amśa, the person will enjoy comforts and be learned, especially if aspected by Venus (śukra).

sanskrit: स्वांशे बलयुते भौमे जातः कन्तायुघी भवेत् । वह्निजीवी नरो वाऽपि रसवादी च जायते ॥१४॥
transliteration: svāṃśe balayute bhaume jātaḥ kantāyughī bhavet . vahnijīvī naro vā'pi rasavādī ca jāyate.
separated_sandhi: svāmśe balayute bhaume jātaḥ kantāyudhī bhavetvahnijīvī naraḥ vā api rasavādī ca jāyate
english: If Mars (bhauma) is strong in its own Amśa (Navamśa), the native becomes a warrior or a man who earns his livelihood through fire-related work, or also an alchemist (rasavādī).

sanskrit: बुधे बलयुते स्वांशे कलाशिल्पविचक्षनः । वाणिज्यकुशलश्चापि बुद्धिविद्यासमन्वितः ॥१५॥
transliteration: budhe balayute svāṃśe kalāśilpavicakṣanaḥ . vāṇijyakuśalaścāpi buddhividyāsamanvitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: budhe balayute svāmśe kalāśilpavicakṣaṇaḥvāṇijyakuśalaḥ ca api buddhividyāsamanvitaḥ
english: If Mercury (budha) is strong in its own Amśa (Navamśa), the native will be expert in arts and crafts, skilled in commerce, and endowed with intelligence and knowledge.

sanskrit: सुकर्मा ज्ञाननिष्ठश्च वेदवित् स्वांशगे गुरौ । शुक्रे शतेन्द्रियः कामी राजकीतो भवेन्नरः ॥१६॥
transliteration: sukarmā jñānaniṣṭhaśca vedavit svāṃśage gurau . śukre śatendriyaḥ kāmī rājakīto bhavennaraḥ.
separated_sandhi: sukarman jñānaniṣṭhaḥ ca vedavit svāṃśage gurauśukre śatendriyaḥ kāmī rājakītaḥ bhavet naraḥ
english: When Jupiter (guru) is in its own Aṃśa (varga), a person becomes virtuous, devoted to knowledge, and a knower of the Vedas. If Venus (śukra) is in its own Aṃśa, the person will be very sensual, desirous, and associated with royalty.

sanskrit: शनौ स्वांशगते जातः स्वकुलोचितकर्मकृत् । राहौ चौरश्च धनुष्को जातो वा लोहयन्त्रकृत् ॥१७॥
transliteration: śanau svāṃśagate jātaḥ svakulocitakarmakṛt . rāhau cauraśca dhanuṣko jāto vā lohayantrakṛt.
separated_sandhi: śanau svāṃśagate jātaḥ svakulocitakarmakṛtrāhau cauraḥ ca dhanuṣkaḥ jātaḥ vā lohayantrakṛt
english: When Saturn (śani) is in its own Aṃśa (varga), the person born will perform actions (karma) appropriate to their family. If Rahu is in its own Aṃśa, the native will be a thief, or an archer, or a maker of iron instruments.

sanskrit: विषवैद्योऽथवा विप्र जायते नाऽत्र संशयः । व्ययहारी गजादीनां केतौ चौरश्च जायते ॥१८॥
transliteration: viṣavaidyo'thavā vipra jāyate nā'tra saṃśayaḥ . vyayahārī gajādīnāṃ ketau cauraśca jāyate.
separated_sandhi: viṣavaidyaḥ athavā vipraḥ jāyate na atra saṃśayaḥvyayahārī gajādīnām ketau cauraḥ ca jāyate
english: Or the person becomes a poison healer or a Brahmin; there is no doubt about this. If Ketu is in its own Aṃśa, the native becomes a thief and deals in elephants and similar animals.

sanskrit: रविराहू यदा स्वांशे सर्पाद् भीतिः प्रजायते । शुभदृष्टौ भयं नैव पापदृष्टौ मृतिभवेत् ॥१९॥
transliteration: ravirāhū yadā svāṃśe sarpād bhītiḥ prajāyate . śubhadṛṣṭau bhayaṃ naiva pāpadṛṣṭau mṛtibhavet.
separated_sandhi: ravirāhū yadā svāṃśe sarpāt bhītiḥ prajāyateśubhadr̥ṣṭau bhayam na eva pāpadr̥ṣṭau mṛtiḥ bhavet
english: When the Sun (ravi) and Rahu are in their own Aṃśa (varga), fear from snakes arises. If they are aspected by benefics, there is no fear. However, if they are aspected by malefics, death may occur.

sanskrit: शुभषड्वर्गसंयुक्तौ विषवैद्यो भवेन् तदा । भौमेक्षिते कारकांशे भानुस्वर्भानुसंयुते ॥२०॥
transliteration: śubhaṣaḍvargasaṃyuktau viṣavaidyo bhaven tadā . bhaumekṣite kārakāṃśe bhānusvarbhānusaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: śubhaṣaḍvargasaṃyuktau viṣavaidyaḥ bhavet tadābhaumekṣite kārakāṃśe bhānusvarbhānusaṃyute
english: If (Sun and Rahu) are joined with benefic ṣaḍvargas, then the person becomes a poison healer. This also applies when the Kāraka Aṃśa is aspected by Mars (bhauma), and the Sun (bhānu) and Rahu (svarbhānu) are conjoined.

sanskrit: अन्यग्र्हा न पश्यन्ति स्ववेश्मपरदाहकः । तस्मिन् बुधेक्षि ते चापि वह्निदो नैव जायते ॥२१॥
transliteration: anyagrhā na paśyanti svaveśmaparadāhakaḥ . tasmin budhekṣi te cāpi vahnido naiva jāyate.
separated_sandhi: anyagrahrāḥ na paśyanti svaveśmaparadāhakaḥtasmin budhekṣi te ca api vahṇidaḥ na eva jāyate
english: Other planets (grahas) do not cause a person to burn his own and others' homes. However, when such a destructive planetary combination is aspected by Mercury (Budha), then even those (malefic planetary influences) do not lead to the birth of an arsonist.

sanskrit: पापर्क्षे गुरुणा दृष्टे समीपगृहदाहकः । शुक्रदृष्टे तु विप्रेन्द्र गृहदाहो न जायते ॥२२॥
transliteration: pāparkṣe guruṇā dṛṣṭe samīpagṛhadāhakaḥ . śukradṛṣṭe tu viprendra gṛhadāho na jāyate.
separated_sandhi: pāparkṣe guruṇā dṛṣṭe samīpagṛhadāhakaḥśukradṛṣṭe tu viprendra gṛhadāhaḥ na jāyate
english: When (the relevant house/planet) is in a malefic sign or house (pāparkṣe) and aspected by Jupiter (Guru), one becomes an arsonist of neighboring houses. But, O best of brahmins (viprendra), if aspected by Venus (Śukra), house burning (gṛhadāha) does not occur.

sanskrit: गुलिकेन युते स्वांशे पूर्णचन्द्रेण वीक्षिते । चौरैर्हृतधनो जातः स्वयं चौरोऽथवा भवेत् ॥२३॥
transliteration: gulikena yute svāṃśe pūrṇacandreṇa vīkṣite . caurairhṛtadhano jātaḥ svayaṃ cauro'thavā bhavet.
separated_sandhi: gulikena yute svāṃśe pūrṇacandreṇa vīkṣite cauraiḥhṛtadhanaḥ jātaḥ svayam cauraḥ athavā bhavet
english: When (the relevant planet or house) is joined with Gulika in its own navāṃśa (aṃśa), and aspected by a full Moon, the native becomes one whose wealth is stolen by thieves, or he himself may become a thief.

sanskrit: गृहादृष्टे सगुलिके विपदो वा विषैर्हतः । बुधदृष्टे बृहद्वीजो जायते नाऽत्र संशयः ॥२४॥
transliteration: gṛhādṛṣṭe sagulike vipado vā viṣairhataḥ . budhadṛṣṭe bṛhadvījo jāyate nā'tra saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: gṛhāt adṛṣṭe sa-gulike vipadaḥ vā viṣaiḥ hataḥbudhadṛṣṭe bṛhadvījaḥ jāyate na atra saṃśayaḥ
english: When (the relevant house or planet) is un-aspected by a house lord (gṛhāt adṛṣṭe) and joined with Gulika, misfortunes (vipadaḥ) occur, or the native is killed by poisons. If aspected by Mercury (Budha), the native has great progeny (bṛhadvīja). There is no doubt about this.

sanskrit: सकेतौ कारकांशे च पापदृष्टे द्विजोत्तम । जातस्य कर्णरोगो वा कर्णच्छेदः प्रजायते ॥२५॥
transliteration: saketau kārakāṃśe ca pāpadṛṣṭe dvijottama . jātasya karṇarogo vā karṇacchedaḥ prajāyate.
separated_sandhi: sa-ketau kārakāṃśe ca pāpa-dṛṣṭe dvijottamajātasya karṇarogaḥ vā karṇacchedaḥ prajāyate
english: O best of brahmins (dvijottama), if the kārakāṃśa (a specific divisional chart related to the significator planet) is with Ketu and aspected by a malefic planet, then for the native (jātasya), either an ear disease or ear amputation (karṇaccheda) occurs.

sanskrit: भृगुपुत्रेक्षिते तस्मिन् दीक्षितो जायते जनः । बुधार्किदृष्टे निर्वीर्यो जायते मानवो ध्रुवम् ॥२६॥
transliteration: bhṛguputrekṣite tasmin dīkṣito jāyate janaḥ . budhārkidṛṣṭe nirvīryo jāyate mānavo dhruvam.
separated_sandhi: bhṛguputra-īkṣite tasmin dīkṣitaḥ jāyate janaḥ |budha-arki-dṛṣṭe nir-vīryaḥ jāyate mānavaḥ dhruvam
english: If that (Kāraka-Aṃśa) is aspected by Venus, the person born becomes initiated (dīkṣita). If it is aspected by Mercury and Saturn, the human being certainly becomes impotent or powerless.

sanskrit: बुधशुक्रेक्षिते तस्मिन् दासीपुत्रः प्रजायते । पुनर्भवासुतो वाऽपि जायते नाऽत्र संशयः ॥२७॥
transliteration: budhaśukrekṣite tasmin dāsīputraḥ prajāyate . punarbhavāsuto vā'pi jāyate nā'tra saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: budha-śukra-īkṣite tasmin dāsīputraḥ pra-jāyate| punarbhavā-sutaḥ vā api jāyate na atra saṃśayaḥ
english: If that (Kāraka-Aṃśa) is aspected by Mercury and Venus, a son of a maidservant is born. Or, a son of a remarried woman is born; there is no doubt about this.

sanskrit: तपस्वी सनिना दृष्टे जातः प्रेष्योऽथवा भवेत् । शनिमात्रेक्षिते तस्मिन् जातः संन्यासिवेषवान् ॥२८॥
transliteration: tapasvī saninā dṛṣṭe jātaḥ preṣyo'thavā bhavet . śanimātrekṣite tasmin jātaḥ saṃnyāsiveṣavān.
separated_sandhi: tapasvī saninā dṛṣṭe jātaḥ preṣyaḥ athavā bhavet| śani-mātra-īkṣite tasmin jātaḥ saṃnyāsi-veṣavān
english: If (the Kāraka-Aṃśa) is aspected by Saturn, the person born may become an ascetic (tapasvī) or a servant. If that (Kāraka-Aṃśa) is aspected by Saturn alone, the person born will have the attire of a renunciate (saṃnyāsin).

sanskrit: रविसुक्रेक्षिते तस्मिन् राजप्रेष्यो जनो भवेत् । इतिसंक्षेपतः प्रोक्तं कारकांशफलं द्विज ॥२९॥
transliteration: ravisukrekṣite tasmin rājapreṣyo jano bhavet . itisaṃkṣepataḥ proktaṃ kārakāṃśaphalaṃ dvija.
separated_sandhi: ravi-śukra-īkṣite tasmin rāja-preṣyaḥ janaḥ bhavet| iti saṃkṣepataḥ proktam kāraka-aṃśa-phalam dvija
english: If that (Kāraka-Aṃśa) is aspected by the Sun and Venus, the person becomes a servant of the king. O twice-born (dvija), thus have the results of Kāraka-Aṃśa been concisely explained.

sanskrit: स्वांशाद्धने च शुक्रारवर्गे स्यात् पारदारिकः । तयोर्दृग्योगतो ज्ञेयमिदमामरणं फलम् ॥३०॥
transliteration: svāṃśāddhane ca śukrāravarge syāt pāradārikaḥ . tayordṛgyogato jñeyamidamāmaraṇaṃ phalam.
separated_sandhi: sva-aṃśāt dhane ca śukra-ara-varge syāt pāradārikaḥ| tayoḥ dṛk-yogataḥ jñeyam idam ā-maraṇam phalam
english: If Venus and Mars are in the second house from the Svāṃśa (Kāraka-Aṃśa), and also in their respective Vargas (divisional charts), then the person becomes an adulterer (pāradārika). This outcome, discernible through their aspect or conjunction, is known to persist until death.

sanskrit: केतौ तत्प्रतिबन्धः स्यात् गुरौ तु स्रैण एव सः । राहौ चाऽर्थनिवृत्तिः स्यात् कारकांशाद् द्वितीयगे ॥३१॥
transliteration: ketau tatpratibandhaḥ syāt gurau tu sraiṇa eva saḥ . rāhau cā'rthanivṛttiḥ syāt kārakāṃśād dvitīyage.
separated_sandhi: ketau tatpratibandhaḥ syāt gurau tu sraiṇaḥ eva saḥrāhau ca arthanivṛttiḥ syāt kārakāṃśāt dvitīyage
english: If Ketu is in the second house from the Karakāmśa, there will be an obstruction related to those matters (signified by the second house). However, if (Jupiter) (guru) is there, the native will be effeminate or devoted to women. If Rāhu is in that position, there will be a cessation of wealth.

sanskrit: स्वांशात् तृतीयगे पापे जातः शूरः प्रतापवान् । तस्मिन् शुभग्रहे जातः कातरो नात्र संशयः ॥३२॥
transliteration: svāṃśāt tṛtīyage pāpe jātaḥ śūraḥ pratāpavān . tasmin śubhagrahe jātaḥ kātaro nātra saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: svāṃśāt tṛtīyage pāpe jātaḥ śūraḥ pratāpavāntasmin śubhagrahe jātaḥ kātaraḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ
english: If a malefic planet is in the third house from the Svāṃśa, the native born will be brave and powerful. If, however, a benefic planet is in that same position, the native born will be cowardly; there is no doubt about this.

sanskrit: स्वांशाच्चतुर्थभावे तु चन्द्रशुक्रयुतेक्षिते । तत्र वा स्वोच्चगे खेटे जातः प्रासादवान् भवेत् ॥३३॥
transliteration: svāṃśāccaturthabhāve tu candraśukrayutekṣite . tatra vā svoccage kheṭe jātaḥ prāsādavān bhavet.
separated_sandhi: svāṃśāt caturthabhāve tu candraśukrayutekṣitetatra vā svoccage kheṭe jātaḥ prāsādavān bhavet
english: If the fourth house from the Svāṃśa is conjoined with or aspected by the Moon and Venus, or if a planet is in its exaltation sign there, then the native will own a mansion.

sanskrit: शनिराहुयुते तस्मैन् जातस्य च शिलागृहम् । ऐष्टिकं कुजकेतुभ्यां गुरुणा दारवं गृहम् ॥३४॥
transliteration: śanirāhuyute tasmain jātasya ca śilāgṛham . aiṣṭikaṃ kujaketubhyāṃ guruṇā dāravaṃ gṛham.
separated_sandhi: śanirāhuyute tasmin jātasya ca śilāgṛhamaiṣṭikam kujaketubhyām guruṇā dāravam gṛham
english: If Saturn and Rahu are conjoined in that (fourth house), the native will have a stone house. A brick house is indicated if Mars and Ketu are there, and a wooden house if (Jupiter) (guru) is present.

sanskrit: तार्ण तु रविणा प्रोक्तं जातस्य भवनं द्विज । चन्द्रे त्वनावृते देशे पत्नीयूगः प्रजायते ॥३५॥
transliteration: tārṇa tu raviṇā proktaṃ jātasya bhavanaṃ dvija . candre tvanāvṛte deśe patnīyūgaḥ prajāyate.
separated_sandhi: tārṇam tu raviṇā proktam jātasya bhavanam dvijacandre tu anāvṛte deśe patnīyūgaḥ prajāyate
english: O (Brahmin) (dvija), a thatched house for the native is declared by the Sun. But if the Moon is in an uncovered region (in the fourth house), a pair of wives will be born (for the native).

sanskrit: पञ्चमे कुजराहुभ्यां क्षयरोगस्य संभवः । रात्रिनाथेन दृष्टाभ्यां निश्चयेन प्रजायते ॥३६॥
transliteration: pañcame kujarāhubhyāṃ kṣayarogasya saṃbhavaḥ . rātrināthena dṛṣṭābhyāṃ niścayena prajāyate.
separated_sandhi: pañcame kujarāhubhyām kṣayarogasya saṃbhavaḥrātrināthena dṛṣṭābhyām niścayena prajāyate
english: If Mars (Kuza) and Rahu are in the fifth house, the possibility of a wasting disease (kṣayaroga) arises. If these two (Mars and Rahu) are aspected by the Moon (rātrinātha), it certainly manifests.

sanskrit: कुजदृष्टौ तु जातस्य पिटकादिगदो भवेत् । केतुदृष्टौ तु ग्रहणी जलरोगोऽथवा द्विज ॥३७॥
transliteration: kujadṛṣṭau tu jātasya piṭakādigado bhavet . ketudṛṣṭau tu grahaṇī jalarogo'thavā dvija.
separated_sandhi: kujadṛṣṭau tu jātasya piṭakādigadaḥ bhavetketudṛṣṭau tu grahaṇī jalarogaḥ athavā dvija
english: O twice-born (dvija), if one is born with an aspect from Mars (Kuza), diseases like boils will arise. However, if there is an aspect from Ketu, then dysentery (grahaṇī) or a water-related disease (jalaroga) will occur.

sanskrit: सराहुगुलिके तत्र भयं क्षुदविषोद्भवम् । बुधे परमहंसश्च लगुडी वा प्रजायते ॥३८॥
transliteration: sarāhugulike tatra bhayaṃ kṣudaviṣodbhavam . budhe paramahaṃsaśca laguḍī vā prajāyate.
separated_sandhi: sarāhugulike tatra bhayam kṣudraviṣodbhavambudhe paramahaṃsaḥ ca laguḍī vā prajāyate
english: When Rahu and Gulika are together (in the fifth house), there is fear of danger arising from minor poisons. If Mercury (Budha) is in the fifth house, one is born as a great renunciate (paramahaṃsa) or a staff-bearer (laguḍī), a warrior.

sanskrit: रवौ खेड्गधरो जातः कुजे कुन्तायुधी भवेत् । शनौ धनुर्धरो ज्ञेयो राहौ च लोहयन्त्रवान् ॥३९॥
transliteration: ravau kheḍgadharo jātaḥ kuje kuntāyudhī bhavet . śanau dhanurdharo jñeyo rāhau ca lohayantravān.
separated_sandhi: ravau khaḍgadharaḥ jātaḥ kuje kuntāyudhī bhavetśanau dhanurdharaḥ jñeyaḥ rāhau ca lohayantravān
english: If the Sun (Ravi) is in the fifth house, one is born as a sword-bearer. If Mars (Kuza) is there, one becomes a spear-wielder. If Saturn (Shani) is present, one should be known as an archer. And if Rahu is there, one will possess iron instruments.

sanskrit: केतौ च घटिकायन्त्री मानवो जायते द्विज । भार्गवे तु कविर्वाग्मी काव्यज्ञो जायते जनः ॥४०॥
transliteration: ketau ca ghaṭikāyantrī mānavo jāyate dvija . bhārgave tu kavirvāgmī kāvyajño jāyate janaḥ.
separated_sandhi: ketau ca ghaṭikāyantrī mānavaḥ jāyate dvijabhārgave tu kaviḥ vāgmī kāvyajñaḥ jāyate janaḥ
english: O twice-born (dvija), if Ketu is in the fifth house, a person skilled with time-measuring devices (ghaṭikāyantrī) is born. But if Venus (Bhārgava) is present, a person is born as a poet, an eloquent speaker, and a connoisseur of literature (kāvya).

sanskrit: स्वांशे तत्पञ्चमे वाऽपि चन्द्रेज्याभ्यां च ग्रन्थकृत् । शुक्रेण किञ्चिदूनोऽसौ ततोऽप्यल्पो बुधेन च ॥४१॥
transliteration: svāṃśe tatpañcame vā'pi candrejyābhyāṃ ca granthakṛt . śukreṇa kiñcidūno'sau tato'pyalpo budhena ca.
separated_sandhi: svāṃśe tatpañcame vā api candrejyābhyām ca granthakṛtśukreṇa kiñcit ūnaḥ asau tataḥ api alpaḥ budhena ca
english: If the Moon and Jupiter are situated in the Svāṃśa chart or in the fifth house from it, the native becomes an author. When Venus is the indicator of authorship, it is of somewhat lesser quality, and when Mercury is the indicator, it is even less so.

sanskrit: गुरुणा केवलेनैव सर्वविद् ग्रन्थकृत् तथा । वेदवेदान्तविच्चापि न वाग्मी शाब्दकोऽपि सन् ॥४२॥
transliteration: guruṇā kevalenaiva sarvavid granthakṛt tathā . vedavedāntaviccāpi na vāgmī śābdako'pi san.
separated_sandhi: guruṇā kevalena eva sarvavit granthakṛt tathāveda vedānta vit ca api na vāgmī śābdakaḥ api san
english: When Jupiter alone is the indicator, the native becomes omniscient and an author. Such a person is also a knower of the Vedas and Vedānta, but despite being a grammarian, he is not eloquent.

sanskrit: नैयायिकः कुजेनासौ ज्ञेन मीमांसकस्तथा । सभाजडस्तु शनिना गीतज्ञो रविणा स्मृतः ॥४३॥
transliteration: naiyāyikaḥ kujenāsau jñena mīmāṃsakastathā . sabhājaḍastu śaninā gītajño raviṇā smṛtaḥ.
separated_sandhi: naiyāyikaḥ kujena asau jñena mīmāṃsakaḥ tathāsabhājaḍaḥ tu śaninā gītajñaḥ raviṇā smṛtaḥ
english: If Mars is the indicator, the native becomes a logician (naiyāyika). If Mercury indicates, he becomes a follower of Mīmāṃsā. If Saturn is the influence, he is dull in assemblies, and by the Sun, he is considered a musician.

sanskrit: चन्द्रेण सांख्ययोगज्ञः साहित्यज्ञश्च गायकः । केतुना गणितज्ञोऽसौ राहणाऽपि तथैव च ॥४४॥
transliteration: candreṇa sāṃkhyayogajñaḥ sāhityajñaśca gāyakaḥ . ketunā gaṇitajño'sau rāhaṇā'pi tathaiva ca.
separated_sandhi: candreṇa sāṃkhyayogajñaḥ sāhityajñaḥ ca gāyakaḥketunā gaṇitajñaḥ asau rāhaṇā api tathā eva ca
english: By the Moon, one becomes a knower of Sāṃkhya and Yoga (yoga), a literary scholar, and a singer. If Ketu is the indicator, the native becomes a mathematician, and similarly, by Rāhu as well.

sanskrit: सप्रदायस्य सिध्हिः स्यात् गुरुसम्बन्धतो द्विज । स्वांशाद् द्वितीयतः केचित् फलमेवं वदन्ति हि ॥४५॥
transliteration: sapradāyasya sidhhiḥ syāt gurusambandhato dvija . svāṃśād dvitīyataḥ kecit phalamevaṃ vadanti hi.
separated_sandhi: sampradāyasya siddhiḥ syāt gurusambandhataḥ dvijasvāṃśāt dvitīyataḥ kecit phalam evam vadanti hi
english: O twice-born (dvija), the success of a tradition (sampradāya) arises through connection with a guru (guru). Indeed, some scholars state that these results should be similarly considered from the second house from the Svāṃśa.

sanskrit: स्वांशात् षष्ठगते पापे कर्षको जायते जनः । शुभग्रहेऽलसश्चेति तृतीयेऽपि फलं स्मृतम् ॥४६॥
transliteration: svāṃśāt ṣaṣṭhagate pāpe karṣako jāyate janaḥ . śubhagrahe'lasaśceti tṛtīye'pi phalaṃ smṛtam.
separated_sandhi: svāṃśāt ṣaṣṭhagate pāpe karṣakaḥ jāyate janaḥśubhagrahe alasaḥ ca iti tṛtīye api phalam smṛtam
english: A person becomes a farmer if a malefic planet is located in the sixth house from their Swamsa. If a benefic planet occupies that position, the person will be lazy. This same outcome is also stated for the third house.

sanskrit: द्यूने चन्द्रगुरु यस्य भार्या तस्यातिसुन्दरी । तत्र कामवती शुक्रे बुधे चैव कलावती ॥४७॥
transliteration: dyūne candraguru yasya bhāryā tasyātisundarī . tatra kāmavatī śukre budhe caiva kalāvatī.
separated_sandhi: dyūne candraguru yasya bhāryā tasya atisundarītatra kāmavatī śukre budhe ca eva kalāvatī
english: If the Moon and Jupiter are located in the seventh house, a person's wife will be exceedingly beautiful. If Venus is in that house, she will be passionate, and if Mercury is there, she will be skilled in arts.

sanskrit: रवौ च स्वकुले गुप्ता शनौ चापि वयोऽधिका । तपस्विनी रुजाढ्य वा राहौ च विधवा स्मृता ॥४८॥
transliteration: ravau ca svakule guptā śanau cāpi vayo'dhikā . tapasvinī rujāḍhya vā rāhau ca vidhavā smṛtā.
separated_sandhi: ravau ca svakule guptā śanau ca api vayaḥ adhikātapasvinī rujāḍhyā vā rāhau ca vidhavā smṛtā
english: If the Sun is in that house, she remains protected within her own family. If Saturn is there, she is older (than her husband), and is either an ascetic or afflicted by disease. And if Rahu is in that position, she is considered a widow.

sanskrit: शुभस्वामियुते रन्ध्रे स्वांशाद् दीर्घायुरुच्यते । पापेक्षितयुतेऽल्पायुर्मध्यायुर्मिश्रदृग्युते ॥४९॥
transliteration: śubhasvāmiyute randhre svāṃśād dīrghāyurucyate . pāpekṣitayute'lpāyurmadhyāyurmiśradṛgyute.
separated_sandhi: śubhasvāmiyute randhre svāṃśāt dīrghāyuḥ ucyatepāpekṣitayute alpāyuḥ madhyāyuḥ miśradṛgyute
english: If the eighth house from Swamsa is associated with (conjoined or aspected by) a benefic lord, a long life is predicted. If it is associated with a malefic planet, a short life is indicated. If it is associated with a mixture of benefic and malefic planets, then a medium life is expected.

sanskrit: कारकांशाच्च नवमे शुभग्रहयुतेक्षित । सत्यवादी गुरौ भक्तः स्वधर्मनिरतो नरः ॥५०॥
transliteration: kārakāṃśācca navame śubhagrahayutekṣita . satyavādī gurau bhaktaḥ svadharmanirato naraḥ.
separated_sandhi: kārakāṃśāt ca navame śubhagraḥayutekṣitasatyavādī gurau bhaktaḥ svadharmanirataḥ naraḥ
english: If the ninth house from Karakamsha is conjoined with or aspected by a benefic planet, the person will be truthful, devoted to their spiritual teacher (guru), and committed to their own intrinsic nature (dharma).

sanskrit: स्वांशाच्च नवमे भावे पापग्रहयुतेक्षिते । स्वधर्मनिरतो बाल्ये मिथ्यावादी च वार्धके ॥५१॥
transliteration: svāṃśācca navame bhāve pāpagrahayutekṣite . svadharmanirato bālye mithyāvādī ca vārdhake.
separated_sandhi: svāṃśāt ca navame bhāve pāpagrahayutekṣitesvadharmanirataḥ bālye mithyāvādī ca vārdhake
english: If the ninth house from the Svāṁśa (the navāṁśa sign occupied by the ātmakāraka planet) is conjoined with or aspected by malefic planets, the individual will be dedicated to his own (dharma) intrinsic nature or duties in childhood, but will speak untruths in old age.

sanskrit: नवमे कारकांशाच्च शनिराहुयुतेक्षिते । गुरुद्रोही भवेद् बालः शास्त्रेषु विमुखो नरः ॥५२॥
transliteration: navame kārakāṃśācca śanirāhuyutekṣite . gurudrohī bhaved bālaḥ śāstreṣu vimukho naraḥ.
separated_sandhi: navame kārakāṃśāt ca śanirāhuyutekṣitegurudrohī bhavet bālaḥ śāstreṣu vimukhaḥ naraḥ
english: If the ninth house from the Kārakāṁśa (the navāṁśa sign occupied by the ātmakāraka planet) is conjoined with or aspected by Saturn and Rāhu, the individual (bāla) becomes a betrayer of his teacher (guru) and is averse to scriptures (śāstra).

sanskrit: कारकांशाच्च नवमे गुरुभानुयुतेक्षिते । तदाऽपि गुरुद्रोही स्यात् गुरुवाक्यं न मन्यते ॥५३॥
transliteration: kārakāṃśācca navame gurubhānuyutekṣite . tadā'pi gurudrohī syāt guruvākyaṃ na manyate.
separated_sandhi: kārakāṃśāt ca navame gurubhānuyutekṣite tadāapi gurudrohī syāt guruvākyam na manyate
english: If the ninth house from the Kārakāṁśa (the navāṁśa sign occupied by the ātmakāraka planet) is conjoined with or aspected by Jupiter and the Sun, then also the individual would be a betrayer of his teacher (guru) and would not respect his teacher's (guru) words.

sanskrit: कारकांशाच्च नवमे शुक्रभौमयुतेक्षिते । षड्वर्गादिकयोगे तु मरणं पारदारिकम् ॥५४॥
transliteration: kārakāṃśācca navame śukrabhaumayutekṣite . ṣaḍvargādikayoge tu maraṇaṃ pāradārikam.
separated_sandhi: kārakāṃśāt ca navame śukrabhaumayutekṣiteṣaḍvargādikayoge tu maraṇam pāradārikam
english: If the ninth house from the Kārakāṁśa (the navāṁśa sign occupied by the ātmakāraka planet) is conjoined with or aspected by Venus and Mars, and if there are also specific planetary combinations (yoga) in the ṣaḍvarga charts, then death may occur due to an illicit connection with another man's wife.

sanskrit: कारकांशाच्च नवमे ज्ञेन्दुयुक्तेक्षिते द्विज । परस्त्री सङ्गमाद् बालो बन्धको भवति ध्रुवम् ॥५५॥
transliteration: kārakāṃśācca navame jñenduyuktekṣite dvija . parastrī saṅgamād bālo bandhako bhavati dhruvam.
separated_sandhi: kārakāṃśāt ca navame jñenduyutekṣite dvijaparastrī saṅgamāt bālaḥ bandhakaḥ bhavati dhruvam
english: O Twice-born (dvija), if the ninth house from the Kārakāṁśa (the navāṁśa sign occupied by the ātmakāraka planet) is conjoined with or aspected by Mercury and the Moon, then the individual (bāla) will certainly be imprisoned due to illicit association with another man's wife.

sanskrit: नवमे केवलेनैवे गुरुणा च युतेक्षिते । स्त्रीलोतुपो भवेज्जातो विषयी चैव जायते ॥५६॥
transliteration: navame kevalenaive guruṇā ca yutekṣite . strīlotupo bhavejjāto viṣayī caiva jāyate.
separated_sandhi: navame kevalena eva guruṇā ca yutekṣitestrīlotupaḥ bhavet jātaḥ viṣayī ca eva jāyate
english: If Jupiter (guru) is in the ninth house, whether it is alone or conjoined with or aspected by other planets, the native becomes lustful for women and engrossed in worldly pleasures.

sanskrit: कारकांशाच्च दशमे शुभल्हेटयुतेक्षिते । स्थिरवित्तो भवेद् बालो गम्भीरो बलबुद्धिमान् ॥५७॥
transliteration: kārakāṃśācca daśame śubhalheṭayutekṣite . sthiravitto bhaved bālo gambhīro balabuddhimān.
separated_sandhi: kārakāṁśāt ca daśame śubhalheṭayutekṣitesthiravittaḥ bhavet bālaḥ gambhīraḥ balabuddhimān
english: If, from the Kāraka-aṃśa, the tenth house is conjoined with or aspected by benefic planets, the native becomes wealthy, profound, and possessed of strength and intelligence.

sanskrit: दशमे कारकांशाच्च पापखेटयुतेक्षिते । व्यापारे जायते हानिः पितृसौख्येन वर्जितः ॥५८॥
transliteration: daśame kārakāṃśācca pāpakheṭayutekṣite . vyāpāre jāyate hāniḥ pitṛsaukhyena varjitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: daśame kārakāṁśāt ca pāpakheṭayutekṣitevyāpāre jāyate hāniḥ pitṛsaukhyena varjitaḥ
english: If, from the Kāraka-aṃśa, the tenth house is conjoined with or aspected by malefic planets, there is loss in business and the native is deprived of paternal happiness.

sanskrit: दशमे कारकांशाच्च बुधशुक्रयुतेक्षिते । व्यापारे बहुलाभश्च महत्कर्मकओर् नरः ॥५९॥
transliteration: daśame kārakāṃśācca budhaśukrayutekṣite . vyāpāre bahulābhaśca mahatkarmakaor naraḥ.
separated_sandhi: daśame kārakāṁśāt ca budhaśukrayutekṣitevyāpāre bahulābhaḥ ca mahatkarmakaraḥ naraḥ
english: If, from the Kāraka-aṃśa, the tenth house is conjoined with or aspected by Mercury and Venus, there is great profit in business, and the native performs great deeds.

sanskrit: कारकांशाच्च दशमे रविचन्द्रयुतेक्षिते । गुरुदृष्टयुते विप्र जातको राज्यभाग् भवेत् ॥६०॥
transliteration: kārakāṃśācca daśame ravicandrayutekṣite . gurudṛṣṭayute vipra jātako rājyabhāg bhavet.
separated_sandhi: kārakāṁśāt ca daśame ravicandrayutekṣitegurudṛṣṭayute vipra jātakaḥ rājyabhāk bhavet
english: O Brahmin (vipra), if, from the Kāraka-aṃśa, the tenth house is conjoined with or aspected by the Sun and Moon, and additionally conjoined or aspected by Jupiter (guru), the native becomes a ruler.

sanskrit: स्वांशादेकादशे स्थाने शुभखेटयुतेक्षिते । भ्रातृसौख्ययुतो बालः सर्वकार्येषु लाभकृत् ॥६१॥
transliteration: svāṃśādekādaśe sthāne śubhakheṭayutekṣite . bhrātṛsaukhyayuto bālaḥ sarvakāryeṣu lābhakṛt.
separated_sandhi: svāṃśāt ekādaśe sthāne śubhakheṭa-yuta-īkṣitebhrātṛ-saukhya-yutaḥ bālaḥ sarva-kāryeṣu lābhakṛt
english: If the eleventh house from the "svāṃśa" (the Navāṃśa sign of the Ātmakāraka) is conjoined with or aspected by auspicious planets, the native will enjoy happiness from siblings and will gain profit in all undertakings.

sanskrit: एकादशे सपापे तु कुमार्गाल्लाबकृन्नरः । विख्यातो विक्रमी चैव जायते नाऽत्र संशयः ॥६२॥
transliteration: ekādaśe sapāpe tu kumārgāllābakṛnnaraḥ . vikhyāto vikramī caiva jāyate nā'tra saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: ekādaśe sa-pāpe tu kumārgāt lābhakṛt naraḥvikhyātaḥ vikramī ca eva jāyate na atra saṃśayaḥ
english: However, if the eleventh house has malefic planets, the person earns profit through dishonest means, and indeed becomes renowned and valorous; there is no doubt about this.

sanskrit: कारकांशाद् व्ययस्थाने सद्ग्रहे सद्व्ययो भवेत् । असद्व्ययोऽशुभे ज्ञयो ग्रहाभावे च सत्फलम् ॥६३॥
transliteration: kārakāṃśād vyayasthāne sadgrahe sadvyayo bhavet . asadvyayo'śubhe jñayo grahābhāve ca satphalam.
separated_sandhi: kārakāṃśāt vyaya-sthāne sadgrahe sadvyayaḥ bhavetasadvyayaḥ aśubhe jñeyaḥ graha-abhāve ca satphalam
english: From the "kārakāṃśa" (the Navāṃśa sign of the Ātmakāraka), if an auspicious planet is in the twelfth house, there will be beneficial expenses. If a malefic planet is present, one should understand that there will be detrimental expenses. And if no planet is present, there will be good results.

sanskrit: कारकांशाद् व्ययस्थाने स्वभोच्चस्थे शुभग्रहे । सद्गतिर्जायते तस्य शुभलोकमवाप्नुयात् ॥६४॥
transliteration: kārakāṃśād vyayasthāne svabhoccasthe śubhagrahe . sadgatirjāyate tasya śubhalokamavāpnuyāt.
separated_sandhi: kārakāṃśāt vyaya-sthāne svabha-ucca-sthe śubha-grahesadgatiḥ jāyate tasya śubha-lokam avāpnuyāt
english: If an auspicious planet, situated in its own sign or exaltation, is in the twelfth house from the "kārakāṃśa" (the Navāṃśa sign of the Ātmakāraka), then that person achieves a good destiny and attains auspicious realms.

sanskrit: कारकांशाद् व्यये केतौ शुभखेटयुतेक्षिते । तदा तु जायते मुक्तिः सायुज्यपदमाप्नुयात् ॥६५॥
transliteration: kārakāṃśād vyaye ketau śubhakheṭayutekṣite . tadā tu jāyate muktiḥ sāyujyapadamāpnuyāt.
separated_sandhi: kārakāṃśāt vyaye ketau śubhakheṭa-yuta-īkṣitetadā tu jāyate muktiḥ sāyujya-padam avāpnuyāt
english: If Ketu is in the twelfth house from the "kārakāṃśa" (the Navāṃśa sign of the Ātmakāraka) and is conjoined with or aspected by auspicious planets, then indeed, final liberation (mokṣa) occurs, and the native attains the state of ultimate union.

sanskrit: मेषे धनुषि वा केतौ कारकांशात् व्यये स्थिते । शुभखेटेन सन्दृष्टे सायुजपदमाप्नुयात् ॥६६॥
transliteration: meṣe dhanuṣi vā ketau kārakāṃśāt vyaye sthite . śubhakheṭena sandṛṣṭe sāyujapadamāpnuyāt.
separated_sandhi: meṣe dhanuṣi vā ketau kārakāṃśāt vyaye sthiteśubhakheṭena sandṛṣṭe sāyujyapadam āpnuyāt
english: If Ketu is situated in the 12th house (vyaya) from the Kārakāṃśa lagna, either in Aries (Meṣa) or Sagittarius (Dhanuṣa), and is aspected by a benefic planet, the native attains the state of union (sāyujya).

sanskrit: व्यये च केवले केतौ पापयुक्तेक्षितेपि वा । न तदा जायते मुक्तिः शुभलोकं न पश्यति ॥६७॥
transliteration: vyaye ca kevale ketau pāpayuktekṣitepi vā . na tadā jāyate muktiḥ śubhalokaṃ na paśyati.
separated_sandhi: vyaye ca kevale ketau pāpayukte īkṣite api vāna tadā jāyate muktiḥ śubhalokam na paśyati
english: And if Ketu is merely situated alone in the 12th house (vyaya), or is conjoined with or aspected by a malefic (pāpa) planet, then liberation (mokṣa) does not occur, and the native does not perceive auspicious realms.

sanskrit: रविणा संयुते केतौ कारकांशाद् व्ययस्थिते । शिवभक्तिर्भवेस्यत्त निर्विशंकं द्विजोत्तम ॥६८॥
transliteration: raviṇā saṃyute ketau kārakāṃśād vyayasthite . śivabhaktirbhavesyatta nirviśaṃkaṃ dvijottama.
separated_sandhi: raviṇā saṃyute ketau kārakāṃśāt vyayasthiteśivabhaktiḥ bhavet tasya nirviśaṅkam dvijottama
english: O best among the twice-born (dvija)! When Ketu is conjoined with the Sun (Ravi) and situated in the 12th house (vyaya) from the Kārakāṃśa lagna, devotion (bhakti) to Shiva will undoubtedly be for that native.

sanskrit: चन्द्रेण संयुते केतौ कारकांशाद् व्ययस्थिते । गौर्यां भक्तिर्भवेत्तस्य शाक्तिको जायते नरः ॥६९॥
transliteration: candreṇa saṃyute ketau kārakāṃśād vyayasthite . gauryāṃ bhaktirbhavettasya śāktiko jāyate naraḥ.
separated_sandhi: candreṇa saṃyute ketau kārakāṃśāt vyayasthitegauryām bhaktiḥ bhavet tasya śāktikaḥ jāyate naraḥ
english: When Ketu is conjoined with the Moon (Candra) and situated in the 12th house (vyaya) from the Kārakāṃśa lagna, then devotion (bhakti) to Gaurī (Pārvatī) will be for that native, and he becomes a worshiper of the Divine Mother (śakti).

sanskrit: शुक्रेण संयुते केतौ कारकांशाद् व्ययस्थिते । लक्ष्म्यां सञ्जायते भक्तिर्जातको सौ समृद्धिमान् ॥७०॥
transliteration: śukreṇa saṃyute ketau kārakāṃśād vyayasthite . lakṣmyāṃ sañjāyate bhaktirjātako sau samṛddhimān.
separated_sandhi: śukreṇa saṃyute ketau kārakāṃśāt vyayasthitelakṣmyām sañjāyate bhaktiḥ jātakaḥ asau samṛddhimān
english: When Ketu is conjoined with Venus (Śukra) and situated in the 12th house (vyaya) from the Kārakāṃśa lagna, devotion (bhakti) to Lakṣmī arises, and that native becomes prosperous.

sanskrit: कुजेन संयुते केतौ स्कन्दभक्तौ भवेन्नरः । वैष्णवो बुधसौरिभ्यां गुरुणा शिवभक्तिमान् ॥७१॥
transliteration: kujena saṃyute ketau skandabhaktau bhavennaraḥ . vaiṣṇavo budhasauribhyāṃ guruṇā śivabhaktimān.
separated_sandhi: kujena saṃyute ketau skandabhaktau bhavet naraḥvaiṣṇavaḥ budhasauribhyām guruṇā śivabhaktimān
english: When Ketu is conjunct with Mars, a person becomes engaged in devotion to Skanda (bhakti). If Mercury and Saturn are together, he becomes a devotee of Vishnu. With Jupiter, he becomes a devotee of Shiva (bhaktimān).

sanskrit: राहुणा तामसीं दुर्गां सेवते क्षुद्रदेवताम् । भक्तिः स्कन्देऽथ हेरभ्भे शिखिना केवलेन वा ॥७२॥
transliteration: rāhuṇā tāmasīṃ durgāṃ sevate kṣudradevatām . bhaktiḥ skande'tha herabhbhe śikhinā kevalena vā.
separated_sandhi: rāhuṇā tāmasīm durgām sevate kṣudradevatāmbhaktiḥ skande atha herambhe śikhinā kevalena vā
english: When Rahu is present, one serves Tāmasī Durgā or other minor deities (kṣudradevatā). Devotion (bhakti) is for Skanda or Herambha (Gaṇeśa) if Ketu is alone.

sanskrit: कारकांशाद् व्यये सौरिः पापराशौ यदा भवेत् । तदाऽपि क्षुद्रदेवस्य भक्तिस्तस्य न संशयः ॥७३॥
transliteration: kārakāṃśād vyaye sauriḥ pāparāśau yadā bhavet . tadā'pi kṣudradevasya bhaktistasya na saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: kārakāṃśāt vyaye sauriḥ pāparāśau yadā bhavettadā api kṣudradevasya bhaktiḥ tasya na saṃśayaḥ
english: When Saturn (Sauri) is in the twelfth house (vyaya) from the Kārakaṃśa lagna and in a malefic sign (pāparāśi), then certainly his devotion (bhakti) is also directed towards minor deities (kṣudradeva); there is no doubt about this.

sanskrit: पापर्क्षेऽपि शनौ सुक्रे तदाऽपि क्षुद्रसेवकः । अमात्यकारकात् षष्ठेप्तेवमेव फलं वदेत् ॥७४॥
transliteration: pāparkṣe'pi śanau sukre tadā'pi kṣudrasevakaḥ . amātyakārakāt ṣaṣṭheptevameva phalaṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: pāparkṣe api śanau śukre tadā api kṣudrasevakaḥamātyakārakāt ṣaṣṭhe api evam eva phalam vadet
english: Even if Saturn and Venus are situated in a malefic constellation (pāparkṣa), then also a person becomes a servant of minor deities (kṣudrasevaka). One should declare the same outcome (phala) if the sixth house is calculated from the Amatyakāraka.

sanskrit: कारकांशात् त्रिकोणस्थे पापखेतद्वये द्विज । मानवो मन्त्रतन्त्रज्ञो जायते नाऽत्र संशयः ॥७५॥
transliteration: kārakāṃśāt trikoṇasthe pāpakhetadvaye dvija . mānavo mantratantrajño jāyate nā'tra saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: kārakāṃśāt trikoṇasthe pāpakhetadvaye dvijamānavaḥ mantratantrajñaḥ jāyate na atra saṃśayaḥ
english: O twice-born one (dvija), if two malefic planets (pāpakhetadvaya) are situated in a trine (trikoṇa) from the Kārakaṃśa, a person becomes knowledgeable in mantras (mantra) and tantras (tantra); there is no doubt about this.

sanskrit: पापेन वीक्षिते तत्र जातो निग्राहको भवेत् । शुभैर्निरीक्षिते तस्मिन् नरोऽनुग्राहको भवेत् ॥७६॥
transliteration: pāpena vīkṣite tatra jāto nigrāhako bhavet . śubhairnirīkṣite tasmin naro'nugrāhako bhavet.
separated_sandhi: pāpena vīkṣite tatra jātaḥ nigrāhakaḥ bhavetśubhaiḥ nirīkṣite tasmin naraḥ anugrāhakaḥ bhavet
english: When a planet or house is aspected by a malefic, the person born will become an oppressor or one who restrains. If it is aspected by benefics, that person will become a patron or one who favors.

sanskrit: शुक्रदृष्टे विधौ स्वांशे रसवादी भवेन्नरः । बुधदृष्टे च सद्वैद्यः सर्वरोगहरो भवेत् ॥७७॥
transliteration: śukradṛṣṭe vidhau svāṃśe rasavādī bhavennaraḥ . budhadṛṣṭe ca sadvaidyaḥ sarvarogaharo bhavet.
separated_sandhi: śukradṛṣṭe vidhau svāṃśe rasavādī bhavet naraḥbudhadṛṣṭe ca sat vaidyaḥ sarvarogaharaḥ bhavet
english: When the Moon is in its own Navāṃśa (swa-aṃśa) and aspected by Venus, the person becomes skilled in alchemy or medicinal preparations (rasavādī). And if that Moon is aspected by Mercury, the person becomes a good physician, capable of curing all diseases.

sanskrit: शुक्रदृष्टे सुखे चन्द्रे पाण्डुश्वित्री भवेन्नरः । भौमदृष्टे महारोगी रक्तपित्तार्दितो भवेत् ॥७८॥
transliteration: śukradṛṣṭe sukhe candre pāṇḍuśvitrī bhavennaraḥ . bhaumadṛṣṭe mahārogī raktapittārdito bhavet.
separated_sandhi: śukradṛṣṭe sukhe candre pāṇḍuśvitrī bhavet naraḥbhaumadṛṣṭe mahārogī raktapittārditaḥ bhavet
english: When the Moon is in the fourth house (sukha) and aspected by Venus, the person becomes afflicted with anemia (pāṇḍu) and vitiligo (śvitrī). If that Moon is aspected by Mars, the person becomes gravely ill, tormented by bleeding disorders (raktapitta).

sanskrit: केतुदृष्टे सुखे चंद्रे नीलकुष्ठी प्रजायते । चतुर्थे पञ्चमेवाऽहि स्थितौ राहुकुजौ यदि ॥७९॥
transliteration: ketudṛṣṭe sukhe caṃdre nīlakuṣṭhī prajāyate . caturthe pañcamevā'hi sthitau rāhukujau yadi.
separated_sandhi: ketudṛṣṭe sukhe candre nīlakuṣṭhī prajāyatecaturthe pañcame vā ahi sthitau rāhukujau yadi
english: When the Moon is in the fourth house (sukha) and aspected by Ketu, the person becomes afflicted with black leprosy. Furthermore, if Rāhu and Mars are situated in either the fourth or fifth house... (this condition continues into the next verse).

sanskrit: क्षयरोगो भवेत् तस्य चन्द्रदृष्टौ तु निश्चितः । स्वांशात् सुखे सुते वाऽपि केवलः संस्थितः कुजः ॥८०॥
transliteration: kṣayarogo bhavet tasya candradṛṣṭau tu niścitaḥ . svāṃśāt sukhe sute vā'pi kevalaḥ saṃsthitaḥ kujaḥ.
separated_sandhi: kṣayarogaḥ bhavet tasya candradṛṣṭau tu niścitaḥsvāṃśāt sukhe sute vā api kevalaḥ saṃsthitaḥ kujaḥ
english: ...then tuberculosis is certainly destined for that person if that combination (Rāhu and Mars in 4th/5th) is aspected by the Moon. Alternatively, if Mars is situated alone in the fourth or fifth house from its own Navāṃśa (swa-aṃśa)... (this condition continues into the next verse).

sanskrit: पिट्कादिर्भवेत् तस्य तदा रोगो न संशयः । ग्रहणी जलरोगो वा तत्र केतौ स्थिते सति ॥८१॥
transliteration: piṭkādirbhavet tasya tadā rogo na saṃśayaḥ . grahaṇī jalarogo vā tatra ketau sthite sati.
separated_sandhi: piṭkā-ādiḥ bhavet tasya tadā rogaḥ na saṃśayaḥgrahaṇī jalarogaḥ vā tatra ketau sthite sati
english: When Ketu is situated in that place, the person will undoubtedly suffer from diseases such as pimples, dysentery, or water-borne illnesses.

sanskrit: ख्वर्भानुगुलिकौ तत्र विषवैद्यो विषार्दितः । स्वांशकात् पञ्चमे भावे केवले संस्थिते शनौ ॥८२॥
transliteration: khvarbhānugulikau tatra viṣavaidyo viṣārditaḥ . svāṃśakāt pañcame bhāve kevale saṃsthite śanau.
separated_sandhi: khu arbhānu gulikau tatra viṣa-vaidyaḥ viṣa-arditaḥsvāṃśakāt pañcame bhāve kevale saṃsthite śanau
english: If the Sun, Rahu, Gulika, and Manda are present in that place, the native will be a poison expert or afflicted by poisons. When Saturn is situated alone in the fifth house from the Svāṃśa, (then...)

sanskrit: धनुर्विद्याविदा जाता भवन्त्यत्र न संशयः । केतौ च केवले तत्र घटिकायन्त्रकारकः ॥८३॥
transliteration: dhanurvidyāvidā jātā bhavantyatra na saṃśayaḥ . ketau ca kevale tatra ghaṭikāyantrakārakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: dhanurvidyā-vidā jātā bhavanti atra na saṃśayaḥketau ca kevale tatra ghaṭikā-yantra-kārakaḥ
english: When Saturn is situated alone, without a doubt, they become proficient in archery. And when Ketu is alone in that place (the fifth house from Svāṃśa), the native becomes a maker of water-clocks or time-measuring instruments.

sanskrit: बुधे परमहंसो वा दण्डी भवति मानवः । लोहयन्त्री तथा राहौ रवौ खेड्गधरो भवेत् ॥८४॥
transliteration: budhe paramahaṃso vā daṇḍī bhavati mānavaḥ . lohayantrī tathā rāhau ravau kheḍgadharo bhavet.
separated_sandhi: budhe paramahaṃsaḥ vā daṇḍī bhavati mānavaḥlohayantrī tathā rāhau ravau kheḍgadharaḥ bhavet
english: If Mercury is present (in the fifth house from Svāṃśa), the person becomes a supreme ascetic (paramahaṃsa) or an ascetic (daṇḍī) carrying a staff. Similarly, if Rahu is there, the native works with iron or machinery, and if the Sun is present, one becomes a sword-bearer.

sanskrit: केवले च कुजे तत्र जातः कुन्तास्त्रधारकः । स्वांशे वा पन्ऽचमे स्वांशाच्चन्द्रेज्यौ संस्थितौ तदा ॥८५॥
transliteration: kevale ca kuje tatra jātaḥ kuntāstradhārakaḥ . svāṃśe vā pan'came svāṃśāccandrejyau saṃsthitau tadā.
separated_sandhi: kevale ca kuje tatra jātaḥ kuntāstra-dhārakaḥ svāṃśevā pañcame svāṃśāt candrejyau saṃsthitau tadā
english: And when Mars (Kuja) is alone in that place (the fifth house from Svāṃśa), the native becomes a wielder of spears and other weapons. Alternatively, when the Moon and Jupiter are situated together in the fifth house from the Svāṃśa, then...

sanskrit: ग्रन्थकर्ता भवेज्जातः सर्वविद्याविशारदः । तत्र दैत्यगुरौ किञ्चिदूनग्रन्थकरो भवेत् ॥८६॥
transliteration: granthakartā bhavejjātaḥ sarvavidyāviśāradaḥ . tatra daityagurau kiñcidūnagranthakaro bhavet.
separated_sandhi: granthakartā bhavet jātaḥ sarvavidyāviśāradaḥtatra daityagurau kiñcit ūnagranthakaraḥ bhavet
english: A person becomes a scholar skilled in all branches of knowledge and an author. However, if the preceptor of demons (Śukra/Venus) occupies that specific position, the person will be an author of slightly fewer texts.

sanskrit: बुधे तत्र ततोऽप्यूनग्रन्थकर्त्ता प्रजायते । तत्र शुक्रे कविर्वाग्मी काव्यज्ञश्च प्रजायते ॥८७॥
transliteration: budhe tatra tato'pyūnagranthakarttā prajāyate . tatra śukre kavirvāgmī kāvyajñaśca prajāyate.
separated_sandhi: budhe tatra tataḥ api ūnagranthakartā prajāyatetatra śukre kaviḥ vāgmī kāvyajñaḥ ca prajāyate
english: If Mercury is in that position, one becomes an author of even fewer texts. If Venus is in that position, one becomes a poet, an eloquent speaker, and knowledgeable in poetry.

sanskrit: सर्वविद्ग्रान्थिको जीवे न वाग्मी च सभादिषु । शब्दज्ञश्च विशेषेण वेदवेदान्तवित् तथा ॥८८॥
transliteration: sarvavidgrānthiko jīve na vāgmī ca sabhādiṣu . śabdajñaśca viśeṣeṇa vedavedāntavit tathā.
separated_sandhi: sarvavit grānthikaḥ jīve na vāgmī ca sabhā-ādiṣuśabdajñaḥ ca viśeṣeṇa vedavedāntavit tathā
english: If Jupiter is in that position, the person becomes omniscient and a scholar of texts. However, they will not be an eloquent speaker in assemblies. They will, nonetheless, be particularly knowledgeable in grammar and also in the Vedas and Vedānta.

sanskrit: सभाजडो भवेद् बाल उक्तस्थानगते शनौ । मीमांसको भवेन्नूनमुक्तस्थानगते बुधे ॥८९॥
transliteration: sabhājaḍo bhaved bāla uktasthānagate śanau . mīmāṃsako bhavennūnamuktasthānagate budhe.
separated_sandhi: sabhājaḍaḥ bhavet bālaḥ uktasthānagate śanaumīmāṃsakaḥ bhavet nūnam uktasthānagate budhe
english: If Saturn is in the aforementioned position, the native becomes shy or hesitant in assemblies. If Mercury is in the aforementioned position, the native surely becomes a Mīmāṃsaka (an expert in scriptural interpretation).

sanskrit: स्वांशे वा पञ्चमे भौमे जातो नैयायिको भवेत् । चन्द्रे च सांख्ययोगज्ञः साहित्यज्ञश्च गायकः ॥९०॥
transliteration: svāṃśe vā pañcame bhaume jāto naiyāyiko bhavet . candre ca sāṃkhyayogajñaḥ sāhityajñaśca gāyakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: svāṃśe vā pañcame bhaume jātaḥ naiyāyikaḥ bhavetcandre ca sāṃkhyayogajñaḥ sāhityajñaḥ ca gāyakaḥ
english: If Mars is in its own Navāṃśa (a divisional chart) or in the fifth house, the native becomes a logician (naiyāyika). If the Moon is in that position, the native becomes knowledgeable in Sāṃkhya and (yoga) philosophies, literature, and also a singer.

sanskrit: रवौ वेदान्तविच्चैव गीतज्ञश्च प्रजायते । केतौ च गणितज्ञः स्याज्ज्योतिःशास्त्रविशारदः ॥९१॥
transliteration: ravau vedāntaviccaiva gītajñaśca prajāyate . ketau ca gaṇitajñaḥ syājjyotiḥśāstraviśāradaḥ.
separated_sandhi: ravau vedāntavit ca eva gītajñaḥ ca prajāyateketau ca gaṇitajñaḥ syāt jyotiḥśāstraviśāradaḥ
english: If the Sun is influential, a person becomes a knower of Vedānta and music. And if Ketu is influential, they become a mathematician and an expert in the science of astrology (jyotiḥśāstra).

sanskrit: सम्प्रदायस्य संसिद्धिर्गुरुसम्बन्धतो भवेत् । द्वितीये च तृतीये च स्वांशादेवं विचारयेत् ॥९२॥
transliteration: sampradāyasya saṃsiddhirgurusambandhato bhavet . dvitīye ca tṛtīye ca svāṃśādevaṃ vicārayet.
separated_sandhi: sampradāyasya saṃsiddhiḥ guru-sambandhataḥ bhavetdvitīye ca tṛtīye ca svāṃśāt evam vicārayet
english: The perfect accomplishment of a tradition (sampradāya) comes through connection with a spiritual teacher (guru). One should consider this principle in relation to the second and third houses from the Svāṃśa.

sanskrit: भावे सूक्ष्मफलं ज्ञात्वा जातकस्य फलं वदेत् । केतौ स्वांशाद्द्वितीये वा तृतीये स्तब्धवाग् भवेत् ॥९३॥
transliteration: bhāve sūkṣmaphalaṃ jñātvā jātakasya phalaṃ vadet . ketau svāṃśāddvitīye vā tṛtīye stabdhavāg bhavet.
separated_sandhi: bhāve sūkṣmaphalam jñātvā jātakasya phalam vadetketau svāṃśāt dvitīye vā tṛtīye stabdhvāc bhavet
english: Having understood the subtle results of a house (bhāva), one should declare the native's results. If Ketu is in the second or third house from the Svāṃśa, the person will have blocked speech.

sanskrit: पापदृष्टे विशेषेण मानवो वक्तुमक्षमः । स्वांशाल्लग्नात् पदाद्वाऽपि द्वितीयाष्टमभावयोः ॥९४॥
transliteration: pāpadṛṣṭe viśeṣeṇa mānavo vaktumakṣamaḥ . svāṃśāllagnāt padādvā'pi dvitīyāṣṭamabhāvayoḥ.
separated_sandhi: pāpadṛṣṭe viśeṣeṇa mānavaḥ vaktum akṣamaḥ svāṃśātlagnāt padāt vā api dvitīya-aṣṭama-bhāvayoḥ
english: If aspected by malefic planets, especially, a person becomes incapable of speech. This applies to the second and eighth houses from the Svāṃśa, Lagna, or even from the Pada.

sanskrit: केमद्रुमः पापसाम्ये चन्द्रदृष्टौ विशेषतः । अत्राऽध्याये च ये योगाः सफलाः कथिता मया ॥९५॥
transliteration: kemadrumaḥ pāpasāmye candradṛṣṭau viśeṣataḥ . atrā'dhyāye ca ye yogāḥ saphalāḥ kathitā mayā.
separated_sandhi: atra adhyāye ca ye yogāḥsa-phalāḥ kathitāḥ mayā
english: And in this chapter, whatever combinations (yogas) have been described by me are fruitful.

sanskrit: योगकर्तृदशायान्ते ज्ञेयाः सर्वे फलप्रदाः । एवं दशाप्रदाद्राशैर्द्वितीयाष्टमयोर्द्विज ॥९६॥
transliteration: yogakartṛdaśāyānte jñeyāḥ sarve phalapradāḥ . evaṃ daśāpradādrāśairdvitīyāṣṭamayordvija.
separated_sandhi: yogakartṛdaśānte jñeyāḥ sarve phalapradāḥ |evam daśāpradāt rāśaiḥ dvitīyāṣṭamayoḥ dvija
english: O twice-born (dvija), at the conclusion of the planetary period (dasha) of the planet that forms a (yoga), all planets are understood to grant their results. Similarly, from the dasha-giving sign, (planets) positioned in the second and eighth (houses) are also to be considered.

sanskrit: ग्रहसाम्ये च विज्ञेयो योगः केमद्रुमोऽशुभः । दशाप्रारम्भसमये सलग्नान् साधयेद् ग्रहान् ॥९७॥
transliteration: grahasāmye ca vijñeyo yogaḥ kemadrumo'śubhaḥ . daśāprārambhasamaye salagnān sādhayed grahān.
separated_sandhi: grahasāmye ca vijñeyaḥ yogaḥ kemadrumaḥ aśubhaḥ| daśāprārambhasamaye salagnān sādhayet grahān
english: And in a condition of planetary equality (graha-sāmye), the Kemadruma (yoga) is to be understood as inauspicious. At the time of the dasha's (planetary period's) commencement, one should determine the positions of the planets along with the ascendant (lagna).

sanskrit: ज्ञेयस्तत्रापि योगोऽयं पापसाम्येऽर्थरन्ध्रयोः । एवं तन्वादिभावानां सूर्यादीनां नभसदाम् ॥९८॥
transliteration: jñeyastatrāpi yogo'yaṃ pāpasāmye'rtharandhrayoḥ . evaṃ tanvādibhāvānāṃ sūryādīnāṃ nabhasadām.
separated_sandhi: jñeyaḥ tatra api yogaḥ ayam pāpasāmye artharandhrayoḥ| evam tanvādibhāvānām sūryādīnām nabhasadām
english: This planetary combination (yoga) is also to be known when malefic planets (pāpa) are in a state of similarity or equality (sāmye) in the second and eighth houses (artha-randrayoḥ). Similarly, regarding the houses (bhāvas) starting from the first (tanu), and the Sun and other celestial bodies (nabhasada)...

sanskrit: तत्तत्स्थित्यनुसारेण फलं वाच्यं विपश्चिता । इति संक्षेपतः प्रोक्तं कारकांशफलं मया ॥९९॥
transliteration: tattatsthityanusāreṇa phalaṃ vācyaṃ vipaścitā . iti saṃkṣepataḥ proktaṃ kārakāṃśaphalaṃ mayā.
separated_sandhi: tat-tat-sthityanusāreṇa phalam vācyam vipaścitā| iti saṃkṣepataḥ proktam kārakāṃśaphalam mayā
english: The wise (vipaścitā) should declare the results according to the respective positions (of the houses and planets mentioned). Thus, the results of the Karakamsa (division) have been briefly explained by me.

sanskrit: कारकांशवशादेवं फलं प्रोक्तं मया द्विज । अथ भावाधिपत्येन ग्रहयोगफलं स्रृणु ॥१॥
transliteration: kārakāṃśavaśādevaṃ phalaṃ proktaṃ mayā dvija . atha bhāvādhipatyena grahayogaphalaṃ srṛṇu.
separated_sandhi: kārakāṃśavaśāt evam phalam proktam mayā dvija| atha bhāvādhipatyena grahayogaphalam sṛṇu
english: O twice-born (dvija), thus have the results been declared by me in accordance with the Karakamsa (division). Now, listen (sṛṇu) to the results of planetary combinations (graha-yoga-phalam) derived from the lordship (adhipatya) of the houses (bhāvas).

sanskrit: केन्द्राधिपतयः सौम्या ना दिशन्ति शुभं फलम् । क्रूरा नैवाऽशुभं कुर्युः शुभदाश्च त्रिकोणपाः ॥२॥
transliteration: kendrādhipatayaḥ saumyā nā diśanti śubhaṃ phalam . krūrā naivā'śubhaṃ kuryuḥ śubhadāśca trikoṇapāḥ.
separated_sandhi: kendrādhipatayaḥ saumyāḥ na diśanti śubham phalamkrūrāḥ na eva aśubham kuryuḥ śubhadāḥ ca trikoṇapāḥ
english: Benefic planets that rule angular (kendra) houses do not yield auspicious results. Similarly, malefic planets (ruling angular houses) do not cause inauspiciousness. However, the rulers of trine (trikoṇa) houses are always givers of auspiciousness.

sanskrit: लग्नं केन्द्रत्रिकोणत्वाद् विशेषेण शुभप्रदम् । पञ्चमं नवमं चैव विशेषधनमुच्यते ॥३॥
transliteration: lagnaṃ kendratrikoṇatvād viśeṣeṇa śubhapradam . pañcamaṃ navamaṃ caiva viśeṣadhanamucyate.
separated_sandhi: lagnam kendratrikoṇatvāt viśeṣeṇa śubhapradaṃpañcamaṃ navamaṃ ca eva viśeṣadhanam ucyate
english: The Ascendant (lagna) is an especially auspicious giver due to its nature as both an angular (kendra) and a trine (trikoṇa) house. Moreover, the fifth and ninth houses are declared to be sources of special wealth.

sanskrit: सप्तमं दशमं चैव विशेषसुखमुच्यते । त्रिषडायाधिपाः सर्वे ग्रहाः पापफलाः स्मृताः ॥४॥
transliteration: saptamaṃ daśamaṃ caiva viśeṣasukhamucyate . triṣaḍāyādhipāḥ sarve grahāḥ pāpaphalāḥ smṛtāḥ.
separated_sandhi: saptamaṃ daśamaṃ ca eva viśeṣasukham ucyatetriṣaḍāyādhipāḥ sarve grahāḥ pāpaphalāḥ smṛtāḥ
english: The seventh and tenth houses are indeed declared to be sources of special happiness. All planets ruling the third, sixth, and eleventh houses are considered to give malefic results.

sanskrit: व्ययद्वितीयरन्ध्रेशाः साहचर्यात् फलप्रदाः । स्थानान्तरानुरोधात्ते प्रबलाश्चोत्तरोत्तरम् ॥५॥
transliteration: vyayadvitīyarandhreśāḥ sāhacaryāt phalapradāḥ . sthānāntarānurodhātte prabalāścottarottaram.
separated_sandhi: vyayadvitīyarandhreśāḥ sāhacaryāt phalapradāḥsthānāntarānurodhāt te prabalāḥ ca uttarottaram
english: The rulers of the twelfth (vyaya), second (dvitīya), and eighth (randhra) houses yield results due to their association (with other planets or houses). They (these rulers) become progressively more powerful in succession, based on the influence of other planetary positions.

sanskrit: तत्र भाग्यव्ययेशत्वाद्रन्ध्रेशो न शुभप्रदः । त्रिमदायाधिपत्वेऽथो कोणपत्वे तु सत्फलः ॥६॥
transliteration: tatra bhāgyavyayeśatvādrandhreśo na śubhapradaḥ . trimadāyādhipatve'tho koṇapatve tu satphalaḥ.
separated_sandhi: tatra bhāgyavyayeśatvāt randhreśaḥ na śubhapradaḥtrimadāyādhipatve atho koṇapatve tu satphalaḥ
english: In that regard, the ruler of the eighth house is not an auspicious giver, even if it also holds lordship over the houses of fortune (9th) and expenditure (12th). However, if it holds lordship over the third, seventh, and eleventh houses, or over a trine (trikoṇa) house, then it yields good results.

sanskrit: उक्तेष्वेषु बली योगो निर्बलस्य प्रबाधकः । न रन्ध्रेशत्वदोषोऽत्र सूर्याचन्द्रमसोर्भवेत् ॥७॥
transliteration: ukteṣveṣu balī yogo nirbalasya prabādhakaḥ . na randhreśatvadoṣo'tra sūryācandramasorbhavet.
separated_sandhi: ukteṣu eṣu balī yogaḥ nirbalasya prabādhakaḥ narandhreśatvadoṣaḥ atra sūryācandramasoḥ bhavet
english: Among the aforementioned planetary combinations (yoga), a strong combination (yoga) obstructs or overcomes a weak one. Here, the flaw of being the lord of the 8th house does not apply to the Sun and the Moon.

sanskrit: गुरुशुक्रौ शुभौ प्रोक्तौ चन्द्रो मध्यम उच्यते । उदासीनो बुधः ख्यातः पापा रव्यार्किभूमिजाः ॥८॥
transliteration: guruśukrau śubhau proktau candro madhyama ucyate . udāsīno budhaḥ khyātaḥ pāpā ravyārkibhūmijāḥ.
separated_sandhi: guruśukrau śubhau proktau candraḥ madhyamaḥ ucyateudāsīnaḥ budhaḥ khyātaḥ pāpāḥ ravyārkibhūmijāḥ
english: Jupiter and Venus are declared to be benefic planets. The Moon is considered to be of medium influence. Mercury is known as neutral, while the Sun, Saturn, and Mars are malefic.

sanskrit: पूर्णेन्दुज्ञेज्यशुक्राश्च प्रबला उत्तरोत्तरम् । क्षीणेन्द्वर्कार्किभूपुत्राः प्रबलाश्च यथोत्तरम् ॥९॥
transliteration: pūrṇendujñejyaśukrāśca prabalā uttarottaram . kṣīṇendvarkārkibhūputrāḥ prabalāśca yathottaram.
separated_sandhi: pūrṇendu-jña-ijya-śukrāḥ ca prabalāḥ uttarottaramkṣīṇendu-arka-ārki-bhūputrāḥ prabalāḥ ca yathottaram
english: The full Moon, Mercury, Jupiter, and Venus are successively more powerful (prabala). Similarly, the waning Moon, Sun, Saturn, and Mars are also successively more powerful (prabala).

sanskrit: केन्द्राधिपत्यदोषोयः शुभानां कथितो हि सः । चन्द्रज्ञगुरुशुक्राणां प्रबलाश्चोत्तरोत्तरम् ॥१०॥
transliteration: kendrādhipatyadoṣoyaḥ śubhānāṃ kathito hi saḥ . candrajñaguruśukrāṇāṃ prabalāścottarottaram.
separated_sandhi: kendrādhipatyadoṣaḥ yaḥ śubhānām kathitaḥ hi saḥcandrajñaguruśukrāṇām prabalāḥ ca uttarottaram
english: The flaw of being the lord of a quadrant (kendra) house, which is indeed stated for benefic planets, applies to them. Among the Moon, Mercury, Jupiter, and Venus, they are successively more powerful (prabala).

sanskrit: केन्द्रकोणपती स्यातां परस्परगृहोपगौ । एकभे द्वौ स्थितौ वापि ह्येकभेऽन्यतरः स्थितः ॥११॥
transliteration: kendrakoṇapatī syātāṃ parasparagṛhopagau . ekabhe dvau sthitau vāpi hyekabhe'nyataraḥ sthitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: kendrakoṇapatī syātām paraspara-gṛha-upagau ekabhedvau sthitau vā api hi ekabhe anyataraḥ sthitaḥ
english: The lords of a quadrant (kendra) house and a trine (koṇa) house should be located in each other's houses. Alternatively, both could be situated in the same sign, or indeed, one of them could be situated in the other's sign.

sanskrit: पूर्णदृष्ट्येक्षितौ वापि मिथो योगकारौ तदा । योगेऽस्मिन् जायते भूपो विख्यातो वा जनो भवेत् ॥१२॥
transliteration: pūrṇadṛṣṭyekṣitau vāpi mitho yogakārau tadā . yoge'smin jāyate bhūpo vikhyāto vā jano bhavet.
separated_sandhi: pūrṇadṛṣṭyā īkṣitau vā api mithaḥ yogakārau tadā |yoge asmin jāyate bhūpaḥ vikhyātaḥ vā janaḥ bhavet
english: If two (planets) are aspected by a full aspect, or if they mutually form a beneficial planetary combination (yoga), then a king or a famous person is born from this specific combination (yoga).

sanskrit: कोणेशत्वे यदैकस्य केन्द्रेशत्वं च जायते । केन्द्रे कोणे स्थितो वाऽसौ विशेषाद्योगकारकः ॥१३॥
transliteration: koṇeśatve yadaikasya kendreśatvaṃ ca jāyate . kendre koṇe sthito vā'sau viśeṣādyogakārakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: koṇeśatve yadā ekasya kendreśatvaṃ ca jāyate |kendre koṇe sthitaḥ vā asau viśeṣāt yogakārakaḥ
english: When a single planet possesses the lordship of both a trine house and an angle house, or if that planet is situated in either an angle house or a trine house, it particularly creates a beneficial planetary combination (yoga).

sanskrit: केन्द्रेशत्वेन पापानां या प्रोक्ता शुभकारिता । सा त्रिकोणाधिपत्येऽपि न केन्द्रेशत्वमात्रतः ॥१४॥
transliteration: kendreśatvena pāpānāṃ yā proktā śubhakāritā . sā trikoṇādhipatye'pi na kendreśatvamātrataḥ.
separated_sandhi: kendreśatvena pāpānāṃ yā proktā śubhakāritā | sātrikoṇa adhipatye api na kendreśatva mātrataḥ
english: The beneficence which is declared for malefic planets by virtue of their lordship over angle houses also applies through their lordship over trine houses; it is not solely due to their angle house lordship.

sanskrit: केन्द्रकोणाधिपावेव पापस्थानाधिपौ यदा । तयोः सम्बन्धमात्रेण न योगं लभते नरः ॥१५॥
transliteration: kendrakoṇādhipāveva pāpasthānādhipau yadā . tayoḥ sambandhamātreṇa na yogaṃ labhate naraḥ.
separated_sandhi: kendra koṇa adhipau eva pāpa sthāna adhipau yadā| tayoḥ sambandha mātreṇa na yogaṃ labhate naraḥ
english: When the very lords of the angle (kendra) and trine (koṇa) houses are also the lords of inauspicious houses (dusthanas), a person does not achieve a beneficial planetary combination (yoga) merely through their mutual connection.

sanskrit: यद्भावेशयुतौ वापि यद्यद्भावसमागतौ । तत्तत्फलानि प्रबलौ प्रदिशेतां तमोप्रहौ ॥१६॥
transliteration: yadbhāveśayutau vāpi yadyadbhāvasamāgatau . tattatphalāni prabalau pradiśetāṃ tamoprahau.
separated_sandhi: yat bhāva īśa yutau vā api yat yat bhāva samāgatāu| tat tat phalāni prabalau pra diśetāṃ tamaḥ grahau
english: Rahu and Ketu (tamograha), when strong, bestow the results of whichever house they are conjoined with, or whichever house they are situated in.

sanskrit: यदि केन्द्रे त्रिकोणे वा निवसेतां तमोग्रहौ । नाथेनात्यतरेणाढ्यौ दृष्टौ वा योगकारकौ ॥१७॥
transliteration: yadi kendre trikoṇe vā nivasetāṃ tamograhau . nāthenātyatareṇāḍhyau dṛṣṭau vā yogakārakau.
separated_sandhi: yadi kendre trikoṇe vā nivasetām tamograhaunāthena atyatareṇa āḍhyau dṛṣṭau vā yogakārakau
english: If the two shadow planets (Rahu and Ketu) reside in a Kendra (angular house) or a Trikona (trine house), being endowed by a very powerful house lord, or if they are aspected by planets that form auspicious combinations (yogakārakas)...

sanskrit: कस्मिल्लग्ने प्रजातस्य के ग्रहा योगकारकाः । के चाऽशुभप्रदाः खेटाः कृपया वदे मे मुने ॥१८॥
transliteration: kasmillagne prajātasya ke grahā yogakārakāḥ . ke cā'śubhapradāḥ kheṭāḥ kṛpayā vade me mune.
separated_sandhi: kasmin lagne prajātasya ke grahāḥ yogakārakāḥke ca aśubhapradāḥ kheṭāḥ kṛpayā vade me mune
english: O sage, please tell me, for a person born in which ascendant, which planets are benefactors (yogakārakas) and which planets are malefic-givers?

sanskrit: यथा पृष्टं त्वया विप्र तथोदाहरणं ब्रुवे । रन्ध्रेशत्वेऽपि भूपुत्रो भवेच्छूभसहायवान् ॥१९॥
transliteration: yathā pṛṣṭaṃ tvayā vipra tathodāharaṇaṃ bruve . randhreśatve'pi bhūputro bhavecchūbhasahāyavān.
separated_sandhi: yathā pṛṣṭam tvayā vipra tathā udāharaṇam bruverandhreśatve api bhūputraḥ bhavet śubhasahāyavān
english: O Brahmin, as you have asked, I will give an example. Even if Mars (bhūputra) is the lord of the eighth house (randhra), he may still be endowed with auspicious assistance.

sanskrit: मन्दसौम्यसिताः पापाः शुभौ गुरुदिवाकरौ । न शुभं योगमत्रेण प्रभवेच्छनिजीवयोः ॥२०॥
transliteration: mandasaumyasitāḥ pāpāḥ śubhau gurudivākarau . na śubhaṃ yogamatreṇa prabhavecchanijīvayoḥ.
separated_sandhi: manda saumya sitāḥ pāpāḥ śubhāu guru divākarāuna śubham yogam atreṇa prabhavet śanijīvayoḥ
english: Saturn (manda), Mercury (saumya), and Venus (sita) are malefic. Jupiter (guru) and the Sun (divākara) are benefic. However, no auspicious combination (yoga) is produced by Saturn and Jupiter together in this context.

sanskrit: पारतन्त्र्येण जीवस्य पापकर्मापि निश्चितम् । शुक्रः साक्षान्निहन्ता स्यान्मारकत्वेन लक्षितः ॥२१॥
transliteration: pāratantryeṇa jīvasya pāpakarmāpi niścitam . śukraḥ sākṣānnihantā syānmārakatvena lakṣitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: pāratantryeṇa jīvasya pāpakarma api niścitamśukraḥ sākṣāt nihantā syāt mārakatvena lakṣitaḥ
english: Due to Jupiter's (jīva) dependence or subjugation, even malefic effects (karma) are certain. Venus (śukra) would directly be a killer (nihantā), characterized by its nature as a death-inflicting planet (māraka).

sanskrit: मन्दादयोऽपि हन्तारो भवेयुः पापिनो ग्रहाः । मेषलग्नोद्भवस्यैवं फलं ज्ञेयं द्विजोत्तम ॥२२॥
transliteration: mandādayo'pi hantāro bhaveyuḥ pāpino grahāḥ . meṣalagnodbhavasyaivaṃ phalaṃ jñeyaṃ dvijottama.
separated_sandhi: mandādayaḥ api hantāraḥ bhaveyuḥ pāpinaḥ grahāḥ |meṣalagna udbhavasya evam phalaṃ jñeyam dvijottama
