english: O best among the twice-born (dvija), for a person born with Aries as the ascendant, even malefic planets like Saturn and others can become killers. This is how the results should be understood.

sanskrit: जीवशुक्रेन्दवः पापाः शुभौ शनिदिवाकरौ । राजयोगकरः सौरिर्बुधस्त्वल्पशुभप्रदः ॥२३॥
transliteration: jīvaśukrendavaḥ pāpāḥ śubhau śanidivākarau . rājayogakaraḥ saurirbudhastvalpaśubhapradaḥ.
separated_sandhi: jīva śukra indavaḥ pāpāḥ śubhau śani divākarau |rājayoga karaḥ sauriḥ budhaḥ tu alpa śubha pradaḥ
english: For one born with Aries as the ascendant, Jupiter, Venus, and the Moon are considered malefic planets. Saturn (sauri) and the Sun are auspicious. Saturn (sauri) is a bestower of royal association (rājayoga), and Mercury provides only slight auspiciousness.

sanskrit: जीवादयो कुजश्चापि सन्ति मारकलक्षणाः । वृषलग्नोद्भवस्यैवं फलान्यूह्यानि सूरिभिः ॥२४॥
transliteration: jīvādayo kujaścāpi santi mārakalakṣaṇāḥ . vṛṣalagnodbhavasyaivaṃ phalānyūhyāni sūribhiḥ.
separated_sandhi: jīva ādayaḥ kujaḥ ca api santi mārakalakṣaṇāḥ |vṛṣalagna udbhavasya evam phalāni ūhyāni sūribhiḥ
english: Jupiter and other planets, including Mars, possess the characteristics of killer planets (māraka). Therefore, these results should be inferred by scholars (sūri) for a person born with Taurus as the ascendant.

sanskrit: भौमजीवारुणाः पापाः एक एव कविः सुभः । शनैश्चरणे जीवस्य योगो मेषभवो यथा ॥२५॥
transliteration: bhaumajīvāruṇāḥ pāpāḥ eka eva kaviḥ subhaḥ . śanaiścaraṇe jīvasya yogo meṣabhavo yathā.
separated_sandhi: bhauma jīva aruṇāḥ pāpāḥ ekaḥ eva kaviḥ subhaḥ| śanaiścaraṇe jīvasya yogaḥ meṣabhavaḥ yathā
english: Mars, Jupiter, and the Sun are malefic planets. Only Venus is auspicious. The combination (yoga) of Saturn and Jupiter is similar to how it is for the Aries ascendant.

sanskrit: शशी मुखनिहन्ताऽसौ साहचर्याच्च पाकदः । द्वन्द्वलग्नोद्भवस्यैवं फलान्यूह्यानि पंडितैः ॥२६॥
transliteration: śaśī mukhanihantā'sau sāhacaryācca pākadaḥ . dvandvalagnodbhavasyaivaṃ phalānyūhyāni paṃḍitaiḥ.
separated_sandhi: śaśī mukha nihantā asau sāhacaryāt ca pāka daḥ |dvandva lagna udbhavasya evam phalāni ūhyāni paṇḍitaiḥ
english: For a person born with Gemini as the ascendant, the Moon is the primary killer (māraka), and by association, it yields specific results. Thus, these results should be inferred by the learned (paṇḍita).

sanskrit: भार्गवेन्दुसुतौ पापौ भूसुतेज्येन्दवः शुभाः । पूर्णयोगकरः साक्षान्मंगलो मंगलप्रदः ॥२७॥
transliteration: bhārgavendusutau pāpau bhūsutejyendavaḥ śubhāḥ . pūrṇayogakaraḥ sākṣānmaṃgalo maṃgalapradaḥ.
separated_sandhi: bhārgavendustau pāpau bhūsutejyendavaḥ śubhāḥpūrṇayogakaraḥ sākṣāt maṅgalaḥ maṅgalapradaḥ
english: Venus and Mercury are considered malefic. Mars, Jupiter, and the Moon are benefic. Mars (maṅgala) himself is directly the bestower of complete auspicious combinations (yoga) and welfare.

sanskrit: निहन्ताऽर्कसुतोऽर्कस्तु साहचर्यात् फलप्रदः । कर्कलग्नोद्भवस्यैवं फलं प्रोक्तं मनीषिभिः ॥२८॥
transliteration: nihantā'rkasuto'rkastu sāhacaryāt phalapradaḥ . karkalagnodbhavasyaivaṃ phalaṃ proktaṃ manīṣibhiḥ.
separated_sandhi: nihantā arkasutaḥ arkaḥ tu sāhacaryāt phalapradaḥkarkalagnodbhavasya evam phalam proktam manīṣibhiḥ
english: Saturn (arka-suta) is the killer. However, the Sun (arka) becomes a bestower of results through association. Thus, for those born in the Cancer ascendant, these effects are declared by the wise.

sanskrit: सौम्यशुक्रार्कजाः पापाः कुजेज्यार्काः शुभावहाः । प्रभवेद्योगमात्रेण न शुभं गुरुशुक्रयोः ॥२९॥
transliteration: saumyaśukrārkajāḥ pāpāḥ kujejyārkāḥ śubhāvahāḥ . prabhavedyogamātreṇa na śubhaṃ guruśukrayoḥ.
separated_sandhi: saumyaśukrārkajāḥ pāpāḥ kujejyārkāḥ śubhāvahāḥprabhavet yogamātreṇa na śubham guruśukrayoḥ
english: For Leo ascendant, Mercury, Venus, and Saturn are malefic. Mars, Jupiter, and the Sun are benefic. However, auspiciousness (śubhaṃ) for Jupiter (guru) and Venus (śukra) may not manifest merely by their association (yoga-mātreṇa).

sanskrit: मारकस्तु शनिश्चन्द्रः साहचर्यात् फलप्रदः । सिंहलग्ने प्रजातस्य फलं ज्ञेयं विपश्चिता ॥३०॥
transliteration: mārakastu śaniścandraḥ sāhacaryāt phalapradaḥ . siṃhalagne prajātasya phalaṃ jñeyaṃ vipaścitā.
separated_sandhi: mārakaḥ tu śaniḥ candraḥ sāhacaryāt phalapradaḥsiṃhalagne prajātasya phalam jñeyam vipaścitā
english: Saturn (śani) and the Moon (candra) are death-inflicting (māraka) planets. Yet, through association, they can also bestow other results. For one born in the Leo ascendant, these effects should be known by the wise.

sanskrit: कुजजीवेन्दवः पापाः बुधशुक्रौ शुभावहौ । भार्गवेन्दुसुतावेव भवेतां योगकारकौ ॥३१॥
transliteration: kujajīvendavaḥ pāpāḥ budhaśukrau śubhāvahau . bhārgavendusutāveva bhavetāṃ yogakārakau.
separated_sandhi: kujajīvendavaḥ pāpāḥ budhaśukrau śubhāvahaubhārgavendustau eva bhavetām yogakārakau
english: Mars, Jupiter, and the Moon are malefic. Mercury and Venus are benefic. Indeed, Venus (Bhārgava) and Mercury (Indu-suta) alone become the bestowers of auspicious combinations (yoga-kāraka).

sanskrit: मारकोऽपि कविः सूर्यः साहचर्यफलप्रदः । कन्यालग्नोद्भवस्यैवं फलान्यूह्यानि सूरिभिः ॥३२॥
transliteration: mārako'pi kaviḥ sūryaḥ sāhacaryaphalapradaḥ . kanyālagnodbhavasyaivaṃ phalānyūhyāni sūribhiḥ.
separated_sandhi: mārakaḥ api kaviḥ sūryaḥ sāhacaryaphalapradaḥkanyālagna udbhavasya evam phalāni ūhyāni sūribhiḥ
english: Even Venus (kavi) and the Sun (sūrya), when acting as "māraka" planets, yield results based on their association. Similarly, wise astrologers should deduce the effects for individuals born with a Virgo (kanyālagna) ascendant.

sanskrit: जीवार्कभूसुताः पापाः शनैश्चरबुधौ शुभौ । भवेतां राजयोगस्य कारकौ चन्द्रतत्सुतौ ॥३३॥
transliteration: jīvārkabhūsutāḥ pāpāḥ śanaiścarabudhau śubhau . bhavetāṃ rājayogasya kārakau candratatsutau.
separated_sandhi: jīva arka bhūsutāḥ pāpāḥ śanaiścara budhau śubhāubhavetām rājayogasya kārakau candra tatsutāu
english: Jupiter (jīva), the Sun (arka), and Mars (bhūsuta) are malefic. Saturn (śanaiścara) and Mercury (budha) are benefic. The Moon (candra) and its son (Mercury) become the significators (kāraka) of a royal combination (rājayoga).

sanskrit: कुजो निहन्ति जीवाद्याः पापा मारकलक्षणाः । शुक्रः समः फलान्येवं विज्ञेयानि तुलोद्भवे ॥३४॥
transliteration: kujo nihanti jīvādyāḥ pāpā mārakalakṣaṇāḥ . śukraḥ samaḥ phalānyevaṃ vijñeyāni tulodbhave.
separated_sandhi: kujaḥ nihanti jīva ādyāḥ pāpāḥ māraka lakṣaṇāḥśukraḥ samaḥ phalāni evam vijñeyāni tulā udbhave
english: For those born with a Libra (tulā) ascendant, Mars (kuja) destroys the malefic qualities, such as "māraka" characteristics, of Jupiter (jīva) and other similar planets. Venus (śukra) is considered neutral (sama). Thus, these effects should be understood.

sanskrit: सितज्ञशनयः पापाः शुभौ गुरुनिशाकरौ । सूर्याचन्द्रमसावेव भवेतां योगकारकौ ॥३५॥
transliteration: sitajñaśanayaḥ pāpāḥ śubhau guruniśākarau . sūryācandramasāveva bhavetāṃ yogakārakau.
separated_sandhi: sita jña śanayaḥ pāpāḥ śubhāu guru niśākarausūrya candramasau eva bhavetām yogakārakau
english: For this ascendant, Venus (sita), Mercury (jña), and Saturn (śani) are considered malefic (pāpāḥ). Jupiter (guru) and the Moon (niśākara) are benefic (śubhāu). The Sun (sūrya) and the Moon (candramas) alone become the significators (kāraka) of a royal combination (yoga).

sanskrit: कुजः समः सिताद्याश्च पापा मारकलक्षणाः । एवं फलं च विज्ञेयं वृश्चिकोदयजन्मनः ॥३६॥
transliteration: kujaḥ samaḥ sitādyāśca pāpā mārakalakṣaṇāḥ . evaṃ phalaṃ ca vijñeyaṃ vṛścikodayajanmanaḥ.
separated_sandhi: kujaḥ samaḥ sita ādyāḥ ca pāpāḥ māraka lakṣaṇāḥevam phalam ca vijñeyam vṛścika udaya janmanaḥ
english: Mars (kuja) is considered neutral (sama). Venus (sita) and other similar planets are malefic (pāpāḥ) and possess "māraka" characteristics. Thus, these effects should be understood for individuals born with a Scorpio (vṛścika) ascendant.

sanskrit: एक एव कविः पापः शुभौ भौमदिवाकरौ । योगो भास्करसौम्याभ्यां निहन्ता भास्करात्मजः ॥३७॥
transliteration: eka eva kaviḥ pāpaḥ śubhau bhaumadivākarau . yogo bhāskarasaumyābhyāṃ nihantā bhāskarātmajaḥ.
separated_sandhi: ekaḥ eva kaviḥ pāpaḥ śubhau bhaumadivākarauyogaḥ bhāskarasauumyābhyām nihantā bhāskarātmajaḥ
english: For those born in Sagittarius ascendant, only Venus is malefic. Mars and the Sun are benefics. The planetary combination (yoga) of the Sun and Mercury is favorable. Saturn, the son of the Sun, is a death-inflictor.

sanskrit: गुरुः समफलः ख्यातः शुक्रो मारकलक्षणः । धनुर्लग्नोद्भवस्यैवं फलं ज्ञेयं विपश्चिता ॥३८॥
transliteration: guruḥ samaphalaḥ khyātaḥ śukro mārakalakṣaṇaḥ . dhanurlagnodbhavasyaivaṃ phalaṃ jñeyaṃ vipaścitā.
separated_sandhi: guruḥ samaphalaḥ khyātaḥ śukraḥ mārakalakṣaṇaḥdhanurlagnodbhavasya evam phalam jñeyam vipaścitā
english: Jupiter is known to give mixed results. Venus has the characteristics of a death-inflictor. Thus, a wise person should understand these results for one born in Sagittarius ascendant.

sanskrit: कुजजीवेन्दवः पापाः शुभौ भार्गवचन्द्रजौ । मन्दः स्वयं न हन्ता स्याद् हन्ति पापाः कुजादयः ॥३९॥
transliteration: kujajīvendavaḥ pāpāḥ śubhau bhārgavacandrajau . mandaḥ svayaṃ na hantā syād hanti pāpāḥ kujādayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: kujajīvendavaḥ pāpāḥ śubhau bhārgavacandrajaumandaḥ svayam na hantā syāt hanti pāpāḥ kujādayaḥ
english: For those born in Capricorn ascendant, Mars, Jupiter, and the Moon are malefic. Venus and Mercury are benefics. Saturn itself is not a death-inflictor. Instead, the malefics such as Mars inflict death.

sanskrit: सूर्यः समफलः प्रोक्तः कविरेकः सुयोगकृत् । मृगलग्नोद्भवस्यैवं फलान्यूह्यानि सूरिभिः ॥४०॥
transliteration: sūryaḥ samaphalaḥ proktaḥ kavirekaḥ suyogakṛt . mṛgalagnodbhavasyaivaṃ phalānyūhyāni sūribhiḥ.
separated_sandhi: sūryaḥ samaphalaḥ proktaḥ kaviḥ ekaḥ suyogakṛtmṛgalagnodbhavasya evam phalāni ūhyāni sūribhiḥ
english: The Sun is declared to give mixed results. Only Venus creates auspicious planetary combinations (yoga). Thus, these results for one born in Capricorn ascendant should be inferred by the wise.

sanskrit: जीवचन्द्रकुजाः पापाः शुक्रसूर्यात्मजौ शुभौ । राजयोगकरो ज्ञेजः कविरेव बृहस्पतिः ॥४१॥
transliteration: jīvacandrakujāḥ pāpāḥ śukrasūryātmajau śubhau . rājayogakaro jñejaḥ kavireva bṛhaspatiḥ.
separated_sandhi: jīvacandrakujāḥ pāpāḥ śukrasūryātmajau śubhaurājayogakaraḥ jñejaḥ kaviḥ eva bṛhaspatiḥ
english: For those born in Aquarius ascendant, Jupiter, the Moon, and Mars are malefic. Venus and Saturn (the son of the Sun) are benefics. Only Venus and Jupiter are to be known as creators of royal yogas.

sanskrit: सूर्यो भौमश्च हन्तारो बुधो मध्यफलः स्मृतः । कुम्भलग्नोद् भवस्यैवं फलान्यूह्यानि सूरिभिः ॥४२॥
transliteration: sūryo bhaumaśca hantāro budho madhyaphalaḥ smṛtaḥ . kumbhalagnod bhavasyaivaṃ phalānyūhyāni sūribhiḥ.
separated_sandhi: sūryaḥ bhaumaḥ ca hantāraḥ budhaḥ madhyaphalaḥ smṛtaḥkumbhalagnodbhavasya evam phalāni ūhyāni sūribhiḥ
english: For an individual born with an Aquarius ascendant, the Sun and Mars are considered planetary killers, and Mercury is said to produce moderate effects. Thus, the wise should infer the results accordingly.

sanskrit: मन्दशुक्रांशुमत्सौम्याः पापा भौमविधू शुभौ । महीसुतगुरू योगकारकौ च महीसुतः ॥४३॥
transliteration: mandaśukrāṃśumatsaumyāḥ pāpā bhaumavidhū śubhau . mahīsutagurū yogakārakau ca mahīsutaḥ.
separated_sandhi: mandaśukrāṃśumatsaumyāḥ pāpā bhaumavidhūśubhāu mahīsutagurū yogakārakau ca mahīsutaḥ
english: For the Pisces ascendant: Saturn, Venus, the Sun, and Mercury are considered malefic planets (pāpāḥ). Mars and the Moon are benefics (śubhāu). Mars and Jupiter are powerful agents for auspicious combinations (yogakārakau), and Mars itself is also a significant agent for auspicious combinations.

sanskrit: मारकोऽपि न हन्ताऽसौ मन्दज्ञौ मारकौ स्मृतौ । मीनलग्नोद् भवस्यैवं फलानि परिचिन्तयेत् ॥४४॥
transliteration: mārako'pi na hantā'sau mandajñau mārakau smṛtau . mīnalagnod bhavasyaivaṃ phalāni paricintayet.
separated_sandhi: mārakaḥ api na hantā asau mandajñāu mārakau smṛtaumīnalagnodbhavasya evam phalāni paricintayet
english: For an individual born with a Pisces ascendant: Even though Mars can be a killer planet (māraka), it is not considered the primary destroyer (hantā). Saturn and Mercury, however, are considered killer planets (mārakau). Thus, one should carefully reflect on these planetary influences to determine the results.

sanskrit: एवं भावाधिपत्येन जन्मलग्नवशादिह । शुभत्वमशुभत्व च ग्रहाणां प्रतिपादितम् ॥४५॥
transliteration: evaṃ bhāvādhipatyena janmalagnavaśādiha . śubhatvamaśubhatva ca grahāṇāṃ pratipāditam.
separated_sandhi: evam bhāvādhipatyena jamalagnavaśāt ihaśubhatvam aśubhatvam ca grahāṇām pratipāditam
english: In this manner, the auspicious and inauspicious nature of planets has been established here, based on their lordship over houses and according to the influence of the birth ascendant.

sanskrit: अत्यानपि पुनर्योगान् नाभसादीन् विचिन्त्य वै । देहिना च फलं वाच्यं प्रवक्ष्यामि च तानहम् ॥४६॥
transliteration: atyānapi punaryogān nābhasādīn vicintya vai . dehinā ca phalaṃ vācyaṃ pravakṣyāmi ca tānaham.
separated_sandhi: atyān api punaḥ yogān nābhasādīn vicintya vaidehinām ca phalam vācyam pravakṣyāmi ca tān aham
english: Furthermore, having thoroughly considered various other astrological combinations (yogān), including the Nābhasa Yogas, the results for embodied beings (dehinām) should certainly be predicted. And I will now explain those combinations.

sanskrit: अधुना नाभसा योगाः कथ्यन्ते द्विजसत्तम । द्वात्रिंशात् तत्प्रभेदास्तु शतघ्नाष्टादशोन्मिताः ॥१॥
transliteration: adhunā nābhasā yogāḥ kathyante dvijasattama . dvātriṃśāt tatprabhedāstu śataghnāṣṭādaśonmitāḥ.
separated_sandhi: adhunā nābhasāḥ yogāḥ kathyante dvijasattama |dvātriṃśāt tatprabhedāḥ tu śataghnāṣṭādaśonmitāḥ
english: O best among the twice-born (dvija), now the celestial (nābhasa) combinations (yoga) are being described. Their thirty-two main classifications indeed amount to eighteen hundred varieties.

sanskrit: आश्रयाख्यास्त्रयो योगाः दलसंज्ञं द्वयं ततः । आकृतिर्विशतिः संख्याः सप्त योगाः प्रकीर्तिताः ॥२॥
transliteration: āśrayākhyāstrayo yogāḥ dalasaṃjñaṃ dvayaṃ tataḥ . ākṛtirviśatiḥ saṃkhyāḥ sapta yogāḥ prakīrtitāḥ.
separated_sandhi: āśrayākhyāḥ trayaḥ yogāḥ dalasaṃjñam dvayam tataḥ| ākṛtiḥ viṃśatiḥ saṃkhyāḥ sapta yogāḥ prakīrtitāḥ
english: Three combinations (yoga) are known as Ashraya (āśraya). Thereafter, two are known as Dala (dala). Twenty are Akriti (ākṛti), and seven are Sankhya (saṃkhyā) combinations (yoga); thus they are declared.

sanskrit: रज्जुश्च मुसलश्चैव नलश्चेत्याश्रयास्त्रयः । मालाख्यः सर्पसंज्ञश्च दलयोगौ प्रकीर्तितौ ॥३॥
transliteration: rajjuśca musalaścaiva nalaścetyāśrayāstrayaḥ . mālākhyaḥ sarpasaṃjñaśca dalayogau prakīrtitau.
separated_sandhi: rajjuḥ ca musalaḥ ca eva nalaḥ ca iti āśrayāḥ trayaḥ| mālākhyaḥ sarpasaṃjñaḥ ca dalayogau prakīrtitau
english: Rajju (rajju), Musala (musala), and Nala (nala) – these three are the Ashraya (āśraya) combinations (yoga). The two Dala (dala) combinations (yoga) are declared as Mala (mālā) and Sarpa (sarpa).

sanskrit: गदाख्यः शकटाख्यश्च स्रृङ्गाटकविहंगसौ । हलवज्रयवाश्चैव कमलं वापियूपकौ ॥४॥
transliteration: gadākhyaḥ śakaṭākhyaśca srṛṅgāṭakavihaṃgasau . halavajrayavāścaiva kamalaṃ vāpiyūpakau.
separated_sandhi: gadākhyaḥ śakaṭākhyaḥ ca sṛṅgāṭakavihaṃgasau| halavajrayavāḥ ca eva kamalam vāpiyūpakau
english: The combinations (yoga) named Gada (gada), Shakata (śakaṭa), Shringataka (śṛṅgāṭaka), and Vihaṃga (vihaṃga) [are listed]. Also, Hala (hala), Vajra (vajra), Yava (yava), Kamala (kamala), Vāpi (vāpi), and Yūpa (yūpa) [are likewise mentioned].

sanskrit: शरशक्तिदण्डनौकाकूटच्छत्रध्नूंषि च । अर्धचन्द्रस्तु चक्रं च समुद्रश्चेति विंशतिः ॥५॥
transliteration: śaraśaktidaṇḍanaukākūṭacchatradhnūṃṣi ca . ardhacandrastu cakraṃ ca samudraśceti viṃśatiḥ.
separated_sandhi: śaraśaktidaṇḍanaukākūṭacchtradhnūṃṣi ca |ardhacandraḥ tu cakram ca samudraḥ ca iti viṃśatiḥ
english: Shara (śara), Shakti (śakti), Daṇḍa (daṇḍa), Naukā (naukā), Kūṭa (kūṭa), Chatra (chatra), and Dhanuṣ (dhanuṣ) [are listed]. Indeed, Ardha-candra (ardhacandra), Cakra (cakra), and Samudra (samudra) – thus these twenty (yoga) are.

sanskrit: संख्याख्यावल्लकीदामपाशकेदारशूलकाः । युगो गोलश्च सप्तैते युक्ता दन्तमिता द्विज ॥६॥
transliteration: saṃkhyākhyāvallakīdāmapāśakedāraśūlakāḥ . yugo golaśca saptaite yuktā dantamitā dvija.
separated_sandhi: saṃkhyākhyā vallakī dāma pāśa kedāra śūlakāḥyugaḥ golaḥ ca sapta ete yuktā dantamitā dvija
english: O twice-born (dvija)! The yoga formations named Saṃkhyākhyā, Vallakī, Dāma, Pāśa, Kedāra, Śūlaka, Yuga, and Gola - these seven [specific yoga formations] are considered associated with the number thirty-two (dantamitā).

sanskrit: सर्वैश्चरे स्थितै रज्जुः स्थिरस्थैर्मुसलः स्मृतः । नलाख्यो द्विस्वभावस्थैराश्रयाख्या इमे स्मृताः ॥७॥
transliteration: sarvaiścare sthitai rajjuḥ sthirasthairmusalaḥ smṛtaḥ . nalākhyo dvisvabhāvasthairāśrayākhyā ime smṛtāḥ.
separated_sandhi: sarvaiḥ care sthitaiḥ rajjuḥ sthirasthaiḥ musalaḥ smṛtaḥnalākhyaḥ dvi-svabhāva-sthaiḥ āśrayākhyāḥ ime smṛtāḥ
english: When all planets are situated in movable signs, the Rajju (Rope) yoga is formed. When all [planets] are situated in fixed signs, the Musala (Pestle) yoga is declared. When all [planets] are situated in dual (dvisvabhāva) signs, the yoga named Nala (Reed) is formed. These are known as the Āśraya (Placement) yogas.

sanskrit: केन्द्रत्रयगतैः सौम्यैः पापैर्वा दलसंज्ञकौ । क्रमान्मालाभुजंगाख्यौ शुभाशुभफलप्रदौ ॥८॥
transliteration: kendratrayagataiḥ saumyaiḥ pāpairvā dalasaṃjñakau . kramānmālābhujaṃgākhyau śubhāśubhaphalapradau.
separated_sandhi: kendratrayagataiḥ saumyaiḥ pāpaiḥ vā dalasaṃjñakaukramāt mālābhujaṃgākhyau śubhāśubhaphalapradau
english: When benefic planets are situated in any three kendras (angles), the Mālā (Garland) yoga is formed. When malefic planets are situated in any three kendras, the Bhujaṅga (Serpent) yoga is formed. These two formations are known as Dala yogas, and they grant auspicious or inauspicious results respectively.

sanskrit: आसन्नकेन्द्रद्वयगैः सर्वैर्योगो गदाह्वयः । शकटं लग्नजायास्थैः खाम्बुगैर्विहगः स्मृतः ॥९॥
transliteration: āsannakendradvayagaiḥ sarvairyogo gadāhvayaḥ . śakaṭaṃ lagnajāyāsthaiḥ khāmbugairvihagaḥ smṛtaḥ.
separated_sandhi: āsannakendradvayagaiḥ sarvaiḥ yogaḥ gadāhvayaḥśakaṭam lagnajāyāsthaiḥ khāmbugaiḥ vihagaḥ smṛtaḥ
english: When all planets are situated in two adjacent kendras (angles), the yoga named Gadā (Mace) is formed. The Śakaṭa (Cart) yoga is declared when [all planets] are situated in the Lagna (Ascendant) and Jāyā (7th house). The Vihaga (Bird) yoga is remembered when [all planets] are situated in Kha (10th house) and Ambu (4th house).

sanskrit: योगः स्रृङ्गाटकं नाम लग्नात्मजतपःस्थितैः । अन्यस्थानात् त्रिकोणस्थैः सर्वैर्योगो हलाभिघः ॥१०॥
transliteration: yogaḥ srṛṅgāṭakaṃ nāma lagnātmajatapaḥsthitaiḥ . anyasthānāt trikoṇasthaiḥ sarvairyogo halābhighaḥ.
separated_sandhi: yogaḥ sṛṅgāṭakam nāma lagna-ātma-ja-tapaḥ-sthitaiḥanyasthānāt trikoṇasthaiḥ sarvaiḥ yogaḥ halābhighaḥ
english: The yoga (yoga) named Śṛṅgāṭaka is formed when all planets are situated in the Lagna (Ascendant), Ātmaja (5th house), and Tapas (9th house). When all planets are situated in houses that are trine (trikoṇa) from some other reference house, the yoga named Hala (Plough) is formed.

sanskrit: लग्नजायास्थितैः सौम्यैः पापाख्यैः खाऽम्बुसंस्थितैः । योगो वज्राभिधः प्रोक्तः वीपरीतस्थितैर्यवः ॥११॥
transliteration: lagnajāyāsthitaiḥ saumyaiḥ pāpākhyaiḥ khā'mbusaṃsthitaiḥ . yogo vajrābhidhaḥ proktaḥ vīparītasthitairyavaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagna-jāyā-sthitaiḥ saumyaiḥ pāpa-ākhyaiḥ kha-ambu-saṃsthitaiḥyogaḥ vajra-abhidhaḥ proktaḥ viparīta-sthitaiḥ yavaḥ
english: When benefics are situated in the Ascendant (lagna) and the seventh house, and malefics are situated in the tenth and fourth houses, this planetary combination (yoga) is declared to be the Vajra yoga. Conversely, if planets are situated in the opposite manner (malefics in the Ascendant and seventh, benefics in the tenth and fourth), it is called Yava yoga.

sanskrit: सर्वकेन्द्रगतैः सर्वैर्मिश्रैः कमलसंज्ञकः । केन्द्रादन्यत्रगैः सर्वैर्योगो वापीसमाह्वयः ॥१२॥
transliteration: sarvakendragataiḥ sarvairmiśraiḥ kamalasaṃjñakaḥ . kendrādanyatragaiḥ sarvairyogo vāpīsamāhvayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: sarva-kendra-gataiḥ sarvaiḥ miśraiḥ kamala-saṃjñakaḥkendrāt anyatra-gaiḥ sarvaiḥ yogaḥ vāpī-samāhvayaḥ
english: When all planets, being of mixed (benefic and malefic) nature, are situated in all the angular houses (kendras), the planetary combination (yoga) is named Kamala. When all planets are situated in houses other than the kendras, the yoga is named Vāpī.

sanskrit: यूपो लग्नाच्चतुर्भस्थैः शरस्तुर्याच्चतुर्भगैः । शक्तिर्मदाच्चतुर्भस्थैर्दण्डो मध्याच्चतुर्भगैः ॥१३॥
transliteration: yūpo lagnāccaturbhasthaiḥ śarasturyāccaturbhagaiḥ . śaktirmadāccaturbhasthairdaṇḍo madhyāccaturbhagaiḥ.
separated_sandhi: yūpaḥ lagnāt catur-bha-sthitaiḥśaraḥ turyāt catur-bha-gaiḥśaktiḥ madāt catur-bha-sthitaiḥdaṇḍaḥ madhyāt catur-bha-gaiḥ
english: The Yūpa yoga is formed by planets situated in four successive houses starting from the Ascendant (lagna). The Śara yoga is formed by planets in four successive houses starting from the fourth house. The Śakti yoga is formed by planets in four successive houses starting from the seventh house (mada). The Daṇḍa yoga is formed by planets in four successive houses starting from the tenth house (madhya).

sanskrit: लग्नात् सप्तमगैनौ का कूटस्तुर्याच्च सप्तमैः । छत्राख्यः सप्तमादेवं चापं मध्याद् भसप्तगैः ॥१४॥
transliteration: lagnāt saptamagainau kā kūṭasturyācca saptamaiḥ . chatrākhyaḥ saptamādevaṃ cāpaṃ madhyād bhasaptagaiḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagnāt saptamagaiḥ naukā kūṭaḥ turyāt ca saptamaiḥchatra-ākhyaḥ saptamāt evam cāpam madhyāt bha-saptagaiḥ
english: When planets are situated in seven successive houses starting from the Ascendant (lagna), it is Naukā yoga. When planets are situated in seven successive houses starting from the fourth house, it is Kūṭa yoga. Similarly, when planets are in seven successive houses starting from the seventh house, it is called Chatra yoga. When planets are in seven successive houses starting from the tenth house (madhya), it is Cāpa yoga.

sanskrit: लग्नादेकान्तरस्थैश्च षड्भगैश्चक्रमुच्यते । धनादेकान्तरस्थैस्तु समुद्रः षडगृहाश्रितै ॥१५॥
transliteration: lagnādekāntarasthaiśca ṣaḍbhagaiścakramucyate . dhanādekāntarasthaistu samudraḥ ṣaḍagṛhāśritai.
separated_sandhi: lagnāt eka-antara-sthitaiḥ ca ṣaḍ-bhagaiḥ cakram ucyatedhanāt eka-antara-sthitaiḥ tu samudraḥ ṣaḍ-gṛha-āśritaiḥ
english: When planets are situated in six houses with one intervening house vacant, starting from the Ascendant (lagna), this is called Cakra yoga. But when planets are situated in six houses with one intervening house vacant, starting from the second house (dhana), this is called Samudra yoga.

sanskrit: एकराशिस्थितैर्गोलो युगाख्यो द्विभसंस्थितैः । शूलस्तु त्रिभगैः प्रोक्तः केदारस्तु चतुर्भगैः ॥१६॥
transliteration: ekarāśisthitairgolo yugākhyo dvibhasaṃsthitaiḥ . śūlastu tribhagaiḥ proktaḥ kedārastu caturbhagaiḥ.
separated_sandhi: ekarāśisthitaiḥ golaḥ yuga ākhyaḥ dvibhasaṃsthitaiḥśūlaḥ tu tribhagaiḥ proktaḥ kedāraḥ tu caturbhagaiḥ
english: A Gola (yoga) is formed by planets situated in one zodiacal sign. The Yuga (yoga) is known when planets are situated in two signs. Śūla is declared when planets are in three signs, and Kedāra when they are in four signs.

sanskrit: पञ्चराशिस्थतैः पाशा दामाख्यः षड्गृहाश्रितैः । वीन्>आ सप्तभगैः सर्वैर्विहायान्यानुदीरितान् ॥१७॥
transliteration: pañcarāśisthataiḥ pāśā dāmākhyaḥ ṣaḍgṛhāśritaiḥ . vīn>ā saptabhagaiḥ sarvairvihāyānyānudīritān.
separated_sandhi: pañcarāśisthitaiḥ pāśā dāmākhyaḥ ṣaṭgṛhāśritaiḥvīṇā saptabhagaiḥ sarvaiḥ vihāya anyān udīritān
english: Pāśa (yoga) is formed by planets situated in five zodiacal signs. The Dāma (yoga) is named when planets occupy six signs. The Vīṇā (yoga) is formed by all planets occupying seven signs, excluding those (yogas) already mentioned.

sanskrit: अटनप्रियाः सुरूपाः परदेशस्वास्थ्यभागिनो मनुजाः । क्रूराः खलस्वभावा रज्जुप्रभवाः सदा कथिताः ॥१८॥
transliteration: aṭanapriyāḥ surūpāḥ paradeśasvāsthyabhāgino manujāḥ . krūrāḥ khalasvabhāvā rajjuprabhavāḥ sadā kathitāḥ.
separated_sandhi: aṭanapriyāḥ surūpāḥ paradeśasvāsthyabhāginaḥ manujāḥkrūrāḥ khalasvabhāvāḥ rajjuprabhavāḥ sadā kathitāḥ
english: People born under the Rajju (yoga) are always said to be fond of wandering, good-looking, and enjoying well-being in foreign lands. They are also cruel and of wicked nature.

sanskrit: मानज्ञानधनाद्यैर्युक्ता भूपप्रियाः ख्याताः । बहुपुत्राः स्थिरचित्ता मुसलसमुत्था भवन्ति नराः ॥१९॥
transliteration: mānajñānadhanādyairyuktā bhūpapriyāḥ khyātāḥ . bahuputrāḥ sthiracittā musalasamutthā bhavanti narāḥ.
separated_sandhi: mānajñānadhanādyaiḥ yuktāḥ bhūpapriyāḥ khyātāḥbahuputrāḥ sthiracittāḥ musalasamutthāḥ bhavanti narāḥ
english: People born under the Musala (yoga) are endowed with respect, knowledge, wealth, and other good qualities. They are favored by rulers, renowned, have many sons, and possess steady minds.

sanskrit: न्यूनातिरिक्तदेहा धनसञ्चयभागिनोऽतिनिपुणाश्च । बन्धुहिताश्च सुरूपा नलयोगे सम्प्रसूयन्ते ॥२०॥
transliteration: nyūnātiriktadehā dhanasañcayabhāgino'tinipuṇāśca . bandhuhitāśca surūpā nalayoge samprasūyante.
separated_sandhi: nyūnātiriktadehāḥ dhanasañcayabhāginaḥ atinipuṇāḥca bandhuhitāḥ ca surūpāḥ nalayoge samprasūyante
english: Those born under the Nala (yoga) have deficient or excessive bodies, accumulate wealth, are very skilled, beneficial to relatives, and are good-looking.

sanskrit: नित्यं सुखप्रधाना वाहनवस्त्रान्नभोगसम्पन्ना । कान्ता सुबहुस्त्रीका मालायां सम्प्रसूताः स्युः ॥२१॥
transliteration: nityaṃ sukhapradhānā vāhanavastrānnabhogasampannā . kāntā subahustrīkā mālāyāṃ samprasūtāḥ syuḥ.
separated_sandhi: nityam sukhapradhānā vāhanavastrānnabhogasampannākāntā subahustrīkā mālāyām samprasūtāḥ syuḥ
english: Those born in the Mālā (Garland) Yoga are always primarily happy, possessing vehicles, clothes, food, and various enjoyments. They have a charming wife and many women.

sanskrit: वुषमाः क्रूरा निःस्वा नित्यं दुःखार्दिताः सुदीनाश्च । परभक्षपाननिरताः सर्पप्रभवा भवन्ति नराः ॥२२॥
transliteration: vuṣamāḥ krūrā niḥsvā nityaṃ duḥkhārditāḥ sudīnāśca . parabhakṣapānaniratāḥ sarpaprabhavā bhavanti narāḥ.
separated_sandhi: viṣamāḥ krūrāḥ niḥsvāḥ nityam duḥkhārditāḥ sudīnāḥ caparabhakṣapānaniratāḥ sarpaprabhavāḥ bhavanti narāḥ
english: People born in the Sarpa (Snake) Yoga are wicked, cruel, and destitute. They are always afflicted by sorrow, very miserable, and constantly intent on consuming others' food and drink.

sanskrit: सततोद्युक्तार्थवशा यज्वानः शास्त्रगेयकुशलाश्च । धनकनकरत्नसम्पत्संयुक्ता मानवा गदायां तु ॥२३॥
transliteration: satatodyuktārthavaśā yajvānaḥ śāstrageyakuśalāśca . dhanakanakaratnasampatsaṃyuktā mānavā gadāyāṃ tu.
separated_sandhi: satatodyuktārthavaśāḥ yajvānaḥ śāstrageyakuśalāḥ cadhanakanakaratnasampatsaṃyuktāḥ mānavāḥ gadāyām tu
english: Those born in the Gadā (Mace) Yoga are always intent on acquiring wealth, perform Vedic Vedic rituals (yajña), and are skilled in scriptures and singing. Furthermore, they are endowed with riches, gold, and jewels.

sanskrit: रोगार्ताः कुनखा मूर्खाः शकटानुजीविनो निःस्वा । मित्रस्वजनविहीनाः शकटे जाता भवन्ति नराः ॥२४॥
transliteration: rogārtāḥ kunakhā mūrkhāḥ śakaṭānujīvino niḥsvā . mitrasvajanavihīnāḥ śakaṭe jātā bhavanti narāḥ.
separated_sandhi: rogārtāḥ kunakhāḥ mūrkhāḥ śakaṭaanujīvinaḥ niḥsvāḥmitrasvajanavihīnāḥ śakaṭe jātāḥ bhavanti narāḥ
english: People born in the Śakaṭa (Cart) Yoga are afflicted by disease, have disfigured nails, are foolish, and are destitute, earning their livelihood through carts. They are also devoid of friends and relatives.

sanskrit: भ्रमणरुचयोविकृष्टा दूताः सुरतानुजीवनो धृष्टाः । कलहप्रियाश्च नित्यं विहगे योगे सदा जाताः ॥२५॥
transliteration: bhramaṇarucayovikṛṣṭā dūtāḥ suratānujīvano dhṛṣṭāḥ . kalahapriyāśca nityaṃ vihage yoge sadā jātāḥ.
separated_sandhi: bhramaṇarucayaḥ avikṛṣṭāḥ dūtāḥ suratānujīvinaḥdhṛṣṭāḥ kalahapriyāḥ ca nityam vihage yoge sadā jātāḥ
english: Those born in the Vihaga (Bird) Yoga are fond of roaming and not easily deterred, serving as messengers. They subsist through sexual activities, are impudent, and are always quarrelsome.

sanskrit: प्रियकलहाः समरसहाः सुखिनो नृपतेः शुभकलत्राः । आढ्या युवतिद्वेष्याः स्रृङ्गाटकसम्भवा मनुजाः ॥२६॥
transliteration: priyakalahāḥ samarasahāḥ sukhino nṛpateḥ śubhakalatrāḥ . āḍhyā yuvatidveṣyāḥ srṛṅgāṭakasambhavā manujāḥ.
separated_sandhi: priyakalahāḥ samarasahāḥ sukhinaḥ nṛpateḥ śubhkalatrāḥāḍhyāḥ yuvatidveṣyāḥ śṛṅgāṭakasambhavāḥ manujāḥ
english: People born under the "śṛṅgāṭaka" configuration are fond of arguments, enduring in conflict, happy, possess good wives befitting a ruler, are wealthy, and are disliked by young women.

sanskrit: बह्वाशिनो दरिद्राः कृषीवला दुःखिताश्च सोद्वेगा । बन्धुसुहृदिभः त्यक्ताः प्रेष्याः हलसंज्ञके सदा पुरुषाः ॥२७॥
transliteration: bahvāśino daridrāḥ kṛṣīvalā duḥkhitāśca sodvegā . bandhusuhṛdibhaḥ tyaktāḥ preṣyāḥ halasaṃjñake sadā puruṣāḥ.
separated_sandhi: bahvāśinaḥ daridrāḥ kṛṣīvalāḥ duḥkhitāḥ ca sodvegāḥbandhusuhṛdbhiḥ tyaktāḥ preṣyāḥ halasaṃjñake sadā puruṣāḥ
english: Men born under the "Hala" configuration (yoga) are always heavy eaters, poor, farmers, distressed and anxious, abandoned by their relatives and friends, and become servants.

sanskrit: आद्यन्तवयःसुखिनः शूराः सुभगा निरीहाश्चः । भाग्यविहीना वज्रे जाताः खला विरुद्धाश्च ॥२८॥
transliteration: ādyantavayaḥsukhinaḥ śūrāḥ subhagā nirīhāścaḥ . bhāgyavihīnā vajre jātāḥ khalā viruddhāśca.
separated_sandhi: ādyantavayaḥsukhinaḥ śūrāḥ subhagāḥ nirīhāḥ cabhāgyavihīnāḥ vajre jātāḥ khalāḥ viruddhāḥ ca
english: Those born under the "vajra" configuration are happy in the early and later stages of life, brave, fortunate, and free from desire; however, they are also unlucky, wicked, and antagonistic.

sanskrit: व्रतनियममङ्गलपरा वयसो मध्ये सुखार्थपुत्रयुता । दातारः स्थिरचित्ता यवयोगभवाः सदा पुरुषाः ॥२९॥
transliteration: vrataniyamamaṅgalaparā vayaso madhye sukhārthaputrayutā . dātāraḥ sthiracittā yavayogabhavāḥ sadā puruṣāḥ.
separated_sandhi: vrataniyamamaṅgalaparāḥ vayasaḥ madhye sukhārthaputrayutāḥdātāraḥ sthiracittāḥ yavayogabhavāḥ sadā puruṣāḥ
english: Men born under the "yava" configuration (yoga) are always dedicated to vows, regulations, and auspicious practices; they are endowed with happiness, wealth, and sons in the middle of their lives; and they are generous and stable-minded.

sanskrit: विभवगुणाद्ग्।याः पुरुषाः स्थिरायुषो विपुलकीर्तय शुद्धाः । शुभशतकाः पृथ्वीशाः कमलभवाः मानवा नित्यम् ॥३०॥
transliteration: vibhavaguṇādg.yāḥ puruṣāḥ sthirāyuṣo vipulakīrtaya śuddhāḥ . śubhaśatakāḥ pṛthvīśāḥ kamalabhavāḥ mānavā nityam.
separated_sandhi: vibhavaguṇāḍhyāḥ puruṣāḥ sthirāyuṣaḥ vipulakīrtayaḥśuddhāḥ śubhaśatakāḥ pṛthvīśāḥ kamalabhavāḥ mānavāḥ nityam
english: Human beings born under the "kamala" configuration (yoga) are always abundant in wealth and virtues, long-lived, of extensive renown, pure, possess hundreds of auspicious qualities, and become rulers of the earth.

sanskrit: निधिकरणे निपुणधियः स्थिरार्थसुखसंयुता सुतयुताश्च । नयनसुखसम्प्रहृष्टा वापीयोगेन राजानः ॥३१॥
transliteration: nidhikaraṇe nipuṇadhiyaḥ sthirārthasukhasaṃyutā sutayutāśca . nayanasukhasamprahṛṣṭā vāpīyogena rājānaḥ.
separated_sandhi: nidhikaraṇe nipuṇadhiyaḥ sthirārthasukhasaṃyutāsutayutāḥ ca nayanasukhasamprahṛṣṭāḥ vāpīyogena rājānaḥ
english: Those born under the "vāpīyoga" (planetary combination) become kings who are adept in managing treasuries, endowed with lasting prosperity and happiness, blessed with sons, and delighted by pleasant sights.

sanskrit: आत्मविदिज्यानिरतः स्त्रिया युतः सत्त्वसम्पन्नः । व्रतनियमरतमनुस्यो यूपे जातो विशिष्टश्च ॥३२॥
transliteration: ātmavidijyānirataḥ striyā yutaḥ sattvasampannaḥ . vrataniyamaratamanusyo yūpe jāto viśiṣṭaśca.
separated_sandhi: ātmavidijyānirataḥ striyā yutaḥ sattvasampannaḥvrataniyamaratamanusyaḥ yūpe jātaḥ viśiṣṭaḥ ca
english: A person born under the "yūpa yoga" (planetary combination) is distinguished, a knower of the self (ātman) who is devoted to rituals, accompanied by his wife, endowed with virtuous qualities, and dedicated to vows and observances.

sanskrit: इषुकारा बन्धनपाः मृगयाधनसेविताश्च मंसादा । हिंस्राः कुशिल्पकाराः शरयोगे मानवाः प्रसूयन्ते ॥३३॥
transliteration: iṣukārā bandhanapāḥ mṛgayādhanasevitāśca maṃsādā . hiṃsrāḥ kuśilpakārāḥ śarayoge mānavāḥ prasūyante.
separated_sandhi: iṣukārāḥ bandhanapāḥ mṛgayādhanasevitāḥ ca maṃsādāḥhiṃsrāḥ kuśilpakārāḥ śarayoge mānavāḥ prasūyante
english: Those born under the "śara yoga" (planetary combination) become arrow-makers, jailers, hunters who earn wealth from the chase, flesh-eaters, violent individuals, and artisans of ignoble crafts.

sanskrit: धनरहितविफलदुःखितनीचलसाश्चिरायुषः पुरुषाः । संग्रामबुद्धिनिपुणाः शक्त्यां जाताः स्थिराः शुभगाः ॥३४॥
transliteration: dhanarahitaviphaladuḥkhitanīcalasāścirāyuṣaḥ puruṣāḥ . saṃgrāmabuddhinipuṇāḥ śaktyāṃ jātāḥ sthirāḥ śubhagāḥ.
separated_sandhi: dhanarahita viphala duḥkhita nīcalasāḥ cirāyuṣaḥ puruṣāḥsaṃgrāmabuddhinipuṇāḥ śaktyām jātāḥ sthirāḥ śubhagāḥ
english: Men born under the "śakti yoga" (planetary combination) are long-lived, firm, fortunate, and skilled in battle strategies. However, they can also be devoid of wealth, unsuccessful, unhappy, lowly, and lazy.

sanskrit: हतपुत्रदारनिःस्वाः सर्वत्र च निर्धृंणाः स्वजनबाह्याः । दुःखितनीचप्रेष्या दण्डप्र्भवा भवन्ति नराः ॥३५॥
transliteration: hataputradāraniḥsvāḥ sarvatra ca nirdhṛṃṇāḥ svajanabāhyāḥ . duḥkhitanīcapreṣyā daṇḍaprbhavā bhavanti narāḥ.
separated_sandhi: hataputradāraniḥsvāḥ sarvatra ca nirdhṛṇāḥ svajanabāhyāḥduḥkhitanīcapreṣyāḥ daṇḍaprabhavāḥ bhavanti narāḥ
english: Men born under the "daṇḍa yoga" (planetary combination) become those whose children and wives are lost, destitute, merciless everywhere, ostracized by their own relatives, and miserable, lowly servants.

sanskrit: सलिलोपजीविविभवाः बह्वाशाः ख्यातकीर्तयो दुष्टाः । कृपणा मलिना लुब्धा नौसञ्जाताः खलाः पुरुषाः ॥३६॥
transliteration: salilopajīvivibhavāḥ bahvāśāḥ khyātakīrtayo duṣṭāḥ . kṛpaṇā malinā lubdhā nausañjātāḥ khalāḥ puruṣāḥ.
separated_sandhi: salilopajīvivibhavāḥ bahvāśāḥ khyātakīrtayaḥ duṣṭāḥkṛpaṇāḥ malināḥ lubdhāḥ nausañjātāḥ khalāḥ puruṣāḥ
english: Men connected to boats or living by water are wealthy, possess many desires, are well-known, wicked, miserly, impure, greedy, and malicious.

sanskrit: अनृतकथनबन्धनपा निष्किञ्चनाः शठाः क्रूराः । कूटसमुत्था नित्यं भवन्ति गिरिदुर्गवासिनो मनुजाः ॥३७॥
transliteration: anṛtakathanabandhanapā niṣkiñcanāḥ śaṭhāḥ krūrāḥ . kūṭasamutthā nityaṃ bhavanti giridurgavāsino manujāḥ.
separated_sandhi: anṛtakathanabandhanapāḥ niṣkiñcanāḥ śaṭhāḥ krūrāḥkūṭasamutthāḥ nityaṃ bhavanti giridurgavāsinaḥ manujāḥ
english: Men who live in mountain fortresses are always prone to false statements and imprisonment, destitute, deceitful, cruel, and originate from deception.

sanskrit: स्वजनाश्रयो दयावान्नानानृपवल्लभः प्रकृष्टमतिः । प्रथमेऽन्त्ये वयसि नराः सुखवान् दीर्घायुरातपत्री स्यात् ॥३८॥
transliteration: svajanāśrayo dayāvānnānānṛpavallabhaḥ prakṛṣṭamatiḥ . prathame'ntye vayasi narāḥ sukhavān dīrghāyurātapatrī syāt.
separated_sandhi: svajanāśrayaḥ dayāvān nānānṛpavallabhaḥ prakṛṣṭamatiḥprathame antye vayasi narāḥ sukhavān dīrghāyuḥ ātatpatrī syāt
english: A man who provides support to his relatives, is compassionate, a favorite of various kings, and possesses excellent intellect, will be happy, long-lived, and enjoy high status (symbolized by an umbrella) during the initial and final periods of his life.

sanskrit: आनृतिकगुप्तपालाश्चोराः कितवाश्च कानने निरताः । कार्मुकयोगे जाता भाग्यविहीनाः शुभा वयोमध्ये ॥३९॥
transliteration: ānṛtikaguptapālāścorāḥ kitavāśca kānane niratāḥ . kārmukayoge jātā bhāgyavihīnāḥ śubhā vayomadhye.
separated_sandhi: ānṛtikaguptapālāḥ ca corāḥ kitavāḥ ca kānane niratāḥkārmukayoge jātāḥ bhāgyavihīnāḥ śubhā vayomadhye
english: Those born in a "kārmuka yoga" are liars, secret guards, thieves, and gamblers, who are engaged in forests. They are unfortunate, but experience good fortune in middle age.

sanskrit: सेनापतयः सर्वी कान्तशरीरा नृपप्रिया बलिनः । मणिकनकभूषणयुता भवन्ति योगेऽर्धचन्द्राख्ये ॥४०॥
transliteration: senāpatayaḥ sarvī kāntaśarīrā nṛpapriyā balinaḥ . maṇikanakabhūṣaṇayutā bhavanti yoge'rdhacandrākhye.
separated_sandhi: senāpatayaḥ sarvī kāntaśarīrāḥ nṛpapriyāḥ balinaḥmaṇikanakabhūṣaṇayutāḥ bhavanti yoge ardhacandrākhye
english: Those born in the "ardhacandra" (half-moon) yoga become accomplished army commanders. They possess attractive physiques, are favored by kings, are powerful, and are adorned with gem and gold ornaments.

sanskrit: प्रणताऽऽशेषनराधिपकिरीटरत्नप्रभास्फुरितपादः । भवति नरेन्द्रो मनुजश्चक्रे यो जायते योगे ॥४१॥
transliteration: praṇatā''śeṣanarādhipakirīṭaratnaprabhāsphuritapādaḥ . bhavati narendro manujaścakre yo jāyate yoge.
separated_sandhi: praṇatāśeṣanarādhipakirīṭaratnaprabhāsphuritapādaḥbhavati narendraḥ manujaḥ cakre yaḥ jāyate yoge
english: A person who is born in the Cakra (astrological) conjunction (yoga) becomes a supreme ruler (narendra), whose feet radiate with the brilliance of the jewels from the crowns of all prostrating kings.

sanskrit: बहुरत्नधनसमृद्धा भोगयुता धनजनप्रियाः ससुता । उदधिसमुत्थाः पुरुषाः स्थिरविभवाः साधुशीलाश्च ॥४२॥
transliteration: bahuratnadhanasamṛddhā bhogayutā dhanajanapriyāḥ sasutā . udadhisamutthāḥ puruṣāḥ sthiravibhavāḥ sādhuśīlāśca.
separated_sandhi: bahuratnadhanasamṛddhāḥ bhogayutāḥ dhanajanapriyāḥ sasutāḥudadhisamutthāḥ puruṣāḥ sthiravibhavāḥ sādhuśīlāḥ ca
english: Men (puruṣa) born under the 'ocean-born' configuration (udadhisamutthāḥ) are endowed with abundant jewels and wealth, enjoy various pleasures, are beloved by affluent people, have children, possess lasting prosperity, and exhibit virtuous character.

sanskrit: प्रियगीतनृत्यवाद्या निपुणाः सुखिनश्च धनवन्तः । नेतारो बहुभृत्या वीणायां कीर्तिताः पुरुषाः ॥४३॥
transliteration: priyagītanṛtyavādyā nipuṇāḥ sukhinaśca dhanavantaḥ . netāro bahubhṛtyā vīṇāyāṃ kīrtitāḥ puruṣāḥ.
separated_sandhi: priyagītanṛtyavādyāḥ nipuṇāḥ sukhinaḥ ca dhanavantaḥnetāraḥ bahubhṛtyāḥ vīṇāyām kīrtitāḥ puruṣāḥ
english: Men (puruṣa) who are said to be born in the Vīṇā (astrological) configuration are fond of singing, dancing, and musical instruments; they are skilled, happy, wealthy, leaders, and possess many servants.

sanskrit: दाम्नि सुजनोपकारी नयधनयुक्तो महेश्वरः ख्यातः । बहुसुतरत्नसमृद्धो धीरो जायेत विद्वांश्च ॥४४॥
transliteration: dāmni sujanopakārī nayadhanayukto maheśvaraḥ khyātaḥ . bahusutaratnasamṛddho dhīro jāyeta vidvāṃśca.
separated_sandhi: dāmni sujanopakārī nayadhanayuktaḥ maheśvaraḥ khyātaḥbahusutaratnasamṛddhaḥ dhīraḥ jāyeta vidvān ca
english: A person born in the Dāman (astrological) configuration is a benefactor of good people, endowed with prudence and wealth, a renowned great lord (maheśvara), rich with many sons and jewels, brave, and learned.

sanskrit: पाशे बन्धनभाजः कार्ये दक्षाः प्रपञ्चकाराश्च । बहुभाषिणो विशीला बहुभृत्याः सम्प्रतानाश्च ॥४५॥
transliteration: pāśe bandhanabhājaḥ kārye dakṣāḥ prapañcakārāśca . bahubhāṣiṇo viśīlā bahubhṛtyāḥ sampratānāśca.
separated_sandhi: pāśe bandhanabhājaḥ kārye dakṣāḥ prapañcakārāḥ cabahubhāṣiṇaḥ viśīlāḥ bahubhṛtyāḥ sampratānāḥ ca
english: Those born in the Pāśa (astrological) configuration are prone to imprisonment, adept in their tasks, and deceitful. They are talkative, of ill-character, have many servants, and are widely known.

sanskrit: सुबहूनामुपयोज्याः कृषीवलाः सत्यवादिनः सुखिनः । केदारे सम्भूताश्चलस्वभावा धनैर्युक्ताः ॥४६॥
transliteration: subahūnāmupayojyāḥ kṛṣīvalāḥ satyavādinaḥ sukhinaḥ . kedāre sambhūtāścalasvabhāvā dhanairyuktāḥ.
separated_sandhi: subahūnām upayojyāḥ kṛṣīvalāḥ satyavādinaḥ sukhinaḥkedāre sambhūtāḥ calasvabhāvāḥ dhanaiḥ yuktāḥ
english: Farmers, who are truthful and happy, are useful to many. Those born in a cultivated field are fickle-natured and endowed with wealth.

sanskrit: तीक्ष्णालसधनहीना हिंस्राः सुबहिष्कृता महाशूराः । संग्रामे लब्धयशा शूले योगे भवन्ति नराः ॥४७॥
transliteration: tīkṣṇālasadhanahīnā hiṃsrāḥ subahiṣkṛtā mahāśūrāḥ . saṃgrāme labdhayaśā śūle yoge bhavanti narāḥ.
separated_sandhi: tīkṣṇālasadhanahīnāḥ hiṃsrāḥ subahiṣkṛtāḥ mahāśūrāḥsaṃgrāme labdhayaśāḥ śūle yoge bhavanti narāḥ
english: When born in a Śūla (astrological) combination (yoga), people are fierce, lazy, devoid of wealth, violent, utterly rejected, and yet great heroes who attain fame in battle.

sanskrit: पाखण्डवादिनो वा धनरहिता वा बहिष्कृता लोके । सुतमातृधर्मरहिता युगयोगे ये नरा जाताः ॥४८॥
transliteration: pākhaṇḍavādino vā dhanarahitā vā bahiṣkṛtā loke . sutamātṛdharmarahitā yugayoge ye narā jātāḥ.
separated_sandhi: pākhaṇḍavādinaḥ vā dhanarahitāḥ vā bahiṣkṛtāḥ lokesutamātṛdharmarahitāḥ yugayoge ye narāḥ jātāḥ
english: Those who are born in a Yuga (astrological) combination (yoga) are either hypocrites, or poor, or outcasted in the world, and are devoid of the dutiful conduct (dharma) expected of a son and mother.

sanskrit: बलसंयुक्ता विधना वद्याविज्ञानवर्जिता मलिना । नित्यं दुःखितदीना गोले योगे भवन्ति नराः ॥४९॥
transliteration: balasaṃyuktā vidhanā vadyāvijñānavarjitā malinā . nityaṃ duḥkhitadīnā gole yoge bhavanti narāḥ.
separated_sandhi: balasaṃyuktāḥ vidhanāḥ vadyāvijñānavarjitāḥ malināḥnityaṃ duḥkhitadīnāḥ gole yoge bhavanti narāḥ
english: When born in a Gola (astrological) combination (yoga), people are endowed with strength, yet they are poor, devoid of specific knowledge, impure, and always miserable and distressed.

sanskrit: सर्वास्वपि दशस्वेते भवेयुः फलदायिनः । प्राणिनामिति विज्ञेयाः प्रवदन्ति तवाग्रजाः ॥५०॥
transliteration: sarvāsvapi daśasvete bhaveyuḥ phaladāyinaḥ . prāṇināmiti vijñeyāḥ pravadanti tavāgrajāḥ.
separated_sandhi: sarvāsu api daśāsu ete bhaveyuḥ phaladāyinaḥprāṇinām iti vijñeyāḥ pravadanti tava agrajāḥ
english: These (combinations) would yield results for all living beings in all ten astrological conditions (daśa). Thus, your predecessors declare this to be understood.

sanskrit: लग्ने शुभयुते योगः शुभः पापयुतेऽशुभः । व्ययस्वगैः शुभैः पापैः क्रमाद्योगौ शुभाऽशुभौ ॥१॥
transliteration: lagne śubhayute yogaḥ śubhaḥ pāpayute'śubhaḥ . vyayasvagaiḥ śubhaiḥ pāpaiḥ kramādyogau śubhā'śubhau.
separated_sandhi: lagne śubhayute yogaḥ śubhaḥ pāpayute aśubhaḥvyayasvagaiḥ śubhaiḥ pāpaiḥ kramāt yogau śubha aśubhau
english: If the ascendant (lagna) is conjoined with benefics, the resulting planetary combination (yoga) is auspicious; if it is conjoined with malefics, the yoga is inauspicious. Similarly, if benefics are in the 2nd or 12th house, the yoga is auspicious; if malefics are in the 2nd or 12th house, the yoga is inauspicious, in that order.

sanskrit: शुभयोगोद्भवो वाग्मी रूपशीलगुणवन्वितः । पापयोगोद्भवः कामी पापकर्मा परार्थयुक् ॥२॥
transliteration: śubhayogodbhavo vāgmī rūpaśīlaguṇavanvitaḥ . pāpayogodbhavaḥ kāmī pāpakarmā parārthayuk.
separated_sandhi: śubhayoga udbhavaḥ vāgmī rūpaśīlaguṇavanvitaḥpāpayoga udbhavaḥ kāmī pāpakarmā parārthayuk
english: A person born from an auspicious planetary combination (yoga) is eloquent and endowed with beauty, good character, and virtues. Conversely, one born from an inauspicious planetary combination (yoga) is lustful, performs sinful acts (karma), and may be associated with or covet others' wealth.

sanskrit: केन्द्रे देवगुरौ लग्नाच्चन्द्राद्वा शुभदृग्युते । नीचास्तारिगृहैर्हीने योगोऽयं गजकेसरी ॥३॥
transliteration: kendre devagurau lagnāccandrādvā śubhadṛgyute . nīcāstārigṛhairhīne yogo'yaṃ gajakesarī.
separated_sandhi: kendre devagurau lagnāt candrāt vā śubhadṛgyutenīcāstarigṛhaiḥ hīne yogaḥ ayaṃ gajakesarī
english: When Jupiter (Devaguru) is situated in a Kendra (angular house, 1st, 4th, 7th, or 10th) from either the ascendant (lagna) or the Moon, and is conjoined with or aspected by benefics, and is not in its sign of debilitation, combust, or in an enemy's house, this planetary combination (yoga) is known as Gajakesari.

sanskrit: गजकेसरीसञ्जातस्तेजस्वी धनवान् भवेत् । मेधावी गुणसम्पन्नो राजप्रियकरो नरः ॥४॥
transliteration: gajakesarīsañjātastejasvī dhanavān bhavet . medhāvī guṇasampanno rājapriyakaro naraḥ.
separated_sandhi: gajakesarīsañjātaḥ tejasvī dhanavān bhavetmedhāvī guṇasampannaḥ rājapriyakaraḥ naraḥ
english: A person born under the Gajakesari planetary combination (yoga) is brilliant, becomes wealthy, is intelligent, endowed with good qualities, and is cherished by rulers or authorities.

sanskrit: दशमेऽङ्गात्तथा चन्द्रात् केवलैश्च शुभैर्युते । स योगोऽमलकीत्र्त्याख्यः कीर्तिराचन्द्रतारकी ॥५॥
transliteration: daśame'ṅgāttathā candrāt kevalaiśca śubhairyute . sa yogo'malakītrtyākhyaḥ kīrtirācandratārakī.
separated_sandhi: daśame aṅgāt tathā candrāt kevalaiḥ ca śubhaiḥ yutesa yogaḥ amalākīrti ākhyaḥ kīrtiḥ ācandratārakī
english: When the 10th house, counted from either the ascendant (anga) or the Moon, is conjoined or aspected *only* by benefics, that planetary combination (yoga) is called Amalakirti, and it bestows fame that endures as long as the Moon and stars exist.

sanskrit: राजपूज्ये महाभोगी दाता बन्धुजनप्रियः । परोपकारी धर्मात्मा गुणढ्योऽमलकीर्तिजः ॥६॥
transliteration: rājapūjye mahābhogī dātā bandhujanapriyaḥ . paropakārī dharmātmā guṇaḍhyo'malakīrtijaḥ.
separated_sandhi: rājapūjye mahābhogī dātā bandhujanapriyaḥ paraupakārī dharma ātmā guṇāḍhyaḥ amalakīrtijaḥ
english: Honored by kings, a great enjoyer of pleasures, generous, dear to relatives, a benefactor of others, righteous-souled (dharmātman), endowed with many virtues, and possessing spotless fame.

sanskrit: सप्तमे चाऽष्टमे शुद्धे शुभग्रहयुतेऽथवा । केन्द्रेषु शुभयुक्तेषु योगः पर्वतसंज्ञकः ॥७॥
transliteration: saptame cā'ṣṭame śuddhe śubhagrahayute'thavā . kendreṣu śubhayukteṣu yogaḥ parvatasaṃjñakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: saptame ca aṣṭame śuddhe śubhagraha-yute athavā kendreṣu śubhayukteṣu yogaḥ parvatasaṃjñakaḥ
english: If the seventh and eighth houses are pure or conjoined with benefic planets, or if the angular houses are conjoined with benefic planets, then this combination is known as Parvata Yoga.

sanskrit: भाग्यवान् पर्वतोत्पन्नः वाग्मी दाता च शास्त्रवित् । हास्यप्रियो यशस्वी च तेजस्वी पुरनायकः ॥८॥
transliteration: bhāgyavān parvatotpannaḥ vāgmī dātā ca śāstravit . hāsyapriyo yaśasvī ca tejasvī puranāyakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: bhāgyavān parvata utpannaḥ vāgmī dātā ca śāstravithāsyapriyaḥ yaśasvī ca tejasvī puranāyakaḥ
english: A person born with Parvata Yoga is fortunate, an eloquent speaker, generous, a knower of scriptures, fond of humor, famous, radiant, and a leader of his community.

sanskrit: सुखेशेज्यौ मिथः केन्द्रगतौ बलिनि लग्नपे । काहलो वा स्वभोच्चस्थे सुखेशे कर्मपान्विते ॥९॥
transliteration: sukheśejyau mithaḥ kendragatau balini lagnape . kāhalo vā svabhoccasthe sukheśe karmapānvite.
separated_sandhi: sukheśa ijyau mithaḥ kendragatau balini lagnapekāhalaḥ vā svabha uccasthe sukheśe karmapa anvite
english: Kāhala Yoga occurs if the lord of the 4th house and Jupiter are mutually situated in angular houses while the ascendant lord is strong; or, if the lord of the 4th house is in its own sign or exalted and conjoined with the lord of the 10th house.

sanskrit: ओजस्वी साहसी धूर्तश्चतुरङ्गबलान्वितः । यत्किञ्चिद् ग्रामनाथश्च काहले जायते नरः ॥१०॥
transliteration: ojasvī sāhasī dhūrtaścaturaṅgabalānvitaḥ . yatkiñcid grāmanāthaśca kāhale jāyate naraḥ.
separated_sandhi: ojasvī sāhasī dhūrtaḥ caturaṅgabalānvitaḥyatkiñcit grāmanāthaḥ ca kāhale jāyate naraḥ
english: A person born with Kāhala Yoga is energetic, courageous, shrewd, possesses the strength of a four-fold army (implying great power), and becomes at least a village chief.

sanskrit: लग्नेशे तुङ्गगे केन्द्रे गुरुदृष्टे तु चामरः । शुभद्वये विलग्ने वा नवमे दशमे मदे ॥११॥
transliteration: lagneśe tuṅgage kendre gurudṛṣṭe tu cāmaraḥ . śubhadvaye vilagne vā navame daśame made.
separated_sandhi: lagna-īśe tuṅgage kendre guru-dṛṣṭe tu cāmaraḥ| śubha-dvaye vilagne vā navame daśame made
english: When the lord of the ascendant (lagna) is exalted (tuṅga), located in a quadrant (kendra) house, and aspected by Jupiter (guru), the Chāmara Yoga is formed. Alternatively, this yoga is formed when two benefics are in the ascendant (lagna), or in the ninth, tenth, or seventh house.

sanskrit: राजा वा राजपुज्यो वा चिरजीवी च पण्डितः । वाग्मी सर्वकलाविद् वा चामरे जायते जनः ॥१२॥
transliteration: rājā vā rājapujyo vā cirajīvī ca paṇḍitaḥ . vāgmī sarvakalāvid vā cāmare jāyate janaḥ.
separated_sandhi: rājā vā rāja-pujyaḥ vā cira-jīvī ca paṇḍitaḥ| vāgmī sarva-kalā-vit vā cāmare jāyate janaḥ
english: A person born with Chāmara Yoga (cāmara) becomes a king, or one respected by kings, long-lived, and learned. They are also eloquent, or skilled in all arts.

sanskrit: सवले लग्नपे पुत्रषष्ठपौ केन्द्रगौ मिथः । शंखो वा लग्नकर्मेशौ चरे बलिनि भाग्यपे ॥१३॥
transliteration: savale lagnape putraṣaṣṭhapau kendragau mithaḥ . śaṃkho vā lagnakarmeśau care balini bhāgyape.
separated_sandhi: sabale lagna-pe putra-ṣaṣṭha-pau kendra-gau mithaḥ| śaṅkhaḥ vā lagna-karma-īśau care balini bhāgya-pe
english: Śaṅkha Yoga is formed when the lord of the ascendant (lagna) is strong, and the lords of the fifth (putra) and sixth (ṣaṣṭha) houses are both situated in quadrant (kendra) houses. Alternatively, it is formed when the lords of the ascendant and tenth (karma) houses are in cardinal (cara) signs, and the lord of the ninth (bhāgya) house is strong.

sanskrit: धनस्त्रीपुत्रसंयुक्तो दयालुः पुण्यवान् सुधीः । पुण्यकर्मा चिरञ्जीवी शंखयोगोद्भवो नरः ॥१४॥
transliteration: dhanastrīputrasaṃyukto dayāluḥ puṇyavān sudhīḥ . puṇyakarmā cirañjīvī śaṃkhayogodbhavo naraḥ.
separated_sandhi: dhana-strī-putra-saṃyuktaḥ dayāluḥ puṇyavān su-dhīḥ| puṇya-karmā cirañjīvī śaṅkha-yoga-udbhavaḥ naraḥ
english: A person born with Śaṅkha Yoga (śaṅkhayoga) is endowed with wealth, a wife, and children. They are compassionate, virtuous, intelligent, perform meritorious actions (puṇya-karma), and are long-lived.

sanskrit: सबले भाग्यपे भेरी खगैः स्वान्त्योदयास्तगैः । सबले भाग्यपे वाऽसौ केन्द्रे शुक्रेज्यलग्नपैः ॥१५॥
transliteration: sabale bhāgyape bherī khagaiḥ svāntyodayāstagaiḥ . sabale bhāgyape vā'sau kendre śukrejyalagnapaiḥ.
separated_sandhi: sabale bhāgyape bherī khagaiḥ sva-antya-udaya-asta-gaiḥ| sabale bhāgyape vā asau kendre śukra-ijya-lagna-paiḥ
english: Bherī Yoga is formed when the lord of the ninth (bhāgya) house is strong, and all planets (khaga) are situated in the second (sva), twelfth (antya), first (udaya/lagna), and seventh (asta) houses. Alternatively, this yoga is formed when the lord of the ninth (bhāgya) house is strong and positioned in a quadrant (kendra) house, along with Venus (śukra), Jupiter (ijya), and the lord of the ascendant (lagna-pa).

sanskrit: धनस्त्रीपुत्रसंयुक्तो भूपः कीर्तिगुणान्वितः । आचारवान् सुखी भोगी भेरीयोगे जनो भवेत् ॥१६॥
transliteration: dhanastrīputrasaṃyukto bhūpaḥ kīrtiguṇānvitaḥ . ācāravān sukhī bhogī bherīyoge jano bhavet.
separated_sandhi: dhana-strī-putra-saṃyuktaḥ bhūpaḥ kīrti-guṇa-anvitaḥācāravān sukhī bhogī bherī-yoge janaḥ bhavet
english: A person born in the Bherī Yoga becomes endowed with wealth, a wife, and sons. Such a person is a king, possesses fame and good qualities, is righteous, happy, and enjoys worldly pleasures.

sanskrit: सबले लग्नपे खेटाः केन्द्रे कोणे स्वभोच्चगाः । मृगङ्गयोगो जातोऽत्र भूपो वा तत्समः सुखी ॥१७॥
transliteration: sabale lagnape kheṭāḥ kendre koṇe svabhoccagāḥ . mṛgaṅgayogo jāto'tra bhūpo vā tatsamaḥ sukhī.
separated_sandhi: sabale lagna-pe kheṭāḥ kendre koṇe sva-bha-ucca-gāḥmṛgāṅga-yogaḥ jātaḥ atra bhūpaḥ vā tat-samaḥ sukhī
english: When the lord of the ascendant (lagna) is strong, and planets are situated in quadrant (kendra) or trine (koṇa) houses, in their own signs or signs of exaltation, then a Mṛgāṅga Yoga is formed. A person born in this (yoga) becomes a king or one equal to a king, and is happy.

sanskrit: कीमेशे कर्मगे तुङ्गे कर्मेशे भाग्यपान्विते । योगः श्रीनाथसंज्ञोऽत्र जातः शुक्रसमो नृपः ॥१८॥
transliteration: kīmeśe karmage tuṅge karmeśe bhāgyapānvite . yogaḥ śrīnāthasaṃjño'tra jātaḥ śukrasamo nṛpaḥ.
separated_sandhi: kīmeśe karma-ge tuṅge karma-īśe bhāgya-pa-anviteyogaḥ śrī-nātha-saṃjñaḥ atra jātaḥ śukra-samaḥ nṛpaḥ
english: When the lord of Kīma (likely the 10th house lord) is in the 10th house and exalted, and the lord of the 10th house is conjoined with the lord of the 9th house, then a Yoga named Śrīnātha (yoga) is formed. A person born in this (yoga) becomes a king, equal to Venus in prosperity and enjoyment.

sanskrit: कर्मेशे सुतगे केन्द्रे बुधेऽर्के सबले स्वभे । चन्द्रात् कोणे गुरौ ज्ञे वा कुजे लाभे च शारदः ॥१९॥
transliteration: karmeśe sutage kendre budhe'rke sabale svabhe . candrāt koṇe gurau jñe vā kuje lābhe ca śāradaḥ.
separated_sandhi: karma-īśe suta-ge kendre budhe arke sabale sva-bhecandrāt koṇe gurau jñe vā kuje lābhe ca śāradaḥ
english: Śārada Yoga forms when the lord of the 10th house is in the 5th house and simultaneously in a quadrant (kendra), and Mercury and the Sun are strong in their own signs. Furthermore, either Jupiter or Mercury must be in a trine (koṇa) from the Moon, or Mars must be in the 11th house (lābha).

sanskrit: धनस्त्रीपुत्रसंयुक्तः सुखी विद्वान् नृपप्रियः । तपस्वी धर्मसंयुक्तः शारदे जायते जनः ॥२०॥
transliteration: dhanastrīputrasaṃyuktaḥ sukhī vidvān nṛpapriyaḥ . tapasvī dharmasaṃyuktaḥ śārade jāyate janaḥ.
separated_sandhi: dhana-strī-putra-saṃyuktaḥ sukhī vidvān nṛpa-priyaḥtapasvī dharma-saṃyuktaḥ śārade jāyate janaḥ
english: A person born in the Śārada Yoga becomes endowed with wealth, a wife, and sons. Such a person is happy, learned, dear to the king, an ascetic (tapasvī), and righteous (dharma-saṃyuktaḥ).

sanskrit: धर्मलग्नगते सौम्ये पञ्चमे सदसद्युते । पापे च चतुरस्रस्थे योगोऽयं मत्स्यसंज्ञकः ॥२१॥
transliteration: dharmalagnagate saumye pañcame sadasadyute . pāpe ca caturasrasthe yogo'yaṃ matsyasaṃjñakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: dharma-lagna-gate saumye pañcame sat-asat-yutepāpe ca caturasra-sthe yogaḥ ayam matsya-saṃjñakaḥ
english: When benefic planets are located in the ninth house (dharma) and the first house, the fifth house is associated with both benefic and malefic planets, and malefic planets are situated in the angular houses, this astrological combination is known as Matsya Yoga.

sanskrit: कालज्ञः करुणामूर्तिर्गुणधीबलरूपवान् । यशोविद्यातपस्वी च मत्स्ययोगे हि जायते ॥२२॥
transliteration: kālajñaḥ karuṇāmūrtirguṇadhībalarūpavān . yaśovidyātapasvī ca matsyayoge hi jāyate.
separated_sandhi: kālajñaḥ karuṇā-mūrtiḥ guṇa-dhī-bala-rūpa-vānyaśaḥ-vidyā-tapasvī ca matsya-yoge hi jāyate
english: One born under Matsya Yoga is indeed knowledgeable about time, an embodiment of compassion, endowed with virtues, intelligence, strength, and beauty, and is famous, learned, and ascetic (tapasvī).

sanskrit: पुत्रारिमदगाः सौम्याः स्वभोच्चसुहृदंशगाः । त्रिलाभोदयगाः पापाः कूर्मयोगः स्वभोच्चगाः ॥२३॥
transliteration: putrārimadagāḥ saumyāḥ svabhoccasuhṛdaṃśagāḥ . trilābhodayagāḥ pāpāḥ kūrmayogaḥ svabhoccagāḥ.
separated_sandhi: putra-ari-mada-gāḥ saumyāḥ sva-bha-ucca-suhṛt-aṃśa-gāḥtri-lābha-udaya-gāḥ pāpāḥ kūrma-yogaḥ sva-bha-ucca-gāḥ
english: When benefic planets are situated in the fifth, sixth, and seventh houses, and are in their own sign, exaltation sign, or a friendly divisional sign (amśa), and malefic planets are situated in the third, eleventh, and first houses, being also in their own sign or exaltation sign, this combination is called Kurma Yoga.

sanskrit: कूर्मयोगे जनो भूपो धीरो धर्मगुणान्वितः । कीर्तिमानुपकारी च सुखी मानवनायकः ॥२४॥
transliteration: kūrmayoge jano bhūpo dhīro dharmaguṇānvitaḥ . kīrtimānupakārī ca sukhī mānavanāyakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: kūrma-yoge janaḥ bhūpaḥ dhīraḥ dharma-guṇa-anvitaḥkīrti-mān upakārī ca sukhī mānava-nāyakaḥ
english: A person born with Kurma Yoga becomes a king, is courageous, endowed with virtuous qualities (dharma-guṇa), famous, helpful, happy, and a leader of humanity.

sanskrit: भाग्येशे धनभावास्थे धनेशे भाग्यभावगे । लग्नेशे केन्द्रकोणस्थे खड्गयोगः स कथ्यते ॥२५॥
transliteration: bhāgyeśe dhanabhāvāsthe dhaneśe bhāgyabhāvage . lagneśe kendrakoṇasthe khaḍgayogaḥ sa kathyate.
separated_sandhi: bhāgya-īśe dhana-bhāva-asthe dhana-īśe bhāgya-bhāva-gelagna-īśe kendra-koṇa-asthe khaḍga-yogaḥ saḥ kathyate
english: When the lord of the ninth house is situated in the second house (dhana-bhāva), the lord of the second house is situated in the ninth house (bhāgya-bhāva), and the lord of the ascendant is located in a quadrant or trine house, that combination is called Khadga Yoga.

sanskrit: खड्गयोगे समुत्पन्नो धनभाग्यसुखान्वितः । शास्त्रज्ञो बुद्धिवीर्याढ्यः कृतज्ञः कुशलो नरः ॥२६॥
transliteration: khaḍgayoge samutpanno dhanabhāgyasukhānvitaḥ . śāstrajño buddhivīryāḍhyaḥ kṛtajñaḥ kuśalo naraḥ.
separated_sandhi: khaḍgayoge samutpannaḥ dhanabhāgyasukhānvitaḥśāstrajñaḥ buddhivīryāḍhyaḥ kṛtajñaḥ kuśalaḥ naraḥ
english: A person born in the khaḍga yoga (planetary combination) is endowed with wealth, good fortune, and happiness; they are a knower of scriptures (śāstra), rich in intellect and valor, grateful, and skillful.

sanskrit: केन्द्रे मूलत्रिकोणस्ते भाग्येशे वा स्वभोच्चगे । लग्नाधिपे बलाढ्ये च लक्ष्मीयोगः प्रकीर्त्यते ॥२७॥
transliteration: kendre mūlatrikoṇaste bhāgyeśe vā svabhoccage . lagnādhipe balāḍhye ca lakṣmīyogaḥ prakīrtyate.
separated_sandhi: kendre mūlatrikoṇasthe bhāgyeśe vā svabhoccagelagnādhipe balāḍhye ca lakṣmīyogaḥ prakīrtyate
english: Lakṣmīyoga (an auspicious planetary combination) is declared when the lord of the 9th house (the house of fortune) is situated in a Kendra (angular house - 1st, 4th, 7th, 10th) or in a mūlatrikoṇa (trine house - 1st, 5th, 9th), or is in its own sign or exalted, and the ascendant lord is strong.

sanskrit: सुरूपो गुणवान् भूपो बहुपुत्रधनान्वितः । यशस्वी धर्मसम्पन्नो लक्ष्मीयोगे जनो भवेत् ॥२८॥
transliteration: surūpo guṇavān bhūpo bahuputradhanānvitaḥ . yaśasvī dharmasampanno lakṣmīyoge jano bhavet.
separated_sandhi: surūpaḥ guṇavān bhūpaḥ bahuputradhanānvitaḥyaśasvī dharmasampannaḥ lakṣmīyoge janaḥ bhavet
english: A person born in a lakṣmīyoga (auspicious planetary combination) becomes handsome, virtuous, a king or like a king, endowed with many sons and wealth, famous, and rich in natural law (dharma).

sanskrit: लग्ने स्थिरे भृगौ केन्द्रे चन्द्रकोणे शभान्विते । मानस्थानगते सौरे योगोऽयं कुसुमाभिधः ॥२९॥
transliteration: lagne sthire bhṛgau kendre candrakoṇe śabhānvite . mānasthānagate saure yogo'yaṃ kusumābhidhaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagne sthire bhṛgau kendre candrakone śubhānvitemānasthānagate saure yogaḥ ayam kusumābhidaḥ
english: This planetary combination (yoga) is called Kusuma when the ascendant (lagna) is a fixed sign, Venus (bhṛgu) is in an angular house (kendra), the Moon is in a trine house (koṇa) conjoined with benefic planets, and Saturn (sauri) is in a house of honor.

sanskrit: भूपो वा भूपतुल्यो वा दता भोगी सुखी जनः । कुलमुख्यो गुणी विद्वान् जायते कुसुमाह्वये ॥३०॥
transliteration: bhūpo vā bhūpatulyo vā datā bhogī sukhī janaḥ . kulamukhyo guṇī vidvān jāyate kusumāhvaye.
separated_sandhi: bhūpaḥ vā bhūpatulyaḥ vā dātā bhogī sukhī janaḥkulamukhyaḥ guṇī vidvān jāyate kusumāhvaye
english: A person born in the Kusuma (yoga) combination becomes a king or equal to a king, a generous giver, an enjoyer of pleasures, happy, the chief of his family, virtuous, and learned.

sanskrit: द्वितीये पञ्चमे जीवे बुधशुक्रयुतेक्षिते । क्षत्रे तयोर्वा सम्प्रप्ते योगः स च कलानिधिः ॥३१॥
transliteration: dvitīye pañcame jīve budhaśukrayutekṣite . kṣatre tayorvā samprapte yogaḥ sa ca kalānidhiḥ.
separated_sandhi: dvitīye pañcame jīve budhaśukrayutekṣite kṣatretayoḥ vā samprāpte yogaḥ sa ca kalānidhiḥ
english: When Jupiter is located in the second or fifth house, and is either conjoined with or aspected by Mercury and Venus; or alternatively, when Jupiter occupies a sign (kṣatra) ruled by Mercury or Venus, that planetary combination (yoga) is known as Kalānidhi (yoga).

sanskrit: कलानिधिसमुत्पन्नो गुणवान् भूपवन्दितः । रोगहीनः सुखी जातो धनविद्यासमन्वितः ॥३२॥
transliteration: kalānidhisamutpanno guṇavān bhūpavanditaḥ . rogahīnaḥ sukhī jāto dhanavidyāsamanvitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: kalānidhisamutpannaḥ guṇavān bhūpavanditaḥrogahīnaḥ sukhī jātaḥ dhanavidyāsamanvitaḥ
english: A person born under the Kalānidhi (yoga) is endowed with good qualities, respected by rulers, free from illness, happy, and possesses wealth and knowledge.

sanskrit: लग्नेशतद्गतर्क्षेशतद्गतर्क्षेशतदंशपाः । केन्द्रे कोणे स्वतुङ्गे वा योगः कल्पद्रुमो मतः ॥३३॥
transliteration: lagneśatadgatarkṣeśatadgatarkṣeśatadaṃśapāḥ . kendre koṇe svatuṅge vā yogaḥ kalpadrumo mataḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagneśatadgataṛkṣeśatadgataṛkṣeśatadaṃśapāḥkendre koṇe svatuṅge vā yogaḥ kalpadrumaḥ mataḥ
english: When the lord of the ascendant, the lord of the sign occupied by the ascendant lord, the lord of the sign occupied by that (second) lord, and the lord of the navamsha occupied by that (third) lord - these planetary rulers are located in an angular (kendra) house, a trine (kona) house, or in their own exaltation sign, this planetary combination (yoga) is considered Kalpadruma (yoga).

sanskrit: सर्वैश्वर्ययुतो भूपो धर्मात्मा बलसंयुतः । युद्धप्रियो दयालुश्च पारिजाते नरो भवेत् ॥३४॥
transliteration: sarvaiśvaryayuto bhūpo dharmātmā balasaṃyutaḥ . yuddhapriyo dayāluśca pārijāte naro bhavet.
separated_sandhi: sarvaiśvaryayutaḥ bhūpaḥ dharmātmā balasaṃyutaḥyuddhapriyaḥ dayāluḥ ca pārijāte naraḥ bhavet
english: A person born in Pārijāta (yoga) becomes endowed with all prosperity, a ruler, righteous (dharmātmā), full of strength, fond of battle, and compassionate.

sanskrit: स्वान्त्याष्टस्थैर्द्वितीयेशाद् हरियोगः शुभग्रहैः । कामेशाद् बन्धुधर्माष्टस्थितैः सौम्यैर्हराभिधः ॥३५॥
transliteration: svāntyāṣṭasthairdvitīyeśād hariyogaḥ śubhagrahaiḥ . kāmeśād bandhudharmāṣṭasthitaiḥ saumyairharābhidhaḥ.
separated_sandhi: svāntyāṣṭasthair dvitīyeśāt hariyogaḥ śubhagraaiḥkāmeśāt bandhudharmāṣṭasthitaiḥ saumyaiḥ harābhidhaḥ
english: Hari (yoga) occurs when auspicious planets are located in the twelfth or eighth house from the lord of the second house. Hara (yoga) is named when benefic planets are situated in the fourth, ninth (dharma), or eighth house from the lord of the seventh house.

sanskrit: लग्नेशाद् बन्धुकर्मायस्थितैर्ब्रह्माह्वयः स्मृतः । एषु जातः सुखी विद्वान् धनपुत्रादिसंयुतः ॥३६॥
transliteration: lagneśād bandhukarmāyasthitairbrahmāhvayaḥ smṛtaḥ . eṣu jātaḥ sukhī vidvān dhanaputrādisaṃyutaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagneśāt bandhukarmāyastitaiḥ brahmāhvayaḥ smṛtaḥeṣu jātaḥ sukhī vidvān dhanaputrādisaṃyutaḥ
english: When planets are positioned in the fourth, tenth, and eleventh houses from the lord of the Ascendant, this combination is called the Brahma (yoga). A person born with this (yoga) is happy, learned, and endowed with wealth, children, and other such blessings.

sanskrit: लग्नान्मदाष्टगैः सौम्यैः पापदृग्योगवर्जितैः । योगो लग्नाधियोगोऽस्मिन् महात्मा शास्त्रवित् सुखी ॥३७॥
transliteration: lagnānmadāṣṭagaiḥ saumyaiḥ pāpadṛgyogavarjitaiḥ . yogo lagnādhiyogo'smin mahātmā śāstravit sukhī.
separated_sandhi: lagnāt madāṣṭagaiḥ saumyaiḥ pāpadṛgyogavarjitaiḥyogaḥ lagnādhiyogaḥ asmin mahātman śāstravit sukhī
english: When benefics are positioned in the seventh and eighth houses from the Ascendant, and are free from malefic aspects or conjunctions, this combination is called Lagna Adhiyoga (yoga). A person born with this (yoga) becomes a great soul (mahātman), well-versed in sacred texts, and happy.

sanskrit: लग्नपे पारिजातस्थे सुखी वर्गोत्तमे ह्यरुक् । गोपुरे धनधान्याढ्या भूपः सिंहासने स्थिते ॥३८॥
transliteration: lagnape pārijātasthe sukhī vargottame hyaruk . gopure dhanadhānyāḍhyā bhūpaḥ siṃhāsane sthite.
separated_sandhi: lagnape pārijātaste sukhī vargottame hi arukgopure dhanadhānyāḍhyā bhūpaḥ siṃhāsane sthite
english: When the lord of the Ascendant is in Parijatāṃśa, the person is happy. If the lord is in Vargottamāṃśa, they are certainly free from illness. If in Gopurāṃśa, they are prosperous with wealth and grains. If in Siṃhāsanāṃśa, the person becomes a ruler.

sanskrit: विद्वान् पारावते श्रीमान् देवलोके सवाहनः । ऐरावतस्थिते जातो विख्यातो भूपवन्दितः ॥३९॥
transliteration: vidvān pārāvate śrīmān devaloke savāhanaḥ . airāvatasthite jāto vikhyāto bhūpavanditaḥ.
separated_sandhi: vidvān pārāvate śrīmān devaloke savāhanaḥairāvatasthite jātaḥ vikhyātaḥ bhūpavanditaḥ
english: If the lord of the Ascendant is in Parāvatāṃśa, the person is learned and prosperous. If in Devalokāṃśa, they are endowed with conveyances. When born with the lord in Airāvatāṃśa, the individual becomes renowned and honored by rulers.

sanskrit: सहस्ररश्मितचन्द्रे कण्टकादिगते क्रमात् । धनधीनैपुणादीनि न्यूनमध्योत्तमानि हि ॥१॥
transliteration: sahasraraśmitacandre kaṇṭakādigate kramāt . dhanadhīnaipuṇādīni nyūnamadhyottamāni hi.
separated_sandhi: sahasraraśmitacandre kaṇṭakādigate kramātdhanadhīnaipuṇādīni nyūnamadhyottamāni hi
english: When the Sun and Moon are situated in the cardinal (kendra) houses, the succeeding (paṇaphara) houses, or the cadent (āpoklima) houses, respectively, then the native's wealth, intelligence, and skill, among other qualities, will be high, medium, or low accordingly.

sanskrit: स्वांशे वा स्वाधिमित्रांशे स्थितश्च दिवसे शशी । गुरुणा दृश्यते तत्र जातो धनसुखान्वितः ॥२॥
transliteration: svāṃśe vā svādhimitrāṃśe sthitaśca divase śaśī . guruṇā dṛśyate tatra jāto dhanasukhānvitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: svāṃśe vā svādhimitrāṃśe sthitaḥ ca divase śaśīguruṇā dṛśyate tatra jātaḥ dhanasukhānvitaḥ
english: If the Moon is situated in its own navamsha (divisional chart) or in the navamsha of its great friend during the daytime, and is aspected by Jupiter, then the native born will be endowed with wealth and happiness.

sanskrit: स्वांशे वा स्वाधिमित्रांशे स्थितश्च शशभृन्निशि । शुक्रेण दृश्यते तत्र जातो धनसुखान्वितः ॥३॥
transliteration: svāṃśe vā svādhimitrāṃśe sthitaśca śaśabhṛnniśi . śukreṇa dṛśyate tatra jāto dhanasukhānvitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: svāṃśe vā svādhimitrāṃśe sthitaḥ ca śaśabhṛt niśiśukreṇa dṛśyate tatra jātaḥ dhanasukhānvitaḥ
english: If the Moon is situated in its own navamsha or in the navamsha of its great friend during the night, and is aspected by Venus, then the native born will be endowed with wealth and happiness.

sanskrit: एतद्विपर्ययस्थे च शुक्रेज्यानवलोकिते । जायतेऽल्पधनो बालो योगेऽस्मिन्निर्धनोऽथवा ॥४॥
transliteration: etadviparyayasthe ca śukrejyānavalokite . jāyate'lpadhano bālo yoge'sminnirdhano'thavā.
separated_sandhi: etat viparyayasthite ca śukrejyanavalokite jāyatealpadhanaḥ bālaḥ yoge asmin nirdhanaḥ athavā
english: If, conversely, the Moon is not aspected by Venus and Jupiter, the native born in this (astrological) combination (yoga) will have little wealth or be completely poor.

sanskrit: चन्द्राद्रन्ध्रारिकामस्थै सौम्यैः स्याधियोगकः । तत्र राजा च मन्त्री च सेनाधीशश्च बलक्रमात् ॥५॥
transliteration: candrādrandhrārikāmasthai saumyaiḥ syādhiyogakaḥ . tatra rājā ca mantrī ca senādhīśaśca balakramāt.
separated_sandhi: candrāt randhrārikāmasthaiḥ saumyaiḥ syāt adhiyogakaḥtatra rājā ca mantrī ca senādhīśaḥ ca balakramāt
english: If benefics are situated in the 6th, 7th, and 8th houses from the Moon, an Adhiyoga (auspicious planetary combination) is formed. In such a case, the native becomes a king, a minister, or an army chief, according to the relative strength (of the planets/combination).

sanskrit: चन्द्राद् वृद्धिगतैः सर्वैः शुभैर्जातो महाधनी । द्वाभ्यां मध्यधनो जात एकेनाऽल्पधनो भवेत् ॥६॥
transliteration: candrād vṛddhigataiḥ sarvaiḥ śubhairjāto mahādhanī . dvābhyāṃ madhyadhano jāta ekenā'lpadhano bhavet.
separated_sandhi: candrāt vṛddhigataiḥ sarvaiḥ śubhaiḥ jātaḥ mahādhanīdvābhyām madhyadhanaḥ jātaḥ ekena alpadhanaḥ bhavet
english: If all benefics are situated in houses of increase (upacaya houses like 3, 6, 10, 11) from the Moon, the native becomes extremely wealthy. If this condition is met by two (benefics), the native is moderately wealthy. If by only one (benefic), they will have little wealth.

sanskrit: चन्द्रात् स्वान्त्योभयस्थे हि ग्रहे सूर्यं बिना क्रमात् । सुनफाख्तोऽनफाख्यश्च योगो दुरधराह्वयः ॥७॥
transliteration: candrāt svāntyobhayasthe hi grahe sūryaṃ binā kramāt . sunaphākhto'naphākhyaśca yogo duradharāhvayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: candrāt svāntyobhayasthe hi grahe sūryam vinā kramātsunaphākhyaḥ anaphākhyaḥ ca yogaḥ duradharāhvayaḥ
english: Indeed, when a planet, excluding the Sun, is situated in the second house from the Moon, or in the twelfth house, or in both, these combinations are known respectively as Sunapha, Anapha, and Duradhara (yoga).

sanskrit: राजा वा राजतुल्यो वा धीधनख्यातिमाञ्जनः । स्वभुजार्जितवित्तश्च सुनफायोगसम्भवः ॥८॥
transliteration: rājā vā rājatulyo vā dhīdhanakhyātimāñjanaḥ . svabhujārjitavittaśca sunaphāyogasambhavaḥ.
separated_sandhi: rājā vā rājatulyaḥ vā dhīdhanakhyātimān janaḥsvabhujārjitavittaḥ ca sunaphāyogasaṃbhavaḥ
english: A person born with Sunapha (yoga) becomes a king, or equal to a king, or one endowed with intelligence, wealth, and fame, and who has acquired riches by his own effort.

sanskrit: भूपोऽगदशरीरश्च शीलवान् ख्यातकीर्तिमान् । सुरूपश्चाऽनफाजातो सुखैः सर्वैः समन्वितः ॥९॥
transliteration: bhūpo'gadaśarīraśca śīlavān khyātakīrtimān . surūpaścā'naphājāto sukhaiḥ sarvaiḥ samanvitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: bhūpaḥ agadaśarīraḥ ca śīlavān khyātakīrtimānsurūpaḥ ca anaphājātaḥ sukhāiḥ sarvāiḥ samanvitaḥ
english: A person born with Anapha (yoga) becomes a ruler, possesses a healthy body, is virtuous, widely renowned, handsome, and endowed with all comforts.

sanskrit: उत्पन्नसुखभुग् दाता धनवाहनसंयुतः । सद्भृत्यो जायते नूनं जनो दुरधराभवः ॥१०॥
transliteration: utpannasukhabhug dātā dhanavāhanasaṃyutaḥ . sadbhṛtyo jāyate nūnaṃ jano duradharābhavaḥ.
separated_sandhi: utpannasukhabhuk dātā dhanavāhanasaṃyutaḥsadbhṛtyaḥ jāyate nūnam janaḥ duradharābhavaḥ
english: A person born with Duradhara (yoga) certainly becomes one who enjoys acquired happiness, is generous, possesses wealth and vehicles, and has good servants.

sanskrit: चन्द्रादाद्यधनाऽन्त्यस्थो विना भानुं न चेद्ग्रहः । कश्चित् स्याद्वा विना चन्द्रं लग्नात् केन्द्रगतोऽथ वा ॥११॥
transliteration: candrādādyadhanā'ntyastho vinā bhānuṃ na cedgrahaḥ . kaścit syādvā vinā candraṃ lagnāt kendragato'tha vā.
separated_sandhi: candrāt ādyadhanaantyasthaḥ vinā bhānum na cet grahaḥkaścit syāt vā vinā candram lagnāt kendragataḥ atha vā
english: If no planet, excluding the Sun, is situated in the second (house of wealth) and twelfth house from the Moon; or if any planet, excluding the Moon, is in an angular house (kendra) from the Ascendant...

sanskrit: योगः केमद्रुमो नाम तत्र जातोऽतिगर्हितः । बुद्धिविद्याविहीनश्च दरिद्रापत्तिसंयुतः ॥१२॥
transliteration: yogaḥ kemadrumo nāma tatra jāto'tigarhitaḥ . buddhividyāvihīnaśca daridrāpattisaṃyutaḥ.
separated_sandhi: yogaḥ kemadrumaḥ nāma tatra jātaḥ ati-garhitaḥbuddhi-vidyā-vihīnaḥ ca daridra-āpatti-saṃyutaḥ
english: The astrological combination (yoga) known as Kemadruma is considered very reprehensible. A person born under this specific planetary arrangement (yoga) will be devoid of intelligence and knowledge, and afflicted by poverty and/or misfortune.

sanskrit: अन्ययोगफलं हन्ति चन्द्रयोगो विशेषतः । स्वफलं प्रददातीति बुधो यत्नाद् विचिन्तयेत् ॥१३॥
transliteration: anyayogaphalaṃ hanti candrayogo viśeṣataḥ . svaphalaṃ pradadātīti budho yatnād vicintayet.
separated_sandhi: anya-yoga-phalam hanti candra-yogaḥ viśeṣataḥsva-phalam pra-dadāti iti budhaḥ yatnāt vi-cintayet
english: The Moon's (yoga), especially the Kemadruma (yoga), nullifies the results of other (favorable astrological) combinations (yoga). Therefore, a wise person should carefully analyze, understanding that this particular combination yields its own distinct results.

sanskrit: सूर्यात् स्वन्त्योभयस्थैश्च विना चन्द्रं कुजादिभिः । वेशिवोशिसमाख्यौ च तथोभयचरः क्रमात् ॥१॥
transliteration: sūryāt svantyobhayasthaiśca vinā candraṃ kujādibhiḥ . veśivośisamākhyau ca tathobhayacaraḥ kramāt.
separated_sandhi: sūryāt sva-antya-ubhaya-sthaiḥ ca vinā candram kuja-ādibhiḥveśi-vośi-samākhyau ca tathā ubhayacaraḥ kramāt
english: When planets like Mars (and others), excluding the Moon, are situated in the second or twelfth house from the Sun, these astrological combinations (yoga) are named Veśi (if in the second house) and Vośi (if in the twelfth house) respectively. Similarly, the Ubhayacara (yoga) is formed when such planets are in both houses, in sequence.

sanskrit: समदृक् सत्यवाङ् मर्त्यो दीर्घकायोऽलसस्तथा । सुखभागल्पवित्तोऽपि वेशियोगसमुद्भवः ॥२॥
transliteration: samadṛk satyavāṅ martyo dīrghakāyo'lasastathā . sukhabhāgalpavitto'pi veśiyogasamudbhavaḥ.
separated_sandhi: sama-dṛk satya-vāk martyaḥ dīrgha-kāyaḥ alasaḥ tathāsukha-bhāk alpa-vittaḥ api veśi-yoga-samudbhavaḥ
english: A person born under the Veśi (yoga) will be fair-sighted, truthful, tall in stature, and also somewhat lazy. Such an individual will enjoy happiness even if they possess limited wealth.

sanskrit: वोशौ च निपुणो दाता यशोविद्याबलावन्तिः । तथोभयचरे जातो भूपो वा तत्समः सुखी ॥३॥
transliteration: vośau ca nipuṇo dātā yaśovidyābalāvantiḥ . tathobhayacare jāto bhūpo vā tatsamaḥ sukhī.
separated_sandhi: vośau ca nipuṇaḥ dātā yaśo-vidyā-bala-anvitaḥtathā ubhayacare jātaḥ bhūpaḥ vā tat-samaḥ sukhī
english: Furthermore, a person born under the Vośi (yoga) will be skilled, generous, and endowed with fame, knowledge, and strength. Similarly, one born under the Ubhayacara (yoga) becomes a king or is equivalent to one, and is always happy.

sanskrit: शुभग्रहभवे योगे फलमेवं विचिन्तयेत् । पापग्रहसमुत्पन्ने योगे तु फलमन्यथा ॥४॥
transliteration: śubhagrahabhave yoge phalamevaṃ vicintayet . pāpagrahasamutpanne yoge tu phalamanyathā.
separated_sandhi: śubha-graha-bhave yoge phalam evam vicintayetpāpa-graha-samutpanne yoge tu phalam anyathā
english: When a planetary combination (yoga) is formed by benefic planets, the result should be considered in this manner. However, when a planetary combination (yoga) arises from malefic planets, the result is quite different.

sanskrit: अथाऽतः सम्प्रवक्ष्यामि राययोगान् द्विजोत्तम । येषां विज्ञानमात्रेण राजपूज्यो जनो भवेत् ॥१॥
transliteration: athā'taḥ sampravakṣyāmi rāyayogān dvijottama . yeṣāṃ vijñānamātreṇa rājapūjyo jano bhavet.
separated_sandhi: atha ataḥ sampravakṣyāmi rāja-yogān dvijottamayeṣām vijñāna-mātreṇa rāja-pūjyaḥ janaḥ bhavet
english: Now, therefore, O best of the twice-born (dvijottama), I shall fully explain the royal combinations (rājayoga) by merely knowing which a person becomes revered by kings.

sanskrit: ये योगाः शम्भुना प्रोक्ताः पुरा शैलसुताग्रतः । तेषां सारमहं वक्ष्ये तवाग्रे द्विजनन्दन ॥२॥
transliteration: ye yogāḥ śambhunā proktāḥ purā śailasutāgrataḥ . teṣāṃ sāramahaṃ vakṣye tavāgre dvijanandana.
separated_sandhi: ye yogāḥ śambhunā proktāḥ purā śaila-sutā-agrataḥteṣām sāram aham vakṣye tava-agre dvija-nandana
english: O delight of the twice-born (dvijanandana), I shall now explain before you the essence of those planetary combinations (yoga) which were formerly declared by Shiva (Śambhu) in the presence of Pārvatī (Śailasutā).

sanskrit: चिन्तयेत् कारकांशे वा जनुर्लग्नेऽथ वा द्विज । राजयोगकरौ द्वौ द्वौ स्फुटौ खेटौ प्रयत्नतः ॥३॥
transliteration: cintayet kārakāṃśe vā janurlagne'tha vā dvija . rājayogakarau dvau dvau sphuṭau kheṭau prayatnataḥ.
separated_sandhi: cintayet kāraka-amśe vā januḥ-lagne atha vā dvijarāja-yoga-karau dvau dvau sphuṭau kheṭau prayatnataḥ
english: O twice-born (dvija), one should carefully consider two clear, distinct planets that cause royal combinations (rājayoga), either in the kārakāṃśa (planet in the navāṃśa of the ātmakāraka) or in the ascendant (lagna) of birth.

sanskrit: आत्मकारकपुत्राभ्यां योगमेकं प्रकल्पयेत् । तनुपञ्चमनाथाभ्यां तथैव द्विजसत्तम ॥४॥
transliteration: ātmakārakaputrābhyāṃ yogamekaṃ prakalpayet . tanupañcamanāthābhyāṃ tathaiva dvijasattama.
separated_sandhi: ātma-kāraka-putrābhyām yogam ekam prakalpayettanu-pañcama-nāthābhyām tathā eva dvija-sattama
english: O best among the twice-born (dvijasattama), one should envision one planetary combination (yoga) from the ātmakāraka and the planet signifying the fifth house (putra). Similarly, another such combination (yoga) should be envisioned from the lord of the ascendant (tanu) and the lord of the fifth house.

sanskrit: लग्नपुत्रेशयोरात्मपुत्रकारकयोर्द्वयोः । सम्बन्धात् पूर्णमर्धं वा पादं वीर्यानुसारतः ॥५॥
transliteration: lagnaputreśayorātmaputrakārakayordvayoḥ . sambandhāt pūrṇamardhaṃ vā pādaṃ vīryānusārataḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagnaputreśayoḥ ātmaputrakārakayoḥ dvayoḥsambandhāt pūrṇam ardham vā pādam vīryānusārataḥ
english: Due to the connection between the lords of the Ascendant (Lagna) and the fifth house, along with the significators (karakas) for the self (ātman) and progeny, a full, half, or quarter beneficial effect arises, depending on their strength.

sanskrit: लग्नेशे पञ्चमे भावे पञ्चमेशे च लग्ने । पुत्रात्मकारकौ विप्र लग्ने च पञ्चमे स्थित ॥६॥
transliteration: lagneśe pañcame bhāve pañcameśe ca lagne . putrātmakārakau vipra lagne ca pañcame sthita.
separated_sandhi: lagneśe pañcame bhāve pañcameśe ca lagneputrātmakārakau vipra lagne ca pañcame sthita
english: O Brahmin, when the lord of the Ascendant is in the fifth house, and the lord of the fifth house is in the Ascendant, and similarly, the significators (karakas) for progeny and self (ātman) are situated in the Ascendant and the fifth house (respectively).

sanskrit: स्वोच्चे स्वंशे स्वभे वाऽपि शुभग्रहनिरीक्षितो । महाराजाख्ययोगोऽत्र जातः ख्यातः सुखान्वितः ॥७॥
transliteration: svocce svaṃśe svabhe vā'pi śubhagrahanirīkṣito . mahārājākhyayogo'tra jātaḥ khyātaḥ sukhānvitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: svocce svaṃśe svabhe vā api śubhagrahanirīkṣitaḥmahārājākhyayogaḥ atra jātaḥ khyātaḥ sukhānvitaḥ
english: When (the planets involved in such a combination) are in their own exaltation sign, own Navamsha (divisional chart position), or own house, and are aspected by benefic planets, then this 'Mahārāja Yoga' (a planetary combination indicating a great ruler) is formed here, which is renowned and brings happiness.

sanskrit: भाग्येशः कारको लग्ने पञ्चमे सप्तमेऽपि वा । राजयोगप्रदातारौ शुभखेटयुतेक्षितौ ॥८॥
transliteration: bhāgyeśaḥ kārako lagne pañcame saptame'pi vā . rājayogapradātārau śubhakheṭayutekṣitau.
separated_sandhi: bhāgyeśaḥ kārakaḥ lagne pañcame saptame apivā rājayogapradātārau śubhakheṭayutekṣitau
english: If the lord of the ninth house (Bhāgyeśa) and the significator (karaka) are situated in the Ascendant, the fifth house, or the seventh house, and if these two are conjoined or aspected by benefic planets, they bestow a royal (Rajayoga) status.

sanskrit: लग्नेशात् कारकाच्चापि धने तुर्ये च पञ्चमे । शुभखेटयुते भावे जातो राजा भवेद् ध्रुवम् ॥९॥
transliteration: lagneśāt kārakāccāpi dhane turye ca pañcame . śubhakheṭayute bhāve jāto rājā bhaved dhruvam.
separated_sandhi: lagneśāt kārakāt ca api dhane turye ca pañcameśubhakheṭayute bhāve jātaḥ rājā bhavet dhruvam
english: If benefic planets are situated in the second, fourth, and fifth houses from the position of the Ascendant lord and from the (general) significator (karaka), then the person born (with such a configuration) certainly becomes a king.

sanskrit: तृतीये षष्ठभे ताभ्यां पापग्रहयुतेक्षिते । जातो राजा भवेदेवं मिश्रे मिश्रफलं वदेत् ॥१०॥
transliteration: tṛtīye ṣaṣṭhabhe tābhyāṃ pāpagrahayutekṣite . jāto rājā bhavedevaṃ miśre miśraphalaṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: tṛtīye ṣaṣṭhabhe tābhyām pāpagrahayutekṣitejātaḥ rājā bhavet evam miśre miśraphalam vadet
english: If the third and sixth houses are conjoined with or aspected by malefic planets, the person born becomes a king. Similarly, if the conditions are mixed, one should declare a mixed outcome.

sanskrit: स्वांशे वा पञ्चमे शुक्रे जीवेन्दुयुतवीक्षिते । लग्ने लग्नपदे वाऽपि राजवर्गो भवेन्नरः ॥११॥
transliteration: svāṃśe vā pañcame śukre jīvenduyutavīkṣite . lagne lagnapade vā'pi rājavargo bhavennaraḥ.
separated_sandhi: svāṃśe vā pañcame śukre jīvenduyutekṣite lagnelagna-pade vā api rājavargaḥ bhavet naraḥ
english: A person becomes of royal lineage if Venus, in its own division (aṃśa) or the fifth house, is conjoined with or aspected by Jupiter and the Moon. Alternatively, the same royal outcome occurs if the ascendant (lagna) or the ascendant-pada (lagna-pada) is similarly influenced.
