sanskrit: जन्माङ्गे कालहोराङ्गे कालङ्गे येन केनचित् । एकग्रहेण सन्दृष्टे त्रितये राजभाग् जनः ॥१२॥
transliteration: janmāṅge kālahorāṅge kālaṅge yena kenacit . ekagraheṇa sandṛṣṭe tritaye rājabhāg janaḥ.
separated_sandhi: janmāṅge kālahorāṅge kālaṅge yena kenacitekagraheṇa sandṛṣṭe tritaye rāja-bhāg janaḥ
english: If the natal ascendant (janmāṅga), the "kālahorā" ascendant (kālahorāṅga), and the "kāla-lagna" (kālaṅga) - all three - are aspected by any one particular planet, then the person becomes a partaker of royal status.

sanskrit: लग्नषड्वर्गके चैवमेकखेटयुतेक्षिते । राजयोगो भवत्येव निर्विशंक द्विजोत्तम ॥१३॥
transliteration: lagnaṣaḍvargake caivamekakheṭayutekṣite . rājayogo bhavatyeva nirviśaṃka dvijottama.
separated_sandhi: lagna-ṣaḍvargake ca evam ekakheṭayutekṣiterāja-yogaḥ bhavati eva nirviśaṅka dvijottama
english: O best among the twice-born (dvija), a royal combination (rāja-yoga) certainly occurs without doubt if the ascendant (lagna) and the "ṣaḍvarga" (six divisional charts) are conjoined with or aspected by a single planet.

sanskrit: पूर्णदृष्टे पूर्नयोगमर्धदृष्टेऽर्धमेव च । पाददृष्टे पादयोगमिति ज्ञेयं क्रमात् फलम् ॥१४॥
transliteration: pūrṇadṛṣṭe pūrnayogamardhadṛṣṭe'rdhameva ca . pādadṛṣṭe pādayogamiti jñeyaṃ kramāt phalam.
separated_sandhi: pūrṇadṛṣṭe pūrṇayogam ardhadṛṣṭe ardham eva capādadṛṣṭe pādayogam iti jñeyam kramāt phalam
english: One should understand the result progressively: a full aspect (dṛṣṭi) yields a full combination (yoga), a half aspect yields half (of the yoga), and a quarter aspect yields a quarter (of the yoga).

sanskrit: लग्नत्रये स्वभोच्चस्थे खेटे राजा भवेद् ध्रुवम् । यद्वा लग्ने दृकाणेंऽशे स्वोच्चखेटयुते द्विज ॥१५॥
transliteration: lagnatraye svabhoccasthe kheṭe rājā bhaved dhruvam . yadvā lagne dṛkāṇeṃ'śe svoccakheṭayute dvija.
separated_sandhi: lagnatraye svabhoccaste kheṭe rājā bhavet dhruvam| yat vā lagne dṛkāṇe aṃśe svocchakheṭayute dvija
english: O Brahmin (dvija), if a planet is in its own sign or exalted when situated in any of the three Lagna divisions (i.e., Lagna, Drekkaṇa, or Navāṃśa), a king will certainly be born. Alternatively, a king is born if the Lagna, Drekkaṇa, or Navāṃśa itself is conjoined with a planet that is situated in its own sign or exaltation sign.

sanskrit: पदे शुभ सचंद्रे च धने देवगुरौ तथा । स्वोच्चस्थखेटसन्दृष्टे राजयोगो न संशयः ॥१६॥
transliteration: pade śubha sacaṃdre ca dhane devagurau tathā . svoccasthakheṭasandṛṣṭe rājayogo na saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: pade śubha sacandre ca dhane devagurau tathā| svoccastakheṭasamdṛṣṭe rājayogaḥ na saṃśayaḥ
english: If benefics are present along with the Moon in the second house (pada), and similarly, Jupiter (devaguru) is in the house of wealth (dhana), and this combination is aspected by a planet situated in its own sign or exaltation sign, then it is undoubtedly a royal combination (rājayoga).

sanskrit: शुभे लग्ने शुभे त्वर्थे तृतीये पापखेचरे । चतुर्थे च शुभे प्राप्ते राजा वा तत्समोऽपि वा ॥१७॥
transliteration: śubhe lagne śubhe tvarthe tṛtīye pāpakhecare . caturthe ca śubhe prāpte rājā vā tatsamo'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: śubhe lagne śubhe tu arthe tṛtīye pāpakhecare |caturthe ca śubhe prāpte rājā vā tatsamaḥ api vā
english: If the Lagna is benefic, and the second house (artha) is also benefic, with a malefic planet in the third house, and a benefic present in the fourth house, then one becomes a king or someone equal to a king.

sanskrit: स्वोच्चस्थो हरिणांको वा जीवो वा शुक्र एव वा । बुधो वा धनभावस्थः श्रियं दिशति देहिनः ॥१८॥
transliteration: svoccastho hariṇāṃko vā jīvo vā śukra eva vā . budho vā dhanabhāvasthaḥ śriyaṃ diśati dehinaḥ.
separated_sandhi: svoccastaḥ hariṇāṅkaḥ vā jīvaḥ vā śukraḥ eva vābudhaḥ vā | dhanabhāvasthaḥ śriyam diśati dehinaḥ
english: If the Moon (hariṇāṅka), Jupiter (jīva), Venus (śukra), or Mercury (budha) is exalted and located in the house of wealth (dhana bhāva), then it bestows prosperity upon the embodied being (dehin).

sanskrit: षष्ठेऽष्टमे तृतीये वा स्वस्वनीचगता ग्रहाः । लग्नं पश्येत् स्वभोच्चस्थो लग्नपो राज्ययोगदः ॥१९॥
transliteration: ṣaṣṭhe'ṣṭame tṛtīye vā svasvanīcagatā grahāḥ . lagnaṃ paśyet svabhoccastho lagnapo rājyayogadaḥ.
separated_sandhi: ṣaṣṭhe aṣṭame tṛtīye vā svasvanīcagatāḥ grahāḥ |lagnam paśyet svabhoccastaḥ lagnapaḥ rājyayogadaḥ
english: If planets are situated in their respective debilitation signs in the sixth, eighth, or third houses, and the Lagna lord, being in its own sign or exalted, aspects the Lagna, then this combination bestows a royal yoga (rājyayoga).

sanskrit: षष्ठाऽष्टमव्ययाधीशा नीचस्था रिपुभेऽस्थगाः । स्वोच्चस्वभगलग्नेशो लग्नं पश्यंश्च राज्यदः ॥२०॥
transliteration: ṣaṣṭhā'ṣṭamavyayādhīśā nīcasthā ripubhe'sthagāḥ . svoccasvabhagalagneśo lagnaṃ paśyaṃśca rājyadaḥ.
separated_sandhi: ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyayādhīśāḥ nīcasthāḥ ripubhe asthagāḥ| svoccasvabhagalagneśaḥ lagnaṃ paśyan ca rājyadaḥ
english: If the lords of the 6th, 8th, and 12th houses are debilitated or located in an enemy's sign, and the lord of the ascendant (lagneśa) is situated in its own exaltation sign or its own sign and aspects the ascendant, then this configuration bestows kingship.

sanskrit: स्वोच्चस्वभस्थराज्येशो लग्नं पश्यंश्च राज्यदः । शुभाः केन्द्रस्थिता वाऽपि राज्यदः नाऽत्र संशयः ॥२१॥
transliteration: svoccasvabhastharājyeśo lagnaṃ paśyaṃśca rājyadaḥ . śubhāḥ kendrasthitā vā'pi rājyadaḥ nā'tra saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: svoccasvabhastharājyeśaḥ lagnaṃ paśyan ca rājyadaḥ |śubhāḥ kendrasthitāḥ vā api rājyadaḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ
english: If the lord of the 10th house (rājyeśa) is situated in its own exaltation sign or its own sign and aspects the ascendant, it grants sovereignty. Alternatively, if benefics are located in angular (kendra) houses, this also confers sovereignty; there is no doubt (saṃśaya) about it.

sanskrit: शुभराशौ शुभांशे च कारको धनवान् भवेत् । तदंशकेन्द्रेषु शुभे नूनं राजा प्रजायते ॥२२॥
transliteration: śubharāśau śubhāṃśe ca kārako dhanavān bhavet . tadaṃśakendreṣu śubhe nūnaṃ rājā prajāyate.
separated_sandhi: śubharāśau śubhāṃśe ca kārakaḥ dhanavān bhavet| tat aṃśakendreṣu śubhe nūnaṃ rājā prajāyate
english: If a significator (kāraka) is located in an auspicious sign and an auspicious divisional chart (aṃśa), the individual becomes wealthy. If a benefic (planet) is situated in the angular (kendra) houses of that divisional chart, a king is certainly born.

sanskrit: लग्नारूढं दारपदं मिथः केन्द्र स्थितं यदि । त्रिलाभे वा त्रिकोणे वा तदा राजा न संशयः ॥२३॥
transliteration: lagnārūḍhaṃ dārapadaṃ mithaḥ kendra sthitaṃ yadi . trilābhe vā trikoṇe vā tadā rājā na saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagnārūḍham dārapadam mithaḥ kendre sthitaṃ yadi| trilābhe vā trikoṇe vā tadā rājā na saṃśayaḥ
english: If the "ārūḍha" of the ascendant (lagnārūḍha) and the "ārūḍha" of the 7th house (dārapada) are mutually situated in an angular (kendra) house, or in the 3rd and 11th houses, or in a trine (trikoṇa) house, then a king is certainly born; there is no doubt (saṃśaya) about it.

sanskrit: भावहोराघटीसंज्ञलग्नानि च प्रपश्यति । स्वोच्चग्र्हो राजयोगो लग्नद्वयमथापि वा ॥२४॥
transliteration: bhāvahorāghaṭīsaṃjñalagnāni ca prapaśyati . svoccagrho rājayogo lagnadvayamathāpi vā.
separated_sandhi: bhāvahorāghaṭīsaṃjñalagnāni ca prapaśyati |svoccagrahaḥ rājyayogaḥ lagnadvayam atha api vā
english: If a planet exalted in its own sign aspects the Bhāva Lagna, Horā Lagna, and Ghaṭī Lagna, or even two of these ascendants, it constitutes a king-making combination (rājayoga).

sanskrit: राशेर्द्रेष्काणतोंऽशाच्च राशेरंशादथापि वा । यद्वा राशिदृकाणाभ्यां लग्नद्रष्टा तु योगदः ॥२५॥
transliteration: rāśerdreṣkāṇatoṃ'śācca rāśeraṃśādathāpi vā . yadvā rāśidṛkāṇābhyāṃ lagnadraṣṭā tu yogadaḥ.
separated_sandhi: rāśeḥ dreṣkāṇataḥ aṃśāt ca rāśeḥ aṃśāt atha api vāyat vā rāśi dṛkkāṇābhyām lagna draṣṭā tu yogadaḥ
english: A planet that aspects the ascendant (lagna), either from the sign's decanate (dreṣkāṇa), or from its navamśa, or furthermore from the sign itself, or from both the sign and the decanate combined, certainly grants a royal combination (rājayoga).

sanskrit: पदे स्वोच्चखगाक्रान्ते चन्द्राक्रान्ते विशेषतः । क्रान्ते च गुरुशुक्राभ्यां केनाप्युच्चग्रहेण वा ॥२६॥
transliteration: pade svoccakhagākrānte candrākrānte viśeṣataḥ . krānte ca guruśukrābhyāṃ kenāpyuccagraheṇa vā.
separated_sandhi: pade sva-ucca-khaga-ākrānte candra-ākrānte viśeṣataḥkrānte ca guru-śukrābhyām kena api ucca-graheṇa vā
english: When the Pāda (a specific sensitive point in a chart) is occupied by its own exalted ruling planet, especially when occupied by the Moon, or if it is occupied by both Jupiter and Venus, or by any other exalted planet, (these conditions lead to a rājayoga).

sanskrit: दुष्टार्गलग्रहाभावे राजयोगो न संशयः । शुभारूढे तत्र चन्द्रे धने देवगुरौ तथा ॥२७॥
transliteration: duṣṭārgalagrahābhāve rājayogo na saṃśayaḥ . śubhārūḍhe tatra candre dhane devagurau tathā.
separated_sandhi: duṣṭa-argala-graha-abhāve rāja-yogaḥ na saṃśayaḥśubha-ārūḍhe tatra candre dhane deva-gurau tathā
english: In the absence of planets causing malefic obstructions (duṣṭārgala), a royal combination (rājayoga) will undoubtedly manifest. Furthermore, if the Moon is in an auspicious āruḍha and Jupiter (devaguru) is in the second house (dhana), a royal combination (rājayoga) forms in that instance as well.

sanskrit: दुःस्थानेशोऽपि नीचस्थो यदि लग्नं प्रपश्यति । तदाऽपि राजयोगः स्यादिति ज्ञेयं द्विजोत्तम ॥२८॥
transliteration: duḥsthāneśo'pi nīcastho yadi lagnaṃ prapaśyati . tadā'pi rājayogaḥ syāditi jñeyaṃ dvijottama.
separated_sandhi: duḥstha-īśaḥ api nīca-sthaḥ yadi lagnaṃ prapaśyatitadā api rāja-yogaḥ syāt iti jñeyam dvija-uttama
english: O best among the twice-born (dvija), know that even if the lord of an inauspicious house (duḥstha) is debilitated (nīcastha) and aspects the ascendant (lagna), then also a royal combination (rājayoga) will arise.

sanskrit: चतुर्थदशमार्थायपतिदृष्टे विलग्नभे । पदाल्लाभे तु शुक्रेण दृष्टेऽप्यारूढभे शुभे ॥२९॥
transliteration: caturthadaśamārthāyapatidṛṣṭe vilagnabhe . padāllābhe tu śukreṇa dṛṣṭe'pyārūḍhabhe śubhe.
separated_sandhi: caturtha-daśama-artha-aya-pati-dṛṣṭe vilagnabhepadāt lābhe tu śukreṇa dṛṣṭe api ārūḍhabhe śubhe
english: When the ascendant (vilagnabha) is aspected by the lord of the fourth, tenth, second (artha), or eleventh (aya) house; and also, when the eleventh house from the Pāda (lābha) is aspected by Venus, even if it is an auspicious Āruḍha sign, (these conditions indicate a royal combination).

sanskrit: राजा वा तत्समो वापि जातको जायते ध्रुवम् । ष।ष्ठाष्टमगते नीचे लग्नं पश्यति वा तथा ॥३०॥
transliteration: rājā vā tatsamo vāpi jātako jāyate dhruvam . ṣa.ṣṭhāṣṭamagate nīce lagnaṃ paśyati vā tathā.
separated_sandhi: rājā vā tatsamaḥ vā api jātakaḥ jāyate dhruvamṣaṣṭhāṣṭamagate nīce lagnam paśyati vā tathā
english: A native is certainly born a king or equal to one if a debilitated planet is situated in the sixth or eighth house, or if it similarly aspects the ascendant (lagna).

sanskrit: तृतीयलाभगे नीचे लग्नं पश्यति वा तथा । लग्नांशकेन्द्रेषु शुभे निग्रहानुग्रहक्षमः ॥३१॥
transliteration: tṛtīyalābhage nīce lagnaṃ paśyati vā tathā . lagnāṃśakendreṣu śubhe nigrahānugrahakṣamaḥ.
separated_sandhi: tṛtīyalābhage nīce lagnam paśyati vā tathālagnāṃśakendreṣu śubhe nigrahānugrahakṣamaḥ
english: If a debilitated planet is situated in the third or eleventh house, or similarly aspects the ascendant (lagna), and if a benefic planet is located in the angular houses (kendras) of the ascendant (lagna) or the navamśa ascendant, then the native becomes capable of both punishment and grace.

sanskrit: अथाऽहं सम्प्रवक्ष्यामि राजयोगादिकं परम् । ग्रहाणां स्थानभेदेन दृष्टियोगवशात् फलम् ॥३२॥
transliteration: athā'haṃ sampravakṣyāmi rājayogādikaṃ param . grahāṇāṃ sthānabhedena dṛṣṭiyogavaśāt phalam.
separated_sandhi: atha aham sampravakṣyāmi rājayogādikam paramgrahāṇām sthānabhedena dṛṣṭiyogavaśāt phalam
english: Now I will fully explain the excellent royal yogas and other combinations. These results arise from the planets' varying placements and the influence of their aspects and conjunctions.

sanskrit: तपःस्थानाधिपो मन्त्री मन्त्राधीशो विशेषतः । उभावन्योन्यसंदृष्टौ जातश्चेदिह राज्यभाक् ॥३३॥
transliteration: tapaḥsthānādhipo mantrī mantrādhīśo viśeṣataḥ . ubhāvanyonyasaṃdṛṣṭau jātaścediha rājyabhāk.
separated_sandhi: tapaḥsthānādhipaḥ mantrī mantrādhiśaḥ viśeṣataḥubhau anyonyasaṃdṛṣṭau jātaḥ cet iha rājyabhāk
english: If the lord of the house of spiritual practices (tapasthānādhipa, 9th house) and the lord of the house of counsel (mantrādhiśa, 5th house) - especially the minister - mutually aspect each other, then the native (jāta) in this life certainly attains kingship (rājyabhāk).

sanskrit: यत्र कुत्रापि संयुक्तौ तौ वापि समसप्तमौ । राजवंशभवो बालो राजा भवति निश्चितम् ॥३४॥
transliteration: yatra kutrāpi saṃyuktau tau vāpi samasaptamau . rājavaṃśabhavo bālo rājā bhavati niścitam.
separated_sandhi: yatra kutra api saṃyuktau tau vā api samasaptamaurājavanśabhavaḥ bālaḥ rājā bhavati niścitam
english: Wherever those two (lords mentioned in the previous verse) are conjoined, or even if they are situated in mutual seventh houses (aspecting each other), then a child born into a royal lineage certainly becomes a king.

sanskrit: वाहनेशस्तथा माने मानेशो वाहने स्थितः । बुद्धधर्माधिपाभ्यां तु दृष्टश्चेदिह राज्यभाक् ॥३५॥
transliteration: vāhaneśastathā māne māneśo vāhane sthitaḥ . buddhadharmādhipābhyāṃ tu dṛṣṭaścediha rājyabhāk.
separated_sandhi: vāhaneśaḥ tathā māne māneśaḥ vāhane sthitaḥbudha-dharma-adhipābhyām tu dṛṣṭaḥ cet iha rājyabhāk
english: If the lord of the fourth house is in the tenth house, and similarly, the lord of the tenth house is situated in the fourth house; and if these two are aspected by Mercury and the lord of the ninth house (dharma lord), then the native will certainly attain sovereignty in this life.

sanskrit: सुतकर्मसुहृल्लग्ननाथा धर्मपसंयुताः । यस्य जन्मनि भूपोऽसौ कीर्त्या ख्यातो दिगन्तरे ॥३६॥
transliteration: sutakarmasuhṛllagnanāthā dharmapasaṃyutāḥ . yasya janmani bhūpo'sau kīrtyā khyāto digantare.
separated_sandhi: suta-karma-suhṛt-lagna-nāthāḥ dharma-pa-saṃyutāḥyasya janmani bhūpaḥ asau kīrtyā khyātaḥ digantare
english: If the lords of the fifth house (children/intellect), tenth house (karma/profession), third house (friends/siblings), and ascendant are conjoined with the lord of the ninth house (dharma lord) at one's birth, then that person will be a king, renowned with fame throughout the directions.

sanskrit: सुखकर्मादिपौ वापि मन्त्रिनाथेन संयुतौ । धर्मनाथेन वा युक्तौ जातश्चेदिह राज्यभाक् ॥३७॥
transliteration: sukhakarmādipau vāpi mantrināthena saṃyutau . dharmanāthena vā yuktau jātaścediha rājyabhāk.
separated_sandhi: sukha-karma-ādhipau vā api mantri-nāthena saṃyutaudharma-nāthena vā yuktau jātaḥ cet iha rājyabhāk
english: Alternatively, if the lords of the fourth house (happiness) and the tenth house (karma/profession) are conjoined with the lord of the fifth house (minister) or with the lord of the ninth house (dharma lord), then the native born in such a condition will certainly attain sovereignty in this life.

sanskrit: सुतेशे धर्मनाथेन युते लग्नेश्वरेण वा । लग्ने सुखेऽथवा माने स्थिते जातो नृपो भवेत् ॥३८॥
transliteration: suteśe dharmanāthena yute lagneśvareṇa vā . lagne sukhe'thavā māne sthite jāto nṛpo bhavet.
separated_sandhi: suteśe dharma-nāthena yute lagneśvareṇa vā lagnesukhe athavā māne sthite jātaḥ nṛpaḥ bhavet
english: If the lord of the fifth house (children/intellect) is conjoined with the lord of the ninth house (dharma lord) or with the ascendant lord, or if the ascendant lord is situated in the ascendant (first house), fourth house (happiness), or tenth house (honor), then the native will become a king.

sanskrit: धर्मस्थाने स्थिते जीवे स्वगृहे भृगुसंयुते । पंचमाधिपयुक्ते वा जातश्चेदिह राजभाक् ॥३९॥
transliteration: dharmasthāne sthite jīve svagṛhe bhṛgusaṃyute . paṃcamādhipayukte vā jātaścediha rājabhāk.
separated_sandhi: dharma-sthāne sthite jīve svagṛhe bhṛgu-saṃyutepañcamādhipa-yukte vā jātaḥ cet iha rājyabhāk
english: If Jupiter (jīva) is situated in the ninth house (dharma sthāna) in its own sign, conjoined with Venus (bhṛgu), or conjoined with the lord of the fifth house, then the native will certainly attain sovereignty in this life.

sanskrit: दिनार्धाच्च निशार्धाच्च परं सार्धद्विनाडिका । शुभा वेला तदुत्पन्नो राजा स्यात्तत्समोऽपि वा ॥४०॥
transliteration: dinārdhācca niśārdhācca paraṃ sārdhadvināḍikā . śubhā velā tadutpanno rājā syāttatsamo'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: dinārdhāt ca niśārdhāt ca param sārdhadvivināḍikāśubhā velā tat utpannaḥ rājā syāt tatsamaḥ api vā
english: A period of two and a half nāḍikās (ghaṭikās) immediately following midday and midnight is considered auspicious. A person born during such a time will become a king or someone equivalent to a king.

sanskrit: चन्द्रः कविं कविश्चन्द्रमन्योऽन्यं त्रिभवस्थितः । मिथः पश्यति वा क्वापि राजयोग उदाहृतः ॥४१॥
transliteration: candraḥ kaviṃ kaviścandramanyo'nyaṃ tribhavasthitaḥ . mithaḥ paśyati vā kvāpi rājayoga udāhṛtaḥ.
separated_sandhi: candraḥ kavim kaviḥ candram anyaḥ anyam tri-bhava-sthitaḥmithas paśyati vā kva api rāja-yogaḥ udāhṛtaḥ
english: If the Moon and Venus (kavi) are mutually in a third-house relationship (one is in the third from the other), and they mutually aspect each other, or (even if not in a third-house relationship) they simply aspect each other from any other position, this is declared a Rāja-yoga.

sanskrit: चन्द्रे वर्गोत्तमांशस्थे सबले चतुरादिभिः । ग्रहैर्दृष्टे च यो जातः स राजा भवति ध्रुवम् ॥४२॥
transliteration: candre vargottamāṃśasthe sabale caturādibhiḥ . grahairdṛṣṭe ca yo jātaḥ sa rājā bhavati dhruvam.
separated_sandhi: candre vargottamāṃśa-sthe sabale catuḥ-ādibhiḥgrahaiḥ dṛṣṭe ca yaḥ jātaḥ saḥ rājā bhavati dhruvam
english: If the Moon is situated in a Vargottama Navāṃśa, is strong, and is aspected by four or more planets, then the person born (jāta) under such conditions certainly becomes a king.

sanskrit: उत्तमांशगते लग्ने चन्द्रान्यैश्चतुरादिभिः । ग्रहैर्दृष्टेऽपि यो जातः सोऽपि भूमिपतिर्भवेत् ॥४३॥
transliteration: uttamāṃśagate lagne candrānyaiścaturādibhiḥ . grahairdṛṣṭe'pi yo jātaḥ so'pi bhūmipatirbhavet.
separated_sandhi: uttamāṃśa-gate lagne candra-anyaiḥ ca catuḥ-ādibhiḥgrahaiḥ dṛṣṭe api yaḥ jātaḥ saḥ api bhūmi-patiḥ bhavet
english: Similarly, if the Ascendant (lagna) is situated in a Vargottama Navāṃśa (uttamāṃśa-gate), and is aspected by four or more planets, excluding the Moon, then such a person born (jāta) also becomes a ruler of the earth (bhūmipati).

sanskrit: त्र्यल्पैरुच्चस्थितैः खेटे राजा राजकुलोद्भवः । अन्यवंशभवस्तत्र राजतुल्यो धनैर्युतः ॥४४॥
transliteration: tryalpairuccasthitaiḥ kheṭe rājā rājakulodbhavaḥ . anyavaṃśabhavastatra rājatulyo dhanairyutaḥ.
separated_sandhi: tri-alpaiḥ uccasthitaiḥ kheṭe rājā rāja-kula-udbhavaḥanya-vaṃśa-bhavaḥ tatra rāja-tulyaḥ dhanaiḥ yutaḥ
english: If three or fewer planets are in exaltation, a king will be born into a royal family. If the person is born into another lineage, they will be equal to a king due to their wealth.

sanskrit: चतुर्भिः पञ्चभिर्वाऽपि खेटैः स्वोच्चत्रिकोणगैः । हीनवंशभवश्चापि राजा भवति निश्चितः ॥४५॥
transliteration: caturbhiḥ pañcabhirvā'pi kheṭaiḥ svoccatrikoṇagaiḥ . hīnavaṃśabhavaścāpi rājā bhavati niścitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: caturbhiḥ pañcabhiḥ vā api kheṭaiḥ svoccattrikoṇagaiḥhīnavamśabhavaḥ ca api rājā bhavati niścitaḥ
english: If four or five planets are situated in their own signs of exaltation or trine, a person, even if born into a humble lineage, certainly becomes a king.

sanskrit: षड्भिरुच्चगतैः खेटैश्चक्रवर्तित्वमाप्नुयात् । एवं बहुविधा राजयोगा ज्ञेया द्विजोत्तम ॥४६॥
transliteration: ṣaḍbhiruccagataiḥ kheṭaiścakravartitvamāpnuyāt . evaṃ bahuvidhā rājayogā jñeyā dvijottama.
separated_sandhi: ṣaḍbhiḥ uccagataiḥ kheṭaiḥ cakravartitvam āpnuyātevam bahuvidhāḥ rājayogāḥ jñeyāḥ dvijottama
english: If six planets are in their signs of exaltation, one attains the status of a universal sovereign. O best among the twice-born (dvija), thus many types of royal combinations (rājayoga) should be understood.

sanskrit: एको गुरुर्भृगुर्वापि बुधो वा स्वोच्चसंस्थितः । शुभग्रहयुते केन्द्रे राजा वा तत्समो भवेत् ॥४७॥
transliteration: eko gururbhṛgurvāpi budho vā svoccasaṃsthitaḥ . śubhagrahayute kendre rājā vā tatsamo bhavet.
separated_sandhi: ekaḥ guruḥ bhṛguḥ vā api budhaḥ vā svoccasaṃsthitaḥśubhagrahayute kendre rājā vā tatsamaḥ bhavet
english: If Jupiter, Venus, or Mercury alone is situated in its own sign of exaltation and is in an angular house (kendra) joined by benefic planets, then the person becomes a king or one equal to a king.

sanskrit: केन्द्रेस्थितैः शुभैः सर्वैः पापैश्च त्रिषडायगैः । हीनवंशोऽपि यो जातः स राजा भवति ध्रुवम् ॥४८॥
transliteration: kendresthitaiḥ śubhaiḥ sarvaiḥ pāpaiśca triṣaḍāyagaiḥ . hīnavaṃśo'pi yo jātaḥ sa rājā bhavati dhruvam.
separated_sandhi: kendre sthitaiḥ śubhaiḥ sarvaiḥ pāpaiḥ ca triṣaḍāyagaiḥhīnavamśaḥ api yaḥ jātaḥ saḥ rājā bhavati dhruvam
english: If all benefic planets are located in angular houses (kendra) and malefic planets are in the 3rd, 6th, or 11th houses, then a person, even if born into a humble lineage, certainly becomes a king.

sanskrit: राज्यनाथे जनुर्लग्नादमात्येशयुतेक्षिते । अमात्यकारकेणापि प्रधानत्वं नृपालये ॥१॥
transliteration: rājyanāthe janurlagnādamātyeśayutekṣite . amātyakārakeṇāpi pradhānatvaṃ nṛpālaye.
separated_sandhi: rājyanāthe januḥ lagnāt amātyeśayutekṣiteamātyakārakeṇa api pradhānatvam nṛpālaye
english: If the lord of the 10th house (rājyanātha) from the natal ascendant is conjoined with or aspected by the lord of the 2nd or 5th house (amātyeśa), and also by the significator of the minister (amātyakāraka), then one attains a principal position (pradhānatva) in the king's palace.

sanskrit: लाभेशवीक्षिते लाभे पापदृग्योगवर्जिते । राज्यभावे तदा विप्र प्रधानत्वं नृपालये ॥२॥
transliteration: lābheśavīkṣite lābhe pāpadṛgyogavarjite . rājyabhāve tadā vipra pradhānatvaṃ nṛpālaye.
separated_sandhi: lābheśavīkṣite lābhe pāpadṛgyogavarjiterājyabhāve tadā vipra pradhānatvaṃ nṛpālaye
english: O Brahmin, if the house of gains (lābha) is aspected by its lord (labheśa) and is free from the aspect or conjunction of malefic planets, then the person will attain a prominent position (pradhānatva) in the royal court (nṛpālaye) concerning matters of the state (rājyabhāva).

sanskrit: अमात्यकारकेणापि कारकेन्द्रेण संयुते । तीव्रबुद्धियुतो बालो राजमन्त्री भवेद् ध्रुवम् ॥३॥
transliteration: amātyakārakeṇāpi kārakendreṇa saṃyute . tīvrabuddhiyuto bālo rājamantrī bhaved dhruvam.
separated_sandhi: amātyakārakeṇa api kārakendreṇa saṃyutetīvrabuddhiyutaḥ bālaḥ rājamantrī bhavet dhruvam
english: Moreover, if [the ascendant or a significant house] is conjoined with the significator of ministers (amātyakāraka) and also with a planetary significator (kāraka) located in a quadrant (kendra), then the person, endowed with keen intelligence (tīvrabuddhiyuta), will certainly become a royal minister (rājamantrī).

sanskrit: अमात्यकारके विप्र सबले शुभसंयुते । स्वक्षेत्रेस्वोच्चगे वापि राजमन्त्री भवेद् ध्रुवम् ॥४॥
transliteration: amātyakārake vipra sabale śubhasaṃyute . svakṣetresvoccage vāpi rājamantrī bhaved dhruvam.
separated_sandhi: amātyakārake vipra sabale śubhasaṃyute svakṣetresvocchage vā api rājamantrī bhavet dhruvam
english: O Brahmin, if the significator of ministers (amātyakāraka) is strong (sabale) and conjoined with auspicious planets (śubhasaṃyute), or if it is in its own sign (svakṣetre) or in its sign of exaltation (svocchage), then the person will certainly become a royal minister (rājamantrī).

sanskrit: अमात्यकारके लग्ने पञ्चमे नवमेऽपि वा । राजमन्त्री भवेद् बालो विख्यातो नाऽत्रसंशयः ॥५॥
transliteration: amātyakārake lagne pañcame navame'pi vā . rājamantrī bhaved bālo vikhyāto nā'trasaṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: amātyakārake lagne pañcame navame api vārājamantrī bhavet bālaḥ vikhyātaḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ
english: If the significator of ministers (amātyakāraka) is in the ascendant (lagna), or in the fifth house (pañcame), or even in the ninth house (navame), then the person (bāla) will become a renowned royal minister (rājamantrī); there is no doubt about this.

sanskrit: आत्मकारकतः केन्द्रे कोणे वाऽमात्यकारके । तदा राजकृपायुक्तो जातो राजाश्रितः सुखी ॥६॥
transliteration: ātmakārakataḥ kendre koṇe vā'mātyakārake . tadā rājakṛpāyukto jāto rājāśritaḥ sukhī.
separated_sandhi: ātmakārakataḥ kendre koṇe vā amātyakāraketadā rājakṛpāyuktaḥ jātaḥ rājāśritaḥ sukhī
english: When the significator of ministers (amātyakāraka) is situated in a quadrant (kendra) or a trine (koṇa) from the significator of the self (ātmakāraka), then the native (jāta) is blessed with royal favor (rājakṛpāyukta), dependent on the king (rājāśrita), and happy (sukhī).

sanskrit: कारकाच्च तथारूढात् लग्नाच्च द्विजसत्तम । तृतीये षष्ठभे पापैः सेनाधीशः प्रजायते ॥७॥
transliteration: kārakācca tathārūḍhāt lagnācca dvijasattama . tṛtīye ṣaṣṭhabhe pāpaiḥ senādhīśaḥ prajāyate.
separated_sandhi: kārakāt ca tathā ārūḍhāt lagnāt ca dvijasattamatṛtīye ṣaṣṭhabhe pāpaiḥ senādhīśaḥ prajāyate
english: O best among brahmins, if malefic planets are situated in the third or sixth house from the significator (kāraka), and similarly from the Arudha Lagna and the Lagna, then a person becomes a commander of an army.

sanskrit: कारके केन्द्रे कोणेषु स्वतुङ्गे वा स्वभे स्थिते । भाग्यपेन युते दृष्टे राजमन्त्री भवेद् ध्रुवम् ॥८॥
transliteration: kārake kendre koṇeṣu svatuṅge vā svabhe sthite . bhāgyapena yute dṛṣṭe rājamantrī bhaved dhruvam.
separated_sandhi: kārake kendre koṇeṣu svatuṅge vā svabhe sthitebhāgyapena yute dṛṣṭe rājamantrī bhavet dhruvam
english: When the significator (kāraka) is situated in an angular (Kendra) house or a trinal (Kona) house, or in its sign of exaltation, or in its own sign, and is conjoined with or aspected by the lord of the ninth house, one certainly becomes a royal minister.

sanskrit: कारके जन्मराशीशे लग्नगे शुभसंयुते । मन्त्रित्वे मुख्ययोगोऽयं वार्धकेनाऽत्र संशयः ॥९॥
transliteration: kārake janmarāśīśe lagnage śubhasaṃyute . mantritve mukhyayogo'yaṃ vārdhakenā'tra saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: kārake janmarāśīśe lagnage śubhasaṃyute mantritvemukhyayogaḥ ayam vārdhakena na atra saṃśayaḥ
english: When the significator (kāraka) and the lord of the birth sign are situated in the Lagna (ascendant) and are conjoined with a benefic planet, this is a primary combination for becoming a minister. There is no doubt that this yoga will manifest in old age.

sanskrit: कारके शुभसंयुक्ते पञ्चमे सप्तमेऽपि वा । दशमे नवमे वाऽपि धनं राजाश्रयाद् भवेत् ॥१०॥
transliteration: kārake śubhasaṃyukte pañcame saptame'pi vā . daśame navame vā'pi dhanaṃ rājāśrayād bhavet.
separated_sandhi: kārake śubhasaṃyukte pañcame saptame api vādaśame navame vā api dhanam rājāśrayāt bhavet
english: When the significator (kāraka) is conjoined with a benefic planet and is situated in the fifth, seventh, tenth, or ninth house, then wealth accrues from royal patronage.

sanskrit: भाग्यभावपदे लग्ने कारके नवमेऽपि वा । राजसम्बन्धयोगोऽयं निर्विशंकं द्विजोत्तम ॥११॥
transliteration: bhāgyabhāvapade lagne kārake navame'pi vā . rājasambandhayogo'yaṃ nirviśaṃkaṃ dvijottama.
separated_sandhi: bhāgyabhāvāpade lagne kārake navame api vārājasambandhayogaḥ ayam nirviśaṅkam dvijottama
english: O best among the twice-born, if the Arudha Pada of the ninth house (Bhāgya Bhāva) is in the Lagna (ascendant), and the significator (kāraka) is in the ninth house, this is undoubtedly a combination for royal association.

sanskrit: लाभेशे लाभभावस्थे पापदृष्टिविवर्जिते । कारके शुभसंयुक्ते लाभस्तस्य नृपालयात् ॥१२॥
transliteration: lābheśe lābhabhāvasthe pāpadṛṣṭivivarjite . kārake śubhasaṃyukte lābhastasya nṛpālayāt.
separated_sandhi: lābheśe lābhabhāvasthe pāpadṛṣṭivivarjitekārake śubhasaṃyukte lābhaḥ tasya nṛpālayāt
english: When the lord of the eleventh house (house of gains) is situated in the eleventh house, free from malefic aspects, and the significator (kāraka) is conjoined with benefic planets, then that person will receive gains from royal sources.

sanskrit: लग्नेशे राज्यभावस्थे राज्येशे लग्नसंस्थिते । प्रबलो राजसम्बन्धयोगोऽयं परिकीर्तितः ॥१३॥
transliteration: lagneśe rājyabhāvasthe rājyeśe lagnasaṃsthite . prabalo rājasambandhayogo'yaṃ parikīrtitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagneśe rājyabhāvasthe rājyeśe lagnasaṃsthiteprabalaḥ rājasambandhayogaḥ ayam parikīrtitaḥ
english: When the lord of the ascendant is situated in the tenth house (house of kingdom), and the lord of the tenth house is situated in the ascendant, this is declared to be a powerful combination (yoga) for royal connections.

sanskrit: कारकात् तुर्यंभावस्थौ सितेन्दू द्विजसत्तम । यस्य जन्मनि जातोऽयं राजचिह्नेन संयुतः ॥१४॥
transliteration: kārakāt turyaṃbhāvasthau sitendū dvijasattama . yasya janmani jāto'yaṃ rājacihnena saṃyutaḥ.
separated_sandhi: kārakāt turyabhāvasthau sitendū dvijasattamayasya janmani jātaḥ ayam rājacihnena saṃyutaḥ
english: O best among brahmins (dvijāsattama), if Venus and the Moon are situated in the fourth house from the significator (kāraka) in a person's birth chart, that person is born endowed with royal emblems.

sanskrit: लग्नेशे कारके वाऽपि पञ्चमेशेन संयुते । केन्द्रे कोणे स्थिते तस्मिन् राजमित्रं भवेन्नरः ॥१५॥
transliteration: lagneśe kārake vā'pi pañcameśena saṃyute . kendre koṇe sthite tasmin rājamitraṃ bhavennaraḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagneśe kārake vā api pañcameśena saṃyute kendrekoṇe sthite tasmin rājamitram bhavet naraḥ
english: When the lord of the ascendant, or the significator (kāraka), is conjoined with the lord of the fifth house, and that combination is situated in an angular (kendra) or trine (kona) house, then that person becomes a friend of the king.

sanskrit: अथाऽतः सम्प्रवक्ष्यामि धनयोगं विशेषतः । यस्मिन् योगे समुत्पन्नो निश्चितो धनवान् भवेत् ॥१॥
transliteration: athā'taḥ sampravakṣyāmi dhanayogaṃ viśeṣataḥ . yasmin yoge samutpanno niścito dhanavān bhavet.
separated_sandhi: atha ataḥ sampravakṣyāmi dhanayogaṃ viśeṣataḥyasmin yoge samutpannaḥ niścitaḥ dhanavān bhavet
english: Now, therefore, I shall fully explain the combinations (yogas) for wealth, particularly those by which a person, if born in such a combination, will certainly become wealthy.

sanskrit: पण्चमे भृगुजक्षेत्रे तस्मिन् शुक्रेण संयुते । लाभे भौमेन संयुक्ते बहुद्रव्यस्य नायकः ॥२॥
transliteration: paṇcame bhṛgujakṣetre tasmin śukreṇa saṃyute . lābhe bhaumena saṃyukte bahudravyasya nāyakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: pañcame bhṛguja-kṣetre tasmin śukreṇa saṃyutelābhe bhaumena saṃyukte bahudravyasya nāyakaḥ
english: If the fifth house is a sign ruled by Venus and is conjoined with Venus, and the eleventh house is conjoined with Mars, the native will be a master of great wealth.

sanskrit: पंचमे तु बुधक्षेत्रे तस्मिन् बुधयुतो सति । चन्द्रे भौमे गुरौ लाभे बहुद्रव्यस्य नायकः ॥३॥
transliteration: paṃcame tu budhakṣetre tasmin budhayuto sati . candre bhaume gurau lābhe bahudravyasya nāyakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: pañcame tu budha-kṣetre tasmin budha-yutaḥ saticandre bhaume gurau lābhe bahudravyasya nāyakaḥ
english: If the fifth house is a sign ruled by Mercury and is conjoined with Mercury, and if the Moon, Mars, and Jupiter are in the eleventh house, the native will be a master of great wealth.

sanskrit: पण्चमे च रविक्षेत्रे तस्मिन् रवियुते सति । लाभे शनीन्दुजीवाढ्ये बहुद्रव्यस्य नायकः ॥४॥
transliteration: paṇcame ca ravikṣetre tasmin raviyute sati . lābhe śanīndujīvāḍhye bahudravyasya nāyakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: pañcame ca ravi-kṣetre tasmin ravi-yute satilābhe śanīndujīvāḍhye bahudravyasya nāyakaḥ
english: And if the fifth house is a sign ruled by the Sun and is conjoined with the Sun, and the eleventh house is endowed with Saturn, the Moon, and Jupiter, the native will be a master of great wealth.

sanskrit: पंचमे तु शनिक्षेत्रे तस्मिन् शनियुते सति । लाभे रवीन्दुसंयुक्ते बहुद्रव्यस्य नायकः ॥५॥
transliteration: paṃcame tu śanikṣetre tasmin śaniyute sati . lābhe ravīndusaṃyukte bahudravyasya nāyakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: pañcame tu śani-kṣetre tasmin śani-yute satilābhe ravīndusaṃyukte bahudravyasya nāyakaḥ
english: But if the fifth house is a sign ruled by Saturn and is conjoined with Saturn, and the eleventh house is conjoined with the Sun and the Moon, the native will be a master of great wealth.

sanskrit: पंचमे तु गुरुक्षेत्रे तस्मिन् गुरुयुते सति । लाभे चन्द्रसुते जातो बहुद्रव्यस्य नायकः ॥६॥
transliteration: paṃcame tu gurukṣetre tasmin guruyute sati . lābhe candrasute jāto bahudravyasya nāyakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: pañcame tu guru-kṣetre tasmin guru-yute satilābhe candra-sute jāte bahudravyasya nāyakaḥ
english: But if the fifth house is a sign ruled by Jupiter and is conjoined with Jupiter, and Mercury (the son of the Moon) is situated in the eleventh house, the native will be a master of great wealth.

sanskrit: पंचमे तु कुजक्षेत्रे तस्मिन् कुजयुते सति । लाभस्थे भृगुपुत्रे तु बहुद्रव्यस्य नायकः ॥७॥
transliteration: paṃcame tu kujakṣetre tasmin kujayute sati . lābhasthe bhṛguputre tu bahudravyasya nāyakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: pañcame tu kujakṣetre tasmin kujayute satilābhaste bhṛguputre tu bahudravyasya nāyakaḥ
english: If the fifth house is a sign of Mars, and Mars is conjoined with it, and furthermore, if Venus is situated in the eleventh house (the house of gain), then the person born will be a leader of great wealth.

sanskrit: पंचमे तु शशिक्षेत्रे तस्मिन् शशियुते सति । शनौ लाभस्थिते जातो बहुद्रव्यस्य नायकः ॥८॥
transliteration: paṃcame tu śaśikṣetre tasmin śaśiyute sati . śanau lābhasthite jāto bahudravyasya nāyakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: pañcame tu śaśikṣetre tasmin śaśiyute satiśanau lābhasthite jātaḥ bahudravyasya nāyakaḥ
english: If the fifth house is a sign of the Moon, and the Moon is conjoined with it, and furthermore, if Saturn is situated in the eleventh house (the house of gain), then the person born will be a leader of great wealth.

sanskrit: भानुक्षेत्रगते लग्ने तस्मिन् भानुयुते पुनः । भौमेन गुरुणा युक्ते दृष्टे जातो युतो धनैः ॥९॥
transliteration: bhānukṣetragate lagne tasmin bhānuyute punaḥ . bhaumena guruṇā yukte dṛṣṭe jāto yuto dhanaiḥ.
separated_sandhi: bhānukṣetragate lagne tasmin bhānuyute punaḥbhaumena guruṇā yukte dṛṣṭe jātaḥ yutaḥ dhanaiḥ
english: If the ascendant (lagna) is in a sign ruled by the Sun, and the Sun is conjoined with it, and furthermore, if it is conjoined with or aspected by Mars and Jupiter, the person born will be endowed with wealth.

sanskrit: चन्द्रक्षेत्रगते लग्ने तस्मिन् चन्द्रयुते सति । बुधेन गुरुणा युक्ते दृष्टे जातो धनी भवेत् ॥१०॥
transliteration: candrakṣetragate lagne tasmin candrayute sati . budhena guruṇā yukte dṛṣṭe jāto dhanī bhavet.
separated_sandhi: candrakṣetragate lagne tasmin candrayute satibudhena guruṇā yukte dṛṣṭe jātaḥ dhanī bhavet
english: If the ascendant (lagna) is in a sign ruled by the Moon, and the Moon is conjoined with it, and furthermore, if it is conjoined with or aspected by Mercury and Jupiter, the person born will become wealthy.

sanskrit: भौमक्षेत्रे गते लग्ने तस्मिन् भौमेन संयुते । सौम्यशुक्रार्कजैर्युक्ते दृष्टे श्रीमान्नरो भवेत् ॥११॥
transliteration: bhaumakṣetre gate lagne tasmin bhaumena saṃyute . saumyaśukrārkajairyukte dṛṣṭe śrīmānnaro bhavet.
separated_sandhi: bhaumakṣetre gate lagne tasmin bhaumena saṃyutesaumyaśukrārkajaiḥ yukte dṛṣṭe śrīmān naraḥ bhavet
english: If the ascendant (lagna) is in a sign ruled by Mars, and Mars is conjoined with it, and furthermore, if it is conjoined with or aspected by Mercury, Venus, and Saturn, the person born will become a prosperous man.

sanskrit: बुधक्षेत्रगते लग्ने तस्मिन् बुधयुते सति । शनिजीवयुते दृष्टे जातो धनयुतो भवेत् ॥१२॥
transliteration: budhakṣetragate lagne tasmin budhayute sati . śanijīvayute dṛṣṭe jāto dhanayuto bhavet.
separated_sandhi: budhakṣetragate lagne tasmin budhayute satiśanijīvayute dṛṣṭe jātaḥ dhanayutaḥ bhavet
english: If the ascendant (lagna) is situated in a sign owned by Mercury, and that ascendant is conjoined with Mercury, and it is aspected by Saturn and Jupiter, then the person born will become endowed with wealth.

sanskrit: गुरुक्षेत्रगते लग्ने तस्मिन् गुरुयुते सति । बुधभौमयुते दृष्टे जायते धनवान्नरः ॥१३॥
transliteration: gurukṣetragate lagne tasmin guruyute sati . budhabhaumayute dṛṣṭe jāyate dhanavānnaraḥ.
separated_sandhi: gurukṣetragate lagne tasmin guruyute satibudhabhaumayute dṛṣṭe jāyate dhanavān naraḥ
english: If the ascendant (lagna) is situated in a sign owned by Jupiter, and that ascendant is conjoined with Jupiter, and it is aspected by Mercury and Mars, then a wealthy person will be born.

sanskrit: भृगुक्षेत्रगते लग्ने तस्मिन् भृगुयुते सति । शनिसौम्ययुते दृष्टे यो जातः स धनी भवेत् ॥१४॥
transliteration: bhṛgukṣetragate lagne tasmin bhṛguyute sati . śanisaumyayute dṛṣṭe yo jātaḥ sa dhanī bhavet.
separated_sandhi: bhṛgukṣetragate lagne tasmin bhṛguyute satiśanisaumyayute dṛṣṭe yaḥ jātaḥ sa dhanī bhavet
english: If the ascendant (lagna) is situated in a sign owned by Venus (Bhṛgu), and that ascendant is conjoined with Venus, and it is aspected by Saturn and Mercury, then the person born will become wealthy.

sanskrit: शनिक्षेत्रगते लग्ने तस्मिन् शनियुते सति । भौमेन गुरुणा युक्ते दृष्टे जातो धनैर्युतः ॥१५॥
transliteration: śanikṣetragate lagne tasmin śaniyute sati . bhaumena guruṇā yukte dṛṣṭe jāto dhanairyutaḥ.
separated_sandhi: śanikṣetragate lagne tasmin śaniyute satibhaumena guruṇā yukte dṛṣṭe jātaḥ dhanaiḥ yutaḥ
english: If the ascendant (lagna) is situated in a sign owned by Saturn, and that ascendant is conjoined with Saturn, and it is conjoined with Mars and Jupiter, and aspected, then the person born will be endowed with wealth.

sanskrit: धनदौ धर्मधीनाथौ ये वा ताभ्यां युता ग्रहाः । तेऽपि स्वस्वदशाकाले धनदा नाऽत्र संशयः ॥१६॥
transliteration: dhanadau dharmadhīnāthau ye vā tābhyāṃ yutā grahāḥ . te'pi svasvadaśākāle dhanadā nā'tra saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: dhanadau dharmadhīnāthau ye vā tābhyām yutāḥ grahāḥte api svasvadaśākāle dhanadāḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ
english: The lords of the second house (representing wealth) and the ninth house (representing fortune or natural law (dharma)), or any planets conjoined with these two, certainly bestow wealth during their own planetary periods (daśā kāla). There is no doubt about this.

sanskrit: ग्रहाणामुक्तयोगेषु क्रूरसौम्यविभागतः । बलाबलविवेकेन फलमूह्यं विचक्षणैः ॥१७॥
transliteration: grahāṇāmuktayogeṣu krūrasaumyavibhāgataḥ . balābalavivekena phalamūhyaṃ vicakṣaṇaiḥ.
separated_sandhi: grahāṇām ukta yogeṣu krūrasaumyavibhāgataḥbalābalavivekena phalam ūhyam vicakṣaṇaiḥ
english: From the stated combinations (yoga) of planets, results should be inferred by the wise, considering the classification into malefic and benefic planets and by discerning their strengths and weaknesses.

sanskrit: केन्द्रेशः पारिजातस्थस्तदा दाता भवेन्नरः । उत्तमे ह्युत्तमो दाता गोपुरे पुरुषत्वयुक् ॥१८॥
transliteration: kendreśaḥ pārijātasthastadā dātā bhavennaraḥ . uttame hyuttamo dātā gopure puruṣatvayuk.
separated_sandhi: kendreśaḥ pārijāta-sthaḥ tadā dātā bhavet naraḥuttame hi uttamaḥ dātā gopure puruṣatva-yuk
english: If the lord of an angle house (kendra) is situated in the Pārijāta (divisional chart condition), then the person (nara) becomes a giver. If indeed in the Uttama (divisional chart condition), he becomes an excellent giver. In the Gopura (divisional chart condition), he is endowed with manliness (puruṣatva).

sanskrit: सिंहासने भवेन्मान्यः शूरः पारावतांशके । सभाध्यक्षो देवलोके ब्रह्मलोके मुनिर्मत । ऐरावतांशके तृष्टो दिग्योगो नैव जायते ॥१९॥
transliteration: siṃhāsane bhavenmānyaḥ śūraḥ pārāvatāṃśake . sabhādhyakṣo devaloke brahmaloke munirmata . airāvatāṃśake tṛṣṭo digyogo naiva jāyate.
separated_sandhi: siṃhāsane bhavet mānyaḥ śūraḥpārāvatāṃśake sabhādhyakṣaḥ devalokebrahmaloke muniḥ mataḥ airāvatāṃśaketuṣṭaḥ digyogaḥ na eva jāyate
english: In the Siṃhāsana (divisional chart condition), one becomes respected and brave. In the Pārāvata (divisional chart condition), one becomes the president of an assembly. In the world of the gods (Devaloka) and the world of Brahmā (Brahmaloka), one is considered a sage (muni). In the Airāvata (divisional chart condition), one is content, and no directional combination (dikyoga) occurs.

sanskrit: पारिजाते सुताधीशे विद्या चैव कुलोचिता । उत्तमे चोत्तमा ज्ञेया गोपुरे भुवनांकिता ॥२०॥
transliteration: pārijāte sutādhīśe vidyā caiva kulocitā . uttame cottamā jñeyā gopure bhuvanāṃkitā.
separated_sandhi: pārijāte suta-adhīśe vidyā ca eva kula-ucitāuttame ca uttamā jñeyā gopure bhuvana-aṅkitā
english: When the lord of the 5th house (suta) is in the Pārijāta (divisional chart condition), the person possesses knowledge indeed suitable for their family. In the Uttama (divisional chart condition), excellent knowledge should be known. And in the Gopura (divisional chart condition), the knowledge is renowned throughout the world.

sanskrit: सिंहासने तथा वाच्या साचिव्येन समन्विता । पारावते च विज्ञेया ब्रह्मविद्या द्विजोत्तम ॥२१॥
transliteration: siṃhāsane tathā vācyā sācivyena samanvitā . pārāvate ca vijñeyā brahmavidyā dvijottama.
separated_sandhi: siṃhāsane tathā vācyā sācivyena samanvitāpārāvate ca vijñeyā brahma-vidyā dvija-uttama
english: Similarly, in the Siṃhāsana (divisional chart condition), knowledge associated with ministerial duties should be predicted. And, O best of the twice-born, in the Pārāvata (divisional chart condition), the knowledge of (brahman) should be known.

sanskrit: सुतेशे देवलोकस्थे कर्मयोगश्च जायते । उपासना ब्रह्मलोके भक्तिस्त्वरावतांशके ॥२२॥
transliteration: suteśe devalokasthe karmayogaśca jāyate . upāsanā brahmaloke bhaktistvarāvatāṃśake.
separated_sandhi: suteśe devalokasthe karma yogaḥ ca jāyateupāsanā brahmaloke bhaktiḥ tvarāvatāṃśake
english: When the lord of the fifth house (suteśa) is situated in the divine realm (devaloka), the path of action (karma yoga) manifests. Worship (upāsanā) occurs in Brahmaloka, and devotion (bhakti) arises in the Tvarāvatāṃśa division.

sanskrit: धर्मेशे पारिजातस्थे तीर्थकृत्त्वत्र जन्मनि । पूर्वजन्मन्यपि ज्ञेयस्तीर्थकृच्चोत्तमांशके ॥२३॥
transliteration: dharmeśe pārijātasthe tīrthakṛttvatra janmani . pūrvajanmanyapi jñeyastīrthakṛccottamāṃśake.
separated_sandhi: dharmeśe pārijātasthe tīrthakṛt tu atra janmanipūrvajanmani api jñeyaḥ tīrthakṛt ca uttamāṃśake
english: When the lord of the ninth house (dharma) is situated in the Pārijāta division, the native becomes a pilgrim (tīrthakṛt) in this birth. It should also be understood that such a person was a pilgrim (tīrthakṛt) in a previous birth if they are also in the Uttamāṃśa (best division).

sanskrit: गौपुरे मखकर्ता च परे चैवाऽत्र जन्मनि । सिंहासने भवेद्वीरः सत्यवादी जितेन्द्रियः ॥२४॥
transliteration: gaupure makhakartā ca pare caivā'tra janmani . siṃhāsane bhavedvīraḥ satyavādī jitendriyaḥ.
separated_sandhi: gaupure makha-kartā ca pare ca eva atra janmanisiṃhāsane bhavet vīraḥ satyavādī jitendriyaḥ
english: When a planet is in the Gaupura division, the native performs Vedic rituals (yajña) both in this life and in others. When in the Siṃhāsana division, they become a brave person, a truth-speaker, and one who has conquered their senses (jitendriya).

sanskrit: सर्वधर्मान् परित्यज्य ब्रह्मैकपदमाश्रितः । पारवते च परमो हंअश्चैवात्र जन्मनि ॥२५॥
transliteration: sarvadharmān parityajya brahmaikapadamāśritaḥ . pāravate ca paramo haṃaścaivātra janmani.
separated_sandhi: sarvadharmān parityajya brahma-ekapadam āśritaḥpāravate ca paramaḥ haṃsaḥ ca eva atra janmani
english: Having abandoned all prescribed duties (dharma), one resorts to the sole state of Brahman. And in the Pāravata division, the native becomes a supreme, liberated soul (haṃsa) in this very birth.

sanskrit: लगुडी वा त्रिदण्डी स्याद्देवलोके न संशयः । ब्रह्मलोके शक्रतदं याति कृत्वाऽश्वमेधकम् ॥२६॥
transliteration: laguḍī vā tridaṇḍī syāddevaloke na saṃśayaḥ . brahmaloke śakratadaṃ yāti kṛtvā'śvamedhakam.
separated_sandhi: laguḍī vā tri-daṇḍī syāt deva-loke na saṃśayaḥbrahma-loke śakra-tadaṃ yāti kṛtvā aśva-medhakam
english: One will certainly become either a staff-bearer or a triple-staffed ascetic in the realm of the gods. Having performed the Aśvamedha Vedic ritual (yajña), one attains the realm of Brahma and the status of Indra.

sanskrit: ऐरावते तु धर्मात्मा स्वयं धर्मो भविष्यति । श्रीरामः कुन्तिपुत्राद्यो यथा जातो द्विजोत्तम ॥२७॥
transliteration: airāvate tu dharmātmā svayaṃ dharmo bhaviṣyati . śrīrāmaḥ kuntiputrādyo yathā jāto dvijottama.
separated_sandhi: airāvate tu dharmātmā svayam dharmaḥ bhaviṣyatiśrīrāmaḥ kuntiputrādiḥ yathā jātaḥ dvijottamaḥ
english: In the Airāvata yoga, a righteous soul (dharmātmā) will be born, who himself will embody righteousness (dharma). This is just as Śrī Rāma and preeminent figures like the sons of Kuntī were born as the best among the twice-born (dvijottama).

sanskrit: विष्णुस्थानं च केन्द्रं स्याल्लक्ष्मीस्थानं त्रिकोणकम् । तदीशयोश्च सम्बन्धाद्राजयोगः पुरोदितः ॥२८॥
transliteration: viṣṇusthānaṃ ca kendraṃ syāllakṣmīsthānaṃ trikoṇakam . tadīśayośca sambandhādrājayogaḥ puroditaḥ.
separated_sandhi: viṣṇusthānaṃ ca kendram syāt lakṣmīsthānaṃ trikoṇakamtat īśayoḥ ca sambandhāt rājayogaḥ puroditaḥ
english: The houses of Viṣṇu are the quadrants (kendram), and the houses of Lakṣmī are the trines (trikoṇakam). From the connection of their respective lords, a Rājayoga is declared.

sanskrit: पारिजाते स्थितौ तौ चेन्नृपो लोकानुरक्षकः । उत्तमे चोत्तमो भूपो गजवाजिरथादिमान् ॥२९॥
transliteration: pārijāte sthitau tau cennṛpo lokānurakṣakaḥ . uttame cottamo bhūpo gajavājirathādimān.
separated_sandhi: pārijāte sthitau tau cet nṛpaḥ lokānurakṣakaḥuttame ca uttamaḥ bhūpaḥ gajavājirathādimān
english: If those two (lords) are situated in the Pārijāta yoga, the king (nṛpa) will be a protector of the people. And if they are in the Uttama yoga, the king (bhūpa) will be most excellent, endowed with elephants, horses, chariots, and so forth.

sanskrit: गोपुरे नृपशार्दूलः पूजितांध्रिर्नृपैर्भवेत् । सिंहासने चक्रवर्ती सर्वभूमिप्रपालकः ॥३०॥
transliteration: gopure nṛpaśārdūlaḥ pūjitāṃdhrirnṛpairbhavet . siṃhāsane cakravartī sarvabhūmiprapālakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: gopure nṛpaśārdūlaḥ pūjitāṅghriḥ nṛpaiḥ bhavetsiṃhāsane cakravartī sarvabhūmiprapālakaḥ
english: In the Gopura yoga, one becomes a lion among kings (nṛpaśārdūla), whose feet are worshipped by other kings. In the Siṃhāsana yoga, one becomes a universal emperor (cakravartī) and a protector of all lands.

sanskrit: अस्मिन् योगे हरिश्चन्द्रो मनुश्चैवोत्तमस्तथा । बलिर्वैश्वानरो जातस्तथान्ये चक्रवर्तिनः ॥३१॥
transliteration: asmin yoge hariścandro manuścaivottamastathā . balirvaiśvānaro jātastathānye cakravartinaḥ.
separated_sandhi: asmin yoge hariścandraḥ manuḥ ca eva uttamaḥ tathābaliḥ vaiśvānaraḥ jātaḥ tathā anye cakravartinaḥ
english: In this yoga, figures like Hariścandra, Manu, and Uttama were born. Similarly, Bali, Vaiśvānara, and other universal emperors (cakravartin) also came into being.

sanskrit: वर्तमानयुगे जातस्तथा राजा युधिष्ठिरः । भविता शालिवाहाद्यस्तथैव द्विजसत्तम ॥३२॥
transliteration: vartamānayuge jātastathā rājā yudhiṣṭhiraḥ . bhavitā śālivāhādyastathaiva dvijasattama.
separated_sandhi: vartamāna yuge jātaḥ tathā rājā yudhiṣṭhiraḥbhavitā śālivāhādyaḥ tathā eva dvijasattama
english: O best among the twice-born (dvijasattama), King Yudhishthira was born in the current epoch, and similarly, Shālivāhana and others will also be born.

sanskrit: पारावतांशकेऽप्येवं जाता मन्वादयस्तथा । विष्णोः सर्वेऽवताराश्च जायन्ते देवलोकके ॥३३॥
transliteration: pārāvatāṃśake'pyevaṃ jātā manvādayastathā . viṣṇoḥ sarve'vatārāśca jāyante devalokake.
separated_sandhi: pārāvatāṃśake api evam jātāḥ manu ādayaḥ tathāviṣṇoḥ sarve avatārāḥ ca jāyante devalokake
english: Even in the Pārāvata division (aṃśaka), the Manus and others are born thus. Moreover, all the incarnations (avatāra) of Vishnu are born in the divine realm (devaloka).

sanskrit: ब्रह्मलोकके तु ब्रह्माद्या जायन्ते विश्वपालकाः । ऐरावतांशके जातः पूर्व स्वायंभुवो मनुः ॥३४॥
transliteration: brahmalokake tu brahmādyā jāyante viśvapālakāḥ . airāvatāṃśake jātaḥ pūrva svāyaṃbhuvo manuḥ.
separated_sandhi: brahmalokake tu brahmādyaḥ jāyante viśvapālakāḥairāvatāṃśake jātaḥ pūrvam svāyaṃbhuvaḥ manuḥ
english: But in the Brahmaloka (realm of Brahma), Brahma and others, the protectors of the universe, are born. Formerly, Svayambhuva Manu was born in the Airāvata division (aṃśaka).

sanskrit: बहवो धनदा योगा श्रुतास्त्वत्तो मया मुने । दरिद्रजन्मदान् योगान् कृपया कथय प्रभो ॥१॥
transliteration: bahavo dhanadā yogā śrutāstvatto mayā mune . daridrajanmadān yogān kṛpayā kathaya prabho.
separated_sandhi: bahavaḥ dhanadāḥ yogāḥ śrutāḥ tvattaḥ mayā munedaridrajanmadān yogān kṛpayā kathaya prabho
english: O sage (muni), I have heard many wealth-giving combinations (yoga) from you. O lord, please mercifully tell me about the combinations (yoga) that cause poverty.

sanskrit: लग्नेशे च व्ययस्थाने व्ययेशे लग्नमागते । मारकेशयुते दृष्टे निर्धनो जायते नरः ॥२॥
transliteration: lagneśe ca vyayasthāne vyayeśe lagnamāgate . mārakeśayute dṛṣṭe nirdhano jāyate naraḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagneśe ca vyayasthāne vyayeśe lagnam āgatemārakeśa yute dṛṣṭe nirdhanaḥ jāyate naraḥ
english: When the lord of the Ascendant (lagneśa) is in the house of expenditure (vyayasthāna) and the lord of expenditure (vyayeśa) has entered the Ascendant (lagna), and if this configuration is conjoined with or aspected by a death-inflicting planet (mārakeśa), then a person becomes poor.

sanskrit: लग्नेशे षष्ठभावस्थे षष्ठेशे लग्नमागते । मारकेशेन युग्दृष्टे धनहीनः प्रजायते ॥३॥
transliteration: lagneśe ṣaṣṭhabhāvasthe ṣaṣṭheśe lagnamāgate . mārakeśena yugdṛṣṭe dhanahīnaḥ prajāyate.
separated_sandhi: lagneśe ṣaṣṭhabhāvasthe ṣaṣṭheśe lagnam āgatemārakeśena yugdṛṣṭe dhana-hīnaḥ prajāyate
english: If the lord of the ascendant is situated in the sixth house, and the lord of the sixth house has entered the ascendant, and either of these lords is conjoined with or aspected by a death-inflicting planet (mārakeśa), then the person is born devoid of wealth.

sanskrit: लग्नेन्दू केतुसंयुक्तौ लग्नपे निधनं गते । मारकेशयुते दृष्टे जातो वै निर्धनो भवेत् ॥४॥
transliteration: lagnendū ketusaṃyuktau lagnape nidhanaṃ gate . mārakeśayute dṛṣṭe jāto vai nirdhano bhavet.
separated_sandhi: lagna indū ketusaṃyuktau lagnape nidhanam gatemārakeśayute dṛṣṭe jātaḥ vai nirdhanaḥ bhavet
english: If the lord of the ascendant and the Moon are conjoined with Ketu, and when the lord of the ascendant is situated in the eighth house and is conjoined with or aspected by a death-inflicting planet (mārakeśa), then the person born will certainly become devoid of wealth.

sanskrit: षष्ठाष्टमव्ययगते लग्नपे पापसंयुते । धनेशे रिपुभे नीचे राजवंश्योऽपि निर्धनः ॥५॥
transliteration: ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyayagate lagnape pāpasaṃyute . dhaneśe ripubhe nīce rājavaṃśyo'pi nirdhanaḥ.
separated_sandhi: ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyayagate lagnape pāpasaṃyutedhaneśe ripubhe nīce rājavaṃśyaḥ api nirdhanaḥ
english: If the lord of the ascendant is situated in the sixth, eighth, or twelfth house and is conjoined with a malefic planet, and if the lord of wealth (the second house) is in an enemy's sign and in a state of debilitation, then even a person born in a royal lineage will be devoid of wealth.

sanskrit: त्रिकेशेन समायुक्ते पापदृष्टे विलग्नपे । शनियुक्तेऽधवा सौम्यैरदृष्टे निर्धनो नरः ॥६॥
transliteration: trikeśena samāyukte pāpadṛṣṭe vilagnape . śaniyukte'dhavā saumyairadṛṣṭe nirdhano naraḥ.
separated_sandhi: trikeśena samāyukte pāpadṛṣṭe vilagnapeśaniyukte athavā saumyaiḥ adṛṣṭe nirdhanaḥ naraḥ
english: If the lord of the ascendant is conjoined with the lord of a trika house (6th, 8th, or 12th), or aspected by a malefic planet, or conjoined with Saturn, or un-aspected by benefics, then such a person will be devoid of wealth.

sanskrit: मन्त्रेशो धर्मनाथश्च क्रमात् षष्ठव्ययस्थितौ । दृष्टौ चेन्मारकेशेन निर्धनो जायते नरः ॥७॥
transliteration: mantreśo dharmanāthaśca kramāt ṣaṣṭhavyayasthitau . dṛṣṭau cenmārakeśena nirdhano jāyate naraḥ.
separated_sandhi: mantreśaḥ dharmanāthaḥ ca kramāt ṣaṣṭhavyayasthitaudṛṣṭau cet mārakeśena nirdhanaḥ jāyate naraḥ
english: If the lord of the fifth house and the lord of the ninth house (dharma) are situated respectively in the sixth and twelfth houses, and if they are aspected by a death-inflicting planet (mārakeśa), then such a person is born devoid of wealth.

sanskrit: पापग्रहे लग्नगते राज्यधर्माधिपौ विना । मारकेशयुते दृष्टे जातः स्यन्निर्धनो भवेत् ॥८॥
transliteration: pāpagrahe lagnagate rājyadharmādhipau vinā . mārakeśayute dṛṣṭe jātaḥ syannirdhano bhavet.
separated_sandhi: pāpa-grahe lagna-gate rājya-dharma-adhipau vināmārakeśa-yute dṛṣṭe jātaḥ syāt nirdhanaḥ bhavet
english: If malefic planets are in the ascendant, and the lords of the tenth and ninth houses are absent (from auspicious positions), and if the ascendant is conjoined with or aspected by a killer planet (mārakeśa), then the native will be poor.

sanskrit: त्रिकेशा यत्र भावस्था तद्भावेशास्त्रिकस्थिताः । पापदृष्टयुत बालो दुःखाक्रान्तश्च निर्धनः ॥९॥
transliteration: trikeśā yatra bhāvasthā tadbhāveśāstrikasthitāḥ . pāpadṛṣṭayuta bālo duḥkhākrāntaśca nirdhanaḥ.
separated_sandhi: trikeśāḥ yatra bhāvasthāḥ tad-bhāveśāḥ trika-sthitāḥpāpa-dṛṣṭa-yutaḥ bālaḥ duḥkha-ākrāntaḥ ca nirdhanaḥ
english: If the lords of the trika houses (the 6th, 8th, and 12th) are situated in a particular house, and the lord of that specific house is then situated in a trika house, and this planetary configuration is aspected by or conjoined with malefic planets, the native becomes afflicted by sorrow and is poor.

sanskrit: चन्द्राक्रान्तनवंशेशो मारकेशयुतो यदि । मारकस्थानगो वाऽपि जातोऽत्र निर्धनो नरः ॥१०॥
transliteration: candrākrāntanavaṃśeśo mārakeśayuto yadi . mārakasthānago vā'pi jāto'tra nirdhano naraḥ.
separated_sandhi: candra-ākrānta-navaṃśa-īśaḥ mārakeśa-yutaḥ yadimāraka-sthāna-gaḥ vā api jātaḥ atra nirdhanaḥ naraḥ
english: If the lord of the navamsha sign occupied by the Moon is conjoined with a killer planet (mārakeśa), or if it is situated in a killer (māraka) house, then the native is poor.

sanskrit: लग्नेशलग्नभागेशौ रिश्फरन्ध्रारिगौ यदि । मारकेशयुतौ दृष्टौ जातोऽसौ निर्धनो नरः ॥११॥
transliteration: lagneśalagnabhāgeśau riśpharandhrārigau yadi . mārakeśayutau dṛṣṭau jāto'sau nirdhano naraḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagna-īśa-lagna-bhāga-īśau riṣpha-randhra-ari-gauyadi mārakeśa-yutau dṛṣṭau jātaḥ asau nirdhanaḥ naraḥ
english: If the lord of the ascendant and the lord of the navamsha sign of the ascendant are situated in the twelfth (riṣpha), eighth (randhra), or sixth (ari) houses, and if they are conjoined with or aspected by a killer planet (mārakeśa), then that native is poor.

sanskrit: शुभस्थानगताः पापाः पापस्थानगताः शुभाः । निर्धनो जायते बालो भोजनेन प्रपीडितः ॥१२॥
transliteration: śubhasthānagatāḥ pāpāḥ pāpasthānagatāḥ śubhāḥ . nirdhano jāyate bālo bhojanena prapīḍitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: śubha-sthāna-gatāḥ pāpāḥ pāpa-sthāna-gatāḥ śubhāḥnirdhanaḥ jāyate bālaḥ bhojanena prapīḍitaḥ
english: If malefic planets are situated in auspicious houses and benefic planets are situated in inauspicious houses, the native becomes poor and suffers from lack of food.

sanskrit: कोणेशदृष्टिहीना ये त्रिकेशैः संयुता ग्रहाः । ते सर्वे स्वदशाकाले धनहानिकराः स्मृताः ॥१३॥
transliteration: koṇeśadṛṣṭihīnā ye trikeśaiḥ saṃyutā grahāḥ . te sarve svadaśākāle dhanahānikarāḥ smṛtāḥ.
separated_sandhi: koṇeśa-dṛṣṭi-hīnāḥ ye trikeśaiḥ saṃyutāḥ grahāḥte sarve sva-daśā-kāle dhana-hāni-karāḥ smṛtāḥ
english: Planets that lack the aspect of the lords of trine houses (1st, 5th, 9th) and are associated with the lords of the "trika" houses (6th, 8th, 12th) are all considered to cause financial loss during their own planetary periods (daśā).

sanskrit: कारकाद् वा विलग्नाद् वा रन्ध्रेरिष्फे द्विजोत्तम । कारकाङ्गपयोदृष्ट्या धनहीनः प्रजायते ॥१४॥
transliteration: kārakād vā vilagnād vā randhreriṣphe dvijottama . kārakāṅgapayodṛṣṭyā dhanahīnaḥ prajāyate.
separated_sandhi: kārakāt vā vilagnāt vā randhre riṣphe dvijottamakāraka-aṅgayoḥ dṛṣṭyā dhana-hīnaḥ prajāyate
english: O best of Brahmins (dvijottama), if, counting either from the significator (kāraka) or from the ascendant, there are planets in the 8th or 12th houses, and these positions are aspected by the significator and the ascendant, then a person becomes deprived of wealth.

sanskrit: कारकेशो व्ययं स्वस्मात् लग्नेशो लग्नतो व्ययम् । वीक्षते चेत् तदा बालो व्ययशीलो भवेद्ध्रुवम् ॥१५॥
transliteration: kārakeśo vyayaṃ svasmāt lagneśo lagnato vyayam . vīkṣate cet tadā bālo vyayaśīlo bhaveddhruvam.
separated_sandhi: kārakeśaḥ vyayam svasmāt lagneśaḥ lagnataḥ vyayamvīkṣate cet tadā bālaḥ vyayaśīlaḥ bhavet dhruvam
english: If the lord of the significator (kāraka) aspects its own 12th house (vyaya), and the lord of the ascendant aspects the 12th house (vyaya) from the ascendant, then the native will certainly be prone to excessive expenditure.

sanskrit: अथ दारिद्र्ययोगांस्त् कथयामि सभङ्गकान् । धनसंस्थौ तु भौमार्की कथितौ धननाशकौ ॥१६॥
transliteration: atha dāridryayogāṃst kathayāmi sabhaṅgakān . dhanasaṃsthau tu bhaumārkī kathitau dhananāśakau.
separated_sandhi: atha dāridrya-yogān tu kathayāmi sa-bhaṅgakāndhana-saṃsthau tu bhauma-ārkī kathitau dhana-nāśakau
english: Now I will explain the planetary combinations that cause poverty, along with their potential cancellations. Indeed, Mars and Saturn, when situated in the 2nd house (house of wealth), are said to be destroyers of wealth.

sanskrit: बुधेक्षितौ महावित्तं कुरुतो नात्र संशयः । निःस्वतां कुरुते तत्र रविर्नित्यं यमेक्षितः ॥१७॥
transliteration: budhekṣitau mahāvittaṃ kuruto nātra saṃśayaḥ . niḥsvatāṃ kurute tatra ravirnityaṃ yamekṣitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: budha-īkṣitau mahā-vittam kurutaḥ na atra saṃśayaḥniḥsvatām kurute tatra raviḥ nityam yama-īkṣitaḥ
english: However, if these two (Mars and Saturn, mentioned in the previous verse) are aspected by Mercury, they create great wealth; there is no doubt about this. On the other hand, the Sun, when aspected by Saturn (Yama), always causes poverty.

sanskrit: महाधनयुतं ख्यातं शन्यदृष्टः करोत्यसौ । शनिश्चापि रवेर्दृष्ट्या फलमेवं प्रयच्छति ॥१८॥
transliteration: mahādhanayutaṃ khyātaṃ śanyadṛṣṭaḥ karotyasau . śaniścāpi raverdṛṣṭyā phalamevaṃ prayacchati.
separated_sandhi: mahādhana-yutam khyātam śani-adṛṣṭaḥ karoti asau |śaniḥ ca api raveḥ dṛṣṭyā phalam evam prayacchati
english: That (combination) which is not aspected by Saturn makes one endowed with great wealth and famous. And Saturn, when aspected by the Sun, also produces such a result.

sanskrit: धनाध्नाख्ययोगौ च कथितौ भवता मुने । नराणामायुषो ज्ञानं कथयस्व महामते ॥१॥
transliteration: dhanādhnākhyayogau ca kathitau bhavatā mune . narāṇāmāyuṣo jñānaṃ kathayasva mahāmate.
separated_sandhi: dhana-ādhnā-ākhya-yogau ca kathitau bhavatā mune| narāṇām āyuṣaḥ jñānam kathayasva mahāmate
english: O sage, you have described the two yogas (planetary combinations) known as Dhana and Adhna. Now, O great-minded one, please explain the knowledge concerning the lifespan of human beings.

sanskrit: साधु पृष्टं त्वया विप्र जनानां च हितेच्छया । कथयाम्यायुषो ज्ञानं दुर्ज्ञेयं यत् सुरैरपि ॥२॥
transliteration: sādhu pṛṣṭaṃ tvayā vipra janānāṃ ca hitecchayā . kathayāmyāyuṣo jñānaṃ durjñeyaṃ yat surairapi.
separated_sandhi: sādhu pṛṣṭam tvayā vipra janānām ca hita-icchayā| kathayāmi āyuṣaḥ jñānam durjñeyam yat suraiḥ api
english: O Brahmin, you have asked well, and with a desire for the welfare of people. I will now explain the knowledge concerning lifespan, which is difficult to comprehend even for the gods.

sanskrit: आयुर्ज्ञानविभेदास्तु बहुभिर्बहुधोदिताः । तेषां सारांशमादाय प्र्वदामि तवाऽग्रतः ॥३॥
transliteration: āyurjñānavibhedāstu bahubhirbahudhoditāḥ . teṣāṃ sārāṃśamādāya prvadāmi tavā'grataḥ.
separated_sandhi: āyuḥ-jñāna-vibhedāḥ tu bahubhiḥ bahudhā uditāḥ| teṣām sāra-aṃśam ādāya pravadāmi tava agrataḥ
english: The various divisions of the knowledge of lifespan have been expounded in diverse ways by many (sages). Taking the essence of those, I will now explain it before you.

sanskrit: स्वोच्चनीचादिसंस्थित्या ग्रहा आयुःप्रदायकाः । स्वस्ववीर्यवशैर्नैवं नक्षत्राण् च राशयः ॥४॥
transliteration: svoccanīcādisaṃsthityā grahā āyuḥpradāyakāḥ . svasvavīryavaśairnaivaṃ nakṣatrāṇ ca rāśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: sva-ucca-nīca-ādi-saṃsthityā grahāḥ āyuḥ-pradāyakāḥ| sva-sva-vīrya-vaśaiḥ na evam nakṣatrāṇi ca rāśayaḥ
english: Planets are givers of lifespan based on their positions, such as their own exaltation or debilitation. However, nakṣatras (lunar mansions) and zodiac signs (rāśis) do not (grant lifespan) in this manner merely by their respective strengths.

sanskrit: पिण्डायुः प्रथमं तत्र ग्रहस्थितिवशादहम् । कथयामि द्विजश्रेष्ठ श्रणुष्वेकाग्रमानसः ॥५॥
transliteration: piṇḍāyuḥ prathamaṃ tatra grahasthitivaśādaham . kathayāmi dvijaśreṣṭha śraṇuṣvekāgramānasaḥ.
separated_sandhi: piṇḍāyuḥ prathamam tatra grahasthitivāśāt ahamkathayāmi dvijaśreṣṭha śṛṇuṣva ekāgramānasaḥ
english: O best of the twice-born (dvija), I will first explain the aggregate longevity (piṇḍāyuḥ) based on the positions of the planets. Please listen with a focused mind.

sanskrit: क्रमात् सूर्यादिखेटेषु स्वस्वोच्चस्थानगेष्विह । नन्देन्दवस्तच्वमितास्तिथयोऽर्काः शरेन्दवः ॥६॥
transliteration: kramāt sūryādikheṭeṣu svasvoccasthānageṣviha . nandendavastacvamitāstithayo'rkāḥ śarendavaḥ.
separated_sandhi: kramāt sūryādikheṭeṣu svasvoccasthānageṣu ihanandendavaḥ tattvamitāḥ tithayaḥ arkāḥ śarendavaḥ
english: Here, in order, for the Sun and other planets (sūryādikheṭa) when they are in their own exaltation signs, the assigned years (for aggregate longevity) are: nineteen (for the Sun), twenty-five (tattvas) for the Moon, fifteen (tithis) for Mars, twelve (arkas) for Mercury, and fifteen (śaras and indus) for Jupiter.

sanskrit: प्रकृयतो विंशतिश्चाब्दा आयुःपिण्डाः प्रकीर्तिताः । नीचगेष्वेतदर्धञ्च ज्ञेयं मध्येऽनुपाततः ॥७॥
transliteration: prakṛyato viṃśatiścābdā āyuḥpiṇḍāḥ prakīrtitāḥ . nīcageṣvetadardhañca jñeyaṃ madhye'nupātataḥ.
separated_sandhi: prakṛyato viṃśatiḥ ca abdāḥ āyuḥpiṇḍāḥ prakīrtitāḥnīcageṣu etadardham ca jñeyam madhye anupātataḥ
english: For Venus, twenty-one (prakṛti), and for Saturn, twenty years are declared as the aggregate longevity (āyuḥpiṇḍa). For planets in debilitation (nīcaga), half of this (period) should be known, and for those in intermediate positions, it should be (calculated) by proportion.

sanskrit: स्वच्चशुद्धौ ग्रहः शोध्यः षड्भादूनो भमण्ड्लात् । स्वपिण्डगुणितो भक्तो भादिमानेन वत्सराः ॥८॥
transliteration: svaccaśuddhau grahaḥ śodhyaḥ ṣaḍbhādūno bhamaṇḍlāt . svapiṇḍaguṇito bhakto bhādimānena vatsarāḥ.
separated_sandhi: svoccaśuddhau grahaḥ śodhyaḥ ṣaḍbhādūno bhamandrātsvapiṇḍaguṇito bhakto bhādimānena vatsarāḥ
english: For the calculation related to a planet's exaltation (svoccaśuddhi), the planet's position (from its exaltation point) should be rectified: if it (the arc from exaltation) is greater than six signs, then it must be subtracted from the entire zodiac (bhamaṇḍala) to yield a value less than six signs. This (rectified) arc, multiplied by the planet's own (maximum) aggregate longevity (piṇḍāyuḥ) and then divided by the measure of the signs (i.e., the full zodiac), yields the (proportional) years.

sanskrit: अस्तगस्तु हरेत्स्वार्ध विना शुक्रशनैश्चरौ । वक्रचारं विना त्र्यांशां शज्ञुराशौ हरेद् ग्रहः ॥९॥
transliteration: astagastu haretsvārdha vinā śukraśanaiścarau . vakracāraṃ vinā tryāṃśāṃ śajñurāśau hared grahaḥ.
separated_sandhi: astagaḥ tu haret svārdham vinā śukraśanaiścarauvakracāram vinā tryaṃśām śajñurāśau haret grahaḥ
english: A planet (graha) that is combust (astaga) should lose half of its (allotted) years, except for Venus and Saturn. A planet (graha) should deduct one-third (of its years) if it is in retrograde motion (vakracāra), and if it is situated in an enemy's sign.

sanskrit: सर्वार्धत्रिचतुःपञ्चषष्ठभागं क्रमाद् ग्रहः । व्ययाद्वामं स्थितः पापो हरेत् सौम्यश्च तद्दलम् ॥१०॥
transliteration: sarvārdhatricatuḥpañcaṣaṣṭhabhāgaṃ kramād grahaḥ . vyayādvāmaṃ sthitaḥ pāpo haret saumyaśca taddalam.
separated_sandhi: sarva-ardha-tri-catuḥ-pañca-ṣaṣṭha-bhāgam kramāt grahaḥvyayāt vāmam sthitaḥ pāpaḥ haret saumyaḥ ca tat-dalam
english: Planets (graha) contribute their shares successively (kramād) as full, half, one-third, one-fourth, one-fifth, and one-sixth portions. If a malefic planet (pāpa) is situated (sthita) in the house preceding (vāmaṃ) the twelfth house (vyayād), it completely takes away (haret) [its assigned share]. A benefic planet (saumya) also takes away (haret) half (dala) of that [malefic's destructive effect].

sanskrit: एकभे तु बहुष्वेको हरेत्स्वांशां बली ग्रहः । नाऽत्र क्षीणस्य चन्द्रस्य पापत्वं मुनिभिः स्मृतम् ॥११॥
transliteration: ekabhe tu bahuṣveko haretsvāṃśāṃ balī grahaḥ . nā'tra kṣīṇasya candrasya pāpatvaṃ munibhiḥ smṛtam.
separated_sandhi: ekabhe tu bahuṣu ekaḥ haret svām aṃśām balī grahaḥna atra kṣīṇasya candrasya pāpatvam munibhiḥ smṛtam
english: But (tu) when many planets (bahuṣu) are in one sign (ekabhe), the one strong planet (balī graha) secures (haret) its own share (svāṃ aṃśā). However, in this matter (atra), the malefic nature (pāpatva) of the waning Moon (kṣīṇasya candrasya) is not considered (na smṛtam) by the sages (munibhiḥ).

sanskrit: लग्नांशलिप्तिका हत्वा प्रत्येकं विहगायुषा । भाज्या मण्डललिप्ताभिर्लब्धं वर्षादि शोधयेत् ॥१२॥
transliteration: lagnāṃśaliptikā hatvā pratyekaṃ vihagāyuṣā . bhājyā maṇḍalaliptābhirlabdhaṃ varṣādi śodhayet.
separated_sandhi: lagna-aṃśa-liptikā hatvā pratyekam vihaga-āyuṣābhājyā maṇḍala-liptābhiḥ labdham varṣa-ādi śodhayet
english: Having multiplied (hatvā) the arc minutes of the ascendant's degree (lagnāṃśaliptikā) individually (pratyekam) by the life-span (āyus) of each planet (vihaga), the result should be divided (bhājyā) by the total arc minutes of a circle (maṇḍalaliptābhiḥ). The obtained (labdha) quotient should then be refined (śodhayet) into years and so on (varṣādi).

sanskrit: स्वायुषो लग्नगे सूर्ये मङ्गले च शनैश्चरे । तदर्धं शुभसंदृष्टे पातयेद् द्विजसत्तम ॥१३॥
transliteration: svāyuṣo lagnage sūrye maṅgale ca śanaiścare . tadardhaṃ śubhasaṃdṛṣṭe pātayed dvijasattama.
separated_sandhi: sva-āyuṣaḥ lagnage sūrye maṅgale ca śanaiścaretat-ardham śubha-saṃdṛṣṭe pātayet dvija-sattama
english: O best among the twice-born (dvijasattama)! When the Sun (sūrya), Mars (maṅgala), and Saturn (śanaiścara) are in the ascendant (lagna), half (ardha) of their own (sva) life-span (āyus) should be reduced (pātayed). If (they are) aspected (saṃdṛṣṭa) by a benefic (śubha), [the reduction is modified].

sanskrit: लग्नराशिसमाश्चाब्दा भागाद्यैरनुपाततः । मासादिका इतीच्छन्ति लग्नायुः केऽपि कोविदाः ॥१४॥
transliteration: lagnarāśisamāścābdā bhāgādyairanupātataḥ . māsādikā itīcchanti lagnāyuḥ ke'pi kovidāḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagna-rāśi-samāḥ ca abdāḥ bhāga-ādyaiḥ anupātataḥmāsa-ādikāḥ iti icchanti lagna-āyuḥ ke api kovidāḥ
english: Some (ke'pi) experts (kovidāḥ) thus (iti) consider (icchanti) the life-span (āyus) of the ascendant (lagna) to be years (abdāḥ) equal to the number of the ascendant sign (rāśi-samāḥ), and (ca) months and so on (māsādikāḥ) proportionally (anupātataḥ) according to degrees (bhāga) and so on.

sanskrit: लग्नादायोंऽशतुल्यः स्यादन्तरे चाऽनुपाततः । तत्पतौ बलसंयुक्ते राशितुल्यं च भाघिपे ॥१५॥
transliteration: lagnādāyoṃ'śatulyaḥ syādantare cā'nupātataḥ . tatpatau balasaṃyukte rāśitulyaṃ ca bhāghipe.
separated_sandhi: lagṇāt āyaḥ aṃśatulyaḥ syāt antare ca anupātataḥtatpatau balasaṃyukte rāśitulyaṃ ca bhāghipe
english: The results (āyā) from the Lagna (ascendant) should be considered equivalent to the degrees (aṃśa). In the sub-periods (antara), this is determined proportionally. If the lord of that house (tatpati) is endowed with strength, and especially if the lord of the house (bhāghipa) is powerful, then the results should be considered equivalent to the full sign (rāśi).

sanskrit: अथ विप्र निसर्गायुः खेटानां कथयाम्यहम् । चन्द्रारज्ञसितेज्यार्कशनीनां क्रमशोब्दका ॥१६॥
transliteration: atha vipra nisargāyuḥ kheṭānāṃ kathayāmyaham . candrārajñasitejyārkaśanīnāṃ kramaśobdakā.
separated_sandhi: atha vipra nisargāyuḥ kheṭānāṃ kathayāmi ahamcandrārjñasitejārkaśanīnāṃ kramaśaḥ abdaka
english: Now, O Brahmin, I shall explain to you the natural (nisarga) lifespans (āyu) of the planets (kheṭa). These are the years (abdaka) for the Moon, Mars, Mercury, Venus, Jupiter, Sun, and Saturn, in that order.

sanskrit: एकद्वयंकनखा धृत्यः कृतिः पंचाशदेव हि । जन्मकालात् क्रमाज् ज्ञेया दशाश्चैता निसर्गजाः ॥१७॥
transliteration: ekadvayaṃkanakhā dhṛtyaḥ kṛtiḥ paṃcāśadeva hi . janmakālāt kramāj jñeyā daśāścaitā nisargajāḥ.
separated_sandhi: eka dvayam aṅkanakhā dhṛtyaḥ kṛtiḥ pañcāśat eva hijanmakālāt kramāt jñeyāḥ daśāḥ ca etāḥ nisargajāḥ
english: The (years are) one, two, nine, twenty, eighteen, twenty, and fifty respectively. These natural (nisargaja) planetary periods (daśā) should be understood sequentially from the time of birth.

sanskrit: अथांशायु सलग्नानां खेटानां कथयाम्यहम् । नवांश्राशितुल्यानि खेटो वर्षाणि यच्छति ॥१८॥
transliteration: athāṃśāyu salagnānāṃ kheṭānāṃ kathayāmyaham . navāṃśrāśitulyāni kheṭo varṣāṇi yacchati.
separated_sandhi: atha aṃśāyuḥ salagnānāṃ kheṭānāṃ kathayāmi ahamnavāṃśa rāśitulyāni kheṭaḥ varṣāṇi yacchati
english: Now, I shall explain the Aṃśāyu (lifespan calculation based on degrees/divisional charts) of the planets (kheṭa), along with the Lagna (ascendant). A planet bestows years (varṣāṇi) equivalent to the number of navāṃśa divisions and signs (rāśi) it occupies.

sanskrit: भादिं खगं खगैः सूर्यैर्हत्वा तद्भगणादिकम् । कृत्वाऽर्क्रशेषितं ज्ञेयमब्दाद्यंशायुषः स्फुटम् ॥१९॥
transliteration: bhādiṃ khagaṃ khagaiḥ sūryairhatvā tadbhagaṇādikam . kṛtvā'rkraśeṣitaṃ jñeyamabdādyaṃśāyuṣaḥ sphuṭam.
separated_sandhi: bhā ādim khagaṃ khagaiḥ sūryaiḥ hatvā tadbhagaṇādikamkṛtvā arkaśeṣitaṃ jñeyam abda ādi aṃśāyuṣaḥ sphuṭam
english: Take the planet's position from the beginning of its sign. Multiply this (value) by the numerical factors corresponding to 'planets' (khaga) and 'suns' (sūrya) (i.e., by 120). Then, after performing the necessary calculations related to its revolutions, the remainder derived from the Sun's (position or unit of 12) should be ascertained. This process reveals the precise Aṃśāyu, starting with years and continuing to subdivisions.

sanskrit: पिण्डायुरिव तत्रापि हानिं कुर्याद् विचक्षणः । अत्राऽपरो विशेषोऽपि कैम्चिद् विज्ञैरुदाहृतः ॥२०॥
transliteration: piṇḍāyuriva tatrāpi hāniṃ kuryād vicakṣaṇaḥ . atrā'paro viśeṣo'pi kaimcid vijñairudāhṛtaḥ.
separated_sandhi: piṇḍāyuḥ iva tatra api hānim kuryāt vicakṣaṇaḥatra aparaḥ viśeṣaḥ api kaimcit vijñaiḥ udāhṛtaḥ
english: An expert (vicakṣaṇa) should make reductions (hāni) here, just as in the piṇḍāyu calculation. Furthermore, some scholars (vijña) have also mentioned another specific rule (viśeṣa) in this regard.

sanskrit: साधितायुः खगे स्वोच्चे स्वर्क्षे वा त्रिगुणं स्मृतम् । द्विगुणं स्वनवांशस्थे स्वद्रेष्काणे तथोत्तमे ॥२१॥
transliteration: sādhitāyuḥ khage svocce svarkṣe vā triguṇaṃ smṛtam . dviguṇaṃ svanavāṃśasthe svadreṣkāṇe tathottame.
separated_sandhi: sādhitāyuḥ khage svocce svarkṣe vā triguṇam smṛtamdviguṇam svanavāṃśasthe svadreṣkāṇe tathā uttame
english: The calculated longevity is considered threefold when a planet (khaga) is in its own exaltation sign (svocca) or its own zodiacal sign (svarkṣa). It is considered twofold when a planet is situated in its own navāṃśa, and similarly in its own dreṣkāṇa, or in an excellent (uttama) position.

sanskrit: उभयत्र गते खेटे कार्यं त्रिगुणमेव हि । हानिद्वयेऽर्धहानिः स्यादित्यायुः प्रस्फुटं नृणाम् ॥२२॥
transliteration: ubhayatra gate kheṭe kāryaṃ triguṇameva hi . hānidvaye'rdhahāniḥ syādityāyuḥ prasphuṭaṃ nṛṇām.
separated_sandhi: ubhayatra gate kheṭe kāryam triguṇam eva hi hānidvaye ardha hāniḥ syāt iti āyuḥ prasphuṭam nṛṇām
english: When a planet (kheṭa) is situated in both types of places (e.g., exaltation and own sign), the calculation (kārya) should indeed be threefold. If there are two decrements (hāni), then only half of that decrement should apply. Thus, the precise longevity (āyu) of human beings (nṛṇām) is determined.

sanskrit: एवं संसाध्य चान्येषां हन्यात् स्वस्वपरायुषा । नृणां परायुषा भक्त्वा तेषामायुः स्फुटं भवेत् ॥२३॥
transliteration: evaṃ saṃsādhya cānyeṣāṃ hanyāt svasvaparāyuṣā . nṛṇāṃ parāyuṣā bhaktvā teṣāmāyuḥ sphuṭaṃ bhavet.
separated_sandhi: evam saṃsādhya ca anyeṣām hanyāt svasvaparāyuṣānṛṇām parāyuṣā bhaktvā teṣām āyuḥ sphuṭam bhavet
english: Thus, having thoroughly calculated (saṃsādhya) the longevity for others, one should adjust (hanyāt) with their respective maximum longevity (svasvaparāyuṣā). By dividing (bhaktvā) this derived longevity for humans (nṛṇām) by the (overall) maximum longevity (parāyuṣā), their precise (sphuṭa) longevity (āyu) will be obtained (bhavet).

sanskrit: अथायुः परमं वक्ष्ये नानाजातिसमुद्भवम् । अनन्तसंख्यं देवानामृषीणां च द्विजोत्तम ॥२४॥
transliteration: athāyuḥ paramaṃ vakṣye nānājātisamudbhavam . anantasaṃkhyaṃ devānāmṛṣīṇāṃ ca dvijottama.
separated_sandhi: atha āyuḥ paramam vakṣye nānājātisamudbhavamanantasaṃkhyam devānām ṛṣīṇām ca dvijottama
english: Now, O best among the twice-born (dvijottama), I shall explain the supreme (parama) longevity (āyu) that arises from various species (nānājāti), as well as the infinite lifespan of the gods (deva) and sages (ṛṣi).

sanskrit: गृध्रोलूक्शुकध्वांक्षसर्पाणां च सहस्रकम् । श्येनवानरभल्लुकमण्डूकानां शतत्रयम् ॥२५॥
transliteration: gṛdhrolūkśukadhvāṃkṣasarpāṇāṃ ca sahasrakam . śyenavānarabhallukamaṇḍūkānāṃ śatatrayam.
separated_sandhi: gṛdhrolūkśukadhvāṅkṣasarpāṇām ca sahasrakamśyenavānarabhallukamaṇḍūkānām śatatrayam
english: A thousand years are allotted for vultures, owls, parrots, crows, and snakes. Three hundred years are for hawks, monkeys, bears, and frogs.

sanskrit: पंचशदुत्तरशतं राक्षसानां प्रकीर्तितम् । नगणां कुञ्जराणां च विंशोत्तरशतं तथा ॥२६॥
transliteration: paṃcaśaduttaraśataṃ rākṣasānāṃ prakīrtitam . nagaṇāṃ kuñjarāṇāṃ ca viṃśottaraśataṃ tathā.
separated_sandhi: pañcaśaduttaraśatam rākṣasānām prakīrtitamnagaṇām kuñjarāṇām ca viṃśottaraśatam tathā
english: A hundred and fifty years are declared for demons (rākṣasa). Likewise, a hundred and twenty years are for mountains and elephants.

sanskrit: द्वात्रिंशद् घोटकानाञ्च पंचविंशत् खरोष्ट्रयोः । वृषाणां महिषाणां च चतुर्विंशतिवत्सरम् ॥२७॥
transliteration: dvātriṃśad ghoṭakānāñca paṃcaviṃśat kharoṣṭrayoḥ . vṛṣāṇāṃ mahiṣāṇāṃ ca caturviṃśativatsaram.
separated_sandhi: dvātriṃśat ghoṭakānām ca pañcaviṃśat kharoṣṭrayoḥvṛṣāṇām mahiṣāṇām ca caturviṃśativatsaram
english: Thirty-two years are for horses, and twenty-five for donkeys and camels. For bulls and buffaloes, it is twenty-four years.

sanskrit: विंशत्यायुर्मयूराणां छागादीनां च षोडश । हंसानां पंचनव च पिकानां द्वादशाब्दकाः ॥२८॥
transliteration: viṃśatyāyurmayūrāṇāṃ chāgādīnāṃ ca ṣoḍaśa . haṃsānāṃ paṃcanava ca pikānāṃ dvādaśābdakāḥ.
separated_sandhi: viṃśati āyuḥ mayūrāṇām chāgādīnām ca ṣoḍaśahaṃsānām pañcanava ca pikānām dvādaśābdakāḥ
english: The lifespan for peacocks is twenty years. For goats and similar animals, it is sixteen years. For swans, it is ninety-five years, and for cuckoos, twelve years.

sanskrit: शुनां पारावतानां च कुक्कुटानां द्वादशाब्दकाः । बुद्बुदाद्यण्डजानां च परायुः सप्तवत्सराः ॥२९॥
transliteration: śunāṃ pārāvatānāṃ ca kukkuṭānāṃ dvādaśābdakāḥ . budbudādyaṇḍajānāṃ ca parāyuḥ saptavatsarāḥ.
separated_sandhi: śunām pārāvatānām ca kukkuṭānām dvādaśābdakāḥbudbudādyaṇḍajānām ca parāyuḥ saptavatsarāḥ
english: For dogs, pigeons, and chickens, the lifespan is twelve years. And for fish and other oviparous (egg-born) creatures, the maximum lifespan is seven years.

sanskrit: यदेतदधुना प्रोक्तं त्रिधायुद्विजसत्तम । तेषु किञ्च कदा ग्राह्यमिति ते कथयाम्यहम् ॥३०॥
transliteration: yadetadadhunā proktaṃ tridhāyudvijasattama . teṣu kiñca kadā grāhyamiti te kathayāmyaham.
separated_sandhi: yat etat adhunā proktam tridhāyuḥ dvijasattamateṣu kiñca kadā grāhyam iti te kathayāmi aham
english: O best among the twice-born (dvija), I will now explain to you when each of the three types of longevity (āyuḥ), which have just been described, should be considered.

sanskrit: विलग्नपे बलोपेते शुभदृष्टेंश्शसम्भवभ् । रवौ पिंडोद्भवं ग्राह्यं चन्द्रे नैसर्गिकं तथा ॥३१॥
transliteration: vilagnape balopete śubhadṛṣṭeṃśśasambhavabh . ravau piṃḍodbhavaṃ grāhyaṃ candre naisargikaṃ tathā.
separated_sandhi: vilagnape balopete śubhadṛṣṭe aṃśasambhavaṃ ravaupiṇḍodbhavaṃ grāhyam candre naisargikaṃ tathā
english: When the lord of the Ascendant (lagnape) is strong (balopete) and well-aspected (śubhadṛṣṭe), the longevity (āyuḥ) calculated from the divisional charts (aṃśasambhava) should be considered for the Sun. For the Moon, the natural (naisargika) longevity should be taken.

sanskrit: बलसाम्ये द्वयोर्योगदलमायुः प्रकीर्तितम् । त्रयाणां त्रियुतेस्त्र्यंशसमं ज्ञेयं द्विजोत्तम ॥३२॥
transliteration: balasāmye dvayoryogadalamāyuḥ prakīrtitam . trayāṇāṃ triyutestryaṃśasamaṃ jñeyaṃ dvijottama.
separated_sandhi: balasāmye dvayoḥ yogadalam āyus prakīrtitamtrayāṇām triyuteḥ tryaṃśasamam jñeyam dvijottama
english: O best among the twice-born (dvija), in case of equal strength (balasāmye) of both, half of their combined sum is declared as the longevity (āyuḥ). For the three (methods), when combined, one-third of their sum should be understood as equal.

sanskrit: अथाऽन्यदपि वक्ष्यामि श्र्रिणु त्वं द्विजसत्तम । कैश्चिल्लग्नाष्टमेशाभ्यां मन्देन्दुभ्यां तथैव च ॥३३॥
transliteration: athā'nyadapi vakṣyāmi śrriṇu tvaṃ dvijasattama . kaiścillagnāṣṭameśābhyāṃ mandendubhyāṃ tathaiva ca.
separated_sandhi: atha anyat api vakṣyāmi śṛṇu tvam dvijasattama kaiścitlagna-aṣṭameśābhyām manda-indubhyām tathā eva ca
english: O best among the twice-born (dvija), now listen, I will also explain another method. Some (astrologers calculate longevity) from the lords of the Ascendant (lagna) and the eighth house, and similarly from the Moon (indu) and Saturn (manda).

sanskrit: लग्नहोराविलग्नाभ्यां स्फुटमायुः प्रकीर्तितम् । आदौ लग्नाष्टमेशाभ्यां योगमेकं विचिन्तयेत् ॥३४॥
transliteration: lagnahorāvilagnābhyāṃ sphuṭamāyuḥ prakīrtitam . ādau lagnāṣṭameśābhyāṃ yogamekaṃ vicintayet.
separated_sandhi: lagna-horā-vilagnābhyām sphuṭam āyus prakīrtitamādau lagna-aṣṭameśābhyām yogam ekam vicintayet
english: The precise (sphuṭa) longevity (āyuḥ) is declared (to be calculated) from the Ascendant (lagna) and the Horā Ascendant (horā-vilagna). First, one should consider one method (yoga) from the lords of the Ascendant and the eighth house.

sanskrit: द्वितीयं मन्दचन्द्राभ्यां योगं पश्येद् द्विजोत्तम । लग्नहोराविलग्नाभ्यां तृतीयं परिचिन्तयेत् ॥३५॥
transliteration: dvitīyaṃ mandacandrābhyāṃ yogaṃ paśyed dvijottama . lagnahorāvilagnābhyāṃ tṛtīyaṃ paricintayet.
separated_sandhi: dvitīyam manda-candrābhyām yogam paśyet dvijottamalagna-horā-vilagnābhyām tṛtīyam paricintayet
english: O best among the twice-born, one should examine the second combination (yoga) derived from Saturn and the Moon. The third combination should be thoroughly considered based on the Lagna, Hora, and Vilagna.

sanskrit: चरराशौ स्थितौ द्वौ चित् तदा दीर्घमुदाहृतम् । एकः स्थिरेऽपरो द्वन्द्वे दीर्घमायुस्तथापि हि ॥३६॥
transliteration: cararāśau sthitau dvau cit tadā dīrghamudāhṛtam . ekaḥ sthire'paro dvandve dīrghamāyustathāpi hi.
separated_sandhi: cara-rāśau sthitau dvau cit tadā dīrgham udāhṛtamekaḥ sthire aparaḥ dvandve dīrgham āyuḥ tathā api hi
english: If two (planets) are situated in a movable sign (cara-rāśi), then long life is declared. Even if one (planet) is in a fixed sign (sthira-rāśi) and the other in a dual sign (dvandva-rāśi), still long life (āyu) is indicated.

sanskrit: एकश्चरे स्थिरेऽन्यश्चेत् तदामध्यमुदाहृतम् । द्वौ वा द्वन्द्वे स्थितौ विप्र मध्यमायुस्तथापि च ॥३७॥
transliteration: ekaścare sthire'nyaścet tadāmadhyamudāhṛtam . dvau vā dvandve sthitau vipra madhyamāyustathāpi ca.
separated_sandhi: ekaḥ care sthire anyaḥ cet tadā madhyam udāhṛtam dvauvā dvandve sthitau vipra madhyam āyuḥ tathā api ca
english: If one (planet) is in a movable sign (cara-rāśi) and the other in a fixed sign (sthira-rāśi), then medium life is declared. Or, O Brahmin, if two (planets) are situated in a dual sign (dvandva-rāśi), medium life (āyu) is indicated even then.

sanskrit: एकश्चरेऽपरो द्वन्द्वे द्वौ वा स्थिरगतौ तदा । जातकस्य तदाऽल्पायुर्ज्ञेयमेवं द्विजोत्तम ॥३८॥
