transliteration: ekaścare'paro dvandve dvau vā sthiragatau tadā . jātakasya tadā'lpāyurjñeyamevaṃ dvijottama.
separated_sandhi: ekaḥ care aparaḥ dvandve dvau vā sthira-gatau tadājātakasya tadā alpa-āyuḥ jñeyam evam dvijottama
english: If one (planet) is in a movable sign (cara-rāśi) and the other in a dual sign (dvandva-rāśi), or if both are situated in fixed signs (sthira-rāśi), then short life (āyu) for the native (jātaka) should be understood, O best among the twice-born.

sanskrit: योगत्रयेण योगाभ्यां सिद्धं यद् ग्राह्यमेव तत् । योगत्रयविसंवादे लग्नहोराविलग्नतः ॥३९॥
transliteration: yogatrayeṇa yogābhyāṃ siddhaṃ yad grāhyameva tat . yogatrayavisaṃvāde lagnahorāvilagnataḥ.
separated_sandhi: yoga-trayeṇa yogābhyām siddham yat grāhyam evatat yoga-traya-visaṃvāde lagna-horā-vilagnataḥ
english: Whatever is established by the three combinations (yogas) or by two combinations (yogas), that alone should be accepted. In case of a contradiction among the three combinations (yogas), the determination should be made based on the Lagna, Hora, and Vilagna.

sanskrit: लग्ने वा सप्तमे चन्द्रे ग्राह्यं मन्देन्दुतस्तदा । ह्रासो वृद्धिश्च कक्ष्याया विचिन्त्या सर्वदा बुधैः ॥४०॥
transliteration: lagne vā saptame candre grāhyaṃ mandendutastadā . hrāso vṛddhiśca kakṣyāyā vicintyā sarvadā budhaiḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagne vā saptame candre grāhyam mandendutaḥ tadāhrāsaḥ vṛddhiḥ ca kakṣyāyā vicintyā sarvadā budhaiḥ
english: When the Moon is in the Ascendant (lagna) or the seventh house, the wise should always consider the increase and decrease in the planetary orbit (kakṣyā) based on the positions of Saturn and the Moon.

sanskrit: दीर्घे योगत्रयेणैवं नखचन्द्रसमाब्दकाः । योगद्वयेन वस्वाशा योगैकेन रसांककाः ॥४१॥
transliteration: dīrghe yogatrayeṇaivaṃ nakhacandrasamābdakāḥ . yogadvayena vasvāśā yogaikena rasāṃkakāḥ.
separated_sandhi: dīrghe yogatrayeṇa evam nakhacandrasamābdakāḥyogadvayena vasvāśā yogāikena rasāṅkakāḥ
english: In the long-life category, with three such planetary combinations (yoga), the lifespan is 120 years (nakha-candra). With two combinations, it is 108 years (vasvāśā). And with one combination, it is 96 years (rasāṅkakāḥ).

sanskrit: मध्ये योगत्रयेणैवं खाष्टतुल्याब्दकाः स्मृताः । द्व्यगा योगद्वयेनाऽत्रयोगैकेनाब्धिषण्मिताः ॥४२॥
transliteration: madhye yogatrayeṇaivaṃ khāṣṭatulyābdakāḥ smṛtāḥ . dvyagā yogadvayenā'trayogaikenābdhiṣaṇmitāḥ.
separated_sandhi: madhye yogatrayeṇa evam khāṣṭatulyābdakāḥ smṛtāḥdvyagā yogadvayena atra yogāikena abdhiṣaṇmitāḥ
english: Similarly, in the middle-life category, with three planetary combinations (yoga), eighty years (kha-aṣṭa) are remembered as the lifespan. Here, with two combinations, it is seventy-two years (dvyaga). And with one combination, it is sixty-four years (abdhi-ṣaṭ).

sanskrit: अल्पे योगत्रयेणाऽत्रद्वात्रिंशन्मितवत्सराः । योगद्वयेन षट्त्रिंशात् योगैकेन च खाब्धयः ॥४३॥
transliteration: alpe yogatrayeṇā'tradvātriṃśanmitavatsarāḥ . yogadvayena ṣaṭtriṃśāt yogaikena ca khābdhayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: alpe yogatrayeṇa atra dvātriṃśanmitavatsarāḥyogadvayena ṣaṭtriṃśat yogāikena ca khābdhayaḥ
english: In the short-life category, with three planetary combinations (yoga), the years are thirty-two (dvātriṃśat). With two combinations, thirty-six (ṣaṭtriṃśat). And with one combination, the years are forty (kha-abdhi).

sanskrit: एवं दीर्घसमाल्पेषु खाब्धयो रसवह्नयः । खण्डा दन्तमितास्तेभ्यः स्फुटमायुः प्रसाधयेत् ॥४४॥
transliteration: evaṃ dīrghasamālpeṣu khābdhayo rasavahnayaḥ . khaṇḍā dantamitāstebhyaḥ sphuṭamāyuḥ prasādhayet.
separated_sandhi: evam dīrghasamālpeṣu khābdhayaḥ rasavahnayaḥkhaṇḍā dantamitāḥ tebhyaḥ sphuṭam āyuḥ prasādhayet
english: Thus, for the long, middle, and short lifespan categories, there are (the numbers) forty (kha-abdhi) and thirty-six (rasa-vahni). From these (values), the portions measured as thirty-two (danta) should be (used to) precisely calculate the lifespan (āyuḥ).

sanskrit: पूर्ण राश्यादिगे चान्ते हानिर्मध्येऽनुपाततः । योगकारकखेटांशयोगस्तत्संख्यया हृतः ॥४५॥
transliteration: pūrṇa rāśyādige cānte hānirmadhye'nupātataḥ . yogakārakakheṭāṃśayogastatsaṃkhyayā hṛtaḥ.
separated_sandhi: pūrṇa rāśyādige ca ante hāniḥ madhye anupātataḥyoga-kāraka-kheṭāṃśa-yogaḥ tat-saṃkhyayā hṛtaḥ
english: When a planet is at the beginning of a full sign (rāśi) or at its end, there is a reduction (in its contribution); in the middle, it is proportional. The sum of the portions (aṃśa) of the benefic (yoga-kāraka) planets should be divided by their total number.

sanskrit: लब्धांशास्तु यथाप्राप्तखण्डघ्नास्त्रिंशतोद्धृताः । लब्धवर्षादिभिर्हीनं प्राप्तायुः प्रस्फुटं भवेत् ॥४६॥
transliteration: labdhāṃśāstu yathāprāptakhaṇḍaghnāstriṃśatoddhṛtāḥ . labdhavarṣādibhirhīnaṃ prāptāyuḥ prasphuṭaṃ bhavet.
separated_sandhi: labdhāṃśāḥ tu yathāprāpta-khaṇḍa-ghnāḥ triṃśatā uddhṛtāḥlabdha-varṣādibhiḥ hīnam prāptāyuḥ prasphuṭam bhavet
english: The obtained portions (aṃśa), multiplied by the available sections (khaṇḍa) and divided by thirty, and then reduced by the already received years and so on, will yield the accurate lifespan (āyuṣ).

sanskrit: योगहेतौ शनौ कक्ष्याह्रासोऽन्यैर्वृद्धिरुच्यते । न स्वर्क्षतुङ्गगे नो वा पापमात्रयुतेक्षिते ॥४७॥
transliteration: yogahetau śanau kakṣyāhrāso'nyairvṛddhirucyate . na svarkṣatuṅgage no vā pāpamātrayutekṣite.
separated_sandhi: yoga-hetau śanau kakṣyā-hrāsaḥ anyaiḥ vṛddhiḥ ucyatena sva-ṛkṣa-tuṅgage na u vā pāpa-mātra-yuta-īkṣite
english: When Saturn (śani) is the cause of a beneficial combination (yoga), a reduction in the orbital period (kakṣyā) is declared, while by others, an increase is stated. This does not apply when Saturn is in its own sign or exaltation, nor when it is merely conjoined with or aspected by malefic planets.

sanskrit: लग्नसप्तमगे जीवे शुभमात्रयुतेक्षिते । कथितस्यायुषो विप्र कक्ष्यावृद्धिः प्रजायते ॥४८॥
transliteration: lagnasaptamage jīve śubhamātrayutekṣite . kathitasyāyuṣo vipra kakṣyāvṛddhiḥ prajāyate.
separated_sandhi: lagna-saptamage jīve śubha-mātra-yuta-īkṣitekathitasya āyuṣaḥ vipra kakṣyā-vṛddhiḥ prajāyate
english: O Brahmin, when Jupiter (jīva) is situated in the ascendant (lagna) or the seventh house, and is conjoined with or aspected by only benefic planets, an increase in the orbital period (kakṣyā) of the declared lifespan (āyuṣ) occurs.

sanskrit: अनायुश्चेद् भवेदल्पमल्पान्मध्यं प्रजायते । मध्यमाज्जायते दीर्घं दीर्घायुश्चेत्ततोऽधिकम् ॥४९॥
transliteration: anāyuśced bhavedalpamalpānmadhyaṃ prajāyate . madhyamājjāyate dīrghaṃ dīrghāyuścettato'dhikam.
separated_sandhi: anāyuḥ cet bhavet alpam alpāt madhyam prajāyatemadhyamāt jāyate dīrgham dīrghāyuḥ cet tataḥ adhikam
english: If there were no calculated lifespan (āyuṣ), it would become short. From a short lifespan, a medium lifespan arises. From a medium lifespan, a long lifespan arises. If it is already a long lifespan (āyuṣ), then it becomes even longer than that.

sanskrit: योगहेतौ गुरवेवं कक्ष्यावृद्धेश्च लक्षणम् । एतस्माद् वैपरीत्येन कक्ष्याह्रासः शनौ भवेत् ॥५०॥
transliteration: yogahetau guravevaṃ kakṣyāvṛddheśca lakṣaṇam . etasmād vaiparītyena kakṣyāhrāsaḥ śanau bhavet.
separated_sandhi: yogahetau gurau evam kakṣyāvṛddheḥ ca lakṣaṇametasmāt vaiparītyena kakṣyāhrāsaḥ śanau bhavet
english: Thus, these are the indications for Jupiter (guru) regarding the cause of its strength (yoga) and the increase of its divisional strength (kakṣyā). Conversely, a decrease in divisional strength (kakṣyā) occurs for Saturn (śani).

sanskrit: आयुषो बहुधा भेदाः कथिता भवताऽधुना । कतिधा सा कदाऽनायुरमितायुः कदा भवेत् ॥५१॥
transliteration: āyuṣo bahudhā bhedāḥ kathitā bhavatā'dhunā . katidhā sā kadā'nāyuramitāyuḥ kadā bhavet.
separated_sandhi: āyuṣaḥ bahudhā bhedāḥ kathitāḥ bhavatā adhunākatidhā sā kadā anāyuḥ amitaāyuḥ kadā bhavet
english: The many types of lifespan (āyuṣ) have now been explained by you. How many types are there? When is there no lifespan (anāyuḥ), and when is there immeasurable lifespan (amita-āyuḥ)?

sanskrit: बालारिष्टं योगारिष्टमल्पं मध्यञ्च दीर्घकम् । दिव्यं चैवाऽमितं चैवं सप्तधायुः प्रकीर्तितम् ॥५२॥
transliteration: bālāriṣṭaṃ yogāriṣṭamalpaṃ madhyañca dīrghakam . divyaṃ caivā'mitaṃ caivaṃ saptadhāyuḥ prakīrtitam.
separated_sandhi: bālaariṣṭam yogaariṣṭam alpam madhyam ca dīrghakamdivyam ca eva amitam ca evam saptadhā āyuḥ prakīrtitam
english: Childhood affliction (bālāriṣṭa), planetary affliction (yogāriṣṭa), short, medium, and long [lifespan] - also divine and immeasurable lifespan (amita-āyuṣ) - thus, lifespan is declared to be of seven types.

sanskrit: बालारिष्टे समा अष्टौ योगारिष्टे च विंशतिः । द्वात्रिंशद् वत्ररा अल्पे चतुष्षष्टिस्तु मध्यमे ॥५३॥
transliteration: bālāriṣṭe samā aṣṭau yogāriṣṭe ca viṃśatiḥ . dvātriṃśad vatrarā alpe catuṣṣaṣṭistu madhyame.
separated_sandhi: bālaariṣṭe samāḥ aṣṭau yogaariṣṭe ca viṃśatiḥdvātriṃśat vatsarāḥ alpe catuṣṣaṣṭiḥ tu madhyame
english: For childhood affliction (bālāriṣṭa), eight years. For planetary affliction (yogāriṣṭa), twenty [years]. Thirty-two years for short [lifespan], but sixty-four for medium.

sanskrit: विंशाधिकश्तं दीर्घे दिव्ये वर्षसहस्रकम् । तदूर्ध्वममितं पुण्यैरमितैराप्यते जनैः ॥५४॥
transliteration: viṃśādhikaśtaṃ dīrghe divye varṣasahasrakam . tadūrdhvamamitaṃ puṇyairamitairāpyate janaiḥ.
separated_sandhi: viṃśaadhikaśatam dīrghe divye varṣasahasrakamtat ūrdhvam amitam puṇyaiḥ amitaiḥ āpyate janaiḥ
english: One hundred and twenty [years] for long [lifespan], one thousand years for divine [lifespan]. Beyond that, immeasurable [lifespan] is attained by people with immeasurable merits (puṇya).

sanskrit: चन्द्रेज्यौ च कुलीरांगे ज्न्!असिअतु केन्द्रसंस्थितौ । अन्ये त्र्यायारिगाः खेटा अमितायुस्तदा भवेत् ॥५५॥
transliteration: candrejyau ca kulīrāṃge jn!asiatu kendrasaṃsthitau . anye tryāyārigāḥ kheṭā amitāyustadā bhavet.
separated_sandhi: candra-ijyau ca kulīrāṅge jn!asijatu kendrasaṃsthitauanye tryāyārigāḥ kheṭāḥ amitāyuḥ tadā bhavet
english: When the Moon and Jupiter are in the sign of Cancer and situated in an angular house, and other planets are located in the 3rd, 6th, or 11th houses, then one's lifespan becomes immeasurable. (Note: The word "ज्न्!असिअतु" is corrupt and has been omitted from the interpretation.)

sanskrit: सौम्याः केन्द्रत्रिकोणस्थाः पापास्त्र्यायारिगास्तथा । शुभराशौ स्थिते रन्ध्रे दिव्यमायुस्तदा भवेत् ॥५६॥
transliteration: saumyāḥ kendratrikoṇasthāḥ pāpāstryāyārigāstathā . śubharāśau sthite randhre divyamāyustadā bhavet.
separated_sandhi: saumyāḥ kendratrikoṇasthāḥ pāpāḥ tryāyārigāḥ tathāśubharāśau sthite randhre divyam āyuḥ tadā bhavet
english: When benefic planets are situated in angular and trine houses, and malefic planets are likewise in the 3rd, 6th, or 11th houses, and the 8th house is situated in a benefic sign, then one's lifespan becomes divine.

sanskrit: गोपुरांशे गुरौ केन्द्रे शुक्रे पारावतांशके । त्रिकोणे कर्कटे लग्ने युगान्तायुस्तदा द्विज ॥५७॥
transliteration: gopurāṃśe gurau kendre śukre pārāvatāṃśake . trikoṇe karkaṭe lagne yugāntāyustadā dvija.
separated_sandhi: gopurāṃśe gurau kendre śukre pārāvatāṃśaketrikoṇe karkaṭe lagne yugāntāyuḥ tadā dvija
english: O twice-born one (dvija), when Jupiter is in a gopurāṃśa varga and in an angular house, and Venus is in a pārāvatāṃśaka varga and in a trine house, and Cancer is the ascendant, then the lifespan extends to the end of a cosmic age (yuga).

sanskrit: देवलोकांशके मन्दे कुजे पारावतांशके । गुरौ सिंहासनांशेऽङ्गे जातो मुनिसमो भवेत् ॥५८॥
transliteration: devalokāṃśake mande kuje pārāvatāṃśake . gurau siṃhāsanāṃśe'ṅge jāto munisamo bhavet.
separated_sandhi: devalokāṃśake mande kuje pārāvatāṃśake gurausiṃhāsanāṃśe aṅge jātaḥ munisamaḥ bhavet
english: When Saturn is in a devalokāṃśa varga, Mars is in a pārāvatāṃśaka varga, and Jupiter is in a siṃhāsanāṃśa varga and in the ascendant, then one who is born (jāta) becomes like a sage.

sanskrit: सुयोगैर्वर्ध्यते ह्यायुः कुयोगैर्हीयते तथा । अतो योगानहं वक्ष्ये पूर्णमध्याल्पकारकान् ॥५९॥
transliteration: suyogairvardhyate hyāyuḥ kuyogairhīyate tathā . ato yogānahaṃ vakṣye pūrṇamadhyālpakārakān.
separated_sandhi: suyogaiḥ vardhyate hi āyuḥ kuyogaiḥ hīyate tathāataḥ yogān aham vakṣye pūrṇamadhyālpākārakān
english: Indeed, lifespan (āyu) is increased by beneficial planetary combinations (yoga) and similarly diminished by malefic ones. Therefore, I shall now explain the planetary combinations (yoga) that cause full, medium, or short lifespans.

sanskrit: केन्द्रे शुभग्रहैर्युक्ते लग्नेशे च शुभान्विते । सन्दृष्टे गुरुणा वाऽपि पूर्णमायुयुस्तदा भवेत् ॥६०॥
transliteration: kendre śubhagrahairyukte lagneśe ca śubhānvite . sandṛṣṭe guruṇā vā'pi pūrṇamāyuyustadā bhavet.
separated_sandhi: kendre śubhagraih yukte lagneśe ca śubhānvitesandṛṣṭe guruṇā vā api pūrṇam āyuḥ tadā bhavet
english: When the quadrant houses (kendra) are occupied by benefic planets, and the lord of the ascendant (lagna) is associated with benefics or is aspected by Jupiter (guru), then a full lifespan (āyus) is attained.

sanskrit: केन्द्रस्थिते विलग्नेशे गुरुशुक्रसमन्विते । ताभ्यां निरीक्षिते वाऽपि पूर्णमायुर्विनिर्दिशेत् ॥६१॥
transliteration: kendrasthite vilagneśe guruśukrasamanvite . tābhyāṃ nirīkṣite vā'pi pūrṇamāyurvinirdiśet.
separated_sandhi: kendrasthite vilagneśe guruśukrasamanvitetābhyām nirīkṣite vā api pūrṇam āyuḥ vinirdiśet
english: When the lord of the ascendant (lagna) is situated in a quadrant house (kendra) and is associated with Jupiter (guru) and Venus (śukra), or is aspected by them, one should predict a full lifespan (āyus).

sanskrit: उच्चस्थितैस्त्रिभिः खेटैर्लग्नरन्ध्रशसंयुतैः । अष्टमे पापहीने च पूर्णमायुर्विनिर्दिशेत् ॥६२॥
transliteration: uccasthitaistribhiḥ kheṭairlagnarandhraśasaṃyutaiḥ . aṣṭame pāpahīne ca pūrṇamāyurvinirdiśet.
separated_sandhi: uccasthitaiḥ tribhiḥ kheṭaiḥ lagnarandhraśasaṃyutaiḥaṣṭame pāpahīne ca pūrṇam āyuḥ vinirdiśet
english: When three planets are exalted and associated with the lords of the ascendant (lagna) and the eighth house (aṣṭama), and furthermore, the eighth house is free from malefic planets, one should predict a full lifespan (āyus).

sanskrit: अष्टमस्थैस्त्रिभि खेटैः स्वोच्चमित्रस्ववर्गगैः । लग्नेशे बलसंयुक्ते दीर्घमायुस्तदा भवेत् ॥६३॥
transliteration: aṣṭamasthaistribhi kheṭaiḥ svoccamitrasvavargagaiḥ . lagneśe balasaṃyukte dīrghamāyustadā bhavet.
separated_sandhi: aṣṭamasthaiḥ tribhiḥ kheṭaiḥ svoccamitrasvavargagaiḥlagneśe balasaṃyukte dīrgham āyuḥ tadā bhavet
english: When three planets are situated in the eighth house (aṣṭama), being in their own sign, exaltation, a friendly sign, or their own divisional chart (varga), and the lord of the ascendant (lagna) is endowed with strength, then a long lifespan (āyus) is attained.

sanskrit: स्वभोच्चस्थेन केनापि नभौगेन समन्वितः । अष्टमेशः शनिर्वापि दीर्घमायुर्विनिर्दिशेत् ॥६४॥
transliteration: svabhoccasthena kenāpi nabhaugena samanvitaḥ . aṣṭameśaḥ śanirvāpi dīrghamāyurvinirdiśet.
separated_sandhi: svabhocccasthena kena api nabhaugena samanvitaḥaṣṭameśaḥ śaniḥ vā api dīrgham āyuḥ vinirdiśet
english: When the lord of the eighth house (aṣṭama), Saturn (śani), is associated with any planet that is situated in its own sign or exaltation, one should predict a long lifespan (āyus).

sanskrit: त्रिषडायगतैः पापैः शुभैः केन्द्रत्रिकोणगैः । लग्नेशे बलसंयुक्ते दीर्घमायुर्विनिर्दिशेत् ॥६५॥
transliteration: triṣaḍāyagataiḥ pāpaiḥ śubhaiḥ kendratrikoṇagaiḥ . lagneśe balasaṃyukte dīrghamāyurvinirdiśet.
separated_sandhi: triṣaḍāyagataiḥ pāpaiḥ śubhaiḥ kendratrikoṇagaiḥlagneśe balasaṃyukte dīrgham āyuḥ vinirdiśet
english: When malefic planets are situated in the 3rd, 6th, and 11th houses, and benefic planets are in the angular (kendra) and trine (trikoṇa) houses, and the ascendant lord is endowed with strength, one should predict a long life span.

sanskrit: षट्सप्तरन्ध्रभवेषु शुभखेटयुतेषु च । त्रिभवेषु च पापेषु पूर्णमायुर्विनिर्दिशेत् ॥६६॥
transliteration: ṣaṭsaptarandhrabhaveṣu śubhakheṭayuteṣu ca . tribhaveṣu ca pāpeṣu pūrṇamāyurvinirdiśet.
separated_sandhi: ṣaṭsaptarandhrabhaveṣu śubhakheṭayuteṣu catribhaveṣu ca pāpeṣu pūrṇam āyuḥ vinirdiśet
english: When benefic planets are conjoined in the 6th, 7th, and 8th houses, and malefic planets are in the 3rd, 6th, and 11th houses, one should predict a full life span.

sanskrit: शत्रुव्ययगताः पापा लग्नेशो यदि केन्द्रगः । रविमित्रं च रन्ध्रेशः पूर्णमायुस्तथापि हि ॥६७॥
transliteration: śatruvyayagatāḥ pāpā lagneśo yadi kendragaḥ . ravimitraṃ ca randhreśaḥ pūrṇamāyustathāpi hi.
separated_sandhi: śatruvyayagatāḥ pāpāḥ lagneśaḥ yadi kendragaḥravimitram ca randhreśaḥ pūrṇam āyuḥ tathāpi hi
english: If malefic planets are situated in the 6th and 12th houses, if the ascendant lord is in an angular (kendra) house, and if the lord of the 8th house (randhreśa) is a friend of the Sun, then a full life span is indeed predicted even then.

sanskrit: आयुः स्थानस्थिताः पापाः कर्मेशः स्वोच्चगो यदा । तथापि दीर्घमायु स्यात् विज्ञेयं द्विजसत्तम ॥६८॥
transliteration: āyuḥ sthānasthitāḥ pāpāḥ karmeśaḥ svoccago yadā . tathāpi dīrghamāyu syāt vijñeyaṃ dvijasattama.
separated_sandhi: āyuḥsthānasthitāḥ pāpāḥ karmeśaḥ svoccagaḥ yadātathāpi dīrgham āyuḥ syāt vijñeyam dvijasattama
english: O best among the twice-born (dvijasattama), know that even if malefic planets are situated in the house of longevity (āyuḥ sthāna), a long life span is nevertheless indicated when the lord of the 10th house (karmeśa) is exalted.

sanskrit: द्विस्वभावगृहे लग्ने लग्नेशे केन्द्रसंस्थिते । स्वोच्चराशित्रिकोणे वा दीर्घमायुर्विनिर्दिशेत् ॥६९॥
transliteration: dvisvabhāvagṛhe lagne lagneśe kendrasaṃsthite . svoccarāśitrikoṇe vā dīrghamāyurvinirdiśet.
separated_sandhi: dvisvabhāvagṛhe lagne lagneśe kendrasaṃsthitesvoccarāśitrikoṇe vā dīrgham āyuḥ vinirdiśet
english: When the ascendant (lagna) is in a dual-natured sign, and the ascendant lord is situated in an angular (kendra) house, or in its own exaltation sign, or in a trine (trikoṇa) house, one should predict a long life span.

sanskrit: द्विस्वभावगृहे लग्ने लग्नेशाद् बलसंयुतात् । द्वौ पापौ यदि केन्द्रस्थौ दीर्घमायुस्तदा भवेत् ॥७०॥
transliteration: dvisvabhāvagṛhe lagne lagneśād balasaṃyutāt . dvau pāpau yadi kendrasthau dīrghamāyustadā bhavet.
separated_sandhi: dvisvabhāvagṛhe lagne lagneśāt balasamyutāt dvaupāpau yadi kendrasthau dīrgham āyuḥ tadā bhavet
english: If the ascendant is in a dual-natured sign, and the lord of the ascendant is endowed with strength, and two malefic planets are situated in angular houses (kendras), then a long life will ensue.

sanskrit: लग्नाष्टमेशयोर्मध्ये यः खेटः प्रबलो भवेत् । तस्मिन् केन्द्रगते दीर्घ मध्यं पणफरस्थिते ॥७१॥
transliteration: lagnāṣṭameśayormadhye yaḥ kheṭaḥ prabalo bhavet . tasmin kendragate dīrgha madhyaṃ paṇapharasthite.
separated_sandhi: lagna-aṣṭameśayoḥ madhye yaḥ kheṭaḥ prabalaḥ bhavettasmin kendragate dīrgham madhyam paṇapharasthite
english: Among the lords of the ascendant and the eighth house, whichever planet is stronger, if that planet is situated in an angular house (kendra), there will be a long life. If it is situated in a succedent house (paṇaphara), the life will be medium.

sanskrit: आपोक्लिमे स्थिते स्वल्पमायुर्भवति निश्चितम् । लग्नेशे च रवेर्मित्रे दीर्घंमायुः समे समम् ॥७२॥
transliteration: āpoklime sthite svalpamāyurbhavati niścitam . lagneśe ca ravermitre dīrghaṃmāyuḥ same samam.
separated_sandhi: āpoklime sthite svalpam āyuḥ bhavati niścitamlagneśe ca raveḥ mitre dīrgham āyuḥ same samam
english: When that planet (the stronger one from Lagna/8th lords) is situated in a cadent house (āpoklima), there is certainly a short life. If the lord of the ascendant is a friend of the Sun, there is a long life; if it is neutral, the life is medium.

sanskrit: शत्रौ स्वल्पं वदेदित्थमष्टमेशादपि स्मृतम् । मित्रमध्याऽरिभावस्थे तस्मिन्नेवं फलं वदेत् ॥७३॥
transliteration: śatrau svalpaṃ vadeditthamaṣṭameśādapi smṛtam . mitramadhyā'ribhāvasthe tasminnevaṃ phalaṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: śatrau svalpam vadet ittham aṣṭameśāt api smṛtammitra-madhya-ari-bhāvasthe tasmin evam phalam vadet
english: One should declare a short life when (the lord of the ascendant is) an enemy (of the Sun). This principle is also remembered similarly for the lord of the eighth house. When that (stronger) planet (from the ascendant or 8th lord) is situated in a friendly, neutral, or inimical sign respectively, one should declare the corresponding result (long, medium, or short life).

sanskrit: सहजाधीशभूपुत्रौ द्वौ रन्ध्रेशशनैश्चरौ । अस्तौ वा पापदृग्युक्तौ स्वल्पमायुः प्रयच्छतः ॥७४॥
transliteration: sahajādhīśabhūputrau dvau randhreśaśanaiścarau . astau vā pāpadṛgyuktau svalpamāyuḥ prayacchataḥ.
separated_sandhi: sahajādhiśabhūputrau dvau randhreśaśanaiścarauastau vā pāpa-dṛk-yuktau svalpam āyuḥ prayacchataḥ
english: If either the lord of the third house and Mars (bhūputra), or the lord of the eighth house and Saturn, are combust or afflicted by malefic aspects, they grant a short life.

sanskrit: षष्ठेऽष्टमे व्यये वाऽपि लग्नेशे पापसंयुते । स्व पायुरनपत्यो वा शुभदृग्योगवर्जिते ॥७५॥
transliteration: ṣaṣṭhe'ṣṭame vyaye vā'pi lagneśe pāpasaṃyute . sva pāyuranapatyo vā śubhadṛgyogavarjite.
separated_sandhi: ṣaṣṭhe aṣṭame vyaye vā api lagneśe pāpasaṃyutesvalpāyuḥ anapatyaḥ vā śubhadṛgyogavarjite
english: If the lord of the Ascendant is conjoined with malefic planets and is devoid of auspicious aspect or conjunction, and is situated in the sixth, eighth, or twelfth house, then the native's lifespan will be short or they will be childless.

sanskrit: चतुष्ट्यगते पापे शुभदृष्टिविवर्जिते । बलहीने विग्लनेशे स्वल्पमायुर्विनिर्दिशेत् ॥७६॥
transliteration: catuṣṭyagate pāpe śubhadṛṣṭivivarjite . balahīne viglaneśe svalpamāyurvinirdiśet.
separated_sandhi: catuṣṭyagate pāpe śubhadṛṣṭivivarjitebalahīne lagneśe svalpam āyuḥ vinirdiśet
english: If a malefic planet is situated in a quadrant, devoid of auspicious aspect, and the lord of the Ascendant is weak, then one should predict a short lifespan.

sanskrit: व्ययार्थौ पापसंयुक्तौ शुभदृग्योगवर्जितौ । स्वल्पमायुस्तदा ज्ञेयं निर्विशंकं द्विजोत्तम ॥७७॥
transliteration: vyayārthau pāpasaṃyuktau śubhadṛgyogavarjitau . svalpamāyustadā jñeyaṃ nirviśaṃkaṃ dvijottama.
separated_sandhi: vyayārthau pāpasaṃyutau śubhadṛgyogavarjitausvalpam āyuḥ tadā jñeyam nirviśaṅkam dvijottama
english: O best of Brahmins (dvijottama)! If the lords of the twelfth and second houses are conjoined with malefic planets and devoid of auspicious aspect or conjunction, then a short lifespan should be known (predicted) without any doubt.

sanskrit: लग्नरन्ध्रेशयोरेवं दुःस्थयोर्बलहीनयोः । स्वल्पमायुर्बुधैर्ज्ञेयं मिश्रयोगाच्च मध्यमम् ॥७८॥
transliteration: lagnarandhreśayorevaṃ duḥsthayorbalahīnayoḥ . svalpamāyurbudhairjñeyaṃ miśrayogācca madhyamam.
separated_sandhi: lagnarandhreśayoḥ evam duḥsthayoḥ balahīnayoḥsvalpam āyuḥ budhaiḥ jñeyam miśrayogāt ca madhyamam
english: Similarly, if the lords of the Ascendant and the eighth house are unfavorably placed and weak, then a short lifespan should be known by the wise. A medium lifespan is predicted from mixed astrological combinations.

sanskrit: बहुधाऽऽयुर्भवा योगाः कथिता भवताऽधुना । नृणां मारकभेदाश्च कथ्यन्तां कृपया मुने ॥१॥
transliteration: bahudhā''yurbhavā yogāḥ kathitā bhavatā'dhunā . nṛṇāṃ mārakabhedāśca kathyantāṃ kṛpayā mune.
separated_sandhi: bahudhā āyurbhavāḥ yogāḥ kathitāḥ bhavatā adhunānṛṇām mārakabhedāḥ ca kathyantām kṛpayā mune
english: O sage (mune)! You have now extensively described various combinations that grant longevity for human beings. Please also explain the different kinds of death-inflicting combinations.

sanskrit: तृतीयमष्टमस्थानमायुःस्थानां द्वयं द्विज । मारकं तद्व्ययस्थानं द्वितीयं सप्तमं तथा ॥२॥
transliteration: tṛtīyamaṣṭamasthānamāyuḥsthānāṃ dvayaṃ dvija . mārakaṃ tadvyayasthānaṃ dvitīyaṃ saptamaṃ tathā.
separated_sandhi: tṛtīyam aṣṭamasthānam āyuḥsthānām dvayam dvijamārakam tat vyayasthānam dvitīyam saptamam tathā
english: O twice-born (dvija), the third and eighth houses are considered the two houses of longevity (āyuḥsthāna). The second and seventh houses are the death-inflicting (māraka) houses, which are also the twelfth houses from those longevity houses respectively.

sanskrit: तत्रापि सप्तमस्थानाद् द्वितीयं बलवत्तरम् । तयोरीशौ तत्र गताः पापिनस्तेन संयुताः ॥३॥
transliteration: tatrāpi saptamasthānād dvitīyaṃ balavattaram . tayorīśau tatra gatāḥ pāpinastena saṃyutāḥ.
separated_sandhi: tatra api saptamasthānāt dvitīyam balavattaramtayoḥ īśau tatra gatāḥ pāpinaḥ tena saṃyutāḥ
english: Among these, the second house is more potent than the seventh house. The lords of these two (houses, 2nd and 7th), as well as malefic (pāpinaḥ) planets located in those houses or conjoined with that māraka lord, are considered death-inflicting.

sanskrit: ये खेटाः पापिनस्ते च सर्वे मारकसंज्ञकाः । तेषां दशाविपाकेषु सम्भवे निधनं नृणाम् ॥४॥
transliteration: ye kheṭāḥ pāpinaste ca sarve mārakasaṃjñakāḥ . teṣāṃ daśāvipākeṣu sambhave nidhanaṃ nṛṇām.
separated_sandhi: ye kheṭāḥ pāpinaḥ te ca sarve mārakasaṃjñakāḥteṣām daśāvipākeṣu sambhave nidhanam nṛṇām
english: All those planets which are malefic are designated as death-inflicting (māraka). During their major and sub-planetary periods (daśāvipāka), the death (nidhana) of individuals can occur.

sanskrit: अल्पमध्यमपूर्णायुः प्रमाणमिह योगजम् । विज्ञाय प्रथमं पुंसां मारकं परिचिन्तयेत् ॥५॥
transliteration: alpamadhyamapūrṇāyuḥ pramāṇamiha yogajam . vijñāya prathamaṃ puṃsāṃ mārakaṃ paricintayet.
separated_sandhi: alpamadhyamapūrṇāyuḥ pramāṇam iha yogajamvijñāya prathamam puṃsām mārakam paricintayet
english: After first ascertaining the duration of a short, medium, or full lifespan (āyuḥ pramāṇa) based on the astrological combinations (yoga) in a person's chart, one should then investigate the death-inflicting (māraka) factors.

sanskrit: अलाभे पुनरेतेषां सम्बन्धेन व्ययेशितुः । क्वचिच्छुभानां च दशस्वष्टमेशदशासु च ॥६॥
transliteration: alābhe punareteṣāṃ sambandhena vyayeśituḥ . kvacicchubhānāṃ ca daśasvaṣṭameśadaśāsu ca.
separated_sandhi: alābhe punaḥ eteṣām sambandhena vyayeśituḥkvacit śubhānām ca daśāsu aṣṭameśadaśāsu ca
english: Furthermore, if these (primary māraka agents) are unavailable, death may occur through association with the lord of the twelfth house. It can also occur sometimes during the planetary periods (daśā) of benefics, and in the periods (daśā) of the eighth house lord.

sanskrit: केवलानां च पापानां दशासु निधनं क्वचित् । अल्पनीयं बुधैर्नृणां मारकाणामदर्शने ॥७॥
transliteration: kevalānāṃ ca pāpānāṃ daśāsu nidhanaṃ kvacit . alpanīyaṃ budhairnṛṇāṃ mārakāṇāmadarśane.
separated_sandhi: kevalānām ca pāpānām daśāsu nidhanam kvacitalpanīyam budhaiḥ nṛṇām mārakāṇām adarśane
english: In the absence of death-inflicting planets (mārakas), even the daśā (planetary periods) of merely malefic planets can sometimes bring about death (nidhana). However, the wise should consider this effect to be lessened for individuals.

sanskrit: सत्यपि स्वेन सम्बन्धे न हन्ति शुभभुक्तिषु । हन्ति सत्यप्यसम्बन्धे मारकः पापभुक्तिषु ॥८॥
transliteration: satyapi svena sambandhe na hanti śubhabhuktiṣu . hanti satyapyasambandhe mārakaḥ pāpabhuktiṣu.
separated_sandhi: sati api svena sambandhe na hanti śubhabhuktiṣuhanti sati api asambandhe mārakaḥ pāpabhuktiṣu
english: Even when a planet has a connection, it does not cause death during benefic sub-periods (bhukti). However, a death-inflicting planet (māraka) does cause death during malefic sub-periods (bhukti), even without such a connection.

sanskrit: मारकग्रहसम्बन्धान्निहन्ता पापकृच्छनिः । अतिक्रम्येतरान् सर्वान् भवत्यत्र न संशयः ॥९॥
transliteration: mārakagrahasambandhānnihantā pāpakṛcchaniḥ . atikramyetarān sarvān bhavatyatra na saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: mārakagrahasambandhāt nihantā pāpakṛt śaniḥatikramya itarān sarvān bhavati atra na saṃśayaḥ
english: Through an association with a death-inflicting planet (māraka-graha), malefic Saturn (Śani) becomes the primary agent of death (nihantā), overriding all others. There is no doubt about this.

sanskrit: अथाऽन्यदपि वक्ष्यामि द्विज मारकलक्षणं । त्रिविधाश्चायुषो योगाः स्वल्पायुर्मध्यमोत्तमाः ॥१०॥
transliteration: athā'nyadapi vakṣyāmi dvija mārakalakṣaṇaṃ . trividhāścāyuṣo yogāḥ svalpāyurmadhyamottamāḥ.
separated_sandhi: atha anyat api vakṣyāmi dvija mārakalakṣaṇamtrividhāḥ ca āyuṣaḥ yogāḥ svalpāyuḥ madhyama uttamāḥ
english: Now, O twice-born (dvija), I will explain another characteristic of death-inflicting planets (mārakas). Also, the combinations (yogas) for longevity are of three kinds: short life, medium life, and long life.

sanskrit: द्वाविंशात् पूर्वमल्पायुर्मध्यमायुस्ततः परम् । चतुष्षष्ट्याः पुरस्तात् तु ततो दीर्घमुदाहृतम् ॥११॥
transliteration: dvāviṃśāt pūrvamalpāyurmadhyamāyustataḥ param . catuṣṣaṣṭyāḥ purastāt tu tato dīrghamudāhṛtam.
separated_sandhi: dvāviṁśāt pūrvam alpāyuḥ madhyamāyuḥ tataḥ paramcatuṣṣaṣṭyāḥ purastāt tu tataḥ dīrgham udāhṛtam
english: Short life (alpāyu) is considered to be before the age of twenty-two. Medium life (madhyamāyu) is after that (twenty-two), but before sixty-four. Long life (dīrgham) is declared to be after sixty-four.

sanskrit: उत्तमायुः शतादूर्ध्वं ज्ञातव्यं द्विजसत्तम । जनैर्विंशतिवर्षान्त्यमायुर्ज्ञातं न शक्यते ॥१२॥
transliteration: uttamāyuḥ śatādūrdhvaṃ jñātavyaṃ dvijasattama . janairviṃśativarṣāntyamāyurjñātaṃ na śakyate.
separated_sandhi: uttamāyuḥ śatāt ūrdhvam jñātavyam dvijasattamajanaiḥ viṃśativarṣāntyam āyuḥ jñātam na śakyate
english: O best among the twice-born (dvijasattama), it should be understood that the maximum lifespan extends above one hundred years. Nevertheless, people cannot determine a lifespan that concludes within twenty years.

sanskrit: जपहोमचिकित्साद्यैर्बालरक्षां हि कारयेत् । म्रियन्ते पितृदोषैश्च केचिन्मातृग्रहैरपि ॥१३॥
transliteration: japahomacikitsādyairbālarakṣāṃ hi kārayet . mriyante pitṛdoṣaiśca kecinmātṛgrahairapi.
separated_sandhi: japahomacikitsādyaiḥ bālarakṣām hi kārayetmriyante pitṛdoṣaiḥ ca kecit mātṛgrahaiḥ api
english: Indeed, one should ensure the protection of children through japa (recitation), homa (fire rituals), medical treatments, and other such measures. Some children die due to ancestral faults (pitṛdoṣa), and others even due to maternal planetary afflictions (mātṛgraha).

sanskrit: केचित् स्वारिष्ट्योगाच्च त्रिविधा बालमृत्यवः । ततः परं नृणामायुर्गणयेद् द्विजसत्तम ॥१४॥
transliteration: kecit svāriṣṭyogācca trividhā bālamṛtyavaḥ . tataḥ paraṃ nṛṇāmāyurgaṇayed dvijasattama.
separated_sandhi: kecit svāriṣṭayogāt ca trividhā bālamṛtyavaḥtataḥ param nṛṇām āyuḥ gaṇayet dvijasattama
english: Some children also die due to their own inauspicious astrological combinations (svāriṣṭayoga). Thus, there are three types of infant deaths (bālamṛtyu). O best among the twice-born (dvijasattama), after this period, you should calculate the lifespan of human beings.

sanskrit: अथाऽन्यदपि वक्ष्यामि नृणां मारकलक्षणम् । अल्पायुर्योगजातस्य विप्भे च मृतिर्भवेत् ॥१५॥
transliteration: athā'nyadapi vakṣyāmi nṛṇāṃ mārakalakṣaṇam . alpāyuryogajātasya vipbhe ca mṛtirbhavet.
separated_sandhi: atha anyat api vakṣyāmi nṛṇām mārakalakṣaṇamalpāyuryogajātasya vipphe ca mṛtiḥ bhavet
english: Now, I shall also explain the characteristics of death-inflicting planets or signs (mārakalakṣaṇa) for human beings. For someone born with an astrological combination (yoga) indicating a short lifespan, death occurs during the vippha (a specific planetary period).

sanskrit: मध्यायुर्योगजस्यैवं प्रत्यरौ च मृतिर्भवेत् । दीर्घायुर्योगजातस्य वधभे तु मृतिर्भवेत् ॥१६॥
transliteration: madhyāyuryogajasyaivaṃ pratyarau ca mṛtirbhavet . dīrghāyuryogajātasya vadhabhe tu mṛtirbhavet.
separated_sandhi: madhyāyuryogajasya evam pratyarau ca mṛtiḥ bhavetdīrghāyuryogajātasya vadhabhe tu mṛtiḥ bhavet
english: Similarly, for one born with an astrological combination (yoga) indicating a medium lifespan, death occurs during the Pratyari (a specific planetary period). But for one born with an astrological combination (yoga) indicating a long lifespan, death occurs during the Vadhaka (a specific planetary period).

sanskrit: द्वाविंशत्र्यंशपश्चैव तथा वैनाशिकाधिपः । विपत्ताराप्रत्यरीशा वधभेशंस्तथैव च ॥१७॥
transliteration: dvāviṃśatryaṃśapaścaiva tathā vaināśikādhipaḥ . vipattārāpratyarīśā vadhabheśaṃstathaiva ca.
separated_sandhi: dvāviṃśatryaṃśapaḥ ca eva tathā vaināśikādhipaḥvipattārāpratyarīśā vadhabheśams tathā eva ca
english: The lord of the twenty-second Drekkana, and similarly the lord of the Vaināśika (destructive) constellation (nakṣatra), along with the lords of Vipat (calamity) Tārā and Pratyari (adversity) Tārā, and likewise the lord of the Vadha (slaying) nakṣatra, are significant indicators.

sanskrit: आद्यान्तपौ च विज्ञेयौ चन्द्राक्रान्तगृहाद् द्विज । मारकौ पापखेटौ तौ शुभौ चेद्रोगदौ स्मृतौ ॥१८॥
transliteration: ādyāntapau ca vijñeyau candrākrāntagṛhād dvija . mārakau pāpakheṭau tau śubhau cedrogadau smṛtau.
separated_sandhi: ādyāntapau ca vijñeyau candrākrāntagṛhāt dvijamārakau pāpakheṭau tau śubhau cet rogadau smṛtau
english: O twice-born (dvija), the lords of the second and twelfth houses from the Moon-occupied sign are also to be known as death-inflictors (mārakas). If those two planets are benefics, they are considered givers of disease.

sanskrit: षष्ठाधिपदशायां च नृणां निधनसम्भवः । षष्ठाष्टरिष्फनाथानामपहारे मृतिर्भवेत् ॥१९॥
transliteration: ṣaṣṭhādhipadaśāyāṃ ca nṛṇāṃ nidhanasambhavaḥ . ṣaṣṭhāṣṭariṣphanāthānāmapahāre mṛtirbhavet.
separated_sandhi: ṣaṣṭhādhipadaśāyām ca nṛṇām nidhanasambhavaḥṣaṣṭhāṣṭariṣaphanāthānām apahāre mṛtiḥ bhavet
english: During the planetary period (daśā) of the lord of the sixth house, death may occur for individuals. Death also happens in the sub-periods (antardaśās) of the lords of the sixth, eighth, and twelfth houses.

sanskrit: मारका बहवः खेटा यदि वीर्यसमन्विताः । तत्तद्दशान्तरे विप्र रोगकष्टादिसंभवः ॥२०॥
transliteration: mārakā bahavaḥ kheṭā yadi vīryasamanvitāḥ . tattaddaśāntare vipra rogakaṣṭādisaṃbhavaḥ.
separated_sandhi: mārakāḥ bahavaḥ kheṭāḥ yadi vīryasamanvitāḥtat-tat-daśāntare vipra rogakaṣṭādisambhavaḥ
english: O Brahmin (vipra), if many death-inflicting planets (mārakas) are endowed with strength, then in their respective major or sub-periods (daśā-antardaśā), there is a possibility of disease, suffering, and other misfortunes.

sanskrit: उक्ता ये मारकास्तेषु प्रबलो मुख्यमारकः । तदवस्थानुसारेण मृतिं वा कष्टमादिशेत् ॥२१॥
transliteration: uktā ye mārakāsteṣu prabalo mukhyamārakaḥ . tadavasthānusāreṇa mṛtiṃ vā kaṣṭamādiśet.
separated_sandhi: uktāḥ ye mārakāḥ teṣu prabalaḥ mukhyamārakaḥtat-avasthā-anusāreṇa mṛtim vā kaṣṭam ādiśet
english: Among those death-inflicting planets (mārakas) that have been mentioned, the strongest one is the chief death-inflictor. According to its condition, one should predict either death or suffering.

sanskrit: रहुश्चेदथवा केतुर्लग्ने कामेऽष्टमे व्यये । मारकेशान्मदे वाऽपि मारकेशेन संयुतः ॥२२॥
transliteration: rahuścedathavā keturlagne kāme'ṣṭame vyaye . mārakeśānmade vā'pi mārakeśena saṃyutaḥ.
separated_sandhi: rahuḥ ca it athavā ketuḥ lagne kāme aṣṭamevyaye mārakeśāt made vā api mārakeśena saṃyutaḥ
english: If Rāhu or Ketu are in the Ascendant, 7th (kāma), 8th, or 12th house, or if they are in the 7th house (mada) from the lord of a death-inflicting house (mārakeśa), or conjoined with the lord of a death-inflicting house (mārakeśa).

sanskrit: मारकः स च विज्ञेयः स्वदशान्तर्दशास्वपि । मकरे वृश्चिके जन्म राहुस्तस्य मृतिप्रदः ॥२३॥
transliteration: mārakaḥ sa ca vijñeyaḥ svadaśāntardaśāsvapi . makare vṛścike janma rāhustasya mṛtipradaḥ.
separated_sandhi: mārakaḥ saḥ ca vijñeyaḥ svadaśā-antardaśāsu apimakare vṛścike janma rahuḥ tasya mṛti-pradaḥ
english: He (Rāhu/Ketu in such positions) should be known as a death-inflictor (māraka) even during his own main period (daśā) and sub-periods (antardaśā). If a person is born with Capricorn or Scorpio as the Ascendant, Rāhu becomes a giver of death (mṛtiprada) for him.

sanskrit: षष्ठाऽष्टरिष्फगो राहुस्तद्दये कष्टदो भवेत् । शुभग्रहयुतो दृष्टो न तदा कष्टकृन्मतः ॥२४॥
transliteration: ṣaṣṭhā'ṣṭariṣphago rāhustaddaye kaṣṭado bhavet . śubhagrahayuto dṛṣṭo na tadā kaṣṭakṛnmataḥ.
separated_sandhi: ṣaṣṭha-aṣṭa-riṣpha-gaḥ rahuḥ tat-daśāye kaṣṭa-daḥbhavet śubha-graha-yutaḥ dṛṣṭaḥ na tadā kaṣṭa-kṛt mataḥ
english: If Rāhu is situated in the 6th, 8th, or 12th house (riṣpha), he will cause trouble (kaṣṭada) during his main period (daśā). However, if he is conjoined with or aspected by a benefic planet, he is not considered a trouble-maker (kaṣṭakṛt).

sanskrit: लग्नात् तृतीयभावे तु बलिना रविणा युते । राजहेतुश्च मरणं तस्य ज्ञेयं द्विजोत्तम ॥२५॥
transliteration: lagnāt tṛtīyabhāve tu balinā raviṇā yute . rājahetuśca maraṇaṃ tasya jñeyaṃ dvijottama.
separated_sandhi: lagnāt tṛtīya-bhāve tu balinā raviṇā yuterāja-hetuḥ ca maraṇam tasya jñeyam dvija-uttama
english: But if in the third house (tṛtīya-bhāva) from the Ascendant, it is conjoined with a powerful Sun (ravi), then his death should be known to be caused by the king (rāja-hetu), O best of the twice-born (dvija-uttama).

sanskrit: त्रितीये चेन्दुना युक्ते दृष्टे वा यक्ष्मणा मृतिः । कुजेन व्रणशस्त्राग्निदाहाद्यैर्मरणं भवेत् ॥२६॥
transliteration: tritīye cendunā yukte dṛṣṭe vā yakṣmaṇā mṛtiḥ . kujena vraṇaśastrāgnidāhādyairmaraṇaṃ bhavet.
separated_sandhi: tritīye ca indunā yukte dṛṣṭe vā yakṣmaṇā mṛtiḥkujena vraṇa-śastra-agni-dāha-ādyaiḥ maraṇam bhavet
english: If in the third house (tṛtīya), it is conjoined with the Moon (indu) or aspected by it, death occurs due to consumption (yakṣman). If by Mars (kuja), death occurs from wounds (vraṇa), weapons (śastra), fire (agni), burns (dāha), and so on.

sanskrit: तृतीये शनिराहुभ्यां युक्ते दृष्टेऽपि वा द्विज । विषार्तितो मृतिर्वाच्या जलाद्वा वह्निपीडनात् ॥२७॥
transliteration: tṛtīye śanirāhubhyāṃ yukte dṛṣṭe'pi vā dvija . viṣārtito mṛtirvācyā jalādvā vahnipīḍanāt.
separated_sandhi: tṛtīye śani-rāhubhyām yukte dṛṣṭe api vā dvijaviṣa-ārtitaḥ mṛtiḥ vācyā jalāt vā vahni-pīḍanāt
english: O twice-born (dvija), if the third house is associated with or aspected by Saturn and Rahu, death should be predicted due to poisoning, drowning, or burns.

sanskrit: गर्तादुच्चात् प्रपतनाद् बन्धनाद् वा मृतिर्भवेत् । तृतीये चन्द्रमान्दिभ्यां युक्ते वा वीक्षिते द्विज ॥२८॥
transliteration: gartāduccāt prapatanād bandhanād vā mṛtirbhavet . tṛtīye candramāndibhyāṃ yukte vā vīkṣite dvija.
separated_sandhi: gartāt uccāt prapatanāt bandhanāt vā mṛtiḥ bhavettṛtīye candra-māndibhyām yukte vā vīkṣite dvija
english: O twice-born (dvija), if the third house is associated with or aspected by the Moon (candra) and Mandi, then death may occur from falling into a pit, from a high place, or from imprisonment.

sanskrit: कृमिकुष्ठादिना तस्य मरणं भवति ध्रुवम् । तृतीये बुधसंयुक्ते वीक्षिते वापि तेन च ॥२९॥
transliteration: kṛmikuṣṭhādinā tasya maraṇaṃ bhavati dhruvam . tṛtīye budhasaṃyukte vīkṣite vāpi tena ca.
separated_sandhi: kṛmi-kuṣṭha-ādinā tasya maraṇam bhavati dhruvamtṛtīye budha-saṃyukte vīkṣite vā api tena ca
english: If the third house is associated with or aspected by Mercury (budha), then his death is certainly known to be due to fever, O best among twice-born (dvijasattama).

sanskrit: ज्वरेण मरणं तस्य विज्ञेयं द्विजसत्तम । तृतीये गुरुणा युक्ते दृष्टे शोफादिना मृतिः ॥३०॥
transliteration: jvareṇa maraṇaṃ tasya vijñeyaṃ dvijasattama . tṛtīye guruṇā yukte dṛṣṭe śophādinā mṛtiḥ.
separated_sandhi: jvareṇa maraṇam tasya vijñeyam dvija-sattamatṛtīye guruṇā yukte dṛṣṭe śopha-ādinā mṛtiḥ
english: If the third house is associated with or aspected by Jupiter (guru), death occurs due to conditions like swelling.

sanskrit: तृतीये भृगुयुग्दृष्टे मेहरोगेण तन्मृतिः । बहुखेटयुते तस्मिन् बहुरोगभवा मृतिः ॥३१॥
transliteration: tṛtīye bhṛguyugdṛṣṭe meharogeṇa tanmṛtiḥ . bahukheṭayute tasmin bahurogabhavā mṛtiḥ.
separated_sandhi: tṛtīye bhṛgu-yuk-dṛṣṭe meha-rogeṇa tat mṛtiḥbahu-kheṭa-yute tasmin bahu-roga-bhavā mṛtiḥ
english: If the third house is associated with or aspected by Venus (bhṛgu), death occurs due to urinary diseases. If that (third house) is associated with many planets, death will arise from multiple diseases.

sanskrit: तृतीये च शुभैर्युक्ते शुभदेशे मृतिर्भवेत् । पापैश्च कीकटे देशे मिश्रैर्मिश्रस्थले मृतिः ॥३२॥
transliteration: tṛtīye ca śubhairyukte śubhadeśe mṛtirbhavet . pāpaiśca kīkaṭe deśe miśrairmiśrasthale mṛtiḥ.
separated_sandhi: tṛtīye ca śubhaiḥ yukte śubhadeśe mṛtiḥ bhavet |pāpaiḥ ca kīkaṭe deśe miśraiḥ miśrasthale mṛtiḥ
english: If the third house is associated with benefic planets, death will occur in an auspicious place. If it is associated with malefic planets, death will occur in an inauspicious or despicable place. If it is associated with mixed planets, death will occur in an ordinary place.

sanskrit: तृतीये गुरुशुक्राभ्यां युक्ते ज्ञानन वै मृतिः । अज्ञानेनाऽन्यखेटैश्च मृतिर्ज्ञेया द्विजोत्तम ॥३३॥
transliteration: tṛtīye guruśukrābhyāṃ yukte jñānana vai mṛtiḥ . ajñānenā'nyakheṭaiśca mṛtirjñeyā dvijottama.
separated_sandhi: tṛtīye guruśukrābhyām yukte jñānena vai mṛtiḥ |ajñānena anyakheṭaiḥ ca mṛtiḥ jñeyā dvijottama
english: O best among the twice-born (dvija), if the third house is associated with Jupiter (guru) and Venus (śukra), death certainly occurs due to knowledge or spiritual understanding. If it is associated with other planets, death is understood to be due to ignorance.

sanskrit: चरराशौ तृतीयस्थे परदेशे मृतिर्भवेत् । स्थिरराशौ स्वगेहे च द्विस्वभावे पथि द्विज ॥३४॥
transliteration: cararāśau tṛtīyasthe paradeśe mṛtirbhavet . sthirarāśau svagehe ca dvisvabhāve pathi dvija.
separated_sandhi: cararāśau tṛtīyasthe paradeśe mṛtiḥ bhavet |sthirarāśau svagehe ca dvisvabhāve pathi dvija
english: O twice-born (dvija), if the third house is in a movable zodiac sign, death will occur in a foreign land. If it is in a fixed sign, death will occur in one's own home. If it is in a dual (common) sign, death will occur on the road or while traveling.

sanskrit: लग्नादष्टमभावाच्च निमित्तं कथितं बुधैः । सूर्येऽष्टमेऽग्नितो मृत्युश्चन्द्रे मृत्युर्जलेन च ॥३५॥
transliteration: lagnādaṣṭamabhāvācca nimittaṃ kathitaṃ budhaiḥ . sūrye'ṣṭame'gnito mṛtyuścandre mṛtyurjalena ca.
separated_sandhi: lagnāt aṣṭamabhāvāt ca nimittam kathitam budhaiḥ |sūrye aṣṭame agnitaḥ mṛtyuḥ candre mṛtyuḥ jalena ca
english: The wise (budha) have stated the causes of death from the eighth house relative to the ascendant (lagna). If the Sun (sūrya) is in the eighth house, death is from fire. If the Moon (candra) is in the eighth house, death is by water.

sanskrit: शास्त्राद् भौमे ज्वराज् ज्ञे च गुरौ रोगात् क्षुधा भृगौ । पिपासया शनौ मृत्युर्विज्ञेयो द्विजसत्तम ॥३६॥
transliteration: śāstrād bhaume jvarāj jñe ca gurau rogāt kṣudhā bhṛgau . pipāsayā śanau mṛtyurvijñeyo dvijasattama.
separated_sandhi: śāstrāt bhaume jvarāt jñe ca gurau rogāt kṣudhābhṛgau | pipāsayā śanau mṛtyuḥ vijñeyaḥ dvijasattama
english: O best among the twice-born (dvija), if Mars (bhauma) is in the eighth house, death is from weapons or implements. If Mercury (jña) is there, death is from fever. If Jupiter (guru) is there, death is from disease. If Venus (bhṛgu) is there, death is from hunger. If Saturn (śani) is there, death is from thirst - this should be known.

sanskrit: अष्टमे शुभदृग्युक्ते धर्मपे च शुभैर्युते । तीर्थे मृतिस्तदा ज्ञेया पापाख्यैरन्यथा मृतिः ॥३७॥
transliteration: aṣṭame śubhadṛgyukte dharmape ca śubhairyute . tīrthe mṛtistadā jñeyā pāpākhyairanyathā mṛtiḥ.
separated_sandhi: aṣṭame śubhadṛgyukte dharmapé ca śubhaiḥ yutetīrthe mṛtiḥ tadā jñeyā pāpākhyaiḥ anyathā mṛtiḥ
english: If the eighth house is joined with a benefic aspect, and the lord of the ninth house (dharma lord) is also conjoined with benefic planets, then death should be understood to occur in a holy place (tīrtha). Otherwise, if malefic planets (pāpa) are involved, death will occur under other circumstances.

sanskrit: अग्न्यम्बुमिश्रत्र्यंशैर्ज्ञेयो मृत्युर्गृहाश्रितैः । परिणामः शवस्याऽत्र भस्मसंक्लेदशोषकैः ॥३८॥
transliteration: agnyambumiśratryaṃśairjñeyo mṛtyurgṛhāśritaiḥ . pariṇāmaḥ śavasyā'tra bhasmasaṃkledaśoṣakaiḥ.
separated_sandhi: agnyambumiśratryaṃśaiḥ jñeyaḥ mṛtyuḥ gṛhāśritaiḥpariṇāmaḥ śavasya atra bhasmasaṃkledaśoṣakaiḥ
english: Death should be known from the "drekkāṇas" (tryaṃśa) that are associated with fire, water, or a mixture of both, or from planets situated in houses (gṛha). Here, the transformation of the corpse (śava) is into ashes, liquefaction, or drying up.

sanskrit: व्यालवर्गदृकाणैस्तु विडम्बो भवति ध्रुवम् । शवस्य श्वश‍ृगालाद्यैर्गृध्रकाकादिपक्षिभिः ॥३९॥
transliteration: vyālavargadṛkāṇaistu viḍambo bhavati dhruvam . śavasya śvaśa‍ृgālādyairgṛdhrakākādipakṣibhiḥ.
separated_sandhi: vyālavargadṛkāṇaiḥ tu viḍambaḥ bhavati dhruvamśavasya śvaśṛgālādyaiḥ gṛdhrakākādipakṣibhiḥ
english: If the "drekkāṇas" (dṛkāṇa) belong to the "class of serpents/beasts" (vyālavarga), then the corpse (śava) will certainly be mutilated or desecrated by dogs, jackals, and similar animals, as well as by vultures, crows, and other birds.

sanskrit: कर्कटे मध्यमोऽन्त्यश्च वृश्चिकाद्यद्वितीयकौ । मीनेऽन्तिमस्त्रिभागश्च व्यालवर्गाः प्रकीर्तिताः ॥४०॥
transliteration: karkaṭe madhyamo'ntyaśca vṛścikādyadvitīyakau . mīne'ntimastribhāgaśca vyālavargāḥ prakīrtitāḥ.
separated_sandhi: karkaṭe madhyamaḥ antyaḥ ca vṛścikādyadvitīyakaumīne antimaḥ tribhāgaḥ ca vyālavargāḥ prakīrtitāḥ
english: The middle and last "drekkāṇas" (tribhāga) of Cancer, the first and second of Scorpio, and the last "drekkāṇa" of Pisces are declared as belonging to the "class of serpents/beasts" (vyālavarga).

sanskrit: रविश्चन्द्रबलाक्रान्तत्र्यंशनाथे गुरौ जनः । देवलोकात् समायातो विज्ञेयो द्विजसत्तम ॥४१॥
transliteration: raviścandrabalākrāntatryaṃśanāthe gurau janaḥ . devalokāt samāyāto vijñeyo dvijasattama.
separated_sandhi: raviścandrabalākrāntatryaṃśanāthe gurau janaḥdevalokāt samāyātaḥ vijñeyaḥ dvijasattama
english: O best among the twice-born (dvija), know that a person (jana) who has come from the world of gods (devaloka) is indicated when Jupiter (guru) is the lord of the "drekkāṇa" (tryaṃśa) which is powerfully occupied by both the Sun and the Moon.

sanskrit: शुक्रेन्द्वोः पितृलोकात्तु मर्त्याच्च रविभौमयोः । बुधाऽऽर्क्योर्नरकादेवं जन्मकालाद् वदेत् सुधिः ॥४२॥
transliteration: śukrendvoḥ pitṛlokāttu martyācca ravibhaumayoḥ . budhā''rkyornarakādevaṃ janmakālād vadet sudhiḥ.
separated_sandhi: śukra-indvoḥ pitṛlokāt tu martyāt ca ravi-bhaumayoḥbudha-ārkayoḥ narakāt evam janmakālāt vadet sudhiḥ
english: A wise person should thus declare (the post-mortem destination) from the time of birth: for Venus and the Moon, it is the world of ancestors (pitṛloka); for the Sun and Mars, it is the world of mortals; and for Mercury and Saturn, it is hell.

sanskrit: गुरुश्चन्द्रसितौ सूर्यभौमौ ज्ञार्की यथाक्रमम् । देवेन्दुभूम्यधोलोकान् नयन्त्यस्तारिरन्ध्रगाः ॥४३॥
transliteration: guruścandrasitau sūryabhaumau jñārkī yathākramam . devendubhūmyadholokān nayantyastārirandhragāḥ.
separated_sandhi: guruḥ candra-sitau sūrya-bhaumau jña-ārkau yathākramamdeva-indu-bhūmi-adho-lokān nayanti asta-ari-randhra-gāḥ
english: Jupiter, the Moon and Venus, the Sun and Mars, and Mercury and Saturn, respectively, lead (souls) to the abodes of the gods, the Moon, the Earth, and the lower worlds, if they are positioned in the 7th (setting), 6th (enemy), or 8th (death) houses.

sanskrit: अथ तत्र ग्रहभावे रन्ध्रारित्र्यंशनाथयोः । यो बली स निजं लोकं नयत्यन्ते द्विजोत्तम ॥४४॥
transliteration: atha tatra grahabhāve randhrāritryaṃśanāthayoḥ . yo balī sa nijaṃ lokaṃ nayatyante dvijottama.
separated_sandhi: atha tatra graha-bhāve randhra-ari-tryaṃśa-nāthayoḥyaḥ balī saḥ nijam lokam nayati ante dvijottama
english: Now, in that planetary state, among the lords of the 8th, 6th, and 3rd houses, whichever (planet) is stronger, that one eventually leads (the native) to its own world, O best among the twice-born (dvijottama).

sanskrit: तस्य स्वोच्चादि संस्थित्या वरमध्याऽधमाः क्रमात् । तत्तल्लोकेऽपि सञ्जाता विज्ञेया द्विजसत्तम ॥४५॥
transliteration: tasya svoccādi saṃsthityā varamadhyā'dhamāḥ kramāt . tattalloke'pi sañjātā vijñeyā dvijasattama.
separated_sandhi: tasya sva-ucca-ādi saṃsthityā vara-madhya-adhamāḥkramāt tat-tat-loke api sañjātāḥ vijñeyāḥ dvijasattama
english: According to its own position (such as exaltation, etc.), one should understand, O best among Brahmins (dvijasattama), that individuals born into those respective worlds will be excellent, mediocre, or inferior, in that order.

sanskrit: अन्यान् मारकभेदांश्च राशिग्रहकृतान् द्विज । दशाध्यायप्रसंगेषु कथयिष्यामि सुव्रत ॥४६॥
transliteration: anyān mārakabhedāṃśca rāśigrahakṛtān dvija . daśādhyāyaprasaṃgeṣu kathayiṣyāmi suvrata.
separated_sandhi: anyān māraka-bhedān ca rāśi-graha-kṛtān dvijadaśādhyāya-prasaṃgeṣu kathayiṣyāmi suvrata
english: O twice-born (dvija) of good vows, I will explain other types of death-inflicting (māraka) factors, specifically those related to zodiacal signs and planets, in the context of the chapter on planetary periods (daśādhyāya).

sanskrit: अवस्थावशतः प्रोक्तं ग्रहाणां यत् फलं मुने । का साऽवस्था मुनिश्रेष्ठ कतिधा चेति कथ्ययाम् ॥१॥
transliteration: avasthāvaśataḥ proktaṃ grahāṇāṃ yat phalaṃ mune . kā sā'vasthā muniśreṣṭha katidhā ceti kathyayām.
separated_sandhi: avasthāvaśataḥ proktam grahāṇām yat phalam mune kāsā avasthā muniśreṣṭha katidhā ca iti kathyayām
english: O sage, you have described the results of planets based on their states. O best of sages, what exactly are these states, and how many types are there? Please explain this to me.

sanskrit: अवस्था विविधाः सन्ति ग्रहाणां दिवजसत्तम । सारभूताश्च यास्तासु बालाद्यास्ता वदाम्यहम् ॥२॥
transliteration: avasthā vividhāḥ santi grahāṇāṃ divajasattama . sārabhūtāśca yāstāsu bālādyāstā vadāmyaham.
separated_sandhi: avasthāḥ vividhāḥ santi grahāṇām dvijasattamasārabhūtāḥ ca yāḥ tāsu bālādyāḥ tāḥ vadāmi aham
english: O best among the twice-born (dvijasattama), planets have various states (avasthā). Among those that are essential, I will now describe the ones beginning with bāla (childhood).

sanskrit: क्रमाद् बालः कुमारोऽथ युवा वृद्धस्तथा मृतः । षडंशैरसमे खेटः समे ज्ञेयो विपर्ययात् ॥३॥
transliteration: kramād bālaḥ kumāro'tha yuvā vṛddhastathā mṛtaḥ . ṣaḍaṃśairasame kheṭaḥ same jñeyo viparyayāt.
separated_sandhi: kramāt bālaḥ kumāraḥ atha yuvā vṛddhaḥ tathā mṛtaḥṣaḍaṃśaiḥ asame kheṭaḥ same jñeyaḥ viparyayāt
english: A planet sequentially progresses through the states of child (bāla), adolescent (kumāra), youth (yuvan), old (vṛddha), and dead (mṛta). These states are understood to correspond to six-degree divisions within odd zodiacal signs. In even signs, these states are known to occur in the reverse order.

sanskrit: फलं पादमितं बाले फलार्धं च कुमारके । यूनि पूर्णं फलं ज्ञेयं वृद्धे किञ्चित् मृते च खम् ॥४॥
transliteration: phalaṃ pādamitaṃ bāle phalārdhaṃ ca kumārake . yūni pūrṇaṃ phalaṃ jñeyaṃ vṛddhe kiñcit mṛte ca kham.
separated_sandhi: phalam pādamitam bāle phalārdham ca kumārake yūnipūrṇam phalam jñeyam vṛddhe kiñcit mṛte ca kham
english: The planetary result is considered one-fourth in the child (bāla) state, and half in the adolescent (kumāra) state. In the youth (yuvan) state, the full result is to be understood. In the old (vṛddha) state, it is a small amount, and in the dead (mṛta) state, it is zero.

sanskrit: स्वभोच्चयोः समसुहृद्भयोः शत्रुभनीचयोः । जाग्रत्स्वप्नसुषुप्त्याख्या अवस्था नामदृक्फलाः ॥५॥
transliteration: svabhoccayoḥ samasuhṛdbhayoḥ śatrubhanīcayoḥ . jāgratsvapnasuṣuptyākhyā avasthā nāmadṛkphalāḥ.
separated_sandhi: svabhoccayoḥ samasuhṛdbhyoḥ śatrubhanīcayoḥjāgratsvapnasuṣuptyākhyāḥ avasthāḥ nāma dṛkphalāḥ
english: When planets are in their own house or exaltation, they are said to be in the Jāgrat (waking) state. When in neutral or friendly houses, they are in the Svapna (dream) state. When in enemy houses or debilitation, they are in the Suṣupti (deep sleep) state. These states (avasthā) indeed yield specific observable results.

sanskrit: जागरे च फलं पूर्णं स्वप्ने मध्यफलं तथा । सुषुप्तौ तु फलं शून्यं विज्ञेयं द्विजसत्तम ॥६॥
transliteration: jāgare ca phalaṃ pūrṇaṃ svapne madhyaphalaṃ tathā . suṣuptau tu phalaṃ śūnyaṃ vijñeyaṃ dvijasattama.
separated_sandhi: jāgare ca phalam pūrṇam svapne madhyaphalam tathāsuṣuptau tu phalam śūnyam vijñeyam dvijasattama
english: O best among the twice-born (dvija), it should be understood that a full result occurs in the waking state, a medium result in the dream state, and zero result in the state of deep sleep.

sanskrit: दीप्तः स्वस्थः प्रमुदितः शान्तो दीनोऽथ दुःखितः । विकलश्च खलः कोऽपीत्यवस्था नवधाऽपराः ॥७॥
transliteration: dīptaḥ svasthaḥ pramuditaḥ śānto dīno'tha duḥkhitaḥ . vikalaśca khalaḥ ko'pītyavasthā navadhā'parāḥ.
separated_sandhi: dīptaḥ svasthaḥ pramuditaḥ śāntaḥ dīnaḥ atha duḥkhitaḥvikalaḥ ca khalaḥ kopī iti avasthāḥ navadhā aparāḥ
english: Brilliant, well-placed, very happy, peaceful, miserable, distressed, agitated, wicked, and angry - these are the nine other types of planetary states.

sanskrit: स्वोच्चस्थः खेचरो दीप्तः स्वर्क्षे स्वस्थोऽधिमित्रभे । मुदितो मित्रभे शान्तः समभे दीन उच्यते ॥८॥
transliteration: svoccasthaḥ khecaro dīptaḥ svarkṣe svastho'dhimitrabhe . mudito mitrabhe śāntaḥ samabhe dīna ucyate.
separated_sandhi: svoccāsthaḥ khecaraḥ dīptaḥ svarṣe svasthaḥ adhimitrabhemuditaḥ mitrabhe śāntaḥ samabhe dīnaḥ ucyate
english: A planet (khecara) is said to be brilliant (dīpta) when in its sign of exaltation. It is called well-placed (svastha) in its own sign or a sign of an intimate friend. It is happy (mudita) in a friend's sign, and miserable (dīna) in a neutral sign.

sanskrit: शत्रुभे दुःखितः प्रोक्तो विकलः पापसंयुतः । खलः खलगृहे ज्ञेयः कोपी स्यादर्कसंयुतः ॥९॥
transliteration: śatrubhe duḥkhitaḥ prokto vikalaḥ pāpasaṃyutaḥ . khalaḥ khalagṛhe jñeyaḥ kopī syādarkasaṃyutaḥ.
separated_sandhi: śatrubhe duḥkhitaḥ proktaḥ vikalaḥ pāpasaṃyutaḥkhalaḥ khalagṛhe jñeyaḥ kopī syāt arkasaṃyutaḥ
english: It is declared to be distressed (duḥkhita) in an enemy's sign, agitated (vikala) when conjoined with a malefic, and wicked (khala) when in a wicked planet's sign. It should be known as angry (kopī) when conjoined with the Sun.

sanskrit: यादृशो जन्मकाले यः खेटो यद्भावगो भवेत् । तादृशं तस्य भावस्य फलमुह्यं द्विजोत्तम ॥१०॥
transliteration: yādṛśo janmakāle yaḥ kheṭo yadbhāvago bhavet . tādṛśaṃ tasya bhāvasya phalamuhyaṃ dvijottama.
separated_sandhi: yādṛśaḥ janmakāle yaḥ kheṭaḥ yat bhāvagaḥ bhavettādṛśam tasya bhāvasya phalam ūhyam dvijottama
english: O best among the twice-born (dvijottama), one should infer the result of a particular house (bhāva) at the time of birth to be of the same nature as the planet (kheṭa) that occupies that house (bhāva).

sanskrit: लज्जितो गर्वितश्चैव क्षुधितस्तृषितस्तथा । मुदितः क्षोभितश्चैव ग्रहभावाः प्रकीर्तिताः ॥११॥
transliteration: lajjito garvitaścaiva kṣudhitastṛṣitastathā . muditaḥ kṣobhitaścaiva grahabhāvāḥ prakīrtitāḥ.
separated_sandhi: lajjitaḥ garvitaḥ ca eva kṣudhitaḥ tṛṣitaḥ tathāmuditaḥ kṣobhitaḥ ca eva grahabhāvāḥ prakīrtitāḥ
english: The states of planets are declared as ashamed, proud, hungry, thirsty, pleased, and agitated.

sanskrit: पुत्रगेहगतः खेटो राहुकेतुयुतोऽथवा । रविमन्दकुजैर्युक्तो लज्जितो ग्रह उच्यते ॥१२॥
transliteration: putragehagataḥ kheṭo rāhuketuyuto'thavā . ravimandakujairyukto lajjito graha ucyate.
separated_sandhi: putragehagataḥ kheṭaḥ rāhuketuyutaḥ athavāravimandakujaiḥ yuktaḥ lajjitaḥ grahaḥ ucyate
english: A planet (kheṭa) situated in the fifth house (putrageha), or associated with Rāhu or Ketu, or combined with the Sun, Saturn (śani), and Mars, is called an ashamed (lajjita) planet.

sanskrit: तुङ्गस्थानगतो वाऽपि त्रिकोणेऽपि भवेत्पुनः । गर्वितः सोऽपि गदितो निर्विशंकं द्विजोत्तम ॥१३॥
transliteration: tuṅgasthānagato vā'pi trikoṇe'pi bhavetpunaḥ . garvitaḥ so'pi gadito nirviśaṃkaṃ dvijottama.
separated_sandhi: tuṅgasthānagataḥ vā api trikoṇe api bhavet punaḥgarvitaḥ saḥ api gaditaḥ nirviśaṅkam dvijottama
english: If a planet is situated in its exaltation sign (tuṅgasthāna) or even in a trine (trikoṇa), then it is undoubtedly called a proud (garvita) planet, O best among Brahmins (dvijottama).

sanskrit: शत्रुगेही शत्रुयुक्तो रिपुदृष्टो भवेद्यदि । क्षुधितः स च विज्ञेयः शनियुक्तो यथा तथा ॥१४॥
transliteration: śatrugehī śatruyukto ripudṛṣṭo bhavedyadi . kṣudhitaḥ sa ca vijñeyaḥ śaniyukto yathā tathā.
separated_sandhi: śatrugehī śatruyuktaḥ ripudṛṣṭaḥ bhavet yadikṣudhitaḥ saḥ ca vijñeyaḥ śaniyuktaḥ yathā tathā
english: If a planet is situated in an enemy's house, or conjoined with an enemy planet, or aspected by an enemy planet, it should be known as a hungry (kṣudhita) planet; similarly, if it is conjoined with Saturn (śani).

sanskrit: जलराशौ स्थितः खेटः शत्रुणा चाऽवलोकितः । शुभग्रहा न पश्यन्ति तृषितः स उदाहृतः ॥१५॥
transliteration: jalarāśau sthitaḥ kheṭaḥ śatruṇā cā'valokitaḥ . śubhagrahā na paśyanti tṛṣitaḥ sa udāhṛtaḥ.
separated_sandhi: jalarāśau sthitaḥ kheṭaḥ śatruṇā ca avalokitaḥśubhagrahāḥ na paśyanti tṛṣitaḥ saḥ udāhṛtaḥ
english: A planet (kheṭa) situated in a watery sign (jalarāśi), aspected by an enemy, and not seen by benefic planets, is declared to be a thirsty (tṛṣita) planet.

sanskrit: मित्रगेही मित्रयुक्तो मित्रेण च विलोकितः । गुरुणा सहितो यश्च मुदितः स प्रकीर्तितः ॥१६॥
transliteration: mitragehī mitrayukto mitreṇa ca vilokitaḥ . guruṇā sahito yaśca muditaḥ sa prakīrtitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: mitragehī mitrayuktaḥ mitreṇa ca vilokitaḥ |guruṇā sahitaḥ yaḥ ca muditaḥ saḥ prakīrtitaḥ
english: A planet is declared joyful (muditaḥ) when it is located in a friendly sign, conjoined with a friendly planet, aspected by a friendly planet, and also associated with a (spiritual teacher) guru.

sanskrit: रविणा सहितो यश्च पापा पश्यन्ति सर्वथा । क्षोभितं तं विजानीयाच्छत्रुणा यदि वीक्षितः ॥१७॥
transliteration: raviṇā sahito yaśca pāpā paśyanti sarvathā . kṣobhitaṃ taṃ vijānīyācchatruṇā yadi vīkṣitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: raviṇā sahitaḥ yaḥ ca pāpā paśyanti sarvathā |kṣobhitam tam vijānīyāt śatruṇā yadi vīkṣitaḥ
english: If a planet is conjoined with the Sun, and is always aspected by malefic planets, and if it is aspected by an inimical planet, then one should understand it to be agitated (kṣobhitam).

sanskrit: येषु येषु च भावेषु ग्रहास्तिष्ठन्ति सर्वथा । क्षुधितः क्षोभितो वापि तद्भावफलनाशनः ॥१८॥
transliteration: yeṣu yeṣu ca bhāveṣu grahāstiṣṭhanti sarvathā . kṣudhitaḥ kṣobhito vāpi tadbhāvaphalanāśanaḥ.
separated_sandhi: yeṣu yeṣu ca bhāveṣu grahāḥ tiṣṭhanti sarvathā |kṣudhitaḥ kṣobhitaḥ vā api tadbhāvaphala-nāśanaḥ
english: And in whichever houses planets are always situated, if a planet is in a hungry (kṣudhitaḥ) or agitated (kṣobhitaḥ) state, it will destroy the results pertaining to that house.

sanskrit: एवं क्रमेण बोद्धव्यं सर्वभावेषु पण्डितैः । बलाऽबलविचारेण वक्तव्यः फलनिर्णयः ॥१९॥
transliteration: evaṃ krameṇa boddhavyaṃ sarvabhāveṣu paṇḍitaiḥ . balā'balavicāreṇa vaktavyaḥ phalanirṇayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: evam krameṇa boddhavyam sarvabhāveṣu paṇḍitaiḥ| balābalavicāreṇa vaktavyaḥ phalanirṇayaḥ
english: Thus, the learned (paṇḍitaiḥ) should understand this method for all astrological houses. The final determination of results should be stated after carefully considering the strengths and weaknesses of the planets.

sanskrit: अन्योन्यं च मुदा युक्तं फलं मिश्रं वदेत्पुनः । बलहीने तदा हानिः सबले च महाफलम् ॥२०॥
transliteration: anyonyaṃ ca mudā yuktaṃ phalaṃ miśraṃ vadetpunaḥ . balahīne tadā hāniḥ sabale ca mahāphalam.
separated_sandhi: anyonyam ca mudā yuktam phalam miśram vadetpunaḥ | balahīne tadā hāniḥ sabale ca mahāphalam
english: Furthermore, if planets are mutually joyful, one should declare mixed results. When a planet is weak, there is a loss of outcome, but when it is strong, there are great results.

sanskrit: कर्मस्थाने स्थितो यस्य लज्जितस्तृषितस्तथा । क्षुधितः क्षोभितो वापि स नरो दुःखभाजनम् ॥२१॥
transliteration: karmasthāne sthito yasya lajjitastṛṣitastathā . kṣudhitaḥ kṣobhito vāpi sa naro duḥkhabhājanam.
separated_sandhi: karma-sthāne sthitaḥ yasya lajjitaḥ tṛṣitaḥ tathākṣudhitaḥ kṣobhitaḥ vā api saḥ naraḥ duḥkha-bhājanam
english: If a planet situated in the house of action (karma-sthāna) is abashed (lajjita), thirsty (tṛṣita), hungry (kṣudhita), or agitated (kṣobhita), that person becomes a recipient of misery.

sanskrit: सुतस्थाने भवेद्यस्य लज्जितो ग्रह एव च । सुतनाशो भवेत्तस्य एकस्तिष्ठति सर्वदा ॥२२॥
transliteration: sutasthāne bhavedyasya lajjito graha eva ca . sutanāśo bhavettasya ekastiṣṭhati sarvadā.
separated_sandhi: suta-sthāne bhavet yasya lajjitaḥ grahaḥ eva casuta-nāśaḥ bhavet tasya ekaḥ tiṣṭhati sarvadā
english: If a planet situated in the house of children (suta-sthāna) is abashed (lajjita), there will be a loss of children for that person, and only one (child) will always remain.

sanskrit: क्षोभितस्तृषितश्चैव सप्तमे यस्य वा भवेत् । म्रियते तस्य नारी च सत्यमाहुर्द्विजोत्तम ॥२३॥
transliteration: kṣobhitastṛṣitaścaiva saptame yasya vā bhavet . mriyate tasya nārī ca satyamāhurdvijottama.
separated_sandhi: kṣobhitaḥ tṛṣitaḥ ca eva saptame yasya vā bhavetmriyate tasya nārī ca satyam āhuḥ dvijottama
english: O best among the twice-born (dvijottama), if a planet situated in the seventh house is agitated (kṣobhita) and thirsty (tṛṣita), his wife dies; this is declared as truth.

sanskrit: नवालयारामसुखं नृपत्वं कलापटुत्वं विदधाति पुंसाम् । सदार्थलाभं व्यवहारवृद्धिं फलं विशेषादिह गर्वितस्य ॥२४॥
transliteration: navālayārāmasukhaṃ nṛpatvaṃ kalāpaṭutvaṃ vidadhāti puṃsām . sadārthalābhaṃ vyavahāravṛddhiṃ phalaṃ viśeṣādiha garvitasya.
separated_sandhi: nava-ālaya-ārāma-sukham nṛpatvamkalā-paṭutvam vidadhāti puṃsāmsadā artha-lābham vyavahāra-vṛddhimphalam viśeṣāt iha garvitasya
english: (A planet that is) strong (garvita) here (in a particular house) bestows upon men happiness from new houses and gardens, royal status, skill in arts, continuous acquisition of wealth, and growth in business dealings; these are the special results.

sanskrit: भवति मुदितयोगे वासशालाविशाला । विमलवसनभूषाभूमियोषासु सौख्यम् । स्वजनजनविलासो भूमिपागारवासो । रिपुनिवहविनाशो बुद्धिविद्याविकाशः ॥२५॥
transliteration: bhavati muditayoge vāsaśālāviśālā . vimalavasanabhūṣābhūmiyoṣāsu saukhyam . svajanajanavilāso bhūmipāgāravāso . ripunivahavināśo buddhividyāvikāśaḥ.
separated_sandhi: bhavati mudita-yoge vāsa-śālā viśālāvimala-vasana-bhūṣā-bhūmi-yoṣāsu saukhyamsva-jana-vilāsaḥ bhūmipāgāra-vāsaḥripu-nivaha-vināśaḥ buddhi-vidyā-vikāśaḥ
english: When a planet is in the joyful (mudita) state, there will be spacious residences, happiness from pure clothes, ornaments, land, and women, enjoyment with one's own relatives, residence in royal palaces, destruction of a multitude of enemies, and the development of intellect and knowledge.

sanskrit: दिशति लज्जितभाववशाद्रतिं विगतराममतिं विमतिक्षयम् । सुतगदागमनं गमनं वृथा कलिकथाभिरुचिं न रुचिं शुभे ॥२६॥
transliteration: diśati lajjitabhāvavaśādratiṃ vigatarāmamatiṃ vimatikṣayam . sutagadāgamanaṃ gamanaṃ vṛthā kalikathābhiruciṃ na ruciṃ śubhe.
separated_sandhi: diśati lajjitabhāvavaśāt ratimvigatarāmammatim vimatikṣayamsutagadāgamanam gamanam vṛthākalikathābhirucim na rucim śubhe
english: It causes attachment due to a state of shame, a mind devoid of joy, and the decay of discernment. It also brings the onset of disease in children, futile journeys, an interest in quarrels, and no interest in auspicious matters.

sanskrit: संक्षोभितस्यापि फलं विशेषाद्द्रिद्रजातं कुमतिं च कष्टम् । करोति वित्तक्षयमंध्रिबाधां धनाप्तिबाधामवनीशकोपात् ॥२७॥
transliteration: saṃkṣobhitasyāpi phalaṃ viśeṣāddridrajātaṃ kumatiṃ ca kaṣṭam . karoti vittakṣayamaṃdhribādhāṃ dhanāptibādhāmavanīśakopāt.
separated_sandhi: saṃkṣobhitasya api phalam viśeṣātdridrajātam kumatim ca kaṣṭamkaroti vittakṣayam aṃdhrībādhāmdhanāptibādhām avanīśakopāt
english: Even the outcome for the greatly agitated one is particularly the origin of poverty, perverse intellect, and suffering. It causes loss of wealth, affliction of the feet, hindrance in gaining wealth, and anger from the king.

sanskrit: क्षुधितखगवशाद्वै शोकमोहादिपातः । परिजनपरितापादाधिभीत्या कृशत्वम् । कलिरपि रिपुलोकैरर्थबाधा नराणा । मखिलब्बलनिरोधो बुद्धिरोधो विषादात् ॥२८॥
transliteration: kṣudhitakhagavaśādvai śokamohādipātaḥ . parijanaparitāpādādhibhītyā kṛśatvam . kalirapi ripulokairarthabādhā narāṇā . makhilabbalanirodho buddhirodho viṣādāt.
separated_sandhi: kṣudhitakhagavaśāt vai śokamohādipātaḥparijanaparitāpāt ādhibhītyā kṛśatvamkaliḥ api ripulokaiḥ arthabādhā narāṇāmakhilabalanirodhaḥ buddhinirodhaḥ viṣādāt
english: Indeed, due to a hungry bird (situation), there is a fall into sorrow, delusion, and similar states. Emaciation occurs due to the suffering of kinsfolk and from anxiety and fear. Also, strife among people, obstruction of wealth by enemies, obstruction of all strength, and obstruction of intellect due to despondency.

sanskrit: तृषितखगभवे स्वादंगनासंगमध्ये । भवति गदविकारो दृष्टकार्याधिकारः । निजजनपरिवादादर्थहानिः कृशत्वं । खलकृतपरितापो मानहानिः सदैव ॥२९॥
transliteration: tṛṣitakhagabhave svādaṃganāsaṃgamadhye . bhavati gadavikāro dṛṣṭakāryādhikāraḥ . nijajanaparivādādarthahāniḥ kṛśatvaṃ . khalakṛtaparitāpo mānahāniḥ sadaiva.
separated_sandhi: tṛṣitakhagabhave svāṅganāsaṅgamadhyebhavati gadavikāraḥ dṛṣṭakāryādhikāraḥnijajanaparivādāt arthahāniḥ kṛśatvamkhalakṛtaparitāpaḥ mānahāniḥ sadaiva
english: When the situation of a thirsty bird arises, there occurs disease affliction even amidst intimacy with one's women, and one may have authority over observed tasks. Loss of wealth and emaciation result from criticism by one's own people. Suffering caused by wicked people and loss of honor are constant.

sanskrit: शयनं चोपवेशं च नेत्रपाणिप्रकाशनम् । गमनागमनं चाऽथ सभायां वसतिं तथा ॥३०॥
transliteration: śayanaṃ copaveśaṃ ca netrapāṇiprakāśanam . gamanāgamanaṃ cā'tha sabhāyāṃ vasatiṃ tathā.
separated_sandhi: śayanam ca upaveśam ca netrapāṇiprakāśanamgamanam āgamanam ca atha sabhāyām vasatim tathā
english: Sleeping and sitting, and the display of eyes and hands. Also, going and coming, and residing in an assembly.

sanskrit: आगमं भोजनं चैव नृत्यं लिप्सां च कौतुकम् । निद्रां ग्रहाणां चेष्टां च कथयामि तवाग्रितः ॥३१॥
transliteration: āgamaṃ bhojanaṃ caiva nṛtyaṃ lipsāṃ ca kautukam . nidrāṃ grahāṇāṃ ceṣṭāṃ ca kathayāmi tavāgritaḥ.
separated_sandhi: āgamam bhojanam ca eva nṛtyam lipsām ca kautukam| nidrām grahāṇām ceṣṭām ca kathayāmi tava agritaḥ
english: I will now explain to you the indications of arrival, eating, dance, desires, curiosity, sleep, and the various activities of the planets.

sanskrit: यस्मिन्नृक्षे भवेत्खेटस्तेन तं परिपूरयेत् । पुनरंशेन सम्पूर्य स्वनक्षत्रं नियोजयेत् ॥३२॥
transliteration: yasminnṛkṣe bhavetkheṭastena taṃ paripūrayet . punaraṃśena sampūrya svanakṣatraṃ niyojayet.
separated_sandhi: yasmin ṛkṣe bhavet kheṭaḥ tena tam paripūrayet| punaḥ aṃśena sampūrya svanakṣatram niyojayet
english: One should fill (or complete) that (constellation) with the planet which is present in it. Then, having completed it again with a specific division (or degree), one should apply (or assign) one's own birth constellation (nakṣatra).

sanskrit: यातदण्डं तथा लग्नमेकीकृत्य सदा बुधः । रविभिस्तु हरेद् भागं शेषं कार्ये नियोजयेत् ॥३३॥
transliteration: yātadaṇḍaṃ tathā lagnamekīkṛtya sadā budhaḥ . ravibhistu hared bhāgaṃ śeṣaṃ kārye niyojayet.
separated_sandhi: yātadaṇḍam tathā lagnam ekīkṛtya sadā budhaḥ |ravibhiḥ tu haret bhāgam śeṣam kārye niyojayet
english: The wise person (budhaḥ) should always unite the elapsed time in daṇḍas and the ascendant (lagna). Then, one should divide the portion (obtained) by twelve (represented by 'suns'), and apply the remainder to the specific purpose (kārya) of the calculation.

sanskrit: नाक्षत्रिकदशारीत्या पुनः पूरणमाचरेत् । नामाद्यस्वरसंख्याढ्यं हर्तव्यं रविभिस्ततः ॥३४॥
transliteration: nākṣatrikadaśārītyā punaḥ pūraṇamācaret . nāmādyasvarasaṃkhyāḍhyaṃ hartavyaṃ ravibhistataḥ.
separated_sandhi: nākṣatrikadaśārītyā punaḥ pūraṇam ācaret |nāmādyasvarasaṃkhyāḍhyam hartavyam ravibhiḥ tataḥ
english: One should again perform the completion (calculation) according to the method of the nakṣatra (lunar mansion) dasa (planetary period system). Then, the number (or portion) that is enriched (or determined) by the count of the first vowel of the (native's) name should be divided by twelve (represented by 'suns').

sanskrit: रवौ पञ्च तथा देयाश्चन्द्रे दद्याद्द्वयं तथा । कुजे द्वयं च संय्क्तं बुधे त्रीत्रि नियोजयेत् ॥३५॥
transliteration: ravau pañca tathā deyāścandre dadyāddvayaṃ tathā . kuje dvayaṃ ca saṃyktaṃ budhe trītri niyojayet.
separated_sandhi: ravau pañca tathā deyāḥ candre dadyāt dvayam tathā| kuje dvayam ca saṃyuktam budhe trīṇi niyojayet
english: Five should be assigned for the Sun. Similarly, one should give two for the Moon. And two are to be joined (or assigned) for Mars. For Mercury, one should assign three.

sanskrit: गुरौ बाणाः प्रदेयाश्च त्रयं दद्याच्च भार्गवे । शनौ त्रयमथो देयं राहौ दद्याच्चतुष्टयम् ॥३६॥
transliteration: gurau bāṇāḥ pradeyāśca trayaṃ dadyācca bhārgave . śanau trayamatho deyaṃ rāhau dadyāccatuṣṭayam.
separated_sandhi: gurau bāṇāḥ pradeyāḥ ca trayam dadyāt ca bhārgaveśanau trayam athaḥ deyam rāhau dadyāt catuṣṭayam
english: Five shares (bāṇāḥ) should be assigned to Jupiter (guru), and three shares should be assigned to Venus (bhārgava). Then, three shares should be assigned to Saturn (śani), and four shares should be assigned to Rāhu.

sanskrit: त्रिभिर्भक्तं च शेषांकैः सा पुनस्त्रिबिधा स्मृता । दष्टिश्चेष्टा विचेष्टा च तत्फलं तथयाम्यहम् ॥३७॥
transliteration: tribhirbhaktaṃ ca śeṣāṃkaiḥ sā punastribidhā smṛtā . daṣṭiśceṣṭā viceṣṭā ca tatphalaṃ tathayāmyaham.
separated_sandhi: tribhiḥ bhaktam ca śeṣāṅkaiḥ sā punaḥ tribidhā smṛtādṛṣṭiḥ ceṣṭā viceṣṭā ca tat phalam tathā yāmi aham
english: When divided by three, and by the remaining digits, that (result or value) is again considered threefold: namely, aspect (dṛṣṭi), effort (ceṣṭā), and intensified effort (viceṣṭā). I will explain their effects accordingly.

sanskrit: दृष्टौ मध्यफलं ज्ञेयं चेष्टायां विपुलं फलम् । विचेष्टायां फलं स्वल्पमेवं दृष्टिफलं विदुः ॥३८॥
transliteration: dṛṣṭau madhyaphalaṃ jñeyaṃ ceṣṭāyāṃ vipulaṃ phalam . viceṣṭāyāṃ phalaṃ svalpamevaṃ dṛṣṭiphalaṃ viduḥ.
separated_sandhi: dṛṣṭau madhya phalam jñeyam ceṣṭāyām vipulam phalamviceṣṭāyām phalam svalpam evam dṛṣṭiphalam viduḥ
english: In the case of aspect (dṛṣṭi), a moderate result should be understood. In the case of effort (ceṣṭā), a significant result (is obtained). In the case of intensified effort (viceṣṭā), the result is small. Astrologers understand the effects of these astrological factors in this manner.

sanskrit: शुभाऽशुभं ग्रहाणां च समीक्ष्याऽथ बलाऽबलम् । तुङ्गस्थाने विशेषेण बलं ज्ञेयं तथा बुधैः ॥३९॥
transliteration: śubhā'śubhaṃ grahāṇāṃ ca samīkṣyā'tha balā'balam . tuṅgasthāne viśeṣeṇa balaṃ jñeyaṃ tathā budhaiḥ.
separated_sandhi: śubhāśubham grahāṇām ca samīkṣya atha balābalamtuṅgasthāne viśeṣeṇa balam jñeyam tathā budhaiḥ
english: Having thoroughly examined the auspicious and inauspicious qualities of the planets, as well as their strengths and weaknesses, especially regarding their exaltation (tuṅgasthāna), astrologers (budhaiḥ) should thus understand their strength.

sanskrit: मन्दाग्निरोगो बहुधा नराणां स्थूलत्वमन्ङ् घ्रेरपिपित्तकोपः । व्रणं गुदे शूलमुरःप्रदेशे यदोष्णभानुः शयनं प्रयातः ॥४०॥
transliteration: mandāgnirogo bahudhā narāṇāṃ sthūlatvamanṅ ghrerapipittakopaḥ . vraṇaṃ gude śūlamuraḥpradeśe yadoṣṇabhānuḥ śayanaṃ prayātaḥ.
separated_sandhi: mandāgnirogaḥ bahudhā narāṇāmsthūlatvam aṅghreḥ api pittakopaḥvraṇam gude śūlam uraḥpradeśeyadā uṣṇabhānuḥ śayanam prayātaḥ
english: When the hot-rayed Sun (uṣṇabhānu) enters the house of sleep (the 12th house), there will be various digestive disorders (mandāgniroga) for people, along with stoutness of the feet, bilious afflictions (pittakopa), anal wounds, and pain in the chest region.

sanskrit: दरिद्रताभारविहाराशाली विवादविद्याभिरतो नरः स्यात् । कथोरचित्तः खलु नष्टवित्तः सूर्यो यदा चेदुपवेशनस्थः ॥४१॥
transliteration: daridratābhāravihārāśālī vivādavidyābhirato naraḥ syāt . kathoracittaḥ khalu naṣṭavittaḥ sūryo yadā cedupaveśanasthaḥ.
separated_sandhi: daridratābhāravihārāśālī vivādavidyābhirataḥ naraḥ syātkathoracittaḥ khalu naṣṭavittaḥ sūryaḥ yadā cet upaveśanasthaḥ
english: When the Sun is situated in the "upaveśana" house (7th house from the ascendant), a person will be afflicted by the burden of poverty and restlessness, fond of argumentation, hard-hearted, and certainly one who has lost their wealth.

sanskrit: नरः सदानन्दधरो विवेकी परोपकारी बलवित्तयुक्तः । महामुखी राजकृपाभिमानी दिवाधिनाथो यदि नेत्रपानौ ॥४२॥
transliteration: naraḥ sadānandadharo vivekī paropakārī balavittayuktaḥ . mahāmukhī rājakṛpābhimānī divādhinātho yadi netrapānau.
separated_sandhi: naraḥ sadānandadharaḥ vivekī paropakārī balavittayuktaḥmahāmukhī rājakṛpābhimānī divādhināthaḥ yadi netrapānau
english: If the Sun (divādhinātha) is in the "netrapāna" position (2nd house from the ascendant), a person will always be joyful, discerning, benevolent, endowed with strength and wealth, eloquent, and proud of royal favor.

sanskrit: उदारचित्तः परिपूर्णवित्तः सभासु वक्ता बहुपुण्यकर्त्ता । महाबली सुन्दरररूपशाली प्रकाशने जन्मनि पदिमनीशे ॥४३॥
transliteration: udāracittaḥ paripūrṇavittaḥ sabhāsu vaktā bahupuṇyakarttā . mahābalī sundarararūpaśālī prakāśane janmani padimanīśe.
separated_sandhi: udāracittaḥ paripūrṇavittaḥ sabhāsu vaktā bahupuṇyakarttāmahābalī sundararūpaśālī prakāśane janmani padminīśe
english: When the Sun (padminīśa) is in the "prakāśana" house (10th house from the ascendant) of the birth chart, a person will be generous, very wealthy, an eloquent speaker in assemblies, one who performs many meritorious deeds, very powerful, and endowed with a beautiful form.

sanskrit: प्रवासशाली किल दुःखमाली सदालसी धीधनवर्जितश्च । भयातुरः कोपपरो विशेषाद्दिवाधिनाथे गमने मनुष्यः ॥४४॥
transliteration: pravāsaśālī kila duḥkhamālī sadālasī dhīdhanavarjitaśca . bhayāturaḥ kopaparo viśeṣāddivādhināthe gamane manuṣyaḥ.
separated_sandhi: pravāsaśālī kila duḥkhamālī sadālasī dhīdhanavarjitaḥ cabhayāturaḥ kopaparaḥ viśeṣāt divādhināthe gamane manuṣyaḥ
english: When the Sun (divādhinātha) is in the "gamana" house (12th house from the ascendant), a person will certainly be prone to dwelling abroad, afflicted by misery, always lazy, devoid of intelligence and wealth, distressed by fear, and especially prone to anger.

sanskrit: परदाररतो जनतारहितो बहुधागमने गमनाभिरुचिः । खलताकुशलो मलिनो दिवसाधिपतौ मनुजः कुमतिः कृपणः ॥४५॥
transliteration: paradārarato janatārahito bahudhāgamane gamanābhiruciḥ . khalatākuśalo malino divasādhipatau manujaḥ kumatiḥ kṛpaṇaḥ.
separated_sandhi: paradārarataḥ janatārahitaḥ bahudhāgamane gamanābhiruciḥkhalatākuśalaḥ malinaḥ divasādhipatau manujaḥ kumatiḥ kṛpaṇaḥ
english: When the Sun (divasādhipati) is in a position that indicates frequent travel (related to the 12th house), a person will be devoted to other men's wives, unpopular, fond of travel, skilled in wickedness, impure, foolish, and miserly.

sanskrit: सभागते हिते नरः परोपकारतत्परः । सदार्थरत्नपूरितो दिवाकरे गुणाकरः । वसुन्धरानवांबरालयान्वितो महाबली । विचित्रमित्रवत्सलः कृपाकलाधरः परः ॥४६॥
transliteration: sabhāgate hite naraḥ paropakāratatparaḥ . sadārtharatnapūrito divākare guṇākaraḥ . vasundharānavāṃbarālayānvito mahābalī . vicitramitravatsalaḥ kṛpākalādharaḥ paraḥ.
separated_sandhi: sabhāgate hite naraḥ paropakāratatparaḥsadartharatnapūritaḥ divākare guṇākaraḥvasundharānavāṁbarālāyānvitaḥ mahābalīvicitramitravatsalaḥ kṛpākalādharaḥ paraḥ
english: When the Sun (divākara) is (in a favorable position), a person is beneficial in assemblies, dedicated to helping others, and filled with good intentions and wealth. He is a mine of virtues, endowed with new clothes and homes on earth, very powerful, affectionate towards various friends, and supremely compassionate.

sanskrit: क्षोभितो रिपुगणैः सदा नरश्चञ्चलः खलमतिः कृशस्तथा । धर्मकर्मरहितो मदोद्धतश्चागमे दिनपतौ तदा तदा ॥४७॥
transliteration: kṣobhito ripugaṇaiḥ sadā naraścañcalaḥ khalamatiḥ kṛśastathā . dharmakarmarahito madoddhataścāgame dinapatau tadā tadā.
separated_sandhi: kṣobhitaḥ ripugaṇaiḥ sadā naraḥcañcalaḥ khalamatiḥ kṛśaḥtathā dharmakarmarahitaḥ madoddhataḥca āgame dinapatau tadā tadā
english: When the Sun (dinapati) is (in an unfavorable position), a person is always troubled by enemies, fickle, of wicked mind, and emaciated. He is devoid of righteous actions (dharma) and duties (karma), arrogant, and these negative traits repeatedly manifest at such times.

sanskrit: सदाङ्गसन्धिवेदनापराङ्गनाधनक्षयो । बलक्षयः पदे पदे यदा यदा हि भोजने । असत्यता शिरोव्यथा तथा वृथान्नभोजनं । रवावसत्तथारतिः कुमार्गगामिनी मति ॥४८॥
transliteration: sadāṅgasandhivedanāparāṅganādhanakṣayo . balakṣayaḥ pade pade yadā yadā hi bhojane . asatyatā śirovyathā tathā vṛthānnabhojanaṃ . ravāvasattathāratiḥ kumārgagāminī mati.
separated_sandhi: sadā aṅgasandhivedanā parāṅganādhanakṣayaḥbalakṣayaḥ pade pade yadā yadā hi bhojaneasatyatā śirovyathā tathā vṛthā annabhojanaṃravau asat tathā aratiḥ kumārgagāminī mati
english: When the Sun (ravau) is unfavorably placed, a person experiences constant joint pain, financial loss due to other women, and a gradual loss of strength, especially at mealtimes. There is untruthfulness, headaches, and the consumption of useless food. Additionally, discontent arises, and the mind (mati) tends to stray onto wrong paths.

sanskrit: विज्ञलोकैः स्दा मण्डितः पण्डितः काव्यविद्यानवद्यप्रलापान्वितः । राजपूज्यो धरामण्डले सर्वदा नृत्यलिप्सागते पद्मिनीनायके ॥४९॥
transliteration: vijñalokaiḥ sdā maṇḍitaḥ paṇḍitaḥ kāvyavidyānavadyapralāpānvitaḥ . rājapūjyo dharāmaṇḍale sarvadā nṛtyalipsāgate padminīnāyake.
separated_sandhi: vijñalokaiḥ sadā maṇḍitaḥ paṇḍitaḥkāvyavidyānavadyapralāpānvitaḥrājapūjyaḥ dharāmaṇḍalesarvadā nṛtyalipsāgate padminīnāyake
english: When the Sun (padminīnāyaka) is in a position indicating a desire for dance, the person (born under this influence) is always adorned by wise individuals, learned, and articulate in flawless discussions on poetry and knowledge. Such a person is always honored by kings throughout the world.

sanskrit: सर्वदानन्दधर्ता जनो ज्ञानवान् यज्ञकर्ता धराधीशसद्मस्थितः । पद्मबन्धावरातेर्भयं स्वाननः काव्यविद्याप्रलापी मुदा कौतुके ॥५०॥
transliteration: sarvadānandadhartā jano jñānavān yajñakartā dharādhīśasadmasthitaḥ . padmabandhāvarāterbhayaṃ svānanaḥ kāvyavidyāpralāpī mudā kautuke.
separated_sandhi: sarvadā ānandadhartā janaḥ jñānavānyajñakartā dharādhīśasadmasthitaḥpadmabandhau arāteḥ bhayam svānanaḥkāvyavidyāpralāpī mudā kautuke
english: A person (janaḥ) always maintains happiness, is knowledgeable, performs "yajña"s, and resides in the palace of a king. When the Sun (padmabandhu) is (in an unfavorable position), there is fear from enemies. Despite this, such a person has a beautiful face and speaks eloquently about poetry and knowledge with joy and enthusiasm.

sanskrit: निद्राभरारक्तनिभे भवेतां निद्रागते लोचनपद्मयुग्मे । रवौ विदेशे वसतिर्जनस्य कलत्रहानिः कातिधार्थनाशः ॥५१॥
transliteration: nidrābharāraktanibhe bhavetāṃ nidrāgate locanapadmayugme . ravau videśe vasatirjanasya kalatrahāniḥ kātidhārthanāśaḥ.
separated_sandhi: nidrābharāraktanibhe bhavetām nidrāgate locanapadmayugmeravau videśe vasatiḥ janasya kalatrahāniḥ kātidhārthanāśaḥ
english: When the pair of lotus-like eyes become reddish, appearing as if overcome by sleep, and the Sun is located in a foreign country, it indicates that the person will reside abroad, experience loss of a spouse, and suffer a significant loss of wealth.

sanskrit: जानुःकाले क्षपानाथे शयनं चेदुपागते । मानी शीतप्रधानश्च कामी वित्तविनाशकः ॥५२॥
transliteration: jānuḥkāle kṣapānāthe śayanaṃ cedupāgate . mānī śītapradhānaśca kāmī vittavināśakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: jānuḥkāle kṣapānāthe śayanam cet upāgatemānī śītapradhānaḥ ca kāmī vittavināśakaḥ
english: If the Moon, positioned in the "jānukāla" (knee-related region or time), approaches the "śayana" (sleep) avasthā (state), the person will be proud, predominantly cold in temperament, lustful, and a squanderer of wealth.

sanskrit: रोगार्दितो मन्दमतिर्विशेषाद्वित्तेन हीनो मनुजः कठोरः । अकार्यकारी परवित्तहारी क्षपाकरे चेदुपवेशनस्थे ॥५३॥
transliteration: rogārdito mandamatirviśeṣādvittena hīno manujaḥ kaṭhoraḥ . akāryakārī paravittahārī kṣapākare cedupaveśanasthe.
separated_sandhi: rogaarditaḥ mandamatiḥ viśeṣāt vittena hīnaḥ manujaḥ kaṭhoraḥakāryakārī paravittahārī kṣapākare cet upaveśanasthe
