english: If the Moon is in the "upaveśana" (sitting) state, the person will be afflicted by disease, dull-witted, especially devoid of wealth, cruel, one who does improper deeds, and a thief of others' wealth.

sanskrit: नेत्रपाणौ क्षपानाथे महारोगी नरो भवेत् । अनल्पजल्पको धूर्तः कुकर्मनिरतः सदा ॥५४॥
transliteration: netrapāṇau kṣapānāthe mahārogī naro bhavet . analpajalpako dhūrtaḥ kukarmanirataḥ sadā.
separated_sandhi: netrapāṇau kṣapānāthe mahārogī naraḥ bhavetanalpajalpakaḥ dhūrtaḥ kukarmarataḥ sadā
english: If the Moon is in the "netrapāṇi" (eye-and-hand) state, the person will be very diseased, exceedingly talkative, cunning, and always engaged in bad deeds.

sanskrit: यदा राकानाथे गतवति विकाशं च जनने । विकाशः संसारे विमलगुणराशेरवनिपात् । नवाशामाला स्यात्करितुरगलक्ष्म्या परिवृता । विभूषा योषाभिः सुखमनुदिनं तीर्थगमनम् ॥५५॥
transliteration: yadā rākānāthe gatavati vikāśaṃ ca janane . vikāśaḥ saṃsāre vimalaguṇarāśeravanipāt . navāśāmālā syātkarituragalakṣmyā parivṛtā . vibhūṣā yoṣābhiḥ sukhamanudinaṃ tīrthagamanam.
separated_sandhi: yadā rākānāthe gatavati vikāśam ca jananevikāśaḥ saṃsāre vimalaguṇarāśeḥ avanipātnavāśāmālā syāt karituragalakṣmyā parivṛtāvibhūṣā yoṣābhiḥ sukham anudinam tīrthagamanam
english: When the Moon attains brilliance in the birth chart, there will be prosperity in life (saṃsāra) originating from a king who is a treasury of pure virtues. There will be a new series of hopes, accompanied by the prosperity of elephants and horses, adornment by women, happiness every day, and pilgrimages.

sanskrit: सितेतरे पापरतो निशाकरे विशेषतः क्रूरकरो नरो भवेत् । सदाक्षिरोगैः परिपीड्यमानो वलक्षपक्षे गमने भयातुरः ॥५६॥
transliteration: sitetare pāparato niśākare viśeṣataḥ krūrakaro naro bhavet . sadākṣirogaiḥ paripīḍyamāno valakṣapakṣe gamane bhayāturaḥ.
separated_sandhi: sitetare pāparataḥ niśākareviśeṣataḥ krūrakaraḥ naraḥ bhavetsadā akṣirogaiḥ paripīḍyamānaḥvalakṣapakṣe gamane bhayāturaḥ
english: When the Moon is in the dark half, a person becomes engaged in sinful acts, and is especially cruel. He is constantly afflicted by eye diseases and becomes distressed by fear when traveling during the bright lunar half.

sanskrit: विधावागमगे मानी पादरोगी नरो भवेत् । गुप्तपापरतो दीनो मतितोषविवर्जितः ॥५७॥
transliteration: vidhāvāgamage mānī pādarogī naro bhavet . guptapāparato dīno matitoṣavivarjitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: vidhau āgamage mānī pādarogī naraḥ bhavetguptapāparataḥ dīnaḥ matitoṣavivarjitaḥ
english: When the Moon is in the house of gain (the eleventh house), a person becomes proud, suffers from foot diseases, is engaged in secret sins, feels miserable, and is devoid of intelligence and contentment.

sanskrit: सकलजनवदान्यो राजराजेन्द्रमान्यो । रतिपतिसमाकान्तिः शान्तिकृत्कामिनीनाम् । सपदि सदसि याते चारुबिम्बे शशंके । भवति परमरीतिप्रीतिविज्ञो गुणज्ञः ॥५८॥
transliteration: sakalajanavadānyo rājarājendramānyo . ratipatisamākāntiḥ śāntikṛtkāminīnām . sapadi sadasi yāte cārubimbe śaśaṃke . bhavati paramarītiprītivijño guṇajñaḥ.
separated_sandhi: sakalajanavadānyaḥ rājarājendramānyaḥratipatisamākāntiḥ śāntikṛt kāminīnāmsapadi sadasi yāte cārubimbe śaśaṅkebhavati paramarītiprītivijñaḥ guṇajñaḥ
english: When the beautiful orb of the Moon is situated prominently (in an auspicious house), a person becomes generous to all people, respected by kings and emperors, possessing radiance like Kāmadeva (the lord of love), a peacemaker for women, knowledgeable of excellent customs and affection, and a connoisseur of virtues.

sanskrit: विधावागमके मत्यों वावालो धर्मपूरितः । कृष्णपक्षे द्विभार्यः स्याद्रोगी दुष्टतरो हठी ॥५९॥
transliteration: vidhāvāgamake matyoṃ vāvālo dharmapūritaḥ . kṛṣṇapakṣe dvibhāryaḥ syādrogī duṣṭataro haṭhī.
separated_sandhi: vidhau āgamake martyaḥ vāgbalaḥ dharmapūritaḥkṛṣṇapakṣe dvibhāryaḥ syāt rogī duṣṭataraḥ haṭhī
english: When the Moon is in the house of gain (the eleventh house), a person is eloquent and full of (dharma) natural law. However, if this occurs during the dark lunar half, he will have two wives, be sickly, very wicked, and stubborn.

sanskrit: भोजने जनुषि पूर्णचन्द्रमा मानयानजनतासुखं नृणाम् । आतनोति वनितासुतासुखं सर्वमेव न सितेतरे शुभम् ॥६०॥
transliteration: bhojane januṣi pūrṇacandramā mānayānajanatāsukhaṃ nṛṇām . ātanoti vanitāsutāsukhaṃ sarvameva na sitetare śubham.
separated_sandhi: bhojane januṣi pūrṇacandramāḥ mānayānajanatāsukham nṛṇāmātanoti vanitāsutāsukham sarvam eva na sitetare śubham
english: When the Full Moon is in the house of sustenance (the second house) or the house of self (the first house), it bestows happiness upon people through honor, vehicles, community, women, and children. However, none of these auspicious effects occur when the Moon is in the dark half.

sanskrit: नृत्यलिप्सागते चन्द्रे सबले बलवान्नरः । गीतज्ञो हि रसज्ञश्च कृष्णे पापकरो भवेत् ॥६१॥
transliteration: nṛtyalipsāgate candre sabale balavānnaraḥ . gītajño hi rasajñaśca kṛṣṇe pāpakaro bhavet.
separated_sandhi: nṛtyalipsāgate candre sabale balavān naraḥ |gītajñaḥ hi rasajñaḥ ca kṛṣṇe pāpakaraḥ bhavet
english: When the Moon is strong and situated in the desire for dance, the person is powerful, indeed knowledgeable in music, and appreciative of aesthetics, but commits sinful acts concerning Kṛṣṇa.

sanskrit: कौतकभवनं गतवति चन्द्रे भवति नृपत्वं वा धनपत्वम् । कामकलासु सदा कुशलत्वं वारवधूरतितमणपटुत्वम् ॥६२॥
transliteration: kautakabhavanaṃ gatavati candre bhavati nṛpatvaṃ vā dhanapatvam . kāmakalāsu sadā kuśalatvaṃ vāravadhūratitamaṇapaṭutvam.
separated_sandhi: kautakabhavanaṃ gatavati candre bhavati nṛpatvaṃ vā dhanapatvam| kāmakalāsu sadā kuśalatvaṃ vāravadhūratitamaṇapaṭutvam
english: When the Moon has reached the house of amusement, there is either kingship or great wealth. There is always skillfulness in the arts of love (kāmakalās) and proficiency in the desire for dalliance with courtesans.

sanskrit: निद्रागते जन्मनि मानवानां कलाधरे जीवयुते महत्त्वम् । हीनेऽङ्गनासञ्चितवित्तनाशः शिवालये रौति विचित्रमुच्चैः ॥६३॥
transliteration: nidrāgate janmani mānavānāṃ kalādhare jīvayute mahattvam . hīne'ṅganāsañcitavittanāśaḥ śivālaye rauti vicitramuccaiḥ.
separated_sandhi: nidrāgate janmani mānavānāṃ kalādhare jīvayute mahattvam |hīne aṅganāsañcitavittanāśaḥ śivālaye rauti vicitram uccaiḥ
english: When at birth the Moon (kalādhara) is in the sleeping state and conjoined with Jupiter (jīva), humans attain greatness. If the Moon is debilitated, there is destruction of wealth accumulated by women, and (such a person) cries strangely and loudly in a Shiva temple.

sanskrit: शयने वसुधापुत्रे व्रणयुक्तो जनो भवेत् । बहुना कण्डुना युक्तो दद्रुणा च विशेषतः ॥६४॥
transliteration: śayane vasudhāputre vraṇayukto jano bhavet . bahunā kaṇḍunā yukto dadruṇā ca viśeṣataḥ.
separated_sandhi: śayane vasudhāputre vraṇayuktaḥ janaḥ bhavet| bahunā kaṇḍunā yuktaḥ dadruṇā ca viśeṣataḥ
english: When Mars (vasudhāputra) is in the sleeping state, the person will be afflicted with wounds. They will be afflicted with much itching, and especially with ringworm.

sanskrit: बली सदा पापरतो नरः स्यादसत्यवादी नितरां प्रगल्भः । धनेन पूर्णो निजधर्महीनो धरासुतश्चेदुपवेशनस्थः ॥६५॥
transliteration: balī sadā pāparato naraḥ syādasatyavādī nitarāṃ pragalbhaḥ . dhanena pūrṇo nijadharmahīno dharāsutaścedupaveśanasthaḥ.
separated_sandhi: balī sadā pāparataḥ naraḥ syātasatyavādī nitarām pragalbhaḥ| dhanena pūrṇaḥ nijadharmahīnaḥdharāsutaḥ cet upaveśanasthaḥ
english: If Mars (dharāsuta) is situated in the sitting state, the person will always be powerful and intent on sin. He will be a liar, extremely arrogant, full of wealth, and devoid of his own intrinsic nature (dharma).

sanskrit: यदा भूमिसुतो लग्ने नेत्रपाणिमुपागतः । दरिद्रता तदा पुंसामन्यभे नगरेशता ॥६६॥
transliteration: yadā bhūmisuto lagne netrapāṇimupāgataḥ . daridratā tadā puṃsāmanyabhe nagareśatā.
separated_sandhi: yadā bhūmisutaḥ lagne netrapāṇim upāgataḥtadā daridratā puṃsām anyabhe nagareśatā
english: When Mars (bhūmisuta) is in the ascendant (lagna) and afflicts the eye and hand, then men experience poverty. However, if Mars is in any other house, it bestows lordship over a city.

sanskrit: प्रकाशो गुणस्यापि वासः प्रकाशे धराधीशभ्रतुः सदा मानवृद्धिः । सुते भूसुते पुत्रकान्तावियोगो भवेद्राहुणा दारुणो वा निपातः ॥६७॥
transliteration: prakāśo guṇasyāpi vāsaḥ prakāśe dharādhīśabhratuḥ sadā mānavṛddhiḥ . sute bhūsute putrakāntāviyogo bhavedrāhuṇā dāruṇo vā nipātaḥ.
separated_sandhi: prakāśaḥ guṇasya api vāsaḥ prakāśedharādhiśa-bhartuḥ sadā mānavṛddhiḥsute bhūmisute putrakāntāviyogaḥbhavet rāhuṇā dāruṇaḥ vā nipātaḥ
english: When there is a manifestation of virtue and a dwelling in prominence, there is always an increase in honor for the king's supporter. However, if the son of Earth (bhūmisuta) is in the fifth house (suta), there will be separation from children and wife, or a terrible calamity caused by Rahu.

sanskrit: गमने गमनं कुरुतेऽनुदिनं व्रणजालभयं वनिताकलहः । बहुदद्रुककण्डुभयं बहुधा वसुधातनयो वसुहानिकरः ॥६८॥
transliteration: gamane gamanaṃ kurute'nudinaṃ vraṇajālabhayaṃ vanitākalahaḥ . bahudadrukakaṇḍubhayaṃ bahudhā vasudhātanayo vasuhānikaraḥ.
separated_sandhi: gamane gamanam kurute anudinamvraṇajāla-bhayam vanitā-kalahaḥbahu-dadruka-kaṇḍu-bhayam bahudhāvasudhātanayaḥ vasuhānikaraḥ
english: The son of Earth (vasudhātanaya) causes daily travel, danger from multiple wounds, quarrels with women, and much fear of skin conditions like ringworm and itching, thereby causing loss of wealth in various ways.

sanskrit: आगमने गुणशाली मणिमालीवा करालकरवाली । गजहन्ता रिपुहन्ता परिजनसन्तापहारको भौमे ॥६९॥
transliteration: āgamane guṇaśālī maṇimālīvā karālakaravālī . gajahantā ripuhantā parijanasantāpahārako bhaume.
separated_sandhi: āgamane guṇaśālī maṇimālī iva karāla-karavālīgajahantā ripuhantā parijanasantāpahārakaḥ bhaume
english: When Mars (bhauma) is in the eleventh house (āgamana), the native is endowed with good qualities, becoming like a terrible sword adorned with a garland of gems, a slayer of elephants and enemies, and a remover of the distress of his dependents.

sanskrit: तुङ्गे युद्धकलाकलापकुशलो धर्मध्वजो वित्तपः । कोणे भूमिसुते सभामुपगते विद्याविहीनः पुमान् । अन्तेऽपत्यकलत्रमित्ररहितः प्रोक्तेतरस्थानगे । ऽवश्यं राजसभाबुधो बहुधनी मानी च दानी जनः ॥७०॥
transliteration: tuṅge yuddhakalākalāpakuśalo dharmadhvajo vittapaḥ . koṇe bhūmisute sabhāmupagate vidyāvihīnaḥ pumān . ante'patyakalatramitrarahitaḥ proktetarasthānage . 'vaśyaṃ rājasabhābudho bahudhanī mānī ca dānī janaḥ.
separated_sandhi: tuṅge yuddhakalākalāpakuśalaḥ dharmadhvajaḥ vittapaḥkoṇe bhūmisute sabhām upagate vidyāvihīnaḥ pumānante apatyakalatramitrarahitaḥ proktetara-sthānageavaśyam rājasabhābuddhaḥ bahudhanī mānī ca dānī janaḥ
english: When Mars (bhauma) is in exaltation, the person is skilled in various arts of warfare, an upholder of (dharma), and wealthy. When the son of Earth (bhūmisuta) is in an angle or trine house and associated with assemblies, the man is devoid of knowledge. If Mars is in the twelfth house (anta), the person is devoid of children, wife, and friends. However, if Mars is situated in any other house not mentioned, the person is certainly learned in royal assemblies, very wealthy, honorable, and charitable.

sanskrit: आगमे भवति भूमिजे जनो धर्मकर्मरहितो गदातुरः । कर्णमूलगुरुशूलरोगवानेव कातरमतिः कुसङ्गमी ॥७१॥
transliteration: āgame bhavati bhūmije jano dharmakarmarahito gadāturaḥ . karṇamūlaguruśūlarogavāneva kātaramatiḥ kusaṅgamī.
separated_sandhi: āgame bhavati bhūmije janaḥ dharmakarmarahitaḥ gadāturaḥkarṇamūlaguruśūlarogavān eva kātaramatiḥ kusaṅgamī
english: When Mars (bhūmija) is present, a person becomes devoid of actions in accordance with natural law (dharma) and duty (karma), afflicted by disease, indeed suffering from severe pain at the root of the ear, timid-minded, and keeps bad company.

sanskrit: भोजने मिष्टभोजी च जनने सबले कुजे । नीचकर्मकरो नित्यं मनुजो मानवर्जितः ॥७२॥
transliteration: bhojane miṣṭabhojī ca janane sabale kuje . nīcakarmakaro nityaṃ manujo mānavarjitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: bhojane miṣṭabhojī ca janane sabale kujenīcakarmakaraḥ nityam manujaḥ mānavarjitaḥ
english: When Mars (kuja) is strong in the birth chart, the person (manuja) is fond of sweet foods, always performs ignoble deeds, and is devoid of honor.

sanskrit: नृत्यलिप्सागते भूसुते जन्मिनामिन्दिराराशिरायाति भूमीपतेः । स्वर्नरत्नप्रवालैः सदा मण्डिता वासशाला नराणां भवेत्सर्वदा ॥७३॥
transliteration: nṛtyalipsāgate bhūsute janmināmindirārāśirāyāti bhūmīpateḥ . svarnaratnapravālaiḥ sadā maṇḍitā vāsaśālā narāṇāṃ bhavetsarvadā.
separated_sandhi: nṛtyalipsāgate bhūsute janmināmindirārāśiḥ āyāti bhūmīpateḥsvarṇaratnapravālaiḥ sadā maṇḍitāvāsaśālā narāṇām bhavet sarvadā
english: When Mars (bhūsuta) is situated in "nṛtyalipsā" (a state or sign associated with arts and entertainment), the natives receive abundant wealth (indirārāśi) from the king (bhūmīpati). Their residences are always adorned with gold, jewels, and corals.

sanskrit: कौतुकी भव्ति कौतुके कुजे मित्रपुत्रपरिपूरितो जनः । उच्चगे नृपतिगेहमण्डितः पूजितो गुणवरैर्गुणाकरैः ॥७४॥
transliteration: kautukī bhavti kautuke kuje mitraputraparipūrito janaḥ . uccage nṛpatigehamaṇḍitaḥ pūjito guṇavarairguṇākaraiḥ.
separated_sandhi: kautukī bhavati kautuke kuje mitraputraparipūritaḥ janaḥuccage nṛpatigehamaṇḍitaḥ pūjitaḥ guṇavaraiḥ guṇākaraiḥ
english: When Mars (kuja) is in a "kautuka" state (a position of curiosity or amusement), the person is fond of amusement and blessed with many friends and sons. When Mars is exalted (uccaga), the native is adorned with royal residences and honored by people of excellent virtues and those who are a mine of good qualities.

sanskrit: निद्रावस्थां गते भौमे क्रोधी धीधनवर्जितः । धूर्तो धर्मपरिभ्रष्टो मनुष्यो गदपीडितः ॥७५॥
transliteration: nidrāvasthāṃ gate bhaume krodhī dhīdhanavarjitaḥ . dhūrto dharmaparibhraṣṭo manuṣyo gadapīḍitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: nidrāvasthām gate bhaume krodhī dhīdhanavarjitaḥdhūrtaḥ dharmaparibhraṣṭaḥ manuṣyaḥ gadapīḍitaḥ
english: When Mars (bhauma) is in the sleep state (nidrāvasthā), the person is angry, devoid of intellect and wealth, cunning, deviated from natural law (dharma), and afflicted by disease.

sanskrit: क्षुधातुरो भवेदंगे खञ्जो गुञ्जानिभेक्षणः । अन्यभे लम्पटो धूर्तो मनुजः शयने बुधे ॥७६॥
transliteration: kṣudhāturo bhavedaṃge khañjo guñjānibhekṣaṇaḥ . anyabhe lampaṭo dhūrto manujaḥ śayane budhe.
separated_sandhi: kṣudhāturaḥ bhavet aṅge khañjaḥ guñjānibhekṣaṇaḥanyabhe lampaṭaḥ dhūrtaḥ manujaḥ śayane budhe
english: If Mercury is in the first house (lagna), the person will be afflicted by hunger, lame, and have reddish eyes like a guñjā berry. If Mercury is in the twelfth house (śayana), this person will be lustful and deceitful.

sanskrit: शशांकपुत्रे जनुरण्गगेहे यदोपवेशे गुणराशिपूर्णः । पापेक्षिते पापयुते दरिद्रो हिते शुभे वित्तसुखी मनुष्यः ॥७७॥
transliteration: śaśāṃkaputre januraṇgagehe yadopaveśe guṇarāśipūrṇaḥ . pāpekṣite pāpayute daridro hite śubhe vittasukhī manuṣyaḥ.
separated_sandhi: śaśāṅkaputre januḥ aṅgagehe yadā upaveśe guṇarāśipūrṇaḥpāpekṣite pāpayute daridraḥ hite śubhe vittasukhī manuṣyaḥ
english: When Mercury, the son of the Moon (śaśāṅkaputra), is situated in the ascendant (januraṅgageha), the person will be endowed with a multitude of good qualities. If Mercury is aspected by or conjoined with malefic planets, the person will be poor. However, if Mercury is in a beneficial or auspicious state, the person will be happy and prosperous with wealth.

sanskrit: विद्याविवेकरहितो हिततोषहीनो मनी । जनोभवति चन्द्रसुतेऽक्षि पाणौ । पुत्रालये सुतकलत्रसुखेन हीनः कन्या । प्रजा नृपतिगेहबुधो वरार्थः ॥७८॥
transliteration: vidyāvivekarahito hitatoṣahīno manī . janobhavati candrasute'kṣi pāṇau . putrālaye sutakalatrasukhena hīnaḥ kanyā . prajā nṛpatigehabudho varārthaḥ.
separated_sandhi: vidyāvivekarahitaḥ hitatoṣahīnaḥ manījanaḥ bhavati candrasute akṣi pāṇauputrālaya sutakalatrasukhena hīnaḥkanyā prajā nṛpatigehabudhaḥ varārthaḥ
english: If Mercury, the son of the Moon (candrasuta), is in the second house (akṣi) and third house (pāṇau), a thoughtful person (manī jana) becomes devoid of knowledge and discrimination, and lacking in benefit and contentment. When Mercury is in the fifth house (putrālaya), one is deprived of happiness from children and spouse, and has female progeny (kanyā prajā). If Mercury is in the tenth house (nṛpatigeha), the person is one who desires boons (varārtha).

sanskrit: दाता दयालुः खलु पुण्यकर्ता विकाशने चन्द्रसुते मनुष्यः । अनेकविद्यार्णवपारङ्गता विवेकपूर्णः खलवर्गहन्ता ॥७९॥
transliteration: dātā dayāluḥ khalu puṇyakartā vikāśane candrasute manuṣyaḥ . anekavidyārṇavapāraṅgatā vivekapūrṇaḥ khalavargahantā.
separated_sandhi: dātā dayāluḥ khalu puṇyakartā vikāśane candrasute manuṣyaḥanekavidyārṇavapāraṅgataḥ vivekapūrṇaḥ khalavargahantā
english: Indeed, when Mercury, the son of the Moon (candrasuta), is in an exalted position, the person will be generous, compassionate, and perform meritorious deeds. Such an individual will be proficient in the vast ocean of many sciences, full of discrimination, and a vanquisher of wicked individuals.

sanskrit: गमनागमने भवतो गमने बहुधा वसुधाधिपतेर्भवने । भवनं च विचित्रमलं रमया विदि नुश्च जनुःसमये नितराम् ॥८०॥
transliteration: gamanāgamane bhavato gamane bahudhā vasudhādhipaterbhavane . bhavanaṃ ca vicitramalaṃ ramayā vidi nuśca januḥsamaye nitarām.
separated_sandhi: gamanāgamane bhavataḥ gamanebahudhā vasudhādhipateḥ bhavanebhavanam ca vicitram alam ramayāvidi nu ca januḥsamaye nitarām
english: At the time of birth, the native will have many frequent comings and goings (travels) to the houses of rulers of the earth. Furthermore, the native's own dwelling will be exceedingly wonderful and abundant with wealth, especially when Mercury (vid) is well-placed.

sanskrit: सपदि विदि जनानामुच्चगे जन्मकाले । सदसि धनसमृद्धिः सर्वदा पुण्यवृद्धिः । धनपतिसमता वा भूपता मंत्रिता वा । हरिहरपदभक्तिः सात्त्विकी मुक्तिलब्धिः ॥८१॥
transliteration: sapadi vidi janānāmuccage janmakāle . sadasi dhanasamṛddhiḥ sarvadā puṇyavṛddhiḥ . dhanapatisamatā vā bhūpatā maṃtritā vā . hariharapadabhaktiḥ sāttvikī muktilabdhiḥ.
separated_sandhi: sapadi vidi janānām uccage janma-kāle | sadasidhana-samṛddhiḥ sarvadā puṇya-vṛddhiḥ |dhana-pati-samatā vā bhūpatā mantritā vā |hari-hara-pada-bhaktiḥ sāttvikī mukti-labdhiḥ
english: When (a planet) is exalted in the natal chart at the time of birth, people quickly become well-known. In gatherings, there is an abundance of wealth and a constant increase in merit. Or, one achieves status equal to the lord of wealth (Kubera), or kingship, or ministership. Also, there is pure devotion (bhakti) to the feet of Hari and Hara, and the attainment of liberation (mokṣa).

sanskrit: आगमे जनुषि जन्मिनां यदा चन्द्रजे भवति हीनसेवया । अर्थसिद्धिरपि पुत्रयुग्मता बालिका भवति मानदायिका ॥८२॥
transliteration: āgame januṣi janmināṃ yadā candraje bhavati hīnasevayā . arthasiddhirapi putrayugmatā bālikā bhavati mānadāyikā.
separated_sandhi: āgame januṣi janminām yadā candraje bhavati hīnasevayāarthasiddhiḥ api putrayugmatā bālikā bhavati mānadāyikā
english: When Mercury (candraja) is in the house of gain (āgama) at the time of birth (januṣi) for individuals, then through service to the lowly (hīnasevayā), there is the acquisition of wealth (arthasiddhi) and a pair of sons (putrayugmatā). Furthermore, a daughter (bālikā) also becomes a source of great honor (mānadāyikā).

sanskrit: भोजने चन्द्रजे जन्मकाले यदा जन्मिनानर्थहानिः सदा वादतः । राजभीत्या कृशत्वंचलत्वं मतेरङ्गसङ्गो न जाया न जायासुखम् ॥८३॥
transliteration: bhojane candraje janmakāle yadā janminānarthahāniḥ sadā vādataḥ . rājabhītyā kṛśatvaṃcalatvaṃ materaṅgasaṅgo na jāyā na jāyāsukham.
separated_sandhi: bhojane candraje janmakāle yadājanminā anarthahāniḥ sadā vādataḥrājabhītyā kṛśatvam cañcalatvam mateḥaṅgasaṅgaḥ na jāyā na jāyāsukham
english: When Mercury (candraja) is in the second house ("bhojana") at the time of birth (janmakāle) for individuals, then there is always a loss of wealth (anarthahāni) due to disputes (vādātaḥ). Because of fear of the government (rāja-bhītyā), there is emaciation (kṛśatvam) and mental instability (cañcalatvam). There is no physical intimacy (aṅgasaṅga), no wife (jāyā), and no happiness from a wife (jāyāsukham).

sanskrit: नृत्यलिप्सागते चन्द्रजे मानवो मानयानप्रवालव्रजैः संयुतः । मित्रपुत्रप्रतापैः सभापण्डितः पापभे वारवामारतो लम्पटः ॥८४॥
transliteration: nṛtyalipsāgate candraje mānavo mānayānapravālavrajaiḥ saṃyutaḥ . mitraputrapratāpaiḥ sabhāpaṇḍitaḥ pāpabhe vāravāmārato lampaṭaḥ.
separated_sandhi: nṛtyalipsāgate candraje mānavaḥmānayānapravālavrajaiḥ saṃyutaḥmitraputrapratāpaiḥ sabhāpaṇḍitaḥpāpabhe vāravāmārataḥ lampaṭaḥ
english: When Mercury (candraja) is in the house indicating a desire for dance and arts ("nṛtyalipsāgata"), the person (mānava) is endowed with honorable conveyances and abundant jewels (mānayānapravālavrajaiḥ). He is a scholar in assemblies (sabhāpaṇḍita) due to the glory of his friends and sons (mitraputrapratāpaiḥ). If (Mercury is) in a malefic sign (pāpabhe), he becomes fond of courtesans (vāravāmārata) and licentious (lampaṭa).

sanskrit: कौतुके चन्द्रजे जन्मकाले नृणामंगभे गीतविद्याऽनवद्या भवेत् । सप्तमे नैधने वारवध्वा रतिः पुण्यभे पुण्ययुक्ता मतिः सद्गतिः ॥८५॥
transliteration: kautuke candraje janmakāle nṛṇāmaṃgabhe gītavidyā'navadyā bhavet . saptame naidhane vāravadhvā ratiḥ puṇyabhe puṇyayuktā matiḥ sadgatiḥ.
separated_sandhi: kautuke candraje janmakāle nṛṇāmaṅgābhe gītavidyā anavadyā bhavetsaptame naidhane vāravadhvā ratiḥpuṇyabhe puṇyayuktā matiḥ sadgatiḥ
english: When Mercury (candraja) is in the house of pleasure or intellect ("kautuka") and in the first house (ascendant, "aṅgābha") at the time of birth (janmakāle) for individuals (nṛṇām), then their musical knowledge (gītavidyā) will be flawless (anavadyā). When (Mercury is) in the seventh house (saptame), there is attachment/relations (rati) with a courtesan (vāravadhū). If (Mercury is) in the eighth house ("nidhana"), and in an auspicious sign (puṇyabhe), the intellect (mati) is virtuous (puṇyayuktā) and there is a good destiny (sadgati).

sanskrit: निद्राश्रिते चन्द्रसुते न निद्रासुखं सदा व्याधिसमाधियोगः । सहोत्थवैकल्यमनल्पतापो निजेन वादो धनमाननाशः ॥८६॥
transliteration: nidrāśrite candrasute na nidrāsukhaṃ sadā vyādhisamādhiyogaḥ . sahotthavaikalyamanalpatāpo nijena vādo dhanamānanāśaḥ.
separated_sandhi: nidrāśrite candrasute na nidrāsukham sadā vyādhisamādhiyogaḥsahotthavaikalyam analpatāpaḥ nijena vādaḥ dhanamānanāśaḥ
english: When Mercury (candrasuta) is situated in the twelfth house (the house of sleep), the native finds no comfort in sleep, experiencing a constant state prone to illness and deep mental absorption (vyādhisamādhiyogo). They may have defects among co-born siblings and suffer significant distress. Disputes with their own people and the loss of wealth and honor are also indicated.

sanskrit: वचसामधिपे तु जनुःसमये शयने बलवानपि हीनरवः । अतिगौरतनुः खलुदीर्घहनुः सुतरामरिभीतियुतो मनुजः ॥८७॥
transliteration: vacasāmadhipe tu januḥsamaye śayane balavānapi hīnaravaḥ . atigauratanuḥ khaludīrghahanuḥ sutarāmaribhītiyuto manujaḥ.
separated_sandhi: vacasāmadhipe tu januḥsamaye śayane balavān api hīnaravaḥatigauratanuḥ khalu dīrghahanuḥ sutarām aribhītiyutaḥ manujaḥ
english: However, if Mercury, the lord of speech (vacasām adhipa), is strong in the twelfth house at the time of birth, the person (manuja) will have a weak voice despite their inherent strength. They will possess a very fair complexion and, indeed, a long jaw, and will be exceedingly afflicted by fear of enemies.

sanskrit: उपवेशं गतवति यदि जीवे वाचालो बहुगर्वपरीतः । क्षोणीपतिरिपुजनपतिर्तप्तः पदजंघास्यकरव्रणयुक्तः ॥८८॥
transliteration: upaveśaṃ gatavati yadi jīve vācālo bahugarvaparītaḥ . kṣoṇīpatiripujanapatirtaptaḥ padajaṃghāsyakaravraṇayuktaḥ.
separated_sandhi: upaveśam gatavati yadi jīve vācālaḥ bahugarvaparītaḥkṣoṇīpatiḥ ripujanapatiḥ taptaḥ padajaṅghāsyakaravraṇayuktaḥ
english: If Jupiter (jīva) is situated in the ninth house (upaveśam), the native will be talkative and filled with much pride. They will be tormented by kings and the lords of hostile people, and afflicted by wounds or ulcers on their feet, shanks, mouth, and hands.

sanskrit: नेत्रपाणिं गते देवराजार्चिते रोगयुक्तो वियुक्तो वरार्थश्रिया । गीतनृत्यप्रियः कामुकः सर्वदा गौरवर्णो विवर्णोद्भवप्रीतियुक् ॥८९॥
transliteration: netrapāṇiṃ gate devarājārcite rogayukto viyukto varārthaśriyā . gītanṛtyapriyaḥ kāmukaḥ sarvadā gauravarṇo vivarṇodbhavaprītiyuk.
separated_sandhi: netrapāṇim gate devarājārciterogayuktaḥ viyuktah varārthaśriyāgītanṛtyapriyaḥ kāmukaḥ sarvadāgauravarṇaḥ vivarṇodbhavaprītiyuktaḥ
english: When Jupiter (devarājārcita), the planet worshipped by the king of gods, is situated in a house that signifies eyes and hands (netrapāṇim), the native is afflicted by disease and deprived of excellent wealth and prosperity. Such a person is fond of singing and dancing, always sensual, fair-complexioned, and develops affection for those born of different social classes or complexions.

sanskrit: गुणानामानन्दं विमलसुखकन्दं वितनुते । सदा तेजःपुञ्जं व्रजपतिनिकुञ्जं प्रतिगमम् । प्रकाशं चेदुच्चे द्रुतमुपगतो वासवगुरु । र्गुरुत्वं लोकानां धनपतिसमत्वं तनुभृताम् ॥९०॥
transliteration: guṇānāmānandaṃ vimalasukhakandaṃ vitanute . sadā tejaḥpuñjaṃ vrajapatinikuñjaṃ pratigamam . prakāśaṃ ceducce drutamupagato vāsavaguru . rgurutvaṃ lokānāṃ dhanapatisamatvaṃ tanubhṛtām.
separated_sandhi: guṇānām ānandam vimalasukhakandam vitanute sadātejaḥpuñjam vrajapati-nikuñjam pratigamamprakāśam cet uccaiḥ drutam upagataḥ vāsavaguruḥgurutvam lokānām dhanapatisamatvam tanubhṛtām
english: If Jupiter (vāṣavaguru) is exalted and quickly attains a radiant splendor, it bestows the joy of virtues and the pure source of happiness. It always grants a mass of brilliance and directs one towards the divine groves of the lord of Vraja (Krishna). Such a placement ensures prominence (gurutva) for people and makes embodied beings equal to Kubera (dhanapati), the lord of wealth.

sanskrit: साहसी भवति मानवः सदा मित्रवर्गसुखपूरितो मुदा । पण्डितो विविधवित्तमण्डितो देवविद्यदि गुरौ गमं गते ॥९१॥
transliteration: sāhasī bhavati mānavaḥ sadā mitravargasukhapūrito mudā . paṇḍito vividhavittamaṇḍito devavidyadi gurau gamaṃ gate.
separated_sandhi: sāhasī bhavati mānavaḥ sadā mitravargasukhapūritaḥ mudāpaṇḍitaḥ vividhavittamaṇḍitaḥ devavid yadi gurau gamam gate
english: If the divine preceptor (guru) is positioned in the eleventh house, the person becomes courageous, always filled with the happiness of friends, learned, adorned with various wealth, and knowledgeable in divine matters.

sanskrit: आगमने जनता वरजाया यस्य जनुःसमये हरिमाया । मुञ्चति नालमिहालयमद्धा देवगुरौ परितः परिबद्धा ॥९२॥
transliteration: āgamane janatā varajāyā yasya januḥsamaye harimāyā . muñcati nālamihālayamaddhā devagurau paritaḥ paribaddhā.
separated_sandhi: āgamane janatā varajāyā yasya januḥsamaye harimāyā muñcatina alam iha ālayam addhā devagurau paritaḥ paribaddhā
english: When the divine preceptor (guru) is entirely surrounded, at the birth time of a person, a multitude of excellent women comes, and Lakshmi (the divine power/māyā of Hari) truly does not leave his house, being completely bound there.

sanskrit: सुरगुरुसमवक्ता शुभ्रमुक्ताफलाढ्यः । सदसि सपदि पूर्णो वित्तमाणिक्यमानैः । गजतुरगरथाढ्यो देवताधीशपूज्यो । जनुषि विविधविद्यागर्वितो मानवः स्यात् ॥९३॥
transliteration: suragurusamavaktā śubhramuktāphalāḍhyaḥ . sadasi sapadi pūrṇo vittamāṇikyamānaiḥ . gajaturagarathāḍhyo devatādhīśapūjyo . januṣi vividhavidyāgarvito mānavaḥ syāt.
separated_sandhi: suragurusamavaktā śubhramuktāphalāḍhyaḥsadasi sapadi pūrṇaḥ vittamāṇikyamānaiḥgaja turaga ratha āḍhyaḥ devatādhīśapūjyaḥjanuṣi vividhavidyāgarvitaḥ mānavaḥ syāt
english: At birth, the person would be a human whose speech is like that of the divine preceptor (guru) (Brihaspati), adorned with bright pearls, immediately distinguished in assemblies with wealth, jewels, and honors, rich in elephants, horses, and chariots, worshipped by kings, and proud of various types of knowledge.

sanskrit: नानावाहनमानयानपटलीसौख्यं गुरावागमे । भृत्यापत्यकलत्रमित्रजसुखं विद्याऽनवद्या भवेत् । क्षोणीपालसमानतानवरतं चाऽतीव हृद्या मतिः । काव्यानन्दरतिः सदा हिनगतिः सर्वत्र मानोन्नतिः ॥९४॥
transliteration: nānāvāhanamānayānapaṭalīsaukhyaṃ gurāvāgame . bhṛtyāpatyakalatramitrajasukhaṃ vidyā'navadyā bhavet . kṣoṇīpālasamānatānavarataṃ cā'tīva hṛdyā matiḥ . kāvyānandaratiḥ sadā hinagatiḥ sarvatra mānonnatiḥ.
separated_sandhi: nānāvāhanamānayānapaṭalīsaukyaṃ gurau āgamebhṛtyāpatyakalatramitrajasukhaṃ vidyā anavadyā bhavetkṣoṇīpālasamānatā anavarataṃ ca atīva hṛdyā matiḥkāvyānandaratiḥ sadā hinagatiḥ sarvatra māna unnatiḥ
english: When the preceptor (guru) is in the eleventh house (house of gains), there is happiness from various vehicles, honor, and a multitude of conveyances. Immaculate knowledge (vidyā), and happiness from servants, offspring, wife, and friends will arise. Continuously, there will be equality with kings, a very charming intellect, delight in poetry, constant swift progress, and elevation of honor everywhere.

sanskrit: भोजने भवति देवतागुरौ यस्य तस्य सततं सुभोजनम् । नैव मुञ्चति रमालयं तदा वाजिवारणरथैश्च मण्डितम् ॥९५॥
transliteration: bhojane bhavati devatāgurau yasya tasya satataṃ subhojanam . naiva muñcati ramālayaṃ tadā vājivāraṇarathaiśca maṇḍitam.
separated_sandhi: bhojane bhavati devatāgurau yasya tasya satatam subhojanamna eva muñcati ramālayam tadā vājivāraṇarathaiḥ ca maṇḍitam
english: When the divine preceptor (guru) is in the second house (house of food/wealth), that person will always have excellent food. At that time, Lakshmi's abode (his house), adorned with horses, elephants, and chariots, will certainly never leave him.

sanskrit: नृत्यलिप्सागते राजमानी धनी देवताधीशवन्द्यः सदा धर्मवित् । तन्त्रविज्ञो बुधैर्मण्डितः पंडितः शब्दविद्यानविद्यो हि सद्यो जनः ॥९६॥
transliteration: nṛtyalipsāgate rājamānī dhanī devatādhīśavandyaḥ sadā dharmavit . tantravijño budhairmaṇḍitaḥ paṃḍitaḥ śabdavidyānavidyo hi sadyo janaḥ.
separated_sandhi: nṛtyalipsāgate rājamānī dhanīdevatādhīśavandyaḥ sadā dharmavittantravijñaḥ budhaiḥ maṇḍitaḥ paṇḍitaḥśabdavidyānavidyaḥ hi sadyaḥ janaḥ
english: A person who is inclined towards dance (nṛtyalipsā) is proud, wealthy, revered by the lords of deities, always knowledgeable about (dharma), an expert in Tantra, adorned by scholars, learned, and indeed, immediately skilled in the science of words.

sanskrit: कुतूहली सकौतुके माहाधनी जनः सदा । निजान्वये च भास्करः कृपाकलाधरः सुखी । निलिम्पराजपूजिते सुतेन भूनयेन वा । युतो महाबली धराधिपेन्द्रसद्मपण्डितः ॥९७॥
transliteration: kutūhalī sakautuke māhādhanī janaḥ sadā . nijānvaye ca bhāskaraḥ kṛpākalādharaḥ sukhī . nilimparājapūjite sutena bhūnayena vā . yuto mahābalī dharādhipendrasadmapaṇḍitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: kutūhalī sakautuke māhādhanī janaḥ sadānijānvaye ca bhāskaraḥ kṛpākalādharaḥ sukhīnilimparājapūjite sutena bhūnayena vāyutaḥ mahābalī dharādhipendrasadmapaṇḍitaḥ
english: Such a person is always curious, enthusiastic, and extremely wealthy. Within his own lineage, he shines like the sun (bhāskara), embodying compassion (kṛpā), and is happy. When [a particular planetary influence, often Jupiter (Guru)] is revered by the king of the deities, the person is blessed with a son or a king (bhūnaya), becomes greatly powerful, and is a scholar in the royal court (dharādhipendrasadma).

sanskrit: गुरौ निद्रागते यस्य मूर्खता सर्वकर्मणि । दरिद्रतापरिक्रन्तं भवनें पुण्यवर्जितम् ॥९८॥
transliteration: gurau nidrāgate yasya mūrkhatā sarvakarmaṇi . daridratāparikrantaṃ bhavaneṃ puṇyavarjitam.
separated_sandhi: gurau nidrāgate yasya mūrkhatā sarvakarmaṇidaridratāparikrāntam bhavanam puṇyavarjitam
english: When Jupiter (Guru) is in a debilitated or inactive state, that person's every action (karma) leads to foolishness. His home (bhavana) is overcome by poverty and devoid of spiritual merit (puṇya).

sanskrit: जनो बलीयानपिदन्तरोगी भृगौ महारोषसमन्वितः स्यात् । धनेन हीनः शयनं प्रयाते वारांगनासंगमलम्पटश्च ॥९९॥
transliteration: jano balīyānapidantarogī bhṛgau mahāroṣasamanvitaḥ syāt . dhanena hīnaḥ śayanaṃ prayāte vārāṃganāsaṃgamalampaṭaśca.
separated_sandhi: janaḥ balīyān api dantarogī bhṛgau mahāroṣasamanvitaḥ syātdhanena hīnaḥ śayanam prayāte vārāṅganāsaṅgamalampaṭaḥ ca
english: Even if a person is very strong, he suffers from tooth ailments. When Venus (Bhṛgu) is afflicted by great anger [in the horoscope], he becomes devoid of wealth and, upon going to bed, is lustful for the company of courtesans.

sanskrit: यदि भवेदुशना उपवेशने नवमणिव्रजकाञ्चनभूषणैः । सुखमजस्रमरिक्षय आदरादवनिपादपि मानसमुन्नतिः ॥१००॥
transliteration: yadi bhaveduśanā upaveśane navamaṇivrajakāñcanabhūṣaṇaiḥ . sukhamajasramarikṣaya ādarādavanipādapi mānasamunnatiḥ.
separated_sandhi: yadi bhavet uśanā upaveśane navamaṇivrajakāñcanabhūṣaṇaiḥsukham ajasram arikṣayaḥ ādarāt avanipāt api mānasa unnatiḥ
english: If Venus (Uśanā) is positioned in the Upaveśana house, adorned with new gems, multitudes of jewels, and golden ornaments, then the person enjoys continuous happiness, the destruction of enemies, and mental elevation, all stemming from the respect received even from kings.

sanskrit: नेत्रपाणिंगते लग्नगेहे कवौ सप्तमे मानभे यस्य तस्य ध्रुवम् । नेत्रपाते निपातो धनानामलं चान्यभे वासशाला विशाला भवेत् ॥१०१॥
transliteration: netrapāṇiṃgate lagnagehe kavau saptame mānabhe yasya tasya dhruvam . netrapāte nipāto dhanānāmalaṃ cānyabhe vāsaśālā viśālā bhavet.
separated_sandhi: netrapāṇiṅgate lagnagehe kavausaptame mānabhe yasya tasya dhruvamnetrapāte nipātaḥ dhanānām alamca anyabhe vāsaśālā viśālā bhavet
english: When a planetary influence affects the eyes and hands (netrapāṇiṅgate) in the ascendant house (lagnagehe), and Venus (kavau) is situated in the seventh house (saptame), which is the house of honor (mānabhe), then for such a person, certainly there will be an affliction of the eyes (netrapāte) and a considerable loss of wealth. Furthermore, in another house (anyabhe), a spacious dwelling (vāsaśālā) will be present.

sanskrit: स्वालये तुंगभे मित्रभे भार्गवे तुंगमातंगलीलाकलापी जनः । भूपतेस्तुल्य एव प्रकाशं गते काव्यविद्याकलाकैतुकी गीतवित् ॥१०२॥
transliteration: svālaye tuṃgabhe mitrabhe bhārgave tuṃgamātaṃgalīlākalāpī janaḥ . bhūpatestulya eva prakāśaṃ gate kāvyavidyākalākaitukī gītavit.
separated_sandhi: svālaye tuṅgabhe mitrabhe bhārgavetuṅgamātaṅgalīlākalāpī janaḥbhūpateḥ tulyaḥ eva prakāśamgate kāvyavidyākalākaitukī gītavit
english: When Venus (bhārgava) is situated in its own sign (svālaye), its exaltation sign (tuṅgabhe), or a friendly sign (mitrabhe), the person (janaḥ) will possess the majestic and graceful bearing of an exalted elephant (tuṅgamātaṅgalīlākalāpī). He will indeed be equal to a king, and having attained prominence (prakāśam gate), will be skilled in poetry, various arts (kalā), and learning, as well as knowledgeable in music (gītavit).

sanskrit: गमने जनने शुक्रे तस्य माता न जीवति । आधियोगो वियोगश्च जनानामरिभीतितः ॥१०३॥
transliteration: gamane janane śukre tasya mātā na jīvati . ādhiyogo viyogaśca janānāmaribhītitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: gamane janane śukre tasya mātā na jīvatiādhiyogaḥ viyogaḥ ca janānām aribhītitaḥ
english: When Venus (śukre) is in the house of loss (gamane) at the time of birth (janane), that person's mother does not live. Mental anguish (ādhiyoga) and separation (viyoga) for people will arise due to fear of enemies.

sanskrit: आगमनं भृगुपुत्रे गतवति वित्तेश्वरो मनुजः । सत्तेर्थभ्रमशाली नित्योत्साही करांघ्रिरोगी च ॥१०४॥
transliteration: āgamanaṃ bhṛguputre gatavati vitteśvaro manujaḥ . satterthabhramaśālī nityotsāhī karāṃghrirogī ca.
separated_sandhi: āgamanam bhṛguputre gatavati vitteśvaraḥ manujaḥsattearthabhramaśālī nityotsāhī karāṅghrirogī ca
english: When Venus (bhṛguputra) is associated with gains (āgamanam gatavati), the person (manujaḥ) becomes a lord of wealth (vitteśvaraḥ). He is also someone who actively seeks (bhramaśālī) wealth and purpose (satyārtha), constantly enthusiastic (nityotsāhī), yet afflicted by diseases of the hands and feet (karāṅghrirogī).

sanskrit: अनायासेनालं सपदि महसा याति सहसा । प्रगल्भत्वंराज्ञः सदसि गुणविज्ञः किल कवौ । सभायामायाते रिपुनिवहहन्ता धनपतेः । समत्वं वा दाता बलतुरगगन्ता नरवरः ॥१०५॥
transliteration: anāyāsenālaṃ sapadi mahasā yāti sahasā . pragalbhatvaṃrājñaḥ sadasi guṇavijñaḥ kila kavau . sabhāyāmāyāte ripunivahahantā dhanapateḥ . samatvaṃ vā dātā balaturagagantā naravaraḥ.
separated_sandhi: anāyāsena alam sapadi mahasā yāti sahasāpragalbhatvam rājñaḥ sadasi guṇavijñaḥ kilakavau sabhāyām āyāte ripunivahahantā dhanapateḥsamatvam vā dātā balaturagagantā naravaraḥ
english: A discerning poet certainly attains eloquence swiftly and effortlessly through his brilliance in the king's assembly. When an excellent man, who is a slayer of enemy multitudes, arrives in the assembly, he attains a status equal to that of the lord of wealth, or a generous giver, or one who travels on mighty horses.

sanskrit: आगमे भार्गवे मागमो जन्मिनामर्थराशेररातेरतीव क्षतिः । पुत्रपातो निपातो जनानामपिव्याधिभीतिः प्रियाभोगहानिर्भवेत् ॥१०६॥
transliteration: āgame bhārgave māgamo janmināmartharāśerarāteratīva kṣatiḥ . putrapāto nipāto janānāmapivyādhibhītiḥ priyābhogahānirbhavet.
separated_sandhi: āgame bhārgave māgamaḥ janmināmartharāśeḥ arāteḥ atīva kṣatiḥ |putrapātaḥ nipātaḥ janānām apivyādhibhītiḥ priyābhogahāniḥ bhavet
english: When Venus (Bhārgava) is in an inauspicious position, there will be misfortune for people, a great loss of accumulated wealth, and severe damage from enemies. There will also be loss of children, calamity for people, fear of disease, and deprivation of conjugal pleasure.

sanskrit: क्षुधातुरो व्याधिनिपीडितः स्यादनेकधारातिभयर्द्दितश्च । कवौ यदा भोजनगे युवत्या महाधनी पण्डितमण्डितश्च ॥१०७॥
transliteration: kṣudhāturo vyādhinipīḍitaḥ syādanekadhārātibhayardditaśca . kavau yadā bhojanage yuvatyā mahādhanī paṇḍitamaṇḍitaśca.
separated_sandhi: kṣudhāturaḥ vyādhinipīḍitaḥ syātaneka-dhārā-ati-bhaya-arditaḥca | kavau yadā bhojanage yuvatyāmahādhanī paṇḍitamaṇḍitaḥ ca
english: When Venus (kavi) is in the second house (the house of sustenance), the native may become afflicted by hunger, tormented by disease, and distressed by severe fear from various sources. Alternatively, such a person will be very wealthy, honored by scholars, and enjoy the company of a young woman.

sanskrit: काव्यविद्यानवद्या च हृद्या मतिः सर्वदा नृत्यलिप्सागते भार्गवे । शंखवीणामृदंगादिगानध्वनिव्रातनैपुण्यमेतस्य वित्तोन्नतिः ॥१०८॥
transliteration: kāvyavidyānavadyā ca hṛdyā matiḥ sarvadā nṛtyalipsāgate bhārgave . śaṃkhavīṇāmṛdaṃgādigānadhvanivrātanaipuṇyametasya vittonnatiḥ.
separated_sandhi: kāvya-vidyā anavadyā ca hṛdyā matiḥsarvadā nṛtya-lipsā-gate bhārgave| śaṅkha-vīṇā-mṛdaṅga-ādi-gāna-dhvani-vrāta-naipuṇyametasya vittonnatiḥ
english: When Venus (Bhārgava) is situated in the house indicating a desire for dance, the native will always possess flawless knowledge of poetry, a pleasing intellect, and expertise in the various sounds of instruments like the conch, vīṇā, and mṛdaṅga, as well as singing. Such a person will also experience an increase in wealth.

sanskrit: कौतुकभवनं गतवति शुक्रे शक्रेशत्वं सदसि महत्त्वम् । हृद्या विद्या भविति च पुंसः पदमा निवसति सदमारतः ॥१०९॥
transliteration: kautukabhavanaṃ gatavati śukre śakreśatvaṃ sadasi mahattvam . hṛdyā vidyā bhaviti ca puṃsaḥ padamā nivasati sadamārataḥ.
separated_sandhi: kautuka-bhavanam gata-vati śukreśakra-īśatvam sadasi mahattvam| hṛdyā vidyā bhavati ca puṃsaḥpadamā nivasati sadam ārataḥ
english: When Venus (Śukra) is situated in the house of festivity or amusement, a person attains sovereignty like Indra, importance in assemblies, and pleasing knowledge. For such a man, Lakṣmī (Padmā) dwells, and he is devoted to his home.

sanskrit: परसेवारतो नित्यं निद्रामुपगते कवौ । परनिन्दापरो वीरो वाचालो भ्रमते महीम् ॥११०॥
transliteration: parasevārato nityaṃ nidrāmupagate kavau . paranindāparo vīro vācālo bhramate mahīm.
separated_sandhi: parasevārataḥ nityam nidrām upagate kavau |paranindāparaḥ vīraḥ vācālaḥ bhramate mahīm
english: When Venus (kavi) has fallen into an inauspicious state (like 'sleep'), the native is constantly devoted to serving others, prone to criticizing others, brave, talkative, and wanders the earth.

sanskrit: क्षुत्पिपासापरिक्रान्तो विश्रान्तः शयने शनौ । वयसि प्रथमे रोगी ततो भाग्यवतां वरः ॥१११॥
transliteration: kṣutpipāsāparikrānto viśrāntaḥ śayane śanau . vayasi prathame rogī tato bhāgyavatāṃ varaḥ.
separated_sandhi: kṣutpipāsāparikrāntaḥ viśrāntaḥ śayane śanauvayasi prathame rogī tataḥ bhāgyavatām varaḥ
english: If Saturn is in the twelfth house, the person will be afflicted by hunger and thirst, and fatigued. They will be sickly in the early part of their life, but thereafter will become the foremost among the fortunate.

sanskrit: भानओः सुते चेदुपवेशनस्थे करालकारातिजनानुतप्ताः । अपायुशाली खलु दद्रुमाली नरोभिमानी नृपदण्डयुक्तः ॥११२॥
transliteration: bhānaoḥ sute cedupaveśanasthe karālakārātijanānutaptāḥ . apāyuśālī khalu dadrumālī narobhimānī nṛpadaṇḍayuktaḥ.
separated_sandhi: bhānoḥ sute cet upaveśanasthe karālakārātijanānutaptāḥapāyuśālī khalu dadrumālī naraḥ abhimānī nṛpadaṇḍayuktaḥ
english: If Saturn, the son of the Sun, is situated in the fourth house, the person will be tormented by fierce enemies and people. Such a person will indeed be short-lived, afflicted by skin diseases, proud, and subjected to royal punishment.

sanskrit: नयनपाणिगते रविनन्दने परमया रमया रमयायुतः । नृपतितो हिततो महितोषकृद्बहुकलाकलितो विमलोक्तिकृत् ॥११३॥
transliteration: nayanapāṇigate ravinandane paramayā ramayā ramayāyutaḥ . nṛpatito hitato mahitoṣakṛdbahukalākalito vimaloktikṛt.
separated_sandhi: nayanapāṇigate ravinandane paramayā ramayā ramayāyutaḥnṛpatitaḥ hitataḥ mahitoṣakṛt bahukalākalitaḥ vimaloktikṛt
english: If Saturn, the son of the Sun, is situated in the second and third houses, the person will be endowed with supreme wealth and delight. They will receive benefits from the king and from well-wishers, will be a source of great satisfaction, skilled in many arts, and will speak pure and faultless words.

sanskrit: नानागुणप्रामधनाधिशाली सदा नरो बुद्धिविनोदमाली । प्रकाशने भानुसुते सुभानुः कृपानुतक्तो हरपादभक्तः ॥११४॥
transliteration: nānāguṇaprāmadhanādhiśālī sadā naro buddhivinodamālī . prakāśane bhānusute subhānuḥ kṛpānutakto harapādabhaktaḥ.
separated_sandhi: nānāguṇaprāmadhanādhiśālī sadā naraḥ buddhivinodamālīprakāśane bhānusute subhānuḥ kṛpānutaktaḥ harapadabhaktaḥ
english: When Saturn, the son of the Sun, is in the tenth house (prakāśane), the person will always possess various virtues, excellent wealth, and supremacy. Such a person delights in intelligence, has good radiance, is devoted to compassion, and is a devotee (bhakta) of Lord Shiva's feet.

sanskrit: महाधनी नन्दननन्दितः स्यादपायकारी रिपुभूमिहारी । गमे शनौ पण्डितराजाभावं धरापतेरायातने प्रयाति ॥११५॥
transliteration: mahādhanī nandanananditaḥ syādapāyakārī ripubhūmihārī . game śanau paṇḍitarājābhāvaṃ dharāpaterāyātane prayāti.
separated_sandhi: mahādhanī nandanananditaḥ syāt apāyakārī ripubhūmihārīgame śanau paṇḍitarājābhāvam dharāpateḥ āyātane prayāti
english: If Saturn is in the seventh house, the person will be very wealthy, delighted by sons, prone to causing harm, and one who seizes the lands of enemies. If Saturn is in the eleventh house, the person attains the status of a supreme scholar and approaches the ruler for gains.

sanskrit: आगमने गर्दभपदयुक्तः पुत्रकलत्रसुखेन विमुक्तः । भानुसुते भ्रमते भुवि नित्यं दीनमना विजनाश्रयभावम् ॥११६॥
transliteration: āgamane gardabhapadayuktaḥ putrakalatrasukhena vimuktaḥ . bhānusute bhramate bhuvi nityaṃ dīnamanā vijanāśrayabhāvam.
separated_sandhi: āgamane gardabhapadayuktaḥ putrakalatrasukhena vimuktaḥbhānusute bhramate bhuvi nityaṃ dīnamanā vijanāśrayabhāvam
english: When Saturn (bhānusuta) is in transit, constantly moving on earth, a person travels with a donkey-like gait, is deprived of happiness from his son and wife, becomes dejected in mind, and develops a disposition to seek refuge in desolate places.

sanskrit: रत्नावलीकाञ्चनमौक्तिकानां व्रातेन नित्यं व्रजति प्रमोदम् । सभागते भानुसुते नितान्तं नयेन पूर्णो मनुजो महौजाः ॥११७॥
transliteration: ratnāvalīkāñcanamauktikānāṃ vrātena nityaṃ vrajati pramodam . sabhāgate bhānusute nitāntaṃ nayena pūrṇo manujo mahaujāḥ.
separated_sandhi: ratnāvalīkāñcanamauktikānām vrātena nityaṃ vrajati pramodamsabhāgate bhānusute nitāntam nayena pūrṇaḥ manujaḥ mahaujāḥ
english: When Saturn (bhānusuta) is present in an assembly, the person becomes exceedingly full of prudence (naya) and mighty (mahaujāḥ). He constantly attains great joy from an abundance of necklaces of jewels, gold, and pearls.

sanskrit: आगमे गदसमागमो नृणामब्जबन्धुतनये यदा तदा । मन्दमेव गमनं धरापतेर्याचनाविरहिता मतिः सदा ॥११८॥
transliteration: āgame gadasamāgamo nṛṇāmabjabandhutanaye yadā tadā . mandameva gamanaṃ dharāpateryācanāvirahitā matiḥ sadā.
separated_sandhi: āgame gadasamāgamaḥ nṛṇām abjabandhutanaye yadā tadāmandam eva gamanam dharāpateḥ yācanāvirahitā matiḥ sadā
english: When the son of the Sun (abjabandhutanaya), Saturn, is in transit, then there is an occurrence of diseases for people. The progress of the ruler (dharāpati) is very slow, and his mind is always free from any desire to beg.

sanskrit: संगते जनुषि भानुनन्दने भोजनं भवति भोजनं रसैः । संयुतं नयनमन्दता तता मोहतापपरितापिता मतिः ॥११९॥
transliteration: saṃgate januṣi bhānunandane bhojanaṃ bhavati bhojanaṃ rasaiḥ . saṃyutaṃ nayanamandatā tatā mohatāpaparitāpitā matiḥ.
separated_sandhi: saṃgate januṣi bhānunandane bhojanam bhavati bhojanamrasaiḥ saṃyutam nayanamandatā tatā mohatāpaparitāpitā matiḥ
english: When Saturn (bhānunandana) is united in the natal chart, eating becomes merely sustenance, though it includes various tastes; there is widespread dimness of vision, and the mind is afflicted by the distress of delusion.

sanskrit: नृत्यलिप्सागते मन्दे धर्मात्मा वित्तपूरितः । राजपूज्यो नरो धीरो महावीरो रणाङ्गणे ॥१२०॥
transliteration: nṛtyalipsāgate mande dharmātmā vittapūritaḥ . rājapūjyo naro dhīro mahāvīro raṇāṅgaṇe.
separated_sandhi: nṛtyalipsāgate mande dharmātmā vittapūritaḥrājapūjyaḥ naraḥ dhīraḥ mahāvīraḥ raṇāṅgaṇe
english: When Saturn (manda) is disposed towards the desire for dance, a man becomes virtuous (dharmātmā), filled with wealth, honored by kings, firm (dhīra), and a great hero (mahāvīra) on the battlefield.

sanskrit: भवति कौतकभावमुपागते रविसुते वसुधावसुपूरितः । अतिसुखी सुमुखीसुखपूरितः कवितयामलया कलयानरः ॥१२१॥
transliteration: bhavati kautakabhāvamupāgate ravisute vasudhāvasupūritaḥ . atisukhī sumukhīsukhapūritaḥ kavitayāmalayā kalayānaraḥ.
separated_sandhi: bhavati kautakabhāvam upāgate ravisute vasudhāvasupūritaḥatisukhī sumukhīsukhapūritaḥ kavitayā amalayā kalayā naraḥ
english: When Saturn (ravisuta) attains a state of exaltation, a man becomes filled with earthly wealth, extremely happy, and endowed with the happiness from beautiful women, possessing pure poetry and art.

sanskrit: निद्रागते वासरनाथपुत्रे धनी सदा चारुगुणैरुपेतः । पराक्रमी चण्डविपक्षहन्ता सुवारकान्तारतिरीतिविज्ञः ॥१२२॥
transliteration: nidrāgate vāsaranāthaputre dhanī sadā cāruguṇairupetaḥ . parākramī caṇḍavipakṣahantā suvārakāntāratirītivijñaḥ.
separated_sandhi: nidrāgate vāsaraputre dhanī sadā cāruguṇaiḥ upetaḥparākramī caṇḍavipakṣahantā suvārakāntāratirītivijñaḥ
english: When Saturn (vāsaraputra) is in a debilitated or inactive state (nidrāgata), a man becomes wealthy, always endowed with beautiful qualities, valiant, a destroyer of fierce enemies, and knowledgeable in the ways of pleasure with beautiful women.

sanskrit: यदागमो जन्मनि यस्य राहौ क्लेशाधिकत्वं शयनं प्रयाते । वृषेऽथ युग्मेऽपि च कन्यकायामजे समाजो धनधान्यराशेः ॥१२३॥
transliteration: yadāgamo janmani yasya rāhau kleśādhikatvaṃ śayanaṃ prayāte . vṛṣe'tha yugme'pi ca kanyakāyāmaje samājo dhanadhānyarāśeḥ.
separated_sandhi: yadā āgamaḥ janmani yasya rāhaukleśa adhikatvam śayanam prayāte| vṛṣe atha yugme api ca kanyakāyāmaje samājaḥ dhanadhānyarāśeḥ
english: When Rāhu's presence at a person's birth (janmani yasya) indicates that Rāhu has gone to the 'sleep' state (śayanaṃ prayāte), there will be an abundance of troubles (kleśādhikatva). However, if Rāhu is in Taurus (vṛṣa), Gemini (yugma), Virgo (kanyakā), or Aries (aja), there will be an accumulation of wealth and grain.

sanskrit: उपवेशनमिह गतवति राहौ दद्रुगदेन जनः परितप्तः । राजसमाजयुतो बहुमानी वित्तसुखेन सदा रहितः स्यात् ॥१२४॥
transliteration: upaveśanamiha gatavati rāhau dadrugadena janaḥ paritaptaḥ . rājasamājayuto bahumānī vittasukhena sadā rahitaḥ syāt.
separated_sandhi: upaveśanam iha gatavati rāhau dadrugadena janaḥ paritaptaḥ| rājasamājayutaḥ bahumānī vittasukhena sadā rahitaḥ syāt
english: When Rāhu here has gone to the 'sitting' state (upaveśana), the person (jana) becomes afflicted with skin diseases. (Such a person) may always be devoid of the happiness of wealth, even if associated with royal assemblies and highly respected.

sanskrit: नेत्रपाणावगौ नेत्रे भवतो रोगपीडिते । दुष्टव्यालारिचौराणां भयं तस्य धनक्षयः ॥१२५॥
transliteration: netrapāṇāvagau netre bhavato rogapīḍite . duṣṭavyālāricaurāṇāṃ bhayaṃ tasya dhanakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: netrapāṇau agau netre bhavataḥ rogapīḍite |duṣṭavyāla ari caurāṇām bhayam tasya dhanakṣayaḥ
english: When two malefic planets (agau, e.g., Rāhu and Ketu) are in the 2nd (netra) and 5th (pāṇi) houses, the two eyes (netre) become afflicted by disease. He experiences fear from wicked serpents, enemies, and thieves, and suffers loss of wealth.

sanskrit: प्रकाशने शुभासने स्थितिः कृतिः शुभा नृणां । धनोन्नतिर्गुणोन्नतिः सदा विदामगाविह । धराधिपाधिकारिता यशोलता तता भवे । न्नवीननीरदाकृतिर्विदेशतो महोन्नतिः ॥१२६॥
transliteration: prakāśane śubhāsane sthitiḥ kṛtiḥ śubhā nṛṇāṃ . dhanonnatirguṇonnatiḥ sadā vidāmagāviha . dharādhipādhikāritā yaśolatā tatā bhave . nnavīnanīradākṛtirvideśato mahonnatiḥ.
separated_sandhi: prakāśane śubhāsane sthitiḥ kṛtiḥ śubhānṛṇām dhanonnatiḥ guṇonnatiḥ sadā vidāmagāviha dharādhipādhikāritā yaśolatā tatābhavet navīnanīradākṛtiḥ videśataḥ mahonnatiḥ
english: For people, an auspicious position and good actions bring about a stable state. For the wise, the increase in wealth and virtues is always firmly established in this world. May authority over the land, extensive fame, and great prosperity, resembling newly formed clouds, come from abroad.

sanskrit: गमने च यदा राहौ बहुसन्तानवान्नरः । पण्डितो धनवान् दाता राजपूज्यो नरो भवेत् ॥१२७॥
transliteration: gamane ca yadā rāhau bahusantānavānnaraḥ . paṇḍito dhanavān dātā rājapūjyo naro bhavet.
separated_sandhi: gamane ca yadā rāhau bahusantānavān naraḥpaṇḍitaḥ dhanavān dātā rājapūjyaḥ naraḥ bhavet
english: When Rāhu is in transit, a person becomes one with many descendants, learned, wealthy, generous, and respected by kings.

sanskrit: राहावागमने क्रोधी सदा धीधनवर्जितः । कुटिलः कृपणः कामी नरो भवति सर्वथा ॥१२८॥
transliteration: rāhāvāgamane krodhī sadā dhīdhanavarjitaḥ . kuṭilaḥ kṛpaṇaḥ kāmī naro bhavati sarvathā.
separated_sandhi: rāhau āgamane krodhī sadā dhīdhanavarjitaḥkuṭilaḥ kṛpaṇaḥ kāmī naraḥ bhavati sarvathā
english: When Rāhu is in the ascending node, a person always becomes angry, deprived of intelligence and wealth, crooked, miserly, and lustful in all respects.

sanskrit: सभागतो यदा राहुः पण्डितः कृपणो नरः । नानागुणपरिक्रान्तो वित्त सौख्यसमन्वितः ॥१२९॥
transliteration: sabhāgato yadā rāhuḥ paṇḍitaḥ kṛpaṇo naraḥ . nānāguṇaparikrānto vitta saukhyasamanvitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: sabhāgataḥ yadā rāhuḥ paṇḍitaḥ kṛpaṇaḥ naraḥnānāguṇaparikrāntaḥ vittasaukhyasamanvitaḥ
english: When Rahu is present in an assembly, a person is learned, miserly, endowed with various qualities, and associated with wealth and happiness.

sanskrit: चेदगावागमं यस्य याते तदा व्याकुलत्वं सदारातिभीत्या भयम् । महद्बन्धुवादो जनानां निपातो भवेद्वित्तहानिः शठत्वं कृशत्वं ॥१३०॥
transliteration: cedagāvāgamaṃ yasya yāte tadā vyākulatvaṃ sadārātibhītyā bhayam . mahadbandhuvādo janānāṃ nipāto bhavedvittahāniḥ śaṭhatvaṃ kṛśatvaṃ.
separated_sandhi: cet agāvāgamam yasya yāte tadāvyākulatvam sadāra arātibhītyā bhayammahat bandhuvādaḥ janānām nipātaḥbhavet vittahāniḥ śaṭhatvam kṛśatvam
english: If, for someone, an unfavorable event occurs, then there is agitation, fear accompanied by his wife due to the terror of enemies. There will be widespread criticism from relatives, ruin among people, loss of wealth, deceit, and weakness.

sanskrit: भोजने भोजनेनालं विकलो मनुजो भवेत् । मन्दबुद्धिः क्रियाभीरुः स्त्रीपुत्रसुखवर्जितः ॥१३१॥
transliteration: bhojane bhojanenālaṃ vikalo manujo bhavet . mandabuddhiḥ kriyābhīruḥ strīputrasukhavarjitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: bhojane bhojanena alam vikalaḥ manujaḥ bhavet |mandabuddhiḥ kriyābhīruḥ strīputrasukhavarjitaḥ
english: One who indulges excessively in food becomes afflicted. Such a person is dull-witted, fearful of action, and deprived of the happiness of a wife and children.

sanskrit: नृत्यलिप्सागते राहौ महाव्याधिविवर्द्धनम् । नेत्ररोगी रिपोर्भीतिर्धनधर्मक्षयो नृणाम् ॥१३२॥
transliteration: nṛtyalipsāgate rāhau mahāvyādhivivarddhanam . netrarogī riporbhītirdhanadharmakṣayo nṛṇām.
separated_sandhi: nṛtyalipsāgate rāhau mahāvyādhivivarddhanam |netrarogī ripoḥ bhītiḥ dhanadharmakṣayaḥ nṛṇām
english: When Rāhu is situated in a state or sign indicating a desire for dancing, it leads to a great increase in diseases, eye ailments, fear from enemies, and loss of wealth and (dharma) for people.

sanskrit: कौतुके च यदा राहौ स्थानहीनो नरो भवेत् । परदाररतो नित्यं परवित्तापहारकः ॥१३३॥
transliteration: kautuke ca yadā rāhau sthānahīno naro bhavet . paradārarato nityaṃ paravittāpahārakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: kautuke ca yadā rāhau sthānahīnaḥ naraḥ bhavet| paradārarataḥ nityam paravittāpahārakaḥ
english: And when Rāhu is in a position indicating amusement or curiosity, the person becomes deprived of their place or position. They are always engaged with other men's wives and steal others' wealth.

sanskrit: निद्रावस्थां गते राहौ गुणग्रामयुतो नरः । कान्तासन्तानवान् धीरो गर्वितो बहुवित्तवान् ॥१३४॥
transliteration: nidrāvasthāṃ gate rāhau guṇagrāmayuto naraḥ . kāntāsantānavān dhīro garvito bahuvittavān.
separated_sandhi: nidrāvasthām gate rāhau guṇagrāmayutaḥ naraḥ| kāntāsantānavān dhīraḥ garvitaḥ bahuvittavān
english: When Rāhu is in a state of sleep (or weakness), a person becomes endowed with many good qualities, possesses a beloved wife and children, is courageous, dignified, and wealthy.

sanskrit: मेषे वृषेऽथ वा युग्मे कन्ययां शयनं गते । केतौ धनसमृद्धिः स्यादन्यभे रोगवर्धनम् ॥१३५॥
transliteration: meṣe vṛṣe'tha vā yugme kanyayāṃ śayanaṃ gate . ketau dhanasamṛddhiḥ syādanyabhe rogavardhanam.
separated_sandhi: meṣe vṛṣe atha vā yugme kanyāyām śayanam gate |ketau dhanasamṛddhiḥ syāt anyabhe rogavarddhanam
english: When Ketu is in Aries, Taurus, or Gemini, or when Ketu is in a dormant state in Virgo, there is prosperity of wealth. In other signs, there is an increase in diseases.

sanskrit: उपवेशं गतौ केतौ दद्रुरोगविवर्द्धनम् । अरिवातनृपव्यालचैरशंका समन्ततः ॥१३६॥
transliteration: upaveśaṃ gatau ketau dadrurogavivarddhanam . arivātanṛpavyālacairaśaṃkā samantataḥ.
separated_sandhi: upaveśam gatau ketau dadrurogavivardhanamarivātanṛpavyālacairaśaṅkā samantataḥ
english: When Ketu is situated in an occupied or 'seated' position, it leads to an increase in skin diseases and constant fear from enemies, wind-related ailments, rulers, wild animals, and thieves from all directions.

sanskrit: नेत्रपाणिं गते केतौ नेत्ररोगः प्रजायते । दुष्टसर्पादिभीतिश्च रिपुराजकुलादपि ॥१३७॥
transliteration: netrapāṇiṃ gate ketau netrarogaḥ prajāyate . duṣṭasarpādibhītiśca ripurājakulādapi.
separated_sandhi: netrapāṇim gate ketau netrarogaḥ prajāyateduṣṭasarpādibhītiḥ ca ripurājakulāt api
english: When Ketu is situated in a position affecting the eyes and hands, eye diseases occur. Additionally, there is fear of venomous snakes and other creatures, as well as from enemies and the ruling class.

sanskrit: केतौ प्रकाशने संज्ञे धनवान् धार्मिकः सदा । नित्यं प्रवासी चोत्साही सात्त्विको राजसेवकः ॥१३८॥
transliteration: ketau prakāśane saṃjñe dhanavān dhārmikaḥ sadā . nityaṃ pravāsī cotsāhī sāttviko rājasevakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: ketau prakāśane saṃjñe dhanavān dhārmikaḥ sadānityam pravāsī ca utsāhī sāttvikaḥ rājasevakaḥ
english: When Ketu is in a prominent and well-recognized position, the individual becomes wealthy, always righteous (dhārmika), a constant traveler, enthusiastic, of pure nature (sāttvika), and a servant of the king.

sanskrit: गमेच्छायां भवेत्केतुर्बहुपुत्रो महाधनः । पण्डितो गुणवान् दाता जायते च नरोत्तमः ॥१३९॥
transliteration: gamecchāyāṃ bhavetketurbahuputro mahādhanaḥ . paṇḍito guṇavān dātā jāyate ca narottamaḥ.
separated_sandhi: gamecchāyām bhavet ketuḥ bahuputraḥ mahādhanaḥpaṇḍitaḥ guṇavān dātā jāyate ca narottamaḥ
english: When Ketu is in a position signifying a desire for travel or movement (gamecchāyām), the person has many children, is extremely wealthy, learned, virtuous, generous, and becomes an excellent individual.

sanskrit: आगमने च यदा केतुर्नानारोगो धनक्षयः । दन्तघाती महारोगी पिशुनः परनिन्दकः ॥१४०॥
transliteration: āgamane ca yadā keturnānārogo dhanakṣayaḥ . dantaghātī mahārogī piśunaḥ paranindakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: āgamane ca yadā ketuḥ nānārogaḥ dhanakṣayaḥdantaghātī mahārogī piśunaḥ paranindakaḥ
english: And when Ketu is in a position signifying 'arrival' or 'coming' (āgamane), there are various diseases, loss of wealth, dental problems, severe illness, and the person becomes a backbiter and slanderer of others.

sanskrit: सभावस्थां गते केतौ वाचालो बहुगर्वितः । कृपणो लम्पटश्चैव धूर्तविद्द्याविशारदः ॥१४१॥
transliteration: sabhāvasthāṃ gate ketau vācālo bahugarvitaḥ . kṛpaṇo lampaṭaścaiva dhūrtaviddyāviśāradaḥ.
separated_sandhi: samasthām gate ketau vācālaḥ bahugarvitaḥkṛpaṇaḥ lampaṭaḥ ca eva dhūrtavidyāviśāradaḥ
english: When Ketu is situated in a particular state, the person becomes talkative, very proud, miserly, lustful, and skilled in deceptive arts.

sanskrit: यदागमे भवेत्केतुः केतुः स्यात्पापकर्मणाम् । बन्धुवादरतो दुष्टो रिपुरोगनिपीडितः ॥१४२॥
transliteration: yadāgame bhavetketuḥ ketuḥ syātpāpakarmaṇām . bandhuvādarato duṣṭo ripuroganipīḍitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: yadā āgame bhavet ketuḥ ketuḥ syāt pāpakarmaṇāmbandhuvādarataḥ duṣṭaḥ ripuroganipīḍitaḥ
english: When Ketu is present, the person will be involved in sinful acts (karma), fond of disputes concerning relatives, wicked, and afflicted by enemies and diseases.

sanskrit: भोजने तु जनो नित्यं क्षुधया परिपीडितः । दरिद्रो रोगसंतप्तः केतौ भ्रामति मेदिनीम् ॥१४३॥
transliteration: bhojane tu jano nityaṃ kṣudhayā paripīḍitaḥ . daridro rogasaṃtaptaḥ ketau bhrāmati medinīm.
separated_sandhi: bhojane tu janaḥ nityam kṣudhayā paripīḍitaḥdaridraḥ rogasamtaptaḥ ketau bhrāmati medinīm
english: When Ketu is present, a person is always tormented by hunger concerning food, poor, afflicted by diseases, and wanders the earth.

sanskrit: नृत्यलिप्साङ्गते केतौ व्याधिना विकलो भवेत् । बुद्बुदाक्षो दुराघर्षो धूर्तोऽनर्थकरो नरः ॥१४४॥
transliteration: nṛtyalipsāṅgate ketau vyādhinā vikalo bhavet . budbudākṣo durāgharṣo dhūrto'narthakaro naraḥ.
separated_sandhi: nṛtyalipsāṅgate ketau vyādhinā vikalaḥ bhavetbudbudākṣaḥ durāgharṣaḥ dhūrtaḥ anarthakaraḥ naraḥ
english: When Ketu influences the desire for dance, the person becomes afflicted with disease, having bulging eyes, difficult to conquer, deceitful, and a bringer of misfortune.

sanskrit: कौतुकी कौतुके केतौ नटवामारतिप्रियः । स्थानभ्रष्टो दुराचारी दरिद्रो भ्रमते महीम् ॥१४५॥
transliteration: kautukī kautuke ketau naṭavāmāratipriyaḥ . sthānabhraṣṭo durācārī daridro bhramate mahīm.
separated_sandhi: kautukī kautuke ketau naṭavāmāratipriyaḥsthānabhraṣṭaḥ durācārī daridraḥ bhramate mahīm
english: When Ketu is in a state related to curiosity or amusement, the person is inquisitive, fond of actors and women, fallen from his position, of bad conduct, poor, and wanders the earth.

sanskrit: निद्रावस्थां गते केतौ धनधान्यसुखं महत् । नानागुणविनोदेन कालो गच्छति जन्मिनाम् ॥१४६॥
transliteration: nidrāvasthāṃ gate ketau dhanadhānyasukhaṃ mahat . nānāguṇavinodena kālo gacchati janminām.
separated_sandhi: nidrāvasthām gate ketau dhanadhānyasukhammahat nānāguṇavinodena kālaḥ gacchati janminām
english: When Ketu enters the sleep (nidrā) state, there is great wealth, grain, and happiness. The time of natives is spent in various enjoyable activities and with many virtues.

sanskrit: शयने द्विज भावेषु यत्र तिष्ठन्ति सद्ग्रहाः । नित्यं तस्य शुभज्ञानं निर्विशंकं वदेत् बुधः ॥१४७॥
transliteration: śayane dvija bhāveṣu yatra tiṣṭhanti sadgrahāḥ . nityaṃ tasya śubhajñānaṃ nirviśaṃkaṃ vadet budhaḥ.
separated_sandhi: śayane dvija bhāveṣu yatra tiṣṭhanti satgrahāḥnityam tasya śubhajnānam nirviśaṅkam vadet budhaḥ
english: If benefic planets (sadgraha) are situated in any houses in the "śayana" (sleep) state, O twice-born (dvija), a wise person (budha) should always declare an auspicious outcome for the native without any doubt.

sanskrit: भोजने येषु भावेषु पापास्तिष्ठन्ति सर्वथा । तदा सर्वविनाशेऽपि नाऽत्र कार्या विचारणा ॥१४८॥
transliteration: bhojane yeṣu bhāveṣu pāpāstiṣṭhanti sarvathā . tadā sarvavināśe'pi nā'tra kāryā vicāraṇā.
separated_sandhi: bhojane yeṣu bhāveṣu pāpāḥ tiṣṭhanti sarvathātadā sarvavināśe api na atra kāryā vicāraṇā
english: If malefic planets (pāpa) are always situated in the houses that are in the "bhojana" (eating) state, then, total destruction (sarvavināśa) is certain, and no further deliberation is necessary here.

sanskrit: निद्रायां च यदा पापो जायास्थाने शुभं वदेत् । यदि पापग्रहैर्दृष्टो न शुभं च कदाचन ॥१४९॥
transliteration: nidrāyāṃ ca yadā pāpo jāyāsthāne śubhaṃ vadet . yadi pāpagrahairdṛṣṭo na śubhaṃ ca kadācana.
separated_sandhi: nidrāyām ca yadā pāpaḥ jāyāsthāne śubham vadetyadi pāpagrahaiḥ dṛṣṭaḥ na śubham ca kadācana
english: When a malefic planet (pāpa) is in the "nidrā" (sleep) state, one should predict auspicious results for the house of spouse (jāyāsthāna). However, if it is aspected by other malefic planets, then there is never any auspiciousness.

sanskrit: सुतस्थाने स्थितः पापो निद्रायां शयनेऽपि वा । तदा शुभं वदेत्तस्य नाऽत्र कार्या विचारणा ॥१५०॥
transliteration: sutasthāne sthitaḥ pāpo nidrāyāṃ śayane'pi vā . tadā śubhaṃ vadettasya nā'tra kāryā vicāraṇā.
separated_sandhi: sutasthāne sthitaḥ pāpaḥ nidrāyām śayane api vātadā śubham vadet tasya na atra kāryā vicāraṇā
english: If a malefic planet (pāpa) is situated in the house of children (sutasthāna), either in the "nidrā" (sleep) state or the "śayana" (lying down) state, then one should declare auspicious results for the native. No further deliberation is necessary in this matter.

sanskrit: मृत्युस्थानस्थितः पापो निद्रायां शयनेऽपि वा । तदा तस्याऽपमृत्युः स्याद्राजतः परतस्तथा ॥१५१॥
transliteration: mṛtyusthānasthitaḥ pāpo nidrāyāṃ śayane'pi vā . tadā tasyā'pamṛtyuḥ syādrājataḥ paratastathā.
separated_sandhi: mṛtyusthānasthitaḥ pāpaḥ nidrāyām śayane api vātadā tasya apamṛtyuḥ syāt rājataḥ parataḥ tathā
english: If a malefic planet is situated in the house of death (the 8th house) when one is in a state of sleep or rest, then that person may experience an untimely death, possibly due to authorities or other external causes.

sanskrit: शुभग्रहैर्यदा युक्तः शुभैर्वा यदि वीक्षितः । तदा तु मरणं तस्य गङ्गादौ च विशेषतः ॥१५२॥
transliteration: śubhagrahairyadā yuktaḥ śubhairvā yadi vīkṣitaḥ . tadā tu maraṇaṃ tasya gaṅgādau ca viśeṣataḥ.
separated_sandhi: śubhagraḥaiḥ yadā yuktaḥ śubhaiḥ vā yadi vīkṣitaḥtadā tu maraṇam tasya gaṅgādau ca viśeṣataḥ
english: However, if (the indicator of death, e.g., the 8th house or its lord) is conjoined with auspicious planets, or if it is aspected by auspicious planets, then that person's death will indeed occur, particularly in sacred places like the Ganges (river) or similar holy sites.

sanskrit: कर्मस्थाने यदा पापः शयने भोजनेऽपि वा । तदा कर्मविपाकः स्यान्नानादुःखप्रदायकः ॥१५३॥
transliteration: karmasthāne yadā pāpaḥ śayane bhojane'pi vā . tadā karmavipākaḥ syānnānāduḥkhapradāyakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: karmasthāne yadā pāpaḥ śayane bhojane api vātadā karmavipākaḥ syāt nānāduḥkhapradāyakaḥ
english: If a malefic planet is situated in the house of action (the 10th house), even during periods of rest or while eating, then the consequences of past actions (karma) would manifest, bringing various kinds of suffering.

sanskrit: दशमस्थो निशानाथः कौतुके च प्रकाशने । तदैव राजयोगः स्यान्निर्विशकं द्विजोत्तम ॥१५४॥
transliteration: daśamastho niśānāthaḥ kautuke ca prakāśane . tadaiva rājayogaḥ syānnirviśakaṃ dvijottama.
separated_sandhi: daśamasthaḥ niśānāthaḥ kautuke ca prakāśanetadā eva rājayogaḥ syāt nirviśakam dvijottama
english: When the Moon, the lord of the night, is situated in the tenth house, (especially) during times of joy and public display, then a royal combination (rājayoga) certainly occurs, O best among the twice-born.

sanskrit: बलाऽबलविचारेण ज्ञातव्यञ्च शुभाऽशुभम् । एवं क्रमेण बोद्धव्यं सर्वाभावेषु बुद्धिमन् ॥१५५॥
transliteration: balā'balavicāreṇa jñātavyañca śubhā'śubham . evaṃ krameṇa boddhavyaṃ sarvābhāveṣu buddhiman.
separated_sandhi: bala abala vicāreṇa jñātavyam ca śubha aśubhamevam krameṇa boddhavyam sarva abhāveṣu buddhiman
english: One should discern both auspicious and inauspicious outcomes by considering the strengths and weaknesses (of planets or houses). In this way, O intelligent one, this principle should be progressively understood for all the astrological houses (bhāvas).

sanskrit: सर्वज्ञोऽसि महर्षे त्वं कृपया दीनवत्सल । दशाः कतिविधाः सन्ति तन्मे कथय तत्त्वतः ॥१॥
transliteration: sarvajño'si maharṣe tvaṃ kṛpayā dīnavatsala . daśāḥ katividhāḥ santi tanme kathaya tattvataḥ.
separated_sandhi: sarvajñaḥ asi maharṣe tvam kṛpayā dīnavatsala |daśāḥ katividhāḥ santi tat me kathaya tattvataḥ
english: O omniscient great sage, who is compassionate towards the distressed, please tell me precisely how many types of planetary periods (daśās) exist.

sanskrit: साधु पृष्टं स्वया विप्र लोकानुग्रहकारिणा । कथयामि तवाग्रेऽहं दशभेदाननेकशः ॥२॥
transliteration: sādhu pṛṣṭaṃ svayā vipra lokānugrahakāriṇā . kathayāmi tavāgre'haṃ daśabhedānanekaśaḥ.
separated_sandhi: sādhu pṛṣṭam svayā vipra lokānugrahakāriṇā |kathayāmi tava agre aham daśabhedān anekaśaḥ
english: O Brahmin, your question, born of a desire to benefit the world, is indeed excellent. I will now explain to you the numerous types of planetary periods (daśās) in detail.

sanskrit: दशाबहुविधास्तासु मुख्या विंशोत्तरी मता । कैश्चिदष्टोत्तरी कैश्चित् कथिता षोडशोत्तरी ॥३॥
transliteration: daśābahuvidhāstāsu mukhyā viṃśottarī matā . kaiścidaṣṭottarī kaiścit kathitā ṣoḍaśottarī.
separated_sandhi: daśāḥ bahuvidhāḥ tāsu mukhyā viṃśottarī matā |kaiścit aṣṭottarī kaiścit kathitā ṣoḍaśottarī
english: There are many types of planetary periods (daśās). Among these, Viṃśottarī is considered the most important. Some authorities speak of Aṣṭottarī, while others refer to Ṣoḍaśottarī.

sanskrit: द्वादशाब्दोत्तरी विप्र दशा पञ्चोत्तरी तथा । दशा शतसमा तद्वत् चतुराशीतिवत्सरा ॥४॥
transliteration: dvādaśābdottarī vipra daśā pañcottarī tathā . daśā śatasamā tadvat caturāśītivatsarā.
separated_sandhi: dvādaśābdottarī vipra daśā pañcottarī tathā| daśā śatasamā tadvat caturāśītivatsarā
english: O Brahmin, there are also the Dvādaśābdottarī daśā and Pañcottarī daśā. Similarly, there are the Śatasamā daśā and Caturāśītivatsarā daśā systems.

sanskrit: द्विसप्ततिसमा षष्टिसमा षड्त्रिंशवत्सरा । नक्षत्राधारिकाश्चेताः कथिताः पूर्वसूरिभिः ॥५॥
transliteration: dvisaptatisamā ṣaṣṭisamā ṣaḍtriṃśavatsarā . nakṣatrādhārikāścetāḥ kathitāḥ pūrvasūribhiḥ.
separated_sandhi: dvisaptatisamā ṣaṣṭisamā ṣaṭtriṃśavatsarā |nakṣatrādhārikāḥ ca etāḥ kathitāḥ pūrvasūribhiḥ
english: There are also the Dvisaptatisamā, Ṣaṣṭisamā, and Ṣaṭtriṃśavatsarā daśās. All these (daśā systems) are said by the ancient sages to be based on lunar mansions (nakṣatras).

sanskrit: अथा कालदशा चक्रदशा प्रोक्ता मुनीश्वरैः । कालचक्रदशा चाऽया मान्यासर्वदशासु या ॥६॥
transliteration: athā kāladaśā cakradaśā proktā munīśvaraiḥ . kālacakradaśā cā'yā mānyāsarvadaśāsu yā.
separated_sandhi: athā kāladashā cakradaśā proktā munīśvaraiḥkālacakradaśā ca ayā mānyā sarvadaśāsu yā
english: Now, the great sages (munīśvara) have explained the Kāladashā and the Cakradashā. This Kālacaka dasha, in particular, is considered authoritative among all dasha systems.

sanskrit: दशाऽथ चरपर्याया स्थिराख्या च दशा द्विज । केन्द्राद्य च दशा ज्ञेया कारकादिग्रहोद्भवा ॥७॥
transliteration: daśā'tha caraparyāyā sthirākhyā ca daśā dvija . kendrādya ca daśā jñeyā kārakādigrahodbhavā.
separated_sandhi: dashā atha caraparyāyā sthirākhyā ca dashā dvijakendrādyā ca dashā jñeyā kārakādigrahoḍbhavā
english: O dvija (twice-born)! Furthermore, there is the Caraparyāya dasha and the Sthirākhyā dasha. Also, the Kendrādyā dasha should be understood as originating from the significator (kāraka) planets and others.

sanskrit: ब्रह्मग्रहाश्रितर्क्षाद्या दशा प्रोक्ता तु केनचित् । माण्डूकी च दशा नाम तथा स्थूलदशा स्मृता ॥८॥
transliteration: brahmagrahāśritarkṣādyā daśā proktā tu kenacit . māṇḍūkī ca daśā nāma tathā sthūladaśā smṛtā.
separated_sandhi: brahmagrahāśritarkṣādyā dashā proktā tu kenacitmāṇḍūkī ca dashā nāma tathā sthūladashā smṛtā
english: Moreover, a dasha system called Brahmagrahāśritarkṣādyā (starting from the sign occupied by Brahmagraha) is declared by some. Similarly, the Māṇḍūkī dasha and the Sthūladashā are also mentioned.

sanskrit: योगार्धजदशा विप्र दृग्दशा च ततः परम् । त्रिकोणाख्या दशा नाम तथा राशिदशा स्मृता ॥९॥
transliteration: yogārdhajadaśā vipra dṛgdaśā ca tataḥ param . trikoṇākhyā daśā nāma tathā rāśidaśā smṛtā.
separated_sandhi: yogārdhajadashā vipra dṛgdaśā ca tataḥ paramtrikoṇākhyā dashā nāma tathā rāśidashā smṛtā
english: O vipra (Brahmana)! Following these, there is the Yogārdhajadashā and the Dṛgdaśā. Similarly, the Trikoṇākhyā dasha, and the Rāśidashā are mentioned.

sanskrit: पञ्चस्वरदशा विप्र विज्ञेया योगिनीदशा । दशा पैण्डी तथांशी च नैसर्गिकदशा तथा ॥१०॥
transliteration: pañcasvaradaśā vipra vijñeyā yoginīdaśā . daśā paiṇḍī tathāṃśī ca naisargikadaśā tathā.
separated_sandhi: pañcasvaradashā vipra vijñeyā yoginīdashā dashāpaiṇḍī tathā aṃśī ca naisargikadashā tathā
english: O vipra (Brahmana)! The Pañcasvaradashā and the Yoginīdashā should be known. There are also the Paiṇḍī dasha, the Aṃśī dasha, and similarly, the Naisargikadashā.

sanskrit: अष्टवर्गदश सन्ध्यादसा पाचकसंज्ञिका । अन्यास्तारादशाद्याश्च न स्वर्गाः सर्वसम्मताः ॥११॥
transliteration: aṣṭavargadaśa sandhyādasā pācakasaṃjñikā . anyāstārādaśādyāśca na svargāḥ sarvasammatāḥ.
separated_sandhi: aṣṭavargadaśa sandhyādasa pācakasaṃjñikāanyāḥ tārādaśādyāḥ ca na svargāḥ sarvasammatāḥ
english: The "aṣṭavarga daśā", "sandhyā daśā", and the one known as "pācaka daśā", along with other types like "tārā daśā" and so on, are not all universally accepted by authorities.

sanskrit: कृत्तिकातः समारभ्य त्रिरावृत्य दशाधिपाः । आचंकुरागुशबुकेशुपूर्वा विहगाः क्रमात् ॥१२॥
transliteration: kṛttikātaḥ samārabhya trirāvṛtya daśādhipāḥ . ācaṃkurāguśabukeśupūrvā vihagāḥ kramāt.
separated_sandhi: kṛttikātaḥ samārabhya trirāvṛtya daśādhipāḥācaṅkurāguśabukeśupūrvā vihagāḥ kramāt
english: Starting from the "Kṛttikā" "nakṣatra", and repeating the cycle three times, the lords of the "daśās" are the planets, in sequence, following the order indicated by "ācaṅkurāguśabukeśupūrvā" (Sun, Moon, Mars, Rahu, Jupiter, Saturn, Mercury, Ketu, Venus).

sanskrit: वह्निभाज्जन्मभं यावद् या संख्या नवतष्टिता । शेषाद्दशाधिपो ज्ञेयस्तमारभ्य दशां नयेत् ॥१३॥
transliteration: vahnibhājjanmabhaṃ yāvad yā saṃkhyā navataṣṭitā . śeṣāddaśādhipo jñeyastamārabhya daśāṃ nayet.
separated_sandhi: vahnibhāt janmabham yāvat yā saṃkhyā navataṣṭitāśeṣāt daśādhipaḥ jñeyaḥ tam ārabhya daśām nayet
english: The number of "nakṣatras" counted from "Kṛttikā" (the fire-star) up to the birth "nakṣatra" should be divided by nine. From the remainder (obtained from this division), the "daśā" lord is to be determined, and starting with that lord, one should proceed with the "daśā" calculation.

sanskrit: विंशोत्तरशतं पूर्णमायुः पूर्वमुदाहृतम् । कलै विंशोत्तरी तस्माद् दशा मुख्या द्विजोत्तम ॥१४॥
transliteration: viṃśottaraśataṃ pūrṇamāyuḥ pūrvamudāhṛtam . kalai viṃśottarī tasmād daśā mukhyā dvijottama.
separated_sandhi: viṃśottaraśatam pūrṇam āyuḥ pūrvam udāhṛtamkalai viṃśottarī tasmāt daśā mukhyā dvijottama
english: A full lifespan of one hundred and twenty years has been previously mentioned. Therefore, O best among the twice-born (dvijottama), the "Vimśottarī daśā", calculated by its divisions, is considered the principal one.

sanskrit: दशासमाः क्रमादेषां षड् दशाऽश्वा गजेन्दवः । नृपाला नवचन्द्राश्च नवचन्द्रा नगा नखाः ॥१५॥
transliteration: daśāsamāḥ kramādeṣāṃ ṣaḍ daśā'śvā gajendavaḥ . nṛpālā navacandrāśca navacandrā nagā nakhāḥ.
separated_sandhi: daśāsamāḥ kramāt eṣām ṣaṭ daśā aśvā gajendavaḥnṛpālā navacandrā ca navacandrā nagā nakhāḥ
english: The years for these "daśās", in sequence, are: six, ten, seven, eighteen, sixteen, nineteen, nineteen, seven, and twenty (corresponding to Sun, Moon, Mars, Rahu, Jupiter, Saturn, Mercury, Ketu, and Venus, respectively).

sanskrit: दशामनां भयातघ्नं भभोगेन हृतं फलम् । दशाया भुक्तवर्षाद्य भोग्यं मानाद् विशोधितम् ॥१६॥
transliteration: daśāmanāṃ bhayātaghnaṃ bhabhogena hṛtaṃ phalam . daśāyā bhuktavarṣādya bhogyaṃ mānād viśodhitam.
separated_sandhi: daśāmanām bhayātaghnam bhābhogena hṛtam phalamdaśāyāḥ bhuktavarṣādyam bhogyam mānāt viśodhitam
english: The result, obtained by multiplying the total measure of a planetary period (daśāmanā) by the elapsed portion of the natal lunar mansion (bhayāt) and then dividing by the total duration of that lunar mansion (bhābhoga), gives the elapsed years and other units of the planetary period. The remaining duration of the planetary period (daśā) is then calculated by subtracting these elapsed years from the total measure (māna) of the planetary period.

sanskrit: लग्नेशात् केन्द्रकोणस्थे राहौ लग्नं विना स्थिते । अष्टोत्तरी दशा विप्र विज्ञेया रौद्रभादितः ॥१७॥
transliteration: lagneśāt kendrakoṇasthe rāhau lagnaṃ vinā sthite . aṣṭottarī daśā vipra vijñeyā raudrabhāditaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagneśāt kendrakoṇasthe rāhau lagnaṃ vinā sthiteaṣṭottarī daśā vipra vijñeyā raudrabhāditaḥ
english: O Brahmin (vipra), the Aṣṭottarī planetary period (daśā) system should be understood (vijñeyā) as applicable when the shadowy planet Rahu is situated (sthite) in a quadrant (kendra) or a trine (koṇa) house from the lord of the ascendant, provided Rahu itself is not in the ascendant (lagnaṃ vinā). In this system, the calculation begins from the Raudra (Ārdrā) lunar mansion.

sanskrit: चतुष्कं त्रितयं तस्मात् चतुष्कं त्रितयं पुनः । एवं स्वजन्मभं यावद् विगणय्य यथाक्रमम् ॥१८॥
transliteration: catuṣkaṃ tritayaṃ tasmāt catuṣkaṃ tritayaṃ punaḥ . evaṃ svajanmabhaṃ yāvad vigaṇayya yathākramam.
separated_sandhi: catuṣkam tritayam tasmāt catuṣkam tritayam punaḥevaṃ svajanmabham yāvat vigaṇayya yathākramam
english: Thus, commencing from that point, count four lunar mansions (nakṣatras), then three, then again four, and then three, and so on, in due order (yathākramam), until your own natal lunar mansion (svajanmabha) is reached.

sanskrit: सूर्यश्चन्द्रः कुजः सौम्यः शनिर्जीवस्तमो भृगुः । एते दशाधिपा विप्र ज्ञेयाः केतुं विना ग्रहाः ॥१९॥
transliteration: sūryaścandraḥ kujaḥ saumyaḥ śanirjīvastamo bhṛguḥ . ete daśādhipā vipra jñeyāḥ ketuṃ vinā grahāḥ.
separated_sandhi: sūryaḥ candraḥ kujaḥ saumyaḥ śaniḥ jīvaḥ tamaḥbhṛguḥ ete daśādhipāḥ vipra jñeyāḥ ketuṃ vinā grahāḥ
english: O Brahmin (vipra), these planets - the Sun, Moon, Mars, Mercury, Saturn, Jupiter, Rahu, and Venus - should be known (jñeyāḥ) as the lords of the planetary periods (daśādhipāḥ), excluding Ketu (ketuṃ vinā).

sanskrit: रसाः पञ्चेन्दवो नागाः सप्तचन्द्राश्च खेन्दवः । गोऽब्जाः सूर्याः कुनेत्राश्च रव्यादीनां दशासमाः ॥२०॥
transliteration: rasāḥ pañcendavo nāgāḥ saptacandrāśca khendavaḥ . go'bjāḥ sūryāḥ kunetrāśca ravyādīnāṃ daśāsamāḥ.
separated_sandhi: rasāḥ pañcendavaḥ nāgāḥ saptacandrāḥ ca khendavaḥgo abjāḥ sūryāḥ kunetrāḥ ca ravyādīnām daśāsamāḥ
english: The years for the planetary periods (daśāsamāḥ) of the Sun and others are: six (rasāḥ) for the Sun, fifteen (pañcendavaḥ) for the Moon, eight (nāgāḥ) for Mars, seventeen (saptacandrāḥ) for Mercury, ten (khendavaḥ) for Saturn, nineteen (go'bjāḥ) for Jupiter, twelve (sūryāḥ) for Rahu, and twenty-one (kunetrāḥ) for Venus.

sanskrit: दशाब्दांघ्रिश्च पापानां शुभानां त्र्यंश एव हि । एकैकभे दशामानं विज्ञेयं द्विजसत्तम ॥२१॥
transliteration: daśābdāṃghriśca pāpānāṃ śubhānāṃ tryaṃśa eva hi . ekaikabhe daśāmānaṃ vijñeyaṃ dvijasattama.
separated_sandhi: daśābdāṅghriḥ ca pāpānām śubhānām tryaṃśaḥ evahi ekaikabhe daśāmānam vijñeyam dvijasattama
english: O best among the twice-born (dvija), it should be understood that the measure of the planetary period (daśā) in each sign is two and a half years for malefic planets, and indeed one-third of ten years (three years and four months) for benefic planets.

sanskrit: ततस्तद्यातभोगाध्यां भुक्तं भोग्यं च साधयेत् । विंशोत्तरीवदेवात्र ततस्तत्फलमादिशेत् ॥२२॥
transliteration: tatastadyātabhogādhyāṃ bhuktaṃ bhogyaṃ ca sādhayet . viṃśottarīvadevātra tatastatphalamādiśet.
separated_sandhi: tataḥ tat yātabhogādhyām bhuktam bhogyam ca sādhayetviṃśottarīvat eva atra tataḥ tat phalam ādiśet
english: Then, from that (daśā duration), one should calculate the elapsed portion (bhuktam) and the remaining portion (bhogyam) according to the elapsed planetary period (yātabhogādhyā). Just as in the Viṃśottarī system, one should then declare the results (phala) of that (daśā).

sanskrit: कृष्णपक्षे दिवा जन्म शुक्लपक्षे तथा निशि । तदा ह्यष्टोत्तरी चिन्त्या फलार्थञ्च विशेषतः ॥२३॥
transliteration: kṛṣṇapakṣe divā janma śuklapakṣe tathā niśi . tadā hyaṣṭottarī cintyā phalārthañca viśeṣataḥ.
separated_sandhi: kṛṣṇapakṣe divā janma śuklapakṣe tathā niśi tadāhi aṣṭottarī cintyā phalārtham ca viśeṣataḥ
english: If a birth occurs during the day in the dark fortnight (kṛṣṇapakṣa), or similarly at night in the bright fortnight (śuklapakṣa), then indeed the Aṣṭottarī (dasha system) should be particularly considered for the purpose of (predicting) results (phala).

sanskrit: चन्द्रहोरागते कृष्णे सूर्यहोरागते सिती । लग्ने नृणां फलज्ञप्त्यै विचिन्त्या षोडशोत्तरी ॥२४॥
transliteration: candrahorāgate kṛṣṇe sūryahorāgate sitī . lagne nṛṇāṃ phalajñaptyai vicintyā ṣoḍaśottarī.
separated_sandhi: candrahorāgate kṛṣṇe sūryahorāgate site lagnenṛṇām phalajñaptyai vicintyā ṣoḍaśottarī
english: For the purpose of understanding the results (phala) for people, the Ṣoḍaśottarī (dasha system) should be particularly considered when the ascendant (lagna) falls in the Moon's hora during the dark fortnight (kṛṣṇa pakṣa), or when it falls in the Sun's hora during the bright fortnight (śukla pakṣa).

sanskrit: पुष्यभाज्जन्मभं यावद् या संख्या गजतष्टिता । रविर्भौमो गुरुर्मन्दः केतुश्चन्द्रो बुधो भृगुः ॥२५॥
transliteration: puṣyabhājjanmabhaṃ yāvad yā saṃkhyā gajataṣṭitā . ravirbhaumo gururmandaḥ ketuścandro budho bhṛguḥ.
separated_sandhi: puṣyabhāt janmabham yāvat yā saṃkhyā gaja taṣṭitāraviḥ bhaumaḥ guruḥ mandaḥ ketuḥ candraḥ budhaḥ bhṛguḥ
english: The number of constellations from Puṣya up to the birth constellation (janmabha), when divided by eight (gaja), indicates the sequence of planetary lords (for a specific daśā system): Sun (Ravi), Mars (Bhauma), Jupiter (Guru), Saturn (Manda), Ketu, Moon (Candra), Mercury (Budha), (and) Venus (Bhṛgu).

sanskrit: इति क्रमाद् दशाधीशाः ज्ञेया राहुं विना ग्रहाः । रुद्राद्येकोत्तराः संख्या धृत्यन्तं वत्सराः क्रमात् ॥२६॥
transliteration: iti kramād daśādhīśāḥ jñeyā rāhuṃ vinā grahāḥ . rudrādyekottarāḥ saṃkhyā dhṛtyantaṃ vatsarāḥ kramāt.
separated_sandhi: iti kramāt daśādhīśāḥ jñeyāḥ rāhum vinā grahāḥrudrāt ekottarāḥ saṃkhyā dhṛti antam vatsarāḥ kramāt
english: Thus, the lords of the planetary periods (dashā) should be understood as the planets excluding Rāhu. Their years are successively assigned, starting from eleven (Rudra) and increasing by one up to eighteen (Dhṛti).

sanskrit: शुक्रांशके प्रजातस्य विचिन्त्या द्वादशोत्तरी । जन्मभात् पौष्णभं यावत् संख्या हि वसुतष्टिता ॥२७॥
transliteration: śukrāṃśake prajātasya vicintyā dvādaśottarī . janmabhāt pauṣṇabhaṃ yāvat saṃkhyā hi vasutaṣṭitā.
