separated_sandhi: śukra aṃśake prajātasya vicintyā dvādaśottarījanmabhāt pauṣṇabham yāvat saṃkhyā hi vasutaṣṭitā
english: For a person born in the navamsha (a divisional chart) ruled by Venus, the Dvādaśottarī (dashā) system should be applied. The number of asterisms from the birth asterism up to Revati (pauṣṇabhaṃ) should be determined and then indeed divided by eight (vasu).

sanskrit: सूर्यो गुरुः शिखी ज्ञोऽगुः कुजो मन्दो निशाकरः । विना शुक्रं दशाधीशा द्विचयात् सप्ततः समाः ॥२८॥
transliteration: sūryo guruḥ śikhī jño'guḥ kujo mando niśākaraḥ . vinā śukraṃ daśādhīśā dvicayāt saptataḥ samāḥ.
separated_sandhi: sūryaḥ guruḥ śikhī jñaḥ aguḥ kujaḥ mandaḥ niśākaraḥvinā śukram daśādhīśāḥ dvicayāt saptataḥ samāḥ
english: The Sun, Jupiter, Ketu, Mercury, Rāhu, Mars, Saturn, and the Moon are the lords of the planetary periods (dashā), excluding Venus. Their respective years are determined from a principle involving the numbers two and seven.

sanskrit: अर्कांश कर्कलग्ने पञ्चोत्तरी मता । मित्रर्क्षाज्जन्मभं यावत् संख्या सप्तविभाजिता ॥२९॥
transliteration: arkāṃśa karkalagne pañcottarī matā . mitrarkṣājjanmabhaṃ yāvat saṃkhyā saptavibhājitā.
separated_sandhi: arka aṃśe karka lagne pañcottarī matā mitrarkṣātjanmabham yāvat saṃkhyā saptavibhājitā
english: If the ascendant (lagna) is Cancer and the native is born in the Sun's navamsha (arkaṃśa), then the Pañcottarī (dashā) system is considered applicable. The count of asterisms from the friendly asterism up to the birth asterism is then divided by seven.

sanskrit: एकादिशेषे विज्ञ्याः क्रमात्सप्तदशाधिपाः । रविर्ज्ञोऽर्कसुतो भौमः शुक्रश्चन्द्रो वृहस्पतिः ॥३०॥
transliteration: ekādiśeṣe vijñyāḥ kramātsaptadaśādhipāḥ . ravirjño'rkasuto bhaumaḥ śukraścandro vṛhaspatiḥ.
separated_sandhi: eka ādi śeṣe vijñeyāḥ kramāt saptadaśa adhipāḥ raviḥjñaḥ arkasutaḥ bhaumaḥ śukraḥ candraḥ bṛhaspatiḥ
english: When the remainder (from a specific calculation) is one, these seven planetary lords of the periods (dashā) should be understood in succession: Sun, Mercury, Saturn, Mars, Venus, Moon, and Jupiter.

sanskrit: एकोत्तराच्च विज्ञेया द्वादशाद्याः क्रमात्समाः । धृत्यन्ताः सप्तखेटानां राहुकेतू विना द्विज ॥३१॥
transliteration: ekottarācca vijñeyā dvādaśādyāḥ kramātsamāḥ . dhṛtyantāḥ saptakheṭānāṃ rāhuketū vinā dvija.
separated_sandhi: ekottarāt ca vijñeyā dvādaśādyāḥ kramāt samāḥdhṛtyantāḥ saptakheṭānām rāhuketū vinā dvija
english: O twice-born (dvija), the years (for the planetary periods) should be understood as beginning with twelve, increasing successively by one, and ending with eighteen (dhṛti), for the seven planets, excluding Rāhu and Ketu.

sanskrit: वर्गोत्तमगते लग्ने दशा चिन्त्या शताब्दिका । पौष्ण्भाज्जन्मपर्यन्तं गणयेत् सप्तभिर्भजेत् ॥३२॥
transliteration: vargottamagate lagne daśā cintyā śatābdikā . pauṣṇbhājjanmaparyantaṃ gaṇayet saptabhirbhajet.
separated_sandhi: vargottamagate lagne daśā cintyā śatābdikāpauṣṇabhāt janmaparyantam gaṇayet saptabhiḥ bhajet
english: When the Ascendant (lagna) is in vargottama, the hundred-year dasha should be considered. One should count from the star Revati (Pauṣṇa nakṣatra) up to the birth nakṣatra (janmabha) and divide (the count) by seven.

sanskrit: शेषाङ्के रवितो ज्ञेया दशा शतसमाह्वया । रविश्चन्द्रो भृगुर्ज्ञश्च जीवो भौमः शनिस्तथा ॥३३॥
transliteration: śeṣāṅke ravito jñeyā daśā śatasamāhvayā . raviścandro bhṛgurjñaśca jīvo bhaumaḥ śanistathā.
separated_sandhi: śeṣāṅke ravitaḥ jñeyā daśā śatasamāhvayā raviḥcandraḥ bhṛguḥ jñaḥ ca jīvaḥ bhaumaḥ śaniḥ tathā
english: Based on the remainder number (from the previous division), the hundred-year dasha should be understood as starting from the Sun. The Sun, Moon, Venus, Mercury, Jupiter, Mars, and Saturn are thus (the lords in order).

sanskrit: क्रमदेते दशाधीशा बाणा बाणा दिशो दश । नखा नखाः खरामाश्च समाज्ञेया द्विजोत्तम ॥३४॥
transliteration: kramadete daśādhīśā bāṇā bāṇā diśo daśa . nakhā nakhāḥ kharāmāśca samājñeyā dvijottama.
separated_sandhi: kramāt ete daśādhīśāḥ bāṇāḥ bāṇāḥ diśaḥ daśanakhāḥ nakhāḥ kharāmāḥ ca samāḥ jñeyāḥ dvijottama
english: O best among the twice-born (dvijottama), these are the successive lords of the (planetary) periods (dasha), and their years should be known as: five (bāṇāḥ), five (bāṇāḥ), ten (diśaḥ), ten (daśa), twenty (nakhāḥ), twenty (nakhāḥ), and thirty-three (kharāmāḥ) years.

sanskrit: कर्मेशे कर्मगे ज्ञेया चतुराशीतिका दशा । पवनाज्जन्मभं यावद् या सण्ख्या सप्तभाजिता ॥३५॥
transliteration: karmeśe karmage jñeyā caturāśītikā daśā . pavanājjanmabhaṃ yāvad yā saṇkhyā saptabhājitā.
separated_sandhi: karmeśe karmage jñeyā caturāśītikā daśāpavanāt janmabham yāvat yā saṅkhyā saptabhājitā
english: When the lord of the 10th house (karma bhāva) is situated in the 10th house, the eighty-four year dasha should be known. One should use the number obtained by counting from the star Svāti (Pāvana nakṣatra) up to the birth nakṣatra (janmabha) and then dividing that count by seven.

sanskrit: शेषे रवीन्दुभौमज्ञा गुरुशुक्रशनैश्चराः । दशाधीशाः क्रमादेषां ज्ञेया द्वादशवत्सराः ॥३६॥
transliteration: śeṣe ravīndubhaumajñā guruśukraśanaiścarāḥ . daśādhīśāḥ kramādeṣāṃ jñeyā dvādaśavatsarāḥ.
separated_sandhi: śeṣe ravīndubhaumajñāḥ guruśukraśanaiścarāḥdaśādhīśāḥ kramāt eṣām jñeyā dvādaśavatsarāḥ
english: The remaining planets, namely the Sun, Moon, Mars, Mercury, Jupiter, Venus, and Saturn, are, in order, the lords of the Daśās. Their Daśās are understood to be of twelve years.

sanskrit: मूलाज्जन्मर्क्षपर्यन्तं गणयेदष्टभिर्भजेत् । शेषाद्दशाधीपा ज्न्`एया अष्टौ रव्यादयः क्रमात् ॥३७॥
transliteration: mūlājjanmarkṣaparyantaṃ gaṇayedaṣṭabhirbhajet . śeṣāddaśādhīpā jn`eyā aṣṭau ravyādayaḥ kramāt.
separated_sandhi: mūlāt janmarkṣaparyantam gaṇayet aṣṭabhiḥ bhajetśeṣāt daśādhīpāḥ jñeyā aṣṭau ravyādayaḥ kramāt
english: One should count from the Mūla (root asterism) up to the birth star (janmarkṣa) and divide (the count) by eight. From the remainder (obtained), the eight lords of the Daśās, beginning with the Sun, are to be understood in proper sequence (kramāt).

sanskrit: नव वर्षाणि सर्वेषां विकेतूनां नभःसदाम् । लग्नेशे सप्तमे यस्य लग्ने वा सप्तमाधिपे ॥३८॥
transliteration: nava varṣāṇi sarveṣāṃ viketūnāṃ nabhaḥsadām . lagneśe saptame yasya lagne vā saptamādhipe.
separated_sandhi: nava varṣāṇi sarveṣām viketūnām nabhaḥsadāmlagneśe saptame yasya lagne vā saptamādhipe
english: For all the planets, excluding Ketu, who reside in the sky (nabhaḥsadām), their (Daśās are) nine years. For the person whose Lagna (ascendant) lord is in the seventh house, or whose seventh house lord is in the Lagna (ascendant)...

sanskrit: चिन्तनीया दशा तस्य द्विसप्ततिसमाह्वया । विंशोत्तरीवदत्राऽपि भुक्तं भोग्यं च साधयेत् ॥३९॥
transliteration: cintanīyā daśā tasya dvisaptatisamāhvayā . viṃśottarīvadatrā'pi bhuktaṃ bhogyaṃ ca sādhayet.
separated_sandhi: cintanīyā daśā tasya dvisaptatisamāhvayāviṃśottarīvat atra api bhuktam bhogyam ca sādhayet
english: His Daśā should be considered as the one called 'seventy-two years'. Here also, just like in Vimśottarī (Daśā), one should calculate both the elapsed and the remaining portions.

sanskrit: यदार्को लग्नराशिस्थश्चिन्त्या षष्टिसमा तदा । दास्रात् त्रयं चतुष्कं च त्रयं चेति पुनः पुनः ॥४०॥
transliteration: yadārko lagnarāśisthaścintyā ṣaṣṭisamā tadā . dāsrāt trayaṃ catuṣkaṃ ca trayaṃ ceti punaḥ punaḥ.
separated_sandhi: yadā arkaḥ lagnerāśisthaḥ cintyā ṣaṣṭisamā tadādāsrāt trayam catuṣkam ca trayam ca iti punaḥ punaḥ
english: When the Sun (arka) is situated in the Lagna (ascendant) sign, then a Daśā of sixty years should be considered. From Daśra (Aśvinī nakṣatra), (one counts) three, then four, and again three (nakṣatras), in such a manner repeatedly (for assigning Daśā lords).

sanskrit: गुर्वर्कभूसुतानां च दशा दश दशाब्दकाः । ततः शशिज्ञशुक्रार्कपुत्रागूनां रसाब्दकाः ॥४१॥
transliteration: gurvarkabhūsutānāṃ ca daśā daśa daśābdakāḥ . tataḥ śaśijñaśukrārkaputrāgūnāṃ rasābdakāḥ.
separated_sandhi: gurvarkabhū-sutānām ca daśā daśa daśābdakāḥ| tataḥ śaśijñaśukrārkaputrāgūnām rasābdakāḥ
english: The planetary periods (daśā) for Jupiter, the Sun, and Mars are each ten years. Thereafter, the periods for the Moon, Mercury, Venus, Saturn, and Rāhu are each six years.

sanskrit: श्रवणाज्जन्मभं यावत् संख्या वसुविभाजिता । शेषे चन्द्ररवीज्यारबुधार्किभृगुराहवः ॥४२॥
transliteration: śravaṇājjanmabhaṃ yāvat saṃkhyā vasuvibhājitā . śeṣe candraravījyārabudhārkibhṛgurāhavaḥ.
separated_sandhi: śravaṇāt janmabham yāvat saṃkhyā vasuvibhājitā| śeṣe candraravījyārabhudhārkibhṛgurāhavaḥ
english: The count of nakṣatras from Śravaṇa up to the birth nakṣatra, when divided by eight (vasu), determines the remainder. In this remainder, the planetary lords are, in order: the Moon, Sun, Jupiter, Mars, Mercury, Saturn, Venus, and Rāhu.

sanskrit: क्रमाद्दशाधिपास्तेषामेकाद्येकोत्तराः समा । लग्ने दिनेऽर्कहोरायां चन्द्रहोरागते निशि ॥४३॥
transliteration: kramāddaśādhipāsteṣāmekādyekottarāḥ samā . lagne dine'rkahorāyāṃ candrahorāgate niśi.
separated_sandhi: kramāt daśādhipāḥ teṣām ekādyekottarāḥ samāḥ |lagne dine arka-horāyām candra-horā-gate niśi
english: In sequence, the lords of those daśās have durations in years that begin with one and successively increase by one. This applies if the birth occurs in the ascendant (lagna) during the day in the Sun's planetary hour (horā), or at night when the Moon's planetary hour has commenced.

sanskrit: सूर्यस्याऽर्धास्तयः पूर्वं परस्तादूदयादपि । पञ्च पञ्च घटी सन्ध्या दशनाडी प्रकीर्तिता ॥४४॥
transliteration: sūryasyā'rdhāstayaḥ pūrvaṃ parastādūdayādapi . pañca pañca ghaṭī sandhyā daśanāḍī prakīrtitā.
separated_sandhi: sūryasya ardhāstayaḥ pūrvam parastāt udayāt api| pañca pañca ghaṭī sandhyā daśanāḍī prakīrtitā
english: The periods of twilight (sandhyā) are five "ghaṭīs" each, extending before the Sun's half-setting (sunset) and after its rising (sunrise). The total is declared as ten "nāḍīs".

sanskrit: सन्ध्याद्वयञ्च विंशत्या नाडिकाभिः प्रकीर्तितम् । दिनस्य विंशतिर्घट्यः पूर्णसंज्ञा उदाहृताः ॥४५॥
transliteration: sandhyādvayañca viṃśatyā nāḍikābhiḥ prakīrtitam . dinasya viṃśatirghaṭyaḥ pūrṇasaṃjñā udāhṛtāḥ.
separated_sandhi: sandhyādvayam ca viṃśatyā nāḍikābhiḥ prakīrtitam| dinasya viṃśatiḥ ghaṭyaḥ pūrṇasaṃjñāḥ udāhṛtāḥ
english: And the two periods of twilight (sandhyā) are declared to be twenty nāḍikās. Twenty "ghaṭīs" of the day are stated to be of the 'full' designation.

sanskrit: निशायाः मुग्धसंज्ञाश्च घटिका विंशतिश्च याः । सूर्योदये च या सन्ध्या खण्डाख्या द/सनाडिका ॥४६॥
transliteration: niśāyāḥ mugdhasaṃjñāśca ghaṭikā viṃśatiśca yāḥ . sūryodaye ca yā sandhyā khaṇḍākhyā da/sanāḍikā.
separated_sandhi: niśāyāḥ mugdhsaṃjñāḥ ca ghaṭikāḥ viṃśatiḥ ca yāḥsūryodaye ca yā sandhyā khaṇḍākhyā daśanāḍikā
english: The twenty ghaṭikās of the night are known as Mugdha-saṃjñā, and the Sandhya at sunrise, which is ten nāḍikās long, is called Khaṇḍa-ākhyā.

sanskrit: अस्तकाले च या सन्ध्या सुधाख्या दशनाडिका । पूर्णमुग्धघटीमाने द्विगुणे तिथिभिर्भजेत् ॥४७॥
transliteration: astakāle ca yā sandhyā sudhākhyā daśanāḍikā . pūrṇamugdhaghaṭīmāne dviguṇe tithibhirbhajet.
separated_sandhi: astakāle ca yā sandhyā sudhākhyā daśanāḍikāpūrṇamugdhaghaṭīmāne dviguṇe tithibhiḥ bhajet
english: Also, the Sandhya at the time of sunset, which is ten nāḍikās long, is named Sudhā. One should take the measure of the full Mugdha ghaṭikās, double it, and then divide it by the number of lunar days (tithis).

sanskrit: तथा खण्डसुधाघट्यौ चतुर्घ्ने तिथिभिर्भजेत् । लब्धं वर्षादिकं मानं सूर्यादीनां खचारिणाम् ॥४८॥
transliteration: tathā khaṇḍasudhāghaṭyau caturghne tithibhirbhajet . labdhaṃ varṣādikaṃ mānaṃ sūryādīnāṃ khacāriṇām.
separated_sandhi: tathā khaṇḍasudhāghaṭyau caturgne tithibhiḥ bhajetlabdham varṣādikam mānam sūryādīnām khacāriṇām
english: Similarly, one should multiply the ghaṭikās of both Khaṇḍa and Sudhā Sandhyas by four, and then divide that by the number of lunar days (tithis). The obtained result is the duration, starting with years, for the Sun and other celestial bodies (planets).

sanskrit: एकादिसंख्यया निघ्नं दशामानं पृथक् क्रमात् । राहुकेतुयुतानां च नवानां कालसंज्ञकम् ॥४९॥
transliteration: ekādisaṃkhyayā nighnaṃ daśāmānaṃ pṛthak kramāt . rāhuketuyutānāṃ ca navānāṃ kālasaṃjñakam.
separated_sandhi: ekādisaṃkhyayā nighnam daśāmānam pṛthak kramātrāhuketuyutānām ca navānām kālasaṃjñakam
english: The measure of the planetary period (daśā), named Kāla, for the nine celestial bodies (planets), including Rāhu and Ketu, is obtained separately and successively by multiplying (the previously derived base measure) by numbers starting from one.

sanskrit: रात्रौ लग्नाश्रिताद्राशेर्दिने लग्नेश्वराश्रिताम् । सन्ध्यायां वित्तभावस्थान्नेया चक्रदशा बुधैः ॥५०॥
transliteration: rātrau lagnāśritādrāśerdine lagneśvarāśritām . sandhyāyāṃ vittabhāvasthānneyā cakradaśā budhaiḥ.
separated_sandhi: rātrau lagnāśritāt rāśeḥ dine lagneśvarāśritāmsandhyāyām vittabhāvasthān neyā cakradaśā budhaiḥ
english: Astrologers (budhaiḥ) should determine the Cakradaśā: at night, it should be reckoned from the sign occupied by the ascendant; during the day, from the sign occupied by the lord of the ascendant; and during the twilight (sandhyā) period, from the planets situated in the second house (vittabhāva).

sanskrit: दशा वर्षाणि राशीनामेकैकस्य दशामितिः । क्रमाच्चक्रस्थितानाञ्च विज्ञातव्या द्विजोत्तम ॥५१॥
transliteration: daśā varṣāṇi rāśīnāmekaikasya daśāmitiḥ . kramāccakrasthitānāñca vijñātavyā dvijottama.
separated_sandhi: daśā varṣāṇi rāśīnām ekaikasya daśāmitiḥ |kramāt cakrasthitānām ca vijñātavyā dvijottama
english: O best among the twice-born (dvija), the duration of ten years for the daśā of each zodiac sign, and for those (planets) situated in the astrological wheel, should be understood sequentially.

sanskrit: अथाऽहं शङ्करं नत्वा कालचक्रदशां ब्रुवे । पार्वत्यै कथिता पूर्वं सादरं या पिनाकिना ॥५२॥
transliteration: athā'haṃ śaṅkaraṃ natvā kālacakradaśāṃ bruve . pārvatyai kathitā pūrvaṃ sādaraṃ yā pinākinā.
separated_sandhi: atha aham śaṅkaram natvā kālacakradaśām bruve| pārvatyai kathitā pūrvam sādaram yā pinākinā
english: Now, having bowed to Śaṅkara, I shall explain the kālacakra daśā, which was formerly respectfully narrated by Pinākī (Lord Shiva) to Pārvatī.

sanskrit: तस्याः सारं समुद्धृत्य तवाग्रे द्विजमन्दन । शुभाऽशुभं मनुष्याणां यथा जानन्ति पण्डिताः ॥५३॥
transliteration: tasyāḥ sāraṃ samuddhṛtya tavāgre dvijamandana . śubhā'śubhaṃ manuṣyāṇāṃ yathā jānanti paṇḍitāḥ.
separated_sandhi: tasyāḥ sāram samuddhṛtya tava agre dvijamandana |śubham aśubham manuṣyāṇām yathā jānanti paṇḍitāḥ
english: O delight of the twice-born (dvija), having extracted the essence of that (kālacakra daśā), I shall present it before you, so that scholars (paṇḍita) may understand the auspicious and inauspicious (results) for human beings.

sanskrit: द्वादशारं लिखेच्चक्रं तिर्यगूर्घ्वसमानकम् । गृहा द्वादश जायन्ते सव्येऽसव्ये द्विधा द्विज ॥५४॥
transliteration: dvādaśāraṃ likheccakraṃ tiryagūrghvasamānakam . gṛhā dvādaśa jāyante savye'savye dvidhā dvija.
separated_sandhi: dvādaśāram likhet cakram tiryak ūrdhva samānakam| gṛhāḥ dvādaśa jāyante savye asavye dvidhā dvija
english: One should draw a wheel (cakra) with twelve spokes (sections), making it equally divided horizontally and vertically. O twice-born (dvija), twelve houses (gṛha) are formed in two ways: clockwise and anti-clockwise.

sanskrit: द्वितीयादिषु कोष्ठेषु राशीन् मेषादिकान् लिखेत् । एवं द्वादशराश्याख्यं कालचक्रमुदीरितम् ॥५५॥
transliteration: dvitīyādiṣu koṣṭheṣu rāśīn meṣādikān likhet . evaṃ dvādaśarāśyākhyaṃ kālacakramudīritam.
separated_sandhi: dvitīyādiṣu koṣṭheṣu rāśīn meṣādikān likhet| evam dvādaśarāśyākhyam kālacakram udīritam
english: In the second and subsequent cells (koṣṭha), one should write the zodiac signs (rāśi) starting with Aries (Meṣa). In this way, the kālacakra (wheel of time) known as 'the twelve zodiac signs' is described.

sanskrit: अश्विन्यादित्रयं सव्यमार्गे चक्रे व्यवस्थितम् । रोहिण्यादित्रयं चैवमपसव्ये व्यविस्थितम् ॥५६॥
transliteration: aśvinyāditrayaṃ savyamārge cakre vyavasthitam . rohiṇyāditrayaṃ caivamapasavye vyavisthitam.
separated_sandhi: aśvinyāditrayam savyamārge cakre vyavasthitamrohiṇyāditrayam ca evam apasavye vyavisthitam
english: The group of three nakshatras beginning with Ashvinī is situated in the clockwise path within the celestial wheel. Similarly, the group of three nakshatras beginning with Rohiṇī is situated in the anti-clockwise path.

sanskrit: एवमृक्षविभागं हि कृत्वा चक्रं समुद्धरेत् । अश्विन्यदितिहस्तक्षेमूलप्रोष्ठपदाभिधाः ॥५७॥
transliteration: evamṛkṣavibhāgaṃ hi kṛtvā cakraṃ samuddharet . aśvinyaditihastakṣemūlaproṣṭhapadābhidhāḥ.
separated_sandhi: evam ṛkṣavibhāgam hi kṛtvā cakram samuddharetaśvinyaditihastakṣemūlaproṣṭhapadābhidhāḥ
english: Having thus made the division of the nakshatras, one should determine the celestial wheel. The names [of certain nakshatras] are Ashvinī, Aditi, Hasta, Kṣe, Mūla, and Proṣṭhapadā.

sanskrit: वह्निवातादिविश्वर्क्षरेवत्यः सव्यतारकाः । एतद्दशोषुपादानामश्विन्यादौ च वीक्षयेत् ॥५८॥
transliteration: vahnivātādiviśvarkṣarevatyaḥ savyatārakāḥ . etaddaśoṣupādānāmaśvinyādau ca vīkṣayet.
separated_sandhi: vahnivātādiviśvarṣarevatyaḥ savyatārakāḥetat daśoṣupādānām aśvinyādau ca vīkṣayet
english: Kṛttikā, Mṛgaśīrṣa and other constellations (including Uttarāṣāḍhā) and Revatī are considered the clockwise nakshatras. One should observe this for the tenfold divisions and quarters, starting from Ashvinī.

sanskrit: देहजीवौ कथं वीक्ष्यौ नक्षत्राणां पदेषु च । विशदं तत्प्रकारं च मैत्रेय कथयामयहम् ॥५९॥
transliteration: dehajīvau kathaṃ vīkṣyau nakṣatrāṇāṃ padeṣu ca . viśadaṃ tatprakāraṃ ca maitreya kathayāmayaham.
separated_sandhi: dehajīvau katham vīkṣyau nakṣatrāṇām padeṣu caviśadam tatprakāram ca maitreya kathayāmi aham
english: How are the body and the soul to be observed within the quarters of the nakshatras? O Maitreya, I shall clearly explain that method.

sanskrit: देहजीवौ मेषचापौ दास्राद्यचरणस्य च । मेषाद्याश्चापपर्यन्तं राशिपाश्च दशाधिपाः ॥६०॥
transliteration: dehajīvau meṣacāpau dāsrādyacaraṇasya ca . meṣādyāścāpaparyantaṃ rāśipāśca daśādhipāḥ.
separated_sandhi: dehajīvau meṣacāpau dāsrādyacaraṇasya cameṣādyāḥ cāpaparyantam rāśipāḥ ca daśādhipāḥ
english: For the first quarter of the Ashvinī nakshatra, the body is Aries and the soul is Sagittarius. From Aries up to Sagittarius, the lords of the zodiac signs are also the lords of the planetary periods.

sanskrit: मृगयुग्मे देहजीवौ द्वितीयचरणे स्मृतौ । क्रमात् मिथुनपर्यन्तं राशिपाश्च दशाधिपाः ॥६१॥
transliteration: mṛgayugme dehajīvau dvitīyacaraṇe smṛtau . kramāt mithunaparyantaṃ rāśipāśca daśādhipāḥ.
separated_sandhi: mṛgayugme dehajīvau dvitīyacaraṇe smṛtaukramāt mithunaparyantam rāśipāḥ ca daśādhipāḥ
english: For the second quarter, Deha (body) and Jiva (life) are assigned within the sign of Gemini (mithuna). Sequentially, up to Gemini, the lords of the zodiac signs become the lords of the planetary periods (dashas).

sanskrit: दास्रादिदशताराणां तृतीयचरणे द्विज । गौर्देहो मिथुनं जीवो द्व्येकार्केशदशाङ्कपाः ॥६२॥
transliteration: dāsrādidaśatārāṇāṃ tṛtīyacaraṇe dvija . gaurdeho mithunaṃ jīvo dvyekārkeśadaśāṅkapāḥ.
separated_sandhi: dāsra ādi daśa tārāṇām tṛtīyacaraṇe dvija gauḥdehaḥ mithunam jīvaḥ dvyaikārkeśa daśāṅkapāḥ
english: O twice-born one (dvija), for the third quarter of the ten nakshatras beginning with Ashvinī, Taurus (go) is considered the 'body' (deha) and Gemini (mithuna) is the 'life' (jīva). The lords of the planetary periods (dashas) are Venus (lord of the second sign), Mars (lord of the first sign), and the Sun, following this numerical sequence.

sanskrit: क्वक्षिरामर्क्षनाथाश्च दशाधिपतयः क्रमात् । अश्विन्यादिदशौडूनां चतुर्थचरणे तथा ॥६३॥
transliteration: kvakṣirāmarkṣanāthāśca daśādhipatayaḥ kramāt . aśvinyādidaśauḍūnāṃ caturthacaraṇe tathā.
separated_sandhi: kvakṣirāma r̥kṣanāthāḥ ca daśādhipatayaḥ kramātaśvinī ādi daśa ūḍūnām caturthacaraṇe tathā
english: Similarly, for the fourth quarter of the ten nakshatras beginning with Ashvinī, the planetary lords (Moon, Mars, Mercury) are considered the nakshatra lords and sequentially the lords of the planetary periods (dashas).

sanskrit: कर्कमीनौ देहजीवौ कर्कादिनवराशिपाः । दशाधीशाश्च विज्ञेया नवैते द्विजसत्तम ॥६४॥
transliteration: karkamīnau dehajīvau karkādinavarāśipāḥ . daśādhīśāśca vijñeyā navaite dvijasattama.
separated_sandhi: karka mīnau dehajīvau karka ādi nava rāśipāḥdaśādhīśāḥ ca vijñeyāḥ nava ete dvijasattama
english: O best among twice-born ones (dvijasattama), Cancer and Pisces are considered the 'body' (deha) and 'life' (jīva). These nine sign lords, beginning with Cancer, are to be known as the lords of the planetary periods (dashas).

sanskrit: यमेज्यचित्रातोयर्क्षाऽहीर्बुध्न्याः सव्यतारकाः । एतत्पञ्चोडुपादानां भरण्यादौ विचिन्तयेत् ॥६५॥
transliteration: yamejyacitrātoyarkṣā'hīrbudhnyāḥ savyatārakāḥ . etatpañcoḍupādānāṃ bharaṇyādau vicintayet.
separated_sandhi: yama ijya citrā toya r̥kṣa ahīrbudhnyāḥ savya tārakāḥetat pañca ūḍu pādānām bharaṇī ādau vicintayet
english: The auspicious nakshatras (tārakāḥ) are Bharani (signified by Yama), Punarvasu (signified by Ijya/Jupiter), Chitra, Purva Ashadha (the watery nakshatra, toyar̥kṣa), and Uttara Bhadrapada (signified by Ahīrbudhnya). One should consider these five, starting with Bharani, for their respective quarters.

sanskrit: याम्यप्रथमपादस्य देहजीवावलिर्झषः । नागागर्तुपयोधीषुरामाक्षीन्द्वर्कभेश्वराः ॥६६॥
transliteration: yāmyaprathamapādasya dehajīvāvalirjhaṣaḥ . nāgāgartupayodhīṣurāmākṣīndvarkabheśvarāḥ.
separated_sandhi: yāmya-prathama-pādasya deha-jīvāvaliḥ jhaṣaḥ nāgaaga ṛtu payodhi īṣu rāma akṣi indu arka bha-īśvarāḥ
english: For the first quarter of the Southern division, the body and life (dvādaśāṃśa) significators are Pisces. The lords of the (dvādaśāṃśa) divisions are represented by the signs corresponding to the numbers 8, 7, 6, 4, 5, 3, 2, 1, and 12.

sanskrit: याम्यद्वितीयपादस्य देहजीवौ घटाङ्गने । रुद्रदिङ्नन्दचन्द्राक्षिरामाब्धीष्वङ्गभेश्वराः ॥६७॥
transliteration: yāmyadvitīyapādasya dehajīvau ghaṭāṅgane . rudradiṅnandacandrākṣirāmābdhīṣvaṅgabheśvarāḥ.
separated_sandhi: yāmya-dvitīya-pādasya deha-jīvau ghaṭa aṅgane rudradik nanda candra akṣi rāma abdhi īṣu aṅga bha-īśvarāḥ
english: For the second quarter of the Southern division, the body and life (dvādaśāṃśa) significators are Aquarius and Virgo. The lords of the (dvādaśāṃśa) divisions are represented by the signs corresponding to the numbers 11, 10, 9, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, and 6.

sanskrit: याम्यतृतीयपादस्य देहजीवौ तुलाङ्गने । सप्ताष्टाङ्कदिगीशार्कगजाद्रिरमभेश्वराः ॥६८॥
transliteration: yāmyatṛtīyapādasya dehajīvau tulāṅgane . saptāṣṭāṅkadigīśārkagajādriramabheśvarāḥ.
separated_sandhi: yāmya-tṛtīya-pādasya deha-jīvau tulā aṅgane saptaaṣṭa aṅka dik īśa arka gaja adri rama bha-īśvarāḥ
english: For the third quarter of the Southern division, the body and life (dvādaśāṃśa) significators are Libra and Virgo. The lords of the (dvādaśāṃśa) divisions are represented by the signs corresponding to the numbers 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12, 8, 7, and 3.

sanskrit: कर्को देहो धनुर्जीवो याम्यतुर्यपदे द्विज । वेदबाणाग्निनेत्रेन्दुसूर्येशाशाङ्कभेश्वराः ॥६९॥
transliteration: karko deho dhanurjīvo yāmyaturyapade dvija . vedabāṇāgninetrendusūryeśāśāṅkabheśvarāḥ.
separated_sandhi: karkaḥ dehaḥ dhanuḥ jīvaḥ yāmya-turya-pade dvija vedabāṇa agni netra indu sūrya īśa aśaṅka bha-īśvarāḥ
english: O twice-born (dvija)! For the fourth quarter of the Southern division, Cancer is the body (dvādaśāṃśa) significator and Sagittarius is the life (dvādaśāṃśa) significator. The lords of the (dvādaśāṃśa) divisions are represented by the signs corresponding to the numbers 4, 5, 3, 2, 1, 12, 11, and 9.

sanskrit: सप्तमेवं विजानीयादसव्यं कथयाम्यहम् । द्वादशारां लिखेच्चकं पूर्ववद् द्विजसत्तम ॥७०॥
transliteration: saptamevaṃ vijānīyādasavyaṃ kathayāmyaham . dvādaśārāṃ likheccakaṃ pūrvavad dvijasattama.
separated_sandhi: saptama evam vijānīyāt asavyam kathayāmi ahamdvādaśā-ārām likhet cakram pūrva-vat dvija-sattama
english: Thus, one should understand the seventh (method/division). Now I will explain the anti-clockwise (asavya) method. O best among twice-born (dvija)! One should draw a twelve-spoked diagram as previously described.

sanskrit: द्वितीयादिषु कोष्ठेषु वृश्चिकाद् व्यस्तमालिखीत् । रोहिणी च मघा द्वीशः कर्णश्चेति चतुष्टयम् ॥७१॥
transliteration: dvitīyādiṣu koṣṭheṣu vṛścikād vyastamālikhīt . rohiṇī ca maghā dvīśaḥ karṇaśceti catuṣṭayam.
separated_sandhi: dvitīyādiṣu koṣṭheṣu vṛścikāt vyastam ālikhītrohiṇī ca maghā dvīśaḥ karṇaḥ ca iti catuṣṭayam
english: One should write them inversely, starting from Scorpio (Vṛścika), in the second and subsequent boxes. This quartet consists of Rohiṇī, Maghā, Dvīśa, and Karṇa.

sanskrit: उक्तं चाऽसव्यनाक्षत्रं पूर्वाचार्यैर्द्विजोत्तम । एतद्वेदोडुपादानां रोहिनीवन्निरीक्षयेत् ॥७२॥
transliteration: uktaṃ cā'savyanākṣatraṃ pūrvācāryairdvijottama . etadvedoḍupādānāṃ rohinīvannirīkṣayet.
separated_sandhi: uktam ca asavya-nākṣatram pūrvācāryaiḥ dvijottamaetat veda uḍu upādānāṃ rohiṇīvat nirīkṣayet
english: O best among the twice-born (dvija)! The anti-clockwise nakṣatra (lunar mansion) system has been declared by the ancient teachers. One should observe this for the foundational principles of the Vedas and the nakṣatras, just as (one observes) Rohiṇī.

sanskrit: रोहिण्यादिपदे देहजीवौ कर्किधनुर्धरौ । नवदिग्रुद्रसूर्येन्दुनेत्राग्नोष्वब्धिभेश्वराः ॥७३॥
transliteration: rohiṇyādipade dehajīvau karkidhanurdharau . navadigrudrasūryendunetrāgnoṣvabdhibheśvarāḥ.
separated_sandhi: rohiṇī-ādi-pade deha-jīvau karki-dhanurdharaunava-dik-rudra-sūrya-indu-netra-agni-oṣu-abdhi-bha-īśvarāḥ
english: In the divisions (pada) starting from Rohiṇī (nakṣatra), "deha" (body) and "jīva" (life-force) correspond to Cancer and Sagittarius. The lords are the nine (Nava), the ten (Dik), the eleven (Rudra), the twelve (Sūrya), the one (Indu), the two (Netra), the three (Agni), Oṣu, the four (Abdhi), and Bha (stars).

sanskrit: धातृद्वितीचरणे देहजीवौ तुलस्त्रियौ । अङ्कागवसुसूर्येशदिगङ्कवसुजूकपाः ॥७४॥
transliteration: dhātṛdvitīcaraṇe dehajīvau tulastriyau . aṅkāgavasusūryeśadigaṅkavasujūkapāḥ.
separated_sandhi: dhātṛ-dvitīya-caraṇe deha-jīvau tulā-striyauaṅka-aga-vasu-sūrya-īśa-dik-aṅka-vasu-jūka-pāḥ
english: In the second division (caraṇa) of Dhātṛ (nakṣatra), "deha" (body) and "jīva" (life-force) correspond to Libra and Virgo. The rulers (pā) are the nine (Aṅka), the seven (Aga), the eight (Vasu), the twelve (Sūrya), the eleven (Īśa), the ten (Dik), the nine (Aṅka), the eight (Vasu), and Jūka (Libra or seven).

sanskrit: तृतीयचरणे ब्राह्म दीहजीवौ घटाङ्गने । षड्बाणब्धिगुणक्षीन्दुनन्ददिग्रुद्रभेश्वराः ॥७५॥
transliteration: tṛtīyacaraṇe brāhma dīhajīvau ghaṭāṅgane . ṣaḍbāṇabdhiguṇakṣīndunandadigrudrabheśvarāḥ.
separated_sandhi: tṛtīya-caraṇe brāhma deha-jīvau ghaṭa-aṅganeṣaṭ-bāṇa-abdhi-guṇa-kṣī-indu-nanda-dik-rudra-bha-īśvarāḥ
english: In the third division (caraṇa) pertaining to Brāhma (nakṣatra), "deha" (body) and "jīva" (life-force) correspond to Aquarius and Virgo. The lords (īśvara) are the six (Ṣaṭ), the five (Bāṇa), the four (Abdhi), the three (Guṇa), Kṣī (zero/earth), the one (Indu), the nine (Nanda), the ten (Dik), the eleven (Rudra), and Bha (stars).

sanskrit: रोहिण्यन्तपदे देहजीवावलिजषौ स्मृतौ । सूर्येन्दुद्विगुणेष्वब्धितर्कशैलाष्टभेश्वराः ॥७६॥
transliteration: rohiṇyantapade dehajīvāvalijaṣau smṛtau . sūryendudviguṇeṣvabdhitarkaśailāṣṭabheśvarāḥ.
separated_sandhi: rohiṇyantapade dehajīvāvalijaṣau smṛtausūryendu-dviguṇeṣu abdhī-tarka-śailāṣṭabheśvarāḥ
english: In the last quarter of Rohini, the body (deha) and life-principle (jīva) are designated as Avali and Pisces (jaṣa). The lords [of divisions] are determined by doubling the positions of the Sun and Moon, and by the lords of the 4th, 6th, 7th, 8th signs (bha).

sanskrit: चान्द्ररौद्रभगार्यम्णमित्रेन्दुवसुवारुणम् । एतत्ताराष्टकं विज्ञैर्विज्ञेयं चान्द्रवत् क्रमात् ॥७७॥
transliteration: cāndraraudrabhagāryamṇamitrenduvasuvāruṇam . etattārāṣṭakaṃ vijñairvijñeyaṃ cāndravat kramāt.
separated_sandhi: cāndra-raudra-bhāgāryamṇa-mitrendu-vasu-vāruṇametat tārāṣṭakam vijñaiḥ vijñeyam cāndravat kramāt
english: This group of eight nakṣatras - Rohini (cāndra), Ardra (raudra), Pūrva Phalgunī (bhāga), Uttara Phalgunī (aryamṇa), Anuradha (mitra), Mūla (indu), Dhanishṭhā (vasu), and Śatabhiṣā (vāruṇa) - should be understood by experts sequentially, similar to [the calculation of] the Moon.

sanskrit: कर्को देहो झषो जीवो मृगाद्यचरणे द्विज । व्यस्तान्मीनादिकर्कान्तराशिपाश्च दशाधिपाः ॥७८॥
transliteration: karko deho jhaṣo jīvo mṛgādyacaraṇe dvija . vyastānmīnādikarkāntarāśipāśca daśādhipāḥ.
separated_sandhi: karkaḥ dehaḥ jhaṣaḥ jīvaḥ mṛgādya-caraṇe dvijavyastāt mīnādi-karkānta-rāśipāḥ ca daśādhipāḥ
english: O twice-born (dvija), in the first quarter of Capricorn, the sign Cancer is considered the body (deha), and Pisces (jaṣa) is considered the soul (jīva). The lords of the signs from Pisces to Cancer, taken in reverse order, are also the lords of the Dasha periods.

sanskrit: गौर्देहो मिथुनं जीवो द्वितीयचरणे मृगे । त्रिद्व्येकाङ्कदिशीशार्कचन्द्राक्षिभवनाधिपाः ॥७९॥
transliteration: gaurdeho mithunaṃ jīvo dvitīyacaraṇe mṛge . tridvyekāṅkadiśīśārkacandrākṣibhavanādhipāḥ.
separated_sandhi: gauḥ dehaḥ mithunam jīvaḥ dvitīya-caraṇe mṛgetridvyekāṅkadiśīśārkacandrākṣibhavanādhipāḥ
english: When in the second quarter of Capricorn (mṛga), Taurus (gauḥ) is considered the body (deha) and Gemini is the soul (jīva). The lords of the houses (bhavana) corresponding to the numbers three, two, one, nine, ten, eleven, twelve, one, and two are the Dasha lords.

sanskrit: देहजीवौ नक्रयुग्मे तृतीयचरणे मृगे । त्रिबाणाब्धिरसागाष्टसूर्येशदशभेश्वराः ॥८०॥
transliteration: dehajīvau nakrayugme tṛtīyacaraṇe mṛge . tribāṇābdhirasāgāṣṭasūryeśadaśabheśvarāḥ.
separated_sandhi: dehajīvau nakrayugme tṛtīya-caraṇe mṛgetribāṇābdhirasāgāṣṭasūryeśadaśabheśvarāḥ
english: When in the third quarter of Capricorn (mṛga), the body (deha) and soul (jīva) are [assigned to] the pair of Capricorn (nakra). The lords of the signs (bha) corresponding to the numbers three, five, four, six, seven, eight, twelve, eleven, and ten are the Dasha lords.

sanskrit: मेषो देहो धनुर्जीवो चतुर्थचरणे मृगे । व्यस्ताच्चापादिमेषान्तराशिपाश्च दशाधिपाः ॥८१॥
transliteration: meṣo deho dhanurjīvo caturthacaraṇe mṛge . vyastāccāpādimeṣāntarāśipāśca daśādhipāḥ.
separated_sandhi: meṣaḥ dehaḥ dhanuḥ jīvaḥ caturthacaraṇe mṛgevyastāt cāpādimēṣānta rāśipāḥ ca daśādhipāḥ
english: Aries represents the body, and Sagittarius represents life. In the fourth quarter (pada) of Capricorn, the lords of the zodiac signs, from Sagittarius in reverse order up to Aries, become the lords of the daśās.

sanskrit: अपसव्यगणे त्वेवं देहजीवदशादिकम् । पार्वत्यै शम्भुना प्रोक्तमिदावींकथितं मया ॥८२॥
transliteration: apasavyagaṇe tvevaṃ dehajīvadaśādikam . pārvatyai śambhunā proktamidāvīṃkathitaṃ mayā.
separated_sandhi: apasavyagaṇe tu evam dehajīvadaśādikampārvatyai śambhunā proktam idānīm kathitam mayā
english: Similarly, in the anti-clockwise reckoning, the daśās pertaining to the body, life, and so forth, were expounded by Śambhu to Pārvatī; now I am relating them to you.

sanskrit: केषां च कति वर्षाणि दशेशानां महामुने । दशाया भुक्तभोग्याद्यं तदारम्भ प्रचक्ष्व मे ॥८३॥
transliteration: keṣāṃ ca kati varṣāṇi daśeśānāṃ mahāmune . daśāyā bhuktabhogyādyaṃ tadārambha pracakṣva me.
separated_sandhi: keṣām ca kati varṣāṇi daśeśānām mahāmune |daśāyāḥ bhuktabhogyādyam tat ārambham pracakṣva me
english: O great sage, please tell me which of these daśā lords have how many years, and also explain to me the calculation of the elapsed and remaining portions of the daśā, along with its commencement.

sanskrit: भूतैकविंशगिरयो नवदिक्षोडशाब्धयः । सूर्यादीनां दशाब्धाः स्यू राशीनां स्वामिनो वशात् ॥८४॥
transliteration: bhūtaikaviṃśagirayo navadikṣoḍaśābdhayaḥ . sūryādīnāṃ daśābdhāḥ syū rāśīnāṃ svāmino vaśāt.
separated_sandhi: bhūtaikaviṃśagirayaḥ navadikṣoḍaśābdhayaḥsūryādīnām daśābdhāḥ syuḥ rāśīnām svāminaḥ vaśāt
english: The daśā years for the Sun and other planets, which are determined according to the lords of the zodiac signs, are: five, twenty-one, seven, nine, ten, sixteen, and four.

sanskrit: नरस्य जन्मकाले वा प्रश्नकाले यदंशकः । तदादिनवराशिनामब्दास्तस्यायुरुच्यते ॥८५॥
transliteration: narasya janmakāle vā praśnakāle yadaṃśakaḥ . tadādinavarāśināmabdāstasyāyurucyate.
separated_sandhi: narasya janmakāle vā praśnakāle yat aṃśakaḥ| tadādinavarāśīnām abdhāḥ tasya āyuḥ ucyate
english: For a person, the years corresponding to the nine zodiac signs, starting from the specific amśaka (divisional chart) degree that is active at the time of their birth or at the time of an astrological query (praśna), are declared to be their lifespan.

sanskrit: सम्पूर्णायुर्भवेदादावर्धमंशस्य मध्यके । अंशान्ते परमं कष्टमित्याहुरपरे बुधाः ॥८६॥
transliteration: sampūrṇāyurbhavedādāvardhamaṃśasya madhyake . aṃśānte paramaṃ kaṣṭamityāhurapare budhāḥ.
separated_sandhi: sampūrṇāyuḥ bhavet ādau ardham aṃśasya madhyake| aṃśānte paramam kaṣṭam iti āhuḥ apare budhāḥ
english: A full lifespan (āyuḥ) occurs in the beginning [of a division (aṃśa)] and in the middle of its half-portion. However, at the very end of the division (aṃśa), there is supreme difficulty; thus declare other learned (budha) persons.

sanskrit: ज्ञात्वैवं स्फुटसिद्धान्तं राश्यंशं गणयेद् बुधः । अनुपातेन वक्ष्यामि तदुपायमतः परम् ॥८७॥
transliteration: jñātvaivaṃ sphuṭasiddhāntaṃ rāśyaṃśaṃ gaṇayed budhaḥ . anupātena vakṣyāmi tadupāyamataḥ param.
separated_sandhi: jñātvā evam sphuṭasiddhāntam rāśyaṃśam gaṇayetbudhaḥ | anupātena vakṣyāmi tat upāyam ataḥ param
english: Having thus understood the clear doctrine (siddhānta), a wise person (budha) should calculate the sign's degree (rāśyaṃśa). Afterwards, I will explain that method using proportionality.

sanskrit: गततारास्त्रिभिर्भक्ताः शेषं चैव चतुर्गुणम् । वर्तमानपदेनाढ्यं राशीनामंशको भवेत् ॥८८॥
transliteration: gatatārāstribhirbhaktāḥ śeṣaṃ caiva caturguṇam . vartamānapadenāḍhyaṃ rāśīnāmaṃśako bhavet.
separated_sandhi: gatatārāḥ tribhiḥ bhaktāḥ śeṣam ca eva caturguṇam| vartamānapadena āḍhyam rāśīnām aṃśakaḥ bhavet
english: The past divisions (tārā), when divided by three, and indeed, the remainder (śeṣa) multiplied by four and then added to the current quarter (pada), will be the division (aṃśaka) for the signs (rāśi).

sanskrit: मेषे शतं वृषेऽक्षाष्टौ मिथुने त्रिगजाः समाः । कर्कटेऽङ्गगजाः प्रोक्तास्तावन्तस्तत्त्रिकोणयोः ॥८९॥
transliteration: meṣe śataṃ vṛṣe'kṣāṣṭau mithune trigajāḥ samāḥ . karkaṭe'ṅgagajāḥ proktāstāvantastattrikoṇayoḥ.
separated_sandhi: meṣe śatam vṛṣe akṣāṣṭau mithune trigajāḥ samāḥ |karkaṭe aṅgagajāḥ proktāḥ tāvantaḥ tat trikoṇayoḥ
english: In Aries (Meṣa) [the value is] one hundred. In Taurus (Vṛṣabha) [it is] fifty-eight (akṣāṣṭa). In Gemini (Mithuna) [it is] thirty-eight (trigaja). In Cancer (Karkaṭa), sixty-eight (aṅgagaja) is declared; the same amounts apply to their trine signs.

sanskrit: जनो यत्रांशके जातो गतनाडीपलादिभिः । तदांशस्य हताः स्वाब्दाः पञ्चभूमिविभाजिताः ॥९०॥
transliteration: jano yatrāṃśake jāto gatanāḍīpalādibhiḥ . tadāṃśasya hatāḥ svābdāḥ pañcabhūmivibhājitāḥ.
separated_sandhi: janaḥ yatra aṃśake jātaḥ gatanaḍīpalādibhiḥ |tadā aṃśasya hatāḥ svābdāḥ pañcabhūmi vibhājitāḥ
english: For a person born in a specific division (aṃśaka), using the elapsed nāḍīs, palas, etc., their own years (svābda) should then be multiplied by [the numerical value of] that division (aṃśa) and divided by fifty-one (pañcabhūmi).

sanskrit: एवं महादशारम्भो भवेदंशाद्यथा क्रमात् । गणयेन्नवपर्यन्तं तत्तदायुः प्रकीर्तितम् ॥९१॥
transliteration: evaṃ mahādaśārambho bhavedaṃśādyathā kramāt . gaṇayennavaparyantaṃ tattadāyuḥ prakīrtitam.
separated_sandhi: evam mahādaśārambhaḥ bhavet aṃśāt yathā kramātgaṇayet navaparyantam tat tat āyuḥ prakīrtitam
english: Thus, the commencement of the great period (Mahadasha) occurs successively from the first portion (Navamsha). One should count up to nine, and that specific duration is declared as the lifespan.

sanskrit: पदस्य भुक्तघट्याद्यैः स्वाब्दमानं हतं ततः । भभोगांघ्रिहृतं भुक्तं भोग्यं मानाद् विशोधितम् ॥९२॥
transliteration: padasya bhuktaghaṭyādyaiḥ svābdamānaṃ hataṃ tataḥ . bhabhogāṃghrihṛtaṃ bhuktaṃ bhogyaṃ mānād viśodhitam.
separated_sandhi: padasya bhuktaghaṭyādyaiḥ svābdamānam hatam tataḥbhabhogāṃghrihṛtam bhuktam bhogyam mānāt viśodhitam
english: The duration of the (Dasha Lord's) section (pada) multiplied by the elapsed time units like ghatikas (bhuktaghaṭyādyaiḥ), and then divided by the quarter of the sign's total duration (bhabhogāṃghri), yields the elapsed portion (bhukta). The remaining portion (bhogya) is obtained by subtracting this from the total measure (māna).

sanskrit: चन्द्राङ्कांशकला भुक्ताः स्वाब्दमानहता हृताः । द्विशत्या भुक्तवर्षाद्यं ज्ञेयं भोग्यं ततो बुधैः ॥९३॥
transliteration: candrāṅkāṃśakalā bhuktāḥ svābdamānahatā hṛtāḥ . dviśatyā bhuktavarṣādyaṃ jñeyaṃ bhogyaṃ tato budhaiḥ.
separated_sandhi: candrāṅkāṃśakalāḥ bhuktāḥ svābdamānahatāḥ hṛtāḥdviśatyā bhuktavarṣādyam jñeyam bhogyam tataḥ budhaiḥ
english: The elapsed degrees and minutes of the Moon's position (candrāṅkāṃśakalāḥ), multiplied by its own Dasha duration, and then divided by two hundred, should be understood by the wise as the elapsed years and so on. The remaining (Dasha period) is then to be known (jñeyam) from this.

sanskrit: सव्याख्ये प्रथमांशो यः स देह इति कथ्यते । अन्त्यांशो जीवसंज्ञः स्याद् विलोममपसव्यके ॥९४॥
transliteration: savyākhye prathamāṃśo yaḥ sa deha iti kathyate . antyāṃśo jīvasaṃjñaḥ syād vilomamapasavyake.
separated_sandhi: savyākhye prathamāṃśaḥ yaḥ saḥ dehaḥ iti kathyateantyāṃśaḥ jīvasaṃjñaḥ syāt vilomam apasavyake
english: In the direct (clockwise) interpretation, the first portion (Navamsha) is called the body (deha). The last portion (Navamsha) should be known as the life (jīva). The reverse applies in the counter-clockwise order.

sanskrit: देहादिं गणयेत् सव्ये जीवादिमपसव्यके । एवं विज्ञाय दैवज्ञस्ततस्तत्फलमादिशेत् ॥९५॥
transliteration: dehādiṃ gaṇayet savye jīvādimapasavyake . evaṃ vijñāya daivajñastatastatphalamādiśet.
separated_sandhi: dehādim gaṇayet savye jīvādim apasavyake evamvijñāya daivajñaḥ tataḥ tat phalam ādiśet
english: One should count beginning with the body (deha) in the clockwise (direct) order, and beginning with the life (jīva) in the counter-clockwise (reverse) order. Having thus understood this, the astrologer (daivajña) should then declare its results.

sanskrit: कालचक्रगतिः प्रोक्ता त्रिधा पूर्वमहर्षिभिः । मण्डूकाख्या गतिश्चैका मर्कटीसंज्ञकाऽपरा ॥९६॥
transliteration: kālacakragatiḥ proktā tridhā pūrvamaharṣibhiḥ . maṇḍūkākhyā gatiścaikā markaṭīsaṃjñakā'parā.
separated_sandhi: kālacakragatiḥ proktā tridhā pūrvamaharṣibhiḥmaṇḍūkākhyā gatiḥ ca ekā markaṭīsaṁjñakā aparā
english: The movement of the wheel of time is declared in three ways by the ancient great sages. One movement is called "frog-like," and another is known as "monkey-like."

sanskrit: सिंहावलोकनाख्या च तृतीया परिकीर्तिता । उत्प्लुत्य गमनं विज्ञा मण्डूकाख्यं प्रचक्षते ॥९७॥
transliteration: siṃhāvalokanākhyā ca tṛtīyā parikīrtitā . utplutya gamanaṃ vijñā maṇḍūkākhyaṃ pracakṣate.
separated_sandhi: siṁhāvalokanākhyā ca tṛtīyā parikīrtitāutplutya gamanam vijñāḥ maṇḍūkākhyam pracakṣate
english: And the third (movement) is described as "lion's glance" (siṁhāvalokana). Wise persons declare the "frog-like" (maṇḍūkākhya) movement to be a leap-and-go action.

sanskrit: पृष्ठतो गमनं नाम मर्कटीसंज्ञकं तथा । वाणाच्च नवपर्यन्तं गतिः सिंहावलोकनम् ॥९८॥
transliteration: pṛṣṭhato gamanaṃ nāma markaṭīsaṃjñakaṃ tathā . vāṇācca navaparyantaṃ gatiḥ siṃhāvalokanam.
separated_sandhi: pṛṣṭhataḥ gamanam nāma markaṭīsaṃjñakam tathā |vāṇāt ca nava-paryantam gatiḥ siṃha-avalokanam
english: Movement backward is called the 'monkey-like' (markaṭī) motion. And from the fifth (house/sign) up to the ninth, the motion is called 'lion's backward glance' (siṃhāvalokanam).

sanskrit: कन्याकर्कटयोः सिंहयुग्मयोर्मण्डूय्की गतिः । कर्ककेसरिणोरेवं कथ्यते मर्कटीं गतिः ॥९९॥
transliteration: kanyākarkaṭayoḥ siṃhayugmayormaṇḍūykī gatiḥ . karkakesariṇorevaṃ kathyate markaṭīṃ gatiḥ.
separated_sandhi: kanyā-karkaṭayoḥ siṃha-yugmayoḥ maṇḍūkī gatiḥ| karka-kesariṇoḥ evam kathyate markaṭī gatiḥ
english: The 'frog-like' (maṇḍūkī) motion is said for (the pairs of signs) Virgo and Cancer, and Leo and Gemini. Thus, the 'monkey-like' (markaṭī) motion is described for Cancer and Leo.

sanskrit: मीनवृश्चिकयोश्चापमेषयोः सैंहिकी गतिः । इति सञ्चिन्त्य विज्ञेयं कालचक्रदशाफलम् ॥१००॥
transliteration: mīnavṛścikayoścāpameṣayoḥ saiṃhikī gatiḥ . iti sañcintya vijñeyaṃ kālacakradaśāphalam.
separated_sandhi: mīna-vṛścikayoḥ ca cāpa-meṣayoḥ saiṃhikī gatiḥ| iti sañcintya vijñeyam kāla-cakra-daśā-phalam
english: The 'lion-like' (saiṃhikī) motion is (said) for Pisces and Scorpio, and for Sagittarius and Aries. Thus, having carefully considered this, one should understand the results of the (astrological) Kālacakra Daśā (periods).

sanskrit: मण्डूकगतिकाले हि सव्ये बन्धुजने भयम् । पित्रोर्वा विषशस्त्राग्निज्वरचोरादिजं भयम् ॥१०१॥
transliteration: maṇḍūkagatikāle hi savye bandhujane bhayam . pitrorvā viṣaśastrāgnijvaracorādijaṃ bhayam.
separated_sandhi: maṇḍūkagatīkāle hi savye bandhujane bhayampitroḥ vā viṣaśastrāgnijvaracorādijam bhayam
english: Indeed, during the period indicated by 'frog's movement' (maṇḍūkagati), there is danger for relatives on the inauspicious left side. Alternatively, for the parents, there is fear arising from poison, weapons, fire, fever, thieves, and similar sources.

sanskrit: केसरीयुग्ममण्डूके मातुर्मरण्मादिशेत् । स्वमृतिं राजभितिं वा सन्निपातभयं भवेत् ॥१०२॥
transliteration: kesarīyugmamaṇḍūke māturmaraṇmādiśet . svamṛtiṃ rājabhitiṃ vā sannipātabhayaṃ bhavet.
separated_sandhi: kesarīyugmamaṇḍūke mātuḥ maraṇam ādiśetsvamṛtim rājabhītim vā sannipātabhayam bhavet
english: When the 'Kesarī' and 'Maṇḍūka' combinations appear in tandem, one should predict the mother's death. Alternatively, one's own death, fear of royal/governmental authority, or fear of a fatal illness (sannipāta) may manifest.

sanskrit: मर्कटीगमने सव्ये धनधान्यपशुक्षयः । पितुर्मरणमालस्यं तत्समानां च व मृतिः ॥१०३॥
transliteration: markaṭīgamane savye dhanadhānyapaśukṣayaḥ . piturmaraṇamālasyaṃ tatsamānāṃ ca va mṛtiḥ.
separated_sandhi: markaṭīgamane savye dhanadhānyapaśukṣayaḥpituḥ maraṇam ālasyam tatsamānām ca vā mṛtiḥ
english: When the 'monkey's movement' (markaṭīgaman) is on the inauspicious left side, there is a loss of wealth, grain, and cattle. Furthermore, the father's death, idleness, or the death of individuals similar to him may occur.

sanskrit: सव्ये सिंहावलोके तु पशुभीतिर्भवेन्नृणाम् । सुहृत्स्नेहादिनाशश्च समानजनपीडनम् ॥१०४॥
transliteration: savye siṃhāvaloke tu paśubhītirbhavennṛṇām . suhṛtsnehādināśaśca samānajanapīḍanam.
separated_sandhi: savye siṃhāvaloke tu paśubhītiḥ bhavetnṛṇām suhṛtsnehādināśaḥ ca samānajanapīḍanam
english: Indeed, when the 'lion's gaze' (siṃhāvaloka) occurs on the inauspicious left side, people may experience fear regarding their cattle. Additionally, there will be the loss of friendships, affection, and so on, as well as distress for peers.

sanskrit: पतनं वापि कूपादौ विषशस्र्ताग्निजं भयम् । वाहनात् पतनं वापि ज्वरार्तिः स्थाननाशनम् ॥१०५॥
transliteration: patanaṃ vāpi kūpādau viṣaśasrtāgnijaṃ bhayam . vāhanāt patanaṃ vāpi jvarārtiḥ sthānanāśanam.
separated_sandhi: patanam vā api kūpādau viṣaśastrāgnijam bhayamvāhanāt patanam vā api jvarārtiḥ sthānanāśanam
english: There may be falling into wells or similar places, or fear arising from poison, weapons, or fire. Also, a fall from a vehicle, suffering from fever, or the loss of one's position may occur.

sanskrit: मण्डूकगमने वामे स्त्रीसुतादिप्रपीडनम् । ज्वरं च श्वापदाद् भीतिं वदेद् विज्ञः पदच्युतिम् ॥१०६॥
transliteration: maṇḍūkagamane vāme strīsutādiprapīḍanam . jvaraṃ ca śvāpadād bhītiṃ vaded vijñaḥ padacyutim.
separated_sandhi: maṇḍūkagamane vāme strīsutādiprapīḍanam jvaramca śvāpadāt bhītim vadet vijñaḥ padacyutim
english: If the movement is frog-like and to the left, the knowledgeable person should predict distress to one's wife, children, and other dependents, as well as fever, fear from wild animals, and a loss of status or position.

sanskrit: मर्कटीगमने वाऽपि जलभीतिं पदच्युतिम् । पितुर्नाशं नृपक्रोधं दुर्गारण्याटनं वदेत् ॥१०७॥
transliteration: markaṭīgamane vā'pi jalabhītiṃ padacyutim . piturnāśaṃ nṛpakrodhaṃ durgāraṇyāṭanaṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: markaṭīgamane vā api jalabhītim padacyutimpituḥ nāśam nṛpakrodham durgāraṇyāṭanam vadet
english: Or if the movement is like that of a monkey, one should predict fear of water, loss of status, the father's destruction or demise, royal wrath, and wandering in difficult terrains like forts and forests.

sanskrit: सिंहावलोकने वामे पदभ्रंशः पितुर्मृतिः । तत्समानमृतिर्वाऽपि फलमेवं विचिन्तयेत् ॥१०८॥
transliteration: siṃhāvalokane vāme padabhraṃśaḥ piturmṛtiḥ . tatsamānamṛtirvā'pi phalamevaṃ vicintayet.
separated_sandhi: siṃhāvalokane vāme padabhraṃśaḥ pituḥ mṛtiḥtat samānamṛtiḥ vā api phalam evam vicintayet
english: If there is a 'lion's glance' (siṃhāvalokana) to the left, one should anticipate a loss of status, the father's death, or a death similar to that. Thus, one should contemplate the outcome.

sanskrit: मीनात् तु वृश्चिके याते ज्वरो भवति निश्चितः । कन्यातः कर्कटे याते भ्रातृबन्धुविनाशनम् ॥१०९॥
transliteration: mīnāt tu vṛścike yāte jvaro bhavati niścitaḥ . kanyātaḥ karkaṭe yāte bhrātṛbandhuvināśanam.
separated_sandhi: mīnāt tu vṛścike yāte jvaraḥ bhavati niścitaḥkanyātaḥ karkaṭe yāte bhrātṛbandhuvināśanam
english: When there is a transition from Pisces (Mīna) to Scorpio (Vṛścika), fever is certain to manifest. When there is a transition from Virgo (Kanyā) to Cancer (Karkaṭa), it indicates the destruction or loss of brothers and relatives.

sanskrit: सिंहात्तु मिथुने याते स्त्रिया व्याधिर्भवेद् ध्रुवम् । कर्कटाच्च हरौ याते वधो भवति देहिनाम् ॥११०॥
transliteration: siṃhāttu mithune yāte striyā vyādhirbhaved dhruvam . karkaṭācca harau yāte vadho bhavati dehinām.
separated_sandhi: siṃhāt tu mithune yāte striyā vyādhiḥ bhavet dhruvamkarkaṭāt ca harau yāte vadhaḥ bhavati dehinām
english: When there is a transition from Leo (Siṃha) to Gemini (Mithuna), disease for women is certain. And when there is a transition from Cancer (Karkaṭa) to Leo (Hari/Siṃha), there is death for embodied beings (dehin).

sanskrit: पितृबन्धुमृतिं विद्याच्चापान्मेषे गते पुनः । भयं पापखगैर्युक्ते शुभखेटयुते शुभम् ॥१११॥
transliteration: pitṛbandhumṛtiṃ vidyāccāpānmeṣe gate punaḥ . bhayaṃ pāpakhagairyukte śubhakheṭayute śubham.
separated_sandhi: pitṛbandhumṛtim vidyāt cāpāt meṣe gate punaḥbhayam pāpakhaigaiḥ yukte śubhakheṭayute śubham
english: One should predict the death of father's relatives when [a planet] has moved from Sagittarius (cāpa) to Aries (meṣa) again. Fear arises when [it is] associated with malefic planets, but auspiciousness results when [it is] associated with benefic planets.

sanskrit: शुभं वाऽप्यशुभं वाऽपि कालचक्रदशाफलम् । राशिदिक्भागतो वापि पूर्वादिदिग्तभश्चरात् ॥११२॥
transliteration: śubhaṃ vā'pyaśubhaṃ vā'pi kālacakradaśāphalam . rāśidikbhāgato vāpi pūrvādidigtabhaścarāt.
separated_sandhi: śubham vā api aśubham vā api kālacakradaśāphalamrāśidikbhāgataḥ vā api pūrvādidiktabhacarāt
english: The results of the kālacakra daśā (planetary period) may be either auspicious or inauspicious. This is determined either by the division or direction of the zodiac sign, or from the planets moving in the eastern and other directions [from that sign].

sanskrit: तद्दिगावभागे वक्तव्यं तद्दशासमये नृणाम् । यथोपदेशमार्गेण सर्वेषां द्विजसत्तम ॥११३॥
transliteration: taddigāvabhāge vaktavyaṃ taddaśāsamaye nṛṇām . yathopadeśamārgeṇa sarveṣāṃ dvijasattama.
separated_sandhi: tat dik avabhāge vaktavyam tat daśāsamaye nṛṇāmyathā upadeśamārgeṇa sarveṣām dvijasattama
english: O best among the twice-born (dvija), these [results] should be declared for human beings during the time of that daśā (planetary period), according to the method of instruction, in that particular direction or division, for all.

sanskrit: कन्यातः कर्कटे याते पूर्वभागे महत्फलम् । उत्तरं देशमाश्रित्य शुभा यात्रा भविष्यति ॥११४॥
transliteration: kanyātaḥ karkaṭe yāte pūrvabhāge mahatphalam . uttaraṃ deśamāśritya śubhā yātrā bhaviṣyati.
separated_sandhi: kanyātaḥ karkaṭe yāte pūrvabhāge mahat phalamuttaram deśam āśritya śubhā yātrā bhaviṣyati
english: When [a planet] has moved from Virgo (kanyā) to Cancer (karkaṭa), great results are seen in the eastern region. An auspicious journey will take place relying on the northern region.

sanskrit: सिंहात्तु मिथुने याते पूर्वभागं विवर्जयेत् । कार्यान्तेऽपि च नैरृत्यां सुखं यात्रा भविष्यति ॥११५॥
transliteration: siṃhāttu mithune yāte pūrvabhāgaṃ vivarjayet . kāryānte'pi ca nairṛtyāṃ sukhaṃ yātrā bhaviṣyati.
separated_sandhi: siṃhāt tu mithune yāte pūrvabhāgam vivarjayetkāryānte api ca nairṛtyām sukham yātrā bhaviṣyati
english: But when [a planet] has moved from Leo (siṃha) to Gemini (mithuna), one should avoid the eastern region. Even at the completion of work, a pleasant journey will take place in the southwest direction.

sanskrit: कर्कटात् सिंहभे याते कार्यहानिश्च दक्षिणे । दक्षिणां दिशमाश्रित्य प्रत्यगागमनं भवेत् ॥११६॥
transliteration: karkaṭāt siṃhabhe yāte kāryahāniśca dakṣiṇe . dakṣiṇāṃ diśamāśritya pratyagāgamanaṃ bhavet.
separated_sandhi: karkaṭāt siṃhabhe yāte kāryahāniḥ ca dakṣiṇedakṣiṇām diśam āśritya pratyagāgamanam bhavet
english: When [a planet] moves from Cancer (Karkaṭa) to Leo (Siṃha), there will be a loss of undertakings, particularly in the southern direction. However, by relying on the southern direction, a return is likely to happen.

sanskrit: मीनात्तु वृश्चिके याते उदग् गच्छति सङ्कटम् । चापाच्च मकरे याते सङ्कटं जायते ध्रुवम् ॥११७॥
transliteration: mīnāttu vṛścike yāte udag gacchati saṅkaṭam . cāpācca makare yāte saṅkaṭaṃ jāyate dhruvam.
separated_sandhi: mīnāt tu vṛścike yāte udak gacchati saṅkaṭamcāpāt ca makare yāte saṅkaṭam jāyate dhruvam
english: But when [a planet] moves from Pisces (Mīna) to Scorpio (Vṛścika), trouble goes northward. And when [it] moves from Sagittarius (Cāpa) to Capricorn (Makara), trouble certainly arises.

sanskrit: चापान्मेषे तु यात्रायां व्याधिर्बन्धो मृतिर्भवेत् । वृश्चिके तु सुखं सम्पत् स्त्रीप्राप्तिश्च द्विजोत्तम ॥११८॥
transliteration: cāpānmeṣe tu yātrāyāṃ vyādhirbandho mṛtirbhavet . vṛścike tu sukhaṃ sampat strīprāptiśca dvijottama.
separated_sandhi: cāpāt meṣe tu yātrāyām vyādhiḥ bandhaḥ mṛtiḥ bhavetvṛścike tu sukham sampat strīprāptiḥ ca dvijottama
english: However, during a journey when [a planet moves] from Sagittarius (Cāpa) to Aries (Meṣa), disease, imprisonment, or death may occur. But in Scorpio (Vṛścika), O best among the twice-born (dvijottama), there will be happiness, prosperity, and the acquisition of a woman.

sanskrit: सिंहाच्च कर्कटे याते पस्चिमां वर्जयेद्दिशम् । शुभयोगे शुभं ब्रूयादशुभे त्वशुभं फलम् ॥११९॥
transliteration: siṃhācca karkaṭe yāte pascimāṃ varjayeddiśam . śubhayoge śubhaṃ brūyādaśubhe tvaśubhaṃ phalam.
separated_sandhi: siṃhāt ca karkaṭe yāte paścimām varjayet diśamśubhayoge śubham brūyāt aśubhe tu aśubham phalam
english: And when [a planet] moves from Leo (Siṃha) to Cancer (Karkaṭa), one should avoid the western direction. In an auspicious astrological combination (yoga), one should declare an auspicious outcome, but in an inauspicious one, an inauspicious result.

sanskrit: शूरश्चौरश्च मेषांशे लक्ष्मीवांश्च वृषांशके । मिथुनांशे भवेज्ज्ञानी कर्कांशे नृपतिर्भवेत् ॥१२०॥
transliteration: śūraścauraśca meṣāṃśe lakṣmīvāṃśca vṛṣāṃśake . mithunāṃśe bhavejjñānī karkāṃśe nṛpatirbhavet.
separated_sandhi: śūraḥ ca cauraḥ ca meṣāṃśe lakṣmīvān ca vṛṣāṃśakemithunāṃśe bhavet jñānī karkāṃśe nṛpatiḥ bhavet
english: One born in the aṃśa (divisional chart) of Aries (Meṣa) will be a hero and a thief. In the aṃśa of Taurus (Vṛṣa), one will be wealthy. In the aṃśa of Gemini (Mithuna), one becomes knowledgeable. In the aṃśa of Cancer (Karkaṭa), one becomes a king.

sanskrit: सिंहांशे राजमान्यश्च कन्यांशे पण्डितो भवेत् । तुलांशे राजमन्त्री स्याद् वृश्चिकांशे च निर्धनः ॥१२१॥
transliteration: siṃhāṃśe rājamānyaśca kanyāṃśe paṇḍito bhavet . tulāṃśe rājamantrī syād vṛścikāṃśe ca nirdhanaḥ.
separated_sandhi: siṃhāṃśe rājamānyaḥ ca kanyāṃśe paṇḍitaḥ bhavettulāṃśe rājamantrī syāt vṛścikāṃśe ca nirdhanaḥ
english: If one's lagna falls in the *siṃhāṃśa* (a specific division of the zodiac sign Leo), they become respected by kings. If in the *kanyāṃśa* (Virgo division), they become learned. If in the *tulāṃśa* (Libra division), they become a royal minister. And if in the *vṛścikāṃśa* (Scorpio division), they become poor.

sanskrit: चापांशे ज्ञानसम्पन्नो मरकांशे च पापकृत् । कुम्भांशे च वणिक्कर्मा मीनांशे धनधान्यवान् ॥१२२॥
transliteration: cāpāṃśe jñānasampanno marakāṃśe ca pāpakṛt . kumbhāṃśe ca vaṇikkarmā mīnāṃśe dhanadhānyavān.
separated_sandhi: cāpāṃśe jñānasampannaḥ makarāṃśe ca pāpakṛtkumbhāṃśe ca vaṇikkarmā mīnāṃśe dhanadhānyavān
english: If one's lagna falls in the *cāpāṃśa* (Sagittarius division), they become endowed with knowledge. If in the *makarāṃśa* (Capricorn division), they become a doer of sinful deeds. If in the *kumbhāṃśa* (Aquarius division), they engage in mercantile work. And if in the *mīnāṃśa* (Pisces division), they possess wealth and grains.

sanskrit: देहो जीवोऽथवा युक्तो रविभौमार्किराहुभिः । एकैकयोगे मृत्युः स्याद् बहुयोगे तु का कथा ॥१२३॥
transliteration: deho jīvo'thavā yukto ravibhaumārkirāhubhiḥ . ekaikayoge mṛtyuḥ syād bahuyoge tu kā kathā.
separated_sandhi: dehaḥ jīvaḥ athavā yuktaḥ ravibhaumārkirāhubhiḥekaikayoge mṛtyuḥ syāt bahuyoge tu kā kathā
english: If the body (deha) or the soul (jīva) is associated with the Sun (ravi), Mars (bhauma), Saturn (arki), and Rahu (rāhu) – even if associated with just one of these planets, there will be death. So, what more can be said about an association with multiple such planets?

sanskrit: क्रूरैर्युक्ते तनौ रोगं जीवे युक्ते महद् भयम् । आधी रोगो भवेद् द्वाभ्यांअपमृत्युस्र्तिभिर्भवेत् ॥१२४॥
transliteration: krūrairyukte tanau rogaṃ jīve yukte mahad bhayam . ādhī rogo bhaved dvābhyāṃapamṛtyusrtibhirbhavet.
separated_sandhi: krūraiḥ yukte tanau rogam jīve yukte mahat bhayamādhiḥ rogaḥ bhavet dvābhyām apamṛtyuḥ tribhiḥ bhavet
english: If the body (tanu) is associated with malefic planets (krūra grahas), there will be disease. If the soul (jīva) is associated (with malefic planets), there will be great fear. If associated with two (malefic planets), there will be mental anguish (ādhi) and disease. If associated with three (malefic planets), there will be an accidental or untimely death (apamṛtyu).

sanskrit: चतुर्भिर्मृतिमापन्नो देहे जीवेऽशुभैर्युते । युगपद्देहजीवौ च क्रूरग्रहयुतौ तदा ॥१२५॥
transliteration: caturbhirmṛtimāpanno dehe jīve'śubhairyute . yugapaddehajīvau ca krūragrahayutau tadā.
separated_sandhi: caturbhiḥ mṛtim āpannaḥ dehe jīve aśubhaiḥyute yugapat dehajīvau ca krūragrahayutau tadā
english: If the body (deha) or the soul (jīva) is associated with four inauspicious (aśubha) planets, one attains death. Similarly, if both the body and the soul are simultaneously associated with malefic planets (krūra grahas), then also (death occurs).

sanskrit: राजचोरादिभीतिश्च मृतिश्चापि न संशयः । वह्निवाधा रवौ ज्ञेया क्षीणेन्दौ च जलाद् भयम् ॥१२६॥
transliteration: rājacorādibhītiśca mṛtiścāpi na saṃśayaḥ . vahnivādhā ravau jñeyā kṣīṇendau ca jalād bhayam.
separated_sandhi: rājacaurādibhītiḥ ca mṛtiḥ ca api na saṃśayaḥvahnivādhā ravau jñeyā kṣīṇendau ca jalāt bhayam
english: There is no doubt of fear from kings, thieves, and similar sources, as well as death. Obstruction from fire should be known when the Sun (ravau) is influencing, and fear from water when the Moon (indau) is waning.

sanskrit: कुजे शस्त्रकृता पीडा वायुवाधा बुधे भवेत् । गुल्मवाधा शनौ ज्ञेया राहौ केतौ विषाद् भयम् ॥१२७॥
transliteration: kuje śastrakṛtā pīḍā vāyuvādhā budhe bhavet . gulmavādhā śanau jñeyā rāhau ketau viṣād bhayam.
separated_sandhi: kuje śastrakṛtā pīḍā vāyuvādhā budhe bhavetgulmavādhā śanau jñeyā rāhau ketau viṣāt bhayam
english: When Mars (kuje) is influencing, there is pain caused by weapons. Obstruction from wind should occur when Mercury (budhe) is influencing. Trouble from tumors should be known when Saturn (śanau) is influencing, and when Rahu (rāhau) and Ketu (ketau) are influencing, there is fear from poison.

sanskrit: देहजीवगृहे यातो बुधो जीवोऽथवा भृगुः । सुखस्म्पत्कराः सर्वे रोगशोकविनाशनाः ॥१२८॥
transliteration: dehajīvagṛhe yāto budho jīvo'thavā bhṛguḥ . sukhasmpatkarāḥ sarve rogaśokavināśanāḥ.
separated_sandhi: dehajīvagṛhe yātaḥ budhaḥ jīvaḥ athavā bhṛguḥsukhasampatkarāḥ sarve rogaśokavināśanāḥ
english: When Mercury (budhaḥ), Jupiter (jīvaḥ), or Venus (bhṛguḥ) are situated in the house of the body (lagna) or the house of the life-force (jīva), all of them bestow happiness and wealth, and destroy diseases and sorrow.

sanskrit: मिश्रगृहैश्च संयुक्ते मिश्रं फलमवाप्नुयात् । पापक्षेत्रदशाकाले देहजीवौ तु दुःखितौ । शुभक्षेत्रदशाकाले शुभं भवति निश्चितम् ॥१२९॥
transliteration: miśragṛhaiśca saṃyukte miśraṃ phalamavāpnuyāt . pāpakṣetradaśākāle dehajīvau tu duḥkhitau . śubhakṣetradaśākāle śubhaṃ bhavati niścitam.
separated_sandhi: miśragṛhaiḥ ca saṃyukte miśramphalam avāpnuyāt pāpakṣetradaśākāledehajīvau tu duḥkhitauśubhakṣetradaśākāle śubham bhavati niścitam
english: And when (a planet or daśā lord) is associated with mixed houses, one obtains mixed results. During the daśā period of malefic signs, the body (deha) and life-force (jīva) are indeed afflicted. During the daśā period of benefic signs, good results certainly occur.

sanskrit: शुभयुक्ताशुभक्षेत्रदशा मिश्रफला स्मृता । क्रूरयुक्तशुभक्षेत्रदशा मिश्रफला तथा ॥१३०॥
transliteration: śubhayuktāśubhakṣetradaśā miśraphalā smṛtā . krūrayuktaśubhakṣetradaśā miśraphalā tathā.
separated_sandhi: śubhayuktāśubhakṣetradaśā miśraphalā smṛtākrūrayuktaśubhakṣetradaśā miśraphalā tathā
english: The daśā period of a malefic sign or house that is associated with benefic (influences or planets) is considered to yield mixed results. Similarly, the daśā period of a benefic sign or house that is associated with malefic (influences or planets) also yields mixed results.

sanskrit: जनानां जन्मकाले तु यो राशिस्तनुभावगः । तस्य चक्रदशाकाले देहारोग्यं सुखं महत् ॥१३१॥
transliteration: janānāṃ janmakāle tu yo rāśistanubhāvagaḥ . tasya cakradaśākāle dehārogyaṃ sukhaṃ mahat.
separated_sandhi: janānām janma-kāle tu yaḥ rāśiḥ tanu-bhāva-gaḥ |tasya cakra-daśā-kāle deha-ārogyam sukham mahat
english: When, at the time of a person's birth, the sign that is situated in the first house (house of the body) experiences its Chakra Dasha period, then there will be great bodily health and happiness.

sanskrit: शुभे पूर्णसुखं पापे देहे रोगादिसम्भवः । स्वोच्चादिगतखेटाढ्ये राज्यमानधनाप्तयः ॥१३२॥
transliteration: śubhe pūrṇasukhaṃ pāpe dehe rogādisambhavaḥ . svoccādigatakheṭāḍhye rājyamānadhanāptayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: śubhe pūrṇa-sukham pāpe dehe roga-ādi-sambhavaḥ |sva-ucca-ādi-gata-kheṭa-āḍhye rājya-māna-dhana-āptayaḥ
english: If the sign is benefic, there is complete happiness. If it is malefic, there is a possibility of diseases and the like in the body. When it (the sign) is associated with planets situated in their own signs or exaltation, there are acquisitions of kingdom, honor, and wealth.

sanskrit: धनभावे च यो राशिस्तस्य चक्रदशा यदा । तदा सुभोजनं पुत्रस्त्रिसुखं च धनाप्तयः ॥१३३॥
transliteration: dhanabhāve ca yo rāśistasya cakradaśā yadā . tadā subhojanaṃ putrastrisukhaṃ ca dhanāptayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: dhana-bhāve ca yaḥ rāśiḥ tasya cakra-daśā yadā |tadā su-bhojanam putra-strī-sukham ca dhana-āptayaḥ
english: And when the Chakra Dasha of the sign in the second house (house of wealth) occurs, then there will be good food, happiness from sons and women, and acquisitions of wealth.

sanskrit: विद्याप्तिर्वाक्पटुत्वं च सुगोष्ठ्या कालयापनम् । शुभर्क्षे फलमेवं स्यात् पापभे फलमन्यथा ॥१३४॥
transliteration: vidyāptirvākpaṭutvaṃ ca sugoṣṭhyā kālayāpanam . śubharkṣe phalamevaṃ syāt pāpabhe phalamanyathā.
separated_sandhi: vidyā-āptiḥ vāk-paṭutvam ca su-goṣṭhyā kāla-yāpanam| śubha-ṛkṣe phalam evam syāt pāpa-bhe phalam anyathā
english: Acquisition of knowledge, eloquence, and spending time in good company will occur. Such a result happens in an auspicious sign, while in a malefic sign, the result is otherwise.

sanskrit: तृतीयभावराशेस्तु कालचक्रदशा यदा । तदा भ्रातृसुखं शौर्यं धैर्यं चापि महत्सुखम् ॥१३५॥
transliteration: tṛtīyabhāvarāśestu kālacakradaśā yadā . tadā bhrātṛsukhaṃ śauryaṃ dhairyaṃ cāpi mahatsukham.
separated_sandhi: tṛtīya-bhāva-rāśeḥ tu kāla-cakra-daśā yadā | tadābhrātṛ-sukham śauryaṃ dhairyaṃ ca api mahat-sukham
english: And when the Kala Chakra Dasha of the sign in the third house occurs, then there will be happiness from siblings, valor, courage, and also great happiness.

sanskrit: स्वर्णाभरणवस्त्राप्तिः सम्मानं राजसंसदि । शुभर्क्षे फलमेवं स्यात् पापर्क्षे फलमन्यथा ॥१३६॥
transliteration: svarṇābharaṇavastrāptiḥ sammānaṃ rājasaṃsadi . śubharkṣe phalamevaṃ syāt pāparkṣe phalamanyathā.
separated_sandhi: svarṇa ābharaṇa vastra prāptiḥ sammānam rāja saṃsadiśubha ṛkṣe phalam evam syāt pāpa ṛkṣe phalam anyathā
english: The acquisition of gold ornaments and garments, and honor in the royal assembly – such results occur when the constellation (ṛkṣa) is auspicious. If the constellation is inauspicious, the results will be otherwise.

sanskrit: सुखभावगतर्क्षस्य कालचक्रदशा यदा । तदा बन्धुसुखं भूमिगृहराज्यसुखाप्तयः ॥१३७॥
transliteration: sukhabhāvagatarkṣasya kālacakradaśā yadā . tadā bandhusukhaṃ bhūmigṛharājyasukhāptayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: sukha bhāva gata ṛkṣasya kāla cakra daśā yadātadā bandhu sukham bhūmi gṛha rājya sukha āptayaḥ
english: When the Kālacakra-daśā (period) of the constellation (ṛkṣa) situated in the house of happiness (sukha-bhāva) occurs, then there will be happiness from relatives, and the acquisition of pleasure from land, houses, and kingdom.

sanskrit: आरोग्यमर्थलाभश्च वस्त्रवाहनजं सुखम् । शुभर्क्षे शोभनं ज्ञेयं पापभे फलमन्यथा ॥१३८॥
transliteration: ārogyamarthalābhaśca vastravāhanajaṃ sukham . śubharkṣe śobhanaṃ jñeyaṃ pāpabhe phalamanyathā.
separated_sandhi: ārogyam artha lābhaḥ ca vastra vāhana jam sukhamśubha ṛkṣe śobhanam jñeyam pāpa bhe phalam anyathā
english: Good health, financial gain, and happiness derived from clothes and vehicles are to be known as excellent if the constellation (ṛkṣa) is auspicious. If the constellation is inauspicious, the results will be otherwise.

sanskrit: सुतभावगतर्क्षस्य कालचक्रदशा यदा । सुतस्त्रीराज्यसौख्याप्तिरारोग्यं मित्रसंगमः ॥१३९॥
transliteration: sutabhāvagatarkṣasya kālacakradaśā yadā . sutastrīrājyasaukhyāptirārogyaṃ mitrasaṃgamaḥ.
separated_sandhi: suta bhāva gata ṛkṣasya kāla cakra daśā yadā sutastrī rājya saukhya āptiḥ ārogyam mitra saṅgamaḥ
english: When the Kālacakra-daśā (period) of the constellation (ṛkṣa) situated in the house of children (suta-bhāva) occurs, there will be the acquisition of happiness from children, wife, and kingdom, along with good health and the company of friends.

sanskrit: विद्याबुद्धियशोलाभो धैर्यं च विक्रमोदयः । शुभराशौ शुभं पूर्णं पापर्क्षे फलमन्यथा ॥१४०॥
transliteration: vidyābuddhiyaśolābho dhairyaṃ ca vikramodayaḥ . śubharāśau śubhaṃ pūrṇaṃ pāparkṣe phalamanyathā.
separated_sandhi: vidyā buddhi yaśaḥ lābhaḥ dhairyam ca vikrama udayaḥśubha rāśau śubham pūrṇam pāpa ṛkṣe phalam anyathā
english: The gain of knowledge, intelligence, and fame, along with courage and the rise of valor, are completely auspicious when the sign (rāśi) is auspicious. If the constellation (ṛkṣa) is inauspicious, the results will be otherwise.

sanskrit: रिपुभावगतर्क्षस्य कालचक्रदशा यदा । तदा चोरादिभूपाग्निविषशस्त्रभयं महत् ॥१४१॥
transliteration: ripubhāvagatarkṣasya kālacakradaśā yadā . tadā corādibhūpāgniviṣaśastrabhayaṃ mahat.
separated_sandhi: ripubhāvagatarakṣasya kālacakradaśā yadātadā corādibhūpāgniviṣaśastrabhayam mahat
english: When the Kalachakra Dasha of the constellation situated in the house of enemies occurs, then there is great fear from thieves, rulers, fire, poison, and weapons.

sanskrit: प्रमेहगुल्मपण्ड्वादिरोगाणामपि संभवः । पापर्क्षे फलमेवं स्यात् शुभर्क्षे मिश्रमादिशेत् ॥१४२॥
transliteration: pramehagulmapaṇḍvādirogāṇāmapi saṃbhavaḥ . pāparkṣe phalamevaṃ syāt śubharkṣe miśramādiśet.
separated_sandhi: pramehagulmapaṇḍvādirogāṇām api saṃbhavaḥpāparkṣe phalam evaṃ syāt śubharkṣe miśram ādiśet
english: There is also a possibility of diseases such as diabetes, abdominal tumors, and impotence. Such a result occurs when the constellation is malefic, but in an auspicious constellation, one should declare mixed results.

sanskrit: जायाभावगतर्क्षस्य कालचक्रदशा यदा । तदा पाणिग्रहः पत्नीपुत्रलाभादिकं सुखम् ॥१४३॥
transliteration: jāyābhāvagatarkṣasya kālacakradaśā yadā . tadā pāṇigrahaḥ patnīputralābhādikaṃ sukham.
separated_sandhi: jāyābhāvagatarakṣasya kālacakradaśā yadātadā pāṇigrahaḥ patnīputralābhādikam sukham
english: When the Kalachakra Dasha of the constellation situated in the house of the spouse occurs, then there is marriage, and happiness such as the acquisition of a wife and children.

sanskrit: कृषियोधनवस्त्राप्तिर्नृपपूजा महद्यशः । शुभराशौ फलं पूर्णं पापराशौ च तद्दलम् ॥१४४॥
transliteration: kṛṣiyodhanavastrāptirnṛpapūjā mahadyaśaḥ . śubharāśau phalaṃ pūrṇaṃ pāparāśau ca taddalam.
separated_sandhi: kṛṣiyodhanavastrāptiḥ nṛpapūjā mahat yaśaḥśubharāśau phalam pūrṇam pāparāśau ca tat dalam
english: There is acquisition of agricultural produce, wealth, and new clothes, along with honor from rulers and great fame. The result is complete in an auspicious sign, and half of that in a malefic sign.

sanskrit: मृत्युभावस्थितर्क्षस्य कालचक्रदशा तदा । स्थाननाशं महद् दुःखं बन्धुनाशं धनक्षयम् ॥१४५॥
transliteration: mṛtyubhāvasthitarkṣasya kālacakradaśā tadā . sthānanāśaṃ mahad duḥkhaṃ bandhunāśaṃ dhanakṣayam.
separated_sandhi: mṛtyubhāvasthitarakṣasya kālacakradaśā tadāsthānanāśam mahat duḥkham bandhunāśam dhanakṣayam
english: When the Kalachakra Dasha of the constellation situated in the house of death occurs, then there is loss of position, great sorrow, loss of relatives, and depletion of wealth.

sanskrit: दारिद्र्यमन्नविद्वोपमरिभीतिं च निर्दिशेत् । पापराशौ फलं पूर्णं शुभराशौ च तद्दलम् ॥१४६॥
transliteration: dāridryamannavidvopamaribhītiṃ ca nirdiśet . pāparāśau phalaṃ pūrṇaṃ śubharāśau ca taddalam.
separated_sandhi: dāridryam annavidvopamaribhītim ca nirdiśetpāparāśau phalam pūrṇam śubharāśau ca tat dalam
english: One should predict poverty, scarcity of food, loss of wealth, and fear of epidemics or calamities. If the condition arises in an inauspicious astrological sign (rāśi), the full negative outcome is experienced; if in an auspicious sign, only a partial result (or milder negative outcome) occurs.

sanskrit: धर्मभावगतर्क्षस्य कालचक्रदशा यदा । तदा पुत्रकलत्रार्थकृषिगेहसुखं वदेत् ॥१४७॥
transliteration: dharmabhāvagatarkṣasya kālacakradaśā yadā . tadā putrakalatrārthakṛṣigehasukhaṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: dharmabhāvagatarṣasya kālacakradaśā yadātadā putrakalatrārthakṛṣigehasukham vadet
english: When the kālacakradaśā (astrological period) of the sign (ṛkṣa) situated in the house of natural law (dharma) occurs, then one should predict happiness from children, wife, wealth, agriculture, and home.

sanskrit: सत्कर्मधर्मसंसिद्धिं महज्जनपरिग्रहम् । शुभराशौ शुभं पूर्णं पापराशौ च तद्दलम् ॥१४८॥
transliteration: satkarmadharmasaṃsiddhiṃ mahajjanaparigraham . śubharāśau śubhaṃ pūrṇaṃ pāparāśau ca taddalam.
separated_sandhi: satkarmadharmasaṃsiddhim mahajjanaparigrahamśubharāśau śubham pūrṇam pāparāśau ca tat dalam
english: One experiences the perfect accomplishment of virtuous actions (karma) and adherence to natural law (dharma), along with the patronage of great individuals. If these conditions are in an auspicious astrological sign (rāśi), the full positive outcome is realized; if in an inauspicious sign, only a partial result occurs.

sanskrit: कर्मभावगतर्क्षस्य कालचक्रदशा यदा । राज्याप्तिर्भूपसम्मानं पुत्रदारादिजं सुखम् ॥१४९॥
transliteration: karmabhāvagatarkṣasya kālacakradaśā yadā . rājyāptirbhūpasammānaṃ putradārādijaṃ sukham.
separated_sandhi: karmabhāvagatarṣasya kālacakradaśā yadārājyāptiḥ bhūpasammānam putradārādijam sukham
english: When the kālacakradaśā (astrological period) of the sign (ṛkṣa) situated in the house of action or profession (karma) occurs, there will be the attainment of high office or sovereignty, honor from rulers, and happiness originating from children, wife, and other such relations.

sanskrit: सत्कर्मफलमैश्वर्यं सद्गोष्ठ्या कालयापनम् । शुभराशौ फलं पूर्णं पापराशौ च मिश्रितम् ॥१५०॥
transliteration: satkarmaphalamaiśvaryaṃ sadgoṣṭhyā kālayāpanam . śubharāśau phalaṃ pūrṇaṃ pāparāśau ca miśritam.
separated_sandhi: satkarmaphalam aiśvaryam sadgoṣṭhyā kālayāpanamśubharāśau phalam pūrṇam pāparāśau ca miśritam
english: One experiences the fruits of virtuous actions (karma), prosperity, and the passing of time in good company or virtuous assemblies. If these conditions are in an auspicious astrological sign (rāśi), the full positive outcome is realized; if in an inauspicious sign, the results are mixed.

sanskrit: लाभभावस्थितर्क्षस्य कालचक्रदशा यदा । पुत्रस्त्रीबन्धुसौख्याप्तिर्भूपप्रीतिर्महत्सुखम् ॥१५१॥
transliteration: lābhabhāvasthitarkṣasya kālacakradaśā yadā . putrastrībandhusaukhyāptirbhūpaprītirmahatsukham.
separated_sandhi: lābhabhāvasthita ṛkṣasya kālacakradaśā yadā putrastrī bandhu saukhya āptiḥ bhūpa prītiḥ mahat sukham
english: When the Kālacakra-daśā of the zodiac sign situated in the eleventh house (the house of gains) operates, there will be the attainment of happiness from sons, wives, and relatives, favor from the king, and great joy.

sanskrit: धनवस्त्राप्तिरारोग्यं सतां सङ्गश्च जायते । शुभराशौ फलं पूर्णं पापराशौ च खण्डितम् ॥१५२॥
transliteration: dhanavastrāptirārogyaṃ satāṃ saṅgaśca jāyate . śubharāśau phalaṃ pūrṇaṃ pāparāśau ca khaṇḍitam.
separated_sandhi: dhana vastra āptiḥ ārogyam satām saṅgaḥ ca jāyateśubharāśau phalam pūrṇam pāparāśau ca khaṇḍitam
english: The acquisition of wealth and clothes, good health, and the company of virtuous people occur. When this occurs in an auspicious sign, the results are complete, but in a malefic sign, they are fragmented.

sanskrit: व्ययभावगतर्क्षस्य कालचक्रदशा तदा । उद्योगभङ्गमालस्यं देहपीडां पदच्युतिम् ॥१५३॥
transliteration: vyayabhāvagatarkṣasya kālacakradaśā tadā . udyogabhaṅgamālasyaṃ dehapīḍāṃ padacyutim.
separated_sandhi: vyayabhāvagata ṛkṣasya kālacakradaśā tadāudyogabhaṅgam ālasyam dehapīḍām padacyutim
english: Then, when the Kālacakra-daśā of the zodiac sign situated in the twelfth house (the house of expenditure) operates, it brings destruction of enterprises, laziness, bodily affliction, and loss of position.

sanskrit: दारिद्यं कर्मवैफल्यं तथा व्यर्थव्ययं वदेत् । पापराशौ फलं त्वेवं शुभराशौ च तद्दलम् ॥१५४॥
transliteration: dāridyaṃ karmavaiphalyaṃ tathā vyarthavyayaṃ vadet . pāparāśau phalaṃ tvevaṃ śubharāśau ca taddalam.
separated_sandhi: dāridyam karmavaiphalyam tathā vyarthavyayam vadetpāparāśau phalam tu evam śubharāśau ca tat dalam
english: One should declare poverty, failure in actions (karma), and useless expenditure. Such results are fully experienced when this daśā occurs in a malefic sign, while in an auspicious sign, only half of those effects are felt.

sanskrit: लग्नादिव्ययपर्यन्तं भानां चरदशां ब्रुवे । तस्मात् तदीशपर्यन्तं संख्यामत्र दशां विदुः ॥१५५॥
transliteration: lagnādivyayaparyantaṃ bhānāṃ caradaśāṃ bruve . tasmāt tadīśaparyantaṃ saṃkhyāmatra daśāṃ viduḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagna ādi vyaya paryantam bhānām caradaśām bruvetasmāt tat īśa paryantam saṃkhyām atra daśām viduḥ
english: I shall now explain the Caradaśā of the zodiac signs, beginning from the ascendant (lagna) up to the twelfth house (the house of expenditure). Therefore, in this context, they consider the duration (saṃkhyā) of this daśā to be up to the lord of that specific sign.

sanskrit: मेषादित्रित्रिभैर्ज्ञेयं पदमोजपदे क्रमात् । दशाब्दानयने कार्या गणना व्युत्क्रमात् समे ॥१५६॥
transliteration: meṣāditritribhairjñeyaṃ padamojapade kramāt . daśābdānayane kāryā gaṇanā vyutkramāt same.
separated_sandhi: meṣāditritribhaiḥ jñeyam padam ojapade kramātdaśābdayane kāryā gaṇanā vyutkramāt same
english: Starting from Aries, the padas (quarter divisions of a sign) should be understood as three for each sign. In odd signs (oja) they are reckoned in direct order. For the purpose of calculating the years of planetary periods (daśā), the calculation should be performed in reverse order for even signs (sama).

sanskrit: वृश्चिकाधिपती द्वौ च केतुभौमौ स्मृतौ द्विज । शनिराहु च कुम्भस्य स्वामिनौ परिकीर्तितो ॥१५७॥
transliteration: vṛścikādhipatī dvau ca ketubhaumau smṛtau dvija . śanirāhu ca kumbhasya svāminau parikīrtito.
separated_sandhi: vṛścikādhipatī dvau ca ketubhaumau smṛtau dvijaśanirāhu ca kumbhasya svāminau parikīrtitau
english: O twice-born (dvija), Ketu and Mars are considered to be the two lords of Scorpio. Similarly, Saturn and Rahu are declared as the two masters of Aquarius.

sanskrit: द्विनाथक्षेत्रयोरत्र क्रियते निर्णयोऽधुना । द्वावेवाधिपती विप्र युक्तौ स्वर्क्षे स्थितौ यदि ॥१५८॥
transliteration: dvināthakṣetrayoratra kriyate nirṇayo'dhunā . dvāvevādhipatī vipra yuktau svarkṣe sthitau yadi.
separated_sandhi: dvināthakṣetrayoḥ atra kriyate nirṇayaḥ adhunā dvaueva adhipatī vipra yuktau svarkṣe sthitau yadi
english: O Brahmin (vipra), a determination is now being made regarding those signs (kṣetra) that have two lords. This applies if both of their lords are indeed situated in their own respective signs.

sanskrit: वर्ष द्वादशकं तत्र न चेदेकादि चिन्तयेत् । एकः स्वक्षेत्रयोऽन्यस्तु परत्र यदि संस्थितः ॥१५९॥
transliteration: varṣa dvādaśakaṃ tatra na cedekādi cintayet . ekaḥ svakṣetrayo'nyastu paratra yadi saṃsthitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: varṣam dvādaśakam tatra na cet ekādi cintayet ekaḥsvakṣetrayoḥ anyaḥ tu paratra yadi saṃsthitaḥ
english: In that situation (where both lords are in their own sign), there are twelve years (assigned to that daśā). If not (i.e., if both are not in their own signs), one should consider the planets individually. If one (of the two lords) is in its own sign (svakṣetra) and the other is situated in a different sign...

sanskrit: तदाऽन्यत्र स्थितं नाथं परिगृह्य दशां नयेत् । द्वावप्यन्यर्क्षगौ तौ चेत् तमोर्मध्ये च यो बली ॥१६०॥
transliteration: tadā'nyatra sthitaṃ nāthaṃ parigṛhya daśāṃ nayet . dvāvapyanyarkṣagau tau cet tamormadhye ca yo balī.
separated_sandhi: tadā anyatra sthitam nātham parigṛhya daśām nayetdvau api anyarkṣagau tau cet tayoḥ madhye ca yaḥ balī
english: Then, if one (of the two lords) is in its own sign (svakṣetra) while the other is situated in a different sign, one should assign the planetary period (daśā) by taking the lord that is situated in that other sign. If, however, both of those lords are situated in other signs, then among those two, the one which is stronger (balī) should be chosen.

sanskrit: तत एव दशा ग्राह्या क्रमाद् वोत्क्रमतो द्विजः । बलस्याऽत्र विचारे स्यादग्रहात् सग्रहो बली ॥१६१॥
transliteration: tata eva daśā grāhyā kramād votkramato dvijaḥ . balasyā'tra vicāre syādagrahāt sagraho balī.
separated_sandhi: tataḥ eva daśā grāhyā kramāt vā utkramataḥ dvijaḥbalasya atra vicāre syāt agrahāt sagrahaḥ balī
english: O twice-born (dvija), the planetary periods (daśā) should be considered from that very point, either in forward or reverse order. In this assessment of strength, if a planet is accompanied by another planet, it is considered stronger than one that is not accompanied.

sanskrit: द्वावेव सग्रहौ तौ चेत् बली तत्राधिकग्रहः । ग्रहयोगसमानत्वे ज्ञेयं राशिबलाद् बलम् ॥१६२॥
transliteration: dvāveva sagrahau tau cet balī tatrādhikagrahaḥ . grahayogasamānatve jñeyaṃ rāśibalād balam.
separated_sandhi: dvau eva sagrahau tau cet balī tatra adhika-grahaḥgraha-yoga-samānatve jñeyam rāśi-balāt balam
english: If both of them (planets) are accompanied by other planets, then the one with more planets is stronger. If the number of planets in conjunction (yoga) is equal, then the strength (bala) should be determined by the strength of the sign (rāśi-bala).

sanskrit: ज्ञेयाश्चरस्थिरद्वन्द्वाः क्रमतो बलशालिनः । राशिसत्त्वसमानत्वे बहुवर्षो बली भवेद् ॥१६३॥
transliteration: jñeyāścarasthiradvandvāḥ kramato balaśālinaḥ . rāśisattvasamānatve bahuvarṣo balī bhaved.
separated_sandhi: jñeyāḥ cara-sthira-dvandvāḥ kramataḥ bala-śālinaḥrāśi-sattva-samānatve bahu-varṣaḥ balī bhavet
english: The movable (cara), fixed (sthira), and dual (dvisvabhāva) signs should be understood as possessing strength in that order. If the inherent quality or strength of the signs is equal, then the one signifying more years (in its daśā) becomes stronger.

sanskrit: एकः स्वोच्चगतश्चाऽन्यः परत्र यदि संस्थितः । गृह्णीयादुच्चखेटस्थं राशिमन्यं विहाय वै ॥१६४॥
transliteration: ekaḥ svoccagataścā'nyaḥ paratra yadi saṃsthitaḥ . gṛhṇīyāduccakheṭasthaṃ rāśimanyaṃ vihāya vai.
separated_sandhi: ekaḥ sva-ucca-gataḥ ca anyaḥ paratra yadi saṃsthitaḥgṛhṇīyāt ucca-kheṭa-stham rāśim anyam vihāya vai
english: If one (planet) is exalted (svocca-gata) and another is situated elsewhere (paratra), one should definitely accept the planet that is situated in its exaltation (ucca-kheṭa-stha), disregarding the other sign.

sanskrit: उच्चखेटस्य सद्भावे वर्षमेकं च निक्षिपेत् । तथैव नीचखेटस्य वर्षमेकं विशोधयेत् ॥१६५॥
transliteration: uccakheṭasya sadbhāve varṣamekaṃ ca nikṣipet . tathaiva nīcakheṭasya varṣamekaṃ viśodhayet.
separated_sandhi: ucca-kheṭasya sad-bhāve varṣam ekam ca nikṣipettathā eva nīca-kheṭasya varṣam ekam viśodhayet
english: In the presence of an exalted planet (ucca-kheṭa), one year should be added. Similarly, in the case of a debilitated planet (nīca-kheṭa), one year should be subtracted.

sanskrit: एवं सर्वं समालोच्यजातकस्य फलं वदेत् ॥१६६॥
transliteration: evaṃ sarvaṃ samālocyajātakasya phalaṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: evaṃ sarvaṃ samālocyajātakasya phalaṃ vadet
english: Having thus thoroughly considered everything, one should declare the results (predictions) for the native.

sanskrit: क्रमादुत्क्रमतो वाऽपि धर्मभावपदक्रमात् । लग्नराशिं समारभ्य विज्ञश्चरदशां नयेत् ॥१६७॥
transliteration: kramādutkramato vā'pi dharmabhāvapadakramāt . lagnarāśiṃ samārabhya vijñaścaradaśāṃ nayet.
separated_sandhi: kramāt utkramataḥ vā api dharmabhāvapada-kramātlagna-rāśiṃ samārabhya vijñaḥ caradaśāṃ nayet
english: The expert should apply the "cara-daśā" (planetary period) starting from the ascendant sign, either in direct or reverse order, or according to the sequence of the "dharma" house (9th house) or the "pada" sign.

sanskrit: अथाऽहं सम्प्रवक्ष्यामि स्थिरसंज्ञां दशां द्विज । चरे सप्त स्थिरे चाऽष्टौ द्वन्द्वे नव समाः स्मृताः ॥१६८॥
transliteration: athā'haṃ sampravakṣyāmi sthirasaṃjñāṃ daśāṃ dvija . care sapta sthire cā'ṣṭau dvandve nava samāḥ smṛtāḥ.
separated_sandhi: atha ahaṃ sampravakṣyāmi sthirasaṃjñāṃ daśāṃ dvijacare sapta sthire ca aṣṭau dvandve nava samāḥ smṛtāḥ
english: Now, O twice-born (dvija), I shall thoroughly explain the "Sthira-saṃjñā" (Fixed) "Daśā". Seven years are stated for movable signs, eight for fixed signs, and nine for dual (common) signs.

sanskrit: स्थिरत्वाच्च दशाब्दानां स्थिराख्येति निगद्यते । ब्रह्मखेटाश्रितर्क्षादिर्दशेयं परिवर्तते ॥१६९॥
transliteration: sthiratvācca daśābdānāṃ sthirākhyeti nigadyate . brahmakheṭāśritarkṣādirdaśeyaṃ parivartate.
separated_sandhi: sthiratvāt ca daśābdānāṃ sthirākhyā iti nigadyatebrahmakheṭāśritarkṣādiḥ daśā iyaṃ parivartate
english: And because the duration of these planetary periods (daśā) is fixed, it is therefore called "Sthira" (the fixed daśā). This "daśā" system revolves (or is calculated) starting from the zodiac sign occupied by the Brahmā-planet (brahma-graha).

sanskrit: योऽसौ ब्रह्मग्रहः प्रोक्तः कथं स ज्ञायते मुने । इति स्पष्टतरं ब्रूहि कृपाऽस्ति यदि ते मयि ॥१७०॥
transliteration: yo'sau brahmagrahaḥ proktaḥ kathaṃ sa jñāyate mune . iti spaṣṭataraṃ brūhi kṛpā'sti yadi te mayi.
separated_sandhi: yaḥ asau brahmagrahaḥ proktaḥ kathaṃ saḥ jñāyatemune iti spaṣṭataraṃ brūhi kṛpā asti yadi te mayi
english: O sage, how is that Brahmā-planet (brahma-graha) which was mentioned, to be understood? Please explain this more clearly if you have compassion for me.
