sanskrit: षष्ठाष्टव्ययनाथेषु यो बली विषमर्क्षगः । पृष्ठस्थितो भवेद् ब्रह्मां बलिनो लग्नजाययोः ॥१७१॥
transliteration: ṣaṣṭhāṣṭavyayanātheṣu yo balī viṣamarkṣagaḥ . pṛṣṭhasthito bhaved brahmāṃ balino lagnajāyayoḥ.
separated_sandhi: ṣaṣṭha-aṣṭa-vyaya-nātheṣu yaḥ balī viṣama-ṛkṣa-gaḥpṛṣṭha-sthitaḥ bhavet brahmā balinaḥ lagna-jāyayoḥ
english: Among the lords of the sixth, eighth, and twelfth houses, whichever is strong and located in an odd sign, or is situated in a back-rising sign, that one becomes the Brahma (planet for longevity) for the strong ascendant (lagna) and descendant (jāyā).

sanskrit: कारकादष्टमेशो वा ब्रह्माऽप्यष्टभावगः । शनौ पाते च ब्रह्मत्त्वे ब्रह्मा तत्षष्ठखेचरः ॥१७२॥
transliteration: kārakādaṣṭameśo vā brahmā'pyaṣṭabhāvagaḥ . śanau pāte ca brahmattve brahmā tatṣaṣṭhakhecaraḥ.
separated_sandhi: kārakāt aṣṭameśaḥ vā brahmā api aṣṭa-bhāva-gaḥśanau pāte ca brahmatve brahmā tat-ṣaṣṭha-khecaraḥ
english: Alternatively, the lord of the eighth house from the significator (karaka), or even the designated Brahma (planet) if it is situated in the eighth house, or if Saturn (śani) or the lunar nodes (pāta) are involved in determining the Brahma (longevity significator), then the planet located in the sixth house from that (initial) Brahma becomes the final Brahma (planet for longevity).

sanskrit: बहवो लक्षणक्रान्ता ज्ञेयस्तेष्वधिकांशकः । अंशसाम्ये बलाधिक्याद् विज्ञेयो ब्रह्मखेचरः ॥१७३॥
transliteration: bahavo lakṣaṇakrāntā jñeyasteṣvadhikāṃśakaḥ . aṃśasāmye balādhikyād vijñeyo brahmakhecaraḥ.
separated_sandhi: bahavaḥ lakṣaṇa-krāntāḥ jñeyaḥ teṣu adhika-aṃśakaḥ| aṃśa-sāmye bala-adhikyāt vijñeyaḥ brahma-khecaraḥ
english: If many planets fulfill the aforementioned criteria, then the one with the highest degree (aṃśa) should be identified as the (Brahma planet). If their degrees are equal, then the planet with superior strength (bala) should be recognized as the Brahma (longevity significator) planet.

sanskrit: योगार्धे च दशामानं द्वयोर्योगार्धसम्मितम् । लग्नसप्तमप्राण्यादिर्दशेयं च प्रवर्तते ॥१७४॥
transliteration: yogārdhe ca daśāmānaṃ dvayoryogārdhasammitam . lagnasaptamaprāṇyādirdaśeyaṃ ca pravartate.
separated_sandhi: yoga-ardhe ca daśā-mānam dvayoḥ yoga-ardha-sammitam| lagna-saptama-prāṇy-ādiḥ daśā iyam ca pravartate
english: And the duration of a Dasha (planetary period) is measured as half of the total longevity (yoga) contributed by two (planets). This Dasha, which begins from the ascendant (lagna) or the seventh house (as the life-giving source), then commences.

sanskrit: लग्नसप्तमयोर्मध्ये यो राशिर्बलवान् भवेत् । ततः केन्द्रादिसंस्थानां राशीनाञ्च बलक्रमात् ॥१७५॥
transliteration: lagnasaptamayormadhye yo rāśirbalavān bhavet . tataḥ kendrādisaṃsthānāṃ rāśīnāñca balakramāt.
separated_sandhi: lagna-saptamayoḥ madhye yaḥ rāśiḥ balavān bhavet |tataḥ kendra-ādi-saṃsthānām rāśīnām ca bala-kramāt
english: Among the ascendant (lagna) and the seventh house, whichever sign is stronger, from that sign, the strength of the other signs, specifically those situated in angular (kendra) houses and so forth, is considered in a hierarchical order of strength (bala).

sanskrit: कारकादपि राशीनां खेटानां चैवमेव हि । दशाब्दाश्चरवज्ज्ञेयाः खेटानां च स्वभावधि ॥१७६॥
transliteration: kārakādapi rāśīnāṃ kheṭānāṃ caivameva hi . daśābdāścaravajjñeyāḥ kheṭānāṃ ca svabhāvadhi.
separated_sandhi: kārakāt api rāśīnām kheṭānām ca evam eva hi |daśāabdāḥ caravat jñeyāḥ kheṭānām ca svabhāvādhi
english: The daśā periods (dasha-abda) for the signs and planets should be understood as similar to the Chara (movable) daśā, even considering them from the significators (kāraka), and also based on the intrinsic nature of the planets.

sanskrit: द्विराश्यधिपक्षेटस्य गण्येदुभयावधि । उभयोर्धिक संख्या कारकस्य दशा समाः ॥१७७॥
transliteration: dvirāśyadhipakṣeṭasya gaṇyedubhayāvadhi . ubhayordhika saṃkhyā kārakasya daśā samāḥ.
separated_sandhi: dvirāśyadhipakheṭasya gaṇyet ubhayāvadhī |ubhayoḥ adhika saṅkhyā kārakasya daśā samāḥ
english: For the planet that lords two signs, both boundaries should be counted. The larger number between the two becomes the daśā years for that significator (kāraka).

sanskrit: आत्मकारकमारभ्य कारकाख्यदशा क्रमात् । लग्नात् कारकपर्यन्तं संख्यामत्र दशां विदुः ॥१७८॥
transliteration: ātmakārakamārabhya kārakākhyadaśā kramāt . lagnāt kārakaparyantaṃ saṃkhyāmatra daśāṃ viduḥ.
separated_sandhi: ātmakārakam ārabhya kārakākhyadaśā kramāt |lagnāt kārakaparyantam saṅkhyām atra daśām viduḥ
english: Starting from the Self-Significator (ātmakāraka), the daśā known as Karaka proceeds in sequence. The number of signs from the Ascendant (lagna) up to the Karaka (planet) is understood as the daśā (period) in this context.

sanskrit: मण्डूकापरपर्याया त्रिकूटाख्यदशा द्विज । लग्नसप्तमयोर्मध्ये यो राशिर्बलवान् भवेत् ॥१७९॥
transliteration: maṇḍūkāparaparyāyā trikūṭākhyadaśā dvija . lagnasaptamayormadhye yo rāśirbalavān bhavet.
separated_sandhi: maṇḍūka aparaparyāyā trikūṭākhyadaśā dvija |lagna saptamayoḥ madhye yaḥ rāśiḥ balavān bhavet
english: O twice-born (dvija), the daśā named Trikūṭa is also known as Maṇḍūka. Among the Ascendant (lagna) and the seventh house, whichever sign is stronger...

sanskrit: ततः क्रमेणौजराशौ समे नेया तथोऽत्क्रमात् । त्रिकूटानां च विज्ञेयाः स्थिरवच्च दशा समाः ॥१८०॥
transliteration: tataḥ krameṇaujarāśau same neyā tatho'tkramāt . trikūṭānāṃ ca vijñeyāḥ sthiravacca daśā samāḥ.
separated_sandhi: tataḥ krameṇa ojarāśau same neyā tathā utkramāt| trikūṭānām ca vijñeyāḥ sthiravat ca daśā samāḥ
english: Then, the calculation should proceed in direct order for odd signs and similarly in reverse order for even signs. And the daśā years for the Trikūṭa (daśā) should be understood just like those for the Sthira (fixed) daśā.

sanskrit: निर्याणस्य विचारार्थं कैश्चिछूलदशा स्मृता । लग्नसप्तमतो मृत्युभयोर्यो बलवान् भवेत् ॥१८१॥
transliteration: niryāṇasya vicārārthaṃ kaiścichūladaśā smṛtā . lagnasaptamato mṛtyubhayoryo balavān bhavet.
separated_sandhi: niryāṇasya vicārārtham kaiścit śūladaśā smṛtālagna-saptamataḥ mṛtyubhayoḥ yaḥ balavān bhavet
english: For the purpose of considering the time of death, some authorities mention the Śūla daśā. One should consider whichever is stronger between the Lagna (ascendant) and the seventh house for matters pertaining to death.

sanskrit: तदादिर्विषमे विप्र क्रमादुत्क्रमतः समे । दशाब्दाः स्थिरवत्तत्र बलिमारकभे मृतिः ॥१८२॥
transliteration: tadādirviṣame vipra kramādutkramataḥ same . daśābdāḥ sthiravattatra balimārakabhe mṛtiḥ.
separated_sandhi: tad-ādiḥ viṣame vipra kramāt utkramataḥ samedaśābdāḥ sthiravat tatra bali-mārakabhe mṛtiḥ
english: O Brahmin, starting from that (stronger house), the daśā years proceed in direct order for odd signs and in reverse order for even signs. In this system, the daśā years are fixed. Death occurs in a strong death-inflicting (māraka) house.

sanskrit: जन्मलग्नत्रिकोणेषु यो राशिर्बलवान् भवेत् । तमार्भ्य नयेद् धीमान् चरिपर्यायवद् दशाम् ॥१८३॥
transliteration: janmalagnatrikoṇeṣu yo rāśirbalavān bhavet . tamārbhya nayed dhīmān cariparyāyavad daśām.
separated_sandhi: janmalagna-trikoṇeṣu yaḥ rāśiḥ balavān bhavettam ārabhya nayet dhīmān cari-paryāyavat daśām
english: Among the Lagna (ascendant) and its trinal houses (1st, 5th, 9th), a wise person should calculate the daśā, starting from whichever sign among them is stronger, similar to the method of Chara daśā.

sanskrit: क्रमादुत्क्रमतो ग्राह्यं त्रिकोणं विषमे समे । त्रिकोणाख्यदशा प्रोक्ता समा नाथावसानकाः ॥१८४॥
transliteration: kramādutkramato grāhyaṃ trikoṇaṃ viṣame same . trikoṇākhyadaśā proktā samā nāthāvasānakāḥ.
separated_sandhi: kramāt utkramataḥ grāhyam trikoṇam viṣame sametrikoṇākhya-daśā proktā samāḥ nātha-avasānakāḥ
english: For odd signs, the trines should be considered in direct order, and for even signs, in reverse order. This daśā is known as the Trikoṇa daśā, and its years are fixed, concluding with the lords (of the signs).

sanskrit: लग्नाद् धर्मस्य तद्दृष्टराशीनां च दशास्ततः । दशमस्य च तद्दृष्टराशीनां च नयेत् पुनः ॥१८५॥
transliteration: lagnād dharmasya taddṛṣṭarāśīnāṃ ca daśāstataḥ . daśamasya ca taddṛṣṭarāśīnāṃ ca nayet punaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagnāt dharmasya tad-dṛṣṭa-rāśīnām ca daśāḥ tataḥdaśamasya ca tad-dṛṣṭa-rāśīnām ca nayet punaḥ
english: One should then calculate the daśās from the Lagna (ascendant), and from the (lord of the) ninth house (dharma) and the signs aspected by its lord. Thereafter, one should again calculate (the daśās) from the (lord of the) tenth house and the signs aspected by its lord.

sanskrit: एकादशस्य तद्दृष्टराशीनां स्थिरवत् समाः । प्रवृत्ता दृग् वशाद्यस्माद् दृग्दशेयं ततः स्मृता ॥१८६॥
transliteration: ekādaśasya taddṛṣṭarāśīnāṃ sthiravat samāḥ . pravṛttā dṛg vaśādyasmād dṛgdaśeyaṃ tataḥ smṛtā.
separated_sandhi: ekādaśasya tat dṛṣṭa rāśīnām sthiravat samāḥpravṛttā dṛk vaśāt yasmāt dṛk daśā iyam tataḥ smṛtā
english: The number of years assigned to the signs aspected by the eleventh house is similar to those for fixed signs. Since this Dṛgdaśā system is initiated based on planetary aspects (dṛk), it is therefore known as the Dṛk-Daśā.

sanskrit: चरे व्युत्क्रमतो ग्राह्या दृग्योग्याः स्थिरभे क्रमात् । विषमे क्रमतो द्वन्द्वे राशयो व्युत्क्रमात् समे ॥१८७॥
transliteration: care vyutkramato grāhyā dṛgyogyāḥ sthirabhe kramāt . viṣame kramato dvandve rāśayo vyutkramāt same.
separated_sandhi: care vyutkramataḥ grāhyāḥ dṛk yogyāḥ sthirabhe kramātviṣame kramataḥ dvandve rāśayaḥ vyutkramāt same
english: For movable signs, the applicable signs (for Dṛk-Daśā) are to be reckoned in reverse order. For fixed signs, they are to be reckoned in direct order. When starting from an odd sign, the reckoning is in direct order. When starting from a dual (common) sign, if that dual sign is even, the reckoning of signs is in reverse order.

sanskrit: ऋक्षे लग्नादिराशीनां दशा राशिदशा स्मृता । भयातं रविभिर्निघ्नं भभोगविहृतं फलम् ॥१८८॥
transliteration: ṛkṣe lagnādirāśīnāṃ daśā rāśidaśā smṛtā . bhayātaṃ ravibhirnighnaṃ bhabhogavihṛtaṃ phalam.
separated_sandhi: ṛkṣe lagna ādi rāśīnām daśā rāśi daśā smṛtā bhayaātam ravibhiḥ nighnam bha bhoga vihṛtam phalam
english: The daśā periods of the signs, beginning from the ascendant (lagna), are called Rāśi-Daśā. The amount of time already elapsed in a sign (bhayāta) is to be multiplied by the number of years for a sign (twelve 'suns'), and this product is then to be divided by the full extent of a sign (bhābhoga, i.e., 30 degrees) to get the result (phalam).

sanskrit: राश्याद्यं लग्नराश्यादौ योज्यं द्वादशशेषितम् । तदारभ्य क्रमादोजे दशा ज्ञेयोत्क्रमात् समे ॥१८९॥
transliteration: rāśyādyaṃ lagnarāśyādau yojyaṃ dvādaśaśeṣitam . tadārabhya kramādoje daśā jñeyotkramāt same.
separated_sandhi: rāśi ādyam lagna rāśi ādau yojyam dvādaśa śeṣitamtat ārabhya kramāt oje daśā jñeya utkramāt same
english: The initial period (daśā) of the sign, pertaining to the ascendant (lagna) sign, should be applied at its commencement. After this calculation, the remainder when divided by twelve (years) is considered. Starting from this (ascendant) sign, the daśā periods are known to proceed in direct order for odd signs and in reverse order for even signs.

sanskrit: दशाब्दा भुक्तभागघ्ना त्रिंशता विहृताह् फलम् । भुक्तं वर्षादिकं ज्ञेयं भोग्यं मानाद् विशोधितम् ॥१९०॥
transliteration: daśābdā bhuktabhāgaghnā triṃśatā vihṛtāh phalam . bhuktaṃ varṣādikaṃ jñeyaṃ bhogyaṃ mānād viśodhitam.
separated_sandhi: daśā abdāḥ bhukta bhāga ghnāḥ triṃśatā vihṛtāḥ phalambhuktam varṣa ādikam jñeyam bhogyam mānāt viśodhitam
english: The total years of a daśā, when multiplied by the elapsed portion of the sign and then divided by thirty (degrees), yields the elapsed (bhukta) portion of the daśā in years, months, etc. The remaining (bhogya) portion is to be understood by subtracting this elapsed (bhukta) duration from the total daśā duration (māna).

sanskrit: अकारादीन् स्वरान् पञ्च प्रथमं विन्यसेत् क्रमात् । कादिहान्तांल्लिखेद् वर्णान् स्वराधो ङञणोज्झितान् ॥१९१॥
transliteration: akārādīn svarān pañca prathamaṃ vinyaset kramāt . kādihāntāṃllikhed varṇān svarādho ṅañaṇojjhitān.
separated_sandhi: akārādīn svarān pañca prathamaṃ vinyaset kramātkādihāntān likhet varṇān svarādhaḥ ṅañṇojjhitān
english: First, one should arrange the five vowels, beginning with 'a', in sequence. Below these vowels, one should then write the consonants from 'ka' up to 'ha', omitting the letters 'ṅa', 'ña', and 'ṇa'.

sanskrit: तिर्यक् पंक्तिक्रमेणैव पञ्चपञ्चविभागतः । न प्रोक्ता ङञणा वर्णा नामादौ सन्ति ते नहि ॥१९२॥
transliteration: tiryak paṃktikrameṇaiva pañcapañcavibhāgataḥ . na proktā ṅañaṇā varṇā nāmādau santi te nahi.
separated_sandhi: tiryak paṃktikrameṇa eva pañcapañcavibhāgataḥna proktāḥ ṅañṇāḥ varṇāḥ nāmādau santi te na hi
english: The letters 'ṅa', 'ña', and 'ṇa' are not mentioned as being arranged horizontally in rows, divided into groups of five. Indeed, these letters do not appear at the beginning of names.

sanskrit: चेद् भवन्ति तदा ज्ञेया गजडास्ते यथाक्रमात् । यत्र स्वरे स्वनामाद्यवर्णः स्यात् तत्स्वरादयः ॥१९३॥
transliteration: ced bhavanti tadā jñeyā gajaḍāste yathākramāt . yatra svare svanāmādyavarṇaḥ syāt tatsvarādayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: ced bhavanti tadā jñeyāḥ gajaḍāḥ te yathākramātyatra svare svanāmādyavarṇaḥ syāt tatsvarādayaḥ
english: If these (letters 'ṅa', 'ña', 'ṇa') do appear, they should then be understood as 'ga', 'ja', and 'ḍa' respectively. The first letter of a person's name (which falls) in a particular vowel category determines which vowel series (etc.) applies to them.

sanskrit: क्रमात् पंच दशाधीशाः द्वादशद्वादशाब्दकाः । स्वराणां च क्रमाज्ज्ञेयाः दशास्वन्तर्दशादयः ॥१९४॥
transliteration: kramāt paṃca daśādhīśāḥ dvādaśadvādaśābdakāḥ . svarāṇāṃ ca kramājjñeyāḥ daśāsvantardaśādayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: kramāt pañca daśādhīśāḥ dvādaśadvādaśābdakāḥsvarāṇāṃ ca kramāt jñeyāḥ daśāsu antardaśādayaḥ
english: In sequence, the five lords of the daśā periods, each presiding for twelve years, are to be understood. Furthermore, the antardaśās (sub-periods) and so forth, in order, are known from the vowels.

sanskrit: पूर्वमेव मया प्रोक्ता वर्णदाख्या दशा द्विज । इदानीं शम्भुना प्रोक्ता कथ्यते योगिनी दशा ॥१९५॥
transliteration: pūrvameva mayā proktā varṇadākhyā daśā dvija . idānīṃ śambhunā proktā kathyate yoginī daśā.
separated_sandhi: pūrvam eva mayā proktā varṇadākhyā daśā dvijaidānīṃ śambhunā proktā kathyate yoginī daśā
english: O twice-born (dvija), the Varṇadā daśā (planetary period) was already explained by me. Now, the Yoginī daśā, as declared by Śambhu, is being narrated.

sanskrit: मङ्गला पिङ्गला धन्या भ्रामरी भद्रिका तथा । उल्का सिद्धा संकटा च योगिन्योऽष्टौ प्रकीर्तिताः ॥१९६॥
transliteration: maṅgalā piṅgalā dhanyā bhrāmarī bhadrikā tathā . ulkā siddhā saṃkaṭā ca yoginyo'ṣṭau prakīrtitāḥ.
separated_sandhi: maṅgalā piṅgalā dhanyā bhrāmarī bhadrikā tathāulkā siddhā saṃkaṭā ca yoginyaḥ aṣṭau prakīrtitāḥ
english: Maṅgalā, Piṅgalā, Dhanyā, Bhrāmarī, Bhadrikā, and similarly Ulkā, Siddhā, and Saṃkaṭā – these eight are declared to be the Yoginīs.

sanskrit: मङ्गलातोऽभवच्चन्द्रः पिङ्गलातो दिवाकरः । धन्यातो देवपूज्योऽभूद् भ्रामरीतोऽभवत् कुजः ॥१९७॥
transliteration: maṅgalāto'bhavaccandraḥ piṅgalāto divākaraḥ . dhanyāto devapūjyo'bhūd bhrāmarīto'bhavat kujaḥ.
separated_sandhi: maṅgalātaḥ abhavat candraḥ piṅgalātaḥ divākaraḥdhanyātaḥ devapūjyaḥ abhūt bhrāmarītaḥ abhavat kujaḥ
english: From Maṅgalā arose the Moon; from Piṅgalā, the Sun; from Dhanyā arose Jupiter (devapūjya); and from Bhrāmarī, Mars (kuja).

sanskrit: भर्दिकातो बुधो जातस्तथोल्कातः शनैश्चरः । सिद्धातो भार्गवि जातः संकटातस्तमोऽभवद् ॥१९८॥
transliteration: bhardikāto budho jātastatholkātaḥ śanaiścaraḥ . siddhāto bhārgavi jātaḥ saṃkaṭātastamo'bhavad.
separated_sandhi: bhadrikātaḥ budhaḥ jātaḥ tathā ulkātaḥ śanaiścaraḥsiddhātaḥ bhārgavi jātaḥ saṃkaṭātaḥ tamaḥ abhavat
english: From Bhadrikā, Mercury (budha) was born; similarly, from Ulkā, Saturn (śanaiścara) was born. From Siddhā, Venus (bhārgavi) was born; and from Saṃkaṭā, the shadow planet Rahu (tamas) arose.

sanskrit: जन्मर्क्ष च त्रिभिर्युक्तं वसुभिर्भागमाहरेत् । एकादिशेषे विज्ञेया योगिन्योः मङ्गलादिकाः ॥१९९॥
transliteration: janmarkṣa ca tribhiryuktaṃ vasubhirbhāgamāharet . ekādiśeṣe vijñeyā yoginyoḥ maṅgalādikāḥ.
separated_sandhi: janmarkṣam ca tribhiḥ yuktam vasubhiḥ bhāgamāharet ekādiśeṣe vijñeyāḥ yoginyaḥ maṅgalādikāḥ
english: One should take the birth constellation, combined with three (03), and divide the portion by eight (vasubhiḥ). From the remainder, beginning with one, the Yoginīs starting with Maṅgalā are to be known.

sanskrit: एकाद्येकोत्तरा ज्ञेयाः क्रमादासां दशासमाः । नक्षत्रयातभोगाभ्यां भुक्तं भोग्यं च साधयेत् ॥२००॥
transliteration: ekādyekottarā jñeyāḥ kramādāsāṃ daśāsamāḥ . nakṣatrayātabhogābhyāṃ bhuktaṃ bhogyaṃ ca sādhayet.
separated_sandhi: ekādyekottarā jñeyāḥ kramāt āsām daśāsamāḥnakṣatrayātabhogābhyām bhuktam bhogyam ca sādhayet
english: Their periods of years (daśāsamāḥ) are to be known as starting with one and increasing by one in sequence. One should determine the elapsed portion (bhuktam) and the remaining portion (bhogyam) from the constellation's elapsed and remaining spans (nakṣatrayātabhogābhyām).

sanskrit: येषां यदायुः सम्प्रोक्तं पैण्डमांशं निसर्गजम् । तक्षत् तेषां दशा ज्ञेया पैण्डी चांशी निसर्गजा ॥२०१॥
transliteration: yeṣāṃ yadāyuḥ samproktaṃ paiṇḍamāṃśaṃ nisargajam . takṣat teṣāṃ daśā jñeyā paiṇḍī cāṃśī nisargajā.
separated_sandhi: yeṣām yat āyuḥ samproktam paiṇḍam aṃśam nisargajamtakṣat teṣām daśā jñeyā paiṇḍī ca āṃśī nisargajā
english: For those (planets/signs) whose life span ("āyuḥ"), specifically the "Paiṇḍa" portion and the "Nisargaja" (natural) portion, has been declared, their planetary periods ("daśā") should be understood. These "daśā"s are known as "Paiṇḍī" and "Nisargajā Āṃśī", as they are the determining factors.

sanskrit: बली लग्नार्कचन्द्राणां यत्तस्य प्रथमा दशा । तत्केन्द्रादिगतानां च ज्ञेया बलवशात्ततः ॥२०२॥
transliteration: balī lagnārkacandrāṇāṃ yattasya prathamā daśā . tatkendrādigatānāṃ ca jñeyā balavaśāttataḥ.
separated_sandhi: balī lagna arka candrāṇām yat tasya prathamā daśātatkendra ādi gatānām ca jñeyā balavaśāt tataḥ
english: Among the Lagna (Ascendant), the Sun, and the Moon, whichever is the strongest, its planetary period ("daśā") is considered the first. Thereafter, the "daśā"s of the planets/signs situated in the angular houses (kendras) and so on, relative to that strongest one, should be known according to their respective strengths.

sanskrit: अष्टवर्गबलेनैषां फलानि परिचिन्तयेत् । अष्टवर्गदशाश्चैताः कथिताः पूर्वसूरिभिः ॥२०३॥
transliteration: aṣṭavargabalenaiṣāṃ phalāni paricintayet . aṣṭavargadaśāścaitāḥ kathitāḥ pūrvasūribhiḥ.
separated_sandhi: aṣṭavargabalena eṣām phalāni paricintayetaṣṭavargadaśāḥ ca etāḥ kathitāḥ pūrvasūribhiḥ
english: One should consider the results of these (planetary periods) by assessing their strength based on the "Aṣṭakavarga" system. These very "daśā"s (planetary periods) calculated using the "Aṣṭakavarga" have been declared by the ancient sages.

sanskrit: परायुर्द्वादशो भागस्तस्य सन्ध्या प्रकीर्तिता । तन्मिता लग्नभादीनां क्रमात् सन्ध्यादशा स्मृता ॥२०४॥
transliteration: parāyurdvādaśo bhāgastasya sandhyā prakīrtitā . tanmitā lagnabhādīnāṃ kramāt sandhyādaśā smṛtā.
separated_sandhi: parāyuḥ dvādaśaḥ bhāgaḥ tasya sandhyā prakīrtitātat mitā lagnabhādīnām kramāt sandhyādaśā smṛtā
english: The twelfth portion of the supreme life span ("parāyuḥ") is declared as its (the supreme life span's) "sandhyā" (junctional period). The "sandhyā daśā" (transition period) of the Lagna (Ascendant), signs, and so on, is considered to be measured by that same proportion, in successive order.

sanskrit: सन्ध्या रसगुणा कार्या चन्द्रवह्निहृता फलम् । संस्थाप्यं प्रथमे कोष्ठे तदर्धं त्रिषु विन्यसेत् ॥२०५॥
transliteration: sandhyā rasaguṇā kāryā candravahnihṛtā phalam . saṃsthāpyaṃ prathame koṣṭhe tadardhaṃ triṣu vinyaset.
separated_sandhi: sandhyā rasaguṇā kāryā candravahnihṛtā phalamsaṃsthāpyam prathame koṣṭhe tat ardham triṣu vinyaset
english: The "sandhyā" (junctional period) should be calculated by multiplying it by "rasa" (six) and "guṇa" (three), and the result ("phalam") then divided by "candra" (one) and "vahni" (three). This final result should be placed in the first cell, and half of it should be placed into the three (subsequent) cells.

sanskrit: त्रिभागं वसुकोष्ठेषु विन्यस्य तत्फलं वदेत् । एवं द्वादशभावेषु पाचकानि प्रकल्पयेत् ॥२०६॥
transliteration: tribhāgaṃ vasukoṣṭheṣu vinyasya tatphalaṃ vadet . evaṃ dvādaśabhāveṣu pācakāni prakalpayet.
separated_sandhi: tribhāgam vasukoṣṭheṣu vinyasya tatphalamvadet evam dvādaśabhāveṣu pācakāni prakalpayet
english: By placing one-third part into the eight houses, one should then declare its result. In this manner, one should determine the pacaka (dasa components) for all twelve houses.

sanskrit: विंशत्तरिदशेवाऽत्र कैश्चित् तारादशा स्मृता । आशंकुरागुशबुकेश्वादिस्थानेषु तारकाः ॥२०७॥
transliteration: viṃśattaridaśevā'tra kaiścit tārādaśā smṛtā . āśaṃkurāguśabukeśvādisthāneṣu tārakāḥ.
separated_sandhi: viṃśattaridaśā eva atra kaiścit tārādaśāsmṛtā āśaṅkurāguśabukeśvādi sthāneṣu tārakāḥ
english: Here, the Viṃśottarī dasa (system) is considered Tārā dasa by some (scholars). The stars (are situated) in the positions related to Āśaṅkura, Rāgu, Śabuka, Īśva, and so forth.

sanskrit: अन्मसम्पत्विपत्क्षेमप्रत्यरिः साधको बधः । मैत्रं परममैत्रं च केन्द्रस्थबलिनो ग्रहात् ॥२०८॥
transliteration: anmasampatvipatkṣemapratyariḥ sādhako badhaḥ . maitraṃ paramamaitraṃ ca kendrasthabalino grahāt.
separated_sandhi: anma sampat vipat kṣema pratyariḥ sādhakaḥ badhaḥmaitram paramamaitram ca kendrasthabalinaḥ grahāt
english: Birth, Wealth, Adversity, Well-being, Adversary, Accomplishment, Affliction; and Friendly, Very Friendly (these are the Tārās, or star groups), calculated from a strong planet located in an angular house (kendra).

sanskrit: ज्ञेया तारादशा विप्र नामतुल्यफलप्रदा । यस्य केन्द्रे स्थितः खेटो दशेयं तस्य कीर्तिता ॥२०९॥
transliteration: jñeyā tārādaśā vipra nāmatulyaphalapradā . yasya kendre sthitaḥ kheṭo daśeyaṃ tasya kīrtitā.
separated_sandhi: jñeyā tārādaśā vipra nāmatulyaphalapradā yasyakendre sthitaḥ kheṭaḥ daśā iyam tasya kīrtitā
english: O Brahmin, the Tārā dasa should be understood as yielding results corresponding to its name. This dasa is declared (to belong) to that planet which is situated in an angular house (kendra).

sanskrit: इति ते कथिता विप्र दश भेदा अनेकधा । एतदन्तर्दशाभेदान् कथयिष्यामि चाग्रतः ॥२१०॥
transliteration: iti te kathitā vipra daśa bhedā anekadhā . etadantardaśābhedān kathayiṣyāmi cāgrataḥ.
separated_sandhi: iti te kathitā vipra daśa bhedā anekadhāetat antardaśābhedān kathayiṣyāmi ca agrataḥ
english: Thus, O Brahmin, these ten types of dasas have been explained to you in manifold ways. And subsequently, I shall describe the distinctions of their sub-periods (antardaśā).

sanskrit: श्रुताश्च बहुधा भेदा दशानां च मया मुने । फलं च कीदृशं तासां कृपया मे तदुच्यताम् ॥१॥
transliteration: śrutāśca bahudhā bhedā daśānāṃ ca mayā mune . phalaṃ ca kīdṛśaṃ tāsāṃ kṛpayā me taducyatām.
separated_sandhi: śrutāḥ ca bahudhā bhedāḥ daśānām ca mayā mune| phalam ca kīdṛśam tāsām kṛpayā me tat ucyatām
english: O sage, I have heard about the many varieties of daśās (planetary periods). Please kindly tell me what kind of results they yield.

sanskrit: साधारणं विशिष्टञ्च दशानां द्विविधं फलम् । ग्रहाणां च स्वभावेन स्थानस्थितिवशेन च ॥२॥
transliteration: sādhāraṇaṃ viśiṣṭañca daśānāṃ dvividhaṃ phalam . grahāṇāṃ ca svabhāvena sthānasthitivaśena ca.
separated_sandhi: sādhāraṇam viśiṣṭam ca daśānām dvividham phalam| grahāṇām ca svabhāvena sthānasthitivvaśena ca
english: The results of the daśās are of two kinds, general and specific. They are determined by the intrinsic nature (svabhāva) of the planets and also by their placement in houses.

sanskrit: ग्रहवीर्यानुसारेण फलं ज्ञेयं दशासु च । आद्यद्रेष्काणगे खेटे दशारम्भे फलं वदेत् ॥३॥
transliteration: grahavīryānusāreṇa phalaṃ jñeyaṃ daśāsu ca . ādyadreṣkāṇage kheṭe daśārambhe phalaṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: grahavīryānusāreṇa phalam jñeyam daśāsu ca |ādyadreṣkāṇage kheṭe daśārambhe phalam vadet
english: The results of the daśās should be understood according to the strength of the planets. If a planet is situated in the first drekkāṇa, its results should be declared at the beginning of its daśā.

sanskrit: दशामध्ये फलं वाच्यं मध्यद्रेष्काणगे खगे । अन्ते फलं तृतीयस्थे व्यस्तं खेटे च वक्रगे ॥४॥
transliteration: daśāmadhye phalaṃ vācyaṃ madhyadreṣkāṇage khage . ante phalaṃ tṛtīyasthe vyastaṃ kheṭe ca vakrage.
separated_sandhi: daśāmadhye phalam vācyam madhyadreṣkāṇage khage| ante phalam tṛtīyasthe vyastam kheṭe ca vakrage
english: If a planet is situated in the middle drekkāṇa, its results should be declared in the middle of its daśā. If it is in the third (drekkāṇa), its results are to be declared at the end (of its daśā). And the effects are reversed when the planet is retrograde.

sanskrit: दशारम्भे दशादीशे लग्नगे शुभदृग्युते । स्वोच्चे स्वभे स्वमैत्रे वा शुभं तस्य दशाफलम् ॥५॥
transliteration: daśārambhe daśādīśe lagnage śubhadṛgyute . svocce svabhe svamaitre vā śubhaṃ tasya daśāphalam.
separated_sandhi: daśārambhe daśādīśe lagnage śubhadṛgyute | svoccesvabhe svamaitre vā śubham tasya daśāphalam
english: At the beginning of a daśā, if the lord of that daśā is in the Lagna (ascendant), aspected by or conjoined with benefics, or is in its sign of exaltation, its own sign, or a friendly sign, then the results of that daśā will be auspicious.

sanskrit: षष्ठाऽष्टमव्ययस्थे च नीचास्तरिपुभस्थिते । अशुभं तत्फलं चाऽथ ब्रुवे सर्वदशाफलम् ॥६॥
transliteration: ṣaṣṭhā'ṣṭamavyayasthe ca nīcāstaripubhasthite . aśubhaṃ tatphalaṃ cā'tha bruve sarvadaśāphalam.
separated_sandhi: ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyayasthite ca nīcāstaripubhasthiteaśubham tatphalam ca atha bruve sarvadaśāphalam
english: When a planet is situated in the 6th, 8th, or 12th house, or is debilitated, combust, or in an enemy sign, its results are inauspicious. Now, I shall declare the results of all planetary periods (daśā).

sanskrit: मूलत्रिकोणे स्वक्षेत्रे स्वोच्चे वा परमोच्चगे । केन्द्रत्रिकोणलाभस्थे भाग्यकर्माधिपैर्युते ॥७॥
transliteration: mūlatrikoṇe svakṣetre svocce vā paramoccage . kendratrikoṇalābhasthe bhāgyakarmādhipairyute.
separated_sandhi: mūlatrikoṇe svakṣetre svocce vā paramoccagekendratrikoṇalābhasthite bhāgyakarmādhipaiḥ yute
english: When a planet is in its mūlatrikoṇa sign, its own sign, its exaltation sign, or in its deepest exaltation point; or when it is situated in an angular (kendra), trinal (trikoṇa), or profit (lābha) house; or when it is conjoined with the lords of the house of fortune (bhāgya) and action (karma).

sanskrit: सूर्ये बलसमायुक्ते निजवर्गबलैर्युते । तस्मिन्दाये महत् सौख्यं धनलाभादिकं शुभम् ॥८॥
transliteration: sūrye balasamāyukte nijavargabalairyute . tasmindāye mahat saukhyaṃ dhanalābhādikaṃ śubham.
separated_sandhi: sūrye balasamāyukte nijavargabalaiḥ yute tasmindāye mahat saukhyam dhanalābhādikam śubham
english: When the Sun is endowed with strength and possesses strength from its own divisional charts (vargas), then in its planetary period (dāya) there will be great happiness, acquisition of wealth, and other auspicious results.

sanskrit: अत्यन्तं राजसन्मानमश्वांदोल्यादिकं शुभम् । सुताधिपसमायुक्ते पुत्रलाभं च विन्दति ॥९॥
transliteration: atyantaṃ rājasanmānamaśvāṃdolyādikaṃ śubham . sutādhipasamāyukte putralābhaṃ ca vindati.
separated_sandhi: atyantam rājasammānam aśvāmdolyādikam śubhamsutādhipasamāyukte putralābham ca vindati
english: One obtains exceeding royal honor and auspicious things like horses and palanquins. And when (the Sun is) conjoined with the lord of the fifth house (sutādhipa), one gains a son.

sanskrit: धनेशस्य च सम्बन्धे गजान्तैश्वर्यमादिशेत् । वाहनाधिपसम्बन्धे वाहनात्रयलाभकृत् ॥१०॥
transliteration: dhaneśasya ca sambandhe gajāntaiśvaryamādiśet . vāhanādhipasambandhe vāhanātrayalābhakṛt.
separated_sandhi: dhaneśasya ca sambandhe gajāntaiśvaryam ādiśetvāhanādhipasambandhe vāhanatrayalābhakṛt
english: And in connection with the lord of wealth (dhaneśa), one should predict immense wealth, including elephants. In connection with the lord of conveyances, (it) causes the gain of three types of conveyances.

sanskrit: नृपलतुष्टिर्वित्ताढ्यः सेनाधीशः सुखी नरः । वस्त्रवाहनलाभश्च दशायां बलिनो रवेः ॥११॥
transliteration: nṛpalatuṣṭirvittāḍhyaḥ senādhīśaḥ sukhī naraḥ . vastravāhanalābhaśca daśāyāṃ balino raveḥ.
separated_sandhi: nṛpalatuṣṭiḥ vittāḍhyaḥ senādhīśaḥ sukhī naraḥvastravāhanalābhaḥ ca daśāyām balinaḥ raveḥ
english: During the planetary period (daśā) of a strong Sun, a person gains the favor of the king, becomes wealthy, a commander of an army, and happy, acquiring clothes and vehicles.

sanskrit: नीचे षडष्टके रिःफे दुर्बले पापसंयुते । राहुकेतुसमायुक्ते दुह्स्थानाधिपसंयुते ॥१२॥
transliteration: nīce ṣaḍaṣṭake riḥphe durbale pāpasaṃyute . rāhuketusamāyukte duhsthānādhipasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: nīce ṣaḍaṣṭake riḥphe durabale pāpasaṃyuterāhuketusamāyukte duḥsthānādhipasaṃyute
english: When (the Sun is) in a debilitated sign, in the 6th, 8th, or 12th house, weak, conjoined with a malefic planet, associated with Rāhu or Ketu, or conjoined with the lord of an inauspicious house...

sanskrit: तस्मिन्दाये महापीडा धनधान्यविनाशकृत । राजकोपः प्रवासश्च राजदण्डो धनक्षयः ॥१३॥
transliteration: tasmindāye mahāpīḍā dhanadhānyavināśakṛta . rājakopaḥ pravāsaśca rājadaṇḍo dhanakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: tasmin dāye mahāpīḍā dhanadhānyavināśakṛtrājakopaḥ pravāsaḥ ca rājadaṇḍaḥ dhanakṣayaḥ
english: During that planetary period (daśā) (of the afflicted Sun), there will be great suffering, destruction of wealth and grains, the king's anger, exile, royal punishment, and loss of wealth.

sanskrit: ज्वरपीडा यशोहानिर्बन्धुमित्रविरोधकृत । पितृक्षयभयं चैव गृहे त्वशुभमेव च ॥१४॥
transliteration: jvarapīḍā yaśohānirbandhumitravirodhakṛta . pitṛkṣayabhayaṃ caiva gṛhe tvaśubhameva ca.
separated_sandhi: jvarapīḍā yaśohāniḥ bandhumitravirodhakṛtpitṛkṣayabhayam ca eva gṛhe tu aśubham eva ca
english: One will suffer from fever, experience loss of reputation, and encounter enmity with relatives and friends. There will also be fear of the father's demise, and inauspicious events at home.

sanskrit: पितृवर्गे मनस्तापं जन्द्वेषं च विन्दति । शुभदृष्टियुते सूर्ये मध्ये तस्मिन् क्वचित्सुखम् । पापग्र्हेण सन्दृष्टे वदेत्पापफलं बुधः ॥१५॥
transliteration: pitṛvarge manastāpaṃ jandveṣaṃ ca vindati . śubhadṛṣṭiyute sūrye madhye tasmin kvacitsukham . pāpagrheṇa sandṛṣṭe vadetpāpaphalaṃ budhaḥ.
separated_sandhi: pitṛvarge manastāpam janadveṣam cavindati śubhadṛṣṭiyute sūryemadhye tasmin kvacit sukham pāpagraheṇasandṛṣṭe vadet pāphalam budhaḥ
english: The native experiences mental distress concerning paternal relatives and faces animosity from people. If the Sun is aspected by a benefic planet, there will be some happiness during the middle part of its period. If it is aspected by a malefic planet, a knowledgeable astrologer should predict malefic outcomes.

sanskrit: एवं सूर्यफलं विप्र संक्षेपादुदितं मया । विंशोत्तरीमतेनाथ ब्रुवे चन्द्रदशाफलम् ॥१६॥
transliteration: evaṃ sūryaphalaṃ vipra saṃkṣepāduditaṃ mayā . viṃśottarīmatenātha bruve candradaśāphalam.
separated_sandhi: evaṃ sūryaphalam vipra saṃkṣepāt uditam mayā| viṃśottarīmatena atha bruve candradaśāphalam
english: Thus, O Brahmin, I have briefly described the results of the Sun's planetary period (daśā). Now, I shall explain the results of the Moon's planetary period according to the Vimśottarī system.

sanskrit: स्वोच्चे स्वक्षेत्रगे चैव केन्द्रे लाभत्रिकोणगे । शुभग्रहेण संयुक्ते पूर्णे चन्द्रेबलैर्युते ॥१७॥
transliteration: svocce svakṣetrage caiva kendre lābhatrikoṇage . śubhagraheṇa saṃyukte pūrṇe candrebalairyute.
separated_sandhi: svocce svakṣetrage ca eva kendre lābhatrikoṇage| śubhagrapheṇa saṃyukte pūrṇe candre balaiḥ yute
english: When the Moon (candra) is in its own exaltation sign, or situated in its own sign, or in a quadrant (kendra), or in the 11th house or a trine (trikoṇa), or conjoined with a benefic planet, or full, and endowed with strength (bala).

sanskrit: कर्मभाग्याधिपैर्युक्ते वाहनेशबलैर्युते । आद्यन्तैश्वर्यसौभाग्यधनधान्यादिलाभकृत ॥१८॥
transliteration: karmabhāgyādhipairyukte vāhaneśabalairyute . ādyantaiśvaryasaubhāgyadhanadhānyādilābhakṛta.
separated_sandhi: karmabhāgyādhipaiḥ yukte vāhaneśabalaiḥ yute| ādyantaiśvaryasaubhāgyadhanadhānyādilābhakṛt
english: When the Moon is conjoined with the lords of the 10th (karma) and 9th (bhāgya) houses, and endowed with the strength (bala) of the lord of conveyances, then it grants gains of opulence, good fortune, riches, grains, and so forth, from beginning to end.

sanskrit: गृहे तु शुभकार्याणि वाहनं राजदर्शनम् । यत्नकार्यार्थसिद्धिः स्याद् गृहे लक्ष्मीकटाक्षकृत् ॥१९॥
transliteration: gṛhe tu śubhakāryāṇi vāhanaṃ rājadarśanam . yatnakāryārthasiddhiḥ syād gṛhe lakṣmīkaṭākṣakṛt.
separated_sandhi: gṛhe tu śubhakāryāṇi vāhanam rājadarśanam |yatnakāryārthasiddhiḥ syāt gṛhe lakṣmīkaṭākṣakṛt
english: Indeed, in the home, there will be auspicious activities, acquisition of conveyances, and opportunities to see royalty. Success will come in endeavors, and the home will receive the auspicious glance of Lakṣmī.

sanskrit: मित्रप्रभुवशाद्भाग्यं राज्यलाभं महत्सुखम् । अश्वान्दोल्यादिलाभं च श्वेतवस्त्रादिकं लभेत् ॥२०॥
transliteration: mitraprabhuvaśādbhāgyaṃ rājyalābhaṃ mahatsukham . aśvāndolyādilābhaṃ ca śvetavastrādikaṃ labhet.
separated_sandhi: mitraprabhuvashāt bhāgyam rājyalābham mahat sukham| aśvāndolyādilābham ca śvetavastrādikam labhet
english: One obtains good fortune and a kingdom (or government position) through the influence of friends and rulers, great happiness, and the acquisition of horses, palanquins, and white garments, among other things.

sanskrit: पुत्रलाभादिसन्तोषं गृहगोधनसंकुलम् । धनस्थानगते चन्द्रे तुङ्गे स्वक्षेत्रगेऽपि वा ॥२१॥
transliteration: putralābhādisantoṣaṃ gṛhagodhanasaṃkulam . dhanasthānagate candre tuṅge svakṣetrage'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: putralābhādisantoṣam gṛhagodhanasaṃkulamdhanasthānagate candre tuṅge svakṣetrage api vā
english: When the Moon is situated in the house of wealth (the second house), especially if it is exalted or in its own sign, one experiences happiness from gaining sons and other (benefits), and their home is filled with cattle and wealth.

sanskrit: अनेकधनलाभं च भाग्यवृद्धिर्महत्सुखम् । निक्षेपराजसन्मानं विद्यालाभं च विन्दति ॥२२॥
transliteration: anekadhanalābhaṃ ca bhāgyavṛddhirmahatsukham . nikṣeparājasanmānaṃ vidyālābhaṃ ca vindati.
separated_sandhi: anekadhanalābham ca bhāgyavṛddhiḥ mahatsukhamnikṣeparājasammānam vidyālābham ca vindati
english: One obtains much wealth, an increase in fortune, great happiness, honor from rulers and gain of deposits/treasure, and the acquisition of knowledge.

sanskrit: नीचे वा क्षीणचन्द्रे वा धनहानिर्भविष्यति । दुश्चिक्ये बलसंयुक्ते क्वचित्सौख्यं क्वचिद्धनम् ॥२३॥
transliteration: nīce vā kṣīṇacandre vā dhanahānirbhaviṣyati . duścikye balasaṃyukte kvacitsaukhyaṃ kvaciddhanam.
separated_sandhi: nīce vā kṣīṇacandre vā dhanahāniḥ bhaviṣyatiduścikye balasaṃyukte kvacitsaukhyam kvacitdhanam
english: When the Moon is debilitated or waning, there will be a loss of wealth. If the Moon is strong and located in the third house, there will be occasional happiness and occasional wealth.

sanskrit: दुर्बले पापसंयुक्ते देहजाड्यं मनोरुजम् । भृत्यपीडा वित्तहानिर्मातृवर्गजनाद्वधः ॥२४॥
transliteration: durbale pāpasaṃyukte dehajāḍyaṃ manorujam . bhṛtyapīḍā vittahānirmātṛvargajanādvadhaḥ.
separated_sandhi: durbale pāpasaṃyukte dehajāḍyam manorujambhṛtyapīḍā vittahāniḥ mātṛvargajanāt vadhaḥ
english: When the Moon is weak and conjoined with malefic planets, there will be bodily weakness, mental distress, suffering for servants, loss of property, and danger or destruction from maternal relatives.

sanskrit: षष्ठाष्टमव्यये चन्द्रे दुर्बले पापसंयुते । राजद्वेषो मनोदुःखं धनधान्यादिनाशनम् ॥२५॥
transliteration: ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyaye candre durbale pāpasaṃyute . rājadveṣo manoduḥkhaṃ dhanadhānyādināśanam.
separated_sandhi: ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyaye candre durbale pāpasaṃyuterājadveṣaḥ manoduḥkham dhanadhānyādināśanam
english: When the Moon is weak and conjoined with malefic planets in the sixth, eighth, or twelfth houses, there will be animosity from rulers, mental distress, and the destruction of wealth, grains, and other possessions.

sanskrit: मातृक्लेषं मनस्तापं देहजाड्यं मनोरुजम् । दुःस्थे चन्द्रे बलैर्युक्ते क्वचिल्लाभं क्वचित्सुखम् । देहजाड्यं क्वचिच्चैव शान्त्या तत्र शुभं दिशेत् ॥२६॥
transliteration: mātṛkleṣaṃ manastāpaṃ dehajāḍyaṃ manorujam . duḥsthe candre balairyukte kvacillābhaṃ kvacitsukham . dehajāḍyaṃ kvaciccaiva śāntyā tatra śubhaṃ diśet.
separated_sandhi: mātṛkleṣam manastāpam dehajaḍyammanorujam duḥsthe candre balaiḥ yukte kvacitlābham kvacit sukham dehajaḍyamkvacit ca eva śāntyā tatra śubham diśet
english: When the Moon (candra) is unfavorably placed yet endowed with strength, it causes distress to the mother, mental anguish, bodily sluggishness, and mental pain. Sometimes, there is gain and happiness, while at other times, bodily sluggishness persists. In such a case, auspicious outcomes should be indicated through propitiation (śānti).

sanskrit: स्वभोच्चादिगतस्यैवं नीचशत्रुभगस्य च । ब्रवीमि भूमिपुर्तस्य शुभाऽशुभदशाफलम् ॥२७॥
transliteration: svabhoccādigatasyaivaṃ nīcaśatrubhagasya ca . bravīmi bhūmipurtasya śubhā'śubhadaśāphalam.
separated_sandhi: svabhoccādigatasya evam nīcaśatrubhagasya cabravīmi bhūmiputrasya śubhāśubhadaśāphalam
english: I shall now describe the auspicious and inauspicious effects of Mars' (bhūmiputra) planetary period (daśā), regarding its placement in its own sign, exaltation, and other such favorable positions, as well as its placement in debilitation, an enemy's sign, or a position of misfortune.

sanskrit: परमोच्चगते भौमे स्वोच्चे मूलत्रिकोणगे । स्वर्क्षे केन्द्रत्रिकोणे वा लाभे वा धनगेऽपि वा ॥२८॥
transliteration: paramoccagate bhaume svocce mūlatrikoṇage . svarkṣe kendratrikoṇe vā lābhe vā dhanage'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: paramoccagate bhaume svocce mūlatrikoṇagesvarṣe kendratrikoṇe vā lābhe vā dhanage api vā
english: When Mars (Bhauma) is situated in its highest exaltation, or in its own sign of exaltation, or in its Mūlatrikoṇa sign, or in its own sign, or in a Kendra (angular) or Trikona (trine) house, or in the house of gain (the 11th), or even in the house of wealth (the 2nd).

sanskrit: सम्पूर्णबलसंयुक्ते शुभदृष्टे शुभांशके । राज्यलाभं भूमिलाभं धनधान्यादिलाभकृत् ॥२९॥
transliteration: sampūrṇabalasaṃyukte śubhadṛṣṭe śubhāṃśake . rājyalābhaṃ bhūmilābhaṃ dhanadhānyādilābhakṛt.
separated_sandhi: sampūrṇabalasaṃyukte śubhadṛṣṭe śubhāṃśakerājyalābham bhūmilābham dhanadhānyādilābhakṛt
english: When Mars (Bhauma) is endowed with complete strength, aspected by auspicious planets, and located in an auspicious divisional chart (aṃśaka), it causes gain of kingdom or high status, acquisition of land, and profit from wealth, grains, and other assets.

sanskrit: आधिक्यं राजसम्मानं वाहनाम्बरभूषणम् । विदेशे स्थानलाभं च सोदराणां सुखं लभेत् ॥३०॥
transliteration: ādhikyaṃ rājasammānaṃ vāhanāmbarabhūṣaṇam . videśe sthānalābhaṃ ca sodarāṇāṃ sukhaṃ labhet.
separated_sandhi: ādhikyam rājasammānam vāhanāmbarabhūṣaṇamvideśe sthānalābham ca sodarāṇām sukham labhet
english: One obtains abundance, royal honors or recognition from the government, as well as conveyances, garments, and ornaments. There is also gain of status in foreign lands and happiness for siblings.

sanskrit: केन्द्रे गते सदा भौमे दुश्चिक्ये बलसंयुते । पराक्रमाद्वित्तलाभो युद्धे शत्रुजयो भवेत् ॥३१॥
transliteration: kendre gate sadā bhaume duścikye balasaṃyute . parākramādvittalābho yuddhe śatrujayo bhavet.
separated_sandhi: kendre gate sadā bhaume duścikye balasaṃyute |parākramāt vittalābhaḥ yuddhe śatrujayaḥ bhavet
english: When Mars (bhauma) is always situated in an angular house (kendra) and is strong in the third house (duścikya), there will be acquisition of wealth through one's valor and victory over enemies in war.

sanskrit: कलत्रपुत्रविभवं राजसम्मानमेव च । दशादौ सुखमाप्नोति दशान्ते कष्टमादिशेत् ॥३२॥
transliteration: kalatraputravibhavaṃ rājasammānameva ca . daśādau sukhamāpnoti daśānte kaṣṭamādiśet.
separated_sandhi: kalatraputravibhavam rājasammānam eva ca |daśādau sukham āpnoti daśānte kaṣṭam ādiśet
english: One obtains prosperity related to spouse and children, and also royal honor. Happiness is attained at the beginning of the daśā period, but trouble should be predicted at its end.

sanskrit: नीचादिदुष्टभावस्थे भौमे बलविवर्जिते । पापयुक्ते पापदृष्टे सा दशा नेष्टदायिका ॥३३॥
transliteration: nīcādiduṣṭabhāvasthe bhaume balavivarjite . pāpayukte pāpadṛṣṭe sā daśā neṣṭadāyikā.
separated_sandhi: nīcādidustabhāvasthe bhaume balavivarjite| pāpayukte pāpadṛṣṭe sā daśā na iṣṭadāyikā
english: When Mars (bhauma) is situated in a debilitated sign or an inauspicious house (duṣṭabhāva), devoid of strength, associated with malefic planets, or aspected by them, that particular daśā period does not bestow desired results.

sanskrit: एवं राहोश्च केतोश्च कथयामि गृहादिकम् । तयोर्दशाफलज्ञप्त्यै तवाऽग्रे द्विजनन्दन ॥३४॥
transliteration: evaṃ rāhośca ketośca kathayāmi gṛhādikam . tayordaśāphalajñaptyai tavā'gre dvijanandana.
separated_sandhi: evam rāhoḥ ca ketoḥ ca kathayāmi gṛhādikam |tayoḥ daśāphalajñaptyai tava agre dvijanandana
english: O son of a twice-born (dvija), in this manner, I will explain the houses and other related matters concerning Rāhu and Ketu, for the purpose of understanding the results of their daśā periods, here before you.

sanskrit: राहोस्तु वृषभं केतोर्वृश्चिकं तुङ्गसंज्ञकम् । मूलत्रिकोणकं ज्ञेयं युग्मं चापं क्रमेण च ॥३५॥
transliteration: rāhostu vṛṣabhaṃ ketorvṛścikaṃ tuṅgasaṃjñakam . mūlatrikoṇakaṃ jñeyaṃ yugmaṃ cāpaṃ krameṇa ca.
separated_sandhi: rāhoḥ tu vṛṣabham ketoḥ vṛścikam tuṅgasaṃjñakam| mūlatrikoṇakam jñeyam yugmam cāpam krameṇa ca
english: Taurus is the sign of exaltation (tuṅga) for Rāhu, and Scorpio is the sign of exaltation for Ketu. Gemini and Sagittarius, respectively, should be understood as their mūlatrikoṇa signs.

sanskrit: कुम्भाली च गृहौ प्रोक्तौ कन्यामीनौ च केनचित् । तद्दाये बहुसौख्यं च धनधान्यादिसम्पदाम् ॥३६॥
transliteration: kumbhālī ca gṛhau proktau kanyāmīnau ca kenacit . taddāye bahusaukhyaṃ ca dhanadhānyādisampadām.
separated_sandhi: kumbhālī ca gṛhau proktau kanyāmīnau ca kenacittat dāye bahu saukhyam ca dhanadhānyādisampadām
english: Aquarius (Kumbha) and Scorpio (Alī) are declared as houses, as are Virgo (Kanyā) and Pisces (Mīna) by some (authorities). During their planetary period (dāya), there is much happiness and the acquisition of wealth (dhana), grains, and other forms of prosperity (sampadā).

sanskrit: मित्र्प्रभुवशादिष्टं वाहनं पुत्रसम्भवः । नवीनगृहनिर्माणं धर्मचिन्ता महोत्सवः ॥३७॥
transliteration: mitrprabhuvaśādiṣṭaṃ vāhanaṃ putrasambhavaḥ . navīnagṛhanirmāṇaṃ dharmacintā mahotsavaḥ.
separated_sandhi: mitraprabhuvśāt iṣṭam vāhanam putrasambhavaḥnavīnagṛhanirmāṇam dharmacintā mahotsavaḥ
english: By the influence of a friendly ruler, there will be desired vehicles, the birth of sons, construction of new homes, contemplation on natural law (dharma), and great festivals.

sanskrit: विदेशराजसन्मानं वस्त्रालङ्कारभूषणम् । शुभयुक्ते शुभैर्दृष्टे योगकारकसंयुते ॥३८॥
transliteration: videśarājasanmānaṃ vastrālaṅkārabhūṣaṇam . śubhayukte śubhairdṛṣṭe yogakārakasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: videśarājasanmānam vastrālankārabhūṣaṇamśubhayukte śubhaiḥ dṛṣṭe yogakārakasaṃyute
english: There will be honor from foreign rulers, and clothes, ornaments, and jewels. This occurs when (the period lord is) associated with auspicious (planets/factors), aspected by auspicious (planets), and conjoined with a (yoga) forming planet.

sanskrit: केन्द्रत्रिकूणलाभे वा दुश्चिक्ये शुभराशिगे । महाराजप्रसादेन सर्वसम्पत्सुखावहम् ॥३९॥
transliteration: kendratrikūṇalābhe vā duścikye śubharāśige . mahārājaprasādena sarvasampatsukhāvaham.
separated_sandhi: kendratrikoṇalābhe vā duścikye śubharāśigemahārājaprasādena sarvasampatsukhāvaham
english: Or, if (the period lord is) in a quadrant (kendra), trine (trikoṇa), or house of gain (lābha), or in the third house (duścikya) if it resides in an auspicious sign. Then, by the grace of a great king, all prosperity and happiness are brought about.

sanskrit: यवनप्रभुसन्मानं ग्र्हे कल्याणसम्भवम् । रन्ध्रे वा व्ययगे राहौ तद्दाये कष्टमादिशेत् ॥४०॥
transliteration: yavanaprabhusanmānaṃ grhe kalyāṇasambhavam . randhre vā vyayage rāhau taddāye kaṣṭamādiśet.
separated_sandhi: yavanaprabhusanmānam gṛhe kalyāṇasambhavaṃrandhre vā vyayage rāhau tat dāye kaṣṭam ādiśet
english: There will be honor from Yavana (foreign/Muslim) rulers and auspicious events in the house. However, if Rahu is situated in the eighth house (randhra) or the twelfth house (vyaya), during its period (daśā), one should predict suffering.

sanskrit: पापग्रहेण सम्बन्धे मारकग्र्हसंयुते । नीचराशिगते वापि स्थानभ्रंशो मनोव्यथा ॥४१॥
transliteration: pāpagraheṇa sambandhe mārakagrhasaṃyute . nīcarāśigate vāpi sthānabhraṃśo manovyathā.
separated_sandhi: pāpagraheṇa sambandhe mārakagrahasaṃyutenīcarāśigate vā api sthānabhraṃśaḥ manovyathā
english: If a planet is connected with a malefic planet, or associated with a death-inflicting (maraka) planet, or even situated in a debilitated sign, then there will be a loss of position and mental anguish.

sanskrit: विनाशो दारपुत्राणां कुत्सितान्नं च भोजनम् । दशादौ देहपीडा च धनधान्यपरिच्युतिः ॥४२॥
transliteration: vināśo dāraputrāṇāṃ kutsitānnaṃ ca bhojanam . daśādau dehapīḍā ca dhanadhānyaparicyutiḥ.
separated_sandhi: vināśaḥ dāraputrāṇāṃ kutsitānnaṃ ca bhojanamdaśādau dehapīḍā ca dhanadhānyaparicyutiḥ
english: At the beginning of the planetary period (daśā), there is the destruction of one's wife and sons, consumption of bad food, physical pain, and loss of wealth and grains.

sanskrit: दशामध्ये तु सौख्यं स्यात् स्वदेशे धनलाभकृत् । दशान्ते कष्टमाप्नोति स्थानभ्रंशो मनोव्यथा ॥४३॥
transliteration: daśāmadhye tu saukhyaṃ syāt svadeśe dhanalābhakṛt . daśānte kaṣṭamāpnoti sthānabhraṃśo manovyathā.
separated_sandhi: daśāmadhye tu saukhyaṃ syāt svadeśe dhanalābhakṛtdaśānte kaṣṭam āpnoti sthānabhraṃśaḥ manovyathā
english: But in the middle of the planetary period (daśā), there would be happiness and gain of wealth in one's own country. At the end of the daśā, one experiences suffering, loss of position, and mental anguish.

sanskrit: यः सर्वेषु नाभोगेषु बुधैरतिशुभः स्मृतः । तस्य देवेन्द्रपूज्यस्य कथयामि दशाफलम् ॥४४॥
transliteration: yaḥ sarveṣu nābhogeṣu budhairatiśubhaḥ smṛtaḥ . tasya devendrapūjyasya kathayāmi daśāphalam.
separated_sandhi: yaḥ sarveṣu nābhogeṣu budhaiḥ atiśubhaḥ smṛtaḥtasya devendrapūjyasya kathayāmi daśāphalam
english: I shall now narrate the results of the planetary period (daśā) of that revered one, who is worshipped by Indra (the king of gods) and is considered by the wise to be exceedingly auspicious among all celestial entities.

sanskrit: स्वोच्चे स्वक्षेत्रगे जीवे केन्द्रे लाभत्रिकोणगे । मूलत्रिकोणलाभे वा तुंगांशे स्वांशगेऽपि वा ॥४५॥
transliteration: svocce svakṣetrage jīve kendre lābhatrikoṇage . mūlatrikoṇalābhe vā tuṃgāṃśe svāṃśage'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: svocce svakṣetrage jīve kendre lābhatrikoṇagemūlatrikoṇalābhe vā tuṅgāṃśe svāṃśage api vā
english: When Jupiter (jīva) is in its own exaltation sign, in its own sign, in an angular house (kendra), or in a house of gain (11th) or a trine house (5th or 9th); or even when it is in its Moola Trikona sign, or in its exaltation division (tuṅgāṃśa), or in its own division (svāṃśa).

sanskrit: राज्यलाभं महापौरुषं राजसन्मानकीर्तनम् । गजवाजिसमायुक्तं देवब्राह्मणपूजनम् ॥४६॥
transliteration: rājyalābhaṃ mahāpauruṣaṃ rājasanmānakīrtanam . gajavājisamāyuktaṃ devabrāhmaṇapūjanam.
separated_sandhi: rājyalābham mahāpauruṣam rājasanmānakīrtanamgajavājisamāyuktam devabrāhmaṇapūjanam
english: One obtains a kingdom, great valor, praise, and honor from kings. There will be associations with elephants and horses, and the worship of gods and brahmins.

sanskrit: दारपुत्रादिसौख्यं च वाहनांबरलाभजम् । यज्ञादिकर्मसिद्धिः स्याद्वेदान्तश्रवणादिकम् ॥४७॥
transliteration: dāraputrādisaukhyaṃ ca vāhanāṃbaralābhajam . yajñādikarmasiddhiḥ syādvedāntaśravaṇādikam.
separated_sandhi: dāraputrādisaukhyam ca vāhanāmbaralābhajamyajñādikarmasiddhiḥ syāt vedāntaśravaṇādikam
english: There will be happiness from one's wife, children, and so on, as well as that arising from the acquisition of vehicles and garments. There will be success in Vedic rituals (yajña) and other rituals, and the listening to Vedānta and similar spiritual teachings.

sanskrit: महाराजप्रसादेनाऽभीष्टसिद्धिः सुखावहा । आन्दोलिकादिलाभश्च कल्याणं च महत्सुखम् ॥४८॥
transliteration: mahārājaprasādenā'bhīṣṭasiddhiḥ sukhāvahā . āndolikādilābhaśca kalyāṇaṃ ca mahatsukham.
separated_sandhi: mahārājaprasādena abhīṣṭasiddhiḥ sukhāvahāāndolikādilābhaḥ ca kalyāṇam ca mahatsukham
english: Through the grace of a great king, there will be the accomplishment of desires (siddhi) leading to happiness. Also, the gain of palanquins and so on, as well as welfare and great joy.

sanskrit: पुत्रदारादिलाभश्च अन्नदानं महत्प्रियम् । नीचास्तपापसंयुक्ते जीवै रिष्फाष्टसंयुते ॥४९॥
transliteration: putradārādilābhaśca annadānaṃ mahatpriyam . nīcāstapāpasaṃyukte jīvai riṣphāṣṭasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: putradārādilābhaḥ ca annadānam mahatpriyamnīcāstapāpasaṃyukte jīvaiḥ riṣphāṣṭasaṃyute
english: There is also the gain of sons, wife, and so on, and the giving of food, which is very dear. (However,) when Jupiter (jīva) is associated with debilitated or combust malefic planets, and these conditions occur in the sixth or eighth houses...

sanskrit: स्थानभ्रंशं मनस्तापं पुत्रपीडामहद्भयम् । पश्वादिधनहानिश्च तीर्थयात्रादिकं लभेत् ॥५०॥
transliteration: sthānabhraṃśaṃ manastāpaṃ putrapīḍāmahadbhayam . paśvādidhanahāniśca tīrthayātrādikaṃ labhet.
separated_sandhi: sthānabhraṃśam manastāpam putrapīḍām mahat bhayampaśvādidhanahāniḥ ca tīrthayātrādikam labhet
english: There will be loss of position, mental anguish, distress to children, and great fear. There will be loss of wealth like cattle and other animals, but one may also undertake pilgrimages (tīrthayātrā) and similar religious journeys.

sanskrit: आदौ कष्टफलं चैव चतुष्पाज्जीवलाभकृत् । मध्यान्ते सुखमाप्नोति राजसम्मानवैभवम् ॥५१॥
transliteration: ādau kaṣṭaphalaṃ caiva catuṣpājjīvalābhakṛt . madhyānte sukhamāpnoti rājasammānavaibhavam.
separated_sandhi: ādau kaṣṭaphalam ca eva catuṣpāt jīvalābhakṛtmadhyānte sukham āpnoti rājasammānavaihavam
english: Initially, there are difficult results. It also brings gains from quadrupeds and other living beings. In the middle and at the end, one attains happiness, royal honor, and prosperity.

sanskrit: अथ सर्वेषु खेटेषु योऽतिहीनः प्रकीर्तितः । तस्य भास्करपुत्रस्य कथयामि दशाफलम् ॥५२॥
transliteration: atha sarveṣu kheṭeṣu yo'tihīnaḥ prakīrtitaḥ . tasya bhāskaraputrasya kathayāmi daśāphalam.
separated_sandhi: atha sarveṣu kheṭeṣu yaḥ atihīnaḥ prakīrtitaḥtasya bhāskaraputrasya kathayāmi daśāphalam
english: Now, I will describe the results of the planetary period (dasha) of that son of the Sun, Saturn, who is declared to be the most inferior among all planets.

sanskrit: स्वोच्चे स्वक्षेत्रगे मन्दे मित्रक्षेत्रेऽथ वा यदि । मूलत्रिकोणे भाग्ये वा तुंगांशे स्वांशगेऽपि वा ॥५३॥
transliteration: svocce svakṣetrage mande mitrakṣetre'tha vā yadi . mūlatrikoṇe bhāgye vā tuṃgāṃśe svāṃśage'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: svocce svakṣetrage mande mitrakṣetre atha vā yadimūlatrikoṇe bhāgye vā tuṅgāṃśe svāṃśage api vā
english: When Saturn is in its own exaltation sign, or in its own sign, or in a friend's sign; or if it is in its mūlatrikoṇa sign, or in the house of fortune (9th house), or in its exaltation navāmśa, or even in its own navāmśa.

sanskrit: दुश्चिक्ये लाभगे चैव राजसम्मानवैभवम् । सत्कीर्तिर्धनलाभश्च विद्यावादविनोदकृत् ॥५४॥
transliteration: duścikye lābhage caiva rājasammānavaibhavam . satkīrtirdhanalābhaśca vidyāvādavinodakṛt.
separated_sandhi: duścikye lābhage ca eva rājasammānavaihavamsatkīrtiḥ dhanalābhaḥ ca vidyāvādavinodakṛt
english: And if (Saturn is) in the 3rd house or the 11th house, one experiences royal honor and prosperity, good fame, gain of wealth, and becomes one who delights in scholarly debates.

sanskrit: महाराजप्रसादेन गजवाहनभूषणम् । राजयोगं प्रकुर्वीत सेनाधीशान्महत्सुखम् ॥५५॥
transliteration: mahārājaprasādena gajavāhanabhūṣaṇam . rājayogaṃ prakurvīta senādhīśānmahatsukham.
separated_sandhi: mahārājaprasādena gajavāhanabhūṣaṇamrājayogam prakurvīta senādhīśāt mahatsukham
english: By the grace of a great king, one acquires elephants, conveyances, and ornaments. Such a planetary position forms a royal combination (rājayoga), and one receives great happiness from a military commander.

sanskrit: लक्ष्मीकटाक्षचिह्नानि राज्यलाभं करोति च । गृहे कल्याणसम्पत्तिर्दारपुत्रादिलाभकृत् ॥५६॥
transliteration: lakṣmīkaṭākṣacihnāni rājyalābhaṃ karoti ca . gṛhe kalyāṇasampattirdāraputrādilābhakṛt.
separated_sandhi: lakṣmīkaṭākṣacihnāni rājyalābham karoti cagṛhe kalyāṇasampattiḥ dāraputrādilābhakṛt
english: Signs of Lakṣmī’s (goddess of wealth) auspicious glance bring about the acquisition of a kingdom. In the home, there is abundant welfare and prosperity, resulting in the gain of a spouse, children, and other blessings.

sanskrit: षष्ठाष्टमव्यये मन्दे नीचे वाऽस्तङ्गतेऽपि वा । विषशस्त्रादिपीडा च स्थाभ्रंशं महद्भयम् ॥५७॥
transliteration: ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyaye mande nīce vā'staṅgate'pi vā . viṣaśastrādipīḍā ca sthābhraṃśaṃ mahadbhayam.
separated_sandhi: ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyaye mande nīce vā astamgate api vāviṣaśastrādipīḍā ca sthābhraṃśam mahadbhayam
english: When Saturn ("manda") is situated in the sixth, eighth, or twelfth house, or is debilitated, or even combust, it indicates affliction from poison, weapons, and similar dangers, along with loss of position and great fear.

sanskrit: पितृमातृवियोगं च दारपुत्रादिपीडनम् । राजवैस्ःअम्यकार्याणि ह्यनिष्टं बन्धनं तथा ॥५८॥
transliteration: pitṛmātṛviyogaṃ ca dāraputrādipīḍanam . rājavaisḥamyakāryāṇi hyaniṣṭaṃ bandhanaṃ tathā.
separated_sandhi: pitṛmātṛviyogam ca dāraputrādipīḍanamrājavaiṣamyakāryāṇi hi aniṣṭam bandhanam tathā
english: (It also indicates) separation from one's father and mother, distress to one's spouse and children, and involvement in matters incurring royal displeasure. Indeed, there will be misfortune and imprisonment.

sanskrit: शुभयुक्तेक्षिते मन्दे योगकारकसंयुते । केन्द्रत्रिकोणलाभे वा मीनगे कार्मुके शनौ ॥५९॥
transliteration: śubhayuktekṣite mande yogakārakasaṃyute . kendratrikoṇalābhe vā mīnage kārmuke śanau.
separated_sandhi: śubhayuktekṣite mande yogakārakasaṃyutekendratrikoṇalābhe vā mīnage kārmuke śanau
english: When Saturn ("manda") is conjoined with or aspected by benefic planets, or conjoined with a planet that forms an auspicious combination (yoga), or if it is situated in an angular house, a trine house, or the house of gains, or if Saturn is in Pisces or Sagittarius...

sanskrit: राज्यलाभं महोत्साहंगजश्वाम्बरसंकुलम् ॥६०॥
transliteration: rājyalābhaṃ mahotsāhaṃgajaśvāmbarasaṃkulam.
separated_sandhi: rājyalābham mahotsāhamgajaśvāmbarasaṅkulam
english: ...(then one will experience) the acquisition of a kingdom, great enthusiasm, and an abundance of elephants, horses, and fine garments.

sanskrit: अथ सर्वनभोगेषु यः कुमारः प्रकीर्तितः । तस्य तारेशपुत्रस्य कथयामि दशाफलम् ॥६१॥
transliteration: atha sarvanabhogeṣu yaḥ kumāraḥ prakīrtitaḥ . tasya tāreśaputrasya kathayāmi daśāphalam.
separated_sandhi: atha sarvanabhogeṣu yaḥ kumāraḥ prakīrtitaḥtasya tāreśaputrasya kathayāmi daśāphalam
english: Now, I will describe the results of the planetary period (daśā) of Kumara (Mercury), who is renowned among all celestial bodies as the son of the Moon (tāreśaputra).

sanskrit: स्वोच्चे स्वक्षेत्रसंयुक्ते केन्द्रलाभत्रिकोणगे । मित्रक्षेत्रसमायुक्ते सौम्ये दाये महत्सुखम् ॥६२॥
transliteration: svocce svakṣetrasaṃyukte kendralābhatrikoṇage . mitrakṣetrasamāyukte saumye dāye mahatsukham.
separated_sandhi: svocce svakṣetrasaṃyukte kendralābhatrikoṇagemitrakṣetrasamāyukte saumye dāye mahat sukham
english: Great happiness will occur during Mercury's (saumya) planetary period (daśā) if Mercury is situated in its own exaltation sign, its own sign, an angular house (kendra), a house of gain (lābha), or a trine (trikoṇa), and is also in a friendly sign.

sanskrit: धनधान्यादिलाभं च सत्कीर्तिधनसम्पदाम् । ज्ञानाधिक्यं नृपप्रीतिं सत्कर्मगुणवर्द्धनम् ॥६३॥
transliteration: dhanadhānyādilābhaṃ ca satkīrtidhanasampadām . jñānādhikyaṃ nṛpaprītiṃ satkarmaguṇavarddhanam.
separated_sandhi: dhanadhānyādilābham ca satkīrtidhanasampadāmjñānādhikyam nṛpaprītim satkarmaguṇavarddhanam
english: There is acquisition of wealth, grain, and other resources, and also (gain) of good fame, riches, and prosperity. There is abundance of knowledge, royal favor, and the enhancement of good deeds (karma) and virtues.

sanskrit: पुत्रदारादिसौख्यं च देहारोग्यं महत्सुखम् । क्षीरेण भोजनं सौख्यं व्यापाराल्लभते धनम् ॥६४॥
transliteration: putradārādisaukhyaṃ ca dehārogyaṃ mahatsukham . kṣīreṇa bhojanaṃ saukhyaṃ vyāpārāllabhate dhanam.
separated_sandhi: putradārādisaukhyam ca dehārogyam mahat sukhamkṣīreṇa bhojanam saukhyam vyāpārāt labhate dhanam
english: There is happiness from children, spouse, and other family members, along with good bodily health and great joy. One obtains happiness from consuming food with milk, and wealth is acquired through business (vyāpāra).

sanskrit: शुभदृष्टियुते सौम्ये भाग्ये कर्माधिपे दशा । आधिपत्ये बलवती सम्पूर्ण्फलदादिका ॥६५॥
transliteration: śubhadṛṣṭiyute saumye bhāgye karmādhipe daśā . ādhipatye balavatī sampūrṇphaladādikā.
separated_sandhi: śubhadr̥ṣṭiyute saumye bhāgye karmādhipedaśā ādhipatye balavatī sampūrṇaphaladādikā
english: When Mercury (saumya) is aspected by auspicious planets, or is situated in the ninth house (bhāgya), or is the lord of the tenth house (karma), its planetary period (daśā) is powerful due to its rulership and gives full results and more.

sanskrit: पापग्रहयुते दृष्टे राजद्वेषं मनोरुजम् । बन्धुजनविरोधं च विदेशगमनं लभेत् ॥६६॥
transliteration: pāpagrahayute dṛṣṭe rājadveṣaṃ manorujam . bandhujanavirodhaṃ ca videśagamanaṃ labhet.
separated_sandhi: pāpagrahayute dṛṣṭe rājadveṣam manorujambandhujanavirodham ca videśagamanam labhet
english: When (a planet or house) is conjoined with or aspected by malefic planets, one experiences royal displeasure, mental affliction, conflict with relatives, and foreign travel.

sanskrit: परप्रेष्यं च कलहं मूर्तकृर्च्छान्महन्भयम् । षष्ठाष्टमव्यये सौम्ये लाभभोगार्थनाशनम् ॥६७॥
transliteration: parapreṣyaṃ ca kalahaṃ mūrtakṛrcchānmahanbhayam . ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyaye saumye lābhabhogārthanāśanam.
separated_sandhi: parapreṣyam ca kalaham mūrtakṛcchrāt mahant bhayamṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyaye saumye lābhabhogārthanāśanam
english: One experiences servitude to others and disputes, as well as great fear due to physical afflictions. When a benefic planet is in the 6th, 8th, or 12th house, there is a loss of gains, enjoyments, and wealth.

sanskrit: वातपीडां धनं चैवं पाण्डुरोगं विनिर्दिशेत् । नृपचौराग्निभीतिं च कृषिगोभूमिनाशनम् ॥६८॥
transliteration: vātapīḍāṃ dhanaṃ caivaṃ pāṇḍurogaṃ vinirdiśet . nṛpacaurāgnibhītiṃ ca kṛṣigobhūmināśanam.
separated_sandhi: vātapiḍām dhanam ca evam pāṇḍurogam vinirdiśetnṛpacaurāgnibhītim ca kṛṣigobhūmināśanam
english: One should predict ailments caused by vata (wind element), loss of wealth, and jaundice (pāṇḍuroga). Furthermore, there will be fear from rulers, thieves, and fire, along with the destruction of agriculture, cattle, and land.

sanskrit: दशादौ धनधान्यं च विद्यालाभं महत्सुखम् । पुत्रकल्याणसम्पत्तिः सन्मार्गे धनलाभकृत् ॥६९॥
transliteration: daśādau dhanadhānyaṃ ca vidyālābhaṃ mahatsukham . putrakalyāṇasampattiḥ sanmārge dhanalābhakṛt.
separated_sandhi: daśādau dhanadhānyam ca vidyālābham mahat sukhamputrakalyāṇasampattiḥ sanmārge dhanalābhakṛt
english: At the beginning of a planetary period (daśā), there is wealth and grains, acquisition of knowledge, and great happiness. There is also the welfare and prosperity of children, and the acquisition of wealth through virtuous means (sanmārga).

sanskrit: मध्ये नरेन्द्रसन्मानमन्तेदुःखं भविष्यति ॥७०॥
transliteration: madhye narendrasanmānamanteduḥkhaṃ bhaviṣyati.
separated_sandhi: madhye narendrasanmānamante duḥkham bhaviṣyati
english: In the middle portion (of the planetary period), there will be honor from the ruler. At the end, however, there will be suffering.

sanskrit: यस्तमोग्रहयोर्मध्ये कबन्धः कथ्यते बुधैः । तस्य केतोरिदानीं ते कथेयामि दशाफलम् ॥७१॥
transliteration: yastamograhayormadhye kabandhaḥ kathyate budhaiḥ . tasya ketoridānīṃ te katheyāmi daśāphalam.
separated_sandhi: yaḥ tamograḥayoh madhye kabandhaḥ kathyatebudhaiḥ tasya ketoh idānīm te kathayāmi daśāphalam
english: I will now describe to you the results of the planetary period (dasha) of Ketu, who is referred to by the wise as Kabandha, the headless body, among the two shadowy planets (Rahu and Ketu).

sanskrit: केन्द्रे लाभे त्रिकोणे व शुभराशौ शुभेक्षिते । स्वोच्चे वा शुभवर्गे वा राजप्रीतिं मनोनुगम् ॥७२॥
transliteration: kendre lābhe trikoṇe va śubharāśau śubhekṣite . svocce vā śubhavarge vā rājaprītiṃ manonugam.
separated_sandhi: kendre lābhe trikoṇe vā śubharāśau śubhekṣitesvocce vā śubhavarge vā rājaprītim manonugam
english: If Ketu is situated in an angular house (kendra), an eleventh house (labha), or a trine house (trikona); or in an auspicious sign; or aspected by an auspicious planet; or in its exaltation sign (svocca); or in an auspicious divisional chart (varga), it brings royal favor and fulfillment of desires.

sanskrit: देशाग्रामाधिपत्यं च वाहनं पुत्रसम्भवम् । देशान्तरप्रयाणं च निर्दिशेत् तत् सुखावहम् ॥७३॥
transliteration: deśāgrāmādhipatyaṃ ca vāhanaṃ putrasambhavam . deśāntaraprayāṇaṃ ca nirdiśet tat sukhāvaham.
separated_sandhi: deśagrāmādhipatyam ca vāhanam putrasambhavamdeśāntaraprayāṇam ca nirdiśet tat sukhāvaham
english: It indicates rulership over regions and villages, acquisition of vehicles, the birth of children, and journeys to other countries. These outcomes should be declared as pleasant.

sanskrit: पुत्रदारसुखं चैव चतुष्पाज्जीवलाभकृत् । दुश्चिक्ये षष्ठलाभे वा केतुर्दाये सुखं दिशेत् ॥७४॥
transliteration: putradārasukhaṃ caiva catuṣpājjīvalābhakṛt . duścikye ṣaṣṭhalābhe vā keturdāye sukhaṃ diśet.
separated_sandhi: putradārasukham ca eva catuṣpāt jīvalābhakṛtduścikye ṣaṣṭhalābhe vā ketuḥ dāye sukham diśet
english: During its planetary period (dasha), Ketu indicates happiness from children and spouse, and gains from quadrupeds. If Ketu is situated in the third house (duścikyā), or in the sixth and eleventh houses (ṣaṣṭhalābha), it bestows happiness.

sanskrit: राज्यं करोति मित्रांशं गजवाजिसमन्वितम् । दशदौ राजयोगश्च दशामध्ये महद्भयम् ॥७५॥
transliteration: rājyaṃ karoti mitrāṃśaṃ gajavājisamanvitam . daśadau rājayogaśca daśāmadhye mahadbhayam.
separated_sandhi: rājyam karoti mitrāṃśam gajavājisamanvitamdaśādau rājayogaḥ ca daśāmadhye mahat bhayam
english: It grants sovereignty (rājya), friendly influence (mitrāṃśa), and is accompanied by elephants and horses. A royal combination (yoga) forms at the beginning of the planetary period (dasha), but great fear manifests in the middle of the dasha.

sanskrit: अन्ते दूराटनं चैव देहविश्रमणं तथा । धने रन्ध्रे व्यये केतौ पापदृष्टियुतेक्षिते ॥७६॥
transliteration: ante dūrāṭanaṃ caiva dehaviśramaṇaṃ tathā . dhane randhre vyaye ketau pāpadṛṣṭiyutekṣite.
separated_sandhi: ante dūrāṭanam ca eva dehaviśramaṇam tathādhane randhre vyaye ketau pāpadṛṣṭiyutekṣite
english: Ultimately, there will be distant travels and bodily exhaustion when Ketu is in the second (dhane), eighth (randhre), or twelfth (vyaye) houses, and is conjoined with or aspected by malefic planets.

sanskrit: निगडं बन्धुनाशं च स्थानभ्रंशं मनोरुजम् । शूद्रसङ्गादिलाभं च कुरुते रोगसंकुलम् ॥७७॥
transliteration: nigaḍaṃ bandhunāśaṃ ca sthānabhraṃśaṃ manorujam . śūdrasaṅgādilābhaṃ ca kurute rogasaṃkulam.
separated_sandhi: nigaḍam bandhunāśam ca sthānabhraṃśam manorujamśūdrasaṅgādilābham ca kurute rogasaṅkulam
english: It causes imprisonment, loss of relatives, loss of position, mental anguish, gains from associating with Shudras and similar people, and a state of being riddled with diseases.

sanskrit: अथ भूतेषु यः शुक्रा मदरूपेण तिष्ठति । तस्य दैत्यगुरोर्विप्र कथयामि दशाफलम् ॥७८॥
transliteration: atha bhūteṣu yaḥ śukrā madarūpeṇa tiṣṭhati . tasya daityagurorvipra kathayāmi daśāphalam.
separated_sandhi: atha bhūteṣu yaḥ śukrā madarūpeṇa tiṣṭhatitasya daityaguroḥ vipra kathayāmi daśāphalam
english: Now, O Brahmin (vipra), I will describe the results of the planetary period (daśā) of Shukra, who among living beings manifests in the form of passion.

sanskrit: परमोच्चगते शुक्रे स्वोच्चे स्वक्षेत्रकेन्द्रगे । नृपाऽभिषेकसम्प्राप्तिर्वाहनाऽम्बरभूषणम् ॥७९॥
transliteration: paramoccagate śukre svocce svakṣetrakendrage . nṛpā'bhiṣekasamprāptirvāhanā'mbarabhūṣaṇam.
separated_sandhi: paramoccagate śukre svocce svakṣetrakendragenṛpābhiṣekasamprāptiḥ vāhanāmbarabhūṣaṇam
english: When Shukra is in its highest exaltation, or in its own exaltation sign, or situated in its own sign, or in an angular house (Kendra), then the acquisition of royal coronation, vehicles, garments, and ornaments will occur.

sanskrit: गजाश्वपशुलाभं च नित्यं मिष्ठान्नभोजनम् । अखण्डमण्डलाधीशाराजसन्मानवैभवम् ॥८०॥
transliteration: gajāśvapaśulābhaṃ ca nityaṃ miṣṭhānnabhojanam . akhaṇḍamaṇḍalādhīśārājasanmānavaibhavam.
separated_sandhi: gajāśvapaśulābham ca nityam miṣṭhānnabhojanamakhaṇḍamaṇḍalādhīśārājasammānavibhavam
english: And there will be gain of elephants, horses, and cattle, constant sweet meals, and the glory of being a ruler of an unbroken dominion and possessing royal honor.

sanskrit: मृदङ्गवाद्यघोषं च गृहे लक्ष्मीकटाक्षकृत् । त्रिकोणस्थे निजे तस्मिन् राज्यार्थगृहहसम्पदः ॥८१॥
transliteration: mṛdaṅgavādyaghoṣaṃ ca gṛhe lakṣmīkaṭākṣakṛt . trikoṇasthe nije tasmin rājyārthagṛhahasampadaḥ.
separated_sandhi: mṛdaṅgavādyaghoṣam ca gṛhe lakṣmīkaṭākṣakṛttrikoṇasthe nije tasmin rājyārthagṛhasampadaḥ
english: The sound of mridanga (mṛdaṅga) musical instruments and the auspicious glance (kaṭākṣa) of Lakshmi (lakṣmī) in the home are produced. When that planet (Venus) is situated in its own (nija) trine (trikoṇa), it bestows a kingdom, wealth (artha), a home, and prosperity.

sanskrit: विवाहोत्सवकार्याणि पुत्रकल्याणवैभवम् । सेनाधिपत्यं कुरुते इष्टबन्धुसमागनम् ॥८२॥
transliteration: vivāhotsavakāryāṇi putrakalyāṇavaibhavam . senādhipatyaṃ kurute iṣṭabandhusamāganam.
separated_sandhi: vivāhotsavakāryāṇi putrakalyāṇavaibhavamsenādhipatyam kurute iṣṭabandhusamāgamam
english: It brings about marriage ceremonies and festive activities, the welfare and prosperity of children, command over the army, and meetings with beloved relatives.

sanskrit: नष्टराज्याद्धनप्राप्तिं गृहे गोधनसङ्ग्रहम् । षष्ठाष्टमव्यये शुक्रे नीचे वा व्ययराशिगे ॥८३॥
transliteration: naṣṭarājyāddhanaprāptiṃ gṛhe godhanasaṅgraham . ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyaye śukre nīce vā vyayarāśige.
separated_sandhi: naṣṭarājyāt dhanaprāptim gṛhe godhanasaṅgrahamṣaṣṭha aṣṭama vyaye śukre nīce vā vyayarāśige
english: There is also the acquisition of wealth (artha) from a lost kingdom, and the accumulation of cattle (go) wealth in the home. However, when Venus (śukra) is in the 6th, 8th, or 12th house, or debilitated (nīca), or situated in a house of loss (vyaya rāśi)...

sanskrit: आत्मबन्धुजनद्वेषं दारवर्गादिपीडनम् । व्यवसायात्फ्लं नष्टं गोमहिष्यादिहानिकृत् ॥८४॥
transliteration: ātmabandhujanadveṣaṃ dāravargādipīḍanam . vyavasāyātphlaṃ naṣṭaṃ gomahiṣyādihānikṛt.
separated_sandhi: ātmabandhujanadveṣam dāravargādipīḍanamvyavasāyāt phalam naṣṭam gomahiṣyādihānikṛt
english: It causes animosity from one's own relatives and people, and harassment from one's spouse (dāra) and others. The results of business (vyavasāya) are lost, and there is loss of cattle (go), buffaloes (mahiṣī), and so on.

sanskrit: दारपुत्रादिपीडा वा आत्मबन्धुवियोगकृत् । भाग्यकर्माधिपत्येन लग्नवाहनराशिगे ॥८५॥
transliteration: dāraputrādipīḍā vā ātmabandhuviyogakṛt . bhāgyakarmādhipatyena lagnavāhanarāśige.
separated_sandhi: dāraputrādipīḍā vā ātmabandhuvayogakṛtbhāgyakarmādhipatyena lagnasvāhanarāśige
english: There may also be suffering for one's spouse (dāra) and children (putra), or it causes separation from one's own (ātman) relatives. When Venus is situated in the ascendant (lagna) or the house of vehicles (vāhana rāśi), by virtue of its lordship over fortune (bhāgya) and action (karma)...

sanskrit: तद्दशायां महत्सौख्यं देशग्रामाधिपालता । देवालयतडागादिपुण्यकर्मसु संग्रहः ॥८६॥
transliteration: taddaśāyāṃ mahatsaukhyaṃ deśagrāmādhipālatā . devālayataḍāgādipuṇyakarmasu saṃgrahaḥ.
separated_sandhi: taddaśāyām mahat saukhyam deśagrāmādhipālatādevālayataḍāgādipuṇyakarmasu saṃgrahaḥ
english: During that planetary period (daśā), there will be great happiness, attainment of rulership over regions and villages, and involvement in auspicious activities such as building temples and ponds.

sanskrit: अन्नदाने महत्सौख्यं नित्यं मिष्ठान्नभोजनम् । उत्साहः कीर्तिसम्पत्ती स्त्रीपुत्रधनसम्पदः ॥८७॥
transliteration: annadāne mahatsaukhyaṃ nityaṃ miṣṭhānnabhojanam . utsāhaḥ kīrtisampattī strīputradhanasampadaḥ.
separated_sandhi: annadāne mahat saukhyam nityam miṣṭānnābhojanamutsāhaḥ kīrtisampattī strīputradhanasampadaḥ
english: There will be great happiness from giving food (dāna), daily enjoyment of sweet meals, enthusiasm, attainment of fame and prosperity, and an abundance of women, sons, and wealth.

sanskrit: स्वभुक्तौ फलमेवं स्याद्बलान्यन्यानि भुक्तिषु । द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु देहपीडा भविष्यति ॥८८॥
transliteration: svabhuktau phalamevaṃ syādbalānyanyāni bhuktiṣu . dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu dehapīḍā bhaviṣyati.
separated_sandhi: svabhuktau phalam evam syāt balāni anyānibhuktiṣu dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu dehapīḍā bhaviṣyati
english: The effects will be thus during its own sub-period (bhukti), and other strengths will manifest in other sub-periods (bhukti). However, if it is the lord of the second and seventh houses, there will be bodily affliction.

sanskrit: तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं रुद्रं वा त्र्यम्बकं जपेत् । स्वेतां गां महिषीं दव्यादारोग्यं च ततो भवेत् ॥८९॥
transliteration: taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ rudraṃ vā tryambakaṃ japet . svetāṃ gāṃ mahiṣīṃ davyādārogyaṃ ca tato bhavet.
separated_sandhi: taddoṣaparihārārtham rudram vā tryambakam japetśvetām gām mahiṣīm dadyāt ārogyam ca tataḥ bhavet
english: For the mitigation of that fault, one should chant the Rudra or Tryambaka (mantra). One should also donate a white cow or a buffalo, and from that, good health will be attained.

sanskrit: स्थानस्थितिवशेनैवं फलं प्रोक्तं पुरातनैः । मिथो भावेशसम्बन्धात्फलानि कथयाम्यहम् ॥१॥
transliteration: sthānasthitivaśenaivaṃ phalaṃ proktaṃ purātanaiḥ . mitho bhāveśasambandhātphalāni kathayāmyaham.
separated_sandhi: sthānasthitivaśena evam phalam proktam purātanaiḥmithaḥ bhāveśasambandhāt phalāni kathayāmi aham
english: The results based on the strength of a planet's position (sthāna) have thus been declared by the ancients. Now, I (aham) shall describe the results based on the mutual relationships between the lords of houses (bhāvas).

sanskrit: लग्नेशस्य गशाकाले सत्कीतिर्देहजं सुखम् । धनेशस्य दशायां तु क्लेशो वा मृत्युतो भयम् ॥२॥
transliteration: lagneśasya gaśākāle satkītirdehajaṃ sukham . dhaneśasya daśāyāṃ tu kleśo vā mṛtyuto bhayam.
separated_sandhi: lagnesasya daśākāle satkīrtiḥ dehajam sukhamdhanesasya daśāyām tu kleśaḥ vā mṛtyutaḥ bhayam
english: During the planetary period (dasha) of the lord of the ascendant (lagna), there will be good reputation and physical comfort. However, during the planetary period (dasha) of the lord of wealth, there will be distress or fear from death.

sanskrit: सहजेशदशाकाले ज्ञेयं पापफलं नृणाम् । सुखाधीशदशायां तु गृहभूमिसुखं भवेत् ॥३॥
transliteration: sahajeśadaśākāle jñeyaṃ pāpaphalaṃ nṛṇām . sukhādhīśadaśāyāṃ tu gṛhabhūmisukhaṃ bhavet.
separated_sandhi: sahajeśadaśākāle jñeyam pāpaphaḷam nṛṇāmsukhādhīśadaśāyām tu gṛhabhūmisukham bhavet
english: During the planetary period (dasha) of the lord of the third house (sahaja), evil consequences (pāpaphaḷam) for people should be understood. However, during the planetary period (dasha) of the lord of happiness (sukha), there will be joy related to home and land.

sanskrit: पञ्चमेशस्य पाके च विद्याप्तिः पुत्रजं सुखम् । रोगेशस्य दशाकाले देहपीडा रिपोर्भयम् ॥४॥
transliteration: pañcameśasya pāke ca vidyāptiḥ putrajaṃ sukham . rogeśasya daśākāle dehapīḍā riporbhayam.
separated_sandhi: pañcameśasya pāke ca vidyāptiḥ putrajjam sukhamrogeśasya daśākāle dehapīḍā ripoḥ bhayam
english: During the planetary period (dasha) of the lord of the fifth house, there will be acquisition of knowledge and happiness from children. Additionally, during the planetary period (dasha) of the lord of disease, there will be bodily suffering and fear from enemies.

sanskrit: सप्तमेशस्य पाके तु स्त्रीपीडा मृत्युतो भयम् । अष्टमेशदशाकाले मृत्युभीतिर्धनक्षतिः ॥५॥
transliteration: saptameśasya pāke tu strīpīḍā mṛtyuto bhayam . aṣṭameśadaśākāle mṛtyubhītirdhanakṣatiḥ.
separated_sandhi: saptameśasya pāke tu strīpīḍā mṛtyutaḥ bhayamaṣṭameśadaśākāle mṛtyubhītiḥ dhanakṣatiḥ
english: However, during the planetary period (dasha) of the lord of the seventh house, there will be suffering for one's spouse or women, and fear of death. During the planetary period (dasha) of the lord of the eighth house, there will be fear of death and loss of wealth.

sanskrit: धर्मशस्य दशायां च भूरिल्लाभो यशःसुखम् । दशमेशदशाकाले सम्मानं नृपसंसदि ॥६॥
transliteration: dharmaśasya daśāyāṃ ca bhūrillābho yaśaḥsukham . daśameśadaśākāle sammānaṃ nṛpasaṃsadi.
separated_sandhi: dharmaśasya daśāyām ca bhūriḥ lābhaḥ yaśaḥsukhamdaśameśadaśākāle sammānam nṛpasaṃsadi
english: During the planetary period (dasha) of the lord of the ninth house, which represents righteousness (dharma), there will be great profit and joy from renown. During the planetary period (dasha) of the lord of the tenth house, one will receive honor in royal courts or assemblies.

sanskrit: लाभेशस्य दशाकाले लाभे बाधा रुजोभयम् । व्ययेशस्य दशा नृणां बहुकष्टप्रदा द्विज ॥७॥
transliteration: lābheśasya daśākāle lābhe bādhā rujobhayam . vyayeśasya daśā nṛṇāṃ bahukaṣṭapradā dvija.
separated_sandhi: lābheśasya daśākāle lābhe bādhā rujaḥ bhayamvyayeśasya daśā nṛṇām bahukaṣṭapradā dvija
english: O twice-born (dvija), during the planetary period (dasha) of the lord of the eleventh house (gains), there will be hindrances to gains, as well as sicknesses and fear. The planetary period (dasha) of the lord of the twelfth house (expenditures) causes much suffering for people.

sanskrit: दशारम्भे शुभस्थाने स्थितस्यापि शुभं फलम् । अशुभस्थानगस्यैवं शुभस्यापि न शोभनम् ॥८॥
transliteration: daśārambhe śubhasthāne sthitasyāpi śubhaṃ phalam . aśubhasthānagasyaivaṃ śubhasyāpi na śobhanam.
separated_sandhi: daśārambhe śubhasthāne sthitasya api śubham phalamaśubhasthānagasya evam śubhasya api na śobhanam
english: At the beginning of a planetary period (dasha), if the dasha lord is situated in an auspicious house, it yields favorable results. Conversely, even an auspicious planet, if located in an inauspicious house at the beginning of its dasha, will not produce good results.

sanskrit: पञ्चमेशेन युक्तस्य कर्मेशस्य दशा शुभा । नवमेशेन युक्तस्य कर्मेशस्यातिशभना ॥९॥
transliteration: pañcameśena yuktasya karmeśasya daśā śubhā . navameśena yuktasya karmeśasyātiśabhanā.
separated_sandhi: pañcameśena yuktasya karmeśasya daśā śubhānavameśena yuktasya karmeśasya atiśobhanā
english: The planetary period (dasha) of the lord of the tenth house (karma), when associated with the lord of the fifth house, is considered auspicious. If the lord of the tenth house (karma) is associated with the lord of the ninth house, its planetary period (dasha) is exceedingly auspicious.

sanskrit: पञ्चमेशेन युक्तस्य ग्रहस्यापि दशा शुभा । तथा धर्मपयुक्तस्य दशा परमशोभना ॥१०॥
transliteration: pañcameśena yuktasya grahasyāpi daśā śubhā . tathā dharmapayuktasya daśā paramaśobhanā.
separated_sandhi: pañcameśena yuktasya grahasya api daśā śubhātathā dharmapayuktasya daśā paramaśobhanā
english: Even the planetary period (dasha) of a planet associated with the lord of the fifth house is auspicious. Similarly, the planetary period (dasha) of a planet associated with the lord of the ninth house (dharma) is supremely auspicious.

sanskrit: सुखेशसहितस्यापि धर्मेशस्य दशा शुभा । पञ्चमस्थानगस्यापि मानेशस्य दशाशुभा ॥११॥
transliteration: sukheśasahitasyāpi dharmeśasya daśā śubhā . pañcamasthānagasyāpi māneśasya daśāśubhā.
separated_sandhi: sukheśasahitasya api dharmeśasya daśā śubhāpañcamasthānagasya api māneśasya daśā aśubhā
english: The planetary period (dasha) of the lord of the ninth house (dharma), even when associated with the lord of the fourth house (happiness), is auspicious. However, the planetary period (dasha) of the lord of the tenth house (honor), even when situated in the fifth house, is inauspicious.

sanskrit: एवं त्रिकोणनाथानां केन्द्रस्थानां दशाः शुभाः । तथा कोणस्थितानां च केन्द्रेशानां दशाः शुभाः ॥१२॥
transliteration: evaṃ trikoṇanāthānāṃ kendrasthānāṃ daśāḥ śubhāḥ . tathā koṇasthitānāṃ ca kendreśānāṃ daśāḥ śubhāḥ.
separated_sandhi: evam trikoṇanāthānām kendrasthānām daśāḥ śubhāḥtathā koṇasthitānām ca kendreśānām daśāḥ śubhāḥ
english: Thus, the planetary periods (daśā) of the lords of trine houses (koṇa) are auspicious when those lords are situated in angular houses (kendra). Similarly, the planetary periods (daśā) of the lords of angular houses (kendra) are auspicious when those lords are situated in trine houses (koṇa).

sanskrit: केन्द्रेशः कोणभावस्थः कोणेशः केन्द्रगो यदि । तयोर्दशां शुभां प्राहुर्ज्योतिःशास्त्रविदो जनाः ॥१३॥
transliteration: kendreśaḥ koṇabhāvasthaḥ koṇeśaḥ kendrago yadi . tayordaśāṃ śubhāṃ prāhurjyotiḥśāstravido janāḥ.
separated_sandhi: kendreśaḥ koṇabhāvasthaḥ koṇeśaḥ kendragaḥ yaditayoḥ daśām śubhām prāhuḥ jyotiḥśāstravidaḥ janāḥ
english: If the lord of an angular house (kendra) is situated in a trine house (koṇa), and the lord of a trine house (koṇa) is situated in an angular house (kendra), then experts in astrology (jyotiḥśāstra) declare the planetary periods (daśā) of these two (planets) to be auspicious.

sanskrit: षष्ठाष्टमव्ययाधीशा अपि कोणेशसंयुता । तेषां दशाऽपि शुभदा कथिता कालकोविदैः ॥१४॥
transliteration: ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyayādhīśā api koṇeśasaṃyutā . teṣāṃ daśā'pi śubhadā kathitā kālakovidaiḥ.
separated_sandhi: ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyayādhīśāḥ api koṇeśasaṃyutāteṣām daśā api śubhadā kathitā kālakovidaiḥ
english: Even if the lords of the 6th, 8th, and 12th houses are associated with the lords of trine houses (koṇa), their planetary periods (daśā) are also declared to be auspicious by the experts in time (kāla-kovidaiḥ).

sanskrit: कोणेशो यदि केम्द्रस्थः केन्द्रेशो यदि कोणगः । ताभ्यां युक्तस्य खेटस्य दृष्टियुक्तस्य चैतयोः ॥१५॥
transliteration: koṇeśo yadi kemdrasthaḥ kendreśo yadi koṇagaḥ . tābhyāṃ yuktasya kheṭasya dṛṣṭiyuktasya caitayoḥ.
separated_sandhi: koṇeśaḥ yadi kendrasthaḥ kendreśaḥ yadi koṇagaḥtābhyām yuktasya kheṭasya dṛṣṭiyuktasya ca etayoḥ
english: If the lord of a trine house (koṇa) is situated in an angular house (kendra), and the lord of an angular house (kendra) is situated in a trine house (koṇa); then, regarding any planet that is conjoined with these two (koṇa and kendra lords) or aspected by these two (koṇa and kendra lords)...

sanskrit: दशां शुभप्रदां प्राहुर्विद्वांसो दैवचिन्तकाः । लग्नेशो धर्मभावस्थो धर्मेशो लग्नगो यदि ॥१६॥
transliteration: daśāṃ śubhapradāṃ prāhurvidvāṃso daivacintakāḥ . lagneśo dharmabhāvastho dharmeśo lagnago yadi.
separated_sandhi: daśām śubhapradām prāhuḥ vidvāṃsaḥ daivacintakāḥlagneśaḥ dharmabhāvasthaḥ dharmeśaḥ lagnagaḥ yadi
english: Wise astrologers (daivachintakāḥ) declare the planetary period (daśā) of such a planet (from the previous verse) to be auspicious. Furthermore, if the lord of the ascendant (lagna) is situated in the dharma house (dharma-bhāva), and the lord of the dharma house (dharma-bhāva) is situated in the ascendant (lagna)...

sanskrit: एतयोस्तु दशाकाले सुखधर्मसमुद्भवः । कर्मेशो लग्नराशिस्थो लग्नेशः कर्मभावगः ॥१७॥
transliteration: etayostu daśākāle sukhadharmasamudbhavaḥ . karmeśo lagnarāśistho lagneśaḥ karmabhāvagaḥ.
