separated_sandhi: etayoḥ tu daśākāle sukha-dharma-samudbhavaḥ karma-īśaḥlagna-rāśi-sthaḥ lagna-īśaḥ karma-bhāva-gaḥ
english: When the lord of the 10th house is situated in the ascendant sign and the lord of the ascendant is situated in the 10th house, then during the daśā period of these two (lords), there will be the arising of happiness and prosperity (dharma).

sanskrit: तयोर्दशाविपाके तु राज्यलाभो भवेद्ध्रुवम् । त्रिषडायगतानां च त्रिषडायाधिपैर्युजम् ॥१८॥
transliteration: tayordaśāvipāke tu rājyalābho bhaveddhruvam . triṣaḍāyagatānāṃ ca triṣaḍāyādhipairyujam.
separated_sandhi: tayoḥ daśā-vipāke tu rājya-lābhaḥ bhavet dhruvamtriṣaḍāya-gatānām ca triṣaḍāya-adhipaiḥ yujam
english: During the fruition of their daśā periods (referring to the ascendant lord and the tenth house lord), there will certainly be the gain of a kingdom (rājya). However, for those (planets) situated in the 3rd, 6th, or 11th houses, or associated with the lords of the 3rd, 6th, or 11th houses...

sanskrit: शुभानामपि खेटानां दशा पापफलप्रदा । मारकस्थानगानां च मारकेशयुजामपि ॥१९॥
transliteration: śubhānāmapi kheṭānāṃ daśā pāpaphalapradā . mārakasthānagānāṃ ca mārakeśayujāmapi.
separated_sandhi: śubhānām api kheṭānām daśā pāpa-phala-pradāmāraka-sthāna-gatānām ca mārakeśa-yujām api
english: Even the daśā of auspicious planets (benefics) yields inauspicious results (pāpa phala) (if they are afflicted as described). Furthermore, the daśā of planets situated in the death-inflicting houses (māraka sthāna) or associated with the death-inflicting lord (mārakeśa) also yields inauspicious results.

sanskrit: रन्ध्रस्थानगतानां च दशाऽनिष्टफलप्रदा । एवं भावेशसम्बन्धादूरनीयं दशाफलम् ॥२०॥
transliteration: randhrasthānagatānāṃ ca daśā'niṣṭaphalapradā . evaṃ bhāveśasambandhādūranīyaṃ daśāphalam.
separated_sandhi: randhra-sthāna-gatānām ca daśā aniṣṭa-phala-pradāevam bhāveśa-sambandhāt ūhanīyam daśā-phalam
english: And the daśā of planets situated in the 8th house (randhra sthāna) also yields undesirable results. Therefore, the results of the daśā should be inferred in this manner, based on the connections of the house lords.

sanskrit: कथयाम्यथ विप्रेन्द्र कालचक्रदशाफलम् । तत्रादौ राशिनाथानां सूर्यादीनां फलं ब्रुवे ॥१॥
transliteration: kathayāmyatha viprendra kālacakradaśāphalam . tatrādau rāśināthānāṃ sūryādīnāṃ phalaṃ bruve.
separated_sandhi: kathayāmi atha vipra-indra kāla-cakra-daśā-phalamtatra ādau rāśi-nāthānām sūrya-ādīnām phalam bruve
english: Now, O chief among brahmins (vipra indra), I shall explain the results of the Kālacakra Daśā. Firstly, in this regard, I will declare the results pertaining to the lords of the signs, beginning with the Sun.

sanskrit: रक्तपित्तादितो व्याधिं नृणामर्कफलं वदेत् । धनकीर्तिप्रजावृद्धिवस्त्राभरणदः शशी ॥२॥
transliteration: raktapittādito vyādhiṃ nṛṇāmarkaphalaṃ vadet . dhanakīrtiprajāvṛddhivastrābharaṇadaḥ śaśī.
separated_sandhi: rakta-pitta-āditaḥ vyādhim nṛṇām arka-phalam vadetdhana-kīrti-prajā-vṛddhi-vastra-ābharaṇa-daḥ śaśī
english: One should declare that the Sun's result for people is disease, stemming from issues like blood and bile. The Moon, however, grants an increase in wealth, fame, progeny, clothing, and ornaments.

sanskrit: ज्वरमाशु दिशेत् पैत्त्यं ग्रन्थिस्फोटं कुजस्तथा । प्रजानां च धनानां च सदा वृद्धिं बुधो दिशेत् ॥३॥
transliteration: jvaramāśu diśet paittyaṃ granthisphoṭaṃ kujastathā . prajānāṃ ca dhanānāṃ ca sadā vṛddhiṃ budho diśet.
separated_sandhi: jvaram āśu diśet paittyam granthi-sphoṭam kujaḥ tathāprajānām ca dhanānām ca sadā vṛddhim budhaḥ diśet
english: Mars quickly indicates bilious fever and abscesses. Similarly, Mercury always bestows an increase in progeny and wealth.

sanskrit: धनं कीर्तिं प्रजावृद्धिं नानाभोगं बृहस्पतिः । विद्यावृद्धिर्विवाहश्च गृहं धान्यं भृगोः फलम् ॥४॥
transliteration: dhanaṃ kīrtiṃ prajāvṛddhiṃ nānābhogaṃ bṛhaspatiḥ . vidyāvṛddhirvivāhaśca gṛhaṃ dhānyaṃ bhṛgoḥ phalam.
separated_sandhi: dhanam kīrtim prajā-vṛddhim nānā-bhogam bṛhaspatiḥvidyā-vṛddhiḥ vivāhaḥ ca gṛham dhānyam bhṛgoḥ phalam
english: Jupiter grants wealth, fame, increase in progeny, and various enjoyments. The result of Venus is an increase in knowledge, marriage, a house, and grain.

sanskrit: तापाधिक्यं महद्दुःखं बन्धुनाशः शनेः फलम् । एवमर्कादियोगेन वदेद्राशिदशाफलम् ॥५॥
transliteration: tāpādhikyaṃ mahadduḥkhaṃ bandhunāśaḥ śaneḥ phalam . evamarkādiyogena vadedrāśidaśāphalam.
separated_sandhi: tāpa-ādhikyam mahat-duḥkham bandhu-nāśaḥ śaneḥphalam evam arka-ādi-yogena vadet rāśi-daśā-phalam
english: Excessive suffering, great sorrow, and the destruction of relatives are the results of Saturn. Thus, one should declare the results of the zodiacal signs (rāśi) and planetary periods (daśā) according to the influences of the Sun and other planets.

sanskrit: मेषे तु रक्तपीडा च वृषभे धान्यवर्द्धनम् । मिथुने ज्ञानसम्पान्नश्चान्द्रे धनपतिर्भवेत् ॥६॥
transliteration: meṣe tu raktapīḍā ca vṛṣabhe dhānyavarddhanam . mithune jñānasampānnaścāndre dhanapatirbhavet.
separated_sandhi: meṣe tu rakta-pīḍā ca vṛṣabhe dhānya-varddhanammithune jñāna-sampannaḥ ca cāndre dhana-patiḥ bhavet
english: In Aries, there is indeed blood affliction, and in Taurus, an increase in grain. In Gemini, one becomes endowed with knowledge, and in Cancer, a lord of wealth.

sanskrit: सूर्यक्षे शत्रुबाधा च कन्या स्त्रीणां च नाशनं । तालिके राजमन्त्रित्वं वृश्चिके मरणं भवेत् ॥७॥
transliteration: sūryakṣe śatrubādhā ca kanyā strīṇāṃ ca nāśanaṃ . tālike rājamantritvaṃ vṛścike maraṇaṃ bhavet.
separated_sandhi: sūryakṣe śatrubādhā ca kanyā strīṇām ca nāśanamtālike rājamantritvam vṛścike maraṇam bhavet
english: When in the Sun's sign (navamsha), there is trouble from enemies. When in Virgo, there is loss for women. When in Libra, one attains royal ministership. When in Scorpio, death occurs.

sanskrit: अर्थलाभो भवेच्चापे मेषस्य नवभागके । मकरे पापकर्माणि कुम्भे वाणिज्यमेव च ॥८॥
transliteration: arthalābho bhaveccāpe meṣasya navabhāgake . makare pāpakarmāṇi kumbhe vāṇijyameva ca.
separated_sandhi: arthalābhaḥ bhavet cāpe meṣasya navabhāgakemakare pāpakarmāṇi kumbhe vāṇijyam eva ca
english: Gain of wealth occurs when in Sagittarius (navamsha). When in the navamsha of Aries (also gain of wealth occurs). When in Capricorn (navamsha), there are sinful deeds. And when in Aquarius (navamsha), there is indeed commerce.

sanskrit: मीने सर्वार्थसिद्धिश्च वृश्चिकेष्वग्नितो भयम् । तौलिके राजपूज्यश्च कन्यायां शत्रुवर्धनम् ॥९॥
transliteration: mīne sarvārthasiddhiśca vṛścikeṣvagnito bhayam . taulike rājapūjyaśca kanyāyāṃ śatruvardhanam.
separated_sandhi: mīne sarvārthasiddhiḥ ca vṛścikeṣu agnitaḥ bhayamtāulike rājapūjyaḥ ca kanyāyām śatruvardhanam
english: When in Pisces (navamsha), there is accomplishment of all objectives. When in Scorpio (navamsha), there is fear from fire. When in Libra (navamsha), one is honored by the king. When in Virgo (navamsha), there is an increase of enemies.

sanskrit: शशिभे दारसम्बाधा सिंहे च त्वक्षिरोगकृत् । मिथुने वृत्तिबाधा स्याद्वृषभस्य नवांशके ॥१०॥
transliteration: śaśibhe dārasambādhā siṃhe ca tvakṣirogakṛt . mithune vṛttibādhā syādvṛṣabhasya navāṃśake.
separated_sandhi: śaśibhe dārasambādhā siṃhe ca tu akṣirogakṛtmithune vṛttibādhā syāt vṛṣabhasya navāṃśake
english: When in the Moon's sign (navamsha), there is trouble concerning the spouse. And when in Leo (navamsha), it causes eye disease. When in Gemini (navamsha), there may be obstruction to livelihood, and also in the navamsha of Taurus.

sanskrit: वृषभे त्वर्थलाभाश्च मेषे तु ज्वररोगकृत् । मीने तु मातुलप्रीतिः कुम्भे शत्रुप्रवर्द्धनम् ॥११॥
transliteration: vṛṣabhe tvarthalābhāśca meṣe tu jvararogakṛt . mīne tu mātulaprītiḥ kumbhe śatrupravarddhanam.
separated_sandhi: vṛṣabhe tu arthalābhāḥ ca meṣe tu jvararogakṛtmīne tu mātulaprītiḥ kumbhe śatrupravarddhanam
english: When in Taurus (navamsha), there are gains of wealth. When in Aries (navamsha), it causes fever and disease. When in Pisces (navamsha), there is affection for the maternal uncle. When in Aquarius (navamsha), there is a great increase of enemies.

sanskrit: मृगे चौरस्य सम्बाधा धनुषि शस्त्रवर्धनम् । मेषे तु शस्त्रसंघातो वृषभे कलहो भवेत् ॥१२॥
transliteration: mṛge caurasya sambādhā dhanuṣi śastravardhanam . meṣe tu śastrasaṃghāto vṛṣabhe kalaho bhavet.
separated_sandhi: mṛge caurasya sambādhā dhanuṣi śastravardhanammeṣe tu śastrasaṃghātaḥ vṛṣabhe kalahaḥ bhavet
english: In Capricorn, there is trouble from thieves. In Sagittarius, there is an increase in weapons. However, in Aries, there is a clash of weapons, and in Taurus, a quarrel will occur.

sanskrit: मिथुने सुखमाप्नोति मिथुनस्य नवांशके । कर्कटे सङ्कटप्राप्तिः सिंहे राजप्रकोपकृत् ॥१३॥
transliteration: mithune sukhamāpnoti mithunasya navāṃśake . karkaṭe saṅkaṭaprāptiḥ siṃhe rājaprakopakṛt.
separated_sandhi: mithune sukham āpnoti mithunasya navāṃśakekarkaṭe saṅkaṭaprāptiḥ siṃhe rājaprakopakṛt
english: One attains happiness in Gemini, specifically in the Navāṃśaka (ninth division) of Gemini. In Cancer, there is the arrival of distress, and in Leo, it causes the king's anger.

sanskrit: कन्यायां भ्रातृपूजा व तौलिके प्रियकृन्नरः । वृश्चिके पितृबाधा स्यात् चापे ज्ञानधनोदयः ॥१४॥
transliteration: kanyāyāṃ bhrātṛpūjā va taulike priyakṛnnaraḥ . vṛścike pitṛbādhā syāt cāpe jñānadhanodayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: kanyāyām bhrātṛpūjā va taulike priyakṛt naraḥvṛścike pitṛbādhā syāt cāpe jñānadhanodayaḥ
english: In Virgo, there is honor for brothers, and in Libra, one becomes a pleasing person. In Scorpio, there is trouble concerning the father or ancestors, and in Sagittarius, there is a rise in knowledge and wealth.

sanskrit: मकरे जलभीतिः स्यात् कुम्भे धान्यविवर्धनम् । मीने च सुखसम्पत्तिः कर्कटस्य नवांशके ॥१५॥
transliteration: makare jalabhītiḥ syāt kumbhe dhānyavivardhanam . mīne ca sukhasampattiḥ karkaṭasya navāṃśake.
separated_sandhi: makare jalabhītiḥ syāt kumbhe dhānyavivardhanammīne ca sukhasampattiḥ karkaṭasya navāṃśake
english: In Capricorn, there will be fear of water. In Aquarius, there is a great increase of grain. And in Pisces, as well as in the Navāṃśaka (ninth division) of Cancer, there is happiness and prosperity.

sanskrit: वृश्चिके कलः पीडा तौलिके ह्यधिकं फलम् । कन्यायामतिलाभश्च शशांके मृगबाधिका ॥१६॥
transliteration: vṛścike kalaḥ pīḍā taulike hyadhikaṃ phalam . kanyāyāmatilābhaśca śaśāṃke mṛgabādhikā.
separated_sandhi: vṛścike kalaḥ pīḍā taulike hi adhikam phalamkanyāyām atilābhaḥ ca śaśāṃke mṛgabādhikā
english: In Scorpio, there is strife and affliction. In Libra, indeed, there are abundant results. In Virgo, there is excessive gain; and in Cancer, there is harm to animals.

sanskrit: सिंहे च पुत्रलाभश्च मिथुने शत्रुवर्द्धनम् । वृषेः चतुष्पदाल्लाभो मेषांशे पशुतो भयम् । मीने तु दीर्घयात्रा स्यात् सिंहस्य नवभागके ॥१७॥
transliteration: siṃhe ca putralābhaśca mithune śatruvarddhanam . vṛṣeḥ catuṣpadāllābho meṣāṃśe paśuto bhayam . mīne tu dīrghayātrā syāt siṃhasya navabhāgake.
separated_sandhi: siṃhe ca putralābhaḥ ca mithuneśatruvarddhanam | vṛṣeḥ catuṣpadāt lābhaḥmeṣāṃśe paśutaḥ bhayam | mīne tudīrghayātrā syāt siṃhasya navabhāgake
english: When in the navamsha (ninth part) of Leo, there is a gain of sons in Leo, an increase of enemies in Gemini, gain from quadrupeds in Taurus, fear from animals in the Aries portion, and a long journey would occur in Pisces.

sanskrit: कुम्भे तु धनलाभश्च मकरे द्रव्यलाभकृत् । धनुषि भ्रातृसंसर्गो मेषे मातृविवर्द्धनम् ॥१८॥
transliteration: kumbhe tu dhanalābhaśca makare dravyalābhakṛt . dhanuṣi bhrātṛsaṃsargo meṣe mātṛvivarddhanam.
separated_sandhi: kumbhe tu dhanalābhaḥ ca makare dravyalābhakṛt| dhanuṣi bhrātṛsaṃsargaḥ meṣe mātṛvivarddhanam
english: In Aquarius, there is indeed a gain of wealth, and in Capricorn, it causes gain of riches. In Sagittarius, there is association with brothers, and in Aries, an increase in the well-being of the mother.

sanskrit: वृषभे पुत्रवृद्धिः स्यान्मिथुने शत्रुवर्द्धनम् । शशिभे तु स्त्रियां प्रीतिः सिंहे व्याधिविवर्द्धनम् ॥१९॥
transliteration: vṛṣabhe putravṛddhiḥ syānmithune śatruvarddhanam . śaśibhe tu striyāṃ prītiḥ siṃhe vyādhivivarddhanam.
separated_sandhi: vṛṣabhe putravṛddhiḥ syāt mithune śatruvarddhanam |śaśibhe tu striyām prītiḥ siṃhe vyādhivivarddhanam
english: In Taurus, there would be an increase of sons, and in Gemini, an increase of enemies. In Cancer, there is indeed affection for women, and in Leo, an increase of diseases.

sanskrit: कन्यायां पुत्रवृद्धिः स्यात्कन्याया नवमांशके । तुलायामर्थलाभश्च वृश्चिके भ्रातृवर्द्धनम् ॥२०॥
transliteration: kanyāyāṃ putravṛddhiḥ syātkanyāyā navamāṃśake . tulāyāmarthalābhaśca vṛścike bhrātṛvarddhanam.
separated_sandhi: kanyāyām putravṛddhiḥ syāt kanyāyāḥ navamāṃśake| tulāyām arthālābhaḥ ca vṛścike bhrātṛvarddhanam
english: When in the navamsha (ninth part) of Virgo, there would be an increase of sons in Virgo; and in Libra, a gain of wealth; and in Scorpio, an increase of brothers.

sanskrit: चापे च तातसौख्यं च मृगे मातृविरोधिता । कुम्भे पुत्रार्थलाभश्च मीने शत्रुविरोधिता ॥२१॥
transliteration: cāpe ca tātasaukhyaṃ ca mṛge mātṛvirodhitā . kumbhe putrārthalābhaśca mīne śatruvirodhitā.
separated_sandhi: cāpe ca tātasaukhyam ca mṛge mātṛvirodhitā |kumbhe putrārthalābhaḥ ca mīne śatruvirodhitā
english: In Sagittarius, there is happiness from the father, and in Capricorn, opposition towards the mother. In Aquarius, there is gain of sons and wealth, and in Pisces, opposition from enemies.

sanskrit: अलौ जायाविरोधश्च तुले च जलबाधता । कन्यायां धनवृद्धिः स्यात् तुलाया नवभागके ॥२२॥
transliteration: alau jāyāvirodhaśca tule ca jalabādhatā . kanyāyāṃ dhanavṛddhiḥ syāt tulāyā navabhāgake.
separated_sandhi: alau jāyā-virodhaḥ ca tule ca jala-bādhatākanyāyām dhana-vṛddhiḥ syāt tulāyā navabhāgake
english: In the Scorpio navamsha, there is conflict with the spouse. In the Libra navamsha, there is trouble from water. In the Virgo navamsha, there will be an increase in wealth. (Similarly, wealth increases) in the ninth navamsha of Libra (Gemini).

sanskrit: कर्कटे ह्यर्थनाशश्च सिंहे राजविरोधिता । मिथुने भूमिलाभश्च वृषभे चाऽर्थलाभकृत् ॥२३॥
transliteration: karkaṭe hyarthanāśaśca siṃhe rājavirodhitā . mithune bhūmilābhaśca vṛṣabhe cā'rthalābhakṛt.
separated_sandhi: karkaṭe hi artha-nāśaḥ ca siṃhe rāja-virodhitāmithune bhūmi-lābhaḥ ca vṛṣabhe ca artha-lābha-kṛt
english: In the Cancer navamsha, there is indeed a loss of wealth. In the Leo navamsha, there is enmity with rulers. In the Gemini navamsha, there is gain of land. And in the Taurus navamsha, there is gain of wealth.

sanskrit: मेषे सर्पादिभीतिः स्यान्मीने चैव जलाद् भयम् । कुम्भे व्यापारतो लाभो मकरेऽपि रुजो भयम् ॥२४॥
transliteration: meṣe sarpādibhītiḥ syānmīne caiva jalād bhayam . kumbhe vyāpārato lābho makare'pi rujo bhayam.
separated_sandhi: meṣe sarpa-ādi-bhītiḥ syāt mīne ca eva jalāt bhayamkumbhe vyāpārato lābhaḥ makare api rujaḥ bhayam
english: In the Aries navamsha, there is fear from snakes and similar creatures. And in the Pisces navamsha, there is indeed fear from water. In the Aquarius navamsha, there is gain from business. And in the Capricorn navamsha, there is fear of disease.

sanskrit: चापे तु धनलाभः स्याद् वृश्चिकस्य नवांशके । मेषे तु धनलाभः स्याद् वृषे भूमिविवर्द्धनम् ॥२५॥
transliteration: cāpe tu dhanalābhaḥ syād vṛścikasya navāṃśake . meṣe tu dhanalābhaḥ syād vṛṣe bhūmivivarddhanam.
separated_sandhi: cāpe tu dhana-lābhaḥ syāt vṛścikasya navāṃśakemeṣe tu dhana-lābhaḥ syāt vṛṣe bhūmi-vivarddhanam
english: In the Sagittarius navamsha, there is gain of wealth. (Similarly, gain of wealth occurs) in the Scorpio navamsha. But in the Aries navamsha, there is gain of wealth. In the Taurus navamsha, there is an increase of land.

sanskrit: मिथुने सर्वसिद्धिः स्यात्कर्कटे सर्वसिद्धिकृत् । सिंहे तु पूर्ववृद्धिः स्यात्कन्यायां कलहो भवेत् ॥२६॥
transliteration: mithune sarvasiddhiḥ syātkarkaṭe sarvasiddhikṛt . siṃhe tu pūrvavṛddhiḥ syātkanyāyāṃ kalaho bhavet.
separated_sandhi: mithune sarva-siddhiḥ syāt karkaṭe sarva-siddhi-kṛtsiṃhe tu pūrva-vṛddhiḥ syāt kanyāyām kalahaḥ bhavet
english: In the Gemini navamsha, there is complete success. In the Cancer navamsha, there is attainment of all success. But in the Leo navamsha, there is an increase in previous fortunes. In the Virgo navamsha, there is a quarrel.

sanskrit: तौलिके चार्थलाभः स्याद् वृश्चिके रूगमाप्नुयात् । चापे तु सुतवृद्धिः स्याच्चापस्य नवमांशके ॥२७॥
transliteration: taulike cārthalābhaḥ syād vṛścike rūgamāpnuyāt . cāpe tu sutavṛddhiḥ syāccāpasya navamāṃśake.
separated_sandhi: taulike ca arthalābhaḥ syāt vṛścike rūgam āpnuyātcāpe tu sutavṛddhiḥ syāt cāpasya navamāṃśake
english: In Libra, there will be financial gain. In Scorpio, one will acquire illness. However, in Sagittarius, there will be an increase in children, specifically in the Navamsha (ninth divisional chart) of Sagittarius.

sanskrit: मकरे पुत्रलाभः स्यात्कुम्भे धान्यविवर्द्धनम् । मीने कल्याणमाप्नोति वृश्चिके विषबाधिता ॥२८॥
transliteration: makare putralābhaḥ syātkumbhe dhānyavivarddhanam . mīne kalyāṇamāpnoti vṛścike viṣabādhitā.
separated_sandhi: makare putralābhaḥ syāt kumbhe dhānyavivarddhanammīne kalyāṇam āpnoti vṛścike viṣabādhitā
english: In Capricorn, there will be the acquisition of children. In Aquarius, there will be an increase in grains (or wealth derived from them). When in Pisces, one attains welfare. In Scorpio, there is affliction by poison.

sanskrit: तौलिके त्वर्थलाभश्च कन्यायां शत्रुवर्द्धनम् । शशिभे स्र्/इयमाप्नोति सिंहे तु मृगबाधिता ॥२९॥
transliteration: taulike tvarthalābhaśca kanyāyāṃ śatruvarddhanam . śaśibhe sr/iyamāpnoti siṃhe tu mṛgabādhitā.
separated_sandhi: taulike tu arthalābhaḥ ca kanyāyām śatruvarddhanamśaśibhe striyam āpnoti siṃhe tu mṛgabādhitā
english: In Libra, however, there is financial gain, and in Virgo, an increase of enemies. In the Moon's sign (Cancer), one acquires a woman. But in Leo, there is affliction by wild animals.

sanskrit: मिथुने वृक्षबाधा च मृगस्य नवभागके । वृषभे त्वर्थलाभश्च मेषभे त्वक्षिरोगकृत् ॥३०॥
transliteration: mithune vṛkṣabādhā ca mṛgasya navabhāgake . vṛṣabhe tvarthalābhaśca meṣabhe tvakṣirogakṛt.
separated_sandhi: mithune vṛkṣabādhā ca mṛgasya navabhāgakevṛṣabhe tu arthalābhaḥ ca meṣabhe tu akṣirogakṛt
english: In Gemini, there is affliction by trees, and also in the ninth division of Capricorn. However, in Taurus there is financial gain, and in Aries, it causes eye disease.

sanskrit: मीने तु दीर्घयात्रा स्यात्कुम्भे धनविवर्द्धनम् । मकरे सर्वसिद्धिः स्याच्चापे शत्रुविवर्द्धनम् ॥३१॥
transliteration: mīne tu dīrghayātrā syātkumbhe dhanavivarddhanam . makare sarvasiddhiḥ syāccāpe śatruvivarddhanam.
separated_sandhi: mīne tu dīrghayātrā syāt kumbhe dhanavivarddhanammakare sarvasiddhiḥ syāt cāpe śatruvivarddhanam
english: However, in Pisces there will be a long journey. In Aquarius, there will be an increase in wealth. In Capricorn, there will be all accomplishments. In Sagittarius, there will be an increase of enemies.

sanskrit: मेषे सौख्यविनाशश्च वृषभे मरणं भवेत् । युग्मे कल्याणमाप्नोति कुम्भस्य नवमांशके ॥३२॥
transliteration: meṣe saukhyavināśaśca vṛṣabhe maraṇaṃ bhavet . yugme kalyāṇamāpnoti kumbhasya navamāṃśake.
separated_sandhi: meṣe saukhyavināśaḥ ca vṛṣabhe maraṇam bhavetyugme kalyāṇam āpnoti kumbhasya navamāṃśake
english: When considering the Navamsha (ninth divisional chart) of Aquarius: in Aries, there is a destruction of happiness; in Taurus, death may occur; and in Gemini, one attains welfare.

sanskrit: कर्कटे धनवृद्दिः स्यात् सिंहे तु राजपूजनम् । कन्यायामर्थलाभस्तु तुलायां लाभमाप्नुयात् ॥३३॥
transliteration: karkaṭe dhanavṛddiḥ syāt siṃhe tu rājapūjanam . kanyāyāmarthalābhastu tulāyāṃ lābhamāpnuyāt.
separated_sandhi: karkaṭe dhanavṛddhiḥ syāt siṃhe tu rājapūjanamkanyāyām arthalābhaḥ tu tulāyām lābham āpnuyāt
english: In Cancer, there will be an increase in wealth. In Leo, one receives royal honor. In Virgo, there is a gain of wealth, and in Libra, one may attain profit.

sanskrit: वृश्चिके ज्वरमाप्नोति चापे शत्रुविवर्द्धनम् । मृगे जायाविरोधश्च कुम्भे जलविरोधता ॥३४॥
transliteration: vṛścike jvaramāpnoti cāpe śatruvivarddhanam . mṛge jāyāvirodhaśca kumbhe jalavirodhatā.
separated_sandhi: vṛścike jvaram āpnoti cāpe śatruvivarddhanammṛge jāyāvirodhaḥ ca kumbhe jalavirodhatā
english: In Scorpio, one experiences fever. In Sagittarius, there is an increase of enemies. In Capricorn, there is conflict with one's wife, and in Aquarius, there is animosity or conflict related to water.

sanskrit: मीने तु सर्वसौभाग्यं मीनस्य नवभागके । दशांशक्रमेणैवं ज्ञात्वा सर्वफलं वदेत् ॥३५॥
transliteration: mīne tu sarvasaubhāgyaṃ mīnasya navabhāgake . daśāṃśakrameṇaivaṃ jñātvā sarvaphalaṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: mīne tu sarvasaubhāgyam mīnasya navabhāgakedaśāṃśakrameṇa evam jñātvā sarvaphalam vadet
english: In Pisces, particularly in its ninth division (Navamsha), there is indeed all good fortune. Having thus understood all the results according to the order of the decanates (Daśāṃśa divisions), one should declare them.

sanskrit: क्रूरग्रहदशाकाले शान्तिं कुर्याद्विचक्षणः । यत् प्रोक्तं राजयोगादौ संज्ञाध्याये च यत् फलम् ॥३६॥
transliteration: krūragrahadaśākāle śāntiṃ kuryādvicakṣaṇaḥ . yat proktaṃ rājayogādau saṃjñādhyāye ca yat phalam.
separated_sandhi: krūragrahadaśākāle śāntim kuryāt vicakṣaṇaḥ yatproktam rājayogādau saṃjñādhyāye ca yat phalam
english: During the operational period (daśā) of malefic planets, a wise astrologer should perform propitiatory rites (śānti). One should also consider what has been declared concerning royal planetary combinations (rājayogas) and the results mentioned in the chapter on definitions (saṃjñādhyāya).

sanskrit: तत्सर्वं चत्रकाले हि सुबुद्ध्या योजयेद् बुधः । इति संक्षेपतः प्रोक्तं कालचक्रदशाफलम् ॥३७॥
transliteration: tatsarvaṃ catrakāle hi subuddhyā yojayed budhaḥ . iti saṃkṣepataḥ proktaṃ kālacakradaśāphalam.
separated_sandhi: tat sarvam cakrakāle hi subuddhyā yojayet budhaḥiti saṃkṣepataḥ proktam kālacakradaśāphalam
english: A wise astrologer should indeed apply all of this with keen intellect during the period of the Kālacakra Dasha. Thus, the results of the Kālacakra Dasha have been briefly explained.

sanskrit: चरस्थिरादिसंज्ञा या दशाः प्रोक्ताः पुरा द्विज । शुभाऽशुभफलं तासां कथयामि तवाऽग्रतः ॥१॥
transliteration: carasthirādisaṃjñā yā daśāḥ proktāḥ purā dvija . śubhā'śubhaphalaṃ tāsāṃ kathayāmi tavā'grataḥ.
separated_sandhi: carasthirādisaṃjñā yāḥ daśāḥ proktāḥ purā dvijaśubhāśubhaphalam tāsām kathayāmi tava agrataḥ
english: O twice-born (dvija), I will now explain to you the auspicious and inauspicious results of those Dasha periods previously named 'movable' (cara), 'fixed' (sthira), and so on.

sanskrit: लग्नादिद्वादशान्तानां भावानां फलकीर्तने । तत्तद्राशीशवीर्येण यथायोग्यं प्रयोजयेत् ॥२॥
transliteration: lagnādidvādaśāntānāṃ bhāvānāṃ phalakīrtane . tattadrāśīśavīryeṇa yathāyogyaṃ prayojayet.
separated_sandhi: lagnādidvādaśāntānām bhāvānām phalakīrtanetattadrāśīśavīryeṇa yathāyogyam prayojayet
english: When describing the results of the twelve houses (bhāva), from the Ascendant (Lagna) to the twelfth, one should apply them appropriately according to the strength (vīrya) of the lord of each respective sign.

sanskrit: बलयुक्ते च राशीशे पूर्णं तस्य तदा फलम् । फलं मध्य्बले मध्यं बलहीने विपर्ययः ॥३॥
transliteration: balayukte ca rāśīśe pūrṇaṃ tasya tadā phalam . phalaṃ madhybale madhyaṃ balahīne viparyayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: balayukte ca rāśīśe pūrṇam tasya tadā phalamphalam madhyabale madhyam balahīne viparyayaḥ
english: When the lord of a sign (rāśīśa) is endowed with full strength (bala), then its result is complete. If its strength is moderate, the result is moderate. If it is devoid of strength, the result is the opposite.

sanskrit: यो यो दशाप्रदो राशिस्तस्य रन्ध्रत्रिकोणके । पापखेटयुते विप्र तद्दशा दुःखदायिका ॥४॥
transliteration: yo yo daśāprado rāśistasya randhratrikoṇake . pāpakheṭayute vipra taddaśā duḥkhadāyikā.
separated_sandhi: yaḥ yaḥ daśāpradaḥ rāśiḥ tasya randhratrikoṇakepāpakheṭayute vipra tat daśā duḥkhadāyikā
english: O Brahmin (vipra), for whichever sign is the Dasha giver, if its 8th or trine houses are associated with malefic planets, then that particular Dasha period will be a cause of suffering.

sanskrit: तृतीयषष्ठगे पापे ज्यादिः परिकीर्तितः । शुभखेटयुते तत्र जायते च पराजयः ॥५॥
transliteration: tṛtīyaṣaṣṭhage pāpe jyādiḥ parikīrtitaḥ . śubhakheṭayute tatra jāyate ca parājayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: tṛtīya-ṣaṣṭhage pāpe jyādiḥ parikīrtitaḥśubha-kheṭa-yute tatra jāyate ca parājayaḥ
english: When a malefic planet is situated in the third or sixth house, obstacles and distress are declared. If that malefic is associated with benefic planets in those houses, then defeat certainly arises.

sanskrit: लाभस्थे च शुभे पापे लाभो भवति निश्चितः । यदा दशाप्रदो राशिः शुभखेटयुतो द्विज ॥६॥
transliteration: lābhasthe ca śubhe pāpe lābho bhavati niścitaḥ . yadā daśāprado rāśiḥ śubhakheṭayuto dvija.
separated_sandhi: lābha-sthe ca śubhe pāpe lābhaḥ bhavati niścitaḥyadā daśā-pradaḥ rāśiḥ śubha-kheṭa-yutaḥ dvija
english: O brahmin (dvija), if both benefic and malefic planets are situated in the eleventh house (house of gain), then gain is certainly achieved. When the sign (rāśi) that bestows the planetary period (daśā) is associated with benefic planets, [then...]

sanskrit: शुभक्षेत्रे हि तद्राशेः शुभं ज्ञेयं दशाफलम् । पापयुक्ते शुभक्षेत्रे पूर्वं शुभमसत्परे ॥७॥
transliteration: śubhakṣetre hi tadrāśeḥ śubhaṃ jñeyaṃ daśāphalam . pāpayukte śubhakṣetre pūrvaṃ śubhamasatpare.
separated_sandhi: śubha-kṣetre hi tad-rāśeḥ śubham jñeyam daśā-phalampāpa-yukte śubha-kṣetre pūrvam śubham asat pare
english: Indeed, if that sign (rāśi) is a benefic house (śubha-kṣetra), then the outcome of the planetary period (daśā-phalam) should be known as auspicious. If it is a benefic house (śubha-kṣetra) associated with malefic planets, the results are auspicious at first, but inauspicious afterwards.

sanskrit: पापर्क्षे शुभसंयुक्ते पूर्वं सौख्यं ततोऽशुभम् । पापक्षेत्रे पापयुक्ते सा दशा सर्वदुखदा ॥८॥
transliteration: pāparkṣe śubhasaṃyukte pūrvaṃ saukhyaṃ tato'śubham . pāpakṣetre pāpayukte sā daśā sarvadukhadā.
separated_sandhi: pāparṣe śubha-saṃyukte pūrvam saukhyam tataḥaśubham pāpa-kṣetre pāpa-yukte sā daśā sarva-dukhadā
english: If a planetary period (daśā) occurs in a malefic sign (pāpa-ṛkṣa) associated with benefic planets, there is happiness at first, but then inauspicious results. If it is a malefic house (pāpa-kṣetra) associated with malefic planets, that entire planetary period (daśā) causes all kinds of suffering.

sanskrit: शुभक्षेत्रदशा राशौयुक्ते पापशुभैर्द्विज ॥९॥
transliteration: śubhakṣetradaśā rāśauyukte pāpaśubhairdvija.
separated_sandhi: śubha-kṣetra-daśā rāśauyukte pāpa-śubhaiḥ dvija
english: O brahmin (dvija), when the planetary period (daśā) is of a benefic sign (śubha-kṣetra) and that sign (rāśi) is associated with both malefic and benefic planets, [then the results are...]

sanskrit: पूर्वं कष्टं सुखं पश्चान्निर्विशङ्कं प्रजायते । शुभक्षेत्रे शुभं वाच्यं पापर्क्षे त्वशुभं फलम् ॥१०॥
transliteration: pūrvaṃ kaṣṭaṃ sukhaṃ paścānnirviśaṅkaṃ prajāyate . śubhakṣetre śubhaṃ vācyaṃ pāparkṣe tvaśubhaṃ phalam.
separated_sandhi: pūrvam kaṣṭam sukham paścāt nirviśaṅkam prajāyateśubhakṣetre śubham vācyam pāparkṣe tu aśubham phalam
english: First, there is difficulty, and then happiness arises without doubt. In an auspicious house (kṣetra), an auspicious result should be declared; whereas in an inauspicious house, an inauspicious outcome is indicated.

sanskrit: द्वितीये पञ्चमे सौम्ये राजप्रीतिर्जयो ध्रुवम् । पापे तत्र गते ज्ञेयमशुभं तद्दशाफलम् ॥११॥
transliteration: dvitīye pañcame saumye rājaprītirjayo dhruvam . pāpe tatra gate jñeyamaśubhaṃ taddaśāphalam.
separated_sandhi: dvitīye pañcame saumye rājaprītiḥ jayaḥ dhruvampāpe tatra gate jñeyam aśubham tat daśāphalam
english: When a benefic planet is in the second or fifth house, royal favor and victory are certain. If a malefic planet has gone there, know that the result of that planetary period (daśā) will be inauspicious.

sanskrit: चतुर्थे तु शुभं सौख्यमारोग्यं त्वष्टमे शुभे । धर्मवृद्धिर्गुरुजनात्सौख्यं च नवमे शुभे ॥१२॥
transliteration: caturthe tu śubhaṃ saukhyamārogyaṃ tvaṣṭame śubhe . dharmavṛddhirgurujanātsaukhyaṃ ca navame śubhe.
separated_sandhi: caturthe tu śubham saukhyam ārogyam tu aṣṭame śubhedharmavṛddhiḥ gurujanāt saukhyam ca navame śubhe
english: In the fourth house, auspicious happiness and health are indicated. When an auspicious planet is in the eighth house, health is indicated. An increase in one's constitution (dharma) from elders (guru) and happiness are seen when an auspicious planet is in the ninth house.

sanskrit: विपरीते विपर्यासो मिश्रे मिश्रं प्रकीर्तितम् । पाके भोगे च पापाढ्ये देहपीडा मनोव्यथा ॥१३॥
transliteration: viparīte viparyāso miśre miśraṃ prakīrtitam . pāke bhoge ca pāpāḍhye dehapīḍā manovyathā.
separated_sandhi: viparīte viparyāsaḥ miśre miśram prakīrtitampāke bhoge ca pāpāḍhye dehapīḍā manovyathā
english: When the conditions are contrary, the result is the opposite. When mixed conditions prevail, a mixed result is declared. When the planetary period (pāka) and sub-period (bhoga) are associated with malefic planets, there is physical pain and mental distress.

sanskrit: सप्तमे पाकभोगाभ्यां पापे दारार्तिरीरिता । चतुर्थे स्थानहानिः स्यात्पञ्चमे पुत्रपीडनम् ॥१४॥
transliteration: saptame pākabhogābhyāṃ pāpe dārārtirīritā . caturthe sthānahāniḥ syātpañcame putrapīḍanam.
separated_sandhi: saptame pāka-bhogābhyām pāpe dārā-ārtiḥ īritācaturthe sthāna-hāniḥ syāt pañcame putra-pīḍanam
english: When malefic planets are in the seventh house during both the planetary period (pāka) and sub-period (bhoga), distress to the spouse is declared. In the fourth house, there would be loss of position or residence, and in the fifth house, affliction to children.

sanskrit: दशमे कीर्तिहानिः स्यान्नवमे पितृपीडनम् । पाकाद्रुद्रागते पापे पीडा सर्वाप्यबाधिका ॥१५॥
transliteration: daśame kīrtihāniḥ syānnavame pitṛpīḍanam . pākādrudrāgate pāpe pīḍā sarvāpyabādhikā.
separated_sandhi: daśame kīrti-hāniḥ syāt navame pitṛ-pīḍanampākāt rudra-āgate pāpe pīḍā sarvā api abādhikā
english: When (a malefic is) in the tenth house, there is a loss of fame. When (a malefic is) in the ninth house, there is affliction to the father. During the ripening of fate (or planetary period, dasa), when a destructive malefic planet is present, all suffering occurs without hindrance.

sanskrit: उक्तस्थानगते सौम्ये ततः सौख्यं विनिर्दिशेत् । केन्द्रस्थानगते सौम्ये लाभः शत्रुजपप्रदः ॥१६॥
transliteration: uktasthānagate saumye tataḥ saukhyaṃ vinirdiśet . kendrasthānagate saumye lābhaḥ śatrujapapradaḥ.
separated_sandhi: ukta-sthāna-gate saumye tataḥ saukhyam vinirdiśetkendra-sthāna-gate saumye lābhaḥ śatru-japa-pradaḥ
english: When a benefic planet is situated in the aforementioned houses (the ninth and tenth), happiness should be declared. Similarly, when a benefic planet is in an angular house (kendra), it bestows gains and victory over enemies.

sanskrit: जन्मकालग्रहस्थित्या सगोचगग्रहैरपि । विचारितैः प्रवक्तव्यं तत्तद्राशिद/साफलम् ॥१७॥
transliteration: janmakālagrahasthityā sagocagagrahairapi . vicāritaiḥ pravaktavyaṃ tattadrāśida/sāphalam.
separated_sandhi: janma-kāla-graha-sthityā sa-gocara-ga-grahaiḥ apivicāritaiḥ pravaktavyam tat-tad-rāśi-daśā-phalam
english: The results of the planetary periods (dasa) for each sign should be declared after due consideration of the planetary positions at the time of birth, and also by taking into account the transiting planets.

sanskrit: यश्च राशिः शुभाकान्तो यस्य पश्चाच्छुभग्रहाः । तद्दशा शुभदा प्रोक्ता विपरीते विपर्ययः ॥१८॥
transliteration: yaśca rāśiḥ śubhākānto yasya paścācchubhagrahāḥ . taddaśā śubhadā proktā viparīte viparyayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: yaḥ ca rāśiḥ śubha-ākāntaḥ yasya paścāt śubha-grahāḥtat-daśā śubha-dā proktā viparīte viparyayaḥ
english: The planetary period (dasa) of that sign which is associated with benefic planets, or behind which benefic planets are situated, is declared to be auspicious. In the opposite scenario, the outcome is reversed.

sanskrit: त्रिकोणरन्ध्ररिष्फस्थैः शुभपापैः शुभाऽशुभम् । तद्दशायां च वक्तव्यं फलं दैवविदा सदा ॥१९॥
transliteration: trikoṇarandhrariṣphasthaiḥ śubhapāpaiḥ śubhā'śubham . taddaśāyāṃ ca vaktavyaṃ phalaṃ daivavidā sadā.
separated_sandhi: trikoṇa-randhra-riṣpha-sthaiḥ śubha-pāpaiḥ śubha-aśubhamtat-daśāyām ca vaktavyam phalam daivavidā sadā
english: Auspicious and inauspicious results, depending on whether planets are benefics or malefics, should always be declared by an astrologer during the planetary period (dasa) of planets situated in the trine, eighth (randhra), and twelfth (riṣpha) houses.

sanskrit: मेषकर्कतुलानक्रराशीनां च यथाक्रमम् । बाधा स्तानानि सम्प्रोक्ता कुभगोसिंहवृश्चिकाः ॥२०॥
transliteration: meṣakarkatulānakrarāśīnāṃ ca yathākramam . bādhā stānāni samproktā kubhagosiṃhavṛścikāḥ.
separated_sandhi: meṣakarkatulānakrarāśīnām ca yathākramambādhā stānāni samproktā kubhagosimhavṛścikāḥ
english: For the zodiac signs Aries, Cancer, Libra, and Capricorn, respectively, the obstruction (bādhā) places are declared to be Aquarius, Taurus, Leo, and Scorpio.

sanskrit: पाकेशाक्रान्तराशौ वा बाधास्थाने शुभेतरे । स्थिते सति महाशोको बन्धनव्यसनामयाः ॥२१॥
transliteration: pākeśākrāntarāśau vā bādhāsthāne śubhetare . sthite sati mahāśoko bandhanavyasanāmayāḥ.
separated_sandhi: pākeśākrāntarāśau vā bādhāsthāne śubhetaresthite sati mahāśokaḥ bandhanavyasanāmayāḥ
english: If (a planet) is situated in the sign occupied by the lord of the planetary period ("pākeśa"), or in an inauspicious obstruction (bādhā) place, then there will be great sorrow, imprisonment, calamities, and diseases.

sanskrit: उच्चस्वर्क्षग्र्हे तस्मिञ्छुभं सौख्यं धनागमः । तच्छून्यं चेदसौख्यं स्यात्तद्दशा न फलप्रदा ॥२२॥
transliteration: uccasvarkṣagrhe tasmiñchubhaṃ saukhyaṃ dhanāgamaḥ . tacchūnyaṃ cedasaukhyaṃ syāttaddaśā na phalapradā.
separated_sandhi: uccasvarkṣagṛhe tasmin śubham saukhyam dhanāgamaḥtat śūnyam cet asaukhyam syāt tad daśā na phalapradā
english: If that particular (bādhaka) sign is the planet's exaltation sign or its own sign, then there will be auspiciousness, happiness, and acquisition of wealth. However, if it is devoid of such (exaltation or own sign status), then there will be unhappiness, and that planetary period (daśā) will not be beneficial.

sanskrit: बाधकव्ययषडरन्ध्रे राहुयुक्ते महद्भयम् । प्रस्थाने बन्धनप्राप्ती राजपीडा रिपोभयम् ॥२३॥
transliteration: bādhakavyayaṣaḍarandhre rāhuyukte mahadbhayam . prasthāne bandhanaprāptī rājapīḍā ripobhayam.
separated_sandhi: bādhakavyayaṣaḍarandhre rāhuyukte mahat bhayamprasthāne bandhanaprāptī rājapīḍā ripu bhayam
english: If (a planet) is joined with Rāhu in the "bādhaka" (obstruction) house, or in the 12th, 6th, or 8th house, there will be great fear. During journeys, there will be imprisonment, troubles from the ruler, and fear from enemies.

sanskrit: रव्यारराहुशनयो भुक्तिराशौ स्थिता यदि । तद्राशिभिक्तौ पतनं राजकोपान् महद्भयम् ॥२४॥
transliteration: ravyārarāhuśanayo bhuktirāśau sthitā yadi . tadrāśibhiktau patanaṃ rājakopān mahadbhayam.
separated_sandhi: ravyararāhuśanayaḥ bhuktirāśau sthitā yaditad rāśibhuktau patanam rājakopāt mahat bhayam
english: If the Sun, Mars, Rāhu, and Saturn are situated in the sign of the sub-period ("bhukti"), then during that sign's sub-period ("bhukti"), there will be downfall, danger from the king's anger, and great fear.

sanskrit: भुक्तिराशित्रिकोणे तु नीचखेटः स्थितो यदि । तद्राशौ वा युते नीचे पापे मृत्युभयं वदेत् ॥२५॥
transliteration: bhuktirāśitrikoṇe tu nīcakheṭaḥ sthito yadi . tadrāśau vā yute nīce pāpe mṛtyubhayaṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: bhuktirāśitrikoṇe tu nīcakheṭaḥ sthitaḥ yaditadrāśau vā yute nīce pāpe mṛtyubhayam vadet
english: If a debilitated planet is situated in the trine of the sub-period (bhukti) sign, or if it is conjoined with a debilitated planet or a malefic in that (sub-period) sign, one should predict fear of death.

sanskrit: भुक्तिराशौ स्वतुङ्गस्थे त्रिकोणे वापि खेचरे । यदा भुक्तिदशा प्राप्ता तदा सौख्यं लभेन्नरः ॥२६॥
transliteration: bhuktirāśau svatuṅgasthe trikoṇe vāpi khecare . yadā bhuktidaśā prāptā tadā saukhyaṃ labhennaraḥ.
separated_sandhi: bhuktirāśau svatuṅgasthe trikoṇe vā api khecareyadā bhuktidāśā prāptā tadā saukhyam labhet naraḥ
english: When the sub-period (bhukti) planet is situated in the "bhukti" sign, or in its own sign of exaltation, or in a trine (trikoṇa), and when that sub-period (bhukti-daśā) arrives, a person will attain happiness.

sanskrit: नगरग्रामनाथत्वं पुत्रलाभं धनागमम् । कल्याणं भूरिभाग्यं च सेनपत्यं महोन्नतम् ॥२७॥
transliteration: nagaragrāmanāthatvaṃ putralābhaṃ dhanāgamam . kalyāṇaṃ bhūribhāgyaṃ ca senapatyaṃ mahonnatam.
separated_sandhi: nagaragrāmanāthatvam putralābham dhanāgamamkalyāṇam bhūribhāgyam ca senāpatyam mahonnatam
english: One attains lordship over cities and villages, the gain of children, the acquisition of wealth, great welfare, immense good fortune, and a highly exalted position as an army commander.

sanskrit: पाकेश्वरो जीवदृष्टः शुभराशिस्थितो यदि । तद्दशायां धनप्राप्तिर्मङ्गलं पुत्रसम्भवम् ॥२८॥
transliteration: pākeśvaro jīvadṛṣṭaḥ śubharāśisthito yadi . taddaśāyāṃ dhanaprāptirmaṅgalaṃ putrasambhavam.
separated_sandhi: pākeśvaraḥ jīvadṛṣṭaḥ śubharāśisthitaḥ yaditaddaśāyām dhanaprāptiḥ maṅgalam putrasambhavam
english: If the lord of the sub-period (pākeśvara) is aspected by Jupiter and situated in an auspicious sign, then in its dasha (period), there will be the acquisition of wealth, auspiciousness, and the birth of children.

sanskrit: सितासितभयुग्माश्च सूर्यस्य रिपुराशयः । कौर्पितौलिघटाश्चेन्द्रोर्भौमस्य रिपुराशयः ॥२९॥
transliteration: sitāsitabhayugmāśca sūryasya ripurāśayaḥ . kaurpitaulighaṭāścendrorbhaumasya ripurāśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: sitāsitabhayugmāḥ ca sūryasya ripurāśayaḥkaurpitāulighaṭāḥ ca indroḥ bhaumasya ripurāśayaḥ
english: Taurus, Capricorn, Cancer, and Gemini are the enemy signs of the Sun. Cancer, Scorpio, Libra, and Aquarius are the enemy signs of the Moon and Mars.

sanskrit: घटमीननृयुल्तौलिकन्या ज्ञस्य ततः परम् । कर्कमीनालिकुम्भाश्च राशयो रिपवः स्मृताः ॥३०॥
transliteration: ghaṭamīnanṛyultaulikanyā jñasya tataḥ param . karkamīnālikumbhāśca rāśayo ripavaḥ smṛtāḥ.
separated_sandhi: ghaṭamīnanṛyuktāulikanyā jñasya tataḥ paramkarkamīnālikumbhāḥ ca rāśayaḥ ripavaḥ smṛtāḥ
english: Aquarius, Pisces, Gemini, Libra, and Virgo; and subsequently Cancer, Pisces, Scorpio, and Aquarius are considered enemy signs for Mercury.

sanskrit: वृषतौलिनृयुक्कन्याराशयो रिपवो गुरोः । सिंहालिकर्कचापाश्च शुकस्य रिपुराशयः ॥३१॥
transliteration: vṛṣataulinṛyukkanyārāśayo ripavo guroḥ . siṃhālikarkacāpāśca śukasya ripurāśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: vṛṣatāulinṛyukkanyārāśayaḥ ripavaḥ guroḥsiṃhālikarkacāpāḥ ca śukasya ripurāśayaḥ
english: Taurus, Libra, Gemini, and Virgo are enemy signs for Jupiter. Leo, Scorpio, Cancer, and Sagittarius are enemy signs for Venus.

sanskrit: मेषसिंहधनुःकौर्पिकर्कटा शनिशत्रवः । एवं ग्राहन्तरदाशां चिन्तयेत्कोविदो द्विज ॥३२॥
transliteration: meṣasiṃhadhanuḥkaurpikarkaṭā śaniśatravaḥ . evaṃ grāhantaradāśāṃ cintayetkovido dvija.
separated_sandhi: meṣasiṃhadhanuḥkaurpikakarkaṭāḥ śaniśatravaḥevam grāhāntaradaśām cintayet kovidaḥ dvija
english: Aries, Leo, Sagittarius, Scorpio, and Cancer are enemy signs for Saturn. In this manner, an expert Brahmin should analyze the planetary sub-periods (antaradaśā).

sanskrit: ये राजयोगदा ये च शुभमध्यमता ग्रहाः । यस्माद्वा द्वित्रितुर्यस्थाः ग्रहाः शुभफलप्रदाः ॥३३॥
transliteration: ye rājayogadā ye ca śubhamadhyamatā grahāḥ . yasmādvā dvitrituryasthāḥ grahāḥ śubhaphalapradāḥ.
separated_sandhi: ye rājayogadāḥ ye ca śubhamadhyamatāḥ grahāḥ yasmātvā dvi-tri-turyasthāḥ grahāḥ śubhaphala-pradāḥ
english: Those planets that confer royal (rājayoga) combinations, and those that are naturally auspicious or neutral; or planets situated in the second, third, or fourth houses from a particular reference point, bestow auspicious results.

sanskrit: तद्दशानां शुभं ब्रूयाद्राजयोगादिसम्भवम् । शुभद्वयान्तरगतः पापोऽपि शुभदः स्मृतः ॥३४॥
transliteration: taddaśānāṃ śubhaṃ brūyādrājayogādisambhavam . śubhadvayāntaragataḥ pāpo'pi śubhadaḥ smṛtaḥ.
separated_sandhi: tat-daśānām śubham brūyāt rājayogādi-sambhavamśubhadvayāntargataḥ pāpaḥ api śubhagaḥ smṛtaḥ
english: One should declare the auspiciousness of their (planetary) periods, which arises from "rājayoga" and similar combinations. Even a malefic planet, situated between two benefics, is considered auspicious.

sanskrit: गता शुभदशामध्यं दशा सौम्यस्य शोभना । शुभा यस्य त्रिकोणस्थस्तद्दशापि शुभप्रदा ॥३५॥
transliteration: gatā śubhadaśāmadhyaṃ daśā saumyasya śobhanā . śubhā yasya trikoṇasthastaddaśāpi śubhapradā.
separated_sandhi: gatā śubhadaśāmadhyam daśā saumyasya śobhanāśubhā yasya trikoṇasthaḥ tat daśā api śubhaprada
english: When a planetary period (daśā) has entered its middle phase, the period of a benefic planet is auspicious. If the planet whose period (daśā) is running is auspiciously situated in a trine house (trikoṇa), that period also bestows auspicious results.

sanskrit: आरम्भान्तो मित्रशुभराश्योर्यदि फलं शुभम् । प्रतिराश्यैवमव्दाद्यं विभज्य तत्फलं वदेत् ॥३६॥
transliteration: ārambhānto mitraśubharāśyoryadi phalaṃ śubham . pratirāśyaivamavdādyaṃ vibhajya tatphalaṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: ārambhāntaḥ mitraśubharāśyoḥ yadi phalam śubhampratirāśyā evam abdādyam vibhajya tat phalam vadet
english: If the results (phala) at the beginning and end of a daśā are auspicious due to its association with friendly or benefic zodiacal signs (rāśi), then one should similarly (evam) divide the calculation, starting from the years, according to each sign (pratirāśi) and declare its specific outcome (phala).

sanskrit: आरम्भात्तत्त्रिकोणे तु सौम्ये तु शुभभावहेत् । शुभराशौ शुभारम्भे दशा स्यादतिशोभना ॥३७॥
transliteration: ārambhāttattrikoṇe tu saumye tu śubhabhāvahet . śubharāśau śubhārambhe daśā syādatiśobhanā.
separated_sandhi: ārambhāt tat trikoṇe tu saumye tu śubhabhāvahetśubharāśau śubhārambhe daśā syāt atiśobhanā
english: From the outset, if that (planet) is situated in a trine (trikoṇa), or in a benefic (sign/house) (saumye), or if it is the cause of auspicious houses (śubhabhāvahetu), and if the planetary period (daśā) commences in an auspicious zodiacal sign (śubharāśi), then that daśā will be exceedingly auspicious.

sanskrit: शुभादिराशौ पापश्चेद्दशारम्भे शुभा स्मृता । शुभारम्भे कथा केति प्रारम्भस्य फलं वदेत् ॥३८॥
transliteration: śubhādirāśau pāpaśceddaśārambhe śubhā smṛtā . śubhārambhe kathā keti prārambhasya phalaṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: śubhādirāśau pāpaḥ cet daśārambhe śubhā smṛtāśubhārambhe kathā kā iti prārambhasya phalam vadet
english: If a malefic planet (pāpa) is situated in a sign that is auspicious from the beginning (śubhādirāśi), then the commencement of the planetary period (daśārambha) is still considered auspicious (śubhā smṛtā). What is the nature (kathā) of an auspicious beginning (śubhārambha)? One should declare the overall result (phala) of the commencement (prārambha).

sanskrit: आरम्भे पापराशौ वा यदीशो दुर्बलो द्विज । नीचादौ तद्दशाद्यन्ते वदेद्भाग्यविपर्ययम् ॥३९॥
transliteration: ārambhe pāparāśau vā yadīśo durbalo dvija . nīcādau taddaśādyante vadedbhāgyaviparyayam.
separated_sandhi: ārambhe pāparāśau vā yadi īśaḥ durbalaḥ dvijanīcādau tat daśā ādyante vadet bhāgyaviparyayam
english: O twice-born (dvija)! If at the commencement (ārambha) of a planetary period, the lord (īśa) is weak (durbala) due to being in a malefic sign (pāparāśi), or if it is debilitated (nīca) or in similar adverse conditions, then one should predict a reversal of fortune (bhāgyaviparyayam) both at the beginning and the end of that specific planetary period (daśā).

sanskrit: यत्र स्थितो नीचखेटस्त्रिकोणे वाऽथ नीचगः । तथा राशीश्वरे नीचे सम्बन्धो नीचखेटकैः ॥४०॥
transliteration: yatra sthito nīcakheṭastrikoṇe vā'tha nīcagaḥ . tathā rāśīśvare nīce sambandho nīcakheṭakaiḥ.
separated_sandhi: yatra sthitaḥ nīcakheṭaḥ trikoṇe vā atha nīcagaḥtathā rāśīśvare nīce sambandhaḥ nīcakheṭakaiḥ
english: When a debilitated planet is situated in a trine house (1st, 5th, or 9th), or when it is simply in its sign of debilitation; and similarly, if the lord of the sign (where the debilitated planet is) is also in debilitation and connected with debilitated planets.

sanskrit: भाग्यस्य विपरीतत्वं करोत्येव द्विजोत्तम । धनधान्यादिहानिश्च देहे रोगभयं तथा ॥४१॥
transliteration: bhāgyasya viparītatvaṃ karotyeva dvijottama . dhanadhānyādihāniśca dehe rogabhayaṃ tathā.
separated_sandhi: bhāgyasya viparītatvam karoti eva dvijottamadhanadhānyādi hāniḥ ca dehe rogabhayam tathā
english: O best among the twice-born (dvijottama)! Such a planetary configuration certainly causes adverse fortune, leading to the loss of wealth and grains, etc., and also fear of disease in the body.

sanskrit: राहोः केतोश्च कुम्भादि वृश्चिकादि चतुष्टयम् । स्वभं तत्र समारम्भस्तद्दशायां शुभं भवेत् ॥४२॥
transliteration: rāhoḥ ketośca kumbhādi vṛścikādi catuṣṭayam . svabhaṃ tatra samārambhastaddaśāyāṃ śubhaṃ bhavet.
separated_sandhi: rāhoḥ ketoḥ ca kumbha ādi vṛścika ādi catuṣṭayamsvabham tatra samārambhaḥ tat daśāyām śubham bhavet
english: The quadruplets of signs, such as Aquarius (kumbhādi) for Rahu and Scorpio (vṛścikādi) for Ketu, are considered their own houses (svabham). When an undertaking (samārambha) is commenced during their planetary period (daśā) while they are in these own signs, it will be auspicious.

sanskrit: यद्दशायां शुभं ब्रूयात्स चेन्मारकसंस्थितः । यस्मिन् राशौदशान्तःस्यात्तस्मिन् दृष्टे युतेऽपि वा ॥४३॥
transliteration: yaddaśāyāṃ śubhaṃ brūyātsa cenmārakasaṃsthitaḥ . yasmin rāśaudaśāntaḥsyāttasmin dṛṣṭe yute'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: yat daśāyām śubham brūyāt sa cet mārakasaṃsthitaḥyasmin rāśau daśā antaḥ syāt tasmin dṛṣṭe yute api vā
english: Even if one predicts auspicious results for a certain planetary period (daśā), (these results will not materialize) if the planet is situated in a death-inflicting (māraka) house. Furthermore, if the end of a planetary period occurs in a particular sign, and that sign is either aspected or conjoined...

sanskrit: शुक्रेण विधुना वा स्याद्राजकोपाद्धनक्षयः । दशान्तश्चेदरिक्षेत्रे राहुदृष्टयुतेऽपि वा ॥४४॥
transliteration: śukreṇa vidhunā vā syādrājakopāddhanakṣayaḥ . daśāntaścedarikṣetre rāhudṛṣṭayute'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: śukreṇa vidhunā vā syāt rājakopāt dhana kṣayaḥdaśā antaḥ cet ari kṣetre rāhu dṛṣṭa yute api vā
english: ...[if the end of a planetary period (daśā) in a sign] is aspected or conjoined by Venus (śukra) or the Moon (vidhu), there may be loss of wealth due to governmental anger (rājakopa). Similarly, if the end of the daśā is in an enemy's sign, or if it is aspected or conjoined by Rahu (rāhu), similar adverse effects may occur.

sanskrit: इदं फलं शनेः पाके न विचिन्त्यं द्विजोत्तम । दशाप्रदे नक्रराशौ न विचिन्त्यमिदं फलम् ॥४५॥
transliteration: idaṃ phalaṃ śaneḥ pāke na vicintyaṃ dvijottama . daśāprade nakrarāśau na vicintyamidaṃ phalam.
separated_sandhi: idam phalam śaneḥ pāke na vicintyam dvijottamadaśāprade nakrarāśau na vicintyam idam phalam
english: O best among the twice-born (dvija), one should not predict this outcome (phalam) during Saturn's (śani) planetary period (pāka). This outcome should also not be predicted if the dasha-lord is situated in the Capricorn (nakrarāśi) sign.

sanskrit: राहुर्दशान्ते सर्वस्वनाशो मरणबन्धने । दशान्निर्वासनं वा स्यात्कष्टं वा महदश्नुते ॥४६॥
transliteration: rāhurdaśānte sarvasvanāśo maraṇabandhane . daśānnirvāsanaṃ vā syātkaṣṭaṃ vā mahadaśnute.
separated_sandhi: rāhuḥ daśānte sarvasvanāśaḥ maraṇabandhanedaśāt nirvāsanam vā syāt kaṣṭam vā mahat aśnute
english: At the conclusion of Rahu's (rāhu) planetary period (dasha), there may be a total loss of all possessions (sarvasvanāśa), death (maraṇa), or imprisonment (bandhana). Alternatively, there could be exile (nirvāsana) or one might experience great distress (kaṣṭa).

sanskrit: तत्त्रिकोणगते पापे निश्चयाद्दुःखमादिशेत् । एवं शुभाशुभं सर्वं निश्चयेन वदेद् बुधः ॥४७॥
transliteration: tattrikoṇagate pāpe niścayādduḥkhamādiśet . evaṃ śubhāśubhaṃ sarvaṃ niścayena vaded budhaḥ.
separated_sandhi: tat trikoṇagate pāpe niścayāt duḥkham ādiśetevam śubhāśubham sarvam niścayena vadet budhaḥ
english: When a malefic (pāpa) planet is situated in a trine house (trikoṇa), one should certainly (niścaya) predict suffering (duḥkha). In this manner, an expert astrologer (budha) should confidently (niścaya) declare all auspicious and inauspicious outcomes (śubhāśubha).

sanskrit: राह्वाद्याश्रितराशिस्तु भवेद्यदि दशाप्रदः । तत्र कालेऽपि पूर्वोक्तं चिन्तनीयं प्रयत्नतः ॥४८॥
transliteration: rāhvādyāśritarāśistu bhavedyadi daśāpradaḥ . tatra kāle'pi pūrvoktaṃ cintanīyaṃ prayatnataḥ.
separated_sandhi: rāhvādyāśritarāśiḥ tu bhavet yadi daśāpradaḥtatra kāle api pūrvoktam cintanīyam prayatnataḥ
english: However, if the zodiac sign (rāśi) occupied by Rahu (rāhu) or other such planets becomes the giver of the planetary period (daśāprada), then even during that time (kāla), the aforementioned (pūrvokta) results should be diligently (prayatna) predicted.

sanskrit: द/सारम्भो दशान्तो वा मारके चेन्न शोभनम् । तस्मिन्नेव च राहुश्चन्नरोधो द्रव्यनाशनः ॥४९॥
transliteration: da/sārambho daśānto vā mārake cenna śobhanam . tasminneva ca rāhuścannarodho dravyanāśanaḥ.
separated_sandhi: daśārambhaḥ daśāntaḥ vā mārake cet na śobhanamtasmin eva ca rāhuḥ ca cet nirodhaḥ dravyanāśanaḥ
english: The beginning (daśārambha) or end (daśānta) of a planetary period (dasha) in a maraka (killer) house is not auspicious (śobhana). And if, in that very situation, Rahu (rāhu) creates an obstruction (nirodha), it leads to the destruction of wealth (dravyanāśana).

sanskrit: यत्र क्वापि च भे राहौ दशारम्भे विनाशनम् । गृहभ्रंशः समुद्दिष्टो धने राहुधनार्तिकृत् ॥५०॥
transliteration: yatra kvāpi ca bhe rāhau daśārambhe vināśanam . gṛhabhraṃśaḥ samuddiṣṭo dhane rāhudhanārtikṛt.
separated_sandhi: yatra kvāpi ca bhe rāhau daśārambhe vināśanam |gṛhabhraṃśaḥ samuddiṣṭaḥ dhane rāhudhanārtikṛt
english: Whenever Rāhu is in any zodiac sign at the beginning of its planetary period (daśā), it indicates destruction. Loss of home is declared. If Rāhu is in the second house (dhana), it causes distress concerning wealth.

sanskrit: चन्द्र्शुक्रौ द्वादश चेद्राजकोपो भवेद्ध्रुवम् । भौमकेतू तत्र यदि वधोऽग्नेर्महती व्यथा ॥५१॥
transliteration: candrśukrau dvādaśa cedrājakopo bhaveddhruvam . bhaumaketū tatra yadi vadho'gnermahatī vyathā.
separated_sandhi: candraśukrau dvādaśa cet rājakopaḥ bhavet dhruvam| bhaumaketū tatra yadi vadhaḥ agneḥ mahatī vyathā
english: If the Moon and Venus are in the twelfth house, royal displeasure will certainly occur. If Mars and Ketu are there (in the twelfth house), then death by fire or great suffering will result.

sanskrit: चेन्द्रशुक्रौ धने विप्र यदि राज्यं प्रयच्छतः । दशारम्भे दशान्ते च द्वितीयस्थमिदं फलम् ॥५२॥
transliteration: cendraśukrau dhane vipra yadi rājyaṃ prayacchataḥ . daśārambhe daśānte ca dvitīyasthamidaṃ phalam.
separated_sandhi: ca indraśukrau dhane vipra yadi rājyam prayacchataḥ| daśārambhe daśānte ca dvitīyastham idam phalam
english: And if Indra and Venus are in the second house (dhana), O Brahmin, they bestow kingship. This result, stemming from the second house, is observed at the beginning and end of the planetary period (daśā).

sanskrit: एवमर्गलभावानां फलं विज्ञैः प्रदर्शितम् । यस्य पापः शुभो वाऽपि ग्रहस्तिष्ठेच्छुभार्गले ॥५३॥
transliteration: evamargalabhāvānāṃ phalaṃ vijñaiḥ pradarśitam . yasya pāpaḥ śubho vā'pi grahastiṣṭhecchubhārgale.
separated_sandhi: evam argalabhāvānām phalam vijñaiḥ pradarśitam |yasya pāpaḥ śubhaḥ vā api grahaḥ tiṣṭhet śubhārgale
english: Thus, the wise have explained the results of argala dispositions. If a malefic or benefic planet is situated in an auspicious argala (an astrological influence) for someone...

sanskrit: तेन द्रष्ट्रेक्षिते लग्नं पाबल्यायोपकल्प्यते । यदि पश्येद्ग्रहस्तन्न विपरीतार्गलस्थितः ॥५४॥
transliteration: tena draṣṭrekṣite lagnaṃ pābalyāyopakalpyate . yadi paśyedgrahastanna viparītārgalasthitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: tena draṣṭrā īkṣite lagnam pābalyāya upakalpyate| yadi paśyet grahaḥ tat na viparītārgalasthitaḥ
english: When the ascendant (lagna) is aspected by that (argala-forming) planet, it is considered for strengthening. However, if a planet aspects the ascendant while itself being situated in a *viparītārgala* (reverse argala) position, then it does not contribute to strength.

sanskrit: तद्भावस्य दशायास्तु विपरीतफलं भवेत् । सद्दृष्टेऽपि शुभं ब्रूयान्निर्विशंकं द्विजोत्तम ॥५५॥
transliteration: tadbhāvasya daśāyāstu viparītaphalaṃ bhavet . saddṛṣṭe'pi śubhaṃ brūyānnirviśaṃkaṃ dvijottama.
separated_sandhi: tadbhāvasya daśāyāḥ tu viparītaphalām bhavetsad-dṛṣṭe api śubham brūyāt nirviśaṅkam dvijottama
english: During the planetary period (daśā) of a particular house (bhāva), adverse results may occur. However, even if it is aspected by a benefic (graha), O best among the twice-born (dvijottama), one should declare auspicious results without hesitation.

sanskrit: यस्मिन्भावे शुभस्वामिसम्बन्धस्तुङ्गखेचरः । स्यात्तद्भावदशायां तु अन्त्यैश्वर्यमखण्डितम् ॥५६॥
transliteration: yasminbhāve śubhasvāmisambandhastuṅgakhecaraḥ . syāttadbhāvadaśāyāṃ tu antyaiśvaryamakhaṇḍitam.
separated_sandhi: yasmin bhāve śubhasvāmi-sambandhaḥ tuṅga-khecaraḥsyāt tadbhāvadaśāyām tu antyaiśvaryam akhaṇḍitam
english: If a house (bhāva) is associated with a benefic lord or has an exalted planet (khecara) present, then during the planetary period (daśā) of that house, there will be immense and uninterrupted prosperity.

sanskrit: यद्भावेशः स्वार्थराशिमधितिष्ठति पश्यति । स्यातद्भावदशाकाले धनलाभो महत्तरः ॥५७॥
transliteration: yadbhāveśaḥ svārtharāśimadhitiṣṭhati paśyati . syātadbhāvadaśākāle dhanalābho mahattaraḥ.
separated_sandhi: yad-bhāveśaḥ svārtharāśim adhitiṣṭhati paśyatisyāt tadbhāvadaśākāle dhana-lābhaḥ mahattaraḥ
english: If the lord of a house (bhāva) occupies or aspects a beneficial sign (rāśi), then during the planetary period (daśā) of that house, there will be a very great acquisition of wealth.

sanskrit: यस्माद्व्ययगतो यस्तु तद्दशायां धनक्षयः । यस्मात्त्रिकोणगाः पापास्तत्रात्मशुभनाशनम् ॥५८॥
transliteration: yasmādvyayagato yastu taddaśāyāṃ dhanakṣayaḥ . yasmāttrikoṇagāḥ pāpāstatrātmaśubhanāśanam.
separated_sandhi: yasmāt vyayagataḥ yaḥ tu taddaśāyām dhana-kṣayaḥyasmāt trikoṇagāḥ pāpāḥ tatra ātma-śubha-nāśanam
english: From a particular house (yasmāt), if a planet (yaḥ) is situated in the twelfth house (vyaya) from it, then during its planetary period (daśā), there will be a loss of wealth. Furthermore, if malefic planets (pāpāḥ) are located in trine (trikoṇa) from a specific house (yasmāt), then there will be a destruction of auspiciousness for the self (ātman).

sanskrit: पुत्रहानिः पितुः पीडा मनस्तापो महान् भवेत् । यस्मात्त्रिकोण्गा रिःफरन्ध्रेशार्कारसूर्यजाः ॥५९॥
transliteration: putrahāniḥ pituḥ pīḍā manastāpo mahān bhavet . yasmāttrikoṇgā riḥpharandhreśārkārasūryajāḥ.
separated_sandhi: putra-hāniḥ pituḥ pīḍā manas-tāpaḥ mahān bhavet yasmāttrikoṇagāḥ riḥpha-randhra-īśa-arka-āra-sūryajāḥ
english: Loss of children, affliction to the father, and great mental distress may occur if the lords of the twelfth and eighth houses, along with Mars, Sun, and Saturn, are situated in trine (trikoṇa) from a particular house (yasmāt).

sanskrit: पुत्रपीडा द्रव्यहानिस्तत्र केत्वहिसङ्गमे । विदेशभ्रमणं क्लेशो भयं चैव पदे पदे ॥६०॥
transliteration: putrapīḍā dravyahānistatra ketvahisaṅgame . videśabhramaṇaṃ kleśo bhayaṃ caiva pade pade.
separated_sandhi: putrapīḍā dravyahāniḥ tatra ketu-ahi-saṅgamevideśabhramaṇam kleśaḥ bhayam ca eva pade pade
english: When Ketu and Rahu (ahi) are conjoined, there is distress to sons and loss of wealth. Furthermore, there is travel to foreign lands, trouble, and constant fear.

sanskrit: तस्मात्षष्ठाष्टमे क्रूरनीचखेटादयः स्थिताः । रोगशत्रुनृपालेभ्यो मुहुः पीडा सुदुःसहा ॥६१॥
transliteration: tasmātṣaṣṭhāṣṭame krūranīcakheṭādayaḥ sthitāḥ . rogaśatrunṛpālebhyo muhuḥ pīḍā suduḥsahā.
separated_sandhi: tasmāt ṣaṣṭha-aṣṭame krūra-nīca-kheṭa-ādayaḥsthitāḥ roga-śatru-nṛpālebhyaḥ muhuḥ pīḍā suduḥsahā
english: Therefore, if malefic or debilitated planets (grahas) are situated in the sixth and eighth houses, there will be frequent and unbearable suffering originating from diseases, enemies, and rulers.

sanskrit: यस्माच्चतुर्थः क्रूरः स्याद्भूगृहक्षेत्रनाशनम् । पशुहानिस्तत्र भौमे गृहदाहः प्रमादकृत् ॥६२॥
transliteration: yasmāccaturthaḥ krūraḥ syādbhūgṛhakṣetranāśanam . paśuhānistatra bhaume gṛhadāhaḥ pramādakṛt.
separated_sandhi: yasmāt ca caturthaḥ krūraḥ syāt bhū-gṛha-kṣetra-nāśanampaśuhāniḥ tatra bhaume gṛhadāhaḥ pramādakṛt
english: And if the fourth house (bhāva) contains a malefic (graha), there will be destruction of land, house, and fields. Furthermore, if Mars (Bhauma) is present there, it causes loss of cattle and the burning of the house due to carelessness or calamity.

sanskrit: शनौ हृदयशूलं स्यात्सूर्ये राजप्रकोपनम् । सर्वस्वहरणं राहौ विषचौरादिजं भयम् ॥६३॥
transliteration: śanau hṛdayaśūlaṃ syātsūrye rājaprakopanam . sarvasvaharaṇaṃ rāhau viṣacaurādijaṃ bhayam.
separated_sandhi: śanau hṛdayaśūlam syāt sūrye rāja-prakopanamsarvasvaharaṇam rāhau viṣa-caura-ādi-jam bhayam
english: If Saturn (Śani) is present, there will be heart pain. If the Sun (Sūrya) is present, there will be royal displeasure. If Rahu is present, there will be confiscation of all possessions and fear arising from poison, thieves, and similar sources.

sanskrit: यस्माद् दशमभे राहुः पुण्यतीर्थाटनं भवेत् । यस्मात्कर्मायभाग्यर्क्षगतः शोभनखेचराः ॥६४॥
transliteration: yasmād daśamabhe rāhuḥ puṇyatīrthāṭanaṃ bhavet . yasmātkarmāyabhāgyarkṣagataḥ śobhanakhecarāḥ.
separated_sandhi: yasmāt daśamabhe rāhuḥ puṇyatīrthāṭanam bhavetyasmāt karma-āya-bhāgya-ṛkṣa-gataḥ śobana-khecarāḥ
english: If Rahu is in the tenth house, pilgrimage to holy places will occur. Additionally, because one (a planet or lord) is situated in the houses of action (karma), gains (āya), and fortune (bhāgya), auspicious planets (grahas) are present.

sanskrit: विद्यार्थधर्मसत्कर्मख्यातिपौरुषसिद्धयः । यतः पञ्चमकामारिगताः स्वोच्चशुभग्रहाः ॥६५॥
transliteration: vidyārthadharmasatkarmakhyātipauruṣasiddhayaḥ . yataḥ pañcamakāmārigatāḥ svoccaśubhagrahāḥ.
separated_sandhi: vidyārthadharmasatkarma-khyātipauruṣasiddhayaḥyataḥ pañcamakāmārigatāḥ svoccaśubhagrahāḥ
english: Accomplishments in education, financial prosperity, righteous conduct (dharma), virtuous actions, fame, and valor (pauruṣa) are attained when auspicious planets, exalted in their own sign, are located in the fifth, seventh, or sixth houses.

sanskrit: पुत्रदारादिसम्प्राप्तिर्नृपपूजा मह्त्तरा । यस्मान्पुत्रायकर्माम्बुनवलग्नाधिपाः स्थिताः ॥६६॥
transliteration: putradārādisamprāptirnṛpapūjā mahttarā . yasmānputrāyakarmāmbunavalagnādhipāḥ sthitāḥ.
separated_sandhi: putradārādisamprāptiḥ nṛpapūjā mahattarāyasmāt putrāyakarmāmbunavalagnādhipāḥ sthitāḥ
english: The acquisition of sons, wives, etc., and very great royal honor, occurs when the lords of the houses of progeny (fifth), gains (eleventh), profession (tenth), comforts (fourth), fortune (ninth), and ascendant (first) are well-situated.

sanskrit: तत्तद्भावार्थसिद्धिः स्याच्छ्रेयो योगानुसारतः । यस्मिन् गुरुर्वा शुक्रोवा शुभेशो वापि संस्थितः ॥६७॥
transliteration: tattadbhāvārthasiddhiḥ syācchreyo yogānusārataḥ . yasmin gururvā śukrovā śubheśo vāpi saṃsthitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: tattadbhāvārthasiddhiḥ syāt śreyaḥ yogānusārataḥyasmin guruḥ vā śukraḥ vā śubheśaḥ vā api saṃsthitaḥ
english: The fulfillment of the objectives of the various houses and general well-being (śreya) will occur according to the planetary combination (yoga), if Jupiter (Guru), or Venus (Śukra), or even an auspicious house lord, is situated in that house.

sanskrit: कल्याणं सर्वसम्पत्तिर् देवब्राह्मणतर्पनम् । यत्चतुर्थे तुङ्गखेटाः शुभस्वामी ग्रहश्च वा ॥६८॥
transliteration: kalyāṇaṃ sarvasampattir devabrāhmaṇatarpanam . yatcaturthe tuṅgakheṭāḥ śubhasvāmī grahaśca vā.
separated_sandhi: kalyāṇam sarvasampattiḥ devabrāhmaṇatarpaṇamyat caturthe tuṅgakheṭāḥ śubhasvāmī grahaḥ ca vā
english: Welfare, all prosperity, and the propitiation of deities and Brahmins (brāhmaṇa) are gained when exalted planets, or an auspicious lord, or even an auspicious planet, is situated in the fourth house.

sanskrit: वाहनग्रामलाभश्च पशुवृद्धिश्च भूयसी । तत्र चन्द्रे च लाभः स्याद्बहुधान्यरसान्वितः ॥६९॥
transliteration: vāhanagrāmalābhaśca paśuvṛddhiśca bhūyasī . tatra candre ca lābhaḥ syādbahudhānyarasānvitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: vāhanagrāmalābhaḥ ca paśuvṛddhiḥ ca bhūyasītatra candre ca lābhaḥ syāt bahudhānyarasānvitaḥ
english: The acquisition of vehicles and villages, and a significant increase in livestock (paśuvṛddhi), will occur in the fourth house when the Moon (Candra) is present, leading to gains (lābha) endowed with abundant grains and liquids.

sanskrit: पूर्णे विधौ निधिप्राप्तिर्लभेद्वा मणिसञ्जयम् । तत्र सुक्रे भृदङ्गादिवाद्यगानपुरस्कृतः ॥७०॥
transliteration: pūrṇe vidhau nidhiprāptirlabhedvā maṇisañjayam . tatra sukre bhṛdaṅgādivādyagānapuraskṛtaḥ.
separated_sandhi: pūrṇe vidhau nidhiprāptiḥ labhet vā maṇisañcayamtatra śukre bhṛdaṅgādivādyagānapuraskṛtaḥ
english: When the Moon is full, one may obtain treasure or an accumulation of jewels. If Venus is similarly auspicious, one is honored and accompanied by drums, other musical instruments, and singing.

sanskrit: आन्दोलिकाप्तिर्जीवे तु कनकांदोलिका ध्रुवम् । लग्नकर्मेशभाग्येशतुङ्गस्थशुभयोगतः ॥७१॥
transliteration: āndolikāptirjīve tu kanakāṃdolikā dhruvam . lagnakarmeśabhāgyeśatuṅgasthaśubhayogataḥ.
separated_sandhi: āndolikāptiḥ jīve tu kanakāndolikā dhruvamlagnakarmeśabhāgyeśatuṅgasthaśubhayogataḥ
english: One obtains a palanquin (vehicle). However, if Jupiter is auspicious, a golden palanquin is certainly obtained. This occurs due to an auspicious combination where the lord of the Ascendant, the lord of the 10th house, and the lord of the 9th house are all situated in their exaltation signs.

sanskrit: सर्वोत्कर्षमहैश्वर्यसाम्राज्यादिमहत्फलम् । एवं तत्तद्भावदायफलं यत्स्याद्विचिन्तयेत् ॥७२॥
transliteration: sarvotkarṣamahaiśvaryasāmrājyādimahatphalam . evaṃ tattadbhāvadāyaphalaṃ yatsyādvicintayet.
separated_sandhi: sarvotkarṣamahāiśvaryasāmrājyādimahatphalamevam tattadbhāvadāyaphalām yat syāt vicintayet
english: Thus, one should contemplate the great results, such as supreme excellence, vast prosperity, imperial dominion, and so forth, as well as whatever outcomes are indicated by each particular astrological house (bhāva).

sanskrit: एकैकोडुदशा स्वीयैर्गुणैरष्टादशात्मभि । भिन्नं फलविपाकं तु कुर्याद्वै चित्रसंयुतम् ॥७३॥
transliteration: ekaikoḍudaśā svīyairguṇairaṣṭādaśātmabhi . bhinnaṃ phalavipākaṃ tu kuryādvai citrasaṃyutam.
separated_sandhi: ekaikodudaśā svīyaiḥ guṇaiḥ aṣṭādaśātmabhiḥbhinnam phalavipākam tu kuryāt vai citrasaṃyutam
english: Each individual nakṣatra (lunar mansion) daśā, through its eighteen intrinsic qualities (guṇas), certainly produces diverse and fascinating results (karma).

sanskrit: परमोच्चे तुङ्गमात्रे तदर्वाक्तदुपर्यपि । मूलत्रिकोणभे स्वर्क्षे स्वाधिमित्रग्रहस्य भे ॥७४॥
transliteration: paramocce tuṅgamātre tadarvāktaduparyapi . mūlatrikoṇabhe svarkṣe svādhimitragrahasya bhe.
separated_sandhi: paramocce tuṅgamātre tad arvāk tad upari apimūlatrikoṇabhe svar̥kṣe svādhimitragrahasya bhe
english: A planet can be in its highest exaltation degree, or generally in its exaltation sign (even slightly below or above the precise degree), and also in its mūlatrikoṇa sign, in its own sign, or in the sign of its intimate friend (adhimitra) planet.

sanskrit: तत्कालसुहृदो गेहे उदासीनस्य भे तथा । शर्तोर्भेऽधिरिपोर्भे च नीचान्तादूर्ध्वदेशभे ॥७५॥
transliteration: tatkālasuhṛdo gehe udāsīnasya bhe tathā . śartorbhe'dhiriporbhe ca nīcāntādūrdhvadeśabhe.
separated_sandhi: tatkālasuhṛdaḥ gehe udāsīnasya bhe tathā śatroḥbhe adhiripoḥ bhe ca nīcāntāt ūrdhvadeśabhe
english: A planet's state is considered when it is in the sign of a temporary friend, or in the sign of a neutral planet. Likewise, it is considered when in the sign of an enemy or a great enemy, and when in a position higher than its deepest point of debilitation.

sanskrit: तस्मादर्वाङ् नीचमात्र नीचान्ते परमांशके । नीचारिवर्गे सखले स्ववर्गे केन्द्रकोणभे ॥७६॥
transliteration: tasmādarvāṅ nīcamātra nīcānte paramāṃśake . nīcārivarge sakhale svavarge kendrakoṇabhe.
separated_sandhi: tasmāt arvāk nīcamātra nīcānte paramāṃśakenīcārivarge sakhale svavarge kendrakoṇabhe
english: Below that (point above the deepest debilitation), when merely debilitated, or at the deepest degree of debilitation. Also, when in the divisional chart of a debilitated enemy and afflicted by malefics, or when in its own divisional chart and located in an angular (kendra) or trinal (kona) sign.

sanskrit: व्यवस्थितस्य खेटस्य समरे पीडितस्य च । गाढपूढस्य च दशापचितिः स्वगुणैः फलम् ॥७७॥
transliteration: vyavasthitasya kheṭasya samare pīḍitasya ca . gāḍhapūḍhasya ca daśāpacitiḥ svaguṇaiḥ phalam.
separated_sandhi: vyavasthitasya kheṭasya samare pīḍitasya cagāḍhapūḍhasya ca daśāpacitiḥ svaguṇaiḥ phalam
english: For a planet (kheṭa) that is situated (in various positions), afflicted in a planetary war (samare), or deeply distressed, the outcome (phalam) during its planetary period (daśā) is a decline (apacitiḥ), commensurate with its own inherent qualities (svaguṇa).

sanskrit: परमोच्चगतो यस्तु योऽतिवीर्यसमन्वितः । सम्पूर्णाख्या दशा तस्य राज्यभूग्यशुभप्रदा ॥७८॥
transliteration: paramoccagato yastu yo'tivīryasamanvitaḥ . sampūrṇākhyā daśā tasya rājyabhūgyaśubhapradā.
separated_sandhi: paramoccagataḥ yaḥ tu yaḥ ativīryasamanvitaḥsampūrṇākhyā daśā tasya rājyabhūgyaśubhapradā
english: For a planet (kheṭa) that is in the highest exaltation (paramocca) and endowed with extreme strength, its planetary period (daśā) is called 'complete' (sampūrṇa) and bestows auspicious results related to kingdom, land/possessions, and enjoyment.

sanskrit: लक्ष्मीकटाक्षचिह्नानां चिरवासगृहप्रदा । तुङ्गमात्रगतस्यापि तथा वीर्याधिकस्य च ॥७९॥
transliteration: lakṣmīkaṭākṣacihnānāṃ ciravāsagṛhapradā . tuṅgamātragatasyāpi tathā vīryādhikasya ca.
separated_sandhi: lakṣmīkaṭākṣacihnānām ciravāsagṛhapradātuṅgamātragatasyāpi tathā vīryādhikasya ca
english: It (such a planetary period) also bestows the signs of Lakṣmī's (Lakṣmī) favorable glance and grants permanent residences. These benefits apply even to a planet that has merely attained exaltation, and similarly, to one possessing abundant strength.

sanskrit: पूर्णाख्या बहुलैश्वर्यदायिन्यापि रुजप्रदा । अतिनीचगतस्यापि दुर्बलस्य ग्रहस्य तु ॥८०॥
transliteration: pūrṇākhyā bahulaiśvaryadāyinyāpi rujapradā . atinīcagatasyāpi durbalasya grahasya tu.
separated_sandhi: pūrṇākhyā bahulaiśvaryadāyinyā api rujapradāatinīcagatasya api durbalasya grahasya tu
english: The daśā known as Pūrṇā, even though it grants abundant prosperity, also bestows diseases, particularly for a planet that is extremely debilitated or otherwise weak.

sanskrit: रिक्ता त्वनिष्टफलदा व्याध्यनर्थमृतिप्रदा । अत्युच्चेऽप्यतिनीचस्थे मध्यगस्यावरोहिणी ॥८१॥
transliteration: riktā tvaniṣṭaphaladā vyādhyanarthamṛtipradā . atyucce'pyatinīcasthe madhyagasyāvarohiṇī.
separated_sandhi: riktā tu aniṣṭaphaladā vyādhyanarthamṛtipradāatyucce api atinīcasthye madhyagasya avarohiṇī
english: The daśā known as Riktā, however, produces undesirable results, bringing forth disease, misfortune, and death. It proves to be a declining influence even when a planet is in its highest exaltation or deepest debilitation, and also for a planet situated in a middle position.

sanskrit: मित्रोच्चभावप्राप्तस्य मध्याख्या ह्यर्थदा दशा । नीचांतादुच्चभागान्तं भषट्के मध्यगस्य च ॥८२॥
transliteration: mitroccabhāvaprāptasya madhyākhyā hyarthadā daśā . nīcāṃtāduccabhāgāntaṃ bhaṣaṭke madhyagasya ca.
separated_sandhi: mitroccabhāvapraptasya madhyākhyā hi arthadā daśānīcāntāt uccabhāgāntam bhaṣaṭke madhyagasya ca
english: Indeed, the daśā named Madhyā is a provider of wealth for a planet that has attained the status of being in a friendly sign or in exaltation. This daśā's influence applies to a planet situated from the end of its debilitation portion up to the end of its exaltation portion within a sign, as well as for a planet in the middle range of the six divisional charts (vargas).

sanskrit: दशा चारोहिणी नीचरिपुभांशगतस्य च । अधमाख्या भयक्लेशव्याधिदुःखविवर्धिनी ॥८३॥
transliteration: daśā cārohiṇī nīcaripubhāṃśagatasya ca . adhamākhyā bhayakleśavyādhiduḥkhavivardhinī.
separated_sandhi: daśā ca avarohiṇī nīcaripubhāṃśagatasya caadhamākhyā bhayakleśavyādhiduḥkhavivardhinī
english: And the daśā is a declining one for a planet situated in the portion of its debilitation or enemy sign. The daśā known as Adhamā (inferior) particularly increases fear, affliction, disease, and sorrow.

sanskrit: नामानुरूपफलदाः पाककाले दशा इमाः । भाग्येशगुरुसम्बन्धो योगदृक्केन्द्रभादिभिः ॥८४॥
transliteration: nāmānurūpaphaladāḥ pākakāle daśā imāḥ . bhāgyeśagurusambandho yogadṛkkendrabhādibhiḥ.
separated_sandhi: nāmānurūpaphaladāḥ pākakāle daśā imāḥbhāgyeśagurusambandhaḥ yogadṛkkendrabhāgādibhiḥ
english: These daśās, during their period of operation, yield results corresponding to their names. The relationships (sambandha) involving the lord of the 9th house (bhāgya-īśa) and Jupiter (guru), along with yogas, aspects, angular houses (kendra), signs (bhāga), and other factors, should also be considered.

sanskrit: परेषामपि दायेषु भग्योपक्रममुन्नयेत् । जातको यस्तु फलदो भग्ययोगप्रदोऽथ यः ॥८५॥
transliteration: pareṣāmapi dāyeṣu bhagyopakramamunnayet . jātako yastu phalado bhagyayogaprado'tha yaḥ.
separated_sandhi: pareṣām api dāyeṣu bhāgyopakramam unnayetjātakaḥ yaḥ tu phaladaḥ bhāgyayogapradaḥ atha yaḥ
english: One should ascertain the commencement of fortune (bhāgya) even from the shares or legacies of others. And whichever (planet or configuration) in the birth chart (jātaka) yields results and grants auspicious combinations for fortune (bhāgya)...

sanskrit: सफलो वक्रिमादूर्ध्वमन्यानपि च खेचरान् । दुर्बलानसमर्थांश्च फलदानेषु यागतः ॥८६॥
transliteration: saphalo vakrimādūrdhvamanyānapi ca khecarān . durbalānasamarthāṃśca phaladāneṣu yāgataḥ.
separated_sandhi: safalaḥ vakrimāt ūrdhvam anyān api ca khecarāndurbalān asamarthān ca phaladāneṣu yāgataḥ
english: That (planet or factor), which is effective (safala) after its direct motion following retrogradation, also (influences) other planets (khecarāḥ) that are weak and unable to grant results, due to its combination (yoga).

sanskrit: तारतम्यात्सुसम्बन्धा दशा ह्येताः फलप्रदाः । स्वकेन्द्रादिजुषां तेषां पूर्णार्द्धांघ्रिव्यवस्थया ॥८७॥
transliteration: tāratamyātsusambandhā daśā hyetāḥ phalapradāḥ . svakendrādijuṣāṃ teṣāṃ pūrṇārddhāṃghrivyavasthayā.
separated_sandhi: tāratamyāt susambandhāḥ daśāḥ hi etāḥ phalapradāḥsvakendrādijuṣām teṣām pūrṇārddhāṅghrivyavasthayā
english: Indeed, these planetary periods (daśā), being well-connected and graduated in their effects, are productive of results. For those (planets) occupying their own Kendra (angular) houses and so on, results are given according to a system of full, half, or quarter strength.

sanskrit: शीर्षोदयभगाः स्वस्वदशादौ स्वफलप्रदाः । उभयोदयराशिस्थदशा मध्यफलप्रदा ॥८८॥
transliteration: śīrṣodayabhagāḥ svasvadaśādau svaphalapradāḥ . ubhayodayarāśisthadaśā madhyaphalapradā.
separated_sandhi: śīrṣodayabhagāḥ svasvadaśāādau svaphalapradāḥubhayodayarāśisthadaśā madhyaphalapradā
english: Planets located in head-rising signs (śīrṣodaya rāśis) grant their full results at the beginning of their respective planetary periods (daśā). The planetary periods (daśā) of planets in signs that rise both ways (ubhayodaya rāśis) yield moderate results.

sanskrit: पृष्ठोदयर्क्षगाः खेटाः स्वदशान्ते फलप्रदाः । निसर्गतश्च तत्काले सुहृदां हरणे शुभम् ॥८९॥
transliteration: pṛṣṭhodayarkṣagāḥ kheṭāḥ svadaśānte phalapradāḥ . nisargataśca tatkāle suhṛdāṃ haraṇe śubham.
separated_sandhi: pṛṣṭhodayarkṣagāḥ kheṭāḥ svadaśāante phalapradāḥnisargataḥ ca tatkāle suhṛdām haraṇe śubham
english: Planets (kheṭa) located in tail-rising signs (pṛṣṭhodaya rāśis) grant results at the end of their respective planetary periods (daśā). And naturally, at that specific time, there is auspiciousness regarding the loss of friends.

sanskrit: सम्पादयेत्तदा कष्टं तद्विपर्ययगामिनाम् । दशेशाक्रांतभावर्क्षादारभ्य द्वादशर्क्षकम् ॥९०॥
transliteration: sampādayettadā kaṣṭaṃ tadviparyayagāminām . daśeśākrāṃtabhāvarkṣādārabhya dvādaśarkṣakam.
separated_sandhi: sampādayet tadā kaṣṭam tadviparyayagāminām |daśeśākrāntabhāvarṣāt ārabhya dvādaśarṣakam
english: Then, trouble is caused to those who go against the principles, specifically starting from the sign occupied by the lord of the daśā (planetary period) and extending up to the twelfth house from it.

sanskrit: भक्त्वा द्वादशराशीनां दशाभुक्ति प्रकल्पयेत् । एकैकराशेर्या तत्र सुहृत्स्वक्षेत्रगामिनी ॥९१॥
transliteration: bhaktvā dvādaśarāśīnāṃ daśābhukti prakalpayet . ekaikarāśeryā tatra suhṛtsvakṣetragāminī.
separated_sandhi: bhaktvā dvādaśarāśīnām daśābhuktim prakalpayet| ekaikarāśeḥ yā tatra suhṛtsvakṣetragāminī
english: One should arrange the daśā (planetary period) sub-periods (bhukti) by dividing them among the twelve signs. Among these, the sub-period of any given sign that is situated in a friendly sign or its own sign...

sanskrit: तस्यां राज्यादिसम्पत्तिपूर्वकं शुभमीरयेत् । दुःस्थानरिपुगेहस्थनीचक्रूरयुता च या ॥९२॥
transliteration: tasyāṃ rājyādisampattipūrvakaṃ śubhamīrayet . duḥsthānaripugehasthanīcakrūrayutā ca yā.
separated_sandhi: tasyām rājyādisampattipūrvakam śubham īrayet| duḥsthānaripugehasthanīcakrūrayutā ca yā
english: In such a sub-period (bhukti), which is situated in a friendly sign or its own sign, one should predict auspicious results, including gains of kingdom and other forms of prosperity. Conversely, that (sub-period) which is situated in an evil house, an enemy's house, or is conjoined with debilitated or malefic planets...

sanskrit: तस्यामनर्थकलहं रोगमृत्युभयादिकम् । बिन्दुभूयस्त्वशून्यत्ववशात् स्वीयाष्टवर्गके ॥९३॥
transliteration: tasyāmanarthakalahaṃ rogamṛtyubhayādikam . bindubhūyastvaśūnyatvavaśāt svīyāṣṭavargake.
separated_sandhi: tasyām anarthakalaham rogamṛtyubhayādikam |bindubhūyastvaśūnyatvavaśāt svīyāṣṭavargake
english: In such a sub-period (bhukti) – meaning the one situated in an evil house, an enemy's house, or conjoined with debilitated or malefic planets – one should predict misfortune, quarrels, sickness, death, fear, and so on. The extent of these effects should be known based on the abundance (bhūyastva) or absence (śūnyatva) of benefic points (bindu) in its own (planet's) Aṣṭakavarga (system).

sanskrit: वृद्धिं हानिं च तद्राशिभावस्य स्वगृहात्क्रमात् । भावयोजनया विद्यात्सुतस्त्र्यादिशुभाऽशुभम् ॥९४॥
transliteration: vṛddhiṃ hāniṃ ca tadrāśibhāvasya svagṛhātkramāt . bhāvayojanayā vidyātsutastryādiśubhā'śubham.
separated_sandhi: vṛddhim hānim ca tadrāśibhāvasya svagṛhāt kramāt| bhāvayojanayā vidyāt sutastryādiśubhāśubham
english: Thus, one should understand the increase (vṛddhi) or decrease (hāni) of the significance of that particular house (bhāva) belonging to the sign (rāśi) in question, relative to its own natural house, sequentially determined by the abundance or absence of benefic points (bindu) in its own Aṣṭakavarga. By applying the principles of houses (bhāvayojanā), one should know the auspicious and inauspicious effects concerning children, spouses, and so on.

sanskrit: धात्वादिराशिभेदाच्च धात्वादिग्रहयोगतः । शुभपापनशाभेदाच्छुभपापयुतैरपि ॥९५॥
transliteration: dhātvādirāśibhedācca dhātvādigrahayogataḥ . śubhapāpanaśābhedācchubhapāpayutairapi.
separated_sandhi: dhātvādirāśibhedāt ca dhātvādigrahayogataḥśubhapāpadaśābhedāt śubhapāpayutaiḥ api
english: One should determine results based on the differences in signs (rāśi) related to minerals (dhātu) and so on, and from the conjunctions of planets (graha) similarly related to minerals; also, due to distinctions from auspicious and inauspicious planetary periods (daśā), and from associations with auspicious and inauspicious planets.

sanskrit: इष्टानिष्टस्थानभेदात् फलभेदात् समुन्नयेत् । एवं सर्वग्रहाणां च स्वां स्वामन्तर्दशामपि ॥९६॥
transliteration: iṣṭāniṣṭasthānabhedāt phalabhedāt samunnayet . evaṃ sarvagrahāṇāṃ ca svāṃ svāmantardaśāmapi.
separated_sandhi: iṣṭāniṣṭasthānabhedāt phalabhedāt samunnayetevam sarvagrahāṇām ca svām svām antardaśām api
english: One should infer results based on the distinctions of auspicious and inauspicious positions (sthāna) and from differences in outcomes. Similarly, for all planets, one should also consider their own respective sub-periods (antardaśā).

sanskrit: स्वराशितो राशिभुक्तिं प्रकल्प्य फलमीरयेत् । अन्तरन्तर्दशां स्वीयां विभज्यैवं पुनः पुनः ॥९७॥
transliteration: svarāśito rāśibhuktiṃ prakalpya phalamīrayet . antarantardaśāṃ svīyāṃ vibhajyaivaṃ punaḥ punaḥ.
separated_sandhi: svarāśitaḥ rāśibhuktim prakalpya phalam īrayetantarāntardaśām svīyām vibhajya evam punaḥ punaḥ
english: One should determine the planetary period (bhukti) of a sign (rāśi) from its own sign (svarāśi), and then declare the results. Similarly, one should subdivide one's own sub-sub-period (antar-antardaśā) in this manner repeatedly.

sanskrit: दशाब्दाः स्वस्वमानघ्नाः सर्वायुर्योगभाजिताः । पृथगन्तर्दशा एवं प्रत्यन्तरदशादिकाः ॥१॥
transliteration: daśābdāḥ svasvamānaghnāḥ sarvāyuryogabhājitāḥ . pṛthagantardaśā evaṃ pratyantaradaśādikāḥ.
separated_sandhi: daśābdāḥ svasvamānaghnāḥ sarvāyuryogabhājitāḥpṛthak antardaśā evam pratyantardaśādikāḥ
english: The years of the planetary period (daśā), multiplied by their respective measures (māna), and divided by the total sum of the lifespan, result in the separate sub-periods (antardaśā). In this manner, the sub-sub-periods (pratyantardaśā) and so on are derived.

sanskrit: आदावन्तर्दशा पाकपतेस्तत्क्रमतोऽपराः । एवं प्रत्यन्तरादौ च क्रमो ज्ञेयो विचक्षणैः ॥२॥
transliteration: ādāvantardaśā pākapatestatkramato'parāḥ . evaṃ pratyantarādau ca kramo jñeyo vicakṣaṇaiḥ.
separated_sandhi: ādau antardaśā pākapateḥ tatkramataḥ aparāḥ evampratyantarādau ca kramaḥ jñeyaḥ vicakṣaṇaiḥ
english: Initially, the sub-period (antardaśā) is that of the lord of the main planetary period (pākapa), followed by others in the same sequence. Similarly, the sequence for the sub-sub-period (pratyantardaśā) and further subdivisions should be understood by experts.

sanskrit: भुक्तिर्नवानां तुल्या स्याद् विभाज्या नवधा दशा । आदौ दशापतेर्भुक्तिस्तत्केन्द्रादियुजां ततः ॥३॥
transliteration: bhuktirnavānāṃ tulyā syād vibhājyā navadhā daśā . ādau daśāpaterbhuktistatkendrādiyujāṃ tataḥ.
separated_sandhi: bhuktiḥ navānām tulyā syāt vibhājyā navadhā daśā| ādau daśāpateḥ bhuktiḥ tat kendrādi-yujām tataḥ
english: The sub-periods (bhukti) of the nine (planets) should be of equal duration, as the main planetary period (daśā) is to be divided into nine parts. First, the sub-period belongs to the lord of the main planetary period (daśā), and then, in sequence, to the planets associated with the angular houses (kendras) and so on from that (daśā lord).

sanskrit: विद्यात् क्रमेण भुक्त्यंशानेवं सूक्ष्मदशादिकम् । बलक्रमात् फलं विज्ञैर्वक्तव्यं पूर्वरीतितः ॥४॥
transliteration: vidyāt krameṇa bhuktyaṃśānevaṃ sūkṣmadaśādikam . balakramāt phalaṃ vijñairvaktavyaṃ pūrvarītitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: vidyāt krameṇa bhuktyaṃśān evam sūkṣma-daśā-ādikam| bala-kramāt phalam vijñaiḥ vaktavyam pūrva-rītitaḥ
english: One should similarly understand the portions of the sub-periods (bhuktyaṃśa) and the very subtle periods (sūkṣmadaśā) and so on, in their proper sequence. The wise should declare the results according to the strength (of the planets), following the previously explained method.

sanskrit: कृत्वाऽर्कधा राशिदशां राशेर्भुक्तिं क्रमाद् वदेत् । प्रत्यन्तर्दशाद्येवं कृत्वा तत्तत्फलं वदेत् ॥५॥
transliteration: kṛtvā'rkadhā rāśidaśāṃ rāśerbhuktiṃ kramād vadet . pratyantardaśādyevaṃ kṛtvā tattatphalaṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: kṛtvā arka-dhā rāśi-daśām rāśeḥ bhuktim kramāt vadet| prati-antar-daśā-ādi evam kṛtvā tat-tat-phalam vadet
english: After dividing the sign's period (rāśi-daśā) into twelve parts, one should sequentially declare the sub-periods (bhukti) for that sign. Similarly, having calculated the sub-sub-periods (pratyantardaśā) and further divisions, one should declare their respective outcomes.
