sanskrit: आद्यसप्तमयोर्मध्ये यो राशिर्बलवांस्ततः । ओजे दशाश्रये गण्याः क्रमादुत्क्रमतः समे ॥६॥
transliteration: ādyasaptamayormadhye yo rāśirbalavāṃstataḥ . oje daśāśraye gaṇyāḥ kramādutkramataḥ same.
separated_sandhi: ādya-saptamayoḥ madhye yaḥ rāśiḥ balavān tataḥ| oje daśā-āśraye gaṇyāḥ kramāt utkramataḥ same
english: Between the first and seventh (houses or signs), whichever sign is stronger, from that point (the daśā reckoning proceeds). For odd signs, when determining the planetary periods (daśā), they are to be counted in direct order, while for even signs, they are to be counted in reverse order.

sanskrit: अत्राऽपरो विशेषोऽस्ति ब्रवीमि तमहं द्विज । चरेऽनुज्झितमार्गः स्यात् षष्ठषष्ठादिकाः स्थिरे ॥७॥
transliteration: atrā'paro viśeṣo'sti bravīmi tamahaṃ dvija . care'nujjhitamārgaḥ syāt ṣaṣṭhaṣaṣṭhādikāḥ sthire.
separated_sandhi: atra aparaḥ viśeṣaḥ asti bravīmi tam aham dvija | careanujjhita-mārgaḥ syāt ṣaṣṭha-ṣaṣṭha-ādikāḥ sthire
english: O twice-born (dvija), here is another special rule that I shall explain to you. In movable (cara) signs, the sequence (for daśā counting) should be direct, while in fixed (sthira) signs, it should proceed from the sixth house, then the sixth from that (i.e., the eleventh) and so on.

sanskrit: उभये कण्टकाज् ज्ञेया लग्नपञ्चमभाग्यतः । चरस्थिरद्विस्वभावेष्वोजेषुः प्राक् क्रमो मतः ॥८॥
transliteration: ubhaye kaṇṭakāj jñeyā lagnapañcamabhāgyataḥ . carasthiradvisvabhāveṣvojeṣuḥ prāk kramo mataḥ.
separated_sandhi: ubhaye kaṇṭakāt jñeyā lagna-pañcama-bhāgyataḥcara-sthira-dvisvabhāveṣu ojeṣu prāk kramaḥ mataḥ
english: Both (pāka and bhoga) should be understood through the pivotal houses (kaṇṭaka): the ascendant (lagna), fifth house, and ninth house. In movable (cara), fixed (sthira), and dual (dvisvabhāva) signs that are also odd signs (oja), the direct order (krama) of calculation is prescribed.

sanskrit: तेष्वेव त्रिषु युग्मेषु ग्राह्यं व्युत्क्रमतोऽखिलम् । एवमुल्लिखितो राशि पाकराशिरुदीर्युते ॥९॥
transliteration: teṣveva triṣu yugmeṣu grāhyaṃ vyutkramato'khilam . evamullikhito rāśi pākarāśirudīryute.
separated_sandhi: teṣu eva triṣu yugmeṣu grāhyam vyutkramataḥakhilam | evam ullikhitaḥ rāśiḥ pāka-rāśiḥ udīryate
english: In those same three (types of signs - movable, fixed, and dual) that are even (yugma), the entire calculation should be understood in reverse order (vyutkrama). The sign thus determined is declared to be the *pāka* sign (pākarāśi).

sanskrit: स एव भोगराशिः स्यात् पर्याये प्रथमे स्मृतः । आद्याद् यावतिथः पाकः पर्याये यत्र दृश्यते ॥१०॥
transliteration: sa eva bhogarāśiḥ syāt paryāye prathame smṛtaḥ . ādyād yāvatithaḥ pākaḥ paryāye yatra dṛśyate.
separated_sandhi: sa eva bhoga-rāśiḥ syāt paryāye prathame smṛtaḥ| ādyāt yāvatithaḥ pākaḥ paryāye yatra dṛśyate
english: That same sign is designated as the *bhoga* sign (bhogarāśi) in the first cycle (paryāya). From the first, whichever (yāvatitha) *pāka* is observed in a cycle...

sanskrit: तस्मात् तावतिथो भोगः पर्याये तत्र गृह्यताम् । तदिदं चरपर्यायस्थिरपर्याययोर्द्वयोः ॥११॥
transliteration: tasmāt tāvatitho bhogaḥ paryāye tatra gṛhyatām . tadidaṃ caraparyāyasthiraparyāyayordvayoḥ.
separated_sandhi: tasmāt tāvatithaḥ bhogaḥ paryāye tatra gṛhyatām| tat idam cara-paryāya-sthira-paryāyayoḥ dvayoḥ
english: Therefore, in that cycle (paryāya), the *bhoga* of the same ordinal number (tāvatitha) should be taken. This calculation applies to both the movable cycle (cara-paryāya) and the fixed cycle (sthira-paryāya).

sanskrit: त्रिकोणाख्यदशायां च पाकभोगप्रकल्पनम् । पाके भोगे च पापाढ्ये देपपीडा नमोव्यथा ॥१२॥
transliteration: trikoṇākhyadaśāyāṃ ca pākabhogaprakalpanam . pāke bhoge ca pāpāḍhye depapīḍā namovyathā.
separated_sandhi: trikoṇa-ākhya-daśāyām ca pāka-bhoga-prakalpanam| pāke bhoge ca pāpāḍhye depapīḍā namovyathā
english: This calculation of *pāka* and *bhoga* is also applied in the *Trikoṇa*-named planetary periods (daśā). Furthermore, if the *pāka* and *bhoga* (signs/houses) are afflicted by malefic planets (pāpāḍhya), then there will be bodily suffering (deha-pīḍā) and mental distress (mano-vyathā).

sanskrit: पिण्डत्रिकदशायां तु ब्रविम्यन्तर्दशाविधिम् । पूर्ण दशापतिर्दद्यात् तदर्धं तेन संयुतः ॥१३॥
transliteration: piṇḍatrikadaśāyāṃ tu bravimyantardaśāvidhim . pūrṇa daśāpatirdadyāt tadardhaṃ tena saṃyutaḥ.
separated_sandhi: piṇḍatrikadaśāyām tu bravimi antardaśāvidhim |pūrṇa daśāpatiḥ dadyāt tat ardham tena saṃyutaḥ
english: Now, I shall explain the method for calculating sub-periods (antardaśā) within the Piṇḍa-trika planetary period (daśā). The daśā lord grants its full period, while a planet conjoined with it grants half of that.

sanskrit: त्रिकोणगस्तृतीयांशं तुर्यांशश्चतुरस्रगः । स्मरगः सप्तमं भागं बहुष्वेको बली ग्रहः ॥१४॥
transliteration: trikoṇagastṛtīyāṃśaṃ turyāṃśaścaturasragaḥ . smaragaḥ saptamaṃ bhāgaṃ bahuṣveko balī grahaḥ.
separated_sandhi: trikoṇagaḥ tṛtīyāṃśam turyāṃśaḥ caturasragaḥ |smaragaḥ saptamam bhāgam bahuṣu ekaḥ balī grahaḥ
english: A planet located in a trine house (5th or 9th from the daśā lord) gets a third share. A planet located in a quadrant house (4th or 10th) gets a fourth share. A planet located in the seventh house gets a seventh share. Among many such planets, one strong planet (prevails).

sanskrit: एवं सलग्नकाः खेटाः पाचयन्ति मिथः स्थिताः । समच्छेदीकृताः प्राप्ता अंसाश्छेदविवर्जिताः ॥१५॥
transliteration: evaṃ salagnakāḥ kheṭāḥ pācayanti mithaḥ sthitāḥ . samacchedīkṛtāḥ prāptā aṃsāśchedavivarjitāḥ.
separated_sandhi: evam salagnakāḥ kheṭāḥ pācayanti mithaḥ sthitāḥ| samacchedīkṛtāḥ prāptāḥ aṃśāḥ chedavivarjitāḥ
english: In this manner, planets, whether considered from the ascendant (lagna) or in mutual positions, produce their effects. The obtained shares are then reduced to a common denominator and subsequently simplified (by removing the denominator).

sanskrit: दशाब्दाः पृथगंशघ्ना अंशयोगविभाजिताः । अन्तर्दशा भवन्त्येवं तत्प्रत्यन्तर्दशादिकाः ॥१६॥
transliteration: daśābdāḥ pṛthagaṃśaghnā aṃśayogavibhājitāḥ . antardaśā bhavantyevaṃ tatpratyantardaśādikāḥ.
separated_sandhi: daśābdāḥ pṛthak aṃśaghnāḥ aṃśayogavibhājitāḥ |antardaśā bhavanti evam tat pratyantardaśā ādikāḥ
english: The years of the daśā (planetary period), multiplied by the individual shares (of planets) and divided by the sum of shares, thus become the sub-periods (antardaśā), and so on for the sub-sub-periods (pratyantardaśā) and so forth.

sanskrit: स्वोच्चे स्व्भे स्थितः सूर्यो लाभे केन्द्रे त्रिकोणके । स्वदशायां स्वभुक्तौ च धनधान्यादिलाभकृत् ॥१॥
transliteration: svocce svbhe sthitaḥ sūryo lābhe kendre trikoṇake . svadaśāyāṃ svabhuktau ca dhanadhānyādilābhakṛt.
separated_sandhi: svocce svabhe sthitaḥ sūryaḥ lābhe kendre trikoṇake| svadaśāyām svabhuktau ca dhanadhānyādilābhakṛt
english: When the Sun is situated in its own exaltation sign, its own sign, in the house of gain (11th), a quadrant (kendra) house, or a trine (trikoṇa) house, then in its own planetary period (daśā) and sub-period (bhukti), it bestows gains of wealth, grains, and other benefits.

sanskrit: नीचाद्यशुभराशिस्थो विपरीतं फलं दिशेत् । द्वितीयद्यूननाथेऽर्के त्वपमृत्युभयं वदेत् ॥२॥
transliteration: nīcādyaśubharāśistho viparītaṃ phalaṃ diśet . dvitīyadyūnanāthe'rke tvapamṛtyubhayaṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: nīca-ādi-aśubha-rāśi-sthaḥ viparītam phalam diśetdvitīya-dyūna-nāthe arke tu apamṛtyu-bhayam vadet
english: If a planet is situated in its debilitated sign or an inauspicious sign, it will yield unfavorable results. Moreover, if the Sun is the lord of both the second and seventh houses, one should predict the fear of untimely death.

sanskrit: तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं मृत्युञ्जयजपं चरेत् । सूर्यप्रीतिकरीं शान्तिं कुर्यादारोग्यलब्धये ॥३॥
transliteration: taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ mṛtyuñjayajapaṃ caret . sūryaprītikarīṃ śāntiṃ kuryādārogyalabdhaye.
separated_sandhi: tat-doṣa-parihāra-artham mṛtyuñjaya-japam caretsūrya-prīti-karīm śāntim kuryāt ārogya-labdhaye
english: For the purpose of averting that fault, one should perform the Mṛtyuñjaya recitation (japa). One should also perform a pacification ritual (śānti) that pleases the Sun, in order to attain good health.

sanskrit: सूर्यस्याऽन्तर्गते चन्द्रे लग्नात्केन्द्रत्रिकोणगे । विवाहं शुभकार्यं च धनधान्यसमृद्धिकृत् ॥४॥
transliteration: sūryasyā'ntargate candre lagnātkendratrikoṇage . vivāhaṃ śubhakāryaṃ ca dhanadhānyasamṛddhikṛt.
separated_sandhi: sūryasya antargate candre lagnāt kendra-trikoṇa-gevivāham śubha-kāryam ca dhana-dhānya-samṛddhi-kṛt
english: When the Moon, being within the Sun's orb, is situated in an angular or trine house from the ascendant, it brings about marriage, auspicious activities, and prosperity of wealth and grain.

sanskrit: गृहक्षेत्राभिवृद्धिं च पशुवाहनसम्पदाम् । तुङ्गे वा स्वर्क्षगे वाऽपि दारसौख्यं धनागमम् ॥५॥
transliteration: gṛhakṣetrābhivṛddhiṃ ca paśuvāhanasampadām . tuṅge vā svarkṣage vā'pi dārasaukhyaṃ dhanāgamam.
separated_sandhi: gṛha-kṣetra-abhivṛddhim ca paśu-vāhana-sampadām tuṅgevā sva-ṛkṣa-ge vā api dāra-saukhyam dhana-āgamam
english: It also brings growth of houses and fields, and prosperity of cattle and conveyances. Or, when the Moon is in exaltation or situated in its own sign, it brings happiness from one's spouse and acquisition of wealth.

sanskrit: पुत्रलाभसुखं चैव सौख्यं राजसमागमम् । महाराजप्रसादेन इष्टसिद्धिसुखवाहम् ॥६॥
transliteration: putralābhasukhaṃ caiva saukhyaṃ rājasamāgamam . mahārājaprasādena iṣṭasiddhisukhavāham.
separated_sandhi: putra-lābha-sukham ca eva saukhyam rāja-samāgamammahārāja-prasādena iṣṭa-siddhi-sukha-vāham
english: It (the Moon in good position) also brings happiness from gaining children, general comfort, and association with rulers. Furthermore, by the grace of great rulers, it is a conveyer of happiness stemming from the fulfillment of desires.

sanskrit: क्षीणे वा पापसंयुक्ते दारपुत्रादिपोडनम् । वैषम्यं जनसंवादं भृत्यवर्गविनाशनम् ॥७॥
transliteration: kṣīṇe vā pāpasaṃyukte dāraputrādipoḍanam . vaiṣamyaṃ janasaṃvādaṃ bhṛtyavargavināśanam.
separated_sandhi: kṣīṇe vā pāpasaṃyukte dāraputrādipīḍanam |vaiṣamyaṃ janasaṃvādaṃ bhṛtyavargavināśanam
english: If the (Moon) is debilitated or associated with malefic planets, there will be distress concerning one's wife and children, adversity, public disputes, and the destruction of one's servants.

sanskrit: विरोधं राजकलहं धनधान्यपशुक्षयम् । षष्ठाष्टमव्यये चन्द्रे जलभीतिं मनोरुजम् ॥८॥
transliteration: virodhaṃ rājakalahaṃ dhanadhānyapaśukṣayam . ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyaye candre jalabhītiṃ manorujam.
separated_sandhi: virodhaṃ rājakalahaṃ dhanadhānyapaśukṣayam |ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyaye candre jalabhītiṃ manorujam
english: (There will be) opposition, conflicts with the government, and the loss of wealth, grain, and cattle. When the Moon is in the sixth, eighth, or twelfth house, there is fear of water and mental illness.

sanskrit: बन्धनं रोगपीडां च स्थानविच्युतिकारकम् । दुःस्थानं चापि चित्तेन दायादजनविग्रहम् ॥९॥
transliteration: bandhanaṃ rogapīḍāṃ ca sthānavicyutikārakam . duḥsthānaṃ cāpi cittena dāyādajanavigraham.
separated_sandhi: bandhanaṃ rogapīḍāṃ ca sthānavicyutikārakam |duḥsthānaṃ ca api cittena dāyādajanavigraham
english: (There will be) imprisonment, affliction by disease, and causing displacement from one's position. Also, an inauspicious placement (of the Moon) can lead to mental distress and disputes with kinsmen.

sanskrit: निर्दिशेत् कुत्सितान्नं च चौरादिनृपपीडनम् । मूत्रकृच्छादिरोगश्च देहपीडा तथा भवेत् ॥१०॥
transliteration: nirdiśet kutsitānnaṃ ca caurādinṛpapīḍanam . mūtrakṛcchādirogaśca dehapīḍā tathā bhavet.
separated_sandhi: nirdiśet kutsitānnam ca caurādinṛpapīḍanam |mūtrakṛcchādirogaḥ ca dehapīḍā tathā bhavet
english: One should predict contemptible food, and harassment from thieves, rulers, and the like. Similarly, diseases like dysuria and other urinary disorders, along with physical pain, will occur.

sanskrit: दायेशाल्लभभाग्ये च केन्द्रे वा शुभसंयुते । भोगभाग्यादिसन्तोषदारपुत्रादिवर्द्धनम् ॥११॥
transliteration: dāyeśāllabhabhāgye ca kendre vā śubhasaṃyute . bhogabhāgyādisantoṣadāraputrādivarddhanam.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt lābhabhāgye ca kendre vā śubhasaṃyute| bhogabhāgyādisantoṣa dāraputrādivardhanam
english: When the lord of the (planetary) period (dāyeśa) is in a house of gain (lābha) or fortune (bhāgya), or in an angular house (kendra), or associated with benefic planets, there will be satisfaction from enjoyments, good fortune, and the like, along with the increase of wife and children.

sanskrit: राज्यप्राप्तिं महत्सौख्यं स्थानप्राप्तिं च शाश्वर्ताम् । विविआहं यज्ञदीक्षां च सुमाल्यामबरभूषणम् ॥१२॥
transliteration: rājyaprāptiṃ mahatsaukhyaṃ sthānaprāptiṃ ca śāśvartām . viviāhaṃ yajñadīkṣāṃ ca sumālyāmabarabhūṣaṇam.
separated_sandhi: rājya-prāptim mahat-saukhyam sthāna-prāptim ca śāśvartām| viviāham yajña-dīkṣām ca su-mālyām ambara-bhūṣaṇam
english: (One attains) the acquisition of a kingdom, great happiness, and the permanent attainment of a high position. Also, marriage, initiation into a Vedic ritual (yajña), fine garlands, and ornaments for clothing.

sanskrit: वाहनं पुत्रपौत्रादि लभते सुखवर्द्धनम् । दायेशाद्रिपुरन्ध्रस्थे व्यये वा बलवर्जिते ॥१३॥
transliteration: vāhanaṃ putrapautrādi labhate sukhavarddhanam . dāyeśādripurandhrasthe vyaye vā balavarjite.
separated_sandhi: vāhanam putrapautrādi labhate sukhavarddhanamdāyeśādripurandhrasthe vyaye vā balavarjite
english: One obtains vehicles, sons, grandsons, and other things that increase happiness. However, when the lord of the 6th house is situated in the 7th, 8th, or 12th house, and is devoid of strength...

sanskrit: अकाले भोजनं चैव देशाद्देशं गमिष्यति । द्वितीयद्यूननाथे च ह्यपमृत्युर्भविष्यति । श्वेतां गां महिषीं गद्याच्छान्ति कुर्यात्सुखाप्तये ॥१४॥
transliteration: akāle bhojanaṃ caiva deśāddeśaṃ gamiṣyati . dvitīyadyūnanāthe ca hyapamṛtyurbhaviṣyati . śvetāṃ gāṃ mahiṣīṃ gadyācchānti kuryātsukhāptaye.
separated_sandhi: akāle bhojanam ca eva deśāt deśamgamiṣyati dvitīyadyūnanāthe ca hiapamṛtyuḥ bhaviṣyati śvetām gāmmahiṣīm dadyāt śāntim kuryāt sukhāptaye
english: One will eat at improper times and travel from one country to another. Furthermore, when the lord of the 2nd and 7th houses (is in an adverse state), there will be untimely death (apamṛtyu). One should offer a white cow and a buffalo, and perform remedial measures (śānti) for the attainment of happiness.

sanskrit: सूर्यस्यान्तर्गते भौमे स्वोच्चे स्वक्षेत्रलाभगे । लग्नात्केन्द्रत्रिकोणे वा शुभकार्यं समादिशेत् ॥१५॥
transliteration: sūryasyāntargate bhaume svocce svakṣetralābhage . lagnātkendratrikoṇe vā śubhakāryaṃ samādiśet.
separated_sandhi: sūryasya antargate bhaume svocce svakṣetralābhagelagnāt kendratrikoṇe vā śubhakāryam samādiśet
english: When Mars (bhauma) is in the sub-period (antar-daśā) of the Sun, and it is situated in its own sign of exaltation, or in its own sign, or in the house of gains (11th house), or in an angular (kendra) or trine (trikoṇa) house from the Ascendant, one should predict auspicious undertakings.

sanskrit: भूलाभं कृषिलाभं च धनधान्यविवर्धनम् । गृहक्षेत्रादि लाभं च रक्तवस्त्रादिलाभकृत् ॥१६॥
transliteration: bhūlābhaṃ kṛṣilābhaṃ ca dhanadhānyavivardhanam . gṛhakṣetrādi lābhaṃ ca raktavastrādilābhakṛt.
separated_sandhi: bhūlābham kṛṣilābham ca dhanadhānyavivardhanamgṛhakṣetrādi lābham ca raktavastrādilābhakṛt
english: There will be gains of land, gains from agriculture, and an increase in wealth and grains. Also, gains of houses, fields, etc., and the acquisition of red garments and other similar items.

sanskrit: लग्नाधिपेन संयुक्ते सौख्यं राजप्रियं वदेत् । भाग्यलाभाधिपैर्युक्ते लाभश्चैव भविष्यति ॥१७॥
transliteration: lagnādhipena saṃyukte saukhyaṃ rājapriyaṃ vadet . bhāgyalābhādhipairyukte lābhaścaiva bhaviṣyati.
separated_sandhi: lagnādhipena saṃyukte saukhyam rājapriyam vadetbhāgyalābhādhipaiḥ yukte lābhaḥ ca eva bhaviṣyati
english: If there is a conjunction with the lord of the ascendant, one should declare happiness and royal favor. If there is a conjunction with the lords of the houses of fortune (9th) and gains (11th), there will certainly be gains.

sanskrit: बहुसेनाधिपत्यं च शत्रुनाशं मनोदृढम् । आत्मबन्धुसुखम् चैव भ्रातृवर्द्धनकं तथा ॥१८॥
transliteration: bahusenādhipatyaṃ ca śatrunāśaṃ manodṛḍham . ātmabandhusukham caiva bhrātṛvarddhanakaṃ tathā.
separated_sandhi: bahusenādhipatyam ca śatrunāśam manodṛḍhamātmabandhusukham ca eva bhrātṛvarddhanakam tathā
english: And also, chieftainship over many armies, destruction of enemies, and firmness of mind. Moreover, happiness for oneself and relatives, and the increase of siblings.

sanskrit: दायेशाद्व्ययरन्ध्रस्थे पापैर्युक्ते च वीक्षिते । आधिपत्यबलैर्हीने क्रूरबुद्धिं मनोरुजम् ॥१९॥
transliteration: dāyeśādvyayarandhrasthe pāpairyukte ca vīkṣite . ādhipatyabalairhīne krūrabuddhiṃ manorujam.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt vyayarandhrasthe pāpaiḥ yukte ca vīkṣiteādhipatyabalaiḥ hīne krūrabuddhim manorujam
english: If the lord of the 10th house (dāyeśa) is situated in the 12th (expenditure) or 8th (obstacles) house, conjoined with or aspected by malefic planets, and devoid of strength from its rulership, then it indicates a cruel intellect and mental distress.

sanskrit: कारागृहे प्रवेशं च कथयेद् बन्धुनाशनम् । भ्राऋवगविरोधं च कर्मनाशमथापि वा ॥२०॥
transliteration: kārāgṛhe praveśaṃ ca kathayed bandhunāśanam . bhrāṛvagavirodhaṃ ca karmanāśamathāpi vā.
separated_sandhi: kārāgṛhe praveśam ca kathayet bandhunāśanambhrātṛvargavirodham ca karmanāśam atha api vā
english: One should also declare imprisonment, destruction of relatives, conflict with siblings, or even loss of one's profession (karma).

sanskrit: नीचे वा दुर्बले भौमे राजमूलाद्धनक्षयः । द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु देहे जाड्यं मनोरुजम् ॥२१॥
transliteration: nīce vā durbale bhaume rājamūlāddhanakṣayaḥ . dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu dehe jāḍyaṃ manorujam.
separated_sandhi: nīce vā durbale bhaume rājamūlāt dhanakṣayaḥdvitīyadyūnanāthe tu dehe jāḍyam manorujam
english: If Mars (bhauma) is debilitated or weak, there will be a loss of wealth originating from the king or government. However, if the lord of the 2nd (wealth) and 7th (spouse/partnership) houses is (unfavorably placed), then physical dullness and mental distress will manifest.

sanskrit: सुब्रह्मजपदानं च वृषोत्सर्गं तथैव च । शान्तिं कुर्वीत विद्यिवदायुरारोग्यसिद्धिदाम् ॥२२॥
transliteration: subrahmajapadānaṃ ca vṛṣotsargaṃ tathaiva ca . śāntiṃ kurvīta vidyivadāyurārogyasiddhidām.
separated_sandhi: subrahmajapadānam ca vṛṣotsargam tathā eva caśāntim kurvīta vidhivat āyurārogyasiddhidām
english: One should perform a propitiation ritual (śānti) according to the prescribed method, which grants the attainment of longevity and good health. This ritual involves the proper recitation of sacred texts (brahman), offering donations, and also the release of a bull.

sanskrit: सूर्यस्यान्तर्गते राहौ लग्नात्केन्द्रत्रिकोणगे । आदौ द्विमासपर्यन्तं धननाशो महद्भयम् ॥२३॥
transliteration: sūryasyāntargate rāhau lagnātkendratrikoṇage . ādau dvimāsaparyantaṃ dhananāśo mahadbhayam.
separated_sandhi: sūryasya antargate rāhau lagnāt kendratrikoṇageādau dvimāsaparyantam dhananāśaḥ mahat bhayam
english: When Rahu is conjoined with the Sun (literally, "within the Sun") and is positioned in an angular (kendra) or trinal (trikoṇa) house from the ascendant (lagna), there will be loss of wealth and great fear for an initial period of two months.

sanskrit: चौरादिव्रणभीतिश्च दारपुत्रादिपीडनम् । तत्परं सुखमाप्नोति शुभयुक्ते शुभांशके ॥२४॥
transliteration: caurādivraṇabhītiśca dāraputrādipīḍanam . tatparaṃ sukhamāpnoti śubhayukte śubhāṃśake.
separated_sandhi: caurādivraṇabhītiḥ ca dāraputrādipīḍanamtatparam sukham āpnoti śubhayukte śubha-aṃśake
english: There will also be fear of wounds from thieves and the harassment of one's wife, children, and so on. Afterwards, if [Rahu is] conjoined with auspicious planets and is in an auspicious divisional chart (śubhāṃśaka), one will attain happiness.

sanskrit: देहारोग्यं मनस्तुष्टि राजप्रीतिकरं सुखम् । लग्नादुपचये राहौ योगकारकसंयुते ॥२५॥
transliteration: dehārogyaṃ manastuṣṭi rājaprītikaraṃ sukham . lagnādupacaye rāhau yogakārakasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: dehārogyam manastuṣṭiḥ rājaprītikaram sukhamlagnāt upacaye rāhau yogakārakasaṃyute
english: One experiences bodily health, mental contentment, and happiness that brings royal favor, when Rahu is situated in an upacaya (growth-producing) house from the ascendant (lagna) and is conjoined with a yogakāraka (a planet indicating auspicious results).

sanskrit: दायेशाच्छुभराशिस्थे राजसन्मानमादिशेत् । भाग्यवृद्धिं यशोलाभं दारपुत्रादिपीडनम् ॥२६॥
transliteration: dāyeśācchubharāśisthe rājasanmānamādiśet . bhāgyavṛddhiṃ yaśolābhaṃ dāraputrādipīḍanam.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt śubharāśisthe rājasanmānam ādiśetbhāgyavṛddhim yaśaslābham dāraputrādipīḍanam
english: When [Rahu is] situated in an auspicious sign from the lord of the daśā (planetary period), one should predict royal honor and an increase in fortune (bhāgya), along with gain of fame. However, there will also be harassment of one's wife, children, and so on.

sanskrit: पुत्रोत्सवादिसन्तोषं गृहे कल्याणशोभनं । दायेशादथ रिष्फस्थे रन्ध्रे वा बलवर्जिते ॥२७॥
transliteration: putrotsavādisantoṣaṃ gṛhe kalyāṇaśobhanaṃ . dāyeśādatha riṣphasthe randhre vā balavarjite.
separated_sandhi: putrotsavādisantoṣam gṛhe kalyāṇaśobhanamdāyeśāt atha riṣphasthe randhre vā balavarjite
english: There is a lack of joy due to the birth of a son, etc., and a reduction in auspicious splendor in the home when the lord of the daśā is in the 12th house (riṣpha), or the 8th house (randhra), or is devoid of strength.

sanskrit: बन्धनं स्थाननाशश्च कारागृहनिवेशनम् । चौरादिव्रणभीतिश्च दारपुत्रादिवर्द्धनम् ॥२८॥
transliteration: bandhanaṃ sthānanāśaśca kārāgṛhaniveśanam . caurādivraṇabhītiśca dāraputrādivarddhanam.
separated_sandhi: bandhanam sthānanāśaḥ ca kārāgṛhaniveśanamcaurādivraṇabhītiḥ ca dāraputrādivarddhanam
english: Imprisonment, loss of position, entry into prison, fear of wounds from thieves etc., and an increase related to wife and children (which may signify increased burdens or difficulties) occur.

sanskrit: चतुष्पाज्जीवनाशश्च गृहक्षेत्रादिनाशनं । गुल्मक्षयादिरोगश्च ह्यतिसारादिपीडनं ॥२९॥
transliteration: catuṣpājjīvanāśaśca gṛhakṣetrādināśanaṃ . gulmakṣayādirogaśca hyatisārādipīḍanaṃ.
separated_sandhi: catuṣpajjīvanāśaḥ ca gṛhakṣetrādināśanamgulmakṣayādirogaḥ ca hi atisārādipīḍanam
english: There is also loss of quadrupeds/livestock, destruction of house and fields, diseases like tumors (gulma) and consumption (kṣaya), and affliction by diarrhea (atisāra) and similar ailments.

sanskrit: द्विस्फस्थे तथा राहौ तत्स्थानाधिपसंयुते । अपमृत्युभयं चैव सर्पभीतिश्च सम्भवेत् ॥३०॥
transliteration: dvisphasthe tathā rāhau tatsthānādhipasaṃyute . apamṛtyubhayaṃ caiva sarpabhītiśca sambhavet.
separated_sandhi: dvisphasthe tathā rāhau tatsthānādhipasaṃyuteapamṛtyubhayam ca eva sarpabhītiḥ ca sambhavet
english: When Rāhu is in the second house (dvispha) and conjoined with the lord of that house, then fear of unnatural death and fear of snakes may certainly occur.

sanskrit: दुर्गाजपं च कुर्वीत् छागदानं समाचरेत् । कृष्णां गां महिषीं दद्यच्छान्तिमाप्नोत्यसंशयम् ॥३१॥
transliteration: durgājapaṃ ca kurvīt chāgadānaṃ samācaret . kṛṣṇāṃ gāṃ mahiṣīṃ dadyacchāntimāpnotyasaṃśayam.
separated_sandhi: durgājapam ca kurvīt chāgadānam samācaret kṛṣṇāmgām mahiṣīm dadyāt śāntim āpnoti asaṃśayam
english: One should perform the chanting (japa) of Durgā and offer a goat (dāna). One should also give a black cow and a buffalo, and undoubtedly, one will obtain peace (śānti).

sanskrit: सूर्यस्यान्तर्गते जीवे लग्नात्केन्द्रत्रिकोणगे । स्वोच्चे मित्रस्य वर्गस्थे विवाहं राजदर्शनम् ॥३२॥
transliteration: sūryasyāntargate jīve lagnātkendratrikoṇage . svocce mitrasya vargasthe vivāhaṃ rājadarśanam.
separated_sandhi: sūryasya antargate jīve lagnāt kendra-trikoṇagesvocce mitrasya vargas-sthe vivāham rāja-darśanam
english: When Jupiter (jīva) is within the Sun's influence, and is situated in an angular (kendra) or trinal (trikoṇa) house from the ascendant, in its own exaltation sign, and in a divisional chart (varga) of a friendly planet, then marriage and an audience with a ruler are indicated.

sanskrit: धनधान्यादिलाभ च पुत्रलाभं महत्सुखं । महाराजप्रसादेन इष्टकार्यार्थलाभकृत् ॥३३॥
transliteration: dhanadhānyādilābha ca putralābhaṃ mahatsukhaṃ . mahārājaprasādena iṣṭakāryārthalābhakṛt.
separated_sandhi: dhana-dhānya-ādi-lābha ca putra-lābham mahat sukhammahārāja-prasādena iṣṭa-kārya-artha-lābha-kṛt
english: One gains wealth, grain, and other resources, as well as a son and great happiness. By the grace of a great ruler, one achieves the fulfillment of desired objectives.

sanskrit: ब्राह्मण्प्रियसन्मानं प्रियवस्त्रादिलाभकृत् । भाग्यकर्माधिपवशाद्राज्यलाभं वदेद् द्विज ॥३४॥
transliteration: brāhmaṇpriyasanmānaṃ priyavastrādilābhakṛt . bhāgyakarmādhipavaśādrājyalābhaṃ vaded dvija.
separated_sandhi: brāhmaṇ-priya-sanmānam priya-vastra-ādi-lābha-kṛtbhāgya-karma-adhipa-vaśāt rājya-lābham vadet dvija
english: One receives honor and affection from Brahmins, and gains desired clothes and other items. O Brahmin (dvija), you should declare that a person will achieve a high position or a kingdom through the influence of the lords of fortune and action (karma).

sanskrit: नरवाहनयोगश्च स्थानाधिक्यं महत्सुखम् । दायेशाच्छुभराशिस्थे भाग्यवृद्धिः सुखावहा ॥३५॥
transliteration: naravāhanayogaśca sthānādhikyaṃ mahatsukham . dāyeśācchubharāśisthe bhāgyavṛddhiḥ sukhāvahā.
separated_sandhi: nara-vāhana-yogaḥ ca sthāna-ādhikyam mahat sukhamdāyeśāt śubha-rāśi-sthe bhāgya-vṛddhiḥ sukha-āvahā
english: One obtains the Naravāhana yoga (an astrological combination indicating being carried by humans, signifying high status), an increase in status, and great happiness. When the lord of the planetary period (daśā) is situated in an auspicious sign, there is an increase in fortune and it brings happiness.

sanskrit: दीनधर्मक्रियायुक्तो देवताराधनप्रियः । गुरुभक्तिर्मनःसिद्धिः पुण्युकर्मादिसंग्रहः ॥३६॥
transliteration: dīnadharmakriyāyukto devatārādhanapriyaḥ . gurubhaktirmanaḥsiddhiḥ puṇyukarmādisaṃgrahaḥ.
separated_sandhi: dīna-dharma-kriyā-yuktaḥ devatā-ārādhana-priyaḥguru-bhaktiḥ manaḥ-siddhiḥ puṇya-karma-ādi-saṅgrahaḥ
english: The person will be engaged in acts of compassion and righteous (dharma) conduct, and will be fond of worshipping deities. They will have devotion (bhakti) to their guru, mental accomplishments, and accumulate meritorious deeds (karma) and other virtues.

sanskrit: राशेशाद्रिपुरन्ध्रस्थे नीचे वा पापसंयुते । दारपुत्रादिपीडा च देहपीडा महद्भयम् ॥३७॥
transliteration: rāśeśādripurandhrasthe nīce vā pāpasaṃyute . dāraputrādipīḍā ca dehapīḍā mahadbhayam.
separated_sandhi: rāśeśādripurandhrasthe nīce vā pāpasaṃyutedāraputrādipīḍā ca dehapīḍā mahat bhayam
english: When the lord of a sign is located in the seventh or eighth house, or is debilitated, or conjoined with a malefic planet, there will be troubles concerning one's spouse and children, physical suffering, and great fear.

sanskrit: राजकोपं प्रकुरुतेऽभीष्टवस्तुविनाश्नम् । पापमूलद्द्रव्यनाशं देहभ्रष्टं मनोरुजम् ॥३८॥
transliteration: rājakopaṃ prakurute'bhīṣṭavastuvināśnam . pāpamūladdravyanāśaṃ dehabhraṣṭaṃ manorujam.
separated_sandhi: rājakopam prakurute abhīṣṭavastuvināśnampāpamūlāt dravyanāśam dehabhraṣṭam manorujam
english: It causes the wrath of authorities, the destruction of desired possessions, the loss of wealth acquired through sinful means, physical deterioration, and mental illness.

sanskrit: स्वर्णदानं प्रकुर्वीत स्वेष्टजाप्यं च कारयेत् । गवां कपिलवर्णानां दानेनारोग्यमादिशेत् ॥३९॥
transliteration: svarṇadānaṃ prakurvīta sveṣṭajāpyaṃ ca kārayet . gavāṃ kapilavarṇānāṃ dānenārogyamādiśet.
separated_sandhi: svarṇadānam prakurvīta sveṣṭajāpyam ca kārayetgavām kapilavarṇānām dānena ārogyam ādiśet
english: One should perform the giving (dāna) of gold and have one's chosen recitation (jāpya) performed. By giving (dāna) tawny-colored cows, one can achieve good health.

sanskrit: सूर्यस्यान्तर्गते मन्दे लग्नात्केन्द्रत्रिकोणगे । शत्रुनाशो महत्सौख्यं स्वल्पधान्यार्थलाभकृत् ॥४०॥
transliteration: sūryasyāntargate mande lagnātkendratrikoṇage . śatrunāśo mahatsaukhyaṃ svalpadhānyārthalābhakṛt.
separated_sandhi: sūryasya antargate mande lagnāt kendratrikoṇageśatrunāśaḥ mahat saukhyam svalpadhānyārthalābhakṛt
english: When Saturn (Manda) is combust by the Sun, and simultaneously positioned in a Kendra (angular) or Trikona (trine) house from the Ascendant (Lagna), there will be destruction of enemies, great happiness, and a moderate gain of grains and wealth.

sanskrit: विवाहादिसुकार्यञ्च गृहे तस्य शुभावहम् । स्वोच्चे स्वक्षेत्रगे मन्दे सुहृद्ग्रहसमन्विते ॥४१॥
transliteration: vivāhādisukāryañca gṛhe tasya śubhāvaham . svocce svakṣetrage mande suhṛdgrahasamanvite.
separated_sandhi: vivāhādisukāryam ca gṛhe tasya śubhāvahamsvocce svakṣetrage mande suhṛdgrahasamanvite
english: Auspicious ceremonies such as marriages are also beneficial for his home when Saturn (Manda) is in its own sign of exaltation or in its own sign, and conjoined with friendly planets.

sanskrit: गृहे कल्याणसम्पत्तिर्विवाहादिषु सत्क्रिया । राजसन्मानकीर्तिश्च नानावस्त्रधनागमम् ॥४२॥
transliteration: gṛhe kalyāṇasampattirvivāhādiṣu satkriyā . rājasanmānakīrtiśca nānāvastradhanāgamam.
separated_sandhi: gṛhe kalyāṇasampattiḥ vivāhādiṣu satkriyārājasanmānakīrtiḥ ca nānāvastradhanāgamam
english: There will be auspicious prosperity (kalyāṇasampatti) in the home, good deeds and ceremonies like marriages, honor and fame from the government, and the acquisition of various clothes and wealth.

sanskrit: दायेशादथ रन्ध्रस्थे व्यये वा पापसंयुते । वातशूलमहाव्याधिज्वरातीसारपीडनम् ॥४३॥
transliteration: dāyeśādatha randhrasthe vyaye vā pāpasaṃyute . vātaśūlamahāvyādhijvarātīsārapīḍanam.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt atha randhrasthe vyaye vā pāpasaṃyutevātaśūlamahāvyādhijvarātīsārapīḍanam
english: When the lord of the planetary period (dāyeśa) is in the eighth house (randhra) or the twelfth house (vyaya), or is associated with malefic planets (pāpa), there will be affliction by rheumatic pain, severe illnesses, fever, and dysentery.

sanskrit: बन्धनं कार्यहानिश्च वित्तनाशो महद्भयम् । अकश्मात्कलहश्चैव दायादजनविग्रहः ॥४४॥
transliteration: bandhanaṃ kāryahāniśca vittanāśo mahadbhayam . akaśmātkalahaścaiva dāyādajanavigrahaḥ.
separated_sandhi: bandhanam kāryahāniḥ ca vittanāśaḥ mahatbhayamakasmāt kalahaḥ ca eva dāyādajanavigrahaḥ
english: There will be imprisonment, loss of undertakings, destruction of wealth, great fear, sudden disputes, and quarrels with relatives.

sanskrit: भुक्त्यादौ मित्रहानिःस्यान्मध्ये किञ्चित्सुखावहम् । अन्ते क्लेशकरं चैव नीचे तेषां तथैव च ॥४५॥
transliteration: bhuktyādau mitrahāniḥsyānmadhye kiñcitsukhāvaham . ante kleśakaraṃ caiva nīce teṣāṃ tathaiva ca.
separated_sandhi: bhuktyādau mitrahāniḥ syāt madhye kiñcit sukhāvahamante kleśakaram ca eva nīce teṣām tathā eva ca
english: At the beginning of the sub-period (bhukti) there will be loss of friends, a little happiness in the middle, and at the end it will cause distress. Similarly, these effects occur when the planets (causing the bhukti) are debilitated.

sanskrit: पितृमातृवियोगश्च गमनागममं तथा । द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु अपमृत्युभयं भवेत् ॥४६॥
transliteration: pitṛmātṛviyogaśca gamanāgamamaṃ tathā . dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu apamṛtyubhayaṃ bhavet.
separated_sandhi: pitṛmātṛviyogaḥ ca gamanāgamanam tathādvitīyadyūnanāthe tu apamṛtyubhayam bhavet
english: There will be separation from father and mother, as well as journeys. But if the lord of the second and seventh houses (dvitīyadyūnanātha) is involved, there will be fear of untimely death.

sanskrit: कृष्णां गां महिषीं दद्यान्मृत्युञ्जयजपं चरेत् । छागदानं प्रकुर्वीत सर्वसम्पत्प्रदायकम् ॥४७॥
transliteration: kṛṣṇāṃ gāṃ mahiṣīṃ dadyānmṛtyuñjayajapaṃ caret . chāgadānaṃ prakurvīta sarvasampatpradāyakam.
separated_sandhi: kṛṣṇām gām mahiṣīm dadyāt mṛtyuñjayajapam caretchāgadānam prakurvīta sarvasampatpradāyakam
english: One should offer a black cow and a buffalo, and perform the recitation (japa) of the Mṛtyuñjaya mantra. One should also offer a goat, as this bestows all kinds of prosperity.

sanskrit: सूर्यास्यान्तर्गते सौम्ये स्वोच्चे वा स्वर्क्षगेऽपि वा । केन्द्रत्रिकोणलाभस्थे बुधे वर्गबलैर्युते ॥४८॥
transliteration: sūryāsyāntargate saumye svocce vā svarkṣage'pi vā . kendratrikoṇalābhasthe budhe vargabalairyute.
separated_sandhi: sūryāsyāntargate saumye sva-ucce vā sva-ṛkṣage apivā kendratrikoṇalābhaste budhe vargabalaiḥ yute
english: When Mercury (budha) is within the sun's sign, or in its own sign of exaltation, or in its own sign, and is situated in a quadrant, a trine, or a house of gain, and is endowed with divisional strengths (vargabalas)...

sanskrit: राज्यलाभो महोत्साहो दारपुत्रादिसौख्यकृत् । महारजप्रसादेन वाहनाम्बरभूषणं ॥४९॥
transliteration: rājyalābho mahotsāho dāraputrādisaukhyakṛt . mahārajaprasādena vāhanāmbarabhūṣaṇaṃ.
separated_sandhi: rājyalābhaḥ mahotsāhaḥ dāraputrādisaukhyakṛtmahārājaprasādena vāhanāmbarabhūṣaṇam
english: (Under these conditions) there will be acquisition of kingdom or high status, great enthusiasm, and happiness derived from one's wife, children, and so forth. Through the grace (prasādena) of a great king, one will obtain vehicles, garments, and ornaments.

sanskrit: पुण्यतीर्थफलावाप्तिर्गृहे गोधनसंकुलम् । भाग्यलाभाधिपैर्युक्ते लाभवृद्धिकोरो भवेत् ॥५०॥
transliteration: puṇyatīrthaphalāvāptirgṛhe godhanasaṃkulam . bhāgyalābhādhipairyukte lābhavṛddhikoro bhavet.
separated_sandhi: puṇyatīrthaphalāvāptiḥ gṛhe godhanasaṃkulambhāgyalābhādhipaiḥ yukte lābhavṛddhikaraḥ bhavet
english: There will be the attainment of merits (phala) from visiting sacred places (tīrthas), and one's home will be filled with cattle. When (Mercury or the relevant planet) is conjoined with the lords of the houses of fortune (bhāgya) and gain (lābha), there will be an increase in profits.

sanskrit: भाग्यपंचमकर्मस्थे सन्मानो भवति ध्रुवम् । सुकर्मधर्मबुद्धिश्च गुरुदेवद्विजार्जनम् ॥५१॥
transliteration: bhāgyapaṃcamakarmasthe sanmāno bhavati dhruvam . sukarmadharmabuddhiśca gurudevadvijārjanam.
separated_sandhi: bhāgyapañcamakarmasthe sanmānaḥ bhavati dhruvamsukarmadharmabuddhiḥ ca gurudevadvijārjanam
english: When (the planet) is situated in the house of fortune (bhāgya - 9th), intellect/children (5th), or action (karma - 10th), then honor will certainly be attained. There will also be an intellect (buddhi) inclined towards good deeds and natural law (dharma), and one will gain from spiritual teachers (gurus), deities, and Brahmins (dvijas).

sanskrit: धनधान्यादिसंयुक्तो विवाहः पुत्रसम्भवः । दायेशाच्छुभराशिस्थे सौम्ययुक्ते महत्सुखम् ॥५२॥
transliteration: dhanadhānyādisaṃyukto vivāhaḥ putrasambhavaḥ . dāyeśācchubharāśisthe saumyayukte mahatsukham.
separated_sandhi: dhana-dhānya-ādi-saṃyuktaḥ vivāhaḥ putra-sambhavaḥdāyeśāt śubha-rāśi-sthe saumya-yukte mahat-sukham
english: When the lord of the planetary period (dāyeśa) is situated in an auspicious sign and associated with benefics, there is great happiness, along with an abundance of wealth and grains, marriage, and the birth of sons.

sanskrit: वैवाहिकं यज्ञकर्म दानधर्मजपादिकम् । स्वनामाङ्कितपद्यानि नामद्वयमथाऽपि वा ॥५३॥
transliteration: vaivāhikaṃ yajñakarma dānadharmajapādikam . svanāmāṅkitapadyāni nāmadvayamathā'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: vaivāhikam yajña-karma dāna-dharma-japa-ādikamsva-nāma-aṅkita-padyāni nāma-dvayam atha api vā
english: There will be marital activities, ritual sacrifices (yajñakarma), acts of charity (dāna), religious duties (dharma), chanting, and similar observances. One may also compose poems marked with their own name, or even two names.

sanskrit: भोजनाम्बरभूषाप्तिरमरेशो भवेन्नरः । दायेशाद्रिपुरन्ध्रस्थे रिष्फगे नीचगेऽपि वा ॥५४॥
transliteration: bhojanāmbarabhūṣāptiramareśo bhavennaraḥ . dāyeśādripurandhrasthe riṣphage nīcage'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: bhojana-ambara-bhūṣā-āptiḥ amareśaḥ bhavet naraḥdāyeśāt ripu-randhra-sthe ṛṣpha-ge nīca-ge api vā
english: There will be the attainment of food, clothing, and ornaments, and the person will become a king or a lord of men. Conversely, when the lord of the planetary period (dāyeśa) is situated in the 6th house (ripu), 8th house (randhra), or 12th house (ṛṣpha), or even in a debilitated sign...

sanskrit: देहपीडा मनस्तापो दारपुत्रादिपीडनम् । भुक्त्यादौ दुःखमाप्नोति मध्ये किञ्चित्सुखावहम् ॥५५॥
transliteration: dehapīḍā manastāpo dāraputrādipīḍanam . bhuktyādau duḥkhamāpnoti madhye kiñcitsukhāvaham.
separated_sandhi: deha-pīḍā manas-tāpaḥ dāra-putra-ādi-pīḍanambhukti-ādau duḥkham āpnoti madhye kiñcit-sukha-āvaham
english: There will be physical pain, mental distress, and suffering related to one's wife, sons, and so on. In the beginning of the sub-period (bhukti), one experiences misery, while in the middle, it brings a little happiness.

sanskrit: अन्ते तु राजभीतिश्च गमनागमनं तथा । द्वितीये द्यूननाथे तु देहजाड्यं ज्वरादिकम् ॥५६॥
transliteration: ante tu rājabhītiśca gamanāgamanaṃ tathā . dvitīye dyūnanāthe tu dehajāḍyaṃ jvarādikam.
separated_sandhi: ante tu rāja-bhītiḥ ca gamana-āgamanam tathādvitīye dyūna-nāthe tu deha-jāḍyam jvara-ādikam
english: At the end (of the sub-period), however, there will be fear from the authorities and much travel. Moreover, when the lord of the 7th house (dyūna) is in the second house, there will be bodily inertia, fever, and similar ailments.

sanskrit: विष्णुनामसहस्रं च ह्यन्नदानं च कारयेत् । रजतप्रतिमादानं कुर्यादारोग्यसिद्धये ॥५७॥
transliteration: viṣṇunāmasahasraṃ ca hyannadānaṃ ca kārayet . rajatapratimādānaṃ kuryādārogyasiddhaye.
separated_sandhi: viṣṇunāmasahasram ca hi annadānam ca kārayet| rajatapratimādānam kuryāt ārogyasiddhaye
english: One should perform the chanting of the one thousand names of Vishnu (Viṣṇunāmasahasra) and give food. One should also make a gift of a silver idol for the attainment of good health.

sanskrit: सूर्यस्यान्तर्गते केतौ देहपीडा मनोव्यथा । अर्थव्ययं राजकोपं स्वजनादेरुपद्रवम् ॥५८॥
transliteration: sūryasyāntargate ketau dehapīḍā manovyathā . arthavyayaṃ rājakopaṃ svajanāderupadravam.
separated_sandhi: sūryasya antargate ketau dehapīḍā manovyathā| arthavyayam rājakopam svajanādeḥ upadravam
english: When Ketu is within the Sun, there occurs bodily pain, mental distress, financial expenditure, royal displeasure, and trouble from relatives and so forth.

sanskrit: लग्नाधिपेन संयुक्ते आदौ सौख्यं धनागमम् । मध्ये तत्क्लेशमाप्नोति मृतवार्तागमं वदेत् ॥५९॥
transliteration: lagnādhipena saṃyukte ādau saukhyaṃ dhanāgamam . madhye tatkleśamāpnoti mṛtavārtāgamaṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: lagnādhipena saṃyukte ādau saukhyam dhanāgamam| madhye tat kleśam āpnoti mṛtavārtāgamam vadet
english: When connected with the lord of the ascendant, at first there is happiness and an inflow of wealth. In the middle (period), one obtains distress, and one should predict the arrival of news of death.

sanskrit: अथाष्टमव्यये चैवं दायेशात्पापसंयुते । कपोलदन्तरोगश्च मूत्रकृर्च्छस्य सम्भवः ॥६०॥
transliteration: athāṣṭamavyaye caivaṃ dāyeśātpāpasaṃyute . kapoladantarogaśca mūtrakṛrcchasya sambhavaḥ.
separated_sandhi: atha aṣṭamavyaye ca evam dāyeśāt pāpasaṃyute |kapoladantarogaḥ ca mūtrakṛcchrasya sambhavaḥ
english: Now, if (an astrological event occurs) in the eighth or twelfth house, and likewise, if there is a conjunction with a malefic (planet) through the influence of the dasha lord, then disease of the cheek and teeth, and the possibility of urinary difficulties occur.

sanskrit: स्थानविच्युतिरर्थस्य मित्रहानिः पितुर्मृतिः । विदेशगमनं चैव शत्रुपीडा महद्भयम् ॥६१॥
transliteration: sthānavicyutirarthasya mitrahāniḥ piturmṛtiḥ . videśagamanaṃ caiva śatrupīḍā mahadbhayam.
separated_sandhi: sthānavicyutiḥ arthasya mitrahāniḥ pituḥ mṛtiḥ| videśagamanam ca eva śatrupīḍā mahat bhayam
english: Loss of position, loss of wealth, loss of friends, the father's death, going abroad, and also affliction from enemies, and great fear (all occur).

sanskrit: लग्नादुपचये केतौ योगकारकसंयुते । शुभांशे शुभवर्गे च शुभकर्मफलोदयः ॥६२॥
transliteration: lagnādupacaye ketau yogakārakasaṃyute . śubhāṃśe śubhavarge ca śubhakarmaphalodayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagnāt upacaye ketau yogakārakasaṃyuteśubhāṃśe śubhavarge ca śubhakarmaphalodayaḥ
english: When Ketu is situated in an Upacaya house from the Ascendant, conjoined with a planet that forms a benefic yoga, and is placed in an auspicious divisional sign (aṃśa) and auspicious varga, there will be the manifestation of favorable results from one's actions (karma).

sanskrit: पुत्रदारादिसौख्यं च सन्तोषं प्रियवर्द्धनम् । विचित्रवस्त्रलाभश्च यशोवृद्धिः सुखावहा ॥६३॥
transliteration: putradārādisaukhyaṃ ca santoṣaṃ priyavarddhanam . vicitravastralābhaśca yaśovṛddhiḥ sukhāvahā.
separated_sandhi: putradārādisaukhyam ca santoṣam priyavardhanamvicitravastralābhaḥ ca yaśovṛddhiḥ sukhāvahā
english: There will be happiness concerning sons, wife, and others, along with contentment and an increase in beloved ones. There will also be the acquisition of diverse garments, and a growth in fame that brings happiness.

sanskrit: द्वितीयाद्यूननाथे वा ह्यपमृत्युभयं वदेत् । दुर्गाजपं च कुर्वीत छागदानं सुखाप्तये ॥६४॥
transliteration: dvitīyādyūnanāthe vā hyapamṛtyubhayaṃ vadet . durgājapaṃ ca kurvīta chāgadānaṃ sukhāptaye.
separated_sandhi: dvitīyādyūnanāthe vā hi apamṛtyubhayam vadetdurgājapam ca kurvīta chāgadānam sukhāptaye
english: When the lord of the second house and the lord of the seventh house are [problematic, implied by context], one should declare fear of untimely death. To attain happiness, one should perform the chanting (japa) of Durga and offer a goat as a donation (dāna).

sanskrit: सूर्यस्यान्तर्गते शुक्रे त्रिकोणे केन्द्रगेऽपि वा । स्वोच्चे मित्रस्ववर्गस्थेऽभीष्टस्त्रीभोग्यसम्पदः ॥६५॥
transliteration: sūryasyāntargate śukre trikoṇe kendrage'pi vā . svocce mitrasvavargasthe'bhīṣṭastrībhogyasampadaḥ.
separated_sandhi: sūryasya antargate śukre trikoṇe kendrage api vāsvocce mitrasvavargasthite abhīṣṭastrībhogyasampadaḥ
english: When Venus is in the sub-period of the Sun, and Venus is situated in a trine house or a Kendra (angular) house, or in its exaltation sign, or positioned in a friendly sign or its own varga, there will be desired women, enjoyable possessions, and wealth.

sanskrit: ग्रामान्तरप्रयाणं च भाह्मणप्रभुदर्शनम् । राज्यलाभो महोत्साहश्छत्रचामरवैभवम् ॥६६॥
transliteration: grāmāntaraprayāṇaṃ ca bhāhmaṇaprabhudarśanam . rājyalābho mahotsāhaśchatracāmaravaibhavam.
separated_sandhi: grāmāntaraprayāṇam ca brāhmaṇaprabhudarśanamrājyalābhaḥ mahotsāhaḥ chatracāmaravaibhavam
english: There will be journeys to other places, the sight of Brahmins and powerful figures (prabhu), the acquisition of dominion, great enthusiasm, and the splendor of royal insignias like the umbrella and fly-whisk.

sanskrit: गृहे कल्याणसम्पत्तिर्नित्यं मिष्ठान्नभोजनम् । विद्रुमादिरत्नलाभो मुक्तावस्त्रादि लाभकृत् ॥६७॥
transliteration: gṛhe kalyāṇasampattirnityaṃ miṣṭhānnabhojanam . vidrumādiratnalābho muktāvastrādi lābhakṛt.
separated_sandhi: gṛhe kalyāṇasampattiḥ nityam miṣṭānnābhojanamvidrumādiratnalābhaḥ muktāvastrādi lābhakṛt
english: There will be prosperity and auspiciousness in the home, along with daily consumption of sweet food. One will gain coral and other gems, as well as pearls, clothes, and similar valuable items.

sanskrit: चतुष्पाज्जीवलाभः स्याद्बहुधान्यधनादिकम् । उत्साहः कीर्तिसम्पत्तिर्नरवाहनसम्पदः ॥६८॥
transliteration: catuṣpājjīvalābhaḥ syādbahudhānyadhanādikam . utsāhaḥ kīrtisampattirnaravāhanasampadaḥ.
separated_sandhi: catuṣpājīvalābhaḥ syāt bahudhānyadhanādikamutsāhaḥ kīrtisampattiḥ naravāhanasampadaḥ
english: There will be gain of quadrupeds and an abundance of grains, wealth, and similar possessions. There will also be enthusiasm, acquisition of fame, and wealth in the form of human-borne conveyances.

sanskrit: षष्ठाष्टमव्यये शुक्रे दायेशाद्बलवर्जिते । राजकोपो मनःक्लेशः पुत्रस्त्रीधननाशनम् ॥६९॥
transliteration: ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyaye śukre dāyeśādbalavarjite . rājakopo manaḥkleśaḥ putrastrīdhananāśanam.
separated_sandhi: ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyaye śukre dāyeśāt balavarjiterājakopaḥ manaḥkleśaḥ putrastrīdhananāśanam
english: If Venus is situated in the sixth, eighth, or twelfth house and is devoid of strength from the lord of the ruling planetary period, there will be royal displeasure (rājakopaḥ), mental distress, and the destruction of sons, wife, and wealth.

sanskrit: भुक्त्यादौ मध्यमं मध्ये लाभः शुभकरो भवेत् । अन्ते यशोनाशनं च स्थानभ्रंशमथापि वा ॥७०॥
transliteration: bhuktyādau madhyamaṃ madhye lābhaḥ śubhakaro bhavet . ante yaśonāśanaṃ ca sthānabhraṃśamathāpi vā.
separated_sandhi: bhuktyādau madhyamam madhye lābhaḥ śubhakarah bhavetante yaśonāśanam ca sthānabhraṃśam atha api vā
english: In the beginning of the sub-period (bhukti), the results are mediocre; in the middle, there will be auspicious gains. At the end, however, there will be a loss of fame and possibly a loss of position.

sanskrit: बन्धुद्वेषं वदेद् वापि स्वकुलाद्भोगनाशनम् । भार्गवे द्यूननाथे तु देहे जाड्यं रुजोभयम् ॥७१॥
transliteration: bandhudveṣaṃ vaded vāpi svakulādbhoganāśanam . bhārgave dyūnanāthe tu dehe jāḍyaṃ rujobhayam.
separated_sandhi: bandhudveṣam vadet vā api svakulāt bhoganāśanambhārgave dyūnānāthe tu dehe jāḍyam rujaḥ bhayam
english: One may also predict animosity from relatives or the destruction of enjoyment within one's own family. However, if Venus (bhārgava) is the lord of the seventh house, there will be dullness in the body and fear of diseases.

sanskrit: रन्ध्ररिष्फसमायुक्ते ह्यपमृत्युर्भविष्यति । तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं मृत्युर्जयजपं चरेत् ॥७२॥
transliteration: randhrariṣphasamāyukte hyapamṛtyurbhaviṣyati . taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ mṛtyurjayajapaṃ caret.
separated_sandhi: randhrariṣphasamāyukte hi apamṛtyuḥ bhaviṣyatitat doṣaparihārārtham mṛtyuñjayajapam caret
english: If connected with the eighth (randhra) and twelfth (riṣpha) houses, an untimely death will indeed occur. To remedy this defect, one should perform the chanting of the Mṛtyuñjaya (mantra).

sanskrit: श्वेतां गां महिषीं दद्याद्रुद्रजाप्यं च कारयेत् । ततः शान्तिभवाप्नोति शङ्करस्य प्रसादतः ॥७३॥
transliteration: śvetāṃ gāṃ mahiṣīṃ dadyādrudrajāpyaṃ ca kārayet . tataḥ śāntibhavāpnoti śaṅkarasya prasādataḥ.
separated_sandhi: śvetām gām mahiṣīm dadyāt rudrajāpyam ca kārayettataḥ śāntim avāpnoti śaṅkarasya prasādataḥ
english: One should offer a white cow and a she-buffalo, and also arrange for the chanting of the Rudra (mantra). Subsequently, one attains peace by the grace (prasāda) of Śaṅkara.

sanskrit: स्वोच्चे स्वक्षेत्रगे चन्द्रे त्रिकोणे लाभगेऽपि वा । भाग्यकर्माधिपैर्युक्ते गजाश्वाम्बरसंकुलम् ॥१॥
transliteration: svocce svakṣetrage candre trikoṇe lābhage'pi vā . bhāgyakarmādhipairyukte gajāśvāmbarasaṃkulam.
separated_sandhi: svocce svakṣetrage candre trikoṇe lābhage api vābhāgyakarmādhipaiḥ yukte gajāśvāmbarasaṃkulam
english: When the Moon is in its exaltation sign, or in its own sign (svakṣetra), or in a trine (trikoṇa), or even in the house of gain (lābha-bhāva), and is associated with the lords of the fortune (bhāgya) and action (karma) houses, there will be an abundance of elephants, horses, and fine garments.

sanskrit: देवतागुरुभक्तिश्च पुण्यश्लोकादिकीर्तनम् । राज्यलाभो महत्सौख्यं यशोवृद्धिः सुखावहा ॥२॥
transliteration: devatāgurubhaktiśca puṇyaślokādikīrtanam . rājyalābho mahatsaukhyaṃ yaśovṛddhiḥ sukhāvahā.
separated_sandhi: devatāgurubhaktiḥ ca puṇyaślokādikīrtanamrājyalābhaḥ mahatsukham yaśovṛddhiḥ sukhāvahā
english: Also, there will be devotion (bhakti) towards deities and preceptors (gurus), along with the chanting of auspicious verses and similar sacred texts. This leads to the acquisition of a kingdom, great happiness, increased renown, and brings about well-being.

sanskrit: पूर्णे चन्द्रे बलं पूर्णं सेनापत्यं महत्सुखम् । पापयुक्तेऽथवा चन्द्रे नीचे वा रिष्फषष्ठगे ॥३॥
transliteration: pūrṇe candre balaṃ pūrṇaṃ senāpatyaṃ mahatsukham . pāpayukte'thavā candre nīce vā riṣphaṣaṣṭhage.
separated_sandhi: pūrṇe candre balam pūrṇam senāpatyam mahatsukhampāpayukte athavā candre nīce vā riṣphaṣaṣṭhage
english: When the Moon is full (pūrṇa candra), there is complete strength, the command of an army (senāpatya), and great happiness. However, if the Moon is afflicted by malefic planets (pāpa-yukta), or in its debilitation sign (nīca), or situated in the twelfth (riṣpha) or sixth (ṣaṣṭha) houses...

sanskrit: अतकाले धननाशः स्यात्स्थानच्युतिरथापि वा । देहलस्यं मनस्तपो राजमन्त्रिविरोधकृत् ॥४॥
transliteration: atakāle dhananāśaḥ syātsthānacyutirathāpi vā . dehalasyaṃ manastapo rājamantrivirodhakṛt.
separated_sandhi: ata kāle dhana nāśaḥ syāt sthāna cyutiḥ atha apivā deha lasyam manas tapaḥ rāja mantri virodhakṛt
english: During that period, there will be a loss of wealth or even a demotion from one's position. Physical inertia and mental distress will occur, leading to conflicts with the king or his minister.

sanskrit: मातृक्लेशो मनोदुःखं निगडं बन्धुनाशनम् । द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु रन्ध्ररिष्फेशसंयुते ॥५॥
transliteration: mātṛkleśo manoduḥkhaṃ nigaḍaṃ bandhunāśanam . dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu randhrariṣpheśasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: mātṛ kleśaḥ manas duḥkham nigaḍam bandhu nāśanamdvitīya dyūna nāthe tu randhra riṣpha īśa saṃyute
english: There will be distress to the mother, mental sorrow, imprisonment, and the loss of relatives. This occurs when the lord of the second and seventh houses is conjoined with the lord of the eighth and twelfth houses.

sanskrit: देहजाड्यं महाभङ्गमपमृत्योभयं वदेत् । श्वेतां गां महिषीं दद्यात् स्वदशान्तर्गते विधौ ॥६॥
transliteration: dehajāḍyaṃ mahābhaṅgamapamṛtyobhayaṃ vadet . śvetāṃ gāṃ mahiṣīṃ dadyāt svadaśāntargate vidhau.
separated_sandhi: deha jāḍyam mahā bhaṅgam apamṛtyu bhayam vadetśvetām gām mahiṣīm dadyāt sva daśā antargate vidhau
english: One should predict physical lethargy, significant obstacles, and the fear of untimely death. During the Moon's sub-period within its own major period, one should donate a white cow or a buffalo.

sanskrit: चन्द्रस्यान्तर्गते भौमे लग्नात्केन्द्रत्रिकोणगे । सौभाग्यं राजसन्मानं वस्त्रभरणभूषणम् ॥७॥
transliteration: candrasyāntargate bhaume lagnātkendratrikoṇage . saubhāgyaṃ rājasanmānaṃ vastrabharaṇabhūṣaṇam.
separated_sandhi: candrasya antargate bhaume lagnāt kendra trikoṇa gesaubhāgyam rāja sanmānam vastra bharaṇa bhūṣaṇam
english: When Mars is situated in a quadrant or trine from the ascendant, during the sub-period of the Moon, there will be good fortune, respect from the king, and acquisitions of clothes, jewelry, and ornaments.

sanskrit: यत्नात् कार्यार्थसिद्धिस्तु भविष्यति न संशयः । गृहक्षेत्राभिवृद्धिश्च व्यवहारे जयो भवेत् ॥८॥
transliteration: yatnāt kāryārthasiddhistu bhaviṣyati na saṃśayaḥ . gṛhakṣetrābhivṛddhiśca vyavahāre jayo bhavet.
separated_sandhi: yatnāt kārya artha siddhiḥ tu bhaviṣyati na saṃśayaḥgṛha kṣetra abhivṛddhiḥ ca vyavahāre jayaḥ bhavet
english: Through diligent effort, the accomplishment of one's objectives will certainly occur; there is no doubt about it. There will also be an increase in one's house and land, and victory will be attained in all endeavors.

sanskrit: कार्यलाभो महत्सौख्यं स्वोच्चे स्वक्षेत्रगे फलम् । तथाऽष्टमव्यये भौमे पापयुक्तेऽथ वा यदि ॥९॥
transliteration: kāryalābho mahatsaukhyaṃ svocce svakṣetrage phalam . tathā'ṣṭamavyaye bhaume pāpayukte'tha vā yadi.
separated_sandhi: kāryalābhaḥ mahat saukhyam svocce svakṣetrage phalam| tathā aṣṭamavyaye bhaume pāpayukte atha vā yadi
english: When Mars (bhauma) is in its own exaltation sign (svocca) or its own sign (svakṣetra), the outcome (phalam) brings the accomplishment of objectives (kāryalābha) and great happiness (mahat saukhya). However, if Mars is in the eighth or twelfth house and conjoined with a malefic planet, then...

sanskrit: दायशादशुभस्थाने देहार्तिः परवीक्षिते । गृहक्षेत्रादिहानिश्च व्यवहारे तथा क्षतिः ॥१०॥
transliteration: dāyaśādaśubhasthāne dehārtiḥ paravīkṣite . gṛhakṣetrādihāniśca vyavahāre tathā kṣatiḥ.
separated_sandhi: dāyaśāt aśubhasthāne dehārtiḥ paravīkṣite |gṛhakṣetrādihāniḥ ca vyavahāre tathā kṣatiḥ
english: During a planetary period (daśā), if (a planet is) in an inauspicious house and aspected by malefic planets (paravīkṣite), there will be bodily affliction (dehārti), loss of home, land, and so forth (gṛhakṣetrādihāni), as well as damage (kṣati) in one's affairs (vyavahāra).

sanskrit: मृत्युवर्गेषु कलहो भूपालस्य विरोधनम् । आत्मबन्धुवियोगश्च नित्यं निष्ठुरभाषणम् ॥११॥
transliteration: mṛtyuvargeṣu kalaho bhūpālasya virodhanam . ātmabandhuviyogaśca nityaṃ niṣṭhurabhāṣaṇam.
separated_sandhi: mṛtyuvargeṣu kalahaḥ bhūpālasya virodhanam |ātmabandhuviyogaḥ ca nityam niṣṭhurabhāṣaṇam
english: If (a planet is positioned) in the "mṛtyu vargas" (divisions indicating death), there will be quarrels (kalaha), opposition from the ruler (bhūpālasya virodhanam), separation from one's own relatives (ātmabandhuviyoga), and constant harsh speech (nityaṃ niṣṭhurabhāṣaṇam).

sanskrit: द्वितीये द्यूननाथे तु रन्ध्रे रन्ध्राधिपो यदा । तत्तोषपरिहारार्थं ब्राह्मणस्याऽर्चनं चरेत् ॥१२॥
transliteration: dvitīye dyūnanāthe tu randhre randhrādhipo yadā . tattoṣaparihārārthaṃ brāhmaṇasyā'rcanaṃ caret.
separated_sandhi: dvitīye dyūnanāthe tu randhre randhrādhipaḥ yadā| tattoṣaparihārārtham brāhmaṇasya arcanam caret
english: When the lord of the seventh house (dyūnanātha) is in the second house (dvitīya), and the lord of the eighth house (randhrādhipa) is in the eighth house (randhra), then, in order to alleviate that distress and ensure propitiation (tattoṣaparihārārtham), one should perform worship (arcana) of a Brahmin.

sanskrit: चन्द्रस्यान्तर्गते राहौ लग्नात्केन्द्रत्रिकोणगे । आदौ स्वल्फलं ज्ञेयं शत्रुपीडा महद्भयम् ॥१३॥
transliteration: candrasyāntargate rāhau lagnātkendratrikoṇage . ādau svalphalaṃ jñeyaṃ śatrupīḍā mahadbhayam.
separated_sandhi: candrasya antargate rāhau lagnāt kendratrikoṇage |ādau svalpam phalam jñeyam śatrupīḍā mahat bhayam
english: When Rahu (rāhu) is in the sub-period (antargata) of the Moon (candra), and if (Rahu is) situated in a Kendra (angular) or Trikona (trinal) house from the ascendant (lagna), then initially only meager results (svalpa phalam) are to be expected, followed by affliction from enemies (śatrupīḍā) and great fear (mahat bhayam).

sanskrit: चौराहिराजभीतिश्च चतुष्पाज्जिवपीडनम् । बन्धुनाशो मित्रहानिर्मानहानिर्मनोव्यथा ॥१४॥
transliteration: caurāhirājabhītiśca catuṣpājjivapīḍanam . bandhunāśo mitrahānirmānahānirmanovyathā.
separated_sandhi: caurāhi-rāja-bhītiḥ ca catuṣpāj-jīva-pīḍanambandhu-nāśaḥ mitra-hāniḥ māna-hāniḥ manovyathā
english: There will be fear stemming from thieves, snakes, and rulers, along with affliction from four-footed creatures, loss of relatives, loss of friends, loss of honor, and mental distress.

sanskrit: शुभयुक्ते शुभैर्दृष्टे लग्नादुपचयेऽपि वा । योगकारकसम्बन्धे सर्वकार्यार्थसिद्धिकृत् ॥१५॥
transliteration: śubhayukte śubhairdṛṣṭe lagnādupacaye'pi vā . yogakārakasambandhe sarvakāryārthasiddhikṛt.
separated_sandhi: śubhayukte śubhaiḥ dṛṣṭe lagnāt upacaye api vāyogakārakasambandhe sarvakāryārthasiddhikṛt
english: When a house or planet is conjoined with auspicious planets, or aspected by auspicious planets, or even if it is in an Upachaya house from the Lagna (ascendant), or connected with a Yoga-karaka planet, it ensures the fulfillment of all endeavors.

sanskrit: नैरृत्ये पश्चिमे भावे क्वचित्प्रभुसमागमः । वाहनामबरलाभश्च स्वेष्टकार्यार्थसिद्धिकृत् ॥१६॥
transliteration: nairṛtye paścime bhāve kvacitprabhusamāgamaḥ . vāhanāmabaralābhaśca sveṣṭakāryārthasiddhikṛt.
separated_sandhi: nairṛtye paścime bhāve kvacit prabhu-samāgamaḥvāhanāmbara-lābhaḥ ca sveṣṭakāryārthasiddhikṛt
english: Sometimes, regarding the southwest or western direction (or house), there occurs a meeting with rulers and a gain of vehicles and clothes, which brings about the fulfillment of one's desired objectives.

sanskrit: दायेशादथ रन्ध्रथे व्यये वा बलवर्जिते । स्थानभ्रंशो मनोदुखं पुत्रक्लेशो महद्भयम् ॥१७॥
transliteration: dāyeśādatha randhrathe vyaye vā balavarjite . sthānabhraṃśo manodukhaṃ putrakleśo mahadbhayam.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt atha randhrathe vyaye vā balavarjitesthānabhraṃśaḥ manoduḥkham putrakleśaḥ mahadbhayam
english: When the Dasha lord is then (placed) in the 8th house (randhra) or the 12th house (vyaya) and is devoid of strength, there will be a loss of position, mental sorrow, affliction for children, and great fear.

sanskrit: दारपीडा क्वचिज्ज्ञेया क्वचित्स्वाङ्गे रुजोभयम् । वृश्चिकादिविषाद्भीतिश्चौराहिनृपपीडनम् ॥१८॥
transliteration: dārapīḍā kvacijjñeyā kvacitsvāṅge rujobhayam . vṛścikādiviṣādbhītiścaurāhinṛpapīḍanam.
separated_sandhi: dārapīḍā kvacit jñeyā kvacit svāṅge rujobhayamvṛścikādiviṣādbhītiḥ caurāhinṛpapīḍanam
english: Sometimes affliction to the wife is to be understood, and at other times, fear of disease in one's own body. There is also fear from the poison of scorpions and similar creatures, along with harassment from thieves, snakes, and rulers.

sanskrit: दायेशात्केन्द्रकोणे व दुश्चिक्ये लाभगेऽपि वा । पुण्यतीर्थफलावाप्तिर्देवतादर्शनं महत् ॥१९॥
transliteration: dāyeśātkendrakoṇe va duścikye lābhage'pi vā . puṇyatīrthaphalāvāptirdevatādarśanaṃ mahat.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt kendrakoṇe vā duścikye lābhage api vā| puṇyatīrthaphalāvāptiḥ devatādarśanam mahat
english: When the lord of the Daśā is located in an angular (kendra) or trinal (koṇa) house, or even in the third or eleventh house, one attains the benefits of visiting sacred places (puṇyatīrtha) and experiences significant visions of deities.

sanskrit: परोपकारकर्मादिपुण्यकर्मादिसम्प्रहः । द्वितीयद्यूनराशिअथे देहबाधा भविष्यति ॥२०॥
transliteration: paropakārakarmādipuṇyakarmādisamprahaḥ . dvitīyadyūnarāśiathe dehabādhā bhaviṣyati.
separated_sandhi: paropakārakarmādipuṇyakarmādisamprahaḥ |dvitīyadyūnarāśiathe dehabādhā bhaviṣyati
english: There will be a hindrance to meritorious deeds, such as helping others. If [affliction is indicated] in the context of the second or seventh house, then bodily affliction (dehābādhā) will occur.

sanskrit: तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं रुद्रजाप्यं समाचरेत् । छागदानं प्रकुर्वीत देहारोग्यं प्रजायते ॥२१॥
transliteration: taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ rudrajāpyaṃ samācaret . chāgadānaṃ prakurvīta dehārogyaṃ prajāyate.
separated_sandhi: tatdoṣaparihārārtham rudrajāpyam samācaret| chāgadānam prakurvīta dehārogyam prajāyate
english: To mitigate that defect, one should perform the chanting (jāpya) of Rudra mantras. One should also offer a goat as a gift (dāna), and then bodily health will be attained.

sanskrit: चन्द्रस्यान्तर्गते जीवे लग्नात्केन्द्रत्रिकोणगे । स्वगेहे लाभगे स्वोच्चे राज्यलाभो महोत्सवः ॥२२॥
transliteration: candrasyāntargate jīve lagnātkendratrikoṇage . svagehe lābhage svocce rājyalābho mahotsavaḥ.
separated_sandhi: candrasya antargate jīve lagnāt kendratrikoṇage| svagehe lābhage svocce rājyalābhaḥ mahotsavaḥ
english: When Jupiter (jīva) is in the sub-period (antargata) of the Moon (candra), and is situated in an angular (kendra) or trinal (trikoṇa) house from the Ascendant (lagna), or in its own sign (svageha), or in the eleventh house (lābhaga), or in its sign of exaltation (svocca), then there will be attainment of high status (rājyalābha) and great celebration.

sanskrit: वस्त्राऽलङ्कारभूषाप्ती राजप्रीतिर्धनागमः । इष्टदेवप्रसादेन गर्भाधानादिकं फलम् ॥२३॥
transliteration: vastrā'laṅkārabhūṣāptī rājaprītirdhanāgamaḥ . iṣṭadevaprasādena garbhādhānādikaṃ phalam.
separated_sandhi: vastrālaṅkārabhūṣāptī rājaprītiḥ dhanāgamaḥ| iṣṭadevaprasādena garbhādhānādikam phalam
english: There will be acquisition of clothes, ornaments, and decorations, along with royal favor and an influx of wealth. Through the grace (prasāda) of one's chosen deity (iṣṭadeva), auspicious outcomes such as conception (garbhādhāna) will be attained.

sanskrit: तथा शोभनकार्याणि गृहे लक्ष्मीः कटाक्षकृत् । राजाश्रयं धनं भूमिगजवाजिसमन्वितम् ॥२४॥
transliteration: tathā śobhanakāryāṇi gṛhe lakṣmīḥ kaṭākṣakṛt . rājāśrayaṃ dhanaṃ bhūmigajavājisamanvitam.
separated_sandhi: tathā śobhanakāryāṇi gṛhe lakṣmīḥ kaṭākṣakṛtrājāśrayam dhanam bhūmigajavājisamanvitam
english: Similarly, there will be auspicious activities in the home; prosperity (lakṣmī) will cast her grace, bestowing royal patronage, wealth, land, elephants, and horses.

sanskrit: महाराजप्रसादेन स्वेष्टसिद्धिः सुखावहा । ष।ष्ठाष्टमव्यये जीवे नीच वास्तङ्गते यदि ॥२५॥
transliteration: mahārājaprasādena sveṣṭasiddhiḥ sukhāvahā . ṣa.ṣṭhāṣṭamavyaye jīve nīca vāstaṅgate yadi.
separated_sandhi: mahārājaprasādena sveṣṭasiddhiḥ sukhāvahāṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyaye jīve nīca vā astaṅgate yadi
english: Through the grace of a great king, one achieves the fulfillment of one's desires, bringing great happiness. However, if Jupiter (guru) is in the sixth, eighth, or twelfth house, or is debilitated, or combust...

sanskrit: पापयुक्तेऽशुभं कर्म गुरुपुत्रादिनाशनम् । स्थानभ्रंशो मनोदुःखमकस्मात्कलहो ध्रुवम् ॥२६॥
transliteration: pāpayukte'śubhaṃ karma guruputrādināśanam . sthānabhraṃśo manoduḥkhamakasmātkalaho dhruvam.
separated_sandhi: pāpayukte aśubham karma guruputrādināśanamsthānabhraṃśaḥ manaḥduḥkham akasmāt kalahaḥ dhruvam
english: If Jupiter is associated with malefic planets, there will be inauspicious actions and the destruction of gurus, sons, and others. Loss of position, mental distress, and sudden quarrels are certain.

sanskrit: गृहक्षेत्रादिनाशश्च वाहनाम्बरनाशनम् । दायेशात्केन्द्रकोणे वा दुश्चिक्ये लाभगेऽपि वा ॥२७॥
transliteration: gṛhakṣetrādināśaśca vāhanāmbaranāśanam . dāyeśātkendrakoṇe vā duścikye lābhage'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: gṛhakṣetrādināśaḥ ca vāhana ambara nāśanamdāyeśāt kendra koṇe vā duścikye lābhage api vā
english: There is also destruction of homes, fields, etc., as well as vehicles and clothing. However, if the lord of the planetary period (daśā) is situated in an angular (kendra) or trinal (kona) house, or in the third house (duścikhya), or even in the house of gain (labha, 11th house)...

sanskrit: भोजनाम्बरपरवादि=लाभं सौख्यं करोति च । ब्र्हात्रादिसुखसम्पत्तिं धैर्यं वीर्यपराक्रमम् ॥२८॥
transliteration: bhojanāmbaraparavādi=lābhaṃ saukhyaṃ karoti ca . brhātrādisukhasampattiṃ dhairyaṃ vīryaparākramam.
separated_sandhi: bhojanāmbaraparavādilābham saukhyam karoti cabhrātrādisukhasampattim dhairyam vīryaparākramam
english: It (the Dasha lord) brings gain of food, clothing, and victory over adversaries. It also produces happiness, wealth, and comfort through brothers, along with courage, strength, and valor.

sanskrit: यज्ञव्रतविवाहादिराज्यश्रीधनसम्पदः । दायेशाद्रिपुरन्ध्रस्थे व्यये वा बलवर्जिते ॥२९॥
transliteration: yajñavratavivāhādirājyaśrīdhanasampadaḥ . dāyeśādripurandhrasthe vyaye vā balavarjite.
separated_sandhi: yajñavratavivāhādirājyaśrīdhanasampadaḥdāyeśādripurandhrasthe vyaye vā balavarjite
english: When the lord of the 12th house (dāyeśa) is situated in the 7th (adri), 4th (pura), or 8th (randhra) house, or is in the 12th house (vyaya) and is devoid of strength, [it leads to a decline in] Vedic rituals (yajña), vows, marriages, and so on, as well as royal splendor, wealth, and prosperity.

sanskrit: करोति कुत्सिनान्नं च विदेशगमनं तथा । भुक्त्यादौ शोभनं प्रोक्तमन्ते क्लेशकरं भवेत् ॥३०॥
transliteration: karoti kutsinānnaṃ ca videśagamanaṃ tathā . bhuktyādau śobhanaṃ proktamante kleśakaraṃ bhavet.
separated_sandhi: karoti kutsitam annam ca videśagamanam tathābhuktyādau śobhanam proktam ante kleśakaram bhavet
english: When these conditions exist, it causes bad food and also foreign travel. It is declared to be good in the beginning of the planetary sub-period (bhukti), but becomes troublesome at the end.

sanskrit: द्वितीयद्यूननाथे च ह्यपमृत्युर्भविष्यति । तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं शिवसाहस्रकं जपेत् । स्वर्णदानमिति प्रोक्तं सर्वकष्टनिवारकम् ॥३१॥
transliteration: dvitīyadyūnanāthe ca hyapamṛtyurbhaviṣyati . taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ śivasāhasrakaṃ japet . svarṇadānamiti proktaṃ sarvakaṣṭanivārakam.
separated_sandhi: dvitīyadyūnanāthe ca hi apamṛtyuḥbhaviṣyati tatdoṣaparihārārthamśivasāhasrakam japet svarṇadānamiti proktam sarvakaṣṭanivārakam
english: And when the lord of the 2nd and 7th houses (dyūna) is involved, there will be untimely death. For the removal of that defect, one should chant the thousand names of Shiva. Gold donation (dāna) is thus declared as a remover of all troubles.

sanskrit: चन्द्रस्यान्तर्गते मन्दे लग्नात्केन्द्रत्रिकोणगे । स्वक्षेत्रे स्वांशगे चैव मन्दे तुङ्गांशसंयुते ॥३२॥
transliteration: candrasyāntargate mande lagnātkendratrikoṇage . svakṣetre svāṃśage caiva mande tuṅgāṃśasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: candrasya antargate mande lagnāt kendratrikoṇagesvakṣetre svāṃśage ca eva mande tuṅgāṃśasaṃyute
english: When Saturn (manda) is in the sub-period of the Moon, and Saturn is situated in a quadrant or trine from the Ascendant, and also in its own sign or own navamsha, or Saturn is associated with an exalted navamsha...

sanskrit: शुभदृष्टयुते वाऽपि लाभे वा बलसंयुते । पुत्रमित्रार्थसम्पत्तिः शूद्रप्रभुसमागमात् ॥३३॥
transliteration: śubhadṛṣṭayute vā'pi lābhe vā balasaṃyute . putramitrārthasampattiḥ śūdraprabhusamāgamāt.
separated_sandhi: śubhadṛṣṭiyute vā api lābhe vā balasaṃyuteputramitrārthasampattiḥ śūdraprabhusamāgamāt
english: ...or is aspected by benefic planets, or is in the 11th house (lābha) endowed with strength, then there will be acquisition of sons, friends, wealth, and prosperity, through association with Shudra (śūdra) lords or masters.

sanskrit: व्ययसायात्फलाधिक्यं गृहे क्षेत्रादिवृद्धिदम् । पुत्रलाभश्च कल्याणं राजानुग्रहवैभवम् ॥३४॥
transliteration: vyayasāyātphalādhikyaṃ gṛhe kṣetrādivṛddhidam . putralābhaśca kalyāṇaṃ rājānugrahavaibhavam.
separated_sandhi: vyayasāyāt phalādhikyam gṛhe kṣetrādi-vṛddhidamputralābhaḥ ca kalyāṇam rājānugraha-vaibhavam
english: Through business endeavors, there will be an abundance of results. It grants growth in one's home and lands, the acquisition of sons, general welfare, and prosperity due to royal favor.

sanskrit: षष्ठाष्टमव्यये मन्दे नीचे वा धनगेऽपि वा । तद्भुक्त्यादौ पुण्यतीर्थे स्नानं चैव तु दर्शनम् ॥३५॥
transliteration: ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyaye mande nīce vā dhanage'pi vā . tadbhuktyādau puṇyatīrthe snānaṃ caiva tu darśanam.
separated_sandhi: ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyaye mande nīce vā dhanage api vātat-bhuktyādau puṇyatīrthe snānam ca eva tu darśanam
english: If Saturn is in the sixth, eighth, or twelfth house, or is debilitated, or even positioned in the house of wealth (second house), then at the beginning of its planetary period (bhukti), one should bathe in sacred bathing places (tīrtha) and also perform sacred viewing (darśana).

sanskrit: अनेकजनत्रासश्च शस्त्रपीडा भविष्यति । दायेशात्केन्द्रराशिस्थे त्रिकोणे बलगेऽपि वा ॥३६॥
transliteration: anekajanatrāsaśca śastrapīḍā bhaviṣyati . dāyeśātkendrarāśisthe trikoṇe balage'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: aneka-jana-trāsaḥ ca śastra-pīḍā bhaviṣyatidāyeśāt kendrarāśi-sthe trikoṇe balage api vā
english: There will be fear from many people and affliction from weapons. These may arise from the lord of the planetary period (dāyeśa), even when it is situated in an angular house (kendra), a trine house, or is strong.

sanskrit: क्वचित्सौख्यं धनाप्तिश्च दारपुत्रविरोधकृत् । द्वितीयद्यूनरन्ध्रस्थे देहबाधा भविष्यति ॥३७॥
transliteration: kvacitsaukhyaṃ dhanāptiśca dāraputravirodhakṛt . dvitīyadyūnarandhrasthe dehabādhā bhaviṣyati.
separated_sandhi: kvacit saukhyam dhana-āptiḥ ca dāraputra-virodha-kṛtdvitīya-dyūna-randhra-sthe deha-bādhā bhaviṣyati
english: Sometimes there will be happiness and acquisition of wealth, but it will cause conflict with one's spouse and children. If it (the dasha lord) is situated in the second, seventh (dyūna), or eighth (randhra) house, physical affliction will occur.

sanskrit: तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं मृत्युञ्जयजपं चरेत् । कृष्णां गां महिषीं दद्याद्दानेमारोग्यमादिशेत् ॥३८॥
transliteration: taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ mṛtyuñjayajapaṃ caret . kṛṣṇāṃ gāṃ mahiṣīṃ dadyāddānemārogyamādiśet.
separated_sandhi: tat-doṣa-parihāra-artham mṛtyuñjaya-japam caretkṛṣṇām gām mahiṣīm dadyāt dāne ārogyam ādiśet
english: For the removal of those faults, one should perform the chanting (japa) of the Mṛtyuñjaya (mantra). One should give a black cow or a she-buffalo as a donation (dāna); through this donation, health is granted.

sanskrit: चन्द्रस्यान्तर्गते सौम्ये केन्द्रलाभत्रिकोणगे । स्वर्क्षे निजांशके सौम्ये तुङ्गे वा बलसंयुते ॥३९॥
transliteration: candrasyāntargate saumye kendralābhatrikoṇage . svarkṣe nijāṃśake saumye tuṅge vā balasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: candrasya antargate saumye kendra lābha trikoṇagesvarṣe nijāṃśake saumye tuṅge vā bala saṃyute
english: When a benefic planet is situated within the Moon's sub-period (antardasha), and that benefic is located in a quadrant (kendra), house of gain (labha), or trine (trikoṇa) house, or is in its own sign, own varga, or exalted, or is endowed with strength, then the following good effects occur.

sanskrit: धनागमो राजमानप्रियवस्त्रादिलाभकृत् । विद्याविनोदसद्गोष्ठी ज्ञानवृद्धिः सुखावहा ॥४०॥
transliteration: dhanāgamo rājamānapriyavastrādilābhakṛt . vidyāvinodasadgoṣṭhī jñānavṛddhiḥ sukhāvahā.
separated_sandhi: dhana āgamaḥ rāja māna priya vastra ādi lābha kṛtvidyā vinoda sad goṣṭhī jñāna vṛddhiḥ sukha āvahā
english: There will be an acquisition of wealth, royal favor, and gains of beloved clothes and other desirable things. It brings joy from learning, good company, an increase of knowledge, and happiness.

sanskrit: सन्तानप्राप्तिः सन्तोषो वाणिज्याद्धनलाभ्कृत् । वाहनच्छत्रसंयुक्तनानालङ्कारलाभकृत् ॥४१॥
transliteration: santānaprāptiḥ santoṣo vāṇijyāddhanalābhkṛt . vāhanacchatrasaṃyuktanānālaṅkāralābhakṛt.
separated_sandhi: santāna prāptiḥ santoṣaḥ vāṇijyāt dhana lābha kṛtvāhana chatra saṃyukta nānā alaṅkāra lābha kṛt
english: There will be the acquisition of progeny, contentment, and gains of wealth through business. One will also gain vehicles, umbrellas, and various ornaments.

sanskrit: दायेशात्केन्द्रकोणे वा लाभे वा धनगेऽपि वा । विवाहो यज्ञदीक्षा च दानधर्मशुभादिकम् ॥४२॥
transliteration: dāyeśātkendrakoṇe vā lābhe vā dhanage'pi vā . vivāho yajñadīkṣā ca dānadharmaśubhādikam.
separated_sandhi: dāya īśāt kendra koṇe vā lābhe vā dhana ge api vāvivāhaḥ yajña dīkṣā ca dāna dharma śubha ādikam
english: Furthermore, when the lord of the planetary period (dāyeśa) is in a quadrant (kendra) or trine (koṇa) house, or in the house of gain (lābha), or even in the house of wealth, then there will be marriage, initiation into a Vedic ritual (yajña-dīkṣā), acts of charity (dāna), righteous deeds (dharma), and other auspicious activities.

sanskrit: राजप्रीतिकरश्चैव विद्वज्जनसमागमः । मुक्तामणिप्रवालानि वाहनाम्बरभूषणम् ॥४३॥
transliteration: rājaprītikaraścaiva vidvajjanasamāgamaḥ . muktāmaṇipravālāni vāhanāmbarabhūṣaṇam.
separated_sandhi: rāja prīti karaḥ ca eva vidvat jana samāgamaḥmuktā maṇi pravālāni vāhana ambara bhūṣaṇam
english: There will also be royal favor, association with learned people, and acquisitions of pearls, gems, corals, vehicles, clothes, and ornaments.

sanskrit: आरोग्यप्रीतिसौख्यं च सोमपानादिकं सुखम् । दायेशाद्रिपुरन्ध्रस्थे व्यये वा नीचगेऽपि वा ॥४४॥
transliteration: ārogyaprītisaukhyaṃ ca somapānādikaṃ sukham . dāyeśādripurandhrasthe vyaye vā nīcage'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: ārogya-prīti-saukhyam ca soma-pāna-ādikam sukhamdāyeśa-adri-purandhra-sthe vyaye vā nīcage api vā
english: Health, affection, happiness, and joy from soma-like drinks are generally anticipated. However, when the lord of the daśā (dāyeśa) is situated in the seventh, eighth, or twelfth house, or is debilitated...

sanskrit: तद्भुक्तौ देहबाधा च कृर्षिगोभूमिनाशनम् । कारागृहप्रवेशाश्च दारपुत्रादिपीडनम् ॥४५॥
transliteration: tadbhuktau dehabādhā ca kṛrṣigobhūmināśanam . kārāgṛhapraveśāśca dāraputrādipīḍanam.
separated_sandhi: tat bhuktau deha-bādhā ca kṛṣi-go-bhūmi-nāśanamkārāgṛha-praveśāḥ ca dāra-putra-ādi-pīḍanam
english: During that sub-period (bhukti), there will be bodily affliction, loss of agriculture, cows, and land, entry into prison, and distress for one's wife, children, and so on.

sanskrit: द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु ज्वरपीडा महद्भयम् । छागदानं प्रकुर्वीत विष्णुसाहस्रकं जपेत् ॥४६॥
transliteration: dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu jvarapīḍā mahadbhayam . chāgadānaṃ prakurvīta viṣṇusāhasrakaṃ japet.
separated_sandhi: dvitīya-dyūna-nāthe tu jvara-pīḍā mahat bhayamchāga-dānam pra-kurvīta viṣṇu-sāhasrakam japet
english: However, if the lord of the second and seventh houses (dvitīya-dyūna-nātha) is operative, there is affliction by fever and great fear. One should perform the offering of a goat (chāga-dāna) and chant the thousand names of Viṣṇu (Viṣṇu-Sāhasranāma).

sanskrit: चन्द्रस्यान्तर्गते केतौ केन्द्रलाभत्रिकोणगे । दुश्चिक्ये बलसंयुक्ते धनलाभं महत्सुखम् ॥४७॥
transliteration: candrasyāntargate ketau kendralābhatrikoṇage . duścikye balasaṃyukte dhanalābhaṃ mahatsukham.
separated_sandhi: candrasya antargate ketau kendra-lābha-trikoṇa-geduścikye bala-saṃyukte dhana-lābham mahat sukham
english: When Ketu is in the sub-period of the Moon (Candra) and is situated in a quadrant (kendra), the house of gains (lābha), or a trine (trikoṇa), and when the third house (duścikya) is endowed with strength, there will be gain of wealth and great happiness.

sanskrit: पुत्रदारादिसौख्यं च विधिकर्म करोति च । भुक्त्यादौ धनहानिः स्यान्मध्यगे सुखमाप्नुयात् ॥४८॥
transliteration: putradārādisaukhyaṃ ca vidhikarma karoti ca . bhuktyādau dhanahāniḥ syānmadhyage sukhamāpnuyāt.
separated_sandhi: putra-dāra-ādi-saukhyam ca vidhi-karma karoti cabhukti-ādau dhana-hāniḥ syāt madhyage sukham āpnuyāt
english: There will be happiness from children and wife, etc., and one performs prescribed religious duties (vidhi-karma). At the beginning of the sub-period (bhukti), there may be loss of wealth, but in the middle part, one attains happiness.

sanskrit: दायेशात्केन्द्रलाभे वा त्रिकोणे बलसंयुते । क्वचित्फलं दशादौ तु दद्यात् सौख्यं धनागमम् ॥४९॥
transliteration: dāyeśātkendralābhe vā trikoṇe balasaṃyute . kvacitphalaṃ daśādau tu dadyāt saukhyaṃ dhanāgamam.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt kendralābhe vā trikoṇe balasaṃyute kvacitphalam daśādau tu dadyāt saukhyam dhanāgamam
english: When the lord of the planetary period (daśā) is located in an angle (kendra), an eleventh house (lābha), or a trine (trikoṇa), and is endowed with strength, it certainly bestows happiness and the acquisition of wealth at the beginning of its period.

sanskrit: गोमहिष्यादिलाभं च भुक्त्यन्ते चार्थनाशनम् । पापयुक्तेऽथवा दृष्टे दायेशाद्रन्ध्ररिःफगे ॥५०॥
transliteration: gomahiṣyādilābhaṃ ca bhuktyante cārthanāśanam . pāpayukte'thavā dṛṣṭe dāyeśādrandhrariḥphage.
separated_sandhi: gomahiṣyādilābham ca bhuktyante ca arthanāśanampāpayukte athavā dṛṣṭe dāyeśāt randhrariḥphage
english: Furthermore, there will be gains of cows, buffaloes, and similar animals. However, if (the Daśā lord is) conjoined with or aspected by malefic planets, or if (it is) situated in the eighth or twelfth house from itself, then there will be a loss of wealth at the end of the planetary period.

sanskrit: शत्रुतः कार्यहानिः स्यादकस्मात्कलहो ध्रुवम् । द्वितीयद्यूनराशिस्त्य्हे ह्यनारोग्यं महद्भयम् ॥५१॥
transliteration: śatrutaḥ kāryahāniḥ syādakasmātkalaho dhruvam . dvitīyadyūnarāśistyhe hyanārogyaṃ mahadbhayam.
separated_sandhi: śatrutaḥ kāryahāniḥ syāt akasmāt kalahaḥ dhruvamdvitīyadyūnarāśisthite hi anārogyam mahatbhayam
english: There will be loss of undertakings due to enemies, and certainly sudden quarrels. If (the Daśā lord is) situated in the second or seventh house (from itself), then indeed there will be ill-health and great fear.

sanskrit: मृत्युञ्जयजपं कुर्यात् सर्वसम्पत्प्रदायकम् । ततः शान्तिमवाप्नोति शङ्करस्य प्रसादतः ॥५२॥
transliteration: mṛtyuñjayajapaṃ kuryāt sarvasampatpradāyakam . tataḥ śāntimavāpnoti śaṅkarasya prasādataḥ.
separated_sandhi: mṛtyuñjayajapam kuryāt sarvasampatpradāyakamtataḥ śāntim avāpnoti śaṅkarasya prasādataḥ
english: One should perform the Mṛtyuñjaya (japa) recitation, which bestows all prosperity. Thereafter, one attains peace by the grace of Śaṅkara.

sanskrit: चन्द्रस्यान्तर्गते शुक्रे केन्द्रलाभत्रिकोणगे । स्वोच्चे स्वक्षेत्रगे वापि राज्यलाभं करोति च ॥५३॥
transliteration: candrasyāntargate śukre kendralābhatrikoṇage . svocce svakṣetrage vāpi rājyalābhaṃ karoti ca.
separated_sandhi: candrasya antargate śukre kendralābhatrikoṇagesvocce svakṣetrage vā api rājyalābham karoti ca
english: When Venus (śukra) is in the sub-period (antargata) of the Moon (candra), and is situated in an angle (kendra), an eleventh house (lābha), or a trine (trikoṇa), or in its own exaltation sign, or in its own sign, then it causes the acquisition of high status or a kingdom (rājyalābha).

sanskrit: महाराजप्रसादेन वाहनाम्बरभूषणम् । चतुष्पाज्जिवलाभः स्याद्दारपुत्रादिवर्धनम् ॥५४॥
transliteration: mahārājaprasādena vāhanāmbarabhūṣaṇam . catuṣpājjivalābhaḥ syāddāraputrādivardhanam.
separated_sandhi: mahārājaprasādena vāhanāmbarabhūṣaṇamcatuṣpājjivalābhaḥ syāt dāraputrādivardhanam
english: By the grace of the great king, there will be gains in vehicles, clothing, ornaments, quadrupeds (animals), and an increase in wife, sons, and so forth.

sanskrit: नूतनागारनिर्माणं नित्यं मिष्ठान्नभोजनं । सुगन्धपुष्पमाल्यादिरम्यस्त्र्यारोग्यसम्पदम् ॥५५॥
transliteration: nūtanāgāranirmāṇaṃ nityaṃ miṣṭhānnabhojanaṃ . sugandhapuṣpamālyādiramyastryārogyasampadam.
separated_sandhi: nūtanāgāranirmāṇam nityam miṣṭhānnabhojanamsugandhapuṣpamālyādiramyastryārogyasampadam
english: There will be construction of new houses, constant enjoyment of sweet food, and the acquisition of fragrant flowers, garlands, beautiful women, health, and prosperity.

sanskrit: दशाधिपेन संयुक्ते देहसौख्यं महत्सुखम् । सत्कीर्तिसुखसम्पत्तिगृहक्षेत्रादिवृद्धिकृत् ॥५६॥
transliteration: daśādhipena saṃyukte dehasaukhyaṃ mahatsukham . satkīrtisukhasampattigṛhakṣetrādivṛddhikṛt.
separated_sandhi: daśādhipena saṃyukte dehasaukhyam mahatsukhamsatkīrtisukhasampattigṛhakṣetrādivṛddhikṛt
english: When (the planet) is conjoined with the lord of the daśā, there will be bodily comfort and great happiness, bringing about an increase in good reputation, happiness, prosperity, houses, fields, and so forth.

sanskrit: नीचे वाऽस्तङ्गते शुक्रे पापग्रहयुतेक्षिते । भूनाशः पुत्रमित्रादिनाशनं पत्निनाशनम् ॥५७॥
transliteration: nīce vā'staṅgate śukre pāpagrahayutekṣite . bhūnāśaḥ putramitrādināśanaṃ patnināśanam.
separated_sandhi: nīce vā astaṅgate śukre pāpagrahayuta īkṣitebhūnāśaḥ putramitrādināśanam patnināśanam
english: When Venus (śukra) is debilitated or combust, and conjoined with or aspected by malefic planets, there will be loss of land, loss of sons, friends, and so forth, and loss of wife.

sanskrit: चतुष्पाज्जिवहानिः स्याद्राजद्वारे विरोधकृत् । धनस्थानगते शुक्रे स्वच्चे स्वक्षेत्रसंयुते ॥५८॥
transliteration: catuṣpājjivahāniḥ syādrājadvāre virodhakṛt . dhanasthānagate śukre svacce svakṣetrasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: catuṣpājjivahāniḥ syāt rājadvāre virodhakṛtdhanasthānagate śukre svacce svakṣetrasaṃyute
english: There will be loss of quadrupeds (animals) and creation of opposition at the royal court. (These effects occur) when Venus (śukra) is in the house of wealth, in its exalted sign, or situated in its own sign.

sanskrit: निधिलाभं महत्सौख्यं भू लाभं पुत्रसम्भवम् । भाग्यलाभादिपैर्युक्ते भाग्यवृद्धिः करोत्यसौ ॥५९॥
transliteration: nidhilābhaṃ mahatsaukhyaṃ bhū lābhaṃ putrasambhavam . bhāgyalābhādipairyukte bhāgyavṛddhiḥ karotyasau.
separated_sandhi: nidhilābham mahatsaukhyam bhū lābham putrasambhavambhāgyalābhādhipaiḥ yukte bhāgyavṛddhiḥ karoti asau
english: There will be acquisition of treasure, great happiness, gain of land, and the birth of a son. When associated with the lords of fortune (bhāgya) and gain (lābha), it causes an increase in prosperity.

sanskrit: महाराजप्रसादेन स्वेष्टसिद्धिः सुखावहा । देवब्राह्मणभक्तिश्च मुक्तविद्रुमलाभकृत् ॥६०॥
transliteration: mahārājaprasādena sveṣṭasiddhiḥ sukhāvahā . devabrāhmaṇabhaktiśca muktavidrumalābhakṛt.
separated_sandhi: mahārājaprasādena sveṣṭasiddhiḥ sukhāvahādevabrāhmaṇabhaktiḥ ca muktavidrumalābhakṛt
english: This brings the fulfillment of one's desires, yielding happiness, through the grace of a great king. There is also devotion (bhakti) to gods and Brahmins, and the acquisition of pearls and coral.

sanskrit: दायशाल्लाभगे शुक्रे त्रिकोणे केन्द्रगेऽपि वा । गृहक्षेत्राभिवृद्धिश्च वित्तलाभो महत्सुखम् ॥६१॥
transliteration: dāyaśāllābhage śukre trikoṇe kendrage'pi vā . gṛhakṣetrābhivṛddhiśca vittalābho mahatsukham.
