separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt lābhage śukre trikoṇe kendrage api vāgṛhakṣetrābhivṛddhiḥ ca vittalābhaḥ mahatsukham
english: When a planet is situated in the eleventh house (lābha) from the Daśā lord, or if Venus (Śukra) is in a trine (trikoṇa) or quadrant (kendra) house, there will be an increase in home and land, acquisition of wealth, and great happiness.

sanskrit: दायेशाद्रिपुरन्ध्रस्थे व्यये वा पापसंयुते । विदेशवासदुःखार्तिमृत्युचौरादिपीडनम् ॥६२॥
transliteration: dāyeśādripurandhrasthe vyaye vā pāpasaṃyute . videśavāsaduḥkhārtimṛtyucaurādipīḍanam.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt ripurandhrasthe vyaye vā pāpasaṃyutevideśavāsaduḥkhārtimṛtyucaurādipīḍanam
english: If a planet is situated in the 6th (ripu) or 8th (randhra) house from the Daśā lord, or in the 12th house (vyaya), or is conjoined with malefic planets (pāpa), there will be suffering from foreign residence, distress, death, and harassment from thieves and the like.

sanskrit: द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु अपमृत्युभयं भवेत् । तद्दोषविनिवृत्त्यर्थं रुद्रजाप्यं च कारयेत् ॥६३॥
transliteration: dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu apamṛtyubhayaṃ bhavet . taddoṣavinivṛttyarthaṃ rudrajāpyaṃ ca kārayet.
separated_sandhi: dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu apamṛtyubhayam bhavettaddoṣavinivṛttyartham rudrajāpyam ca kārayet
english: However, if the lord of the second house (dvitīya) and the lord of the seventh house (dyūna) are unfavorably situated, there may be fear of untimely death. To alleviate this affliction, one should arrange for the recitation of Rudra mantras.

sanskrit: श्वेतां गां रजतं दद्याच्छन्तिमाप्नोत्यसंशयः । शङ्करस्य प्रसादेन नाऽत्र कार्या विचारणा ॥६४॥
transliteration: śvetāṃ gāṃ rajataṃ dadyācchantimāpnotyasaṃśayaḥ . śaṅkarasya prasādena nā'tra kāryā vicāraṇā.
separated_sandhi: śvetām gām rajatam dadyāt śāntim āpnoti asaṁśayaḥ| śaṅkarasya prasādena na atra kāryā vicāraṇā
english: By donating a white cow and silver, one undoubtedly attains peace (śānti). Through the grace of Śaṅkara, there is no need for further deliberation on this matter.

sanskrit: चन्द्रस्यान्तर्गते भानौ स्वोच्चे स्वक्षेत्रसंयुते । केन्द्रे त्रिकोणे लाभे वा धने वा सोदरालये ॥६५॥
transliteration: candrasyāntargate bhānau svocce svakṣetrasaṃyute . kendre trikoṇe lābhe vā dhane vā sodarālaye.
separated_sandhi: candrasya antargate bhānau svocce svakṣetrasaṁyute| kendre trikoṇe lābhe vā dhane vā sodarālaye
english: When the Sun is within the Moon's planetary sub-period (antardasha), and is situated in its own exaltation sign or conjoined with its own sign, placed in a Kendra (angular house), Trikona (trine house), the 11th house (lābha), the 2nd house (dhana), or the 3rd house (sodarālaya)...

sanskrit: नष्टराज्यधनप्राप्तिर्गृहे कल्याणशोभनम् । मित्रराजप्रसादेन ग्रामभूम्यादिलाभ्कृत् ॥६६॥
transliteration: naṣṭarājyadhanaprāptirgṛhe kalyāṇaśobhanam . mitrarājaprasādena grāmabhūmyādilābhkṛt.
separated_sandhi: naṣṭarājyadhanaprāptiḥ gṛhe kalyāṇaśobhanam| mitrarājaprasādena grāmabhūmyādilābhakṛt
english: There will be the recovery of lost kingdom and wealth, auspiciousness and prosperity at home, and through the grace of a friendly ruler, one gains villages, land, and other assets.

sanskrit: गर्भाधानफलप्राप्तिर्गृहे लक्ष्मीः कटाक्षकृत् । भुक्त्यन्ते देह आलस्यं ज्वरपीडा भविष्यति ॥६७॥
transliteration: garbhādhānaphalaprāptirgṛhe lakṣmīḥ kaṭākṣakṛt . bhuktyante deha ālasyaṃ jvarapīḍā bhaviṣyati.
separated_sandhi: garbhādhānaphalaprāptiḥ gṛhe lakṣmīḥ kaṭākṣakṛt| bhukti ante deha ālasyam jvarapīḍā bhaviṣyati
english: There will be the attainment of conception and childbirth, and the goddess Lakṣmī will bestow her favor upon the home. However, towards the end of the planetary sub-period (bhukti), there will be bodily lethargy and the onset of feverish ailments.

sanskrit: दायेशादपि रन्ध्रस्थे व्यये वा पापसंयुते । नृपचौराहिभीतिश्च ज्वररोगादिसम्भवः ॥६८॥
transliteration: dāyeśādapi randhrasthe vyaye vā pāpasaṃyute . nṛpacaurāhibhītiśca jvararogādisambhavaḥ.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt api randhrasthe vyaye vā pāpasaṁyute| nṛpacaurāhibhītiḥ ca jvararogādisambhavaḥ
english: If the planetary lord of the daśā (planetary period) is even situated in the 8th house (randhra) or the 12th house (vyaya), or is conjoined with malefic planets, then there will be fear from rulers, thieves, and snakes, and the likelihood of fever and other diseases.

sanskrit: विदेशगमने चार्ति लभते न संशयः । द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु ज्वरपीडा भविष्यति ॥६९॥
transliteration: videśagamane cārti labhate na saṃśayaḥ . dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu jvarapīḍā bhaviṣyati.
separated_sandhi: videśagamane ca ārti labhate na saṃśayaḥdvitīyadyūnanāthe tu jvarapīḍā bhaviṣyati
english: There is no doubt that one experiences distress when traveling to foreign lands. However, when the planet ruling both the second and seventh houses is afflicted, then suffering from fever will occur.

sanskrit: तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं शिवपूजां च कारयेत् । ततः शान्तिभवाप्नोति शाङ्करस्य प्रसादतः ॥७०॥
transliteration: taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ śivapūjāṃ ca kārayet . tataḥ śāntibhavāpnoti śāṅkarasya prasādataḥ.
separated_sandhi: taddoṣaparihārārtham śivapūjām ca kārayettataḥ śāntibhava āpnoti śāṅkarasya prasādataḥ
english: For the purpose of remedying that defect, one should also perform worship of Shiva (śiva-pūjā). Thereafter, one obtains a peaceful existence through the grace of Shankara (Shiva).

sanskrit: कुजे स्वान्तर्गते विप्र लग्नात्केन्द्रत्रिकोणगे । लाभे वा शुभसंयुक्ते दुष्चिक्ये धनसंयुते ॥१॥
transliteration: kuje svāntargate vipra lagnātkendratrikoṇage . lābhe vā śubhasaṃyukte duṣcikye dhanasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: kuje svāntargate vipra lagnātkendratrikoṇagelābhe vā śubhasaṃyukte duścikye dhanasaṃyute
english: O Brahmin, when Mars (Kuja) is in its own sign, or situated in an angular (kendra) or trinal (trikoṇa) house from the ascendant (lagna), or in the house of gain (lābha), or conjoined with a benefic planet, or in the third house conjoined with a wealth-giving planet, [it brings auspicious results].

sanskrit: लग्नाधिपेन संयुक्ते राजाऽनुग्रहवैभवम् । लक्ष्मीकटोक्षचिह्नानि नष्टराज्यार्थलाभकृत् ॥२॥
transliteration: lagnādhipena saṃyukte rājā'nugrahavaibhavam . lakṣmīkaṭokṣacihnāni naṣṭarājyārthalābhakṛt.
separated_sandhi: lagnādhipena saṃyukte rājānugrahavaibhavamlakṣmīkaṭokṣacihnāni naṣṭarājyārthalābhakṛt
english: When (Mars is) conjoined with the lord of the ascendant (lagna), it brings the grandeur of royal favor (rāja-anugraha) and prosperity. There are signs of the favorable glance of Lakshmi (Lakṣmī), and it causes the recovery of lost kingdom and wealth.

sanskrit: पुत्रोत्सवादिसन्तोषो गृहे गोक्षीरसङ्कलम् । स्वोच्चे वा स्वर्क्षगे भौमे स्वांशे वा बलसंयुते ॥३॥
transliteration: putrotsavādisantoṣo gṛhe gokṣīrasaṅkalam . svocce vā svarkṣage bhaume svāṃśe vā balasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: putrotsavādisantoṣaḥ gṛhe gokṣīrasaṅkalamsvocche vā svarkṣage bhaume svāṃśe vā balasaṃyute
english: There is joy and celebrations related to children, and an abundance of cow's milk in the home. This happens when Mars (bhauma) is in its own exaltation sign (svocca), or situated in its own sign (svarkṣa), or in its own navāmśa (svaṃśa), or endowed with strength.

sanskrit: गृहक्षेत्राभिवृद्धिश्च गोमहिष्यादिलाभकृत् । महाराजप्रसादेन स्वेष्टसिद्धिः सुखावहा ॥४॥
transliteration: gṛhakṣetrābhivṛddhiśca gomahiṣyādilābhakṛt . mahārājaprasādena sveṣṭasiddhiḥ sukhāvahā.
separated_sandhi: gṛhakṣetrābhivṛddhiḥ ca gomahiṣyādilābhakṛtmahārājaprasādena sveṣṭasiddhiḥ sukhāvahā
english: There is growth in one's home and lands, bringing gains like cows and buffaloes. By the grace of a great king, one's desired objectives are achieved, bringing happiness.

sanskrit: अथाऽष्टमव्यये भौमे पापदृग्योगसंयुते । मूत्रकृर्च्छादिरोगश्च कष्टाधिक्यं व्रणाद्भयम् ॥५॥
transliteration: athā'ṣṭamavyaye bhaume pāpadṛgyogasaṃyute . mūtrakṛrcchādirogaśca kaṣṭādhikyaṃ vraṇādbhayam.
separated_sandhi: atha aṣṭamavyaye bhaume pāpadṛgyogasaṃyutemūtrakṛcchādirgaḥ ca kaṣṭādhikyam vraṇāt bhayam
english: Now, if Mars (Bhāuma) is situated in the eighth or twelfth house and is associated with malefic aspects or conjunctions, there will be diseases like urinary tract disorders, an excess of suffering, and fear arising from wounds.

sanskrit: चौराहिराजपीडा च धनधान्यपरुक्षयः । द्वितीये द्यूननाथे तु देहजाड्यं मनोव्यथा ॥६॥
transliteration: caurāhirājapīḍā ca dhanadhānyaparukṣayaḥ . dvitīye dyūnanāthe tu dehajāḍyaṃ manovyathā.
separated_sandhi: caurāhirājapīḍā ca dhanadhānyaparukṣayaḥdvitīye dyūnanāthe tu dehajāḍyam manovyathā
english: There is affliction from thieves, snakes, and rulers, along with the loss of wealth, grain, and bodily decay. However, when the lord of the seventh house is in the second house, there will be physical debility and mental anguish.

sanskrit: तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं रुद्रजाप्यं च कारयेत् । अनड्वाहं प्रदद्वाच्च कुजदोषनिवृत्तये ॥७॥
transliteration: taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ rudrajāpyaṃ ca kārayet . anaḍvāhaṃ pradadvācca kujadoṣanivṛttaye.
separated_sandhi: tat doṣaparihārārtham rudrajāpyam ca kārayetanaḍvāham pradadyāt ca kujadoṣanivṛttaye
english: To remedy those afflictions, one should perform the chanting (japa) of Rudra. And for the alleviation of Mars' (Kuja) malefic effects, one should donate a bull.

sanskrit: तेन तुष्टो भवेद् भौमः शङ्करस्य प्रसादतः । आरोग्यं कुरुते तस्य सर्वसम्पत्तिदायकम् ॥८॥
transliteration: tena tuṣṭo bhaved bhaumaḥ śaṅkarasya prasādataḥ . ārogyaṃ kurute tasya sarvasampattidāyakam.
separated_sandhi: tena tuṣṭaḥ bhavet bhaumaḥ śaṅkarasya prasādataḥārogyam kurute tasya sarvasampattidāyakam
english: By these actions, Mars (Bhāuma) becomes pleased through the grace of Śaṅkara. He bestows health upon that person and grants all prosperity.

sanskrit: कुजस्यान्तर्गते राहौ स्वोच्चे मूलत्रिकोणगे । शुभैर्युक्ते शुभैर्दृष्टे केन्द्रलाभतृकोणगे ॥९॥
transliteration: kujasyāntargate rāhau svocce mūlatrikoṇage . śubhairyukte śubhairdṛṣṭe kendralābhatṛkoṇage.
separated_sandhi: kujasya antargate rāhau svocce mūlatrikoṇageśubhaiḥ yukte śubhaiḥ dṛṣṭe kendralābhatrikoṇage
english: When Rāhu is in the sub-period of Mars, and Rāhu is situated in its own exaltation sign or its mūlatrikoṇa sign, conjoined with benefics, aspected by benefics, and located in a Kendra (angle) house, a Lābha (gain) house, or a Trikona (trine) house, then (good effects will follow, as described in subsequent verses).

sanskrit: तत्काले राजसम्मानं गृहभूम्यादिलाभकृत् । कलत्रपुत्रलाभः स्याद्व्यवसायात्फलाधिकम् ॥१०॥
transliteration: tatkāle rājasammānaṃ gṛhabhūmyādilābhakṛt . kalatraputralābhaḥ syādvyavasāyātphalādhikam.
separated_sandhi: tatkāle rājasammānam gṛhabhūmyādilābhakṛtkalatraputralābhaḥ syāt vyavasāyāt phalādhikam
english: During that period, there will be royal honor and gains of houses, lands, and so on. There will be acquisition of a wife and children, and abundant profit from one's business.

sanskrit: गङ्गास्नानफलावाप्तिं विदेशगमनं तथा । तथाऽष्टमव्यये राहौ पापयुक्तेऽथ वीक्षिते ॥११॥
transliteration: gaṅgāsnānaphalāvāptiṃ videśagamanaṃ tathā . tathā'ṣṭamavyaye rāhau pāpayukte'tha vīkṣite.
separated_sandhi: gaṅgāsnānaphalāvāptim videśagamanam tathātathā aṣṭamavyaye rāhau pāpayukte atha vīkṣite
english: There will be the attainment of the merit from bathing in the Ganges, and also travels to foreign lands. However, if Rāhu is in the 8th or 12th house, conjoined with or aspected by malefics, then (negative effects will follow, as described in subsequent verses).

sanskrit: चौराहिव्रणभीतिश्च चतुष्पाज्जीवनशनम् । वातपित्तरुजोभीतिः कारागृहनिवेशनम् ॥१२॥
transliteration: caurāhivraṇabhītiśca catuṣpājjīvanaśanam . vātapittarujobhītiḥ kārāgṛhaniveśanam.
separated_sandhi: caurāhivraṇabhītiḥ ca catuṣpājjīvanaśanamvātapiṭṭarujobhītiḥ kārāgṛhaniveśanam
english: There will be fear from thieves, snakes, and wounds. There will be destruction of quadrupeds (livestock), fear of diseases related to vāta and pitta, and confinement in a prison.

sanskrit: धनस्थानगते राहौ धननासं महद्भयम् । सप्तमस्थानगे वाऽपि ह्यपमृत्युभयं महत् ॥१३॥
transliteration: dhanasthānagate rāhau dhananāsaṃ mahadbhayam . saptamasthānage vā'pi hyapamṛtyubhayaṃ mahat.
separated_sandhi: dhanasthānagate rāhau dhananāśam mahat bhayamsaptamasthānage vā api hi apamṛtyubhayam mahat
english: If Rāhu is in the house of wealth (the 2nd house), there will be loss of wealth and great fear. And if it is also in the 7th house, there will indeed be a great fear of unnatural death.

sanskrit: नागपूजां प्रकुर्वीत देवब्राह्मणभोजनं । मृत्युञ्जयजपं कुर्यादायुरारोग्यलब्धये ॥१४॥
transliteration: nāgapūjāṃ prakurvīta devabrāhmaṇabhojanaṃ . mṛtyuñjayajapaṃ kuryādāyurārogyalabdhaye.
separated_sandhi: nāgapūjām prakurvīta devabrāhmaṇabhojanammṛtyuñjayajapam kuryāt āyuḥ ārogya labdhaye
english: One should perform serpent worship, feed Brahmins and deities, and chant the Mṛtyuñjaya mantra for the attainment of long life and good health.

sanskrit: कुजस्यान्तर्गते जीवे त्रिकोणे केन्द्रगेऽपि वा । लाभे वा धनसंयुक्ते तुङ्गांशे स्वांशगेपि वा ॥१५॥
transliteration: kujasyāntargate jīve trikoṇe kendrage'pi vā . lābhe vā dhanasaṃyukte tuṅgāṃśe svāṃśagepi vā.
separated_sandhi: kujasya antargate jīve trikoṇe kendrage api vālābhe vā dhanasaṃyukte tuṅgāṃśe svāṃśage api vā
english: When Jupiter (jīva) is in the sub-period of Mars (kuja), and Jupiter is situated in a trine (trikoṇa), a quadrant (kendra), the house of gains (lābha), or associated with wealth, or in its exalted division, or its own division.

sanskrit: सत्कीर्ती राजसम्मानं धनधान्यस्य वृद्धिकृत् । गृहे कल्याणसम्पत्तिर्दारपुत्रादिलाभकृत् ॥१६॥
transliteration: satkīrtī rājasammānaṃ dhanadhānyasya vṛddhikṛt . gṛhe kalyāṇasampattirdāraputrādilābhakṛt.
separated_sandhi: satkīrtiḥ rājasammānam dhanadhānyasya vṛddhikṛtgṛhe kalyāṇasampattiḥ dāraputrādilābhakṛt
english: (Under these planetary conditions, one gains) good fame, royal honor, and an increase in wealth and grains. Auspicious prosperity will prevail in the home, bringing gains of wife, sons, and other family members.

sanskrit: दायेशात्केन्द्रराशिस्थे त्रिकोणे लाभगेऽपि वा । भाग्यकर्माधिपैर्युक्ते वाहनाधिपसंयुते ॥१७॥
transliteration: dāyeśātkendrarāśisthe trikoṇe lābhage'pi vā . bhāgyakarmādhipairyukte vāhanādhipasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt kendrarāśisthe trikoṇe lābhage api vābhāgyakarmādhipaiḥ yukte vāhanādhipasaṃyute
english: If Jupiter is located in a quadrant (kendra) or a trine (trikoṇa) or the house of gains (lābha) from the lord of the Dasha (period), or if it is conjoined with the lords of fortune (bhāgya) and action (karma), or with the lord of conveyances.

sanskrit: लग्नाधिपसमायुक्ते शुभांशे शुभवर्गगे । गृहक्षेत्राभिवृद्धिश्च गृहे कल्याणसम्पदः ॥१८॥
transliteration: lagnādhipasamāyukte śubhāṃśe śubhavargage . gṛhakṣetrābhivṛddhiśca gṛhe kalyāṇasampadaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagnādhipasamāyukte śubhāṃśe śubhavargagegṛhakṣetrābhivṛddhiḥ ca gṛhe kalyāṇasampadaḥ
english: If Jupiter is perfectly conjoined with the lord of the Ascendant (lagna), or situated in an auspicious divisional chart (aṃśa) or auspicious varga, then there will be an increase in houses and lands, and prosperity and welfare in the home.

sanskrit: देहारोग्यं महत्कीर्तिगृहे गोकुलसंग्रहः । चतुष्पाज्जीवलाभः स्याद्व्यवसायात्फलाधिकम् ॥१९॥
transliteration: dehārogyaṃ mahatkīrtigṛhe gokulasaṃgrahaḥ . catuṣpājjīvalābhaḥ syādvyavasāyātphalādhikam.
separated_sandhi: deha-ārogyam mahat-kīrtiḥ gṛhe gokula-saṅgrahaḥcatuṣpāt-jīva-lābhaḥ syāt vyavasāyāt phala-adhikam
english: One will experience bodily health, great fame, and an accumulation of cattle in the home. There will be gains from livestock, and abundant results from one's business.

sanskrit: कलपुत्रसौख्यं च राजसम्मानवैभवम् । षष्ठाष्टमव्यये जीवे नीचे वास्तंगते सति ॥२०॥
transliteration: kalaputrasaukhyaṃ ca rājasammānavaibhavam . ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyaye jīve nīce vāstaṃgate sati.
separated_sandhi: kalaputra-saukhyam ca rāja-sammāna-vaibhavamṣaṣṭha-aṣṭama-vyaye jīve nīce vā astaṅgate sati
english: Happiness from excellent children and the splendor of royal honor (are denied) when Jupiter (jīva) is in the sixth, eighth, or twelfth house, or when he is debilitated or combust.

sanskrit: पापग्रहेण संयुक्ते दृष्टे वा दुर्बले सति । चौराहिनृपभीतिश्च पित्तरोगादिसम्भवम् ॥२१॥
transliteration: pāpagraheṇa saṃyukte dṛṣṭe vā durbale sati . caurāhinṛpabhītiśca pittarogādisambhavam.
separated_sandhi: pāpa-graheṇa saṃyukte dṛṣṭe vā dur-bale saticaura-ahi-nṛpa-bhītiḥ ca pitta-roga-ādi-sambhavam
english: Fear from thieves, snakes, and kings, as well as the possibility of bile-related and other diseases, arise when (Jupiter, jīva, is) conjoined with a malefic planet, aspected by one, or is weak.

sanskrit: प्रेतबाधा भृत्यनाशः सोदराणां विनाशनम् । द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु ह्यपमृत्युज्वरादिकम् । तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं शिवसाहस्रकं जपेत् ॥२२॥
transliteration: pretabādhā bhṛtyanāśaḥ sodarāṇāṃ vināśanam . dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu hyapamṛtyujvarādikam . taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ śivasāhasrakaṃ japet.
separated_sandhi: preta-bādhā bhṛtya-nāśaḥ sa-odarāṇāmvināśanam dvitīya-dyūna-nāthe tuhi apa-mṛtyu-jvara-ādikamtat-doṣa-parihāra-artham śiva-sāhasrakam japet
english: Affliction by spirits, loss of servants, and destruction of siblings (occur). Furthermore, if the lord of the second and seventh houses (is afflicted), there is indeed untimely death and fevers, etc. To remedy these defects, one should chant the thousand names of Shiva.

sanskrit: कुजस्यान्तर्गते मन्दे स्वर्क्षे केन्द्रत्रिकोणगे । मूलत्रिकोणकेन्द्रे वा तुङ्गांशे स्वांशगे सति ॥२३॥
transliteration: kujasyāntargate mande svarkṣe kendratrikoṇage . mūlatrikoṇakendre vā tuṅgāṃśe svāṃśage sati.
separated_sandhi: kujasya antargate mande sva-ṛkṣe kendra-trikoṇa-gemūla-trikoṇa-kendre vā tuṅga-aṃśe sva-aṃśage sati
english: When Saturn (manda) is in the sub-period of Mars (kuja), and Saturn is situated in his own sign, or in a Kendra (angular) or Trikona (trine) house, or in his Moola Trikona or Kendra, or in his exalted varga (harmonic chart division), or in his own varga.

sanskrit: लग्नाधिपतिना वापि शुभदृष्टियुतेऽसिते । राज्यसौख्यं यशोवृद्धिः स्वग्रामे धान्यवृद्धिकृत् ॥२४॥
transliteration: lagnādhipatinā vāpi śubhadṛṣṭiyute'site . rājyasaukhyaṃ yaśovṛddhiḥ svagrāme dhānyavṛddhikṛt.
separated_sandhi: lagnādhipatinā vā api śubhadṛṣṭiyute asiterājyasaukhyam yaśovṛddhiḥ svagrāme dhānyavṛddhikṛt
english: If Saturn is conjoined with or aspected by benefics, or even by the lord of the ascendant, it bestows happiness from the government, an increase in fame, and causes the prosperity of grains in one's own village.

sanskrit: पुत्रपौत्रसमायुक्तो गृहे गोधनसंग्रहः । स्ववारे राजसम्मानं स्वमासे पुत्रवृद्धिकृत् ॥२५॥
transliteration: putrapautrasamāyukto gṛhe godhanasaṃgrahaḥ . svavāre rājasammānaṃ svamāse putravṛddhikṛt.
separated_sandhi: putrapautrasamāyuktaḥ gṛhe godhanasaṅgrahaḥsvavāre rājasammānam svamāse putravṛddhikṛt
english: The native is endowed with sons and grandsons, and has an accumulation of cows and wealth in the home. On one's own weekday, there is royal respect, and in one's own month, an increase in progeny.

sanskrit: नीचादिक्षेत्रगे मन्दे तथाऽष्टव्ययराशिगे । म्लेच्छवर्गप्रभुभयं धनधन्यादिनाशनम् ॥२६॥
transliteration: nīcādikṣetrage mande tathā'ṣṭavyayarāśige . mlecchavargaprabhubhayaṃ dhanadhanyādināśanam.
separated_sandhi: nīcādikṣetrage mande tathā aṣṭavyayarāśigemlecchavargaprabhubhayam dhanadhanyādināśanam
english: When Saturn is in debilitated signs or other adverse signs, and similarly, when he is in the 8th or 12th house, there will be fear from low-class rulers, and destruction of wealth, grains, and other possessions.

sanskrit: निगडे बन्धनं व्याधिरन्ते क्षेत्रनाशकृत् । द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु पापयुक्ते महद्भयम् ॥२७॥
transliteration: nigaḍe bandhanaṃ vyādhirante kṣetranāśakṛt . dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu pāpayukte mahadbhayam.
separated_sandhi: nigaḍe bandhanam vyādhiḥ ante kṣetranāśakṛtdvitīyadyūnanāthe tu pāpayukte mahadbhayam
english: There will be imprisonment (bandhanam) in fetters, disease, and ultimately, destruction of property. But if the lords of the 2nd and 7th houses are conjoined with malefics, there will be great fear.

sanskrit: धननाशश्च सञ्चारे राजद्वेषो मनोव्यथा । चौराग्निनृपपीडा च सहोदरविनाशनम् ॥२८॥
transliteration: dhananāśaśca sañcāre rājadveṣo manovyathā . caurāgninṛpapīḍā ca sahodaravināśanam.
separated_sandhi: dhananāśaḥ ca sañcāre rājadvṣaḥ manovyathācaurāgninṛpapīḍā ca sahodaravināśanam
english: There will be loss of wealth, especially during travel or movement, enmity from the government, and mental anguish. Additionally, there will be affliction from thieves, fire, and the king, along with the loss of siblings.

sanskrit: बन्धुद्वेषः प्रमाद्यैश्च जीवहानिश्च जायते । अकस्माच्च मृतेर्भीतिः पुत्रदारादिपीडनम् ॥२९॥
transliteration: bandhudveṣaḥ pramādyaiśca jīvahāniśca jāyate . akasmācca mṛterbhītiḥ putradārādipīḍanam.
separated_sandhi: bandhudveṣaḥ pramādyaiḥ ca jīvahāniḥ ca jāyateakasmāt ca mṛteḥ bhītiḥ putradārādipīḍanam
english: Hatred towards relatives, negligence, and loss of life manifest. There is also sudden fear of death and affliction to one's children, spouse, and others.

sanskrit: कारागृहादिभीदिश्च राजदण्डो महद्भयम् । दायेशात्केन्द्रराशिस्थे लाभस्थे वा त्रिकोणगे ॥३०॥
transliteration: kārāgṛhādibhīdiśca rājadaṇḍo mahadbhayam . dāyeśātkendrarāśisthe lābhasthe vā trikoṇage.
separated_sandhi: kārāgṛhādibhītiḥ ca rājadaṇḍaḥ mahat bhayamdāyeśāt kendrarāśisthe lābhaste vā trikoṇage
english: There is fear of imprisonment (kārāgṛha) and the like, royal punishment, and great dread. This occurs when the lord of the "dāya" (planetary period) is situated in a "kendra" (angular) house, or in the house of gain ("lābhasthāna"), or in a "trikoṇa" (trinal) house.

sanskrit: विदेशयानं लभते दुष्कीर्तिर्विविधा तथा । पापकर्मरतो नित्यं बहुजीवादिहिंसकः ॥३१॥
transliteration: videśayānaṃ labhate duṣkīrtirvividhā tathā . pāpakarmarato nityaṃ bahujīvādihiṃsakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: videśayānam labhate duṣkīrtiḥ vividhā tathāpāpakarmarataḥ nityam bahujīvādihinsakaḥ
english: One undertakes foreign travel and also acquires various kinds of ill-repute. Such a person is constantly engaged in sinful actions and harms many living beings.

sanskrit: विक्रयः क्षेत्रहानिश्च स्थानभ्रंशो मनोव्यथा । रणे पराजयश्चैव मूत्रकृर्च्छान्महद्भयम् ॥३२॥
transliteration: vikrayaḥ kṣetrahāniśca sthānabhraṃśo manovyathā . raṇe parājayaścaiva mūtrakṛrcchānmahadbhayam.
separated_sandhi: vikrayaḥ kṣetrahāniḥ ca sthānabhraṃśaḥ manovyathāraṇe parājayaḥ ca eva mūtrakṛcchrāt mahat bhayam
english: There is sale or loss of possessions, loss of land, displacement from one's place, and mental anguish. Also, defeat in battle and great fear arising from urinary difficulties (mūtrakṛcchra).

sanskrit: दायेशादथ रन्ध्रे वा व्यये वा पापसंयुते । तद्भुक्तौ मरणं ज्ञेयं नृपचौरादिपीडनम् ॥३३॥
transliteration: dāyeśādatha randhre vā vyaye vā pāpasaṃyute . tadbhuktau maraṇaṃ jñeyaṃ nṛpacaurādipīḍanam.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt atha randhre vā vyaye vā pāpasaṃyutetat bhuktau maraṇam jñeyam nṛpacaurādipīḍanam
english: Furthermore, if the lord of the "dāya" (planetary period) is situated in the 8th house ("randhrabhāva") or the 12th house ("vyayabhāva") and is associated with malefic planets, then during its sub-period ("bhukti"), death should be understood as a possibility, along with affliction from rulers, thieves, and similar entities.

sanskrit: वातपीडा चशूलादिज्ञातिश्त्रुभयं भवेत् ॥३४॥
transliteration: vātapīḍā caśūlādijñātiśtrubhayaṃ bhavet.
separated_sandhi: vātapīḍā ca śūlādijñātiśatrubhayam bhavet
english: There will be affliction from vāta (wind-related ailments), sharp pains, and fear from relatives and enemies.

sanskrit: तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं मृत्युञ्जयजपं चरेत् । ततः सुखमवाप्नोति शङ्करस्य प्रसादतः ॥३५॥
transliteration: taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ mṛtyuñjayajapaṃ caret . tataḥ sukhamavāpnoti śaṅkarasya prasādataḥ.
separated_sandhi: tat doṣaparihārārtham mṛtyuñjayajapam carettataḥ sukham avāpnoti śaṅkarasya prasādataḥ
english: To alleviate these defects, one should perform the recitation (japa) of the Mṛtyuñjaya mantra. Then, through the grace of Śaṅkara, one attains happiness.

sanskrit: कुजस्यान्तर्गते सौम्ये लग्नात्केन्द्रत्रिकोणगे । सत्कथाश्चाऽजपादानं धर्मबुद्धिर्महद्यशः ॥३६॥
transliteration: kujasyāntargate saumye lagnātkendratrikoṇage . satkathāścā'japādānaṃ dharmabuddhirmahadyaśaḥ.
separated_sandhi: kujasya antargate saumye lagnāt kendratrikoṇagesatkathāḥ ca ajapādānam dharmabuddhiḥ mahat yaśaḥ
english: When Mercury is in the sub-period (antargata) of Mars and situated in an angular (kendra) or trinal (trikoṇa) house from the ascendant (Lagna), there will be good discourses, the gift (dāna) of Ajapā (mantra), an inclination towards righteousness (dharma), and great fame.

sanskrit: नीतिमार्गप्रसङ्गश्च नित्यं मिष्टान्नभोजनम् । वाहनाम्बरपश्वादिर्राजकर्म सुखानि च ॥३७॥
transliteration: nītimārgaprasaṅgaśca nityaṃ miṣṭānnabhojanam . vāhanāmbarapaśvādirrājakarma sukhāni ca.
separated_sandhi: nītimārgaprasaṅgaḥ ca nityam miṣṭānnabhojanamvāhanāmbarapaśvādi rājakarma sukhāni ca
english: There will also be engagement with the path of righteous policy, regular consumption of sweet food, possession of vehicles, garments, cattle, etc., royal service, and various comforts.

sanskrit: कृषिकर्मफले सिद्धिर्वारणाम्बरभूषणम् । नीचे वास्तङ्गते वापि षष्ठाष्टव्ययगेऽपि वा ॥३८॥
transliteration: kṛṣikarmaphale siddhirvāraṇāmbarabhūṣaṇam . nīce vāstaṅgate vāpi ṣaṣṭhāṣṭavyayage'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: kṛṣikarmaphale siddhiḥ vāraṇāmbarabhūṣaṇam nīcevā astamgate vā api ṣaṣṭhāṣṭavyayage api vā
english: There will be success (siddhi) in agricultural undertakings, and acquisition of elephants, garments, and ornaments. However, if (Mercury is) debilitated (nīca), combust (astamgata), or situated in the 6th, 8th, or 12th house, then [the aforementioned good results will be affected or negated].

sanskrit: हृद्रोगं मानहानिश्च निगडं बन्धुनाशनम् । दारपुत्रार्थनाशः स्याच्चतुष्पाज्जीवनाशनम् ॥३९॥
transliteration: hṛdrogaṃ mānahāniśca nigaḍaṃ bandhunāśanam . dāraputrārthanāśaḥ syāccatuṣpājjīvanāśanam.
separated_sandhi: hṛdrogaṃ mānahāniḥ ca nigaḍaṃ bandhunāśanamdāraputrārthanāśaḥ syāt catuṣpāt jīvanāśanam
english: Heart disease, loss of honor, imprisonment, ruin of relatives, and loss of wife, sons, and wealth may occur, along with the destruction of quadruped animals.

sanskrit: दशाधिपेन संयुक्ते शत्रुवृद्धिर्महद्भयम् । विदेशगमनं चैव नानारोगास्तथैव च ॥४०॥
transliteration: daśādhipena saṃyukte śatruvṛddhirmahadbhayam . videśagamanaṃ caiva nānārogāstathaiva ca.
separated_sandhi: daśādhipena saṃyukte śatruvṛddhiḥ mahadbhayamvideśagamanaṃ ca eva nānārogāḥ tathā eva ca
english: When associated with the ruler of the planetary period (daśā), there will be an increase in enemies and great fear. Also, there will be foreign travel and various diseases.

sanskrit: राजद्वारे विरोधश्च कलहः स्वजनैरपि । दायेशात्केन्द्रत्रिकोणे वा स्वोच्चे युक्तार्थलाभकृत् ॥४१॥
transliteration: rājadvāre virodhaśca kalahaḥ svajanairapi . dāyeśātkendratrikoṇe vā svocce yuktārthalābhakṛt.
separated_sandhi: rājadvāre virodhaḥ ca kalahaḥ svajanaiḥ apidāyeśāt kendratrikoṇe vā svocce yukthārthalābhakṛt
english: There will be opposition at the royal court and quarrels even with one's own relatives. However, if (a planet is placed) in a quadrant or trine from the daśā lord, or in its own sign of exaltation, it brings appropriate financial gains.

sanskrit: अनेकधननाथत्वं राजसम्मनमेव च । भूपालयोगं कुरुते धनम्बरविभूषणम् ॥४२॥
transliteration: anekadhananāthatvaṃ rājasammanameva ca . bhūpālayogaṃ kurute dhanambaravibhūṣaṇam.
separated_sandhi: anekadhananāthatvaṃ rājasammanam eva cabhūpālayogaṃ kurute dhanambaravibhūṣaṇam
english: And indeed, it causes one to become the master of much wealth, to receive royal honor, to attain kingship (yoga), and to acquire wealth, garments, and ornaments.

sanskrit: भूरवाद्यमृदंगादि सेनापत्यं महत्सुखम् । विद्याविनोदविमला वस्त्रवाहनभूषणम् ॥४३॥
transliteration: bhūravādyamṛdaṃgādi senāpatyaṃ mahatsukham . vidyāvinodavimalā vastravāhanabhūṣaṇam.
separated_sandhi: bhūravādyamṛdaṅgādi senāpatyaṃ mahatsukhamvidyāvinodavimalā vastravāhanabhūṣaṇam
english: It grants command of an army, great happiness, pure enjoyment of knowledge, and possession of clothes, conveyances, and ornaments, along with loud instrumental music, mṛdaṅgas, and so on.

sanskrit: दारपुत्रादिविभवं गृहे लक्ष्मीः कटाक्षकृत् । दायेशात्षष्ठरिःफस्थे रन्ध्रे वा पापसंयुते ॥४४॥
transliteration: dāraputrādivibhavaṃ gṛhe lakṣmīḥ kaṭākṣakṛt . dāyeśātṣaṣṭhariḥphasthe randhre vā pāpasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: dāraputrādivibhavam gṛhe lakṣmīḥ kaṭākṣakṛtdāyeśāt ṣaṣṭhariḥphasthe randhre vā pāpasaṃyute
english: Wealth from wife, children, and other possessions, and the grace of Lakṣmī (goddess of wealth) in the home, are diminished when the lord of the Daśā (major planetary period) is situated in the 6th, 12th, or 8th house, or is conjoined with malefic planets (pāpa).

sanskrit: तद्दाये मानोहानिः स्यात्क्रूरबुद्धिस्तु क्रूरवाक् । चौराग्निनृपपीडा च मार्गे दस्युभयादिकम् ॥४५॥
transliteration: taddāye mānohāniḥ syātkrūrabuddhistu krūravāk . caurāgninṛpapīḍā ca mārge dasyubhayādikam.
separated_sandhi: tad dāye mānohāniḥ syāt krūrabuddhiḥ tu krūravākcaurāgninṛpapīḍā ca mārge dasyubhayādikam
english: During that Daśā (major planetary period), there would be a loss of honor, a cruel mind, harsh speech, and afflictions from thieves, fire, or rulers. Also, there would be fear of robbers, etc., on journeys.

sanskrit: अकस्मात्कलहश्चैव बुधमुक्तौ न संशयः । द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु महाव्याधिर्भयङ्करः ॥४६॥
transliteration: akasmātkalahaścaiva budhamuktau na saṃśayaḥ . dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu mahāvyādhirbhayaṅkaraḥ.
separated_sandhi: akasmāt kalahaḥ ca eva budhamuktau na saṃśayaḥdvitīyadyūnanāthe tu mahāvyādhiḥ bhayaṅkaraḥ
english: And suddenly there will be quarrels, certainly, during the sub-period of Mercury (Budha). However, if the lord of the 2nd and 7th houses is (also adversely placed), a terrifying great disease will manifest.

sanskrit: अश्वदानं प्रकुर्वीत विष्णोर्नामसहस्रकम् । सर्वसम्पत्प्रदं विप्र सर्वारिष्टप्रशान्तये ॥४७॥
transliteration: aśvadānaṃ prakurvīta viṣṇornāmasahasrakam . sarvasampatpradaṃ vipra sarvāriṣṭapraśāntaye.
separated_sandhi: aśvadānam prakurvīta viṣṇoḥ nāmasahasrakamsarvasampatpradam vipra sarvāriṣṭapraśāntaye
english: O Brahmin (vipra), one should perform the donation (dāna) of a horse, and recite the thousand names of Viṣṇu (Viṣṇu Sahasranāma). This grants all prosperity and is for the pacification of all calamities (ariṣṭa).

sanskrit: कुजस्यान्तर्गते केतौ त्रिकोणे केन्द्रगेऽपि वा । दिश्चिक्ये लाभगे वाऽपि शुभयुक्ते शुभेक्षिते ॥४८॥
transliteration: kujasyāntargate ketau trikoṇe kendrage'pi vā . diścikye lābhage vā'pi śubhayukte śubhekṣite.
separated_sandhi: kujasya antargate ketau trikoṇe kendrage api vādiścikye lābhage vā api śubhayukte śubhekṣite
english: When Ketu (South Node of the Moon) is in the sub-period of Mars (Kuja), and is situated in a trine (1st, 5th, or 9th) house, or even in a quadrant (1st, 4th, 7th, or 10th) house, or in the "diścikya" position, or in the house of gain (11th), and is conjoined with benefics or aspected by benefics...

sanskrit: राजानुग्रहशान्तिश्च बहुसौख्यं धनागमः । किञ्चित्फलं दशादौ तु भूलाभः पुत्रलाभकृत् ॥४९॥
transliteration: rājānugrahaśāntiśca bahusaukhyaṃ dhanāgamaḥ . kiñcitphalaṃ daśādau tu bhūlābhaḥ putralābhakṛt.
separated_sandhi: rāja anugraha śāntiḥ ca bahusaukhyam dhana āgamaḥkiñcit phalam daśā ādau tu bhū lābhaḥ putra lābhakṛt
english: At the beginning of the planetary period (daśā), there is royal favor, peace, great happiness, and the inflow of wealth. Some benefits manifest, such as the acquisition of land and the birth of sons.

sanskrit: राजसंलाभकार्याणि चतुष्पाज्जीवलाभकृत् । योगकारकसंस्थाने बलवीर्यसमन्विते ॥५०॥
transliteration: rājasaṃlābhakāryāṇi catuṣpājjīvalābhakṛt . yogakārakasaṃsthāne balavīryasamanvite.
separated_sandhi: rāja saṃlābha kāryāṇi catuṣpāt jīva lābhakṛtyoga kāraka saṃsthāne bala vīrya samanvite
english: Activities involving contact with kings are undertaken, and there is a gain of quadrupeds and other living beings. This occurs when the "yoga"-forming planet (yogakāraka) is positioned with strength and vitality.

sanskrit: पुत्रलाभो यशोवृद्धिर्गृहे लक्ष्मीः कटाक्षकृत् । भृत्यवर्गधनप्राप्तिः सेनापत्यं महत्सुखम् ॥५१॥
transliteration: putralābho yaśovṛddhirgṛhe lakṣmīḥ kaṭākṣakṛt . bhṛtyavargadhanaprāptiḥ senāpatyaṃ mahatsukham.
separated_sandhi: putra lābhaḥ yaśaḥ vṛddhiḥ gṛhe lakṣmīḥ kaṭākṣakṛtbhṛtya varga dhana prāptiḥ senāpatyam mahat sukham
english: There is the acquisition of sons, an increase in fame, and prosperity (Lakṣmī) at home, bringing favorable outcomes. Also, there is a gain of wealth through servants, attainment of generalship, and great happiness.

sanskrit: भूपालमित्रं कुरुते यागाम्बरादिभूषणम् । दायेशात्षष्ठरिःफस्थे रन्ध्रे वा पापसंयुते ॥५२॥
transliteration: bhūpālamitraṃ kurute yāgāmbarādibhūṣaṇam . dāyeśātṣaṣṭhariḥphasthe randhre vā pāpasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: bhūpālamitram kurute yāgāmbarādibhūṣaṇamdāyeśāt ṣaṣṭha riḥphasthe randhre vā pāpasaṃyute
english: One cultivates the friendship of kings, and acquires adornments like robes and other items intended for Vedic rituals (yajña), even when the lord of inheritance (dāya) is situated in the sixth, twelfth, or eighth house, or is conjoined with malefic planets.

sanskrit: कलहो दन्तरोगश्च चौरव्याघ्रादिपीडनम् । ज्वरातिसारकुष्ठादिदारपुत्रादिपीडनम् ॥५३॥
transliteration: kalaho dantarogaśca cauravyāghrādipīḍanam . jvarātisārakuṣṭhādidāraputrādipīḍanam.
separated_sandhi: kalahaḥ danta rogaḥ ca caura vyāghra ādi pīḍanamjvara atisāra kuṣṭha ādi dāra putra ādi pīḍanam
english: (The daśā brings) quarrels, tooth diseases, and harassment from thieves, tigers, and other dangers. There is also affliction from fever, dysentery, leprosy, and similar ailments, as well as distress from one's wife, sons, and other family members.

sanskrit: द्वितीयसप्तमस्थाने देहे व्याधिर्भविष्यति । अपमानमनस्तापो धनधान्यादिप्रच्युतिम् ॥५४॥
transliteration: dvitīyasaptamasthāne dehe vyādhirbhaviṣyati . apamānamanastāpo dhanadhānyādipracyutim.
separated_sandhi: dvitīyasaptamasthāne dehe vyādhiḥ bhaviṣyatiapamāna-manastāpaḥ dhana-dhānya-ādi-pracyutim
english: If [a certain planetary influence or position, implied by context] is in the second and seventh houses, there will be physical illness in the body, disgrace and mental anguish, and a loss of wealth, grains, and other possessions.

sanskrit: कुजस्यान्तर्गते शुक्रे केन्द्रलाभत्रिकोणगे । स्वोच्चे वा स्वर्क्षगे वाऽपिशुभस्थानाधिपेऽथवा ॥५५॥
transliteration: kujasyāntargate śukre kendralābhatrikoṇage . svocce vā svarkṣage vā'piśubhasthānādhipe'thavā.
separated_sandhi: kujasya antargate śukre kendra-lābha-trikoṇage svoccevā sva-ṛkṣage vā api śubha-sthāna-adhipe athavā
english: During the sub-period (antardaśā) of Mars, if Venus is located in a Kendra (angular), Lābha (11th), or Trikona (trine) house, or if it is in its exaltation sign, or in its own sign, or if it is the lord of an auspicious house...

sanskrit: राज्यलाभो महत्सौख्यं गजाश्वाम्बरभूषणम् । लग्नाधिपेन सम्बन्धे पुत्रदारादिवर्धनम् ॥५६॥
transliteration: rājyalābho mahatsaukhyaṃ gajāśvāmbarabhūṣaṇam . lagnādhipena sambandhe putradārādivardhanam.
separated_sandhi: rājya-lābhaḥ mahat-saukhyam gaja-aśva-ambara-bhūṣaṇamlagna-adhipeṇa sambandhe putra-dāra-ādi-vardhanam
english: ... [such a Venus will bring] gain of kingdom or high position, great happiness, and the acquisition of elephants, horses, garments, and ornaments. If there is a connection with the ascendant lord, there will be an increase in sons, wife, and so on.

sanskrit: आयुषो वृद्धिरैश्वर्यं भाग्यवृद्धिसुखं भवेत् । दायेशात्केन्द्रकोणस्थे लाभे वा धनगेऽपि वा ॥५७॥
transliteration: āyuṣo vṛddhiraiśvaryaṃ bhāgyavṛddhisukhaṃ bhavet . dāyeśātkendrakoṇasthe lābhe vā dhanage'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: āyuṣaḥ vṛddhiḥ aiśvaryam bhāgya-vṛddhi-sukham bhavetdāyeśāt kendra-koṇa-sthe lābhe vā dhanage api vā
english: There will be an increase in lifespan, prosperity, and happiness resulting from increased fortune. Furthermore, if [the planet] is situated in an angular (Kendra) or trine (Kona) house from the Daśā lord, or in the eleventh house (Lābha), or even in the second house (Dhana)...

sanskrit: तत्काले श्रियमाप्नोति पुत्रलाभं महत्सुखम् । स्वप्रभोश्च महत्सौख्यं धनवस्त्रादिलाभकृत् ॥५८॥
transliteration: tatkāle śriyamāpnoti putralābhaṃ mahatsukham . svaprabhośca mahatsaukhyaṃ dhanavastrādilābhakṛt.
separated_sandhi: tat-kāle śriyam āpnoti putra-lābham mahat-sukhamsva-prabhoḥ ca mahat-saukhyam dhana-vastra-ādi-lābha-kṛt
english: At that time, one attains prosperity, gain of sons, and great happiness. And for one's own lord (or self), there will be great happiness, bringing gains of wealth, garments, and other possessions.

sanskrit: महारजप्रसादेन ग्रामभूम्यादिलाभदम् । भुक्त्यन्ते फलमाप्नोति गीतनृत्यादिलाभकृत् ॥५९॥
transliteration: mahārajaprasādena grāmabhūmyādilābhadam . bhuktyante phalamāpnoti gītanṛtyādilābhakṛt.
separated_sandhi: mahārajaprasādena grāmabhūmyādilābhadambhuktyante phalam āpnoti gītanṛtyādilābhakṛt
english: By the grace of a great king, this period grants gains such as villages and lands. At the end of the sub-period (bhukti), one obtains results, specifically profits from music, dance, and similar activities.

sanskrit: पुण्यतीर्थस्नानलाभं कर्माधिपसमन्विते । पुण्यधर्मदयाकूपतडागं कारयिष्यति ॥६०॥
transliteration: puṇyatīrthasnānalābhaṃ karmādhipasamanvite . puṇyadharmadayākūpataḍāgaṃ kārayiṣyati.
separated_sandhi: puṇyatīrthasnānalābham karmādhipasamanvitepuṇyadharmadayākūpataḍāgam kārayiṣyati
english: When [the relevant planet/period] is associated with the lord of (karma) (actions), one will obtain the benefit of bathing in sacred pilgrimage sites. Such a person will also cause the construction of wells and ponds for the sake of merit, religious duty (dharma), and compassion.

sanskrit: दायेशाद्रन्ध्ररिष्फस्थे षष्ठे वा पापसंयुते । करोति दुःखबाहुल्यं देहपीडां धनक्षयं ॥६१॥
transliteration: dāyeśādrandhrariṣphasthe ṣaṣṭhe vā pāpasaṃyute . karoti duḥkhabāhulyaṃ dehapīḍāṃ dhanakṣayaṃ.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt randhrariṣphasthe ṣaṣṭhe vā pāpasaṃyutekaroti duḥkhabāhulyam dehapīḍām dhanakṣayam
english: When the lord of the planetary period (dāyeśa) is situated in the eighth, twelfth, or sixth house, or is conjoined with a malefic planet, it causes a multitude of suffering, bodily afflictions, and loss of wealth.

sanskrit: राजचौरादिभीतिञ्च गृहे कलहमेव च । दारपुत्रादिपीडां च गोमहिष्यादिनाशकृत् ॥६२॥
transliteration: rājacaurādibhītiñca gṛhe kalahameva ca . dāraputrādipīḍāṃ ca gomahiṣyādināśakṛt.
separated_sandhi: rājacaurādibhītim ca gṛhe kalaham eva cadāraputrādipīḍām ca gomahiṣyādināśakṛt
english: (This planetary influence) also causes fear from rulers, thieves, and others, as well as quarrels in the home. It brings affliction to one's wife, children, and so on, and causes the destruction of cows, buffaloes, and similar livestock.

sanskrit: द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु देहबाधा भविष्यति । श्वेतां गां महिषीं दद्यादायुरारोग्यवृद्धये ॥६३॥
transliteration: dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu dehabādhā bhaviṣyati . śvetāṃ gāṃ mahiṣīṃ dadyādāyurārogyavṛddhaye.
separated_sandhi: dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu dehabādhā bhaviṣyatiśvetām gām mahiṣīm dadyāt āyurārogyavṛddhaye
english: But if the lord of the second or seventh house (is ill-placed or afflicted, implied), there will be bodily afflictions. To increase longevity and good health, one should donate a white cow or buffalo.

sanskrit: कुजस्यान्तर्गते सूर्ये स्वोच्चे स्वक्षेत्रकेन्द्रगे । मूलत्रिकोणलाभे वा भाग्यकर्मेशसंयुते ॥६४॥
transliteration: kujasyāntargate sūrye svocce svakṣetrakendrage . mūlatrikoṇalābhe vā bhāgyakarmeśasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: kujasya antargate sūrye svocce svakṣetrakendragemūlatrikoṇalābhe vā bhāgyakarmeśasaṃyute
english: When the Sun, during its sub-period within the main period of Mars, is in its exaltation sign, its own sign, an angular house, its mūlatrikoṇa sign, or a house of gain, or is conjoined with the lords of the ninth (fortune) and tenth (action) houses,

sanskrit: तद्भुक्तौ वाहनं कीर्तिं पुत्रलाभं च विन्दति । धनधान्यसमृद्धिः स्याद् गृहे कल्याणसम्पदः ॥६५॥
transliteration: tadbhuktau vāhanaṃ kīrtiṃ putralābhaṃ ca vindati . dhanadhānyasamṛddhiḥ syād gṛhe kalyāṇasampadaḥ.
separated_sandhi: tat bhuktau vāhanam kīrtim putralābham ca vindatidhanadhānyasamṛddhiḥ syāt gṛhe kalyāṇasampadaḥ
english: During that sub-period, the native obtains conveyances, fame, and the birth of sons. There will be an abundance of wealth and grains, and well-being and prosperity in the household.

sanskrit: क्षेमारोग्यं महद्धैर्यं राजपूज्यं महत्सुखम् । व्यवसायात्फलाधिक्यं विदेशे राजदर्शनम् ॥६६॥
transliteration: kṣemārogyaṃ mahaddhairyaṃ rājapūjyaṃ mahatsukham . vyavasāyātphalādhikyaṃ videśe rājadarśanam.
separated_sandhi: kṣemārogyam mahat dhairyam rājapūjyam mahat sukhamvyavasāyāt phalādhikyam videśe rājadarśanam
english: There will be security and good health, great courage, honor from the government, and great happiness. There will be an abundance of results from business, and an audience with the government in a foreign land.

sanskrit: दायेशात्षष्ठरिष्फे वा व्यये वा पापसंयुते । देहपीडा मनस्तापः कार्यहानिर्महद्भयम् ॥६७॥
transliteration: dāyeśātṣaṣṭhariṣphe vā vyaye vā pāpasaṃyute . dehapīḍā manastāpaḥ kāryahānirmahadbhayam.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt ṣaṣṭhariṣphe vā vyaye vā pāpasaṃyutedehapīḍā manastāpaḥ kāryahāniḥ mahat bhayam
english: If the Sun, during its sub-period, is located in the sixth, eighth, or twelfth house from the lord of the main period, or if it is conjoined with malefic planets, then there will be physical suffering, mental anguish, loss in undertakings, and great fear.

sanskrit: शिरोरोगो ज्वरादिश्च अतिसारमथापि वा । द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु सर्पज्वरविषाद्भयम् ॥६८॥
transliteration: śirorogo jvarādiśca atisāramathāpi vā . dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu sarpajvaraviṣādbhayam.
separated_sandhi: śirorogaḥ jvarādiḥ ca atisāram atha api vādvitīyadyūnanāthe tu sarpajvaraviṣāt bhayam
english: There will be headaches, fever, and similar ailments, or even dysentery. However, if (the Sun is associated with) the lord of the second and seventh houses (maraka houses), there will be fear of snake venom or fever caused by poison.

sanskrit: सुतपीडाभयं चैव शान्ति कुर्याद्यथाविधि । देहारोग्यं प्रकुरुते धनधान्यचयं तथा ॥६९॥
transliteration: sutapīḍābhayaṃ caiva śānti kuryādyathāvidhi . dehārogyaṃ prakurute dhanadhānyacayaṃ tathā.
separated_sandhi: sutapīḍābhayam ca eva śāntim kuryāt yathāvidhidehārogyam prakurute dhanadhānyacayam tathā
english: To avert the fear of affliction to children, one should perform propitiatory rites (śānti) according to the prescribed rules. Similarly, this brings about physical health and the accumulation of wealth and grains.

sanskrit: कुजस्यान्तर्गते चन्द्रे स्वोच्चे स्वक्षेत्रकेन्द्रगे । भार्यवाहनकर्मेशलग्नाधिपसमन्विते ॥७०॥
transliteration: kujasyāntargate candre svocce svakṣetrakendrage . bhāryavāhanakarmeśalagnādhipasamanvite.
separated_sandhi: kujasya antargate candre svocce svakṣetrakendragebhāryāvāhanakarmeśalagnādhipasamanvite
english: When the Moon is in the sub-period of Mars, and is situated in its own exaltation sign, its own sign, or a Kendra (angular) house, and is associated with the lords of the 7th house (wife), 4th house (vehicles), 10th house (profession/karma), and the ascendant.

sanskrit: करोति विपुलं राज्यं गन्धमाल्याम्बरादिकम् । तडागं गोपुरादीनां पुण्यधर्मादिसंग्रहम् ॥७१॥
transliteration: karoti vipulaṃ rājyaṃ gandhamālyāmbarādikam . taḍāgaṃ gopurādīnāṃ puṇyadharmādisaṃgraham.
separated_sandhi: karoti vipulam rājyam gandhamālyāmbarādikamtaḍāgam gopurādīnām puṇyadharmādisaṃgraham
english: This configuration bestows vast rulership and provides luxuries such as fragrant garlands and fine garments. It also leads to the construction of ponds, temple gateways, and similar public works, as well as the accumulation of merit (puṇya) and righteous acts (dharma).

sanskrit: विवाहोत्सवकर्माणि दारपुत्रादिसौख्यकृत् । पितृमातृसुखावाप्तिं गृहे लक्ष्मीः कटाक्षकृत् ॥७२॥
transliteration: vivāhotsavakarmāṇi dāraputrādisaukhyakṛt . pitṛmātṛsukhāvāptiṃ gṛhe lakṣmīḥ kaṭākṣakṛt.
separated_sandhi: vivāhotsavakarmāṇi dāraputrādisaukhyakṛtpitṛmātṛsukhāvāptim gṛhe lakṣmīḥ kaṭākṣakṛt
english: This brings about marriage ceremonies and festive activities, along with happiness for one's wife and children. It leads to the attainment of happiness for one's father and mother, and the goddess Lakṣmī bestows her gracious sidelong glances (kaṭākṣa), ensuring prosperity in the home.

sanskrit: महारजप्रसादेन स्वेष्टसिद्धिसुखादिकम् । पूर्णे चन्द्रे पूर्णफलं क्षीणे स्वल्पफल्ं भवेत् ॥७३॥
transliteration: mahārajaprasādena sveṣṭasiddhisukhādikam . pūrṇe candre pūrṇaphalaṃ kṣīṇe svalpaphalṃ bhavet.
separated_sandhi: mahārajaprasādena sva iṣṭasiddhisukhādikam pūrṇecandre pūrṇaphalam kṣīṇe svalpaphalam bhavet
english: Through the grace of great rulers, one achieves desired success and happiness. When the Moon is full, the results are complete; when it is waning, the results are minimal.

sanskrit: नीचारिस्थऽष्टमे षष्ठे दायेशाद्रिपुरन्ध्रके । मरणं दारपुत्राणां कष्टं भूमिविनाशनम् ॥७४॥
transliteration: nīcāristha'ṣṭame ṣaṣṭhe dāyeśādripurandhrake . maraṇaṃ dāraputrāṇāṃ kaṣṭaṃ bhūmivināśanam.
separated_sandhi: nīcāristha aṣṭame ṣaṣṭhe dāyeśādri-purandhrakemaraṇam dāraputrāṇām kaṣṭam bhūmivināśanam
english: When the lord of the astrological period (daśā) is debilitated (nīca), situated in an enemy's sign, in the 8th house, or in the 6th house, or in the 7th (adri) or 8th (purandhraka) house from the daśā lord itself, then there will be death of one's wife and children, great suffering, and destruction of land.

sanskrit: पशुधान्यक्षयश्चैव चौरादिरणभीतिकृत् । द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु ह्यपमृत्युर्भविष्यति ॥७५॥
transliteration: paśudhānyakṣayaścaiva caurādiraṇabhītikṛt . dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu hyapamṛtyurbhaviṣyati.
separated_sandhi: paśudhānyakṣayaḥ ca eva caurādiraṇabhītikṛtdvitīyadyūnanāthe tu hi apamṛtyuḥ bhaviṣyati
english: There will also be loss of cattle and grains, and it causes fear from thieves, fire, and enemies. However, when (this condition applies to) the lord of the 2nd and 7th houses, then there will indeed be untimely death.

sanskrit: देहजाड्यं मनोदुःखं दुर्गा लक्ष्मीजपं चरेत् । श्वेतां गां महिषीं दद्यादनेमारोग्यमादिशेत् ॥७६॥
transliteration: dehajāḍyaṃ manoduḥkhaṃ durgā lakṣmījapaṃ caret . śvetāṃ gāṃ mahiṣīṃ dadyādanemārogyamādiśet.
separated_sandhi: dehajāḍyam manoduḥkham durgā lakṣmījapam caretśvetām gām mahiṣīm dadyāt anena ārogyam ādiśet
english: When there is bodily sluggishness and mental distress, one should perform chanting (japa) for Durgā and Lakṣmī. One should also donate a white cow and a buffalo. By doing this, good health (ārogya) is prescribed.

sanskrit: कुलीरे वृश्चिके राहौ कन्यत्यां चापगेऽपि वा । तद्भुक्तो राजसम्मानं वस्त्रवाहनभूषणम् ॥१॥
transliteration: kulīre vṛścike rāhau kanyatyāṃ cāpage'pi vā . tadbhukto rājasammānaṃ vastravāhanabhūṣaṇam.
separated_sandhi: kulīre vṛścike rāhau kanyatyām ca āpage api vātadbhuktaḥ rājasammānam vastravāhanabhūṣaṇam
english: When Rāhu is in Cancer, Scorpio, Virgo, or even in Sagittarius, during its period (bhukti) there will be honor from rulers and acquisition of clothes, vehicles, and ornaments.

sanskrit: व्यवसायात्फलाधिक्यं चतुष्पाज्जीवलाभकृत् । प्रयाणं पश्चिमे भागे वाहनाम्बरलाभकृत् ॥२॥
transliteration: vyavasāyātphalādhikyaṃ catuṣpājjīvalābhakṛt . prayāṇaṃ paścime bhāge vāhanāmbaralābhakṛt.
separated_sandhi: vyavasāyāt phalādhikyam catuṣpāt jīvalābhakṛtprayāṇam paścime bhāge vāhanāmbaralābhakṛt
english: There will be an abundance of results from one's profession, and it will cause gains from quadrupeds. There will also be journeys towards the western direction, bringing gains of vehicles and garments.

sanskrit: लग्नादुपचये राहौ शुभग्रहयुतेक्षिते । मित्रांशे तुङ्गभागांशे योगकारकसंयुते ॥३॥
transliteration: lagnādupacaye rāhau śubhagrahayutekṣite . mitrāṃśe tuṅgabhāgāṃśe yogakārakasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: lagnāt upacaye rāhau śubhagrahayutekṣitemitrāṃśe tuṅgabhāgāṃśe yogakārakasaṃyute
english: If Rahu is in an Upachaya house (3rd, 6th, 10th, or 11th from the ascendant), conjoined with or aspected by a benefic planet, situated in a friendly divisional sign (aṃśa), in an exalted divisional sign, and conjoined with a yoga-karaka planet (a planet that confers auspicious results), then it yields very favorable outcomes.

sanskrit: राज्यलाभं महोत्साहं राजप्रीतिं शुभावहम् । करोति सुखसम्पत्तिं दारपुत्रादिवर्द्धनम् ॥४॥
transliteration: rājyalābhaṃ mahotsāhaṃ rājaprītiṃ śubhāvaham . karoti sukhasampattiṃ dāraputrādivarddhanam.
separated_sandhi: rājyalābham mahotsāham rājaprītim śubhāvahamkaroti sukhasampattim dāraputrādivarddhanam
english: (This yoga) brings gain of kingdom or high position, great enthusiasm, royal favor, auspiciousness, happiness, wealth, and the increase of wife, sons, and so forth.

sanskrit: लग्नाष्ट्मे व्यये राहौ पापयुक्तेऽथ वीक्षिते । चौरादिव्रणपीडा च सर्वत्रैवं भवेद्द्विज ॥५॥
transliteration: lagnāṣṭme vyaye rāhau pāpayukte'tha vīkṣite . caurādivraṇapīḍā ca sarvatraivaṃ bhaveddvija.
separated_sandhi: lagnāṣṭame vyaye rāhau pāpayukte atha vīkṣitecaurādivraṇapīḍā ca sarvatra evam bhavet dvija
english: O twice-born one (dvija), if Rahu is in the eighth or twelfth house from the ascendant, and is conjoined with or aspected by a malefic planet, then trouble from thieves, wounds, and similar afflictions will occur everywhere.

sanskrit: राजद्वारजनद्वेष इष्टबन्धुविनाशनम् । दारपुत्रादिपीडा च भवत्येव न संशयः ॥६॥
transliteration: rājadvārajanadveṣa iṣṭabandhuvināśanam . dāraputrādipīḍā ca bhavatyeva na saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: rājadvarajanadveṣaḥ iṣṭabandhuvināśanamdāraputrādipīḍā ca bhavati eva na saṃśayaḥ
english: There will certainly be hatred from people at the royal court, destruction of dear relatives, and affliction to wife, sons, and so forth; there is no doubt about it.

sanskrit: द्वितीयद्यूननाथे वा सप्तमस्थानमाश्रिते । सदा रोगो महाकष्टं शान्तिं कुर्याद्यथाविधि । आरोग्यं सम्पदश्चैव भविष्यन्ति तदा द्विज ॥७॥
transliteration: dvitīyadyūnanāthe vā saptamasthānamāśrite . sadā rogo mahākaṣṭaṃ śāntiṃ kuryādyathāvidhi . ārogyaṃ sampadaścaiva bhaviṣyanti tadā dvija.
separated_sandhi: dvitīyadhyūnanāthe vā saptamasthānamāśrite sadā rogaḥ mahākaṣṭamśāntim kuryāt yathāvidhi ārogyamsampadaḥ ca eva bhaviṣyanti tadā dvija
english: O twice-born one (dvija), if the lord of the second or seventh house occupies the seventh house, there will always be disease and great suffering. One should perform propitiation (śānti) rituals according to the rules, and then health and prosperity will certainly be attained.

sanskrit: राहुरन्तर्गते जीवे लग्नात्केन्द्रत्रिकोणगे । स्वोच्चे स्वक्षेत्रगे वापि तुङ्गस्वर्क्षांशगेऽपि वा ॥८॥
transliteration: rāhurantargate jīve lagnātkendratrikoṇage . svocce svakṣetrage vāpi tuṅgasvarkṣāṃśage'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: rāhuḥ antargate jīve lagnāt kendra-trikoṇage | sva-uccesva-kṣetrage vā api tuṅga-sva-ṛkṣa-aṃśage api vā
english: When Rahu is operative and Jupiter is under its influence, and Jupiter is located in an angular (kendra) or trinal (trikona) house from the Ascendant, or in its own exaltation sign, or its own sign, or even in its exaltation *navamśa* or its own sign's *navamśa*...

sanskrit: स्थानलाभं मनोधैर्यं शत्रुनाशं महत्सुखम् । राजप्रीतिकरं सौख्यं जनोऽतीव समश्नुते ॥९॥
transliteration: sthānalābhaṃ manodhairyaṃ śatrunāśaṃ mahatsukham . rājaprītikaraṃ saukhyaṃ jano'tīva samaśnute.
separated_sandhi: sthāna-lābham mano-dhairyam śatru-nāśam mahat-sukham| rāja-prītikaram saukhyam janaḥ atīva samaśnute
english: A person then experiences a great acquisition of status, mental fortitude, destruction of enemies, immense happiness, and comfort that brings governmental favor.

sanskrit: दिनेदिने वृद्धिरपि सितपक्षे शशी यथा । वाहनादिधनं भूरि गृहे गोधनसंकुलम् ॥१०॥
transliteration: dinedine vṛddhirapi sitapakṣe śaśī yathā . vāhanādidhanaṃ bhūri gṛhe godhanasaṃkulam.
separated_sandhi: dine dine vṛddhiḥ api sita-pakṣe śaśī yathā |vāhana-ādi-dhanam bhūri gṛhe go-dhana-saṅkulam
english: Just as the moon (śaśī) grows day by day in the bright fortnight, there will be increasing prosperity. One's house will become abundant with wealth, including vehicles and cattle (godhana).

sanskrit: नैरृत्ये पश्चिमे भागे प्रयाणं राजदर्शनम् । युक्तकार्यार्थसिद्धिः स्यात्स्वदेशे पुनरेष्यति ॥११॥
transliteration: nairṛtye paścime bhāge prayāṇaṃ rājadarśanam . yuktakāryārthasiddhiḥ syātsvadeśe punareṣyati.
separated_sandhi: nairṛtye paścime bhāge prayāṇam rāja-darśanam |yukta-kāryārtha-siddhiḥ syāt sva-deśe punaḥ eṣyati
english: There will be travel to the South-West (nairṛtya) and Western regions, and an audience with the government. There will be success in appropriate undertakings, and one will return to one's own country.

sanskrit: उपकारो ब्राह्मणानां तीर्थयात्रादिकर्मणाम् । वाहनग्रामलाभश्च देवब्राह्मणपूजनम् ॥१२॥
transliteration: upakāro brāhmaṇānāṃ tīrthayātrādikarmaṇām . vāhanagrāmalābhaśca devabrāhmaṇapūjanam.
separated_sandhi: upakāraḥ brāhmaṇānām tīrtha-yātrā-ādi-karmaṇām| vāhana-grāma-lābhaḥ ca deva-brāhmaṇa-pūjanam
english: There will be beneficence towards Brahmins, performance of acts like pilgrimages (tīrtha-yātrā), acquisition of vehicles and villages, and worship of deities and Brahmins.

sanskrit: पुत्रोत्सवादिसन्तोषो नित्यं मिष्ठान्नभोजनम् । नीचे वाऽस्तङ्गते वापि षष्ठाष्टव्ययराशिगे ॥१३॥
transliteration: putrotsavādisantoṣo nityaṃ miṣṭhānnabhojanam . nīce vā'staṅgate vāpi ṣaṣṭhāṣṭavyayarāśige.
separated_sandhi: putrotsavādisantoṣaḥ nityaṃ miṣṭhānnabhojanamnīce vā astaṅgate vā api ṣaṣṭhāṣṭavyayarāśige
english: Even though there may be joy from events like the birth of a son and constant consumption of sweet food, if (a planet) is debilitated, combust, or located in the 6th, 8th, or 12th house (rāśi), then...

sanskrit: शत्रुक्षेत्रे पापयुक्ते धनहानिर्भविष्यति । कर्मविघ्नो भवेत्तस्य मानहानिश्च जायते ॥१४॥
transliteration: śatrukṣetre pāpayukte dhanahānirbhaviṣyati . karmavighno bhavettasya mānahāniśca jāyate.
separated_sandhi: śatrukṣetre pāpayukte dhanahāniḥ bhaviṣyatikarma-vighnaḥ bhavet tasya mānahāniḥ ca jāyate
english: (If the planet is also) in an enemy's sign or conjoined with malefic planets, then there will be a loss of wealth. Obstacles to (karma) action will occur for that person, and loss of honor will also arise.

sanskrit: कलत्रपुत्रपीडा च हृद्रोगो राजकारकृत् । दायेशात्केन्द्रकोणे वा लाभे वा धनगेऽपि वा ॥१५॥
transliteration: kalatraputrapīḍā ca hṛdrogo rājakārakṛt . dāyeśātkendrakoṇe vā lābhe vā dhanage'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: kalatraputrapīḍā ca hṛdrogaḥ rājakārakṛtdāyeśāt kendrakoṇe vā lābhe vā dhanage api vā
english: There will be suffering for spouse and children, heart disease, and royal displeasure. However, if (the planet) is in an angle or trine from the dasha lord, or in the 11th house, or in the 2nd house...

sanskrit: दुश्चिक्ये बलसम्पूर्णे गृहक्षेत्रादिवृद्धिकृत् । भोजनाम्बरपश्वादिदानधर्मजपादिकम् ॥१६॥
transliteration: duścikye balasampūrṇe gṛhakṣetrādivṛddhikṛt . bhojanāmbarapaśvādidānadharmajapādikam.
separated_sandhi: duścikye balasampūrṇe gṛhakṣetrādivṛddhikṛtbhojanāmbarapaśvādidānadharmajapādikam
english: If (the planet is) very strong in the third house, it causes an increase in houses, lands, and similar possessions. (There will also be) charity (dāna) involving food, clothes, animals, and so forth, along with practices like (dharma) and chanting (japa).

sanskrit: भुक्त्यन्ते राजकोपाच्च द्विमासं देहपीडनम् । ज्येष्ठभ्रातुर्विनाशश्च मातृपित्रादिपीडनम् ॥१७॥
transliteration: bhuktyante rājakopācca dvimāsaṃ dehapīḍanam . jyeṣṭhabhrāturvināśaśca mātṛpitrādipīḍanam.
separated_sandhi: bhukti ante rājakopāt ca dvi-māsam dehapīḍanamjyeṣṭhabhrātuḥ vināśaḥ ca mātṛpitrādipīḍanam
english: At the end of the sub-period (bhukti), there will be royal displeasure and bodily suffering for two months. There will also be the destruction of an elder brother, and affliction to one's mother, father, and other relatives.

sanskrit: दायेशात्षष्ठरन्ध्रे वा रिःफे वा पापसंयुते । तद्भुक्तौ धनहानिः स्याद्देहपीडा भविष्यति ॥१८॥
transliteration: dāyeśātṣaṣṭharandhre vā riḥphe vā pāpasaṃyute . tadbhuktau dhanahāniḥ syāddehapīḍā bhaviṣyati.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt ṣaṣṭha randhre vā riḥphe vā pāpasaṃyutetat bhuktau dhanahāniḥ syāt dehapīḍā bhaviṣyati
english: If the lord of a planetary period (daśā) is situated in the sixth, eighth, or twelfth house, or is conjoined with malefic planets, then during that planet's sub-period (bhukti), there will be a loss of wealth and physical suffering.

sanskrit: द्वितीयद्यूननाथे वा ह्यपमृत्युर्भविष्यति । स्वर्णस्य प्र्तिमादानं शिवपूजं च कार्यते ॥१९॥
transliteration: dvitīyadyūnanāthe vā hyapamṛtyurbhaviṣyati . svarṇasya prtimādānaṃ śivapūjaṃ ca kāryate.
separated_sandhi: dvitīya dyūnanāthe vā hi apamṛtyuḥ bhaviṣyatisvarṇasya pratimādānam śivapūjam ca kāryate
english: If (the planetary period's lord) is in the second house, or is the lord of the seventh house, then indeed there will be an untimely death. In such a situation, the giving of a golden idol and the worship of Shiva should be performed.

sanskrit: स्र्/ईशम्भोश्च प्रसादेन ग्रहस्तुष्टो द्विजोत्तम । देहारोग्यं प्रकुरुते शान्तिं कुर्याद्विचक्षणम् ॥२०॥
transliteration: sr/īśambhośca prasādena grahastuṣṭo dvijottama . dehārogyaṃ prakurute śāntiṃ kuryādvicakṣaṇam.
separated_sandhi: śrīśambhoḥ ca prasādena grahaḥ tuṣṭaḥ dvijottamadehārogyam prakurute śāntim kuryāt vicakṣaṇam
english: And by the grace of the glorious Shiva (Śambhu), O best among brahmins (dvijottama), the satisfied planet bestows good bodily health, and (one) should wisely perform appeasement (śānti).

sanskrit: राहोरन्तर्गते मन्दे लग्नात्केन्द्रत्रिकोणगे । स्वोच्चे मूलत्रिकोणे वा दुश्चिक्ये लाभराशिगे ॥२१॥
transliteration: rāhorantargate mande lagnātkendratrikoṇage . svocce mūlatrikoṇe vā duścikye lābharāśige.
separated_sandhi: rāhoḥ antargate mande lagnāt kendratrikoṇagesvocce mūlatrikoṇe vā duścikye lābharāśige
english: When Saturn (Manda) is in the sub-period (antardashā) of Rahu, and Saturn is situated in an angular (kendra) or trine (trikoṇa) house from the Ascendant (lagna), or in its own sign of exaltation (svocca), or in its mūlatrikoṇa sign, or in the third house, or in the eleventh house (of gain)...

sanskrit: तद्भुक्तौ नृपतेः सेवा राजप्रीतिकरी शुभा । विवाहोत्सवकार्याणि कृत्वा पुण्यानि भूरिशः ॥२२॥
transliteration: tadbhuktau nṛpateḥ sevā rājaprītikarī śubhā . vivāhotsavakāryāṇi kṛtvā puṇyāni bhūriśaḥ.
separated_sandhi: tat bhuktau nṛpateḥ sevā rājaprītikrī śubhāvivāha utsava kāryāṇi kṛtvā puṇyāni bhūriśaḥ
english: During that sub-period (bhukti), service to the king will be auspicious and will lead to royal favor. One performs abundant virtuous acts (puṇya), including marriages and festive undertakings.

sanskrit: आरामकरणे युक्तो तडागं कारयिष्यति । शूद्रप्रभुवशादिष्टलाभो गोधनसंग्रहः ॥२३॥
transliteration: ārāmakaraṇe yukto taḍāgaṃ kārayiṣyati . śūdraprabhuvaśādiṣṭalābho godhanasaṃgrahaḥ.
separated_sandhi: ārāmakaraṇe yuktaḥ taḍāgaṃ kārayiṣyatiśūdraprabhuvaśāt iṣṭalābhaḥ godhanasaṃgrahaḥ
english: Engaged in creating gardens, he will construct tanks. Through the influence of a śūdra master, there will be desired gains and accumulation of cattle wealth.

sanskrit: प्रयाणं पश्चिमे भागे प्रभुमूलाद्धनक्षयः । देहालस्यं फलाल्पत्वं स्वदेशे पुनरेष्यति ॥२४॥
transliteration: prayāṇaṃ paścime bhāge prabhumūlāddhanakṣayaḥ . dehālasyaṃ phalālpatvaṃ svadeśe punareṣyati.
separated_sandhi: prayāṇaṃ paścime bhāge prabhumūlāt dhanakṣayaḥdehālasyaṃ phalālpattvaṃ svadeśe punar eṣyati
english: There will be a journey towards the western direction, leading to loss of wealth originating from the master. Physical lethargy and meager results will follow, and he will return to his own country again.

sanskrit: नीचारिक्षेत्रगे मन्दे रन्ध्रे वा व्ययगेऽपि वा । नीचारिराजभीतिश्च दारपुत्रादिपीडनम् ॥२५॥
transliteration: nīcārikṣetrage mande randhre vā vyayage'pi vā . nīcārirājabhītiśca dāraputrādipīḍanam.
separated_sandhi: nīcārikṣetrage mande randhre vā vyayage apivā nīcārirājabhītiḥ ca dāraputrādipīḍanam
english: When Saturn is located in a debilitated sign, an enemy's sign, the eighth house, or even the twelfth house, there will be fear from low individuals, enemies, and the ruler, along with affliction for one's wife, children, and other dependents.

sanskrit: आत्मबन्धुमनस्तापं दायादजनविग्रहम् । व्यवहारे च कलहमकस्माद्भूषणं लभेत् ॥२६॥
transliteration: ātmabandhumanastāpaṃ dāyādajanavigraham . vyavahāre ca kalahamakasmādbhūṣaṇaṃ labhet.
separated_sandhi: ātmabandhumanastāpaṃ dāyādajanavigrahamvyavahāre ca kalaham akasmāt bhūṣaṇaṃ labhet
english: There will be mental distress for oneself and one's relatives (bandhu), disputes with co-heirs or family members (dāyādajana), and quarrels in business (vyavahāra) matters. Unexpectedly, one may also obtain an ornament.

sanskrit: दायेशात्षष्ठरिष्फे वा रन्ध्रे वा पापसंयुते । हृद्रोगो मानहानिश्च विवादः शत्रुपीडनम् ॥२७॥
transliteration: dāyeśātṣaṣṭhariṣphe vā randhre vā pāpasaṃyute . hṛdrogo mānahāniśca vivādaḥ śatrupīḍanam.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt ṣaṣṭhariṣphe vā randhre vā pāpasaṃyutehṛdrogaḥ mānahāniḥ ca vivādaḥ śatrupīḍanam
english: When the Dasha (dāyeśa) lord is situated in the sixth, twelfth, or eighth house, or is conjoined with a malefic planet, there will be heart disease, loss of honor, disputes, and harassment from enemies.

sanskrit: अन्यदेशादिसञ्चारो गुल्मवद्वयाधिभाग्भवेत् । कुभोजनं कोद्रवादि जातिदुःखाद्भयं भवेत् ॥२८॥
transliteration: anyadeśādisañcāro gulmavadvayādhibhāgbhavet . kubhojanaṃ kodravādi jātiduḥkhādbhayaṃ bhavet.
separated_sandhi: anyadeśādisañcāraḥ gulmavat vyādhibhāk bhavetkubhojanaṃ kodravādi jātiduḥkhāt bhayam bhavet
english: There will be travel to other regions, and the person may suffer from diseases like tumors (gulma). There will also be fear arising from unwholesome food, such as kodrava millet, and from distress caused by one's own family or community.

sanskrit: द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु ह्यपमृत्युर्भविष्यति । कृष्णां गां महिषीं दद्याद्दानेमारोग्यमादिशेत् ॥२९॥
transliteration: dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu hyapamṛtyurbhaviṣyati . kṛṣṇāṃ gāṃ mahiṣīṃ dadyāddānemārogyamādiśet.
separated_sandhi: dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu hi apamṛtyuḥ bhaviṣyatikṛṣṇām gām mahiṣīm dadyāt dāne imām ārogyam ādiśet
english: If the lord of the second and seventh houses is [in a problematic position, implied by context], then an untimely death (apamṛtyu) will occur. One should donate (dāna) a black cow and a buffalo; by performing this donation (dāna), one should prescribe health (ārogyam) as a remedy.

sanskrit: राहोरन्तर्गते सौम्ये भाग्ये वा स्वर्क्षगेऽपि वा । तुङ्गे वा केन्द्रराशिस्थे पुत्रे वा बलगेऽपि वा ॥३०॥
transliteration: rāhorantargate saumye bhāgye vā svarkṣage'pi vā . tuṅge vā kendrarāśisthe putre vā balage'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: rāhoḥ antargate saumye bhāgye vā svarkṣage api vātuṅge vā kendrarāśisthe putre vā balage api vā
english: When a benefic planet is in the sub-period (antardaśā) of Rāhu, or is situated in the house of fortune (bhāgya-bhāva), or in its own sign, or in exaltation, or located in a kendra (angular) house, or in the fifth house (putra-bhāva), or is otherwise strong...

sanskrit: राजयोगं प्रकुरुते गृहे कल्याणवर्द्धनम् । व्यापारेण धनप्राप्तिविद्यावाहनमुत्तमम् ॥३१॥
transliteration: rājayogaṃ prakurute gṛhe kalyāṇavarddhanam . vyāpāreṇa dhanaprāptividyāvāhanamuttamam.
separated_sandhi: rājayogam prakurute gṛhe kalyāṇavarddhanamvyāpāreṇa dhanaprāptividyāvāhanam uttamam
english: This (referring to the conditions from the previous verse) creates a royal combination (rājayoga) and fosters increased well-being in the home. There will be acquisition of wealth (dhana), knowledge (vidyā), and excellent conveyances through one's business endeavors.

sanskrit: विवाहोत्सवकार्याणि चतुष्पाज्जीवलाभकृत् । सौम्यमासे महत्सौख्यं स्ववारे राजदर्शनम् ॥३२॥
transliteration: vivāhotsavakāryāṇi catuṣpājjīvalābhakṛt . saumyamāse mahatsaukhyaṃ svavāre rājadarśanam.
separated_sandhi: vivāhotsavakāryāṇi catuṣpāt jīvalābhakṛtsaumyamāse mahat saukhyam svavāre rājadarśanam
english: There will be marriage ceremonies and festive activities, along with gains of four-footed animals. Great happiness will be experienced in a benefic month, and on one's own astrological weekday, there will be an audience with the ruler.

sanskrit: सुगन्धपुष्पशय्यादि स्त्रीसौख्यं चातिरोभनम् । महाराजप्रसादेन धनलाभो महद्यशः ॥३३॥
transliteration: sugandhapuṣpaśayyādi strīsaukhyaṃ cātirobhanam . mahārājaprasādena dhanalābho mahadyaśaḥ.
separated_sandhi: sugandhapuṣpaśayyādi strīsaukkhyam ca atirobhanammahārājaprasādena dhanalābhaḥ mahat yaśaḥ
english: Fragrant flower beds and similar comforts, along with exceedingly delightful pleasure from women, gain of wealth, and great fame, all occur by the grace of a great king.

sanskrit: दायेशात्केन्द्रलाभे वा दुश्चिक्ये भाग्यकर्मगे । देहारोग्यं हृदुत्साह इष्टसिद्धिः सुखावहा ॥३४॥
transliteration: dāyeśātkendralābhe vā duścikye bhāgyakarmage . dehārogyaṃ hṛdutsāha iṣṭasiddhiḥ sukhāvahā.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt kendralābhe vā duścikkye bhāgyakarmagedehārogyam hṛdutsāhaḥ iṣṭasiddhiḥ sukhāvahā
english: When the lord of the daśā (planetary period) is situated in an angular house, the eleventh house, the third house, or the ninth or tenth house, there will be bodily health, enthusiasm of the heart, and the attainment of desired results which brings happiness.

sanskrit: पुण्यश्लोकादिकीर्तिश्च पुराणश्रवणादिकम् । विवाहो यज्ञदीक्षा च दानधर्मदयादिकम् ॥३५॥
transliteration: puṇyaślokādikīrtiśca purāṇaśravaṇādikam . vivāho yajñadīkṣā ca dānadharmadayādikam.
separated_sandhi: puṇyaślokādikīrtiḥ ca purāṇaśravaṇādikamvivāhaḥ yajñadīkṣā ca dānadharmadayādikam
english: Fame originating from meritorious deeds, along with listening to ancient texts and similar activities. Also, marriage, initiation into a Vedic ritual (yajña), and acts of charity (dāna), adherence to natural law (dharma), compassion, and the like.

sanskrit: षष्ठाष्टमव्यये सौम्ये मन्देनापि युतेक्षिते । दायेशात्षष्ठरिःफे वा रन्ध्रे वा पापसंयुते ॥३६॥
transliteration: ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyaye saumye mandenāpi yutekṣite . dāyeśātṣaṣṭhariḥphe vā randhre vā pāpasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyaye saumye mandena api yutekṣitedāyeśāt ṣaṣṭhariḥphe vā randhre vā pāpasaṃyute
english: When the daśā lord, even if a benefic (saumya), is situated in the sixth, eighth, or twelfth house, or is conjoined with or aspected even by Saturn; or, when the daśā lord is in the sixth, twelfth, or eighth house, being conjoined with a malefic planet.

sanskrit: देवभाह्मणनिन्दा च भोगभाग्यविवर्जितः । सत्यहीनश्च दुर्बुद्धिश्चौराहिनृपपीडनम् ॥३७॥
transliteration: devabhāhmaṇanindā ca bhogabhāgyavivarjitaḥ . satyahīnaśca durbuddhiścaurāhinṛpapīḍanam.
separated_sandhi: devabrāhmaṇanindā ca bhogabhāgyavivarjitaḥsatyahīnaḥ ca durbuddhiḥ caurāhinṛpapīḍanam
english: There will be condemnation of gods and brahmins, deprivation of enjoyments and fortune, being devoid of truth, having an evil mind, and affliction by thieves, snakes, and kings.

sanskrit: अकस्मात्कलहश्चैव गुरुपुत्रादिनाशनम् । अर्थव्ययो राजकोपो दारपुत्रादिपीडनम् ॥३८॥
transliteration: akasmātkalahaścaiva guruputrādināśanam . arthavyayo rājakopo dāraputrādipīḍanam.
separated_sandhi: akasmāt kalahaḥ ca eva guruputrādināśanamartha-vyayaḥ rāja-kopaḥ dāra-putrādi-pīḍanam
english: There will be sudden quarrels, and indeed, destruction for preceptors and sons. There will be loss of wealth, anger from the king, and affliction to wife and sons.

sanskrit: द्वितीयद्यूननाथे वा ह्यपमृत्युभयं वदेत् । तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं विष्णुसाहस्रकं जपेत् ॥३९॥
transliteration: dvitīyadyūnanāthe vā hyapamṛtyubhayaṃ vadet . taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ viṣṇusāhasrakaṃ japet.
separated_sandhi: dvitīya-dyūna-nāthe vā hi apamṛtyu-bhayam vadettat-doṣa-parihāra-artham viṣṇu-sāhasrakam japet
english: When there is a connection with the lord of the second house or the seventh house, one should declare a fear of untimely death. To remedy that fault (doṣa), one should chant the Viṣṇu-sāhasranāma (viṣṇusāhasra).

sanskrit: राहोरन्तर्गते केतौ भ्रमणं राजतो भयम् । वातज्वरादिरोगश्च चतुष्पाज्जीवहानिकृत् ॥४०॥
transliteration: rāhorantargate ketau bhramaṇaṃ rājato bhayam . vātajvarādirogaśca catuṣpājjīvahānikṛt.
separated_sandhi: rāhoḥ antargate ketau bhramaṇam rājataḥ bhayamvāta-jvara-ādi-rogaḥ ca catuṣ-pāt-jīva-hāni-kṛt
english: When Ketu is in the antar-daśā (antargate) of Rāhu, there will be wandering, fear from the king, and diseases like vāta fever, causing the loss of four-footed animals.

sanskrit: अष्टमाधिसंयुक्ते देहजाड्यं मनोव्यथा । शुभयुक्ते शुभैर्दृष्टे देहसौख्यं धनागमः । राजसम्मानभूषाप्तिर्गृहे शुभकरो भवेत् ॥४१॥
transliteration: aṣṭamādhisaṃyukte dehajāḍyaṃ manovyathā . śubhayukte śubhairdṛṣṭe dehasaukhyaṃ dhanāgamaḥ . rājasammānabhūṣāptirgṛhe śubhakaro bhavet.
separated_sandhi: aṣṭama-adhi-saṃyukte deha-jāḍyammanaḥ-vyathā śubha-yukte śubhaiḥ dṛṣṭedeha-saukhyam dhana-āgamaḥrāja-sammāna-bhūṣā-āptiḥ gṛhe śubha-karaḥ bhavet
english: When connected with the lord of the eighth house, there will be physical dullness and mental distress. When associated with benefics or aspected by benefics, there will be physical comfort, acquisition of wealth, and attainment of honors and ornaments from the king. It becomes auspicious within the home.

sanskrit: लग्नाधिपेन सम्बन्धे इष्टसिद्धिः सुखावहा । लग्नाधिपसमायुक्ते लाभो वा भवति ध्रुवम् ॥४२॥
transliteration: lagnādhipena sambandhe iṣṭasiddhiḥ sukhāvahā . lagnādhipasamāyukte lābho vā bhavati dhruvam.
separated_sandhi: lagna-adhipena sambandhe iṣṭa-siddhiḥ sukha-āvahālagna-adhipa-samāyukte lābhaḥ vā bhavati dhruvam
english: When there is a connection with the lord of the ascendant (lagna), there is the attainment of desired results, bringing happiness. When associated with the lord of the ascendant, gain certainly occurs.

sanskrit: चतुष्पाज्जिवलाभः स्यात्केन्द्रे वाथ त्रिकोणगे । रन्ध्रस्थानगते केतौ व्यये वा बलवर्जिते ॥४३॥
transliteration: catuṣpājjivalābhaḥ syātkendre vātha trikoṇage . randhrasthānagate ketau vyaye vā balavarjite.
separated_sandhi: catuṣpāt jīvalābhaḥ syāt kendre vā atha trikoṇagerandhrasthānagate ketau vyaye vā balavarjite
english: Gains from quadrupeds will occur if [the lord of the house indicating quadrupeds] is located in an angular (kendra) or trine (trikoṇa) house. However, if Ketu is situated in the 8th house (randhrasthāna) or 12th house (vyaya) and is devoid of strength...

sanskrit: तद्भुक्तौ बहुरोगः स्याच्चोराहिव्रणपीडनम् । पितृमातृवियोगश्च भातृद्वेषो मनोरुजा ॥४४॥
transliteration: tadbhuktau bahurogaḥ syāccorāhivraṇapīḍanam . pitṛmātṛviyogaśca bhātṛdveṣo manorujā.
separated_sandhi: tat bhuktau bahurogaḥ syāt corāhivraṇapīḍanampitṛmātṛviyogaḥ ca bhrātṛdveṣaḥ manorujā
english: During its (Ketu's) sub-period (bhukti), there will be many diseases, affliction from thieves, snakes, and wounds, separation from father and mother, hostility from brothers, and mental anguish.

sanskrit: द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु देहबाधा भविष्यति । तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं छागदानं च कारयेत् ॥४५॥
transliteration: dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu dehabādhā bhaviṣyati . taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ chāgadānaṃ ca kārayet.
separated_sandhi: dvitīya dyūnanāthe tu dehabādhā bhaviṣyatitat doṣaparihārārthaṃ chāgadānaṃ ca kārayet
english: Furthermore, if the lord of the 2nd and 7th houses (dvitīyadyūnanāthe) is [afflicted], physical suffering (dehabādhā) will occur. To mitigate this defect, one should perform the gifting (dāna) of a goat.

sanskrit: राहोरन्तर्गते शुक्रे कग्नात्केन्द्गत्रिकोणगे । लाभे वा बलसंयुक्ते योगप्राबल्यमादिशेत् ॥४६॥
transliteration: rāhorantargate śukre kagnātkendgatrikoṇage . lābhe vā balasaṃyukte yogaprābalyamādiśet.
separated_sandhi: rāhoḥ antargate śukre lagnāt kendratrikoṇagelābhe vā balasaṃyukte yogaprābalyam ādiśet
english: When Venus (śukra) is in Rahu's sub-period (antardaśā), and Venus is located in an angular (kendra) or trine (trikoṇa) house from the ascendant (lagna), or in the 11th house (lābha) and endowed with strength (bala), one should predict a very powerful astrological combination (yoga).

sanskrit: विप्रमूलाद्धनप्राप्तिर्गोमहिष्यादिलाभकृत् । पुत्रोत्सवादिसन्तोषो गृहे कल्याणसम्भवः ॥४७॥
transliteration: vipramūlāddhanaprāptirgomahiṣyādilābhakṛt . putrotsavādisantoṣo gṛhe kalyāṇasambhavaḥ.
separated_sandhi: vipramūlāt dhanaprāptiḥ gomahiṣyādi lābhakṛtputrotsavādi santoṣaḥ gṛhe kalyāṇasambhavaḥ
english: There will be acquisition of wealth from Brahmins (vipra), gains of cows, buffaloes, and other such animals, joy from celebrations related to children, and the occurrence of auspicious events in the home.

sanskrit: सम्मानं राजसम्मनं राज्यलाभो महत्सुखम् । स्वोच्चे वा स्वर्क्षगे वापि तुङ्गांशे स्वांशगेऽपि वा ॥४८॥
transliteration: sammānaṃ rājasammanaṃ rājyalābho mahatsukham . svocce vā svarkṣage vāpi tuṅgāṃśe svāṃśage'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: sammānam rājasammanam rājyalābhaḥ mahat sukhamsvocce vā svarkṣage vā api tuṅgāṃśe svāṃśage api vā
english: One experiences honor, royal recognition, the acquisition of a kingdom, and great happiness when a planet is situated in its own sign of exaltation, or in its own sign, or even in its exaltation divisional chart (aṃśa), or in its own divisional chart (aṃśa).

sanskrit: नूतनं गृहनिर्माणं नित्यं मिष्ठान्नभोजनं । कलत्रपुत्रविभवं मित्रसंगः सुभोजनम् ॥४९॥
transliteration: nūtanaṃ gṛhanirmāṇaṃ nityaṃ miṣṭhānnabhojanaṃ . kalatraputravibhavaṃ mitrasaṃgaḥ subhojanam.
separated_sandhi: nūtanam gṛhanirmāṇam nityam miṣṭānnābhojanamkalatraputravibhavam mitrasaṅgaḥ subhojanam
english: New house construction, a regular diet of sweet delicacies, prosperity related to one's wife and sons, the company of friends, and good food are attained.

sanskrit: अन्नदानं प्रियं नित्यं दानधर्मादिसंग्रहः । महाराजप्रसादेन वाहनाम्बरभूषणं ॥५०॥
transliteration: annadānaṃ priyaṃ nityaṃ dānadharmādisaṃgrahaḥ . mahārājaprasādena vāhanāmbarabhūṣaṇaṃ.
separated_sandhi: annadānam priyam nityam dānadharmādisaṅgrahaḥmahārājaprasādena vāhanāmbarabhūṣaṇam
english: There is a constant and pleasant giving of food (dāna), an accumulation of charitable (dāna) and righteous (dharma) deeds, and by the grace of a great king, one acquires vehicles, garments, and ornaments.

sanskrit: व्यवसायात्फलाधिक्यं विवाहो मौञ्जिबन्धनम् । षष्ठाष्टमव्यये शुक्रे नीचे शत्रुगृहे स्थिते ॥५१॥
transliteration: vyavasāyātphalādhikyaṃ vivāho mauñjibandhanam . ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyaye śukre nīce śatrugṛhe sthite.
separated_sandhi: vyavasāyāt phalādhikyam vivāhaḥ mauñjibandhanamṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyaye śukre nīce śatrugṛhe sthite
english: There will be abundant profits from business, marriage, and the sacred thread ceremony (mauñjibandhanam). However, if Venus (Śukra) is situated in the sixth, eighth, or twelfth house, in its debilitation sign, or in an enemy's sign, then...

sanskrit: मन्दारफणिसंयुक्ते तद्भुक्तौ रोगमादिशेत् । अकस्मात्कलहं चैव पितृपुत्रवियोगकृत् ॥५२॥
transliteration: mandāraphaṇisaṃyukte tadbhuktau rogamādiśet . akasmātkalahaṃ caiva pitṛputraviyogakṛt.
separated_sandhi: mandāraphaṇisaṃyukte tadbhuktau rogam ādiśetakasmāt kalaham ca eva pitṛputraviyogakṛt
english: When (Venus is) conjoined with Saturn (Manda) and Rāhu or Ketu (Phaṇī), one should predict disease during its (Venus's) sub-period (bhukti). Furthermore, there will be sudden quarrels and the causing of separation from one's father and son.

sanskrit: स्वबन्धुजनहानिश्च सर्वत्र जनपीडनम् । दायादकलहश्चैव स्वप्रभोः स्वस्य मृत्युकृत् ॥५३॥
transliteration: svabandhujanahāniśca sarvatra janapīḍanam . dāyādakalahaścaiva svaprabhoḥ svasya mṛtyukṛt.
separated_sandhi: svabandhujanahāniḥ ca sarvatra janapīḍanamdāyādakalahaḥ ca eva svaprabhoḥ svasya mṛtyukṛt
english: There will be the loss of one's own relatives and harassment of people everywhere. Furthermore, there will be disputes over inheritance, leading to the death of one's own master and oneself.

sanskrit: कलत्रपुत्रपीडा च शूलरोगादिसम्भवः । दायेशात्केन्द्रराशिस्थे त्रिकोणे वा समन्विते ॥५४॥
transliteration: kalatraputrapīḍā ca śūlarogādisambhavaḥ . dāyeśātkendrarāśisthe trikoṇe vā samanvite.
separated_sandhi: kalatraputrapīḍā ca śūlarogādisambhavaḥdāyeśāt kendrarāśisthe trikoṇe vā samanvite
english: There will be distress to one's spouse and children, and the onset of diseases like colic. This occurs when the relevant planet is situated in a Kendra (angular house) or Trikona (trinal house) from the lord of the daśā (planetary period), or is associated with such a position.

sanskrit: लाभे वा कर्मराशिस्थे क्षेत्रपालमहत्सुखम् । सुगन्धवस्त्रशय्यादि गानवाद्यसुखं भवेत् ॥५५॥
transliteration: lābhe vā karmarāśisthe kṣetrapālamahatsukham . sugandhavastraśayyādi gānavādyasukhaṃ bhavet.
separated_sandhi: lābhe vā karmarāśisthe kṣetrapālamahatsukhamsugandhavastraśayyādi gānavādyasukham bhavet
english: When the relevant planet is in the house of gain (11th house) or the house of action (10th house), there will be great happiness from guardians of the land. One will enjoy fragrant clothes, comfortable beds, and the pleasure of music and singing.

sanskrit: छत्रचामरभूषाप्तिः प्रियवस्तुसमन्विता । दायेशाद्रिपुरन्ध्रस्थे व्यये वा पापसंयुते ॥५६॥
transliteration: chatracāmarabhūṣāptiḥ priyavastusamanvitā . dāyeśādripurandhrasthe vyaye vā pāpasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: chatracāmarabhūṣāptiḥ priyavastusamannvitādāyeśāt ripurandhrasthe vyaye vā pāpasaṃyute
english: There will be the acquisition of royal insignias (umbrellas and whisks), ornaments, and other cherished possessions. Conversely, when the planet (referring to the operating planet or lord) is in the 6th (enemy), 8th (danger), or 12th (loss) house from the daśā lord, or is associated with malefic planets...

sanskrit: विप्राहिनृपचौरादिमूत्रकृच्छ्रान्महद्भयम् । प्रमेहाद्रौधिरो रोगः कुत्सितान्नं शिरोव्यथा ॥५७॥
transliteration: viprāhinṛpacaurādimūtrakṛcchrānmahadbhayam . pramehādraudhiro rogaḥ kutsitānnaṃ śirovyathā.
separated_sandhi: viprāhinṛpacaurādi mūtrakṛcchrāt mahat bhayampramehāt raudhiro rogaḥ kutsitānnam śirovyathā
english: Following the conditions in the previous verse, there will be great fear from Brahmins, snakes, kings, thieves, and from painful urination (dysuria). There will also be blood-related diseases due to urinary disorders (like diabetes), consumption of repulsive food, and headaches.

sanskrit: कारागृहप्रवेशश्च राजदण्डाद्धनक्षयः । द्वितीयद्यूननाथे वा दारपुत्रादिनाशनम् ॥५८॥
transliteration: kārāgṛhapraveśaśca rājadaṇḍāddhanakṣayaḥ . dvitīyadyūnanāthe vā dāraputrādināśanam.
separated_sandhi: kārāgṛhapraveśaḥ ca rājadaṇḍāt dhanakṣayaḥ| dvitīyadyūnanāthe vā dāraputrādināśanam
english: When the lord of the second and seventh houses (is unfavorably placed), there will be imprisonment and loss of wealth from royal punishment, or destruction of one's wife, children, and so forth.

sanskrit: आत्मपीडा भयं चैव ह्यपमृत्युभयं भवेत् । दुर्गालक्ष्मीजपं कुर्यात् ततःसुखमवाप्नुयात् ॥५९॥
transliteration: ātmapīḍā bhayaṃ caiva hyapamṛtyubhayaṃ bhavet . durgālakṣmījapaṃ kuryāt tataḥsukhamavāpnuyāt.
separated_sandhi: ātmapīḍā bhayam ca eva hi apamṛtyubhayam bhavet| durgālakṣmījapam kuryāt tataḥ sukham avāpnuyāt
english: There will be distress to the self (ātman), fear, and indeed, the fear of untimely death. One should perform recitation (japa) of Durgā and Lakṣmī (mantras), and then happiness will be attained.

sanskrit: राहोरन्तर्गते सूर्ये स्वोच्चे स्वक्षेत्रकेन्द्रगे । त्रिकोणे लाभगे वाऽपि तुङ्गांशे स्वांशगेऽपि वा ॥६०॥
transliteration: rāhorantargate sūrye svocce svakṣetrakendrage . trikoṇe lābhage vā'pi tuṅgāṃśe svāṃśage'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: rāhoḥ antargate sūrye svocce svakṣetrakendrage |trikoṇe lābhage vā api tuṅgāṃśe svāṃśage api vā
english: When the Sun is in the sub-period (antardashā) of Rāhu, and the Sun is in its exaltation sign, or in its own sign, or in a kendra house, or in a trine house, or in the house of gains, or even in its exaltation navamsha, or in its own navamsha.

sanskrit: शुभग्रहेण सन्दृष्टे राजप्रीतिकरं शुभम् । धनधान्यसमृद्धिश्च ह्यल्पमान सुखवाहम् ॥६१॥
transliteration: śubhagraheṇa sandṛṣṭe rājaprītikaraṃ śubham . dhanadhānyasamṛddhiśca hyalpamāna sukhavāham.
separated_sandhi: śubhagraheṇa sandṛṣṭe rājaprītikarām śubham |dhanadhānyasamṛddhiḥ ca hi alpamānam sukhavāham
english: When (the Sun is also) aspected by an auspicious planet, there will be royal favor and auspiciousness, prosperity of wealth and grain, and indeed, modest honor and comfortable conveyances.
