sanskrit: अल्पग्रामाधिपत्यं च स्वल्पलाभो भविष्यति । भाग्यलग्नेशसंयुक्ते कर्मेशेन निरीक्षिते ॥६२॥
transliteration: alpagrāmādhipatyaṃ ca svalpalābho bhaviṣyati . bhāgyalagneśasaṃyukte karmeśena nirīkṣite.
separated_sandhi: alpagrāmādhipatyam ca svalpalābhaḥ bhaviṣyati| bhāgyalagneśasaṃyukte karmeśena nirīkṣite
english: There will be rule over a small village and modest gains when (the Sun is) conjoined with the lord of the house of fortune (bhāgya) and the lord of the ascendant, and also aspected by the lord of the house of profession (karma).

sanskrit: राजाश्रयो महाकीर्तिर्विदेशगमनं तथा । देशाधिपत्ययोगश्च गजश्वाम्बरभूषणम् ॥६३॥
transliteration: rājāśrayo mahākīrtirvideśagamanaṃ tathā . deśādhipatyayogaśca gajaśvāmbarabhūṣaṇam.
separated_sandhi: rājāśrayaḥ mahākīrtiḥ videśagamanam tathādeśādhipatya-yogaḥ ca gajaśvāmbara-bhūṣaṇam
english: One attains royal patronage, great fame, foreign travel, and the attainment of dominion over a country, along with elephants, horses, garments, and ornaments.

sanskrit: मनोऽभिष्टप्रदानं च पुत्रकल्याणसम्भवम् । दयेशाद्रिःफरन्ध्रस्थे षष्ठे वा नीचगेऽपि वा ॥६४॥
transliteration: mano'bhiṣṭapradānaṃ ca putrakalyāṇasambhavam . dayeśādriḥpharandhrasthe ṣaṣṭhe vā nīcage'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: manas abhiṣṭapradānam ca putrakalyāṇasambhavamdayeśaḥ adri-ripha-randhrasthe ṣaṣṭhe vā nīcage api vā
english: One will experience the granting of desired wishes and the welfare of one's sons. However, if the lord of the Lagna is situated in the 7th, 6th, or 8th house, or is debilitated, then (the following negative effects occur).

sanskrit: ज्वरातिसाररोगश्च कलहो राजविग्रहः । प्रयाणं शत्रुवृद्धिश्च न्रिपचौराग्निपीडनम् ॥६५॥
transliteration: jvarātisārarogaśca kalaho rājavigrahaḥ . prayāṇaṃ śatruvṛddhiśca nripacaurāgnipīḍanam.
separated_sandhi: jvarātisārarogaḥ ca kalahaḥ rājavigrahaḥprayāṇam śatruvṛddhiḥ ca nṛpacaurāgnipīḍanam
english: (If the conditions from the previous verse are met, then there will be) fever, diarrhea, and other diseases, quarrels, conflict with the government, troublesome journeys, an increase in enemies, and affliction from rulers, thieves, or fire.

sanskrit: दायेशात्केन्द्रकोणे वा दश्चिक्ये लाभगेऽपि वा । विदेशे राजसम्मानं कल्याणं च शुभावहम् ॥६६॥
transliteration: dāyeśātkendrakoṇe vā daścikye lābhage'pi vā . videśe rājasammānaṃ kalyāṇaṃ ca śubhāvaham.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt kendrakoṇe vā daścikye lābhage api vāvideśe rājasammānam kalyāṇam ca śubhāvaham
english: When the lord of the daśā (planetary period) is in a Kendra (angular) or Trikona (trine) house, or in the 3rd or 10th house, or in the 11th house of gains, then there will be royal honor in foreign lands, and general welfare and auspiciousness.

sanskrit: द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु महारोगो भविष्यति । सूर्यप्रणामं शान्तिं च कुर्यादारोग्यसम्भवाम् ॥६७॥
transliteration: dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu mahārogo bhaviṣyati . sūryapraṇāmaṃ śāntiṃ ca kuryādārogyasambhavām.
separated_sandhi: dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu mahārogaḥ bhaviṣyatisūryapraṇāmam śāntim ca kuryāt ārogyasambhavām
english: If the lord of the 2nd and 7th houses is (afflicted or poorly placed), a great disease will manifest. One should therefore perform salutations and propitiatory rites to the Sun for the attainment of health.

sanskrit: राहोरन्तर्गते चन्द्रे स्वक्षेत्रे स्वोच्चगेऽपि वा । केन्द्रत्रिकोणलाभे वा मित्रर्क्षे शुभसंयुते ॥६८॥
transliteration: rāhorantargate candre svakṣetre svoccage'pi vā . kendratrikoṇalābhe vā mitrarkṣe śubhasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: rāhoḥ antargate candre svakṣetre svoccage apivā kendratrikoṇalābhe vā mitrarkṣe śubhasaṃyute
english: When the Moon is situated within Rahu's influence, or if it is in its own sign, or in its exaltation sign; or when it is in an angle (kendra), a trine (trikoṇa), or a house of gain, and is conjoined with benefics in a friendly sign (mitrarkṣa).

sanskrit: राजत्वं राजपूज्यत्वं धनार्थं धनलाभकृत् । आरोग्यं भूषण्ं चैव मित्रस्त्रीपुत्रसम्पदः ॥६९॥
transliteration: rājatvaṃ rājapūjyatvaṃ dhanārthaṃ dhanalābhakṛt . ārogyaṃ bhūṣaṇṃ caiva mitrastrīputrasampadaḥ.
separated_sandhi: rājātvaṃ rājapūjyatvaṃ dhanārthaṃ dhanalābhakṛtārogyaṃ bhūṣaṇaṃ ca eva mitrastrīputrasampadaḥ
english: One obtains kingship, honor from kings, and acquires wealth, leading to financial gains. There will be good health, ornaments, and prosperity through friends, wives, and sons.

sanskrit: पूर्णे चन्द्रे फलं पूर्णं राजप्रीत्या शुभावहम् । अश्ववाहनलाभः स्यद्गृहक्षेत्रादिवृद्धिकृत् ॥७०॥
transliteration: pūrṇe candre phalaṃ pūrṇaṃ rājaprītyā śubhāvaham . aśvavāhanalābhaḥ syadgṛhakṣetrādivṛddhikṛt.
separated_sandhi: pūrṇe candre phalaṃ pūrṇaṃ rājaprītyā śubhāvahamaśvavāhanalābhaḥ syāt gṛhakṣetrādivṛddhikṛt
english: When the Moon is full, the results are complete and bring auspiciousness through royal favor. There will be gains of horses and vehicles, and an increase in houses, fields, and other such possessions.

sanskrit: दायेशात्सुखभाग्यस्थे केन्द्रे वा लाभगेऽपि वा । लक्ष्मीकटाक्षचिह्नानि गृहे कल्याणसम्भवः ॥७१॥
transliteration: dāyeśātsukhabhāgyasthe kendre vā lābhage'pi vā . lakṣmīkaṭākṣacihnāni gṛhe kalyāṇasambhavaḥ.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt sukhabhāgyasthe keandre vā lābhage apivā lakṣmīkaṭākṣacihnāni gṛhe kalyāṇasambhavaḥ
english: When (the Moon is) situated in a house of happiness (sukha) or fortune (bhāgya), or in an angle (kendra) or house of gain (lābha) from the Daśā lord, there will be signs of the grace (kaṭākṣa) of Goddess Lakshmi, and the occurrence of auspicious events at home.

sanskrit: सर्वकार्यसिद्धिः स्याद्धनधान्यसुखावहा । सत्कीर्तिलाभसम्मानं देव्याराधनमाचरेत् ॥७२॥
transliteration: sarvakāryasiddhiḥ syāddhanadhānyasukhāvahā . satkīrtilābhasammānaṃ devyārādhanamācaret.
separated_sandhi: sarvakāryasiddhiḥ syāt dhanadhānyasukhāvahāsatkīrtilābhasammānaṃ devyārādhanam ācaret
english: There will be success in all undertakings, bringing wealth, grain, and happiness. Also, there will be gains of good reputation and honor. One should perform the worship of the Goddess.

sanskrit: दायेशात्षष्ठरन्ध्रस्थे व्यये वा बलवर्जिते । पिशाचक्षुद्रव्याघ्राद्य्सिर्गृहक्षेत्रार्थनाशनम् ॥७३॥
transliteration: dāyeśātṣaṣṭharandhrasthe vyaye vā balavarjite . piśācakṣudravyāghrādysirgṛhakṣetrārthanāśanam.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt ṣaṣṭha-randhra-sthe vyaye vā bala-varjite |pishāca-kṣudra-vyāghra-ādi-sṛṣṭiḥ gṛha-kṣetra-artha-nāśanam
english: When the lord of the planetary period (daśā) is devoid of strength and located in the 6th, 8th, or 12th house, it causes the destruction of one's house, land, and wealth through the agency of demons, small animals, tigers, and similar beings.

sanskrit: मार्गे चौरभयं चैव व्रणाधिक्य महोदयम् । द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु अपमृत्युस्तदा भवेत् ॥७४॥
transliteration: mārge caurabhayaṃ caiva vraṇādhikya mahodayam . dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu apamṛtyustadā bhavet.
separated_sandhi: mārge caura-bhayam ca eva vraṇa-ādhikyam maha-udayam| dvitīya-dyūna-nāthe tu apa-mṛtyuḥ tadā bhavet
english: There is also fear of thieves on the road and a great incidence of wounds. Moreover, if the lord of the 2nd or 7th house is involved, then an untimely death (apamṛtyu) may occur.

sanskrit: श्वेतां गां महिषीं दद्याद् विप्रायारोग्यसिद्धये । ततः सौख्यमवाप्नोति चन्द्रग्रहप्रसादतः ॥७५॥
transliteration: śvetāṃ gāṃ mahiṣīṃ dadyād viprāyārogyasiddhaye . tataḥ saukhyamavāpnoti candragrahaprasādataḥ.
separated_sandhi: śvetām gām mahiṣīm dadyāt viprāya ārogya-siddhaye| tataḥ saukhyam avāpnoti candra-graha-prasādataḥ
english: One should donate a white cow or a buffalo to a Brahmin for the attainment of good health. Then, one achieves happiness through the grace (prasāda) of the Moon (graha).

sanskrit: राहोरन्तर्गते भौमे लग्नाल्लाभत्रिकोणगे । केन्द्रे वा शुभसंयुक्ते स्वोच्चे स्वक्षेत्रगेऽपि वा ॥७६॥
transliteration: rāhorantargate bhaume lagnāllābhatrikoṇage . kendre vā śubhasaṃyukte svocce svakṣetrage'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: rāhoḥ antargate bhaume lagnāt lābha-trikoṇa-ge | kendrevā śubha-saṃyukte sva-ucche sva-kṣetra-ge api vā
english: When Mars (bhauma) is in the sub-period (antardaśā) of Rāhu, and Mars is located from the ascendant (lagna) in the 11th house, a trine (5th or 9th house), or an angular house (kendra), or is conjoined with auspicious planets, or is in its own exaltation sign (svocca), or in its own sign (svakṣetra).

sanskrit: नष्टराज्यधन्प्राप्तिर्गृहक्षेत्राभिवृद्धिकृत् । इष्टदेवप्रसादेन सन्तानसुखभाग्भवेत् ॥७७॥
transliteration: naṣṭarājyadhanprāptirgṛhakṣetrābhivṛddhikṛt . iṣṭadevaprasādena santānasukhabhāgbhavet.
separated_sandhi: naṣṭa-rājya-dhan-prāptiḥ gṛha-kṣetra-abhivṛddhi-kṛt| iṣṭa-deva-prasādena santāna-sukha-bhāk bhavet
english: There will be attainment of lost kingdom and wealth, and an increase in one's house and land. Through the grace (prasāda) of one's chosen deity (iṣṭa-deva), one becomes a partaker of the happiness of progeny.

sanskrit: क्षिप्रभोज्यान्महत्सौख्यं भूषणश्वाम्बरादिकृत् । दायेशात्केन्द्रकोणे वा दुश्चिक्ये लाभगेऽपि वा ॥७८॥
transliteration: kṣiprabhojyānmahatsaukhyaṃ bhūṣaṇaśvāmbarādikṛt . dāyeśātkendrakoṇe vā duścikye lābhage'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: kṣiprabhojyān mahat saukhyam bhūṣaṇaḥ ca ambarādikṛt dāyeśāt kendrakoṇe vā duścikye lābhage api vā
english: When the lord of the daśā (planetary period) is located in a quadrant (kendra) or trine (koṇa) house, or even in the 3rd or 11th house, there will be swift enjoyment of food, great happiness, and the acquisition of ornaments, garments, and the like.

sanskrit: रक्तवस्त्रादिलाभः स्यात्प्रयाणं राजदर्शनम् । पुत्रवर्गेषु कल्याणं स्वप्रभोश्च महत्सुखम् ॥७९॥
transliteration: raktavastrādilābhaḥ syātprayāṇaṃ rājadarśanam . putravargeṣu kalyāṇaṃ svaprabhośca mahatsukham.
separated_sandhi: raktavastrādi lābhaḥ syāt prayāṇam rājadarśanamputravargeṣu kalyāṇam svaprabhoḥ ca mahat sukham
english: There will be gains of red garments and similar items, journeys, an audience with royalty, well-being for one's children, and great happiness for one's own lord or master.

sanskrit: सेनपत्यं महोत्साहो भ्रातृवर्गधनागमः । दायेशाद्रन्ध्ररिःफे वा षष्ठे पापसमन्विते ॥८०॥
transliteration: senapatyaṃ mahotsāho bhrātṛvargadhanāgamaḥ . dāyeśādrandhrariḥphe vā ṣaṣṭhe pāpasamanvite.
separated_sandhi: senapatyam mahā utsāhaḥ bhrātṛvarga dhana āgamaḥdāyeśāt randhrariḥphe vā ṣaṣṭhe pāpa samanvite
english: Generalship, great enthusiasm, and the acquisition of wealth for one's family of brothers (occur). However, if the daśā (planetary period) lord is in the 8th (randhra) or 12th (riḥpha) house, or in the 6th house associated with a malefic planet...

sanskrit: पुत्रदारादिहानिश्च सूदराणां च पीडनम् । स्थानभ्रंशो बन्धुवर्गदारपुत्रविरोधनम् ॥८१॥
transliteration: putradārādihāniśca sūdarāṇāṃ ca pīḍanam . sthānabhraṃśo bandhuvargadāraputravirodhanam.
separated_sandhi: putra dārādi hāniḥ ca sūdarāṇām ca pīḍanamsthānabhraṃśaḥ bandhuvarga dāra putra virodhanam
english: ... (there will be) loss of children and spouse, affliction for servants, loss of position, and discord with relatives, wife, and children.

sanskrit: चौराहिव्रणभीतिश्च स्वदेहस्य च पीडनम् । आदौ क्लेशकरं चैव मध्यान्ते सौखमाप्नुयात् ॥८२॥
transliteration: caurāhivraṇabhītiśca svadehasya ca pīḍanam . ādau kleśakaraṃ caiva madhyānte saukhamāpnuyāt.
separated_sandhi: caurāhivraṇabhītiḥ ca svadehasya ca pīḍanam ādaukleśakaram ca eva madhyānte saukham āpnuyāt
english: There will be fear of thieves, snakes, and wounds, and affliction of one's own body. Initially, there will be distress, but in the middle and toward the end (of the daśā), one may attain happiness.

sanskrit: द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु देहालस्यं महद्भयम् । अनड्वाहं च गां दद्यादारोग्यसुखलब्धये ॥८३॥
transliteration: dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu dehālasyaṃ mahadbhayam . anaḍvāhaṃ ca gāṃ dadyādārogyasukhalabdhaye.
separated_sandhi: dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu dehālasyam mahat bhayamanadvāham ca gām dadyāt ārogyasukhalabdhaye
english: When the lord of the seventh house is in the second house, there will be bodily illness and great fear. One should offer a bullock and a cow for the attainment of health and happiness.

sanskrit: स्वोच्चे स्वक्षेत्रगे जीवे लग्नात्केन्द्रत्रिकोणगे । अनेकराजधीशो वा सम्पन्नो राजपूजितः ॥१॥
transliteration: svocce svakṣetrage jīve lagnātkendratrikoṇage . anekarājadhīśo vā sampanno rājapūjitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: svocce svakṣetrage jīve lagnāt kendratrikoṇageanekarājādhīśaḥ vā sampannaḥ rājapūjitaḥ
english: When Jupiter is in its own exaltation sign, its own sign, or in an angular or trinal house from the ascendant, the native becomes a ruler over many kings, prosperous, and honored by kings.

sanskrit: मोमहिष्यादिलाभश्च वस्त्रवाहनभूषणम् । नूतनस्थाननिर्माणं हर्म्यप्राकारसंयुतम् ॥२॥
transliteration: momahiṣyādilābhaśca vastravāhanabhūṣaṇam . nūtanasthānanirmāṇaṃ harmyaprākārasaṃyutam.
separated_sandhi: momahiṣyādilābhaḥ ca vastravāhanabhūṣaṇamnūtanasthānanirmāṇam harmyaprākārasaṃyutam
english: And acquisition of 'moma' (a type of livestock), buffaloes, etc., along with clothes, vehicles, and ornaments. There will be the construction of new residences, endowed with mansions and enclosures.

sanskrit: गजान्तैश्वर्यसम्पत्तिर्भाग्यकर्मफलओदयः । ब्राह्मणप्रभुसम्मानं समानं प्रभुदर्शनम् ॥३॥
transliteration: gajāntaiśvaryasampattirbhāgyakarmaphalaodayaḥ . brāhmaṇaprabhusammānaṃ samānaṃ prabhudarśanam.
separated_sandhi: gajāntaiśvaryasampattiḥ bhāgyakarmaphalodayaḥbrāhmaṇaprabhusammānam samānam prabhudarśanam
english: Immense wealth, comparable to that of elephants, and the fruition of destiny (bhāgya) and actions (karma) will occur. There will be respect from Brahmins and rulers, and likewise, audiences with rulers.

sanskrit: स्वप्रभोः स्वफलाधिक्य दारपुत्रादिलाभकृत् । नीचांशे नीचराशिस्थे षष्ठाष्टमव्ययराशिगे ॥४॥
transliteration: svaprabhoḥ svaphalādhikya dāraputrādilābhakṛt . nīcāṃśe nīcarāśisthe ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyayarāśige.
separated_sandhi: svaprabhoḥ svaphalādhikyam dāraputrādilābhakṛtnīcāṃśe nīcarāśisthe ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyayarāśige
english: There will be an abundance of one's own results from one's own ruling planet, causing the gain of wife, sons, and so on. (This is contrasted with situations where the planet is) in its debilitated division (nīcāṃśa), situated in a debilitated sign, or located in the 6th, 8th, or 12th houses.

sanskrit: नीचसङ्गो महादुःखं दायादजनविग्रहः । कलहो न विचारोस्य स्वप्रभुष्वपमृत्युकृत् ॥५॥
transliteration: nīcasaṅgo mahāduḥkhaṃ dāyādajanavigrahaḥ . kalaho na vicārosya svaprabhuṣvapamṛtyukṛt.
separated_sandhi: nīcasaṅgaḥ mahāduḥkham dāyādajanavigrahaḥkalahaḥ na vicāraḥ asya svaprabhuṣu apamṛtyukṛt
english: Association with ignoble people brings great sorrow. Strife with relatives and quarrels with one's own superiors, (undertaken) without proper consideration, cause untimely death.

sanskrit: पुत्रदारवियोगश्च धनधान्यार्थहानिकृत् । सप्तमाधिपदोषेण देववाधा भविष्यति ॥६॥
transliteration: putradāraviyogaśca dhanadhānyārthahānikṛt . saptamādhipadoṣeṇa devavādhā bhaviṣyati.
separated_sandhi: putradāraviyogaḥ ca dhanadhānyārthahānikṛtsaptamādhipadoṣeṇa devavādhā bhaviṣyati
english: Separation from one's sons and wife, along with loss of wealth, grains, and money, occur. Due to a fault of the lord of the seventh house, there will also be afflictions from deities.

sanskrit: तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं शिवसाहस्रकं जपेत् । रुद्रजाप्यं च गोदानं कुर्यात् स्वाऽभीष्टलब्धये ॥७॥
transliteration: taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ śivasāhasrakaṃ japet . rudrajāpyaṃ ca godānaṃ kuryāt svā'bhīṣṭalabdhaye.
separated_sandhi: taddoṣaparihārārtham śivasāhasrakam japetrudrajāpyam ca godānam kuryāt svābhīṣṭalabdhaye
english: To mitigate that fault, one should recite the thousand names of Shiva (Śiva-Sāhasrakam). One should also perform Rudra Jāpya and donate a cow to attain one's desired outcomes.

sanskrit: जीवस्यान्तर्गते मन्दे स्वोच्चे स्वक्षेत्रमित्रभे । लग्नात्केन्द्रत्रिकोणस्थे लाभे वा बलसंयुते ॥८॥
transliteration: jīvasyāntargate mande svocce svakṣetramitrabhe . lagnātkendratrikoṇasthe lābhe vā balasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: jīvasya antargate mande svocce svakṣetramitrabhelagnāt kendratrikoṇasthe lābhe vā balasaṃyute
english: When Saturn (Manda) is in Jupiter's (Jīva's) sub-period, and is either in its exaltation sign, its own sign, or a friendly sign; or, when it is situated in a Kendra (angular) or Trikona (trine) house from the Ascendant, or in the eleventh house of gains, or is endowed with strength.

sanskrit: राज्यलाभो महत्सौख्यं वस्त्राभरणसंयुतम् । धनधान्यादिलाभश्च स्त्रीलाभो बहुसौख्यकृत् ॥९॥
transliteration: rājyalābho mahatsaukhyaṃ vastrābharaṇasaṃyutam . dhanadhānyādilābhaśca strīlābho bahusaukhyakṛt.
separated_sandhi: rājyalābhaḥ mahatsaukhyam vastrābharaṇasaṃyutamdhanadhānyādilābhaḥ ca strīlābhaḥ bahusaukhyakṛt
english: There is acquisition of a kingdom or high office, great happiness, and the attainment of clothes and ornaments. Furthermore, there will be gains of wealth, grains, and other such things, along with the acquisition of a wife, which brings much joy.

sanskrit: वाहनाम्बरपश्वादिभूलाभः स्थानलाभकृत् । पुत्रमित्रादिसौख्यं च नरवाहनयोगकृत् ॥१०॥
transliteration: vāhanāmbarapaśvādibhūlābhaḥ sthānalābhakṛt . putramitrādisaukhyaṃ ca naravāhanayogakṛt.
separated_sandhi: vāhanāmbarapaśvādbhūlābhaḥ sthānalābhakṛtputramitrādisaukhyam ca naravāhanayogakṛt
english: One gains vehicles, clothes, animals, land, and so forth, along with acquiring status or position. There is also happiness from sons, friends, and others, and the attainment of conveyances borne by men.

sanskrit: नीलवस्त्रादिलाभश्च नीलाश्वं लभते च सः । पश्चिमां दिशमाश्रित्य प्रयाणं राजदर्शनम् ॥११॥
transliteration: nīlavastrādilābhaśca nīlāśvaṃ labhate ca saḥ . paścimāṃ diśamāśritya prayāṇaṃ rājadarśanam.
separated_sandhi: nīlavastrādilābhaḥ ca nīlāśvam labhate ca saḥpaścimām diśam āśritya prayāṇam rājadarśanam
english: One also gains blue clothes and other similar items, and obtains a blue horse. Taking the western direction, a journey and an audience with the king (rāja-darśanam) will occur.

sanskrit: अनेकयानलाभं च निर्दिशेन्मन्दभुक्तिषु । लग्नात्षष्ठाष्टमे मन्दे व्यये नीचेऽस्तगेऽप्यरौ ॥१२॥
transliteration: anekayānalābhaṃ ca nirdiśenmandabhuktiṣu . lagnātṣaṣṭhāṣṭame mande vyaye nīce'stage'pyarau.
separated_sandhi: anekayānalābham ca nirdiśet mandabhuktiṣu lagnātṣaṣṭhāṣṭame mande vyaye nīce astage api arau
english: One should indicate the acquisition of many vehicles during the planetary sub-periods of Saturn (mandabhukti). However, if Saturn is in the sixth or eighth house from the ascendant (lagna), in the twelfth house (vyaye), debilitated (nīce), in the seventh house (astage), or even in an enemy's sign (arau), then...

sanskrit: धनधान्यादिनाशश्च ज्वरपीडा मनोरुजः । स्त्रीपुत्रादिषु पीडा वाव्रणार्त्यादिकमुद्भवेत् ॥१३॥
transliteration: dhanadhānyādināśaśca jvarapīḍā manorujaḥ . strīputrādiṣu pīḍā vāvraṇārtyādikamudbhavet.
separated_sandhi: dhanadhānyādināśaḥ ca jvarapīḍā manorujaḥstrīputrādiṣu pīḍā vā vraṇārtyādikam udbhavet
english: There will be destruction of wealth, grain, and other such assets, along with suffering from fever and mental illness. There may also be distress for one's wife, sons, and others, or the occurrence of wounds, pain, and similar afflictions.

sanskrit: गृहे त्वशुभकार्याणि भ्र्त्यवर्गादिपीडनम् । गोमहिष्यादिहानिश्च बन्धुद्वेषी भविष्यति ॥१४॥
transliteration: gṛhe tvaśubhakāryāṇi bhrtyavargādipīḍanam . gomahiṣyādihāniśca bandhudveṣī bhaviṣyati.
separated_sandhi: gṛhe tu aśubhakāryāṇi bhṛtyavargādipīḍanamgomahiṣyādihāniḥ ca bandhudveṣī bhaviṣyati
english: Within the home, inauspicious activities will occur, and there will be harassment of servants and similar groups. There will be a loss of cows, buffaloes, and other cattle, and the individual will become estranged from or hated by relatives.

sanskrit: दायेशात्केन्द्रकोणस्थे लाभे वा धनगेऽपि वा । भूराभश्चार्थलाभश्च पुत्रलाभसुखं भवेत् ॥१५॥
transliteration: dāyeśātkendrakoṇasthe lābhe vā dhanage'pi vā . bhūrābhaścārthalābhaśca putralābhasukhaṃ bhavet.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt kendrakoṇasthe lābhe vā dhanage api vā |bhūlābhaḥ ca arthalābhaḥ ca putralābhasukham bhavet
english: When the lord of the daśā (planetary period) is situated in a kendra (angular house) or koṇa (trinal house), or in the eleventh house (of gains), or even in the second house (of wealth), there will be acquisition of land, gain of wealth, and happiness from the birth or acquisition of children.

sanskrit: गोमहिष्यादिलाभश्च शूद्रमूलाद्धनं तथा । दायेशाद्रिपुरन्ध्रस्थे व्यये वा पापसंयुते ॥१६॥
transliteration: gomahiṣyādilābhaśca śūdramūlāddhanaṃ tathā . dāyeśādripurandhrasthe vyaye vā pāpasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: gomahiṣyādi lābhaḥ ca śūdramūlāt dhanam tathā| dāyeśāt ripurandhrasthe vyaye vā pāpasaṃyute
english: There will also be acquisition of cows, buffaloes, and similar animals, and similarly, wealth gained from the śūdra (working class). However, when the lord of the daśā (planetary period) is situated in the sixth, eighth, or twelfth house, and is conjoined with a malefic planet, then...

sanskrit: धनधान्यादिनाशश्च बन्धुमित्रविरोधकृत् । उद्योगभङ्गो देहार्तिः स्वजनानां महद्भयम् ॥१७॥
transliteration: dhanadhānyādināśaśca bandhumitravirodhakṛt . udyogabhaṅgo dehārtiḥ svajanānāṃ mahadbhayam.
separated_sandhi: dhanadhānyādi nāśaḥ ca bandhumitravirodhakṛt |udyogabhaṅgaḥ dehārtiḥ svajanānām mahat bhayam
english: There will be destruction of wealth and grain, enmity with relatives and friends, obstruction of enterprises, bodily afflictions, and great fear for one's own people.

sanskrit: द्विसप्तमाधिपे मन्दे ह्यपमृत्युर्भविष्यति । तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं विष्णुसाहस्रकं जपेत् ॥१८॥
transliteration: dvisaptamādhipe mande hyapamṛtyurbhaviṣyati . taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ viṣṇusāhasrakaṃ japet.
separated_sandhi: dvisaptamādhipe mande hi apamṛtyuḥ bhaviṣyati| tatdoṣaparihārārtham viṣṇusāhasrakam japet
english: When Saturn (manda) is the lord of both the second and seventh houses, an accidental death will indeed occur. To remedy this flaw, one should chant the Viṣṇu Sahasranāma.

sanskrit: कृष्णां गां महिषीं दद्यादनेनारोग्यमादिशेत् । मन्दग्रहप्रसादेन सत्यं सत्यं द्विजोत्तम ॥१९॥
transliteration: kṛṣṇāṃ gāṃ mahiṣīṃ dadyādanenārogyamādiśet . mandagrahaprasādena satyaṃ satyaṃ dvijottama.
separated_sandhi: kṛṣṇām gām mahiṣīm dadyāt anena ārogyam ādiśet| mandagrahaprasādena satyam satyam dvijottama
english: One should donate a black cow or a buffalo; by doing this, good health will be bestowed. By the grace of the slow-moving planet (Saturn), this is truly, truly stated, O best among the twice-born (dvijottama).

sanskrit: जीवस्यान्तर्गते सौम्ये केन्द्रलाभत्रिकोणगे । स्वोच्चे वा स्वर्क्षगे वापि दशाधिपसमन्विते ॥२०॥
transliteration: jīvasyāntargate saumye kendralābhatrikoṇage . svocce vā svarkṣage vāpi daśādhipasamanvite.
separated_sandhi: jīvasya antargate saumye kendralābhatrikoṇagesvocce vā svarṣage vā api daśādhipasamanvite
english: When Mercury (saumya) is situated in an angular (kendra), eleventh (lābha), or trine (trikoṇa) house from Jupiter (jīva), or is in its sign of exaltation or its own sign, and is also conjoined with the lord of the planetary period (daśā).

sanskrit: अर्थलाभो देहसौख्यं राज्यलाभो महत्सुखम् । महाराजप्रसादेन स्वेष्टसिद्धिः सुखावहा ॥२१॥
transliteration: arthalābho dehasaukhyaṃ rājyalābho mahatsukham . mahārājaprasādena sveṣṭasiddhiḥ sukhāvahā.
separated_sandhi: arthalābhaḥ dehasaukhyam rājyalābhaḥ mahatsukhammahārājaprasādena sveṣṭasiddhiḥ sukhāvahā
english: There will be gain of wealth, physical comfort, acquisition of position, and great happiness. Through the favor of a great king, one's cherished desires will be fulfilled, bringing much joy.

sanskrit: वाहनाम्बरपश्वादिगोधनैस्संकुलं गृहम् । महीसुतेन संदृष्टे शत्रुवृद्धिः सुखक्षयः ॥२२॥
transliteration: vāhanāmbarapaśvādigodhanaissaṃkulaṃ gṛham . mahīsutena saṃdṛṣṭe śatruvṛddhiḥ sukhakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: vāhanāmbarapaśvādigodhanaiḥ saṅkulam gṛhammahīsutena sandṛṣṭe śatruvṛddhiḥ sukhakṣayaḥ
english: The home will be filled with vehicles, garments, animals, cattle, and other forms of wealth. However, when this condition is aspected by Mars (mahīsuta), there will be an increase in enemies and a reduction in happiness.

sanskrit: व्यवसायात्फलं निष्टं ज्वरातीमारपीडनम् । दायेशाद्भाग्यकोणे वा केन्द्रे वा तुङ्गराशिगे ॥२३॥
transliteration: vyavasāyātphalaṃ niṣṭaṃ jvarātīmārapīḍanam . dāyeśādbhāgyakoṇe vā kendre vā tuṅgarāśige.
separated_sandhi: vyavasāyāt phalam niṣṭam jvarātīmārapīḍanamdāyeśāt bhāgyakoṇe vā keñdre vā tuṅgarāśige
english: There are adverse results from business ventures, along with suffering from fever and severe affliction. This occurs when a planet (causing these effects) is situated in a trine house (bhāgyakoṇa) or an angular house (kendra) from the Daśā lord, or is in its exaltation sign.

sanskrit: स्वदेशे धनलाभश्च पितृमातृसुखावहा । गजवाजिसमायुक्तो राजमित्रप्रसादतः ॥२४॥
transliteration: svadeśe dhanalābhaśca pitṛmātṛsukhāvahā . gajavājisamāyukto rājamitraprasādataḥ.
separated_sandhi: svadeśe dhanalābhaḥ ca pitṛmātṛsukhāvahāgajavājīsamāyuktaḥ rājamitraprasādataḥ
english: In one's own country, there is gain of wealth, and happiness is brought to one's parents. One becomes endowed with elephants and horses through the favor of royal friends.

sanskrit: दायेशात्षष्ठरन्ध्रस्थे व्यये वा पापसंयुते । शुभदृष्टिविहीने च धन्धान्यपरिच्युतिः ॥२५॥
transliteration: dāyeśātṣaṣṭharandhrasthe vyaye vā pāpasaṃyute . śubhadṛṣṭivihīne ca dhandhānyaparicyutiḥ.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt ṣaṣṭharandhrasthe vyaye vā pāpasaṃyuteśubhadṛṣṭivihīne ca dhanadhānyaparicyutiḥ
english: When the lord of the daśā (planetary period) is situated in the sixth, eighth, or twelfth house, is conjoined with malefic planets, and is also without the aspect of benefic planets, there will be a loss of wealth and grain.

sanskrit: विदेशगमनं चैव मार्गे चौरभयं तथा । व्रणदाहाक्षिरोगश्च नानादेशपरिभ्रमः ॥२६॥
transliteration: videśagamanaṃ caiva mārge caurabhayaṃ tathā . vraṇadāhākṣirogaśca nānādeśaparibhramaḥ.
separated_sandhi: videśagamanaṃ ca eva mārge caurabhayaṃ tathāvraṇadāhākṣirogaḥ ca nānādeśaparibhramaḥ
english: Moreover, there will be foreign travel, and similarly, fear of thieves on the journey. Also, wounds, burning sensations, eye diseases, and wandering through many lands will occur.

sanskrit: लग्नात्षष्ठाष्टमभावे वा व्यये वा पापसंयुते । अक्समात्कलहश्चैव गृहे मिष्ठुरभावणम् ॥२७॥
transliteration: lagnātṣaṣṭhāṣṭamabhāve vā vyaye vā pāpasaṃyute . aksamātkalahaścaiva gṛhe miṣṭhurabhāvaṇam.
separated_sandhi: lagnāt ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamabhāve vā vyaye vā pāpasaṃyuteakasmāt kalahaḥ ca eva gṛhe miṣṭhurabhāvaṇam
english: When (a planet) from the ascendant (lagna) is situated in the sixth, eighth, or twelfth house, and is conjoined with malefic planets, there will suddenly be quarrels and harsh words at home.

sanskrit: चतुष्पाज्जीवहानिश्च व्यवहारे तथैव च । अपमृत्युभयं चैव शत्रूणां कलहो भवेत् ॥२८॥
transliteration: catuṣpājjīvahāniśca vyavahāre tathaiva ca . apamṛtyubhayaṃ caiva śatrūṇāṃ kalaho bhavet.
separated_sandhi: catuṣpāt jīvahāniḥ ca vyavahāre tathā eva caapamṛtyubhayaṃ ca eva śatrūṇāṃ kalahaḥ bhavet
english: There will be a loss of four-footed creatures (livestock), and similarly, difficulties in business dealings. Furthermore, there will be fear of accidental death, and quarrels among enemies will arise.

sanskrit: शुभदृष्टे शुभैर्युक्ते दारसौख्यं धनागमः । आदौ शुभं देहसौख्यं वाहनाम्बरलाभकृत् ॥२९॥
transliteration: śubhadṛṣṭe śubhairyukte dārasaukhyaṃ dhanāgamaḥ . ādau śubhaṃ dehasaukhyaṃ vāhanāmbaralābhakṛt.
separated_sandhi: śubhadṛṣṭe śubhaiḥ yukte dārasaukhyaṃ dhanāgamaḥādau śubhaṃ dehasaukhyaṃ vāhanāmbaralābhakṛt
english: When aspected by benefic planets and conjoined with benefic planets, there will be happiness from one's spouse and acquisition of wealth. Initially, there will be auspicious outcomes, physical well-being, and gains of conveyances and garments.

sanskrit: अन्ते तु धनहानिश्चेत्स्वात्मसौख्यं न जायते । द्वितीयद्यूननाथे वा ह्यपमृत्युर्भविष्यति ॥३०॥
transliteration: ante tu dhanahāniścetsvātmasaukhyaṃ na jāyate . dvitīyadyūnanāthe vā hyapamṛtyurbhaviṣyati.
separated_sandhi: ante tu dhana-hāniḥ cet svātma-saukhyam na jāyate| dvitīya-dyūna-nāthe vā hi apamṛtyuḥ bhaviṣyati
english: If there is a loss of wealth in the end, one's personal happiness (svātmasaukhya) will not manifest. Alternatively, if the lord of the second or seventh house is involved, there will surely be an untimely death (apamṛtyu).

sanskrit: तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं विष्णुसाहस्रकं जपेत् । आयुर्वृद्धिकरं चैव सर्वसौभाग्यदायकम् ॥३१॥
transliteration: taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ viṣṇusāhasrakaṃ japet . āyurvṛddhikaraṃ caiva sarvasaubhāgyadāyakam.
separated_sandhi: tat doṣa-parihāra-artham viṣṇusāhasrakam japet |āyuḥ-vṛddhi-karam ca eva sarva-saubhāgya-dāyakam
english: To remedy that fault, one should recite the Viṣṇu Sahasranāma. It certainly bestows increased longevity and all auspiciousness.

sanskrit: जीवस्यान्तर्गते केतौ शुभग्रहसमन्विते । अल्पसौख्यधनव्याप्तिः कुत्सितान्नस्य भोजनम् ॥३२॥
transliteration: jīvasyāntargate ketau śubhagrahasamanvite . alpasaukhyadhanavyāptiḥ kutsitānnasya bhojanam.
separated_sandhi: jīvasya antargate ketau śubha-graha-samanvite |alpa-saukhya-dhana-vyāptiḥ kutsita-annasya bhojanam
english: When Ketu is situated within or associated with Jīva (Jupiter) and conjoined with auspicious planets, there is limited attainment of happiness and wealth, along with the consumption of undesirable food.

sanskrit: परान्नं चैव श्राद्धान्नं पापमूलाद्धनानि च । दायेशाद्रिपुरन्ध्रस्थे व्यये वा पापसंयुते ॥३३॥
transliteration: parānnaṃ caiva śrāddhānnaṃ pāpamūlāddhanāni ca . dāyeśādripurandhrasthe vyaye vā pāpasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: para-annam ca eva śrāddha-annam pāpa-mūlāt dhanānica | dāyeśāt ripu-randhra-sthe vyaye vā pāpa-saṃyute
english: Furthermore, one consumes food from others and food from śrāddha (ancestral offerings), and obtains wealth from sinful sources, when the Lagna Lord (dāyeśa) is located in the sixth, eighth, or twelfth house, or is associated with malefic planets.

sanskrit: राजकोपो धनच्छेदो बन्धनं रोगपीडनम् । बलाहानिः पितृद्वेषो भ्रातृद्वेषो मनोरुजम् ॥३४॥
transliteration: rājakopo dhanacchedo bandhanaṃ rogapīḍanam . balāhāniḥ pitṛdveṣo bhrātṛdveṣo manorujam.
separated_sandhi: rāja-kopaḥ dhana-cchedaḥ bandhanam roga-pīḍanam| bala-hāniḥ pitṛ-dveṣaḥ bhrātṛ-dveṣaḥ manorujaṃ
english: There will be royal wrath, loss of wealth, imprisonment, affliction by disease, diminution of strength, animosity from/towards the father, animosity from/towards brothers, and mental distress.

sanskrit: दायेशात्सुतभाग्यस्थे वाहने कर्मगेऽपि वा । नरवाहनयोगश्च गजाश्वाम्बरसङ्कुलम् ॥३५॥
transliteration: dāyeśātsutabhāgyasthe vāhane karmage'pi vā . naravāhanayogaśca gajāśvāmbarasaṅkulam.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt suta-bhāgya-sthe vāhane karma-ge api vā| nara-vāhana-yogaḥ ca gajāśvāmbara-saṅkulam
english: When the lord of wealth is situated in the house of children or fortune, or in the house of vehicles, or even in the house of action, then the naravāhana-yoga (combination for human-borne conveyances) occurs, indicating an abundance of elephants, horses, and garments.

sanskrit: महाराजप्रसादेन स्वेष्टकार्यार्थलाभकृत् । व्यवसायात्फलाधिक्यं गोमहिष्यादिलाभकृत् ॥३६॥
transliteration: mahārājaprasādena sveṣṭakāryārthalābhakṛt . vyavasāyātphalādhikyaṃ gomahiṣyādilābhakṛt.
separated_sandhi: mahārāja-prasādena sveṣṭa-kāryā-artha-lābha-kṛt| vyavasāyāt phalādhikyam go-mahiṣy-ādi-lābha-kṛt
english: (This yoga leads to) the achievement of desired objectives and wealth by the grace of a great king, and an abundance of results from enterprise, bringing gains of cows, buffaloes, and the like.

sanskrit: यवनप्रभुमूलाद्वा धनवस्त्रादिलाभकृत् । द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु देहवाधा भविष्यति ॥३७॥
transliteration: yavanaprabhumūlādvā dhanavastrādilābhakṛt . dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu dehavādhā bhaviṣyati.
separated_sandhi: yavana-prabhu-mūlāt vā dhana-vastra-ādi-lābha-kṛt| dvitīya-dyūna-nāthe tu deha-vādhā bhaviṣyati
english: Alternatively, there will be gains of wealth, clothes, and the like from a foreign ruler. However, if the lord of the second and seventh houses (is afflicted or poorly placed), there will be physical obstruction or trouble.

sanskrit: छागदानं प्रकुर्वीत मृत्युञ्जयजपं चरेत् । सर्वदोषोपशमनीं शान्तिं कुर्याद्विधानतः ॥३८॥
transliteration: chāgadānaṃ prakurvīta mṛtyuñjayajapaṃ caret . sarvadoṣopaśamanīṃ śāntiṃ kuryādvidhānataḥ.
separated_sandhi: chāga-dānam pra-kurvīta mṛtyuñjaya-japam caret| sarva-doṣopaśamanīm śāntim kuryāt vidhānataḥ
english: One should offer a goat and perform the chanting of the Mṛtyuñjaya (conqueror of death) mantra. One should perform a propitiatory rite (śānti) according to the prescribed rules, which alleviates all defects.

sanskrit: जीवस्यान्तर्गते शुक्रे भाग्यकेन्द्रेशसंयुते । लाभे वा सुतराशिस्थे स्वक्षेत्रे शुभसंयुते ॥३९॥
transliteration: jīvasyāntargate śukre bhāgyakendreśasaṃyute . lābhe vā sutarāśisthe svakṣetre śubhasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: jīvasya antargate śukre bhāgya-kendreśa-saṃyute |lābhe vā suta-rāśi-sthe sva-kṣetre śubha-saṃyute
english: When Venus (Śukra) is in the sub-period of Jupiter (Jīva), and is conjoined with the lord of fortune or a quadrant, or if it is in the house of gains, or located in the house of children, or in its own sign, or conjoined with benefics (śubha).

sanskrit: नरवाहनयोगश्च गजाश्वाम्बरसंयुतः । महारजप्रसादेन लाभाधिक्यं महत्सुखम् । नीलाम्बराणां रक्तानां लाभश्चैव भविष्यति ॥४०॥
transliteration: naravāhanayogaśca gajāśvāmbarasaṃyutaḥ . mahārajaprasādena lābhādhikyaṃ mahatsukham . nīlāmbarāṇāṃ raktānāṃ lābhaścaiva bhaviṣyati.
separated_sandhi: nara-vāhana-yogaḥ ca gaja-aśva-ambara-saṃyutaḥmahā-rāja-prasādenalābha-ādhikyam mahat sukham nīla-ambarāṇāmraktānām lābhaḥ ca eva bhaviṣyati
english: There will be a combination (yoga) indicating conveyances carried by men (like palanquins), along with elephants, horses, and fine garments. By the favor of a great king, there will be a great increase in gains and immense happiness. Furthermore, there will be profit from blue and red clothes.

sanskrit: पूर्वस्यां दिशि विप्रेन्द्र प्रयाणं धन्लाभदम् । कल्याणं च महाप्रीतिः पितृमातृसुखावहा ॥४१॥
transliteration: pūrvasyāṃ diśi viprendra prayāṇaṃ dhanlābhadam . kalyāṇaṃ ca mahāprītiḥ pitṛmātṛsukhāvahā.
separated_sandhi: pūrvasyām diśi vipra-indra prayāṇam dhan-lābha-damkalyāṇam ca mahā-prītiḥ pitṛ-mātṛ-sukha-āvahā
english: O preeminent Brahmin, journeying in the eastern direction grants wealth and profit. It brings about welfare and great joy, leading to happiness for both father and mother.

sanskrit: देवतागुरुभक्तिश्च अन्नदानं महत्तथा । तडागगोपुरादीनि दिशेत् पुण्यानि भूरिशः ॥४२॥
transliteration: devatāgurubhaktiśca annadānaṃ mahattathā . taḍāgagopurādīni diśet puṇyāni bhūriśaḥ.
separated_sandhi: devatā-guru-bhaktiḥ ca anna-dānam mahat tathātaḍāga-gopura-ādīni diśet puṇyāni bhūriśaḥ
english: There will be devotion (bhakti) to deities and gurus, and also great giving of food. One should undertake numerous pious acts such as building ponds and temple gateways.

sanskrit: षष्ठाष्टमव्यये नीचे दायेशाद्वा तथैव च । कल्हो बन्धुवैषम्यं दारपुत्रादिपीडनम् ॥४३॥
transliteration: ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyaye nīce dāyeśādvā tathaiva ca . kalho bandhuvaiṣamyaṃ dāraputrādipīḍanam.
separated_sandhi: ṣaṣṭha-aṣṭama-vyaye nīce dāya-īśāt vā tathā eva cakalahaḥ bandhu-vaiṣamyam dāra-putra-ādi-pīḍanam
english: When the lord of inheritance is situated in the 6th, 8th, or 12th house, or in a debilitated sign, then there will be strife, disharmony among relatives, and distress for one's wife, children, and so on.

sanskrit: मन्दारराहुसंयुक्ते कलहो राजतो भयम् । स्त्रीमूलात्कलहश्चैव श्वसुरात्कलहस्तथा ॥४४॥
transliteration: mandārarāhusaṃyukte kalaho rājato bhayam . strīmūlātkalahaścaiva śvasurātkalahastathā.
separated_sandhi: mandāra-rāhu-saṃyukte kalahaḥ rājataḥ bhayamstrī-mūlāt kalahaḥ ca eva śvaśurāt kalahaḥ tathā
english: When combined with Mandāra (Saturn) and Rāhu, there will be strife and fear from the king. Moreover, there will be strife originating from women, and strife from the father-in-law.

sanskrit: सोदरेण विवादः स्याद्धनधान्यपरिच्युतिः । दायेशात्केन्द्रराशिस्थे धने वा भाग्यगेऽपि वा ॥४५॥
transliteration: sodareṇa vivādaḥ syāddhanadhānyaparicyutiḥ . dāyeśātkendrarāśisthe dhane vā bhāgyage'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: sodareṇa vivādaḥ syāt dhana-dhānya-paricyutiḥdāyeśāt kendra-rāśi-sthe dhane vā bhāgyage api vā
english: There will be disputes with siblings and a loss of wealth and grains. This happens when the lord of the house of inheritance is situated in a cardinal house (kendra), or in the house of wealth, or even in the house of fortune.

sanskrit: धनधान्यादिलाभश्चस्र्/ईलाभो राजदर्शनम् ॥४६॥
transliteration: dhanadhānyādilābhaścasr/īlābho rājadarśanam.
separated_sandhi: dhana-dhānya-ādi-lābhaḥ castrī-lābhaḥ rāja-darśanam
english: There will be gains of wealth, grains, and other resources, the acquisition of a wife, and an audience with the king.

sanskrit: वाहनं पुत्रलाभश्च पशुवृद्धिर्महत्सुखम् । गीतावाद्यप्रसङ्गादिर्विद्वज्जनसमागमः ॥४७॥
transliteration: vāhanaṃ putralābhaśca paśuvṛddhirmahatsukham . gītāvādyaprasaṅgādirvidvajjanasamāgamaḥ.
separated_sandhi: vāhanam putra-lābhaḥ ca paśu-vṛddhiḥ mahat-sukhamgīta-vādya-prasaṅga-ādiḥ vidvat-jana-samāgamaḥ
english: There will be conveyances, the acquisition of sons, an increase in livestock, and great happiness. Also, occasions for singing, instrumental music, and the gathering of learned people.

sanskrit: दिव्यान्नभोजनं सौख्यं स्वबन्धुजनपोषकम् । द्विसप्तमाधिपे शुक्रे तद्दशानां धनक्षतिः ॥४८॥
transliteration: divyānnabhojanaṃ saukhyaṃ svabandhujanapoṣakam . dvisaptamādhipe śukre taddaśānāṃ dhanakṣatiḥ.
separated_sandhi: divya-anna-bhojanam saukhyam sva-bandhu-jana-poṣakamdvi-saptama-adhipe śukre tat-daśānām dhana-kṣatiḥ
english: Enjoyment of divine food, comfort, and supporting one's own relatives. However, when Venus is the lord of the second and seventh houses, its planetary period (daśā) brings about a loss of wealth.

sanskrit: अपमृत्युभयं तस्य स्त्रीमूलादौषधादितः । तस्य रोगस्य शान्त्यर्थं शान्तिकर्म समाचरेत् ॥४९॥
transliteration: apamṛtyubhayaṃ tasya strīmūlādauṣadhāditaḥ . tasya rogasya śāntyarthaṃ śāntikarma samācaret.
separated_sandhi: apamṛtyu-bhayam tasya strī-mūlāt auṣadha-āditaḥtasya rogasya śānti-artham śānti-karma samācaret
english: There will be fear of untimely death for him, originating from a woman or from medicine, etc. For the appeasement of that disease, one should perform a pacification ritual (śāntikarma).

sanskrit: श्वेतां गां महिषीं दद्यादायुरारोग्यवृद्धये । शुक्रग्रहप्रसादेन ततः सुखमवाप्नुयात् ॥५०॥
transliteration: śvetāṃ gāṃ mahiṣīṃ dadyādāyurārogyavṛddhaye . śukragrahaprasādena tataḥ sukhamavāpnuyāt.
separated_sandhi: śvetām gām mahiṣīm dadyāt āyuḥ ārogyavṛddhayeśukragrahaprasādena tataḥ sukham avāpnuyāt
english: To promote longevity and health, one should donate a white cow or a buffalo. Consequently, by the favor of the planet Venus (śukra), one will attain happiness.

sanskrit: जीवस्यान्तर्गते सूर्ये स्वोच्चे स्वक्षेत्रगेऽपि वा । केन्द्रे वाऽथत्रिकोणे च दुश्चिक्ये लाभगेऽपि वा ॥५१॥
transliteration: jīvasyāntargate sūrye svocce svakṣetrage'pi vā . kendre vā'thatrikoṇe ca duścikye lābhage'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: jīvasya antargate sūrye svocce svakṣetrage api vākendre vā atha trikoṇe ca duścikye lābhage api vā
english: When the Sun is within Jupiter's (jīva) influence, or situated in its own sign of exaltation, or in its own sign; or if it is in an angular (kendra) house, or a trine (trikona) house; or even in the third (duścikya) or eleventh (lābha) house.

sanskrit: धने वा बलसंयुते दायेशाद्वा तथैव च । तत्काले धनलाभः स्याद्राजसम्मानवैभवम् ॥५२॥
transliteration: dhane vā balasaṃyute dāyeśādvā tathaiva ca . tatkāle dhanalābhaḥ syādrājasammānavaibhavam.
separated_sandhi: dhane vā balasaṃyute dāyeśāt vā tathā eva catatkāle dhanalābhaḥ syāt rājasammānavibhavam
english: Alternatively, if the Sun is in the second (dhana) house and endowed with strength; or if similar auspicious conditions are observed from the perspective of the Dasha (dāyeśa) lord. At that time, there will be a gain of wealth, royal honor, and splendor.

sanskrit: वाहनाम्बरपश्वादिभूषणं पुत्रसम्भवः । मित्रप्रभुवशादिष्टं सर्वकार्ये शुभावहम् ॥५३॥
transliteration: vāhanāmbarapaśvādibhūṣaṇaṃ putrasambhavaḥ . mitraprabhuvaśādiṣṭaṃ sarvakārye śubhāvaham.
separated_sandhi: vāhanāmbarapaśvādibhūṣaṇam putrasambhavaḥmitraprabhuvaśādiṣṭam sarvakārye śubhāvaham
english: Adornments such as vehicles, clothing, and animals; the birth of sons; and that which is granted by the influence of friends and masters - all these bring auspiciousness in every undertaking.

sanskrit: लग्नादष्टमव्यये सूर्ये दायेशाद्वा तथैव च । शिरोरोगादिपीडा च ज्वरपीडा तथैव च ॥५४॥
transliteration: lagnādaṣṭamavyaye sūrye dāyeśādvā tathaiva ca . śirorogādipīḍā ca jvarapīḍā tathaiva ca.
separated_sandhi: lagnāt aṣṭamavyaye sūrye dāyeśāt vā tathā evaca śirorogādipiḍā ca jvarapīḍā tathā eva ca
english: When the Sun is situated in the eighth or twelfth house from the Ascendant (lagna), or when similar inauspicious conditions are observed from the perspective of the Dasha (dāyeśa) lord, there will be afflictions such as head diseases and feverish ailments.

sanskrit: सत्कर्मसु तदा हीनः पापकर्मचयस्तथा । सर्वत्र जनविद्वेषो ह्यात्मबन्धुवियोगकृत् ॥५५॥
transliteration: satkarmasu tadā hīnaḥ pāpakarmacayastathā . sarvatra janavidveṣo hyātmabandhuviyogakṛt.
separated_sandhi: satkarmasu tadā hīnaḥ pāpakarmacayaḥ tathāsarvatra janavidveṣaḥ hi ātmabandhuvayogakṛt
english: At that time, one is devoid of virtuous actions and accumulates sinful actions. Indeed, there is hatred from people everywhere, and it causes separation from one's own kinsmen.

sanskrit: अकस्मात्कलहश्चैव जीवस्यान्तर्गते रवौ । द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु देहपीडा भविष्यति ॥५६॥
transliteration: akasmātkalahaścaiva jīvasyāntargate ravau . dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu dehapīḍā bhaviṣyati.
separated_sandhi: akasmāt kalahaḥ ca eva jīvasya antargateravau dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu dehapīḍā bhaviṣyati
english: Unexpected quarrels occur when the Sun is situated within the life-force (jīva). However, if the lord of the second and seventh houses is involved, there will be bodily affliction.

sanskrit: तद्दोषपरिहारार्थमादित्यहृदयं जपेत् । सर्वपीडोपशमनं श्रीसूर्यस्य प्रसादतः ॥५७॥
transliteration: taddoṣaparihārārthamādityahṛdayaṃ japet . sarvapīḍopaśamanaṃ śrīsūryasya prasādataḥ.
separated_sandhi: taddoṣaparihārārtham ādityahṛdayam japetsarvapīḍopaśamanam śrīsūryasya prasādataḥ
english: For the removal of those flaws, one should chant the Āditya Hṛdayam. All afflictions are pacified by the grace of the revered Sun (Sūrya).

sanskrit: जीवस्यान्तर्गते चन्द्रे केन्द्रे लाभत्रिकोणगे । स्वोच्चे वा स्वर्क्षराशिस्थे पूर्णे चैव बलैर्युते ॥५८॥
transliteration: jīvasyāntargate candre kendre lābhatrikoṇage . svocce vā svarkṣarāśisthe pūrṇe caiva balairyute.
separated_sandhi: jīvasya antargate candre kendre lābhatrikoṇagesvocce vā svarkṣarāśisthe pūrṇe ca eva balaiḥ yute
english: When the Moon is situated within the life-force (jīva), or in an angular house (kendra), or in a house of gain (11th) or a trine (5th/9th), or in its own exaltation sign, or situated in its own sign, and furthermore, is full and endowed with strength...

sanskrit: दायेशाच्छुभराशिस्थे राजसम्मानवैभवम् । दारपुत्रादिसौख्यं च क्षीराणं भोजनं तथा ॥५९॥
transliteration: dāyeśācchubharāśisthe rājasammānavaibhavam . dāraputrādisaukhyaṃ ca kṣīrāṇaṃ bhojanaṃ tathā.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt śubharāśisthe rājasammāṇavaibhavamdāraputrādisaukhyam ca kṣīrānṇam bhojanam tathā
english: When (the planet, from the previous conditions, like the Moon) is situated in an auspicious sign by the influence of the daśā lord, there will be royal honor and splendor, happiness from one's wife, children, and so on, and also milk-rice as food.

sanskrit: सत्कर्म च तथा कीर्तिः पुत्रपौत्रादिवृद्धिदा । महाराजप्रसादेन सर्वसौख्यं धनागमः ॥६०॥
transliteration: satkarma ca tathā kīrtiḥ putrapautrādivṛddhidā . mahārājaprasādena sarvasaukhyaṃ dhanāgamaḥ.
separated_sandhi: satkarma ca tathā kīrtiḥ putrapautrādivṛddhidāmahārājaprasādena sarvasaukhyam dhanāgamaḥ
english: Good deeds (karma) and renown, similarly providing growth for sons, grandsons, and so forth. Through the grace of a great king, there is all happiness and acquisition of wealth.

sanskrit: अनेकजनसौख्यं च दानधर्मादिसंग्रहः । षष्ठाष्टमव्यये चन्द्रे स्थिते वा पापसंयुते ॥६१॥
transliteration: anekajanasaukhyaṃ ca dānadharmādisaṃgrahaḥ . ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyaye candre sthite vā pāpasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: anekajanasaukhyam ca dānadharmādisaṅgrahaḥṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyaye candre sthite vā pāpasaṃyute
english: Much happiness for many people, and the accumulation of charity (dāna) and virtuous deeds (dharma) etc., occurs when the Moon (candra) is situated in the 6th, 8th, or 12th house, or associated with malefic planets.

sanskrit: दायेशात्षष्ठरन्ध्रे वा व्यये वा बलवर्जिते । मानार्थबन्धुहानिश्च विदेशपरिविच्युतिः ॥६२॥
transliteration: dāyeśātṣaṣṭharandhre vā vyaye vā balavarjite . mānārthabandhuhāniśca videśaparivicyutiḥ.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt ṣaṣṭharandhre vā vyaye vā balavarjitemānārthabandhuhāniḥ ca videśaparivicyutiḥ
english: Or when (the Moon is) devoid of strength (bala), situated in the 6th, 8th, or 12th house from the Daśā lord (dāyeśa). There will be a loss of honor, wealth, and relatives, as well as displacement (parivicyuti) due to foreign lands.

sanskrit: नृपचौरादिपीडा च दायादजनविग्रहः । मातुलादिवियोगश्च मातृपीडा तथैव च ॥६३॥
transliteration: nṛpacaurādipīḍā ca dāyādajanavigrahaḥ . mātulādiviyogaśca mātṛpīḍā tathaiva ca.
separated_sandhi: nṛpacaurādipīḍā ca dāyādajanavigrahaḥmātulādiviyogaḥ ca mātṛpīḍā tathaiva ca
english: There is also suffering (pīḍā) from kings, thieves, and others, along with disputes (vigraha) with co-heirs or relatives (dāyāda). Additionally, there is separation from maternal uncles and others, and similarly, distress (pīḍā) to the mother.

sanskrit: द्वितीयषष्ठयोरीशे देहपीडा भविष्यति । तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं दुर्गापाठं च कारयेत् ॥६४॥
transliteration: dvitīyaṣaṣṭhayorīśe dehapīḍā bhaviṣyati . taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ durgāpāṭhaṃ ca kārayet.
separated_sandhi: dvitīyaṣaṣṭhayorīśe dehapīḍā bhaviṣyatitaddoṣaparihārārtham durgāpāṭham ca kārayet
english: When the lord (īśa) of the 2nd and 6th houses is (afflicted/related), there will be physical suffering (pīḍā). To remedy this fault (doṣa), one should cause a recitation of the Durgā (Saptashatī) to be performed.

sanskrit: जीवस्यान्तर्गते भौमे लग्नात्केन्द्रत्रिकोणगे । स्वोच्चे वा स्वर्क्षगे वापि तुङ्गांशे स्वांशगेऽपि वा ॥६५॥
transliteration: jīvasyāntargate bhaume lagnātkendratrikoṇage . svocce vā svarkṣage vāpi tuṅgāṃśe svāṃśage'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: jīvasya antargate bhaume lagnāt kendratrikoṇagesvocce vā svarkṣage vā api tuṅgāṃśe svāṃśage api vā
english: When Mars, during the planetary period (dasha) of Jupiter, is situated in a quadrant or trine house from the ascendant, or in its sign of exaltation, or in its own sign, or even in an exalted navamsha, or in its own navamsha...

sanskrit: विद्याविवाहकार्याणि ग्रामभूम्यादिलाभकृत् । जनसामर्थ्यमाप्नोति सर्वकार्यार्थसिद्धिदम् ॥६६॥
transliteration: vidyāvivāhakāryāṇi grāmabhūmyādilābhakṛt . janasāmarthyamāpnoti sarvakāryārthasiddhidam.
separated_sandhi: vidyāvivāhakāryāṇi grāmabhūmyādilābhakṛtjanasāmarthyam āpnoti sarvakāryārthasiddhidam
english: The person gains from educational and marriage-related endeavors, profits from villages, land, and similar assets, attains influence among people, and achieves success in all undertakings and objectives.

sanskrit: दायेशात्केन्द्रकोणस्थे लाभे वा धनगेऽपि वा । शुभयुक्ते शुभैर्दृष्टे धनधान्यादिसम्पदः ॥६७॥
transliteration: dāyeśātkendrakoṇasthe lābhe vā dhanage'pi vā . śubhayukte śubhairdṛṣṭe dhanadhānyādisampadaḥ.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt kendrakoṇasthe lābhe vā dhanage api vāśubhayukte śubhaiḥ dṛṣṭe dhanadhānyādisampadaḥ
english: If the planet in question is situated in a quadrant or trine, or in the eleventh house (of gain), or in the second house (of wealth) from the dasha lord, and is conjoined with or aspected by benefic planets, then there will be an abundance of wealth, grains, and other riches.

sanskrit: मिष्ठान्नदानविभवं राजप्रीतिकरं शुभम् । स्त्रीसौख्यं च सुतवाप्तिः पुण्यतीर्थफलं तथा ॥६८॥
transliteration: miṣṭhānnadānavibhavaṃ rājaprītikaraṃ śubham . strīsaukhyaṃ ca sutavāptiḥ puṇyatīrthaphalaṃ tathā.
separated_sandhi: miṣṭānnadānavibhavam rājaprītikaram śubhamstrīsaukkhyam ca sutavāptiḥ puṇyatīrthaphalam tathā
english: There will be grandeur through offering sweet food (dāna), achieving favor from rulers, auspiciousness, marital happiness, the birth of children, and the benefit of visiting sacred places of pilgrimage (tīrtha).

sanskrit: दायेशाद्रन्ध्रभावे वा व्यये वा नीचगेऽपि वा । पापयुतेक्षिते वापि धान्यार्थगृहनाशनम् ॥६९॥
transliteration: dāyeśādrandhrabhāve vā vyaye vā nīcage'pi vā . pāpayutekṣite vāpi dhānyārthagṛhanāśanam.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt randhrabhāve vā vyaye vā nīcage apivā pāpayutekṣite vā api dhānyārthagṛhanāśanam
english: However, if the planet in question is situated in the eighth house (of difficulties) or the twelfth house (of loss) from the dasha lord, or is debilitated, or is conjoined with or aspected by malefic planets, then it indicates destruction of grains, wealth, and residence.

sanskrit: नानरोगभयं दुःखं नेत्ररोगादिसम्भवः । पूर्वार्द्धे कष्टमधिकमपरार्द्धे महत्सुखम् ॥७०॥
transliteration: nānarogabhayaṃ duḥkhaṃ netrarogādisambhavaḥ . pūrvārddhe kaṣṭamadhikamaparārddhe mahatsukham.
separated_sandhi: nānārogabhayaṃ duḥkhaṃ netrarogādisambhavaḥpūrvārdhe kaṣṭaṃ adhikaṃ aparārdhe mahat sukham
english: There will be fear of various diseases, suffering, and the manifestation of eye ailments and similar issues. In the first half of the period, there will be more difficulties, while in the latter half, there will be great happiness.

sanskrit: द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु देहजाड्यं मनोरुजः । वृषभस्य प्रदानं तु सर्वसम्पत्प्रदायकम् ॥७१॥
transliteration: dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu dehajāḍyaṃ manorujaḥ . vṛṣabhasya pradānaṃ tu sarvasampatpradāyakam.
separated_sandhi: dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu dehajāḍyaṃ manorujaḥvṛṣabhasya pradānaṃ tu sarvasampatpradāyakam
english: When the lord of the second and seventh houses is positioned (thus), there are bodily ailments and mental afflictions. However, the offering (dāna) of a bull (vṛṣabha) grants all prosperity.

sanskrit: जीवस्यान्तर्गते राहौ स्वोच्चे वा केन्द्रगेऽपि वा । मूलत्रिकोणे भाग्ये च केन्द्राधिपसमन्विते ॥७२॥
transliteration: jīvasyāntargate rāhau svocce vā kendrage'pi vā . mūlatrikoṇe bhāgye ca kendrādhipasamanvite.
separated_sandhi: jīvasya antargate rāhau svocce vā kendrage apivā mūlatrikoṇe bhāgye ca kendrādhipasammanvite
english: When Rāhu is located within Jupiter's (jīva) sphere, or is in its sign of exaltation (svocca), or in an angular house (kendra), or in its mūlatrikoṇa sign, or in the house of fortune (bhāgya), and is conjoined with the lord of an angular house (kendra)...

sanskrit: शुभयुतेक्षिते वापि योगप्रीतिं समादिशेत् । भुक्त्यादौ पञ्चमासांश्च धनधान्यादिकं लभेत् ॥७३॥
transliteration: śubhayutekṣite vāpi yogaprītiṃ samādiśet . bhuktyādau pañcamāsāṃśca dhanadhānyādikaṃ labhet.
separated_sandhi: śubhayutekṣite vā api yogaprītiṃ samādiśetbhuktyādau pañcamāsān ca dhanadhānyādikaṃ labhet
english: Or if (Rāhu) is conjoined with or aspected by benefics, one should predict an affinity for spiritual practices (yoga). At the beginning of the planetary sub-period (bhukti) and for five months, one obtains wealth, grains, and similar gains.

sanskrit: देशग्रामाधिकं च यवनप्रभुदर्शनम् । गृहे कल्याणसम्पत्तिर्बहुसेनाधिपत्यकम् ॥७४॥
transliteration: deśagrāmādhikaṃ ca yavanaprabhudarśanam . gṛhe kalyāṇasampattirbahusenādhipatyakam.
separated_sandhi: deśagrāmādhikaṃ ca yavanaprabhudarśanamgṛhe kalyāṇasampattiḥ bahusenādhipatyakam
english: And authority over lands (deśa) and villages (grāma), as well as an audience with foreign rulers (yavana prabhu). In the home, there will be auspicious prosperity and command over many armies.

sanskrit: दूरयात्रादिगमनं पुण्यधर्मादिसंग्रहः । सेतुस्नानफलावाप्तिरिष्टसिद्धिः सुखावहा ॥७५॥
transliteration: dūrayātrādigamanaṃ puṇyadharmādisaṃgrahaḥ . setusnānaphalāvāptiriṣṭasiddhiḥ sukhāvahā.
separated_sandhi: dūrayātrādigamanaṃ puṇyadharmādisaṅgrahaḥsetusnānaphalāvāptiḥ iṣṭasiddhiḥ sukhāvahā
english: The person will undertake long journeys, accumulate merit (puṇya) and righteous deeds (dharma), attain the benefits of bathing in sacred waters, and achieve desired successes that bring happiness.

sanskrit: दायेषाद्रन्ध्रभावे वा व्यये वा पापसंयुते । चौराहिव्रणभीतिश्च राजवैषम्यमेव च ॥७६॥
transliteration: dāyeṣādrandhrabhāve vā vyaye vā pāpasaṃyute . caurāhivraṇabhītiśca rājavaiṣamyameva ca.
separated_sandhi: dāyeṣādrandhrabhāve vā vyaye vā pāpasaṃyutecaurāhivraṇabhītiḥ ca rājāvaiṣamyam eva ca
english: If (planets are in) the second, seventh, or eighth houses, or in the twelfth house, conjoined with malefic planets (pāpa), there will be fear of thieves, snakes, and wounds, and certainly animosity from the authorities.

sanskrit: गृहे कर्मकलापेन व्याकुलो भवति ध्रुवम् । सोदरेण विरोधः स्याद्दायादजनविग्रहः ॥७७॥
transliteration: gṛhe karmakalāpena vyākulo bhavati dhruvam . sodareṇa virodhaḥ syāddāyādajanavigrahaḥ.
separated_sandhi: gṛhe karmakalāpena vyākulaḥ bhavati dhruvamsodareṇa virodhaḥ syāt dāyādajanavigrahaḥ
english: He will certainly become distressed at home due to many activities (karma). There will be conflict with siblings and disputes with co-heirs or family members.

sanskrit: गृहे त्वशुभकार्याणि दुःस्वप्नादिभयं ध्रुवम् । अकस्मात्कलहश्चैव क्षूद्रशून्यादिरोगकृत् ॥७८॥
transliteration: gṛhe tvaśubhakāryāṇi duḥsvapnādibhayaṃ dhruvam . akasmātkalahaścaiva kṣūdraśūnyādirogakṛt.
separated_sandhi: gṛhe tu aśubhakāryāṇi duḥsvapnādibhayam dhruvamakasmāt kalahaḥ ca eva kṣudraśūnyādirogakṛt
english: At home, there will be inauspicious activities and certainly fear of bad dreams and similar things. There will also be sudden quarrels and diseases caused by petty troubles or magical influences.

sanskrit: द्विसप्तमस्थिते राहौ देहवाधां विनिर्दिशेत् । तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं मृत्युञ्जयजपं चरेत् ॥७९॥
transliteration: dvisaptamasthite rāhau dehavādhāṃ vinirdiśet . taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ mṛtyuñjayajapaṃ caret.
separated_sandhi: dvisaptamasthite rāhau dehavādhām vinirdiśettat doṣaparihārārtham mṛtyuñjayajapam caret
english: If Rāhu is situated in the second or seventh house, one should predict bodily afflictions. To alleviate this defect, one should perform the Mṛtyuñjaya mantra chanting (japa).

sanskrit: छागदानं प्रकुर्वीत सर्वसौख्यमवाप्नुयात् । देवपूयप्रसादेन राहुतुष्ट्या द्विजोत्तम ॥८०॥
transliteration: chāgadānaṃ prakurvīta sarvasaukhyamavāpnuyāt . devapūyaprasādena rāhutuṣṭyā dvijottama.
separated_sandhi: chāga-dānam pra-kurvīta sarva-saukhyam avāpnuyātdeva-pūya-prasādena rāhu-tuṣṭyā dvija-uttama
english: O best among the twice-born (dvijottama), one should perform the offering of a goat. By the grace (prasāda) of Devapūya and by the appeasement of Rahu, one will attain all happiness.

sanskrit: मूलत्रिकोणे स्वर्क्षे वा तुलायामुच्चगेऽपि वा । केन्द्रत्रिकोणलाभे वा राजयोगादिसंयुते ॥१॥
transliteration: mūlatrikoṇe svarkṣe vā tulāyāmuccage'pi vā . kendratrikoṇalābhe vā rājayogādisaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: mūla-trikoṇe sva-ṛkṣe vā tulāyām uccage api vākendra-trikoṇa-lābhe vā rāja-yoga-ādi-saṃyute
english: When it (Rahu, implied) is in its Mūlatrikoṇa sign, or in its own sign, or in Libra, or exalted; or when it is situated in a Kendra (angular), Trikona (trinal), or Lābha (11th) house; and is associated with a Rāja-yoga (royal combination) or similar auspicious configurations.

sanskrit: राज्यलाभो महत्सौख्यं दारपुत्रादिवर्धनम् । वाहनत्रयसंयुक्तं गजाश्वाम्बरसङ्कुलम् ॥२॥
transliteration: rājyalābho mahatsaukhyaṃ dāraputrādivardhanam . vāhanatrayasaṃyuktaṃ gajāśvāmbarasaṅkulam.
separated_sandhi: rājya-lābhaḥ mahat-saukhyam dāra-putra-ādi-vardhanamvāhana-traya-saṃyuktam gaja-aśva-ambara-saṅkulam
english: There will be gain of a kingdom (rājya), great happiness, and an increase in wife, sons, and other family members. One will be endowed with three types of conveyances and surrounded by elephants, horses, and rich garments.

sanskrit: महाराजप्रसादेन सेनापत्यादिलाभकृत् । चतुष्पाज्जीवलाभः स्याद्ग्रामभूम्यादिलाभकृत् ॥३॥
transliteration: mahārājaprasādena senāpatyādilābhakṛt . catuṣpājjīvalābhaḥ syādgrāmabhūmyādilābhakṛt.
separated_sandhi: mahā-rāja-prasādena senāpatya-ādi-lābha-kṛtcatuṣ-pāt-jīva-lābhaḥ syāt grāma-bhūmi-ādi-lābha-kṛt
english: By the grace (prasāda) of a great king (mahārāja), one will gain positions like military command. There will be a gain of four-footed animals (catuspāt-jīva) and an acquisition of villages, lands, and other properties.

sanskrit: तथाऽष्टमे व्यये मन्दे नीचे वा पापसंयुते । तद्भुक्त्यादौ राजभीतिर्विषशस्त्रादिपीडनम् ॥४॥
transliteration: tathā'ṣṭame vyaye mande nīce vā pāpasaṃyute . tadbhuktyādau rājabhītirviṣaśastrādipīḍanam.
separated_sandhi: tathā aṣṭame vyaye mande nīce vā pāpa-saṃyutetat-bhukti-ādau rāja-bhītiḥ viṣa-śastra-ādi-pīḍanam
english: Similarly, when it (Rahu) is in the eighth or twelfth house, or in a weak state, or in a debilitated sign, or conjoined with a malefic (pāpa) planet, then in the beginning of its sub-period (bhukti), there will be fear from the king or government, and affliction by poison, weapons, and similar dangers.

sanskrit: रक्तस्त्रावो गुल्मरोगो ह्यतिमारादिपीडनम् । मध्ये चौरादि भीतिश्च देशत्यागो मनोरुजः ॥५॥
transliteration: raktastrāvo gulmarogo hyatimārādipīḍanam . madhye caurādi bhītiśca deśatyāgo manorujaḥ.
separated_sandhi: rakta-strāvaḥ gulma-rogaḥ hi ati-māra-ādi-pīḍanammadhye caura-ādi bhītiḥ ca deśa-tyāgaḥ manaḥ-rujaḥ
english: There will be bleeding, abdominal tumors, and affliction from diseases like plague. During the middle part (of the period), there will be fear from thieves and others, abandonment of one's country, and mental distress.

sanskrit: अन्ते शुभकरी चैव शनेरन्तर्दशा द्विज । द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु ह्यपमृत्युर्भविष्यति ॥६॥
transliteration: ante śubhakarī caiva śanerantardaśā dvija . dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu hyapamṛtyurbhaviṣyati.
separated_sandhi: ante śubha-karī ca eva śaneḥ antaḥ-daśā dvijadvitīya-dyūna-nāthe tu hi apamṛtyuḥ bhaviṣyati
english: O twice-born (dvija), the sub-period (antardaśā) of Saturn (śani) will indeed be auspicious at its conclusion. However, if (Saturn is related to) the lord of the second and seventh houses, then there will be an untimely death.

sanskrit: तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं म्र्ट्युञ्जयजपं चरेत् । ततः शान्तिमवाप्नोति शङ्करस्य प्रसादतः ॥७॥
transliteration: taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ mrṭyuñjayajapaṃ caret . tataḥ śāntimavāpnoti śaṅkarasya prasādataḥ.
separated_sandhi: tat-doṣa-parihāra-artham mṛtyuñjaya-japam carettataḥ śāntim avāpnoti śaṅkarasya prasāda-taḥ
english: To remedy that defect, one should perform the chanting (japa) of the Mṛtyuñjaya mantra. Consequently, one attains peace by the grace of Śaṅkara.

sanskrit: मन्दस्यान्तर्गते सौम्ये त्रिकोणे केन्द्रगेऽपि वा । सम्मानं च यशः कीर्तिं विद्यालाभं धनागमम् ॥८॥
transliteration: mandasyāntargate saumye trikoṇe kendrage'pi vā . sammānaṃ ca yaśaḥ kīrtiṃ vidyālābhaṃ dhanāgamam.
separated_sandhi: mandasya antaḥ-gate saumye tri-koṇe kendra-ge api vāsammānam ca yaśaḥ kīrtim vidyā-lābham dhana-āgamam
english: When Mercury ("saumya") is in Saturn's ("manda") sub-period, and is located in a trine or quadrant house, there will be respect, fame, renown, acquisition of knowledge, and gain of wealth.

sanskrit: स्वदेशे सुखमाप्नोति वाहनादिफलैर्युतम् । यज्ञादिकर्मसिद्धिश्च राजयोगादिसम्भवम् ॥९॥
transliteration: svadeśe sukhamāpnoti vāhanādiphalairyutam . yajñādikarmasiddhiśca rājayogādisambhavam.
separated_sandhi: svadeśe sukham āpnoti vāhanādiphalaīḥ yutamyajñādikarmasiddhiḥ ca rājayogādisambhavam
english: One attains happiness in one's own country, endowed with the benefits of vehicles and the like. There is also success in Vedic rituals (yajña) and other actions (karma), and the manifestation of royal conjunctions (rājayoga) and similar auspicious occurrences.

sanskrit: देहसौख्यं हृदुत्साहं गृहे कल्याणसम्भवम् । सेतुस्नानफलावाप्तिस्तीर्थयात्रादिकर्मणा ॥१०॥
transliteration: dehasaukhyaṃ hṛdutsāhaṃ gṛhe kalyāṇasambhavam . setusnānaphalāvāptistīrthayātrādikarmaṇā.
separated_sandhi: dehasaukhyam hṛdutsāham gṛhe kalyāṇasambhavamsetusnānaphalāvāptiḥ tīrthayātrādikarmaṇā
english: There will be bodily comfort, enthusiasm in the heart, and the manifestation of well-being in the home. One will attain the fruit of bathing at Setu (Rameshwaram) through performing actions (karma) like pilgrimages.

sanskrit: वाणिज्याद्धनलाभश्च पुराणश्रवणादिकम् । अन्नदानफलं चैव नित्यं मिष्ठान्नभोजनम् ॥११॥
transliteration: vāṇijyāddhanalābhaśca purāṇaśravaṇādikam . annadānaphalaṃ caiva nityaṃ miṣṭhānnabhojanam.
separated_sandhi: vāṇijyāt dhanalābhaḥ ca purāṇaśravaṇādikamannadānaphalam ca eva nityam miṣṭānnabhojanam
english: There will be gain of wealth from commerce, and listening to Purāṇas and similar sacred texts. Also, the fruit of giving food (dāna) will be realized, along with the daily consumption of sweet delicacies.

sanskrit: षष्ठाष्टमव्यये सौम्ये नीचे वास्तंगते सति । रव्यारफणिसंयुक्ते दायेशाद्वा तथैव च ॥१२॥
transliteration: ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyaye saumye nīce vāstaṃgate sati . ravyāraphaṇisaṃyukte dāyeśādvā tathaiva ca.
separated_sandhi: ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyaye saumye nīce vā astaṃgate satiravyāraphaṇisaṃyukte dāyeśāt vā tathaiva ca
english: When a benefic planet (saumya) is situated in the 6th, 8th, or 12th house, or is debilitated (nīca), or is combust, or is conjoined with the Sun, Mars, or Saturn; and similarly, when it is so from the Dāyā (planetary period) lord.

sanskrit: नृपाभिषेकमर्थाप्तिर्देशग्रामाधिपत्यता । फलमीदृशमादौ तु मध्यान्ते रोगपीडनम् ॥१३॥
transliteration: nṛpābhiṣekamarthāptirdeśagrāmādhipatyatā . phalamīdṛśamādau tu madhyānte rogapīḍanam.
separated_sandhi: nṛpābhiṣekam arthāptiḥ deśagrāmādhipatyatāphalam īdṛśam ādau tu madhyānte rogapīḍanam
english: Such are the results in the beginning: royal anointing, attainment of wealth, and lordship over a region or village. However, in the middle and at the end, there will be affliction by disease.

sanskrit: नष्टानि सर्वकार्याणि व्याकुलत्वं महद्भयम् । द्वितीयसप्तमाधिशे देहबाधा भविष्यति ॥१४॥
transliteration: naṣṭāni sarvakāryāṇi vyākulatvaṃ mahadbhayam . dvitīyasaptamādhiśe dehabādhā bhaviṣyati.
separated_sandhi: naṣṭāni sarvakāryāṇi vyākulatvam mahadbhayamdvitīyasaptamādhiśe dehabādhā bhaviṣyati
english: All undertakings (kārya) will be ruined, and there will be anxiety and great fear. When the lord of the 2nd or 7th house (is involved in adverse conditions), bodily affliction will occur.

sanskrit: तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं विष्णुसाहस्रकं जपेत् । अन्नदानं प्रकुर्वीत सर्वसम्पत्प्रदायकम् ॥१५॥
transliteration: taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ viṣṇusāhasrakaṃ japet . annadānaṃ prakurvīta sarvasampatpradāyakam.
separated_sandhi: tat doṣaparihārārtham viṣṇusāhasrakam japetannadānam prakurvīta sarvasampatpradāyakam
english: For the removal of those faults, one should chant the Viṣṇu Sahasranāma. One should also perform food donation (dāna), as it bestows all prosperity.

sanskrit: मन्दस्यान्तर्गते केतौ शुभदृष्टियुतेक्षिते । स्वोच्चे वा शुभराशिस्थे योगकारकसंयुते ॥१६॥
transliteration: mandasyāntargate ketau śubhadṛṣṭiyutekṣite . svocce vā śubharāśisthe yogakārakasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: mandasya antargate ketau śubhadṛṣṭiyutekṣitesva ucce vā śubharāśisthe yogakārakasaṃyute
english: When Ketu is within the period of Saturn, and it is aspected by benefic planets, or situated in its exaltation sign, or located in an auspicious sign, or conjoined with a "yogakāraka" (yoga) planet.

sanskrit: केन्द्रकोणगते वापि स्थानभ्रंशो महद्भयम् । दरिद्रबन्धनं भीतिः पुत्रदारादिनाशनम् ॥१७॥
transliteration: kendrakoṇagate vāpi sthānabhraṃśo mahadbhayam . daridrabandhanaṃ bhītiḥ putradārādināśanam.
separated_sandhi: kendrakonagate vā api sthānabhraṃśaḥ mahat bhayamdaridrabandhanam bhītiḥ putradārādināśanam
english: Even when it (Ketu) is situated in an angular ("kendra") or trinal ("koṇa") house, there can be loss of position, great fear, poverty, imprisonment, fright, and destruction of children, spouse, and so forth.

sanskrit: स्वप्रभोश्च महाकष्टं विदेशगमनं तथा । लग्नाधिपेन संयुक्ते आदौ सौख्यं धनागमः ॥१८॥
transliteration: svaprabhośca mahākaṣṭaṃ videśagamanaṃ tathā . lagnādhipena saṃyukte ādau saukhyaṃ dhanāgamaḥ.
separated_sandhi: svaprabhoḥ ca mahākaṣṭam videśagamanam tathālagnādhipena saṃyukte ādau saukhyam dhanāgamaḥ
english: Also, there is great suffering for one's own lord and travel to foreign lands. However, when (Ketu is) conjoined with the lord of the ascendant, there is happiness and acquisition of wealth in the beginning.

sanskrit: गङ्गादिसर्वतीर्भेषु स्नानं दैवतदर्शनम् । दायेशात्केन्द्रकोणे वा तृतीयभवराशिगे ॥१९॥
transliteration: gaṅgādisarvatīrbheṣu snānaṃ daivatadarśanam . dāyeśātkendrakoṇe vā tṛtīyabhavarāśige.
separated_sandhi: gaṅgādisarvatīrtheṣu snānam daivatadarśanamdāyeśāt kendrakoṇe vā tṛtīyabhavarāśige
english: When (Ketu is) in an angular ("kendra") or trinal ("koṇa") house from the "daśā" lord, or situated in the third house/sign (from it), there will be bathing in all holy rivers like the Ganges and the sight of deities.

sanskrit: समर्थो धर्मबुद्धिश्च सौख्यं नृपसमागमः । तथाऽष्टमे व्यये केतौ दायेशाद्वा तथैव च ॥२०॥
transliteration: samartho dharmabuddhiśca saukhyaṃ nṛpasamāgamaḥ . tathā'ṣṭame vyaye ketau dāyeśādvā tathaiva ca.
separated_sandhi: samarthaḥ dharmabuddhiḥ ca saukhyam nṛpasamāgamaḥ| tathā aṣṭame vyaye ketau dāyeśāt vā tathaiva ca
english: One is capable, possesses a righteous intellect (dharma-buddhi), experiences happiness, and associates with rulers. However, similarly, when Ketu is in the eighth house or the twelfth house, or is influenced by the lord of gains (dāyeśa), and likewise (other adverse effects will manifest).

sanskrit: अपमृत्युभयं चैव कुत्सितान्नस्य भोजनम् । शीतज्वरातिसारश्च व्रणचौरादिपीडनम् ॥२१॥
transliteration: apamṛtyubhayaṃ caiva kutsitānnasya bhojanam . śītajvarātisāraśca vraṇacaurādipīḍanam.
separated_sandhi: apamṛtyubhayam ca eva kutsitānnasya bhojanam| śītajvarātisāraḥ ca vraṇacaurādipīḍanam
english: And indeed, there will be fear of unnatural death, consumption of unwholesome food, cold fever and dysentery, and affliction from wounds, thieves, and similar troubles.

sanskrit: दारपुत्रवियोगश्च संसारे भवति ध्रुवम् । द्वितियद्यूनराशिस्थे देह पीडा भविष्यति ॥२२॥
transliteration: dāraputraviyogaśca saṃsāre bhavati dhruvam . dvitiyadyūnarāśisthe deha pīḍā bhaviṣyati.
separated_sandhi: dāraputraviyogaḥ ca saṃsāre bhavati dhruvam| dvitīyadyūnarāśisthe deha pīḍā bhaviṣyati
english: And certainly, separation from wife and children occurs in this worldly existence (saṃsāra). When [Ketu] is located in the second or seventh house, affliction to the body will occur.

sanskrit: छागदानं प्रकुर्वीत ह्यपमृत्युनिवारणम् । केतुग्रहप्रसादेन सुखशान्तिमवाप्नुयात् ॥२३॥
transliteration: chāgadānaṃ prakurvīta hyapamṛtyunivāraṇam . ketugrahaprasādena sukhaśāntimavāpnuyāt.
separated_sandhi: chāgadānam prakurvīta hi apamṛtyunivāraṇam| ketugrahaprasādena sukhaśāntim avāpnuyāt
english: One should perform the offering of a goat (chāgadāna) as a remedy to prevent unnatural death. By the grace of the planet Ketu, one will attain happiness and peace.

sanskrit: मन्दस्यान्तर्गते शुक्रे स्वोच्चे स्वक्षेत्रगेऽपि वा । केन्द्रे वा शुभसंयुक्ते त्रिओकोणे लाभगेऽपि वा ॥२४॥
transliteration: mandasyāntargate śukre svocce svakṣetrage'pi vā . kendre vā śubhasaṃyukte triokoṇe lābhage'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: mandasya antargate śukre svocce svakṣetrage api vā| kendre vā śubhasaṃyukte trikoṇe lābhage api vā
english: When Venus (Śukra) is in Saturn's (Manda) sub-period (antardasha), and is in its own exaltation sign or its own sign, or in an angular house (kendra), or conjoined with auspicious planets, or in a trine house (trikoṇa), or even in the house of gains (lābha-bhāva), (then specific effects will occur).

sanskrit: दारपुत्रधनप्राप्तिर्देहारोग्यं महोत्सवः । गृहे कल्याण्सम्पत्ति राज्यलाभं महत्सुखम् ॥२५॥
transliteration: dāraputradhanaprāptirdehārogyaṃ mahotsavaḥ . gṛhe kalyāṇsampatti rājyalābhaṃ mahatsukham.
separated_sandhi: dāraputradhanaprāptiḥ dehaārogyam mahotsavaḥgṛhe kalyāṇasampattiḥ rājyalābham mahatsukham
english: The acquisition of a wife, sons, and wealth, health of the body, and a great celebration. Auspicious prosperity in the home, the attainment of a kingdom, and great happiness.

sanskrit: महाराजप्रसादेन हीष्टसिद्धिः सुखावहा । स्सम्मानं प्रभुसम्मानं प्रियवस्त्रादिलाभकृत् ॥२६॥
transliteration: mahārājaprasādena hīṣṭasiddhiḥ sukhāvahā . ssammānaṃ prabhusammānaṃ priyavastrādilābhakṛt.
separated_sandhi: mahārājaprasādena hi iṣṭasiddhiḥ sukhāavahāsammānam prabhusammānam priyavastrādilābhakṛt
english: Indeed, by the grace of the great king, there is the attainment of desired results, bringing happiness. There is also honor, respect from a superior, and the acquisition of beloved garments and other things.

sanskrit: द्विपान्तराद्वस्त्रलाभः श्वेताश्वो महिषी तथा । गुरुचारवशाद्भाग्यं सौख्यं च धनसम्पदः ॥२७॥
transliteration: dvipāntarādvastralābhaḥ śvetāśvo mahiṣī tathā . gurucāravaśādbhāgyaṃ saukhyaṃ ca dhanasampadaḥ.
separated_sandhi: dvipaantarāt vastralābhaḥ śvetaaśvaḥ mahiṣī tathāgurucāravaśāt bhāgyam saukhyam ca dhanasampadaḥ
english: There is acquisition of clothes from another land, a white horse, and a buffalo (or chief queen). Due to the movement of Jupiter, there will be good fortune, happiness, and prosperity with wealth.

sanskrit: शनिचारान्मनुष्योऽसौ योगमाप्नोत्यसंशयम् । शत्रुनीचास्तगे शुक्रे षष्ठाष्टमव्ययराशिगे ॥२८॥
transliteration: śanicārānmanuṣyo'sau yogamāpnotyasaṃśayam . śatrunīcāstage śukre ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyayarāśige.
separated_sandhi: śanicārāt manuṣyaḥ asau yogam āpnoti asaṃśayamśatrunīcāstage śukre ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyayarāśige
english: From the movement of Saturn, this person undoubtedly attains favorable planetary combinations (yoga). (This occurs) when Venus (śukra) is in an enemy sign, debilitated, set, or located in the sixth, eighth, or twelfth house.

sanskrit: दारनाशो मनःक्लेशः स्थाननाशो मनोरुजः । दारानां स्वजनक्लेशः सन्तापो जनविग्रहः ॥२९॥
transliteration: dāranāśo manaḥkleśaḥ sthānanāśo manorujaḥ . dārānāṃ svajanakleśaḥ santāpo janavigrahaḥ.
separated_sandhi: dāranāśaḥ manaḥkleśaḥ sthānanāśaḥ manorujaḥdārāṇām svajanakleśaḥ santāpaḥ janavigrahaḥ
english: Destruction of wife, mental distress, loss of position, and mental illness. There is distress among one's own relatives because of wives, suffering, and conflict with people.

sanskrit: दायेशाद्भाग्यगे चैव केन्द्रे वा लाभसंयुते । राजप्रीतिकरं चैव मनोऽभीष्टप्रदायकम् ॥३०॥
transliteration: dāyeśādbhāgyage caiva kendre vā lābhasaṃyute . rājaprītikaraṃ caiva mano'bhīṣṭapradāyakam.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt bhāgyage ca eva kendre vā lābhasaṃyuterājaprītikaram ca eva manas abhīṣṭapradāyakam
english: When the lord of the current dasha is situated in the ninth house (bhāgyage) or in an angular house (kendra), and is associated with gains, it brings royal favor and fulfills one's cherished desires.

sanskrit: दानधर्मदयायुक्तं तीर्थयात्रादिकं फलम् । सास्र्तार्थकाव्यरचनां वेदान्तश्रवणादिकम् ॥३१॥
transliteration: dānadharmadayāyuktaṃ tīrthayātrādikaṃ phalam . sāsrtārthakāvyaracanāṃ vedāntaśravaṇādikam.
separated_sandhi: dānadharmadayāyuktam tīrthayātrādikam phalamsārthakāvyaracanām vedāntaśravaṇādikam
english: This period brings results such as engagement in charity (dāna), adherence to natural law (dharma), and compassion, including benefits from pilgrimages. It also facilitates the composition of meaningful poetic works and the study of Vedānta.

sanskrit: दारपुत्रादिसौख्यं च लभते नाऽत्र संशयः । दायेशाद्व्ययगे शुक्रे षष्ठे वा ह्यष्टमेऽपि वा ॥३२॥
transliteration: dāraputrādisaukhyaṃ ca labhate nā'tra saṃśayaḥ . dāyeśādvyayage śukre ṣaṣṭhe vā hyaṣṭame'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: dāraputrādisaukhyam ca labhate na atra saṃśayaḥdāyeśāt vyayage śukre ṣaṣṭhe vā hi aṣṭame api vā
english: One gains happiness from spouse, children, and similar comforts; there is no doubt about this. However, if the lord of the dasha is in the twelfth house, or Venus is in the sixth or eighth house...

sanskrit: नेत्रपीडा ज्वरभयं स्वकुलाचारवर्जितः । कपोले दन्तशूलादि हृदि गुह्ये च पीडनम् ॥३३॥
transliteration: netrapīḍā jvarabhayaṃ svakulācāravarjitaḥ . kapole dantaśūlādi hṛdi guhye ca pīḍanam.
separated_sandhi: netrapīḍā jvarabhayam svakulācāravarjitaḥkapole dantaśūlādi hṛdi guhye ca pīḍanam
english: This leads to eye pain, fear of fever, and abandonment of one's family traditions. There will be pain in the cheeks, toothache and similar ailments, and discomfort in the heart and private parts.

sanskrit: जलभीतिर्मनस्तापो वृक्षात्पतनसम्भवः । राजद्वारे जनद्वेषः सोधरेण विरोधनम् ॥३४॥
transliteration: jalabhītirmanastāpo vṛkṣātpatanasambhavaḥ . rājadvāre janadveṣaḥ sodhareṇa virodhanam.
separated_sandhi: jalabhītiḥ manastāpaḥ vṛkṣāt patanasambhavaḥrājadvāre janadveṣaḥ sodareṇa virodhanam
english: There will be fear of water, mental anguish, and the possibility of falling from a tree. The native will experience enmity from people at the government (or royal court) and quarrels with siblings.

sanskrit: द्वितीयसप्तमाधीशे आत्मक्लेशो भविष्यति । तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं दुर्गादेवीजपं चरेत् ॥३५॥
transliteration: dvitīyasaptamādhīśe ātmakleśo bhaviṣyati . taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ durgādevījapaṃ caret.
separated_sandhi: dvitīyasaptamādhīśe ātmakleśaḥ bhaviṣyatitatdoṣaparihārārtham durgādevījapam caret
english: When the lords of the second and seventh houses are afflicted or in a troublesome position, there will be distress to the self (ātman). To remedy this fault, one should perform the chanting (japa) of Goddess Durgā.

sanskrit: श्वेतां गां महिषीं दद्यादायुरारोग्यवृद्धिदाम् । जगदम्बाप्रसादेन ततः सुखमवाप्नुयात् ॥३६॥
transliteration: śvetāṃ gāṃ mahiṣīṃ dadyādāyurārogyavṛddhidām . jagadambāprasādena tataḥ sukhamavāpnuyāt.
separated_sandhi: śvetām gām mahiṣīm dadyāt āyurārogyavṛddhidāmjagadambāprasādena tataḥ sukham avāpnuyāt
english: One should donate a white cow or a buffalo, which bestows increased longevity and good health. Through the grace of Jagadambā, one will subsequently attain happiness.

sanskrit: मन्दस्यान्तर्गते सूर्ये स्वोच्चे स्वक्षेत्रगेऽपि वा । भाग्याधिपेन संयुक्ते केन्द्रलाभत्रिकोणगे ॥३७॥
transliteration: mandasyāntargate sūrye svocce svakṣetrage'pi vā . bhāgyādhipena saṃyukte kendralābhatrikoṇage.
separated_sandhi: mandasya antargate sūrye sva ucce sva-kṣetrage apivā bhāgya-adhipena saṃyukte kendra-lābha-trikoṇage
english: When the Sun is influenced by or associated with Saturn, or is in its sign of exaltation, or in its own sign, or conjoined with the lord of the ninth house, and is situated in a Kendra (angular), Lābha (eleventh), or Trikona (trine) house.

sanskrit: शुभदृष्टियुते वापि स्वप्रभोश्च महत्सुखम् । गृहे कल्याणसम्पत्तिः पुत्रादिसुखवर्द्धनम् ॥३८॥
transliteration: śubhadṛṣṭiyute vāpi svaprabhośca mahatsukham . gṛhe kalyāṇasampattiḥ putrādisukhavarddhanam.
separated_sandhi: śubhadṛṣṭiyute vā api svaprabhoḥ ca mahat sukhamgṛhe kalyāṇasampattiḥ putrādisukhavardhanam
english: Or if (the Sun) is aspected by benefics, there will be great happiness for the native. In the home, there will be auspicious prosperity and an increase in happiness derived from children and other sources.

sanskrit: वाहनाम्बरपश्वादिगोक्षीरैस्संकुलं गृहम् । लग्नाष्टमव्यये सूर्ये दायेशाद्वा तथैव च ॥३९॥
transliteration: vāhanāmbarapaśvādigokṣīraissaṃkulaṃ gṛham . lagnāṣṭamavyaye sūrye dāyeśādvā tathaiva ca.
separated_sandhi: vāhanāmbarapaśvādigokṣīraiḥ saṃkulam gṛhamlagnaaṣṭamavyaye sūrye dāyeśāt vā tathā eva ca
english: The home will be abundant with vehicles, garments, cattle, cows' milk, and similar possessions. However, if the Sun is in the ascendant (lagna), eighth, or twelfth house, or similarly from the lord of wealth and inheritance...

sanskrit: हृद्रोगो मानहानिश्च स्थानभ्रंशो मनोरुजा । इष्ट्बन्धुवियोगश्च उद्योगस्य विनाशनम् ॥४०॥
transliteration: hṛdrogo mānahāniśca sthānabhraṃśo manorujā . iṣṭbandhuviyogaśca udyogasya vināśanam.
separated_sandhi: hṛdrogaḥ mānahāniḥ ca sthānabhraṃśaḥ manorujāiṣṭabandhuviyogaḥ ca udyogasya vināśanam
english: One may experience heart disease, loss of honor, displacement from one's position, mental affliction, separation from beloved relatives, and the destruction of one's livelihood.

sanskrit: तापज्वरादिपीडा च व्याकुलत्वं भयं तथा । आत्मसम्बन्धिमरणमिष्टवस्तुवियोगकृत् ॥४१॥
transliteration: tāpajvarādipīḍā ca vyākulatvaṃ bhayaṃ tathā . ātmasambandhimaraṇamiṣṭavastuviyogakṛt.
separated_sandhi: tāpajvarādipīḍā ca vyākulatvaṃ bhayaṃ tathāātmasambandhimaraṇam iṣṭavastuvayogakṛt
english: Also, there may be suffering from fever and similar ailments, anxiety, fear, the death of relatives (ātman-sambandhi), and the causing of separation from beloved possessions.

sanskrit: द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु देहबाधा भविष्यति । तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं सूर्यपूजां च कारयेत् ॥४२॥
transliteration: dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu dehabādhā bhaviṣyati . taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ sūryapūjāṃ ca kārayet.
separated_sandhi: dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu dehabādhā bhaviṣyatitat doṣaparihārārtham sūryapūjām ca kārayet
english: Indeed, if the lord of the second and seventh houses is (afflicted), there will be physical ailments. For the removal of that defect, one should perform worship (pūjā) of the Sun.

sanskrit: मन्दस्यान्तर्गते चन्द्रे जीवदृष्टिसमन्विते । स्वोच्चे स्वक्षेत्रकेन्द्रस्थे त्रिकोणे लाभगेऽपि वा ॥४३॥
transliteration: mandasyāntargate candre jīvadṛṣṭisamanvite . svocce svakṣetrakendrasthe trikoṇe lābhage'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: mandasya antargate candre jīvadṛṣṭisammanvitesvocce svakṣetrakendrasthe trikoṇe lābhage api vā
english: When the Moon is in Saturn's antar-daśā, (and if the Moon is) accompanied by Jupiter's (jīva's) aspect, or in its own exaltation sign, or situated in its own sign or in an angle (kendra), or in a trine (trikona), or even in the house of gain (lābha).

sanskrit: पूर्णे शुभग्रहैर्युक्ते राजप्रीतिसमागमः । महाराजप्रसादेन वाहनाम्बरभूषणम् ॥४४॥
transliteration: pūrṇe śubhagrahairyukte rājaprītisamāgamaḥ . mahārājaprasādena vāhanāmbarabhūṣaṇam.
separated_sandhi: pūrṇe śubhagrahaiḥ yukte rājaprītisamāgamaḥmahārājaprasādena vāhanāmbarabhūṣaṇam
english: When (the Moon is) strong and associated with auspicious planets (grahas), there will be a meeting with royal favor (prīti), and by the grace (prasāda) of a great king, one will obtain conveyances, garments, and ornaments.

sanskrit: सौभाग्यं सुखवृद्धिं च भृत्यानां परिपालनम् । पितृमातृकुले सौख्यं पशुवृद्धिः सुखावहा ॥४५॥
transliteration: saubhāgyaṃ sukhavṛddhiṃ ca bhṛtyānāṃ paripālanam . pitṛmātṛkule saukhyaṃ paśuvṛddhiḥ sukhāvahā.
separated_sandhi: saubhāgyam sukhavṛddhim ca bhṛtyānām paripālanampitṛmātṛkule saukhyam paśuvṛddhiḥ sukhāvahā
english: This brings good fortune, an increase in happiness, the proper maintenance of dependents, happiness within both the paternal and maternal families, and a comfortable increase in livestock.

sanskrit: क्षीणे वा पापसंयुक्ते पापदृष्टे वा नीचगे । क्रूरांशकगते वापि क्रूरक्षेत्रगतेऽपि वा ॥४६॥
transliteration: kṣīṇe vā pāpasaṃyukte pāpadṛṣṭe vā nīcage . krūrāṃśakagate vāpi krūrakṣetragate'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: kṣīṇe vā pāpasaṃyukte pāpadṛṣṭe vā nīcagekrūrāṃśakagate vā api krūrakṣetragate api vā
english: When a planet is weakened, or conjoined with malefic planets, or aspected by malefic planets, or in its sign of debilitation, or positioned in a malefic sub-division (aṃśaka), or even in a malefic zodiac sign (kṣetra).

sanskrit: जातकस्य महत्कष्टं राजकोपो धनक्षयः । पितृमातृवियोगश्च पुत्रीपुत्रादिरोगकृत् ॥४७॥
transliteration: jātakasya mahatkaṣṭaṃ rājakopo dhanakṣayaḥ . pitṛmātṛviyogaśca putrīputrādirogakṛt.
separated_sandhi: jātakasya mahatkaṣṭam rājakopaḥ dhanakṣayaḥpitṛmātṛviyogaḥ ca putrīputrādirogakṛt
english: For the native, there will be great suffering, the wrath of the ruler, loss of wealth, separation from parents, and diseases affecting daughters, sons, and others.

sanskrit: व्यवसायात्फलं नेष्टं नानामार्गे धनव्ययः । अकाले भोजनं चैव मौषधस्य च भक्षणम् ॥४८॥
transliteration: vyavasāyātphalaṃ neṣṭaṃ nānāmārge dhanavyayaḥ . akāle bhojanaṃ caiva mauṣadhasya ca bhakṣaṇam.
separated_sandhi: vyavasāyāt phalam na iṣṭam nānāmārge dhanavyayaḥakāle bhojanam ca eva auṣadhasya ca bhakṣaṇam
