english: The outcome from professional endeavors will be unfavorable, leading to excessive expenditure of wealth through various means. Moreover, there will be untimely eating and the consumption of medicine.

sanskrit: फलमेतद्विजानीयादादौ सौख्यं धनागमः । दायेशात्केन्द्रराशिस्थे त्रिकोणे लाभगेऽपि वा ॥४९॥
transliteration: phalametadvijānīyādādau saukhyaṃ dhanāgamaḥ . dāyeśātkendrarāśisthe trikoṇe lābhage'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: phalam etat vijānīyāt ādau saukhyam dhanāgamaḥdāyeśāt kendrarāśisthe trikoṇe lābhage api vā
english: One should understand this outcome: there will be initial happiness and gain of wealth when the lord of the planetary period (dāyeśa) is situated in a Kendra house, or in a Trikona house, or even in the eleventh house (lābha bhāva).

sanskrit: वाहनाम्बरपश्वादिभ्रातृवृद्धिः सुखावहा । पितृमातृसुखावाप्तिः स्त्रीसौख्यं च धनागमः ॥५०॥
transliteration: vāhanāmbarapaśvādibhrātṛvṛddhiḥ sukhāvahā . pitṛmātṛsukhāvāptiḥ strīsaukhyaṃ ca dhanāgamaḥ.
separated_sandhi: vāhanāmbara-paśv-ādi-bhrātṛ-vṛddhiḥ sukhāvahāpitṛmātṛsukhāvāptiḥ strīsaukhyam ca dhanāgamaḥ
english: There will be an increase in vehicles, clothes, animals, and brothers, bringing happiness. There will be the attainment of happiness from one's father and mother, along with happiness from one's wife, and gain of wealth.

sanskrit: मित्रप्रभुवशादिष्टं सर्वसौख्यं शुभावहम् । दायेशाद्द्वादश भावे रन्ध्रे वा बलवर्जिते ॥५१॥
transliteration: mitraprabhuvaśādiṣṭaṃ sarvasaukhyaṃ śubhāvaham . dāyeśāddvādaśa bhāve randhre vā balavarjite.
separated_sandhi: mitra-prabhu-vaśāt iṣṭam sarva-saukhyam śubhāvahamdāyeśāt dvādaśe bhāve randhre vā bala-varjite
english: Desired benefits from friends and rulers, and all auspicious happiness, are attained. However, if the lord of the dasha (dāyeśa) is situated in the twelfth house or the eighth house (randhra), and is devoid of strength (bala), then...

sanskrit: शयनं रोगमालस्यं स्थानभ्रष्टं सुखापहम् । शत्रुवृद्धिविरोधं च बन्धुद्वेषमवाप्नुयात् ॥५२॥
transliteration: śayanaṃ rogamālasyaṃ sthānabhraṣṭaṃ sukhāpaham . śatruvṛddhivirodhaṃ ca bandhudveṣamavāpnuyāt.
separated_sandhi: śayanam rogam ālasyam sthāna-bhraṣṭam sukhāpahamśatru-vṛddhi-virodham ca bandhu-dveṣam avāpnuyāt
english: One will experience inactivity, disease, laziness, loss of position, deprivation of happiness, an increase in enemies, conflict, and hatred from relatives.

sanskrit: द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु देहालस्य भविष्यति । तद्दोषशमनार्थं च तिलहोमादिकं चरेत् ॥५३॥
transliteration: dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu dehālasya bhaviṣyati . taddoṣaśamanārthaṃ ca tilahomādikaṃ caret.
separated_sandhi: dvitīya-dyūna-nāthe tu dehālasyam bhaviṣyatitat-doṣa-śamanārtham ca tila-homa-ādikam caret
english: However, if the lord of the second house and the lord of the seventh house (are in such a debilitated state), there will be bodily laziness. For the purpose of alleviating this affliction, one should perform rituals like the sesame (tila) homa.

sanskrit: गुडं घृतं च दध्नाक्तं तण्डुलं च यथाविधि । श्वेतां गां महिषीं दद्यादायुरारोग्यवृद्धये ॥५४॥
transliteration: guḍaṃ ghṛtaṃ ca dadhnāktaṃ taṇḍulaṃ ca yathāvidhi . śvetāṃ gāṃ mahiṣīṃ dadyādāyurārogyavṛddhaye.
separated_sandhi: guḍam ghṛtam ca dadhnā āktam taṇḍulam ca yathāvidhiśvetām gām mahiṣīm dadyāt āyuḥ ārogya-vṛddhaye
english: Jaggery, ghee, and rice mixed with curd, (all should be offered) according to the prescribed rites. One should also give (dāna) a white cow and a buffalo for the increase of longevity and health.

sanskrit: मन्दस्यान्तर्गते भौमे केन्द्रलाभत्रिकोणगे । तुङ्गे स्वक्षेत्रगे वापि दशाधिपसमन्विते ॥५५॥
transliteration: mandasyāntargate bhaume kendralābhatrikoṇage . tuṅge svakṣetrage vāpi daśādhipasamanvite.
separated_sandhi: mandasya antargate bhaume kendralābhatrikoṇagetuṅge svakṣetrage vā api daśādhipasamanvite
english: When Mars (bhauma) is located in a sign owned by Saturn (manda), or is situated in a kendra (1st, 4th, 7th, 10th house), labha (11th house), or trikoṇa (5th, 9th house) house, or is exalted, or is in its own sign, and is associated with the lord of the planetary period (daśādhipa).

sanskrit: लग्नाधिपेन संयुक्ते आदौ सौख्यं धनागमः । राजप्रीतिकरं सौख्यं वाहनाम्बरभूषणम् ॥५६॥
transliteration: lagnādhipena saṃyukte ādau saukhyaṃ dhanāgamaḥ . rājaprītikaraṃ saukhyaṃ vāhanāmbarabhūṣaṇam.
separated_sandhi: lagnādhipena saṃyukte ādau saukhyaṃ dhanāgamaḥrājaprītikaraṃ saukhyaṃ vāhanāmbarabhūṣaṇam
english: When Mars is also associated with the lord of the ascendant (lagnādhipa), there will initially be happiness and acquisition of wealth. There will be comfort leading to royal favor, and gains in vehicles, garments, and ornaments.

sanskrit: सेनापत्यं नृपप्रीतिः कृषिगोधान्यसम्पदः । नूतनस्थाननिर्माणं भ्रातृवर्गेष्टसौख्यकृत् ॥५७॥
transliteration: senāpatyaṃ nṛpaprītiḥ kṛṣigodhānyasampadaḥ . nūtanasthānanirmāṇaṃ bhrātṛvargeṣṭasaukhyakṛt.
separated_sandhi: senāpatyaṃ nṛpaprītiḥ kṛṣigodhānyasampadaḥnūtanasthānanirmāṇaṃ bhrātṛvargaiṣṭasaukhyakṛt
english: There will be command of an army, royal favor, and prosperity in agriculture, cows, and grains. There will be the construction of new residences, and it will bring desired happiness to one's siblings and relatives.

sanskrit: नीचे चास्तङ्गते भौमे लग्नादष्टव्ययस्थिते । पापदृष्टियुते वापि धनहानिर्भविष्यति ॥५८॥
transliteration: nīce cāstaṅgate bhaume lagnādaṣṭavyayasthite . pāpadṛṣṭiyute vāpi dhanahānirbhaviṣyati.
separated_sandhi: nīce ca astaṅgate bhaume lagnāt aṣṭavyayasthitepāpadṛṣṭiyute vā api dhanahāniḥ bhaviṣyati
english: However, when Mars (bhauma) is debilitated and combust, or is situated in the 8th or 12th house from the ascendant, or is aspected by or conjoined with malefic planets, then there will be a loss of wealth.

sanskrit: चौराहिव्रणशस्त्रादिग्रन्थिरोगादिपीडनम् । भ्रातृपित्रादिपीडा च दायादजनविग्रहः ॥५९॥
transliteration: caurāhivraṇaśastrādigranthirogādipīḍanam . bhrātṛpitrādipīḍā ca dāyādajanavigrahaḥ.
separated_sandhi: caurāhivraṇaśastrādiganthirogādipīḍanambhrātṛpitrādipīḍā ca dāyādajanavigrahaḥ
english: There will be affliction from thieves, snakes, wounds, weapons, etc., and also from glandular diseases, etc. There will be suffering for siblings and father, etc., and disputes with kinsmen.

sanskrit: चतुष्पाज्जीवहानिश्च कुत्सितान्नस्य भोजनम् । विदेशगमनं चैव नानमार्गे धनव्ययः ॥६०॥
transliteration: catuṣpājjīvahāniśca kutsitānnasya bhojanam . videśagamanaṃ caiva nānamārge dhanavyayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: catuṣpājjīvahāniḥ ca kutsitānnasya bhojanamvideśagamanam ca eva nānāmārge dhanavyayaḥ
english: There will be loss of four-footed animals, consumption of unwholesome food, travel to foreign lands, and expenditure of money in various inappropriate ways.

sanskrit: अष्टमद्यूननाथे तु द्वितीयस्थेऽथ वा यदि । अपमृत्युभयं चैव नानाकष्टं पराभवः ॥६१॥
transliteration: aṣṭamadyūnanāthe tu dvitīyasthe'tha vā yadi . apamṛtyubhayaṃ caiva nānākaṣṭaṃ parābhavaḥ.
separated_sandhi: aṣṭamadyūnanāthe tu dvitīyasthe atha vā yadiapamṛtyubhayam ca eva nānākaṣṭam parābhavaḥ
english: If the lord of the eighth and seventh houses is thus (afflicted), or if it is located in the second house, then there will be fear of unnatural death, various troubles, and disgrace.

sanskrit: तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं शान्तिहोमं च कारयेत् । वृषदानं प्रकुर्वीत सर्वारिष्टनिवारणम् ॥६२॥
transliteration: taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ śāntihomaṃ ca kārayet . vṛṣadānaṃ prakurvīta sarvāriṣṭanivāraṇam.
separated_sandhi: tat doṣaparihārārtham śāntihomam ca kārayetvṛṣadānam prakurvīta sarvāriṣṭanivāraṇam
english: To mitigate these faults, one should perform a peace offering (śānti-homa) and donate a bull, as this acts as a remedy for all misfortunes.

sanskrit: मन्दस्यान्तर्गते राहौ कलहश्च मनोव्यथा । देहपीडा मनस्तापः पुत्रद्वेषो रुजोभयम् ॥६३॥
transliteration: mandasyāntargate rāhau kalahaśca manovyathā . dehapīḍā manastāpaḥ putradveṣo rujobhayam.
separated_sandhi: mandasya antargate rāhau kalahaḥ ca manovyathādehapīḍā manastāpaḥ putradveṣaḥ rujobhayam
english: When Rāhu is in the sub-period (antargata) of Saturn (manda), there will be quarrels, mental anguish, bodily pain, emotional distress, animosity towards children, and fear of diseases.

sanskrit: अर्थव्ययो राजभयं स्वजनादिविरोधिता । विदेशगमनं चैव गृहक्षेत्रादिनाशनम् ॥६४॥
transliteration: arthavyayo rājabhayaṃ svajanādivirodhitā . videśagamanaṃ caiva gṛhakṣetrādināśanam.
separated_sandhi: arthavyayaḥ rājabhayam svajanādivirodhitāvideśagamanam ca eva gṛhakṣetrādināśanam
english: There will be financial loss, fear from the government, opposition from one's relatives and others, and also travel to foreign lands, along with the destruction of houses, fields, and other properties.

sanskrit: लग्नाधिपेन संयुक्ते योगकारकसंयुते । स्वोच्चे स्वक्षेत्रगे केन्द्रे दायेशाल्लाभराशिगे ॥६५॥
transliteration: lagnādhipena saṃyukte yogakārakasaṃyute . svocce svakṣetrage kendre dāyeśāllābharāśige.
separated_sandhi: lagnādhipena saṃyukte yogakārakasaṃyute svaucce svakṣetrage kendre dāyeśāt lābharāśige
english: When a planet is conjoined with the ascendant lord, or conjoined with a yoga-karaka (auspicious planetary combination), or is in its exaltation sign, or in its own sign, or in an angular house (kendra), or is situated in the house of gains (11th house) relative to the lord of the 12th house...

sanskrit: आदौ सौख्यं धनावाप्तिं गृहक्षेत्रादिसम्पदम् । देवब्राह्मणभक्तिं च तीर्थयात्रादिकं लभेत् ॥६६॥
transliteration: ādau saukhyaṃ dhanāvāptiṃ gṛhakṣetrādisampadam . devabrāhmaṇabhaktiṃ ca tīrthayātrādikaṃ labhet.
separated_sandhi: ādau saukhyaṃ dhanāvāptiṃ gṛhakṣetrādisampadamdevabrāhmaṇabhaktiṃ ca tīrthayātrādikaṃ labhet
english: Initially, one obtains happiness, acquisition of wealth, property such as houses and lands, devotion (bhakti) towards gods and Brahmins, and accomplishments like pilgrimages.

sanskrit: चतुष्पाज्जीवलाभः स्याद्गृहे कल्याण्वर्द्धनम् । मध्ये तु राजभीतिश्च पुत्रमित्रविरोधनम् ॥६७॥
transliteration: catuṣpājjīvalābhaḥ syādgṛhe kalyāṇvarddhanam . madhye tu rājabhītiśca putramitravirodhanam.
separated_sandhi: catuṣpāt jīvalābhaḥ syāt gṛhe kalyāṇa vardhanammadhye tu rājabhītiḥ ca putramitra virodhanam
english: There will be gain of quadrupeds (livestock), and an increase of welfare in the family. However, in the middle period (of life or a dasha), there will be fear from the government and opposition from sons and friends.

sanskrit: मेषे कन्यागते वापि कुलीरे वृषभे तथा । मीनकोदण्डसिंहेषु गजान्तैश्वर्यमादिशेत् ॥६८॥
transliteration: meṣe kanyāgate vāpi kulīre vṛṣabhe tathā . mīnakodaṇḍasiṃheṣu gajāntaiśvaryamādiśet.
separated_sandhi: meṣe kanyāgate vā api kulīre vṛṣabhe tathāmīnakodaṇḍasiṃheṣu gaja-anta aiśvaryam ādiśet
english: If (the planet is) in Aries, or in Virgo, or in Cancer, or in Taurus, or in Pisces, Sagittarius, or Leo, one should predict supreme wealth, signifying even the possession of elephants.

sanskrit: राजसम्मनभूषाप्तिं मृदुलाभरसौख्यकृत् । द्विसप्तमाधिपैर्युक्ते देहबाधा भविष्यति ॥६९॥
transliteration: rājasammanabhūṣāptiṃ mṛdulābharasaukhyakṛt . dvisaptamādhipairyukte dehabādhā bhaviṣyati.
separated_sandhi: rājasammanabhūṣā āptiṃ mṛdula ābharaṇa saukhya kṛtdvi saptama adhipaiḥ yukte dehabādhā bhaviṣyati
english: One will attain royal honor, ornaments, and comfort from luxurious possessions. However, if (the planet is) conjoined with the lords of the 2nd and 7th houses, bodily affliction will occur.

sanskrit: मृत्युञ्जयं प्रकुर्वीत छागदानं च कारयेत् । वृषदानं प्रकुर्वीत सर्वसम्पत्सुखावहम् ॥७०॥
transliteration: mṛtyuñjayaṃ prakurvīta chāgadānaṃ ca kārayet . vṛṣadānaṃ prakurvīta sarvasampatsukhāvaham.
separated_sandhi: mṛtyuñjayam prakurvīta chāgadānam ca kārayetvṛṣadānam prakurvīta sarvasampatsukhāvaham
english: One should perform the Mṛtyuñjaya ritual and arrange for the donation (dāna) of a goat. One should also perform the donation (dāna) of a bull, which brings all prosperity and happiness.

sanskrit: मन्दस्यान्तर्गते जीवे केन्द्रे लाभत्रिकोणगे । लग्नाधिपेन संयुक्ते स्वोच्चे स्वक्षेत्रगेऽपि वा ॥७१॥
transliteration: mandasyāntargate jīve kendre lābhatrikoṇage . lagnādhipena saṃyukte svocce svakṣetrage'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: mandasya antargate jīve kendre lābhatrikoṇagelagnādhipena saṃyukte svocce svakṣetrage api vā
english: When Jupiter (jīva) is in Saturn's (manda) sub-period, and is situated in an angular house (kendra), a house of gain (lābha), or a trine house (trikoṇa); or when it is conjoined with the lord of the ascendant, or is in its own exaltation sign, or even in its own house.

sanskrit: सर्वकार्यार्थसिद्धिः स्याच्छोभनं भवति ध्रुवम् । महाराजप्रसादेन धनवाहनभूषणम् ॥७२॥
transliteration: sarvakāryārthasiddhiḥ syācchobhanaṃ bhavati dhruvam . mahārājaprasādena dhanavāhanabhūṣaṇam.
separated_sandhi: sarvakāryārthasiddhiḥ syāt śobhanam bhavatidhruvam mahārājaprasādena dhanavāhanabhūṣaṇam
english: Success in all undertakings and objectives will certainly occur, and there will be auspiciousness. By the grace of the great king, one will gain wealth, conveyances, and ornaments.

sanskrit: सन्मानं प्रभुसम्मानं प्रियवस्त्रार्थलाभकृत् । देवतागुरुभक्तिश्च विद्वज्जनसमागमः ॥७३॥
transliteration: sanmānaṃ prabhusammānaṃ priyavastrārthalābhakṛt . devatāgurubhaktiśca vidvajjanasamāgamaḥ.
separated_sandhi: sanmānam prabhusammmānam priyavastrārthalābhakṛtdevatāgurubhaktiḥ ca vidvajjansamāgamaḥ
english: One gains good honor, respect from superiors, and the acquisition of desired clothes and wealth. There will also be devotion (bhakti) towards deities and gurus, and association with learned individuals.

sanskrit: दारपुत्रादिलाभश्च पुत्रकल्याणवैभवम् । षष्ठाष्टमव्यये जीवे नीचे वा पापसंयुते ॥७४॥
transliteration: dāraputrādilābhaśca putrakalyāṇavaibhavam . ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyaye jīve nīce vā pāpasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: dāraputrādilābhaḥ ca putrakalyāṇavaibhavamṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyaye jīve nīce vā pāpasaṃyute
english: One also gains a wife, sons, and so forth, along with the well-being and prosperity of children. Conversely, conditions are adverse when Jupiter (jīva) is in the 6th, 8th, or 12th house, or is debilitated, or is conjoined with malefic planets.

sanskrit: निजसम्बन्धिमरणं धनधान्यविनाशनम् । राजस्थाने जनद्वेषः कर्यहानिर्भविष्यति ॥७५॥
transliteration: nijasambandhimaraṇaṃ dhanadhānyavināśanam . rājasthāne janadveṣaḥ karyahānirbhaviṣyati.
separated_sandhi: nija-sambandhi-maraṇam dhana-dhānya-vināśanamrājasthāne jana-dveṣaḥ karya-hāniḥ bhaviṣyati
english: There will be the death of one's relatives, destruction of wealth and grains, enmity from the government, hatred from people, and loss of undertakings.

sanskrit: विदेशगमनं चैव कुष्ठरोगादिसम्भवः । दायेशात्केन्द्रकोणे वा धने वा लाभगेऽपि वा ॥७६॥
transliteration: videśagamanaṃ caiva kuṣṭharogādisambhavaḥ . dāyeśātkendrakoṇe vā dhane vā lābhage'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: videśa-gamanam ca eva kuṣṭha-roga-ādi-sambhavaḥdāyeśāt kendra-koṇe vā dhane vā lābha-ge api vā
english: Foreign travel will also occur, along with the possibility of leprosy and other diseases. This is indicated when the lord of the planetary period (dāyeśa) is situated in an angular (kendra) or trine (koṇa) house, or in the house of wealth (dhana), or even in the house of gains (lābha).

sanskrit: विभवं दारसौभाग्यं राजश्रीधनसम्पदः । भोजनाम्बरसौख्यं च दानधर्मादिकं भवेत् ॥७७॥
transliteration: vibhavaṃ dārasaubhāgyaṃ rājaśrīdhanasampadaḥ . bhojanāmbarasaukhyaṃ ca dānadharmādikaṃ bhavet.
separated_sandhi: vibhavam dāra-saubhāgyam rāja-śrī-dhana-sampadaḥbhojana-ambara-saukhyam ca dāna-dharma-ādikam bhavet
english: There will be prosperity, marital happiness, royal splendor, wealth, and abundance. Also, happiness from food and clothing, and acts of charity (dāna) and virtuous conduct (dharma), and similar auspicious events will take place.

sanskrit: ब्रह्मप्र्तिष्ठासिद्धिश्च क्रतुकर्मफलं तथा । अन्नदानं महाकीर्तिर्वेदान्तश्रवणादिकम् ॥७८॥
transliteration: brahmaprtiṣṭhāsiddhiśca kratukarmaphalaṃ tathā . annadānaṃ mahākīrtirvedāntaśravaṇādikam.
separated_sandhi: brahma-pratiṣṭhā-siddhiḥ ca kratu-karma-phalamtathā anna-dānam mahā-kīrtiḥ vedānta-śravaṇa-ādikam
english: There will be the accomplishment of establishing Brahman, along with the fruits of sacrificial rites. Similarly, food charity (dāna), great fame, and the study or hearing (śravaṇa) of Vedānta scriptures, and similar pious acts will occur.

sanskrit: दायेशात्षष्ठरन्ध्रे वा व्यये वा बलवर्जिते । बन्धुद्वेषो मनोदुःखं कलहः पदविच्युति ॥७९॥
transliteration: dāyeśātṣaṣṭharandhre vā vyaye vā balavarjite . bandhudveṣo manoduḥkhaṃ kalahaḥ padavicyuti.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt ṣaṣṭha-randhre vā vyaye vā bala-varjitebandhu-dveṣaḥ mano-duḥkham kalahaḥ pada-vicyutiḥ
english: When the lord of the planetary period (dāyeśa) is situated in the sixth house, or the eighth house, or the twelfth house (vyaya), and is devoid of strength, then there will be hatred from relatives, mental distress, quarrels, and loss of position.

sanskrit: कुभोजनं कर्महानी राजदण्डाद्धनव्यय । कारागृहप्रवेशश्च पुत्रदारादिपीडनम् ॥८०॥
transliteration: kubhojanaṃ karmahānī rājadaṇḍāddhanavyaya . kārāgṛhapraveśaśca putradārādipīḍanam.
separated_sandhi: kubhojanam karmahānī rājadaṇḍāt dhanavyayaḥkārāgṛhapraveśaḥ ca putradārādipīḍanam
english: There will be bad food, loss of work, expenditure of wealth due to royal punishment, imprisonment, and affliction to sons, wife, and other family members.

sanskrit: द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु देहवाधा मनोरुजः । आत्मसम्बन्धमरणं भविष्यति न संशयः ॥८१॥
transliteration: dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu dehavādhā manorujaḥ . ātmasambandhamaraṇaṃ bhaviṣyati na saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu dehavādhā manorujahātmasambandhamaraṇam bhaviṣyati na saṃśayaḥ
english: Furthermore, when the lord of the second or seventh house is afflicted, there will be physical ailments, mental illnesses, and the death of relatives (ātmasambandha). There is no doubt about this.

sanskrit: तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं शिवसाहस्रकं जपेत् । स्वर्णदानं प्र्कुर्वीत ह्यारोग्यं भवति ध्रुवम् ॥८२॥
transliteration: taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ śivasāhasrakaṃ japet . svarṇadānaṃ prkurvīta hyārogyaṃ bhavati dhruvam.
separated_sandhi: taddoṣaparihārārtham śivasāhasrakam japetsvarṇadānam prakurvīta hi ārogyam bhavati dhruvam
english: To alleviate this defect, one should chant the thousand names of Shiva (śivasāhasrakam) and perform the giving of gold (dāna). Health will certainly be attained.

sanskrit: मुक्ताविद्रुमलाभश्च ज्ञानकर्मसुखादिकम् । विद्यामहत्त्वं कीर्तिश्च नूतनप्रभुदर्शनम् ॥१॥
transliteration: muktāvidrumalābhaśca jñānakarmasukhādikam . vidyāmahattvaṃ kīrtiśca nūtanaprabhudarśanam.
separated_sandhi: muktāvidrumalābhaḥ ca jñānakarmasukhadikamvidyāmahattvaṃ kīrtiḥ ca nūtanaprabhudarśanam
english: There will be gains of pearls and corals, along with knowledge, auspicious actions (karma), happiness, and so on. Also, the importance of learning, fame, and the vision of a new lord or master (are predicted).

sanskrit: विभवं दारपुत्रादि पितृमातृसुखावहम् । स्वोच्चादिस्थेऽथ नीचेऽस्ते षष्ठाष्टमव्ययराशिगे ॥२॥
transliteration: vibhavaṃ dāraputrādi pitṛmātṛsukhāvaham . svoccādisthe'tha nīce'ste ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyayarāśige.
separated_sandhi: vibhavam dāraputrādi pitṛmātṛsukhāvahamsvoccādisthite atha nīce aste ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyayarāśige
english: Prosperity, family (wife, sons, etc.), and happiness for parents (are indicated). These are results when (a planet) is situated in its own exalted sign or similar auspicious positions. Furthermore, (different outcomes occur) when it is debilitated, in the seventh house, or in the sixth, eighth, or twelfth houses.

sanskrit: पापयुक्तेऽथवा दृष्टे धनधान्यपशुक्षयः । आत्मबन्धुविरोधश्च शूलरूगादिसम्भवः ॥३॥
transliteration: pāpayukte'thavā dṛṣṭe dhanadhānyapaśukṣayaḥ . ātmabandhuvirodhaśca śūlarūgādisambhavaḥ.
separated_sandhi: pāpayukte athavā dṛṣṭe dhanadhānyapaśukṣayaḥ| ātmabandhuvirodhaḥ ca śūlarūgādisambhavaḥ
english: When [a planet or house] is conjoined with or aspected by malefic planets, there will be a loss of wealth, grains, and cattle. There will also be conflict with one's own relatives, and the occurrence of colic and other diseases.

sanskrit: राजकार्यकलापेन व्याकुलो भव्ति ध्रुवम् । द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु दारक्लेशो भविष्यति ॥४॥
transliteration: rājakāryakalāpena vyākulo bhavti dhruvam . dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu dārakleśo bhaviṣyati.
separated_sandhi: rājakāryakalāpena vyākulaḥ bhavati dhruvam| dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu dārakleśaḥ bhaviṣyati
english: One will certainly be troubled by state affairs. However, if the lord of the second house is simultaneously the lord of the seventh house, there will be distress concerning the spouse.

sanskrit: आत्मसम्बन्धिमरणं वातशूलादिसम्भवः । तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं विष्णुसाहस्रकं जपेत् ॥५॥
transliteration: ātmasambandhimaraṇaṃ vātaśūlādisambhavaḥ . taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ viṣṇusāhasrakaṃ japet.
separated_sandhi: ātmasambandhimaraṇam vātaśūlādisambhavaḥ |taddoṣaparihārārtham viṣṇusāhasrakam japet
english: There will be the death of one's own relatives and the occurrence of vāta-related colic and other diseases. To alleviate these defects, one should chant the Viṣṇu Sahasranāma.

sanskrit: बुधस्यान्तर्गते केतौ लग्नात्केन्द्रत्रिकोणगे । शुभयुक्ते शुभैर्दृष्टे लग्नाधिपसमन्विते ॥६॥
transliteration: budhasyāntargate ketau lagnātkendratrikoṇage . śubhayukte śubhairdṛṣṭe lagnādhipasamanvite.
separated_sandhi: budhasya antargate ketau lagnāt kendratrikoṇage| śubhayukte śubhaiḥ dṛṣṭe lagnādhipasamannite
english: When Ketu is in the sub-period (antardaśā) of Budha (Mercury), and Ketu is situated in a Kendra (angular) or Trikona (trine) house from the Lagna (ascendant), is conjoined with benefics, aspected by benefics, and associated with the lord of the Lagna (ascendant).

sanskrit: योगकारकसम्बन्धे दायेशात्केन्द्रलाभगे । देहसौख्यं धनाल्पत्वं बन्धुस्नेहमथादिशेत् ॥७॥
transliteration: yogakārakasambandhe dāyeśātkendralābhage . dehasaukhyaṃ dhanālpatvaṃ bandhusnehamathādiśet.
separated_sandhi: yogakārakasambandhe dāyeśāt kendralābhage |dehasaukhyam dhanālpatvam bandhusneham atha ādiśet
english: When there is an association with a planet that forms a yoga (yogakāraka), and it is situated in a Kendra (angular) or Lābha (11th) house from the lord of gains (dāyeśa), then one should predict bodily comfort, limited wealth, and affection for relatives.

sanskrit: चतुष्पाज्जीवलाभः स्यात्संचारेण धनागमः । विद्याकीर्तिर्प्रसङ्गश्च समानप्रभुदर्शनम् ॥८॥
transliteration: catuṣpājjīvalābhaḥ syātsaṃcāreṇa dhanāgamaḥ . vidyākīrtirprasaṅgaśca samānaprabhudarśanam.
separated_sandhi: catuṣpāt jīvalābhaḥ syāt saṃcāreṇa dhanāgamaḥvidyākīrtiḥ prasaṅgaḥ ca samānaprabhudarśanam
english: There will be a gain of four-footed creatures. Through journeys, there will be an acquisition of wealth. One will also achieve fame through knowledge, form associations, and meet with equals or superiors.

sanskrit: भोजनाम्बरसौख्यं च ह्यादौ मध्ये सुखावहम् । दायेशाद्यदि रन्ध्रस्थे व्यये वा पापसंयुते ॥९॥
transliteration: bhojanāmbarasaukhyaṃ ca hyādau madhye sukhāvaham . dāyeśādyadi randhrasthe vyaye vā pāpasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: bhojanāmbarasaukhyam ca hi ādau madhye sukhāvahamdāyeśāt yadi randhrasthe vyaye vā pāpasaṃyute
english: There will be happiness from food and clothing, which is indeed pleasant in the beginning and middle (of the period). However, if the lord of the daśā is situated in the eighth house (randhra) or the twelfth house (vyaya), or is conjoined with a malefic planet...

sanskrit: वाहनात्पतनं चैव पुत्रक्लेशादिसम्भवः । चौरादिराजभीतिश्च पापकर्मरतः सदा ॥१०॥
transliteration: vāhanātpatanaṃ caiva putrakleśādisambhavaḥ . caurādirājabhītiśca pāpakarmarataḥ sadā.
separated_sandhi: vāhanāt patanam ca eva putrakleśādisambhavaḥcaurādirājabhītiḥ ca pāpakarmarataḥ sadā
english: There will be a fall from a vehicle, indeed, and the possibility of troubles related to children and so on. There will also be fear from thieves, royalty, etc., and one will always be engaged in sinful deeds (karma).

sanskrit: वृश्चिकादिविषाद्भीतिर्नीचैः कलहसंभवः । शोकरोगादिदुःखं च नीचसङ्गादिकं भवेत् ॥११॥
transliteration: vṛścikādiviṣādbhītirnīcaiḥ kalahasaṃbhavaḥ . śokarogādiduḥkhaṃ ca nīcasaṅgādikaṃ bhavet.
separated_sandhi: vṛścikādiviṣāt bhītiḥ nīcaiḥ kalahasambhavaḥśokarogādiduḥkham ca nīcasaṅgādikam bhavet
english: There will be fear from the poison of scorpions and other such creatures, and the possibility of quarrels with low individuals. Sorrow, disease, and other miseries, as well as association with low company, etc., will occur.

sanskrit: द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु देहजाड्यं भविष्यति । तद्दोषपरिहाराय छागदानं तु कारयेत् ॥१२॥
transliteration: dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu dehajāḍyaṃ bhaviṣyati . taddoṣaparihārāya chāgadānaṃ tu kārayet.
separated_sandhi: dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu dehajāḍyam bhaviṣyatitatdoṣaparihārāya chāgadānam tu kārayet
english: However, if the lord of the second and seventh houses (dyūna) is (afflicted), then bodily inertness will occur. To remove this fault, one should indeed perform the giving of a goat (dāna).

sanskrit: सौम्यस्यान्तर्गते शुक्रे केन्द्रे लाभे त्रिकोणगे । सत्कथापुण्यधर्मादिसंग्रहः पुण्यकर्मकृत् ॥१३॥
transliteration: saumyasyāntargate śukre kendre lābhe trikoṇage . satkathāpuṇyadharmādisaṃgrahaḥ puṇyakarmakṛt.
separated_sandhi: saumyasya antargate śukre kendre lābhe trikoṇagesatkathāpuṇyadharmādisaṃgrahaḥ puṇyakarmakṛt
english: If Venus is within the influence of a benefic planet and is situated in a Kendra (angular house), Labha (eleventh house of gains), or Trikona (trine house), the person will accumulate good stories, merits, and righteousness (dharma), and will perform virtuous actions.

sanskrit: मित्रप्रभुवशादिष्टं क्षेत्रलाभः सुखं भवेत् । दशाधिपात्केन्द्रगते त्रिकोणे लाभगेऽपि वा ॥१४॥
transliteration: mitraprabhuvaśādiṣṭaṃ kṣetralābhaḥ sukhaṃ bhavet . daśādhipātkendragate trikoṇe lābhage'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: mitraprabhuvaśāt iṣṭam kṣetralābhaḥ sukham bhavetdaśādhipāt kendragate trikoṇe lābhage api vā
english: When a planet is situated in an angle house (kendra), a trine house (trikoṇa), or even a house of gains (lābha) from the lord of the planetary period (daśādhipa), then through the influence of a friendly planetary lord, desired acquisition of property (kṣetra) and happiness will occur.

sanskrit: तत्काले श्रियमाप्नोति राजश्रीधनसम्पदः । वापीकूपतडागदिदानधर्मादिसंग्रहः ॥१५॥
transliteration: tatkāle śriyamāpnoti rājaśrīdhanasampadaḥ . vāpīkūpataḍāgadidānadharmādisaṃgrahaḥ.
separated_sandhi: tatkāle śriyam āpnoti rājaśrīdhanasampadaḥvāpīkūpataḍāgādidānadharmādisaṃgrahaḥ
english: During that period, one obtains prosperity, royal affluence, and great wealth. There is also an accumulation of charitable donations (dāna) such as step-wells, ordinary wells, tanks, and other virtuous acts (dharma).

sanskrit: व्यवसायात्फलाधिक्यं धनधान्यसमृद्धिकृत् । दायेशात्षष्ठरन्ध्रस्थे व्यये वा बलवर्जिते ॥१६॥
transliteration: vyavasāyātphalādhikyaṃ dhanadhānyasamṛddhikṛt . dāyeśātṣaṣṭharandhrasthe vyaye vā balavarjite.
separated_sandhi: vyavasāyāt phalādhikyaṃ dhanadhānyasamṛddhikṛtdāyeśāt ṣaṣṭharandhrasthe vyaye vā balavarjite
english: There will be an abundance of results from enterprises, leading to prosperity in wealth and grains. If the Dasha lord is situated in the sixth house, the eighth house (randhra), or the twelfth house (vyaya), or is devoid of strength...

sanskrit: हृद्रोगो मानहानिश्च ज्वरातीसारपीडनम् । आत्मबन्धुवियोगश्च संसारे भवति ध्रुवम् ॥१७॥
transliteration: hṛdrogo mānahāniśca jvarātīsārapīḍanam . ātmabandhuviyogaśca saṃsāre bhavati dhruvam.
separated_sandhi: hṛdrogaḥ mānahāniḥ ca jvarātīsārapīḍanamātmabandhuviyogaḥ ca saṃsāre bhavati dhruvam
english: During such a period, there will be heart disease, loss of honor, and affliction by fever and dysentery. There will certainly be separation from one's own kith and kin (ātman-bandhu) in the cycle of transmigration (saṃsāra).

sanskrit: आत्मकष्टं मनस्तापदायकं द्विजसत्तम । द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु ह्यपमृत्युर्भविष्यति ॥१८॥
transliteration: ātmakaṣṭaṃ manastāpadāyakaṃ dvijasattama . dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu hyapamṛtyurbhaviṣyati.
separated_sandhi: ātma kaṣṭam manastāpadāyakam dvijasattamadvitīyadyūnanāthe tu hi apamṛtyuḥ bhaviṣyati
english: O best among the twice-born, when the lord of the second and seventh houses is (prominent), there will surely be self-suffering, mental distress, and an untimely death.

sanskrit: तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं दुर्गादेवीजपं चरेत् । जगदम्बाप्रसादेन ततः शान्तिमवाप्नुयात् ॥१९॥
transliteration: taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ durgādevījapaṃ caret . jagadambāprasādena tataḥ śāntimavāpnuyāt.
separated_sandhi: tatdoṣaparihārārtham durgādevījapam caretjagadambāprasādena tataḥ śāntim avāpnuyāt
english: For the removal of that affliction, one should perform the chanting (japa) of Goddess Durgā. Subsequently, by the grace of Jagadambā (Mother of the World), one will attain peace.

sanskrit: सौम्यस्यान्तर्गते सूर्ये स्वोच्चे स्वक्षेत्रकेन्द्रगे । त्रिकोणे धनलाभे तु तुङ्गांशे स्वांशगेऽपि वा ॥२०॥
transliteration: saumyasyāntargate sūrye svocce svakṣetrakendrage . trikoṇe dhanalābhe tu tuṅgāṃśe svāṃśage'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: saumyasya antargate sūrye svocce svakṣetrakendragetrikoṇe dhanalābhe tu tuṅgāṃśe svāṃśage api vā
english: When the Sun is situated within a sign ruled by Mercury, or is in its exaltation sign, or in its own sign and an angular house (kendra), or in a trine house (trikoṇa), or in a house of wealth or gain, or in its exalted Navāmśa, or even in its own Navāmśa...

sanskrit: राजप्रसादसुभाग्यं मित्रप्रभुवशात्सुखम् । भूम्यात्मजेन संदृष्टे आदौ भूलाभमादिशेत् ॥२१॥
transliteration: rājaprasādasubhāgyaṃ mitraprabhuvaśātsukham . bhūmyātmajena saṃdṛṣṭe ādau bhūlābhamādiśet.
separated_sandhi: rājaprasādasubhāgyam mitraprabhuvaśāt sukhambhūmyātmajena sandṛṣṭe ādau bhūlābham ādiśet
english: There will be royal favor, good fortune, and happiness derived from friends and masters. If the Sun is aspected by the son of the Earth (Mars), one should primarily predict the acquisition of land.

sanskrit: लग्नाधिपेन संदृष्टे बहुसौख्यं धनागमम् । ग्रामभूम्यादिलाभं च भोजनाम्बरसौख्यकृत् ॥२२॥
transliteration: lagnādhipena saṃdṛṣṭe bahusaukhyaṃ dhanāgamam . grāmabhūmyādilābhaṃ ca bhojanāmbarasaukhyakṛt.
separated_sandhi: lagnādhipena sandṛṣṭe bahusaukhyam dhanāgamamgrāmabhūmyādilābham ca bhojanāmbarasaukhyakṛt
english: If the Sun is aspected by the lord of the Ascendant, it bestows great happiness, the inflow of wealth, and the acquisition of villages, land, and so on. It also causes comfort related to food and clothing.

sanskrit: लग्नाष्टमव्यये वापि शन्यारफणिसंयुते । दायेशाद्रिपुरन्ध्रस्थे व्यये वा बलवर्जिते ॥२३॥
transliteration: lagnāṣṭamavyaye vāpi śanyāraphaṇisaṃyute . dāyeśādripurandhrasthe vyaye vā balavarjite.
separated_sandhi: lagnāṣṭamavyaye vā api śani ara phaṇi saṃyutedāyeśāt ripurandhrasthe vyaye vā balavarjite
english: When a planet is situated in the Ascendant (lagna), the 8th house, or the 12th house, or is conjoined with Saturn, Mars, and Rahu/Ketu; and if (that planet) is located in the 6th, 8th, or 12th house from the Dasha (period) lord, or is devoid of strength.

sanskrit: चौरादिशस्त्रपीडा च पित्ताधिक्यं भविष्यति । शिरोरुङ्मनसस्ताप इष्टबन्धुवियोगकृत् ॥२४॥
transliteration: caurādiśastrapīḍā ca pittādhikyaṃ bhaviṣyati . śiroruṅmanasastāpa iṣṭabandhuviyogakṛt.
separated_sandhi: caurādi śastrapīḍā ca pittādhikyam bhaviṣyati| śiroruk manasastāpa iṣṭabandhuvyogakṛt
english: There will be suffering from thieves, weapons, and similar dangers, and an excess of Pitta (bile) will manifest. There will be headaches, mental distress, and separation from dear relatives.

sanskrit: द्वितीयसप्तमाधीशे ह्यपमृत्युर्भविश्यति । तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं शान्तिं कुर्याद्यथाविधि ॥२५॥
transliteration: dvitīyasaptamādhīśe hyapamṛtyurbhaviśyati . taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ śāntiṃ kuryādyathāvidhi.
separated_sandhi: dvitīyasaptamādhīśe hi apamṛtyuḥ bhaviṣyati |taddoṣaparihārārtham śāntim kuryāt yathāvidhi
english: Indeed, if the lord of the 2nd and 7th houses is (afflicted as described), untimely death will occur. For the removal of that defect, one should perform a propitiation (śānti) ritual according to the prescribed rules.

sanskrit: सौम्यस्यान्तर्गते चन्द्रे लग्नात्केन्द्रत्रिकोणगे । स्वोच्चे वा स्वर्क्षगे वापि गुरुदृष्टिसमन्विते ॥२६॥
transliteration: saumyasyāntargate candre lagnātkendratrikoṇage . svocce vā svarkṣage vāpi gurudṛṣṭisamanvite.
separated_sandhi: saumyasya antargate candre lagnāt kendratrikoṇage| svocche vā svarkṣage vā api gurudṛṣṭisamanvite
english: When the Moon is in the sub-period (antargata) of a benefic planet, and is situated in a Kendra (angular) or Trikona (trine) house from the Ascendant (lagna), or in its own exaltation (svocca) sign, or in its own sign (svarkṣa), and is endowed with the aspect of Jupiter (guru).

sanskrit: योगस्थानाधिपत्येन योगप्राबल्यमादिशेत् । स्त्रीलाभं पुत्रलाभं च वस्त्रवाहनभूषणम् ॥२७॥
transliteration: yogasthānādhipatyena yogaprābalyamādiśet . strīlābhaṃ putralābhaṃ ca vastravāhanabhūṣaṇam.
separated_sandhi: yogasthānādhipatyena yogaprābalyam ādiśet |strīlābham putralābham ca vastravāhanabhūṣaṇam
english: Through the lordship of auspicious positions, one should predict the strength of that favorable planetary combination (yoga). This combination indicates the gain of a wife, children, clothes, conveyances, and ornaments.

sanskrit: नूतनालयलाभं च नित्यं मिष्ठान्नभोजनम् । गीतवाद्यप्रसंगं च शास्त्रविद्यापरिश्रमम् ॥२८॥
transliteration: nūtanālayalābhaṃ ca nityaṃ miṣṭhānnabhojanam . gītavādyaprasaṃgaṃ ca śāstravidyāpariśramam.
separated_sandhi: nūtanālayalābham ca nityam miṣṭānnābhojanamgītavādyaprasaṅgam ca śāstravidyāpariśramam
english: There will be the acquisition of a new house, and a continuous indulgence in sweet foods. Also, there will be involvement in singing and instrumental music, and diligent study (pariśrama) of scriptural knowledge (śāstra vidyā).

sanskrit: दक्षिणां दिशमाश्रित्य प्रयाणं च भविष्यति । द्वीपान्तरादिवस्त्राणां लाभश्चैव भविष्यति ॥२९॥
transliteration: dakṣiṇāṃ diśamāśritya prayāṇaṃ ca bhaviṣyati . dvīpāntarādivastrāṇāṃ lābhaścaiva bhaviṣyati.
separated_sandhi: dakṣiṇām diśam āśritya prayāṇam ca bhaviṣyatidvīpāntarādivastrāṇām lābhaḥ ca eva bhaviṣyati
english: A journey (prayāṇa) will occur, heading towards the southern direction (dakṣiṇā diś). Indeed, there will also be the acquisition of clothes and other goods from foreign lands (dvīpāntara).

sanskrit: मुक्ताविद्रुमरत्नानि धौतवस्त्रादिकं लभेत् । नीचारिक्षेत्रसंयुक्ते देहबाधा भविष्यति ॥३०॥
transliteration: muktāvidrumaratnāni dhautavastrādikaṃ labhet . nīcārikṣetrasaṃyukte dehabādhā bhaviṣyati.
separated_sandhi: muktāvidrumaratnāni dhautavastrādikam labhetnīcārikṣetrasaṃyukte dehabādhā bhaviṣyati
english: One will obtain pearls (muktā), corals (vidruma), gems (ratna), and clean garments (dhautavastra) along with other items. When [a planet is] associated with a sign of debilitation (nīca) or an enemy's sign (ari-kṣetra), there will be bodily affliction (dehabādhā).

sanskrit: दायेशात्केन्द्रकोणस्थे दुश्चिक्ये लाभगेऽपि वा । तद्भुक्त्यादौ पुण्यतीर्थस्थानदैवतदर्शनम् ॥३१॥
transliteration: dāyeśātkendrakoṇasthe duścikye lābhage'pi vā . tadbhuktyādau puṇyatīrthasthānadaivatadarśanam.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt kendrakoṇasthe duścikye lābhage api vātadbhuktyādau puṇyatīrthasthānadaivatadarśanam
english: When [a planet] from the daśā lord (dāyeśa) is situated in a quadrant (kendra) or trine (koṇa) house, or even in the 3rd house (duścikya) or the 11th house (lābha), then at the beginning of that sub-period (bhukti) and subsequently, there will be a visit (darśana) to sacred holy places (puṇya tīrtha), shrines, and deities (daivata).

sanskrit: मनोधैर्यं हृदुत्साहो विदेशधनलाभकृत् । दायेशात्षष्ठरन्ध्रे वा व्यये वा पापसंयुते ॥३२॥
transliteration: manodhairyaṃ hṛdutsāho videśadhanalābhakṛt . dāyeśātṣaṣṭharandhre vā vyaye vā pāpasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: manodhāiryam hṛd utsāhaḥ videśadhanalābhakṛtdāyeśāt ṣaṣṭharandhre vā vyaye vā pāpasaṃyute
english: There will be mental fortitude (manodhairya) and enthusiasm (utsāha) from the heart (hṛd), and one will gain wealth from foreign lands (videśa). This happens when [a planet] is located in the 6th (ṣaṣṭha), 8th (randhra), or 12th (vyaya) house from the daśā lord (dāyeśa), or when it is conjoined (saṃyukta) with malefic planets (pāpa).

sanskrit: चोराग्निनृपभीतिश्च स्त्रीसमागमतो भवेत् । दुष्कृतिर्धनहानिश्च कृषिगोश्वादिनाशकृत् ॥३३॥
transliteration: corāgninṛpabhītiśca strīsamāgamato bhavet . duṣkṛtirdhanahāniśca kṛṣigośvādināśakṛt.
separated_sandhi: corāgninṛpabhītiḥ ca strīsamāgamataḥ bhavetduṣkṛtiḥ dhanahāniḥ ca kṛṣigośvādināśakṛt
english: There will be fear from thieves, fire, and kings, along with association with women. There will also be evil deeds, loss of wealth, and destruction of agriculture, cows, horses, and so on.

sanskrit: द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु देहबाधा भविष्यति । तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं दुर्गादेवीजपं चरेत् ॥३४॥
transliteration: dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu dehabādhā bhaviṣyati . taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ durgādevījapaṃ caret.
separated_sandhi: dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu dehabādhā bhaviṣyatitat doṣaparihārārtham durgādevījapam caret
english: When the lord of the seventh house is in the second house, there will be physical ailments. To remedy this affliction, one should perform the chanting (japa) of Goddess Durgā.

sanskrit: वस्त्रदानं प्रकुर्वीत आयुर्वृद्धिसुखावहम् । जगदम्बाप्रसादेन ततः सुखमवाप्नुयात् ॥३५॥
transliteration: vastradānaṃ prakurvīta āyurvṛddhisukhāvaham . jagadambāprasādena tataḥ sukhamavāpnuyāt.
separated_sandhi: vastradānam prakurvīta āyurvṛddhisukhāvahamjagadambāprasādena tataḥ sukham avāpnuyāt
english: One should perform the giving of clothes (dāna), which brings increase in longevity and happiness. Through the grace (prasāda) of Jagadambā (the Mother of the World), one will then attain happiness.

sanskrit: सौम्यस्यान्तर्गते भौमे लग्नात्केन्द्रत्रिकोणगे । स्वोच्चे वा स्वर्क्षगे वापि लग्नाधिपसमन्विते ॥३६॥
transliteration: saumyasyāntargate bhaume lagnātkendratrikoṇage . svocce vā svarkṣage vāpi lagnādhipasamanvite.
separated_sandhi: saumyasya antargate bhaume lagnāt kendratrikoṇagesvocce vā svarkṣage vā api lagnādhipasammanvite
english: When Mars (bhaume) is situated within the period of Mercury (saumyasya antargate), and is in a kendra or trikona house from the ascendant, or in its exaltation sign, or in its own sign, or associated with the lord of the ascendant.

sanskrit: राजानुग्रहशान्तिं च गृहे कल्याणसम्भवम् । लक्ष्मीकटाक्षचिह्नानि नष्टराज्यार्थमाप्नुयात् ॥३७॥
transliteration: rājānugrahaśāntiṃ ca gṛhe kalyāṇasambhavam . lakṣmīkaṭākṣacihnāni naṣṭarājyārthamāpnuyāt.
separated_sandhi: rājānugrahaśāntim ca gṛhe kalyāṇasambhavamlakṣmīkaṭākṣacihnāni naṣṭarājyārtham āpnuyāt
english: One will attain the peace of royal favor, the possibility of auspiciousness at home, and the signs of Lakṣmī's benevolent glance, even regaining lost wealth or kingdom.

sanskrit: पुत्रोत्सवादिसन्तोषं गृहे गोधनसंकुलम् । गृहक्षेत्रादिलाभं च गजवाजिसमन्वितम् ॥३८॥
transliteration: putrotsavādisantoṣaṃ gṛhe godhanasaṃkulam . gṛhakṣetrādilābhaṃ ca gajavājisamanvitam.
separated_sandhi: putrotsavādi-santoṣam gṛhe godhana-saṃkulamgṛhakṣetrādi-lābham ca gaja-vāji-samanvitam
english: One experiences joy from events such as the birth of a son, a home bustling with cows and other wealth, and the acquisition of houses, lands, accompanied by elephants and horses.

sanskrit: राजप्रीतिकरं चैव स्त्रीसौख्यं चातिशोभनम् । नीचक्षेत्रसमायुक्ते ह्यष्टमे वा व्ययेऽपि वा ॥३९॥
transliteration: rājaprītikaraṃ caiva strīsaukhyaṃ cātiśobhanam . nīcakṣetrasamāyukte hyaṣṭame vā vyaye'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: rāja-prīti-karam ca eva strī-saukhyam ca ati-śobhanamnīca-kṣetra-samāyukte hi aṣṭame vā vyaye api vā
english: One also experiences royal favor and very excellent conjugal happiness. However, if (the relevant planet) is situated in a debilitated sign (nīcakṣetra), or in the eighth house, or even in the twelfth house (vyaya), then...

sanskrit: पापदृष्टियुते वापि देहपीडा मनोव्यथा । उद्योगभङ्गो दशादौ स्वग्रामे धान्यनशनम् ॥४०॥
transliteration: pāpadṛṣṭiyute vāpi dehapīḍā manovyathā . udyogabhaṅgo daśādau svagrāme dhānyanaśanam.
separated_sandhi: pāpa-dṛṣṭi-yute vā api deha-pīḍā mano-vyathāudyoga-bhaṅgaḥ daśā-ādau sva-grāme dhānya-naśanam
english: Or even if it (the planet) is aspected by malefic planets, there will be bodily pain and mental distress. At the beginning of the planetary period (daśā), there will be disruption of one's endeavors and destruction of grain in one's own village.

sanskrit: ग्रंथिशस्त्रव्रणादीनां भयं तापज्वरादिकम् । दायेशात्केन्द्रगे भौमे त्रिकोणे लाभगेऽपि वा ॥४१॥
transliteration: graṃthiśastravraṇādīnāṃ bhayaṃ tāpajvarādikam . dāyeśātkendrage bhaume trikoṇe lābhage'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: granthi-śastra-vraṇa-ādīnām bhayam tāpa-jvara-ādikamdāyeśāt kendrage bhaume trikoṇe lābhage api vā
english: One may experience fear from tumors, weapons, wounds, and similar afflictions, along with fever and other illnesses. However, if Mars (bhauma) is situated in a quadrant (kendra) or a trine (trikoṇa), or even in a house of gain (lābha) from the lord of the planetary period (daśā)...

sanskrit: शुभदृष्टे धनप्राप्तिर्देहसौख्यं भवेनृणाम् । पुत्रलाभो यशोवृद्धिर्भ्रातृवर्गो महाप्रियः ॥४२॥
transliteration: śubhadṛṣṭe dhanaprāptirdehasaukhyaṃ bhavenṛṇām . putralābho yaśovṛddhirbhrātṛvargo mahāpriyaḥ.
separated_sandhi: śubha-dṛṣṭe dhana-prāptiḥ deha-saukhyam bhavet nṛṇāmputra-lābhaḥ yaśo-vṛddhiḥ bhrātṛ-vargaḥ mahā-priyaḥ
english: If it (Mars from the previous verse) is aspected by benefics, then people will attain wealth and bodily comfort. There will be gain of sons, an increase in fame, and one's circle of brothers (or kinsmen) will become very dear.

sanskrit: दायेशादथ रन्ध्रस्थे व्यये वा पापसंयुते । तद्भुक्त्यादौ महाक्लेशो भ्रातृवर्गे महद्भयम् ॥४३॥
transliteration: dāyeśādatha randhrasthe vyaye vā pāpasaṃyute . tadbhuktyādau mahākleśo bhrātṛvarge mahadbhayam.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt atha randhrasthe vyaye vā pāpasaṃyute tatbhukti ādau mahākleśaḥ bhrātṛvarge mahat bhayam
english: If the lord of the planetary period is situated in the eighth house or the twelfth house, or is conjoined with a malefic planet, then at the beginning of its sub-period, there will be great distress and significant fear among one's siblings and relatives.

sanskrit: नृपाग्निचौरभीतिश्च पुत्रमित्रविरोधनम् । स्थानभ्रंशो भवेदादौ मध्ये सौख्यं धनागमः ॥४४॥
transliteration: nṛpāgnicaurabhītiśca putramitravirodhanam . sthānabhraṃśo bhavedādau madhye saukhyaṃ dhanāgamaḥ.
separated_sandhi: nṛpa agni caura bhītiḥ ca putramitra virodhanamsthānabhraṃśaḥ bhavet ādau madhye saukhyam dhana āgamaḥ
english: There will also be fear from authorities, fire, and thieves, as well as hostility with one's children and friends. Loss of position will occur at the beginning (of the sub-period). In the middle (of the sub-period), however, there will be happiness and acquisition of wealth.

sanskrit: अन्ते तु राजभीतिः स्यात्स्थानभ्रंशोह्यथापिवा । द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु ह्यपमृत्युभयं भवेत् ॥४५॥
transliteration: ante tu rājabhītiḥ syātsthānabhraṃśohyathāpivā . dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu hyapamṛtyubhayaṃ bhavet.
separated_sandhi: ante tu rājabhītiḥ syāt sthānabhraṃśaḥ hi atha apivā dvitīya dyūna nāthe tu hi apamṛtyu bhayam bhavet
english: At the end (of the sub-period), there will be fear from authorities, or indeed a loss of position. If the lord of the second (house) or the seventh (house) is involved, there will certainly be fear of an untimely death.

sanskrit: गोदानं च प्रकुर्वीत मृत्युञ्जयजपं चरेत् । शङ्करस्य प्रसादेन ततः सुकह्मवाप्नुयात् ॥४६॥
transliteration: godānaṃ ca prakurvīta mṛtyuñjayajapaṃ caret . śaṅkarasya prasādena tataḥ sukahmavāpnuyāt.
separated_sandhi: godānam ca prakurvīta mṛtyuñjaya japam caretśaṅkarasya prasādena tataḥ sukham avāpnuyāt
english: One should perform the gift of a cow (dāna) and chant the Mṛtyuñjaya mantra (mantra). Then, by the grace of Śaṅkara, one will attain well-being.

sanskrit: बुधस्यान्तर्गते राहौ केन्द्रलाभत्रिकोणगे । कुलीरे कुम्भगे वापि कन्यायां वृषभेपि वा ॥४७॥
transliteration: budhasyāntargate rāhau kendralābhatrikoṇage . kulīre kumbhage vāpi kanyāyāṃ vṛṣabhepi vā.
separated_sandhi: budhasya antargate rāhau kendra lābha trikoṇagekulīre kumbhage vā api kanyāyām vṛṣabhe api vā
english: During the sub-period of Budha (Mercury), if Rāhu is situated in an angular house (kendra), an eleventh house (lābha), or a trinal house (trikoṇa) - specifically if it is in Cancer, Aquarius, Virgo, or Taurus - (certain astrological effects will manifest).

sanskrit: राजसम्मानकीर्तिं च धनं च प्रभविष्यति । पुण्यतीर्थस्थानलाभो देवतादर्शनं तथा ॥४८॥
transliteration: rājasammānakīrtiṃ ca dhanaṃ ca prabhaviṣyati . puṇyatīrthasthānalābho devatādarśanaṃ tathā.
separated_sandhi: rājasaṃmānakīrtim ca dhanam ca prabhaviṣyatipuṇyatīrthasthānalābhaḥ devatādarśanam tathā
english: One will attain royal honor, fame, and wealth. There will also be the benefit of visiting sacred pilgrimage sites and experiencing the vision of deities.

sanskrit: इष्तापूर्ते च महतो मानश्चाम्बरलाभकृत् । भुक्त्यादौ देहपीडा च त्वन्ते सौख्यं विनिर्दिशेत् ॥४९॥
transliteration: iṣtāpūrte ca mahato mānaścāmbaralābhakṛt . bhuktyādau dehapīḍā ca tvante saukhyaṃ vinirdiśet.
separated_sandhi: iṣṭāpūrte ca mahataḥ mānaḥ ca ambaralābhakṛtbhuktyādau dehapīḍā ca tu ante saukhyam vinirdiśet
english: There will be sacrifices (iṣṭa) and charitable acts (pūrta); from these great deeds, honor and the acquisition of clothing will result. In the beginning of the astrological period (bhukti), there will be bodily pain, but at its end, one should predict happiness.

sanskrit: लग्नाष्टव्ययराशिस्थे तद्भुक्तौ धननाशनम् । भुक्त्यादौ देहनाशश्च वातज्वरमजीर्णकृत् ॥५०॥
transliteration: lagnāṣṭavyayarāśisthe tadbhuktau dhananāśanam . bhuktyādau dehanāśaśca vātajvaramajīrṇakṛt.
separated_sandhi: lagnāṣṭavyayarāśisthe tat bhuktau dhananāśanambhuktyādau dehanāśaḥ ca vātajvaram ajīrṇakṛt
english: When (the planet is) situated in the first, eighth, or twelfth house (from the ascendant), during its sub-period (bhukti) there will be loss of wealth. In the initial part of this period, there will be physical destruction (death), causing fever due to imbalance of wind (vāta) and indigestion.

sanskrit: लग्नादुपचये राहौ शुभग्रहसमन्विते । राजसंलापसन्तोषो नूतनप्रभुदर्शनम् ॥५१॥
transliteration: lagnādupacaye rāhau śubhagrahasamanvite . rājasaṃlāpasantoṣo nūtanaprabhudarśanam.
separated_sandhi: lagnāt upacaye rāhau śubhagrahasamanviterājasaṃlāpasantosṣaḥ nūtanaprabhudarśanam
english: When Rāhu is situated in an Upacaya house (the 3rd, 6th, 10th, or 11th) from the ascendant, and is associated with benefic planets, there will be satisfaction from discussions with rulers and the sighting of a new lord or authority.

sanskrit: दायेशाद्द्वादशे वापि ह्यष्टमे पापसंयुते । निष्ठुरं राजकार्याणि स्थानभ्रंशो महद्भयम् ॥५२॥
transliteration: dāyeśāddvādaśe vāpi hyaṣṭame pāpasaṃyute . niṣṭhuraṃ rājakāryāṇi sthānabhraṃśo mahadbhayam.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt dvādaśe vā api hi aṣṭame pāpasaṃyuteniṣṭhuram rājakāryāṇi sthānabhraṃśaḥ mahat bhayam
english: When (a planet is) in the twelfth house from the lord of the Dasha (astrological period), or even in the eighth house, and is conjoined with a malefic planet, there will be harsh royal duties, loss of position, and great fear.

sanskrit: बन्धनं रोगपीडा च निजबन्धुमनोव्यथा । हृद्रोगो मानहानिश्च धनहानिर्भविष्यति ॥५३॥
transliteration: bandhanaṃ rogapīḍā ca nijabandhumanovyathā . hṛdrogo mānahāniśca dhanahānirbhaviṣyati.
separated_sandhi: bandhanam rogapīḍā ca nijabandhumanovyathāhṛdrogaḥ mānahāniḥ ca dhanahāniḥ bhaviṣyati
english: There will be imprisonment, affliction by disease, mental anguish for one's own relatives, heart disease, loss of honor, and loss of wealth.

sanskrit: द्वितीयसप्तमस्थे वा ह्यपमृत्युर्भविष्यति । तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं दुर्गालक्ष्मीजपं चरेत् ॥५४॥
transliteration: dvitīyasaptamasthe vā hyapamṛtyurbhaviṣyati . taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ durgālakṣmījapaṃ caret.
separated_sandhi: dvitīyasaptamasthe vā hi apamṛtyuḥ bhaviṣyatitat doṣa parihārārtham durgālakṣmījapam caret
english: If (a planet) is in the second or seventh (house), there will surely be an untimely death. To counteract this flaw, one should perform the chanting (japa) of Durgā and Lakṣmī.

sanskrit: श्वेतां गां महिषीं दद्यादायुआरोग्यदायिनीम् । जगदम्बाप्रसादेन ततः सुखमवाप्नुयात् ॥५५॥
transliteration: śvetāṃ gāṃ mahiṣīṃ dadyādāyuārogyadāyinīm . jagadambāprasādena tataḥ sukhamavāpnuyāt.
separated_sandhi: śvetām gām mahiṣīm dadyāt āyuārogyadāyinīmjagadambāprasādena tataḥ sukham avāpnuyāt
english: One should donate a white cow or buffalo that bestows long life and health. Thereafter, by the grace (prasāda) of Jagadambā, one will attain happiness.

sanskrit: बुधस्यान्तर्गते जीवे लग्नात्केन्द्रत्रिकोणगे । स्वोच्चे वा स्वर्क्षगे वापि लाभे वा धनराशिगे ॥५६॥
transliteration: budhasyāntargate jīve lagnātkendratrikoṇage . svocce vā svarkṣage vāpi lābhe vā dhanarāśige.
separated_sandhi: budhasya antargate jīve lagnāt kendratrikoṇagesvocce vā svarṣage vā api lābhe vā dhanarāśige
english: During the sub-period (antardasha) of Mercury, if Jupiter (Jīva) is located in a Kendra or Trikona house from the Ascendant (Lagna), or in its exaltation sign, or in its own sign, or even in the house of gain, or in the house of wealth...

sanskrit: देहसौख्यं धनावाप्ती राजप्रीतिस्तथैव च । विवाहोत्सवकार्याणि नित्यं मिष्ठान्नभोजनम् ॥५७॥
transliteration: dehasaukhyaṃ dhanāvāptī rājaprītistathaiva ca . vivāhotsavakāryāṇi nityaṃ miṣṭhānnabhojanam.
separated_sandhi: dehasaukhyam dhanāvāptiḥ rājaprītiḥ tathā evaca vivāhotsavakāryāṇi nityam miṣṭānnabhojanam
english: There will be bodily comfort, acquisition of wealth, royal favor, as well as activities like marriages and festivals, and constant consumption of sweet delicacies.

sanskrit: गोमहिष्यादिलाभश्च पुराणस्र्/अवणादिकम् । देवतागुरुभक्तिश्च दानधर्ममखादिकम् ॥५८॥
transliteration: gomahiṣyādilābhaśca purāṇasr/avaṇādikam . devatāgurubhaktiśca dānadharmamakhādikam.
separated_sandhi: gomahiṣyādilābhaḥ ca purāṇaśravaṇādikamdevatāgurubhaktiḥ ca dānadharmamakhādikam
english: There will be gain of cows, buffaloes, etc., and listening to ancient scriptures (purāṇa), etc. There will be devotion (bhakti) to deities and spiritual teachers (guru), and acts of charity (dāna), following natural law (dharma), and performing sacrifices, etc.

sanskrit: यज्ञकर्मप्रवृद्धिश्च शिवपूजाफलं तथा । नीचे वास्तंगते वापि षष्ठाष्टव्ययगेऽपि वा ॥५९॥
transliteration: yajñakarmapravṛddhiśca śivapūjāphalaṃ tathā . nīce vāstaṃgate vāpi ṣaṣṭhāṣṭavyayage'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: yajñakarmapravṛddhiḥ ca śivapūjāphalam tathānīce vā astamgate vā api ṣaṣṭhāṣṭavyayage api vā
english: There will also be an increase in sacrificial (yajña) activities (karma) and the benefits of Shiva worship. This applies even if a planet is debilitated, or has set, or is in the sixth, eighth, or twelfth house.

sanskrit: शन्यारदृष्टसंयुक्ते कलहो राजविग्रहः । चौरादिदेहपीडा च पितृमातृविनाश्नम् ॥६०॥
transliteration: śanyāradṛṣṭasaṃyukte kalaho rājavigrahaḥ . caurādidehapīḍā ca pitṛmātṛvināśnam.
separated_sandhi: śanyāradṛṣṭasaṃyukte kalahaḥ rājavigrahaḥcaurādidehapīḍā ca pitṛmātṛvināśnam
english: When a planet is conjoined with or aspected by Saturn (Śani) and Mars (Āra), there will be quarrels, conflicts with the government, physical suffering from thieves and other sources, and loss of parents.

sanskrit: मानहानि राजदण्डो धनहानिर्भविष्यति । विषाहिज्वरपीडा च कृषिभूमिविनाशनम् ॥६१॥
transliteration: mānahāni rājadaṇḍo dhanahānirbhaviṣyati . viṣāhijvarapīḍā ca kṛṣibhūmivināśanam.
separated_sandhi: mānahāniḥ rājadaṇḍaḥ dhanahāniḥ bhaviṣyativiṣāhijvarapīḍā ca kṛṣibhūmivināśanam
english: There will be loss of honor, royal punishment, and loss of wealth. There will also be suffering from poison, snakes, and fevers, along with the destruction of agriculture and land.

sanskrit: दयेशात्केन्द्रकोणे वा लाभे वा बलसंयुते । बन्धुपुत्रहृदुत्साहो शुभं च धनसंयुतम् ॥६२॥
transliteration: dayeśātkendrakoṇe vā lābhe vā balasaṃyute . bandhuputrahṛdutsāho śubhaṃ ca dhanasaṃyutam.
separated_sandhi: dayeśāt kendrakoṇe vā lābhe vā balasaṃyutebandhuputrahṛdutsāhaḥ śubham ca dhanasaṃyutam
english: If the lord of the seventh house is in a Kendra (angle) or Koṇa (trine) house, or in the eleventh house (Lābha), and is endowed with strength, there will be joy in the heart concerning relatives and sons, and it will be auspicious and accompanied by wealth.

sanskrit: पशुवृद्धिर्यशोवृद्धिरन्नदानादिकं फलम् । दायेशात्षष्ठरन्ध्रे वा व्यये वा बलवर्जिते ॥६३॥
transliteration: paśuvṛddhiryaśovṛddhirannadānādikaṃ phalam . dāyeśātṣaṣṭharandhre vā vyaye vā balavarjite.
separated_sandhi: paśuvṛddhiḥ yaśovṛddhiḥ annadānādikam phalam |dāyeśāt ṣaṣṭharandhre vā vyaye vā balavarjite
english: An increase in livestock, a rise in fame, and acts of charity like donating food are among the results. However, when the lord of the planetary period (daśā) is situated in the 6th, 8th (randhra), or 12th (vyaya) house, or is devoid of strength...

sanskrit: अङ्गतापश्च वैकल्यं देहबाधा भ्विष्यति । कलत्रबन्धुवैषम्यं राजकोपो धनक्षयः ॥६४॥
transliteration: aṅgatāpaśca vaikalyaṃ dehabādhā bhviṣyati . kalatrabandhuvaiṣamyaṃ rājakopo dhanakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: aṅgatāpaḥ ca vaikalyam dehabādhā bhaviṣyati |kalatrabandhu vaiṣamyam rājakopaḥ dhanakṣayaḥ
english: There will be fever or pain in the limbs, disability, and physical afflictions. There will also be discord with one's spouse and relatives, displeasure from the government or authorities, and loss of wealth.

sanskrit: अकस्मात्कलहाद्भीतिः प्रमादो द्विजतो भयम् । द्वितीयसप्तमस्थे वा देहबाधा भविष्यति ॥६५॥
transliteration: akasmātkalahādbhītiḥ pramādo dvijato bhayam . dvitīyasaptamasthe vā dehabādhā bhaviṣyati.
separated_sandhi: akasmāt kalahāt bhītiḥ pramādaḥ dvijataḥ bhayam| dvitīyasaptamasthe vā dehabādhā bhaviṣyati
english: There will be sudden fear due to quarrels, misfortune, and apprehension from a Brahmin or a learned person. Bodily afflictions will also occur if (the daśā lord is) situated in the 2nd or 7th house.

sanskrit: तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं शिवसाहस्रकं जपेत् । गोभूरिरण्यदानेन सर्वारिष्टं व्यपोहति ॥६६॥
transliteration: taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ śivasāhasrakaṃ japet . gobhūriraṇyadānena sarvāriṣṭaṃ vyapohati.
separated_sandhi: tat doṣaparihārārtham śivasāhasrakam japet| gobhūhiraṇyadānena sarva ariṣṭam vyapohati
english: To remedy these faults, one should chant the thousand names of Shiva (śivasāhasraka). By donating cows, land, and gold (dāna), one dispels all misfortunes.

sanskrit: सौम्यस्यान्तर्गते मन्दे स्वोच्चे स्वक्षेत्रकेन्द्रगे । त्रिकोणलाभगे वापि गृहे कल्याणवर्द्धनम् ॥६७॥
transliteration: saumyasyāntargate mande svocce svakṣetrakendrage . trikoṇalābhage vāpi gṛhe kalyāṇavarddhanam.
separated_sandhi: saumyasya antargate mande svocce svakṣetrakendrage| trikoṇalābhage vā api gṛhe kalyāṇavardhanam
english: When Saturn (manda) is in the sub-period (antardasha) of a benefic (saumya) planet, and Saturn is situated in its exaltation sign, or in its own sign, or in an angular (kendra) house, or in a trine (trikoṇa), or in a house of gain (lābha, 11th house) - then, prosperity and welfare will increase in that particular house.

sanskrit: राज्यलाभं महोत्साहंगृहं गोधनसंकुलम् ॥६८॥
transliteration: rājyalābhaṃ mahotsāhaṃgṛhaṃ godhanasaṃkulam.
separated_sandhi: rājyalābham mahā utsāhamgṛham godhanasaṅkulam
english: One may experience the acquisition of a kingdom, great enthusiasm, and a home abundant with cattle and wealth.

sanskrit: शुभस्थानफलवाप्तिं तीर्थवासं तथादिशेत् । अष्टमे वा व्यये मन्दे दायेशाद्वा तथैव च ॥६९॥
transliteration: śubhasthānaphalavāptiṃ tīrthavāsaṃ tathādiśet . aṣṭame vā vyaye mande dāyeśādvā tathaiva ca.
separated_sandhi: śubhasthānaphalavāptim tīrthavāsam tathā ādiśetaṣṭame vā vyaye mande dāyeśāt vā tathā eva ca
english: One should predict the attainment of auspicious results and residence in holy places. Conversely, if Saturn (manda) is in the eighth house or the twelfth house, or similarly due to the daśā lord...

sanskrit: अरातिदुःखबाहुल्यं दारपुत्रादिपीडनम् । बुद्धिभ्रंशो बन्धुनाशः कर्मनाशो मनोरुजः ॥७०॥
transliteration: arātiduḥkhabāhulyaṃ dāraputrādipīḍanam . buddhibhraṃśo bandhunāśaḥ karmanāśo manorujaḥ.
separated_sandhi: arātiduḥkhabāhulyam dāraputrādipīḍanambuddhibhraṃśaḥ bandhunāśaḥ karmanāśaḥ manorujaḥ
english: An abundance of suffering from enemies, affliction of one's wife and children, loss of intellect, destruction of relatives, loss of livelihood (karma), and mental distress.

sanskrit: विदेशगमनं चैव दुःस्वप्नादिप्रदर्शनम् । द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु ह्यपमृत्युर्भविष्यति ॥७१॥
transliteration: videśagamanaṃ caiva duḥsvapnādipradarśanam . dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu hyapamṛtyurbhaviṣyati.
separated_sandhi: videśagamanam ca eva duḥsvapnādipradarśanamdvitīyadyūnanāthe tu hi apamṛtyuḥ bhaviṣyati
english: Also, travel to foreign lands and seeing bad dreams, among other things. However, if the lord of the second house and the seventh house are involved, premature death will certainly occur.

sanskrit: तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं मृत्युञ्जयजपं चरेत् । कृष्णां गां महिषीं दद्यादायुरारोग्यवृद्धये ॥७२॥
transliteration: taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ mṛtyuñjayajapaṃ caret . kṛṣṇāṃ gāṃ mahiṣīṃ dadyādāyurārogyavṛddhaye.
separated_sandhi: tat doṣaparihārārtham mṛtyuñjayajapam caretkṛṣṇām gām mahiṣīm dadyāt āyuḥ ārogyavṛddhaye
english: To alleviate that defect, one should perform the Mṛtyuñjaya mantra (japa). Additionally, one should donate a black cow or a she-buffalo for the increase of longevity and health.

sanskrit: केन्द्रे त्रिकोणलाभे वा केतौ लग्नेशसंयुते । भाग्यकर्मसुसम्बन्धे वाहनेशसमन्विते ॥१॥
transliteration: kendre trikoṇalābhe vā ketau lagneśasaṃyute . bhāgyakarmasusambandhe vāhaneśasamanvite.
separated_sandhi: kendre trikoṇalābhe vā ketau lagneśasaṃyutebhāgyakarmasusambandhe vāhaneśasamannvite
english: When Ketu is in an angular house (kendra), a trine house (trikoṇa), or the house of gains (labha), and is conjoined with the lord of the Ascendant, and furthermore, is well-connected with the lords of the house of fortune (bhāgya) and the house of action (karma), and associated with the lord of conveyances (vāhana)...

sanskrit: तद्भुक्तौ धनधान्यादि चतुष्पाज्जीवलाभकृत् । पुत्रदारादिसौख्यं च राजप्रीतिमनोरुजः ॥२॥
transliteration: tadbhuktau dhanadhānyādi catuṣpājjīvalābhakṛt . putradārādisaukhyaṃ ca rājaprītimanorujaḥ.
separated_sandhi: tat bhuktau dhana dhānya ādi catuṣpāt jīva lābhakṛtputra dāra ādi saukhyam ca rāja prīti manorujaḥ
english: During its (Ketu's) planetary period (bhukti), there will be gains of wealth, grains, four-footed animals, happiness from children and spouse, royal favor, and mental ailments.

sanskrit: ग्रामभूम्यादिलाभश्च गृहं गोधनसंकुलम् । नीचास्तखेटसंयुक्ते ह्यष्टमे व्ययगेऽपि वा ॥३॥
transliteration: grāmabhūmyādilābhaśca gṛhaṃ godhanasaṃkulam . nīcāstakheṭasaṃyukte hyaṣṭame vyayage'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: grāma bhūmi ādi lābhaḥ ca gṛham go dhana saṃkulamnīca asta kheṭa saṃyukte hi aṣṭame vyayage api vā
english: There will also be acquisition of villages, lands, and so on, and a house filled with cattle wealth. However, if Ketu is conjoined with a debilitated or combust planet, or is located in the eighth house or even in the twelfth house (house of loss)...

sanskrit: हृद्रोगो मानहानिश्च धनधान्यपशुक्षयः । दारपुत्रादिपीडा च मनश्चांचल्यमेव च ॥४॥
transliteration: hṛdrogo mānahāniśca dhanadhānyapaśukṣayaḥ . dāraputrādipīḍā ca manaścāṃcalyameva ca.
separated_sandhi: hṛt rogaḥ māna hāniḥ ca dhana dhānya paśu kṣayaḥdāra putra ādi pīḍā ca manas cāñcalyam eva ca
english: During this period, one experiences heart disease, loss of honor, and the destruction of wealth, grains, and livestock. Furthermore, there will be suffering for one's spouse, children, and similar kin, along with significant mental agitation.

sanskrit: द्वितीयद्यूननाथेन सम्बन्धे तत्र संस्थिते । अनारोग्यं महत्कष्टमात्मबन्धुवियोगकृत् ॥५॥
transliteration: dvitīyadyūnanāthena sambandhe tatra saṃsthite . anārogyaṃ mahatkaṣṭamātmabandhuviyogakṛt.
separated_sandhi: dvitīya dyūna nāthena sambandhe tatra saṃsthiteanārogyam mahat kaṣṭam ātma bandhu viyoga kṛt
english: If Ketu, located in the eighth or twelfth house, is connected with the lord of the second house and the lord of the seventh house, it causes ill health, great suffering, and separation from one's own kinsmen.

sanskrit: दुर्गादेवीजपं कुर्यान्मृत्युञ्जयजपं चरेत् । एवं स्वान्तर्गते केतौ ततः सुखमवाप्नुयात् ॥६॥
transliteration: durgādevījapaṃ kuryānmṛtyuñjayajapaṃ caret . evaṃ svāntargate ketau tataḥ sukhamavāpnuyāt.
separated_sandhi: durgādevījapaṃ kuryāt mṛtyuñjayajapaṃ caretevaṃ svāntargate ketau tataḥ sukham avāpnuyāt
english: One should perform chanting (japa) to Durgā Devī and also chant (japa) the Mṛtyuñjaya mantra. By doing so, when Ketu is in its sub-period (antardasha), one will attain happiness.

sanskrit: केतोरन्तर्गते शुक्रे स्वोच्चे स्वक्षेत्रसंयुते । केन्द्रत्रिकोणलाभे वा राज्यनाथेन संयुते ॥७॥
transliteration: ketorantargate śukre svocce svakṣetrasaṃyute . kendratrikoṇalābhe vā rājyanāthena saṃyute.
separated_sandhi: ketoḥ antargate śukre svocce svakṣetrasaṃyutekendratrikoṇalābhe vā rājyanāthena saṃyute
english: When Venus (Śukra) is in Ketu's sub-period (antardasha), and is situated in its own sign (svakṣetra) or exaltation (svocca), or is connected to a kendra (angle), trikoṇa (trine), or labha (house of gain), or is associated with the lord of the kingdom.

sanskrit: राजप्रीतिं च सौभाग्यं दिशात्स्वाम्बरसंकुलम् । तत्काले श्रियमाप्नोति भाग्यकर्मेशसंयुते ॥८॥
transliteration: rājaprītiṃ ca saubhāgyaṃ diśātsvāmbarasaṃkulam . tatkāle śriyamāpnoti bhāgyakarmeśasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: rājaprītiṃ ca saubhāgyaṃ diśātsvāmbarasaṃkulamtatkāle śriyam āpnoti bhāgyakarmeśasaṃyute
english: One obtains royal favor and good fortune, accompanied by an abundance of one's own garments and wealth from all directions. At that time, one attains prosperity (śrī), especially when the lord of fortune (bhāgya) and actions (karma) is associated (with Venus).

sanskrit: नष्टराज्यधनप्राप्तिं सुखवाहनसुत्तमम् । सेतुस्नानादिकं चैव देवतादर्शनं महत् ॥९॥
transliteration: naṣṭarājyadhanaprāptiṃ sukhavāhanasuttamam . setusnānādikaṃ caiva devatādarśanaṃ mahat.
separated_sandhi: naṣṭarājyadhanaprāptiṃ sukhavāhanasuttamamsetusnānādikaṃ ca eva devatādarśanaṃ mahat
english: One attains the recovery of a lost kingdom and wealth, excellent happiness and conveyances, and bathing in sacred places like Setu (Rāmeśvaram), as well as a great vision of deities.

sanskrit: महाराजप्रसादेन ग्रामभूम्यादिलाभकृत् । दायेशात्केन्द्रकोणे वा दुश्चिक्ये लाभगेऽपि वा ॥१०॥
transliteration: mahārājaprasādena grāmabhūmyādilābhakṛt . dāyeśātkendrakoṇe vā duścikye lābhage'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: mahārājaprasādena grāmabhūmyādilābhakṛtdāyeśāt kendrakoṇe vā duścikye lābhage api vā
english: One gains villages, lands, and other benefits by the favor of a great king. This occurs if the lord of the Daśā (major planetary period) is in an angle (kendra) or trine (koṇa), or even in the third house (duścikya) or eleventh house (lābhaga).

sanskrit: देहारोग्यं शुभं चैव गृहे कल्याणशोभनम् । भोजनाम्बरभूषाप्तिरथदोलादिलाभकृत् ॥११॥
transliteration: dehārogyaṃ śubhaṃ caiva gṛhe kalyāṇaśobhanam . bhojanāmbarabhūṣāptirathadolādilābhakṛt.
separated_sandhi: deha-ārogyam śubham ca eva gṛhe kalyāṇa-śobhanambhojana-ambara-bhūṣā-āpti-ratha-dolā-ādi-lābha-kṛt
english: It causes bodily health and auspiciousness, as well as well-being and beauty in the home. It also brings about the gain of food, clothing, ornaments, vehicles, palanquins, and other such acquisitions.

sanskrit: दायेशाद्रिपुरन्ध्रस्थे व्यये वा पापसंयुते । अकस्मात्कलहं चैव पशुधान्यादिपीडनम् ॥१२॥
transliteration: dāyeśādripurandhrasthe vyaye vā pāpasaṃyute . akasmātkalahaṃ caiva paśudhānyādipīḍanam.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśa-adri-ripu-randhra-sthe vyaye vā pāpa-saṃyuteakasmāt kalaham ca eva paśu-dhānya-ādi-pīḍanam
english: When the lord of the planetary period (daśā) is situated in the 7th, 6th, or 8th house, or in the 12th house, and is conjoined with malefic planets, there will be sudden disputes, as well as affliction to cattle, grains, and similar possessions.

sanskrit: नीचस्थे खेटसंयुक्ते लग्नात्षष्ठाष्टराशिगे । स्वबन्धुजनवैषम्यं शिरोक्षिव्रणपीडनम् ॥१३॥
transliteration: nīcasthe kheṭasaṃyukte lagnātṣaṣṭhāṣṭarāśige . svabandhujanavaiṣamyaṃ śirokṣivraṇapīḍanam.
separated_sandhi: nīca-sthe kheṭa-saṃyukte lagnāt ṣaṣṭha-aṣṭa-rāśi-gesva-bandhu-jana-vaiṣamyam śiras akṣi vraṇa pīḍanam
english: When it (the planet) is debilitated (nīcastha), conjoined with another planet, and situated in the 6th or 8th house from the Ascendant (lagna), there will be discord among one's own relatives, as well as suffering from wounds to the head and eyes.

sanskrit: हृद्रोगं मानहानिं च धनधान्यपशुक्षयम् । कलत्रपुत्रपीडायाः सञ्चारं च समादिशेत् ॥१४॥
transliteration: hṛdrogaṃ mānahāniṃ ca dhanadhānyapaśukṣayam . kalatraputrapīḍāyāḥ sañcāraṃ ca samādiśet.
separated_sandhi: hṛd-rogam māna-hānim ca dhana-dhānya-paśu-kṣayamkalatra-putra-pīḍāyāḥ sañcāram ca sam-ādiśet
english: One should predict heart disease, loss of honor, and the destruction of wealth, grains, and cattle, as well as the onset of troubles for one's spouse and children.

sanskrit: द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु देहजाड्यं मनोरुजम् । तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं दुर्गादेवीजपं चरेत् । श्वेतां गां महिषीं दद्यादायुआरोग्यवृद्धये ॥१५॥
transliteration: dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu dehajāḍyaṃ manorujam . taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ durgādevījapaṃ caret . śvetāṃ gāṃ mahiṣīṃ dadyādāyuārogyavṛddhaye.
separated_sandhi: dvitīya dyūna-nāthe tu deha-jāḍyammanas-rujam tat-doṣa-parihāra-arthamdurgā-devī-japam caret śvetām gāmmahiṣīm dadyāt āyus ārogya vṛddhaye
english: But when the lord of the 7th house (dyūna) is in the 2nd house (dvitīya), there will be physical inertia and mental illness. For the removal of these defects, one should perform the chanting (japa) of Durgā Devi. One should donate a white cow and a buffalo for the increase of longevity and health.

sanskrit: केतोरन्तर्गते सूर्ये स्वोच्चे स्वक्षेत्रगेऽपि वा । केन्द्रत्रिकोणलाभे वा शुभयुक्तनिरीक्षिते ॥१६॥
transliteration: ketorantargate sūrye svocce svakṣetrage'pi vā . kendratrikoṇalābhe vā śubhayuktanirīkṣite.
separated_sandhi: ketoh antargate sūrye svocce svakṣetrage apivā kendratrikoṇalābhe vā śubhayuktanirīkṣite
english: During the sub-period of the Sun within Ketu's major period, if the Sun is situated in its own sign of exaltation, its own sign, or in a Kendra (angular), Trikona (trine), or Labha (eleventh) house, and is either conjoined with or aspected by benefics.

sanskrit: धनधान्यादिलाभश्च राजानुग्रहवैभवम् । अनेकशुभकार्याणि चेष्टसिद्धिः सुखावहा ॥१७॥
transliteration: dhanadhānyādilābhaśca rājānugrahavaibhavam . anekaśubhakāryāṇi ceṣṭasiddhiḥ sukhāvahā.
separated_sandhi: dhana-dhānya-ādi-lābhaḥ ca rājānugraha-vaibhavamaneka-śubhakāryāṇi ceṣṭa-siddhiḥ sukhāvahā
english: Then there will be gains of wealth, grains, and other resources, as well as royal favor and prosperity. Many auspicious activities will occur, and the fulfillment of desires will bring happiness.

sanskrit: अष्टमव्ययराशिस्थे पापग्रहसमन्विते । तद्भुक्तौ राजभीतिश्च पितृमातृवियोगकृत् ॥१८॥
transliteration: aṣṭamavyayarāśisthe pāpagrahasamanvite . tadbhuktau rājabhītiśca pitṛmātṛviyogakṛt.
separated_sandhi: aṣṭama-vyaya-rāśi-sthe pāpa-graha-samanvitetat-bhuktau rāja-bhītiḥ ca pitṛ-mātṛ-viyoga-kṛt
english: However, if the Sun is located in the eighth or twelfth house and is conjoined with malefic planets during that sub-period, there will be fear from the government, and it will cause separation from one's father and mother.

sanskrit: विदेशगमनं चैव चौराहिविषपीडनम् । राजमित्रविरोधश्च राजदण्डाद्धनक्षयः ॥१९॥
transliteration: videśagamanaṃ caiva caurāhiviṣapīḍanam . rājamitravirodhaśca rājadaṇḍāddhanakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: videśa-gamanam ca eva caura-ahi-viṣa-pīḍanamrāja-mitra-virodhaḥ ca rāja-daṇḍāt dhana-kṣayaḥ
english: There will also be foreign travel, affliction by thieves, snakes, or poison, and conflict with royal associates. Furthermore, there will be loss of wealth due to royal punishment or fines.

sanskrit: शोकरोगभयं चैव उष्णाधिक्यं ज्वरो भवेत् । दायेशात्लेन्द्रकोणे वा लाभे वा धनसंस्थिते ॥२०॥
transliteration: śokarogabhayaṃ caiva uṣṇādhikyaṃ jvaro bhavet . dāyeśātlendrakoṇe vā lābhe vā dhanasaṃsthite.
separated_sandhi: śoka-roga-bhayam ca eva uṣṇa-ādhikyam jvaraḥ bhavetdāyeśāt kendra-koṇe vā lābhe vā dhana-saṃsthite
english: Sorrow, disease, fear, excessive heat, and fever will occur. When the (sub-period) lord is situated in an angular (kendra) or trine (koṇa) house, or in the eleventh (lābha) house, or in the house of wealth (dhana, 2nd house) from the Daśā lord (Ketu).

sanskrit: देहसौख्यं चार्थलाभ0 पुत्रलाभो मनोदृढम् । सर्वकार्यार्थसिद्धिः स्यात्स्वल्पग्रामाधिपत्ययुक् ॥२१॥
transliteration: dehasaukhyaṃ cārthalābha0 putralābho manodṛḍham . sarvakāryārthasiddhiḥ syātsvalpagrāmādhipatyayuk.
separated_sandhi: dehasaukhyam ca arthalābhaḥ putralābhaḥ manodṛḍhamsarvakāryārthasiddhiḥ syāt svalpagramādhipatyayuk
english: One will experience bodily comfort, gain of wealth, the birth of sons, a strong mind, and the accomplishment of all desired goals, along with the lordship over a small village.

sanskrit: दायेशाद्रन्ध्ररिःफे वा स्थिते वा पापसंयुते । अन्नविघ्नो मनोबीतिर्धनधान्यपशुक्षयः ॥२२॥
transliteration: dāyeśādrandhrariḥphe vā sthite vā pāpasaṃyute . annavighno manobītirdhanadhānyapaśukṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt randhrariḥphe vā sthite vā pāpasaṃyuteannavighnaḥ manobītiḥ dhanadhānyapaśukṣayaḥ
english: If the lord of the daśā is situated in the eighth or twelfth house, or is associated with malefic planets, there will be obstacles concerning food, mental anguish, and loss of wealth, grain, and cattle.

sanskrit: आदौ मध्ये महाक्लेशानन्ते सौख्यं विनिर्दिशेत् । द्वितीयसप्तमाधीशे ह्यपमृत्युर्भविष्यति ॥२३॥
transliteration: ādau madhye mahākleśānante saukhyaṃ vinirdiśet . dvitīyasaptamādhīśe hyapamṛtyurbhaviṣyati.
separated_sandhi: ādau madhye mahākleśān ante saukhyam vinirdiśetdvitīyasaptamādhīśe hi apamṛtyuḥ bhaviṣyati
english: One should predict great afflictions in the beginning and middle, and happiness in the end. However, if the lord of the second and seventh houses is [afflicted], an unnatural death will certainly occur.

sanskrit: तस्य शान्तिं प्रकुर्वीत स्वर्णं धेनुं प्रदापयेत् । भास्करस्य प्रसादेन ततः सुखमवाप्नुयात् ॥२४॥
transliteration: tasya śāntiṃ prakurvīta svarṇaṃ dhenuṃ pradāpayet . bhāskarasya prasādena tataḥ sukhamavāpnuyāt.
separated_sandhi: tasya śāntiṃ prakurvīta svarṇaṃ dhenuṃ pradāpayetbhāskarasya prasādena tataḥ sukham avāpnuyāt
english: One should perform remedies for this [condition] and donate gold and a cow. By the grace of the Sun (bhāskara), one will then obtain happiness.

sanskrit: केतोरन्तर्गते चन्द्रे स्वोच्चे स्वक्षेत्रगेऽपि वा । केन्द्रत्रिकोणलाभे वा धने शुभसमन्विते ॥२५॥
transliteration: ketorantargate candre svocce svakṣetrage'pi vā . kendratrikoṇalābhe vā dhane śubhasamanvite.
separated_sandhi: ketoḥ antargate candre svocce svakṣetrage apivā kendratrikoṇalābhe vā dhane śubhasamanvite
english: When the Moon (candra) is within Ketu's period (daśā), and is situated in its sign of exaltation, or in its own sign, or even in a quadrant, trine, or house of gain, or in the house of wealth (the second house), and is associated with benefic planets...

sanskrit: राजप्रीतिर्महोत्साहः कल्याणं च महत्सुखम् । महाराजप्रसादेन गृहभूम्यादिलाभकृत् ॥२६॥
transliteration: rājaprītirmahotsāhaḥ kalyāṇaṃ ca mahatsukham . mahārājaprasādena gṛhabhūmyādilābhakṛt.
separated_sandhi: rājaprītiḥ mahotsāhaḥ kalyāṇam ca mahatsukhammahārājaprasādena gṛhabhūmyādilābhakṛt
english: Royal favor, great enthusiasm, well-being, and immense happiness, as well as the acquisition of houses, lands, and similar possessions, are brought about through the grace of a great king.

sanskrit: भोजनाम्बरपश्वादिव्यवसायेऽधिकं फलम् । अश्ववाहनलाभश्च वस्त्रभरणभूषणम् ॥२७॥
transliteration: bhojanāmbarapaśvādivyavasāye'dhikaṃ phalam . aśvavāhanalābhaśca vastrabharaṇabhūṣaṇam.
separated_sandhi: bhojanāmbarapaśvādivyavasāye adhikam phalamaśvavāhanalābhaḥ ca vastrabharaṇabhūṣaṇam
english: There is significant profit in businesses related to food, clothing, animals, and so forth. Also, there is the gain of horses and vehicles, along with clothes, ornaments, and decorations.

sanskrit: देवालयतडागादिपुण्यधर्मादिसङ्ग्रहम् । पुत्रदारादिसौख्यं च पूर्णचन्द्रः प्रयच्छति ॥२८॥
transliteration: devālayataḍāgādipuṇyadharmādisaṅgraham . putradārādisaukhyaṃ ca pūrṇacandraḥ prayacchati.
separated_sandhi: devālayataḍāgādipuṇyadharmādisaṅgrahamputradārādisaukhyam ca pūrṇacandraḥ prayacchati
english: The full moon bestows the accumulation of merit (puṇya) and righteous deeds (dharma) from activities like building temples and ponds, as well as happiness from sons, wives, and similar family relationships.

sanskrit: क्षीणे वा नीचगे चन्द्रे षष्ठाष्टमव्ययराशिगे । आत्मसौख्यं मनस्तापं कार्यविघ्नं महद्भयम् ॥२९॥
transliteration: kṣīṇe vā nīcage candre ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyayarāśige . ātmasaukhyaṃ manastāpaṃ kāryavighnaṃ mahadbhayam.
separated_sandhi: kṣīṇe vā nīcage candre ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyayarāśigeātmasaukhyam manastāpam kāryavighnam mahatbhayam
english: When the moon is waning or debilitated, or situated in the sixth, eighth, or twelfth house (rāśi), there is a lack of self-comfort, mental distress, obstacles in work, and great fear.

sanskrit: पितृमातृवियोगं च देहजाड्यं मनोव्यथाम् । व्यवसायात्फलं कष्टं पशुनाशं भयं वदेत् ॥३०॥
transliteration: pitṛmātṛviyogaṃ ca dehajāḍyaṃ manovyathām . vyavasāyātphalaṃ kaṣṭaṃ paśunāśaṃ bhayaṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: pitṛmātṛviyogam ca dehajāḍyam manovyathāmvyavasāyāt phalam kaṣṭam paśunāśam bhayam vadet
english: One experiences separation from father and mother, bodily illness, and mental anguish. Troublesome outcomes from business, loss of animals, and fear are also predicted.

sanskrit: दायेशात्केन्द्रकोणे वा लाभे वा बलसंयुते । कृषिगोभूमिलाभं च इष्टबन्धुसमागमम् ॥३१॥
transliteration: dāyeśātkendrakoṇe vā lābhe vā balasaṃyute . kṛṣigobhūmilābhaṃ ca iṣṭabandhusamāgamam.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt kendrakoṇe vā lābhe vā balasamyutekṛṣigobhūmilābham ca iṣṭabandhusamāgamam
english: When the lord of the planetary period (daśā) is strong and situated in an angular (kendra), trinal (koṇa), or gain (lābha) house, there will be gains from agriculture, cattle, and land, and a reunion with dear relatives.

sanskrit: तस्मात्स्वकार्यसिद्धिं च गृहे गोक्षीरमेव च । भुक्त्यादौ शुभमारोग्यं मध्ये राजप्रियं शुभम् ॥३२॥
transliteration: tasmātsvakāryasiddhiṃ ca gṛhe gokṣīrameva ca . bhuktyādau śubhamārogyaṃ madhye rājapriyaṃ śubham.
separated_sandhi: tasmāt svakāryasiddhim ca gṛhe gokṣīram eva cabhuktyādau śubham ārogyam madhye rājapriyam śubham
english: Consequently, there will be success in one's own undertakings and an abundance of cow's milk in the home. At the beginning of the sub-period, there will be auspiciousness and good health; in the middle, auspicious favor from the government.

sanskrit: अन्ते तु राजभीतिं च विदेशगमनं तथा । दूरयात्रादिसञ्चारं सम्बन्धिजनपूजनम् ॥३३॥
transliteration: ante tu rājabhītiṃ ca videśagamanaṃ tathā . dūrayātrādisañcāraṃ sambandhijanapūjanam.
separated_sandhi: ante tu rājabhītim ca videśagamanam tathādūrayātrādisañcāram sambandhijanapūjanam
english: However, at the end (of the sub-period), there will be fear from the government, as well as travel to foreign lands, movement involving long journeys, and the honoring of relatives.

sanskrit: दायेशात्षष्ठरिःफे वा रन्ध्रे वा बलवर्जिते । धनधान्यादिहानिश्च मनोव्यात्कुलमेव च ॥३४॥
transliteration: dāyeśātṣaṣṭhariḥphe vā randhre vā balavarjite . dhanadhānyādihāniśca manovyātkulameva ca.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt ṣaṣṭhariḥphe vā randhre vā balavarjitedhanadhānyādihāniḥ ca manovyākulam eva ca
english: If the lord of the planetary period (daśā) is weak and located in the sixth, twelfth, or eighth house, there will be a loss of wealth, grains, and other possessions, along with mental distress.

sanskrit: स्वबन्धुजनवैरं च भ्रातृपीडा तथैव च । निधनाधिपदोषेण द्विसप्तपतिसंयुते ॥३५॥
transliteration: svabandhujanavairaṃ ca bhrātṛpīḍā tathaiva ca . nidhanādhipadoṣeṇa dvisaptapatisaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: svabandhujanavairam ca bhrātṛpīḍā tathā evaca nidhanādhipadoṣeṇa dvisaptapatisaṃyute
english: There will also be enmity with one's own relatives and trouble to siblings. This particularly occurs due to the affliction caused by the lord of the eighth house, when it is associated with the lords of the second and seventh houses.

sanskrit: अपमृत्युभयं तस्य शान्तिं कुर्याद्यथाविधि । चन्द्रप्रीतिकरीं चैव ह्यायुरारोग्यसिद्धये ॥३६॥
transliteration: apamṛtyubhayaṃ tasya śāntiṃ kuryādyathāvidhi . candraprītikarīṃ caiva hyāyurārogyasiddhaye.
separated_sandhi: apamṛtyubhayam tasya śāntim kuryāt yathāvidhicandraprītikarīm ca eva hi āyurārogyasiddhaye
english: To avert the fear of untimely death for that person, one should perform propitiatory rites according to the prescribed method. These rites should also be performed to please the Moon, for the attainment of longevity and health.

sanskrit: केतोरन्तर्गते भौमे लग्नात्केन्द्रत्रिकोणगे । स्वोच्चे स्वक्षेत्रगे वाऽपि शुभग्रहयुतेक्षिते ॥३७॥
transliteration: ketorantargate bhaume lagnātkendratrikoṇage . svocce svakṣetrage vā'pi śubhagrahayutekṣite.
separated_sandhi: ketoḥ antargate bhaume lagnāt kendratrikoṇagesvocce svakṣetrage vā api śubhagrahayutekṣite
english: When Mars is in Ketu's sub-period, and Mars is located in an angular or trine house from the Ascendant, or it is in its own exaltation sign or its own sign, or it is conjoined with or aspected by benefic planets.

sanskrit: आदौ शुभफलं चैव ग्रामभूम्यादिलाभकृत् । धनधान्यादिलाभश्च चतुष्पाज्जीवलाभकृत् ॥३८॥
transliteration: ādau śubhaphalaṃ caiva grāmabhūmyādilābhakṛt . dhanadhānyādilābhaśca catuṣpājjīvalābhakṛt.
separated_sandhi: ādau śubhaphalam ca eva grāmabhūmyādilābhakṛtdhanadhānyādilābhaḥ ca catuṣpājjīvalābhakṛt
english: First, there will be auspicious results, specifically the acquisition of villages, lands, and similar assets. There will also be gains of wealth and grains, along with the acquisition of quadrupeds and other living creatures.

sanskrit: गृगारामक्षेत्रलाभो राजानुग्रहवैभवम् । भाग्ये कर्मेशसम्बन्धे भूलाभः सौख्यमेव च ॥३९॥
transliteration: gṛgārāmakṣetralābho rājānugrahavaibhavam . bhāgye karmeśasambandhe bhūlābhaḥ saukhyameva ca.
separated_sandhi: gṛgārāmakṣetralābhaḥ rājānugrahavibhavam bhāgyekarmeśasambandhe bhūlābhaḥ saukhyam eva ca
english: There will be gains of houses, gardens, and fields, along with royal favor and splendor. When there is a connection between the lord of the tenth house and the ninth house, there will be gains of land and indeed, happiness.

sanskrit: दायेशात्केन्द्रकोणे वा दुश्चिक्ये लाभगेऽपि वा । राजप्रीतियशोलाभः पुत्रमित्रादिसौख्यकृत् ॥४०॥
transliteration: dāyeśātkendrakoṇe vā duścikye lābhage'pi vā . rājaprītiyaśolābhaḥ putramitrādisaukhyakṛt.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt kendrakoṇe vā duścikye lābhage api vārājaprītiyaśolābhaḥ putramitrādisaukhyakṛt
english: When (Mars is situated) in an angular or trine house from the Daśā lord, or even in the 3rd house or the 11th house, there will be gains of royal favor and fame, and it will bring happiness from sons, friends, and similar relations.

sanskrit: तथाऽष्टमव्यये भौमे दायेशाद्धनगेऽपि वा । द्रुतं करोति मरणं विदेशे चापदं भ्रमम् ॥४१॥
transliteration: tathā'ṣṭamavyaye bhaume dāyeśāddhanage'pi vā . drutaṃ karoti maraṇaṃ videśe cāpadaṃ bhramam.
separated_sandhi: tathā aṣṭama-vyaye bhaume dāyeśāt dhana-ge api vā| drutaṃ karoti maraṇaṃ videśe ca āpadam bhramam
english: Similarly, when Mars is situated in the eighth or twelfth house, or in the second house from the lord of the seventh house, it quickly causes death, as well as calamity and wandering in foreign lands.

sanskrit: प्रमेहमूत्रकृच्छ्रादिचौरादिनृपपीडनम् । कलहादि व्यथायुक्तं किञ्चित्सुखविवर्द्धनम् ॥४२॥
transliteration: pramehamūtrakṛcchrādicaurādinṛpapīḍanam . kalahādi vyathāyuktaṃ kiñcitsukhavivarddhanam.
separated_sandhi: prameha-mūtra-kṛcchra-ādi-caura-ādi-nṛpa-pīḍanam |kalaha-ādi vyathā-yuktaṃ kiñcit-sukha-vivarddhanam
english: (It causes) diseases like diabetes and dysuria, oppression by thieves and kings, quarrels, and is associated with suffering, though with a slight increase in happiness.

sanskrit: द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु तापज्वरविषाद्भयम् । दारपीडा मनःक्लेशमपमृत्युभयं भवेत् ॥४३॥
