transliteration: dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu tāpajvaraviṣādbhayam . dārapīḍā manaḥkleśamapamṛtyubhayaṃ bhavet.
separated_sandhi: dvitīya-dyūna-nāthe tu tāpa-jvara-viṣāt bhayam| dāra-pīḍā manaḥ-kleśam apamṛtyu-bhayam bhavet
english: However, when the lord of the second and seventh houses is afflicted, there will be fear from fevers and poison, suffering to the spouse, mental distress, and fear of untimely death.

sanskrit: अण्ड्वाहं प्रदद्यात्तु सर्वसम्पत्सुखावहम् । ततः शान्तिमवाप्नोति भौमग्रहप्रसादतः ॥४४॥
transliteration: aṇḍvāhaṃ pradadyāttu sarvasampatsukhāvaham . tataḥ śāntimavāpnoti bhaumagrahaprasādataḥ.
separated_sandhi: aṇḍvāham pradadyāt tu sarva-sampat-sukha-āvaham| tataḥ śāntim avāpnoti bhauma-graha-prasādataḥ
english: One should offer a bull, which brings all prosperity and happiness. Thereafter, one attains peace by the grace (prasāda) of the planet Mars.

sanskrit: केतोरन्तर्गते राहौ स्वोच्चे मित्रस्वराशिगे । केन्द्रत्रिकोणे लाभे वा दुश्चिक्ये धनसंज्ञके ॥४५॥
transliteration: ketorantargate rāhau svocce mitrasvarāśige . kendratrikoṇe lābhe vā duścikye dhanasaṃjñake.
separated_sandhi: ketoḥ antargate rāhau sva-ucce mitra-sva-rāśi-ge| kendra-trikoṇe lābhe vā duścikye dhana-saṃjñake
english: When Rahu's sub-period (antargata) is running within Ketu's major period, and Rahu is located in its own sign of exaltation, or in a friendly sign, or its own sign, or in an angular (kendra) house, a trine (trikoṇa) house, the eleventh house (lābha), the third house (duścikkya), or the second house (dhana)...

sanskrit: तत्काले धनलाभः स्यात्सञ्चारो भवति ध्रुवम् । म्लेच्छप्रभुवशात्सौख्यं धन्धान्यफलादिकम् ॥४६॥
transliteration: tatkāle dhanalābhaḥ syātsañcāro bhavati dhruvam . mlecchaprabhuvaśātsaukhyaṃ dhandhānyaphalādikam.
separated_sandhi: tatkāle dhanalābhaḥ syāt sañcāraḥ bhavati dhruvam| mlecchaprabhuvashāt saukhyam dhandhānyaphalādikam
english: At that time, there will certainly be a gain of wealth and journeys. Happiness and the acquisition of grain, wealth, and similar benefits will come due to the influence of foreign rulers.

sanskrit: चतुष्पाज्जीवलाभः स्याद्ग्रामभूम्यादिलाभकृत् । भुक्त्यादौ क्लेशमाप्नोति मध्यान्ते सौख्यमाप्नुयात् ॥४७॥
transliteration: catuṣpājjīvalābhaḥ syādgrāmabhūmyādilābhakṛt . bhuktyādau kleśamāpnoti madhyānte saukhyamāpnuyāt.
separated_sandhi: catuṣpāt jīvalābhaḥ syāt grāmabhūmyādilābhakṛt |bhuktyādau kleśam āpnoti madhyānte saukhyam āpnuyāt
english: There will be a gain of four-footed animals and acquisition of villages, land, and similar assets. One experiences trouble at the beginning of enjoyment, but obtains happiness in the middle and at the end.

sanskrit: रन्ध्रे वा व्ययगे राहौ पापसंदृष्टसंयुते । बहुमूत्रं कृशं दीहं शीतज्वरविषाद्भयम् ॥४८॥
transliteration: randhre vā vyayage rāhau pāpasaṃdṛṣṭasaṃyute . bahumūtraṃ kṛśaṃ dīhaṃ śītajvaraviṣādbhayam.
separated_sandhi: randhre vā vyayage rāhau pāpasaṃdṛṣṭasaṃyute| bahumūtram kṛśam dīham śītajvaraviṣāt bhayam
english: If Rahu is in the eighth house (randhra) or the twelfth house (vyaya) and is conjoined or aspected by malefic planets, there will be excessive urination, emaciation, debility, and fear from cold fevers and poison.

sanskrit: चातुर्थिकज्वरं चैव क्षुद्रोपद्रवपीडनम् । अकस्मात्कलहं चैव प्रमेहं शूलमादिशेत् ॥४९॥
transliteration: cāturthikajvaraṃ caiva kṣudropadravapīḍanam . akasmātkalahaṃ caiva pramehaṃ śūlamādiśet.
separated_sandhi: cāturthikajvaram ca eva kṣudropadravapīḍanam| akasmāt kalaham ca eva prameham śūlam ādiśet
english: One should also predict quartan fever, affliction by minor troubles, sudden quarrels, diabetes, and colic.

sanskrit: द्वितीयसप्तमस्थे वा तदा क्लेशं महद्भयम् । तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं दुर्गादेवीजपं चरेत् ॥५०॥
transliteration: dvitīyasaptamasthe vā tadā kleśaṃ mahadbhayam . taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ durgādevījapaṃ caret.
separated_sandhi: dvitīyasaptamasthe vā tadā kleśam mahat bhayam| taddoṣaparihārārtham durgādevījapam caret
english: Or, if it (Rahu, implicitly from the previous verse) is in the second or seventh house, then there will be trouble and great fear. To remedy this affliction, one should perform the chanting (japa) of Goddess Durga.

sanskrit: केतोरन्तर्गते जीवे कन्द्रे लाभे त्रिकोणगे । स्वोच्चे स्वक्षेत्रगे वापि लग्नाधिपसमन्विते ॥५१॥
transliteration: ketorantargate jīve kandre lābhe trikoṇage . svocce svakṣetrage vāpi lagnādhipasamanvite.
separated_sandhi: ketuḥ antargate jīve kandre lābhe trikoṇagesvocce svakṣetrage vā api lagnādhipasamanvite
english: When Jupiter (jīva) is located within Ketu's sub-period (antardaśā), and Jupiter is situated in a quadrant (kendra), a house of gain (lābha), or a trine (trikoṇa), or in its exaltation sign, or in its own sign, or conjoined with the lord of the Ascendant...

sanskrit: कर्मभाग्याधिपैर्युक्ते धनधान्यार्थसम्पदम् । राजप्रीतिं तदोत्साहमश्वांदोल्यादिकं दिशेत् ॥५२॥
transliteration: karmabhāgyādhipairyukte dhanadhānyārthasampadam . rājaprītiṃ tadotsāhamaśvāṃdolyādikaṃ diśet.
separated_sandhi: karmabhāgyādhipaiḥ yukte dhanadhānyārthasampadamrājaprītim tadā utsāham aśvāndolyādikam diśet
english: If (Jupiter is) conjoined with the lords of the 10th house (karma) and 9th house (bhāgya), then it indicates the acquisition of wealth, grains, and other riches, royal favor, enthusiasm, and conveyances like horses and palanquins.

sanskrit: गृहे कल्याणसम्पत्तिं पुत्रलाभं महोत्सवहम् । पुण्यतीर्थं महोत्साहं सत्कर्म च सुखावहम् ॥५३॥
transliteration: gṛhe kalyāṇasampattiṃ putralābhaṃ mahotsavaham . puṇyatīrthaṃ mahotsāhaṃ satkarma ca sukhāvaham.
separated_sandhi: gṛhe kalyāṇasampattim putralābham mahotsavahampuṇyatīrtham mahotsāham sat karma ca sukhāvaham
english: It indicates prosperity and auspiciousness in the home, the birth of children (putralābha), great festivities, meritorious pilgrimages (puṇyatīrtha), immense enthusiasm, and virtuous actions (sat karma) that bring happiness.

sanskrit: इष्टदेवप्रसादेन विजयं कार्यलाभकृत् । राजसंल्लापकार्याणि नूतनप्रभुदर्शनम् ॥५४॥
transliteration: iṣṭadevaprasādena vijayaṃ kāryalābhakṛt . rājasaṃllāpakāryāṇi nūtanaprabhudarśanam.
separated_sandhi: iṣṭadevaprāsādena vijayam kāryalābhākṛtrājasaṃllāpakāryāṇi nūtanaprabhudarśanam
english: By the grace of one's chosen deity (iṣṭadeva), there will be victory and success in undertakings. It also indicates royal discussions and engagements, as well as the meeting of new rulers or important persons.

sanskrit: षष्ठाष्टमव्यये जीवे दायेशान्नीचगेऽपि वा । चौराहिव्रणभीतिं च धनधान्यादिनाशनम् ॥५५॥
transliteration: ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyaye jīve dāyeśānnīcage'pi vā . caurāhivraṇabhītiṃ ca dhanadhānyādināśanam.
separated_sandhi: ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyaye jīve dāyeśāt nīcage api vācaurāhivraṇabhītim ca dhanadhānyādināśanam
english: However, if Jupiter (jīva) is situated in the 6th, 8th, or 12th house, or if it is debilitated in relation to the dasha lord, then there will be fear from thieves, snakes, and wounds, along with the loss of wealth, grains, and other possessions.

sanskrit: पुत्रदारावियोगं च त्वतीवक्लेशसम्भवम् । आदौ सुभफलं चैव अन्ते क्लेशकरं वदेत् ॥५६॥
transliteration: putradārāviyogaṃ ca tvatīvakleśasambhavam . ādau subhaphalaṃ caiva ante kleśakaraṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: putradārāviyogam ca tu atīvakleśasaṃbhavamādau subhaphalam ca eva ante kleśakaram vadet
english: One should predict separation from children and wife, which will be very distress-causing. Initially, there will be auspicious results, but ultimately, it will bring distress.

sanskrit: दायेशात्केन्द्रकोणे वा दुश्चिक्ये लाभगेऽपि वा । शुभयुक्ते नृपप्रीतिर्विचित्राम्बरभूषणम् ॥५७॥
transliteration: dāyeśātkendrakoṇe vā duścikye lābhage'pi vā . śubhayukte nṛpaprītirvicitrāmbarabhūṣaṇam.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt kendrakoṇe vā duścikye lābhage apivā śubhayukte nṛpapītiḥ vicitrāmbarabhūṣaṇam
english: If the lord of the planetary period (daśā-pati) is in an angle (kendra) or a trine (koṇa), or in the 3rd house, or also in the 11th house, and is associated with benefics, then there will be royal favor and various clothes and ornaments.

sanskrit: दूरदेशप्रयाणं च स्वबन्धुजनपोषणम् । भोजनाम्बरपश्वादि भुक्त्यादौ देहपीडनम् ॥५८॥
transliteration: dūradeśaprayāṇaṃ ca svabandhujanapoṣaṇam . bhojanāmbarapaśvādi bhuktyādau dehapīḍanam.
separated_sandhi: dūradeśaprayāṇam ca svabandhujanapoṣaṇambhojanāmbarapaśuādi bhuktiādau dehapīḍanam
english: There will be journeys to distant lands and the maintenance of one's own relatives. At the beginning of the sub-period (bhukti), there will be enjoyment of food, clothes, animals, etc., but also bodily suffering.

sanskrit: अन्ते तु स्थानचलनमकस्मात्कलहो भवेत् । द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु ह्यपमृत्युर्भविष्यति ॥५९॥
transliteration: ante tu sthānacalanamakasmātkalaho bhavet . dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu hyapamṛtyurbhaviṣyati.
separated_sandhi: ante tu sthānacalanam akasmāt kalahaḥ bhavetdvitīyadyūnanāthe tu hi apamṛtyuḥ bhaviṣyati
english: At the end (of the period), there will be a change of residence and sudden quarrels. However, if the lord of the second and seventh houses is involved, there will certainly be an untimely death.

sanskrit: तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं शिवसाहस्रकं जपेत् । महामृत्युञ्जयं जाप्यं सर्वोपद्रवनाशनम् ॥६०॥
transliteration: taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ śivasāhasrakaṃ japet . mahāmṛtyuñjayaṃ jāpyaṃ sarvopadravanāśanam.
separated_sandhi: taddoṣaparihārārtham śivasāhasrakam japetmahāmṛtyuñjayam jāpyam sarvopadravanāśanam
english: To alleviate that affliction, one should chant the thousand names of Shiva (Śiva-Sāhasrakam). The Mahāmṛtyuñjaya (mantra) is also to be chanted, as it destroys all calamities.

sanskrit: केतोरन्तर्गते मन्दे स्वदशायां तु पीडनम् । बन्धोः क्लेशो मनस्तापश्चतुष्पाज्जीवलाभकृत् ॥६१॥
transliteration: ketorantargate mande svadaśāyāṃ tu pīḍanam . bandhoḥ kleśo manastāpaścatuṣpājjīvalābhakṛt.
separated_sandhi: ketoḥ antargate mande svadaśāyām tu pīḍanambandhoḥ kleśaḥ manastāpaḥ catuṣpāt jīvalābhakṛt
english: When Saturn (Manda) is situated in the sub-period (antargata) of Ketu, there will be affliction during Ketu's own main planetary period (daśā). This period brings trouble to relatives, mental anguish (manastāpa), but also profit from four-footed animals.

sanskrit: राजकार्यकलापेन धननाशो महद्भयम् । स्थानाच्च्युतिः प्रवासश्च मार्गे चौरभयं भवेत् ॥६२॥
transliteration: rājakāryakalāpena dhananāśo mahadbhayam . sthānāccyutiḥ pravāsaśca mārge caurabhayaṃ bhavet.
separated_sandhi: rājakāryakalāpena dhananāśaḥ mahat bhayam sthānātcyutiḥ pravāsaḥ ca mārge caurabhayam bhavet
english: Due to involvement in governmental activities or royal affairs (rājakāryakalāpa), there will be loss of wealth (dhananāśa) and great fear. Displacement from one's position (sthāna), foreign residence or travel (pravāsa), and fear of thieves on the journey will occur.

sanskrit: आलस्यं मनसो हानिश्चाष्टमे व्ययराशिगे । मीनत्रिकोणगे मन्दे तुलायां स्वर्क्षगेऽपि वा ॥६३॥
transliteration: ālasyaṃ manaso hāniścāṣṭame vyayarāśige . mīnatrikoṇage mande tulāyāṃ svarkṣage'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: ālasyam manasaḥ hāniḥ ca aṣṭame vyayarāśigemīnatrikoṇage mande tulāyām svarkṣage api vā
english: Laziness and mental deterioration (manaso hāni) occur when [Ketu is] in the eighth house or in the house of expenditure (vyayarāśiga) (the twelfth house). Alternatively, when Saturn (Manda) is in a trine to Pisces, or in Libra (tulā), or even in its own sign,...

sanskrit: केन्द्रत्रिकोणलाभे वा दुश्चिक्ये वा शुभांशके । शुभदृष्टयुते चैव सर्वकार्यार्थसाधनम् ॥६४॥
transliteration: kendratrikoṇalābhe vā duścikye vā śubhāṃśake . śubhadṛṣṭayute caiva sarvakāryārthasādhanam.
separated_sandhi: kendratrikoṇalābhe vā duścikhye vā śubhāṃśakeśubhadṛṣṭiyute ca eva sarvakāryārthasādhanam
english: When [Saturn is] in an angular house (kendra), a trine (trikoṇa), or the house of gain (lābha), or in an Upachaya house (duścikhya), or in an auspicious divisional chart (aṃśa). And furthermore, if it is conjoined with or aspected by benefics (śubhadṛṣṭiyute), then all undertakings and objectives are accomplished.

sanskrit: स्वप्रभोश्च महत्सौख्यं भ्रमणं च सुखावहम् । स्वग्रामे सुखसम्पत्तिः स्ववर्गे राजदर्शनम् ॥६५॥
transliteration: svaprabhośca mahatsaukhyaṃ bhramaṇaṃ ca sukhāvaham . svagrāme sukhasampattiḥ svavarge rājadarśanam.
separated_sandhi: svaprabhoḥ ca mahat saukhyam bhramaṇam ca sukhāvahamsvagrāme sukhasampattiḥ svavarge rājadarśanam
english: And great happiness (saukhya) from one's own lord (svaprabhoḥ), along with pleasant travel (bhramaṇa). There will be happiness and prosperity (sukhasampatti) in one's native village (svagrāma), and a meeting with royalty or high officials (rājadarsana) within one's own community (svavarga).

sanskrit: दायेशात्षष्ठरिःफे वा अष्टमे पापसंयुते । देहतापो मनस्तापः कार्ये विघ्नो महद्भयम् ॥६६॥
transliteration: dāyeśātṣaṣṭhariḥphe vā aṣṭame pāpasaṃyute . dehatāpo manastāpaḥ kārye vighno mahadbhayam.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt ṣaṣṭhariḥphe vā aṣṭame pāpa saṃyutedehatāpaḥ manastāpaḥ kārye vighnaḥ mahat bhayam
english: When a planet, located in the 6th and 12th houses, or in the 8th house conjoined with a malefic, is considered from the Daśā (planetary period) lord, it causes bodily suffering, mental anguish, obstacles in one's endeavors, and great fear.

sanskrit: आलस्यं मानहानिश्च पितृमात्रोर्विनाशनम् । द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु ह्यपमृत्युभयं भवेत् ॥६७॥
transliteration: ālasyaṃ mānahāniśca pitṛmātrorvināśanam . dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu hyapamṛtyubhayaṃ bhavet.
separated_sandhi: ālasyam mānahāniḥ ca pitṛmātroḥ vināśanamdvitīyadyūnanāthe tu hi apamṛtyubhayam bhavet
english: Laziness, loss of honor, and destruction to parents occur. Indeed, if the lord of the 2nd and 7th houses (māraka houses) is involved, there will certainly be fear of untimely death.

sanskrit: तद्दोषपैर्हारार्थं तिलहोमं च कारयेत् । कृष्णां गां महिषीं दद्यादायुरारोग्यवृद्धये ॥६८॥
transliteration: taddoṣapairhārārthaṃ tilahomaṃ ca kārayet . kṛṣṇāṃ gāṃ mahiṣīṃ dadyādāyurārogyavṛddhaye.
separated_sandhi: tat doṣaparihārārtham tilahomam ca kārayetkṛṣṇām gām mahiṣīm dadyāt āyurārogyavṛddhaye
english: To remove those defects, one should perform a sesame (tilahomam) fire ritual. One should also donate a black cow and a buffalo for the increase of longevity and health.

sanskrit: केतोरन्तर्गते सौम्ये केन्द्रलाभत्रिकोणगे । स्वोच्चे स्वक्षेत्रसंयुक्ते राज्यलाभो महत्सुखम् ॥६९॥
transliteration: ketorantargate saumye kendralābhatrikoṇage . svocce svakṣetrasaṃyukte rājyalābho mahatsukham.
separated_sandhi: ketoḥ antargate saumye kendralābhatrikoṇage svoccesvakshetra saṃyukte rājyalābhaḥ mahat sukham
english: When a benefic planet, in Ketu's Antardasha (sub-period), is situated in a Kendra (angular), Labha (11th), or Trikona (trinal) house, and is in its exaltation sign or its own sign while conjoined with Ketu, it brings gains of power or status and great happiness.

sanskrit: सत्कथाश्रवणं दानं धर्मसिद्धिः सुखावहा । भूलाभः पुत्रलाभश्च शुभगोष्ठीधनागमः ॥७०॥
transliteration: satkathāśravaṇaṃ dānaṃ dharmasiddhiḥ sukhāvahā . bhūlābhaḥ putralābhaśca śubhagoṣṭhīdhanāgamaḥ.
separated_sandhi: satkathāśravaṇam dānam dharmasiddhiḥ sukhāvahābhūlābhaḥ putralābhaḥ ca śubhagoṣṭhīdhanāgamaḥ
english: Listening to virtuous stories, giving (dāna) charity, and the attainment of (dharma) natural law, which brings happiness, are predicted. Also, there will be gains of land, gains of sons, and an influx of wealth from auspicious gatherings.

sanskrit: अयत्नाद्धर्मलब्धिश्च विवाहश्च भविष्यति । गृहे शुभकरं कर्म वस्त्राभरणभूषणम् ॥७१॥
transliteration: ayatnāddharmalabdhiśca vivāhaśca bhaviṣyati . gṛhe śubhakaraṃ karma vastrābharaṇabhūṣaṇam.
separated_sandhi: ayatnāt dharmalabdhiḥ ca vivāhaḥ ca bhaviṣyatigṛhe śubhakaram karma vastrābharaṇabhūṣaṇam
english: There will be an effortless acquisition of merit (dharma) and a marriage. Auspicious activities, involving clothes, ornaments, and decorations, will take place in the home.

sanskrit: भाग्यकर्माधिपैर्युक्ते भाग्यवृद्धिः सुखावहा । विद्वद्गोष्ठीकथाभिश्च कालक्षेपो भविष्यति ॥७२॥
transliteration: bhāgyakarmādhipairyukte bhāgyavṛddhiḥ sukhāvahā . vidvadgoṣṭhīkathābhiśca kālakṣepo bhaviṣyati.
separated_sandhi: bhāgyakarmādhipaiḥ yukte bhāgyavṛddhiḥ sukhāvahāvidvadgoṣṭhīkathābhiḥ ca kālakṣepaḥ bhaviṣyati
english: When associated with the lords of fortune (bhāgya) and action (karma), there will be an increase in prosperity (bhāgya) that brings happiness. Time will also be spent in discussions and stories with learned individuals.

sanskrit: षष्ठाष्टमव्यये सौम्ये मन्दाराहियुतेक्षिते । विरोधो राजवर्गैश्च परगेहनिवासनम् ॥७३॥
transliteration: ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyaye saumye mandārāhiyutekṣite . virodho rājavargaiśca paragehanivāsanam.
separated_sandhi: ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyaye saumye mandārāhiyutekṣitevirodhaḥ rājavargaiḥ ca paragehanivāsanam
english: When a benefic planet is in the 6th, 8th, or 12th house, and is conjoined with or aspected by Saturn, Mars, or Rahu, there will be conflict with the ruling class and residence in another's house.

sanskrit: वाहनाम्बरपश्वादिधनधान्यादिनाशकृत् । भुक्त्यादौ शोभनं प्रोक्तं मध्ये सौख्यं धनागमः ॥७४॥
transliteration: vāhanāmbarapaśvādidhanadhānyādināśakṛt . bhuktyādau śobhanaṃ proktaṃ madhye saukhyaṃ dhanāgamaḥ.
separated_sandhi: vāhanāmbarapaśvādidhanadhānyādināśakṛt bhuktyādauśobhanam proktam madhye saukhyam dhanāgamaḥ
english: It causes the destruction of conveyances, clothes, cattle, wealth, grains, and so on. At the beginning of the planetary sub-period (bhukti), it is declared to be auspicious, with happiness and acquisition of wealth in the middle.

sanskrit: अन्ते क्लेशकरं चैव दारपुत्रादिपीडनम् । दायेशात्केन्द्रगे सौम्ये त्रिकोणे लाभगेऽपि वा ॥७५॥
transliteration: ante kleśakaraṃ caiva dāraputrādipīḍanam . dāyeśātkendrage saumye trikoṇe lābhage'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: ante kleśakaram ca eva dāraputrādipīḍanamdāyeśāt kendrage saumye trikoṇe lābhage api vā
english: At the end of the period, there will certainly be trouble and affliction to one's spouse, children, and so on. This occurs even when a benefic planet is in a Kendra (1st, 4th, 7th, 10th), Trikona (5th, 9th), or Labha (11th) house relative to the lord of the planetary period (dāyeśa).

sanskrit: देहारोग्यं महांल्लाभः पुत्रकल्याणवैभवम् । भोजनाम्बरपश्वादिव्यवसायेऽधिकं फलम् ॥७६॥
transliteration: dehārogyaṃ mahāṃllābhaḥ putrakalyāṇavaibhavam . bhojanāmbarapaśvādivyavasāye'dhikaṃ phalam.
separated_sandhi: dehārogyam mahān lābhaḥ putrakalyāṇavaibhavambhojanāmbarapaśvādivyavasāye adhikam phalam
english: One will experience good bodily health, great gains, and prosperity for children. There will be abundant results in businesses related to food, clothing, animals, and the like.

sanskrit: दायेशात्षष्ठरन्ध्रे वा व्यये वा बलवर्जिते । तद्भुक्त्यादौ महाक्लेशो दारपुत्रादिपीडनम् ॥७७॥
transliteration: dāyeśātṣaṣṭharandhre vā vyaye vā balavarjite . tadbhuktyādau mahākleśo dāraputrādipīḍanam.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt ṣaṣṭharandhre vā vyaye vā balavarjitetatbhuktyādau mahākleśaḥ dāraputrādipīḍanam
english: If the lord of the daśā (planetary period) is devoid of strength and located in the sixth house, eighth house, or twelfth house from itself, then at the beginning of its sub-period and onwards, there will be great trouble and affliction to one's wife, children, and others.

sanskrit: राजभीतिकरश्चैव मध्ये तीर्थकरो भवेत् । द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु ह्यपमृत्युर्भविष्यति ॥७८॥
transliteration: rājabhītikaraścaiva madhye tīrthakaro bhavet . dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu hyapamṛtyurbhaviṣyati.
separated_sandhi: rājabhītikaraḥ ca eva madhye tīrthakaraḥ bhavetdvitīyadyūnanāthe tu hi apamṛtyuḥ bhaviṣyati
english: There will also be fear from the king or government. In the middle of the period, one may undertake a pilgrimage (tīrtha). But if it is the lord of the second or seventh house, there will indeed be an untimely death (apamṛtyu).

sanskrit: तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं विष्णुसाहस्रकं जपेत् । ततः सुखमवाप्नोति श्रीहरेश्च प्रसादतः ॥७९॥
transliteration: taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ viṣṇusāhasrakaṃ japet . tataḥ sukhamavāpnoti śrīhareśca prasādataḥ.
separated_sandhi: tat doṣaparihārārtham viṣṇusāhasrakam japettataḥ sukham avāpnoti śrīhareḥ ca prasādataḥ
english: For the removal of that defect, one should chant the Viṣṇusahasranāma. Thereafter, by the grace (prasāda) of Śrī Hari, one will attain happiness.

sanskrit: अथ स्वान्तर्गते शुक्रे लग्नात्केन्द्रत्रिकोणगे । लाभे वा बलसंयुक्ते तद्भुक्तौ च शुभं फलम् ॥१॥
transliteration: atha svāntargate śukre lagnātkendratrikoṇage . lābhe vā balasaṃyukte tadbhuktau ca śubhaṃ phalam.
separated_sandhi: atha svaantargate śukre lagnāt kendratrikoṇagelābhe vā balasaṃyukte tatbhuktau ca śubham phalam
english: Now, when Venus (śukra) is in its own sub-period (antardaśā), and if it is situated in a quadrant (kendra) or trine (trikoṇa) house, or in the eleventh house (lābha) from the ascendant (lagna), and is endowed with strength, then in that sub-period, there will be auspicious results.

sanskrit: विप्रमूलाद्धनप्राप्तिर्गोमहिष्यादिलाभकृत् । पुत्रोत्सवादिसन्तोषो गृहे कल्याणसम्भवः ॥२॥
transliteration: vipramūlāddhanaprāptirgomahiṣyādilābhakṛt . putrotsavādisantoṣo gṛhe kalyāṇasambhavaḥ.
separated_sandhi: vipramūlāt dhanaprāptiḥ gomahiṣyādi lābhakṛtputrotsavādi santoṣaḥ gṛhe kalyāṇasambhavaḥ
english: There will be acquisition of wealth from Brahminical sources, and gains from cows, buffaloes, etc. There will be contentment due to celebrations for sons and other auspicious events occurring in the home.

sanskrit: सन्मानं राजसम्मानं राज्यलाभो महत्सुखम् । स्वोच्चे वा स्वर्क्षगे वापि तुङ्गांशे वांशगेऽपि वा ॥३॥
transliteration: sanmānaṃ rājasammānaṃ rājyalābho mahatsukham . svocce vā svarkṣage vāpi tuṅgāṃśe vāṃśage'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: sanmānam rājasammānam rājyalābhaḥ mahat sukhamsvocce vā svarkṣage vā api tuṅgāṃśe vā aṃśage api vā
english: There will be good honor, royal recognition, attainment of a kingdom, and great happiness. This occurs when (a planet is placed) either in its own sign of exaltation, or in its own (ruling) sign, or in an exalted navāṃśa, or even in a navāṃśa ruled by its own sign.

sanskrit: नूतनालयनिर्माणं नित्यं मिष्ठान्नभोजनम् । कलत्रपुत्रविभवं मित्रसंयुक्तभोजनम् ॥४॥
transliteration: nūtanālayanirmāṇaṃ nityaṃ miṣṭhānnabhojanam . kalatraputravibhavaṃ mitrasaṃyuktabhojanam.
separated_sandhi: nūtanālayanirmāṇam nityam miṣṭhānnabhojanamkalatraputravibhavam mitrasaṃyuktabhojanam
english: There will be the construction of new residences, daily consumption of sweet foods, prosperity of one's wife and sons, and dining together with friends.

sanskrit: अन्नदानं प्रियं नित्यं दनधर्मादिसङ्ग्रहः । महाराजप्रसादेन वाहनाम्बरभूषणम् ॥५॥
transliteration: annadānaṃ priyaṃ nityaṃ danadharmādisaṅgrahaḥ . mahārājaprasādena vāhanāmbarabhūṣaṇam.
separated_sandhi: annadānam priyam nityam dānadharmādisaṅgrahaḥmahārājaprasādena vāhanāmbarabhūṣaṇam
english: The constant and cherished giving of food, accumulation of charity (dāna) and religious duties (dharma), etc., and the acquisition of conveyances, garments, and ornaments through the favor of a great king.

sanskrit: व्यवसायात्फलाधिक्यं चतुष्पाज्जीवलाभकृत् । प्रयाणं पश्चिमे भागे वाहनाम्बरलाभकृत् ॥६॥
transliteration: vyavasāyātphalādhikyaṃ catuṣpājjīvalābhakṛt . prayāṇaṃ paścime bhāge vāhanāmbaralābhakṛt.
separated_sandhi: vyavasāyāt phalādhikyam catuṣpajjīvalābhakṛtprayāṇam paścime bhāge vāhanāmbaralābhakṛt
english: There will be an abundance of results from business ventures, and gains from four-footed creatures. There will be travel in the western direction, leading to the acquisition of conveyances and garments.

sanskrit: लग्नाद्युपचये शुक्रे शुभग्रहयुतेक्षिते । मित्रांशे तुङ्गलाभेशयोगलारकसंयुते ॥७॥
transliteration: lagnādyupacaye śukre śubhagrahayutekṣite . mitrāṃśe tuṅgalābheśayogalārakasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: lagnādi upacaye śukre śubha-graha-yuta-īkṣitemitra-aṃśe tuṅga-lābha-īśa-yoga-kāraka-saṃyute
english: When Venus (śukra) is situated in an Upacaya house (3rd, 6th, 10th, or 11th) counted from the ascendant (lagna), conjoined with or aspected by benefic planets, residing in a friendly navāṃśa (a specific divisional chart), and associated with (or conjoined with) a planet in exaltation, the lord of the 11th house (gains), and a yoga-forming planet, then the following auspicious results occur.

sanskrit: राज्यलाभो महोत्साहो राजप्रीतिः शुभावहा । गृहे कल्याणसम्पत्तिर्दारपुत्रादिवर्द्धनम् ॥८॥
transliteration: rājyalābho mahotsāho rājaprītiḥ śubhāvahā . gṛhe kalyāṇasampattirdāraputrādivarddhanam.
separated_sandhi: rājya-lābhaḥ mahā-utsāhaḥ rāja-prītiḥ śubha-āvahāgṛhe kalyāṇa-sampattiḥ dāra-putra-ādi-varddhanam
english: Such a placement brings gain of high status, great enthusiasm, royal favor (rāja-prīti) that promotes welfare, auspicious wealth and prosperity in the home, and the growth and well-being of one's wife, children, and so forth.

sanskrit: षष्ठाष्टमव्यये शुक्रे पापयुक्तेऽथ वीक्षिते । चौरादिव्रणभीतिश्च सर्वत्र जनपीडनम् ॥९॥
transliteration: ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyaye śukre pāpayukte'tha vīkṣite . caurādivraṇabhītiśca sarvatra janapīḍanam.
separated_sandhi: ṣaṣṭha-aṣṭama-vyaye śukre pāpa-yukte atha vīkṣitecaura-ādi-vraṇa-bhītiḥ ca sarvatra jana-pīḍanam
english: However, if Venus (śukra) is located in the 6th, 8th, or 12th house, and is conjoined with or aspected by malefic planets, then there will be fear of thieves and wounds, and harassment from people everywhere.

sanskrit: राजद्वारे जनद्वेष इष्टबन्धुविनाशनम् । दारपुत्रादिपीडा च सर्वत्र जनपीडनम् ॥१०॥
transliteration: rājadvāre janadveṣa iṣṭabandhuvināśanam . dāraputrādipīḍā ca sarvatra janapīḍanam.
separated_sandhi: rāja-dvāre jana-dveṣaḥ iṣṭa-bandhu-vināśanamdāra-putra-ādi-pīḍā ca sarvatra jana-pīḍanam
english: This leads to public animosity, especially at governmental levels, loss of beloved relatives, distress to one's wife and children, and general harassment and suffering from others everywhere.

sanskrit: द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु स्थिते चेन्मरणं भवेत् । तर्त दुर्गाजपं कुर्याद्धनुदानं च कारयेत् ॥११॥
transliteration: dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu sthite cenmaraṇaṃ bhavet . tarta durgājapaṃ kuryāddhanudānaṃ ca kārayet.
separated_sandhi: dvitīya-dyūna-nāthe tu sthite cet maraṇaṃ bhavettatra durgā-japam kuryāt dhanuḥ-dānam ca kārayet
english: If the planet that rules both the 2nd and 7th houses (the "maraka" houses) is situated (adversely), then death (maraṇa) may occur. In such a situation, one should perform the recitation (japa) of Goddess Durga's mantra and arrange for the donation (dāna) of a bow.

sanskrit: शुक्रस्यान्तर्गते सूर्ये सन्तापो राजविग्रहः । दायादकलहश्चैव स्वोच्चनीचविवर्जिते ॥१२॥
transliteration: śukrasyāntargate sūrye santāpo rājavigrahaḥ . dāyādakalahaścaiva svoccanīcavivarjite.
separated_sandhi: śukrasya antargate sūrye santāpaḥ rājavigrahaḥdāyādakalahaḥ ca eva svoccanīcavivarjite
english: When the Sun is in the sub-period of Venus, and the Sun is neither exalted nor debilitated, there is anguish, conflict with the government, and disputes among heirs.

sanskrit: तद्भुक्तौ धनलाभः स्याद्राज्यस्त्रीधनसम्पदः । स्वप्रभोश्च महत्सौख्यमिष्टबन्धोः समागमः ॥१४॥
transliteration: tadbhuktau dhanalābhaḥ syādrājyastrīdhanasampadaḥ . svaprabhośca mahatsaukhyamiṣṭabandhoḥ samāgamaḥ.
separated_sandhi: tat bhuktau dhanalābhaḥ syāt rājyastrīdhanasampadaḥsvaprabhoḥ ca mahat saukhyam iṣṭabandhoḥ samāgamaḥ
english: In that sub-period (of the Sun), there will be gains of wealth, riches from the government, wealth from women, and general prosperity. There will also be great happiness for one's own master and a reunion with beloved relatives.

sanskrit: पितृमात्रोः सुखप्राप्तिं भ्रातृलाभं सुखावहम् । सत्कीर्तिं सुखसौभाग्यं पुत्रलाभं च विन्दति ॥१५॥
transliteration: pitṛmātroḥ sukhaprāptiṃ bhrātṛlābhaṃ sukhāvaham . satkīrtiṃ sukhasaubhāgyaṃ putralābhaṃ ca vindati.
separated_sandhi: pitṛmātroḥ sukhaprāptim bhrātṛlābham sukhāvahamsatkīrtim sukhasaubhāgyam putralābham ca vindati
english: One obtains happiness for parents, the acquisition of siblings which brings joy, good fame, happiness, good fortune, and the gain of children.

sanskrit: तथाष्टमे व्यये सूर्ये रिपुराशिस्थितेऽपि वा । नीचे वा पापवर्गस्थे देहतापो मनोरुजः ॥१६॥
transliteration: tathāṣṭame vyaye sūrye ripurāśisthite'pi vā . nīce vā pāpavargasthe dehatāpo manorujaḥ.
separated_sandhi: tathā aṣṭame vyaye sūrye ripurāśisthite api vānīce vā pāpavargasthite dehatāpaḥ manorujaḥ
english: Similarly, when the Sun is in the eighth or twelfth house, or is situated in an enemy sign, or is debilitated, or is in a malefic divisional position (varga), there will be physical ailments and mental distress.

sanskrit: स्वजनोपरिसंक्लेशो नित्यं निष्ठुरभाषणम् । पितृपीडा बन्धुहानी राजद्वारे विरोधकृत् ॥१७॥
transliteration: svajanoparisaṃkleśo nityaṃ niṣṭhurabhāṣaṇam . pitṛpīḍā bandhuhānī rājadvāre virodhakṛt.
separated_sandhi: svajanopari-saṃkleśaḥ nityam niṣṭhurabhāṣaṇampitṛpīḍā bandhuhānī rājadvāre virodhakṛt
english: There is constant distress concerning one's own people, harsh speech, suffering for the father (or ancestors), loss of relatives, and causing opposition at the royal court (or government).

sanskrit: व्रणपीडाहिबाधा च स्वगृहे च भयं तथा । नानारोगभयं चैव गृहक्षेत्रादिनाशनम् ॥१८॥
transliteration: vraṇapīḍāhibādhā ca svagṛhe ca bhayaṃ tathā . nānārogabhayaṃ caiva gṛhakṣetrādināśanam.
separated_sandhi: vraṇa-pīḍā ahi-bādhā ca svagṛhe ca bhayam tathānānā-roga-bhayam ca eva gṛha-kṣetrādi-nāśanam
english: There will be injury, trouble from snakes, and also fear in one's own house. Similarly, there will be fear of various diseases and destruction of one's home, fields, and other properties.

sanskrit: सप्तमाधिपतौ सूर्ये ग्रहबाधा भविष्यति । तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं सूर्यप्रीतिं च कारयेत् ॥१९॥
transliteration: saptamādhipatau sūrye grahabādhā bhaviṣyati . taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ sūryaprītiṃ ca kārayet.
separated_sandhi: saptamādhipatau sūrye grahabādhā bhaviṣyatitat doṣa-parihārārtham sūrya-prītim ca kārayet
english: When the lord of the seventh house is the Sun, there will be planetary affliction. For the removal of that defect, one should perform appeasement of the Sun.

sanskrit: शुक्रस्यान्तर्गते चन्द्रे केन्द्रलाभत्रिकोणगे । स्वोच्चे स्वक्षेत्रगे चैव भाग्यनाथेनसंयुते ॥२०॥
transliteration: śukrasyāntargate candre kendralābhatrikoṇage . svocce svakṣetrage caiva bhāgyanāthenasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: śukrasya antargate candre kendra-lābha-trikoṇagesva-ucce sva-kṣetrage ca eva bhāgya-nāthena saṃyute
english: When the Moon is in the sub-period of Venus, and the Moon is situated in an angular house (kendra), an eleventh house (lābha), or a trine house (trikoṇa), and is in its own exaltation sign or its own house, and is also associated with the lord of fortune (the ninth house lord)...

sanskrit: शुभयुक्ते पूर्णचन्द्रे राज्यनाथेन संयुते । तद्बुक्तौ वाहनादीनां लाभं गेहे महत्सुखम् ॥२१॥
transliteration: śubhayukte pūrṇacandre rājyanāthena saṃyute . tadbuktau vāhanādīnāṃ lābhaṃ gehe mahatsukham.
separated_sandhi: śubha-yukte pūrṇa-candre rājya-nāthena saṃyutetat bhuktau vāhanādīnām lābham gehe mahat sukham
english: When the full Moon is associated with auspicious planets and conjoined with the lord of the tenth house (rājya), then in that (Moon's) sub-period, there will be gain of vehicles and other possessions, and great happiness at home.

sanskrit: महाराजप्रसादेन गजान्तैश्वर्यमादिशेत् । महानदीस्नानपुण्यं देवब्राह्मणपूजनम् ॥२२॥
transliteration: mahārājaprasādena gajāntaiśvaryamādiśet . mahānadīsnānapuṇyaṃ devabrāhmaṇapūjanam.
separated_sandhi: mahārājaprasādena gajāntaiśvaryam ādiśetmahānadīsnānapuṇyam devabrāhmaṇapūjanam
english: One should predict prosperity, even to the extent of possessing elephants, granted by the grace of a great king. Other outcomes to be predicted are the merit (puṇya) from bathing in great rivers and the worship of deities and brahmins.

sanskrit: गीतवाद्यप्रसङ्गादिविद्वज्जनविभूषणम् । गोमहिष्यादिवृद्धिश्च व्यवसायेऽधिकं फलम् ॥२३॥
transliteration: gītavādyaprasaṅgādividvajjanavibhūṣaṇam . gomahiṣyādivṛddhiśca vyavasāye'dhikaṃ phalam.
separated_sandhi: gītavādyaprasaṅgādi vidvajjana vibhūṣaṇamgomahiṣyādi vṛddhiḥ ca vyavasāye adhikam phalam
english: There will be ornamentation for learned people (vidvajjana) through engagement with singing, musical instruments, and similar arts. Also, there will be an increase in cows, buffaloes, and other livestock, and significant profit in business.

sanskrit: भोजनाम्बरसौख्यं च बन्धुसंयुक्तभोजनम् । नीचे वात्सङ्गते वापि षष्ठाष्टमव्ययराशिगे ॥२४॥
transliteration: bhojanāmbarasaukhyaṃ ca bandhusaṃyuktabhojanam . nīce vātsaṅgate vāpi ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyayarāśige.
separated_sandhi: bhojanāmbarasaukhyam ca bandhusaṃyuktabhojanamnīce vā saṅgate vā api ṣaṣṭhāṣṭamavyayarāśige
english: One will experience pleasure from food and clothing, and shared meals with relatives. Alternatively, there might be association with lowly individuals, or the planet (governing the period) may be situated in the 6th, 8th, or 12th house (from the Ascendant or the period lord).

sanskrit: दायेशात्षष्ठगे वापि रन्ध्रे वा व्ययराशिगे । तत्काले धननाशः स्यात्सञ्चरेत महद्भयम् ॥२५॥
transliteration: dāyeśātṣaṣṭhage vāpi randhre vā vyayarāśige . tatkāle dhananāśaḥ syātsañcareta mahadbhayam.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt ṣaṣṭhage vā api randhre vā vyayarāśigetatkāle dhananāśaḥ syāt saṃcareta mahat bhayam
english: If (the lord of the sub-period) is in the 6th, 8th, or 12th house from the lord of the main period (dāyeśa), then at that time there will be loss of wealth and great fear will arise.

sanskrit: देहायासो मनस्तापो राजद्वारे विरोधकृत् । विदेशगमनं चैव तीर्थयात्रादिकं फलम् ॥२६॥
transliteration: dehāyāso manastāpo rājadvāre virodhakṛt . videśagamanaṃ caiva tīrthayātrādikaṃ phalam.
separated_sandhi: dehāyāsaḥ manastāpaḥ rājadvāre virodhakṛtvideśagamanaṃ ca eva tīrthayātrādikam phalam
english: There will be physical exertion, mental distress, and conflict at the royal court. Additionally, there will be foreign travel, and outcomes such as pilgrimages.

sanskrit: दारपुत्रादि पीडा च निजबन्धुवियोगकृत् । दायेशात्केन्द्रलाभस्थे त्रिकोणे सहजेऽपि वा ॥२७॥
transliteration: dāraputrādi pīḍā ca nijabandhuviyogakṛt . dāyeśātkendralābhasthe trikoṇe sahaje'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: dāraputrādi pīḍā ca nijabandhuviyogakṛtdāyeśāt kendralābhaste trikoṇe sahaje api vā
english: Trouble arises from spouse and children, and there is separation from one's own relatives, when the (sub-period lord) is situated in a kendra (1st, 4th, 7th, 10th), labha (11th), trine (5th, 9th), or also the 3rd house from the lord of the 2nd house.

sanskrit: राजप्रीतिकरी चैव देशग्रामाधिपत्यता । धैर्यं यशः सुखं कीर्तिर्वाहनाम्बरभूषणम् ॥२८॥
transliteration: rājaprītikarī caiva deśagrāmādhipatyatā . dhairyaṃ yaśaḥ sukhaṃ kīrtirvāhanāmbarabhūṣaṇam.
separated_sandhi: rājaprītikarī ca eva deśagrāmādhipatyatādhairyam yaśaḥ sukham kīrtiḥ vāhanāmbarabhūṣaṇam
english: Indeed, it causes royal favor and lordship over a country or village. There is courage, fame, happiness, renown, and acquisition of conveyances, clothes, and ornaments.

sanskrit: कूपारामतडागदिनिर्माणं धनसङ्ग्रहः । भुक्तयादौ देहसौख्यं स्यादन्ते क्लेशस्तथा भवेत् ॥२९॥
transliteration: kūpārāmataḍāgadinirmāṇaṃ dhanasaṅgrahaḥ . bhuktayādau dehasaukhyaṃ syādante kleśastathā bhavet.
separated_sandhi: kūpārāmatadāgādi nirmāṇam dhanasaṅgrahaḥ bhuktyāādau dehasaukhyam syāt ante kleśaḥ tathā bhavet
english: There will be construction of wells, gardens, ponds, and so on, and accumulation of wealth. At the beginning of the sub-period, there will be physical comfort, but at the end, distress will likewise occur.

sanskrit: शुक्रस्यान्तर्गते भौमे लग्नात्केन्द्रत्रिकोणगे । स्वोच्चे वा स्वर्क्षगे भौमे लाभे वा बलसंयुते ॥३०॥
transliteration: śukrasyāntargate bhaume lagnātkendratrikoṇage . svocce vā svarkṣage bhaume lābhe vā balasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: śukrasya antargate bhaume lagnāt kendratrikoṇagesvocce vā svarkṣage bhaume lābhe vā balasaṃyute
english: When Mars (bhauma) is in the sub-period (antar-daśā) within Venus's (śukra) major period, and is situated in a kendra (1st, 4th, 7th, 10th) or trine (5th, 9th) from the Ascendant (lagna), or if Mars is in its exaltation sign, or in its own sign, or in the 11th house, or endowed with strength.

sanskrit: लग्नाधिपेन संयुक्ते कर्मभाग्येशसंयुते । तद्भुक्तौ राजयोगादिसम्पदं शोभनां वदेत् ॥३१॥
transliteration: lagnādhipena saṃyukte karmabhāgyeśasaṃyute . tadbhuktau rājayogādisampadaṃ śobhanāṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: lagnādhipena saṃyukte karmabhāgyeśasaṃyutetat bhuktau rājayogādi sampadam śobhanām vadet
english: If (Mars is) conjoined with the Ascendant lord, or conjoined with the lord of the 10th house (karma) and 9th house (bhāgya), then in that sub-period (bhukti), one should declare auspicious wealth and effects resembling a royal combination (rāja-yoga).

sanskrit: वस्त्राभरणभूम्यादेरिष्टसिद्धिः सुखावहा । तथाऽष्टमे व्यये वाऽपि दायेशाद्वा तथैव च ॥३२॥
transliteration: vastrābharaṇabhūmyāderiṣṭasiddhiḥ sukhāvahā . tathā'ṣṭame vyaye vā'pi dāyeśādvā tathaiva ca.
separated_sandhi: vastrābharaṇabhūmyādeḥ iṣṭasiddhiḥ sukhāvahātathā aṣṭame vyaye vā api dāyeśāt vā tathā eva ca
english: There will be the successful acquisition of desired items such as clothes, ornaments, and land, bringing happiness. Similarly, (negative outcomes will occur) if (the planet is) in the 8th or 12th house, or if it is from the Dasha lord, in the same manner (as previously mentioned).

sanskrit: शीतज्वरादिपीडा च पितृमातृभयावहा । ज्वराद्यधिकरोगाश्च स्थानभ्रंशो मनोरुजा ॥३३॥
transliteration: śītajvarādipīḍā ca pitṛmātṛbhayāvahā . jvarādyadhikarogāśca sthānabhraṃśo manorujā.
separated_sandhi: śītajvarādipīḍā ca pitṛmātṛbhayāvahā jvarādiadhikarogāḥ ca sthānabhraṃśaḥ manorujā
english: There will be suffering from cold fevers and similar ailments, causing apprehension for one's parents. Additionally, one may experience an increase in diseases, loss of status, and mental distress.

sanskrit: स्वबन्धुजनहानिश्च कलहो राजविग्रहः । राजद्वारजनद्वेषो धनधान्यव्ययोऽधिकः ॥३४॥
transliteration: svabandhujanahāniśca kalaho rājavigrahaḥ . rājadvārajanadveṣo dhanadhānyavyayo'dhikaḥ.
separated_sandhi: svabandhujanahāniḥ ca kalahaḥ rājavigrahaḥrājadvārajanadveṣaḥ dhanadhānyavyayaḥ adhikaḥ
english: There will be loss of one's own relatives, disputes, and conflicts with the government. Also, enmity from officials at the royal court, and excessive expenditure of wealth and grains.

sanskrit: व्यवसायात्फलं नेष्टं ग्रामभूम्यादिहानिकृत् । द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु देहवाधा भविष्यति ॥३५॥
transliteration: vyavasāyātphalaṃ neṣṭaṃ grāmabhūmyādihānikṛt . dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu dehavādhā bhaviṣyati.
separated_sandhi: vyavasāyāt phalam na iṣṭam grāmabhūmyādihānikṛtdvitīyadyūnanāthe tu dehavādhā bhaviṣyati
english: The outcome from business will be unfavorable, leading to the loss of villages, land, and similar assets. Moreover, if the lord of the second house and the lord of the seventh house are in such a state, there will be physical ailments.

sanskrit: शुक्रस्यान्तर्गते राहौ केन्द्रलाभत्रिकोणगे । स्वोच्चे वा शुभसंदृष्टे योगकारकसंयुते ॥३६॥
transliteration: śukrasyāntargate rāhau kendralābhatrikoṇage . svocce vā śubhasaṃdṛṣṭe yogakārakasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: śukrasya antargate rāhau kendralābhatrikoṇagesvocce vā śubhasaṃdṛṣṭe yogakārakasaṃyute
english: When Rāhu is in the sub-period (antardaśā) of Śukra (Venus), and Rāhu is situated in an angular (kendra), eleventh (lābha), or trinal (trikoṇa) house; or if it is in its exaltation sign (svocce); or if it is aspected by auspicious planets; or if it is conjoined with a planet causing beneficial alignments (yoga-kāraka).

sanskrit: तद्भुक्तौ बहुसौख्यं च धनधान्यादिलाभकृत् । इष्टबन्धुसमाकीर्णं भवनं च समादिशेत् ॥३७॥
transliteration: tadbhuktau bahusaukhyaṃ ca dhanadhānyādilābhakṛt . iṣṭabandhusamākīrṇaṃ bhavanaṃ ca samādiśet.
separated_sandhi: tad bhuktau bahusaukhyam ca dhanadhānyādilābhakṛtiṣṭabandhusamākīrṇam bhavanam ca samādiśet
english: During that sub-period (antardaśā), there will be much happiness, leading to the acquisition of wealth, grains, and similar benefits. One should also predict a dwelling filled with beloved relatives and friends.

sanskrit: यातुः कार्यार्थसिद्धिः स्यात् पशुक्षेत्रादिसम्भवः । लग्नाद्युपचये राहौ तद्भुक्तिः सुखदा भवेत् ॥३८॥
transliteration: yātuḥ kāryārthasiddhiḥ syāt paśukṣetrādisambhavaḥ . lagnādyupacaye rāhau tadbhuktiḥ sukhadā bhavet.
separated_sandhi: yātuḥ kāryārthasiddhiḥ syāt paśukṣetrādisambhavaḥlagnādyupacaye rāhau tadbhuktiḥ sukhadā bhavet
english: For the native, there will be success in endeavors and the acquisition of cattle, land, and similar possessions. If Rahu is positioned in an upacaya house from the ascendant, its sub-period will bring happiness.

sanskrit: शत्रुनाशो महोत्साहो राजप्रीतिकरी शुभा । भुक्त्यादौ शरमासांश्च अन्ते ज्वरमजीर्णकृत् ॥३९॥
transliteration: śatrunāśo mahotsāho rājaprītikarī śubhā . bhuktyādau śaramāsāṃśca ante jvaramajīrṇakṛt.
separated_sandhi: śatrunāśaḥ mahotsāhaḥ rājaprītikrī śubhābhuktyādau śaramāsām ca ante jvaramajīrṇakṛt
english: This period is auspicious, bringing the destruction of enemies, great enthusiasm, and royal favor. In its initial five months and at its conclusion, however, it causes fever and indigestion.

sanskrit: कार्यविघ्नमवाप्नोति सञ्चरे च मनोव्यथा । परं सुखं च सौभाग्यं महाराज इवाऽश्नुते ॥४०॥
transliteration: kāryavighnamavāpnoti sañcare ca manovyathā . paraṃ sukhaṃ ca saubhāgyaṃ mahārāja ivā'śnute.
separated_sandhi: kāryavighnam avāpnoti sañcare ca manovyathāparam sukham ca saubhāgyam mahārāja iva aśnute
english: Obstruction of endeavors and mental distress occur during transit. However, one also experiences supreme happiness and good fortune, just like a great king.

sanskrit: नैरृतीं दिशमाश्रित्य प्रयाणं प्रभुदर्शनम् । यातुः कार्यार्थसिद्धिः स्यात्स्वदेशे पुनरेष्यति ॥४१॥
transliteration: nairṛtīṃ diśamāśritya prayāṇaṃ prabhudarśanam . yātuḥ kāryārthasiddhiḥ syātsvadeśe punareṣyati.
separated_sandhi: nairṛtīm diśam āśritya prayāṇam prabhudarśanamyātuḥ kāryārthasiddhiḥ syāt svadeśe punar eṣyati
english: By undertaking a journey towards the southwest direction and meeting a lord, the native will achieve success in their undertakings and will return to their own country.

sanskrit: उपकारो ब्राह्मणानां तीर्थयात्राफलं भवेत् । दायेशाद्रन्ध्रभावस्थे व्यये वा पापसंयुते ॥४२॥
transliteration: upakāro brāhmaṇānāṃ tīrthayātrāphalaṃ bhavet . dāyeśādrandhrabhāvasthe vyaye vā pāpasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: upakāraḥ brāhmaṇānām tīrthayātrāphalam bhavetdāyeśāt randhrabhāvasthe vyaye vā pāpasaṃyute
english: Beneficence to Brahmins and the merit of pilgrimage may be experienced when the lord of the planetary period is situated in the 8th house, or in the 12th house, or is associated with malefic planets.

sanskrit: अशुभं लभते कर्म पितृमातृजनावधि । सर्वत्र जनविद्वेषं नानारूपं द्विजोत्तम ॥४३॥
transliteration: aśubhaṃ labhate karma pitṛmātṛjanāvadhi . sarvatra janavidveṣaṃ nānārūpaṃ dvijottama.
separated_sandhi: aśubham labhate karma pitṛmātṛjana avadhisarvatra janavidveṣam nānārūpam dvijottama
english: O best among the twice-born, one experiences various kinds of inauspicious consequences (karma), extending even to one's parents and relatives, and widespread hostility from people everywhere.

sanskrit: द्वितीये सप्तमे वापि देहालस्य विनिर्दिशेत् । तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं मृत्युञ्जयजपं चरेत् ॥४४॥
transliteration: dvitīye saptame vāpi dehālasya vinirdiśet . taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ mṛtyuñjayajapaṃ caret.
separated_sandhi: dvitīye saptame vā api deha ālasya vinirdiśettat doṣa parihāra artham mṛtyuñjaya japam caret
english: One should predict physical lethargy (dehālasya) in the second or seventh (house). For the removal of that affliction, one should perform the repetition (japa) of the Mṛtyuñjaya mantra.

sanskrit: शुक्रस्यान्तर्गते जीवे स्वोच्चे स्वक्षेत्रकेन्द्रगे । दायेशाच्छुभराशिस्थे भाग्ये वा पुत्रराशिगे ॥४५॥
transliteration: śukrasyāntargate jīve svocce svakṣetrakendrage . dāyeśācchubharāśisthe bhāgye vā putrarāśige.
separated_sandhi: śukrasya antargate jīve sva ucce sva kṣetra kendrage dāyeśāt śubha rāśi sthe bhāgye vā putra rāśi ge
english: When Jupiter (jīva) is in the sub-period of Venus (śukra), and Jupiter is in its exaltation sign, or in its own sign, or in an angular house, or in an auspicious sign from the lord of the daśā, or in the house of fortune (bhāgya), or in the house of children (putrarāśi)... (the benefits are described in the next verse).

sanskrit: नष्टराज्याद्धनप्राप्तिमिष्टार्थाम्बरसम्पदम् । मित्रप्रभोश्च सन्मानं धनधान्यं लभेन्नरः ॥४६॥
transliteration: naṣṭarājyāddhanaprāptimiṣṭārthāmbarasampadam . mitraprabhośca sanmānaṃ dhanadhānyaṃ labhennaraḥ.
separated_sandhi: naṣṭa rājyāt dhana prāptim iṣṭa artha ambara sampadammitra prabhoḥ ca sanmānam dhana dhānyam labheta naraḥ
english: Such a person would obtain wealth even from a lost kingdom or position, prosperity in desired objects and garments, respect from friends and rulers, as well as abundant wealth and grain.

sanskrit: राजसम्मानकीर्तिं च अश्वान्दोलादिलाभकृत् । विद्वत्प्रभुसमाकीर्णं शास्त्रापरिश्रमम् ॥४७॥
transliteration: rājasammānakīrtiṃ ca aśvāndolādilābhakṛt . vidvatprabhusamākīrṇaṃ śāstrāpariśramam.
separated_sandhi: rāja sammāna kīrtim ca aśvān dolā ādi lābha kṛtvidvat prabhu sama ākīrṇam śāstra apariśramam
english: (Such a person also) gains royal honor and fame, horses, palanquins, and other such benefits. He becomes one surrounded by learned individuals and rulers, and acquires scriptural knowledge (śāstra) without arduous effort.

sanskrit: पुत्रोत्सवादिसन्तोषमिष्टबन्धुसमागमम् । पितृमातृसुखप्राप्तिं पुत्रादिसौख्यमादिशेत् ॥४८॥
transliteration: putrotsavādisantoṣamiṣṭabandhusamāgamam . pitṛmātṛsukhaprāptiṃ putrādisaukhyamādiśet.
separated_sandhi: putra-utsava-ādi-santoṣam iṣṭa-bandhu-samāgamampitṛ-mātṛ-sukha-prāptim putra-ādi-saukhyam ādiśet
english: One should predict happiness from the birth of sons and similar joyous events, the gathering of beloved relatives, the attainment of comfort from parents, and prosperity from children and so forth.

sanskrit: दायेशात्षष्ठराशिस्थे व्यये वा पापसंयुते । राजचौरादिपीडा च देहपीडा भविष्यति ॥४९॥
transliteration: dāyeśātṣaṣṭharāśisthe vyaye vā pāpasaṃyute . rājacaurādipīḍā ca dehapīḍā bhaviṣyati.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt ṣaṣṭha-rāśi-sthe vyaye vā pāpa-saṃyuterāja-caura-ādi-pīḍā ca deha-pīḍā bhaviṣyati
english: If the lord of the planetary sub-period (daśā) is situated in the sixth house, or in the twelfth house, or is conjoined with a malefic planet, then there will be suffering from rulers or government, thieves, and so forth, as well as physical ailments.

sanskrit: आत्मरुग्बन्धुकष्टं स्यात्कलहेन मनोव्यथा । स्थानच्युतिं प्रवासं च नानारोगं समाप्नुयात् ॥५०॥
transliteration: ātmarugbandhukaṣṭaṃ syātkalahena manovyathā . sthānacyutiṃ pravāsaṃ ca nānārogaṃ samāpnuyāt.
separated_sandhi: ātma-ruk bandhu-kaṣṭam syāt kalahena manaḥ-vyathāsthāna-cyutim pravāsam ca nānā-rogam samāpnuyāt
english: There may be personal illness (ātman), distress for relatives, and mental anguish caused by disputes. One may also incur loss of position, separation from home, and various illnesses.

sanskrit: द्वितीयसप्तमाधीशे देहबाधा भविष्यति । तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं महामृत्युञ्जयं चरेत् ॥५१॥
transliteration: dvitīyasaptamādhīśe dehabādhā bhaviṣyati . taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ mahāmṛtyuñjayaṃ caret.
separated_sandhi: dvitīya-saptama-adhīśe deha-bādhā bhaviṣyatitad-doṣa-parihāra-artham mahā-mṛtyuñjayam caret
english: When the lord of the second and seventh houses is unfavorably placed, physical ailments will occur. For the purpose of alleviating that affliction, one should perform the Mahamrityunjaya (mantra or ritual).

sanskrit: शुक्रस्यान्तर्गते मन्दे स्वोच्चे तु परमोच्चगे । स्वर्क्षकेन्द्रत्रिकोणस्थे तुङ्गांशे स्वांशगेऽपि वा ॥५२॥
transliteration: śukrasyāntargate mande svocce tu paramoccage . svarkṣakendratrikoṇasthe tuṅgāṃśe svāṃśage'pi vā.
separated_sandhi: śukrasya antargate mande sva-ucce tu parama-uccagesva-ṛkṣa-kendra-trikoṇa-sthe tuṅga-aṃśe sva-aṃśage api vā
english: When Saturn (manda) is in the sub-period (antargata) of Venus (śukra), and Saturn is in its own exalted sign, or in its highest exaltation, or located in its own sign, an angular house (kendra), or a trinal house (trikoṇa), or in an exalted divisional portion (tuṅgāṃśa), or in its own divisional portion (svāṃśaga) -

sanskrit: तद्भुक्तौ बहुसौख्यं स्यादिष्टबन्धुसमागमः । राजद्वारे च सम्मानं पुत्रिकाजन्मसम्भवः ॥५३॥
transliteration: tadbhuktau bahusaukhyaṃ syādiṣṭabandhusamāgamaḥ . rājadvāre ca sammānaṃ putrikājanmasambhavaḥ.
separated_sandhi: tat bhuktau bahu saukhyam syāt iṣṭabandhusamāgamaḥrājadvāre ca sammānam putrikājanmasambhavaḥ
english: During that planetary sub-period (bhukti), there will be much happiness and a reunion with dear relatives. There will also be honor from the government and the birth of a daughter.

sanskrit: पुण्यतीर्थफलवाप्तिर्दानधर्मादिपुण्यकृत् । स्वप्रभोश्च पदावाप्तिः नीचस्थे क्लेशभाग्यभवेत् ॥५४॥
transliteration: puṇyatīrthaphalavāptirdānadharmādipuṇyakṛt . svaprabhośca padāvāptiḥ nīcasthe kleśabhāgyabhavet.
separated_sandhi: puṇyatīrthaphalavāptiḥ dānadharmādipuṇyakṛtsvaprabhoḥ ca padāvāptiḥ nīcasthe kleśabhāgya bhavet
english: There will be the attainment of benefits from sacred pilgrimages and the performance of virtuous acts like charity (dāna) and righteous conduct (dharma). One will also gain a position from one's own lord. If the planet is in a debilitated sign, however, one will experience a share of troubles.

sanskrit: देहालस्यमवाप्नोति तथाऽयादधिकव्ययम् । तथाष्टमे व्यये मन्दे दायेशाद्वा तथैव च ॥५५॥
transliteration: dehālasyamavāpnoti tathā'yādadhikavyayam . tathāṣṭame vyaye mande dāyeśādvā tathaiva ca.
separated_sandhi: deha ālasyam avāpnoti tathā ayāt adhika vyayamtathā aṣṭame vyaye mande dāyeśāt vā tathā eva ca
english: One experiences physical laziness and excessive expenses compared to income. Similarly, when the (planetary lord is) in the eighth house, or the twelfth house (vyaya), or is debilitated, or due to the lord of the eleventh house (dāyeśa), similar difficulties arise.

sanskrit: भुक्त्यादौ विविधा पीडा पितृमातृजनावधि । दारपुत्रादिपीडा च परदेशादिविभ्रमः ॥५६॥
transliteration: bhuktyādau vividhā pīḍā pitṛmātṛjanāvadhi . dāraputrādipīḍā ca paradeśādivibhramaḥ.
separated_sandhi: bhukti ādau vividhā pīḍā pitṛmātṛjanāvadhidāraputrādipīḍā ca paradeśādivibhramaḥ
english: At the beginning of the planetary sub-period (bhukti), various afflictions will arise, affecting even one's father and mother. There will also be distress for one's wife and children, and wandering or confusion in foreign lands.

sanskrit: व्यवसायात्फलं नष्टं गोमहिष्यादिहानिकृत् । द्वितीयसप्तमाधीशे देहबाधा भविष्यति ॥५७॥
transliteration: vyavasāyātphalaṃ naṣṭaṃ gomahiṣyādihānikṛt . dvitīyasaptamādhīśe dehabādhā bhaviṣyati.
separated_sandhi: vyavasāyāt phalam naṣṭam gomahiṣyādihānikṛtdvitīyasaptamādhīśe dehabādhā bhaviṣyati
english: The fruits of one's enterprise will be lost, and there will be damage to cattle, buffaloes, and other livestock. When the lord of the second and seventh houses (is so placed/afflicted, implied), physical afflictions will occur.

sanskrit: तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं तिलहोमं च कारयेत् । मृत्युञ्जयजपं कुर्याच्चण्डीपाठमाथपि वा ॥५८॥
transliteration: taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ tilahomaṃ ca kārayet . mṛtyuñjayajapaṃ kuryāccaṇḍīpāṭhamāthapi vā.
separated_sandhi: tat doṣaparihārārtham tilahomam ca kārayetmṛtyuñjayajapam kuryāt caṇḍīpāṭham atha api vā
english: To remedy those defects, one should perform a *tilahoma* (offering of sesame seeds in fire) and recite the *Mṛtyuñjaya mantra*, or alternatively, recite the *Caṇḍīpāṭha*.

sanskrit: स्वयं वा ब्राह्मणद्वारा यथाशक्ति यथाविधि । ततः शान्तिमवाप्नोति शिवाशम्भुप्रसादतः ॥५९॥
transliteration: svayaṃ vā brāhmaṇadvārā yathāśakti yathāvidhi . tataḥ śāntimavāpnoti śivāśambhuprasādataḥ.
separated_sandhi: svayam vā brāhmaṇadvārā yathāśakti yathāvidhitataḥ śāntim avāpnoti śivaśambhuprasādataḥ
english: One should perform these either personally or through a brahmin, according to one's capacity and according to the proper rites. Thereafter, one attains peace by the grace of Shiva and Shambhu.

sanskrit: शुक्रस्यान्तर्गते सौम्ये केन्द्रे लाभत्रिकोणगे । स्वोच्चे वा स्वर्क्षगे वापि राजप्रीतिकरं शुभम् ॥६०॥
transliteration: śukrasyāntargate saumye kendre lābhatrikoṇage . svocce vā svarkṣage vāpi rājaprītikaraṃ śubham.
separated_sandhi: śukrasya antargate saumye kendre lābhatrikoṇagesvocce vā svarkṣage vā api rājaprītikaram śubham
english: When, during the sub-period of Venus, Mercury is situated in a *kendra* house (1, 4, 7, 10), or a *lābha* (11th) or *trikoṇa* (5th, 9th) house, or in its own exaltation sign, or in its own sign, then it is auspicious and brings royal favor.

sanskrit: सौभाग्यं पुत्रलाभश्च सन्मार्गेण धनागमः । पुराणधर्मश्रवणं श‍ृङ्गारिजनसंगमः ॥६१॥
transliteration: saubhāgyaṃ putralābhaśca sanmārgeṇa dhanāgamaḥ . purāṇadharmaśravaṇaṃ śa‍ृṅgārijanasaṃgamaḥ.
separated_sandhi: saubhāgyam putralābhaḥ ca sanmārgeṇa dhanāgamaḥpurāṇadharmaśravaṇam śṛṅgārijanasaṅgamaḥ
english: There will be good fortune, gain of children, and acquisition of wealth through righteous means. There will be listening to the ancient teachings (dharma) of the Purāṇas and association with people of an amorous disposition.

sanskrit: इष्टबन्धुजनाकीर्णं शोभितं तस्य मन्दिरम् । स्वप्रभोश्च महत्सौख्यं नित्यं मिष्ठान्नभोजनम् ॥६२॥
transliteration: iṣṭabandhujanākīrṇaṃ śobhitaṃ tasya mandiram . svaprabhośca mahatsaukhyaṃ nityaṃ miṣṭhānnabhojanam.
separated_sandhi: iṣṭabandhujanākīrṇam śobhitam tasya mandiramsvaprabhoḥ ca mahat saukhyam nityam miṣṭhānnabhojanam
english: His house (or temple) will be adorned, crowded with beloved relatives and friends. There will be great happiness for his own master/lord, and daily consumption of sweet foods.

sanskrit: दायेशात्षष्ठरन्ध्रे वा व्यये वा बलवर्जिते । पापदृष्टे पापयुक्ते चतुष्पाज्जीवहानिकृत् ॥६३॥
transliteration: dāyeśātṣaṣṭharandhre vā vyaye vā balavarjite . pāpadṛṣṭe pāpayukte catuṣpājjīvahānikṛt.
separated_sandhi: dāyeśāt ṣaṣṭharandhre vā vyaye vā balavarjitepāpadṛṣṭe pāpayukte catuṣpājjīvahānikṛt
english: If the lord of the planetary period (dāyeśa) is situated in the sixth, eighth, or twelfth house, is devoid of strength, or is aspected by or conjoined with a malefic planet, it causes the loss of four-footed creatures.

sanskrit: अन्यालयनिवासश्च मनोवैकल्यसम्भवः । व्यापारेषु च सर्वेषु हानिरेव न संशयः ॥६४॥
transliteration: anyālayanivāsaśca manovaikalyasambhavaḥ . vyāpāreṣu ca sarveṣu hānireva na saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: anyālayanivāsaḥ ca manovaikalyasambhavaḥvyāpāreṣu ca sarveṣu hāniḥ eva na saṃśayaḥ
english: There will also be residence in a different place and the occurrence of mental distress. In all undertakings, there will undoubtedly be only loss.

sanskrit: भुक्त्यादौ शोभनं प्रोक्तं मध्ये मध्यफलं दिशेत् । अन्ते क्लेशकरं चैव शीतवातज्वरादिकम् ॥६५॥
transliteration: bhuktyādau śobhanaṃ proktaṃ madhye madhyaphalaṃ diśet . ante kleśakaraṃ caiva śītavātajvarādikam.
separated_sandhi: bhuktyādau śobhanam proktam madhye madhyaphalamdiśet ante kleśakaram ca eva śītavātajvarādikam
english: In the beginning of the sub-period (bhukti), auspicious results are declared. In the middle, it indicates moderate results. And at the end, it causes troubles such as colds, wind-related ailments, fever, and so forth.

sanskrit: सप्तमाधीशदोषेण देहपीडा भविष्यति । तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं विष्णुसाहस्रकं जपेत् ॥६६॥
transliteration: saptamādhīśadoṣeṇa dehapīḍā bhaviṣyati . taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ viṣṇusāhasrakaṃ japet.
separated_sandhi: saptamādhīśadoṣeṇa dehapīḍā bhaviṣyatitaddoṣaparihārārtham viṣṇusāhasrakam japet
english: Due to a flaw in the lord of the seventh house, there will be bodily pain. For the purpose of removing that flaw, one should chant the Viṣṇu Sahasranāma.

sanskrit: शुक्रस्यान्तर्गते केतौ स्वोच्चे वा स्वर्क्षगेऽपि वा । योगकारकसम्बन्धे स्थानवीर्यसमन्विते ॥६७॥
transliteration: śukrasyāntargate ketau svocce vā svarkṣage'pi vā . yogakārakasambandhe sthānavīryasamanvite.
separated_sandhi: śukrasya antargate ketau svocce vā svaṛkṣagateapi vā yogakārakasambandhe sthānavīryasamanvite
english: When Ketu is in the sub-period of Venus, if Ketu is in its own exaltation sign or its own sign, or is connected with a planet that produces beneficial (yoga) results, and is endowed with positional strength...

sanskrit: भुक्त्यादौ शुभमाधिक्यान्नित्यं मिष्ठान्नभोजनम् । व्यवसायात्फलाधिक्यं गोमहोष्यादिवृद्धिकृत् ॥६८॥
transliteration: bhuktyādau śubhamādhikyānnityaṃ miṣṭhānnabhojanam . vyavasāyātphalādhikyaṃ gomahoṣyādivṛddhikṛt.
separated_sandhi: bhuktyādau śubham ādhikyāt nityam miṣṭānnābhojanamvyavasāyāt phalādhikyam gomahiṣyādivṛddhikṛt
english: During the initial part of the planetary sub-period (bhukti), an abundance of auspiciousness leads to a daily consumption of sweet foods. There is also increased profit from businesses, and an expansion in cattle wealth, such as cows and buffaloes.

sanskrit: धनधान्यसमृद्धिश्च संग्रामे विजयो भवेत् । भुक्त्यन्ते हि सुखं चैव भुक्त्यादौ मध्यमं फलम् ॥६९॥
transliteration: dhanadhānyasamṛddhiśca saṃgrāme vijayo bhavet . bhuktyante hi sukhaṃ caiva bhuktyādau madhyamaṃ phalam.
separated_sandhi: dhanadhānyasamṛddhiḥ ca saṃgrāme vijayaḥ bhavetbhuktyante hi sukham ca eva bhuktyādau madhyamam phalam
english: There will be prosperity in wealth and grains, and victory in conflicts. At the conclusion of the planetary sub-period (bhukti), there is certainly happiness, whereas in its initial phase, the outcomes are moderate.

sanskrit: मध्ये मध्ये महत्कष्टं पश्चादारोग्यमादिशेत् । दायेशाद्रन्ध्रभावस्थे व्यये वा पापसंयुते ॥७०॥
transliteration: madhye madhye mahatkaṣṭaṃ paścādārogyamādiśet . dāyeśādrandhrabhāvasthe vyaye vā pāpasaṃyute.
separated_sandhi: madhye madhye mahat kaṣṭam paścāt ārogyam ādiśetdāyeśāt randhrabhāvasthe vyaye vā pāpasaṃyute
english: During the middle portion [of the sub-period (bhukti)], there is significant hardship; however, health is indicated later. This occurs when the lord of the planetary sub-period (dāyeśa) is situated in the eighth house (randhra-bhāva), or the twelfth house (vyaya-bhāva), or is conjoined with malefic planets (pāpa-saṃyute).

sanskrit: चौराहिव्रणपीडा च बुद्धिनाशो महद्भयम् । शिरोरुजं मनस्तापमकर्मकलहं वदेत् ॥७१॥
transliteration: caurāhivraṇapīḍā ca buddhināśo mahadbhayam . śirorujaṃ manastāpamakarmakalahaṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: caurāhivraṇapīḍā ca buddhināśaḥ mahat bhayamśirorujam manastāpam akarmakalaham vadet
english: (This verse continues the condition from 140603) Such a planetary configuration indicates affliction from thieves, snakes, and wounds; loss of intellect; great fear; headaches; mental distress; and conflicts arising from idleness.

sanskrit: प्रमेहभवरोगं च नानामार्गे धनव्ययः । भार्यापुत्रविरोधश्च गमनं कार्यनाशनम् ॥७२॥
transliteration: pramehabhavarogaṃ ca nānāmārge dhanavyayaḥ . bhāryāputravirodhaśca gamanaṃ kāryanāśanam.
separated_sandhi: pramehabhavarogam ca nānāmārge dhanavyayaḥbhāryāputravirodhaḥ ca gamanam kāryanāśanam
english: (This verse continues the condition from 140603-140604) Furthermore, it signifies diseases such as urinary disorders (prameha), expenditures of wealth through various means, conflicts with one's spouse and children, and travels that result in the destruction of one's undertakings.

sanskrit: द्वितीयद्यूननाथे तु देहबाधा भविष्यति । तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं मृत्युञ्जयजपं चरेत् ॥७३॥
transliteration: dvitīyadyūnanāthe tu dehabādhā bhaviṣyati . taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ mṛtyuñjayajapaṃ caret.
separated_sandhi: dvitīya-dyūna-nāthe tu deha-bādhā bhaviṣyatitat doṣa-parihārārtham mṛtyuñjaya-japam caret
english: If the lord of the eighth house (which is the second from the seventh house) is prominent, there will be bodily afflictions. For the removal of this defect, one should perform the recitation (japa) of the Mṛtyuñjaya mantra.

sanskrit: छागदानं प्रकुर्वीत सर्वसम्पत्प्रदायकम् । शुक्रप्रीतिकरीं शान्तिं ततः सुखमवाप्नुयात् ॥७४॥
transliteration: chāgadānaṃ prakurvīta sarvasampatpradāyakam . śukraprītikarīṃ śāntiṃ tataḥ sukhamavāpnuyāt.
separated_sandhi: chāga-dānam prakurvīta sarva-sampat-pradāyakamśukra-prītikarīm śāntim tataḥ sukham avāpnuyāt
english: One should perform the donation of a goat, which bestows all prosperity. One should also perform a pacification ritual that pleases Venus. Thereafter, one will attain happiness.

sanskrit: पृथक् स्वस्वदशामानैर्हन्यादन्तर्दशामितिम् । भ्येत्सर्वदशायोगैः फलं प्रत्यन्तरं क्रमात् ॥१॥
transliteration: pṛthak svasvadaśāmānairhanyādantardaśāmitim . bhyetsarvadaśāyogaiḥ phalaṃ pratyantaraṃ kramāt.
separated_sandhi: pṛthak svasva-daśā-mānaiḥ hanyāt antardaśā-mitimbhet sarva-daśā-yogaiḥ phalam pratyantaram kramāt
english: Separately, one should determine the duration of the sub-period (antardaśā) by means of the measures of their respective major periods (daśā). One should discern the results for each sub-sub-period (pratyantardaśā) in sequence, by considering all the combinations of the major periods.

sanskrit: विवादो वित्तहानिश्च दारार्तिः शिरसि व्यथा । रव्यन्तरे बुधैर्ज्ञेयं तस्य प्रत्यन्तरे फलम् ॥२॥
transliteration: vivādo vittahāniśca dārārtiḥ śirasi vyathā . ravyantare budhairjñeyaṃ tasya pratyantare phalam.
separated_sandhi: vivādaḥ vitta-hāniḥ ca dāra-ārtiḥ śirasi vyathāravi antare budhaiḥ jñeyam tasya pratyantare phalam
english: Disputes, loss of wealth, distress to the spouse, and head pain - these are the results that should be known by astrologers during the Sun's sub-period (antardaśā) and its corresponding sub-sub-period (pratyantardaśā).

sanskrit: उद्वेगः कलहश्चैव वित्तहानिर्मनोव्यथा । रव्यन्तरे विजानीयात् चन्द्रप्रत्यन्तरे फलम् ॥३॥
transliteration: udvegaḥ kalahaścaiva vittahānirmanovyathā . ravyantare vijānīyāt candrapratyantare phalam.
separated_sandhi: udvegaḥ kalahaḥ ca eva vitta-hāniḥ manas-vyathāravi antare vijānīyāt candra-pratyantare phalam
english: Anxiety, disputes, loss of wealth, and mental distress - one should know these as the results during the Sun's sub-period (antardaśā) and the Moon's sub-sub-period (pratyantardaśā).

sanskrit: राजभीतिः शस्त्रभीतिर्बन्धनं बहुसंकटम् । स/त्रुवह्निकृता पीडा कुजप्रत्यन्तरे फलम् ॥४॥
transliteration: rājabhītiḥ śastrabhītirbandhanaṃ bahusaṃkaṭam . sa/truvahnikṛtā pīḍā kujapratyantare phalam.
separated_sandhi: rāja-bhītiḥ śastra-bhītiḥ bandhanam bahu-saṅkaṭamśatru-vahni-kṛtā pīḍā kujaprātyantare phalam
english: During the sub-sub-period of Mars, one experiences fear from the government, fear from weapons, imprisonment, great distress, and suffering caused by enemies and fire.

sanskrit: श्लेष्मव्याधिः शस्त्रभीतिएधनहानिर्महद्भयम् । राजभङ्गस्तथा त्रासो राहुप्रत्यन्तरे फलम् ॥५॥
transliteration: śleṣmavyādhiḥ śastrabhītiedhanahānirmahadbhayam . rājabhaṅgastathā trāso rāhupratyantare phalam.
separated_sandhi: śleṣma-vyādhiḥ śastra-bhītiḥ edhana-hāniḥ mahodvegaḥmahā-bhayam rāja-bhaṅgaḥ tathā trāsaḥ rāhu-pratyantare phalam
english: During the sub-sub-period of Rahu, there are phlegmatic diseases, fear from weapons, loss of prosperity, great fear, disgrace from authorities, and terror.

sanskrit: शत्रुनाशो जयो वृद्धिर्वस्त्रहेमादिभूषणम् । अश्वयानादिलाभश्च गुरुप्रत्यन्तरे फलम् ॥६॥
transliteration: śatrunāśo jayo vṛddhirvastrahemādibhūṣaṇam . aśvayānādilābhaśca gurupratyantare phalam.
separated_sandhi: śatru-nāśaḥ jayaḥ vṛddhiḥ vastra-hema-ādi-bhūṣaṇamaśva-yāna-ādi-lābhaḥ ca guru-pratyantare phalam
english: During the sub-sub-period of Jupiter (guru), one experiences the destruction of enemies, victory, prosperity, the acquisition of ornaments such as clothes and gold, and gains like horses and conveyances.

sanskrit: धनहानिः पशोः पीडा महोद्वेगो महारुजः । अशुभं सर्वमाप्नोति शनिप्रत्यन्तरे जनः ॥७॥
transliteration: dhanahāniḥ paśoḥ pīḍā mahodvego mahārujaḥ . aśubhaṃ sarvamāpnoti śanipratyantare janaḥ.
separated_sandhi: dhana-hāniḥ paśoḥ pīḍā mahodvegaḥ mahā-rujaḥaśubham sarvam āpnoti śani-pratyantare janaḥ
english: During the sub-sub-period of Saturn (śani), a person experiences loss of wealth, suffering for their animals, great anxiety, severe illness, and generally encounters all inauspicious things.

sanskrit: विद्यालाभो बन्धुसङ्ग भोज्यप्राप्तिर्धनागमः । धर्मलाभो नृपात्पूजा बिधप्रत्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥८॥
transliteration: vidyālābho bandhusaṅga bhojyaprāptirdhanāgamaḥ . dharmalābho nṛpātpūjā bidhapratyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: vidyā-lābhaḥ bandhu-saṅgaḥ bhojya-prāptiḥ dhanāgamaḥdharma-lābhaḥ nṛpāt pūjā vidhu-pratyantare bhavet
english: During the sub-sub-period of the Moon (vidhu), one experiences the acquisition of knowledge, the company of relatives, the obtainment of good food, the gain of wealth, the gain of virtue (dharma), and honor from the ruler.

sanskrit: प्राणभीतिर्महाहानी राजभीतिश्च विग्रहः । शत्रुणाञ्च महावादो केतोः प्रत्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥९॥
transliteration: prāṇabhītirmahāhānī rājabhītiśca vigrahaḥ . śatruṇāñca mahāvādo ketoḥ pratyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: prāṇabhītiḥ mahāhānī rājabhītiḥ ca vigrahaḥśatruṇām ca mahāvādaḥ ketoḥ pratyantare bhavet
english: During the sub-sub-period of Ketu, there will be fear for one's life, significant financial losses, fear from governmental authorities, disputes, and major arguments with enemies.

sanskrit: दिनानि समरूपाणि लाभोऽप्यल्पो भवेदिह । स्वल्पा च सुखसम्पत्तिः शुक्रप्रत्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥१०॥
transliteration: dināni samarūpāṇi lābho'pyalpo bhavediha . svalpā ca sukhasampattiḥ śukrapratyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: dināni samarūpāṇi lābhaḥ api alpaḥ bhavet ihasvalpā ca sukhasampattiḥ śukrapratyantare bhavet
english: During the sub-sub-period of Venus (Śukra), days will be uneventful or ordinary, and there will be only minor gains. Happiness and prosperity will also be minimal.

sanskrit: भूमोज्यधनसम्प्राप्ती राजपूजामहत्सुखम् । लाभश्चन्द्रान्तरे ज्ञेयं चन्द्रप्रत्यन्तरे फलम् ॥११॥
transliteration: bhūmojyadhanasamprāptī rājapūjāmahatsukham . lābhaścandrāntare jñeyaṃ candrapratyantare phalam.
separated_sandhi: bhūmyojyadhanasampraptī rājapūjāmahatsukham lābhaḥca candrāntare jñeyam candrapratyantare phalam
english: During the sub-sub-period of the Moon (Candra), there will be the acquisition of land, enjoyment, and wealth, along with great happiness from royal honors. This period is known for gains and favorable results.

sanskrit: मतिवृद्धिर्महापूज्यः सुखं बन्धुजनैः सह । धनागमः शत्रुभयं कुजप्रत्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥१२॥
transliteration: mativṛddhirmahāpūjyaḥ sukhaṃ bandhujanaiḥ saha . dhanāgamaḥ śatrubhayaṃ kujapratyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: mativṛddhiḥ mahāpūjyaḥ sukham bandhujanaiḥ sahadhanāgamaḥ śatrubhayam kujapratyantare bhavet
english: During the sub-sub-period of Mars (Kuja), there will be an increase in intelligence, great respect, happiness in the company of relatives, and the acquisition of wealth. However, there will also be fear from enemies.

sanskrit: भवेत्कल्याणसम्पत्ती राजवित्तसमागमः । अशुभैरल्पमृत्युअश्च राहुप्रत्यन्तरे द्विज ॥१३॥
transliteration: bhavetkalyāṇasampattī rājavittasamāgamaḥ . aśubhairalpamṛtyuaśca rāhupratyantare dvija.
separated_sandhi: bhavet kalyāṇasampattī rājavittasamāgamaḥaśubhaiḥ alpamṛtyuḥ ca rāhupratyantare dvija
english: O twice-born (dvija), during the sub-sub-period of Rahu, there will be auspicious prosperity and the accumulation of royal wealth. However, it will also bring a minor risk of death or minor troubles caused by malefic influences.

sanskrit: वस्त्रलाभो महातेजो ब्रह्मज्ञानं च सद्गुरोः । राज्यालंकरणावाप्तिर्गुरुप्रत्यन्तरे फलम् ॥१४॥
transliteration: vastralābho mahātejo brahmajñānaṃ ca sadguroḥ . rājyālaṃkaraṇāvāptirgurupratyantare phalam.
separated_sandhi: vastralābhaḥ mahātejaḥ brahmajñānaṃ ca sadguroḥrājyālaṅkaraṇāvāptiḥ gurupratyantare phalam
english: During the sub-sub-period of Jupiter (Guru), one experiences the acquisition of clothes, great splendor, knowledge of the Absolute (Brahman) from a true teacher (guru), and the attainment of a kingdom and ornaments.

sanskrit: दुर्दिने लभते पीडां वातपित्ताद्विशेषतः । धनधान्ययशोहानिः शनिप्रत्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥१५॥
transliteration: durdine labhate pīḍāṃ vātapittādviśeṣataḥ . dhanadhānyayaśohāniḥ śanipratyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: durdine labhate pīḍām vātapittāt viśeṣataḥdhanadhānyayaśohāniḥ śanipratyantare bhavet
english: During difficult times, one experiences distress, especially due to imbalances of vāta and pitta [doshas]. Loss of wealth, grains, and reputation occurs during the sub-sub-period of Saturn (Shani).

sanskrit: पुत्रजन्महयप्राप्तिर्विद्यालाभो महोन्नतिः । शुक्लवस्त्रान्नलाभश्च बुधप्रत्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥१६॥
transliteration: putrajanmahayaprāptirvidyālābho mahonnatiḥ . śuklavastrānnalābhaśca budhapratyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: putrajanma hayaprāptiḥ vidyālābhaḥ mahonnatiḥśuklavastrānnalābhaḥ ca budhapratyantare bhavet
english: During the sub-sub-period of Mercury (Budha), there will be the birth of a son, acquisition of horses, gain of knowledge, great advancement, and the acquisition of white clothes and food.

sanskrit: ब्राह्मणेन समं युद्धमपमृत्युः सुखक्षयः । सर्वत्र जायते क्लेशः केतोः प्रत्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥१७॥
transliteration: brāhmaṇena samaṃ yuddhamapamṛtyuḥ sukhakṣayaḥ . sarvatra jāyate kleśaḥ ketoḥ pratyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: brāhmaṇena samaṃ yuddham apamṛtyuḥ sukhakṣayaḥsarvatra jāyate kleśaḥ ketoḥ pratyantare bhavet
english: During the sub-sub-period of Ketu, there will be conflict with Brahmins, untimely death, and a loss of happiness. Distress will arise everywhere.

sanskrit: धनलाभो महत्सौख्यं कन्याजन्म सुभोजनम् । प्रीतिश्च सर्वलोकेभ्यो भृगुप्रत्यन्तरे विधोः ॥१८॥
transliteration: dhanalābho mahatsaukhyaṃ kanyājanma subhojanam . prītiśca sarvalokebhyo bhṛgupratyantare vidhoḥ.
separated_sandhi: dhanalābhaḥ mahatsaukhyam kanyājanma subhojanamprītiḥ ca sarvalokebhyaḥ bhṛgupratyantare vidhoḥ
english: During the sub-sub-period of Venus (Bhṛgu) within the main period of the Moon, there will be acquisition of wealth, great happiness, the birth of a daughter, delicious food, and affection from all people.

sanskrit: अन्नागमो वस्त्रलाभः शत्रुहानिः सुखागमः । सर्वत्र विजयप्राप्तिः सूर्यप्रत्यन्तरे विधोः ॥१९॥
transliteration: annāgamo vastralābhaḥ śatruhāniḥ sukhāgamaḥ . sarvatra vijayaprāptiḥ sūryapratyantare vidhoḥ.
separated_sandhi: annāgamaḥ vastralābhaḥ śatruhāniḥ sukhāgamaḥsarvatra vijayaprāptiḥ sūryapratyantare vidhoḥ
english: During the Moon's (vidhu) sub-sub-period within the Sun's sub-period, there will be gains of food, acquisition of clothes, destruction of enemies, and the arrival of happiness. Victory will be achieved everywhere.

sanskrit: शत्रुभीतिं कलिं घोरं रक्तस्रावं मृतेर्भयम् । कुजस्यान्तर्दशायां च कुजप्रत्यन्तरे वदेत् ॥२०॥
transliteration: śatrubhītiṃ kaliṃ ghoraṃ raktasrāvaṃ mṛterbhayam . kujasyāntardaśāyāṃ ca kujapratyantare vadet.
separated_sandhi: śatrubhītim kalim ghoram raktasrāvam mṛteḥ bhayamkujasya antardaśāyām ca kujapratyantare vadet
english: One should state that during Mars' (kuja) sub-sub-period within Mars' own sub-period, there will be fear from enemies, dreadful strife, bleeding, and fear of death.

sanskrit: बन्धनं राजभङ्गश्च धनहानिः कुभोजनम् । कलहः शत्रुभिर्नित्यं राहुप्रत्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥२१॥
transliteration: bandhanaṃ rājabhaṅgaśca dhanahāniḥ kubhojanam . kalahaḥ śatrubhirnityaṃ rāhupratyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: bandhanam rājabhaṅgaḥ ca dhanahāniḥ kubhojanamkalahaḥ śatrubhiḥ nityam rāhupratyantare bhavet
english: During Rahu's sub-sub-period, there will be imprisonment, disgrace from the king or government, loss of wealth, unwholesome food, and constant quarrels with enemies.

sanskrit: मतिनाशस्तथा दुःखं सन्तापः कलहो भवेत् । विफलं चिन्तितं सर्वं गुरोः प्रत्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥२२॥
transliteration: matināśastathā duḥkhaṃ santāpaḥ kalaho bhavet . viphalaṃ cintitaṃ sarvaṃ guroḥ pratyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: matināśaḥ tathā duḥkham santāpaḥ kalahaḥ bhavetviphalam cintitam sarvam guroḥ pratyantare bhavet
english: During Jupiter's (guru) sub-sub-period, there will be mental confusion, sorrow, anguish, and quarrels. All thoughts and efforts will become fruitless.

sanskrit: स्वामिनाशस्तथा पीडा धनहानिर्न्महाभयम् । वैकल्यं कलहस्त्रासो शनेः प्रत्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥२३॥
transliteration: svāmināśastathā pīḍā dhanahānirnmahābhayam . vaikalyaṃ kalahastrāso śaneḥ pratyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: svāmināśaḥ tathā pīḍā dhanahāniḥ mahābhayamvaikalyaṃ kalahaḥ trāsaḥ śaneḥ pratyantare bhavet
english: During Saturn's (śani) sub-sub-period, there will be loss of the master or husband, affliction, loss of wealth, great fear, disability, quarrels, and terror.

sanskrit: सर्वथा बुद्धिनाशश्च धनहानिर्ज्वरस्तनौ । वस्त्रान्नसुहृदां नाशो बुधप्रत्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥२४॥
transliteration: sarvathā buddhināśaśca dhanahānirjvarastanau . vastrānnasuhṛdāṃ nāśo budhapratyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: sarvathā buddhināśaḥ ca dhanahāniḥ jvaraḥ tanauvastra-anna-suhṛdām nāśaḥ budha-pratyantare bhavet
english: In the sub-period (pratyantara) of Budha (Mercury), there will be a complete destruction of intellect, loss of wealth, fever in the body, and the loss of clothes, food, and friends.

sanskrit: आलस्य च शिरःपीडा पापरोगोऽपमृत्युकृत् । राजभीतिः शस्त्रघातो केतोः प्रत्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥२५॥
transliteration: ālasya ca śiraḥpīḍā pāparogo'pamṛtyukṛt . rājabhītiḥ śastraghāto ketoḥ pratyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: ālasya ca śiraḥpīḍā pāparogaḥ apamṛtyukṛtrājabhītiḥ śastraghātaḥ ketoḥ pratyantare bhavet
english: In the sub-period (pratyantara) of Ketu, there will be laziness, headache, evil diseases, accidental death, fear from the king/government, and wounds from weapons.

sanskrit: चाण्डालात्सङ्कटस्त्रासो राजशास्त्रभयं भवेत् । अतिसाराऽथ वमनं भृगोः प्रत्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥२६॥
transliteration: cāṇḍālātsaṅkaṭastrāso rājaśāstrabhayaṃ bhavet . atisārā'tha vamanaṃ bhṛgoḥ pratyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: cāṇḍālāt saṅkaṭa-strāsaḥ rāja-śastra-bhayam bhavetatisāraḥ atha vamanaṃ bhṛgoḥ pratyantare bhavet
english: In the sub-period (pratyantara) of Bhṛgu (Venus), there will be danger and fear from outcasts, fear from royal power/decrees and weapons, dysentery, and vomiting.

sanskrit: भूमिलाभोऽर्थसम्पत्तिः सन्तोषो मित्रसङ्गतिः । सर्वत्र सुखमाप्नोति रवेः प्रत्यन्तरे जनः ॥२७॥
transliteration: bhūmilābho'rthasampattiḥ santoṣo mitrasaṅgatiḥ . sarvatra sukhamāpnoti raveḥ pratyantare janaḥ.
separated_sandhi: bhūmilābhaḥ arthasampattiḥ santoṣaḥ mitrasaṅgatiḥsarvatra sukham āpnoti raveḥ pratyantare janaḥ
english: In the sub-period (pratyantara) of Ravi (Sun), a person obtains gain of land, acquisition of wealth, contentment, association with friends, and happiness everywhere.

sanskrit: याम्यां दिशि भवेल्लाभः सितवस्त्रविभूषणम् । संसिद्धिः सर्वकार्याणां विधोः प्रत्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥२८॥
transliteration: yāmyāṃ diśi bhavellābhaḥ sitavastravibhūṣaṇam . saṃsiddhiḥ sarvakāryāṇāṃ vidhoḥ pratyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: yāmyām diśi bhavet lābhaḥ sitavastravibhūṣaṇamsaṃsiddhiḥ sarvakāryāṇām vidhoḥ pratyantare bhavet
english: In the sub-period (pratyantara) of Vidhu (Moon), there will be gains in the southern direction, white clothes and ornaments, and the complete accomplishment of all undertakings.

sanskrit: बन्धनं बहुधा रोगो बहुघातः सुहृद्भयम् । राह्वन्तर्दशायां च ज्ञेयं राह्वन्तरे फलम् ॥२९॥
transliteration: bandhanaṃ bahudhā rogo bahughātaḥ suhṛdbhayam . rāhvantardaśāyāṃ ca jñeyaṃ rāhvantare phalam.
separated_sandhi: bandhanam bahudhā rogaḥ bahughātaḥ suhṛdbhayamrāhvantardaśāyām ca jñeyam rāhvantare phalam
english: During the sub-period (antardaśā) of Rāhu, and similarly, during its inner-sub-period (pratyantardaśā), one should expect results such as various forms of confinement, diseases, significant injuries, and fear from friends.

sanskrit: सर्वत्र लभते मानं गजाश्वं च धनागमम् । राहोरन्तर्दशायां च गुरोः प्रत्यन्तरे जनः ॥३०॥
transliteration: sarvatra labhate mānaṃ gajāśvaṃ ca dhanāgamam . rāhorantardaśāyāṃ ca guroḥ pratyantare janaḥ.
separated_sandhi: sarvatra labhate mānam gajāśvam ca dhanāgamamrāhoḥ antardaśāyām ca guroḥ pratyantare janaḥ
english: Everywhere, a person (jana) gains honor, elephants and horses, and an inflow of wealth. This occurs specifically during the sub-period (antardaśā) of Rāhu and the inner-sub-period (pratyantara) of Jupiter (guru).

sanskrit: बन्धनं जायते घोरं सुखहानिर्महद्भयम् । प्रत्यहं वातपीडा च शनेः प्रत्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥३१॥
transliteration: bandhanaṃ jāyate ghoraṃ sukhahānirmahadbhayam . pratyahaṃ vātapīḍā ca śaneḥ pratyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: bandhanam jāyate ghoram sukhahāniḥ mahadbhayāmpratyaham vātapīḍā ca śaneḥ pratyantare bhavet
english: In the inner-sub-period (pratyantara) of Saturn (śani), terrible confinement (bandhana) occurs, along with loss of happiness, great fear, and daily afflictions from vāta (vātapīḍā) disorders.

sanskrit: सर्वत्र बहुधा लाभः स्त्रीसङ्गाच्च विशेषतः । परदेशभवा सिद्धिर्बुधप्रत्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥३२॥
transliteration: sarvatra bahudhā lābhaḥ strīsaṅgācca viśeṣataḥ . paradeśabhavā siddhirbudhapratyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: sarvatra bahudhā lābhaḥ strīsaṅgāt ca viśeṣataḥparadeśabhavā siddhiḥ budhapratyantare bhavet
english: In the inner-sub-period (pratyantara) of Mercury (budha), there will be manifold gains everywhere, especially through associations with women, and success will arise from foreign lands.

sanskrit: बुद्धिनाशो भयं विघ्नो धनहानिर्महद्भयम् । सर्वत्र कलहोद्वेगौ केतोः प्रत्यन्तरे फलम् ॥३३॥
transliteration: buddhināśo bhayaṃ vighno dhanahānirmahadbhayam . sarvatra kalahodvegau ketoḥ pratyantare phalam.
separated_sandhi: buddhināśaḥ bhayam vighnaḥ dhanahāniḥ mahadbhayāmsarvatra kalahodvegau ketoḥ pratyantare phalam
english: During the inner-sub-period (pratyantara) of Ketu, there will be mental confusion, fear, obstacles, financial loss, great apprehension, and general quarrels and anxieties everywhere. These are the results.

sanskrit: योगिनीभ्यो भयं भूयादश्वहानिः कुभोजनम् । स्त्रीनाशः कुलजं शोकं शुक्रप्रत्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥३४॥
transliteration: yoginībhyo bhayaṃ bhūyādaśvahāniḥ kubhojanam . strīnāśaḥ kulajaṃ śokaṃ śukrapratyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: yoginībhyo bhayam bhūyāt aśvahāniḥ kubhojanamstrīnāśaḥ kulajam śokam śukrapratyantare bhavet
english: In the "pratyantara" (sub-sub-period) of Venus (śukra), there may be fear from yoginis, loss of horses, bad food, loss of wife, and family-related grief.

sanskrit: ज्वररोगो महाभीतिः पुत्रपौत्रादिपीडनम् । अल्पमृत्युः प्रमादश्च रवेः प्रत्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥३५॥
transliteration: jvararogo mahābhītiḥ putrapautrādipīḍanam . alpamṛtyuḥ pramādaśca raveḥ pratyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: jvararogaḥ mahābhītiḥ putrapautrādipīḍanamalpamṛtyuḥ pramādaḥ ca raveḥ pratyantare bhavet
english: In the "pratyantara" (sub-sub-period) of the Sun (ravi), there will be fever, great fear, affliction of sons and grandsons, untimely death, and misfortune.

sanskrit: उद्वेगकलहो चिन्ता मानहानिर्महद्भयम् । पितुर्विकलता देहे विद्योः रवेः प्रत्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥३६॥
transliteration: udvegakalaho cintā mānahānirmahadbhayam . piturvikalatā dehe vidyoḥ raveḥ pratyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: udvegakalahaḥ cintā mānahāniḥ mahat bhayam pituḥvikalatā dehe vidyoḥ raveḥ pratyantare bhavet
english: Agitation, quarrels, worry, loss of honor, great fear, physical distress to the father, and difficulties from learned persons occur in the "pratyantara" (sub-sub-period) of the Sun (ravi).

sanskrit: भगन्दरकृता पीडा रक्तपित्तप्रपीडनम् । अर्थहानिर्महोद्वेगः कुजप्रत्यन्तरे फलम् ॥३७॥
transliteration: bhagandarakṛtā pīḍā raktapittaprapīḍanam . arthahānirmahodvegaḥ kujapratyantare phalam.
separated_sandhi: bhagandarakṛtā pīḍā raktapittaprapīḍanamarthahāniḥ mahat udvegaḥ kujapratyantare phalam
english: In the "pratyantara" (sub-sub-period) of Mars (kuja), the results are affliction caused by fistula, severe suffering from blood-bile diseases, loss of wealth, and great agitation.

sanskrit: हेमलाभो धान्यवृद्धि कल्याणं सुफलोदयः । गुरोरन्तर्दशायां च भवेद् गुर्वन्तरे फलम् ॥३८॥
transliteration: hemalābho dhānyavṛddhi kalyāṇaṃ suphalodayaḥ . gurorantardaśāyāṃ ca bhaved gurvantare phalam.
separated_sandhi: hemalābhaḥ dhānyavṛddhiḥ kalyāṇam suphalodayaḥguroḥ antardaśāyām ca bhavet guru antare phalam
english: Gain of gold, increase in grains or wealth, well-being, and the emergence of good results occur in the "antardaśā" (sub-period) of Jupiter (guru); these very results also manifest in the "pratyantara" (sub-sub-period) of Jupiter (guru) [within its own "antardaśā"].

sanskrit: गोभूमिहयलाभः स्यात्सर्वत्र सुखसाधनम् । संग्रहो ह्यन्नपानादेः शनेः प्रत्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥३९॥
transliteration: gobhūmihayalābhaḥ syātsarvatra sukhasādhanam . saṃgraho hyannapānādeḥ śaneḥ pratyantare bhavet.
