separated_sandhi: gobhūmihayalābhaḥ syāt sarvatra sukhasādhanamsaṃgrahaḥ hi annapānādeḥ śaneḥ pratyantare bhavet
english: During the sub-sub-period of Saturn (Śani), there will be gains of cows, land, and horses, which lead to happiness everywhere. Indeed, there will also be an accumulation of food, drink, and other provisions.

sanskrit: विद्यालाभो वस्त्रलाभो ज्ञानलाभः समौक्तिकः । सुहृदां सङ्गमः स्नेहो बुधप्रत्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥४०॥
transliteration: vidyālābho vastralābho jñānalābhaḥ samauktikaḥ . suhṛdāṃ saṅgamaḥ sneho budhapratyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: vidyālābhaḥ vastralābhaḥ jñānalābhaḥ samauktikaḥsuhṛdām saṅgamaḥ snehaḥ budhapratyantare bhavet
english: During the sub-sub-period of Mercury (Budha), there will be gains of learning, gains of clothes, and gains of knowledge, along with pearls. There will also be the association and affection of friends.

sanskrit: जलभीतिस्तथा चौर्यं बन्धनं कलहो भवेत् । अपमृत्युर्भयं घोरं केतोः प्रत्यन्तरे द्विज ॥४१॥
transliteration: jalabhītistathā cauryaṃ bandhanaṃ kalaho bhavet . apamṛtyurbhayaṃ ghoraṃ ketoḥ pratyantare dvija.
separated_sandhi: jalabhītiḥ tathā cauryam bandhanam kalahaḥ bhavetapamṛtyuḥ bhayam ghoram ketoḥ pratyantare dvija
english: O twice-born (dvija)! During the sub-sub-period of Ketu, there will be fear of water, theft, imprisonment, quarrels, unnatural death, and dreadful fear.

sanskrit: नानाविद्यार्थसम्प्राप्तिर्हेमवस्त्रविभूषणम् । लभते क्षेमसन्तोषं भृगोः प्रत्यन्तरे जनः ॥४२॥
transliteration: nānāvidyārthasamprāptirhemavastravibhūṣaṇam . labhate kṣemasantoṣaṃ bhṛgoḥ pratyantare janaḥ.
separated_sandhi: nānāvidyārthasamprāptiḥ hemavastravibhūṣaṇamlabhate kṣemasantōṣam bhṛgoḥ pratyantare janaḥ
english: During the sub-sub-period of Venus (Bhṛgu), a person obtains the acquisition of various kinds of learning and wealth, along with gold, clothes, and ornaments. They also achieve welfare and contentment.

sanskrit: नृपाल्लाभस्तथा मित्रात्पितृतो मातृतोऽपि वा । सर्वत्र लभते पूजां रवेः प्रत्यन्तरे जनः ॥४३॥
transliteration: nṛpāllābhastathā mitrātpitṛto mātṛto'pi vā . sarvatra labhate pūjāṃ raveḥ pratyantare janaḥ.
separated_sandhi: nṛpāt lābhaḥ tathā mitrāt pitṛtaḥ mātṛtaḥ api vāsarvatra labhate pūjām raveḥ pratyantare janaḥ
english: During the sub-sub-period of the Sun (Ravi), a person obtains gains from the king, from a friend, or from the father, or even from the mother. They receive honor everywhere.

sanskrit: सर्वदुःखविमोक्षश्च मुक्तलाभो हयस्य च । सिद्ध्यन्ति सर्वकार्याणि विधो प्रत्यन्तरे द्विज ॥४४॥
transliteration: sarvaduḥkhavimokṣaśca muktalābho hayasya ca . siddhyanti sarvakāryāṇi vidho pratyantare dvija.
separated_sandhi: sarvaduḥkhavimokṣaḥ ca muktalābhaḥ hayasya casiddhyanti sarvakāryāṇi vidho pratyantare dvija
english: O Brahmin, during the sub-sub-period (pratyantara) of the Moon, there is complete freedom from all suffering, the attainment of liberation (mokṣa), and the acquisition of horses. All undertakings are accomplished.

sanskrit: शस्त्रभीतिर्गदे पीडा वह्निमाद्द्यमजीर्णता । पीडा शत्रुकृता भूरिर्भौमप्रत्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥४५॥
transliteration: śastrabhītirgade pīḍā vahnimāddyamajīrṇatā . pīḍā śatrukṛtā bhūrirbhaumapratyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: śastrabhītiḥ gade pīḍā vahnimādyam ajīrṇatāpīḍā śatrukṛtā bhūriḥ bhaumapratyantare bhavet
english: During the sub-sub-period (pratyantara) of Mars (Bhauma), there will be fear of weapons, suffering from illness, problems related to fire or intoxication, indigestion, and significant distress caused by enemies.

sanskrit: चाण्डालेन विरधः स्याद्भयं तेभ्यो धनक्षतिः । कष्टं जीवान्तरे ज्ञेयं राहोः प्रत्यन्तरे ध्रुवम् ॥४६॥
transliteration: cāṇḍālena viradhaḥ syādbhayaṃ tebhyo dhanakṣatiḥ . kaṣṭaṃ jīvāntare jñeyaṃ rāhoḥ pratyantare dhruvam.
separated_sandhi: cāṇḍālena viradhaḥ syāt bhayam tebhyaḥ dhanakṣatiḥkaṣṭam jīvāntare jñeyam rāhoḥ pratyantare dhruvam
english: During the sub-sub-period (pratyantara) of Rahu, one will certainly experience harm or opposition from outcastes, fear from them, and loss of wealth. It should be known that distress will occur during this period of life.

sanskrit: देहपीडा कलेर्भीतिर्भयमन्त्यजलोकतः । दुःखं शन्यन्तरे नाना शनेः प्र्त्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥४७॥
transliteration: dehapīḍā kalerbhītirbhayamantyajalokataḥ . duḥkhaṃ śanyantare nānā śaneḥ prtyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: dehapīḍā kaleḥ bhītiḥ bhayam antyajalokataḥduḥkham śanyantare nānā śaneḥ pratyantare bhavet
english: During the sub-sub-period (pratyantara) of Saturn (Śani), there will be bodily suffering, fear of conflict or the age of Kali, and fear from outcastes. Various kinds of distress may occur.

sanskrit: बुद्धिनाशः कलेर्भीतिरन्नपानादिहानिकृत् । धन्हानिर्भयं शत्रोः सनेः प्रत्यन्तरे बुधे ॥४८॥
transliteration: buddhināśaḥ kalerbhītirannapānādihānikṛt . dhanhānirbhayaṃ śatroḥ saneḥ pratyantare budhe.
separated_sandhi: buddhināśaḥ kaleḥ bhītiḥ annapānādihānikṛtdhanahāniḥ bhayam śatroḥ śaneḥ pratyantare budhe
english: O learned one, during the sub-sub-period (pratyantara) of Saturn (Śani), there is a loss of intellect, fear of conflict or the age of Kali, and a reduction in food, drink, and other necessities. There is also a loss of wealth and fear from enemies.

sanskrit: बन्धः शत्रोर्गृहे जातो वर्णहानिर्बहुक्षुधा । चित्ते चिन्ता भयं त्रासः केतो प्रत्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥४९॥
transliteration: bandhaḥ śatrorgṛhe jāto varṇahānirbahukṣudhā . citte cintā bhayaṃ trāsaḥ keto pratyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: bandhaḥ śatroḥ gṛhe jātaḥ varṇahāniḥ bahukṣudhācitte cintā bhayam trāsaḥ ketoḥ pratyantare bhavet
english: During Ketu's sub-period (pratyantara), there will be imprisonment by enemies, loss of social standing, and intense hunger. The mind will be filled with anxiety, fear, and dread.

sanskrit: चिन्तितं फलितं वस्तु कल्याणं स्वजने सदा । मनुष्यकृतितो लाभः भृगिः प्रत्यन्तरे द्विज ॥५०॥
transliteration: cintitaṃ phalitaṃ vastu kalyāṇaṃ svajane sadā . manuṣyakṛtito lābhaḥ bhṛgiḥ pratyantare dvija.
separated_sandhi: cintitam phalitam vastu kalyāṇam svajane sadāmanuṣyakṛtitaḥ lābhaḥ bhṛgiḥ pratyantare dvija
english: O twice-born (dvija), during Venus's sub-period (pratyantara), one's desires will be fulfilled, and there will always be prosperity among one's own relatives. Gains will come through human effort.

sanskrit: राजतेजोऽधिकारित्वं स्वगृहे जायते कलिः । ज्वरादिव्याधिपीडा च रवेः प्रत्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥५१॥
transliteration: rājatejo'dhikāritvaṃ svagṛhe jāyate kaliḥ . jvarādivyādhipīḍā ca raveḥ pratyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: rājatejaḥ adhikāritvam svagṛhe jāyate kaliḥjvarādivyādhipīḍā ca raveḥ pratyantare bhavet
english: During the Sun's sub-period (pratyantara), one will experience royal splendor and authority, but there will be domestic strife in one's own home. Additionally, suffering from fevers and other ailments will occur.

sanskrit: स्फीतबुद्धिर्महारम्भो मन्दतेजा बहुव्ययः । बहुस्त्रीभिः समं भोगो विधोः प्रत्यन्तरे शनौ ॥५२॥
transliteration: sphītabuddhirmahārambho mandatejā bahuvyayaḥ . bahustrībhiḥ samaṃ bhogo vidhoḥ pratyantare śanau.
separated_sandhi: sphītabuddhiḥ mahārambhaḥ mandatejāḥ bahuvyayaḥbahustrībhiḥ samam bhogaḥ vidhoḥ pratyantare śanau
english: During the Moon's sub-period (pratyantara), when Saturn is influential, there is sharp intellect and grand initiatives, yet also diminished vitality and much expenditure. There is also enjoyment with many women.

sanskrit: तेजोहानि पुत्रघातो वह्निभीती रिपोर्भयम् । वातपित्तकृता पीडा कुजप्रत्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥५३॥
transliteration: tejohāni putraghāto vahnibhītī riporbhayam . vātapittakṛtā pīḍā kujapratyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: tejohāniḥ putraghātaḥ vahnibhītiḥ ripoḥ bhayamvātapittakṛtā pīḍā kujapratyantare bhavet
english: During Mars's sub-period (pratyantara), there will be a loss of vitality, harm to children, fear of fire, and fear from enemies. Additionally, afflictions caused by imbalances of Vāta and Pitta doshas will occur.

sanskrit: धननाशो वस्त्रहानिर्भूमिनाशो भयं भवेत् । विदेशगमनं मृत्युः राहो प्रत्यन्तरे शनौ ॥५४॥
transliteration: dhananāśo vastrahānirbhūmināśo bhayaṃ bhavet . videśagamanaṃ mṛtyuḥ rāho pratyantare śanau.
separated_sandhi: dhananāśaḥ vastrahāniḥ bhūmināśaḥ bhayam bhavetvideśagamanaṃ mṛtyuḥ rāho pratyantare śanau
english: During the sub-sub-period of Saturn (śani) in the sub-period of Rahu (rāhu), there would be loss of wealth, loss of clothes, loss of land, fear, foreign travel, and death.

sanskrit: गृहेषु स्वीकृतं छिद्रं ह्यसमर्थो निरीक्षणे । अथ वा कलिमुद्वेगं गुरोः प्रत्यन्तरे वदेत् ॥५५॥
transliteration: gṛheṣu svīkṛtaṃ chidraṃ hyasamartho nirīkṣaṇe . atha vā kalimudvegaṃ guroḥ pratyantare vadet.
separated_sandhi: gṛheṣu svīkṛtam chidram hi asamarthaḥ nirīkṣaṇeatha vā kalim udvegam guroḥ pratyantare vadet
english: During the sub-sub-period of Jupiter (guru), one should predict an admitted fault in the home and an inability in supervision, or alternatively, discord and agitation.

sanskrit: बुद्धिर्विद्यार्थलाभो वा वस्त्रलाभो महत्सुखम् । बुधास्यान्तर्दशायाञ्च बुधप्रत्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥५६॥
transliteration: buddhirvidyārthalābho vā vastralābho mahatsukham . budhāsyāntardaśāyāñca budhapratyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: buddhiḥ vidyārthalābhaḥ vā vastralābhaḥ mahat sukhambudhasya antardaśāyām ca budhapratyantare bhavet
english: Intelligence, gain of knowledge or wealth, gain of clothes, and great happiness would occur during the sub-period of Mercury (budha) and in the sub-sub-period of Mercury (budha).

sanskrit: कठिनान्नस्य सम्प्राप्तिरुदरे रोगसम्भवः । कामलं रक्तपित्तं च केतोः प्रत्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥५७॥
transliteration: kaṭhinānnasya samprāptirudare rogasambhavaḥ . kāmalaṃ raktapittaṃ ca ketoḥ pratyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: kaṭhinānnasya samprāptiḥ udare rogasambhavaḥkāmalama raktapittam ca ketoḥ pratyantare bhavet
english: During the sub-sub-period of Ketu (ketu), there would be the acquisition of difficult-to-digest food, the possibility of stomach diseases, jaundice, and bleeding disorders.

sanskrit: उत्तरस्यां भवेल्लाभो हानिः स्यात्तु चतुष्पदात् । अधिकारो नृपागारे भृगोः प्र्त्यनतरे भवेत् ॥५८॥
transliteration: uttarasyāṃ bhavellābho hāniḥ syāttu catuṣpadāt . adhikāro nṛpāgāre bhṛgoḥ prtyanatare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: uttarasyām bhavet lābhaḥ hāniḥ syāt tu catuṣpadātadhikāraḥ nṛpāgāre bhṛgoḥ pratyantare bhavet
english: During the sub-sub-period of Venus (bhṛgu), there would be gain from the northern direction, but there would be loss from quadrupeds, and authority in the royal court (or government).

sanskrit: तेजोहानिर्भवेद्रोगस्तनुपीडा यदा कदा । जायते चित्तवैकल्यं रवेः प्रत्यन्तरे बुधे ॥५९॥
transliteration: tejohānirbhavedrogastanupīḍā yadā kadā . jāyate cittavaikalyaṃ raveḥ pratyantare budhe.
separated_sandhi: tejo-hāniḥ bhavet rogaḥ tanu-pīḍā yadā kadājāyate citta-vaikalyaṃ raveḥ pratyantare budhe
english: When Mercury (budha) is the major planetary period (daśā) lord, and the sub-sub-period (pratyantardaśā) is of the Sun (ravi), there will be a loss of vitality, disease, and occasional bodily suffering. Mental distress also arises.

sanskrit: स्त्रीलाभश्चार्थसम्पत्तिः कन्यालाभो महद्धनम् । लभते सर्वतः सौख्यं विधोः प्र्त्यन्तरे जनः ॥६०॥
transliteration: strīlābhaścārthasampattiḥ kanyālābho mahaddhanam . labhate sarvataḥ saukhyaṃ vidhoḥ prtyantare janaḥ.
separated_sandhi: strī-lābhaḥ ca artha-sampattiḥ kanyā-lābhaḥ mahat dhanamlabhate sarvataḥ saukhyaṃ vidhoḥ pratyantare janaḥ
english: During the sub-sub-period (pratyantardaśā) of the Moon (vidhu), a person obtains a wife, acquires wealth, gains a daughter, and receives great riches. They experience happiness from all sides.

sanskrit: धर्मधीधनसम्प्राप्तिश्चौराग्न्यादिप्रपीडनम् । रक्तवस्त्रं शस्त्रघातं भौमप्रत्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥६१॥
transliteration: dharmadhīdhanasamprāptiścaurāgnyādiprapīḍanam . raktavastraṃ śastraghātaṃ bhaumapratyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: dharma-dhī-dhana-samprāptiḥ ca caurāgnyādi-prapīḍanamrakta-vastraṃ śastra-ghātaṃ bhauma-pratyantare bhavet
english: During the sub-sub-period (pratyantardaśā) of Mars (bhauma), there is acquisition of righteousness (dharma), wisdom, and wealth. However, there is also affliction from thieves, fire, and similar dangers, along with the acquisition of red garments and injury by weapons.

sanskrit: कलहो जायते स्त्रीभिरकस्माद्भयसम्भवः । राजशस्त्राकृता भीतिः राहिः प्र्त्यन्तरे द्विज ॥६२॥
transliteration: kalaho jāyate strībhirakasmādbhayasambhavaḥ . rājaśastrākṛtā bhītiḥ rāhiḥ prtyantare dvija.
separated_sandhi: kalahaḥ jāyate strībhiḥ akasmāt bhaya-sambhavaḥrāja-śastra-ākṛtā bhītiḥ rāhuḥ pratyantare dvija
english: O twice-born (dvija), during the sub-sub-period (pratyantardaśā) of Rahu, quarrels arise with women. There is also the unexpected occurrence of fear, and apprehension caused by kings or rulers and weapons.

sanskrit: राज्यं राज्याधिकारो वा पूजा राजसमुद्भवा । विद्याबुद्धिसमृद्धिश्च गुरोः प्रत्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥६३॥
transliteration: rājyaṃ rājyādhikāro vā pūjā rājasamudbhavā . vidyābuddhisamṛddhiśca guroḥ pratyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: rājyaṃ rājya-adhikāraḥ vā pūjā rāja-samudbhavāvidyā-buddhi-samṛddhiḥ ca guroḥ pratyantare bhavet
english: During the sub-sub-period (pratyantardaśā) of Jupiter (guru), a kingdom, royal authority, or honor from rulers may be obtained. Prosperity in learning and intellect (buddhi) also occurs.

sanskrit: वातपित्तमहापीडा देहघातसमुद्भवा । धननाशमवाप्नोति शनेः प्रत्यन्तरे जनः ॥६४॥
transliteration: vātapittamahāpīḍā dehaghātasamudbhavā . dhananāśamavāpnoti śaneḥ pratyantare janaḥ.
separated_sandhi: vātapittamahāpīḍā dehaghātasamudbhavādhananāśam avāpnoti śaneḥ pratyantare janaḥ
english: During the sub-sub-period (pratyantara) of Saturn (Śani), a person experiences severe afflictions (mahāpīḍā) caused by imbalances of vāta and pitta, leading to bodily harm and the loss of wealth.

sanskrit: आपत्समुद्भवोऽकस्माद्देशन्तरसमागमः । केत्वन्तरेऽर्थहानिश्च केतोः प्रत्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥६५॥
transliteration: āpatsamudbhavo'kasmāddeśantarasamāgamaḥ . ketvantare'rthahāniśca ketoḥ pratyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: āpatsamudbhavaḥ akasmāt deśantarasamāgamaḥketvantare arthahāniḥ ca ketoḥ pratyantare bhavet
english: During the sub-period (antara) of Ketu, there is a sudden rise of calamities and association with foreign lands. Furthermore, loss of wealth occurs during the sub-sub-period (pratyantara) of Ketu.

sanskrit: म्लेच्छभीरर्थनाशो वा नेत्ररोगः शिरोव्यथा । हानिश्चतुष्पदानां च भृगोः प्रत्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥६६॥
transliteration: mlecchabhīrarthanāśo vā netrarogaḥ śirovyathā . hāniścatuṣpadānāṃ ca bhṛgoḥ pratyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: mlecchabhīḥ arthanāśaḥ vā netrarogaḥ śirovyathāhāniḥ catuṣpadānām ca bhṛgoḥ pratyantare bhavet
english: Fear from barbarians (mlecchas), or loss of wealth, eye disease, headache, and loss of quadrupeds (such as cattle) occur during the sub-sub-period (pratyantara) of Venus (Bhṛgu).

sanskrit: मित्रैः सह विरोधश्च स्वल्पमृत्युः पराजयः । मतिभ्रंशो विवादश्च रवेः प्र्त्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥६७॥
transliteration: mitraiḥ saha virodhaśca svalpamṛtyuḥ parājayaḥ . matibhraṃśo vivādaśca raveḥ prtyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: mitraiḥ saha virodhaḥ ca svalpamṛtyuḥ parājayaḥmatibhramśaḥ vivādaḥ ca raveḥ pratyantare bhavet
english: During the sub-sub-period (pratyantara) of the Sun (Ravi), there will be conflict with friends, danger of death, defeat, mental confusion, and disputes.

sanskrit: अन्ननाशो यशोहानिर्देहपीडा मतिभ्रमः । आमवातादिवृद्धिश्चविधोः प्र्त्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥६८॥
transliteration: annanāśo yaśohānirdehapīḍā matibhramaḥ . āmavātādivṛddhiścavidhoḥ prtyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: annanāśaḥ yaśohāniḥ dehapīḍā matibhramaḥāmavātādivṛddhiḥ ca vidhoḥ pratyantare bhavet
english: During the sub-sub-period (pratyantara) of the Moon (Vidhu), there will be loss of food, loss of fame, bodily suffering, mental confusion, and an increase in ailments like rheumatism (āmavāta).

sanskrit: शस्त्रघातेन पातेन पीडितो वह्निपीडया । नीचाद्भीती रिपोः शङ्का कुजप्रत्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥६९॥
transliteration: śastraghātena pātena pīḍito vahnipīḍayā . nīcādbhītī ripoḥ śaṅkā kujapratyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: śastraghātena pātena pīḍitaḥ vahni-pīḍayānīcāt bhītiḥ ripoḥ śaṅkā kujapratyantare bhavet
english: During the sub-sub-period of Mars (Ku ja), there will be affliction from weapon wounds, falls, and fire. There will be fear from base people and apprehension from enemies.

sanskrit: कामिनीभ्यो भयं भूयात्तथा वैरिसमुद्भवः । क्षुद्रादपि भवेद्भीती राहोः प्रत्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥७०॥
transliteration: kāminībhyo bhayaṃ bhūyāttathā vairisamudbhavaḥ . kṣudrādapi bhavedbhītī rāhoḥ pratyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: kāminībhyo bhayam bhūyāt tathā vairisamudbhavaḥkṣudrāt api bhavet bhītiḥ rāhoḥ pratyantare bhavet
english: During the sub-sub-period of Rahu, there will be fear from women, and similarly, trouble arising from enemies. Fear will also arise even from petty individuals.

sanskrit: धनहानिर्महोत्पातो स/स्त्रमित्रविनाशनम् । सर्वत्र लभते क्लेशं गुरोः प्रत्यन्तरे फलम् ॥७१॥
transliteration: dhanahānirmahotpāto sa/stramitravināśanam . sarvatra labhate kleśaṃ guroḥ pratyantare phalam.
separated_sandhi: dhanahāniḥ mahotpātaḥ sva-strī-mitra-vināśanamsarvatra labhate kleśam guroḥ pratyantare phalam
english: During the sub-sub-period of Jupiter (Guru), there will be a loss of wealth, great calamities, and the destruction of one's wife and friends. One experiences distress in all matters.

sanskrit: गोमहिष्यादिमरणं देहपीडा सुहृद्वधः । स्वल्पाल्पलाभकरणं शनेः प्रत्यन्तरे फलम् ॥७२॥
transliteration: gomahiṣyādimaraṇaṃ dehapīḍā suhṛdvadhaḥ . svalpālpalābhakaraṇaṃ śaneḥ pratyantare phalam.
separated_sandhi: go-mahiṣy-ādi-maraṇam deha-pīḍā suhṛd-vadhaḥsvalpālpalābhakaraṇam śaneḥ pratyantare phalam
english: During the sub-sub-period of Saturn (Śani), the results will include the death of cows, buffaloes, and other animals, bodily affliction, and the loss of friends. One will achieve only meager profits.

sanskrit: बुद्धिनाशो महोद्वेगो विद्याहानिर्महाभयम् । कार्यसिद्धिर्न जायते ज्ञस्य प्रत्यन्तरे फलम् ॥७३॥
transliteration: buddhināśo mahodvego vidyāhānirmahābhayam . kāryasiddhirna jāyate jñasya pratyantare phalam.
separated_sandhi: buddhināśaḥ mahodvegaḥ vidyāhāniḥ mahābhayamkāryasiddhiḥ na jāyate jñasya pratyantare phalam
english: During the sub-sub-period of Mercury (Jña), there will be a loss of intellect, great agitation, loss of knowledge, and intense fear. Success in undertakings does not occur.

sanskrit: श्वेताश्ववस्त्रमुक्ताद्यं दिव्यस्त्रीजङ्गजं सुखम् । लभते शुक्रन्तरे प्राप्ते शुक्रप्रत्यन्तरे जनः ॥७४॥
transliteration: śvetāśvavastramuktādyaṃ divyastrījaṅgajaṃ sukham . labhate śukrantare prāpte śukrapratyantare janaḥ.
separated_sandhi: śvetāśva-vastra-mukta-ādyam divya-strī-jaṅgajam sukhamlabhate śukra-antare prāpte śukra-pratyantare janaḥ
english: A person (jana) obtains happiness (sukham) relating to divine women and movable possessions, and also pleasures like white horses, clothes, pearls, etc., when the sub-period (antarā) and sub-sub-period (pratyantarā) of Venus (Śukra) arrive.

sanskrit: वातज्वरः शिरःपीडा राज्ञः पीडा रिपोरपि । जायते स्वल्पलाभोऽपि रवेः प्रत्यन्तरे फलम् ॥७५॥
transliteration: vātajvaraḥ śiraḥpīḍā rājñaḥ pīḍā riporapi . jāyate svalpalābho'pi raveḥ pratyantare phalam.
separated_sandhi: vāta-jvaraḥ śiraḥ-pīḍā rājñaḥ pīḍā ripoḥ apijāyate svalpa-lābhaḥ api raveḥ pratyantare phalam
english: Fever caused by wind (vāta) imbalance, headaches, trouble from the king/government, and also from enemies arise. Even a small gain may occur. These are the results (phala) in the sub-sub-period (pratyantarā) of the Sun (Ravi).

sanskrit: कन्याजन्म नृपाल्लाभो वस्त्राभरणसंयुतः । राज्याधिकारसम्प्राप्तिः चन्द्रप्रत्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥७६॥
transliteration: kanyājanma nṛpāllābho vastrābharaṇasaṃyutaḥ . rājyādhikārasamprāptiḥ candrapratyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: kanyā-janma nṛpāt lābhaḥ vastra-ābharaṇa-saṃyutaḥrājya-adhikāra-samprāptiḥ candra-pratyantare bhavet
english: The birth of a daughter, gains from the king/government accompanied by clothes and ornaments, and the acquisition of royal authority may occur during the sub-sub-period (pratyantarā) of the Moon (Candra).

sanskrit: रक्तपित्तादिरोगश्च कलहस्ताडनं भवेत् । महान्क्लेशो भवेदत कुजप्रत्यन्तरे द्विज ॥७७॥
transliteration: raktapittādirogaśca kalahastāḍanaṃ bhavet . mahānkleśo bhavedata kujapratyantare dvija.
separated_sandhi: rakta-pitta-ādi-rogaḥ ca kalaha-tāḍanam bhavetmahān kleśaḥ bhavet atra kuja-pratyantare dvija
english: Diseases such as blood-bile disorders, quarrels, and beatings may occur. Great distress may also arise during the sub-sub-period (pratyantarā) of Mars (Kuja), O twice-born (dvija).

sanskrit: कलहो जायते स्त्रीभिरकस्माद्भयसम्भवः । राजतः शत्रुतः पीडा राहोः प्रत्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥७८॥
transliteration: kalaho jāyate strībhirakasmādbhayasambhavaḥ . rājataḥ śatrutaḥ pīḍā rāhoḥ pratyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: kalahaḥ jāyate strībhiḥ akasmāt bhaya-sambhavaḥrājataḥ śatrutaḥ pīḍā rāhoḥ pratyantare bhavet
english: Quarrels arise with women, and there is an unexpected occurrence of fear. Trouble from the king/government and from enemies may occur during the sub-sub-period (pratyantarā) of Rāhu.

sanskrit: महद्द्रव्यं महद्राज्यं वस्त्र्मुक्तादिभूषणम् । गजाश्वादिपदप्राप्तिः गुरोः प्रत्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥७९॥
transliteration: mahaddravyaṃ mahadrājyaṃ vastrmuktādibhūṣaṇam . gajāśvādipadaprāptiḥ guroḥ pratyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: mahat dravyam mahat rājyam vastra-muktā-ādi-bhūṣaṇamgaja-aśva-ādi-pada-prāptiḥ guroḥ pratyantare bhavet
english: In the sub-period (pratyantara) of Guru (Jupiter), one may acquire great wealth, a significant kingdom, ornaments like clothes and pearls, and positions involving elephants, horses, and the like.

sanskrit: खरोष्ट्रछागसम्प्राप्तिर्लोहमाषतिलादिकम् । लभते स्वल्पपीडादि शनेः प्रत्यन्तरे जनः ॥८०॥
transliteration: kharoṣṭrachāgasamprāptirlohamāṣatilādikam . labhate svalpapīḍādi śaneḥ pratyantare janaḥ.
separated_sandhi: khara-uṣṭra-chāga-samprāptiḥ loha-māṣa-tila-ādikamlabhate svalpa-pīḍā-ādi śaneḥ pratyantare janaḥ
english: In the sub-period (pratyantara) of Śani (Saturn), a person (jana) obtains donkeys, camels, and goats, as well as iron, black gram, sesame, and other such things. They also experience minor troubles and the like.

sanskrit: धनज्ञानमहल्लाभो राजराज्यादिकारिता । निक्षेपाद्धनलाभोऽपि ज्ञस्य प्रत्यन्तरे भवेत् ॥८१॥
transliteration: dhanajñānamahallābho rājarājyādikāritā . nikṣepāddhanalābho'pi jñasya pratyantare bhavet.
separated_sandhi: dhana-jñāna-mahat-lābhaḥ rāja-rājya-ādi-kāritānikṣepāt dhana-lābhaḥ api jñasya pratyantare bhavet
english: In the sub-period (pratyantara) of Jña (Mercury), there will be a great gain of wealth and knowledge, administrative power over kings and kingdoms, and also acquisition of wealth from deposits.

sanskrit: अपमृत्युभयं ज्ञेयं देशाद्देशान्तरागमः । लाभोऽपि जायते मध्ये केतोः प्रत्यन्तरे द्विज ॥८२॥
transliteration: apamṛtyubhayaṃ jñeyaṃ deśāddeśāntarāgamaḥ . lābho'pi jāyate madhye ketoḥ pratyantare dvija.
separated_sandhi: apamṛtyu-bhayam jñeyam deśāt deśa-antara-āgamaḥlābhaḥ api jāyate madhye ketoḥ pratyantare dvija
english: O Brahmin (dvija), in the sub-period (pratyantara) of Ketu, one should know that there is fear of unnatural death, migration from one country to another, and also gain in the middle of the period.

sanskrit: गुण्या स्वस्वदशावर्षैः प्रत्यन्तरदशामितिः । खार्क्रैभक्ता पृथग्लब्धिः सूक्ष्मान्तरदशा भवेत् ॥१॥
transliteration: guṇyā svasvadaśāvarṣaiḥ pratyantaradaśāmitiḥ . khārkraibhaktā pṛthaglabdhiḥ sūkṣmāntaradaśā bhavet.
separated_sandhi: guṇyā sva-sva-daśā-varṣaiḥ pratyantara-daśā-mitiḥkha-arkaiḥ bhaktā pṛthak labdhiḥ sūkṣma-antara-daśā bhavet
english: The duration (mitiḥ) of a sub-period (pratyantaradaśā) is to be multiplied (guṇyā) by the years of its own (daśā) major period. When this product is divided by 360 (kha-arkaiḥ), the resulting quotient (labdhi) will be the subtle sub-period (sūkṣmāntaradaśā).

sanskrit: निजभूमिपरित्यागो प्राणनाशभयं भवेत् । स्थाननाशो महाहानिः निजसूक्ष्मगते रवौ ॥२॥
transliteration: nijabhūmiparityāgo prāṇanāśabhayaṃ bhavet . sthānanāśo mahāhāniḥ nijasūkṣmagate ravau.
separated_sandhi: nijabhūmiparityāgaḥ prāṇanāśabhayam bhavetsthānanāśaḥ mahāhāniḥ nijasūkṣmagate ravau
english: When the Sun (ravi) is in its own subtle (sūkṣma) period, there will be the abandonment of one's native land, fear of losing one's life, loss of position, and great financial detriment.

sanskrit: देवब्राह्मण्भक्तिश्च नित्यकर्मरतस्तथा । सुप्रीतिः सर्वमित्रश्चैव रवेः सूक्ष्मगते विधौ ॥३॥
transliteration: devabrāhmaṇbhaktiśca nityakarmaratastathā . suprītiḥ sarvamitraścaiva raveḥ sūkṣmagate vidhau.
separated_sandhi: devabrāhmaṇabhaktiḥ ca nityakarmarataḥ tathāsuprītiḥ sarvamitraḥ ca eva raveḥ sūkṣmagate vidhau
english: When the Moon (vidhu) is in the subtle (sūkṣma) period of the Sun, there will be devotion (bhakti) to gods and Brahmins, engagement in daily duties, great affection, and friendship with everyone.

sanskrit: क्रूरकर्मरतिस्तिग्मशत्रुभिः परिपीडनम् । रक्तस्रावादिरोगश्च रवेः सूक्ष्मगते कुजे ॥४॥
transliteration: krūrakarmaratistigmaśatrubhiḥ paripīḍanam . raktasrāvādirogaśca raveḥ sūkṣmagate kuje.
separated_sandhi: krūrakarmaratiḥ tigmaśatrubhiḥ paripīḍanamraktasrāva-ādi-rogaḥ ca raveḥ sūkṣmagate kuje
english: When Mars (kuja) is in the subtle (sūkṣma) period of the Sun, there will be an inclination towards cruel actions, harassment by fierce enemies, and diseases like hemorrhages.

sanskrit: चौराग्निविषभीतिश्च रणे भङ्गः पराजयः । दानधर्मादिहीनश्च रवेः सूक्ष्मगते ह्यगौ ॥५॥
transliteration: caurāgniviṣabhītiśca raṇe bhaṅgaḥ parājayaḥ . dānadharmādihīnaśca raveḥ sūkṣmagate hyagau.
separated_sandhi: caura-agni-viṣabhītiḥ ca raṇe bhaṅgaḥ parājayaḥdānadharma-ādi-hīnaḥ ca raveḥ sūkṣmagate hi agau
english: When Mercury (budha, though here referred to as "aga") is in the subtle (sūkṣma) period of the Sun, there will be fear of thieves, fire, and poison, as well as defeat and rout in battle. One will also be devoid of charity (dāna) and virtue (dharma).

sanskrit: नृपसत्कारराजार्हः सेवकैः परिपूजितः । राजचक्षुर्गतः शान्तः सूर्यसूक्ष्मगते गुरौ ॥६॥
transliteration: nṛpasatkārarājārhaḥ sevakaiḥ paripūjitaḥ . rājacakṣurgataḥ śāntaḥ sūryasūkṣmagate gurau.
separated_sandhi: nṛpasatkārarājārhaḥ sevakaiḥ paripūjitaḥrājacakṣurgataḥ śāntaḥ sūryasūkṣmagate gurau
english: When Jupiter (guru) is in the subtle (sūkṣma) period of the Sun, one will be worthy of royal honor and respect from kings, worshipped by servants, will come into the king's favor, and remain peaceful.

sanskrit: चौर्यसाहसकर्मार्थं देवब्राह्मणपीडनम् । स्थानच्युतिं मनोदुखं रवेः सूक्ष्मगते शनौ ॥७॥
transliteration: cauryasāhasakarmārthaṃ devabrāhmaṇapīḍanam . sthānacyutiṃ manodukhaṃ raveḥ sūkṣmagate śanau.
separated_sandhi: cauryasāhasakarmārtham devabrāhmaṇapīḍanamsthānacyutim manodukham raveḥ sūkṣmagate śanau
english: When Saturn (Śani) is in subtle motion relative to the Sun (Ravi), there will be acts of theft and violence, harassment of deities and Brahmins, loss of position, and mental distress.

sanskrit: दिव्याम्बरादिलब्धिश्च दिव्यस्त्रीपरिभोगिता । अचिन्तितार्थसिद्धिश्च रवेः सूक्ष्मगते बुधे ॥८॥
transliteration: divyāmbarādilabdhiśca divyastrīparibhogitā . acintitārthasiddhiśca raveḥ sūkṣmagate budhe.
separated_sandhi: divyāmbarādilabdhiḥ ca divyastrīparibhogitāacintitārthasiddhiḥ ca raveḥ sūkṣmagate budhe
english: When Mercury (Budha) is in subtle motion relative to the Sun (Ravi), there is the acquisition of divine garments and similar things, the enjoyment of divine women, and the accomplishment of unexpected goals.

sanskrit: गुरुतार्थविनाशश्च भृत्यदारभवस्तथा । क्वचित्सेवकसम्बन्धो रवेः सूक्ष्मगते ध्वजे ॥९॥
transliteration: gurutārthavināśaśca bhṛtyadārabhavastathā . kvacitsevakasambandho raveḥ sūkṣmagate dhvaje.
separated_sandhi: gurutārthavināśaḥ ca bhṛtyadārabhavaḥ tathākvacitsevakasambandhaḥ raveḥ sūkṣmagate dhvaje
english: When Ketu (Dhvaja) is in subtle motion relative to the Sun (Ravi), there is loss of the preceptor's wealth, issues concerning servants and one's wife, and occasional association with servants.

sanskrit: पुत्रमित्रकलत्रादिसाख्यसम्पन्न एव च । नानाविधा च सम्पत्ती रवेः सूक्ष्मगते भृगौ ॥१०॥
transliteration: putramitrakalatrādisākhyasampanna eva ca . nānāvidhā ca sampattī raveḥ sūkṣmagate bhṛgau.
separated_sandhi: putramitrakalatrādisākhyasampannaḥ eva canānāvidhā ca sampattiḥ raveḥ sūkṣmagate bhṛgau
english: When Venus (Bhṛgu) is in subtle motion relative to the Sun (Ravi), one is endowed with the friendship of sons, friends, wife, and similar relations, along with various kinds of prosperity.

sanskrit: भूषणं भूमिलाभश्च सम्मानं नृपपूजनम् । तामसत्त्वं गुरुत्वं च निजसूक्ष्मगते विधौ ॥११॥
transliteration: bhūṣaṇaṃ bhūmilābhaśca sammānaṃ nṛpapūjanam . tāmasattvaṃ gurutvaṃ ca nijasūkṣmagate vidhau.
separated_sandhi: bhūṣaṇam bhūmilābhaḥ ca sammānam nṛpapūjanamtāmasatvam gurutvam ca nijasūkṣmagate vidhau
english: When the Moon (Vidhu) is in its own subtle motion, there is adornment, acquisition of land, honor, royal veneration, the quality of dullness/inertia (tāmasatva), and importance/gravity.

sanskrit: दुःखं शत्रुविरोधश्च कुक्षिरोगः पितुर्मृतिः । वातपित्तकफोद्रेकः विधोः सूक्ष्मगते कुजे ॥१२॥
transliteration: duḥkhaṃ śatruvirodhaśca kukṣirogaḥ piturmṛtiḥ . vātapittakaphodrekaḥ vidhoḥ sūkṣmagate kuje.
separated_sandhi: duḥkham śatruvirodhaḥ ca kukṣirogaḥ pituḥ mṛtiḥvātapittakaphodrekaḥ vidhoḥ sūkṣmagate kuje
english: When Mars (kuja) is in a subtle state (sūkṣmagati) relative to the Moon, there will be sorrow, conflict with enemies, abdominal diseases, the father's death, and an excess of vāta, pitta, and kapha (the three humors).

sanskrit: क्रोधनं मित्रबन्धूनां देशत्यागो धनक्षयः । विदेशान्निगडप्राप्तिर्विधोः सूक्ष्मगतेप्यगौ ॥१३॥
transliteration: krodhanaṃ mitrabandhūnāṃ deśatyāgo dhanakṣayaḥ . videśānnigaḍaprāptirvidhoḥ sūkṣmagatepyagau.
separated_sandhi: krodhanam mitrabandhūnām deśatyāgaḥ dhanakṣayaḥvideśāt nigaḍaprāptiḥ vidhoḥ sūkṣmagate api agau
english: When Mars (aga) is in a subtle state (sūkṣmagati) relative to the Moon, there will be anger towards friends and relatives, abandonment of one's country, loss of wealth, and the acquisition of fetters (imprisonment) from foreign lands.

sanskrit: छत्रचामरसंयुक्तं वैभवं पुत्रसम्पदः । सर्वत्र सुखमाप्नोति विधोः सूक्ष्मगते गुरौ ॥१४॥
transliteration: chatracāmarasaṃyuktaṃ vaibhavaṃ putrasampadaḥ . sarvatra sukhamāpnoti vidhoḥ sūkṣmagate gurau.
separated_sandhi: chatracāmarasaṃyuktam vaibhavam putrasampadaḥsarvatra sukham āpnoti vidhoḥ sūkṣmagate gurau
english: When Jupiter (guru) is in a subtle state (sūkṣmagati) relative to the Moon, one attains prosperity accompanied by royal insignia (like parasols and whisks), wealth of sons, and happiness everywhere.

sanskrit: राजोपद्रवभीतिः स्याद्व्यवहारे धनक्षयः । चौरर्वं विप्रभीतिश्च विधोः सूक्ष्मगते शनौ ॥१५॥
transliteration: rājopadravabhītiḥ syādvyavahāre dhanakṣayaḥ . caurarvaṃ viprabhītiśca vidhoḥ sūkṣmagate śanau.
separated_sandhi: rājopadravabhītiḥ syāt vyavahāre dhanakṣayaḥcauraiḥ ca viprabhītiḥ ca vidhoḥ sūkṣmagate śanau
english: When Saturn (śani) is in a subtle state (sūkṣmagati) relative to the Moon, there will be fear of oppression from the government (rāja), loss of wealth in business dealings, and fear from thieves and Brahmins.

sanskrit: राजमानं वस्तुलाभो विदेशाद्वाहनादिकम् । पुत्रपौत्र्समृद्धिश्च विधोः सूक्ष्मगते बुधे ॥१६॥
transliteration: rājamānaṃ vastulābho videśādvāhanādikam . putrapautrsamṛddhiśca vidhoḥ sūkṣmagate budhe.
separated_sandhi: rājamānam vastulābhaḥ videśāt vāhanādikamputrapautrasamṛddhiḥ ca vidhoḥ sūkṣmagate budhe
english: When Mercury (budha) is in a subtle state (sūkṣmagati) relative to the Moon, there will be royal honor, acquisition of goods, vehicles, etc., from foreign lands, and prosperity of sons and grandsons.

sanskrit: आत्मनो वृत्तिहननं सस्यश‍ृङ्गवृषादिभिः । अग्निसूर्यादिभीतिः स्याद्विधोः सूक्ष्मगते ध्वजे ॥१७॥
transliteration: ātmano vṛttihananaṃ sasyaśa‍ृṅgavṛṣādibhiḥ . agnisūryādibhītiḥ syādvidhoḥ sūkṣmagate dhvaje.
separated_sandhi: ātmanaḥ vṛttihananam sasyśṛṅgavṛṣādibhiḥagnisūryādibhītiḥ syāt vidhoḥ sūkṣmagate dhvaje
english: When the Moon (vidhu) is in a subtle transit through Ketu (dhvaja), there will be a destruction of one's livelihood (vṛtti) caused by crops, horned animals, bulls, etc., and fear from fire, the sun, and similar sources.

sanskrit: विवाहो भूमिलाभश्च वस्त्राभरणवैभवम् । राज्यलाभश्च कीर्तिश्च विधोः सूक्ष्मगते भृगौ ॥१८॥
transliteration: vivāho bhūmilābhaśca vastrābharaṇavaibhavam . rājyalābhaśca kīrtiśca vidhoḥ sūkṣmagate bhṛgau.
separated_sandhi: vivāhaḥ bhūmilābhaḥ ca vastrābharaṇavaibhavamrājyalābhaḥ ca kīrtiḥ ca vidhoḥ sūkṣmagate bhṛgau
english: When the Moon (vidhu) is in a subtle transit through Venus (bhṛgu), there will be marriage, acquisition of land, opulence in clothes and ornaments, gain of a kingdom, and fame.

sanskrit: क्लेशात्क्लेशः कार्यनाशः पशुधान्यधनक्षयः । गात्रवैषम्यभूमिश्च विधोः सूक्ष्मगते रवौ ॥१९॥
transliteration: kleśātkleśaḥ kāryanāśaḥ paśudhānyadhanakṣayaḥ . gātravaiṣamyabhūmiśca vidhoḥ sūkṣmagate ravau.
separated_sandhi: kleśāt kleśaḥ kāryanāśaḥ paśudhānyadhanakṣayaḥgātravaiṣamyabhūmiḥ ca vidhoḥ sūkṣmagate ravau
english: When the Moon (vidhu) is in a subtle transit through the Sun (ravi), there will be trouble after trouble, destruction of undertakings, loss of cattle, grain, and wealth, and a state of bodily ailments.

sanskrit: भूमिहानिर्मनःखेदो ह्यपस्मारी च बन्धुयुक् । पुरोक्षोभमनस्तापो निजसूक्ष्मगते कुजे ॥२०॥
transliteration: bhūmihānirmanaḥkhedo hyapasmārī ca bandhuyuk . purokṣobhamanastāpo nijasūkṣmagate kuje.
separated_sandhi: bhūmihāniḥ manaḥkhedaḥ hi apasmārī ca bandhuyukpurakṣobhamanastāpaḥ nija sūkṣmagate kuje
english: When Mars (Kuja) is in its own subtle transit, there will be loss of land, mental distress, indeed epilepsy (apasmārī), troubles to relatives, and agitation in one's home or city leading to mental agony.

sanskrit: अङ्गदोषो जनाद्भीतिः प्रमदावंशनाशनम् । वह्निसर्पभयं घोरं भौमे सूक्ष्मगतेऽप्यहौ ॥२१॥
transliteration: aṅgadoṣo janādbhītiḥ pramadāvaṃśanāśanam . vahnisarpabhayaṃ ghoraṃ bhaume sūkṣmagate'pyahau.
separated_sandhi: aṅgadoṣaḥ janāt bhītiḥ pramadāvaṃśanāśanamvahnisarpabhayam ghoram bhaume sūkṣmagate api ahau
english: When Mars (Bhauma) is in a subtle transit through Ketu/Rāhu (ahi), there will be bodily defects, fear from people, destruction of the family lineage through women, and terrible fear from fire and snakes.

sanskrit: देवपूजारतिश्चात्र मन्त्राभ्युत्थानतत्परः । लोके पूजा प्रमोदश्च भौमे सूक्ष्मगते गुरौ ॥२२॥
transliteration: devapūjāratiścātra mantrābhyutthānatatparaḥ . loke pūjā pramodaśca bhaume sūkṣmagate gurau.
separated_sandhi: devapūjāratiḥ ca atra mantrābhyutthānatatparaḥloke pūjā pramodaḥ ca bhaume sūkṣmagate gurau
english: When Mars is in a subtle (sūkṣma) state and Jupiter (guru) is also influencing, the native is dedicated to divine worship (devapūjā) and committed to the practice of mantras (mantra). Such a person receives honor and joy in the world.

sanskrit: बन्धनान्मुच्यते बद्धो धनधान्यपरिच्छदः । भृत्यार्थबहुलः श्रीमान् भौमे सूक्ष्मगते शनौ ॥२३॥
transliteration: bandhanānmucyate baddho dhanadhānyaparicchadaḥ . bhṛtyārthabahulaḥ śrīmān bhaume sūkṣmagate śanau.
separated_sandhi: bandhanāt mucyate baddhaḥ dhanadhānyaparicchadaḥbhṛtyārthabahulaḥ śrīmān bhaume sūkṣmagate śanau
english: When Mars is in a subtle (sūkṣma) state and Saturn is also influencing, an imprisoned person is released from bondage. The native becomes endowed with wealth, grains, and possessions, has many servants and much wealth, and is prosperous.

sanskrit: वाहनं छात्रसंयुक्तं राज्यभोगपरं सुखम् । कामश्वासादिका पीडा भौमे सूक्ष्मगते बुधे ॥२४॥
transliteration: vāhanaṃ chātrasaṃyuktaṃ rājyabhogaparaṃ sukham . kāmaśvāsādikā pīḍā bhaume sūkṣmagate budhe.
separated_sandhi: vāhanam chātrasaṃyuktam rājyabhogaparam sukhamkāmaśvāsādikā pīḍā bhaume sūkṣmagate budhe
english: When Mars is in a subtle (sūkṣma) state and Mercury is also influencing, the native enjoys conveyances and royal insignia (like an umbrella), supreme royal comforts and happiness. However, there is also affliction from diseases such as those related to desire and asthma.

sanskrit: परप्रेतितबुद्धिश्च सर्वत्राऽपि च गर्हिता । अशुचिः सर्वकालेषु भौमे सूक्ष्मगते ध्वजे ॥२५॥
transliteration: parapretitabuddhiśca sarvatrā'pi ca garhitā . aśuciḥ sarvakāleṣu bhaume sūkṣmagate dhvaje.
separated_sandhi: parapretitabuddhiḥ ca sarvatra api ca garhitāaśuciḥ sarvakāleṣu bhaume sūkṣmagate dhvaje
english: When Mars is in a subtle (sūkṣma) state and Ketu (dhvaja) is also influencing, the native's intellect is prompted by others, and they are censured everywhere. They are also impure at all times.

sanskrit: इष्टस्त्रीभोगसम्पत्तिरिष्टभोजनसंग्रहः । इष्टार्थस्यापि लाभश्च भौमे सूक्ष्मगते भृगौ ॥२६॥
transliteration: iṣṭastrībhogasampattiriṣṭabhojanasaṃgrahaḥ . iṣṭārthasyāpi lābhaśca bhaume sūkṣmagate bhṛgau.
separated_sandhi: iṣṭastrībhogasaṃpattiḥ iṣṭabhojanasaṃgrahaḥiṣṭārthasya api lābhaḥ ca bhaume sūkṣmagate bhṛgau
english: When Mars is in a subtle (sūkṣma) state and Venus (bhṛgu) is also influencing, the native experiences an abundance of enjoyment with desired women and an accumulation of preferred foods. There is also the attainment of desired objectives.

sanskrit: राजद्वेषो द्विजात्क्लेशः कार्याभिप्रयवंचकः । लोकेऽपि निन्द्यतामेति भौमे सूक्ष्मगते रवौ ॥२७॥
transliteration: rājadveṣo dvijātkleśaḥ kāryābhiprayavaṃcakaḥ . loke'pi nindyatāmeti bhaume sūkṣmagate ravau.
separated_sandhi: rājadvēṣaḥ dvijāt klēśaḥ kāryābhiprayavañcakaḥ| lōkē api nindyatām ēti bhaumē sūkṣmagatē ravau
english: When Mars is in a very subtle position relative to the Sun, a person experiences animosity from the government, difficulties from learned individuals (dvija), and deceit in their undertakings. They also become subject to reproach in the world.

sanskrit: शुद्धत्वं धनसम्प्राप्तिर्देवभाह्मण्वत्सलः । व्याधिना परिभूयेत् भौमे सूक्ष्मगते विधौ ॥२८॥
transliteration: śuddhatvaṃ dhanasamprāptirdevabhāhmaṇvatsalaḥ . vyādhinā paribhūyet bhaume sūkṣmagate vidhau.
separated_sandhi: śuddhatvam dhanasampraptiḥ devabrāhmaṇavatsalaḥ| vyādhinā paribhūyēt bhaumē sūkṣmagatē vidhau
english: When Mars is in a very subtle position relative to the Moon, the person achieves purity, gains wealth, and is devoted to the gods and learned individuals (brāhmaṇa), but may also be afflicted by disease.

sanskrit: लोकोपद्रवबुद्धिश्च सर्वकार्ये मतिविभ्रमः । शून्यता चित्तदोषः स्यात् स्वीये सूक्ष्मगतेऽप्यगौ ॥२९॥
transliteration: lokopadravabuddhiśca sarvakārye mativibhramaḥ . śūnyatā cittadoṣaḥ syāt svīye sūkṣmagate'pyagau.
separated_sandhi: lōkōpadravabuddhiḥ ca sarvakāryē mativibhramaḥ |śūnyatā cittadōṣaḥ syāt svīyē sūkṣmagatē api agau
english: Even when Mars (Aga) is in its own sign but in a subtle position, there arises an inclination towards causing public disturbance, confusion of mind in all actions, and mental emptiness (śūnyatā) and defects (cittadōṣa).

sanskrit: दीर्घरोगी दरिद्रश्च सर्वेषां प्रियदर्शनः । दानधर्मरतः शस्तो राहोः सूक्ष्मगते गुरौ ॥३०॥
transliteration: dīrgharogī daridraśca sarveṣāṃ priyadarśanaḥ . dānadharmarataḥ śasto rāhoḥ sūkṣmagate gurau.
separated_sandhi: dīrgharōgī daridraḥ ca sarvēṣām priyadarśanaḥ| dānadharmarataḥ śastaḥ rāhōḥ sūkṣmagatē gurau
english: When Jupiter (Guru) is in a subtle position relative to Rahu, the individual suffers from chronic illness and poverty. However, they are also pleasant to behold, dedicated to charitable acts (dāna) and righteous conduct (dharma), and are therefore praised.

sanskrit: कुमार्गात्कुत्सितोर्थश्च दुष्टश्च परसेवकः । असत्सङ्गमतिर्मूढो राहोः सूक्ष्मगते शनौ ॥३१॥
transliteration: kumārgātkutsitorthaśca duṣṭaśca parasevakaḥ . asatsaṅgamatirmūḍho rāhoḥ sūkṣmagate śanau.
separated_sandhi: kumārgāt kutsitaḥ arthaḥ ca duṣṭaḥ ca parasevakaḥ| asatsaṅgamatiḥ mūḍhaḥ rāhōḥ sūkṣmagatē śanau
english: When Saturn (Śani) is in a subtle position relative to Rahu, the individual acquires despicable wealth through illicit means, is wicked, acts as a servant to others, has a mind inclined towards bad company, and is foolish (mūḍha).

sanskrit: स्त्रीसम्भोगमतिर्वाग्मी लोकसम्भावनावृतः । अन्नमिच्छंस्तनुग्लानी राहोः सूक्ष्मगते बुधे ॥३२॥
transliteration: strīsambhogamatirvāgmī lokasambhāvanāvṛtaḥ . annamicchaṃstanuglānī rāhoḥ sūkṣmagate budhe.
separated_sandhi: strīsambhōgamatiḥ vāgmī lōkasambhāvanāvṛtaḥannam icchan tanuglānī rāhoḥ sūkṣmagate budhe
english: When Rāhu is in a subtle transit (or sub-period) through Mercury, the individual will have an inclination towards sexual enjoyment, be eloquent, be honored by the public, desire food, and experience physical weakness.

sanskrit: माधुर्यं मानहानिश्च बन्धनं चाप्रमाकरम् । पारुष्यं जीवहानिश्च राहोः सूक्ष्मगते ध्वजे ॥३३॥
transliteration: mādhuryaṃ mānahāniśca bandhanaṃ cāpramākaram . pāruṣyaṃ jīvahāniśca rāhoḥ sūkṣmagate dhvaje.
separated_sandhi: mādhuryaṁ mānahāniḥ ca bandhanaṁ ca apramākarampāruṣyaṁ jīvahāniḥ ca rāhoḥ sūkṣmagate dhvaje
english: When Rāhu is in a subtle transit (or sub-period) through Ketu, there will be sweetness, loss of honor, bondage, the creation of error, harshness, and loss of life or vitality.

sanskrit: बन्धनान्मुच्यते बद्धः स्थानमानार्थसञ्चयः । कारणाद् द्रव्यलाभश्च राहौ सूक्ष्मगते भृगौ ॥३४॥
transliteration: bandhanānmucyate baddhaḥ sthānamānārthasañcayaḥ . kāraṇād dravyalābhaśca rāhau sūkṣmagate bhṛgau.
separated_sandhi: bandhanāt mucyate baddhaḥ sthānamānārthasañcayaḥkāraṇāt dravyalābhaḥ ca rāhau sūkṣmagate bhṛgau
english: When Rāhu is in a subtle transit (or sub-period) through Venus, an imprisoned person is released from bondage, there is an accumulation of status, honor, and wealth, and also a gain of wealth due to a specific reason.

sanskrit: व्यक्तार्शो गुल्मरोगश्च क्रोधहानिस्तथैव च । वाहनादिसुखं सर्वं राहोः सूक्ष्मगते रवौ ॥३५॥
transliteration: vyaktārśo gulmarogaśca krodhahānistathaiva ca . vāhanādisukhaṃ sarvaṃ rāhoḥ sūkṣmagate ravau.
separated_sandhi: vyaktārśaḥ gulmarogaḥ ca krodhahāniḥ tathā evaca vāhanādisukhaṁ sarvaṁ rāhoḥ sūkṣmagate ravau
english: When Rāhu is in a subtle transit (or sub-period) through the Sun, there will be manifest piles, abdominal tumors or splenic disease, a decrease in anger, and also all kinds of comforts from conveyances and other amenities.

sanskrit: मणिरत्नधनवाप्तिर्विद्योपासनशीलवान् । देवार्चनपरो भक्त्या राहोः सूक्ष्मगते विधौ ॥३६॥
transliteration: maṇiratnadhanavāptirvidyopāsanaśīlavān . devārcanaparo bhaktyā rāhoḥ sūkṣmagate vidhau.
separated_sandhi: maṇiratnadhanāvāptiḥ vidyōpāsanaśīlavāndēvārcanaparaḥ bhaktyā rāhoḥ sūkṣmagate vidhau
english: When Rāhu is in a subtle transit (or sub-period) through the Moon, there will be the acquisition of gems, jewels, and wealth. The person will be virtuous, devoted to the pursuit of knowledge, and earnestly dedicated to the worship of deities with devotion (bhakti).

sanskrit: निर्जिते जनविद्रावो जने क्रोधश्च बन्धनम् । चौर्यशीलरतिर्नित्यं राहोः सूक्ष्मगते कुजे ॥३७॥
transliteration: nirjite janavidrāvo jane krodhaśca bandhanam . cauryaśīlaratirnityaṃ rāhoḥ sūkṣmagate kuje.
separated_sandhi: nirjite janavidrāvaḥ jane krodhaḥ ca bandhanamcauryaśīlaratiḥ nityam rāhoḥ sūkṣmagate kuje
english: When Mars (kuja) is defeated and in a subtle position concerning Rahu, there will be public disturbance, anger, and imprisonment among people, as well as a constant inclination towards theft.

sanskrit: शोकनाशो धनाधिक्यमग्निहोत्रं शिवार्चनम् । वाहनं छत्रसंयुक्तं स्वीये सूक्ष्मगते गुरौ ॥३८॥
transliteration: śokanāśo dhanādhikyamagnihotraṃ śivārcanam . vāhanaṃ chatrasaṃyuktaṃ svīye sūkṣmagate gurau.
separated_sandhi: śokanāśaḥ dhanādhikyam agnihotram śivārcanamvāhanam chatrasaṃyuktam svīye sūkṣmagate gurau
english: When Jupiter (guru) is in its own subtle position, there is an end to sorrow, abundance of wealth, performance of fire rituals (agnihotra) and Shiva worship, and conveyances associated with an umbrella (symbolizing status).

sanskrit: व्रतभङ्गो मनस्तापो विदेशे वसुनाशनम् । विरोधो बन्धुवैर्गश्च गुरोः सूक्ष्मगते शनौ ॥३९॥
transliteration: vratabhaṅgo manastāpo videśe vasunāśanam . virodho bandhuvairgaśca guroḥ sūkṣmagate śanau.
separated_sandhi: vratabhaṅgaḥ manastāpaḥ videśe vasunāśanamvirodhaḥ bandhuvargaḥ ca guroḥ sūkṣmagate śanau
english: When Saturn (śani) is in a subtle position concerning Jupiter (guru), there is a breaking of vows, mental distress, loss of wealth in foreign lands, and opposition from kinsmen.

sanskrit: विद्याबुद्धिविवृद्धिश्च ससम्मानं धनागमः । गृहे सर्वविधं सौख्यं गुरोः सूक्ष्मगते बुधे ॥४०॥
transliteration: vidyābuddhivivṛddhiśca sasammānaṃ dhanāgamaḥ . gṛhe sarvavidhaṃ saukhyaṃ guroḥ sūkṣmagate budhe.
separated_sandhi: vidyābuddhivivṛddhiḥ ca sasammānam dhanāgamaḥgṛhe sarvavidham saukhyam guroḥ sūkṣmagate budhe
english: When Mercury (budha) is in a subtle position concerning Jupiter (guru), there is an increase in knowledge and intellect, respected acquisition of wealth, and all kinds of happiness at home.

sanskrit: ज्ञानं विभवपाण्डित्ये शास्त्रश्रोता शिवार्चनम् । अग्निहोत्रं गुरोर्भक्तिर्गुरोः सूक्ष्मगते ध्वजे ॥४१॥
transliteration: jñānaṃ vibhavapāṇḍitye śāstraśrotā śivārcanam . agnihotraṃ gurorbhaktirguroḥ sūkṣmagate dhvaje.
separated_sandhi: jñānam vibhavapāṇḍitye śāstraśrotā śivārcanamagnihotram guroḥ bhaktiḥ guroḥ sūkṣmagate dhvaje
english: When Ketu (dhvaja) is in a subtle position concerning Jupiter (guru), there is knowledge, wealth and scholarship, the quality of being a listener of scriptures, Shiva worship, performance of fire rituals (agnihotra), and devotion (bhakti) to one's preceptor (guru).

sanskrit: रोगान्मुक्तिः सुखं भोगो धनधान्यसमागमः । पुत्रदारादिसौख्यं च गुरोः सूक्ष्मगते भृगौ ॥४२॥
transliteration: rogānmuktiḥ sukhaṃ bhogo dhanadhānyasamāgamaḥ . putradārādisaukhyaṃ ca guroḥ sūkṣmagate bhṛgau.
separated_sandhi: rogāt muktiḥ sukham bhogaḥ dhanadhānyasamāgamaḥputradārādisaukhyam ca guroḥ sūkṣmagate bhṛgau
english: When Venus (Bhṛgu) is in a subtle position relative to Jupiter (Guru), there will be freedom from diseases, happiness, enjoyment, accumulation of wealth and grains, and happiness from children, spouse, and others.

sanskrit: वातपित्तप्रकोपश्च श्लेष्मोद्रेकस्तु दारुणः । रसव्यादिकृतं शूलं गुरोः सूक्ष्मगते रवौ ॥४३॥
transliteration: vātapittaprakopaśca śleṣmodrekastu dāruṇaḥ . rasavyādikṛtaṃ śūlaṃ guroḥ sūkṣmagate ravau.
separated_sandhi: vātapittaprakopaḥ ca śleṣma udrekaḥ tu dāruṇaḥrasavyādikṛtam śūlam guroḥ sūkṣmagate ravau
english: When the Sun (Ravi) is in a subtle position relative to Jupiter (Guru), there will be an aggravation of Vāta and Pitta, a terrible increase of Kapha, and pain caused by disorders of the essential bodily fluids (rasa) and other ailments.

sanskrit: छत्रचामरसंयुक्तं वैभवं पुत्रसम्पदः । नेत्रकुक्षिगता पीडा गुरोः सूक्ष्मगते विधौ ॥४४॥
transliteration: chatracāmarasaṃyuktaṃ vaibhavaṃ putrasampadaḥ . netrakukṣigatā pīḍā guroḥ sūkṣmagate vidhau.
separated_sandhi: chatracāmarasaṃyuktam vaibhavam putrasampadaḥnetrakukṣigatā pīḍā guroḥ sūkṣmagate vidhau
english: When the Moon (Vidhu) is in a subtle position relative to Jupiter (Guru), there will be splendor associated with royal symbols (canopy and fly-whisks), prosperity in children, but also pain in the eyes and abdomen.

sanskrit: स्र्तीजनाच्च विषोत्पत्तिर्बन्धनं च रुजोभयम् । देशान्तरगमो भ्रान्तिर्गुरोः सूक्ष्मगते कुजे ॥४५॥
transliteration: srtījanācca viṣotpattirbandhanaṃ ca rujobhayam . deśāntaragamo bhrāntirguroḥ sūkṣmagate kuje.
separated_sandhi: strījanāt ca viṣa utpattiḥ bandhanam ca rujaḥ bhayamdeśāntaragamaḥ bhrāntiḥ guroḥ sūkṣmagate kuje
english: When Mars (Kuja) is in a subtle position relative to Jupiter (Guru), there will be harm from women, fear of imprisonment and disease, travel to foreign lands, and mental confusion or wandering.

sanskrit: व्याधिभिः परिभूतःस्याच्चौरैरपहृतं धनम् । सर्पवृश्चिकभीतिश्च गुरोः सूक्ष्मगतेऽप्यगौ ॥४६॥
transliteration: vyādhibhiḥ paribhūtaḥsyāccaurairapahṛtaṃ dhanam . sarpavṛścikabhītiśca guroḥ sūkṣmagate'pyagau.
separated_sandhi: vyādhibhiḥ paribhūtaḥ syāt cauraiḥ apahṛtam dhanamsarpavṛścikabhītiḥ ca guroḥ sūkṣmagate api agau
english: When the Sun (Aga) is even subtly placed relative to Jupiter (Guru), one will be afflicted by diseases, one's wealth will be stolen by thieves, and there will be fear of snakes and scorpions.

sanskrit: धनहानिर्महाव्याधिः वातपीडा कुलक्षयः । भिन्नाहारी महादुःखी निजसूक्ष्मगते शनौ ॥४७॥
transliteration: dhanahānirmahāvyādhiḥ vātapīḍā kulakṣayaḥ . bhinnāhārī mahāduḥkhī nijasūkṣmagate śanau.
separated_sandhi: dhana-hāniḥ mahā-vyādhiḥ vāta-pīḍā kula-kṣayaḥbhinna-āhārī mahā-duḥkhī nija-sūkṣma-gate śanau
english: When Saturn is in its subtle state, there will be loss of wealth, severe illness, afflictions caused by wind (vāta), and destruction of the family. The person will consume varied foods and be extremely unhappy.

sanskrit: वाणिज्यवृत्तेर्लाभश्च विद्याविभवमेव च । स्त्रीलाभश्च महीप्राप्तिः शनेः सूक्ष्मगते बुधे ॥४८॥
transliteration: vāṇijyavṛtterlābhaśca vidyāvibhavameva ca . strīlābhaśca mahīprāptiḥ śaneḥ sūkṣmagate budhe.
separated_sandhi: vāṇijya-vṛtteḥ lābhaḥ ca vidyā-vibhavam eva castrī-lābhaḥ ca mahī-prāptiḥ śaneḥ sūkṣma-gate budhe
english: When Mercury is in the subtle state of Saturn, there will be gains from commerce, prosperity through knowledge, acquisition of a wife, and acquisition of land.

sanskrit: चौरोपद्रवकुष्ठादिवृत्तिक्षयविगुम्फनम् । सर्वाङ्गपीडनं व्याधिः शनेः सूक्ष्मगते ध्वजे ॥४९॥
transliteration: cauropadravakuṣṭhādivṛttikṣayavigumphanam . sarvāṅgapīḍanaṃ vyādhiḥ śaneḥ sūkṣmagate dhvaje.
separated_sandhi: caura-upadrava-kuṣṭha-ādi-vṛtti-kṣaya-vigumphanamsarva-aṅga-pīḍanam vyādhiḥ śaneḥ sūkṣma-gate dhvaje
english: When Ketu is in the subtle state of Saturn, there will be harassment from thieves, diseases such as leprosy, destruction of livelihood, entanglement in difficulties, pain in all limbs, and general illness.

sanskrit: ऐश्वर्यमायुधाभ्यासः पुत्रलाभोऽभिषेचनम् । आरोग्यं धनकामौ च शनेः सूक्ष्मगते भृगौ ॥५०॥
transliteration: aiśvaryamāyudhābhyāsaḥ putralābho'bhiṣecanam . ārogyaṃ dhanakāmau ca śaneḥ sūkṣmagate bhṛgau.
separated_sandhi: aiśvaryam āyudha-abhyāsaḥ putra-lābhaḥ abhiṣecanamārogyam dhana-kāmau ca śaneḥ sūkṣma-gate bhṛgau
english: When Venus is in the subtle state of Saturn, there will be prosperity, practice of weaponry, the birth of sons, royal consecration, good health, and both wealth and the fulfillment of desires.

sanskrit: राजतेजोविकारत्वं स्वगृहे जायते कलिः । किञ्चित्पीडा स्वदेहोत्था शनेः सूक्ष्मगते रवौ ॥५१॥
transliteration: rājatejovikāratvaṃ svagṛhe jāyate kaliḥ . kiñcitpīḍā svadehotthā śaneḥ sūkṣmagate ravau.
separated_sandhi: rāja-tejas-vikāra-tvam sva-gṛhe jāyate kaliḥkiñcit pīḍā sva-deha-utthā śaneḥ sūkṣma-gate ravau
english: When the Sun is in the subtle state of Saturn, there will be a decline in royal influence or personal splendor, quarrels will arise in one's own home, and some pain will originate from one's own body.

sanskrit: स्फीतबुद्धिर्महारम्भो मन्दतेजा बहुव्ययः । स्त्रीपुत्रैश्च समं सौख्यं शनेः सूक्ष्मगते विधौ ॥५२॥
transliteration: sphītabuddhirmahārambho mandatejā bahuvyayaḥ . strīputraiśca samaṃ saukhyaṃ śaneḥ sūkṣmagate vidhau.
separated_sandhi: sphītabuddhiḥ mahārambhaḥ mandatejā bahuvyayaḥstrīputraiḥ ca samam saukhyam śaneḥ sūkṣmagate vidhau
english: When the Moon is in a subtle aspect of Saturn, the person will have a great intellect, undertake grand ventures, possess diminished vitality, incur much expenditure, and experience happiness with their wife and sons.

sanskrit: तेजोहानिर्महोद्वेगो वह्निमान्द्यं भ्रमः कलिः । वातपित्तकृता पीडा शनेः सूक्ष्मगते कुजे ॥५३॥
transliteration: tejohānirmahodvego vahnimāndyaṃ bhramaḥ kaliḥ . vātapittakṛtā pīḍā śaneḥ sūkṣmagate kuje.
separated_sandhi: tejohāniḥ mahodvegaḥ vahnimāndyam bhramaḥkaliḥ vātapittakṛtā pīḍā śaneḥ sūkṣmagate kuje
english: When Mars is in a subtle aspect of Saturn, there will be a loss of vitality, great anxiety, weak digestion, confusion, quarrels, and affliction caused by imbalances of vāta and pitta.

sanskrit: पितृमातृविनाशश्च मनोदुःखं गुरुव्ययम् । सर्वत्र विफलत्वं च शनेः सूक्ष्मगतेऽप्यहौ ॥५४॥
transliteration: pitṛmātṛvināśaśca manoduḥkhaṃ guruvyayam . sarvatra viphalatvaṃ ca śaneḥ sūkṣmagate'pyahau.
separated_sandhi: pitṛmātṛvināśaḥ ca manoduḥkham guruvyayamsarvatra viphalatvam ca śaneḥ sūkṣmagate api ahau
english: When Rahu is in a subtle aspect of Saturn, there will be the loss of father and mother, mental sorrow, significant expenditure, and failure in all endeavors.

sanskrit: सन्मुद्राभोगसम्मानं धनधान्यविवर्द्धनम् । छत्रचामरसम्प्राप्तिः शनेः सूक्ष्मगते गुरौ ॥५५॥
transliteration: sanmudrābhogasammānaṃ dhanadhānyavivarddhanam . chatracāmarasamprāptiḥ śaneḥ sūkṣmagate gurau.
separated_sandhi: sanmudrābhogasaṃmānam dhanadhānyavivarddhanamchattracāmarasamprāptiḥ śaneḥ sūkṣmagate gurau
english: When Jupiter is in a subtle aspect of Saturn, one will experience prosperity, enjoyment, and honor; an increase in wealth and grains; and the attainment of royal insignia like umbrellas and whisks.

sanskrit: सौभाग्यं राजसम्मानं धनधान्यादिसम्पदः । सर्वेषां प्रियदर्शी च निजसूक्ष्मगते बुधे ॥५६॥
transliteration: saubhāgyaṃ rājasammānaṃ dhanadhānyādisampadaḥ . sarveṣāṃ priyadarśī ca nijasūkṣmagate budhe.
separated_sandhi: saubhāgyam rājasammānam dhanadhānyādisampadaḥsarveṣām priyadarśī ca nijasūkṣmagate budhe
english: When Mercury is in its own subtle aspect, one will experience good fortune, honor from rulers, abundant wealth including grains and other possessions, and will be beloved by all.

sanskrit: बालग्रहोग्निभीस्तापः स्त्रीगदोद्भवदोषभाक् । कुमार्गी कुत्सिताशी च बौधे सूक्ष्मगते ध्वजे ॥५७॥
transliteration: bālagrahognibhīstāpaḥ strīgadodbhavadoṣabhāk . kumārgī kutsitāśī ca baudhe sūkṣmagate dhvaje.
separated_sandhi: bālagrahaḥ agnibhīḥ tāpaḥ strīgada udbhava doṣabhākkumārgī kutsitāśī ca baudhe sūkṣmagate dhvaje
english: When Ketu (dhvaja) is in a subtle state (sūkṣmagate) within a sign ruled by Mercury (budha), the person is afflicted by childhood ailments, fear of fire, and fever. They suffer from troubles originating from female-related diseases. They also tread wrong paths and consume repulsive food.

sanskrit: वाहनं धनसम्पत्तिर्जलजान्नार्थसम्भवः । शुभकीर्तिर्महाभोगो बौधे सूक्ष्मगते भृगौ ॥५८॥
transliteration: vāhanaṃ dhanasampattirjalajānnārthasambhavaḥ . śubhakīrtirmahābhogo baudhe sūkṣmagate bhṛgau.
separated_sandhi: vāhanam dhanasampattiḥ jalaja anna artha sambhavaḥśubhakīrtiḥ mahābhogaḥ baudhe sūkṣmagate bhṛgau
english: When Venus (bhṛgu) is in a subtle state (sūkṣmagate) in a sign ruled by Mercury (budha), the person possesses conveyances and ample wealth. They accrue wealth from aquatic products and food, achieve auspicious fame, and enjoy great prosperity.

sanskrit: ताडनं नृपवैषम्यं बुद्धिस्खलनरोगभाक् । हानिर्जनापवादं च बौधे सूक्ष्मगते रवौ ॥५९॥
transliteration: tāḍanaṃ nṛpavaiṣamyaṃ buddhiskhalanarogabhāk . hānirjanāpavādaṃ ca baudhe sūkṣmagate ravau.
separated_sandhi: tāḍanam nṛpavaiṣamyam buddhiskhalana rogabhākhāniḥ janāpavādam ca baudhe sūkṣmagate ravau
english: When the Sun (ravi) is in a subtle state (sūkṣmagate) in a sign ruled by Mercury (budha), the person experiences physical punishment and royal displeasure. They are afflicted by intellectual errors and illnesses, and they suffer losses and public defamation.

sanskrit: सुभगः स्थिरबुद्धिश्च राजसन्मानसम्पदः । सुहृदां गुरुसंचारो बौधे सूक्ष्मगते विधौ ॥६०॥
transliteration: subhagaḥ sthirabuddhiśca rājasanmānasampadaḥ . suhṛdāṃ gurusaṃcāro baudhe sūkṣmagate vidhau.
separated_sandhi: subhagaḥ sthirabuddhiḥ ca rājasanmāna sampadaḥsuhṛdām gurusañcāraḥ baudhe sūkṣmagate vidhau
english: When the Moon (vidhu) is in a subtle state (sūkṣmagate) in a sign ruled by Mercury (budha), the person is fortunate and possesses a steady intellect. They receive honor and wealth from rulers, and experience auspicious interactions with friends and respected elders (guru).

sanskrit: अग्निदाहो विषोत्पत्तिर्जडत्वं च दरिद्रता । विभ्रमश्च महोद्वेगो बौधे सूक्ष्मगते कुजे ॥६१॥
transliteration: agnidāho viṣotpattirjaḍatvaṃ ca daridratā . vibhramaśca mahodvego baudhe sūkṣmagate kuje.
separated_sandhi: agnidāhaḥ viṣotpattiḥ jaḍatvam ca daridratāvibhramaḥ ca mahodvegaḥ baudhe sūkṣmagate kuje
english: When Mars (kuja) is in a subtle state (sūkṣmagate) in a sign ruled by Mercury (budha), the person is prone to burns from fire, the generation of poison, mental dullness, and poverty. They also experience confusion and great anxiety.

sanskrit: अग्निसर्पनृपाद्भीतिः कुच्छ्रादिरिपराभवः । भूतावेशभ्रमाद्भ्रान्तिर्बौधे सूक्ष्मगतेप्यहौ ॥६२॥
transliteration: agnisarpanṛpādbhītiḥ kucchrādiriparābhavaḥ . bhūtāveśabhramādbhrāntirbaudhe sūkṣmagatepyahau.
separated_sandhi: agnisarpanṛpāt bhītiḥ kucchrāt ariparābhavaḥbhūtāveśabhramāt bhrāntiḥ baudhe sūkṣmagate api ahau
english: When Mercury (budha) is in a subtle state, even in conjunction with Rahu (ahi), there is fear from fire, snakes, or rulers; defeat by enemies due to adversity; and confusion or delusion due to possession by spirits.

sanskrit: गृहोपकरणं भव्यं दानं भोगादिवैभवम् । राजप्रसादसम्पत्तिर्बौधे सूक्ष्मगते गुरौ ॥६३॥
transliteration: gṛhopakaraṇaṃ bhavyaṃ dānaṃ bhogādivaibhavam . rājaprasādasampattirbaudhe sūkṣmagate gurau.
separated_sandhi: gṛhopakaraṇam bhavyam dānam bhogādivaibhavamrājaprasādasampattiḥ baudhe sūkṣmagate gurau
english: When Mercury (budha) is in a subtle state, in conjunction with Jupiter (guru), there is acquisition of splendid household articles, charity (dāna), prosperity including enjoyments, and the attainment of royal favor.

sanskrit: वाणिज्यवृत्तिलाभश्च विद्याविभवमेव च । स्त्रीलाभश्च महाव्याप्तिर्बौधे सूक्ष्मगते शनौ ॥६४॥
transliteration: vāṇijyavṛttilābhaśca vidyāvibhavameva ca . strīlābhaśca mahāvyāptirbaudhe sūkṣmagate śanau.
separated_sandhi: vāṇijyavṛttilābhaḥ ca vidyāvaibhavam eva castrīlābhaḥ ca mahāvyāptiḥ baudhe sūkṣmagate śanau
english: When Mercury (budha) is in a subtle state, in conjunction with Saturn (śani), there is gain from a mercantile profession, as well as the splendor of knowledge, acquisition of a wife, and great expansion of influence.

sanskrit: पुत्रदारादिजं दुःखं गात्रवैषम्यमेव च । दारिद्र्याद् भिक्षुवृत्तिश्च नैजे सूक्ष्मगते ध्वजे ॥६५॥
transliteration: putradārādijaṃ duḥkhaṃ gātravaiṣamyameva ca . dāridryād bhikṣuvṛttiśca naije sūkṣmagate dhvaje.
separated_sandhi: putradārādijam duḥkham gātravaiṣamyam eva cadāridryāt bhikṣuvṛttiḥ ca naije sūkṣmagate dhvaje
english: When Mercury (budha) is in a subtle state, situated in its own sign or exalted sign, there is sorrow originating from children and wife, physical ailments, and a life of begging due to poverty.

sanskrit: रोगनाशऽर्थलाभश्च गुरुविप्रानुवत्सलः । सङ्गमः स्वजनैः सार्द्धकेतोः सूक्ष्मगते भृगौ ॥६६॥
transliteration: roganāśa'rthalābhaśca guruviprānuvatsalaḥ . saṅgamaḥ svajanaiḥ sārddhaketoḥ sūkṣmagate bhṛgau.
separated_sandhi: roga-nāśaḥ artha-lābhaḥ ca guru-vipra-anuvatsalaḥsaṅgamaḥ svajanaiḥ sārdham ketoḥ sūkṣma-gate bhṛgau
english: When Ketu is in a subtle state (sūkṣma-gata) and in Bhṛgu (Venus), there will be recovery from illness, gain of wealth, devotion to preceptors (guru) and brahmins, and association with one's relatives.

sanskrit: युद्धं भूमिविनाशश्च विप्रवासः स्वदेशतः । सुहृद्विपातिरार्तिश्च केतोः सूक्ष्मगते रवौ ॥६७॥
transliteration: yuddhaṃ bhūmivināśaśca vipravāsaḥ svadeśataḥ . suhṛdvipātirārtiśca ketoḥ sūkṣmagate ravau.
separated_sandhi: yuddham bhūmi-vināśaḥ ca vipravāsaḥ svadeśataḥsuhṛd-vipātiḥ ārtiḥ ca ketoḥ sūkṣma-gate ravau
english: When Ketu is in a subtle state (sūkṣma-gata) and in Ravi (Sun), there will be war, destruction of land, exile from one's own country, and distress due to the loss of friends.

sanskrit: दासीदाससमृद्धिश्च युद्धे लब्धिर्जयस्तथा । ललिता कीर्तिरुत्पन्ना केतोः सूक्ष्मगते विधौ ॥६८॥
transliteration: dāsīdāsasamṛddhiśca yuddhe labdhirjayastathā . lalitā kīrtirutpannā ketoḥ sūkṣmagate vidhau.
separated_sandhi: dāsī-dāsa-samṛddhiḥ ca yuddhe labdhiḥ jayaḥ tathālalitā kīrtiḥ utpannā ketoḥ sūkṣma-gate vidhau
english: When Ketu is in a subtle state (sūkṣma-gata) and in Vidhu (Moon), there will be prosperity of servants and maidservants, gain and victory in battle, and beautiful renown will arise.

sanskrit: आसने भयमश्वादेश्चौरदुष्टादिपीडनम् । गुल्मपीडा शिरोरोगः केतोः सूक्ष्मगते कुजे ॥६९॥
transliteration: āsane bhayamaśvādeścauraduṣṭādipīḍanam . gulmapīḍā śirorogaḥ ketoḥ sūkṣmagate kuje.
separated_sandhi: āsane bhayam aśva-ādeḥ caura-duṣṭa-ādi-pīḍanamgulma-pīḍā śirorogaḥ ketoḥ sūkṣma-gate kuje
english: When Ketu is in a subtle state (sūkṣma-gata) and in Kuja (Mars), there will be fear regarding one's position, trouble from horses and others, oppression by thieves and wicked people, abdominal ailments, and headaches.

sanskrit: विनाशः स्त्रीगुरूणां च दुष्टस्त्रीसङ्गमाल्लघुः । वमनं रुधिरं पित्तं केतोः सूक्ष्मगतेऽप्यगौ ॥७०॥
transliteration: vināśaḥ strīgurūṇāṃ ca duṣṭastrīsaṅgamāllaghuḥ . vamanaṃ rudhiraṃ pittaṃ ketoḥ sūkṣmagate'pyagau.
separated_sandhi: vināśaḥ strīgurūṇām ca duṣṭastrīsaṅgamāt laghuḥ |vamanaṃ rudhiraṃ pittaṃ ketoḥ sūkṣmagate api agau
english: When Ketu is in subtle transit with Mars, there will be the ruin of women and preceptors, and quick downfall due to association with wicked women. There will also be vomiting, bleeding, and an imbalance of bile (pitta).

sanskrit: रिपोर्विरोधः सम्पत्तिः सहसा राजवैभवम् । पशुक्षेत्रविनाशार्तिः केतोः सूक्ष्मगते गुरौ ॥७१॥
transliteration: riporvirodhaḥ sampattiḥ sahasā rājavaibhavam . paśukṣetravināśārtiḥ ketoḥ sūkṣmagate gurau.
separated_sandhi: ripoḥ virodhaḥ sampattiḥ sahasā rājavaibhavam| paśukṣetravināśārtiḥ ketoḥ sūkṣmagate gurau
english: When Ketu is in subtle transit with Jupiter, there will be opposition from enemies, sudden acquisition of royal splendor and wealth. There will also be distress due to the destruction of cattle and agricultural land.

sanskrit: मृषा पीडा भवेत्क्षुद्रमुखोत्पत्तिश्च लङ्घनम् । स्त्रीविरोधः सत्यहानिः केतोः सूक्ष्मगते शनौ ॥७२॥
transliteration: mṛṣā pīḍā bhavetkṣudramukhotpattiśca laṅghanam . strīvirodhaḥ satyahāniḥ ketoḥ sūkṣmagate śanau.
separated_sandhi: mṛṣā pīḍā bhavet kṣudramukhotpattiḥ ca laṅghanam| strīvirodhaḥ satyahāniḥ ketoḥ sūkṣmagate śanau
english: When Ketu is in subtle transit with Saturn, there will be unfounded distress, outbreaks of petty arguments, and transgressions. There will also be conflict with women and a loss of integrity (satyahāni).

sanskrit: नानाविधजनाप्तिश्च विप्रयोगोऽरिपीडनम् । अर्थसम्पत्समृद्धिश्च केतोः सूक्ष्मगते बुधे ॥७३॥
transliteration: nānāvidhajanāptiśca viprayogo'ripīḍanam . arthasampatsamṛddhiśca ketoḥ sūkṣmagate budhe.
separated_sandhi: nānāvidhajanāptiḥ ca viprayogaḥ aripīḍanam |arthasampatsamṛddhiḥ ca ketoḥ sūkṣmagate budhe
english: When Ketu is in subtle transit with Mercury, there will be association with various kinds of people, separation (from loved ones), and harassment by enemies. There will also be an abundance and prosperity of wealth and resources.

sanskrit: शत्रुहानिर्महत्सौख्यं शङ्करालयनिर्मितिः । तडागकूपनिर्माणं निजसूक्ष्मगते भृगौ ॥७४॥
transliteration: śatruhānirmahatsaukhyaṃ śaṅkarālayanirmitiḥ . taḍāgakūpanirmāṇaṃ nijasūkṣmagate bhṛgau.
separated_sandhi: śatruhāniḥ mahatsaukhyam śaṅkarālayanirmitiḥtaḍāgakūpanirmāṇam nija sūkṣmagate bhṛgau
english: When Venus (Bhṛgu) is in its subtle motion, there will be the destruction of enemies, great happiness, the construction of temples for Shiva (Śaṅkara), and the building of ponds and wells.

sanskrit: उरस्तापो भ्रमश्चैव गतागतविचेष्टितम् । क्वचिल्लाभः क्वचिद्धानिर्भृगोः सूक्ष्मगते रवौ ॥७५॥
transliteration: urastāpo bhramaścaiva gatāgataviceṣṭitam . kvacillābhaḥ kvaciddhānirbhṛgoḥ sūkṣmagate ravau.
separated_sandhi: urastāpaḥ bhramaḥ ca eva gatāgataviceṣṭitam kvacitlābhaḥ kvacit hāniḥ bhṛgoḥ sūkṣmagate ravau
english: When the Sun (Ravi) is in the subtle motion of Venus (Bhṛgu), there will be chest discomfort (urastāpa) and delusion, restless coming and going, and sometimes gain, sometimes loss.

sanskrit: आरोग्यं धनसम्पात्तिः कार्यलाभो गतागतैः । बुद्धिविद्याविवृद्धिः स्याद् भृगोः सूक्ष्मगते विधौ ॥७६॥
transliteration: ārogyaṃ dhanasampāttiḥ kāryalābho gatāgataiḥ . buddhividyāvivṛddhiḥ syād bhṛgoḥ sūkṣmagate vidhau.
separated_sandhi: ārogyam dhanasampattiḥ kāryalābhaḥ gatāgataiḥbuddhividyāvivṛddhiḥ syāt bhṛgoḥ sūkṣmagate vidhau
english: When the Moon (Vidhu) is in the subtle motion of Venus (Bhṛgu), there will be good health, acquisition of wealth, success in endeavors through journeys, and an increase in intelligence and knowledge.

sanskrit: जडत्वं रिपुवैषम्यं देशभ्रंशो महद्भयम् । व्याधिदुःखसमृत्पत्तिर्भृगोः सूक्ष्मगते कुजे ॥७७॥
transliteration: jaḍatvaṃ ripuvaiṣamyaṃ deśabhraṃśo mahadbhayam . vyādhiduḥkhasamṛtpattirbhṛgoḥ sūkṣmagate kuje.
separated_sandhi: jaḍatvam ripuvaiṣamyam deśabhraṃśaḥ mahatbhayamvyādhiduḥkhasamutpattiḥ bhṛgoḥ sūkṣmagate kuje
english: When Mars (Kuḍja) is in the subtle motion of Venus (Bhṛgu), there will be sluggishness, hostility from enemies, loss of country, great fear, and the onset of disease and suffering.

sanskrit: राज्याग्निसर्पजा भीतिर्बन्धुनाशो गुरुव्यथा । स्थानच्युतिर्महाभीतिर्भृगोः सूक्ष्मगतेऽप्यहौ ॥७८॥
transliteration: rājyāgnisarpajā bhītirbandhunāśo guruvyathā . sthānacyutirmahābhītirbhṛgoḥ sūkṣmagate'pyahau.
separated_sandhi: rājyāgnisarpajā bhītiḥ bandhunāśaḥ guruvyathāsthānacyutiḥ mahābhītiḥ bhṛgoḥ sūkṣmagate api ahau
english: When Venus (Bhṛgu) is in a subtle division and also when Rāhu (ahi) is in a subtle division, there will be fear arising from the state, fire, or snakes, loss of relatives, severe distress, displacement from one's position, and great anxiety.

sanskrit: सर्वत्र कार्यलाभश्च क्षेत्रार्थविभवोन्नतिः । वणिग्वृत्तेर्महालब्धिर्भृगोः सूक्ष्मगते गुरौ ॥७९॥
transliteration: sarvatra kāryalābhaśca kṣetrārthavibhavonnatiḥ . vaṇigvṛttermahālabdhirbhṛgoḥ sūkṣmagate gurau.
separated_sandhi: sarvatra kāryalābhaḥ ca kṣetrārthavibhavonnatiḥvaṇigvṛtteḥ mahālabdhiḥ bhṛgoḥ sūkṣmagate gurau
english: When Venus (Bhṛgu) is in a subtle division and Jupiter (Guru) is in a subtle division, there will be success in all undertakings, an increase in property, wealth, and prosperity, and great profits from mercantile activities.

sanskrit: शत्रुपीडा महद्दुःखं चतुष्पादविनाशनम् । स्वगोत्रगुरुहानिः स्याद् भृगोः सूक्ष्मगते शनौ ॥८०॥
transliteration: śatrupīḍā mahadduḥkhaṃ catuṣpādavināśanam . svagotraguruhāniḥ syād bhṛgoḥ sūkṣmagate śanau.
separated_sandhi: śatrupīḍā mahadduḥkham catuṣpādavināśanamsvagotraguruhāniḥ syāt bhṛgoḥ sūkṣmagate śanau
english: When Venus (Bhṛgu) is in a subtle division and Saturn (Śani) is in a subtle division, there will be harassment from enemies, great suffering, destruction of quadrupeds, and harm to one's own clan and elders (guru).

sanskrit: बाण्धवादिषु सम्पत्तिर्व्यवहारो धनोन्नतिः । पुत्रदारादितः सौख्यं भृगोः सूक्ष्मगते बुधे ॥८१॥
transliteration: bāṇdhavādiṣu sampattirvyavahāro dhanonnatiḥ . putradārāditaḥ saukhyaṃ bhṛgoḥ sūkṣmagate budhe.
separated_sandhi: bāndhavādiṣu sampattiḥ vyavahāraḥ dhanonnatiḥputradārāditaḥ saukhyam bhṛgoḥ sūkṣmagate budhe
english: When Venus (Bhṛgu) is in a subtle division and Mercury (Budha) is in a subtle division, there will be prosperity among relatives and others, successful dealings, an increase in wealth, and happiness from sons, wives, and so forth.

sanskrit: अग्निरोगो महापीडा मुखनेत्रशिरोव्यथा । सञ्चितार्थात्मनः पीडा भृगोः सूक्ष्मगते ध्वजे ॥८२॥
transliteration: agnirogo mahāpīḍā mukhanetraśirovyathā . sañcitārthātmanaḥ pīḍā bhṛgoḥ sūkṣmagate dhvaje.
separated_sandhi: agnirogaḥ mahāpīḍā mukhaneṭraśirovyathāsañcitārthātmanaḥ pīḍā bhṛgoḥ sūkṣmagate dhvaje
english: When Venus (Bhṛgu) is in its subtle sub-period (sūkṣma-daśā), there will be feverish diseases, great suffering, pain in the face, eyes, and head, and distress to one's accumulated wealth and the individual (ātman).

sanskrit: पृथक् खगदशावर्षैर्हन्यात् सूक्ष्मदशामितिम् । खसूर्यैर्विभजेल्लिब्धर्ज्ञेय प्राणदशामितिः ॥१॥
transliteration: pṛthak khagadaśāvarṣairhanyāt sūkṣmadaśāmitim . khasūryairvibhajellibdharjñeya prāṇadaśāmitiḥ.
separated_sandhi: pṛthak khagadaśāvarṣaiḥ hanyāt sūkṣmadaśāmitimkha sūryaiḥ vibhajet labdhaiḥ jñeyā prāṇadaśāmitiḥ
english: One should separately calculate the duration of the subtle sub-period (sūkṣma-daśā) using the years of the planet's main period (daśā). Then, one should divide the obtained result by ten (kha) and twelve (sūrya); the duration of the prāṇa daśā should be understood from this result.

sanskrit: प्ॐश्चल्यं विषजा बाधा चौराग्निनृपजं भयम् । कष्टं सूक्ष्मदशाकाले रवौ प्राणदशां गते ॥२॥
transliteration: poṃścalyaṃ viṣajā bādhā caurāgninṛpajaṃ bhayam . kaṣṭaṃ sūkṣmadaśākāle ravau prāṇadaśāṃ gate.
separated_sandhi: pauṃścalyam viṣajā bādhā caurāgninṛpajam bhayamkaṣṭam sūkṣmadaśākāle ravau prāṇadaśām gate
english: During the subtle sub-period (sūkṣma-daśā), when the Sun (ravi) enters its prāṇa daśā, there will be unchastity, affliction from poison, fear caused by thieves, fire, or kings, and general suffering.

sanskrit: सुखं भोजनसम्पत्तिः संस्कारो नृपवैभवम् । उदारादिकृपाभिश्च रवेः प्राणगते विधौ ॥३॥
transliteration: sukhaṃ bhojanasampattiḥ saṃskāro nṛpavaibhavam . udārādikṛpābhiśca raveḥ prāṇagate vidhau.
separated_sandhi: sukham bhojanasampattiḥ saṃskāraḥ nṛpavaibhavamudārādikṛpābhiḥ ca raveḥ prāṇagate vidhau
english: When the Moon (vidhu) enters its prāṇa daśā during the subtle sub-period (sūkṣma-daśā) of the Sun (ravi), there will be happiness, abundance of food, auspicious sacraments (saṃskāra), royal splendor, and favors from generous people.

sanskrit: भूपोपद्रवमन्यार्थे द्रव्यनाशो महद्भयम् । महत्यपचयप्राप्ती रवेः प्राणगते कुजे ॥४॥
transliteration: bhūpopadravamanyārthe dravyanāśo mahadbhayam . mahatyapacayaprāptī raveḥ prāṇagate kuje.
separated_sandhi: bhūpa upadravam anyārthe dravyanāśaḥ mahatbhayam mahati apacayaprāptī raveḥ prāṇagate kuje
english: When Mars (Kuza) is in prāṇa-gati (transit related to vital breath) with respect to the Sun, and when there is a great decline, there will be trouble from rulers, loss of wealth for others, and great fear.

sanskrit: अन्नोद्भवा महापीडा विषोत्पत्तिर्विशेषतः । अर्थाग्निराजभिः क्लेशो रवेः प्राणगतेऽप्यहौ ॥५॥
transliteration: annodbhavā mahāpīḍā viṣotpattirviśeṣataḥ . arthāgnirājabhiḥ kleśo raveḥ prāṇagate'pyahau.
separated_sandhi: anna udbhavā mahāpīḍā viṣa utpattiḥ viśeṣataḥartha agni rājabhiḥ kleśaḥ raveḥ prāṇagate api ahau
english: When Rāhu (or Ketu, known as Ahi) is in prāṇa-gati (transit related to vital breath) with respect to the Sun, there will be great distress caused by food, especially the production of poison, and suffering due to wealth, fire, and rulers.

sanskrit: नानाविद्यार्थसम्पत्तिः कार्यलाभो गतागतैः । नृपविप्राश्रमे सूक्ष्मे रवेः प्राणगते गुरौ ॥६॥
transliteration: nānāvidyārthasampattiḥ kāryalābho gatāgataiḥ . nṛpaviprāśrame sūkṣme raveḥ prāṇagate gurau.
separated_sandhi: nānā vidyā artha sampattiḥ kāryalābhaḥ gatāgataiḥnṛpa vipra āśrame sūkṣme raveḥ prāṇagate gurau
english: When Jupiter (Guru) is in prāṇa-gati (transit related to vital breath) with respect to the Sun, there will be acquisition of various kinds of knowledge and wealth, and success in endeavors through frequent travels, especially in the subtle or hidden abodes (āśrama) of kings and Brahmins.

sanskrit: बन्धनं प्राणनाशश्च चित्तोद्वेगस्तथैव च । बहुबाधा महाहानी रवेः प्राणगते शनौ ॥७॥
transliteration: bandhanaṃ prāṇanāśaśca cittodvegastathaiva ca . bahubādhā mahāhānī raveḥ prāṇagate śanau.
separated_sandhi: bandhanam prāṇanāśaḥ ca citta udvegaḥ tathaivaca bahubādhā mahāhānī raveḥ prāṇagate śanau
english: When Saturn (Śani) is in prāṇa-gati (transit related to vital breath) with respect to the Sun, there will be imprisonment, loss of life, mental agitation, and many obstacles and great losses.

sanskrit: राजान्नभोगः सततं राजलाञ्छानतत्पदम् । आत्मा सन्तर्पयेदीवं रवेः प्राणगते बुधे ॥८॥
transliteration: rājānnabhogaḥ satataṃ rājalāñchānatatpadam . ātmā santarpayedīvaṃ raveḥ prāṇagate budhe.
separated_sandhi: rāja-anna-bhogaḥ satatam rāja-lāñchana-tat-padamātmā santarpayet īham raveḥ prāṇa-gate budhe
english: When Mercury (Budha) is associated with the vital energy (prāṇa) of the Sun (Ravi), there is constant enjoyment of royal food and a position marked by royal insignia. Furthermore, the self (ātman) fulfills its aspirations.

sanskrit: अन्योऽन्यं कलहश्चैव वसुहानिः पराजयः । गुरुस्त्रीबन्धुविर्गैश्च सूर्यप्राणगते ध्वजे ॥९॥
transliteration: anyo'nyaṃ kalahaścaiva vasuhāniḥ parājayaḥ . gurustrībandhuvirgaiśca sūryaprāṇagate dhvaje.
separated_sandhi: anyonyam kalahaḥ ca eva vasu-hāniḥ parājayaḥguru-strī-bandhu-vargaiḥ ca sūrya-prāṇa-gate dhvaje
english: When Ketu (Dhvaja) is associated with the vital energy (prāṇa) of the Sun (Sūrya), there is mutual strife, loss of wealth, and defeat, especially with preceptors, women, relatives, and various groups of people.

sanskrit: राजपूजा धनाधिक्यं स्त्रीपुत्रादिभवं सुखम् । अन्नपानादिभोगादि सूर्यप्राणगते भृगौ ॥१०॥
transliteration: rājapūjā dhanādhikyaṃ strīputrādibhavaṃ sukham . annapānādibhogādi sūryaprāṇagate bhṛgau.
separated_sandhi: rāja-pūjā dhana-ādhikyam strī-putra-ādi-bhavam sukhamanna-pāna-ādi-bhoga-ādi sūrya-prāṇa-gate bhṛgau
english: When Venus (Bhṛgu) is associated with the vital energy (prāṇa) of the Sun (Sūrya), one receives royal honors, an abundance of wealth, happiness arising from one's wife and sons, and the enjoyment of food, drink, and other pleasures.

sanskrit: स्त्रीपुत्रादिसुखं द्रव्यं लभते नूतनाम्बरम् । योगसिद्धिं समाधिञ्च निजप्राणगते विधौ ॥११॥
transliteration: strīputrādisukhaṃ dravyaṃ labhate nūtanāmbaram . yogasiddhiṃ samādhiñca nijaprāṇagate vidhau.
separated_sandhi: strī-putra-ādi-sukham dravyam labhate nūtana-ambaramyoga-siddhim samādhim ca nija-prāṇa-gate vidhau
english: When the Moon (Vidhu) is within its own vital energy (prāṇa), one obtains happiness from one's wife and sons, wealth, new garments, the accomplishment of yoga (yoga-siddhi), and deep meditative absorption (samādhi).

sanskrit: क्षयं कुष्ठं बन्धुनाशं रक्तस्रावान्महद्भयम् । भूतावेशादि जायते विधोः प्राणगते कुजे ॥१२॥
transliteration: kṣayaṃ kuṣṭhaṃ bandhunāśaṃ raktasrāvānmahadbhayam . bhūtāveśādi jāyate vidhoḥ prāṇagate kuje.
separated_sandhi: kṣayam kuṣṭham bandhunāśam raktasrāvāt mahatbhayam bhūtāveśa ādi jāyate vidhoḥ prāṇagate kuje
english: When Mars is situated in the vital energy (prāṇa) of the Moon, there occur decay, leprosy, loss of relatives, great fear due to blood discharge, and possession by spirits.

sanskrit: सर्पभीतिविशेषाण भूतोपद्रवान् सदा । दृष्टिक्षोभो मतिभ्रंशो विधोः प्राणगतेऽप्यहौ ॥१३॥
transliteration: sarpabhītiviśeṣāṇa bhūtopadravān sadā . dṛṣṭikṣobho matibhraṃśo vidhoḥ prāṇagate'pyahau.
separated_sandhi: sarpa bhīti viśeṣān bhūta upadravān sadā dṛṣṭikṣobhaḥ mati bhraṃśaḥ vidhoḥ prāṇagate api ahau
english: When Rahu is situated in the vital energy (prāṇa) of the Moon, there is fear of snakes, especially constant troubles from spirits, eye afflictions, and mental delusion.

sanskrit: धर्मवृद्धिः क्षमाप्राप्तिर्देवब्राह्मणपूजनम् । सौभाग्यं प्रियदृष्टिश्च चन्द्रप्राणगते गुरौ ॥१४॥
transliteration: dharmavṛddhiḥ kṣamāprāptirdevabrāhmaṇapūjanam . saubhāgyaṃ priyadṛṣṭiśca candraprāṇagate gurau.
separated_sandhi: dharma vṛddhiḥ kṣamā prāptiḥ deva brāhmaṇa pūjanamsaubhāgyam priya dṛṣṭiḥ ca candra prāṇagate gurau
english: When Jupiter is situated in the vital energy (prāṇa) of the Moon, there is an increase of adherence to natural law (dharma), attainment of patience, worship of gods and Brahmins, good fortune, and a favorable outlook.

sanskrit: सहसा देहपतनं शत्रूपद्रववेदना । अन्धत्वं च धनप्राप्तिश्चन्द्रप्राणगते शनौ ॥१५॥
transliteration: sahasā dehapatanaṃ śatrūpadravavedanā . andhatvaṃ ca dhanaprāptiścandraprāṇagate śanau.
separated_sandhi: sahasā deha patanam śatru upadrava vedanāandhatvam ca dhana prāptiḥ candra prāṇagate śanau
english: When Saturn is situated in the vital energy (prāṇa) of the Moon, there is sudden death, pain from enemy afflictions, blindness, and acquisition of wealth.

sanskrit: चामरच्छत्रसम्प्राप्ती राज्यलाभो नृपात्ततः । समत्वं सर्वभूतेषु चन्द्रप्राणगते बुधे ॥१६॥
transliteration: cāmaracchatrasamprāptī rājyalābho nṛpāttataḥ . samatvaṃ sarvabhūteṣu candraprāṇagate budhe.
separated_sandhi: cāmaracchatrasamprāptī rājyalābhaḥ nṛpāt tataḥsamatvam sarvabhūteṣu candraprāṇagate budhe
english: When Mercury is in the prāṇa-sphere of the Moon, one attains royal insignia like chowries and umbrellas, gains a kingdom from the ruler, and experiences equanimity among all beings.

sanskrit: शस्त्राग्निरिपुजा पीडा विषाग्निः कुक्षिरोगता । पुत्रदारवियोगश्च चन्द्रप्राणगते ध्वजे ॥१७॥
transliteration: śastrāgniripujā pīḍā viṣāgniḥ kukṣirogatā . putradāraviyogaśca candraprāṇagate dhvaje.
separated_sandhi: śastrāgniripujā pīḍā viṣāgniḥ kukṣirogatāputradāraviyogaḥ ca candraprāṇagate dhvaje
english: When Ketu is in the prāṇa-sphere of the Moon, there is affliction arising from weapons, fire, and enemies, along with poison, fire, abdominal diseases, and separation from one's son and wife.

sanskrit: पुत्रमित्रकलत्राप्तिविदेशाच्च धनागमः । सुखसम्पत्तिरर्थश्च चन्द्रप्राणगते भृगौ ॥१८॥
transliteration: putramitrakalatrāptivideśācca dhanāgamaḥ . sukhasampattirarthaśca candraprāṇagate bhṛgau.
separated_sandhi: putramitrakalatrāpti videśāt ca dhanāgamaḥsukhasampattiḥ arthaḥ ca candraprāṇagate bhṛgau
english: When Venus is in the prāṇa-sphere of the Moon, there is the acquisition of sons, friends, and a wife, an inflow of wealth from foreign lands, and an abundance of happiness, prosperity, and financial gain.

sanskrit: क्रूरता कोपवृद्धिश्च प्राणहानिर्मनोव्यथा । देशत्यागो महाभीतिश्चन्द्रप्राणगते रवौ ॥१९॥
transliteration: krūratā kopavṛddhiśca prāṇahānirmanovyathā . deśatyāgo mahābhītiścandraprāṇagate ravau.
separated_sandhi: krūratā kopavṛddhiḥ ca prāṇahāniḥ manovyathādeśatyāgaḥ mahābhītiḥ candraprāṇagate ravau
english: When the Sun is in the prāṇa-sphere of the Moon, there is cruelty, an increase in anger, loss of life, mental anguish, abandonment of one's country, and great fear.

sanskrit: कलहो रिपुभिर्बन्धः रक्तपित्तादिरोगभीः । निजसूक्ष्मदशामध्ये कुज प्राणगते फलम् ॥२०॥
transliteration: kalaho ripubhirbandhaḥ raktapittādirogabhīḥ . nijasūkṣmadaśāmadhye kuja prāṇagate phalam.
separated_sandhi: kalahaḥ ripubhiḥ bandhaḥ raktapittādi-roga-bhīḥnijasūkṣmadaśāmadhye kuja prāṇagate phalam
english: During one's own sub-sub-period (sūkṣmadaśā), when Mars (kuja) is in its minute sub-period (prāṇagati), the results include conflicts with enemies, obstacles or imprisonment, and fear of diseases such as those involving blood and bile.

sanskrit: विच्युतः सुतदारैश्च बन्धूपद्रवपीडितः । प्राणत्यागो विषेणैव भौमप्राणगतेऽप्यहौ ॥२१॥
transliteration: vicyutaḥ sutadāraiśca bandhūpadravapīḍitaḥ . prāṇatyāgo viṣeṇaiva bhaumaprāṇagate'pyahau.
separated_sandhi: vicyutaḥ sutadāraiḥ ca bandhūpadrava-pīḍitaḥprāṇa-tyāgaḥ viṣeṇa eva bhauma-prāṇa-gate api ahau
english: One experiences separation from children and spouse, is tormented by harassment from relatives, and suffers death, specifically by poison, when Mars (bhauma) is in its minute sub-period (prāṇagati) during Rahu's (aha) period.

sanskrit: देवार्चनपरः स्र्/ईमान्मन्तानुष्ठानतत्परः । पुत्रपौत्रसुखावाप्तिर्भौमप्राणगते गुरौ ॥२२॥
transliteration: devārcanaparaḥ sr/īmānmantānuṣṭhānatatparaḥ . putrapautrasukhāvāptirbhaumaprāṇagate gurau.
separated_sandhi: devārcana-paraḥ śrīmān mantānuṣṭhāna-tatparaḥputra-pautra-sukhāvāptiḥ bhauma-prāṇa-gate gurau
english: When Mars (bhauma) is in its minute sub-period (prāṇagati) during Jupiter's (guru) period, the person becomes devoted to deity worship and diligent in performing mantra (mantra) rituals, achieving happiness from children and grandchildren.

sanskrit: अग्निबाधा भवेन्मृत्युरर्थनाशः पदच्युतिः । बन्धुभिबन्धुतावाप्तिर्भौमप्राणगते शनौ ॥२३॥
transliteration: agnibādhā bhavenmṛtyurarthanāśaḥ padacyutiḥ . bandhubhibandhutāvāptirbhaumaprāṇagate śanau.
separated_sandhi: agni-bādhā bhavet mṛtyuḥ artha-nāśaḥ pada-cyutiḥbandhubhiḥ bandhutā-avāptiḥ bhauma-prāṇa-gate śanau
english: When Mars (bhauma) is in its minute sub-period (prāṇagati) during Saturn's (śani) period, there will be afflictions by fire, death, loss of wealth, and loss of position, yet also the acquisition of kinship or friendly relations with relatives.

sanskrit: दिव्याम्बरसमुत्पत्तिर्दिव्याभरणभूषितः । दिव्याङ्गनायाः सम्प्राप्तिर्भौमप्राणगते बुधे ॥२४॥
