transliteration: divyāmbarasamutpattirdivyābharaṇabhūṣitaḥ . divyāṅganāyāḥ samprāptirbhaumaprāṇagate budhe.
separated_sandhi: divyāmbarasamutpattiḥ divyābharaṇabhūṣitaḥdivyāṅganāyāḥ samprāptiḥ bhaumaprāṇagate budhe
english: When Mercury is in the prāṇa-level sub-sub-period of Mars, there is the acquisition of divine garments, adornment with divine ornaments, and the obtainment of a celestial woman.

sanskrit: पतनोत्पातिपीडा च नेत्रक्षोभो महद्भयम् । भुजङ्गाद् द्रव्यहानिश्च भौमप्राणगते ध्वजे ॥२५॥
transliteration: patanotpātipīḍā ca netrakṣobho mahadbhayam . bhujaṅgād dravyahāniśca bhaumaprāṇagate dhvaje.
separated_sandhi: patanotpātipīḍā ca netrakṣobhaḥ mahadbhayambhujaṅgāt dravyahāniḥ ca bhaumaprāṇagate dhvaje
english: When Ketu is in the prāṇa-level sub-sub-period of Mars, there is distress from falls and unexpected troubles, eye afflictions, great fear, and loss of wealth due to snakes.

sanskrit: धनधान्यादिसम्पत्तिर्लोकपूजा सुखागमा । नानाभोगैर्भवेद्भोगी भौमप्राणगते भृगौ ॥२६॥
transliteration: dhanadhānyādisampattirlokapūjā sukhāgamā . nānābhogairbhavedbhogī bhaumaprāṇagate bhṛgau.
separated_sandhi: dhanadhānyādisampattiḥ lokapūjā sukhāgamānānābhogaiḥ bhavet bhogī bhaumaprāṇagate bhṛgau
english: When Venus is in the prāṇa-level sub-sub-period of Mars, there is acquisition of wealth, grains, and so on, public respect, and the arrival of happiness. The person becomes an enjoyer of various pleasures.

sanskrit: ज्वरोन्मादः क्षयोऽर्थस्य राजविस्नेहसम्भवः । दीर्घरोगी दरिद्रः स्याद्भौमप्राणगते रवौ ॥२७॥
transliteration: jvaronmādaḥ kṣayo'rthasya rājavisnehasambhavaḥ . dīrgharogī daridraḥ syādbhaumaprāṇagate ravau.
separated_sandhi: jvaronmādaḥ kṣayaḥ arthasya rājavisnehasambhavaḥdīrgharogī daridraḥ syāt bhaumaprāṇagate ravau
english: When the Sun is in the prāṇa-level sub-sub-period of Mars, there is fever and madness, loss of wealth, and the possibility of incurring the disfavor of the ruler. The person would become chronically ill and impoverished.

sanskrit: भोजनादिसुखप्राप्तिर्वस्त्राभरणजं सुखम् । शीतोष्णव्याधिपीडा च भौमप्राणगते विधौ ॥२८॥
transliteration: bhojanādisukhaprāptirvastrābharaṇajaṃ sukham . śītoṣṇavyādhipīḍā ca bhaumaprāṇagate vidhau.
separated_sandhi: bhojanādisukhaprāptiḥ vastrābharaṇajam sukhamśītoṣṇavyādhipīḍā ca bhaumaprāṇagate vidhau
english: When Mars (bhauma) is in its prāṇa (a sub-period) and the Moon (vidhu) is influencing, there is the attainment of happiness from food and other comforts, and joy derived from clothes and ornaments. Additionally, there is suffering from cold, heat, and disease.

sanskrit: अन्नाशने विरक्तश्च विषभीतिस्तथैव च । साहसाद्धननाशश्च राहौ प्राणगते भवेत् ॥२९॥
transliteration: annāśane viraktaśca viṣabhītistathaiva ca . sāhasāddhananāśaśca rāhau prāṇagate bhavet.
separated_sandhi: anna āśane viraktaḥ ca viṣabhītiḥ tathā eva casāhasāt dhana-nāśaḥ ca rāhau prāṇagate bhavet
english: When Rāhu is in its prāṇa (a sub-period), there is an aversion to consuming food, a fear of poison, and a loss of wealth due to rash actions.

sanskrit: अङ्गसौख्यं विनिर्भीतिर्वाहनादेश्च सङ्गता । नीचिः कलहसम्प्राप्ती राहोः प्राणगते गुरौ ॥३०॥
transliteration: aṅgasaukhyaṃ vinirbhītirvāhanādeśca saṅgatā . nīciḥ kalahasamprāptī rāhoḥ prāṇagate gurau.
separated_sandhi: aṅgasaukhyam vinirbhītiḥ vāhana-ādeḥ ca saṅgatānīciḥ kalahasamprāptiḥ rāhoḥ prāṇagate gurau
english: During the prāṇa (a sub-period) of Rāhu, with Jupiter (guru) influencing, there is bodily comfort, fearlessness, and the acquisition of vehicles and similar possessions. However, there is also contact with ignoble people or degradation, and the occurrence of quarrels.

sanskrit: गृहदाहः शरीरे रुङ् नीचैरपहृत धनम् । तथा बन्धनसम्प्राप्ती राहोः प्राणगते शनौ ॥३१॥
transliteration: gṛhadāhaḥ śarīre ruṅ nīcairapahṛta dhanam . tathā bandhanasamprāptī rāhoḥ prāṇagate śanau.
separated_sandhi: gṛhadāhaḥ śarīre ruk nīcaiḥ apahṛtam dhanamtathā bandhanasamprāptiḥ rāhoḥ prāṇagate śanau
english: When Rāhu is in its prāṇa (a sub-period) and Saturn (śani) is influencing, there is the burning of the house, bodily pain, wealth stolen by ignoble people, and similarly, the occurrence of imprisonment.

sanskrit: गुरूपदेशविभवो गुरुसत्कारवर्द्धनम् । गुणवाञ्छीलवांश्चापि राहोः प्राणगते बुधे ॥३२॥
transliteration: gurūpadeśavibhavo gurusatkāravarddhanam . guṇavāñchīlavāṃścāpi rāhoḥ prāṇagate budhe.
separated_sandhi: gurūpadeśavibhavaḥ gurusatkāravarddhanamguṇavān śīlavān ca api rāhoḥ prāṇagate budhe
english: When the prāṇa sub-period of Rahu is associated with Budha (Mercury), there will be the splendor of a teacher's (guru's) instructions, an increase in respect for the teacher (guru), and one will possess virtues and good conduct.

sanskrit: स्त्रीपुत्रादिविरोधश्च गृहान्निष्क्रमणादपि । साहसात्कायहानिश्च राहोः प्राणगते ध्वजे ॥३३॥
transliteration: strīputrādivirodhaśca gṛhānniṣkramaṇādapi . sāhasātkāyahāniśca rāhoḥ prāṇagate dhvaje.
separated_sandhi: strīputrādivirodhaḥ ca gṛhāt niṣkramaṇāt apisāhasāt kāyahāniḥ ca rāhoḥ prāṇagate dhvaje
english: When the prāṇa sub-period of Rahu is associated with Dhvaja (Ketu), there will be conflict with one's wife, children, etc., and even departure from home. There will also be physical harm due to rash actions.

sanskrit: छत्रवाहनसम्पत्तिः सर्वार्थफलसञ्चयः । शिवार्चनगृहारम्भो राहोः प्राणगते भृगौ ॥३४॥
transliteration: chatravāhanasampattiḥ sarvārthaphalasañcayaḥ . śivārcanagṛhārambho rāhoḥ prāṇagate bhṛgau.
separated_sandhi: chatravāhanasampattiḥ sarvārthaphalasañcayaḥśivārcanagṛhārambhaḥ rāhoḥ prāṇagate bhṛgau
english: When the prāṇa sub-period of Rahu is associated with Bhṛgu (Venus), there will be the attainment of umbrellas and vehicles, the accumulation of all desired results, and the commencement of Shiva worship and house building.

sanskrit: अर्शादिरोगभीतिश्च राज्योपद्रवसम्भवः । चतुष्पादादिहानिश्च राहोः प्राणगते रवौ ॥३५॥
transliteration: arśādirogabhītiśca rājyopadravasambhavaḥ . catuṣpādādihāniśca rāhoḥ prāṇagate ravau.
separated_sandhi: arśāđirogabhītiḥ ca rājyopadravasambhavaḥcatuṣpādādihāniḥ ca rāhoḥ prāṇagate ravau
english: When the prāṇa sub-period of Rahu is associated with Ravi (Sun), there will be fear of diseases like hemorrhoids, etc., the possibility of troubles related to the government, and loss of quadrupeds, etc.

sanskrit: सौमनस्यं च सद्बुद्धिः सत्कारो गुरुदर्शनम् । पापाद्भीतिर्मनःसौख्यं राहोः प्राणगते विधौ ॥३६॥
transliteration: saumanasyaṃ ca sadbuddhiḥ satkāro gurudarśanam . pāpādbhītirmanaḥsaukhyaṃ rāhoḥ prāṇagate vidhau.
separated_sandhi: saumanasyaṃ ca sadbuddhiḥ satkāraḥ gurudarśanampāpāt bhītiḥ manaḥsaukhyam rāhoḥ prāṇagate vidhau
english: When the prāṇa sub-period of Rāhu is associated with the Moon, there is cheerfulness, good intellect, honor, meetings with a spiritual teacher (guru), fear of sinful acts, and mental happiness.

sanskrit: चाण्डालाग्निवशाद्भीतिः स्वपदच्युतिरापदः । मलिनः श्वादिवृत्तिश्च राहोः प्राणगते कुजे ॥३७॥
transliteration: cāṇḍālāgnivaśādbhītiḥ svapadacyutirāpadaḥ . malinaḥ śvādivṛttiśca rāhoḥ prāṇagate kuje.
separated_sandhi: caṇḍālagnivaśāt bhītiḥ svapadacyutiḥ āpadaḥmalinaḥ śvādivṛttiḥ ca rāhoḥ prāṇagate kuje
english: When the prāṇa sub-period of Rāhu is associated with Mars, there is fear from outcasts (caṇḍāla), fire, or external control; loss of one's position; calamities; impurity; and a livelihood similar to that of a dog.

sanskrit: हर्षागमो धनाधिक्यमग्निहोत्रं शिवार्चनम् । वाहनं छत्रसंयुक्तं निज प्राणगते गुरौ ॥३८॥
transliteration: harṣāgamo dhanādhikyamagnihotraṃ śivārcanam . vāhanaṃ chatrasaṃyuktaṃ nija prāṇagate gurau.
separated_sandhi: harṣāgamaḥ dhanādhikyam agnihotram śivārcanamvāhanam chatrasaṃyuktam nija prāṇagate gurau
english: When the prāṇa sub-period of Jupiter occurs, there is the arrival of joy, abundance of wealth, performance of the agnihotra (fire sacrifice), worship of Śiva, and vehicles accompanied by an umbrella (a symbol of honor).

sanskrit: व्रतहानिर्विषादश्च विदेशे धननाशनम् । विरोधो बन्धुवर्गैश्च गुरोः प्राणगते शनौ ॥३९॥
transliteration: vratahānirviṣādaśca videśe dhananāśanam . virodho bandhuvargaiśca guroḥ prāṇagate śanau.
separated_sandhi: vratahāniḥ viṣādaḥ ca videśe dhananāśanamvirodhaḥ bandhuvargaiḥ ca guroḥ prāṇagate śanau
english: When the prāṇa sub-period of Jupiter is associated with Saturn, there is a breach of vows, dejection, loss of wealth in a foreign land, and conflicts with family members and friends.

sanskrit: विद्याबुद्धिविवृद्धिश्च लोके पूजा धनागमः । स्त्रीपुत्रादिसुखप्राप्तिर्गुरोः प्राणगते बुधे ॥४०॥
transliteration: vidyābuddhivivṛddhiśca loke pūjā dhanāgamaḥ . strīputrādisukhaprāptirguroḥ prāṇagate budhe.
separated_sandhi: vidyābuddhivivṛddhiḥ ca loke pūjā dhanāgamaḥstrīputrādisukhaprāptiḥ guroḥ prāṇagate budhe
english: When Mercury is in a vital division (prāṇaga) of Jupiter, there will be an increase in knowledge and intelligence, respect among people, acquisition of wealth, and the attainment of happiness from one's wife, sons, and so on.

sanskrit: ज्ञानं विभवपाण्डित्यं शास्त्रज्ञानं शिवार्चनम् । अग्निहोत्रं गुरोर्भक्तिर्गुरोः प्राणगते ध्वजे ॥४१॥
transliteration: jñānaṃ vibhavapāṇḍityaṃ śāstrajñānaṃ śivārcanam . agnihotraṃ gurorbhaktirguroḥ prāṇagate dhvaje.
separated_sandhi: jñānam vibhavapāṇḍityam śāstrajñānam śivārcanamagnihotram guroḥ bhaktiḥ guroḥ prāṇagate dhvaje
english: When Ketu (dhvaja) is in a vital division (prāṇaga) of Jupiter, there will be knowledge, worldly prosperity, scholarship, scriptural knowledge, worship of Shiva, the fire ritual (agnihotra), and devotion (bhakti) to the preceptor (guru).

sanskrit: रोगान्मुक्तिः सुखं भोगो धनधान्यसमागमः । पुत्रदारादिजं सौख्यं गुरोः प्राणगते भृगौ ॥४२॥
transliteration: rogānmuktiḥ sukhaṃ bhogo dhanadhānyasamāgamaḥ . putradārādijaṃ saukhyaṃ guroḥ prāṇagate bhṛgau.
separated_sandhi: rogaat muktiḥ sukham bhogaḥ dhanadhānyasamāgamaḥputradārādijam saukhyam guroḥ prāṇagate bhṛgau
english: When Venus (bhṛgu) is in a vital division (prāṇaga) of Jupiter, there will be freedom from diseases, happiness, enjoyment, the acquisition of wealth and grains, and joy arising from sons, wife, and so on.

sanskrit: वातपित्तप्रकोपं च श्लेष्मोद्रेकं तु दारुणम् । रसव्याधिकृतं शूलं गुरोः प्राणगते रवौ ॥४३॥
transliteration: vātapittaprakopaṃ ca śleṣmodrekaṃ tu dāruṇam . rasavyādhikṛtaṃ śūlaṃ guroḥ prāṇagate ravau.
separated_sandhi: vātapittaprakopam ca śleṣmodrekam tu dāruṇamrasavyādhikṛtam śūlam guroḥ prāṇagate ravau
english: When the Sun (ravi) is in a vital division (prāṇaga) of Jupiter, there will be an aggravation of vāta and pitta, a severe increase of kapha (śleṣman), and pain caused by diseases related to the essential fluids (rasa) of the body.

sanskrit: छत्रचामरसंयुक्तं वैभवं पुत्रसम्पदः । नेत्रकुक्षिगता पीडा गुरोः प्राणगते विधौ ॥४४॥
transliteration: chatracāmarasaṃyuktaṃ vaibhavaṃ putrasampadaḥ . netrakukṣigatā pīḍā guroḥ prāṇagate vidhau.
separated_sandhi: chatracāmarasaṃyuktam vaibhavam putrasampadaḥnetrakukṣigatā pīḍā guroḥ prāṇagate vidhau
english: When the Moon (vidhu) is situated in the "prāṇa" sub-period of Jupiter (guru), there will be prosperity (vaibhava) adorned with royal insignia (chatracāmara) and an abundance of sons. However, there will also be affliction in the eyes and abdomen.

sanskrit: स्त्रीजनाच्च विषोत्पत्तिर्बन्धनं चातिनिग्रहः । देशान्तरगमो भ्रान्तिर्गुरोः प्राणगते कुजे ॥४५॥
transliteration: strījanācca viṣotpattirbandhanaṃ cātinigrahaḥ . deśāntaragamo bhrāntirguroḥ prāṇagate kuje.
separated_sandhi: strījanāt ca viṣotpattiḥ bandhanam ca atinigrahaḥdeśāntaragamaḥ bhrāntiḥ guroḥ prāṇagate kuje
english: When Mars (kuja) is situated in the "prāṇa" sub-period of Jupiter (guru), there will be poisoning from women, imprisonment, and great subjugation. Also, there will be travel to other countries and mental confusion.

sanskrit: व्याधिभिः परिभूतः स्याच्चौरैरपहृतं धनम् । सर्पवृश्चिकभीतिश्च गुरोः प्राणगतेऽप्यहौ ॥४६॥
transliteration: vyādhibhiḥ paribhūtaḥ syāccaurairapahṛtaṃ dhanam . sarpavṛścikabhītiśca guroḥ prāṇagate'pyahau.
separated_sandhi: vyādhibhiḥ paribhūtaḥ syāt cauraiḥ apahṛtam dhanamsarpavṛścikabhītiḥ ca guroḥ prāṇagate api ahau
english: When Rāhu (ahi) is situated in the "prāṇa" sub-period of Jupiter (guru), there will be suffering from diseases, wealth plundered by thieves, and also fear of snakes and scorpions.

sanskrit: ज्वरेण ज्वलिता कान्तिः कुष्ठरोगोदरादिरुक् । जलाग्निकृतमृत्युः स्यान्निजप्राणगते शनौ ॥४७॥
transliteration: jvareṇa jvalitā kāntiḥ kuṣṭharogodarādiruk . jalāgnikṛtamṛtyuḥ syānnijaprāṇagate śanau.
separated_sandhi: jvareṇa jvalitā kāntiḥ kuṣṭharogodarādirukjalāgnikṛtamṛtyuḥ syāt nijaprāṇagate śanau
english: When Saturn (śani) is situated in its own "prāṇa" sub-period, the body's radiance (kānti) will be inflamed by fever, and there will be afflictions such as leprosy, abdominal diseases, etc. There may also be death caused by water or fire.

sanskrit: धनं धान्यं च माङ्गल्यं व्यवहाराभिपूजनम् । देवब्राह्मणभक्तिश्च शनेः प्राणगते बुधे ॥४८॥
transliteration: dhanaṃ dhānyaṃ ca māṅgalyaṃ vyavahārābhipūjanam . devabrāhmaṇabhaktiśca śaneḥ prāṇagate budhe.
separated_sandhi: dhanam dhānyam ca māṅgalyam vyavahārābhipūjanamdevabrāhmaṇabhaktiḥ ca śaneḥ prāṇagate budhe
english: When Saturn (śani) influences the vital energy of Mercury (budha), there will be wealth, grain, auspiciousness, honor in dealings, and devotion (bhakti) to gods and Brahmins.

sanskrit: मृत्युवेदनदुःखं च भूतोपद्रवसम्भवः । परदाराभिभूतत्वं शनेः प्राणगते ध्वजे ॥४९॥
transliteration: mṛtyuvedanaduḥkhaṃ ca bhūtopadravasambhavaḥ . paradārābhibhūtatvaṃ śaneḥ prāṇagate dhvaje.
separated_sandhi: mṛtyuvedanaduḥkham ca bhūtopadravasambhavaḥparadārābhibhūtatvam śaneḥ prāṇagate dhvaje
english: When Saturn (śani) influences the vital energy of Ketu (dhvaja), there will be suffering like the pain of death, the possibility of affliction by spirits, and involvement with another's wife.

sanskrit: पुत्रार्थविभवैः सौख्यं क्षितिपालादितः सुखम् । अग्निहोत्रं विवाहश्च शनेः प्राणगते भृगौ ॥५०॥
transliteration: putrārthavibhavaiḥ saukhyaṃ kṣitipālāditaḥ sukham . agnihotraṃ vivāhaśca śaneḥ prāṇagate bhṛgau.
separated_sandhi: putrārthavibhavaiḥ saukhyam kṣitipālāditaḥ sukhamagnihotram vivāhaḥ ca śaneḥ prāṇagate bhṛgau
english: When Saturn (śani) influences the vital energy of Venus (bhṛgu), there will be happiness from children, wealth, and prosperity, happiness from kings and similar authorities, performance of Agnihotra (agnihotra) rituals, and marriage.

sanskrit: अक्षिपीडा शिरोव्याधिः सर्पशत्रुभयं भवेत् । अर्थहानिर्महाक्लेशः शनेः प्राणगते रवौ ॥५१॥
transliteration: akṣipīḍā śirovyādhiḥ sarpaśatrubhayaṃ bhavet . arthahānirmahākleśaḥ śaneḥ prāṇagate ravau.
separated_sandhi: akṣipīḍā śirovyādhiḥ sarpaśatrubhayam bhavetarthahāniḥ mahākleśaḥ śaneḥ prāṇagate ravau
english: When Saturn (śani) influences the vital energy of the Sun (ravi), there may be eye pain, head ailments, fear from serpents and enemies, loss of wealth, and great distress.

sanskrit: आरोग्यं पुत्रलाभश्च शान्तिपौष्टिकवर्धनम् । देवब्राह्मणभक्तिश्च शनेः प्राणगते विधौ ॥५२॥
transliteration: ārogyaṃ putralābhaśca śāntipauṣṭikavardhanam . devabrāhmaṇabhaktiśca śaneḥ prāṇagate vidhau.
separated_sandhi: ārogyam putra-lābhaḥ ca śānti-pauṣṭika-vardhanamdeva-brāhmaṇa-bhaktiḥ ca śaneḥ prāṇa-gate vidhau
english: When Saturn's vital influence (prāṇa) is directed towards the Moon, one experiences health, the gain of children, an increase in peace and prosperity, and devotion (bhakti) towards gods and Brahmins.

sanskrit: गुल्मरोगः शत्रुभीतिर्मृगया प्राननाशनम् । सर्पाग्निविषतो भीतिः शनेः प्राणगते कुजे ॥५३॥
transliteration: gulmarogaḥ śatrubhītirmṛgayā prānanāśanam . sarpāgniviṣato bhītiḥ śaneḥ prāṇagate kuje.
separated_sandhi: gulma-rogaḥ śatru-bhītiḥ mṛgayā prāna-nāśanamsarpa-agni-viṣataḥ bhītiḥ śaneḥ prāṇa-gate kuje
english: When Saturn's vital influence (prāṇa) is directed towards Mars, there will be abdominal diseases, fear from enemies, hunting, destruction of life, and fear from serpents, fire, and poison.

sanskrit: देशत्यागो नृपाद्भीतिर्मोहनं विषभक्षणम् । वातपित्तकृता पीडा शनेः प्राणगतेऽप्यहौ ॥५४॥
transliteration: deśatyāgo nṛpādbhītirmohanaṃ viṣabhakṣaṇam . vātapittakṛtā pīḍā śaneḥ prāṇagate'pyahau.
separated_sandhi: deśa-tyāgaḥ nṛpāt bhītiḥ mohanam viṣa-bhakṣaṇamvāta-pitta-kṛtā pīḍā śaneḥ prāṇa-gate api ahau
english: When Saturn's vital influence (prāṇa) is directed towards Rāhu, one experiences abandonment of country, fear from the ruler, delusion, consumption of poison, and afflictions caused by imbalances of vāta and pitta.

sanskrit: सेनापत्यं भूमिलाभः संगमः स्वजनैः सह । गौरवं नृपसम्मानं शनेः प्राणगते गुरौ ॥५५॥
transliteration: senāpatyaṃ bhūmilābhaḥ saṃgamaḥ svajanaiḥ saha . gauravaṃ nṛpasammānaṃ śaneḥ prāṇagate gurau.
separated_sandhi: senā-patyam bhūmi-lābhaḥ saṅgamaḥ sva-janaiḥ sahagauravam nṛpa-sammānam śaneḥ prāṇa-gate gurau
english: When Saturn's vital influence (prāṇa) is directed towards Jupiter, one attains generalship, acquisition of land, association with one's own people, respect, and honor from the ruler.

sanskrit: आरोग्यं सुखसम्पत्तिर्धर्मकर्मादिसाधनम् । समत्वं सर्वभुतेषु निजप्राणगते बुधे ॥५६॥
transliteration: ārogyaṃ sukhasampattirdharmakarmādisādhanam . samatvaṃ sarvabhuteṣu nijaprāṇagate budhe.
separated_sandhi: ārogyam sukhasampattiḥ dharmakarmādisādhanamsamatvam sarvabhuteṣu nijaprāṇagate budhe
english: When Mercury is in its own "prāṇa" (life-force position), one experiences health, abundant happiness, and the means for righteous (dharma) and other actions, along with equanimity towards all beings.

sanskrit: वह्नितस्करतो भीतिः परमाधिर्विषोद्भवः । देहान्तकरणं दुःखं बुधप्राणगते ध्वजे ॥५७॥
transliteration: vahnitaskarato bhītiḥ paramādhirviṣodbhavaḥ . dehāntakaraṇaṃ duḥkhaṃ budhaprāṇagate dhvaje.
separated_sandhi: vahnitaskarataḥ bhītiḥ paramādhiḥ viṣodbhavaḥdehāntakaraṇam duḥkham budhaprāṇagate dhvaje
english: When Ketu (dhvaja) is in Mercury's "prāṇa" (life-force position), one experiences fear from fire and thieves, extreme mental anguish, problems arising from poison (viṣa), and suffering leading to the end of the body.

sanskrit: प्रभुत्वं धनसम्पत्तिः कीर्तिर्धर्मः शिवार्चनम् । पुत्रदारादिकं सौख्यं बुधप्राणगते भृगौ ॥५८॥
transliteration: prabhutvaṃ dhanasampattiḥ kīrtirdharmaḥ śivārcanam . putradārādikaṃ saukhyaṃ budhaprāṇagate bhṛgau.
separated_sandhi: prabhutvam dhanasampattiḥ kīrtiḥ dharmaḥ śivārcanamputradārādikam saukhyam budhaprāṇagate bhṛgau
english: When Venus (bhṛgu) is in Mercury's "prāṇa" (life-force position), one attains leadership, wealth and prosperity, fame, righteous (dharma) conduct, the worship of Shiva, and happiness from children, spouse, and so on.

sanskrit: अन्तर्दाहो ज्वरोन्मादौ बान्धवानां रति स्त्रियाः । प्राप्यते स्तीयसम्पत्तिर्बुधप्राणगते रवौ ॥५९॥
transliteration: antardāho jvaronmādau bāndhavānāṃ rati striyāḥ . prāpyate stīyasampattirbudhaprāṇagate ravau.
separated_sandhi: antardāhaḥ jvaronmādau bāndhavānām ratiḥ striyāḥprāpyate strīyasampattiḥ budhaprāṇagate ravau
english: When the Sun (ravi) is in Mercury's "prāṇa" (life-force position), one experiences internal torment, fever, and madness. There is also attachment (rati) among relatives and women, and prosperity through women is obtained.

sanskrit: स्त्रीलाभश्चार्थसम्पत्तिः कन्यालाभो धनागमः । लभते सर्वतः सौख्यं बुधप्राणगते विधौ ॥६०॥
transliteration: strīlābhaścārthasampattiḥ kanyālābho dhanāgamaḥ . labhate sarvataḥ saukhyaṃ budhaprāṇagate vidhau.
separated_sandhi: strīlābhaḥ ca arthasampattiḥ kanyālābhaḥ dhanāgamaḥlabhate sarvataḥ saukhyaṃ budhaprāṇagate vidhau
english: When the Moon is in the prāṇaga-daśā of Mercury, one gains a wife, acquires wealth, obtains a daughter, and receives riches. Happiness is attained from all directions.

sanskrit: पतितः कुक्षिरोगी च दन्तनेत्रादिजा व्यथा । अर्शांसि प्राणसन्देहो बुधप्राणगते कुजे ॥६१॥
transliteration: patitaḥ kukṣirogī ca dantanetrādijā vyathā . arśāṃsi prāṇasandeho budhaprāṇagate kuje.
separated_sandhi: patitaḥ kukṣirogī ca dantanetrādijā vyathāarśāṃsi prāṇasandehaḥ budhaprāṇagate kuje
english: When Mars is in the prāṇaga-daśā of Mercury, there is degradation, stomach ailments, pain originating from teeth, eyes, and other organs, hemorrhoids, and danger to life.

sanskrit: वस्त्राभरणसम्पत्तिर्वियोगो विप्रवैरिता । सन्निपातोद्भवं दुखं बुधप्राणगतेऽप्यहौ ॥६२॥
transliteration: vastrābharaṇasampattirviyogo vipravairitā . sannipātodbhavaṃ dukhaṃ budhaprāṇagate'pyahau.
separated_sandhi: vastrābharaṇasampattiḥ viyogaḥ vipravairitāsannipātodbhavaṃ duḥkhaṃ budhaprāṇagate api ahau
english: Even when Rāhu is in the prāṇaga-daśā of Mercury, there is acquisition of clothes and ornaments, but also separation, enmity with Brahmins, and suffering arising from a high fever (saṃnipāta).

sanskrit: गुरुत्वं धनसम्पत्तिर्विद्या सद्गुणसंग्रहः । व्यवसायेन सल्लाभो बुधप्राणगते गुरौ ॥६३॥
transliteration: gurutvaṃ dhanasampattirvidyā sadguṇasaṃgrahaḥ . vyavasāyena sallābho budhaprāṇagate gurau.
separated_sandhi: gurūtvaṃ dhanasampattiḥ vidyā sadguṇasaṃgrahaḥvyavasāyena sallābhaḥ budhaprāṇagate gurau
english: When Jupiter is in the prāṇaga-daśā of Mercury, one attains importance, acquires wealth, knowledge, and a collection of good qualities. There are also good gains through business (vyavasāya).

sanskrit: चौर्येण निधनप्राप्तिर्विधनत्वं दरिद्रता । याचकत्वं विशेषेण बुधप्राणगते शनौ ॥६४॥
transliteration: cauryeṇa nidhanaprāptirvidhanatvaṃ daridratā . yācakatvaṃ viśeṣeṇa budhaprāṇagate śanau.
separated_sandhi: cauryeṇa nidhanaprāptiḥ vidhanatvam daridratāyācakatvam viśeṣeṇa budhaprāṇagate śanau
english: Death (nidhana) results from theft, along with destitution and extreme poverty, and particularly the state of a beggar, when Saturn is situated in the life-force (prāṇa) of Mercury.

sanskrit: अश्वपातेन घातश्च शत्रुतः कलहागमः । निर्विचारवधोत्पत्तिर्निजप्राणगते ध्वजे ॥६५॥
transliteration: aśvapātena ghātaśca śatrutaḥ kalahāgamaḥ . nirvicāravadhotpattirnijaprāṇagate dhvaje.
separated_sandhi: aśvapātena ghātaḥ ca śatrutaḥ kalahāgamaḥnirvicāravadhotpattiḥ nijaprāṇagate dhvaje
english: Injury from a horse fall, strife (kalaha) originating from enemies, and the occurrence of thoughtless killing (vadha) arise when Ketu (dhvaja) is situated in one's own life-force (prāṇa).

sanskrit: क्षेत्रलाभो वैरिनाशो हयलाभो मनःसुखम् । पशुक्षेत्रधनाप्तिश्च केतोः प्राणगते भृगौ ॥६६॥
transliteration: kṣetralābho vairināśo hayalābho manaḥsukham . paśukṣetradhanāptiśca ketoḥ prāṇagate bhṛgau.
separated_sandhi: kṣetralābhaḥ vairināśaḥ hayalābhaḥ manaḥsukhampaśukṣetradhanāptiḥ ca ketoḥ prāṇagate bhṛgau
english: Acquisition of land, destruction of enemies, gain of horses, mental happiness, and the attainment of cattle, land, and wealth occur when Venus (bhṛgu) is situated in the life-force (prāṇa) of Ketu.

sanskrit: स्तेयाग्निरिपुभीतिश्च धनहानिर्मनोव्यथा । प्राणान्तकरणं कष्टं केतोः प्राणगते रवौ ॥६७॥
transliteration: steyāgniripubhītiśca dhanahānirmanovyathā . prāṇāntakaraṇaṃ kaṣṭaṃ ketoḥ prāṇagate ravau.
separated_sandhi: steyāgniripubhītiḥ ca dhanahāniḥ manovyathāprāṇāntakaraṇam kaṣṭam ketoḥ prāṇagate ravau
english: Fear from thieves, fire, and enemies, loss of wealth, mental anguish, and a painful cause of death arise when the Sun (ravi) is situated in the life-force (prāṇa) of Ketu.

sanskrit: देवद्विजगुरोः पूजा दीर्घयात्रा धनं सुखम् । कर्णे वा लोचने रोगः केतोः प्राणगते विधौ ॥६८॥
transliteration: devadvijaguroḥ pūjā dīrghayātrā dhanaṃ sukham . karṇe vā locane rogaḥ ketoḥ prāṇagate vidhau.
separated_sandhi: devadvijaguroḥ pūjā dīrghayātrā dhanam sukhamkarṇe vā locane rogaḥ ketoḥ prāṇagate vidhau
english: During the sub-period (prāṇa) of the Moon, while Ketu's major period is active, there will be worship of deities, Brahmins, and teachers, along with long journeys, wealth, and happiness. Alternatively, there may be disease in the ear or eye.

sanskrit: पित्तरोगो नसावृद्धिर्विभ्रमः सन्निपातजः । स्वबन्धुजनविद्वेषः केतोः प्राणगते कुजे ॥६९॥
transliteration: pittarogo nasāvṛddhirvibhramaḥ sannipātajaḥ . svabandhujanavidveṣaḥ ketoḥ prāṇagate kuje.
separated_sandhi: pittarogaḥ nasāvṛddhiḥ vibhramaḥ sannipātajaḥsvabandhujanavidveṣaḥ ketoḥ prāṇagate kuje
english: During the sub-period (prāṇa) of Mars, while Ketu's major period is active, there will be "pitta" ailments, growth of nasal issues or veins, and confusion caused by "sannipāta" (a derangement of all three humors). There will also be animosity towards one's own relatives.

sanskrit: विरोधः स्त्रीसुताद्यैश्च गृहान्निष्क्रमणं भवेत् । स्वसाहसात्कार्यहानिः केतोः प्राणगतेऽप्यहौ ॥७०॥
transliteration: virodhaḥ strīsutādyaiśca gṛhānniṣkramaṇaṃ bhavet . svasāhasātkāryahāniḥ ketoḥ prāṇagate'pyahau.
separated_sandhi: virodhaḥ strīsutādyaiḥ ca gṛhāt niṣkramaṇam bhavetsvasāhasāt kāryahāniḥ ketoḥ prāṇagate api ahau
english: During the sub-period (prāṇa) of Rāhu, while Ketu's major period is active, there will be conflicts with one's wife, sons, and others, and a departure from home may occur. There will also be a loss of ventures due to one's own rash actions.

sanskrit: स/स्त्रव्रणैर्महारोगो हृत्पीडादिसमुद्भवः । सुतदारवियोगश्च केतोः प्राणगते गुरौ ॥७१॥
transliteration: sa/stravraṇairmahārogo hṛtpīḍādisamudbhavaḥ . sutadāraviyogaśca ketoḥ prāṇagate gurau.
separated_sandhi: sasravraṇaiḥ mahārogaḥ hṛtpīḍādisamudbhavaḥsutadāraviyogaḥ ca ketoḥ prāṇagate gurau
english: During the sub-period (prāṇa) of Jupiter, while Ketu's major period is active, there will be serious ailments from bloody wounds, and suffering originating from heart pain and similar issues. There will also be separation from sons and wife.

sanskrit: मतिविभ्रमतीक्ष्णत्वं क्रूरकर्मरतिः सदा । व्यवसनाद्बन्धनं दुःखं केतोः प्राणगते शनौ ॥७२॥
transliteration: mativibhramatīkṣṇatvaṃ krūrakarmaratiḥ sadā . vyavasanādbandhanaṃ duḥkhaṃ ketoḥ prāṇagate śanau.
separated_sandhi: mati-vibhrama-tīkṣṇatvam krūra-karma-ratiḥ sadāvyasanāt bandhanam duḥkham ketoḥ prāṇagate śanau
english: When Ketu's sub-sub-period (prāṇaga) is in Shani's (main) period, there will be mental confusion, intense engagement in cruel actions, constant delight in cruel deeds, imprisonment due to misfortunes or addictions, and suffering.

sanskrit: कुसुमं शयनं भूषा लेपनं भोजनादिकम् । सौख्यं सर्वाङ्गभोग्यं च केतोः प्राणगते बुधे ॥७३॥
transliteration: kusumaṃ śayanaṃ bhūṣā lepanaṃ bhojanādikam . saukhyaṃ sarvāṅgabhogyaṃ ca ketoḥ prāṇagate budhe.
separated_sandhi: kusumam śayanam bhūṣā lepanam bhojana-ādikamsaukhyam sarva-aṅga-bhogyam ca ketoḥ prāṇagate budhe
english: When Ketu's sub-sub-period (prāṇaga) is in Budha's (main) period, there will be enjoyment of flowers, comfortable beds, ornaments, perfumes, food and so on, happiness, and pleasure for all the senses.

sanskrit: ज्ञानमीश्वरभक्तिश्च सन्तोषश्च धनागमः । पुत्रपौत्रसमृद्धिश्च निजप्राणगते भृगौ ॥७४॥
transliteration: jñānamīśvarabhaktiśca santoṣaśca dhanāgamaḥ . putrapautrasamṛddhiśca nijaprāṇagate bhṛgau.
separated_sandhi: jñānam īśvara-bhaktiḥ ca santoṣaḥ ca dhana-āgamaḥputra-pautra-samṛddhiḥ ca nija-prāṇagate bhṛgau
english: When Ketu's sub-sub-period (prāṇaga) is in Venus's (main) period, there will be knowledge, devotion (bhakti) to the Lord, contentment, acquisition of wealth, and prosperity of sons and grandsons.

sanskrit: लोकप्रकाशकीर्तिश्च सुतसौख्यविवर्जितः । उष्णादिरोगजं दुखं शुक्रप्राणगते रवौ ॥७५॥
transliteration: lokaprakāśakīrtiśca sutasaukhyavivarjitaḥ . uṣṇādirogajaṃ dukhaṃ śukraprāṇagate ravau.
separated_sandhi: loka-prakāśa-kīrtiḥ ca suta-saukhya-vivarjitaḥuṣṇa-ādi-roga-jam duḥkham śukra-prāṇagate ravau
english: When Venus's sub-sub-period (prāṇaga) is in the Sun's (main) period, there will be world-renowned fame, but a deprivation of happiness from children, and suffering caused by diseases like fevers.

sanskrit: देवार्चने कर्मरतिर्मन्त्रतोषणतत्परः । धनसौभाग्यसम्पत्तिः शुक्रप्राणगते विधौ ॥७६॥
transliteration: devārcane karmaratirmantratoṣaṇatatparaḥ . dhanasaubhāgyasampattiḥ śukraprāṇagate vidhau.
separated_sandhi: devarcane karmaratiḥ mantratoṣaṇatatparaḥdhanasaubhāgyasampattiḥ śukraprāṇagate vidhau
english: When the Moon (Vidhu) is in the "prāṇa-daśā" (vital sub-sub-period) of Venus, there is delight in actions (karma) related to deity worship and dedication to propitiating (deities) with sacred utterances (mantra). This brings about the attainment of wealth and good fortune.

sanskrit: ज्वरो मसूरिकास्फोटकण्डूचिपिटकादिकाः । देवब्राह्मणपूजा च शुक्रप्राणगते कुजे ॥७७॥
transliteration: jvaro masūrikāsphoṭakaṇḍūcipiṭakādikāḥ . devabrāhmaṇapūjā ca śukraprāṇagate kuje.
separated_sandhi: jvaraḥ masūrikāsphoṭakaṇḍūcipiṭakādikāḥdevabrāhmaṇapūjā ca śukraprāṇagate kuje
english: When Mars (Kuja) is in the "prāṇa-daśā" (vital sub-sub-period) of Venus, there arise fever, smallpox, boils, itching, pimples, and similar ailments. There is also the worship of deities and Brahmins.

sanskrit: नित्यं शत्रुकृता पीडा नेत्रकुक्षिरुजादयः । विरोधः सुहृदां पीडा शुक्रप्राणगतेऽप्यहौ ॥७८॥
transliteration: nityaṃ śatrukṛtā pīḍā netrakukṣirujādayaḥ . virodhaḥ suhṛdāṃ pīḍā śukraprāṇagate'pyahau.
separated_sandhi: nityam śatrukṛtā pīḍā netrakukṣirujādayaḥvirodhaḥ suhṛdām pīḍā śukraprāṇagate api ahau
english: When Rāhu (or Ketu) is even in the "prāṇa-daśā" (vital sub-sub-period) of Venus, there is constant affliction caused by enemies, diseases of the eyes and abdomen, conflict, and distress to friends.

sanskrit: आयुरारोग्यमैश्वर्यं पुत्रस्त्रीधनवैभवम् । छत्रवाहनसम्प्राप्तिः शुक्रप्राणगते गुरौ ॥७९॥
transliteration: āyurārogyamaiśvaryaṃ putrastrīdhanavaibhavam . chatravāhanasamprāptiḥ śukraprāṇagate gurau.
separated_sandhi: āyurārogyam aiśvaryam putrastrīdhanavaibhavamchatravāhanasamprāptiḥ śukraprāṇagate gurau
english: When Jupiter (Guru) is in the "prāṇa-daśā" (vital sub-sub-period) of Venus, one gains longevity, good health, prosperity, and an abundance of children, wives, wealth, and opulence. There is also the acquisition of royal insignia (umbrellas) and vehicles.

sanskrit: राजोपद्रवजा भीतिः सुखहानिर्महारुजः । नीचैः सह विवादश्च भृगोः प्राणगते शनौ ॥८०॥
transliteration: rājopadravajā bhītiḥ sukhahānirmahārujaḥ . nīcaiḥ saha vivādaśca bhṛgoḥ prāṇagate śanau.
separated_sandhi: rājopadravajā bhītiḥ sukha-hāniḥ mahā-rujaḥnīcaiḥ saha vivādaḥ ca bhṛgoḥ prāṇagate śanau
english: When Saturn is in the prāṇagati (sub-sub-period) of Venus (Bhṛgu), there will be fear arising from governmental troubles, loss of happiness, great suffering, and disputes with lowly individuals.

sanskrit: सन्तोषो राजसम्मानं नानादिग्भूमिसम्पदः । नित्यमुत्साहव्र्द्धिः स्याच्छुक्रप्राणगते बुधे ॥८१॥
transliteration: santoṣo rājasammānaṃ nānādigbhūmisampadaḥ . nityamutsāhavrddhiḥ syācchukraprāṇagate budhe.
separated_sandhi: santoṣaḥ rāja-sammānam nānā-dig-bhūmi-sampadaḥnityam utsāha-vṛddhiḥ syāt śukra-prāṇagate budhe
english: When Mercury (Budha) is in the prāṇagati (sub-sub-period) of Venus (Śukra), there will be contentment, royal honor, wealth from various directions and lands, and a constant increase in enthusiasm.

sanskrit: जीवितात्मयशोहानिर्धनधान्यपरिक्षयः । त्यागभोगधनानि स्युः शुक्रप्राणगते ध्वजे ॥८२॥
transliteration: jīvitātmayaśohānirdhanadhānyaparikṣayaḥ . tyāgabhogadhanāni syuḥ śukraprāṇagate dhvaje.
separated_sandhi: jīvitātmayasohāniḥ dhana-dhānya-parikṣayaḥtyāga-bhoga-dhanāni syuḥ śukra-prāṇagate dhvaje
english: When Ketu (Dhvaja) is in the prāṇagati (sub-sub-period) of Venus (Śukra), there will be loss of life, self-reputation, and depletion of wealth and grains. Additionally, there will be instances of renunciation, enjoyments, and wealth.

sanskrit: एवमृक्षदशानां हि सान्तरागां मया द्विज । फलानि कथितान्यत्र संक्षेपादेव तेऽग्रतः ॥८३॥
transliteration: evamṛkṣadaśānāṃ hi sāntarāgāṃ mayā dvija . phalāni kathitānyatra saṃkṣepādeva te'grataḥ.
separated_sandhi: evam ṛkṣa-daśānām hi sāntarāgām mayā dvijaphalāni kathitāni atra saṅkṣepāt eva te agrataḥ
english: Thus, O twice-born (dvija), the results of the planetary periods (daśās) of the constellations, along with their sub-periods (antaradaśās), have indeed been briefly explained by me here before you.

sanskrit: जगद्धिताय प्रोक्तानि पुरा यानि पुरारिणा । तानि चक्रान्तर्दशाफलानि कथयाम्यहम् ॥१॥
transliteration: jagaddhitāya proktāni purā yāni purāriṇā . tāni cakrāntardaśāphalāni kathayāmyaham.
separated_sandhi: jagaddhitāya proktāni purā yāni purāriṇātāni cakrāntardaśāphalāni kathayāmi aham
english: I will now narrate the results of the antardaśā (sub-periods) within the Cakra system, which were formerly declared by the enemy of the cities (Śiva) for the welfare of the world.

sanskrit: मेषांशे स्वान्तरे भौमे ज्वरश्च व्रणसम्भवः । बुधशुक्रेन्दुजीवेषु सुखं शत्रुभयं रवौ ॥२॥
transliteration: meṣāṃśe svāntare bhaume jvaraśca vraṇasambhavaḥ . budhaśukrendujīveṣu sukhaṃ śatrubhayaṃ ravau.
separated_sandhi: meṣāṃśe svāntare bhaume jvaraḥ ca vraṇasambhavaḥbudhaśukrendujīveṣu sukhaṃ śatrubhayaṃ ravau
english: When Mars is in its own sub-period (antardaśā) within the Aries (Meṣa) division, there will be fever and the possibility of wounds. When Mercury, Venus, Moon, or Jupiter are present (in their sub-periods within the Aries division), there will be happiness. When the Sun is present, there will be fear from enemies.

sanskrit: वृषांशे स्वान्तरे सौरे कलहो रोगसम्भवः । विद्यालाभस्तनौ सौख्यं गुरौ तत्र गते फलम् ॥३॥
transliteration: vṛṣāṃśe svāntare saure kalaho rogasambhavaḥ . vidyālābhastanau saukhyaṃ gurau tatra gate phalam.
separated_sandhi: vṛṣāṃśe svāntare saure kalahaḥ rogasambhavaḥvidyālābhaḥ tanau saukhyaṃ gurau tatra gate phalam
english: When Saturn is in its own sub-period (antardaśā) within the Taurus (Vṛṣa) division, there will be quarrel and the possibility of disease. When Jupiter is present there (in its sub-period within the Taurus division), the result is gain of knowledge and happiness for the self/body.

sanskrit: देशत्यागो मृतिर्वापि शस्त्रघातो ज्वरोऽथवा । वृषभस्वांशके विप्र कुजे तत्र गते फलम् ॥४॥
transliteration: deśatyāgo mṛtirvāpi śastraghāto jvaro'thavā . vṛṣabhasvāṃśake vipra kuje tatra gate phalam.
separated_sandhi: deśatyāgaḥ mṛtiḥ vā api śastraghātaḥ jvaraḥ athavāvṛṣabhasvāṃśake vipra kuje tatra gate phalam
english: O Brahmin, when Mars (Ku-ja) is present in its own sub-period (antardaśā) within the Taurus (Vṛṣabha) division, the result will be abandonment of the country, or even death, or injury from weapons, or fever.

sanskrit: वस्त्राभरणलाभश्च स्त्रीसुयोगो महत् सुखम् । शुक्रेन्दुसुतचन्द्रेषु वृषभस्वांशके फलम् ॥५॥
transliteration: vastrābharaṇalābhaśca strīsuyogo mahat sukham . śukrendusutacandreṣu vṛṣabhasvāṃśake phalam.
separated_sandhi: vastra-ābharaṇa-lābhaḥ ca strī-su-yogaḥ mahat sukhamśukra-indu-suta-candreṣu vṛṣabha-svāṃśake phalam
english: There is a gain of clothes and ornaments, a good association with women, and great happiness. This is the result when Venus (śukra), Mercury (indusuta), and the Moon (candra) are in the Taurus (vṛṣabha) svāṃśaka.

sanskrit: नृपाद् भयं पितृमृतिः स्ववदाद्यैर्भयं रवौ । मिथुने स्वांशके शुक्रे धनवस्त्रसमागमः ॥६॥
transliteration: nṛpād bhayaṃ pitṛmṛtiḥ svavadādyairbhayaṃ ravau . mithune svāṃśake śukre dhanavastrasamāgamaḥ.
separated_sandhi: nṛpāt bhayam pitṛ-mṛtiḥ sva-vat-ādyaiḥ bhayamravau mithune svāṃśake śukre dhana-vastra-samāgamaḥ
english: When the Sun (ravi) is in the Gemini (mithuna) svāṃśaka, there is fear from the king (nṛpa), the father's death, and fear from one's own relatives. When Venus (śukra) is in the Gemini (mithuna) svāṃśaka, there is an accumulation of wealth and clothes.

sanskrit: पितृमातृमृतेर्भीतिर्ज्वरश्च व्रणसम्भवः । दूरदेशप्रयाणं च मिथुने स्वांशके कुजे ॥७॥
transliteration: pitṛmātṛmṛterbhītirjvaraśca vraṇasambhavaḥ . dūradeśaprayāṇaṃ ca mithune svāṃśake kuje.
separated_sandhi: pitṛ-mātṛ-mṛteḥ bhītiḥ jvaraḥ ca vraṇa-sambhavaḥdūra-deśa-prayāṇam ca mithune svāṃśake kuje
english: When Mars (kuja) is in the Gemini (mithuna) svāṃśaka, there is fear of the death of one's parents, fever, the occurrence of wounds, and travel to distant lands.

sanskrit: बुद्धिविद्याविवृद्धिश्च महाविभवसम्भवः । लोके मानश्च प्रीतिश्च मिथेने स्वांशके गुरौ ॥८॥
transliteration: buddhividyāvivṛddhiśca mahāvibhavasambhavaḥ . loke mānaśca prītiśca mithene svāṃśake gurau.
separated_sandhi: buddhi-vidyā-vivṛddhiḥ ca mahā-vibhava-sambhavaḥloke mānaḥ ca prītiḥ ca mithune svāṃśake gurau
english: When Jupiter (guru) is in the Gemini (mithuna) svāṃśaka, there is an increase in intelligence and knowledge, the attainment of great prosperity, and honor and affection in the world.

sanskrit: विदेशगमनं व्याधिर्मरणं धननाशनम् । बन्धुनाशोऽथवा विप्र मिथुने स्वांशके शनौ ॥९॥
transliteration: videśagamanaṃ vyādhirmaraṇaṃ dhananāśanam . bandhunāśo'thavā vipra mithune svāṃśake śanau.
separated_sandhi: videśagamanam vyādhiḥ maraṇam dhananāśanambandhunāśaḥ athavā vipra mithune svāṃśake śanau
english: O Brahmin, when Saturn (śani) is in Gemini (Mithuna) and in its own divisional sign (aṃśa), there will be foreign travel, disease, death, loss of wealth, or loss of relatives.

sanskrit: विद्यावस्त्रादिलाभश्च दारपुत्रादिजं सुखम् । सर्वत्र मानमाप्नोति मिथुने स्वांशके बुधे ॥१०॥
transliteration: vidyāvastrādilābhaśca dāraputrādijaṃ sukham . sarvatra mānamāpnoti mithune svāṃśake budhe.
separated_sandhi: vidyāvastrādilābhaḥ ca dāraputrādijam sukhamsarvatra mānam āpnoti mithune svāṃśake budhe
english: When Mercury (budha) is in Gemini (Mithuna) and in its own divisional sign (aṃśa), one obtains gains of education, clothes, and so on, as well as happiness arising from wife and children, and attains respect everywhere.

sanskrit: कर्क स्वांशगते चन्द्रे पुत्रदारसुखं महत् । ऐश्वर्यं लभते लोके मानं प्रीतिं तथैव च ॥११॥
transliteration: karka svāṃśagate candre putradārasukhaṃ mahat . aiśvaryaṃ labhate loke mānaṃ prītiṃ tathaiva ca.
separated_sandhi: karke svāṃśagate candre putradārasukham mahataiśvaryam labhate loke mānam prītim tathaiva ca
english: When the Moon (candra) is in Cancer (Karka) and in its own divisional sign (aṃśa), one obtains great happiness from sons and wife, and attains prosperity (aiśvarya), respect, and affection in the world.

sanskrit: शत्रुभ्यश्च पशुभ्यश्च भयं राजकुलात् तथा । आधिव्याधिभयं चैव कर्के स्वांशगते रवौ ॥१२॥
transliteration: śatrubhyaśca paśubhyaśca bhayaṃ rājakulāt tathā . ādhivyādhibhayaṃ caiva karke svāṃśagate ravau.
separated_sandhi: śatrubhyaḥ ca paśubhyaḥ ca bhayam rājakulāt tathāādhivyādhibhayam ca eva karke svāṃśagate ravau
english: When the Sun (ravi) is in Cancer (Karka) and in its own divisional sign (aṃśa), there will be fear from enemies and animals, and likewise from the government (or royal family), and indeed, fear from mental anguish and physical ailments.

sanskrit: पुत्रदारसुहृत्सौख्यं धनवृद्धिस्तथैव च । लोके मानं यशश्चैव कर्कांशे बुधशुक्रयोः ॥१३॥
transliteration: putradārasuhṛtsaukhyaṃ dhanavṛddhistathaiva ca . loke mānaṃ yaśaścaiva karkāṃśe budhaśukrayoḥ.
separated_sandhi: putradārasuhṛtsaukhyam dhanavṛddhiḥ tathā eva caloke mānam yaśaḥ ca eva karkāṃśe budhaśukrayoḥ
english: When Mercury and Venus are in the Cancer navāṃśa, one experiences happiness from children, spouse, and friends, an increase in wealth, and indeed, respect and fame in the world.

sanskrit: विषशस्त्रमृतेर्भीतिं ज्वररोगादिसम्भवाम् । पीडां चैव समाप्नोति कर्के स्वांशगते कुजे ॥१४॥
transliteration: viṣaśastramṛterbhītiṃ jvararogādisambhavām . pīḍāṃ caiva samāpnoti karke svāṃśagate kuje.
separated_sandhi: viṣaśastramṛteḥ bhītim jvararogādisambhavāmpīḍām ca eva samāpnoti karke svāṃśagate kuje
english: When Mars is in the Cancer sign and in its own navāṃśa, one indeed experiences fear of death by poison or weapons, and suffering arising from fever, diseases, and similar conditions.

sanskrit: विभवस्यातिलाभश्च शरीरेऽपि सुखं तथा । नृपात् सम्मानलाभश्च कर्के स्वांशगते गुरौ ॥१५॥
transliteration: vibhavasyātilābhaśca śarīre'pi sukhaṃ tathā . nṛpāt sammānalābhaśca karke svāṃśagate gurau.
separated_sandhi: vibhavasya atilābhaḥ ca śarīre api sukham tathānṛpāt sammānalābhaḥ ca karke svāṃśagate gurau
english: When Jupiter is in the Cancer sign and in its own navāṃśa, there is abundant gain of prosperity, as well as physical comfort, and the acquisition of honor from rulers.

sanskrit: वादव्याधिभयं घोरं सर्पवृश्चिकतो भयम् । नानाकष्टमवाप्नोति कर्के स्वांशगते शनौ ॥१६॥
transliteration: vādavyādhibhayaṃ ghoraṃ sarpavṛścikato bhayam . nānākaṣṭamavāpnoti karke svāṃśagate śanau.
separated_sandhi: vādavyādhibhayam ghoram sarpavṛścikataḥ bhayamnānākaṣṭam avāpnoti karke svāṃśagate śanau
english: When Saturn is in the Cancer sign and in its own navāṃśa, one experiences dreadful fear from disputes and diseases, fear from snakes and scorpions, and various other difficulties.

sanskrit: सिंहांशे स्वांशगे भौमे मुखरोगभयं दिशेत् । पित्तज्वरकृतां वाधां शस्त्रक्षतमथापि वा ॥१७॥
transliteration: siṃhāṃśe svāṃśage bhaume mukharogabhayaṃ diśet . pittajvarakṛtāṃ vādhāṃ śastrakṣatamathāpi vā.
separated_sandhi: siṃhāṃśe svāṃśage bhaume mukharogabhayam diśetpittajvarakṛtām vādhām śastrakṣatam atha api vā
english: If Mars (Bhāuma) is situated in its own varga (svāṃśa) within the Leo (siṃha) sign, one should predict fear of mouth diseases, trouble caused by bilious fever, or even a wound from a weapon.

sanskrit: धनवस्त्रादिलाभश्च स्त्रीपुत्रादिसुखं तथा । बुधभार्गवयोर्विप्र सिंहांशे स्वान्तरस्थयोः ॥१८॥
transliteration: dhanavastrādilābhaśca strīputrādisukhaṃ tathā . budhabhārgavayorvipra siṃhāṃśe svāntarasthayoḥ.
separated_sandhi: dhanavastrādilābhaḥ ca strīputrādisukham tathābudhabhārgavayoḥ vipra siṃhāṃśe svāntarasthayoḥ
english: O Brāhmaṇa (vipra), when Mercury (Budha) and Venus (Bhārgava) are situated in their own internal divisions within the Leo (siṃha) sign, there will be gain of wealth, clothes, and so on, as well as happiness from one's wife, sons, and so forth.

sanskrit: उच्चात् पतनभीतिश्च स्वल्पद्रव्यसमागमः । विदेशगमनं चैव सिंहे स्वान्तर्गते विधौ ॥१९॥
transliteration: uccāt patanabhītiśca svalpadravyasamāgamaḥ . videśagamanaṃ caiva siṃhe svāntargate vidhau.
separated_sandhi: uccāt patanabhītiḥ ca svalpadravyasāmagamaḥvideśagamanam ca eva siṃhe svāntargate vidhau
english: And also, when the Moon (Vidhu) is situated in its own internal division within the Leo (siṃha) sign, there will be fear of falling from a height, acquisition of little wealth, and travel to foreign lands.

sanskrit: भयं शत्रुजनेभ्यश्च ज्वरादिव्याद्धिसम्भवः । ज्ञानहानिर्मृतेर्भीतिः सिंहे स्वान्तर्गते रवौ ॥२०॥
transliteration: bhayaṃ śatrujanebhyaśca jvarādivyāddhisambhavaḥ . jñānahānirmṛterbhītiḥ siṃhe svāntargate ravau.
separated_sandhi: bhayam śatrujanebhyaḥ ca jvarādivyāddhisambhavaḥjñānahāniḥ mṛteḥ bhītiḥ siṃhe svāntargate ravau
english: When the Sun (Ravi) is situated in its own internal division within the Leo (siṃha) sign, there will be fear from enemies, occurrence of fevers and other diseases, loss of knowledge, and fear of death.

sanskrit: धनधान्यादिलाभं च प्रसादं द्विजभूपयोः । विद्यावृद्धिमवाप्नोति सिंहे स्वान्तर्गते गुरौ ॥२१॥
transliteration: dhanadhānyādilābhaṃ ca prasādaṃ dvijabhūpayoḥ . vidyāvṛddhimavāpnoti siṃhe svāntargate gurau.
separated_sandhi: dhanadhānyādilābham ca prasādam dvijabhūpayoḥvidyāvṛddhim avāpnoti siṃhe svāntargate gurau
english: When Jupiter (Guru) is in Leo, situated in its own division, a person obtains gains of wealth, grains, and other possessions, the favor of Brahmins and kings, and an increase in knowledge.

sanskrit: कन्यायां स्वांशगे सौरे कष्टं प्राप्नोति मानवः । द्रयाणं च ज्वरं चैव क्षुद्भवं वैक्लवं तथा ॥२२॥
transliteration: kanyāyāṃ svāṃśage saure kaṣṭaṃ prāpnoti mānavaḥ . drayāṇaṃ ca jvaraṃ caiva kṣudbhavaṃ vaiklavaṃ tathā.
separated_sandhi: kanyāyām svāṃśage saure kaṣṭam prāpnoti mānavaḥdrayāṇam ca jvaram ca eva kṣudbhavam vaiklavam tathā
english: When Saturn (Śani) is in Virgo, situated in its own division, a person experiences suffering, journeys, fever, and also distress caused by hunger, and similar afflictions.

sanskrit: नृपप्रसादमैश्वर्यं सुहृद्बन्धुसमागमम् । विद्यावृद्धिमवाप्नोति कन्यायां स्वांशके गुरौ ॥२३॥
transliteration: nṛpaprasādamaiśvaryaṃ suhṛdbandhusamāgamam . vidyāvṛddhimavāpnoti kanyāyāṃ svāṃśake gurau.
separated_sandhi: nṛpaprasādam aiśvaryam suhṛdbandhusamāgamamvidyāvṛddhim avāpnoti kanyāyām svāṃśake gurau
english: When Jupiter (Guru) is in Virgo, situated in its own division, one obtains royal favor, opulence, the gathering of friends and relatives, and an increase in knowledge.

sanskrit: पित्तज्वरभवा पीडा विदेशे गमनं तथा । शस्त्रघातोऽग्निभीतिश्च कन्यायां स्वान्तरे कुजे ॥२४॥
transliteration: pittajvarabhavā pīḍā videśe gamanaṃ tathā . śastraghāto'gnibhītiśca kanyāyāṃ svāntare kuje.
separated_sandhi: pittajvarabhavā pīḍā videśe gamanam tathāśastrāghātaḥ agnibhītiḥ ca kanyāyām svāntare kuje
english: When Mars (Kuja) is in Virgo, situated in its own division, there is affliction born of bilious fever, travel to foreign lands, injury from weapons, and fear of fire.

sanskrit: भृत्यपुत्रार्थलाभश्च नानासुखसमागमः । बन्धुभार्गवचन्द्रेषु कन्यास्वांशगतेषु च ॥२५॥
transliteration: bhṛtyaputrārthalābhaśca nānāsukhasamāgamaḥ . bandhubhārgavacandreṣu kanyāsvāṃśagateṣu ca.
separated_sandhi: bhṛtyaputrārthalābhaḥ ca nānāsukhasamāgamaḥbandhubhārgavacandreṣu kanyāsvāṃśagateṣu ca
english: When relatives, Venus, and the Moon are in the sign of Virgo and situated in their own divisions (svāṃśa), there will be gains concerning servants, sons, and wealth, along with the attainment of various kinds of happiness.

sanskrit: प्रयाणं रोगभीतिश्च कलहो बन्धुभिः सह । शस्त्रघातभयं चैव कन्यांशे स्वांशगे रवौ ॥२६॥
transliteration: prayāṇaṃ rogabhītiśca kalaho bandhubhiḥ saha . śastraghātabhayaṃ caiva kanyāṃśe svāṃśage ravau.
separated_sandhi: prayāṇaṃ rogabhītiḥ ca kalahaḥ bandhubhiḥ sahaśastraghātabhayaṃ ca eva kanyāṃśe svāṃśage ravau
english: When the Sun is in the Virgo division (aṃśa) and also in its own division (svāṃśa), there will be travel, fear of disease, conflicts with relatives, and indeed, fear of injury from weapons.

sanskrit: तुले स्वान्तर्गते शुक्रे सद्बुद्धिश्च सुखोदयः । स्त्रीपुत्रधननवस्त्रादिलाभो भवति निश्चितः ॥२७॥
transliteration: tule svāntargate śukre sadbuddhiśca sukhodayaḥ . strīputradhananavastrādilābho bhavati niścitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: tule svāntargate śukre sadbuddhiḥ ca sukhodayaḥstrīputradhananavastrādilābhaḥ bhavati niścitaḥ
english: When Venus is in the sign of Libra and situated in its own division (svāṃśa), there will be good intellect and the dawn of happiness. It is certain that there will be gains of a wife, sons, wealth, new clothes, and so forth.

sanskrit: पितृकष्टं सुहृद्वैरं शिरोरोगो ज्वरोदयः । विषशस्त्राग्निभीतिश्च तुले स्वान्तर्गते कुजे ॥२८॥
transliteration: pitṛkaṣṭaṃ suhṛdvairaṃ śirorogo jvarodayaḥ . viṣaśastrāgnibhītiśca tule svāntargate kuje.
separated_sandhi: pitṛkaṣṭaṃ suhṛdvairaṃ śirorogaḥ jvarodayaḥviṣaśastrāgnibhītiḥ ca tule svāntargate kuje
english: When Mars is in the sign of Libra and situated in its own division (svāṃśa), there will be distress for the father, enmity with friends, head ailments, the onset of fever, and fear of poison, weapons, and fire.

sanskrit: द्रव्यरत्नादिलाभश्च धर्मकार्यं नृपादयः । सर्वत्र सुखसम्प्राप्तिस्तुले स्वांशगते गुरौ ॥२९॥
transliteration: dravyaratnādilābhaśca dharmakāryaṃ nṛpādayaḥ . sarvatra sukhasamprāptistule svāṃśagate gurau.
separated_sandhi: dravya-ratnādi-lābhaḥ ca dharma-kāryam nṛpa-ādayaḥsarvatra sukha-samprāptiḥ tule svāṃśa-gate gurau
english: When Jupiter (guru) is in its own division (svāṃśa) in the sign of Libra, there will be gains of wealth, jewels, and so forth, engagement in activities related to natural law (dharma), benefits from kings and other authorities, and the attainment of happiness everywhere.

sanskrit: प्रयाणं च महाव्याधिः क्षेत्रदेः क्षतिरेव च । शत्रुवाधा च कार्येषु तुले स्वांशगते शनौ ॥३०॥
transliteration: prayāṇaṃ ca mahāvyādhiḥ kṣetradeḥ kṣatireva ca . śatruvādhā ca kāryeṣu tule svāṃśagate śanau.
separated_sandhi: prayāṇam ca mahā-vyādhiḥ kṣetra-ādeḥ kṣatiḥ evaca śatru-bādhā ca kāryeṣu tule svāṃśa-gate śanau
english: When Saturn (śani) is in its own division (svāṃśa) in the sign of Libra, there will be travels, severe illness, indeed the destruction of fields and other properties, and hindrances from enemies in various activities.

sanskrit: पुत्रजन्म धनप्राप्तिः स्त्रीसुखं च मनःप्रियम् । भाग्योदयश्च विज्नेयस्तुले स्वान्तर्गते बुधे ॥३१॥
transliteration: putrajanma dhanaprāptiḥ strīsukhaṃ ca manaḥpriyam . bhāgyodayaśca vijneyastule svāntargate budhe.
separated_sandhi: putra-janma dhana-prāptiḥ strī-sukham ca manas-priyambhāgya-udayaḥ ca vijñeyaḥ tule sva-antar-gate budhe
english: When Mercury (budha) is in its own division (svāṃśa) in the sign of Libra, one should understand that there will be the birth of sons, acquisition of wealth, happiness from women, mental satisfaction, and the rise of good fortune.

sanskrit: शशाङ्कबुधशुक्रेषु वृश्चिके स्वांशगेषु च । नानाधान्यधनप्राप्तिर्व्याधिविनाशो महत् सुखम् ॥३२॥
transliteration: śaśāṅkabudhaśukreṣu vṛścike svāṃśageṣu ca . nānādhānyadhanaprāptirvyādhivināśo mahat sukham.
separated_sandhi: śaśāṅka-budha-śukreṣu vṛścike svāṃśa-gateṣu canānā-dhānya-dhana-prāptiḥ vyādhi-vināśaḥ mahat sukham
english: When the Moon (śaśāṅka), Mercury (budha), and Venus (śukra) are in their own divisions (svāṃśa) in the sign of Scorpio, there will be the acquisition of various grains and wealth, the destruction of diseases, and great happiness.

sanskrit: शत्रुक्षोभभयं व्याधिमर्थनाशं पितुर्भयम् । श्वापदाद् भयमाप्नोति वृश्चिके स्वांशगे रवौ ॥३३॥
transliteration: śatrukṣobhabhayaṃ vyādhimarthanāśaṃ piturbhayam . śvāpadād bhayamāpnoti vṛścike svāṃśage ravau.
separated_sandhi: śatrukṣobhabhayam vyādhim arthanāśam pituḥ bhayam| śvāpadāt bhayam āpnoti vṛścike sva aṃśage ravau
english: When the Sun is in its own varga (decanate/navamsa) within the sign of Scorpio, one experiences fear of disturbances from enemies, illness, loss of wealth, fear concerning one's father, and fear from wild animals.

sanskrit: वातपित्तभयं चैव मसूरीव्रणमादिशेत् । अग्निशस्त्रादिभीतिश्च वृश्चिके स्वांशगे कुजे ॥३४॥
transliteration: vātapittabhayaṃ caiva masūrīvraṇamādiśet . agniśastrādibhītiśca vṛścike svāṃśage kuje.
separated_sandhi: vātapittabhayam ca eva masūrīvraṇam ādiśet |agniśastra ādi bhītiḥ ca vṛścike sva aṃśage kuje
english: One should predict fear related to vāta and pitta (humors), as well as smallpox or pustules, and fear from fire, weapons, and the like, when Mars is in its own varga (decanate/navamsa) within the sign of Scorpio.

sanskrit: धनं धान्यञ्च रत्नं च देवब्राह्मणपूजनम् । राजप्रसादमाप्नोति वृश्चिके स्वांशगे गुरौ ॥३५॥
transliteration: dhanaṃ dhānyañca ratnaṃ ca devabrāhmaṇapūjanam . rājaprasādamāpnoti vṛścike svāṃśage gurau.
separated_sandhi: dhanam dhānyam ca ratnam ca devabrāhmaṇapūjanam| rājaprasādam āpnoti vṛścike sva aṃśage gurau
english: When Jupiter is in its own varga (decanate/navamsa) within the sign of Scorpio, one obtains wealth, grains, gems, the worship of gods and Brahmins, and royal favor.

sanskrit: धनबन्धुविनाशश्च जायते मानसी व्यथा । शत्रुवाधा महाव्याधिर्वृश्चिके स्वांशगे शनौ ॥३६॥
transliteration: dhanabandhuvināśaśca jāyate mānasī vyathā . śatruvādhā mahāvyādhirvṛścike svāṃśage śanau.
separated_sandhi: dhanabandhuvināśaḥ ca jāyate mānasī vyathā |śatruvādhā mahāvyādhiḥ vṛścike sva aṃśage śanau
english: When Saturn is in its own varga (decanate/navamsa) within the sign of Scorpio, there arises loss of wealth and relatives, mental anguish, obstruction from enemies, and severe illness.

sanskrit: अतिदाहं ज्वरं छर्दि मुखरोगं विशेषतः । नानाक्लेशमवाप्नोति चापांशे स्वांशगे कुजे ॥३७॥
transliteration: atidāhaṃ jvaraṃ chardi mukharogaṃ viśeṣataḥ . nānākleśamavāpnoti cāpāṃśe svāṃśage kuje.
separated_sandhi: atidāham jvaram chardi mukharogam viśeṣataḥnānākleśam avāpnoti cāpāṃśe svāṃśage kuje
english: When Mars (kuja) is in its own *aṃśa* (divisional part) while that *aṃśa* is in the sign of Sagittarius, the native experiences excessive burning sensation, fever, vomiting, especially mouth diseases, and various kinds of troubles.

sanskrit: श्रियं विद्यां च सौभाग्यं शत्रुनाशं नृपात् सुखम् । भार्गवेन्दुचन्द्राणां चापे स्वस्वांशके दिशेत् ॥३८॥
transliteration: śriyaṃ vidyāṃ ca saubhāgyaṃ śatrunāśaṃ nṛpāt sukham . bhārgavenducandrāṇāṃ cāpe svasvāṃśake diśet.
separated_sandhi: śriyam vidyām ca saubhāgyam śatrunāśam nṛpāt sukhambhārgavendu-candrāṇām cāpe svasvāṃśake diśet
english: When Venus (bhārgava) and the Moon (indu-candra) are situated in their own respective *aṃśas* within the sign of Sagittarius, one experiences prosperity, knowledge, good fortune, destruction of enemies, and happiness from the ruler.

sanskrit: भार्यावित्तविनाशं च कलहं च नृपाद् भयम् । दूरयात्रामवाप्नोति चापांशे स्वांशगे रवौ ॥३९॥
transliteration: bhāryāvittavināśaṃ ca kalahaṃ ca nṛpād bhayam . dūrayātrāmavāpnoti cāpāṃśe svāṃśage ravau.
separated_sandhi: bhāryā-vitta-vināśam ca kalaham ca nṛpāt bhayamdūrayātrām avāpnoti cāpāṃśe svāṃśage ravau
english: When the Sun (ravi) is in its own *aṃśa* (divisional part) while that *aṃśa* is in the sign of Sagittarius, the native experiences the destruction of the spouse's wealth, quarrels, fear from the ruler, and long journeys.

sanskrit: दानधर्मतपोलाभं राजपूजनमाप्नुयात् । भार्याविभवलाभं च चापे स्वांशगते गुरौ ॥४०॥
transliteration: dānadharmatapolābhaṃ rājapūjanamāpnuyāt . bhāryāvibhavalābhaṃ ca cāpe svāṃśagate gurau.
separated_sandhi: dāna-dharma-tapo-lābham rājapūjanam āpnuyātbhāryā-vibhava-lābham ca cāpe svāṃśagate gurau
english: When Jupiter (guru) is in its own *aṃśa* (divisional part) while that *aṃśa* is in the sign of Sagittarius, the native may obtain benefits from charity (dāna), righteousness (dharma), and austerity (tapas), along with honor from the ruler and the acquisition of the spouse's wealth.

sanskrit: द्विजदेवनृपोद्भूतं कोपं बन्धुविनाशनम् । देशत्यागमवाप्नोति मकरस्वांशगे शनौ ॥४१॥
transliteration: dvijadevanṛpodbhūtaṃ kopaṃ bandhuvināśanam . deśatyāgamavāpnoti makarasvāṃśage śanau.
separated_sandhi: dvijadevanṛpodbhūtam kopam bandhuvināśanamdeśatyāgam avāpnoti makarasvāṃśagate śanau
english: When Saturn is in its own *aṃśa* (division) in Capricorn, one experiences anger caused by Brahmins, deities, and kings, leading to the destruction of relatives and the abandonment of one's native land.

sanskrit: देवार्चनं तपोध्यानं सम्मानं भूपतेः कुले । भार्गवज्ञेन्दुजीवानां मृगांशेऽन्तर्दशाफलम् ॥४२॥
transliteration: devārcanaṃ tapodhyānaṃ sammānaṃ bhūpateḥ kule . bhārgavajñendujīvānāṃ mṛgāṃśe'ntardaśāphalam.
separated_sandhi: devārcanam tapas dhyānam sammānam bhūpateḥ kulebhārgavajñendujīvānām mṛgāṃśe antardaśāphalam
english: The effects of the sub-periods (antardaśā) of Venus, Mercury, Moon, and Jupiter, when they are positioned in Capricorn's *aṃśa* (division), include deity worship, ascetic practices (tapas), meditation (dhyāna), and honor from a royal family.

sanskrit: शिरोरोगं ज्वरं चैव करपादक्षतं दिशेत् । रक्तपित्तातिसारांश्च मृगस्वांशगते कुजे ॥४३॥
transliteration: śirorogaṃ jvaraṃ caiva karapādakṣataṃ diśet . raktapittātisārāṃśca mṛgasvāṃśagate kuje.
separated_sandhi: śirorogam jvaram ca eva karapādakṣatam diśetraktapittātisārān ca mṛgasvāṃśagate kuje
english: When Mars (Kuja) is in its own *aṃśa* (division) within Capricorn, one should predict head ailments, fever, injuries to hands and feet, and dysentery involving blood and bile (raktapitta).

sanskrit: विनाशं पितृबन्धूनां ज्वररोगादिकं दिशेत् । नृपशत्रुभयं चैव मृगांशस्वांशगे शनौ ॥४४॥
transliteration: vināśaṃ pitṛbandhūnāṃ jvararogādikaṃ diśet . nṛpaśatrubhayaṃ caiva mṛgāṃśasvāṃśage śanau.
separated_sandhi: vināśam pitṛbandhūnām jvararogādikam diśetnṛpaśatrubhayam ca eva mṛgāṃśasvāṃśagate śanau
english: When Saturn is in its own *aṃśa* (division) within Capricorn, one should predict the destruction of paternal relatives, fever, various diseases, and fear from rulers and adversaries.

sanskrit: नानाविद्यार्थलाभश्च पुत्रस्त्रीमित्रजं सुखम् । शरीरारोग्यमैश्वर्यं कुम्भे स्वांशगते भृगौ ॥४५॥
transliteration: nānāvidyārthalābhaśca putrastrīmitrajaṃ sukham . śarīrārogyamaiśvaryaṃ kumbhe svāṃśagate bhṛgau.
separated_sandhi: nānāvidyārthalābhaḥ ca putrastrīmitrajam sukhamśarīrārogyam aiśvaryam kumbhe svāṃśagate bhṛgau
english: When Venus is in Aquarius and situated in its own varga/amsa, there is the attainment of various kinds of knowledge and wealth, happiness derived from sons, wife, and friends, good bodily health, and prosperity.

sanskrit: ज्वराग्निचोरजा पीडा शत्रुणां च महद् भयम् । मनोव्यथामवाप्नोति घटांशस्वान्तरे कुजे ॥४६॥
transliteration: jvarāgnicorajā pīḍā śatruṇāṃ ca mahad bhayam . manovyathāmavāpnoti ghaṭāṃśasvāntare kuje.
separated_sandhi: jvarāgnicorajā pīḍā śatruṇām ca mahat bhayammanovyathām avāpnoti ghaṭāṃśasvāntare kuje
english: When Mars is in its own division within the Aquarius division, one experiences pain caused by fever, fire, or thieves, great fear from enemies, and mental anguish.

sanskrit: नैरुज्यं च सुखं चैव सम्मानं भूपतेः द्विजात् । मनःप्रसादमाप्नोति कुम्भांशस्वांशगे गुरौ ॥४७॥
transliteration: nairujyaṃ ca sukhaṃ caiva sammānaṃ bhūpateḥ dvijāt . manaḥprasādamāpnoti kumbhāṃśasvāṃśage gurau.
separated_sandhi: nairujyam ca sukham ca eva sammānam bhūpateḥ dvijātmanaḥprasādam āpnoti kumbhāṃśasvāṃśage gurau
english: When Jupiter is in its own varga/amsa within the Aquarius varga/division, one obtains freedom from illness, happiness, respect from the king, and from the twice-born (dvija), and mental tranquility.

sanskrit: धातुत्रयप्रकोपं च कलहं देशविभ्रमम् । क्षयव्याधिमवाप्नोति कुंभांशस्वांशगे शनौ ॥४८॥
transliteration: dhātutrayaprakopaṃ ca kalahaṃ deśavibhramam . kṣayavyādhimavāpnoti kuṃbhāṃśasvāṃśage śanau.
separated_sandhi: dhātutrayaprakopam ca kalaham deśavibhramamkṣayavyādhim avāpnoti kumbhāṃśasvāṃśage śanau
english: When Saturn is in its own varga/amsa within the Aquarius varga/division, one experiences aggravation of the three bodily humors, quarrels, confusion or wandering in the country, and a wasting disease.

sanskrit: पुत्रमित्रधनस्त्रीणां लाभं चैव मनःप्रियम् । सौभाग्यवृद्धिमाप्नोति कुम्भांशस्वांशगे बुधे ॥४९॥
transliteration: putramitradhanastrīṇāṃ lābhaṃ caiva manaḥpriyam . saubhāgyavṛddhimāpnoti kumbhāṃśasvāṃśage budhe.
separated_sandhi: putramitradhanastrīṇām lābham ca eva manaḥpriyamsaubhāgyavṛddhim āpnoti kumbhāṃśasvāṃśage budhe
english: When Mercury (Budha) is in its own division (aṃśa) within the sign of Aquarius, one obtains gains of sons, friends, wealth, and wives, which are indeed pleasing to the mind, and an increase in good fortune.

sanskrit: विद्यावृद्धिमवाप्नोति स्त्रीसुखं व्याधिनाशनम् । सुहृत्सङ्गं मनःप्रीतिं मीनांशस्वांशगे विधौ ॥५०॥
transliteration: vidyāvṛddhimavāpnoti strīsukhaṃ vyādhināśanam . suhṛtsaṅgaṃ manaḥprītiṃ mīnāṃśasvāṃśage vidhau.
separated_sandhi: vidyāvṛddhim avāpnoti strīsukham vyādhināśanamsuhṛtsaṅgam manaḥprītim mīnāṃśasvāṃśage vidhau
english: When the Moon (Vidhu) is in its own division (aṃśa) within the sign of Pisces, one obtains an increase in knowledge, happiness from a wife, the destruction of diseases, association with good friends, and mental delight.

sanskrit: बन्धुभिः कलहं चैव चौरभीतिं मनोव्यथाम् । स्थानभ्रंशमवाप्नोति मीनांशस्वांशगे रवौ ॥५१॥
transliteration: bandhubhiḥ kalahaṃ caiva caurabhītiṃ manovyathām . sthānabhraṃśamavāpnoti mīnāṃśasvāṃśage ravau.
separated_sandhi: bandhubhiḥ kalaham ca eva caurabhītim manovyathāmsthānabhraṃśam avāpnoti mīnāṃśasvāṃśage ravau
english: When the Sun (Ravi) is in its own division (aṃśa) within the sign of Pisces, one obtains quarrels with relatives, indeed fear of thieves, mental anguish, and loss of position.

sanskrit: रणे विजयमाप्नोति पशुभूमिसुतागमम् । धनवृद्धिश्च मीनांशे स्वांशयोर्बुधशुक्रयोः ॥५२॥
transliteration: raṇe vijayamāpnoti paśubhūmisutāgamam . dhanavṛddhiśca mīnāṃśe svāṃśayorbudhaśukrayoḥ.
separated_sandhi: raṇe vijayam āpnoti paśubhūmisutāgamamdhanavṛddhiḥ ca mīnāṃśe svāṃśayoḥ budhaśukrayoḥ
english: When Mercury (Budha) and Venus (Śukra) are in their own divisions (aṃśa) within the sign of Pisces, one obtains victory in battle, the acquisition of cattle, land, and sons, and an increase in wealth.

sanskrit: पित्तरोगं विवादञ्च स्वजनैरपि मानवः । शत्रुणां भयमाप्नोति मीनांशस्वांशगे कुजे ॥५३॥
transliteration: pittarogaṃ vivādañca svajanairapi mānavaḥ . śatruṇāṃ bhayamāpnoti mīnāṃśasvāṃśage kuje.
separated_sandhi: pittarogaṃ vivādaṃ ca svajanaiḥ api mānavaḥśatruṇām bhayam āpnoti mīnāṃśa-svāṃśage kuje
english: When Mars (Kūja) is in its own Navamsa within the Pisces (Mīna) Navamsa, a person experiences bile disorders, disputes even with their own relatives, and fear from enemies.

sanskrit: धनवस्त्रकलत्राणां लाभो भूपसमादरः । प्रतिष्ठा बहुधा लोके मीनांशस्वांशगे गुरौ ॥५४॥
transliteration: dhanavastrakalatrāṇāṃ lābho bhūpasamādaraḥ . pratiṣṭhā bahudhā loke mīnāṃśasvāṃśage gurau.
separated_sandhi: dhana-vastra-kalatrāṇām lābhaḥ bhūpa-samādaraḥpratiṣṭhā bahudhā loke mīnāṃśa-svāṃśage gurau
english: When Jupiter (Guru) is in its own Navamsa within the Pisces (Mīna) Navamsa, one gains wealth, clothes, and a wife, receives respect from rulers, and achieves much renown in the world.

sanskrit: धननाशो मनस्तापो वेश्यादीनां च सङ्गमात् । देशत्यागो भवेद्वापि मीनांशस्वांशगे शनौ ॥५५॥
transliteration: dhananāśo manastāpo veśyādīnāṃ ca saṅgamāt . deśatyāgo bhavedvāpi mīnāṃśasvāṃśage śanau.
separated_sandhi: dhana-nāśaḥ manastāpaḥ veśyādīnām ca saṅgamātdeśa-tyāgaḥ bhavet vā api mīnāṃśa-svāṃśage śanau
english: When Saturn (Śani) is in its own Navamsa within the Pisces (Mīna) Navamsa, there will be loss of wealth, mental distress, and association with prostitutes and similar individuals. There may also be abandonment of one's country.

sanskrit: एवं प्राज्ञैश्च विज्ञेयं कालचक्रदशाफलम् । अन्तर्दशाफलं चैव वामर्क्षेऽप्येवमेव च ॥५६॥
transliteration: evaṃ prājñaiśca vijñeyaṃ kālacakradaśāphalam . antardaśāphalaṃ caiva vāmarkṣe'pyevameva ca.
separated_sandhi: evam prājñaiḥ ca vijñeyam kāla-cakra-daśā-phalamantardaśā-phalam ca eva vāmarkṣe api evam eva ca
english: Thus, the wise should know the results of the Kalachakra Dasha and the Antardasha results, and similarly, these (results) should be known for the reverse signs (constellations) as well.

sanskrit: इदं फलं मया प्रोक्तं धर्माऽधर्मकृतं पुरा । तत्सर्वं पाणिभिर्नित्यं प्राप्यते नाऽत्र संशयः ॥५७॥
transliteration: idaṃ phalaṃ mayā proktaṃ dharmā'dharmakṛtaṃ purā . tatsarvaṃ pāṇibhirnityaṃ prāpyate nā'tra saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: idam phalam mayā proktam dharmādharmakṛtam purā tatsarvam pāṇibhiḥ nityam prāpyate na atra saṃśayaḥ
english: I have previously declared this result, which arises from righteous (dharma) and unrighteous (adharma) actions (karma). All of that is invariably attained through one's own efforts (pāṇibhiḥ); there is no doubt about this.

sanskrit: सुहृदोऽन्तर्दशा भव्या पापस्यापि द्विजोत्तम । शुभस्यापि रिपोश्चैवमशुभा च प्रकीर्तिता ॥५८॥
transliteration: suhṛdo'ntardaśā bhavyā pāpasyāpi dvijottama . śubhasyāpi ripoścaivamaśubhā ca prakīrtitā.
separated_sandhi: suhṛdaḥ antardaśā bhavyā pāpasya api dvijottamaśubhasya api ripoḥ ca evam aśubhā ca prakīrtitā
english: O best among the twice-born (dvijottama)! The sub-periods (antardaśā) of friendly planets are considered auspicious. Similarly, the sub-periods of benefic planets are also auspicious. However, those of malefic planets and enemies are declared inauspicious.

sanskrit: मेषे तु रक्तजा पीडा वृषभे धान्यवर्द्धनम् । मिथुने ज्ञानवृद्धिश्च कर्के धनपतिर्भवेत् ॥१॥
transliteration: meṣe tu raktajā pīḍā vṛṣabhe dhānyavarddhanam . mithune jñānavṛddhiśca karke dhanapatirbhavet.
separated_sandhi: meṣe tu raktajā pīḍā vṛṣabhe dhānyavardhanammithune jñānavṛddhiḥ ca karke dhanapatiḥ bhavet
english: In Aries (meṣa), there is an affliction related to blood. In Taurus (vṛṣabha), there is an increase in grains/wealth. In Gemini (mithuna), there is an increase in knowledge. And in Cancer (karka), one becomes a lord of wealth (dhanapati).

sanskrit: सिंहभे शत्रुबाधा स्यात् कन्यायां स्त्रीजनात् सुखम् । तुलभे राजमन्त्रित्वं वृश्चिके मृत्युतो भयम् ॥२॥
transliteration: siṃhabhe śatrubādhā syāt kanyāyāṃ strījanāt sukham . tulabhe rājamantritvaṃ vṛścike mṛtyuto bhayam.
separated_sandhi: siṃhabhe śatrubādhā syāt kanyāyām strījanāt sukhamtulabhe rājamantritvam vṛścike mṛtyutaḥ bhayam
english: In Leo (siṃha-bha), there will be obstruction from enemies. In Virgo (kanyā), there is happiness from women. In Libra (tulā-bha), there is the position of a royal minister. And in Scorpio (vṛścika), there is fear from death.

sanskrit: अर्थलाभो भवेच्चापे मेषस्य नवभागके । फलमेवं विजानीयं दशाकाले द्विजोत्तम ॥३॥
transliteration: arthalābho bhaveccāpe meṣasya navabhāgake . phalamevaṃ vijānīyaṃ daśākāle dvijottama.
separated_sandhi: arthalābhaḥ bhavet cāpe meṣasya navabhāgakephalam evam vijānīyam daśākāle dvijottama
english: O best among the twice-born (dvijottama), one should understand the results in this manner: a gain of wealth will occur during the planetary period (daśā) when the navamśa of Aries is in Sagittarius.

sanskrit: मकरे पापकर्माणि कुम्भे वाणिज्यतो धनम् । मीने सर्वार्थसिद्धिश्च वृश्चिके वह्नितो भयम् ॥४॥
transliteration: makare pāpakarmāṇi kumbhe vāṇijyato dhanam . mīne sarvārthasiddhiśca vṛścike vahnito bhayam.
separated_sandhi: makare pāpakarmāṇi kumbhe vāṇijyataḥ dhanam mīnesarvārthasiddhiḥ ca vṛścike vahnitaḥ bhayam
english: When in Capricorn, there are sinful deeds. When in Aquarius, there is wealth from commerce. In Pisces, there is the accomplishment of all aims. And in Scorpio, there is fear from fire.

sanskrit: तुलभे राजपूजा च कन्यायां शत्रुतो भयम् । कर्के पत्नीजने कष्टं सिंहभे नेत्रपीडनम् ॥५॥
transliteration: tulabhe rājapūjā ca kanyāyāṃ śatruto bhayam . karke patnījane kaṣṭaṃ siṃhabhe netrapīḍanam.
separated_sandhi: tulābhe rājapūjā ca kanyāyām śatrutaḥ bhayamkarke patnījane kaṣṭam siṃhabhe netrapīḍanam
english: When in Libra, there is royal honor. In Virgo, there is fear from enemies. In Cancer, there is trouble concerning the wife's relatives. In Leo, there is eye affliction.

sanskrit: मिथुने विषतो भीतिर्वृषस्य नवमांशके । वृषभे धनलाभः स्थान्मेषे तु ज्वरसंभवः ॥६॥
transliteration: mithune viṣato bhītirvṛṣasya navamāṃśake . vṛṣabhe dhanalābhaḥ sthānmeṣe tu jvarasaṃbhavaḥ.
separated_sandhi: mithune viṣataḥ bhītiḥ vṛṣasya navamāṃśakevṛṣabhe dhanalābhaḥ syāt meṣe tu jvarasaṃbhavaḥ
english: When in Gemini, there is fear from poison (viṣa). When the navamśa of Taurus is in Taurus, there will be a gain of wealth. But when in Aries, there is a possibility of fever.

sanskrit: मीने च मातुलप्रीतिः कुम्भे शत्रुप्रवर्धनम् । मकरे चोरतो भीतिश्चापे विद्याविवर्धनम् ॥७॥
transliteration: mīne ca mātulaprītiḥ kumbhe śatrupravardhanam . makare corato bhītiścāpe vidyāvivardhanam.
separated_sandhi: mīne ca mātulaprītiḥ kumbhe śatruprvardhanammakare corataḥ bhītiḥ ca cāpe vidyāvivardhanam
english: When in Pisces, there is affection for one's maternal uncle. In Aquarius, there is an increase of enemies. In Capricorn, there is fear from thieves, and in Sagittarius, there is a growth of knowledge.

sanskrit: मेषे तु शस्त्रसंघातो वृषे तु कलहो भवेत् । मिथुने सुखमाप्नोति मिथुनांशे फलं त्विदम् ॥८॥
transliteration: meṣe tu śastrasaṃghāto vṛṣe tu kalaho bhavet . mithune sukhamāpnoti mithunāṃśe phalaṃ tvidam.
separated_sandhi: meṣe tu śastrasaṃghātaḥ vṛṣe tu kalahaḥ bhavetmithune sukham āpnoti mithunāṃśe phalam tu idam
english: When in Aries, there is conflict or injury from weapons. In Taurus, there will be disputes. In Gemini, one attains happiness. This specific outcome occurs in the Gemini decanate.

sanskrit: कर्कटे सुखमाप्नोति सिंहे भूपालतो भयम् । कन्यायां बन्धुतः सौख्यं तुलभे कीर्तिमाप्नुयात् ॥९॥
transliteration: karkaṭe sukhamāpnoti siṃhe bhūpālato bhayam . kanyāyāṃ bandhutaḥ saukhyaṃ tulabhe kīrtimāpnuyāt.
separated_sandhi: karkaṭe sukham āpnoti siṃhe bhūpālataḥ bhayamkanyāyām bandhutaḥ saukhyam tulabhe kīrtim āpnuyāt
english: When in Cancer, one experiences happiness. In Leo, there is fear from rulers. In Virgo, happiness comes from relatives, and in Libra, one would attain fame.

sanskrit: वृश्चिके च पितुः कष्टं चापे ज्ञानधनागमः । मकरे त्वयशो लोके कुम्भे वाणिज्यतः क्षतिः ॥१०॥
transliteration: vṛścike ca pituḥ kaṣṭaṃ cāpe jñānadhanāgamaḥ . makare tvayaśo loke kumbhe vāṇijyataḥ kṣatiḥ.
separated_sandhi: vṛścike ca pituḥ kaṣṭam cāpe jñānadhanāgamaḥmakare tu ayaśaḥ loke kumbhe vāṇijyataḥ kṣatiḥ
english: When in Scorpio, there is trouble for the father. In Sagittarius, there is an acquisition of knowledge and wealth. In Capricorn, there is indeed dishonor in the world, and in Aquarius, there is loss due to commerce.

sanskrit: मीने सुखमाप्नोति कर्कांशे फलमीदृशम् । वृश्चिके कलहः पीडा तुलभे सुखसम्पदः ॥११॥
transliteration: mīne sukhamāpnoti karkāṃśe phalamīdṛśam . vṛścike kalahaḥ pīḍā tulabhe sukhasampadaḥ.
separated_sandhi: mīne sukham āpnoti karkāṃśe phalam īdṛśamvṛścike kalahaḥ pīḍā tulābhe sukhasampadaḥ
english: One experiences happiness in Pisces. Similar results are found in the Cancer division (or ascendant). In Scorpio, there are disputes and suffering. In Libra, there is happiness and prosperity.

sanskrit: कन्यायां धनधान्यानि कर्के पशुगणाद् भयम् । सिंहे सुखं च दुःखं च मिथुने शत्रुवर्धनम् ॥१२॥
transliteration: kanyāyāṃ dhanadhānyāni karke paśugaṇād bhayam . siṃhe sukhaṃ ca duḥkhaṃ ca mithune śatruvardhanam.
separated_sandhi: kanyāyām dhanadhānyāni karke paśugaṇāt bhayamsiṃhe sukham ca duḥkham ca mithune śatruvardhanam
english: In Virgo, there is wealth and grains. In Cancer, there is fear from animals. In Leo, there is both happiness and sorrow. In Gemini, there is an increase of enemies.

sanskrit: वृषे च सुखसम्पत्तिः मेषे कष्टमवाप्नुयात् । मीने तु दीर्घयात्रा स्यात् सिंहांशे फलमीदृशम् ॥१३॥
transliteration: vṛṣe ca sukhasampattiḥ meṣe kaṣṭamavāpnuyāt . mīne tu dīrghayātrā syāt siṃhāṃśe phalamīdṛśam.
separated_sandhi: vṛṣe ca sukhasampattiḥ meṣe kaṣṭam avāpnuyātmīne tu dīrghayātrā syāt siṃhāṃśe phalam īdṛśam
english: In Taurus, there is happiness and prosperity. In Aries, one may attain trouble. However, in Pisces, there would be a long journey. Such results are found in the Leo division (or ascendant).

sanskrit: कुम्भभे धनलाभः स्यान्मकरेऽपि धनागमः । चापे भ्रातृजनात् सौख्यं मेषे मातृसुखं वदेत् ॥१४॥
transliteration: kumbhabhe dhanalābhaḥ syānmakare'pi dhanāgamaḥ . cāpe bhrātṛjanāt saukhyaṃ meṣe mātṛsukhaṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: kumbhabhe dhanalābhaḥ syāt makare api dhanāgamaḥcāpe bhrātṛjanāt saukhyam meṣe mātṛsukham vadet
english: There may be gain of wealth in Aquarius, and also gain of wealth in Capricorn. In Sagittarius, there is happiness from siblings or relatives. In Aries, one should declare happiness related to the mother.

sanskrit: वृषभे पुत्रसौख्यं च मिथुने शत्रुतो भयम् । कर्के दारजनैः प्रीतिः सिंहे व्याधिविवर्धनम् ॥१५॥
transliteration: vṛṣabhe putrasaukhyaṃ ca mithune śatruto bhayam . karke dārajanaiḥ prītiḥ siṃhe vyādhivivardhanam.
separated_sandhi: vṛṣabhe putrasaukhyam ca mithune śatrutaḥ bhayamkarke dārajanaiḥ prītiḥ siṃhe vyādhivivardhanam
english: In Taurus, there is happiness from sons; in Gemini, fear from enemies. In Cancer, there is affection from one's wife and family members. In Leo, there is an increase in diseases.

sanskrit: कन्यायां च सुतोत्पत्तिः कन्यांशे फलमीदृशम् । तुलभे धनसम्पत्तिर्वृश्चिके भ्रातृतः सुखम् ॥१६॥
transliteration: kanyāyāṃ ca sutotpattiḥ kanyāṃśe phalamīdṛśam . tulabhe dhanasampattirvṛścike bhrātṛtaḥ sukham.
separated_sandhi: kanyāyām ca sutotpattiḥ kanyāṃśe phalam īdṛśamtulābhe dhanasampattiḥ vṛścike bhrātṛtaḥ sukham
english: In Virgo, there is the birth of children; such is the result when it is in the Aṃśa (divisional chart) of Virgo. In Libra, there is acquisition of wealth, and in Scorpio, happiness from brothers.

sanskrit: पितृवर्गसुखं चापे मातृकष्टं मृगे वदेत् । कुम्भे वाणिज्यतो लाभं मीने च सुखसम्पदम् ॥१७॥
transliteration: pitṛvargasukhaṃ cāpe mātṛkaṣṭaṃ mṛge vadet . kumbhe vāṇijyato lābhaṃ mīne ca sukhasampadam.
separated_sandhi: pitṛvargasukham cāpe mātṛkaṣṭam mṛge vadetkumbhe vāṇijyataḥ lābham mīne ca sukhasampadam
english: It is stated that in Sagittarius, there is happiness from paternal relatives, and in Capricorn, trouble for the mother. In Aquarius, there is gain from trade, and in Pisces, happiness and prosperity.

sanskrit: वृश्चिके च स्त्रीयाः पीडा तुले च जलतो भयम् । कन्यायां सुखसम्पत्तिस्तुलांशे फलमीदृशम् ॥१८॥
transliteration: vṛścike ca strīyāḥ pīḍā tule ca jalato bhayam . kanyāyāṃ sukhasampattistulāṃśe phalamīdṛśam.
separated_sandhi: vṛścike ca strīyāḥ pīḍā tule ca jalataḥ bhayamkanyāyām sukhasampattiḥ tulāṃśe phalam īdṛśam
english: In Scorpio, there is trouble for women, and in Libra, fear from water. In Virgo, there is happiness and prosperity; such is the result when it is in the Aṃśa (divisional chart) of Libra.

sanskrit: कर्कभे धनहानिः स्यात् सिंहे भूपालतो भयम् । मिथुने भूमिलाभश्च वृशभे धनसम्पदः ॥१९॥
transliteration: karkabhe dhanahāniḥ syāt siṃhe bhūpālato bhayam . mithune bhūmilābhaśca vṛśabhe dhanasampadaḥ.
separated_sandhi: karkabhe dhanahāniḥ syāt siṃhe bhūpālataḥ bhayammithune bhūmilābhaḥ ca vṛṣabhe dhanasampadaḥ
english: When in Cancer (Karkabha), there will be loss of wealth. In Leo (Siṃha), there will be fear from the king. In Gemini (Mithuna), there will be acquisition of land. In Taurus (Vṛṣabha), there will be wealth and prosperity.

sanskrit: मेषे तु रक्तजा पीडा मीने च सुखमादिशेत् । कुम्भे वाणिज्यतो लाभो मकरे च धनक्षितः ॥२०॥
transliteration: meṣe tu raktajā pīḍā mīne ca sukhamādiśet . kumbhe vāṇijyato lābho makare ca dhanakṣitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: meṣe tu raktajā pīḍā mīne ca sukham ādiśetkumbhe vāṇijyataḥ lābhaḥ makare ca dhanakṣitaḥ
english: However, in Aries (Meṣa), there will be afflictions related to blood. In Pisces (Mīna), one will experience happiness. In Aquarius (Kumbha), there will be profit from trade. And in Capricorn (Makara), there will be loss of wealth.

sanskrit: चापे च सुखसम्पत्तिर्वृश्चिकांशे फलं त्विदम् । मेषे च धनलाभः स्यात् वृषे भूमिविवर्द्धनम् ॥२१॥
transliteration: cāpe ca sukhasampattirvṛścikāṃśe phalaṃ tvidam . meṣe ca dhanalābhaḥ syāt vṛṣe bhūmivivarddhanam.
separated_sandhi: cāpe ca sukhasampattiḥ vṛścikāṃśe phalam tu idammeṣe ca dhanalābhaḥ syāt vṛṣe bhūmivivarddhanam
english: In Sagittarius (Cāpa), there will be happiness and prosperity. This very result applies also to the degree of Scorpio (Vṛścikāṃśa). In Aries (Meṣa), there will be gain of wealth. In Taurus (Vṛṣa), there will be an increase in land.

sanskrit: मिथुने सर्वसिद्धिः स्यात् कर्कभे सुखसम्पदः । सिंहे सर्वसुखोत्पत्तिः कन्यायां कलहागमः ॥२२॥
transliteration: mithune sarvasiddhiḥ syāt karkabhe sukhasampadaḥ . siṃhe sarvasukhotpattiḥ kanyāyāṃ kalahāgamaḥ.
separated_sandhi: mithune sarvasiddhiḥ syāt karkabhe sukhasampadaḥsiṃhe sarvasukhotpattiḥ kanyāyām kalahāgamaḥ
english: In Gemini (Mithuna), there will be achievement of all goals. In Cancer (Karkabha), there will be happiness and prosperity. In Leo (Siṃha), there will be the generation of all happiness. In Virgo (Kanyā), there will be the arrival of quarrels.

sanskrit: तुले वाण्ज्यतो लाभो वृश्चिके रोगजं भयम् । चापे पुत्रसुखं वाच्यं धनुरंशे फलं त्विदम् ॥२३॥
transliteration: tule vāṇjyato lābho vṛścike rogajaṃ bhayam . cāpe putrasukhaṃ vācyaṃ dhanuraṃśe phalaṃ tvidam.
separated_sandhi: tule vāṇjyataḥ lābhaḥ vṛścike rogajam bhayam cāpeputrasukham vācyam dhanuraṃśe phalam tu idam
english: For the Libra division, there is profit from trade. For the Scorpio division, there is fear arising from illness. For the Sagittarius division, happiness from children should be declared. Such indeed is the outcome for the Sagittarius divisions.

sanskrit: मकरे पुत्रलाभः स्यात् कुम्भे धनविवर्धनम् । मीने कल्याणमाप्नोति वृश्चिके पशुतो भयम् ॥२४॥
transliteration: makare putralābhaḥ syāt kumbhe dhanavivardhanam . mīne kalyāṇamāpnoti vṛścike paśuto bhayam.
separated_sandhi: makare putralābhaḥ syāt kumbhe dhanavivardhanammīne kalyāṇam āpnoti vṛścike paśutaḥ bhayam
english: For the Capricorn division, there is gain of children. For the Aquarius division, there is an increase in wealth. For the Pisces division, one attains welfare. For the Scorpio division, there is fear from animals.

sanskrit: तुलभे त्वर्थलाभः स्यात् कन्यायां शत्रुतो भयम् । कर्कटे श्रियमाप्नोति सिंहे शत्रु जनाद् भयम् ॥२५॥
transliteration: tulabhe tvarthalābhaḥ syāt kanyāyāṃ śatruto bhayam . karkaṭe śriyamāpnoti siṃhe śatru janād bhayam.
separated_sandhi: tulābhe tu arthalābhaḥ syāt kanyāyām śatrutaḥ bhayamkarkaṭe śriyam āpnoti siṃhe śatrujanāt bhayam
english: For the Libra division, there is indeed profit from wealth. For the Virgo division, there is fear from enemies. For the Cancer division, one attains prosperity. For the Leo division, there is fear from hostile people.

sanskrit: मिथुने विषतो भीतिर्मृगांशे फलमीदृशम् । वृशभे धनसम्पत्तिर्मेषे नेत्ररुजो भयम् ॥२६॥
transliteration: mithune viṣato bhītirmṛgāṃśe phalamīdṛśam . vṛśabhe dhanasampattirmeṣe netrarujo bhayam.
separated_sandhi: mithune viṣataḥ bhītiḥ mṛgāṃśe phalam īdṛśamvṛṣabhe dhanasampattiḥ meṣe netrarujaḥ bhayam
english: For the Gemini division, there is fear from poison. For the Capricorn division, such indeed are the results. For the Taurus division, there is acquisition of wealth. For the Aries division, there is fear from eye diseases.

sanskrit: मीनभे दीर्घयात्रा स्यात् कुम्भे धनविवर्धनम् । मकरे सर्वसिद्धिः स्याच्चापे ज्ञानविवर्धनम् ॥२७॥
transliteration: mīnabhe dīrghayātrā syāt kumbhe dhanavivardhanam . makare sarvasiddhiḥ syāccāpe jñānavivardhanam.
separated_sandhi: mīnabhe dīrghayātrā syāt kumbhe dhanavivardhanammakare sarvasiddhiḥ syāt cāpe jñānavivardhanam
english: If it is in the Pisces sign, there will be long journeys. In Aquarius, there will be an increase in wealth. In Capricorn, all achievements will occur, and in Sagittarius, there will be an increase in knowledge.

sanskrit: मेषे सौख्यविनाशः स्यात् वृषभे मरणं भवेत् । मिथुने सुखसम्पत्तिः कुम्भांशे फलमीदृशम् ॥२८॥
transliteration: meṣe saukhyavināśaḥ syāt vṛṣabhe maraṇaṃ bhavet . mithune sukhasampattiḥ kumbhāṃśe phalamīdṛśam.
separated_sandhi: meṣe saukhyavināśaḥ syāt vṛṣabhe maraṇaṃ bhavetmithune sukhasampattiḥ kumbhāṃśe phalam īdṛśam
english: If it is in the Aries sign, there will be destruction of happiness. In Taurus, death may occur. In Gemini, there will be happiness and prosperity. Such results are seen in the Aquarius division.

sanskrit: कर्कटे धनवृद्धिः स्यात् सिंहे राजाश्रयं वदेत् । कन्यायां धनधान्यानि तुले वाणिज्यतो धनम् ॥२९॥
transliteration: karkaṭe dhanavṛddhiḥ syāt siṃhe rājāśrayaṃ vadet . kanyāyāṃ dhanadhānyāni tule vāṇijyato dhanam.
separated_sandhi: karkaṭe dhanavṛddhiḥ syāt siṃhe rājāśrayam vadetkanyāyām dhanadhānyāni tule vāṇijyataḥ dhanam
english: If it is in the Cancer sign, there will be an increase in wealth. In Leo, it is stated there will be royal patronage. In Virgo, there will be wealth and grains. In Libra, wealth comes through commerce.

sanskrit: वृश्चिके ज्वरजा पीडा चापे ज्ञानसुखोदयः । मकरे स्त्रीविरोधः स्यात् कुम्भे च जलतो भयम् ॥३०॥
transliteration: vṛścike jvarajā pīḍā cāpe jñānasukhodayaḥ . makare strīvirodhaḥ syāt kumbhe ca jalato bhayam.
separated_sandhi: vṛścike jvarajā pīḍā cāpe jñānasukhodayaḥ makarestrīvirodhaḥ syāt kumbhe ca jalataḥ bhayam
english: If it is in the Scorpio sign, there will be affliction caused by fever. In Sagittarius, there will be the dawn of knowledge and happiness. In Capricorn, there will be conflict with women. And in Aquarius, there will be fear from water.

sanskrit: मीने तु सर्वसौभाग्यं मीनांशे फलमीदृशम् । दशाद्यंशक्रमेणैव ज्ञात्वा सर्वफलं वदेत् ॥३१॥
transliteration: mīne tu sarvasaubhāgyaṃ mīnāṃśe phalamīdṛśam . daśādyaṃśakrameṇaiva jñātvā sarvaphalaṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: mīne tu sarvasaubhāgyam mīnāṃśe phalam īdṛśam |daśādyaṃśakrameṇa eva jñātvā sarvaphalam vadet
english: When the sign is Pisces, there is complete prosperity. If it is the navāṃśa of Pisces, the results are of this specific kind. One should declare all results after accurately understanding them through the sequence of the planetary periods (daśā) and their subdivisions.

sanskrit: क्रूरग्रहदशाकाले शान्तिं कुर्याद् विधानतः । ततः शुभमवाप्नोति तद्दशायां न संशयः ॥३२॥
transliteration: krūragrahadaśākāle śāntiṃ kuryād vidhānataḥ . tataḥ śubhamavāpnoti taddaśāyāṃ na saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: krūragrahadaśākāle śāntim kuryāt vidhānataḥ |tataḥ śubham avāpnoti tat daśāyām na saṃśayaḥ
