english: During the planetary period (daśā) of malefic planets, one should perform propitiatory rites according to prescribed methods. Thereafter, one undoubtedly attains auspicious results in that same period.

sanskrit: भगवन् भवताऽख्यातं ग्रहभावादिजं फलम् । बहुनामृषिवर्याणामाचार्याणां च सम्मतम् ॥१॥
transliteration: bhagavan bhavatā'khyātaṃ grahabhāvādijaṃ phalam . bahunāmṛṣivaryāṇāmācāryāṇāṃ ca sammatam.
separated_sandhi: bhagavan bhavatā ākhyātam grahabhāvādijam phalam| bahūnām ṛṣivaryāṇām ācāryāṇām ca sammatam
english: O venerable one, you have explained the results arising from planets, astrological houses (bhāva), and so forth. This teaching is also affirmed by many excellent sages and preceptors.

sanskrit: संकरात् तत्फलानां च ग्रहाणां गतिसङ्करात् । इत्थमेवेति नो सर्वे ज्ञात्वा वक्तुमलं नराः ॥२॥
transliteration: saṃkarāt tatphalānāṃ ca grahāṇāṃ gatisaṅkarāt . itthameveti no sarve jñātvā vaktumalaṃ narāḥ.
separated_sandhi: saṃkarāt tatphalānām ca grahāṇām gatisamkarāt |ittham eva iti na sarve jñātvā vaktum alam narāḥ
english: Due to the intricate combination of those results and the complex interplay of planetary movements, not all people, even after knowing, are capable of definitively articulating 'it is precisely thus.'

sanskrit: कलौ पापरतानां च मन्दा बुद्धिर्युतो नृणाम् । अतोऽल्पबुद्धिगम्यं यत् शास्त्रमेतद् वदस्य मे ॥३॥
transliteration: kalau pāparatānāṃ ca mandā buddhiryuto nṛṇām . ato'lpabuddhigamyaṃ yat śāstrametad vadasya me.
separated_sandhi: kalau pāparatānāṃ ca mandā buddhiḥ yutaḥ nṛṇāmataḥ alpabuddhigamyam yat śāstram etat vadasi me
english: In the Kali Yuga, people are devoted to sinful acts and their intelligence is dull. Therefore, you are narrating to me this scripture, which is comprehensible even by those of limited understanding.

sanskrit: तत्तत्कालग्रहस्थित्या मानवानां परिस्फुटम् । सुखदुःखपरिज्ञानमायुषो निर्णयं तथा ॥४॥
transliteration: tattatkālagrahasthityā mānavānāṃ parisphuṭam . sukhaduḥkhaparijñānamāyuṣo nirṇayaṃ tathā.
separated_sandhi: tattatkālagrahasthityā mānavānāṃ parisphuṭamsukhaduḥkhaparijñānam āyuṣaḥ nirṇayam tathā
english: Through the planetary positions at various times, [this scripture provides] for human beings a clear understanding of happiness and suffering, and also the ascertainment of longevity.

sanskrit: साधु पृष्टं त्वया ब्रह्मन् कथयामि तवाग्रतः । लोकेयात्रापरिज्ञानमायुषो निर्णयं तथा ॥५॥
transliteration: sādhu pṛṣṭaṃ tvayā brahman kathayāmi tavāgrataḥ . lokeyātrāparijñānamāyuṣo nirṇayaṃ tathā.
separated_sandhi: sādhu pṛṣṭam tvayā brahman kathayāmi tavaagrataḥ lokeyātrāparijñānam āyuṣaḥ nirṇayam tathā
english: O Brahmana, you have indeed asked well. I will narrate to you the understanding of the worldly journey, and also the determination of longevity.

sanskrit: संकरस्याविरोधञ्च शास्त्रस्यापि प्रयोजनम् । जनानामुपकारार्थं सावधानमनाः श‍ृणु ॥६॥
transliteration: saṃkarasyāvirodhañca śāstrasyāpi prayojanam . janānāmupakārārthaṃ sāvadhānamanāḥ śa‍ृṇu.
separated_sandhi: saṃkarasya avirodham ca śāstrasya api prayojanamjanānām upakārārtham sāvadhānamanāḥ śṛṇu
english: And the prevention of the confusion of social orders (saṃkara) is also a purpose of the scripture. Therefore, listen with an attentive mind for the welfare of the people.

sanskrit: लग्नादिव्ययपर्यन्तं भावा संज्ञानुरूपतः । फलदाः शुभसंदृष्टा युक्ता वा शोभना मताः ॥७॥
transliteration: lagnādivyayaparyantaṃ bhāvā saṃjñānurūpataḥ . phaladāḥ śubhasaṃdṛṣṭā yuktā vā śobhanā matāḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagnādi vyaya paryantam bhāvāḥ saṃjñā anurūpataḥphaladāḥ śubha sandṛṣṭāḥ yuktāḥ vā śobhanāḥ matāḥ
english: The astrological houses (bhāvas), from the ascendant (lagna) up to the twelfth house (vyaya), yield results according to their intrinsic nature (saṃjñā). When these houses are aspected by benefic planets or conjoined with them, they are deemed auspicious.

sanskrit: ते तूच्चादिभगैः खेटैर्न चास्तारिभनीचगैः । पापैर्दृष्टयुता भावाः कल्याणेतरदायकाः ॥८॥
transliteration: te tūccādibhagaiḥ kheṭairna cāstāribhanīcagaiḥ . pāpairdṛṣṭayutā bhāvāḥ kalyāṇetaradāyakāḥ.
separated_sandhi: te tu uccādibhagaiḥ kheṭaiḥ na ca astāribhanīcagaiḥpāpaiḥ dṛṣṭayutāḥ bhāvāḥ kalyāṇetaradāyakāḥ
english: However, when houses (bhāvas) are aspected or conjoined by planets that are exalted or otherwise strong (uccādi), and not by planets that are combust, in enemy signs, or debilitated, they yield auspicious outcomes. But if these houses are aspected or conjoined by malefic planets (pāpaiḥ), they certainly bestow inauspicious results.

sanskrit: तैरःतारिभनीचस्थैर्न च मित्रस्वभोच्चगैः । एवं समान्यतः प्रोक्तं होराशास्त्रज्ञसूरिभिः ॥९॥
transliteration: tairaḥtāribhanīcasthairna ca mitrasvabhoccagaiḥ . evaṃ samānyataḥ proktaṃ horāśāstrajñasūribhiḥ.
separated_sandhi: taiḥ astāribhanīcasthaiḥ na ca mitrasvabhoccagaiḥevam sāmānyataḥ proktam horāśāstrajñasūribhiḥ
english: Similarly, (inauspicious results are caused) by planets (taiḥ) that are combust, in enemy signs, or debilitated (astāribhanīcasthaiḥ), and not by those which are in friendly, own, or exalted signs (mitrasvabhoccagaiḥ). Thus, these general principles have been stated by the wise scholars (sūri) who know the science of astrology (horaśāstra).

sanskrit: मयैयत् सकलं प्रोक्तं पूर्वाचार्यानुवर्तिना । आयुश्च लोकयात्रां च शास्त्रस्यास्यते प्रयोजनम् ॥१०॥
transliteration: mayaiyat sakalaṃ proktaṃ pūrvācāryānuvartinā . āyuśca lokayātrāṃ ca śāstrasyāsyate prayojanam.
separated_sandhi: maya iyat sakalam proktam pūrvācārya anuvartināāyuḥ ca lokayātrām ca śāstrasya asya te prayojanam
english: Whatever has been entirely declared by me, following the ancient teachers, the purpose (prayojana) of this science (śāstra) is both longevity and the course of worldly life.

sanskrit: निश्चेतुं तन्न सक्नोति वसिष्ठो वा बृहस्पतिः । किं पुनर्मनुजास्तत्र विशेषात्तु कलौ युगे ॥११॥
transliteration: niścetuṃ tanna saknoti vasiṣṭho vā bṛhaspatiḥ . kiṃ punarmanujāstatra viśeṣāttu kalau yuge.
separated_sandhi: niscetum tat na saknoti vasiṣṭhaḥ vā bṛhaspatiḥkim punaḥ manujāḥ tatra viśeṣāt tu kalau yuge
english: Even sages like Vasishtha or Brihaspati cannot ascertain that (matter). What then can be said of ordinary humans, especially in the Kali Yuga?

sanskrit: सामान्यांशो विशेषांशो ज्योतिःशास्त्रं द्विधोदितम् । प्रोक्तः सामान्यभागस्तु निश्चयांशस्तु कथ्यते ॥१२॥
transliteration: sāmānyāṃśo viśeṣāṃśo jyotiḥśāstraṃ dvidhoditam . proktaḥ sāmānyabhāgastu niścayāṃśastu kathyate.
separated_sandhi: sāmānyāṃśaḥ viśeṣāṃśaḥ jyotiḥśāstram dvidhā uditamproktaḥ sāmānyabhāgaḥ tu niścayāṃśaḥ tu kathyate
english: The science of astrology (jyotiḥśāstra) is declared to be of two kinds: the general part and the specific part. The general division has been taught (before), and now the definitive part is being described.

sanskrit: यथा लग्नाच्च चन्द्राच्च ग्रहाणां भावजं फलम् । तथाऽन्येभ्योऽपि खेटेभ्यो विचिन्त्यं दैवविद्वरैः ॥१३॥
transliteration: yathā lagnācca candrācca grahāṇāṃ bhāvajaṃ phalam . tathā'nyebhyo'pi kheṭebhyo vicintyaṃ daivavidvaraiḥ.
separated_sandhi: yathā lagnāt ca candrāt ca grahāṇām bhāvajam phalamtathā anyebhyaḥ api kheṭebhyaḥ vicintyam daivavidvaraiḥ
english: Just as the house-born results of the planets are considered from the ascendant (lagna) and the Moon, similarly, they should also be thoughtfully considered by the best astrologers from other planets (as reference points).

sanskrit: अतो रव्यादिखेटानां सलग्नानां पृथक् पृथक् । अष्टानां सर्वभावोत्थं यथोक्तमशुभं शुभम् ॥१४॥
transliteration: ato ravyādikheṭānāṃ salagnānāṃ pṛthak pṛthak . aṣṭānāṃ sarvabhāvotthaṃ yathoktamaśubhaṃ śubham.
separated_sandhi: ataḥ ravyādikheṭānām salagnānām pṛthak pṛthakaṣṭānām sarvabhāvottham yathoktam aśubham śubham
english: Therefore, the auspicious and inauspicious results arising from all houses for the eight entities – the planets beginning with the Sun, along with the ascendant (lagna) – should be described individually, as stated (in the scriptures).

sanskrit: ज्ञात्वाऽदौ करणं स्थानं बिन्दुरेखोपलक्षितम् । क्रमादष्टकवर्गस्य वाच्यं स्पष्टफलं यथा ॥१५॥
transliteration: jñātvā'dau karaṇaṃ sthānaṃ bindurekhopalakṣitam . kramādaṣṭakavargasya vācyaṃ spaṣṭaphalaṃ yathā.
separated_sandhi: jñātvā ādau karaṇam sthānam bindurekhā upalakṣitamkramāt aṣṭakavargasya vācyam spaṣṭaphalam yathā
english: After initially understanding the method and position, which are indicated by dots and lines, one should then declare the clear results of the Aṣṭakavarga system in the proper sequence.

sanskrit: ततुस्वायुस्त्रिरिष्फेषु पञ्च कामे सुखेऽर्णवाः । अरौ भाग्ये त्रयः पुत्रे षट् करौ खे भवे च भूः ॥१६॥
transliteration: tatusvāyustririṣpheṣu pañca kāme sukhe'rṇavāḥ . arau bhāgye trayaḥ putre ṣaṭ karau khe bhave ca bhūḥ.
separated_sandhi: tatusvāyustririspeṣu pañca kāme sukhe arṇavāḥ araubhāgye trayaḥ putre ṣaṭ karau khe bhave ca bhūḥ
english: In the first, second, eighth, third, sixth, and twelfth houses, and also in the seventh house, there are five (auspicious) points. In the fourth house, there are four points. In the sixth and ninth houses, there are three points. In the fifth house, there are six points. In the tenth house, there are two points, and in the eleventh house, there is one point.

sanskrit: लग्नेन्दुजीवशुक्रज्ञास्तनौ स्वे मरणेऽपि च । रविभौमार्कि चन्द्रार्या व्यये ज्ञेन्दुसितायकाः ॥१७॥
transliteration: lagnendujīvaśukrajñāstanau sve maraṇe'pi ca . ravibhaumārki candrāryā vyaye jñendusitāyakāḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagnendujīvaśukrajñāḥ tanau sve maraṇe api caravibhaumārki candra āryā vyaye jñendusitāyakāḥ
english: The Ascendant, Moon, Jupiter, Venus, and Mercury contribute (auspicious points) to the first, second, and eighth houses. The Sun, Mars, Saturn, Moon, and Jupiter contribute to the twelfth house. Mercury, Moon, and Venus contribute to the house of gains (eleventh house).

sanskrit: सुखे होरेन्दुशुक्राश्च धर्मेऽर्कार्किकुजा अरौ । होराज्ञार्येन्दवः कामे भवे दैत्येन्द्रपूजितः ॥१८॥
transliteration: sukhe horenduśukrāśca dharme'rkārkikujā arau . horājñāryendavaḥ kāme bhave daityendrapūjitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: sukhe horenduśukrāḥ ca dharme arkārkikujāḥ arauhorājñāryendavaḥ kāme bhave daityendrapūjitaḥ
english: The Ascendant, Moon, and Venus contribute (auspicious points) to the fourth house. The Sun, Saturn, and Mars contribute to the ninth house (dharma) and to the sixth house (enemy house). The Ascendant, Mercury, Jupiter, and Moon contribute to the seventh house (kāma). Venus (worshipped by the chief of Asuras) contributes to the eleventh house.

sanskrit: सहजेऽर्कार्किशुक्रार्यभौमाः खे गुरुभार्गवौ । सुतेऽर्कार्कीन्दुलग्नारशुक्राः स्युः करणं रवेः ॥१९॥
transliteration: sahaje'rkārkiśukrāryabhaumāḥ khe gurubhārgavau . sute'rkārkīndulagnāraśukrāḥ syuḥ karaṇaṃ raveḥ.
separated_sandhi: sahaje arkārkiśukrāryabhaumāḥ khe gurubhārgavausute arkārkīndulagnāraśukrāḥ syuḥ karaṇam raveḥ
english: In the third house, the Sun, Saturn, Venus, Jupiter, and Mars are the significators (karaṇa) for the Sun. In the tenth house, Jupiter and Venus are the significators (karaṇa) for the Sun. In the fifth house, the Sun, Saturn, Moon, Ascendant, Mars, and Venus become the significators (karaṇa) for the Sun.

sanskrit: भाग्यस्वयोश्च षड् वेश्ममृतिहोरासु पञ्च च । मानदुश्चिक्ययोरेकः सुते वेदा अरिस्त्रियोः ॥२०॥
transliteration: bhāgyasvayośca ṣaḍ veśmamṛtihorāsu pañca ca . mānaduścikyayorekaḥ sute vedā aristriyoḥ.
separated_sandhi: bhāgyasvayoḥ ca ṣaṭ veśmamṛtihorāsu pañca camānaduścikyayoḥ ekaḥ sute vedā aristriyoḥ
english: In the ninth and second houses, six [planets are considered significators for the Sun]. And in the fourth, eighth, and first houses, five [are considered]. One [planet is considered] in the tenth and third houses. In the fifth house, four [are considered], and similarly in the sixth and seventh houses.

sanskrit: त्रयो व्ययेष्टावाये च शून्यं शीतकरस्य तु । होरार्कारार्किभृगवोङ्गज्ञार्केन्द्वार्कभार्गवाः ॥२१॥
transliteration: trayo vyayeṣṭāvāye ca śūnyaṃ śītakarasya tu . horārkārārkibhṛgavoṅgajñārkendvārkabhārgavāḥ.
separated_sandhi: trayaḥ vyayeṣṭāvāye ca śūnyam śītakarasya tuhorārkārārkibhṛgavaḥ aṅgajñārkeṇdvarrkabhārgavāḥ
english: Three [significators for the Sun are placed] in the twelfth, seventh, and eleventh houses. However, for the Moon, the count is zero. [For the Moon, the significators are:] the Ascendant, Sun, Mars, Saturn, and Venus; and the Ascendant, Mercury, Sun, Moon, Saturn, and Venus.

sanskrit: जीवोर्कार्कीन्दुलग्नारा होरेन्दुगुरुभास्कराः । सितज्ञार्याः कुजतनुमन्दास्ते सितशीतगू ॥२२॥
transliteration: jīvorkārkīndulagnārā horendugurubhāskarāḥ . sitajñāryāḥ kujatanumandāste sitaśītagū.
separated_sandhi: jīvārkārkīndulagnārāḥ horendugurubhāskarāḥsitajñāryāḥ kujatanumandāḥ te sitaśītagū
english: Jupiter, Sun, Saturn, Moon, Ascendant, and Mars [are significators]; the Ascendant, Moon, Jupiter, and Sun; Venus, Mercury, and Jupiter; Mars, Ascendant, and Saturn; and Venus and the Moon.

sanskrit: होरार्कारार्किविज्जीवाः शनिः खं सकलाः क्रमात् । व्ययवेश्मसुतस्त्रीषु षड् सप्त धनधर्मयोः ॥२३॥
transliteration: horārkārārkivijjīvāḥ śaniḥ khaṃ sakalāḥ kramāt . vyayaveśmasutastrīṣu ṣaḍ sapta dhanadharmayoḥ.
separated_sandhi: horā arka ārki vit jīvāḥ śaniḥ kham sakalāḥ kramātvyaya-veśma-suta-strīṣu ṣaṭ sapta dhana-dharmayoḥ
english: The Sun, Saturn, Mercury, Jupiter, Saturn, and Mars are, in sequence, the lords of the Hora divisions. These are associated with the houses of expenditure (12th), residence (4th), progeny (5th), spouse (7th), as well as the sixth house, the seventh house, wealth (2nd), and natural law (dharma) (9th) houses.

sanskrit: होरामृत्युवोः शरा वेदा विक्रमे खे त्रयः क्षते । द्वौ भवे शून्यमेवं स्यात् करणं भूमिजस्य तु ॥२४॥
transliteration: horāmṛtyuvoḥ śarā vedā vikrame khe trayaḥ kṣate . dvau bhave śūnyamevaṃ syāt karaṇaṃ bhūmijasya tu.
separated_sandhi: horā-mṛtyuvoḥ śarā vedā vikrame khe trayaḥ kṣatedvau bhave śūnyam evam syāt karaṇam bhūmijasya tu
english: For Mars (bhūmija), the calculation (karaṇam) of strength is as follows: it receives five points when in the Hora (ascendant or its division) and four points when in the eighth house (mṛtyu). It gets three points when in the third house (vikrame) and tenth house (khe). It receives two points when in the sixth house (kṣate). However, when in the first house (bhave) of the Rashi chart itself, it should be zero points.

sanskrit: कुजस्यार्केन्दुविज्जीवसित लग्नशनी च तु । सितारगुरुमन्दाः स्युर्धर्मोक्तेषु कुजं विना ॥२५॥
transliteration: kujasyārkenduvijjīvasita lagnaśanī ca tu . sitāragurumandāḥ syurdharmokteṣu kujaṃ vinā.
separated_sandhi: kujasya arka-indu-vit-jīva-sita lagna-śanī ca tusita-āra-guru-mandāḥ syuḥ dharma-ukteṣu kujam vinā
english: For Mars (kuja), the Sun, Moon, Mercury, Jupiter, Venus, the Ascendant, and Saturn are considered. However, regarding principles stated for natural law (dharma) (9th house) related divisions, Venus, Jupiter, and Saturn are the assigned rulers, excluding Mars (kuja).

sanskrit: चन्द्रारगुरुशुक्रार्किलग्नानि कुजभास्करी । ज्ञेन्द्वर्कसितलग्नार्या एषु शुक्रं विना ततः ॥२६॥
transliteration: candrāraguruśukrārkilagnāni kujabhāskarī . jñendvarkasitalagnāryā eṣu śukraṃ vinā tataḥ.
separated_sandhi: candra-āra-guru-śukra-ārki-lagnāni kuja-bhāskarījña-indu-arka-sita-lagna-āryā eṣu śukram vinā tataḥ
english: For the Moon, Mars (kuja) and the Sun are the Trikona lords. For Mercury, the Moon, Mars, Jupiter, Venus, Saturn, and the Ascendant are the Trikona lords. Subsequently, from the group of Mercury, Moon, Sun, Venus, Ascendant, and Jupiter, excluding Venus (śukra), these remaining planets are assigned as lords for Venus and Saturn.

sanskrit: विना शनिं सप्त धर्मे सितेन्दुज्ञा वियत्ततः । अर्कार्किज्ञेन्दुलग्नाराः करणं प्रोच्यते क्रमात् ॥२७॥
transliteration: vinā śaniṃ sapta dharme sitendujñā viyattataḥ . arkārkijñendulagnārāḥ karaṇaṃ procyate kramāt.
separated_sandhi: vinā śanim sapta dharme sitendujñā viyat tataḥarkārki-jñendulagnārāḥ karaṇam procyate kramāt
english: The Karaṇa is declared in order: it comprises (the conditions of) the seventh (house), the ninth (house of natural law [dharma]), and the planets Venus, Moon, and Mercury, along with the tenth (house), but excluding Saturn from this group; subsequently, the Sun, Saturn, Mercury, Moon, Ascendant, and Mars (are also components of the Karaṇa).

sanskrit: तनुस्वगृहकर्मारिधर्मेष्वग्निर्मृगौ करौ । भ्रातृस्त्रियो रसा लाभे शून्यं पुत्रे व्यये शराः ॥२८॥
transliteration: tanusvagṛhakarmāridharmeṣvagnirmṛgau karau . bhrātṛstriyo rasā lābhe śūnyaṃ putre vyaye śarāḥ.
separated_sandhi: tanusvagṛhakarmāridharmeṣu agniḥ mṛgau karaubhrātṛstriyaḥ rasā lābhe śūnyam putre vyaye śarāḥ
english: For the houses of body (1st), wealth (2nd), home (4th), action (10th), enemies (6th), and natural law (dharma) (9th), the values assigned are three (agniḥ) for action (10th), two (mṛgau) for enemies (6th), and two (karau) for natural law (dharma) (9th). For brothers (3rd house) and wives (7th house), the value is six (rasā). For gain (11th house), it is zero (śūnyam). For progeny (5th house) and expenditure (12th house), it is five (śarāḥ).

sanskrit: बुधास्यर्केन्दुगुरवो गुरुसूर्यबुधाः क्रमात् । लग्नार्कारार्किचन्द्रार्या ज्ञार्कार्या हि बुधस्य तु ॥२९॥
transliteration: budhāsyarkenduguravo gurusūryabudhāḥ kramāt . lagnārkārārkicandrāryā jñārkāryā hi budhasya tu.
separated_sandhi: budhāsyarkenduguravaḥ guru-sūrya-budhāḥ kramātlagnārkārārkicandrāryā jñārkāryā hi budhasya tu
english: Mercury, (the significator of the) face (āsya), Sun, Moon, and Jupiter; then Jupiter, Sun, and Mercury are (to be considered) in order. Furthermore, Lagna, Sun, Mars, Saturn, Moon, and Āryā; and Mercury, Sun, and Āryā are indeed relevant for Mercury.

sanskrit: जीवारेन्द्वार्किलग्नानि शुक्रमन्नधरासुताः । ज्ञेन्दुलग्नार्कशुक्रार्या ज्ञार्कौ जीवेन्दुलग्नकाः ॥३०॥
transliteration: jīvārendvārkilagnāni śukramannadharāsutāḥ . jñendulagnārkaśukrāryā jñārkau jīvendulagnakāḥ.
separated_sandhi: jīvārendvārkilagnāni śukram annadharasutāḥjñendulagnārkaśukrāryā jñārkau jīvendulagnakāḥ
english: Jupiter, Mars, Moon, Saturn, and the Ascendants (Lagna); then Venus and the sons of the Earth (Mars); then Mercury, Moon, Ascendant, Sun, Venus, and Āryā; then Mercury and Sun; and then Jupiter, Moon, and the Ascendants (Lagna) are (mentioned).

sanskrit: अर्कार्यशुक्रः शून्यं च होरेन्द्वारार्किभार्गवाः । रूपं धनाययोः खे द्वौ व्यये सप्त क्षतेऽर्णवाः ॥३१॥
transliteration: arkāryaśukraḥ śūnyaṃ ca horendvārārkibhārgavāḥ . rūpaṃ dhanāyayoḥ khe dvau vyaye sapta kṣate'rṇavāḥ.
separated_sandhi: arkāryaśukraḥ śūnyam ca horendvārārkibhārgavāḥrūpam dhanāyayoḥ khe dvau vyaye sapta kṣate arṇavāḥ
english: The Sun, Jupiter, and Venus are assigned zero (points). The Lagna (Ascendant), Moon, Mars, Saturn, and Venus are assigned one (point). In the second and eleventh houses, there are two (points). In the tenth house, there are two (points). In the twelfth house, there are seven (points). In the sixth house, there are four (points).

sanskrit: मृतिविक्रमयो पञ्च गुरोः शेषेषु वह्नियः । लग्ने शुक्रेन्दुमन्दाः स्वे आये मन्दश्च विक्रमे ॥३२॥
transliteration: mṛtivikramayo pañca guroḥ śeṣeṣu vahniyaḥ . lagne śukrendumandāḥ sve āye mandaśca vikrame.
separated_sandhi: mṛtivikramayoḥ pañca guroḥ śeṣeṣu vahniyaḥlagne śukrendumandāḥ sve āye mandaḥ ca vikrame
english: In the eighth and third houses, five (points are given). For Jupiter, in the remaining houses, three (points are given). Venus, the Moon, and Saturn are (strong) in the Ascendant (Lagna). Saturn is also (strong) in its own sign, in the eleventh house, and in the third house.

sanskrit: लग्नारेन्दुज्ञभृगवः सुतेर्कार्यकुजा गृहे । शुक्रमन्देन्दवो द्यूने बुधशुक्रशनैश्चराः ॥३३॥
transliteration: lagnārendujñabhṛgavaḥ suterkāryakujā gṛhe . śukramandendavo dyūne budhaśukraśanaiścarāḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagnārendujñabhṛgavāḥ sute arkārkikujā gṛheśukramandendavaḥ dyūne budhaśukraśanaiścarāḥ
english: The Lagna (Ascendant), Mars, Moon, Mercury, and Venus are (strong) in the fifth house. The Sun, Saturn, and Mars are (strong) in the fourth house. Venus, Saturn, and the Moon are (strong) in the seventh house. Mercury, Venus, and Saturn (are also significant/strong).

sanskrit: जीवारार्केन्दवः शत्रौ सर्वे मन्दं विना व्यये । कर्मणीन्दुशनी धर्मे मन्दारगुरवो मृगौ ॥३४॥
transliteration: jīvārārkendavaḥ śatrau sarve mandaṃ vinā vyaye . karmaṇīnduśanī dharme mandāraguravo mṛgau.
separated_sandhi: jīvārārkendavaḥ śatrau sarve mandam vinā vyayekarmaṇi indu śanī dharme mandāraguravaḥ mṛgau
english: Jupiter, Mars, the Sun, and the Moon are (strong) in the sixth house. All (planets) except Saturn are (strong) in the twelfth house. The Moon and Saturn are (strong) in the tenth house (karma). Saturn, Mars, and Jupiter are (strong) in the ninth house (dharma) and in Capricorn (the tenth sign).

sanskrit: लग्नार्किसितचन्द्रज्ञाः करणं च गुरोरिदम् । सुतायुर्विक्रमेष्वक्षि तनुस्वव्ययखेष्विषुः ॥३५॥
transliteration: lagnārkisitacandrajñāḥ karaṇaṃ ca guroridam . sutāyurvikrameṣvakṣi tanusvavyayakheṣviṣuḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagna arki sita candra jñāḥ karaṇam ca guroḥ idam| suta āyu vikrameṣu akṣi tanu sva vyaya kheṣu iṣuḥ
english: The ascendant (lagna), Saturn, Venus, Moon, and Mercury, along with this astrological factor (karaṇa) pertaining to Jupiter (guror idam) – (these are the entities discussed). For the fifth (suta), eighth (āyu), and third (vikrama) houses, the numerical value is two (akṣi). For the first (tanu), second (sva), twelfth (vyaya), and tenth (khe) houses, the numerical value is five (iṣu).

sanskrit: अष्टौ स्त्रियामरौ षड् भूर्धर्मे मित्रेऽक्षि खं भवे । लग्ने स्वेऽर्कारविज्जीवमन्दाः सर्वे च कामभे ॥३६॥
transliteration: aṣṭau striyāmarau ṣaḍ bhūrdharme mitre'kṣi khaṃ bhave . lagne sve'rkāravijjīvamandāḥ sarve ca kāmabhe.
separated_sandhi: aṣṭau striyām arau ṣaṭ bhūḥ dharme mitre akṣi kham bhavet| lagne sve arka āra vij jīva mandāḥ sarve ca kāmabhe
english: Eight (aṣṭau) points for the seventh house (striyām, concerning the wife). Six (ṣaṭ) points for the sixth house (arau, concerning enemies). For the fourth (bhūḥ), ninth (dharma), and seventh (mitre, concerning partnerships) houses, the values should be two (akṣi) or zero (kham). Furthermore, regarding the ascendant (lagna), second house (sva), and the house of desire (kāmabhe, seventh house), all these planets – the Sun, Mars, Mercury, Jupiter, and Saturn – (are to be considered).

sanskrit: अर्कार्यौ विक्रमस्थाने सुतेऽर्कारौ शुभे रविः । सुखेऽकबुधजीवाः स्युर्भौमज्ञौ मृतिभे द्वज ॥३७॥
transliteration: arkāryau vikramasthāne sute'rkārau śubhe raviḥ . sukhe'kabudhajīvāḥ syurbhaumajñau mṛtibhe dvaja.
separated_sandhi: arka āryau vikramasthāne sute arka ārau śubhe raviḥ |sukhe arka budha jīvāḥ syuḥ bhauma jñau mṛtibhe dvija
english: Sun and Jupiter (ārya) are in the third house (vikramasthāna). In the fifth house (suta) are the Sun and Mars. The Sun (ravi) is in the ninth house (śubha, auspiciousness). In the fourth house (sukha, happiness) may be the Sun, Mercury, and Jupiter. O twice-born (dvija), Mars and Mercury (jña) are in the eighth house (mṛtibha).

sanskrit: शुक्रार्केन्द्वार्किलग्नार्याः शत्रौ शून्यं भवे व्यये । होरार्किबुधशुक्रार्यास्तन्वारज्ञेन्द्विनाश्च खे ॥३८॥
transliteration: śukrārkendvārkilagnāryāḥ śatrau śūnyaṃ bhave vyaye . horārkibudhaśukrāryāstanvārajñendvināśca khe.
separated_sandhi: śukra arka indu arki lagna āryāḥ śatrau śūnyam bhavet vyaye| horā arki budha śukra āryāḥ tanu āra jña indu ināḥ ca khe
english: When Venus, Sun, Moon, Saturn, the ascendant (lagna), and Jupiter (ārya) are in the sixth house (śatru) or the twelfth house (vyaya), they should be considered as zero (śūnya). Furthermore, Horā, Saturn, Mercury (budha), Venus, and Jupiter; along with the ascendant (tanu), Mars, Mercury (jña), Moon, and the Sun – these entities are (to be considered) for the tenth house (khe).

sanskrit: स्वस्त्रीधर्मेषु सप्ताङ्गं मृतिहोरागृहेषु च । आज्ञाभ्रातृव्यये वेदा रूपं शत्रौ सुते शराः ॥३९॥
transliteration: svastrīdharmeṣu saptāṅgaṃ mṛtihorāgṛheṣu ca . ājñābhrātṛvyaye vedā rūpaṃ śatrau sute śarāḥ.
separated_sandhi: svastrī-dharmeṣu saptāṅgam mṛti-horā-gṛheṣu caājñā-bhrātṛ-vyaye vedā rūpam śatrau sute śarāḥ
english: For matters concerning one's spouse and marital duties (dharma) (7th house), the signification is seven. For the houses of death (8th house) and "horā" (divisions of signs), it is one. For command, brothers, and expenditure (12th house), the signification is four (Vedas). For enemies (6th house) and children (5th house), the signification is five (arrows).

sanskrit: आये शून्यं शनेरेवं करणं प्रोच्यते बुधैः । गृहे तनौ च लग्नार्कौ स्वस्त्रियोश्च रविं विना ॥४०॥
transliteration: āye śūnyaṃ śanerevaṃ karaṇaṃ procyate budhaiḥ . gṛhe tanau ca lagnārkau svastriyośca raviṃ vinā.
separated_sandhi: āye śūnyam śaneḥ evam karaṇam procyate budhaiḥ gṛhetanau ca lagna arkau svastriyauḥ ca ravim vinā
english: For the house of gain (11th house), the signification (karaṇa) of Saturn is zero, as declared by the wise. For the house (4th) and the body/ascendant (1st), Lagna and the Sun are the significators (karaṇa). Furthermore, for one's own spouse (7th house matters), the Sun is excluded (as a significator).

sanskrit: हित्वा धर्मे बुधं माने लग्नाररविचन्द्रजान् । ततो भ्रातरि जीवार्कबुधशुक्राः क्षते रविः ॥४१॥
transliteration: hitvā dharme budhaṃ māne lagnāraravicandrajān . tato bhrātari jīvārkabudhaśukrāḥ kṣate raviḥ.
separated_sandhi: hitvā dharme budham māne lagnāraravicandrajāntataḥ bhrātari jīvārkabudhaśukrāḥ kṣate raviḥ
english: One should exclude Mercury for matters concerning spiritual merit (dharma) (9th house). For matters of honor (10th house), Lagna, Mars, the Sun, and Mercury (are excluded). Thereafter, for brothers (3rd house), Jupiter, the Sun, Mercury, and Venus (are the significators). For injuries (6th house), the Sun (is the significator).

sanskrit: व्यये लग्नेन्दुमन्दार्काः सितार्कन्दुज्ञलग्नकाः । सुते मृतौ बुधार्कौ च हित्वाऽये खं शनेर्विदः ॥४२॥
transliteration: vyaye lagnendumandārkāḥ sitārkandujñalagnakāḥ . sute mṛtau budhārkau ca hitvā'ye khaṃ śanervidaḥ.
separated_sandhi: vyaye lagnendumandārkāḥ sitārkendujñalagnakāḥ sutemṛtau budhārkau ca hitvā āye kham śaneḥ vidaḥ
english: For the house of expenditure (12th house), Lagna, the Moon, Saturn, and the Sun (are the significators). For the Ascendant (1st house), Venus, the Sun, the Moon, Mercury, and Lagna itself (are the significators). For children (5th house) and death (8th house), Mercury and the Sun (are the significators). Furthermore, excluding for the house of gain (11th house), zero is for Saturn, say the knowers.

sanskrit: उक्ताऽन्ये स्थानदातार इति स्थानं विदुर्बुधाः । अथ स्थानग्रहान् वक्ष्ये सुखबोधाय सुरिणाम् ॥४३॥
transliteration: uktā'nye sthānadātāra iti sthānaṃ vidurbudhāḥ . atha sthānagrahān vakṣye sukhabodhāya suriṇām.
separated_sandhi: uktāḥ anye sthānadātāraḥ iti sthānam viduḥ budhāḥ| atha sthānagrahān vakṣye sukhabodhāya surīṇām
english: The wise declare certain other planets as bestowers of positional strength (sthāna), and thus they understand the concept of positional strength. Now, for the easy comprehension of scholars, I will describe the planets that confer positional strength.

sanskrit: स्वायस्तनुषु मन्दारसूर्या जीवबुधौ सुते । विक्रमे ज्ञेन्दुलग्नानि लग्नार्कार्किकुजा गृहे ॥४४॥
transliteration: svāyastanuṣu mandārasūryā jīvabudhau sute . vikrame jñendulagnāni lagnārkārkikujā gṛhe.
separated_sandhi: sva-āya-tanuṣu mandaḥ āraḥ sūryaḥ jīva-budhau sute| vikrame jñendu lagnāni lagna-arka-ārki-kujāḥ gṛhe
english: Saturn, Mars, and the Sun are strong in their own houses (sva), the eleventh house (āya), and the first house (tanu). Jupiter and Mercury are strong in the fifth house (suta). Mercury and the Moon are strong in the third house (vikrama), and the ascendant itself. The lord of the first house, the Sun, Saturn, and Mars are strong in the fourth house (gṛha).

sanskrit: ते च ज्ञेन्दू खभे चाऽये सर्वे शुक्रं विना व्यये । लग्नशुक्रबुधाः शत्रौ ते च जीवसुधाकरौ ॥४५॥
transliteration: te ca jñendū khabhe cā'ye sarve śukraṃ vinā vyaye . lagnaśukrabudhāḥ śatrau te ca jīvasudhākarau.
separated_sandhi: te ca jñendū khabhe ca āye | sarve śukram vinā vyaye| lagna-śukra-budhāḥ śatrau | te ca jīva-sudhākarau
english: Mercury and the Moon are strong in the tenth house (kha) and the eleventh house (āya). All planets except Venus are strong in the twelfth house (vyaya). The lord of the first house, Venus, and Mercury are strong in the sixth house (śatru); and Jupiter and the Moon are also strong there.

sanskrit: द्यूनेऽर्कारार्किशुक्राश्च धर्मेर्कारार्किविद्गुरुः । ज्ञेन्दुजीवाः कुजार्यौ ज्ञार्केन्द्वारार्कितनूशनाः ॥४६॥
transliteration: dyūne'rkārārkiśukrāśca dharmerkārārkividguruḥ . jñendujīvāḥ kujāryau jñārkendvārārkitanūśanāḥ.
separated_sandhi: dyūne arkaḥ āraḥ ārkiḥ śukrāḥ ca| dharme arkaḥ āraḥ ārkiḥ vit guruḥ| jñendu-jīvāḥ | kuja-āryau |jña-arka-indu-āra-ārki-tanū-uśanāḥ
english: The Sun, Mars, Saturn, and Venus are strong in the seventh house (dyūna). The Sun, Mars, Saturn, Mercury, and Jupiter are strong in the ninth house (dharma). Mercury, the Moon, and Jupiter are strong in the tenth house. Mars, Jupiter, Mercury, the Sun, the Moon, Saturn, the lord of the first house (tanu), and Venus (uśanas) are strong in the eleventh house.

sanskrit: जीवशुक्रबुधा भौमबुधशुक्रशनैश्चराः । रवीन्द्वारार्किलग्नानि रवीन्द्वार्यज्ञभार्गवाः ॥४७॥
transliteration: jīvaśukrabudhā bhaumabudhaśukraśanaiścarāḥ . ravīndvārārkilagnāni ravīndvāryajñabhārgavāḥ.
separated_sandhi: jīva śukra budhāḥ | bhauma budha śukra śanaiścarāḥ | raviindu āra ārki lagnāni | ravi indu ārya jña bhārgavāḥ
english: Jupiter, Venus, and Mercury; Mars, Mercury, Venus, and Saturn; the Sun, Moon, Mars, Saturn, and the Ascendants; and the Sun, Moon, Jupiter, Mercury, and Venus are the groups of fully nullifying signs.

sanskrit: अर्कज्ञजीवाः शुक्रेन्दू ते च तौ लग्नभूसुतौ । सर्वे शून्यं क्रमात्प्रोक्तं स्थानं शीतकरस्य च ॥४८॥
transliteration: arkajñajīvāḥ śukrendū te ca tau lagnabhūsutau . sarve śūnyaṃ kramātproktaṃ sthānaṃ śītakarasya ca.
separated_sandhi: arka jña jīvāḥ | śukra indū | te ca tau | lagna bhūsutau| sarve śūnyam | kramāt proktam | sthānam | śītkarasya ca
english: The nullifying places for the Sun, Mercury, and Jupiter are declared in order (from the previous verse); similarly for Venus and the Moon; also for Saturn and Rāhu; and for the Ascendant and Mars. All these are successively declared as nullifying places, and this also applies to the Moon.

sanskrit: लग्नमन्दकुजा भौमो होराज्ञेन्दुदिनाधिपाः । मन्दारौ ज्ञरवी ज्ञेन्दुजीवार्कतनुभार्गवाः ॥४९॥
transliteration: lagnamandakujā bhaumo horājñendudinādhipāḥ . mandārau jñaravī jñendujīvārkatanubhārgavāḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagna manda kujāḥ | bhaumaḥ | horā jña indu dinādhipāḥ |manda ārau | jña ravi | jña indu jīva arka tanu bhārgavāḥ
english: The Ascendant, Saturn, and Mars; then Mars alone; Hora, Mercury, Moon, and the lord of the day (Sun); Saturn and Mars; Mercury and Sun; and Mercury, Moon, Jupiter, Sun, Ascendant, and Venus are the groups of half-nullifying signs.

sanskrit: मन्दारौ तौ सित श्चार्किः कुजार्कार्यार्किलग्नकाः । सर्वे गुरुसितौ स्थानं भौमस्तैवं विदुर्बुधाः ॥५०॥
transliteration: mandārau tau sita ścārkiḥ kujārkāryārkilagnakāḥ . sarve gurusitau sthānaṃ bhaumastaivaṃ vidurbudhāḥ.
separated_sandhi: manda ārau | tau | sitaḥ ca | ārkiḥ| kuja arka ārya ārki lagnakāḥ| sarve | guru sitau | sthānam |bhaumaḥ | tai evam | viduḥ | budhāḥ
english: Saturn and Mars; those two, Venus and Saturn; and Mars, Sun, Jupiter, Saturn, and the Ascendants are also groups of half-nullifying signs. The wise understand that all these are the places for Jupiter, Venus, and Mars.

sanskrit: लग्नमन्दारशुक्रज्ञा लग्नारेन्दुसितार्कजाः । शुक्रज्ञौ लग्नचन्द्रार्किसितारा ज्ञार्कभार्गवाः ॥५१॥
transliteration: lagnamandāraśukrajñā lagnārendusitārkajāḥ . śukrajñau lagnacandrārkisitārā jñārkabhārgavāḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagna manda āra śukra jñāḥ lagna āra indu sita arkajāḥśukra jñau lagna candra arki sita ārāḥ jña arka bhārgavāḥ
english: Consider the following planetary combinations: the Ascendant (lagna), Saturn (manda), Mars (āra), Venus (śukra), and Mercury (jña); another combination includes the Ascendant (lagna), Mars (āra), Moon (indu), Venus (sita), and Saturn (arkaja); also, Venus (śukra) and Mercury (jña) together; then the Ascendant (lagna), Moon (chandra), Saturn (arki), Venus (sita), and Mars (āra); and finally, Mercury (jña), Sun (arka), and Venus (bhārgava).

sanskrit: जीवज्ञार्केन्दुलग्नानि भूमिपुत्रशनैश्चरौ । तौ च लग्नेन्दु शक्रार्या मन्दारार्कज्ञभार्गवाः ॥५२॥
transliteration: jīvajñārkendulagnāni bhūmiputraśanaiścarau . tau ca lagnendu śakrāryā mandārārkajñabhārgavāḥ.
separated_sandhi: jīva jña arka indu lagnāni bhūmiputra śanaiścarau tauca lagna indu śakrārya manda āra arka jña bhārgavāḥ
english: Jupiter (jīva), Mercury (jña), Sun (arka), Moon (indu), and the Ascendant (lagna) [form a combination]; also Mars (bhūmiputra) and Saturn (śanaiścara) [form a combination]. Those two (Mars and Saturn), along with the Ascendant (lagna), Moon (indu), and Jupiter (śakrārya), form another group. Furthermore, Saturn (manda), Mars (āra), Sun (arka), Mercury (jña), and Venus (bhārgava) are another combination.

sanskrit: लग्नमन्दारविच्चन्द्राः सर्वे जीवज्ञभास्कराः । गुरोर्लग्ने सुखे जीव लग्नाराक्रबुधा धने ॥५३॥
transliteration: lagnamandāraviccandrāḥ sarve jīvajñabhāskarāḥ . gurorlagne sukhe jīva lagnārākrabudhā dhane.
separated_sandhi: lagna manda vit candrāḥ sarve jīva jña bhāskarāḥguroḥ lagne sukhe jīva lagna āra arka budhāḥ dhane
english: The combinations are: the Ascendant (lagna), Saturn (manda), Mercury (vit), and Moon (chandra); and Jupiter (jīva), Mercury (jña), and Sun (bhāskara) [all together]. Furthermore, if Jupiter (guru) is in the Ascendant (lagna), or Jupiter (jīva) is in the fourth house (sukha), or the Ascendant (lagna), Mars (āra), Sun (arka), and Mercury (budha) are in the second house (dhana).

sanskrit: चन्द्रशुक्रौ च दुश्चिक्ये मन्दार्यार्काः शनिर्व्यये । सुते शुक्रेन्दुलग्नज्ञमन्दाश्चन्द्रं विना त्वरौ ॥५४॥
transliteration: candraśukrau ca duścikye mandāryārkāḥ śanirvyaye . sute śukrendulagnajñamandāścandraṃ vinā tvarau.
separated_sandhi: candra śukrau ca duścikye manda ārya arkāḥ śaniḥ vyayesute śukra indu lagna jña mandāḥ candram vinā tu arau
english: Moon (chandra) and Venus (śukra) are in the third house (duścikya). Saturn (manda), Jupiter (ārya), and Sun (arka) [form a combination]. Saturn (śani) is in the twelfth house (vyaya). If Venus (śukra), the Ascendant (lagna), Mercury (jña), and Saturn (manda) are in the fifth house (suta) (excluding the Moon (chandra)), or (these same planets, excluding Moon, are) in the sixth house (ari).

sanskrit: लग्नारार्याऽर्केन्दवोऽस्ते मृगौ जीवार्कभूसुताः । धर्मे शुक्रार्कलग्नेन्दुबुधा मन्दं विनाऽयभे ॥५५॥
transliteration: lagnārāryā'rkendavo'ste mṛgau jīvārkabhūsutāḥ . dharme śukrārkalagnendubudhā mandaṃ vinā'yabhe.
separated_sandhi: lagna āra āryā arka indavaḥ aste mṛgau jīva arka bhūsutāḥdharme śukra arka lagna indu budhāḥ mandam vinā ayabhe
english: When the Ascendant (lord), Mars, Jupiter, Sun, and Moon are in the 7th house; when Jupiter, Sun, and Mars are in Capricorn; and when Venus, Sun, the Ascendant (lord), Moon, and Mercury are in the 9th house, or in the 11th house without Saturn.

sanskrit: माने गुरुबुधारार्कशुक्रहोरास्तथा विदुः । लग्नशुक्रेन्दव स्ते ते ज्ञार्क्या रास्ते ज्ञवर्जिताः ॥५६॥
transliteration: māne gurubudhārārkaśukrahorāstathā viduḥ . lagnaśukrendava ste te jñārkyā rāste jñavarjitāḥ.
separated_sandhi: māne guru budha āra arka śukra horāḥ tathā viduḥlagna śukra indavaḥ te te jña ārki rāste jña varjitāḥ
english: Experts declare that Jupiter, Mercury, Mars, Sun, Venus, and the Ascendant (lord) are similarly in the 10th house. Likewise, the Ascendant (lord), Venus, Moon, and Saturn (excluding Mercury) are in the 7th house.

sanskrit: सुतभे लघ्नशशिजशशाङ्कार्यार्किभार्गवाः । ज्ञारौ शून्यं सिताऽर्केन्दुगुरुलग्नशनैश्चराः ॥५७॥
transliteration: sutabhe laghnaśaśijaśaśāṅkāryārkibhārgavāḥ . jñārau śūnyaṃ sitā'rkendugurulagnaśanaiścarāḥ.
separated_sandhi: sutabhe lagna śaśija śaśāṅka ārya ārki bhārgavāḥjña ara śūnyam sita arka indu guru lagna śanaiścarāḥ
english: When the Ascendant (lord), Mercury, Moon, Jupiter, Saturn, and Venus are in the 5th house. When Mercury and Mars are absent, (and) Venus, Sun, Moon, Jupiter, the Ascendant (lord), and Saturn are present.

sanskrit: सर्वे रविं विना शुक्रगुरुमन्दाश्च मानभे । सर्वे कुजेन्दुरवयः क्रमात् भृगुसुतस्य च ॥५८॥
transliteration: sarve raviṃ vinā śukragurumandāśca mānabhe . sarve kujenduravayaḥ kramāt bhṛgusutasya ca.
separated_sandhi: sarve ravim vinā śukra guru mandāḥ ca mānabhesarve kuja indu ravayaḥ kramāt bhṛgusutasya ca
english: All planets except the Sun (specifically Venus, Jupiter, and Saturn) are in the 10th house. And all (planets), namely Mars, Moon, and Sun, are in order for Venus.

sanskrit: शने रवितनू सूर्यो लग्नेन्दुकुजसूर्यजाः । लग्नार्कौ जीवमन्दाराः सर्वे सूर्यं विना क्षते ॥५९॥
transliteration: śane ravitanū sūryo lagnendukujasūryajāḥ . lagnārkau jīvamandārāḥ sarve sūryaṃ vinā kṣate.
separated_sandhi: śane ravi-tanū sūryaḥ lagna-indu-kuja-sūryajāḥlagna-arkaū jīva-manda-ārāḥ sarve sūryaṃ vinā kṣate
english: Saturn; the Sun and the ascendant (Lagna); the Sun; the ascendant (Lagna), Moon, Mars, and Saturn; the ascendant (Lagna) and the Sun; and Jupiter, Saturn, and Mars – all these become subject to harm (kṣate) unless the Sun is present.

sanskrit: अर्कोऽर्कज्ञौ बुधोऽर्कारतनुज्ञाः सकलास्ततः । कुजज्ञगुरुशुक्राश्च क्रमात् स्थानमिदं विदुः ॥६०॥
transliteration: arko'rkajñau budho'rkāratanujñāḥ sakalāstataḥ . kujajñaguruśukrāśca kramāt sthānamidaṃ viduḥ.
separated_sandhi: arkaḥ arka-jñau budhaḥ arka-āra-tanu-jñāḥ sakalāḥtataḥ kuja-jña-guru-śukrāḥ ca kramāt sthānam idam viduḥ
english: The Sun is considered a significator for the first house; the Sun and Mercury for the second house; Mercury for the third; the Sun, Mars, the ascendant (Lagna), and Mercury for the fourth; all planets for the fifth; and thereafter, Mars, Mercury, Jupiter, and Venus are respectively known as significators for the sixth, seventh, ninth, and eleventh houses. In this way, they understand these positions (sthānam) in their proper sequence (kramāt).

sanskrit: तनौ तुर्ये च वह्निः स्याद् दुश्चिक्ये द्वौ धने शराः । बुद्धिमृत्यंकरिःफेषु षट् खेशक्षतराशिषु ॥६१॥
transliteration: tanau turye ca vahniḥ syād duścikye dvau dhane śarāḥ . buddhimṛtyaṃkariḥpheṣu ṣaṭ kheśakṣatarāśiṣu.
separated_sandhi: tanau turye ca vahniḥ syāt duścikye dvau dhane śarāḥbuddhi-mṛtyu-kari-ripheṣu ṣaṭ kheśa-kṣata-rāśiṣu
english: The "Upagraha" Dhūma (vahni) should be considered for the first house (Lagna) and the fourth house; Vyātipāta (dvau) for the third house; Pariveṣa (śarāḥ) for the second house. For the fifth, eighth, eleventh, twelfth houses, and also for the tenth house (kheśa) and houses of affliction (kṣata-rāśi), the "Upagraha" Indracāpa (ṣaṭ) is considered.

sanskrit: रूपंस्त्रियां गुरुं त्यक्त्वा लग्नस्य करणं त्विदम् । होरासूर्येन्दवो लग्ने लग्नारेन्द्विनसूर्यजाः ॥६२॥
transliteration: rūpaṃstriyāṃ guruṃ tyaktvā lagnasya karaṇaṃ tvidam . horāsūryendavo lagne lagnārendvinasūryajāḥ.
separated_sandhi: rūpam striyām guruṃ tyaktvā lagnasya karaṇaṃ tu idamhorā-sūrya-indavaḥ lagne lagna-āra-indva-ina-sūryajāḥ
english: Excluding Jupiter, the "Upagraha" Rūpa is considered for appearance and women (or the seventh house). The "Upagraha" Karaṇa is considered for the ascendant (Lagna). In the context of the ascendant (Lagna), the Sun, Moon, and Horā are relevant. Also, the ascendant (Lagna), Mars, Moon, Sun, and Saturn are significant.

sanskrit: गुरुज्ञौ लग्नचन्द्रारा लसूचंमंबुसौरयः । क्षते शुक्रस्तथा चैकः कामे सर्वे गुरुं विना ॥६३॥
transliteration: gurujñau lagnacandrārā lasūcaṃmaṃbusaurayaḥ . kṣate śukrastathā caikaḥ kāme sarve guruṃ vinā.
separated_sandhi: gurujñau lagnacandrārā lasūcaṃmaṃbusaurayaḥkṣate śukraḥ tathā ca ekaḥ kāme sarve guruṃ vinā
english: Jupiter and Mercury, the Ascendant (Lagna), Moon, and Mars are significant. Similarly, the Ascendant, Sun, Moon, Mars, Mercury, Venus, and Saturn are also [significant]. For matters concerning the seventh house (kṣate), Venus and one other [planet] are relevant. For matters of desire (kāme), all [planets] except Jupiter [are significant].

sanskrit: मृगौ भृगुबुधौ त्यक्त्वा धर्मे गुरुसितौ विना । कर्मण्याये तथा शुक्रोव्यये सूर्येन्दुवर्जिताः ॥६४॥
transliteration: mṛgau bhṛgubudhau tyaktvā dharme gurusitau vinā . karmaṇyāye tathā śukrovyaye sūryenduvarjitāḥ.
separated_sandhi: mṛgau bhṛgubudhau tyaktvā dharme guru-sitau vinākarmaṇi-āye tathā śukraḥ vyaye sūrya-indu-varjitāḥ
english: Excluding Venus and Mercury [as significators associated with] Capricorn and Aquarius. For the ninth house (dharma), [consider significators] without Jupiter and Venus. Furthermore, Venus [is significant] in the tenth (karma) and eleventh (āya) houses. For the twelfth house (vyaye), [planets] devoid of Sun and Moon [are significant].

sanskrit: लग्नस्येदं तु सम्प्रोक्तं करणं द्विजपुङ्गव । अथ स्थानं प्रवक्ष्यामि लग्नस्य द्विजपुङ्गव ॥६५॥
transliteration: lagnasyedaṃ tu samproktaṃ karaṇaṃ dvijapuṅgava . atha sthānaṃ pravakṣyāmi lagnasya dvijapuṅgava.
separated_sandhi: lagnasya idam tu samproktaṃ karaṇaṃ dvijapuṅgavaatha sthānaṃ pravakṣyāmi lagnasya dvijapuṅgava
english: O best among the twice-born (dvijapuṅgava), this explanation (karaṇa) regarding the Ascendant (Lagna) has indeed been declared. Now, O best among the twice-born (dvijapuṅgava), I will explain the house divisions (sthāna) of the Ascendant (Lagna).

sanskrit: आर्किज्ञशुक्रगुर्वाराः सौम्यदेवेज्यभार्गवाः । हित्वा सौम्यगुरू शेषाः सूज्ञेज्यभृगुसूर्यजाः ॥६६॥
transliteration: ārkijñaśukragurvārāḥ saumyadevejyabhārgavāḥ . hitvā saumyagurū śeṣāḥ sūjñejyabhṛgusūryajāḥ.
separated_sandhi: ārki-jña-śukra-guru-ārāḥ saumya-devejya-bhārgavāḥhitvā saumya-gurū śeṣāḥ sū-jña-ijya-bhṛgu-sūryajāḥ
english: Saturn, Mercury, Venus, Jupiter, and Mars are [significant]. Mercury, Jupiter, and Venus are also [significant]. Furthermore, excluding Mercury and Jupiter, the remaining planets are identified as the Sun, Mercury, Jupiter, Venus, and Saturn.

sanskrit: तथा जीवभृगू बुद्धौ सर्वे शुक्रं विना क्षते । जीव एकस्तथा द्यूने मृगौ सौम्यभृगू तथा ॥६७॥
transliteration: tathā jīvabhṛgū buddhau sarve śukraṃ vinā kṣate . jīva ekastathā dyūne mṛgau saumyabhṛgū tathā.
separated_sandhi: tathā jīvabhṛgū buddhau sarve śukraṃ vinā kṣate| jīvaḥ ekaḥ tathā dyūne mṛgau saumyabhṛgū tathā
english: Similarly, Jupiter (Jīva) and Venus (Bhṛgu) are (considered auspicious) in the fourth house (buddhi). All planets except Venus (Śukra) are (considered auspicious) in the twelfth house (kṣata). Likewise, Jupiter (Jīva) alone is (considered auspicious) in the seventh house (dyūna). And similarly, Mars and Saturn (mṛgau), and Mercury (Saumya) and Venus (Bhṛgu) are (also considered auspicious in the seventh house).

sanskrit: धर्मे गुरुसितावेव खे भवे शुक्रमन्तरा । सूर्यचन्द्रौ तथा रिष्फे स्थानं लग्नस्य कीर्तितम् ॥६८॥
transliteration: dharme gurusitāveva khe bhave śukramantarā . sūryacandrau tathā riṣphe sthānaṃ lagnasya kīrtitam.
separated_sandhi: dharme gurusitau eva khe bhave śukram antarā |sūryacandrau tathā riṣphe sthānaṃ lagnasya kīrtitam
english: Jupiter (Guru) and Venus (Śita) are indeed (favorable) in the ninth house (dharma). All (planets) except Venus (Śukra) are (favorable) in the tenth house (kha) and the eleventh house (bhava). Similarly, the Sun (Sūrya) and Moon (Candra) are (favorable) in the sixth house (riṣpha). These are described as the (auspicious) positions for the ascendant (lagna).

sanskrit: करणं बिन्दुवत् लेख्यं स्थानं रेखास्वरूपकम् । करणं त्वशुभदं प्रोक्तं स्थानं शुभफलप्रदम् ॥६९॥
transliteration: karaṇaṃ binduvat lekhyaṃ sthānaṃ rekhāsvarūpakam . karaṇaṃ tvaśubhadaṃ proktaṃ sthānaṃ śubhaphalapradam.
separated_sandhi: karaṇaṃ binduvat lekhyaṃ sthānaṃ rekhāsvarūpakam |karaṇaṃ tu aśubhadaṃ proktam sthānaṃ śubhaphala-pradam
english: A Karaṇa should be drawn like a point (binduvat), and a Sthāna in the form of a line (rekhāsvarūpakam). However, a Karaṇa is said to bestow inauspicious results, while a Sthāna bestows auspicious results.

sanskrit: दशारेखा लिखेदूर्ध्वास्तिर्यग् रेखाश्चतुर्दश । नगेशकोष्ठसंयुक्तं चक्रमेवं प्रजायते ॥७०॥
transliteration: daśārekhā likhedūrdhvāstiryag rekhāścaturdaśa . nageśakoṣṭhasaṃyuktaṃ cakramevaṃ prajāyate.
separated_sandhi: daśarekhā likhet ūrdhvāḥ tiryak rekhāḥ caturdaśa| nakeśakoṣṭhasaṃyuktaṃ cakram evaṃ prajāyate
english: One should draw ten vertical lines and fourteen horizontal lines. In this manner, a diagram (cakra) consisting of Nageśa-compartments is produced.

sanskrit: तिर्यगष्टसु कोष्ठेषु विलग्नसहितान् खगान् । आद्येषूर्ध्वाधरेष्वेवं भावसंख्या लिखेद् बुधः ॥७१॥
transliteration: tiryagaṣṭasu koṣṭheṣu vilagnasahitān khagān . ādyeṣūrdhvādhareṣvevaṃ bhāvasaṃkhyā likhed budhaḥ.
separated_sandhi: tiryagaṣṭasu koṣṭheṣu vilagnasahitān khagān ādyeṣuūrdhvādhereṣu evam bhāvasaṃkhyā likhet budhaḥ
english: An astrologer should thus write the planets, along with the ascendant, in the eight horizontal sections of the chart, specifically in the primary, upper, and lower positions, indicating the house numbers.

sanskrit: यथोक्तं विन्यसेत् तत्र करणं स्थानमेव वा । ततः शुभाऽशुभं ज्ञात्वा जातकस्य फलं वदेत् ॥७२॥
transliteration: yathoktaṃ vinyaset tatra karaṇaṃ sthānameva vā . tataḥ śubhā'śubhaṃ jñātvā jātakasya phalaṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: yathoktam vinyaset tatra karaṇam sthānam eva vātataḥ śubhāśubham jñātvā jātakasya phalam vadet
english: As described, one should place there either the planetary calculations or their positions. Thereafter, having understood the auspicious and inauspicious implications, one should declare the predictions for the native.

sanskrit: एवं सलग्नखेटानां विधायाष्टकवर्गकम् । त्रिकोणशोधनं कुर्यादादौ सर्वंषु राशिषु ॥१॥
transliteration: evaṃ salagnakheṭānāṃ vidhāyāṣṭakavargakam . trikoṇaśodhanaṃ kuryādādau sarvaṃṣu rāśiṣu.
separated_sandhi: evam salagnakheṭānām vidhāya aṣṭakavargakamtrikoṇaśodhanam kuryāt ādau sarveṣu rāśiṣu
english: Thus, having prepared the Aṣṭakavarga chart for the planets along with the ascendant, one should first perform the Trikona Shodhana (rectification of triangles) in all the zodiacal signs.

sanskrit: त्रिकोणं कथ्यते विप्र मेषसिंहधनूंष्यथ । वृषकन्यामृगस्याश्च युग्मतौलिघटास्तथा ॥२॥
transliteration: trikoṇaṃ kathyate vipra meṣasiṃhadhanūṃṣyatha . vṛṣakanyāmṛgasyāśca yugmataulighaṭāstathā.
separated_sandhi: trikoṇam kathyate vipra meṣasiṃhadhanūṃṣi athavṛṣakanyāmṛgasyāḥ ca yugmatāulighaṭāḥ tathā
english: O Brahmin, the trines are declared to be Aries, Leo, and Sagittarius. Likewise, Taurus, Virgo, and Capricorn, and Gemini, Libra, and Aquarius (are also trines).

sanskrit: कर्कवृश्चिकमीनाश्च त्रिकोणाः स्युः परस्परम् । अधोऽधः सर्वराशीनामष्टवर्गफलं न्यसेत् ॥३॥
transliteration: karkavṛścikamīnāśca trikoṇāḥ syuḥ parasparam . adho'dhaḥ sarvarāśīnāmaṣṭavargaphalaṃ nyaset.
separated_sandhi: karkavṛścikamīnāḥ ca trikoṇāḥ syuḥ parasparam |adhaḥ adhaḥ sarvarāśīnām aṣṭavargaphalam nyaset
english: Cancer, Scorpio, and Pisces are mutually trine signs. One should place the aṣṭavarga results below each of the signs (rāśi), one after another.

sanskrit: त्रिकोणेषु च यन्न्यूनं तत्तुल्यं त्रिषु शोधयेत् । एकस्मिन् भवने शून्यं तत् त्रिकोणं न शोधयेत् ॥४॥
transliteration: trikoṇeṣu ca yannyūnaṃ tattulyaṃ triṣu śodhayet . ekasmin bhavane śūnyaṃ tat trikoṇaṃ na śodhayet.
separated_sandhi: trikoṇeṣu ca yat nyūnam tat tulyam triṣu śodhayeḥ| ekasmin bhavane śūnyam tat trikoṇam na śodhayeḥ
english: And whatever amount is deficient among the trines, that equivalent amount should be subtracted from all three (trine signs). If there is a zero in one house, that particular trine should not be subject to this subtraction (śodhana).

sanskrit: समत्वे सर्वगेहेषु सर्वं संशोधयेद् बुधः । पश्चात् विपश्चिता कार्यमेकाधिपतिशोधनम् ॥५॥
transliteration: samatve sarvageheṣu sarvaṃ saṃśodhayed budhaḥ . paścāt vipaścitā kāryamekādhipatiśodhanam.
separated_sandhi: samatve sarvageheṣu sarvam saṃśodhayeḥ budhaḥ| paścāt vipaścitā kāryam ekādhipatiśodhanam
english: If there is equality (samatva) in all the houses, the wise person (budha) should subtract all. Afterwards, the expert should perform the reduction (śodhana) based on the single lord (ekādhipati).

sanskrit: पूर्वं त्रिकोणं संशोध्य राशीनां स्थापयेत् फलम् । पृथक् पृथक् ततः कुर्यादेकाधिपतिशोधनम् ॥१॥
transliteration: pūrvaṃ trikoṇaṃ saṃśodhya rāśīnāṃ sthāpayet phalam . pṛthak pṛthak tataḥ kuryādekādhipatiśodhanam.
separated_sandhi: pūrvam trikoṇam saṃśodhya rāśīnām sthāpayeḥ phalam| pṛthak pṛthak tataḥ kuryāt ekādhipatiśodhanam
english: First, after completing the trine reduction (śodhana), one should establish the results of the signs (rāśi). Then, one should perform the reduction (śodhana) related to the single lord (ekādhipati) for each sign separately.

sanskrit: क्षेत्रद्वये फलनि स्युस्तदा संशोधयेद् यथा । क्षीणेन सह चान्यस्मिन् शुधयेद् ग्रहवर्जिते ॥२॥
transliteration: kṣetradvaye phalani syustadā saṃśodhayed yathā . kṣīṇena saha cānyasmin śudhayed grahavarjite.
separated_sandhi: kṣetradvaye phalani syuḥ tadā saṃśodhayet yathākṣīṇena saha ca anyasmin śudhayet grahavarjite
english: If results are present in two houses, one should rectify them as follows: one should adjust (the results) in the house devoid of planets by taking into account the diminished (planetary influence) in the other (house).

sanskrit: उभयोर्ग्रहसंयोगे न संशोध्यः कदाचन् । ग्रहयुक्ते फलैर्हीने ग्रहाभावे फलाधिके ॥३॥
transliteration: ubhayorgrahasaṃyoge na saṃśodhyaḥ kadācan . grahayukte phalairhīne grahābhāve phalādhike.
separated_sandhi: ubhayoḥ grahasaṃyoge na saṃśodhyaḥ kadācangrahayukte phalaiḥ hīne grahābhāve phalādhike
english: When there is a conjunction of planets in both (houses), rectification should never be performed. (Consider cases such as) a house with planets having deficient results, or a house devoid of planets having abundant results.

sanskrit: ऊनेन सममन्यस्मिन् शोधयेद् ग्रहवर्जिते । फलाधिके ग्रहैर्युक्ते चान्यस्मिन् सर्वमुत्सृजेत् ॥४॥
transliteration: ūnena samamanyasmin śodhayed grahavarjite . phalādhike grahairyukte cānyasmin sarvamutsṛjet.
separated_sandhi: ūnena samam anyasmin śodhayet grahavarjitephalādhike grahaiḥ yukte ca anyasmin sarvam utsṛjet
english: In the other house that is devoid of planets, one should rectify (the results) considering them equally with the deficient (result or influence). If a house has abundant results and is conjoined with planets, and there is also another (house to consider), one should abandon all (rectification efforts).

sanskrit: उभयत्र ग्रहभावे समत्वे सकलं त्यजेत् । सग्रहाग्रहयोस्तुल्ये सर्वं संशोध्यमग्रहे ॥५॥
transliteration: ubhayatra grahabhāve samatve sakalaṃ tyajet . sagrahāgrahayostulye sarvaṃ saṃśodhyamagrahe.
separated_sandhi: ubhayatra grahabhāve samatve sakalam tyajetsagrahāgrahayoḥ tulye sarvam saṃśodhyam agrahe
english: In both (houses), if planets are present and their results are equal, one should abandon everything (rectification). When the house with planets and the house without planets have equal results, everything should be rectified in the house devoid of planets.

sanskrit: कुलीरसिंहयो राश्योः पृथक् क्षेत्रं पृथक् फलम् । संशोध्यैकाधिपत्यं हि ततः पिण्डं प्रसाधयेत् ॥६॥
transliteration: kulīrasiṃhayo rāśyoḥ pṛthak kṣetraṃ pṛthak phalam . saṃśodhyaikādhipatyaṃ hi tataḥ piṇḍaṃ prasādhayet.
separated_sandhi: kulīrasiṃhayoḥ rāśyoḥ pṛthak kṣetram pṛthak phalamsaṃśodhya ekādhipatyam hi tataḥ piṇḍam prasādhayet
english: For the two signs, Cancer and Leo, there is a distinct domain and a distinct outcome. After properly calculating their single rulership, one should then ascertain the aggregate (piṇḍa).

sanskrit: एवं शोध्यावशेषाङ्कं राशिमानेन वर्द्धयेत् । ग्रहयुक्ते च तद्राशौ ग्रहमानेन वर्द्धयेत् ॥१॥
transliteration: evaṃ śodhyāvaśeṣāṅkaṃ rāśimānena varddhayet . grahayukte ca tadrāśau grahamānena varddhayet.
separated_sandhi: evam śodhya-avaśeṣa-aṅkam rāśi-mānena varddhayetgraha-yukte ca tat-rāśau graha-mānena varddhayet
english: Thus, one should multiply the remaining rectified digit by the measure of the sign. And when a planet is associated with that sign, one should multiply by the measure of the planet.

sanskrit: सर्वेषां च पुनर्योगः पिण्डाख्यः कथ्यते द्विज । गोसिंहौ दशभिर्गुण्यौ वसुभिर्युग्मवृश्चिकौ ॥२॥
transliteration: sarveṣāṃ ca punaryogaḥ piṇḍākhyaḥ kathyate dvija . gosiṃhau daśabhirguṇyau vasubhiryugmavṛścikau.
separated_sandhi: sarveṣām ca punar yogaḥ piṇḍākhyaḥ kathyate dvijago-siṃhau daśabhiḥ guṇyau vasubhiḥ yugma-vṛścikau
english: And again, O twice-born (dvija), the sum total (yoga) of all is declared, which is known as piṇḍa. Taurus and Leo should be multiplied by ten, and Gemini and Scorpio by eight.

sanskrit: सप्तभिस्तुलमेषौ च मृगकन्ये च पञ्चभिः । शेषाः स्वसंख्यया गुण्या ग्रहमानमथोच्यते ॥३॥
transliteration: saptabhistulameṣau ca mṛgakanye ca pañcabhiḥ . śeṣāḥ svasaṃkhyayā guṇyā grahamānamathocyate.
separated_sandhi: saptabhiḥ tulā-meṣau ca mṛga-kanye ca pañcabhiḥśeṣāḥ sva-saṃkhyayā guṇyāḥ graha-mānam atha ucyate
english: Libra and Aries should be multiplied by seven, and Capricorn and Virgo by five. The remaining signs should be multiplied by their own intrinsic numerical value. Now, the measure of the planets is declared.

sanskrit: जीवारशुक्रसौम्यानां दशाष्टनगसायकाः । पञ्च शेषग्रहाणां च मानं प्रोक्तमिदं क्रमात् ॥४॥
transliteration: jīvāraśukrasaumyānāṃ daśāṣṭanagasāyakāḥ . pañca śeṣagrahāṇāṃ ca mānaṃ proktamidaṃ kramāt.
separated_sandhi: jīvārasukrasaumyānām daśa aṣṭa naga sāyakāḥ |pañca śeṣagrahāṇām ca mānam proktam idam kramāt
english: The durations (daśā) for Jupiter, Mars, Venus, and Mercury are stated to be ten, eight, seven, and five (years) respectively. This measure is declared successively, with five (years) for the remaining planets.

sanskrit: आत्मस्वभावशक्तिश्च पितृचिन्ता रवेः फलम् । मनोबुद्धिप्रसादश्च मातृचिन्ता मृगाङ्कतः ॥१॥
transliteration: ātmasvabhāvaśaktiśca pitṛcintā raveḥ phalam . manobuddhiprasādaśca mātṛcintā mṛgāṅkataḥ.
separated_sandhi: ātmasvabhāvaśaktiḥ ca pitṛcintā raveḥ phalam| manobuddhiprasādaḥ ca mātṛcintā mṛgāṅkataḥ
english: The Sun indicates one's intrinsic nature (ātman), disposition, capacity (śakti), and paternal matters. The Moon indicates the tranquility of mind and intellect, and maternal matters.

sanskrit: भ्रातृसत्त्वं गुणं भूमिं भौमेनैव विचिन्तयेत् । वाणिज्यकर्म वृत्तिश्च सुहृदं च बुधेन तु ॥२॥
transliteration: bhrātṛsattvaṃ guṇaṃ bhūmiṃ bhaumenaiva vicintayet . vāṇijyakarma vṛttiśca suhṛdaṃ ca budhena tu.
separated_sandhi: bhrātṛsattvam guṇam bhūmim bhaumena eva vicintayet| vāṇijyakarma vṛttiḥ ca suhṛdam ca budhena tu
english: One should specifically consider matters related to siblings, courage, qualities, and land from Mars. However, business activities, livelihood, and friends should be considered from Mercury.

sanskrit: गुरुणा देहपुष्टिञ्च विद्या पुत्रार्थसम्पदः । भृगोर्विवाहकर्माणि भोगस्थान च वाहनम् ॥३॥
transliteration: guruṇā dehapuṣṭiñca vidyā putrārthasampadaḥ . bhṛgorvivāhakarmāṇi bhogasthāna ca vāhanam.
separated_sandhi: guruṇā dehapuṣṭiḥ ca vidyā putrārthasampadaḥ| bhṛgoḥ vivāhakarmāṇi bhogasthānam ca vāhanam
english: From Jupiter, one should consider body strength, knowledge, progeny, wealth, and prosperity. From Venus, one should consider marriage affairs, places of enjoyment, and vehicles.

sanskrit: वेश्यास्त्रीजनसंयोगं शुक्रेण च निरीक्षयेत् । आयुश्च जीवनोपायं दुःखशोक भयानि च ॥४॥
transliteration: veśyāstrījanasaṃyogaṃ śukreṇa ca nirīkṣayet . āyuśca jīvanopāyaṃ duḥkhaśoka bhayāni ca.
separated_sandhi: veśyāstrījanasaṃyogam śukreṇa ca nirīkṣayetāyuḥ ca jīvanopāyam duḥkhaśoka bhayāni ca
english: One should examine (or predict) association with prostitutes and women through Venus. Longevity, means of livelihood, and also sorrows, grief, and fears (should be observed).

sanskrit: सर्वक्षयं च मरणं मन्देनैव निरीक्षयेत् । तत्तद्भावफलाङ्केन गुणयेद् योगपिण्डकम् ॥५॥
transliteration: sarvakṣayaṃ ca maraṇaṃ mandenaiva nirīkṣayet . tattadbhāvaphalāṅkena guṇayed yogapiṇḍakam.
separated_sandhi: sarvakṣayam ca maraṇam mandena eva nirīkṣayettattadbhāvaphalaṅkena guṇayet yogapiṇḍakam
english: One should examine (or predict) all destruction and death specifically through Saturn (manda). One should multiply the aggregate sum (yoga piṇḍaka) by the numerical value of the results of each respective house (bhāva).

sanskrit: सप्तविंशओधृतं शेषतुल्यर्क्षे याति भानुजः । यदा तदा तस्य तस्य भावस्यार्ति विनिर्दिशेत् ॥६॥
transliteration: saptaviṃśaodhṛtaṃ śeṣatulyarkṣe yāti bhānujaḥ . yadā tadā tasya tasya bhāvasyārti vinirdiśet.
separated_sandhi: saptaviṃśa udhṛtam śeṣatulya ṛkṣe yāti bhānujaḥyadā tadā tasya tasya bhāvasya ārti vinirdiśet
english: When Saturn (bhānuja) moves into the constellation (ṛkṣa) corresponding to the remainder obtained after dividing by twenty-seven, then one should predict affliction (ārti) for that particular house (bhāva).

sanskrit: अर्काश्रितर्क्षान्नवमो राशिः पितृ गृहं स्मृतम् । तद्राशिफलसंख्याभिर्वर्धयेद् योगपिण्डकम् ॥७॥
transliteration: arkāśritarkṣānnavamo rāśiḥ pitṛ gṛhaṃ smṛtam . tadrāśiphalasaṃkhyābhirvardhayed yogapiṇḍakam.
separated_sandhi: arka-āśrita-ṛkṣāt navamaḥ rāśiḥ pitṛ gṛham smṛtamtat-rāśi-phala-saṃkhyābhiḥ vardhayet yogapiṇḍakam
english: The ninth house (rāśi) from the constellation (ṛkṣa) occupied by the Sun (arka) is considered the house of the father (pitṛ gṛha). One should increase (or multiply) the aggregate sum (yoga piṇḍaka) with the numerical values of the results of those signs (rāśi).

sanskrit: विभजेत् सप्तविंशत्या शेषर्क्षे याति भानुजः । यदा तदा पितृक्लेशो भवतीति न संशयः ॥८॥
transliteration: vibhajet saptaviṃśatyā śeṣarkṣe yāti bhānujaḥ . yadā tadā pitṛkleśo bhavatīti na saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: vibhajet saptaviṃśatyā śeṣarkṣe yāti bhānujaḥyadā tadā pitṛkleśaḥ bhavati iti na saṃśayaḥ
english: When Saturn (bhānuja) moves into the constellation (nakṣatra) indicated by the remainder after (a certain value) is divided by twenty-seven, then undoubtedly, the father experiences distress (pitṛkleśa).

sanskrit: तत्त्रिकोणगते वापि पिता पितृसमोऽपि वा । मरणं तस्य जानीयात् पीडां वा महतीं वदेत् ॥९॥
transliteration: tattrikoṇagate vāpi pitā pitṛsamo'pi vā . maraṇaṃ tasya jānīyāt pīḍāṃ vā mahatīṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: tat trikoṇagate vā api pitā pitṛsamaḥ api vāmaraṇam tasya jānīyāt pīḍām vā mahatīm vadet
english: Or, when it (Saturn) is situated in a trine (trikoṇa) to that (same) constellation, one should predict either the death of the father or a father-like person, or declare great affliction (pīḍā) for them.

sanskrit: गुणयेद् योगपिण्डं वा तद्राशिफलसंख्यया । अर्कोद्धृतावशेषर्क्षे यदा गच्छति भानुजः ॥१०॥
transliteration: guṇayed yogapiṇḍaṃ vā tadrāśiphalasaṃkhyayā . arkoddhṛtāvaśeṣarkṣe yadā gacchati bhānujaḥ.
separated_sandhi: guṇayet yogapiṇḍam vā tadrāśiphalasaṃkhyayāarka uddhṛta avaśeṣarkṣe yadā gacchati bhānujaḥ
english: Alternatively, one should multiply the combined sum (yogapiṇḍa) by the numerical value of the fruit of that zodiac sign. Or, when Saturn (bhānuja) moves into the constellation (nakṣatra) that remains after (a certain value is) divided by twelve (arka)...

sanskrit: तत्त्रिकोणर्क्षकं वापि पितृकष्टं तदा वदेत् । रिष्टप्रददशायां तु मरणं कष्टमन्यदा ॥११॥
transliteration: tattrikoṇarkṣakaṃ vāpi pitṛkaṣṭaṃ tadā vadet . riṣṭapradadaśāyāṃ tu maraṇaṃ kaṣṭamanyadā.
separated_sandhi: tat trikoṇarkṣakam vā api pitṛkaṣṭam tadā vadetriṣṭapradadaśāyām tu maraṇam kaṣṭam anyadā
english: When it (Saturn) is in the trine constellation (to the calculated one), then one should predict distress (kaṣṭa) for the father. However, if this occurs during a period (daśā) that bestows misfortune (riṣṭa), then death (maraṇa) should be predicted; otherwise, at other times, only general suffering (kaṣṭa).

sanskrit: अर्कात्तु तुर्यगे राहौ मन्दे वा भूमिनन्दने । गुरुशुक्रेक्षणमृते पितृहा जायते नरः ॥१२॥
transliteration: arkāttu turyage rāhau mande vā bhūminandane . guruśukrekṣaṇamṛte pitṛhā jāyate naraḥ.
separated_sandhi: arkāt tu turyage rāhau mande vā bhūminandaneguruśukrekṣaṇam ṛte pitṛhā jāyate naraḥ
english: When Rahu, Saturn (manda), or Mars (bhūminandana) occupies the fourth house from the Sun, and there is no aspect from Jupiter (guru) and Venus (śukra), a person becomes a killer of his father.

sanskrit: लग्नात् चन्द्राद् गुरुस्थाने याते सूय्रसुतेऽथवा । पापैर्दृष्टे युते वापि पितृनाशं वदेद् बुधः ॥१३॥
transliteration: lagnāt candrād gurusthāne yāte sūyrasute'thavā . pāpairdṛṣṭe yute vāpi pitṛnāśaṃ vaded budhaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagnāt candrāt gurusthāne yāte sūryasute athavāpāpaiḥ dṛṣṭe yute vā api pitṛnāśam vadet budhaḥ
english: If Saturn (sūryasuta) goes to the ninth house (gurusthāna) from either the ascendant (lagna) or the Moon, and is aspected or conjoined by malefic planets (pāpaiḥ), a wise astrologer (budhaḥ) should predict the demise of the father.

sanskrit: लग्नात् सुखेश्वरारिष्टदशाकाले पितृक्षयः । अनुकूलदशाकाले नेति चिन्त्यं विचक्षणैः ॥१४॥
transliteration: lagnāt sukheśvarāriṣṭadaśākāle pitṛkṣayaḥ . anukūladaśākāle neti cintyaṃ vicakṣaṇaiḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagnāt sukheśvarāriṣṭadaśākāle pitṛkṣayaḥanukūladaśākāle na iti cintyam vicakṣaṇaiḥ
english: The demise of the father (pitṛkṣaya) occurs during an inauspicious planetary period (daśākāla) of the lord of the fourth house (sukheśvara) from the ascendant (lagna). Wise astrologers (vicakṣaṇaiḥ) should consider that this does not happen during a favorable planetary period (anukūladaśākāle).

sanskrit: पितृजन्माष्टमे जातस्तदीशे लग्नगेऽपि वा । करोति पितृकार्याणि स एवात्र न संशयः ॥१५॥
transliteration: pitṛjanmāṣṭame jātastadīśe lagnage'pi vā . karoti pitṛkāryāṇi sa evātra na saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: pitṛjanmāṣṭame jātaḥ tadīśe lagnage api vākaroti pitṛkāryāṇi saḥ eva atra na saṃśayaḥ
english: If a person is born such that a planet is positioned in the eighth house from the father's natal ascendant or Moon sign, and the lord of that eighth house is also in the native's ascendant, then that very person undoubtedly performs the ancestral rites (pitṛkāryāṇi) for his father.

sanskrit: सुखनाथदशायान्तु सुखप्राप्तेश्च संभवः । सुखेशे लग्नलाभस्थे चन्द्रस्थानाद् विशेषतः । पितृगेहसमायुक्ते जातः पितृवशानुगः ॥१६॥
transliteration: sukhanāthadaśāyāntu sukhaprāpteśca saṃbhavaḥ . sukheśe lagnalābhasthe candrasthānād viśeṣataḥ . pitṛgehasamāyukte jātaḥ pitṛvaśānugaḥ.
separated_sandhi: sukhanāthadaśāyām tu sukhaprāpteḥca saṃbhavaḥ sukheśe lagnalābhastecandrasthānāt viśeṣataḥpitṛgehasamāyukte jātaḥ pitṛvaśānugaḥ
english: When the lord of happiness (sukheśa) is situated in the Ascendant (lagna) or a house of gain (lābha), especially when considered from the Moon's position, then during the planetary period (daśā) of the lord of happiness (sukhanātha), there is a possibility of attaining happiness. If a native is born with [their chart's significant points] associated with the father's house (pitṛgeha), they become subservient to their father.

sanskrit: पितृजन्मतृतीयर्क्षे जातः पितृधनाश्रितः । पितृकर्मगृहे जातः पितृतुल्यगुणान्वितः ॥१७॥
transliteration: pitṛjanmatṛtīyarkṣe jātaḥ pitṛdhanāśritaḥ . pitṛkarmagṛhe jātaḥ pitṛtulyaguṇānvitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: pitṛjanmatṛtīyarkṣe jātaḥ pitṛdhanāśritaḥpitṛkarmagṛhe jātaḥ pitṛtulyaguṇānvitaḥ
english: If a native is born when their birth lunar mansion (nakṣatra) is the third from their father's birth lunar mansion (nakṣatra), they become dependent on their father's wealth. If a native is born with [their chart associated with] the house of the father's actions (karma), they are endowed with qualities similar to their father.

sanskrit: तदीशे लग्नसंस्थेऽपि पितृश्रेष्ठो भवेन्नरः । एवं पूर्वक्तसामान्यफलं चात्रापि चिन्तयेत् ॥१८॥
transliteration: tadīśe lagnasaṃsthe'pi pitṛśreṣṭho bhavennaraḥ . evaṃ pūrvaktasāmānyaphalaṃ cātrāpi cintayet.
separated_sandhi: tadīśe lagnasaṃsthe api pitṛśreṣṭhaḥ bhavet naraḥevam pūrvoktasāmānyaphalam ca atra api cintayet
english: Even if the lord of that [father's house] is situated in the Ascendant (lagna), the native becomes superior to his father. Similarly, one should also consider the general results previously mentioned in this context.

sanskrit: सूर्याष्टवर्गे यञ्छून्यं तन्मासे वस्तरेऽपि च । विवाहव्रतचूडादि शुभकर्म परित्यजेत् ॥१९॥
transliteration: sūryāṣṭavarge yañchūnyaṃ tanmāse vastare'pi ca . vivāhavratacūḍādi śubhakarma parityajet.
separated_sandhi: sūryāṣṭavarge yat śūnyam tat māse vatsare apica vivāhavratacūḍādi śubhakarma parityajet
english: In whichever month and year the Aṣṭakavarga of the Sun (Sūryāṣṭakavarga) yields a zero score for a particular sign, one should avoid auspicious activities (śubhakarma) such as marriage (vivāha), taking vows (vrata), and tonsure (cūḍā).

sanskrit: यत्र रेखाधिका तत्र मासे संवचरेऽपि च । अनिष्टेऽपि रवौ जीवे शुभकर्म समाचरेत् ॥२०॥
transliteration: yatra rekhādhikā tatra māse saṃvacare'pi ca . aniṣṭe'pi ravau jīve śubhakarma samācaret.
separated_sandhi: yatra rekhādhikā tatra māse saṃvatsare api caaniṣṭe api ravau jīve śubhakarma samācaret
english: When there is an abundance of auspicious points in a month or a year (in an astrological chart), even if the Sun (Ravi) and Jupiter (Jīva) are otherwise inauspicious, one should still perform auspicious deeds (karma).

sanskrit: एवं चन्द्राष्टवर्गे च यत्र शून्यं भवेद् बहु । तत्र तत्र गते चन्द्रे शुभं कर्मं परित्यजेत् ॥२१॥
transliteration: evaṃ candrāṣṭavarge ca yatra śūnyaṃ bhaved bahu . tatra tatra gate candre śubhaṃ karmaṃ parityajet.
separated_sandhi: evam candrāṣṭavarge ca yatra śūnyam bhavet bahutatra tatra gate candre śubham karma parityajet
english: Similarly, in the Moon's Aṣṭakavarga, where there are many zeros (inauspicious points), when the Moon transits those specific places, one should avoid performing auspicious deeds (karma).

sanskrit: चन्द्राच्चतुर्थो मातृप्रसादग्रामचिन्तनम् । चन्द्रात् सुखफलं पिण्डं वर्द्धयेद् भैश्च सम्भजेत् ॥२२॥
transliteration: candrāccaturtho mātṛprasādagrāmacintanam . candrāt sukhaphalaṃ piṇḍaṃ varddhayed bhaiśca sambhajet.
separated_sandhi: candrāt caturthaḥ mātṛprasādagrāmacintanam candrātsukhaphalam piṇḍam vardhayet bhaiḥ ca sambhajet
english: The fourth house from the Moon signifies the mother's favor and matters concerning the village. From the Moon, one should increase the aggregate (piṇḍa) of auspicious results related to happiness, and assess it through the planets (bha).

sanskrit: शेषमृक्षं शनौ याते मातृहानिं विनिर्दिशेत् । तत्त्रिकोणगते चापि शनौ मातृरुजं वदेत् ॥२३॥
transliteration: śeṣamṛkṣaṃ śanau yāte mātṛhāniṃ vinirdiśet . tattrikoṇagate cāpi śanau mātṛrujaṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: śeṣam ṛkṣam śanau yāte mātṛhānim vinirdiśettat trikoṇagate ca api śanau mātṛrujam vadet
english: When Saturn (Śani) transits a specific constellation or sign (ṛkṣa), one should predict the loss of the mother. And also, when Saturn is situated in a trine to that (constellation or sign), one should declare the mother's illness.

sanskrit: भौमाष्टवर्गे संचिन्त्यं भ्रातृविक्रमधैर्यकम् । कुजाश्रितात् तृतीयर्क्षं बुधैर्भ्रातृगृहं स्मृतम् ॥२४॥
transliteration: bhaumāṣṭavarge saṃcintyaṃ bhrātṛvikramadhairyakam . kujāśritāt tṛtīyarkṣaṃ budhairbhrātṛgṛhaṃ smṛtam.
separated_sandhi: bhaumāṣṭavarge sañcintyam bhrātṛvikramadhairyakamkujāśritāt tṛtīyarkṣam budhaiḥ bhrātṛgṛham smṛtam
english: One should evaluate matters concerning siblings, valor, and courage using the aṣṭakavarga of Mars. The wise remember the third house from the sign occupied by Mars as the house of siblings.

sanskrit: त्रिकोणशोधनं कृत्वा यत्र स्यादधिकं फलम् । भूमेर्लाभोऽत्र भार्याया भ्रातृणां सुखमुत्तमम् ॥२५॥
transliteration: trikoṇaśodhanaṃ kṛtvā yatra syādadhikaṃ phalam . bhūmerlābho'tra bhāryāyā bhrātṛṇāṃ sukhamuttamam.
separated_sandhi: trikoṇaśodhanam kṛtvā yatra syāt adhikam phalambhūmeḥ lābhaḥ atra bhāryāyāḥ bhrātṛṇām sukham uttamam
english: Having performed the purification of the trine houses, where there is an abundant result, there will be gain of land, and supreme happiness for the wife and siblings.

sanskrit: भौमो बलविहीनश्चद् दीर्घायुर्भातृको भवेत् । फलानि यत्र क्षीयन्ते तत्र भौमे गते क्षतिह् ॥२६॥
transliteration: bhaumo balavihīnaścad dīrghāyurbhātṛko bhavet . phalāni yatra kṣīyante tatra bhaume gate kṣatih.
separated_sandhi: bhaumaḥ balavihīnaḥ cet dīrghāyurbhrātṛkaḥ bhavetphalāni yatra kṣīyante tatra bhaume gate kṣatiḥ
english: If Mars is weak, one's siblings will have long lives. However, if Mars is situated in a place where the beneficial results are diminished, then there will be loss.

sanskrit: तृतीयर्क्षफलेनाथ पिण्डं सम्बर्ध्य पूर्ववत् । शेषमृक्षं शनौ याते भ्रातृकष्टं विनिर्दिशेत् ॥२७॥
transliteration: tṛtīyarkṣaphalenātha piṇḍaṃ sambardhya pūrvavat . śeṣamṛkṣaṃ śanau yāte bhrātṛkaṣṭaṃ vinirdiśet.
separated_sandhi: tṛtīyarkṣaphalena atha piṇḍam sambardhya pūrvavatśeṣam ṛkṣam śanau yāte bhrātṛkaṣṭam vinirdiśet
english: Then, having increased the total sum as before with the results of the third house, one should predict distress for siblings when Saturn is situated in the remaining sign (ṛkṣa).

sanskrit: बुधात्तुर्ये कुटुम्बं च मातुलं मित्रमेव च । बुधे फलाधिके राशौ गते तीषां सुखं दिशेत् ॥२८॥
transliteration: budhātturye kuṭumbaṃ ca mātulaṃ mitrameva ca . budhe phalādhike rāśau gate tīṣāṃ sukhaṃ diśet.
separated_sandhi: budhāt turye kuṭumbam ca mātulam mitram eva cabudhe phalādhike rāśau gate teṣām sukham diśet
english: The fourth house from Mercury indicates family, maternal uncles, and friends. When Mercury (budha) is situated in a sign (rāśau) yielding abundant auspicious results (phalādhike), one should predict happiness for these people.

sanskrit: बुधाष्टवर्गं संशोध्य शेषमृक्षं गते शनौ । कष्टं कुटुम्बमित्राणां मातुलानां च निर्दिशेत् ॥२९॥
transliteration: budhāṣṭavargaṃ saṃśodhya śeṣamṛkṣaṃ gate śanau . kaṣṭaṃ kuṭumbamitrāṇāṃ mātulānāṃ ca nirdiśet.
separated_sandhi: budhāṣṭavargam saṃśodhya śeṣam ṛkṣam gate śanaukaṣṭam kuṭumbamitrāṇām mātulānām ca nirdiśet
english: After adjusting the Aṣṭakavarga of Mercury, when Saturn (śani) transits into the remaining sign (ṛkṣa), one should predict difficulties (kaṣṭa) for family, friends, and maternal uncles.

sanskrit: जीवात् पञ्चमतो ज्ञानं धर्मं पुत्रं च चिन्तयेत् । तस्मिन् फलाधिके राशौ सन्तानस्य सुखं दिशेत् ॥३०॥
transliteration: jīvāt pañcamato jñānaṃ dharmaṃ putraṃ ca cintayet . tasmin phalādhike rāśau santānasya sukhaṃ diśet.
separated_sandhi: jīvāt pañcamataḥ jñānam dharmam putram ca cintayettasmin phalādhike rāśau santānasya sukham diśet
english: From Jupiter (jīva), one should consider the fifth house for knowledge (jñāna), (natural law) (dharma), and children. When Jupiter (jīva) is situated in a sign (rāśau) yielding abundant auspicious results (phalādhike), one should predict happiness for one's progeny (santāna).

sanskrit: बृहस्पतेः सुतस्थाने फलं यत्संख्यकं भवेत् । शत्रुनीचग्रहं त्यक्त्वा तावती सन्ततिर्ध्रुवा ॥३१॥
transliteration: bṛhaspateḥ sutasthāne phalaṃ yatsaṃkhyakaṃ bhavet . śatrunīcagrahaṃ tyaktvā tāvatī santatirdhruvā.
separated_sandhi: bṛhaspateḥ sutasthāne phalam yat saṃkhyakam bhavetśatrunīcagraham tyaktvā tāvatī santatiḥ dhruvā
english: Whatever number of auspicious points (phala) are present in the fifth house (sutasthāne) from Jupiter (bṛhaspati), having excluded (tyaktvā) inimical and debilitated planets (śatrunīcagraha), that exact number of children (santati) is certain (dhruvā).

sanskrit: सुतभेशनवांशैश्च तुल्या वा सन्ततिर्भवेत् । सुतभावफलेनैवं पिण्डं संगुण्य पूर्ववत् ॥३२॥
transliteration: sutabheśanavāṃśaiśca tulyā vā santatirbhavet . sutabhāvaphalenaivaṃ piṇḍaṃ saṃguṇya pūrvavat.
separated_sandhi: sutabhāveśanavāṃśaiḥ ca tulyā vā santatiḥ bhavetsutabhāvaphaleana evam piṇḍam saṅguṇya pūrvavat
english: The number of children may be equivalent to the lord of the fifth house and its navāṃśa. Similarly, one should multiply the piṇḍa by the result of the fifth house, just as previously described.

sanskrit: पुत्रकष्टं विजानीयात् शेषमृक्षं गते शनौ । एवं धर्मं च विद्यां च कल्पयेत् कालचित्तमः ॥३३॥
transliteration: putrakaṣṭaṃ vijānīyāt śeṣamṛkṣaṃ gate śanau . evaṃ dharmaṃ ca vidyāṃ ca kalpayet kālacittamaḥ.
separated_sandhi: putrakaṣṭam vijānīyāt śeṣam ṛkṣam gate śanauevam dharmam ca vidyām ca kalpayet kālacittamāḥ
english: One should understand distress concerning children when Saturn enters the remaining sign. Similarly, an astrologer, who is most skilled in understanding time, should determine matters related to one's intrinsic nature (dharma) and knowledge.

sanskrit: शत्रुस्याकष्टवर्गं च निक्षिप्याकाशचारिषु । यत्र यत्र फलानि स्युर्भूयांसि कलि तत्र तु ॥३४॥
transliteration: śatrusyākaṣṭavargaṃ ca nikṣipyākāśacāriṣu . yatra yatra phalāni syurbhūyāṃsi kali tatra tu.
separated_sandhi: śatrusya ākaṣṭavargam ca nikṣipya ākāśacāriṣuyatra yatra phalāni syuḥ bhūyāṃsi kali tatra tu
english: One should assign the afflicted divisional chart (varga) related to enemies to the planets (ākāśacārī). Wherever the astrological results are most abundant, there will certainly be disputes or troubles.

sanskrit: वित्तं कलत्रं भूमिं च तत्तद्देशाद् विनिर्दिशेत् । शुक्राज्जामित्रतो दारलब्धिश्चिन्त्या विचक्षणैः ॥३५॥
transliteration: vittaṃ kalatraṃ bhūmiṃ ca tattaddeśād vinirdiśet . śukrājjāmitrato dāralabdhiścintyā vicakṣaṇaiḥ.
separated_sandhi: vittam kalatram bhūmim ca tat tat deśāt vinirdiśetśukrāt jāmitrataḥ dāralabdhiḥ cintyā vicakṣaṇaiḥ
english: One should determine wealth, spouse, and land from their respective astrological houses. Furthermore, the wise astrologers should consider the acquisition of a spouse from Venus and the seventh house.

sanskrit: जामित्रतत्त्रिकोणस्थराशिदिग्देशसम्भवा । सुखेदुःखे स्त्रियाश्चिन्त्ये पिण्डं संवर्ध्य पूर्ववत् ॥३६॥
transliteration: jāmitratattrikoṇastharāśidigdeśasambhavā . sukheduḥkhe striyāścintye piṇḍaṃ saṃvardhya pūrvavat.
separated_sandhi: jāmitratattrikoṇasthāśididgdeśasambhavā sukheduḥkhestriyāḥ cintye piṇḍam saṃvardhya pūrvavat
english: The happiness and sorrow of a woman should be considered, based on factors arising from the house of marriage (jāmitra), its trine houses, and the associated signs, directions, and regions. This is done by accumulating the total (piṇḍa) as previously described.

sanskrit: सनैश्चराश्रितस्थानादष्टमं मृत्युभं स्मृतम् । तदेव चायुषः स्थानं तस्मादायुर्विचिन्तयेत् ॥३७॥
transliteration: sanaiścarāśritasthānādaṣṭamaṃ mṛtyubhaṃ smṛtam . tadeva cāyuṣaḥ sthānaṃ tasmādāyurvicintayet.
separated_sandhi: śanaiścarāśritasthānāt aṣṭamam mṛtyubham smṛtamtat eva ca āyuṣaḥ sthānam tasmāt āyuḥ vicintayet
english: The eighth house from the position occupied by Saturn (śanaiścara) is known as the house of death (mṛtyubha). This very house is also the house of longevity (āyuḥ). Therefore, one should meticulously analyze longevity (āyuḥ) from it.

sanskrit: लग्नात्प्रभृति मन्दान्तं फलान्येकत्र कारयेत् । तद्योगफलतुल्याब्दे व्याधिं वैरं समादिशेत् ॥३८॥
transliteration: lagnātprabhṛti mandāntaṃ phalānyekatra kārayet . tadyogaphalatulyābde vyādhiṃ vairaṃ samādiśet.
separated_sandhi: lagnāt prabhṛti manda antam phalāni ekatra kārayettat yoga phala tulya abde vyādhim vairam samādiśet
english: One should consolidate all the planetary results (phalāni) from the ascendant (lagna) up to Saturn (manda). Then, in a year equivalent to the total (yoga) sum of those results, one should predict disease and enmity.

sanskrit: एवं मन्दादिलग्नान्तं फलान्येकत्र योजयेत् । तत्तुल्यवर्षे जातस्य तस्य व्याधिभयं वदेत् ॥३९॥
transliteration: evaṃ mandādilagnāntaṃ phalānyekatra yojayet . tattulyavarṣe jātasya tasya vyādhibhayaṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: evam manda ādi lagna antam phalāni ekatra yojayettat tulya varṣe jātasya tasya vyādhi bhayam vadet
english: In this manner, one should accumulate the results (phalāni) from Saturn (manda) beginning up to the ascendant (lagna). In the year equivalent to that total, one should predict fear of disease for the native.

sanskrit: द्वयोर्योगसमे वर्षे कष्टं मृत्युसमं दिशेत् । दशारिष्टसमायोगो मृत्युरेव न संशयः ॥४०॥
transliteration: dvayoryogasame varṣe kaṣṭaṃ mṛtyusamaṃ diśet . daśāriṣṭasamāyogo mṛtyureva na saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: dvayoḥ yogasame varṣe kaṣṭaṃ mṛtyusamaṃ diśetdaśāriṣṭasamāyogaḥ mṛtyuḥ eva na saṃśayaḥ
english: In a year that corresponds to the combined influence of two [malefic factors], one should predict suffering comparable to death. An alignment of ten malefic indicators (ariṣṭa) in the planetary periods (daśā) certainly signifies death, without a doubt.

sanskrit: पिण्डं संस्थाप्य गुणयेत् शनेरष्टमगैः फलैः । सप्तविंशतिहृच्छेषतुल्यमृक्षं गते शनौ ॥४१॥
transliteration: piṇḍaṃ saṃsthāpya guṇayet śaneraṣṭamagaiḥ phalaiḥ . saptaviṃśatihṛccheṣatulyamṛkṣaṃ gate śanau.
separated_sandhi: piṇḍaṃ saṃsthāpya guṇayet śaneḥ aṣṭamagaiḥ phalaiḥsaptaviṃśatihṛccheṣatulyam ṛkṣaṃ gate śanau
english: Having calculated the astrological sum (piṇḍa), one should multiply it by the numerical results (phala) of Saturn (Śani) related to the eighth position or eight divisions (aṣṭamavarga). When Saturn (Śani) arrives in the lunar mansion (ṛkṣa) corresponding to the remainder obtained after dividing [the result] by twenty-seven, then...

sanskrit: तत्त्रिकोणर्क्षगे वापि जातकस्य मृतिं वदेत् । अर्कहृच्छेषराशौ वा तत्त्रिकोणेऽपि तद् वदेत् ॥४२॥
transliteration: tattrikoṇarkṣage vāpi jātakasya mṛtiṃ vadet . arkahṛccheṣarāśau vā tattrikoṇe'pi tad vadet.
separated_sandhi: tat trikoṇa ṛkṣage vā api jātakasya mṛtiṃ vadetarkahṛccheṣarāśau vā tat trikoṇe api tat vadet
english: Or even if Saturn (Śani) is in a lunar mansion (ṛkṣa) that forms a trine to that [natal] lunar mansion, one should predict the death (mṛti) of the native (jātaka). Alternatively, one should predict that [death] when Saturn (Śani) is in the zodiac sign (rāśi) corresponding to the remainder after dividing [the result] by twelve (arka), or even in its trine.

sanskrit: शनैश्चराष्टवर्गेषु यत्र नास्ति फलं गृहे । तत्र नैव शुभं तस्य यदा याति शनैश्चरः ॥४३॥
transliteration: śanaiścarāṣṭavargeṣu yatra nāsti phalaṃ gṛhe . tatra naiva śubhaṃ tasya yadā yāti śanaiścaraḥ.
separated_sandhi: śanaiścara aṣṭavargeṣu yatra na asti phalaṃ gṛhetatra na eva śubhaṃ tasya yadā yāti śanaiścaraḥ
english: In the aṣṭavarga charts of Saturn (Śanaiścara), where there are no benefic points (phala) in a particular house (gṛha), then when Saturn (Śanaiścara) transits that very house, it is certainly not auspicious (śubha) for the native.

sanskrit: यत्र राशौ शुभाधिक्यं तत्र याते शनैश्चरे । जातकस्य ध्रुवं ज्ञेयं तस्मिन् काले शुभं फलम् ॥४४॥
transliteration: yatra rāśau śubhādhikyaṃ tatra yāte śanaiścare . jātakasya dhruvaṃ jñeyaṃ tasmin kāle śubhaṃ phalam.
separated_sandhi: yatra rāśau śubha-ādhikyam tatra yāte śanaiścare |jātakasya dhruvam jñeyam tasmin kāle śubham phalam
english: When Saturn (śanaiścara) transits into a zodiac sign that has an abundance of benefics, an auspicious outcome for the native should certainly be understood for that period.

sanskrit: अथात्रायुः प्रवक्ष्येऽहमष्टवर्गसमुद्भवम् । दिनद्वयं विरेखायां रेखायां सार्धवासरम् ॥१॥
transliteration: athātrāyuḥ pravakṣye'hamaṣṭavargasamudbhavam . dinadvayaṃ virekhāyāṃ rekhāyāṃ sārdhavāsaram.
separated_sandhi: atha atra āyuḥ pravakṣye aham aṣṭavarga-samudbhavam| dinadvayam virekhāyām rekhāyām sārdha-vāsaram
english: Now, concerning this topic, I will explain the calculation of longevity (āyuḥ) derived from the Aṣṭavarga system. Two days are allotted for a "virēkhā" (a position with zero auspicious points), and one and a half days for a "rēkhā" (a position with one auspicious point).

sanskrit: दिनमेकं द्विरेखायां त्रिरखायां दिनार्धकम् । वेदतुल्यासु रेखासु सार्धसप्तदिनं स्मृतम् ॥२॥
transliteration: dinamekaṃ dvirekhāyāṃ trirakhāyāṃ dinārdhakam . vedatulyāsu rekhāsu sārdhasaptadinaṃ smṛtam.
separated_sandhi: dinam ekam dvirekhāyām trirekhāyām dina-ardhakam| veda-tulyāsu rekhāsu sārdha-sapta-dinam smṛtam
english: One day is assigned for a "dvirekhā" (a position with two auspicious points), and half a day for a "trirekhā" (a position with three points). For positions with auspicious points equal to the Vedas (which means four points), seven and a half days are traditionally assigned.

sanskrit: द्विवर्षं पञ्चरेखासु षड्रेखासु चतुःसमा । षड्वर्षं सप्तरेखासु वसवोऽष्टासु वत्सराः ॥३॥
transliteration: dvivarṣaṃ pañcarekhāsu ṣaḍrekhāsu catuḥsamā . ṣaḍvarṣaṃ saptarekhāsu vasavo'ṣṭāsu vatsarāḥ.
