transliteration: śubhaṃ vā'pyaśubhaṃ vāpi manujasya purākṛtam . asti kaścidupāyaścet taṃ bhavān vaktumarhati.
separated_sandhi: śubham vā api aśubham vā api manuṣasya purākṛtamasti kaścit upāyaḥ cet tam bhavān vaktum arhati
english: If there is any method to discern a person's past actions (karma), whether good or bad, then Your Honor ought to explain it.

sanskrit: साधु पृष्टं त्वया विप्र लोकानुग्रहमानसा । कथयामि तव स्नेहात् फलमज्ञातजन्मनाम् ॥३॥
transliteration: sādhu pṛṣṭaṃ tvayā vipra lokānugrahamānasā . kathayāmi tava snehāt phalamajñātajanmanām.
separated_sandhi: sādhu pṛṣṭam tvayā vipra lokānugrahamānasākathayāmi tava snehāt phalam ajñātajanmanām
english: O Brāhmin, you have asked well, as your mind is intent on benefiting the world. Out of affection, I will tell you the results for those whose birth time is unknown.

sanskrit: वर्षायनर्तुमासार्धतिथिनक्षत्रभादिषु । यदज्ञातं च तन्मानं ज्ञायते प्रश्नलग्नतः ॥४॥
transliteration: varṣāyanartumāsārdhatithinakṣatrabhādiṣu . yadajñātaṃ ca tanmānaṃ jñāyate praśnalagnataḥ.
separated_sandhi: varṣāyanartumāsaardhatithinakṣatrabhādiṣu yatajñātam ca tat mānam jñāyate praśnalagnataḥ
english: Whatever is unknown regarding the year, ayana (half-year), season (ṛtu), month, fortnight, lunar day (tithi), lunar mansion (nakṣatra), zodiacal part (bhā), and so forth, its measure can be ascertained from the ascendant (lagna) of the astrological query (praśna).

sanskrit: प्रश्नाङ्गद्वादशांशर्क्षस्थिते जन्म वदेत् गुरौ । अयनं लग्नपूर्वार्धे सौम्यं याम्यं परार्धके ॥५॥
transliteration: praśnāṅgadvādaśāṃśarkṣasthite janma vadet gurau . ayanaṃ lagnapūrvārdhe saumyaṃ yāmyaṃ parārdhake.
separated_sandhi: praśnāṅgadvādaśāṃśarṣasthite janma vadet gurauayanam lagnapūrvārdhe saumyam yāmyam parārdhake
english: When Jupiter (guru) is situated in the twelfth divisional part (dvādaśāṃśa) of the query's ascendant (lagna) sign, one should declare the birth (janma). The ayana (half-year) is Northern (saumya) if the ascendant (lagna) falls in its first half, and Southern (yāmya) if it falls in its latter half.

sanskrit: ऋतुर्लग्नदृकाणर्क्षस्वामिभिः शशिरादयः । शनिशुक्रकुजेन्दुज्ञजीवैर्ग्रीष्मस्तु भानुना ॥६॥
transliteration: ṛturlagnadṛkāṇarkṣasvāmibhiḥ śaśirādayaḥ . śaniśukrakujendujñajīvairgrīṣmastu bhānunā.
separated_sandhi: ṛtuḥ lagna-dṛkāṇarkṣa-svāmibhiḥ śaśirādayaḥśani-śukra-kuja-indū-jñā-jīvaiḥ grīṣmaḥ tu bhānunā
english: The season (ṛtu) is determined by the lords of the ascendant's (lagna) decanate (dṛkāṇa) and sign/nakṣatra (ṛkṣa), which include the Moon (śaśi), Rāhu, and others. Summer (grīṣma), however, is determined by the Sun (bhānu), while the other seasons are determined by Saturn (śani), Venus (śukra), Mars (kuja), Moon (indu), Mercury (jña), and Jupiter (jīva).

sanskrit: अयनर्तुविरोधे तु परिवर्त्याः परस्परम् । बुधचन्द्र सुराचार्याः कुजशुक्रशनैश्चरैः ॥७॥
transliteration: ayanartuvirodhe tu parivartyāḥ parasparam . budhacandra surācāryāḥ kujaśukraśanaiścaraiḥ.
separated_sandhi: ayana-ṛtu-virodhe tu parivartyāḥ parasparambudha-candra surācāryāḥ kuja-śukra-śanaiścaraiḥ
english: However, in case of a contradiction (virodha) between the ayana (half-year) and the season (ṛtu), Mercury (budha), the Moon (candra), and Jupiter (surācārya) are to be mutually interchanged with Mars (kuja), Venus (śukra), and Saturn (śanaiścara).

sanskrit: मासो दृकाणपूर्वार्धेर्पूर्वोऽन्यस्तु परार्धके । अनुपातात् तिथिर्ज्ञेया भास्करांशसमा द्विज ॥८॥
transliteration: māso dṛkāṇapūrvārdherpūrvo'nyastu parārdhake . anupātāt tithirjñeyā bhāskarāṃśasamā dvija.
separated_sandhi: māsaḥ dṛkāṇapūrvārdheḥ pūrvaḥ anyaḥ tu parārdhakeanupātāt tithiḥ jñeyā bhāskarāṃśasamā dvija
english: O twice-born one (dvija), the month is designated as the former (part) when it is in the first half of a drekkana, and as the other (part) when it is in the latter half. The lunar day (tithi) should be determined proportionally, corresponding to the Sun's divisional portion.

sanskrit: तद्वशादिष्टकालो यो जन्मकालसमो हि सः । तत्र ग्रहांश्च भावांश्च ज्ञात्वा तस्य फलं वदेत् ॥९॥
transliteration: tadvaśādiṣṭakālo yo janmakālasamo hi saḥ . tatra grahāṃśca bhāvāṃśca jñātvā tasya phalaṃ vadet.
separated_sandhi: tadvaśāt iṣṭakālaḥ yaḥ janmakālasamaḥ hi saḥ tatragrahān ca bhāvān ca jñātvā tasya phalam vadet
english: The calculated time (iṣṭakāla), which is indeed equal to the time of birth (janmakāla) based on that [previous calculation], once that is known, one should then ascertain the positions of the planets (graha) and the houses (bhāva) and declare their effects.

sanskrit: गुरुर्द्वादशभ्र्वर्षैः पुनस्तद्राशिगो भवेत् । तत् कस्मिन् पर्ययो तस्य ज्ञेयः संवत्सरो मुने ॥१०॥
transliteration: gururdvādaśabhrvarṣaiḥ punastadrāśigo bhavet . tat kasmin paryayo tasya jñeyaḥ saṃvatsaro mune.
separated_sandhi: guruḥ dvādaśabhiḥ varṣaiḥ punar tadrāśigaḥ bhavettat kasmin paryayaḥ tasya jñeyaḥ saṃvatsaraḥ mune
english: Jupiter (guru) returns to the same zodiacal sign (rāśi) after twelve years. Therefore, O sage (mune), in which revolution should its year be understood?

sanskrit: संवस्तरस्य सन्देहे प्रश्नकर्तुर्द्विजोत्तम । वयोऽनुमानतस्तत्र द्वादश द्वादश क्षिपेत् ॥११॥
transliteration: saṃvastarasya sandehe praśnakarturdvijottama . vayo'numānatastatra dvādaśa dvādaśa kṣipet.
separated_sandhi: saṃvatsarasya sandehe praśnakartuḥ dvijottamavayaḥ anumānataḥ tatra dvādaśa dvādaśa kṣipet
english: O best among twice-born ones (dvijottama), if there is uncertainty about the questioner's year, then one should repeatedly add twelve (years) based on their estimated age.

sanskrit: तत्रापि संशये जाते गुरुर्लग्नत्रिकोणगः । कल्प्यो वयोऽनुमानेन वत्सरः पूर्ववत् ततः ॥१२॥
transliteration: tatrāpi saṃśaye jāte gururlagnatrikoṇagaḥ . kalpyo vayo'numānena vatsaraḥ pūrvavat tataḥ.
separated_sandhi: tatra api saṃśaye jāte guruḥ lagna-trikoṇa-gaḥkalpyaḥ vayas anumānena vatsaraḥ pūrvavat tataḥ
english: Even if doubt arises in that matter, Jupiter, when located in a trine (5th or 9th house) from the ascendant (lagna), should be assumed to determine the year by estimation of age, as was done previously.

sanskrit: ज्ञात्वा मासं ससूर्यांशं कालज्ञानं कथं भवेत् । भगवन्निति मे ब्रूहि लोकानुग्रहचेतसा ॥१३॥
transliteration: jñātvā māsaṃ sasūryāṃśaṃ kālajñānaṃ kathaṃ bhavet . bhagavanniti me brūhi lokānugrahacetasā.
separated_sandhi: jñātvā māsam sa-sūrya-aṃśam kāla-jñānam kathambhavet bhagavan iti me brūhi loka-anugraha-cetasā
english: O venerable one (bhagavan), after ascertaining the month along with the Sun's degree, how is the precise knowledge of time (kālajñāna) determined? Please explain this to me with a mind devoted to bestowing grace upon the people.

sanskrit: सक्रान्तेरिष्टसूर्यांशतुल्येऽह्नि द्विजसत्तम । रविरौदयिकः साध्यस्तस्येष्टार्कस्य चान्तरम् ॥१४॥
transliteration: sakrānteriṣṭasūryāṃśatulye'hni dvijasattama . raviraudayikaḥ sādhyastasyeṣṭārkasya cāntaram.
separated_sandhi: saṅkrānteḥ iṣṭa-sūrya-aṃśa-tulye ahni dvija-sattamaraviḥ audayikaḥ sādhyaḥ tasya iṣṭa-arkasya ca antaram
english: O best among the twice-born (dvija-sattama)! On the day that is equal to the desired solar degree from the moment of the Sun's ingress (saṅkrānti) into a new sign, the Sun's position at sunrise should be calculated, and also the difference between that (calculated) Sun and the desired Sun's position.

sanskrit: कलीकृत्य स्वषण्निघ्नं स्फुटार्कगतिभाजितम् । लब्धंघट्यादिमानं यत् तावान् सूर्योदयात् परम् ॥१५॥
transliteration: kalīkṛtya svaṣaṇnighnaṃ sphuṭārkagatibhājitam . labdhaṃghaṭyādimānaṃ yat tāvān sūryodayāt param.
separated_sandhi: kalī-kṛtya sva-ṣaṭ-nighnam sphuṭa-arka-gati-bhājitamlabdham ghaṭī-ādi-mānam yat tāvān sūrya-udayāt param
english: Having converted (the difference from the previous verse) into minutes (kalīkṛtya), and multiplied it by six, and then divided by the speed of the true Sun, the resulting value (labdham), which is a measure in units like ghaṭīs (ghaṭyādimāna), indicates that much time after sunrise.

sanskrit: पूर्वं जन्मेष्टकालो हि क्रमाज् ज्ञेयो विपश्चिता । साधितौदयिकादर्कादिष्टेऽर्केऽनिकहीनके ॥१६॥
transliteration: pūrvaṃ janmeṣṭakālo hi kramāj jñeyo vipaścitā . sādhitaudayikādarkādiṣṭe'rke'nikahīnake.
separated_sandhi: pūrvam janma iṣṭakālaḥ hi kramāt jñeyaḥ vipaścitā| sādhita audayikāt arkāt iṣṭe arke anikahīnake
english: Indeed, the iṣṭakāla (time from sunrise to birth) of a past birth should be sequentially known by a wise person. This is calculated from the sun's position at its calculated rising until the sun's position at the desired moment of birth, after subtracting the 'anika' adjustment.

sanskrit: अथ विप्र प्रवक्ष्यामि योगं प्रव्रज्यकाभिधम् । प्रव्रजन्ति जना येन सम्प्रदायान्तरं गृहात् ॥१॥
transliteration: atha vipra pravakṣyāmi yogaṃ pravrajyakābhidham . pravrajanti janā yena sampradāyāntaraṃ gṛhāt.
separated_sandhi: atha vipra pravakṣyāmi yogam pravrajyakābhidham| pravrajanti janāḥ yena sampradāyāntaram gṛhāt
english: Now, O Brahmin, I will explain the planetary combination (yoga) called 'Pravrajyaka,' by which people renounce their homes and enter another tradition.

sanskrit: चतुरादिभिरेकस्थैः प्रव्रज्या बलिभिः समाः । रव्यादिभिस्तपस्वी च कपाली रक्तवस्त्रभृत् ॥२॥
transliteration: caturādibhirekasthaiḥ pravrajyā balibhiḥ samāḥ . ravyādibhistapasvī ca kapālī raktavastrabhṛt.
separated_sandhi: caturādibhiḥ ekasthaiḥ pravrajyā balibhiḥ samāḥ| ravyādibhiḥ tapasvī ca kapālī raktavastrabhṛt
english: If four or more powerful planets are situated in a single sign, they cause renunciation (pravrajyā). When the Sun (among them) is the strongest, the person becomes an ascetic (tapasvī), a Kapalika, and wears red garments.

sanskrit: एकदण्डी यतिश्चक्रधरो निर्ग्रन्थिकः क्रमात् । ज्ञेया वीर्याधिकस्यैव सबलेषु बहुष्वपि ॥३॥
transliteration: ekadaṇḍī yatiścakradharo nirgranthikaḥ kramāt . jñeyā vīryādhikasyaiva sabaleṣu bahuṣvapi.
separated_sandhi: ekadaṇḍī yatiḥ cakradharaḥ nirgranthikaḥ kramāt| jñeyā vīryādhikasya eva sabaleṣu bahuṣu api
english: An Ekadaṇḍī (single-staff bearer), a Yati (ascetic), a Cakradhara (discus-bearer), and a Nirgranthika (one without ties) are the types of renunciates to be known in sequence. Such a determination is made based on the strongest planet, even among many powerful ones.

sanskrit: सूर्येणाऽस्तं गतास्ते चेदपि वीर्यसमन्विताः । अदीक्षितास्तदा ज्ञेया जनास्तद्गतभक्तयः ॥४॥
transliteration: sūryeṇā'staṃ gatāste cedapi vīryasamanvitāḥ . adīkṣitāstadā jñeyā janāstadgatabhaktayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: sūryeṇa astam gatāḥ te cet api vīryasamannvitāḥadīkṣitāḥ tadā jñeyāḥ janāḥ tadgatabhaktayaḥ
english: If planets, even when endowed with strength, become combust by the Sun, then individuals influenced by them should be understood as uninitiated, their devotion (bhakti) directed towards that (the Sun).

sanskrit: अस्तंगता निर्बलाश्चेत् सबलश्च रविर्यदा । तदा रविभवा ज्ञेया प्रव्रज्या द्विजसत्तम ॥५॥
transliteration: astaṃgatā nirbalāścet sabalaśca raviryadā . tadā ravibhavā jñeyā pravrajyā dvijasattama.
separated_sandhi: astamgatāḥ nirbalāḥ cet sabalaḥ ca raviḥ yadātadā ravibhavā jñeyā pravrajyā dvijasattama
english: O best of the twice-born (dvija), if planets are combust and weak, and at the same time the Sun is strong, then renunciation (pravrajyā) originating from the Sun should be understood.

sanskrit: जन्मभेशोऽन्यखेटैश्चेददृष्टः शनिमीक्षते । तयोर्बलवशात्तत्र प्रव्रज्यामाप्नुयान्नरः ॥६॥
transliteration: janmabheśo'nyakheṭaiścedadṛṣṭaḥ śanimīkṣate . tayorbalavaśāttatra pravrajyāmāpnuyānnaraḥ.
separated_sandhi: janmabheśaḥ anyakheṭaiḥ cet adṛṣṭaḥ śanim īkṣatetayoḥ balavaśāt tatra pravrajyām āpnuyāt naraḥ
english: If the lord of the natal star (or birth ascendant) aspects Saturn, while not being aspected by any other planets, then a person will attain renunciation (pravrajyā) due to the strength of both of them (the natal lord and Saturn).

sanskrit: निर्बलो जन्मभेशश्चेत् केवलेनार्किणेक्षितः । तदा शनिभवमेव प्रव्रज्यां आप्नुयाज्जनः ॥७॥
transliteration: nirbalo janmabheśaścet kevalenārkiṇekṣitaḥ . tadā śanibhavameva pravrajyāṃ āpnuyājjanaḥ.
separated_sandhi: nirbalaḥ janmabheśaḥ cet kevalena arkiṇā īkṣitaḥtadā śanibhavam eva pravrajyām āpnuyāt janaḥ
english: If the lord of the natal star (or birth ascendant) is weak and aspected only by Saturn, then a person will attain renunciation (pravrajyā) that originates solely from Saturn.

sanskrit: शनिदृक्काणसंस्थे च शनिभौमनवांशके । शनिदृष्टे विधौ ज्ञेया प्रव्रज्या शनिसम्भवा ॥८॥
transliteration: śanidṛkkāṇasaṃsthe ca śanibhaumanavāṃśake . śanidṛṣṭe vidhau jñeyā pravrajyā śanisambhavā.
separated_sandhi: śanidṛkkāṇasaṃsthe ca śanibhaumanavāṃśakeśanidṛṣṭe vidhau jñeyā pravrajyā śanisambhavā
english: If the Moon is located in a "dṛkkāṇa" (decante) of Saturn, and simultaneously in a "navāṃśa" (ninth division) ruled by either Saturn or Mars, and is also aspected by Saturn, then a renunciation (pravrajyā) caused by Saturn should be inferred.

sanskrit: कुजादिषु जयी शुक्रः सौम्यगो याम्यगोऽपि वा । जयी सौम्यगतश्चान्यः परस्परयुतौ भवेत् ॥९॥
transliteration: kujādiṣu jayī śukraḥ saumyago yāmyago'pi vā . jayī saumyagataścānyaḥ parasparayutau bhavet.
separated_sandhi: kujādiṣu jayī śukraḥ saumyagaḥ yāmyagaḥ api vājayī saumyagataḥ ca anyaḥ parasparayutau bhavet
english: Among Mars and other planets, Venus is victorious whether it is moving in the northern course (Uttarāyaṇa) or even in the southern course (Dakṣiṇāyana). Another planet, if it is in its northern course, also becomes victorious when they are in mutual connection (conjunction or aspect).

sanskrit: प्रव्रज्याकारकः खेटो यद्यन्येन पराजितः । तदा लब्धां परिव्रज्यां परित्यजति तां पुनः ॥१०॥
transliteration: pravrajyākārakaḥ kheṭo yadyanyena parājitaḥ . tadā labdhāṃ parivrajyāṃ parityajati tāṃ punaḥ.
separated_sandhi: pravrajyākārakaḥ kheṭaḥ yadi anyena parājitaḥtadā labdhām parivrajyām parityajati tām punaḥ
english: If the planet signifying renunciation (pravrajyā) is defeated by another planet, then one abandons that previously acquired state of renunciation (pravrajyā) again.

sanskrit: बहवो जन्मकाले चेत् प्रव्रज्याकारका ग्रहाः । बलतुल्यास्तदा तत्र प्रव्रज्या कतमा भवेत् ॥११॥
transliteration: bahavo janmakāle cet pravrajyākārakā grahāḥ . balatulyāstadā tatra pravrajyā katamā bhavet.
separated_sandhi: bahavaḥ janmakāle cet pravrajyākārakāḥ grahāḥbalatulyāḥ tadā tatra pravrajyā katamā bhavet
english: If, at the time of birth, there are many planets signifying renunciation (pravrajyā) and they are all of equal strength, then what kind of renunciation (pravrajyā) would one experience?

sanskrit: बहवो बलिनश्चेत् स्युः प्रव्रज्याकारका ग्रहाः । तदा प्राप्नोति सर्वेषां तेषां प्रव्रज्यकां ध्रुवम् ॥१२॥
transliteration: bahavo balinaścet syuḥ pravrajyākārakā grahāḥ . tadā prāpnoti sarveṣāṃ teṣāṃ pravrajyakāṃ dhruvam.
separated_sandhi: bahavaḥ balinaḥ cet syuḥ pravrajyākārakāḥ grahāḥtadā prāpnoti sarveṣām teṣām pravrajyakām dhruvam
english: If there are many powerful planets that are indicators of renunciation (pravrajyā), then a person certainly attains the renunciation associated with all of them.

sanskrit: तत्तद्ग्रहदशाकाले प्रव्रज्यां याति तद्भवाम् । त्यक्त्वा गृहीतपूर्वां तामन्यां प्राप्नोति मानवः ॥१३॥
transliteration: tattadgrahadaśākāle pravrajyāṃ yāti tadbhavām . tyaktvā gṛhītapūrvāṃ tāmanyāṃ prāpnoti mānavaḥ.
separated_sandhi: tattadgrahadaśākāle pravrajyām yāti tat-bhavāmtyaktvā gṛhītapūrvām tām anyām prāpnoti mānavaḥ
english: During the operating period (daśā) of each such planet, a person attains the renunciation (pravrajyā) originating from it. Having abandoned the previously adopted renunciation, that human being (mānava) then takes up another.

sanskrit: दृष्टेष्विन्द्विज्यलग्नेषु शनिना नवमे गुरुः । राजयोगेऽत्र जातोऽसौ तीर्थिकृन्नऽत्र संशयः ॥१४॥
transliteration: dṛṣṭeṣvindvijyalagneṣu śaninā navame guruḥ . rājayoge'tra jāto'sau tīrthikṛnna'tra saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: dṛṣṭeṣu induijyalagneṣu śaninā navame guruḥrājayoge atra jātaḥ asau tīrthikṛt na atra saṃśayaḥ
english: When the Moon (indu), Jupiter (ijya), and the Ascendant (lagna) are aspected by Saturn (śani), and Jupiter is situated in the ninth house, a person born under this prominent planetary combination (rājayoga) certainly becomes an ascetic (tīrthikṛt); there is no doubt about it.

sanskrit: धर्मस्थानगते मन्दे ग्रहदृष्टिविवर्जिते । राजयोगेऽत्र यो जातः स राजा दीक्षितो भवेत् ॥१५॥
transliteration: dharmasthānagate mande grahadṛṣṭivivarjite . rājayoge'tra yo jātaḥ sa rājā dīkṣito bhavet.
separated_sandhi: dharmasthānagate mande grahadṛṣṭivivarjiterājayoge atra yaḥ jātaḥ saḥ rājā dīkṣitaḥ bhavet
english: When Saturn (manda) is situated in the house of natural law (dharma-sthāna, i.e., the ninth house) and is devoid of any planetary aspects, then a person born under this specific planetary combination (rājayoga) becomes a king (rājā) who is initiated (dīkṣita) [into a spiritual path, implying an ascetic king].

sanskrit: बहुधा भवता प्रोक्तं यज्जातकफलं मुने । तन्नारीणां कथं ज्ञेयमिति मे कथयाऽधुना ॥१॥
transliteration: bahudhā bhavatā proktaṃ yajjātakaphalaṃ mune . tannārīṇāṃ kathaṃ jñeyamiti me kathayā'dhunā.
separated_sandhi: bahudhā bhavatā proktam yat jātaka-phalam mune |tat nārīṇām katham jñeyam iti me kathaya adhunā
english: O sage, you have extensively explained the astrological results of birth charts. Now, please tell me how those results should be understood for women.

sanskrit: साधु पृष्टं त्वया विप्र तदपि प्रवदाम्यहम् । स्त्रीणां पुंभिः समं ज्ञेयं फलमुक्तं विपश्चिता ॥२॥
transliteration: sādhu pṛṣṭaṃ tvayā vipra tadapi pravadāmyaham . strīṇāṃ puṃbhiḥ samaṃ jñeyaṃ phalamuktaṃ vipaścitā.
separated_sandhi: sādhu pṛṣṭam tvayā vipra | tat api pravadāmi aham |strīṇām pumbhiḥ samam jñeyam phalam uktam vipaścitā
english: O Brahmin, you have asked a good question. I will explain that to you. The results for women should be understood as similar to those for men, as declared by the learned.

sanskrit: विशेषस्तत्र यो दृष्टः संक्षेपात् कथयामि तत् । लग्ने देहफलं तस्याः पञ्चमे प्रसवस्तथा ॥३॥
transliteration: viśeṣastatra yo dṛṣṭaḥ saṃkṣepāt kathayāmi tat . lagne dehaphalaṃ tasyāḥ pañcame prasavastathā.
separated_sandhi: viśeṣaḥ tatra yaḥ dṛṣṭaḥ saṅkṣepāt kathayāmi tat| lagne deha-phalam tasyāḥ pañcame prasavaḥ tathā
english: I will briefly explain the special considerations observed in that context. For her, bodily characteristics and physical attributes are discerned from the ascendant (lagna), and similarly, progeny or childbirth from the fifth house.

sanskrit: सप्तमे पतिसौभाग्यं वैधव्यं निधने द्विज । स्त्रीणामसम्भवं यद्यत् तत्फलं तत्पतौ वदेत् ॥४॥
transliteration: saptame patisaubhāgyaṃ vaidhavyaṃ nidhane dvija . strīṇāmasambhavaṃ yadyat tatphalaṃ tatpatau vadet.
separated_sandhi: strīṇām asambhavam yat yattat phalam tat patau vadet
english: Whatever results are impossible for women (to experience directly), those results should be declared as applying to their husbands.

sanskrit: लग्नेन्दू समभे यस्याः सा नारी प्रकृतिस्थिता । कन्योचितगुणोपेता सुशीला शुभलक्षणा ॥५॥
transliteration: lagnendū samabhe yasyāḥ sā nārī prakṛtisthitā . kanyocitaguṇopetā suśīlā śubhalakṣaṇā.
separated_sandhi: lagnendū samabhe yasyāḥ sā nārī prakṛtisthitākanyocitaguṇopetā suśīlā śubhalakṣaṇā
english: If a woman has her Ascendant and Moon in even signs, she will be naturally well-disposed (prakṛti), endowed with qualities suitable for a maiden, virtuous, and possess auspicious bodily marks.

sanskrit: शुभेक्षितौ सुरूपा च सदा देहसुखान्विता । विषमे पुरुषाकारा दुःशीला पापवीक्षितौ ॥६॥
transliteration: śubhekṣitau surūpā ca sadā dehasukhānvitā . viṣame puruṣākārā duḥśīlā pāpavīkṣitau.
separated_sandhi: śubhekṣitau surūpā ca sadā dehasukhānvitāviṣame puruṣākārā duḥśīlā pāpavīkṣitau
english: If they (the Ascendant and Moon) are aspected by benefics, she will be beautiful and always enjoy bodily comforts. If they are in odd signs and aspected by malefics, she will have a masculine appearance and be ill-behaved.

sanskrit: पापाढ्यौ च गुणैर्हीना मिश्रे मिश्रफलं वदेत् । लग्नेन्द्वोर्यो बली तस्य फलं तस्य विशेषतः ॥७॥
transliteration: pāpāḍhyau ca guṇairhīnā miśre miśraphalaṃ vadet . lagnendvoryo balī tasya phalaṃ tasya viśeṣataḥ.
separated_sandhi: pāpāḍhyau ca guṇaiḥ hīnā miśre miśraphalam vadetlagnendvoḥ yaḥ balī tasya phalam tasya viśeṣataḥ
english: If they (the Ascendant and Moon) are strongly afflicted by malefics, she will be devoid of good qualities. If there is a mixed influence, one should declare a mixed result. Whichever of the Ascendant and the Moon is stronger, its result should be specifically considered.

sanskrit: लग्नेन्द्वोर्यो बली विप्र त्रिंशांशैस्तदधिष्ठितैः । ग्रहराशिवशाद् वाच्यं फलं स्त्रीणां विशेषतः ॥८॥
transliteration: lagnendvoryo balī vipra triṃśāṃśaistadadhiṣṭhitaiḥ . graharāśivaśād vācyaṃ phalaṃ strīṇāṃ viśeṣataḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagnendvoḥ yaḥ balī vipra triṃśāṃśaiḥ tadadhiṣṭhitaiḥgraharāśivaśāt vācyam phalam strīṇām viśeṣataḥ
english: O Brahmin, whichever of the Ascendant and the Moon is stronger, based on the "triṃśāṃśa" it occupies and according to the nature of the planet and sign, the results for women should be specifically declared.

sanskrit: कन्यैवारगृहे दुष्टा भौमत्रिंशांशके भवेत् । कुचरित्रा तथा शौक्रे समाया बोधने स्मृता ॥९॥
transliteration: kanyaivāragṛhe duṣṭā bhaumatriṃśāṃśake bhavet . kucaritrā tathā śaukre samāyā bodhane smṛtā.
separated_sandhi: kanyā eva vārāgṛhe duṣṭā bhāuma-triṃśāṃśake bhavetkucāritrā tathā śaukra samāyā bodhane smṛtā
english: A maiden (kanyā) becomes indeed wicked (duṣṭā) in a brothel (vārāgṛhe) if born in Mars's triṃśāṃśa. She is ill-behaved (kucāritrā) in Venus's triṃśāṃśa, and in Mercury's triṃśāṃśa (bodhane), she is considered balanced (samā).

sanskrit: जैवे साध्वी शनौ दासी ज्ञर्क्षे कौजे छलान्विता । शौक्रे प्रकीर्णकामा सा बौधेंऽशे च गुणान्विता ॥१०॥
transliteration: jaive sādhvī śanau dāsī jñarkṣe kauje chalānvitā . śaukre prakīrṇakāmā sā baudheṃ'śe ca guṇānvitā.
separated_sandhi: jaive sādhvī śanau dāsī jña ṛkṣe kauje chala-anvitāśaukra prakīrṇa-kāmā sā baudhe aṃśe ca guṇa-anvitā
english: She is virtuous (sādhvī) in Jupiter's triṃśāṃśa (jaive), and a maidservant (dāsī) in Saturn's triṃśāṃśa (śanau). In Mercury's sign (jñarkṣe) and Mars's triṃśāṃśa (kauje), she is deceitful (chalanvitā). In Venus's triṃśāṃśa (śaukra), she has promiscuous desires (prakīrṇakāmā). And in Mercury's triṃśāṃśa (baudhe aṃśe), she is endowed with good qualities (guṇanvitā).

sanskrit: क्लीबाऽर्क्यंशे सती जैवे कौजै दुष्टा सितर्क्षके । शौक्रे ख्यातगुणा बौधे कलासु निपुणा भवेत् ॥११॥
transliteration: klībā'rkyaṃśe satī jaive kaujai duṣṭā sitarkṣake . śaukre khyātaguṇā baudhe kalāsu nipuṇā bhavet.
separated_sandhi: klībā arkya aṃśe satī jaive kauje duṣṭā sita ṛkṣakeśaukra khyāta-guṇā baudhe kalāsu nipuṇā bhavet
english: She becomes frigid (klībā) in Saturn's triṃśāṃśa (arkya-aṃśe). She is chaste (satī) in Jupiter's triṃśāṃśa (jaive). If the sign is Venus's (sitarkṣake) and the triṃśāṃśa is Mars's (kauje), she is wicked (duṣṭā). In Venus's triṃśāṃśa (śaukra), she is of famous qualities (khyātaguṇā). And in Mercury's triṃśāṃśa (baudhe), she becomes skilled (nipuṇā) in arts (kalāsu).

sanskrit: जैवे गुणवती मान्दे पुनर्भूश्चन्द्रभे ततः । स्वतन्त्रा कुजात्रिंशांशे शौक्रे च कुलपांसना ॥१२॥
transliteration: jaive guṇavatī mānde punarbhūścandrabhe tataḥ . svatantrā kujātriṃśāṃśe śaukre ca kulapāṃsanā.
separated_sandhi: jaive guṇa-vatī mānde punar-bhūḥ ca candra-bhe tataḥsvatantrā kuja-triṃśāṃśe śaukra ca kula-pāṃsanā
english: She is endowed with good qualities (guṇavatī) in Jupiter's triṃśāṃśa (jaive). In Saturn's triṃśāṃśa (mānde), she is a remarried woman (punarbhū). If it is the Moon's sign (candrabhe) and Mars's triṃśāṃśa (kujatriṃśāṃśe), then she is independent (svatantrā). And in Venus's triṃśāṃśa (śaukra), she disgraces her family (kulapāṃsanā).

sanskrit: बौधे शिल्पकलाऽभिज्ञा जैवे बहुगुणा शनौ । पतिघ्नी चार्कभे कौजे वाचाला भार्गवे सती ॥१३॥
transliteration: baudhe śilpakalā'bhijñā jaive bahuguṇā śanau . patighnī cārkabhe kauje vācālā bhārgave satī.
separated_sandhi: baudhe śilpakalā abhijñā jaive bahuguṇā śanaupatighnī ca arkabhe kauje vācālā bhārgave satī
english: When Mercury is influential, she will be skilled in arts and crafts. When Jupiter is influential, she will possess many virtues. When Saturn is influential, she will be one who causes the death of her husband. And when Mars is influential in a solar sign, she will be talkative. When Venus is influential, she will be chaste.

sanskrit: बौधे पुंश्चेष्टिता जैवे राज्ञी मान्दे कुलच्युता । कौजे बहुगुणाऽर्यर्क्षे शौक्रे चाप्यसती मता ॥१४॥
transliteration: baudhe puṃśceṣṭitā jaive rājñī mānde kulacyutā . kauje bahuguṇā'ryarkṣe śaukre cāpyasatī matā.
separated_sandhi: baudhe puṃśceṣṭitā jaive rājñī mānde kulacyutākauje bahuguṇā aryarkṣe śaukre ca api asatī matā
english: When Mercury is influential, she will exhibit male-like behavior. When Jupiter is influential, she will be like a queen. When Saturn is influential, she will be fallen from her family. When Mars is influential in a solar sign, she will possess many virtues. And if Venus is influential, she is considered unchaste.

sanskrit: बौधे विज्ञानसंयुता जैवेऽनेकगुणान्विता । मान्दे चाल्परतिः प्रोक्ता दासी कौजे तथाऽर्किभे ॥१५॥
transliteration: baudhe vijñānasaṃyutā jaive'nekaguṇānvitā . mānde cālparatiḥ proktā dāsī kauje tathā'rkibhe.
separated_sandhi: baudhe vijñānasaṃyutā jaive anekaguṇānvitā māndeca alparatiḥ proktā dāsī kauje tathā arkibhe
english: When Mercury is influential, she will be endowed with special knowledge (vijñāna). When Jupiter is influential, she will possess many virtues. When Saturn is influential, she is said to have little enjoyment. Similarly, if Mars is influential in a Saturnine sign, she will be a maidservant.

sanskrit: सुप्रज्ञा च भवेच्छौक्रे बौधे दुःस्था तथा खला । जैवे पतिव्रता प्रोक्ता मान्दे नीचजनानुगा ॥१६॥
transliteration: suprajñā ca bhavecchaukre baudhe duḥsthā tathā khalā . jaive pativratā proktā mānde nīcajanānugā.
separated_sandhi: suprājñā ca bhavet śaukre baudhe duḥsthā tathākhalā jaive pativratā proktā mānde nīcajanānugā
english: When Venus is influential, she will be very intelligent. When Mercury is influential, she will be distressed and wicked. When Jupiter is influential, she is declared to be devoted to her husband. When Saturn is influential, she will follow ignoble persons.

sanskrit: मन्दे शून्ये शुभादृष्टे पतिः कापुरुषो भवेत् । चरभे च प्रवासी स्यात् क्लीवस्तत्र ज्ञमन्दयोः ॥१७॥
transliteration: mande śūnye śubhādṛṣṭe patiḥ kāpuruṣo bhavet . carabhe ca pravāsī syāt klīvastatra jñamandayoḥ.
separated_sandhi: manda śūnye śubhādṛṣṭe patiḥ kāpuruṣaḥ bhavetcarabhe ca pravāsī syāt klīvaḥ tatra jña mandayoḥ
english: When Saturn (manda) is weak (śūnye) and not aspected by benefics (śubhādṛṣṭe), the husband will be a despicable man (kāpuruṣa). If Saturn is in a movable sign (carabhe), the husband will be a wanderer (pravāsī). He will be impotent (klīva) in that sign if Mercury (jña) and Saturn are associated there.

sanskrit: सूर्येऽस्तभे पतित्यक्ता बाल्ये च विधवा कुजे । शनावशुभसन्दृष्टे याति कन्यैव वृद्धताम् ॥१८॥
transliteration: sūrye'stabhe patityaktā bālye ca vidhavā kuje . śanāvaśubhasandṛṣṭe yāti kanyaiva vṛddhatām.
separated_sandhi: sūrye astabhe patityaktā bālye ca vidhavā kujeśanau aśubhasandṛṣṭe yāti kanyā eva vṛddhatām
english: If the Sun (sūrya) is in the house of setting (astabha), the woman will be abandoned by her husband (patityaktā). If Mars (kuja) is similarly placed, she becomes a widow in childhood (bālye). If Saturn (śani) is aspected by malefics (aśubhasandṛṣṭe), the girl (kanyā) will reach old age as a virgin.

sanskrit: विधवास्तगतैः पापैः सौम्यैस्तु सधवा सती । मिश्रखेटैः पूनर्भूः सा ज्ञेया मिश्रफलान्विता ॥१९॥
transliteration: vidhavāstagataiḥ pāpaiḥ saumyaistu sadhavā satī . miśrakheṭaiḥ pūnarbhūḥ sā jñeyā miśraphalānvitā.
separated_sandhi: vidhavā astagataiḥ pāpaiḥ saumyaiḥ tu sadhavā satīmiśrakheṭaiḥ punarbhūḥ sā jñeyā miśraphalānvitā
english: If malefic planets (pāpa) are in the house of setting (astagata), she becomes a widow (vidhavā). But if benefics (saumya) are there, she is a chaste (satī) married woman (sadhavā). If mixed planets (miśrakheṭa) are present, she should be known as a remarried woman (punarbhū), experiencing mixed results (miśraphalānvitā).

sanskrit: मिथोंऽशस्थौ सितारौ चेदन्यासक्ता तदाऽङ्गना । सप्तमे च स्थिते चन्द्रे तदा भर्तुरनुज्ञ्या ॥२०॥
transliteration: mithoṃ'śasthau sitārau cedanyāsaktā tadā'ṅganā . saptame ca sthite candre tadā bharturanujñyā.
separated_sandhi: mithaḥ aṃśasthau sitārau cet anyāsaktā tadā aṅganāsaptame ca sthite candre tadā bhartuḥ anujñayā
english: If Venus (sita) and Mars (āra) are situated in each other's navamśa (aṃśastha), then the woman (aṅganā) will be attached to another man (anyāsaktā). And if the Moon (candra) is situated in the seventh house (saptama), then it will be with her husband's permission (anujñā).

sanskrit: शुक्रभे शनिभे वापि सेन्दुशुक्रे च लग्नगे । मात्रा सह तदा नारी वन्धकी भवति ध्रुवम् ॥२१॥
transliteration: śukrabhe śanibhe vāpi senduśukre ca lagnage . mātrā saha tadā nārī vandhakī bhavati dhruvam.
separated_sandhi: śukrabhe śanibhe vā api sa-indu-śukre ca lagnage| mātrā saha tadā nārī vandhakī bhavati dhruvam
english: If the ascendant is in a sign ruled by Venus or Saturn, or if the Moon and Venus are together in the ascendant, then the woman, along with her mother, certainly becomes unchaste.

sanskrit: कुजर्क्षे वा तदंशेऽस्ते स्त्रीलोलः क्रोधनः पतिः । बौधर्क्षांशे तथा विद्वान् कलासु निपुणः सुधीः ॥२२॥
transliteration: kujarkṣe vā tadaṃśe'ste strīlolaḥ krodhanaḥ patiḥ . baudharkṣāṃśe tathā vidvān kalāsu nipuṇaḥ sudhīḥ.
separated_sandhi: kuja-ṛkṣe vā tat-aṃśe aste strī-lolaḥ krodhanaḥ patiḥ| baudha-ṛkṣa-aṃśe tathā vidvān kalāsu nipuṇaḥ su-dhīḥ
english: If the seventh house (descendant) is in a sign ruled by Mars or its navamsha division is Mars, the husband will be a womanizer and short-tempered. Similarly, if it is in a sign ruled by Mercury or its navamsha division is Mercury, he will be learned, skilled in arts, and intelligent.

sanskrit: जैवे सर्वगुणोपेतः पतिरस्ते जितेन्द्रियः । शौक्रे सौभाग्यसंयुक्तः कान्तः स्त्रीजनवल्लभः ॥२३॥
transliteration: jaive sarvaguṇopetaḥ patiraste jitendriyaḥ . śaukre saubhāgyasaṃyuktaḥ kāntaḥ strījanavallabhaḥ.
separated_sandhi: jaive sarva-guṇa-upetaḥ patiḥ aste jita-indriyaḥ |śaukre saubhāgya-saṃyuktaḥ kāntaḥ strī-jana-vallabhaḥ
english: If the seventh house (descendant) is in a sign ruled by Jupiter or its navamsha division is Jupiter, the husband will be endowed with all good qualities and will have controlled his senses. If it is in a sign ruled by Venus or its navamsha division is Venus, he will be endowed with good fortune, handsome, and beloved by women.

sanskrit: सौरेर्क्ष वाथ सौरांशे वृद्धो मूर्खश्च सप्तमे । अतीवामृदुरर्कांशे तदृक्षेवाऽतिकर्मकृत् ॥२४॥
transliteration: saurerkṣa vātha saurāṃśe vṛddho mūrkhaśca saptame . atīvāmṛdurarkāṃśe tadṛkṣevā'tikarmakṛt.
separated_sandhi: saura-ṛkṣe vā atha saura-aṃśe vṛddhaḥ mūrkhaḥ ca saptame| atīva a-mṛduḥ arka-aṃśe tat-ṛkṣe vā ati-karma-kṛt
english: If the seventh house (descendant) is in a sign ruled by Saturn or its navamsha division is Saturn, the husband will be old and foolish. If it is in a sign ruled by the Sun or its navamsha division is the Sun, he will be extremely harsh and excessively active (or performing many actions).

sanskrit: अस्ते कर्के तदंशे वा कान्तः कामी मृदुः पतिः । मिश्रे मिश्रफलं वाच्यं भांशयोश्च बलक्रमात् ॥२५॥
transliteration: aste karke tadaṃśe vā kāntaḥ kāmī mṛduḥ patiḥ . miśre miśraphalaṃ vācyaṃ bhāṃśayośca balakramāt.
separated_sandhi: aste karke tadaṃśe vā kāntaḥ kāmī mṛduḥ patiḥmiśre miśraphalaṃ vācyaṃ bhāṃśayoḥ ca balakramāt
english: If the significator of the husband is situated in the seventh house, in the sign of Cancer or its navamsha, the husband will be charming, passionate, and gentle. When there is a mix of signs and navamshas, one should declare mixed results according to their relative strengths.

sanskrit: सूर्येऽष्टमगते जाता दुःखदारिद्र्यसंयुता । क्षताङ्गी खेदयुक्ता च भवेद्धर्मपराङ्मुखी ॥२६॥
transliteration: sūrye'ṣṭamagate jātā duḥkhadāridryasaṃyutā . kṣatāṅgī khedayuktā ca bhaveddharmaparāṅmukhī.
separated_sandhi: sūrye aṣṭamagate jātā duḥkhadāridryasaṃyutākṣatāṅgī khedayuktā ca bhavet dharmaparāṅmukhī
english: A woman born with the Sun in the eighth house will be afflicted with sorrow and poverty, will have a wounded body, be full of distress, and will turn away from natural law (dharma).

sanskrit: चन्द्रेऽष्टमगते नारी कुभगा कुस्तनो कुदृग् । वस्त्राभरणहीना च रोगिणी चातिगर्हिता ॥२७॥
transliteration: candre'ṣṭamagate nārī kubhagā kustano kudṛg . vastrābharaṇahīnā ca rogiṇī cātigarhitā.
separated_sandhi: candre aṣṭamagate nārī kubhagā kustano kudṛśvastrābharaṇahīnā ca rogiṇī ca atigarhitā
english: A woman born with the Moon in the eighth house will be unlucky, will have ugly breasts and bad eyesight, will be devoid of clothes and ornaments, sickly, and greatly despised.

sanskrit: कुजेऽष्टमगते बाला कृशाङ्गी रोगसंयुता । विधवा कान्तिहीना च शोकसन्तापदुःखिता ॥२८॥
transliteration: kuje'ṣṭamagate bālā kṛśāṅgī rogasaṃyutā . vidhavā kāntihīnā ca śokasantāpaduḥkhitā.
separated_sandhi: kuje aṣṭamagate bālā kṛśāṅgī rogasaṃyutāvidhavā kāntihīnā ca śokasantāpaduḥkhitā
english: If Mars is in the eighth house, the young woman born (with this configuration) will be thin-bodied, associated with disease, a widow, devoid of beauty, and afflicted by sorrow, distress, and misery.

sanskrit: बुधेष्टमगते जाता धर्महीना भयातुरा । अभिमानधनैर्हीना निर्गुणा कलहप्रिया ॥२९॥
transliteration: budheṣṭamagate jātā dharmahīnā bhayāturā . abhimānadhanairhīnā nirguṇā kalahapriyā.
separated_sandhi: budheṣṭamagate jātā dharmaputrahīnā bhayāturāabhimānadhanaiḥ hīnā nirguṇā kalahapriyā
english: A woman born when Mercury is in the eighth house will be devoid of proper conduct (dharma), distressed by fear, lacking honor and wealth, without good qualities, and fond of quarrels.

sanskrit: गुरावष्टमगे बाला विशीला स्वल्पसन्ततिः । पृथुवादकरा पत्या त्यक्ता बह्वशना भवेत् ॥३०॥
transliteration: gurāvaṣṭamage bālā viśīlā svalpasantatiḥ . pṛthuvādakarā patyā tyaktā bahvaśanā bhavet.
separated_sandhi: gurau aṣṭamage bālā viśīlā svalpasantatiḥpṛthuvādakarā patyā tyaktā bahvaśanā bhavet
english: A woman born when Jupiter is in the eighth house will be ill-mannered, have few children, be very argumentative, abandoned by her husband, and gluttonous.

sanskrit: शुक्रेऽष्टमगते जाता प्रमत्ता धनवर्जिता । निर्दया धर्महीना च मलिना कपटान्विता ॥३१॥
transliteration: śukre'ṣṭamagate jātā pramattā dhanavarjitā . nirdayā dharmahīnā ca malinā kapaṭānvitā.
separated_sandhi: śukre aṣṭamagate jātā pramattā dhanavarjitānirdayā dharmaputrahīnā ca malinā kapaṭānvitā
english: A woman born when Venus is in the eighth house will be careless, devoid of wealth, merciless, without proper conduct (dharma), and also impure and deceitful.

sanskrit: शनावष्टमगे जाता दुःस्वभावा मलिम्लुचा । प्रवंचनपरा नारी भवेत् पतिसुखोज्ज्ञिता ॥३२॥
transliteration: śanāvaṣṭamage jātā duḥsvabhāvā malimlucā . pravaṃcanaparā nārī bhavet patisukhojjñitā.
separated_sandhi: śanau aṣṭamage jātā duḥsvabhāvā malimlucāpravañcanaparā nārī bhavet patisukhojjhitā
english: A woman born when Saturn is in the eighth house will be ill-natured, thievish, very deceptive, and devoid of happiness from her husband.

sanskrit: राहावष्टमभावस्थे कुरूपा पतिवर्जिता । कठोरहृदया रोगैर्युक्ता च व्यभिचारिणी ॥३३॥
transliteration: rāhāvaṣṭamabhāvasthe kurūpā pativarjitā . kaṭhorahṛdayā rogairyuktā ca vyabhicāriṇī.
separated_sandhi: rāhau aṣṭamabhāvasthe kurūpā pativarjitākaṭhorahṛdayā rogaiḥ yuktā ca vyabhicāriṇī
english: When Rahu is situated in the eighth house, the woman will be ugly, abandoned by her husband, hard-hearted, afflicted with diseases, and unchaste.

sanskrit: शशिशुक्रौ यदा लग्ने मन्दराभ्यां युतौ तदा । बन्ध्या भवति सा नारी सुतभे पापदृग्युते ॥३४॥
transliteration: śaśiśukrau yadā lagne mandarābhyāṃ yutau tadā . bandhyā bhavati sā nārī sutabhe pāpadṛgyute.
separated_sandhi: śaśiśukrau yadā lagne mandarābhyām yutau tadābandhyā bhavati sā nārī sutabhe pāpadṛgyute
english: When the Moon and Venus are in the Ascendant, conjoined with Saturn and Mars, and the fifth house is aspected by malefic planets, then that woman becomes barren.

sanskrit: कुजांशेस्तगते सौरिदृष्टे नारी सरुग्भगा । शुभांशे सप्तमे ज्ञेया सुभगा पतिवल्लभा ॥३५॥
transliteration: kujāṃśestagate sauridṛṣṭe nārī sarugbhagā . śubhāṃśe saptame jñeyā subhagā pativallabhā.
separated_sandhi: kujāṁśestagate sauridṛṣṭe nārī sarugbhagāśubhāṁśe saptame jñeyā subhagā pativallabhā
english: If [the indicator of spouse/marriage] is in the navāṁśa (division) of Mars and situated in the seventh house, and aspected by Saturn, the woman will suffer from vaginal diseases. If it is in an auspicious navāṁśa and located in the seventh house, she should be known as fortunate and beloved by her husband.

sanskrit: बुधभे लग्नगे सूतौ चन्द्रशुक्रयुते द्विज । ज्ञेया पितृगृहे नारी सा सर्वसुखसंयुता ॥३६॥
transliteration: budhabhe lagnage sūtau candraśukrayute dvija . jñeyā pitṛgṛhe nārī sā sarvasukhasaṃyutā.
separated_sandhi: budhabhe lagnage sūtau candraśukrayute dvijajñeyā pitṛgṛhe nārī sā sarvasukhasaṃyutā
english: O Brahmin, when the Ascendant is in a sign ruled by Mercury, and the house of progeny (fifth house) is conjoined with the Moon and Venus, that woman, staying in her paternal home, is known to be endowed with all happiness.

sanskrit: लग्ने चन्द्रज्ञशुक्रेषु बहुसौख्यगुणान्विता । जीव तत्रातिसम्पन्ना पुत्रवित्तसुखान्विता ॥३७॥
transliteration: lagne candrajñaśukreṣu bahusaukhyaguṇānvitā . jīva tatrātisampannā putravittasukhānvitā.
separated_sandhi: lagne candrajñaśukreṣu bahusaukhyaguṇānvitājīva tatra atisampannā putravittasukhānvitā
english: If the Moon, Mercury, and Venus are in the ascendant (lagna), the woman will be endowed with many pleasures and good qualities. If Jupiter (jīva) is also there, she will be exceedingly wealthy and blessed with children, prosperity, and happiness.

sanskrit: लग्नादष्टमगौ स्यातां चन्द्रार्कौ स्वर्क्षगौ तदा । बन्ध्याऽथ काकबन्ध्या चेदेवं चन्द्रबुधौ यदा ॥३८॥
transliteration: lagnādaṣṭamagau syātāṃ candrārkau svarkṣagau tadā . bandhyā'tha kākabandhyā cedevaṃ candrabudhau yadā.
separated_sandhi: lagnāt aṣṭamagau syātām candrārkau svarkṣagau tadābandhyā atha kākabandhyā cet evam candrabudhau yadā
english: When the Moon and the Sun are in the eighth house from the ascendant (lagna), and both are situated in their own signs, then the woman is barren (bandhyā). And if the Moon and Mercury are similarly placed, she is a 'crow-barren' woman (kākabandhyā).

sanskrit: शनिमङ्गलभे लग्ने चन्द्रभार्गवसंयुते । पापदृष्टे च सा नारी बन्ध्या भवति निश्चयात् ॥३९॥
transliteration: śanimaṅgalabhe lagne candrabhārgavasaṃyute . pāpadṛṣṭe ca sā nārī bandhyā bhavati niścayāt.
separated_sandhi: śanimaṅgalabhe lagne candrabhārgavasaṃyutepāpadṛṣṭe ca sā nārī bandhyā bhavati niścayāt
english: If the ascendant (lagna) is in a sign ruled by Saturn or Mars, and the ascendant itself is conjoined with the Moon and Venus, and also aspected by malefic planets, then that woman will certainly be barren (bandhyā).

sanskrit: सराहौ सप्तमे सूर्ये पञ्चमे पापसंयुते । शुक्रेज्यराहवो मृत्यौ मृतापत्या च सा भवेत् ॥४०॥
transliteration: sarāhau saptame sūrye pañcame pāpasaṃyute . śukrejyarāhavo mṛtyau mṛtāpatyā ca sā bhavet.
separated_sandhi: sarāhau saptame sūrye pañcame pāpasaṃyuteśukrejyārāhavaḥ mṛtyau mṛtāpatyā ca sā bhavet
english: When the Sun, conjoined with Rāhu, is in the seventh house, and the fifth house is associated with malefic planets, and Venus, Jupiter (ijya), and Rāhu are in the eighth house (mṛtyu), then that woman will have dead children (mṛtāpatyā).

sanskrit: शुक्रेज्यावष्टमे सारौ सप्तमे वा कुजो भवेत् । शनिना दृग्युतो नारी गलद्गर्भा प्रकीर्तिता ॥४१॥
transliteration: śukrejyāvaṣṭame sārau saptame vā kujo bhavet . śaninā dṛgyuto nārī galadgarbhā prakīrtitā.
separated_sandhi: śukrejyau aṣṭame sārau saptame vā kujaḥ bhavetśaninā dṛgyutaḥ nārī galadgarbhā prakīrtitā
english: If Venus and Jupiter, being potent, are in the eighth house, or if Mars is in the seventh house and aspected by Saturn, the woman born under such a configuration is declared to suffer from miscarriages.

sanskrit: पापकर्तरिके लग्ने चन्द्रे जाता च कन्यका । समस्तं पितृवंशं च पतिवंशं हिहन्ति सा ॥४२॥
transliteration: pāpakartarike lagne candre jātā ca kanyakā . samastaṃ pitṛvaṃśaṃ ca pativaṃśaṃ hihanti sā.
separated_sandhi: pāpakartarike lagne candre jātā ca kanyakāsamastaṃ pitṛvaṃśaṃ ca pativaṃśaṃ hihanti sā
english: If the Moon is in the Ascendant, which is hemmed between malefics (pāpakartari yoga), the girl born under such a configuration brings destruction to her entire paternal lineage and her husband's lineage.

sanskrit: ससर्पाग्निजलेशर्क्षे भानुमन्दारवासरे । भद्रातिथौ जनुर्यस्याः सा विषाख्या कुमारिका ॥४३॥
transliteration: sasarpāgnijaleśarkṣe bhānumandāravāsare . bhadrātithau januryasyāḥ sā viṣākhyā kumārikā.
separated_sandhi: sasarpaagnijaleśarkṣe bhānumandavāsarebhadrātithau januḥ yasyāḥ sā viṣākhyā kumārikā
english: If a girl is born when the Moon is in a nakṣatra ruled by Sarpa (Āśleṣā), Agni (Kṛttikā), or a water deity (Jaleśa), on a Sunday or Saturday, and during a Bhadrā lunar day, she is designated as a 'Viṣā Kumārikā' (poisonous girl).

sanskrit: सपापश्च शुभौ लग्ने द्वौ पापौ शत्रुभस्थितौ । यस्या जनुषि सा कन्या विषाख्या परिकीर्तिता ॥४४॥
transliteration: sapāpaśca śubhau lagne dvau pāpau śatrubhasthitau . yasyā januṣi sā kanyā viṣākhyā parikīrtitā.
separated_sandhi: sapāpaḥ ca śubhau lagne dvau pāpau śatrubhasthitauyasyāḥ januṣi sā kanyā viṣākhyā parikīrtitā
english: If in a girl's birth chart, the Ascendant contains a malefic planet along with two benefics, and two malefics are situated in enemy signs, that girl is declared a 'Viṣā Kanyā' (poisonous girl).

sanskrit: विषयोगे समुत्पन्ना मृतवत्सा च दुर्भगा । वस्त्राभरणहीना च शोकसन्तप्तमानसा ॥४५॥
transliteration: viṣayoge samutpannā mṛtavatsā ca durbhagā . vastrābharaṇahīnā ca śokasantaptamānasā.
separated_sandhi: viṣayoge samutpannā mṛtavatsā ca durbhagāvastrābharaṇahīnā ca śokasantaptamānasā
english: A woman born under the influence of a viṣayoga (poisonous planetary combination) will be unfortunate and suffer the loss of her children. She will be deprived of clothes and ornaments, and her mind will be tormented by sorrow.

sanskrit: सप्तमेशः शुभो वापि सप्तमे लग्नतोऽथवा । चन्द्रतो वा विषं योगं विनिहन्ति न संशयः ॥४६॥
transliteration: saptameśaḥ śubho vāpi saptame lagnato'thavā . candrato vā viṣaṃ yogaṃ vinihanti na saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: saptameśaḥ śubhaḥ vā api saptame lagnataḥ athavācandrataḥ vā viṣam yogam vinihanti na saṃśayaḥ
english: If the lord of the seventh house is a benefic planet, or if such a benefic planet is located in the seventh house (reckoned either from the Ascendant or from the Moon), it completely nullifies the viṣayoga (poisonous planetary combination). Of this, there is no doubt.

sanskrit: लग्ने व्यये सुखे वापि सप्तमे चाऽष्टमे कुजे । शुभदृग्योगहीने च पतिं हन्ति न संशयः ॥४७॥
transliteration: lagne vyaye sukhe vāpi saptame cā'ṣṭame kuje . śubhadṛgyogahīne ca patiṃ hanti na saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagne vyaye sukhe vā api saptame ca aṣṭame kujeśubhadrgyogahīne ca patim hanti na saṃśayaḥ
english: If Mars (kuja) is situated in the Ascendant, or in the fourth, seventh, eighth, or twelfth house, and is devoid of benefic aspects or conjunctions, then such a woman causes the death of her husband. Of this, there is no doubt.

sanskrit: यस्मिन् योगे समुत्पन्ना पतिं हन्ति कुमारिका । तस्मिन् योगे समुत्पन्नो पत्नीं हन्ति नरोऽपि च ॥४८॥
transliteration: yasmin yoge samutpannā patiṃ hanti kumārikā . tasmin yoge samutpanno patnīṃ hanti naro'pi ca.
separated_sandhi: yasmin yoge samutpannā patim hanti kumārikātasmin yoge samutpannaḥ patnīm hanti naraḥ api ca
english: If a young girl is born in a planetary combination (yoga) that indicates the death of her husband, then a man born in that same combination (yoga) will likewise cause the death of his wife.

sanskrit: स्त्रीहन्त्रा परिणीता चेत् पतिहन्त्री कुमारिका । तदा वैधव्ययोगस्य भङ्गो भवति निश्चयात् ॥४९॥
transliteration: strīhantrā pariṇītā cet patihantrī kumārikā . tadā vaidhavyayogasya bhaṅgo bhavati niścayāt.
separated_sandhi: strīhantrā pariṇītā cet patihantrī kumārikātadā vaidhavya-yogasya bhaṅgaḥ bhavati niścayāt
english: If a girl, who is destined to kill her husband, is married by a man who has killed a woman, then the planetary combination (yoga) causing widowhood is certainly nullified.

sanskrit: मिथोंऽशस्थौ मिथोदृष्टौ सितार्की वा सितर्क्षके । घटांशे लग्नगे नारी प्रदीप्तं मदनानलम् ॥५०॥
transliteration: mithoṃ'śasthau mithodṛṣṭau sitārkī vā sitarkṣake . ghaṭāṃśe lagnage nārī pradīptaṃ madanānalam.
separated_sandhi: mithaḥ aṃśasthau mithaḥ dṛṣṭau sitārkī vā sitarkṣakeghaṭāṃśe lagna-ge nārī pradīptam madana-analam
english: If Venus and Saturn are situated in each other's divisional charts, or if they aspect each other, and if the ascendant of a woman's chart is located in a Venusian sign (Taurus or Libra) within a ghaṭāṃśa (a specific divisional portion), then she will possess an intensely blazing fire of desire.

sanskrit: संशान्तिं नयति स्त्रीभिः सुखीभिर्मदनातुरा । पराभिः पुरुषाकारस्थितभिर्द्विजसत्तम ॥५१॥
transliteration: saṃśāntiṃ nayati strībhiḥ sukhībhirmadanāturā . parābhiḥ puruṣākārasthitabhirdvijasattama.
separated_sandhi: saṃśāntim nayati strībhiḥ sukhībhiḥ madana-āturāparābhiḥ puruṣa-ākāra-sthitābhiḥ dvija-sattama
english: O best among the twice-born (dvija-sattama), a woman agitated by intense desire (madanātura) achieves pacification through interaction with happy women, and especially through other women who are situated in a male-like form or have masculine qualities.

sanskrit: कुजज्ञगुरुशुक्रैश्च बलिभिः समभे तनौ । कुशलाऽनेकशास्त्रेषु सा नारी ब्रह्मवादिनी ॥५२॥
transliteration: kujajñaguruśukraiśca balibhiḥ samabhe tanau . kuśalā'nekaśāstreṣu sā nārī brahmavādinī.
separated_sandhi: kuja-jña-guru-śukraiḥ ca balibhiḥ sama-abhetanau kuśalā aneka-śāstreṣu sā nārī brahma-vādinī
english: If Mars, Mercury, Jupiter, and Venus are strong, and the ascendant (tanu) is in an even sign, then that woman will be skilled in many sciences and a profound speaker of spiritual truths (brahman).

sanskrit: क्रूरे सप्तमगे कश्चित् खेचरो नवमे यदि । सा प्रव्रज्यां तदाप्नोति पापखेचरसंभवाम् ॥५३॥
transliteration: krūre saptamage kaścit khecaro navame yadi . sā pravrajyāṃ tadāpnoti pāpakhecarasaṃbhavām.
separated_sandhi: krūre saptamage kaścit khecaraḥ navame yadi sāpravrajyām tadā āpnoti pāpakhecarasaṃbhavām
english: If a malefic planet is situated in the seventh house, and any planet (khecara) is in the ninth house, then she obtains renunciation (pravrajyā) that arises from malefic planetary influences.

sanskrit: विलग्नादष्टमे सौम्ये पापदृग्योगवर्जिते । मृत्युः प्रागेव विज्ञेयस्तस्य मृत्युर्न संशयः ॥५४॥
transliteration: vilagnādaṣṭame saumye pāpadṛgyogavarjite . mṛtyuḥ prāgeva vijñeyastasya mṛtyurna saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: vilagnāt aṣṭame saumye pāpadṛgyogavarjite mṛtyuḥprāk eva vijñeyaḥ tasya mṛtyuḥ na saṃśayaḥ
english: If Mercury (saumya) is in the eighth house from the ascendant, and that house is devoid of malefic aspects or conjunctions, then early death (mṛtyu) should be known for that person; there is no doubt about his death.

sanskrit: अष्टमे शुभपापौ चेत् स्यातां तुल्यबलौ यदा । सह भर्त्रा तदा मृत्युं प्राप्त्वा स्वर्याति निश्चयात् ॥५५॥
transliteration: aṣṭame śubhapāpau cet syātāṃ tulyabalau yadā . saha bhartrā tadā mṛtyuṃ prāptvā svaryāti niścayāt.
separated_sandhi: aṣṭame śubhāpapau cet syātām tulyabalau yadā sahabhartrā tadā mṛtyum prāptvā svar yāti niścayāt
english: If a benefic and a malefic planet are both in the eighth house, and they are of equal strength, then she, along with her husband, attains death and certainly goes to heaven.

sanskrit: बहुधा भव्ता प्रोक्तं जन्मकालात् शुभाशुभम् । श्रोतुमिच्छामि नारोणामङ्गचिह्नैः फल मुने ॥१॥
transliteration: bahudhā bhavtā proktaṃ janmakālāt śubhāśubham . śrotumicchāmi nāroṇāmaṅgacihnaiḥ phala mune.
separated_sandhi: bahudhā bhavatā proktam janmakālāt śubhāśubhamśrotum icchāmi nārīṇām aṅgacihnaiḥ phalam mune
english: O sage (muni), you have already explained the auspicious and inauspicious results from the time of birth in many ways. Now, I wish to hear about the results for women based on their bodily marks (aṅgacihna).

sanskrit: श‍ृणु विप्र प्रवक्ष्यामि नारीणामङ्गलक्षणम् । फलं यथाऽह पार्वत्यै भगवान् शङ्करस्तथा ॥२॥
transliteration: śa‍ृṇu vipra pravakṣyāmi nārīṇāmaṅgalakṣaṇam . phalaṃ yathā'ha pārvatyai bhagavān śaṅkarastathā.
separated_sandhi: śṛṇu vipra pravakṣyāmi nārīṇām aṅgalakṣaṇam phalamyathā āha pārvatyai bhagavān śaṅkaraḥ tathā
english: O Brahmin, listen as I explain the bodily characteristics of women and their effects, just as Lord Śaṅkara described them to Pārvatī.

sanskrit: स्निग्धं पादतलं स्त्रीणां मृदुलं मांसलं समम् । रक्तमस्वेदमुष्णं च बहुभोगप्रदायकम् ॥३॥
transliteration: snigdhaṃ pādatalaṃ strīṇāṃ mṛdulaṃ māṃsalaṃ samam . raktamasvedamuṣṇaṃ ca bahubhogapradāyakam.
separated_sandhi: snigdham pādatalam strīṇām mṛdulam māṃsalamsamam raktam asvedam uṣṇam ca bahubhogapradāyakam
english: Soles of the feet of women that are smooth, soft, fleshy, even, reddish, sweatless, and warm bestow much enjoyment and prosperity.

sanskrit: विवर्णं पुरुषं रूक्षं खण्डितं विषमं तथा । सूर्पाकारञ्च शुष्कं च दुःखदौर्भाग्यदायकम् ॥४॥
transliteration: vivarṇaṃ puruṣaṃ rūkṣaṃ khaṇḍitaṃ viṣamaṃ tathā . sūrpākārañca śuṣkaṃ ca duḥkhadaurbhāgyadāyakam.
separated_sandhi: vivarṇam puruṣam rūkṣam khaṇḍitam viṣamam tathāsūrpākāram ca śuṣkam ca duḥkhadaurbhāgyadāyakam
english: Conversely, soles of the feet that are discolored, coarse, rough, cracked, uneven, shaped like a winnowing basket, and dry cause sorrow and misfortune.

sanskrit: शङ्खस्वस्तिकचक्राऽब्जध्वजमीनाऽतपत्रवत् । यस्याः पादतले चिह्नं सा ज्ञेया क्षितिपाङ्गना ॥५॥
transliteration: śaṅkhasvastikacakrā'bjadhvajamīnā'tapatravat . yasyāḥ pādatale cihnaṃ sā jñeyā kṣitipāṅganā.
separated_sandhi: śaṅkhasvastikacakrābjadhvajamīnātapatravatyasyāḥ pādatale cihnam sā jñeyā kṣitipāṅganā
english: A woman on whose sole of the foot there are signs like a conch, a svastika, a discus, a lotus, a flag, a fish, or a parasol should be known as a queen.

sanskrit: भवेत् समस्तभोगाय तथा दीर्घोर्ध्वरेखिका । रेखाः सर्पाऽखुकाकाभा दुःखदारिद्र्यसूचिकाः ॥६॥
transliteration: bhavet samastabhogāya tathā dīrghordhvarekhikā . rekhāḥ sarpā'khukākābhā duḥkhadāridryasūcikāḥ.
separated_sandhi: bhavet samastabhogāya tathā dīrghordhvarekhikā| rekhāḥ sarpākhukākābhā duḥkhadāridryasūcikāḥ
english: A long, upward-moving line indicates the enjoyment of all pleasures. Similarly, lines resembling snakes, rats, or crows are indicative of sorrow and poverty.

sanskrit: रक्ताः समुन्नताः स्निग्धा वृत्ताः पादनखाः शुभाः । स्फुटिताः कृष्णवर्णाश्च ज्ञेया अशुभसूचकाः ॥७॥
transliteration: raktāḥ samunnatāḥ snigdhā vṛttāḥ pādanakhāḥ śubhāḥ . sphuṭitāḥ kṛṣṇavarṇāśca jñeyā aśubhasūcakāḥ.
separated_sandhi: raktāḥ samunnatāḥ snigdhāḥ vṛttāḥ pādanakhāḥ śubhāḥ| sphuṭitāḥ kṛṣṇavarṇāḥ ca jñeyāḥ aśubhasūcakāḥ
english: Toenails that are reddish, well-raised, smooth, and rounded are considered auspicious. Those that are cracked and black in color should be known as indicators of inauspiciousness.

sanskrit: उन्नतो मांसलोऽङ्गुष्ठो वर्तुलोऽतुलभोगदः । वक्रो ह्रस्वश्च चिपिटो दुःखदारिद्र्यसूचकः ॥८॥
transliteration: unnato māṃsalo'ṅguṣṭho vartulo'tulabhogadaḥ . vakro hrasvaśca cipiṭo duḥkhadāridryasūcakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: unnataḥ māṃsalaḥ aṅguṣṭhaḥ vartulaḥ atulabhogadaḥ| vakraḥ hrasvaḥ ca cipiṭaḥ duḥkhadāridryasūcakaḥ
english: A thumb that is well-raised, fleshy, and rounded bestows immense enjoyment. Conversely, a crooked, short, and flat thumb indicates sorrow and poverty.

sanskrit: मृदवोऽङ्गुलयः शस्ता घना वृत्ताश्च मांसलाः । दीर्घाङ्गुलीभिः कुलटा कृशाभिर्धनवर्जिता ॥९॥
transliteration: mṛdavo'ṅgulayaḥ śastā ghanā vṛttāśca māṃsalāḥ . dīrghāṅgulībhiḥ kulaṭā kṛśābhirdhanavarjitā.
separated_sandhi: mṛdavaḥ aṅgulayaḥ śastā ghanā vṛttāḥ ca māṃsalāḥ| dīrghāṅgulībhiḥ kulaṭā kṛśābhiḥ dhanavarjitā
english: Fingers that are soft, thick, rounded, and fleshy are considered excellent. A woman with long fingers is said to be unchaste (kulaṭā), while one with thin fingers is devoid of wealth.

sanskrit: भवेद्ध्रस्वाभिरल्पायुर्विषमाभिश्च कुट्टनी । चिपटाभिर्भवेद्दासी विरलाभश्च निर्धना ॥१०॥
transliteration: bhaveddhrasvābhiralpāyurviṣamābhiśca kuṭṭanī . cipaṭābhirbhaveddāsī viralābhaśca nirdhanā.
separated_sandhi: bhavet hrasvābhiḥ alpāyuḥ viṣamābhiḥ ca kuṭṭanīcipaṭābhiḥ bhavet dāsī viralābhiḥ ca nirdhanā
english: A woman becomes short-lived if her [fingers or toes are] short. She becomes a procuress if they are uneven. She becomes a servant if they are flat. And she will be poor if they are widely spaced.

sanskrit: यस्य मिथः समारूढाः पादाङ्गुल्यो भवन्ति हि । बहुनपि पतीन् हित्वा परप्रेष्या च सा भवेत् ॥११॥
transliteration: yasya mithaḥ samārūḍhāḥ pādāṅgulyo bhavanti hi . bahunapi patīn hitvā parapreṣyā ca sā bhavet.
separated_sandhi: yasyāḥ mithaḥ samārūḍhāḥ pāda-aṅgulyaḥ bhavantihi bahūn api patīn hitvā para-preṣyā ca sā bhavet
english: Indeed, if a woman's toes are mutually overlapping, she will abandon many husbands and become a servant to others.

sanskrit: यस्या पथि चलन्त्याश्च रजो भूमेः समुच्छलेत् । सा पांसुली बह्वेन्नारी कुलत्रयविघातिनी ॥१२॥
transliteration: yasyā pathi calantyāśca rajo bhūmeḥ samucchalet . sā pāṃsulī bahvennārī kulatrayavighātinī.
separated_sandhi: yasyāḥ pathi calantyāḥ ca rajaḥ bhūmeḥ samucchaletsā pāṃsulī bahvī nārī kula-traya-vighātinī
english: If, while a woman walks on the path, dust rises from the ground due to her, she is an unchaste woman and a destroyer of three families.

sanskrit: यस्याः कनिष्ठिका भूमिं गच्छन्त्या न परिस्पृशेत् । सा हि पूर्वपतिं हत्वा द्वितीयं कुरुते पतिम् ॥१३॥
transliteration: yasyāḥ kaniṣṭhikā bhūmiṃ gacchantyā na parispṛśet . sā hi pūrvapatiṃ hatvā dvitīyaṃ kurute patim.
separated_sandhi: yasyāḥ kaniṣṭhikā bhūmim gacchantyāḥ na parispṛśetsā hi pūrva-patim hatvā dvitīyam kurute patim
english: If her little finger or toe does not touch the ground while she walks, she will indeed kill her first husband and take a second one.

sanskrit: मध्यमाऽनामिका चापि यस्या भूमिं न संस्पृशेत् । पतिहीना च सा नारी विज्ञेया द्विजसत्तम ॥१४॥
transliteration: madhyamā'nāmikā cāpi yasyā bhūmiṃ na saṃspṛśet . patihīnā ca sā nārī vijñeyā dvijasattama.
separated_sandhi: madhyamā anāmikā ca api yasyā bhūmim na saṃspṛśetpatihīnā ca sā nārī vijñeyā dvijasattama
english: O best among the twice-born (dvijasattama), a woman whose middle and ring fingers do not touch the ground should be understood as one who will be without a husband.

sanskrit: प्रदेशिनी भवेद्यस्या अंगुष्ठाद्व्यतिरेकिणी । कन्यैव दूषिता सा स्यात् कुलटा च तदग्रतः ॥१५॥
transliteration: pradeśinī bhavedyasyā aṃguṣṭhādvyatirekiṇī . kanyaiva dūṣitā sā syāt kulaṭā ca tadagrataḥ.
separated_sandhi: pradeśinī bhavet yasyā aṅguṣṭhāt vyatirekiṇīkanyā eva dūṣitā sā syāt kulaṭā ca tat agrataḥ
english: If a girl's index finger is disproportionately long compared to her thumb, she is considered defiled; and subsequently, she becomes an unchaste woman (kulaṭā).

sanskrit: उन्नतं पादपृष्ठं चेत् तदा राज्ञी भवेद्ध्रुवम् । अस्वेदमशिराढ्यञ्च मांसलं मसृणं मृदु ॥१६॥
transliteration: unnataṃ pādapṛṣṭhaṃ cet tadā rājñī bhaveddhruvam . asvedamaśirāḍhyañca māṃsalaṃ masṛṇaṃ mṛdu.
separated_sandhi: unnatam pādapṛṣṭham cet tadā rājñī bhavet dhruvamasvedam aśirāḍhyam ca māṃsalam masṛṇam mṛdu
english: If the instep (pādapṛṣṭha) of a woman's foot is raised, then she will certainly be a queen. Furthermore, the foot should be without sweat, free of prominent veins, fleshy, smooth, and soft.

sanskrit: अन्यथा धनहीना च शिरालं चेत्तदाऽध्वगा । रोमाढ्यं चेद् भवेद्दासी निर्मासं यदि दुर्भगा ॥१७॥
transliteration: anyathā dhanahīnā ca śirālaṃ cettadā'dhvagā . romāḍhyaṃ ced bhaveddāsī nirmāsaṃ yadi durbhagā.
separated_sandhi: anyathā dhanahīnā ca śirālam cet tadā adhvagaromāḍhyam cet bhavet dāsī nirmāsam yadi durbhagā
english: Otherwise, she will be poor. If the foot is veiny, she becomes a wanderer. If it is hairy, she will be a maidservant (dāsī). If it is fleshless, she will be unfortunate (durbhagā).

sanskrit: सुभगा समपार्ष्णिः स्त्री पृथुपार्ष्णिश्च दुर्भगा । कुलटोन्नतपार्ष्णिश्च दीर्घपार्ष्णिश्च दुःखिता ॥१८॥
transliteration: subhagā samapārṣṇiḥ strī pṛthupārṣṇiśca durbhagā . kulaṭonnatapārṣṇiśca dīrghapārṣṇiśca duḥkhitā.
separated_sandhi: subhagā samapārṣṇiḥ strī pṛthupārṣṇiḥ ca durbhagākulaṭā unnatapārṣṇiḥ ca dīrghapārṣṇiḥ ca duḥkhitā
english: A woman with even heels is fortunate. However, one with broad heels is unfortunate. An unchaste woman, and one with raised heels, and one with long heels, are unhappy.

sanskrit: अरोमे च समे स्निग्धे यस्या जंघ सुवर्तुले । विसिरे च सुरम्ये सा राजपत्नी भवेद्ध्रुवम् ॥१९॥
transliteration: arome ca same snigdhe yasyā jaṃgha suvartule . visire ca suramye sā rājapatnī bhaveddhruvam.
separated_sandhi: arome ca same snigdhe yasyā jaṃghā suvartulevisire ca suramye sā rājapatnī bhavet dhruvam
english: She whose shanks are hairless, even, smooth, well-rounded, veinless, and very beautiful will certainly become a queen.

sanskrit: वर्तुलं मांसलं स्निग्धं जानुयुग्मं शुभप्रदम् । निर्मासं स्वैरचारिण्या निर्धनायाश्च विश्लथम् ॥२०॥
transliteration: vartulaṃ māṃsalaṃ snigdhaṃ jānuyugmaṃ śubhapradam . nirmāsaṃ svairacāriṇyā nirdhanāyāśca viślatham.
separated_sandhi: vartulaṃ māṃsalaṃ snigdhaṃ jānuyugmaṃ śubhapradaṃnirmāsaṃ svairacāriṇyā nirdhanāyāḥ ca viślatham
english: A rounded, fleshy, and smooth pair of knees is auspicious. In contrast, fleshless and loose knees are characteristic of a dissolute woman and a poor woman.

sanskrit: घनौ करिकराकारौ वर्तुलौ मृदुलौ शुभौ । यस्या ऊरू शिराहीनौ सा राज्ञी भवति ध्रुवम् ॥२१॥
transliteration: ghanau karikarākārau vartulau mṛdulau śubhau . yasyā ūrū śirāhīnau sā rājñī bhavati dhruvam.
separated_sandhi: ghanau karikarākārau vartulau mṛdulau śubhāuyasyā ūrū śirāhīnau sā rājñī bhavati dhruvam
english: She whose thighs are thick, shaped like an elephant's trunk, rounded, soft, beautiful, and veinless, certainly becomes a queen.

sanskrit: चिपिटौ रोमशौ यस्या विधवा दुर्भगा च सा । चतुर्भिर्विशतियुतैरंगुलैश्च समा कटिः । समुन्नतनितम्बाढ्या प्रशस्ता स्यात् मृगीदृशाम् ॥२२॥
transliteration: cipiṭau romaśau yasyā vidhavā durbhagā ca sā . caturbhirviśatiyutairaṃgulaiśca samā kaṭiḥ . samunnatanitambāḍhyā praśastā syāt mṛgīdṛśām.
separated_sandhi: cipiṭau romaśau yasyāḥ vidhavādurbhagā ca sā caturbhiḥ viṃśati-yutaiḥaṅgulaiḥ ca samā kaṭiḥsamunnatantambāḍhyā praśastā syāt mṛgī-dṛśām
english: If a woman's hips are flat and hairy, she will be a widow and unfortunate. However, a waist that measures twenty-four angulas and is adorned with prominent buttocks is considered excellent for women with deer-like eyes.

sanskrit: विनता चिपटा दीर्घा निर्मांसा संकटा कटिः । ह्रस्वा रोमैः समायुक्ता दुःखवैधव्यसूचिका ॥२३॥
transliteration: vinatā cipaṭā dīrghā nirmāṃsā saṃkaṭā kaṭiḥ . hrasvā romaiḥ samāyuktā duḥkhavaidhavyasūcikā.
separated_sandhi: vinatā cipaṭā dīrghā nirmāṃsā saṅkaṭā kaṭiḥhrasvā romaiḥ samāyuktā duḥkha-vaidhavya-sūcikā
english: A waist that is bent, flat, long, lean, narrow, short, and covered with hair indicates sorrow and widowhood.

sanskrit: नतिम्बः शुभदः स्त्रीणामुन्नतो मांसलः पृथुः । सुखसौभाग्यदः प्रोक्तो ज्ञेयो दुःखप्रदोऽन्यथा ॥२४॥
transliteration: natimbaḥ śubhadaḥ strīṇāmunnato māṃsalaḥ pṛthuḥ . sukhasaubhāgyadaḥ prokto jñeyo duḥkhaprado'nyathā.
separated_sandhi: nitambaḥ śubha-daḥ strīṇām unnataḥ māṃsalaḥ pṛthuḥsukha-saubhāgya-daḥ proktaḥ jñeyaḥ duḥkha-pradaḥ anyathā
english: For women, prominent, fleshy, and broad hips are considered auspicious, bringing happiness and good fortune. Otherwise, they are known to bring sorrow.

sanskrit: स्त्रीणां गूढमणिस्तुङ्गो रक्ताभो मृदुरोमकः । भगः कमठपृष्ठाभः शुभोऽश्वत्थगलाकृतिः ॥२५॥
transliteration: strīṇāṃ gūḍhamaṇistuṅgo raktābho mṛduromakaḥ . bhagaḥ kamaṭhapṛṣṭhābhaḥ śubho'śvatthagalākṛtiḥ.
separated_sandhi: strīṇām gūḍha-maṇiḥ tuṅgaḥ rakta-ābhaḥ mṛdu-romakaḥbhagaḥ kamaṭha-pṛṣṭha-ābhaḥ śubhaḥ aśvattha-gala-ākṛtiḥ
english: For women, an auspicious vulva (bhaga) has a prominent, reddish, and softly hairy clitoris (gūḍhamaṇi). Its overall shape resembles a turtle's back and the stalk of a pipal leaf.

sanskrit: कुरङ्गखुररूपो यश्चुल्लिकोदरसंनिभिः । रोमशो दृश्यनासश्च विवृत्तास्योऽशुभप्रदः ॥२६॥
transliteration: kuraṅgakhurarūpo yaścullikodarasaṃnibhiḥ . romaśo dṛśyanāsaśca vivṛttāsyo'śubhapradaḥ.
separated_sandhi: kuraṅgakhurarūpaḥ yaḥ cullikodarasannibhiḥromaśaḥ dṛśyanāsaḥ ca vivṛttāsyaḥ aśubhapradaḥ
english: One who has feet shaped like a deer's hoof, a belly resembling a hearth's depression, is very hairy, has a nose with visible veins, and an open mouth, is considered inauspicious.

sanskrit: वामोन्नतस्तु कन्याजः पुत्रोजो दक्षिणोन्नतः । शङ्खावर्तो भगो यस्याः सा विगर्भाऽङ्गना मता ॥२७॥
transliteration: vāmonnatastu kanyājaḥ putrojo dakṣiṇonnataḥ . śaṅkhāvarto bhago yasyāḥ sā vigarbhā'ṅganā matā.
separated_sandhi: vāmonnataḥ tu kanyājaḥ putrojaḥ dakṣiṇonnataḥśaṅkhāvartaḥ bhagaḥ yasyāḥ sā vigarbhā aṅganā matā
english: If the female genital area is elevated on the left side, it indicates daughters; if elevated on the right, it indicates sons. However, if a woman's vulva (bhaga) has a conch-like spiral, she is considered barren.

sanskrit: मृद्वी वस्तिः प्रशस्ता स्याद् विपुलाल्पसमुन्नता । रोमाढ्या च शिराला च रेखाङ्का न शुभप्रदा ॥२८॥
transliteration: mṛdvī vastiḥ praśastā syād vipulālpasamunnatā . romāḍhyā ca śirālā ca rekhāṅkā na śubhapradā.
separated_sandhi: mṛdvī vastiḥ praśastā syāt vipulālpasamunnatāromāḍhyā ca śirālā ca rekhāṅkā na śubhaprada
english: A soft waist/pelvis is considered excellent if it is broad and slightly elevated. However, one that is very hairy, veiny, or marked with lines is not auspicious.

sanskrit: गम्भीरा दक्षिणावर्ता नाभिः सर्वसुखप्रदा । व्यक्तग्रन्थिः समुत्ताना वामावर्ता न शोभना ॥२९॥
transliteration: gambhīrā dakṣiṇāvartā nābhiḥ sarvasukhapradā . vyaktagranthiḥ samuttānā vāmāvartā na śobhanā.
separated_sandhi: gambhīrā dakṣiṇāvartā nābhiḥ sarvasukhapradāvyaktagranthiḥ samuttānā vāmāvartā na śobhanā
english: A deep navel with a clockwise spiral bestows all happiness. One with a prominent knot, or which is shallow/raised, or has an anti-clockwise spiral, is not auspicious.

sanskrit: पृथुकुक्षिः शुभा नारी सूते सा च बहून् सुतान् । भूपतिं जनयेत् पुत्रं मण्डूकाभेन कुक्षिणा ॥३०॥
transliteration: pṛthukukṣiḥ śubhā nārī sūte sā ca bahūn sutān . bhūpatiṃ janayet putraṃ maṇḍūkābhena kukṣiṇā.
separated_sandhi: pṛthukukṣiḥ śubhā nārī sūte sā ca bahūn sutān| bhūpatim janayet putram maṇḍūkābhena kukṣiṇā
english: If a woman has a broad abdomen, she is auspicious and gives birth to many sons. However, if she has a frog-like abdomen, she will give birth to a son who becomes a king.

sanskrit: उन्नतेन वलीभाजा सावर्तेन च कुक्षिणा । वन्ध्या संन्यासिनी दासी जायते क्रमदोऽबला ॥३१॥
transliteration: unnatena valībhājā sāvartena ca kukṣiṇā . vandhyā saṃnyāsinī dāsī jāyate kramado'balā.
separated_sandhi: unnatena valībhājā sāvartena ca kukṣiṇā |vandhyā saṃnyāsinī dāsī jāyate kramadaḥ abalā
english: If a woman has a prominent abdomen, she becomes barren. If she has a wrinkled abdomen, she becomes a renunciate (saṃnyāsinī). And if her abdomen has a swirl-like mark, she becomes a maidservant; these outcomes occur successively for such women.

sanskrit: समे समांशे मृदुले पार्श्वे स्त्रीणां शुभप्रदे । उन्नते रोमसंयुक्ते शिराले चाऽशुभप्रदे ॥३२॥
transliteration: same samāṃśe mṛdule pārśve strīṇāṃ śubhaprade . unnate romasaṃyukte śirāle cā'śubhaprade.
separated_sandhi: same samāṃśe mṛdule pārśve strīṇām śubhaprde| unnate romasaṃyukte śirāle ca aśubhaprde
english: For women, if the flanks (sides of the body) are even, symmetrical, and soft, they bestow auspiciousness. Conversely, if the flanks are prominent, hairy, and veiny, they bring inauspicious results.

sanskrit: निर्लोभं हृदयं स्त्रीणां समे सर्वसुखप्रदम् । विस्तीर्णं च सलोमं च विज्ञेयमशुभप्रदम् ॥३३॥
transliteration: nirlobhaṃ hṛdayaṃ strīṇāṃ same sarvasukhapradam . vistīrṇaṃ ca salomaṃ ca vijñeyamaśubhapradam.
separated_sandhi: nirlobham hṛdayam strīṇām same sarvasukhapradam| vistīrṇam ca salomam ca vijñeyam aśubhpradam
english: For women, an even and ungreedy heart bestows all happiness. However, a heart that is broad and hairy should be understood as bringing inauspicious results.

sanskrit: समौ पीनौ घनौ वृत्तौ दृढौ शस्तौ पयोध्रौ । स्थूलाग्रौ विरलौ शुष्कौ स्त्रीणां नैव शुभप्रदौ ॥३४॥
transliteration: samau pīnau ghanau vṛttau dṛḍhau śastau payodhrau . sthūlāgrau viralau śuṣkau strīṇāṃ naiva śubhapradau.
separated_sandhi: samau pīnau ghanau vṛttau dṛḍhau śastau payodhrausthūlāgrau viralau śuṣkau strīṇām na eva śubhapradau
english: Breasts that are symmetrical, plump, dense, round, firm, and auspicious are considered good. Conversely, breasts that have thick nipples, are sparse (or widely separated), or shriveled are certainly not conducive to good fortune for women.

sanskrit: दक्षिणोन्नतवक्षोजा नारी पुत्रवती मता । वामोन्नतस्तनी कन्याप्रजा प्रोक्ता पुरातनैः ॥३५॥
transliteration: dakṣiṇonnatavakṣojā nārī putravatī matā . vāmonnatastanī kanyāprajā proktā purātanaiḥ.
separated_sandhi: dakṣiṇonnatavakṣojā nārī putravatī matāvāmonnatastanī kanyāprajā proktā purātanaiḥ
english: A woman whose right breast is elevated is considered to be a mother of sons. A woman whose left breast is elevated is declared by the ancients to be a mother of daughters.

sanskrit: नारीणां चूचुके शस्ते श्यामवर्णे सुवर्तुले । अन्तर्भग्ने च दीर्घे च कृशे चापि न शोभने ॥३६॥
transliteration: nārīṇāṃ cūcuke śaste śyāmavarṇe suvartule . antarbhagne ca dīrghe ca kṛśe cāpi na śobhane.
separated_sandhi: nārīṇām cūcuke śaste śyāmavarṇe suvartuleantarbhagne ca dīrghe ca kṛśe ca api na śobhane
english: For women, nipples that are auspicious, dark-colored, and well-rounded are considered excellent. Conversely, those that are sunken, long, or thin are not beautiful or pleasing.

sanskrit: स्त्रीणां स्कन्धौ समौ पुष्टौ गूढसन्धी शुभप्रदौ । रोमाढ्यावुन्नतौ वक्रौ निर्मासावशुभौ स्मृतौ ॥३७॥
transliteration: strīṇāṃ skandhau samau puṣṭau gūḍhasandhī śubhapradau . romāḍhyāvunnatau vakrau nirmāsāvaśubhau smṛtau.
separated_sandhi: strīṇām skandhau samau puṣṭau gūḍhasandhī śubhapradauromāḍhyau unnatau vakrau nirmāsau aśubhāu smṛtau
english: For women, shoulders that are even, well-developed, and have firm (hidden) joints are considered auspicious. Conversely, those that are excessively hairy, elevated, crooked, or lacking flesh are considered inauspicious.

sanskrit: सुसूक्ष्मरोमे नारीणां पुष्टे स्निग्धे शुभप्रदे । कक्षे शिराले गम्भीरे न शुभे स्वेदमेदुरे ॥३८॥
transliteration: susūkṣmarome nārīṇāṃ puṣṭe snigdhe śubhaprade . kakṣe śirāle gambhīre na śubhe svedamedure.
separated_sandhi: susūkṣmarome nārīṇām puṣṭe snigdhe śubhapradekakṣe śirāle gambhīre na śubhe svedamedure
english: For women, armpits that have very fine hair, are plump, smooth, and bestow auspiciousness are considered good. In contrast, those that are veiny, deep, inauspicious, or excessively sweaty and fatty are not favorable.

sanskrit: गूढास्थी कोमलग्रन्थी विशिरौ च बिरोमकौ । सरलौ सुवर्तुलौ चैव भुजौ शस्तौ मृगीदृशाम् ॥३९॥
transliteration: gūḍhāsthī komalagranthī viśirau ca biromakau . saralau suvartulau caiva bhujau śastau mṛgīdṛśām.
separated_sandhi: gūḍhāsthī komalgranthī viśirau ca biromakausaralau suvartulau ca eva bhujau śastau mṛgīdṛśām
english: For women whose eyes resemble a deer's (mṛgīdṛśām), arms that have concealed bones, soft joints, are free of prominent veins, hairless, straight, and well-rounded are considered auspicious.

sanskrit: निर्मांसौ स्थूलरोमाणौ ह्रस्वौ चैव शिराततौ । वक्रौ भुजौ च नारीणां क्लेशाय परिकीर्तितौ ॥४०॥
transliteration: nirmāṃsau sthūlaromāṇau hrasvau caiva śirātatau . vakrau bhujau ca nārīṇāṃ kleśāya parikīrtitau.
separated_sandhi: nirmāṃsau sthūlaromāṇau hrasvau ca eva śirātatouvakrau bhujau ca nārīṇām kleśāya parikīrtitau
english: For women, arms that are thin, covered with coarse hair, short, marked by prominent veins, and crooked are said to lead to distress (kleśa).

sanskrit: सरोजमुकुलाकारो करांगुष्ठौ मृगीदृशाम् । सर्वसौख्यप्रदौ प्रोक्तौ कृशौ वक्रौ च दुःखदौ ॥४१॥
transliteration: sarojamukulākāro karāṃguṣṭhau mṛgīdṛśām . sarvasaukhyapradau proktau kṛśau vakrau ca duḥkhadau.
separated_sandhi: sarojamukulākārau karāṅguṣṭhau mṛgīdṛśāmsarvasaukhyapradau proktau kṛśau vakrau ca duḥkhadau
english: For women whose eyes resemble a deer's (mṛgīdṛśām), thumbs (karāṅguṣṭhau) shaped like a lotus bud are declared to bestow all happiness. In contrast, those that are thin and crooked bring unhappiness.

sanskrit: स्त्रीणां करतलं रक्तं मध्योन्नतमरन्ध्रकम् । मृदुलं चाल्परेखाढ्यं ज्ञेयं सर्वसुखप्रदम् ॥४२॥
transliteration: strīṇāṃ karatalaṃ raktaṃ madhyonnatamarandhrakam . mṛdulaṃ cālparekhāḍhyaṃ jñeyaṃ sarvasukhapradam.
separated_sandhi: strīṇām karatalam raktam madhyonnatam arandhrakammṛdulam ca alparekhāḍhyam jñeyam sarvasukhapradam
english: A woman's palm that is red, raised in the middle, free of gaps, soft, and adorned with few lines should be understood to bestow all kinds of happiness and prosperity.

sanskrit: विधवा बहुरेखेण रेखाहीनेन निर्धने । भिक्षुका च शिरोढ्येन नारी करतलेन हि ॥४३॥
transliteration: vidhavā bahurekheṇa rekhāhīnena nirdhane . bhikṣukā ca śiroḍhyena nārī karatalena hi.
separated_sandhi: vidhavā bahurekhēṇa rekhāhīṇena nirdhanebhikṣukā ca śiroḍhyena nārī karatalena hi
english: A woman is known to be a widow by a palm with many lines. She lives in poverty due to a palm without lines. And a woman is a beggar if her palm has a prominent center; indeed, this is indicated by the hand (karatala).

sanskrit: पाणिपृष्ठं शुभं स्त्रीणां पुष्टं मृदुविरोमकम् । शिरालं रोमशं निम्नां दुखदारिद्र्यसूचकम् ॥४४॥
transliteration: pāṇipṛṣṭhaṃ śubhaṃ strīṇāṃ puṣṭaṃ mṛduviromakam . śirālaṃ romaśaṃ nimnāṃ dukhadāridryasūcakam.
separated_sandhi: pāṇipṛṣṭham śubham strīṇām puṣṭam mṛduviromakamśirālam romaśam nimnām duḥkhadāridryasūcakam
english: For women, the back of the hand is auspicious if it is plump, soft, and free of hair. Conversely, if it is veined, hairy, and sunken, it indicates sorrow and poverty.

sanskrit: यस्याः करतले रेखा व्यक्ता रक्ता च वर्तुला । स्निग्धा पूर्णा च गम्भीरा सा सर्वसुखभागिनी ॥४५॥
transliteration: yasyāḥ karatale rekhā vyaktā raktā ca vartulā . snigdhā pūrṇā ca gambhīrā sā sarvasukhabhāginī.
separated_sandhi: yasyāḥ karatale rekhā vyaktā raktā ca vartulāsnigdhā pūrṇā ca gambhīrā sā sarvasukhābhāginī
english: A woman whose palm line is distinct, reddish, curved, smooth, full, and deep, she becomes a partaker of all kinds of happiness and prosperity.

sanskrit: मत्स्येन सुभगा ज्ञेया स्वस्तिकेन धनान्विता । राजपत्नी सरोजेन जननी पृथिवीपतेः ॥४६॥
transliteration: matsyena subhagā jñeyā svastikena dhanānvitā . rājapatnī sarojena jananī pṛthivīpateḥ.
separated_sandhi: matsyena subhagā jñeyā svastikena dhanānvitārājapatnī sarojena jananī pṛthivīpateḥ
english: She whose hand bears the fish (matsya) sign is known to be fortunate. One with the svastika sign is endowed with wealth. A royal queen (rājapatnī), the mother of an earth-ruler (pṛthivīpati), has the lotus (saroja) sign.

sanskrit: सार्वभौमप्रिया पाणौ नद्यावर्ते प्रदक्षिणे । शङ्खातपत्रकमठैर्भूपस्य जननी भवेत् ॥४७॥
transliteration: sārvabhaumapriyā pāṇau nadyāvarte pradakṣiṇe . śaṅkhātapatrakamaṭhairbhūpasya jananī bhavet.
separated_sandhi: sārvabhaumapriyā pāṇau nadyāvarte pradakṣiṇeśaṅkhātapatrakamaṭhaiḥ bhūpasya jananī bhavet
english: If a woman has the mark of one dear to a universal sovereign (sarvabhaumapriyā) on her palm, or an auspicious clockwise river-whirl (nadyāvarta), or marks of conch, umbrella, or tortoise, she will become the mother of a king.

sanskrit: रेखा तुलाकृतिः पाणौ यस्याः सा हि बणिग्वधूः । गजवाजिवृषाभा वा करे वामे मृगीदृशः ॥४८॥
transliteration: rekhā tulākṛtiḥ pāṇau yasyāḥ sā hi baṇigvadhūḥ . gajavājivṛṣābhā vā kare vāme mṛgīdṛśaḥ.
separated_sandhi: rekhā tulākṛtiḥ pāṇau yasyāḥ sā hi baṇigvadhūḥgajavājivṛṣābhā vā kare vāme mṛgīdṛśaḥ
english: A woman whose palm bears a line shaped like a balance (tulākṛti) is certainly a merchant's wife. Alternatively, if marks resembling an elephant, a horse, or a bull appear on the left hand of a deer-eyed woman (mṛgīdṛś), she too is destined for prosperity.

sanskrit: रेखा प्रसादवज्राभा सूते तीर्थकरं सुतम् । कृषीवलस्य पत्नी स्याच्छकटेन युगेन वा ॥४९॥
transliteration: rekhā prasādavajrābhā sūte tīrthakaraṃ sutam . kṛṣīvalasya patnī syācchakaṭena yugena vā.
separated_sandhi: rekhā prasādavajrābhā sūte tīrthakaram sutamkṛṣīvalasya patnī syāt śakaṭena yugena vā
english: A line resembling a splendid diamond (prasādavajrābhā) on a woman's hand indicates she will give birth to a son who becomes a Tīrthaṅkara (tīrthakara). The wife of a farmer (kṛṣīvala) will have marks of a cart (śakaṭa) or a yoke (yuga).

sanskrit: चामराङ्कुशचापैश्च राजपत्नी पतिव्रता । त्रिशूलाऽसिगदाशक्तिदुन्दुभ्याकृतिरेखया ॥५०॥
transliteration: cāmarāṅkuśacāpaiśca rājapatnī pativratā . triśūlā'sigadāśaktidundubhyākṛtirekhayā.
separated_sandhi: cāmarāṅkuśacāpaiḥ ca rājapatnī pativratātriśūlāsigadāśaktidundubhyākṛtirekhayā
english: A royal wife (rājapatnī) who is devoted to her husband (pativratā) is characterized by marks resembling fly-whisks (cāmara), elephant goads (aṅkuśa), and bows (cāpa), as well as by a line (rekhā) shaped like a trident (triśūla), sword (asi), mace (gadā), spear (śakti), or drum (dundubhi).

sanskrit: अङ्गुष्ठमूलान्निर्गत्या रेखा याति कनिष्ठिकाम् । सा नारि पतिहन्त्री स्याद् दूरतस्तां परित्यजेत् ॥५१॥
transliteration: aṅguṣṭhamūlānnirgatyā rekhā yāti kaniṣṭhikām . sā nāri patihantrī syād dūratastāṃ parityajet.
separated_sandhi: aṅguṣṭhamūlāt nirgatya rekhā yāti kaniṣṭhikāmsā nāri patihantrī syāt dūrataḥ tām parityajet
english: If a line (rekhā) emerges from the base of the thumb (aṅguṣṭhamūla) and extends to the little finger (kaniṣṭhikā), that woman (nārī) would be a killer of her husband (patihantrī); one should abandon her from a distance.

sanskrit: काकमण्डूकजम्बूकवृकवृश्चिकभोगिनः । रासभोष्ट्रविडालाभा रेखा दुःखप्रदाः स्त्रियाः ॥५२॥
transliteration: kākamaṇḍūkajambūkavṛkavṛścikabhoginaḥ . rāsabhoṣṭraviḍālābhā rekhā duḥkhapradāḥ striyāḥ.
separated_sandhi: kākamaṇḍūkajambūkavṛkavṛścikabhoginaḥrāsabhoṣṭraviḍālāsabhā rekhā duḥkhapradāḥ striyāḥ
english: Lines (rekhāḥ) that resemble a crow (kāka), a frog (maṇḍūka), a jackal (jambūka), a wolf (vṛka), a scorpion (vṛścika), a serpent (bhogin), a donkey (rāsabha), a camel (uṣṭra), or a cat (viḍāla) bring misery to women.

sanskrit: मृदुलाश्च सुपर्वाणो दीर्घा वृत्ताः क्रमात् कृशाः । अरोमकाः शुभाः स्त्रीणामङ्गुल्यः परिकीर्तिताः ॥५३॥
transliteration: mṛdulāśca suparvāṇo dīrghā vṛttāḥ kramāt kṛśāḥ . aromakāḥ śubhāḥ strīṇāmaṅgulyaḥ parikīrtitāḥ.
separated_sandhi: mṛdulāḥ ca suparvāṇaḥ dīrghā vṛttāḥ kramāt kṛśāḥaromakāḥ śubhāḥ strīṇām aṅgulyaḥ parikīrtitāḥ
english: Fingers (aṅgulyaḥ) that are soft (mṛdulāḥ), possess good joints (suparvāṇaḥ), are long (dīrghāḥ), round (vṛttāḥ), gradually slender (kramāt kṛśāḥ), and hairless (aromakāḥ) are declared (parikīrtitāḥ) to be auspicious (śubhāḥ) for women (strīṇām).

sanskrit: अतिह्रस्वाः कृशा वक्रा विरला रोमसंयुताः । बहुपर्वयुता वाऽपि पर्वहीनाश्च दुःखदाः ॥५४॥
transliteration: atihrasvāḥ kṛśā vakrā viralā romasaṃyutāḥ . bahuparvayutā vā'pi parvahīnāśca duḥkhadāḥ.
separated_sandhi: atihrasvāḥ kṛśāḥ vakrāḥ viralāḥ romasaṃyutāḥbahuparvayutāḥ vā api parvahīnāḥ ca duḥkhadāḥ
english: Features that are excessively short, thin, crooked, sparse, or hairy, or those that possess many joints or even none at all, cause sorrow.

sanskrit: रक्तवर्णा नखास्तुङ्गा सशिखाश्च शुभप्रदाः । निम्ना विवर्णा पीता वा पुष्पिता दुःखदायकाः ॥५५॥
transliteration: raktavarṇā nakhāstuṅgā saśikhāśca śubhapradāḥ . nimnā vivarṇā pītā vā puṣpitā duḥkhadāyakāḥ.
separated_sandhi: raktavarṇāḥ nakhāḥ tuṅgāḥ saśikhāḥ ca śubhapradāḥnimnāḥ vivarṇāḥ pītāḥ vā puṣpitāḥ duḥkhadāyakāḥ
english: Nails that are red-colored, prominent, and pointed bring auspicious results. However, those that are sunken, discolored, yellow, or marked with white spots cause sorrow.

sanskrit: अन्तर्निमग्नवंशास्थि पृष्ठं स्यान्मांसलं शुभम् । सशिरं रोमयुक्तं वा वक्रं चाऽशुभदायकम् ॥५६॥
transliteration: antarnimagnavaṃśāsthi pṛṣṭhaṃ syānmāṃsalaṃ śubham . saśiraṃ romayuktaṃ vā vakraṃ cā'śubhadāyakam.
separated_sandhi: antarnimagnavaṃśāsthi pṛṣṭham syāt māṃsalam śubhamsaśiram romayuktam vā vakram ca aśubhadāyakam
english: A back whose spinal bone is deeply set and which is fleshy is considered auspicious. Conversely, a back that is protuberant, hairy, or crooked brings inauspicious results.

sanskrit: स्त्रीणां कण्थस्त्रिरेखाङ्कस्त्वव्यक्तास्थिश्च वर्तुलः । मांसलो मृदुलैश्चैव प्रशस्तफलदायकाः ॥५७॥
transliteration: strīṇāṃ kaṇthastrirekhāṅkastvavyaktāsthiśca vartulaḥ . māṃsalo mṛdulaiścaiva praśastaphaladāyakāḥ.
separated_sandhi: strīṇām kaṇṭhaḥ trirekhāṅkaḥ tu avyaktāsthiḥ cavartulaḥ māṃsalaḥ mṛdulaiḥ ca eva praśastaphaladāyakāḥ
english: For women, a neck that has three lines, indistinct bones, and is round, fleshy, and soft, yields excellent results.

sanskrit: स्थूलग्रीवः च विधवा वक्रग्रीव च किङ्करी । बन्ध्या च चिपिटग्रीवा लघुग्रीवा च निःसुता ॥५८॥
transliteration: sthūlagrīvaḥ ca vidhavā vakragrīva ca kiṅkarī . bandhyā ca cipiṭagrīvā laghugrīvā ca niḥsutā.
separated_sandhi: sthūlagrīvaḥ ca vidhavā vakragrīva ca kiṅkarī| bandhyā ca cipiṭagrīvā laghugrīvā ca niḥsutā
english: A woman with a thick neck becomes a widow. One with a crooked neck becomes a maidservant. A flat-necked woman is barren, and a short-necked woman is childless.

sanskrit: श्रेष्ठा कृकाटिका ऋज्वी समांसा च समुन्नता । शुष्का शिराला रोमाढ्या विशाला कुटिलाऽसुभा ॥५९॥
transliteration: śreṣṭhā kṛkāṭikā ṛjvī samāṃsā ca samunnatā . śuṣkā śirālā romāḍhyā viśālā kuṭilā'subhā.
separated_sandhi: śreṣṭhā kṛkāṭikā ṛjvī samāṃsā ca samunnatā| śuṣkā śirālā romāḍhyā viśālā kuṭilā asubhā
english: An excellent nape of the neck is straight, fleshy, and elevated. A dry, veiny, hairy, broad, or crooked nape is inauspicious.

sanskrit: अरुणं मृदुलं पुष्टं प्रशस्तं चिबुकं स्त्रियाः । आयतं रोमशं स्थूलं द्विधाभक्तमशोभनम् ॥६०॥
transliteration: aruṇaṃ mṛdulaṃ puṣṭaṃ praśastaṃ cibukaṃ striyāḥ . āyataṃ romaśaṃ sthūlaṃ dvidhābhaktamaśobhanam.
separated_sandhi: aruṇaṃ mṛdulaṃ puṣṭaṃ praśastaṃ cibukaṃ striyāḥ| āyataṃ romaśaṃ sthūlaṃ dvidhābhaktam aśobhanam
english: For a woman, a chin that is reddish, soft, well-nourished, and excellent is praiseworthy. A chin that is long, hairy, thick, or divided into two is unlovely.

sanskrit: कपोलावुन्नतौ स्त्रीणां पीनौ वृत्तौ शुभप्रदौ । रोमशौ पुरुषौ निम्नौ निर्मांसौ चाऽशुभप्रदौ ॥६१॥
transliteration: kapolāvunnatau strīṇāṃ pīnau vṛttau śubhapradau . romaśau puruṣau nimnau nirmāṃsau cā'śubhapradau.
separated_sandhi: kapolau unnatau strīṇāṃ pīnau vṛttau śubhapradaau| romaśau puruṣau nimnau nirmāṃsau ca aśubhapradaau
english: For women, prominent, plump, and round cheeks bestow auspiciousness. Hairy, masculine, sunken, or fleshless cheeks are inauspicious.

sanskrit: स्त्रीणां मुखं समं पृष्ठं वर्तुलं च सुगन्धिमत् । सुस्निग्धं च मनोहारि सुखसौभाग्यसूचकम् ॥६२॥
transliteration: strīṇāṃ mukhaṃ samaṃ pṛṣṭhaṃ vartulaṃ ca sugandhimat . susnigdhaṃ ca manohāri sukhasaubhāgyasūcakam.
separated_sandhi: strīṇām mukham samam pṛṣṭham vartulam ca sugandhimatsusnigdham ca manohāri sukhasaubhāgyasūcakam
english: A woman's face that is smooth-surfaced, evenly contoured, round, fragrant, very lustrous, and charming, indicates happiness and good fortune.

sanskrit: वर्तुलः पाटलः स्निग्धारेखाभूषितमध्यभूः । मनोहरोऽधरो यस्याः सा भवेद् राजवल्लभा ॥६३॥
transliteration: vartulaḥ pāṭalaḥ snigdhārekhābhūṣitamadhyabhūḥ . manoharo'dharo yasyāḥ sā bhaved rājavallabhā.
separated_sandhi: vartulaḥ pāṭalaḥ snigdhārekhābhūṣitamadhyabhūḥmanoharaḥ adharaḥ yasyāḥ sā bhavet rājavallabhā
english: A woman whose lower lip is round, rosy, lustrous, charming, and has its central part adorned with fine lines, will become a beloved of a king (rājavallabhā).

sanskrit: निर्मांसः स्फुटितो लम्बो रूक्षो वा श्यामवर्णकः । स्थूलोऽधरश्च नारीणां वैधव्यक्लेशसूचकः ॥६४॥
transliteration: nirmāṃsaḥ sphuṭito lambo rūkṣo vā śyāmavarṇakaḥ . sthūlo'dharaśca nārīṇāṃ vaidhavyakleśasūcakaḥ.
