separated_sandhi: nirmāṃsaḥ sphuṭitaḥ lambaḥ rūkṣaḥ vā śyāmavarṇakaḥsthūlaḥ adharaḥ ca nārīṇām vaidhavyakleśasūcakaḥ
english: A woman's lower lip that is fleshless, cracked, long, rough, or dark-colored, or thick, indicates widowhood and suffering.

sanskrit: रक्तोत्पलनिभः स्निग्ध उत्तरोष्ठो मृगीदृशाम् । किञ्चिन्मध्यौन्नतोऽरोमा सुखसौभाग्यगो भवेत् ॥६५॥
transliteration: raktotpalanibhaḥ snigdha uttaroṣṭho mṛgīdṛśām . kiñcinmadhyaunnato'romā sukhasaubhāgyago bhavet.
separated_sandhi: raktotpalanibhaḥ snigdhaḥ uttaroṣṭhaḥ mṛgīdṛśāmkiñcinmadhyonnataḥ aromā sukhasaubhāgyagaḥ bhavet
english: The upper lip of a deer-eyed woman that resembles a red lotus, is lustrous, slightly elevated in the middle, and hairless, indicates happiness and good fortune.

sanskrit: स्निग्धागुग्धनिभाः स्त्रीणां द्वात्रिंशद्दशनाः शुभाः । अधस्तादुपरिष्ठाच्च समाः स्तोकसमुन्नताः ॥६६॥
transliteration: snigdhāgugdhanibhāḥ strīṇāṃ dvātriṃśaddaśanāḥ śubhāḥ . adhastādupariṣṭhācca samāḥ stokasamunnatāḥ.
separated_sandhi: snigdhāgugdhanibhāḥ strīṇām dvātriṃśaddaśanāḥśubhāḥ adhastāt upariṣṭhāt ca samāḥ stokasamunnatāḥ
english: For women, thirty-two teeth that are glossy, milk-like, even both below and above, and slightly elevated, are auspicious.

sanskrit: अधस्तादधिकाः पीताः श्यामा दीर्घा द्विपङ्क्तयः । विकटा विरलाश्चापि दशना न शुभाः स्मृताः ॥६७॥
transliteration: adhastādadhikāḥ pītāḥ śyāmā dīrghā dvipaṅktayaḥ . vikaṭā viralāścāpi daśanā na śubhāḥ smṛtāḥ.
separated_sandhi: adhastāt adhikāḥ pītāḥ śyāmāḥ dīrghāḥ dvipaṅktayaḥvikaṭāḥ viralāḥ ca api daśanāḥ na śubhāḥ smṛtāḥ
english: Teeth that are more numerous below, yellow, dark, long, in two rows, ugly, or sparse, are not considered auspicious.

sanskrit: शोणा मृद्वी शुभा जिह्वा स्त्रीणामतुलभोगदा । दुःखदा मध्यसङ्कीर्णा पुरोभागेऽतिविस्तरा ॥६८॥
transliteration: śoṇā mṛdvī śubhā jihvā strīṇāmatulabhogadā . duḥkhadā madhyasaṅkīrṇā purobhāge'tivistarā.
separated_sandhi: śoṇā mṛdvī śubhā jihvā strīṇām atulabhogadāduḥkhadā madhyasaṅkīrṇā purobhāge ativistarā
english: For women, a red, soft, and auspicious tongue bestows incomparable enjoyment. A tongue that causes sorrow, is narrow in the middle, or too broad at the front (purabhāge) is inauspicious.

sanskrit: सितया मरणं तोये श्यामया कलहप्रिया । मांसलया धनैर्हीना लम्बयाऽभक्ष्यभक्षिणी ॥६९॥
transliteration: sitayā maraṇaṃ toye śyāmayā kalahapriyā . māṃsalayā dhanairhīnā lambayā'bhakṣyabhakṣiṇī.
separated_sandhi: sitayā maraṇam toye śyāmayā kalahapriyāmāṃsalayā dhanaiḥ hīnā lambayā abhakṣyabhakṣiṇī
english: By a white (tongue), there is death in water. By a dark (tongue), one is quarrelsome. By a fleshy (tongue), one is devoid of wealth. By a long (tongue), one consumes forbidden food.

sanskrit: प्रमादसहिता नारी जिह्वया च विशालया । सुस्निग्धं पाटलं स्त्रीणां कोमलं तालुशोभनम् ॥७०॥
transliteration: pramādasahitā nārī jihvayā ca viśālayā . susnigdhaṃ pāṭalaṃ strīṇāṃ komalaṃ tāluśobhanam.
separated_sandhi: pramādasahitā nārī jihvayā ca viśālayāsu-snigdham pāṭalam strīṇām komalam tālu-śobhanam
english: A woman characterized by heedlessness and a large tongue [is described]. For women, a palate that is very smooth, reddish, soft, and beautiful [is considered auspicious].

sanskrit: श्वेते तालुनि वैधव्यं पीते प्रव्रजिता भवेत् । कृष्णे सन्ततिहीना स्याद्रूक्षे भूरिकुटुम्बिनी ॥७१॥
transliteration: śvete tāluni vaidhavyaṃ pīte pravrajitā bhavet . kṛṣṇe santatihīnā syādrūkṣe bhūrikuṭumbinī.
separated_sandhi: śvete tāluṇi vaidhavyam pīte pravrajitā bhavetkṛṣṇe santati-hīnā syāt rūkṣe bhūri-kuṭumbinī
english: If the palate is white, there will be widowhood. If it is yellow, she will become a renunciate. If it is black, she will be childless. If it is rough, she will have a large family.

sanskrit: अलक्षितरदं स्त्रीणां किञ्चित्फुल्लकपोलकम् । स्मितं शुभप्रदं ज्ञेयमन्यथा त्वशुभप्रदम् ॥७२॥
transliteration: alakṣitaradaṃ strīṇāṃ kiñcitphullakapolakam . smitaṃ śubhapradaṃ jñeyamanyathā tvaśubhapradam.
separated_sandhi: alakṣita-radam strīṇām kiñcit-phulla-kapolakamsmitam śubha-pradam jñeyam anyathā tu a-śubha-pradam
english: A smile in women that conceals the teeth and slightly expands the cheeks should be understood as auspicious. Otherwise, it is indeed inauspicious.

sanskrit: समवृत्तपुटा नासा लघुच्छिद्रा शुभप्रदा । स्थूलाग्रा मध्यनिम्ना वा न प्रशस्ता मृगीदृशाम् ॥७३॥
transliteration: samavṛttapuṭā nāsā laghucchidrā śubhapradā . sthūlāgrā madhyanimnā vā na praśastā mṛgīdṛśām.
separated_sandhi: sama-vṛtta-puṭā nāsā laghu-cchidrā śubha-pradāsthūla-agrā madhya-nimnā vā na praśastā mṛgī-dṛśām
english: A nose with even, rounded nostrils and small apertures bestows auspiciousness. One with a thick tip or depressed in the middle is not considered good for women with deer-like eyes.

sanskrit: रक्ताग्राऽकुञ्चिताग्रा वा नासा वैधव्यकारिणी । दासी सा चिपिटा यस्या ह्रस्वा दीर्घा कलिप्रिया ॥७४॥
transliteration: raktāgrā'kuñcitāgrā vā nāsā vaidhavyakāriṇī . dāsī sā cipiṭā yasyā hrasvā dīrghā kalipriyā.
separated_sandhi: raktāgrā akuñcitāgrā vā nāsā vaidhavya-kāriṇīdāsī sā cipiṭā yasyā hrasvā dīrghā kali-priyā
english: A nose that is red-tipped or crooked-tipped causes widowhood. A woman whose nose is flat, short, or long becomes a maidservant and is fond of quarrels.

sanskrit: शुभे विलोचने स्त्रीणां रक्तान्ते कृष्णतारके । गोक्षीरवर्णे विशदे सुस्निग्धे कृष्णपक्ष्मिणी ॥७५॥
transliteration: śubhe vilocane strīṇāṃ raktānte kṛṣṇatārake . gokṣīravarṇe viśade susnigdhe kṛṣṇapakṣmiṇī.
separated_sandhi: śubhe vilocane strīṇāṁ raktānte kṛṣṇatārakegokṣīravarṇe viśade susnigdhe kṛṣṇapakṣmiṇī
english: Auspicious eyes for women are those with red corners, black pupils, that are clear, white like cow's milk, and very lustrous; a woman with such eyes also has black eyelashes.

sanskrit: उन्नताक्षी न दीर्घायुर्वृत्ताक्षी कुलटा भवेत् । रमणी मधुपिङ्गाक्षी सुखसौभाग्यभागिनी ॥७६॥
transliteration: unnatākṣī na dīrghāyurvṛttākṣī kulaṭā bhavet . ramaṇī madhupiṅgākṣī sukhasaubhāgyabhāginī.
separated_sandhi: unnatākṣī na dīrghāyuḥ vṛttākṣī kulaṭā bhavetramaṇī madhupiṅgākṣī sukhasaubhāgya-bhāginī
english: A woman with prominent eyes does not have a long life. A woman with round eyes becomes unchaste. A charming woman with honey-brown eyes is endowed with happiness and good fortune.

sanskrit: पुंश्चली वामकाणाक्षी वन्ध्या दक्षिणकाणिका । पारावताक्षी दुःशीला गजाक्षी नैव शोभना ॥७७॥
transliteration: puṃścalī vāmakāṇākṣī vandhyā dakṣiṇakāṇikā . pārāvatākṣī duḥśīlā gajākṣī naiva śobhanā.
separated_sandhi: puṃścalī vāmakāṇākṣī vandhyā dakṣiṇakāṇikāpārāvatākṣī duḥśīlā gajākṣī na eva śobhanā
english: A woman with a defective left eye is unchaste. One with a defective right eye is barren. A woman with pigeon-like eyes is ill-natured. A woman with elephant-like eyes is never auspicious or beautiful.

sanskrit: मृदुभिः पक्ष्मभिः कृष्णैर्घनैः सूक्ष्मैः सुभाग्ययुक् । विरलैः कपिलैः स्थूलैर्भामिनी दुखभागिनी ॥७८॥
transliteration: mṛdubhiḥ pakṣmabhiḥ kṛṣṇairghanaiḥ sūkṣmaiḥ subhāgyayuk . viralaiḥ kapilaiḥ sthūlairbhāminī dukhabhāginī.
separated_sandhi: mṛdubhiḥ pakṣmabhiḥ kṛṣṇaiḥ ghanaiḥ sūkṣmaiḥ subhāgyayuk| viralaiḥ kapilaiḥ sthūlaiḥ bhāminī duḥkhabhāginī
english: A woman endowed with soft, black, thick, and fine eyelashes is fortunate. However, a woman with sparse, brown, or coarse eyelashes will experience sorrow.

sanskrit: वर्तुलौ कार्मुकाकारौ स्निग्धे कृष्णे असंहते । सुभ्रुवौ मृदुरोमाणौ सुभ्रुवां सुखकीर्तिदौ ॥७९॥
transliteration: vartulau kārmukākārau snigdhe kṛṣṇe asaṃhate . subhruvau mṛduromāṇau subhruvāṃ sukhakīrtidau.
separated_sandhi: vartulau kārmukākārau snigdhe kṛṣṇe asaṃhatesubhruvau mṛduromāṇau subhruvām sukhakīrtidau
english: Eyebrows that are rounded, shaped like a bow, smooth, black, separated, and soft-haired, bestow happiness and fame upon women who possess beautiful eyebrows.

sanskrit: कर्णौ दीर्घौ शुभावर्तौ सुतसौभाग्यदायकौ । शष्कुलीरहितौ निन्द्यौ शिरालौ कुटिलौ कृशौ ॥८०॥
transliteration: karṇau dīrghau śubhāvartau sutasaubhāgyadāyakau . śaṣkulīrahitau nindyau śirālau kuṭilau kṛśau.
separated_sandhi: karṇau dīrghau śubhāvartau sutasubhāgyadāyakau| śaṣkulīrahitau nindyau śirālau kuṭilau kṛśau
english: Long ears with auspicious folds bestow good fortune upon sons. However, ears lacking the outer rim (helix), those that are censurable, veiny, crooked, or thin, are considered inauspicious.

sanskrit: शिराविरहितो भालः निर्लोमाऽर्धशशिप्रभः । अनिम्नस्त्र्यङ्गुलस्त्रोणां सुतसौभाग्यसौख्यदः ॥८१॥
transliteration: śirāvirahito bhālaḥ nirlomā'rdhaśaśiprabhaḥ . animnastryaṅgulastroṇāṃ sutasaubhāgyasaukhyadaḥ.
separated_sandhi: śirāvirahitaḥ bhālaḥ nirlomaḥ ardhaśaśiprabhaḥanimnaḥ tryaṅgulaḥ strīṇām sutasubhāgyasaukhyadaḥ
english: A forehead that is devoid of veins, hairless, shines like a crescent moon, is not sunken, and measures three fingers in width, bestows good fortune and happiness upon the sons of women.

sanskrit: स्पष्टस्वस्तिकचिह्नश्च भालो राज्यप्रदः स्त्रियाः । प्रलम्बो रोमशश्चैव प्रांशुश्च दुःखदः स्मृतः ॥८२॥
transliteration: spaṣṭasvastikacihnaśca bhālo rājyapradaḥ striyāḥ . pralambo romaśaścaiva prāṃśuśca duḥkhadaḥ smṛtaḥ.
separated_sandhi: spaṣṭasvastikacihnaḥ ca bhālaḥ rājyapradaḥ striyāḥpralambaḥ romaśaḥ ca eva prāṃśuḥ ca duḥkhadaḥ smṛtaḥ
english: For a woman, a forehead clearly marked with a svastika symbol bestows sovereignty. Conversely, a long, hairy, or excessively prominent forehead is considered to bring sorrow.

sanskrit: उन्नतो गजकुम्भाभो वृत्तो मूर्धा शुभः स्त्रियाः । स्थूलो गीर्घोऽथवा वक्रो दुःखदौर्भाग्यसूचकः ॥८३॥
transliteration: unnato gajakumbhābho vṛtto mūrdhā śubhaḥ striyāḥ . sthūlo gīrgho'thavā vakro duḥkhadaurbhāgyasūcakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: unnataḥ gajakumbhābhaḥ vṛttaḥ mūrdhā śubhaḥ striyāḥsthūlaḥ dīrghaḥ athavā vakraḥ duḥkhadaurbhāgyasūcakaḥ
english: For a woman, a high, rounded head resembling an elephant's frontal bosses is auspicious. Conversely, a head that is thick, long, or crooked indicates sorrow and misfortune.

sanskrit: कुन्तलाः कोमलाः कृष्णाः सूक्ष्मा दीर्घश्च शोभना । पिङ्गलाः पुरुषा रूक्षा विरला लघवोऽशुभाः ॥८४॥
transliteration: kuntalāḥ komalāḥ kṛṣṇāḥ sūkṣmā dīrghaśca śobhanā . piṅgalāḥ puruṣā rūkṣā viralā laghavo'śubhāḥ.
separated_sandhi: kuntalāḥ komalāḥ kṛṣṇāḥ sūkṣmāḥ dīrghāḥ ca śobhanāḥpiṅgalāḥ puruṣāḥ rūkṣāḥ viralāḥ laghavaḥ aśubhāḥ
english: Soft, dark, fine, and long hair is considered beautiful. Conversely, reddish-brown, coarse, dry, sparse, or short hair is inauspicious.

sanskrit: पिङ्गला गौरवर्णाया श्यामायाः श्यामलाः शुभाः । नारीलक्षणतश्चैवं नराणामपि चिन्तयेत् ॥८५॥
transliteration: piṅgalā gauravarṇāyā śyāmāyāḥ śyāmalāḥ śubhāḥ . nārīlakṣaṇataścaivaṃ narāṇāmapi cintayet.
separated_sandhi: piṅgalāḥ gauravarṇāyāḥ śyāmāyāḥ śyāmalāḥ śubhāḥnārīlakṣaṇataḥ ca evaṃ narāṇām api cintayet
english: Reddish-brown hair is considered auspicious for a fair-complexioned woman, while dark-colored hair is auspicious for a dark-complexioned woman. Similarly, these characteristics should also be considered for men, based on the specific signs observed in women.

sanskrit: अथाऽहं देहजातानां लांछनानां फलं ब्रुवे । आवर्तानां तिलानां च मशकानां विशेषतः ॥१॥
transliteration: athā'haṃ dehajātānāṃ lāṃchanānāṃ phalaṃ bruve . āvartānāṃ tilānāṃ ca maśakānāṃ viśeṣataḥ.
separated_sandhi: atha aham dehajātānām lāñchanānām phalambruve āvartānām tilānām ca maśakānām viśeṣataḥ
english: Now, I will declare the results of the marks (lāñchana) that appear on the body, especially those of hair-whorls (āvarta), moles (tila), and warts (maśaka).

sanskrit: अङ्गनानां च वामांगे दक्षिणाङ्गे नृणां शुभम् । रक्ताभं तिलकाभं वा लोम्नां चक्रमथापि वा ॥२॥
transliteration: aṅganānāṃ ca vāmāṃge dakṣiṇāṅge nṛṇāṃ śubham . raktābhaṃ tilakābhaṃ vā lomnāṃ cakramathāpi vā.
separated_sandhi: aṅganānām ca vāma-aṅge dakṣiṇa-aṅge nṛṇām śubhamrakta-ābham tilaka-ābham vā lomnām cakram atha api vā
english: For women, these marks are auspicious on the left side of the body, and for men, they are auspicious on the right side. They can be reddish (raktābha), or mole-like (tilakābha), or even a whorl of hairs (loman).

sanskrit: तिलादिलांछनं स्त्रीणां हृदि सौभाग्यसूचकम् । यस्या दक्षिणवक्षोजे रक्ते तिलकलांछने ॥३॥
transliteration: tilādilāṃchanaṃ strīṇāṃ hṛdi saubhāgyasūcakam . yasyā dakṣiṇavakṣoje rakte tilakalāṃchane.
separated_sandhi: tila-ādi-lāñchanam strīṇām hṛdi saubhāgya-sūcakamyasyāḥ dakṣiṇa-vakṣoje rakte tilaka-lāñchane
english: A mark like a mole (tilādilāñchana) on the chest (hṛdi) of women indicates good fortune. If a woman has a reddish mole-like mark (tilakalāñchana) on her right breast...

sanskrit: सा सन्ततिततिं सूते सुखसौभाग्यसंयुताम् । रक्ताभं तिलकं यस्याः स्त्रिया वामे स्तने भवेत् ॥४॥
transliteration: sā santatitatiṃ sūte sukhasaubhāgyasaṃyutām . raktābhaṃ tilakaṃ yasyāḥ striyā vāme stane bhavet.
separated_sandhi: sā santati-tatim sūte sukha-saubhāgya-saṃyutāmrakta-ābham tilakam yasyāḥ striyāḥ vāme stane bhavet
english: She bears a line of descendants endowed with happiness and good fortune. If a woman has a reddish mole (tilaka) on her left breast...

sanskrit: एक एव सुतस्तस्या भवतीत विदो विदुः । पुत्रीपुत्रयुता ज्ञेया तिलके दक्षिणे स्तने ॥५॥
transliteration: eka eva sutastasyā bhavatīta vido viduḥ . putrīputrayutā jñeyā tilake dakṣiṇe stane.
separated_sandhi: ekaḥ eva sutaḥ tasyāḥ bhavati iti vidaḥ viduḥputrīputrayutā jñeyā tilake dakṣiṇe stane
english: The wise know that she will have only one son. However, if there is a mole (tilaka) on her right breast, she should be known as one blessed with both daughters and sons.

sanskrit: भ्रुवोर्मध्ये ललाटे वा लांछनं राजसूचकम् । कपोले मशको रक्तो नित्यं मिष्ठान्नदायकं ॥६॥
transliteration: bhruvormadhye lalāṭe vā lāṃchanaṃ rājasūcakam . kapole maśako rakto nityaṃ miṣṭhānnadāyakaṃ.
separated_sandhi: bhruvoḥ madhye lalāṭe vā lāñchanam rājasūcakamkapole maśakaḥ raktaḥ nityam miṣṭhānnadāyakam
english: A mark (lañchana) between the eyebrows or on the forehead signifies royalty. A red mole on the cheek indicates a person who will always enjoy sweet foods.

sanskrit: भगस्य दक्षिणे भागे लांछनं यदि योषितः । सा हि पृथ्वीपतेः पत्नी सूते वा भूपतिं सुतम् ॥७॥
transliteration: bhagasya dakṣiṇe bhāge lāṃchanaṃ yadi yoṣitaḥ . sā hi pṛthvīpateḥ patnī sūte vā bhūpatiṃ sutam.
separated_sandhi: bhagasya dakṣiṇe bhāge lāñchanam yadi yoṣitaḥsā hi pṛthvīpateḥ patnī sūte vā bhūpatim sutam
english: If a woman has a mark (lañchana) on the right side of her genital area (bhaga), she will indeed be the wife of a king, or she will give birth to a son who becomes a king.

sanskrit: नासाग्रे लाञ्छने रक्तं राजपत्न्याः प्रजायते । कृष्णवर्णं तु यस्याः सा पुंश्चलि विधवाऽथ वा ॥८॥
transliteration: nāsāgre lāñchane raktaṃ rājapatnyāḥ prajāyate . kṛṣṇavarṇaṃ tu yasyāḥ sā puṃścali vidhavā'tha vā.
separated_sandhi: nāsāgre lāñchane raktam rājapatnyāḥ prajāyatekṛṣṇavarṇam tu yasyāḥ sā puṃścali vidhavā atha vā
english: A red mark (lañchana) on the tip of the nose indicates that she will become a queen. However, if that mark is black, she will be a harlot or a widow.

sanskrit: नाभेरधो नृणां स्त्रीणां लाञ्छनं च शुभप्रदम् । कर्णे गण्डे करे वाऽपि कण्ठे वाऽप्यथ लाञ्छनं ॥९॥
transliteration: nābheradho nṛṇāṃ strīṇāṃ lāñchanaṃ ca śubhapradam . karṇe gaṇḍe kare vā'pi kaṇṭhe vā'pyatha lāñchanaṃ.
separated_sandhi: nābheḥ adhaḥ nṛṇām strīṇām lāñchanaṃ ca śubhapradaṃkarṇe gaṇḍe kare vā api kaṇṭhe vā api atha lāñchanaṃ
english: For both men and women, a mark (lāñchana) below the navel is considered auspicious. Similarly, a mark on the ear, cheek, hand, or neck is also beneficial.

sanskrit: प्राग्गर्भे पुत्रदं ज्ञेयं सुखसौभाग्यदं तथा । तिलादि लाञ्छनं विप्र गुल्फगेशे च दुःखदम् ॥१०॥
transliteration: prāggarbhe putradaṃ jñeyaṃ sukhasaubhāgyadaṃ tathā . tilādi lāñchanaṃ vipra gulphageśe ca duḥkhadam.
separated_sandhi: prāk garbhe putradaṃ jñeyaṃ sukha saubhāgyadaṃ tathātilādi lāñchanaṃ vipra gulphage īśe ca duḥkhadaṃ
english: O Brahmin (vipra), a mark (lāñchana) on the lower abdomen is known to bestow sons, as well as happiness and good fortune. However, a mole (tilādi lāñchana) on the ankle or genital region brings sorrow.

sanskrit: त्रिशूलाकृति चिह्न च ललाटे यदि जायते । नारी राजप्रिया ज्ञेया भूपतिश्च नरो भवेत् ॥११॥
transliteration: triśūlākṛti cihna ca lalāṭe yadi jāyate . nārī rājapriyā jñeyā bhūpatiśca naro bhavet.
separated_sandhi: triśūla ākṛti cihnaṃ ca lalāṭe yadi jāyatenārī rājapriyā jñeyā bhūpatiḥ ca naraḥ bhavet
english: If a trident-shaped mark (cihna) appears on the forehead, a woman (nārī) with such a mark is known to be a favorite of the king, and a man (nara) with it becomes a king (bhūpati).

sanskrit: लोम्नां प्रदक्षिणावर्तो हृदि नाभौ करे श्रुतौ । दक्षपृष्ठे शुभो वस्तौ वामावर्तोऽशुभप्रदः ॥१२॥
transliteration: lomnāṃ pradakṣiṇāvarto hṛdi nābhau kare śrutau . dakṣapṛṣṭhe śubho vastau vāmāvarto'śubhapradaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lomnām pradakṣiṇa āvartaḥ hṛdi nābhau kare śrutaudakṣa pṛṣṭhe śubhaḥ vastau vāma āvartaḥ aśubhapradaḥ
english: A clockwise whorl of hair on the heart/chest, navel, hand, ear, or right side of the back is auspicious (śubha). However, an anti-clockwise whorl on the lower abdomen (vasti) is inauspicious (aśubhaprada).

sanskrit: कट्यां गुह्येऽथवाऽवर्तो स्त्रीणां दौर्भाग्यसूचकः । उदरे हन्ति भर्तारं मध्यपृष्ठे च पुंश्चली ॥१३॥
transliteration: kaṭyāṃ guhye'thavā'varto strīṇāṃ daurbhāgyasūcakaḥ . udare hanti bhartāraṃ madhyapṛṣṭhe ca puṃścalī.
separated_sandhi: kaṭyām guhye athavā āvartaḥ strīṇām daurbhāgyasūcakaḥudare hanti bhartāram madhyapṛṣṭhe ca puṃścalī
english: A hair-whorl on the waist or private parts of women is an indicator of misfortune. If it is on the belly, it causes the death of the husband. And if on the middle of the back, it makes the woman unchaste.

sanskrit: कण्ठे ललाटे सीमन्ते मध्यभागे च मूर्धनि । आवर्तो न शुभः स्त्रीणां पुसां वाऽपि द्विजोत्तम ॥१४॥
transliteration: kaṇṭhe lalāṭe sīmante madhyabhāge ca mūrdhani . āvarto na śubhaḥ strīṇāṃ pusāṃ vā'pi dvijottama.
separated_sandhi: kaṇṭhe lalāṭe sīmante madhyabhāge ca mūrdhaniāvartaḥ na śubhaḥ strīṇām pusām vā api dvijottama
english: O best among the twice-born (dvija), a hair-whorl on the neck, forehead, the parting of the hair, the middle of the head, or on the head itself is not considered auspicious for women, nor even for men.

sanskrit: सुलक्षणा सुचरिता अपि मन्दायुषं पतिम् । दीर्घायुषं प्रकुर्वन्ति प्रमदाश्च मुदास्पदम् ॥१५॥
transliteration: sulakṣaṇā sucaritā api mandāyuṣaṃ patim . dīrghāyuṣaṃ prakurvanti pramadāśca mudāspadam.
separated_sandhi: sulakṣaṇā sucaritā api mandāyuṣam patimdīrghāyuṣam prakurvanti pramadāḥ ca mudāspadam
english: Women who possess auspicious bodily marks and are of good conduct make even a short-lived husband long-lived and a source of joy.

sanskrit: महर्षे भवता प्रोक्तं फलं स्त्रीणां नृणां पृथक् । अधुना श्रोतुमिच्छामि त्वत्तो वेदविदांवर ॥१॥
transliteration: maharṣe bhavatā proktaṃ phalaṃ strīṇāṃ nṛṇāṃ pṛthak . adhunā śrotumicchāmi tvatto vedavidāṃvara.
separated_sandhi: maharṣe bhavatā proktam phalam strīṇām nṛṇāmpṛthak adhunā śrotum icchāmi tvattaḥ vedavidāmvara
english: O great sage (maharṣi), you have separately described the effects [of these marks] for women and men. Now, O most excellent among those who know the Vedas (vedavidāmvara), I wish to hear from you.

sanskrit: अपुत्रस्य गतिर्नास्ति शास्त्रेषु श्रूयते मुने । अपुत्रः केन पापेन भवतीति वद प्रभो ॥२॥
transliteration: aputrasya gatirnāsti śāstreṣu śrūyate mune . aputraḥ kena pāpena bhavatīti vada prabho.
separated_sandhi: aputrasya gatiḥ na asti śāstreṣu śrūyate mune| aputraḥ kena pāpena bhavati iti vada prabho
english: O sage, it is heard in the scriptures that for a childless person, there is no good destiny. O Lord, please tell me by what sin one becomes childless.

sanskrit: जन्मलग्नाच्च तज्ज्ञानं कथं दैवविदां भवेत् । अपुत्रस्य सुतप्राप्तेरुपायं कृपयोच्यताम् ॥३॥
transliteration: janmalagnācca tajjñānaṃ kathaṃ daivavidāṃ bhavet . aputrasya sutaprāpterupāyaṃ kṛpayocyatām.
separated_sandhi: janmalagnāt ca tat jñānam katham daivavidām bhavet| aputrasya sutaprāpteḥ upāyam kṛpayā ucyatām
english: And how can astrologers obtain such knowledge from the birth ascendant (lagna)? Please kindly tell me the means for a childless person to obtain a son.

sanskrit: साधु पृष्टं त्वया विप्र कथ्यते हि तथा मया । यथोमया हि पृष्टेन शिवेन कथितं पुरा ॥४॥
transliteration: sādhu pṛṣṭaṃ tvayā vipra kathyate hi tathā mayā . yathomayā hi pṛṣṭena śivena kathitaṃ purā.
separated_sandhi: sādhu pṛṣṭam tvayā vipra kathyate hi tathā mayā| yathā umayā hi pṛṣṭena śivena kathitam purā
english: O brahmin, you have asked well. It will indeed be told by me in the same way as it was formerly narrated by Śiva when asked by Umā.

sanskrit: केन योगेन पापेन ज्ञायतेऽपत्यनाशनम् । तेषां च रक्षणोपायं कृपया नाथ मे वद ॥५॥
transliteration: kena yogena pāpena jñāyate'patyanāśanam . teṣāṃ ca rakṣaṇopāyaṃ kṛpayā nātha me vada.
separated_sandhi: kena yogena pāpena jñāyate apatyanāśanam |teṣām ca rakṣaṇopāyam kṛpayā nātha me vada
english: By what planetary combination (yoga) and by what sin is the destruction of progeny known? And kindly tell me, O Lord, the means for their protection.

sanskrit: साधु पृष्टं त्वया देवि कथयामि तवाऽधुना । सन्तानहानियोगांश्च तद्रक्षोपायसंयुतान् ॥६॥
transliteration: sādhu pṛṣṭaṃ tvayā devi kathayāmi tavā'dhunā . santānahāniyogāṃśca tadrakṣopāyasaṃyutān.
separated_sandhi: sādhu pṛṣṭam tvayā devi kathayāmi tava adhunāsantānahāniyogān ca tadrakṣopāyasaṃyutān
english: O Goddess, you have asked well. Now I will explain to you the astrological combinations indicating loss of progeny (santāna-hānī-yoga), along with the remedial measures for their protection.

sanskrit: गुरुलग्नेश दारेशपुत्रस्थानाधिपेषु च । सर्वेषु बलहीनेषु वक्तव्या त्वनपत्यता ॥७॥
transliteration: gurulagneśa dāreśaputrasthānādhipeṣu ca . sarveṣu balahīneṣu vaktavyā tvanapatyatā.
separated_sandhi: gurulagneśadāreśaputrasthānādhipeṣu casarveṣu balahīneṣu vaktavyā tu anapatyatā
english: Childlessness (anapatyatā) should be declared when Jupiter (guru), the lord of the Ascendant, the lord of the seventh house, and the lord of the fifth house are all devoid of strength.

sanskrit: रव्यारराहुशनयः सबलाः पुत्रभावगाः । तदाऽनपत्यता चेत् स्युरबलाः पुत्रकारकाः ॥८॥
transliteration: ravyārarāhuśanayaḥ sabalāḥ putrabhāvagāḥ . tadā'napatyatā cet syurabalāḥ putrakārakāḥ.
separated_sandhi: ravvyārāhuśanayaḥ sabalāḥ putrabhāvagāḥ tadāanapatyatā cet syuḥ abalāḥ putrakārakāḥ
english: If the Sun (ravi), Mars (āra), Rahu, and Saturn (śani) are strong and located in the fifth house, then childlessness (anapatyatā) occurs if the planets signifying progeny (putrakārakāḥ) are weak.

sanskrit: पुत्रस्थानगते राहौ कुजेन च निरीक्षिते । कुजक्षेत्रगते वाऽपि सर्पशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥९॥
transliteration: putrasthānagate rāhau kujena ca nirīkṣite . kujakṣetragate vā'pi sarpaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: putrasthānagate rāhau kujena ca nirīkṣitekujakṣetragate vā api sarpaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: If Rahu is situated in the fifth house (putrasthāna) and aspected by Mars, or if Rahu is in a sign ruled by Mars, then there will be a loss of progeny (sutakṣayaḥ) due to a serpent's curse (sarpashāpāt).

sanskrit: पुत्रशे राहुसंयुक्ते पुत्रस्थे भानुनन्दने । चन्द्रेण संयुते दृष्टे सर्पशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥१०॥
transliteration: putraśe rāhusaṃyukte putrasthe bhānunandane . candreṇa saṃyute dṛṣṭe sarpaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: putreśe rāhusaṃyukte putrasthe bhānunandanecandreṇa saṃyute dṛṣṭe sarpaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: If the lord of the 5th house is conjoined with Rahu, and Saturn (bhānunandana) is situated in the 5th house, being either conjoined with or aspected by the Moon, then there will be a loss of children (sutakṣaya) due to a serpent's curse (sarpaśāpa).

sanskrit: कारके राहुसंयुक्ते पुत्रेशे बलवर्जिते । लग्नेशे कुजसंयुक्ते सर्पशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥११॥
transliteration: kārake rāhusaṃyukte putreśe balavarjite . lagneśe kujasaṃyukte sarpaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: kārake rāhusaṃyukte putreśe balavarjitelagneśe kujasaṃyukte sarpaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: If the significator for children (kāraka, i.e., Jupiter) is conjoined with Rahu, and the lord of the 5th house (putreśa) is devoid of strength, and the lord of the ascendant (lagneśa) is conjoined with Mars (kuja), then there will be a loss of children (sutakṣaya) due to a serpent's curse (sarpaśāpa).

sanskrit: कारके भौमसंयुक्ते लग्ने च राहुसंयुते । पुत्रस्थानाधिपे दुःस्थे सर्पशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥१२॥
transliteration: kārake bhaumasaṃyukte lagne ca rāhusaṃyute . putrasthānādhipe duḥsthe sarpaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: kārake bhaumasaṃyukte lagne ca rāhusaṃyuteputrasthānādhipe duḥsthe sarpaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: If the significator for children (kāraka, i.e., Jupiter) is conjoined with Mars (bhauma), and the ascendant (lagna) is conjoined with Rahu, and the lord of the 5th house (putrasthānādhipa) is badly placed (duḥstha), then there will be a loss of children (sutakṣaya) due to a serpent's curse (sarpaśāpa).

sanskrit: भौमांशे भौमसंयुक्ते पुत्रेशे सोमनन्दने । राहुमान्दियुते लग्ने सर्पशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥१३॥
transliteration: bhaumāṃśe bhaumasaṃyukte putreśe somanandane . rāhumāndiyute lagne sarpaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: bhaumāṃśe bhaumasaṃyukte putreśe somanandanerāhumāndiyute lagne sarpaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: If the navamsa (aṃśa) of Mars (bhauma) is conjoined with Mars, and the lord of the 5th house (putreśa) is Jupiter (somanandana), and the ascendant (lagna) is conjoined with Rahu and Mandi, then there will be a loss of children (sutakṣaya) due to a serpent's curse (sarpaśāpa).

sanskrit: पुत्रभावे कुजक्षेत्रे पुत्रेशे राहुसंयुते । सौम्यदृष्टे युते वाऽपि सर्पशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥१४॥
transliteration: putrabhāve kujakṣetre putreśe rāhusaṃyute . saumyadṛṣṭe yute vā'pi sarpaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: putrabhāve kujakṣetre putreśe rāhusaṃyutesaumyadr̥ṣṭe yute vā api sarpaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: If the fifth house (putrabhāva) is in a Martian sign (kujakṣetra) and its lord (putreśa) is conjoined with Rāhu, then, even if it is aspected or conjoined by benefic planets, there will be a loss of children (sutakṣaya) due to a serpent's curse (sarpaśāpa).

sanskrit: पुत्रस्था भानुमन्दाराः स्वभानुः शशिजोऽङ्गिराः । निर्बलौ पुत्रलग्नेशौ सर्पशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥१५॥
transliteration: putrasthā bhānumandārāḥ svabhānuḥ śaśijo'ṅgirāḥ . nirbalau putralagneśau sarpaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: putrasthāḥ bhānumandārāḥ svabhānuḥ śaśijaḥ aṅgirāḥnirbalau putralagneśau sarpaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: If the Sun (bhānu) and Saturn (manda) are situated in the fifth house (putrasthā), or if the lord of the fifth house (putreśa) is the Sun, Mercury (śaśija), or Jupiter (aṅgirā), and the lord of the fifth house (putreśa) and the lord of the ascendant (lagneśa) are both weak (nirbalau), then there will be a loss of children (sutakṣaya) due to a serpent's curse (sarpaśāpa).

sanskrit: लग्नेशे राहुसंयुक्ते पुत्रेशे भोमसंयुते । कारके राहुयुक्ते वा सर्पशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥१६॥
transliteration: lagneśe rāhusaṃyukte putreśe bhomasaṃyute . kārake rāhuyukte vā sarpaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagneśe rāhusaṃyukte putreśe bhomasaṃyutekārake rāhuyukte vā sarpaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: If the lord of the ascendant (lagneśa) is conjoined with Rāhu, and the lord of the fifth house (putreśa) is conjoined with Mars (bhoma), or if the significator (kāraka) of children is conjoined with Rāhu, then there will be a loss of children (sutakṣaya) due to a serpent's curse (sarpaśāpa).

sanskrit: ग्रहयोगवशेनैवं नृणां ज्ञात्वाऽनपत्यता । तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं नागपूजां समारभेत् ॥१७॥
transliteration: grahayogavaśenaivaṃ nṛṇāṃ jñātvā'napatyatā . taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ nāgapūjāṃ samārabhet.
separated_sandhi: grahayogavaśena evam nṛṇām jñātvā anapatyatātatdoṣaparihārārtham nāgapūjām samārabhet
english: Having thus understood childlessness (anapatyatā) in people based on these planetary combinations (grahayoga), one should undertake the worship of serpents (nāgapūjā) for the removal of that defect.

sanskrit: स्वगृह्योक्तविधानेन प्रतिष्ठां कारयेत् सुधीः । नागमूर्ति सुवर्णेन कृत्वा पूजां समाचरेत् ॥१८॥
transliteration: svagṛhyoktavidhānena pratiṣṭhāṃ kārayet sudhīḥ . nāgamūrti suvarṇena kṛtvā pūjāṃ samācaret.
separated_sandhi: svagṛhya ukta vidhānena pratiṣṭhām kārayet sudhīḥ| nāga mūrtim suvarṇena kṛtvā pūjām samācaret
english: An intelligent person should perform the consecration (pratiṣṭhā) according to the method prescribed in their own Gṛhya Sūtra (sūtra). Having fashioned an idol of a Nāga (serpent deity) from gold, they should then offer worship.

sanskrit: गोभूतिलहिरण्यादि दद्याद् वित्तानुसारतः । एवं कृते तु नागेन्द्रप्रसादात् वर्धते कुलम् ॥१९॥
transliteration: gobhūtilahiraṇyādi dadyād vittānusārataḥ . evaṃ kṛte tu nāgendraprasādāt vardhate kulam.
separated_sandhi: go bhū tila hiraṇya ādi dadyāt vitta anusārataḥ| evam kṛte tu nāga indra prasādāt vardhate kulam
english: One should donate cows, land, sesame, gold, and other similar items, in accordance with their financial capacity. When this is performed, the family (kula) thrives due to the grace of the lord of the Nāgas (serpent deities).

sanskrit: पुत्रस्थानं गते भानौ नीचे मन्दांशकस्थिते । पार्श्वयोः क्रूरसम्बन्धे पितृशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥२०॥
transliteration: putrasthānaṃ gate bhānau nīce mandāṃśakasthite . pārśvayoḥ krūrasambandhe pitṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: putra sthānam gate bhānau nīce manda aṃśaka sthite| pārśvayoḥ krūra sambandhe pitṛ śāpāt suta kṣayaḥ
english: If the Sun (Bhānu) is in the house of children (putrasthāna) and is debilitated (nīca) while also being situated in a malefic navāṃśa, and if there are malefic planetary associations (krūra sambandha) on both sides (of the fifth house or Sun), then there will be a loss of children, stemming from a curse of the father or ancestors (pitṛśāpa).

sanskrit: पुत्रस्थानाधिपे भानौ त्रिकोणे पापसंयुते । क्रूरान्तरे पापदृष्टे पितृशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥२१॥
transliteration: putrasthānādhipe bhānau trikoṇe pāpasaṃyute . krūrāntare pāpadṛṣṭe pitṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: putra sthāna adhipe bhānau trikoṇe pāpa saṃyute| krūra antare pāpa dṛṣṭe pitṛ śāpāt suta kṣayaḥ
english: If the Sun (Bhānu), as the lord of the house of children (putrasthānādhipa), is situated in a trine (trikoṇa), is conjoined with malefic planets, is hemmed between malefic planets, and is also aspected by malefic planets, then there will be a loss of children, resulting from a curse of the father or ancestors (pitṛśāpa).

sanskrit: भानुराशिस्थिते जीवे पुत्रेशे भानुसंयुते । पुत्रे लग्ने च पापाढ्ये पितृशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥२२॥
transliteration: bhānurāśisthite jīve putreśe bhānusaṃyute . putre lagne ca pāpāḍhye pitṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: bhānurāśisthite jīve putreśe bhānusaṃyuteputre lagne ca pāpāḍhye pitṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: When Jupiter (Jīva) is situated in a solar sign, when the lord of the fifth house is conjoined with the Sun (Bhānu), and when both the fifth house and the Ascendant are afflicted by malefics, then there is a loss of children due to a father's curse.

sanskrit: लग्नेशे दुर्बले पुत्रे पुत्रेशे भानुसंयुते । पुत्रे लग्ने पापयुते पितृशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥२३॥
transliteration: lagneśe durbale putre putreśe bhānusaṃyute . putre lagne pāpayute pitṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagneśe durbale putre putreśe bhānusaṃyuteputre lagne pāpayute pitṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: When the lord of the Ascendant is weak and in the fifth house, when the lord of the fifth house is conjoined with the Sun (Bhānu), and when the fifth house and the Ascendant are conjoined with malefics, then there is a loss of children due to a father's curse.

sanskrit: पितृस्थानाधिपे पुत्रे पुत्रेशे वापि कर्मगे । पुत्रे लग्ने च पापाढ्ये पितृशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥२४॥
transliteration: pitṛsthānādhipe putre putreśe vāpi karmage . putre lagne ca pāpāḍhye pitṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: pitṛsthānādhipe putre putreśe vā api karmageputre lagne ca pāpāḍhye pitṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: When the lord of the ninth house (the house of the father) is in the fifth house, or if the lord of the fifth house is in the tenth house (karma), and when the fifth house and the Ascendant are afflicted by malefics, then there is a loss of children due to a father's curse.

sanskrit: पितृस्थानाधिपे भौमः पुत्रेशेन समन्वितः । लग्ने पुत्रे पितृस्थाने पापे सन्ततिनाशनम् ॥२५॥
transliteration: pitṛsthānādhipe bhaumaḥ putreśena samanvitaḥ . lagne putre pitṛsthāne pāpe santatināśanam.
separated_sandhi: pitṛsthānādhipe bhaumaḥ putreśena samanvitaḥlagne putre pitṛsthāne pāpe santatināśanam
english: If Mars (Bhauma) is the lord of the ninth house (the house of the father) and is conjoined with the lord of the fifth house, and if the Ascendant, the fifth house, and the ninth house are afflicted by malefics, then there is destruction of progeny.

sanskrit: पितृस्थानाधिपे दुःस्थे कारके पापराशिगे । सपापौ पुत्रलग्नेशौ पितृशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥२६॥
transliteration: pitṛsthānādhipe duḥsthe kārake pāparāśige . sapāpau putralagneśau pitṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: pitṛsthānādhipe duḥsthe kārake pāparāśigesa-pāpau putralagneśau pitṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: If the lord of the house representing the father is unfavorably placed, and the significator (karaka) for children is located in a malefic sign, and if both the lord of the children's house (the fifth house) and the lord of the Ascendant are associated with malefics, then the loss of children occurs due to a father's curse.

sanskrit: लग्नपञ्चमभावस्था भानुभौमशनैश्चराः । रन्ध्रे रिष्फे राहुजीवौ पितृशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥२७॥
transliteration: lagnapañcamabhāvasthā bhānubhaumaśanaiścarāḥ . randhre riṣphe rāhujīvau pitṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagnapañcamabhāvasthāḥ bhānu-bhauma-śanaiścarāḥrandhre riṣphe rāhu-jīvau pitṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: When the Sun, Mars, and Saturn are positioned in the Ascendant (first house) and the fifth house, and Rahu and Jupiter are located in the eighth and twelfth houses, a loss of children occurs due to a father's curse.

sanskrit: लग्नादष्टमगे भानौ पुत्रस्थे भानुनन्दने । पुत्रेशे राहुसंयुक्ते लग्ने पापे सुतक्षयः ॥२८॥
transliteration: lagnādaṣṭamage bhānau putrasthe bhānunandane . putreśe rāhusaṃyukte lagne pāpe sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagnāt aṣṭamage bhānau putrasthe bhānunandaneputreśe rāhusaṃyukte lagne pāpe sutakṣayaḥ
english: If the Sun is in the eighth house from the Ascendant, Saturn (bhānunandana) is situated in the fifth house (of children), the lord of the fifth house is conjoined with Rahu, and a malefic planet occupies the Ascendant, then a loss of children occurs.

sanskrit: व्ययेशे लग्नभावस्थे रन्ध्रेशे पुत्रराशिगे । पितृस्थानाधिपे रन्ध्रे पितृशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥२९॥
transliteration: vyayeśe lagnabhāvasthe randhreśe putrarāśige . pitṛsthānādhipe randhre pitṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: vyayeśe lagnabhāvasthe randhreśe putrarāśigepitṛsthānādhipe randhre pitṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: If the lord of the twelfth house (vyaya) is situated in the Ascendant, the lord of the eighth house (randhra) is located in the fifth house (of children), and the lord of the father's house (the ninth house) is in the eighth house, then a loss of children occurs due to a father's curse.

sanskrit: रोगेशे पुत्रभावस्थे पितृस्थानाधिपे रिपौ । कारके राहुसंयुक्ते पितृशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥३०॥
transliteration: rogeśe putrabhāvasthe pitṛsthānādhipe ripau . kārake rāhusaṃyukte pitṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: rogeśe putrabhāvasthe pitṛsthānādhipe ripaukārake rāhusaṃyukte pitṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: When the lord of the sixth house (of diseases or enemies) is situated in the fifth house (of children), the lord of the ninth house (of father/ancestors) is in an inimical state, and the significator (kāraka) of children is conjoined with Rahu, then there is loss of children due to a curse from the father or ancestors.

sanskrit: तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं गयाश्राद्धं च कारयेत् । ब्राह्मणान् भोजयेदत्र अयुतं वा सहस्रकम् ॥३१॥
transliteration: taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ gayāśrāddhaṃ ca kārayet . brāhmaṇān bhojayedatra ayutaṃ vā sahasrakam.
separated_sandhi: tat doṣaparihārārtham gayāśrāddham ca kārayetbrāhmaṇān bhojayet atra ayutam vā sahasrakam
english: To remedy that defect, one should perform the Gayā Śrāddha ritual. In this context, one should also feed Brahmins, either ten thousand or a thousand of them.

sanskrit: अथवा कन्यकादानं गोदानं च समाचरेत् । एवं कृते पितुः शापान्मुच्यते नाऽत्र संशयः ॥३२॥
transliteration: athavā kanyakādānaṃ godānaṃ ca samācaret . evaṃ kṛte pituḥ śāpānmucyate nā'tra saṃśayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: athavā kanyakādānam godānam ca samācaret evamkṛte pituḥ śāpāt mucyate na atra saṃśayaḥ
english: Alternatively, one should perform the ritual of gifting a maiden (dāna) and gifting a cow (dāna). When this is done, one is freed from the curse of the father or ancestors; there is no doubt about this.

sanskrit: वर्धते च कुलं तस्य पुत्रपौत्रदिभिः सदा । ग्रहयोगवशादेवं फलं ब्रूयात् विचक्षणः ॥३३॥
transliteration: vardhate ca kulaṃ tasya putrapautradibhiḥ sadā . grahayogavaśādevaṃ phalaṃ brūyāt vicakṣaṇaḥ.
separated_sandhi: vardhate ca kulam tasya putrapautrādibhiḥ sadāgrahayogavaśāt evam phalam brūyāt vicakṣaṇaḥ
english: And his lineage always prospers through sons, grandsons, and so on. A wise person (vicakṣaṇa) should thus declare the results (phala) based on the influence of planetary combinations (yoga).

sanskrit: पुत्रस्थानाधिपे चन्द्रे नीचे वा पापमध्यगे । हिबुके पञ्चमे पापे मातृशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥३४॥
transliteration: putrasthānādhipe candre nīce vā pāpamadhyage . hibuke pañcame pāpe mātṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: putrasthānādhipe candre nīce vā pāpamadhyagehibuke pañcame pāpe mātṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: When the Moon, being the lord of the fifth house, is either debilitated or hemmed in by malefic planets, and a malefic planet is situated in the fourth or fifth house, then there is a loss of children due to a mother's curse.

sanskrit: लाभे मन्दसमायुक्ते मातृस्थाने शुभेतरे । नीचे पञ्चमगे चन्द्रे मातृशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥३५॥
transliteration: lābhe mandasamāyukte mātṛsthāne śubhetare . nīce pañcamage candre mātṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lābhe mandasamāyukte mātṛsthāne śubhetarenīce pañcamage candre mātṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: When a planet in the eleventh house is conjoined with Saturn, and a malefic planet is in the fourth house (house of the mother), and the Moon is debilitated and located in the fifth house, then there is a loss of children due to a mother's curse.

sanskrit: पुत्रस्थानाधिपे दुःस्थे लग्नेशे नीचराशिगे । चन्द्रे च पापसंयुक्ते मातृशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥३६॥
transliteration: putrasthānādhipe duḥsthe lagneśe nīcarāśige . candre ca pāpasaṃyukte mātṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: putrasthānādhipe duḥsthe lagneśe nīcarāśigecandre ca pāpasaṃyukte mātṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: When the lord of the fifth house is placed in an inauspicious house, and the lord of the ascendant is situated in a debilitated sign, and the Moon is conjoined with a malefic planet, then there is a loss of children due to a mother's curse.

sanskrit: पुत्रेशेऽष्टारिरिष्फेस्थे चन्द्रे पापांशसंगते । लग्ने पुत्रे च पापाढ्ये मातृशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥३७॥
transliteration: putreśe'ṣṭāririṣphesthe candre pāpāṃśasaṃgate . lagne putre ca pāpāḍhye mātṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: putreśe aṣṭārirṣphesthe candre pāpāṃśasaṃgatelagne putre ca pāpāḍhye mātṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: When the lord of the fifth house is situated in the sixth, eighth, or twelfth house; and the Moon is associated with a malefic planet in a divisional chart; and furthermore, the ascendant and the fifth house are heavily afflicted by malefics, then there is a loss of children due to a mother's curse.

sanskrit: पुत्रस्थानाधिपे चन्द्रे मन्दराह्वारसंयुते । भाग्ये वा पुत्रभावे वा मातृशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥३८॥
transliteration: putrasthānādhipe candre mandarāhvārasaṃyute . bhāgye vā putrabhāve vā mātṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: putrasthānādhipe candre mandarāhvārasaṃyutebhāgye vā putrabhāve vā mātṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: When the Moon, who is the lord of the fifth house (house of children), is associated with Saturn, Rahu, and Mars, and is positioned in either the ninth house or the fifth house, there will be a loss of children due to a mother's curse.

sanskrit: मातृस्थानाधिपे भौमे शनिराहुसमन्विते । चन्द्रभानुयुते पुत्रे लग्ने वा सन्ततिक्षयः ॥३९॥
transliteration: mātṛsthānādhipe bhaume śanirāhusamanvite . candrabhānuyute putre lagne vā santatikṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: mātṛsthānādhipe bhaume śanirāhusamanvitecandrabhānuyute putre lagne vā santatikṣayaḥ
english: If Mars, who is the lord of the fourth house (house of mother), is accompanied by Saturn and Rahu, and also joined with the Moon and Sun, while situated in either the fifth house or the ascendant, there will be a loss of progeny.

sanskrit: लग्नात्मजेशौ शत्रुस्थौ रन्ध्रे मात्रधिपः स्थितः । पितृनाशाधिपौ लग्ने मातृशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥४०॥
transliteration: lagnātmajeśau śatrusthau randhre mātradhipaḥ sthitaḥ . pitṛnāśādhipau lagne mātṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagnātmajeśau śatrusthau randhre mātrādhipaḥsthitaḥ pitṛnāśādhipau lagne mātṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: When the lord of the ascendant and the lord of the fifth house are situated in an inimical house, and the lord of the fourth house is positioned in the eighth house, and the lords of the ninth house (representing the father) and a house of loss (eighth or twelfth) are in the ascendant, there will be a loss of children due to a mother's curse.

sanskrit: षष्ठाष्टमेशौ लग्नस्थौ व्यये मात्रधिपः सुते । चन्द्रजीवौ पापयुक्तौ मातृशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥४१॥
transliteration: ṣaṣṭhāṣṭameśau lagnasthau vyaye mātradhipaḥ sute . candrajīvau pāpayuktau mātṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: ṣaṣṭhāṣṭameśau lagnasthau vyaye mātrādhipaḥ sutecandrajīvau pāpayuktau mātṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: If the lords of the sixth and eighth houses are situated in the ascendant, and the lord of the fourth house is in the twelfth house, and furthermore, the Moon and Jupiter are associated with malefic planets while located in the fifth house, there will be a loss of children due to a mother's curse.

sanskrit: पापमध्यगते लग्ने क्षीणे चन्द्रे च सप्तम । मातृपुत्रे राहुमन्दौ मातृशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥४२॥
transliteration: pāpamadhyagate lagne kṣīṇe candre ca saptama . mātṛputre rāhumandau mātṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: pāpamadhyagate lagne kṣīṇe candre ca saptamamātṛputre rāhumandau mātṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: When the Ascendant (lagna) is situated between malefic planets, and the debilitated Moon is in the seventh house, while Rāhu and Saturn are present in the houses representing the mother (4th) and children (5th), then there is a loss of children (sutakṣaya) due to a mother's curse (mātṛśāpa).

sanskrit: नाशस्थानाधिपे पुत्रे पुत्रेशे नाशराशिगे । चन्द्रमातृपतौ दुःस्थे मातृशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥४३॥
transliteration: nāśasthānādhipe putre putreśe nāśarāśige . candramātṛpatau duḥsthe mātṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: nāśasthānādhipe putre putreśe nāśarāśigecandramātṛpatau duḥsthe mātṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: When the lord of a malefic house (duḥsthāna) is in the house of children (5th), and the lord of the house of children (5th lord) is in a malefic house, and the Moon, who is the significator of the mother or the lord of the house of mother (4th house), is badly placed, then there is a loss of children (sutakṣaya) due to a mother's curse (mātṛśāpa).

sanskrit: चन्द्रक्षेत्रे यदा लग्ने कुजराहुसमन्विते । चन्द्रमन्दौ पुत्रसंस्थौ मातृशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥४४॥
transliteration: candrakṣetre yadā lagne kujarāhusamanvite . candramandau putrasaṃsthau mātṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: candrakṣetre yadā lagne kujarāhusammanvitecandramandau putrasaṃsthau mātṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: When the Ascendant (lagna) is in a sign ruled by the Moon (Cancer) and is associated with Mars and Rāhu, and furthermore, the Moon and Saturn are situated in the house of children (5th house), then there is a loss of children (sutakṣaya) due to a mother's curse (mātṛśāpa).

sanskrit: लग्ने पुत्रे मृतौ रिष्फे कुजो राहू रविः शनिः । मातृलग्नाधिपौ दुःस्थौ मातृशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥४५॥
transliteration: lagne putre mṛtau riṣphe kujo rāhū raviḥ śaniḥ . mātṛlagnādhipau duḥsthau mātṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagne putre mṛtau riṣphe kujaḥ rāhuḥ raviḥ śaniḥmātṛlagnādhipau duḥsthau mātṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: When Mars is in the Ascendant, Rāhu is in the house of children (5th), the Sun is in the house of death (8th), and Saturn is in the house of loss (12th); and furthermore, the lords of the house of mother (4th) and the Ascendant are badly placed, then there is a loss of children (sutakṣaya) due to a mother's curse (mātṛśāpa).

sanskrit: नाशस्थानं गते जीवे कुजराहुसमन्विते । पुत्रस्थानौ मन्दचन्द्रौ मातृशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥४६॥
transliteration: nāśasthānaṃ gate jīve kujarāhusamanvite . putrasthānau mandacandrau mātṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: nāśa-sthānam gate jīve kuja-rāhu-samanviteputra-sthānau manda-candrāu mātṛ-śāpāt suta-kṣayaḥ
english: If Jupiter (Jīva) is situated in the house of destruction (nāśa-sthāna), conjoined with Mars (Kuja) and Rāhu, and Saturn (Manda) and the Moon (Candra) are in the house of children (putra-sthāna), then there will be a loss of children (suta-kṣaya) due to the curse of a mother (mātṛ-śāpa).

sanskrit: एवं योगं बुधैदृष्ट्वा विज्ञेया त्वनपत्यता । ततः सन्तानरक्षार्थं कर्त्तव्या शान्तिरुत्तमा ॥४७॥
transliteration: evaṃ yogaṃ budhaidṛṣṭvā vijñeyā tvanapatyatā . tataḥ santānarakṣārthaṃ karttavyā śāntiruttamā.
separated_sandhi: evam yogam budhaiḥ dṛṣṭvā vijñeyā tu anapatyatātataḥ santāna-rakṣārtham kartavyā śāntiḥ uttamā
english: Observing such a planetary combination (yoga), the wise (budhaiḥ) should understand it as indicating childlessness (anapatyatā). Therefore, for the protection of progeny, an excellent propitiation (śānti) should be performed.

sanskrit: सेतुस्नानं प्रकर्तव्यं गायत्रीलक्षसंख्यका । रौप्यमात्रं पयः पीत्वा ग्रहदानं प्रयत्नतः ॥४८॥
transliteration: setusnānaṃ prakartavyaṃ gāyatrīlakṣasaṃkhyakā . raupyamātraṃ payaḥ pītvā grahadānaṃ prayatnataḥ.
separated_sandhi: setu-snānam prakartavyam gāyatrī-lakṣa-saṃkhyakāraupya-mātram payaḥ pītvā graha-dānam prayatnataḥ
english: A ritual bath (snānam) at Setu (Rameswaram) should be performed, along with the recitation of the Gāyatrī mantra a lakh times. After consuming only milk (payaḥ), offerings (dānam) to the planets (graha) should be made with silver and with great effort.

sanskrit: ब्राह्मणान् भोजयेत्तद्वदश्वत्थस्य प्रदक्षिणम् । कर्तव्यं भक्तियुक्तेन चाष्टोत्तरसहस्रकम् ॥४९॥
transliteration: brāhmaṇān bhojayettadvadaśvatthasya pradakṣiṇam . kartavyaṃ bhaktiyuktena cāṣṭottarasahasrakam.
separated_sandhi: brāhmaṇān bhojayet tadvat aśvatthasya pradakṣiṇamkartavyam bhakti-yuktena ca aṣṭottara-sahasrakam
english: Similarly (tadvat), Brahmins (brāhmaṇān) should be fed. Also, circumambulation (pradakṣiṇam) of the holy fig tree (aśvattha) should be performed 1008 times with devotion (bhakti).

sanskrit: एवं कृते महादेवि शापान्मोक्षो भविष्यति । सुपुत्रं लभते पश्चात् कुलवृद्धिश्च जायते ॥५०॥
transliteration: evaṃ kṛte mahādevi śāpānmokṣo bhaviṣyati . suputraṃ labhate paścāt kulavṛddhiśca jāyate.
separated_sandhi: evam kṛte mahādevi śāpāt mokṣaḥ bhaviṣyatisuputram labhate paścāt kula-vṛddhiḥ ca jāyate
english: O great goddess, by doing this, there will be liberation (mokṣa) from the curse. Afterwards, one obtains a good son, and the family's growth and prosperity occur.

sanskrit: अथो योगान् प्रवक्ष्यामि भ्रातृशापसमुद्भवान् । यज्ज्ञात्वाऽपत्यरक्षार्थं यत्नं कुर्याद् विचक्षणः ॥५१॥
transliteration: atho yogān pravakṣyāmi bhrātṛśāpasamudbhavān . yajjñātvā'patyarakṣārthaṃ yatnaṃ kuryād vicakṣaṇaḥ.
separated_sandhi: atho yogān pravakṣyāmi bhrātṛ-śāpa-samudbhavān yatjñātvā apatya-rakṣārtham yatnam kuryāt vicakṣaṇaḥ
english: Now, I will explain the astrological combinations (yoga) that originate from a brother's curse. A wise person, having understood these, should make efforts to protect their progeny.

sanskrit: भ्रातृस्थानाधिपे पुत्रे कुजराहुसमन्विते । पुत्रलग्नेश्वरौ रन्ध्रे भ्रातृशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥५२॥
transliteration: bhrātṛsthānādhipe putre kujarāhusamanvite . putralagneśvarau randhre bhrātṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: bhrātṛ-sthānādhipe putre kuja-rāhu-samanviteputra-lagneśvarau randhre bhrātṛ-śāpāt suta-kṣayaḥ
english: When the lord of the house of brothers (bhrātṛsthāna) is in the fifth house (putra), associated with Mars (Ku_ja) and Rāhu, and when the lords of the fifth house and the ascendant are in the eighth house (randhra), then due to a brother's curse, there is a loss of progeny (sutakṣaya).

sanskrit: लग्ने सुते कुजे मन्दे भ्रातृपे भाग्यराशिगे । कारके नाशभावस्थे भ्रातृशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥५३॥
transliteration: lagne sute kuje mande bhrātṛpe bhāgyarāśige . kārake nāśabhāvasthe bhrātṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagne sute kuje mande bhrātṛpe bhāgya-rāśigekārake nāśa-bhāvasthe bhrātṛ-śāpāt suta-kṣayaḥ
english: When Mars (Ku_ja) is in the ascendant (lagna) and Saturn (Manda) is in the fifth house (putra), when the lord of the third house (bhrātṛpa) is situated in the ninth house (bhāgyarāśi), and when the significator (kāraka) for children is located in the eighth house (nāśabhāva), then there is a loss of progeny (sutakṣaya) caused by a brother's curse.

sanskrit: भ्रातृस्थाने गुरुर्नीचे मन्दः पञ्चमगते यदि । नाशस्थाने तु चन्द्रारौ भ्रातृशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥५४॥
transliteration: bhrātṛsthāne gururnīce mandaḥ pañcamagate yadi . nāśasthāne tu candrārau bhrātṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: bhrātṛsthāne guruḥ nīce mandaḥ pañcamagate yadināśasthāne tu candrārau bhrātṛśāpāt suta-kṣayaḥ
english: If Jupiter is debilitated in the house of siblings, and Saturn is in the fifth house; and if the Moon and Mars are in the house of loss (12th house), then there will be a loss of sons due to a brother's curse.

sanskrit: तनुस्थानाधिपे रिष्फे भौमः पञ्चमगो यदि । रन्ध्रे सपापपुत्रेशे भ्रातृशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥५५॥
transliteration: tanusthānādhipe riṣphe bhaumaḥ pañcamago yadi . randhre sapāpaputreśe bhrātṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: tanu-sthāna-adhipe riṣphe bhaumaḥ pañcama-gaḥ yadirandhre sa-pāpa-putra-īśe bhrātṛ-śāpāt suta-kṣayaḥ
english: If the lord of the Ascendant is in the twelfth house, and Mars is in the fifth house; and if the lord of the fifth house (progeny), accompanied by a malefic planet, is in the eighth house, then there will be a loss of sons due to a brother's curse.

sanskrit: पापमध्यगते लग्ने पापमध्ये सुतेऽपि च । लग्नेशपुत्रपौ दुःस्थौ भ्रातृशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥५६॥
transliteration: pāpamadhyagate lagne pāpamadhye sute'pi ca . lagneśaputrapau duḥsthau bhrātṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: pāpa-madhya-gate lagne pāpa-madhye sute api calagneśa-putrapau duḥsthau bhrātṛ-śāpāt suta-kṣayaḥ
english: If the Ascendant is situated between malefic planets, and likewise the fifth house (progeny) is also situated between malefic planets; and if the lords of the Ascendant and the fifth house are ill-placed, then there will be a loss of sons due to a brother's curse.

sanskrit: कर्मेशे भ्रातृभावस्थे पापयुक्ते तथा शुभे । पुत्रगे कुजसंयुक्ते भ्रातृशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥५७॥
transliteration: karmeśe bhrātṛbhāvasthe pāpayukte tathā śubhe . putrage kujasaṃyukte bhrātṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: karma-īśe bhrātṛ-bhāva-sthe pāpa-yukte tathā śubheputra-ge kuja-saṃyukte bhrātṛ-śāpāt suta-kṣayaḥ
english: If the lord of the tenth house (karma) is situated in the house of brothers (3rd house) and is conjoined with a malefic planet; and similarly, if a benefic planet in the fifth house (progeny) is conjoined with Mars, then there will be a loss of sons due to a brother's curse.

sanskrit: पुत्रस्थाने बुधक्षेत्रे शमिराहुसमन्विते । रिष्फे विदारौ विज्ञेयो भ्रातृशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥५८॥
transliteration: putrasthāne budhakṣetre śamirāhusamanvite . riṣphe vidārau vijñeyo bhrātṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: putrasthāne budhakṣetre śami rāhu sammanviteriṣphe vidārau vijñeyaḥ bhrātṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: If the house of children (the 5th house) is a sign ruled by Mercury and is conjoined with Saturn and Rahu, and if two destructive influences are known to be present in the 12th house (the house of loss), then the loss of children (sutakṣaya) is due to a brother's curse.

sanskrit: लग्नेशे भ्रातृभावस्थे भ्रातृस्थानाधिपे सुते । लग्नभ्रातृसुते पापे भ्रातृशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥५९॥
transliteration: lagneśe bhrātṛbhāvasthe bhrātṛsthānādhipe sute . lagnabhrātṛsute pāpe bhrātṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagneśe bhrātṛbhāvasthe bhrātṛsthānādhipe sutelagnabhrātṛsute pāpe bhrātṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: If the lord of the ascendant is situated in the house of brothers (the 3rd house), and the lord of the house of brothers is in the house of children (the 5th house), and a malefic planet is present in the ascendant, the house of brothers, or the house of children, then there is a loss of children (sutakṣaya) due to a brother's curse.

sanskrit: भ्रात्रीशे मृत्युभावस्थे पुत्रस्थे कारके तथा । राहुमन्देयुते दृष्टे भ्रातृशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥६०॥
transliteration: bhrātrīśe mṛtyubhāvasthe putrasthe kārake tathā . rāhumandeyute dṛṣṭe bhrātṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: bhrātrīśe mṛtyubhāvasthe putrasthe kārake tathārāhu manda yute dṛṣṭe bhrātṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: If the lord of the house of brothers (the 3rd house lord) is in the house of death (the 8th house), and the significator for children (Jupiter) is in the house of children (the 5th house), and that significator is conjoined with Rahu and Saturn and aspected by malefics, then there is a loss of children (sutakṣaya) due to a brother's curse.

sanskrit: नाशस्थानाधिपे पुत्रे भ्रातृनाथेन संयुते । रन्ध्रे आरार्किसंयुक्ते भ्रातृशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥६१॥
transliteration: nāśasthānādhipe putre bhrātṛnāthena saṃyute . randhre ārārkisaṃyukte bhrātṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: nāśa-sthānādhipe putre bhrātṛnāthena saṃyuterandhre ārārkisamyukte bhrātṛśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: If the lord of the house of destruction (the 12th house lord) is in the house of children (the 5th house) and conjoined with the lord of brothers (the 3rd house lord), and if the 8th house is associated with Mars and the Sun, then there is a loss of children (sutakṣaya) due to a brother's curse.

sanskrit: भ्रातृशापविमोक्षार्थं वंशस्य श्रवणं हरेः । चान्द्रायण्स्ं चरेत् पश्चात् कावेर्य्या विष्णुसन्निधौ ॥६२॥
transliteration: bhrātṛśāpavimokṣārthaṃ vaṃśasya śravaṇaṃ hareḥ . cāndrāyaṇsṃ caret paścāt kāveryyā viṣṇusannidhau.
separated_sandhi: bhrātṛśāpavimokṣārtham vaṃśasya śravaṇam hareḥcāndrāyaṇam caret paścāt kāveryyā viṣṇusannidhau
english: For the purpose of liberating the family (vaṃśa) from a brother's curse, one should listen to the sacred narratives of Hari, and afterwards, perform the Cāndrāyaṇa penance on the Kāverī river, in the proximity of a Vishnu temple.

sanskrit: अश्वत्थस्थापनं कुर्याद् दशधेनूश्च दापयेत् । पत्नीहस्तेन पुत्रेच्छुर्भूमिं दद्यात् फलान्विताम् ॥६३॥
transliteration: aśvatthasthāpanaṃ kuryād daśadhenūśca dāpayet . patnīhastena putrecchurbhūmiṃ dadyāt phalānvitām.
separated_sandhi: aśvatthasthāpanam kuryāt daśadhenūḥ ca dāpayetpatnīhastena putrecchuḥ bhūmim dadyāt phalānvitām
english: One should plant a sacred fig (aśvattha) tree and arrange for ten cows to be donated. A man desiring a son should give fertile land, with his wife's hand (as a symbolic gesture).

sanskrit: एवं यः कुरुते भक्त्या धर्मपत्न्या समन्वितः । ध्रुवं तस्य भवेत् पुत्रः कुलवृद्धिश्च जायते ॥६४॥
transliteration: evaṃ yaḥ kurute bhaktyā dharmapatnyā samanvitaḥ . dhruvaṃ tasya bhavet putraḥ kulavṛddhiśca jāyate.
separated_sandhi: evam yaḥ kurute bhaktyā dharmapatnyā samanvitaḥdhruvam tasya bhavet putraḥ kulavṛddhiḥ ca jāyate
english: Whoever performs these acts in this manner, accompanied by his lawful wife (dharmapatnī) and with devotion (bhakti), will certainly have a son, and the family (kula) will also experience growth.

sanskrit: पुत्रस्थाने बुधे जीवे कुजराहुसमन्विते । लग्ने मन्दे सुतभावो ज्ञेयो मातुलशापतः ॥६५॥
transliteration: putrasthāne budhe jīve kujarāhusamanvite . lagne mande sutabhāvo jñeyo mātulaśāpataḥ.
separated_sandhi: putrasthāne budhe jīve kujarāhusammanvitelagne mande sutabhāvaḥ jñeyaḥ mātulaśāpataḥ
english: When Mercury (Budha) and Jupiter (Jīva) are in the house of progeny (putrasthāna), accompanied by Mars (Kuja) and Rahu, and Saturn (Manda) is in the ascendant (lagna), then the state of the house of progeny (sutabhāva) should be understood as resulting from a maternal uncle's curse.

sanskrit: लग्नेपुत्रेश्वरौ पुत्रे बुधभौमार्किसंयुतौ । ज्ञेयं मातुलशापत्वाज्जनस्य सन्ततिक्षयः ॥६६॥
transliteration: lagneputreśvarau putre budhabhaumārkisaṃyutau . jñeyaṃ mātulaśāpatvājjanasya santatikṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagneśvara-putreśvarau putre budha-bhauma-ārki-saṃyutaujñeyaṃ mātula-śāpa-tvāt janasya santati-kṣayaḥ
english: If the lords of the Ascendant and the fifth house are both situated in the fifth house, conjoined with Mercury, Mars, and Saturn, then it should be understood that the person will experience a loss of progeny due to a curse from a maternal uncle.

sanskrit: लुप्ते पुत्राधिपे लग्ने सप्तमे भानुनन्दने । लग्नेशे बुधसंयुक्ते तस्यापि सन्ततिक्षयः ॥६७॥
transliteration: lupte putrādhipe lagne saptame bhānunandane . lagneśe budhasaṃyukte tasyāpi santatikṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lupte putra-adhipe lagne saptame bhānu-nandanelagna-īśe budha-saṃyukte tasya api santati-kṣayaḥ
english: If the lord of the fifth house is lost or afflicted in the Ascendant, and Saturn (the son of the Sun) is in the seventh house, and the lord of the Ascendant is conjoined with Mercury, then that person also experiences a loss of progeny.

sanskrit: ज्ञातिस्थानाधिपे लग्ने व्ययेशेन समन्विते । शशिसौम्यकुजे पुत्रे विज्ञेयः सन्ततिक्षयः ॥६८॥
transliteration: jñātisthānādhipe lagne vyayeśena samanvite . śaśisaumyakuje putre vijñeyaḥ santatikṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: jñāti-sthāna-adhipe lagne vyaya-īśena samanviteśaśi-saumya-kuje putre vijñeyaḥ santati-kṣayaḥ
english: If the lord of the house of relatives is in the Ascendant and conjoined with the lord of the twelfth house, and the Moon, Mercury, and Mars are situated in the fifth house, then it should be understood that there will be a loss of progeny.

sanskrit: तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं विष्णुस्थापरमाचरेत् । वापीकूपतडागादिखननं सुतबन्धुनम् ॥६९॥
transliteration: taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ viṣṇusthāparamācaret . vāpīkūpataḍāgādikhananaṃ sutabandhunam.
separated_sandhi: tad-doṣa-parihāra-artham viṣṇu-sthāparam ācaretvāpī-kūpa-taḍāga-ādi-khananam suta-bandhu-namanam
english: To alleviate that defect, one should perform the installation of Vishnu deities, and engage in acts such as digging wells, ponds, and tanks, as well as showing respect to children and relatives.

sanskrit: पुत्रवृद्धिर्भवेत्तस्य सम्पद्वृद्धिः प्रजायते । इति योगवशादेवं शान्तिं कुर्याद् विचक्षणः ॥७०॥
transliteration: putravṛddhirbhavettasya sampadvṛddhiḥ prajāyate . iti yogavaśādevaṃ śāntiṃ kuryād vicakṣaṇaḥ.
separated_sandhi: putravṛddhiḥ bhavet tasya sampadvṛddhiḥ prajāyateiti yogavaśāt evam śāntim kuryāt vicakṣaṇaḥ
english: Such a person will experience an increase in children and prosperity. Therefore, an expert astrologer (vicakṣaṇa) should perform propitiatory rites (śānti) in this manner, according to the influence of the planetary combination (yoga).

sanskrit: बलगर्व्व यो मर्त्यो ब्राह्मणानवमन्यते । तद्दोषाद् ब्रह्मशापाच्च तस्य स्यात् सन्ततिक्षयः ॥७१॥
transliteration: balagarvva yo martyo brāhmaṇānavamanyate . taddoṣād brahmaśāpācca tasya syāt santatikṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: balagarvaḥ yaḥ martyaḥ brāhmaṇān avamanyate taddoṣāt brahmaśāpāt ca tasya syāt santatikṣayaḥ
english: That mortal who, inflated by the pride of strength, disrespects Brahmins, will experience a loss of progeny due to that offense and a Brahmin's curse.

sanskrit: गुरुक्षेत्रे यदा राहुः पुत्रे जीवारभानुजाः । धर्मस्थानाधिपे नाशे ब्रह्मशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥७२॥
transliteration: gurukṣetre yadā rāhuḥ putre jīvārabhānujāḥ . dharmasthānādhipe nāśe brahmaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: gurukṣetre yadā rāhuḥ putre jīvārabhānujāḥdharmasthānādhipe nāśe brahmaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: When Rahu is in Jupiter's sign, and Jupiter, Mars, and Saturn are in the house of children, and if the lord of the house of natural law (dharma) is in a house of destruction, there will be a loss of sons due to a Brahmin's curse.

sanskrit: धर्मेशे पुत्रभावस्थे पुत्रेशे नाशराशिगे । जीवारराहुभिर्युक्ते ब्रह्मशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥७३॥
transliteration: dharmeśe putrabhāvasthe putreśe nāśarāśige . jīvārarāhubhiryukte brahmaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: dharmeśe putrabhāvasthe putreśe nāśarāśigejīvārāhubhiḥ yukte brahmaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: When the lord of natural law (dharma) is placed in the house of children, and the lord of children is situated in a destructive sign, while being associated with Jupiter, Mars, and Rahu, then a loss of sons occurs due to a Brahmin's curse.

sanskrit: धर्मभावाधिपे नीचे व्ययेशे पुत्रभावगे । राहुयुतेक्षिते वापि ब्रह्मशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥७४॥
transliteration: dharmabhāvādhipe nīce vyayeśe putrabhāvage . rāhuyutekṣite vāpi brahmaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: dharmabhāvādhipe nīce vyayeśe putrabhāvagerāhuyutekṣite vā api brahmaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: If the lord of the house of fortune (dharma) is debilitated, and the lord of the house of loss (vyaya) is in the house of children, and is also conjoined with or aspected by Rahu, then there is a loss of children due to a Brahmin's curse.

sanskrit: जीवे नीचगते राहौ लग्ने वा पुत्रराशिगे । पुत्रस्थानाधिपे दुःस्थे ब्रह्मशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥७५॥
transliteration: jīve nīcagate rāhau lagne vā putrarāśige . putrasthānādhipe duḥsthe brahmaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: jīve nīcagate rāhau lagne vā putrarāśigeputrasthānādhipe duḥsthe brahmaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: If Jupiter is debilitated, and Rahu is in the ascendant or in the house of children, and the lord of the house of children is ill-placed, then there is a loss of children due to a Brahmin's curse.

sanskrit: पुत्रभावाधिपे जीवे रन्ध्रे पापसमन्विते । पुत्रेशे सार्कचन्द्रे वा ब्रह्मशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥७६॥
transliteration: putrabhāvādhipe jīve randhre pāpasamanvite . putreśe sārkacandre vā brahmaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: putrabhāvādhipe jīve randhre pāpasamanviteputreśe sārcacandre vā brahmaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: If Jupiter, as the lord of the house of children, is in the eighth house and conjoined with a malefic, or if the lord of the house of children is with the Sun and Moon, then there is a loss of children due to a Brahmin's curse.

sanskrit: मन्दांशे मन्दसंयुक्ते जीवे भौमसमन्विते । पुत्रेशे व्ययराशिस्थे ब्रह्मशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥७७॥
transliteration: mandāṃśe mandasaṃyukte jīve bhaumasamanvite . putreśe vyayarāśisthe brahmaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: mandāṃśe mandasaṃyukte jīve bhaumasamanviteputreśe vyayarāśisthe brahmaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: If Jupiter is in Saturn's navamsha, conjoined with Saturn, and also conjoined with Mars, and the lord of the house of children is situated in the twelfth house, then there is a loss of children due to a Brahmin's curse.

sanskrit: लग्ने गुरुयुते मन्दे भाग्ये राहुसमन्विते । व्यय वा गुरुसंयुक्ते ब्रह्मशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥७८॥
transliteration: lagne guruyute mande bhāgye rāhusamanvite . vyaya vā gurusaṃyukte brahmaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagne guruyute mande bhāgye rāhusamānvitevyaye vā gurusaṃyukte brahmaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: If Saturn is conjoined with Jupiter in the lagna (ascendant), or if (Saturn is) conjoined with Rahu in the ninth house, or if (Saturn is) conjoined with Jupiter in the twelfth house, then there is a loss of children due to a curse from a brahmin (brahman).

sanskrit: तस्य दोषस्य शान्त्यर्थं कुर्याच्चान्द्रायणं नरः । ब्रह्मकृच्छ्रत्र्यं कृत्वा धनुं दद्यात् सदक्षिणाम् ॥७९॥
transliteration: tasya doṣasya śāntyarthaṃ kuryāccāndrāyaṇaṃ naraḥ . brahmakṛcchratryaṃ kṛtvā dhanuṃ dadyāt sadakṣiṇām.
separated_sandhi: tasya doṣasya śāntyartham kuryāt cāndrāyaṇam naraḥbrahmakṛcchratrayam kṛtvā dhanum dadyāt sadakṣiṇām
english: For the appeasement of that fault, a person should perform the Cāndrāyaṇa penance. After performing three Brahmakṛcchra penances, he should donate a bow along with a monetary gift (dakṣiṇā).

sanskrit: पञ्चरत्नानि देयानि सुवर्णसहितानि च । ब्राह्मणान् भोजयेत् पश्चाद्यथाशक्ति द्विजोत्तम ॥८०॥
transliteration: pañcaratnāni deyāni suvarṇasahitāni ca . brāhmaṇān bhojayet paścādyathāśakti dvijottama.
separated_sandhi: pañcaratnāni deyāni suvarṇasahitāni cabrāhmaṇān bhojayet paścāt yathāśakti dvijottama
english: Additionally, five jewels should be given along with gold. Afterwards, O best of the twice-born (dvijottama), one should feed brahmins according to one's means.

sanskrit: एवं कृते तु सत्पुत्रं लभते नाऽत्र संशयः । मुक्तशापो विशुद्धात्मा स नरः सुखमेधते ॥८१॥
transliteration: evaṃ kṛte tu satputraṃ labhate nā'tra saṃśayaḥ . muktaśāpo viśuddhātmā sa naraḥ sukhamedhate.
separated_sandhi: evam kṛte tu satputram labhate na atra saṃśayaḥmuktaśāpaḥ viśuddhātmā sa naraḥ sukham edhate
english: When this is done, one surely obtains a virtuous son; there is no doubt about this. That man, freed from the curse and with a purified self (ātman), thrives in happiness.

sanskrit: दारेशे पुत्रभावस्थे दारेशस्यांशपे शनौ । पुत्रेशे नाशराशिस्थे पत्नीशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥८२॥
transliteration: dāreśe putrabhāvasthe dāreśasyāṃśape śanau . putreśe nāśarāśisthe patnīśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: dāreśe putrabhāvasthe dāreśasya aṃśape śanauputreśe nāśarāśisthe patnīśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: When the lord of the house of spouse is situated in the house of progeny, and Saturn is the navāṃśa lord of the house of spouse's lord, and the lord of the house of progeny is situated in the house of loss, then the loss of a child occurs due to a wife's curse.

sanskrit: नाशसंस्थे कलत्रेशे पुत्रेशे नाशराशिगे । कारके पापसंयुक्ते पत्नीशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥८३॥
transliteration: nāśasaṃsthe kalatreśe putreśe nāśarāśige . kārake pāpasaṃyukte patnīśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: nāśasaṃsthe kalatreśe putreśe nāśarāśigekārake pāpasaṃyukte patnīśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: When the lord of the house of spouse is situated in the house of loss, and the lord of the house of progeny is also in the house of loss, and the significator (kāraka) for progeny is conjoined with a malefic planet, then the loss of a child occurs due to a wife's curse.

sanskrit: पुत्रस्थानगते शुक्रे कामपे रन्ध्रमाश्रिते । कारके पापसंयुक्ते पत्नीशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥८४॥
transliteration: putrasthānagate śukre kāmape randhramāśrite . kārake pāpasaṃyukte patnīśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: putrasthānagate śukre kāmape randhram āśritekārake pāpasaṃyukte patnīśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: When Venus is situated in the house of progeny, and the lord of the house of spouse resides in the 8th house, and the significator (kāraka) for progeny is conjoined with a malefic planet, then the loss of a child occurs due to a wife's curse.

sanskrit: कुटुम्बे पापसंयुक्ते कामपे नाशराशिगे । पुत्रे पापग्रहैर्युक्ते पत्नीशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥८५॥
transliteration: kuṭumbe pāpasaṃyukte kāmape nāśarāśige . putre pāpagrahairyukte patnīśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: kuṭumbe pāpasaṃyukte kāmape nāśarāśige putrepāpagrahaiḥ yukte patnīśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: When the 2nd house (family) is conjoined with a malefic planet, and the lord of the house of spouse is situated in the house of loss, and the house of progeny is conjoined with malefic planets, then the loss of a child occurs due to a wife's curse.

sanskrit: भाग्यस्थानगते शुक्रे दारेशे नाशराशिगे । लग्ने सुते च पापढ्ये पत्नीशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥८६॥
transliteration: bhāgyasthānagate śukre dāreśe nāśarāśige . lagne sute ca pāpaḍhye patnīśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: bhāgyasthānagate śukre dāreśe nāśarāśigelagne sute ca pāpaḍhye patnīśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: If Venus (śukra) is situated in the ninth house (house of fortune/bhāgyasthāna), and the lord of the seventh house (dāreśa) is in a destructive sign, and if the ascendant (lagna) and the fifth house (suta) are afflicted by malefic planets, then there will be a loss of children (sutakṣaya) due to the curse of the wife (patnīśāpa).

sanskrit: भाग्यस्थानाधिपे शुक्रे पुत्रेशे शत्रुराशिगे । गुरुलग्नेशदारेशा दुःस्थाश्चेत् सन्ततिक्षयः ॥८७॥
transliteration: bhāgyasthānādhipe śukre putreśe śatrurāśige . gurulagneśadāreśā duḥsthāścet santatikṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: bhāgyasthānādhipe śukre putreśe śatrurāśige gurulagneśa dāreśāḥ duḥsthāḥ ca it santatikṣayaḥ
english: If Venus (śukra) is the lord of the ninth house (bhāgyasthānādhipa), and the lord of the fifth house (putreśa) is situated in an enemy sign, and if Jupiter (guru), the lord of the ascendant (lagneśa), and the lord of the seventh house (dāreśa) are located in malefic houses (duḥsthāḥ), then there is a loss of progeny (santatikṣaya).

sanskrit: पुत्रस्थाने भृगुक्षेत्रे राहुचन्द्रसमन्विते । व्यये लग्ने धने पापे पत्नीशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥८८॥
transliteration: putrasthāne bhṛgukṣetre rāhucandrasamanvite . vyaye lagne dhane pāpe patnīśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: putrasthāne bhṛgukṣetre rāhucandrasamanvitevyaye lagne dhane pāpe patnīśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: If the fifth house (putrasthāna) is a sign ruled by Venus (bhṛgu), and it is conjoined with Rahu and the Moon (candra), and if malefic planets are situated in the twelfth house (vyaya), the ascendant (lagna), and the second house (dhana), then there is a loss of children (sutakṣaya) due to the curse of the wife (patnīśāpa).

sanskrit: सप्तमे मन्दशुक्रौ च रन्ध्रेशे पुत्रभे रवौ । लग्ने राहुसमायुक्ते पत्नीशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥८९॥
transliteration: saptame mandaśukrau ca randhreśe putrabhe ravau . lagne rāhusamāyukte patnīśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: saptame mandaśukrau ca randhreśe putrabheravau lagne rāhusamāyukte patnīśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: If Saturn (manda) and Venus (śukra) are in the seventh house, and the lord of the eighth house (randhreśa) is in the fifth house (putrabha) along with the Sun (ravi), and the ascendant (lagna) is conjoined with Rahu, then there will be a loss of children (sutakṣaya) due to the curse of the wife (patnīśāpa).

sanskrit: धने कुजे व्यये जीवे पुत्रस्थे भृगुनन्दने । शनिराहुयुते दृष्टे पत्नीशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥९०॥
transliteration: dhane kuje vyaye jīve putrasthe bhṛgunandane . śanirāhuyute dṛṣṭe patnīśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: dhane kuje vyaye jīve putrasthe bhṛgunandaneśani-rāhu-yute dṛṣṭe patnī-śāpāt suta-kṣayaḥ
english: When Mars (kuja) is in the 2nd house (house of wealth), Jupiter (jīva) is in the 12th house (house of loss), and Venus (bhṛgunandana), placed in the 5th house (house of progeny), is conjoined with Saturn (śani) and Rahu, or aspected [by malefics], there is a loss of progeny (sutakṣaya) due to a wife's curse.

sanskrit: नाशस्थौ वित्तदारेशौ पुत्रे लग्ने कुजे शनौ । कारके पापसंयुक्ते पत्नीशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥९१॥
transliteration: nāśasthau vittadāreśau putre lagne kuje śanau . kārake pāpasaṃyukte patnīśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: nāśa-sthau vitta-dāra-īśau putre lagne kuje śanaukārake pāpa-saṃyukte patnī-śāpāt suta-kṣayaḥ
english: If the lords of the 2nd (wealth) and 7th (spouse) houses are both situated in the 12th house (house of loss), and if Mars (kuja) is in the 5th house (house of progeny) while Saturn (śani) is in the Ascendant (1st house), and additionally, the significator (kāraka) for children (Jupiter) is conjoined with malefic planets, then there is a loss of progeny (sutakṣaya) due to a wife's curse.

sanskrit: लग्नपञ्चमभाग्यस्था राहुमन्दकुजाः क्रमात् । रन्ध्रस्थौ पुत्रदारेशौ पत्नीशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥९२॥
transliteration: lagnapañcamabhāgyasthā rāhumandakujāḥ kramāt . randhrasthau putradāreśau patnīśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagna-pañcama-bhāgya-sthāḥ rāhu-manda-kujāḥ kramātrandhra-sthau putra-dāra-īśau patnī-śāpāt suta-kṣayaḥ
english: If Rahu, Saturn (manda), and Mars (kuja) are positioned respectively in the Ascendant (1st house), 5th house (house of progeny), and 9th house (house of fortune), and if the lords of the 5th house and 7th house (spouse) are both located in the 8th house (house of difficulties), then there is a loss of progeny (sutakṣaya) due to a wife's curse.

sanskrit: शापमुक्त्यै च कन्यायां सत्यां तद्दानमाचरेत् । कन्याभावे च श्रीविष्णोर्मूर्ति लक्ष्मीसमन्विताम् ॥९३॥
transliteration: śāpamuktyai ca kanyāyāṃ satyāṃ taddānamācaret . kanyābhāve ca śrīviṣṇormūrti lakṣmīsamanvitām.
separated_sandhi: śāpa-muktyai ca kanyāyām satyām tad-dānam ācaretkanyā-bhāve ca śrī-viṣṇoḥ mūrtim lakṣmī-samanvitām
english: For liberation from this curse, if there is an available girl (kanyā), one should perform the ritual of giving her in marriage (tad-dāna). In the absence of a girl, one should donate an idol of Lord Viṣṇu accompanied by Lakṣmī.

sanskrit: दद्यात् स्वर्णमयीं विप्र दशदेनुसमन्विताम् । शय्यां च भूषणं वस्त्रं दम्पतिभ्यां द्विजन्मनाम् ॥९४॥
transliteration: dadyāt svarṇamayīṃ vipra daśadenusamanvitām . śayyāṃ ca bhūṣaṇaṃ vastraṃ dampatibhyāṃ dvijanmanām.
separated_sandhi: dadyāt svarṇamayīm vipra daśadhenusamanvitām śayyāmca bhūṣaṇam vastram dampatibhyām dvijanmanām
english: O Brahmin, one should give a golden bed, along with ten cows, and also ornaments and clothes, to a Brahmin couple.

sanskrit: ध्रुवं तस्य भवेत् पुत्रो भाग्यवृद्धिश्च जायते । कर्मलोपे पितृणां च प्रेतत्वं तस्य जायते ॥९५॥
transliteration: dhruvaṃ tasya bhavet putro bhāgyavṛddhiśca jāyate . karmalope pitṛṇāṃ ca pretatvaṃ tasya jāyate.
separated_sandhi: dhruvam tasya bhavet putraḥ bhāgyavṛddhiḥ cajāyate karmalope pitṛṇām ca pretatvam tasya jāyate
english: Certainly, he will have a son, and his fortune will increase. However, if the rituals (karma) for the ancestors are neglected, he attains the state of a ghost.

sanskrit: तस्य प्रेतस्य शापाच्च पुत्राभावः प्रजायते । अतोऽत्र तादृशान् योगात् जन्मलग्नात् प्रवच्म्यहम् ॥९६॥
transliteration: tasya pretasya śāpācca putrābhāvaḥ prajāyate . ato'tra tādṛśān yogāt janmalagnāt pravacmyaham.
separated_sandhi: tasya pretasya śāpāt ca putrābhāvaḥ prajāyateataḥ atra tādṛśān yogāt janmalagnāt pravacmi aham
english: And from the curse of that ghost, a lack of sons arises. Therefore, I will now explain such planetary combinations (yoga) that cause this, starting from the natal ascendant.

sanskrit: पुत्रस्थानौ मन्दसूर्यौ क्षीणचन्द्रश्च सप्तमे । लग्ने व्यये राहुजीवौ प्रेतशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥९७॥
transliteration: putrasthānau mandasūryau kṣīṇacandraśca saptame . lagne vyaye rāhujīvau pretaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: putrasthānau mandasūryau kṣīṇacandraḥ ca saptamelagne vyaye rāhujīvau pretaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: If Saturn (Manda) and the Sun are in the fifth house (putrasthāna), a weak Moon is in the seventh house, and Rāhu and Jupiter (Jīva) are in the ascendant (lagna) and twelfth house (vyaya) respectively, then there is a loss of sons due to the curse of a ghost.

sanskrit: पुत्रस्थानाधिपे मन्दे नाशस्थे लग्नगे कुजे । कारके नाशभावे च प्रेतशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥९८॥
transliteration: putrasthānādhipe mande nāśasthe lagnage kuje . kārake nāśabhāve ca pretaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: putrasthānādhipe mande nāśasthe lagnage kujekārake nāśabhāve ca pretaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: If the lord of the fifth house (representing children) is Saturn (manda) and is situated in a house of loss, and Mars (kuja) is in the ascendant (lagna), and the significator (kāraka) [of children] is also in a house of loss, then the destruction of children (sutakṣayaḥ) occurs due to the curse of a departed spirit (pretaśāpa).

sanskrit: लग्ने पापे व्यये भानौ सुते चारार्किसोमजाः । पुत्रेशे रन्ध्रभावस्थे प्रेतशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥९९॥
transliteration: lagne pāpe vyaye bhānau sute cārārkisomajāḥ . putreśe randhrabhāvasthe pretaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagne pāpe vyaye bhānau sute ca ārkisomajāḥputreśe randhrabhāvasthe pretaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: If a malefic planet is in the ascendant (lagna), the Sun (bhānu) is in the twelfth house (vyaya), and Saturn (ārkisuta) and Mercury (somaja) are in the fifth house (suta), and the lord of the children's house (putreśa) is situated in the eighth house (randhrabhāva), then the destruction of children (sutakṣayaḥ) occurs due to the curse of a departed spirit (pretaśāpa).

sanskrit: लग्ने स्वर्भानुना युक्ते पुत्रस्थे भानुनन्दने । गुरौ च नाशराशिस्थे प्रेतशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥१००॥
transliteration: lagne svarbhānunā yukte putrasthe bhānunandane . gurau ca nāśarāśisthe pretaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagne svarbhānunā yukte putrasthe bhānunandanegurau ca nāśarāśisthe pretaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: If the ascendant (lagna) is conjoined with Rahu (svarbhānu), and Saturn (bhānunandana) is in the fifth house (putrastha), and Jupiter (guru) is also situated in a house of loss (nāśarāśistha), then the destruction of children (sutakṣayaḥ) occurs due to the curse of a departed spirit (pretaśāpa).

sanskrit: लग्ने राहौ सशुक्रेज्ये चन्द्रे मन्दयुते तथा । लग्नेशे मृत्युराशिस्थे प्रेतशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥१०१॥
transliteration: lagne rāhau saśukrejye candre mandayute tathā . lagneśe mṛtyurāśisthe pretaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagne rāhau saśukraijye candre mandayute tathālagneśe mṛtyurāśisthe pretaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: If Rahu (rāhu) is in the ascendant (lagna), and the Moon (candra) is conjoined with Venus (śukra), Jupiter (ijya), and Saturn (manda), and the lord of the ascendant (lagneśa) is situated in the house of death (mṛtyurāśistha), then the destruction of children (sutakṣayaḥ) occurs due to the curse of a departed spirit (pretaśāpa).

sanskrit: पुत्रस्थानाधिपे नीचे कारके नीचराशिगे । नीचस्थग्रहदृष्टे च प्रेतशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥१०२॥
transliteration: putrasthānādhipe nīce kārake nīcarāśige . nīcasthagrahadṛṣṭe ca pretaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: putrasthānādhipe nīce kārake nīcarāśigenīcasthagrahadṛṣṭe ca pretaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: When the lord of the house of children is in debilitation, and the significator for children is also situated in a debilitated sign and aspected by a debilitated planet, then there is a loss of children (sutakṣaya) due to the curse of a departed spirit (pretaśāpa).

sanskrit: लग्ने मन्दे सुते राहौ रन्ध्रे भानुसमन्विते । व्यये भौमेन संयुक्ते प्रेतशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥१०३॥
transliteration: lagne mande sute rāhau randhre bhānusamanvite . vyaye bhaumena saṃyukte pretaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: lagne mande sute rāhau randhre bhānusamanvitevyaye bhaumena saṃyukte pretaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: When Saturn is in the ascendant, Rahu is in the house of children (5th house), a planet in the 8th house is conjoined with the Sun, and a planet in the 12th house is conjoined with Mars, then there is a loss of children (sutakṣaya) due to the curse of a departed spirit (pretaśāpa).

sanskrit: कामस्थानाधिपे दुःस्थे पुत्रे चन्द्रसमन्विते । मन्दमान्दियुते लग्ने प्रेतशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥१०४॥
transliteration: kāmasthānādhipe duḥsthe putre candrasamanvite . mandamāndiyute lagne pretaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: kāmasthānādhipe duḥsthe putre candrasamanvitemandamāndiyute lagne pretaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: When the lord of the house of desires (7th house) is badly placed, the house of children (5th house) is conjoined with the Moon, and the ascendant is conjoined with Saturn and Mandi, then there is a loss of children (sutakṣaya) due to the curse of a departed spirit (pretaśāpa).

sanskrit: वधस्थानाधिपे पुत्रे शनिशुक्रसमन्विते । कारके नाशराशिस्थे प्रेतशापात् सुतक्षयः ॥१०५॥
transliteration: vadhasthānādhipe putre śaniśukrasamanvite . kārake nāśarāśisthe pretaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: vadhasthānādhipe putre śaniśukrasamanvitekārake nāśarāśisthe pretaśāpāt sutakṣayaḥ
english: When the lord of the house of death (8th house) is in the house of children (5th house), and the house of children (5th house) is conjoined with Saturn and Venus, and the significator for children is situated in a destructive house, then there is a loss of children (sutakṣaya) due to the curse of a departed spirit (pretaśāpa).

sanskrit: अस्य दोषस्य शान्त्यर्थं गयाश्राद्धं समाचरेत् । कुर्यांद्रुद्राभिषेकञ्च ब्रह्ममूर्ति प्रदापयेत् ॥१०६॥
transliteration: asya doṣasya śāntyarthaṃ gayāśrāddhaṃ samācaret . kuryāṃdrudrābhiṣekañca brahmamūrti pradāpayet.
separated_sandhi: asya doṣasya śāntyartham gayāśrāddham samācaretkuryāt rudrābhiṣekam ca brahmamūrtim pradāpayet
english: For the appeasement of this defect, one should perform a śrāddha ritual at Gaya. One should also perform a Rudrābhiṣeka (oblation to Rudra) and donate an idol of Brahma.
