sanskrit: धेनुं रजतपात्रं च तथा नीलमणिं द्विज । ब्राह्मणान् भोजयेत् पश्चात् तेभ्यश्च दक्षिणां दिशेत् ॥१०७॥
transliteration: dhenuṃ rajatapātraṃ ca tathā nīlamaṇiṃ dvija . brāhmaṇān bhojayet paścāt tebhyaśca dakṣiṇāṃ diśet.
separated_sandhi: dhenum rajatapātram ca tathā nīlamaṇim dvijabrāhmaṇān bhojayet paścāt tebhyaḥ ca dakṣiṇām diśet
english: O brahmin (dvija), one should also donate a cow, a silver vessel, and a sapphire. Subsequently, one should feed brahmins and offer them donations.

sanskrit: एवं कृते मनुष्यस्य शापमोक्षा प्रजायते । पुत्रोत्पत्तिर्भवेत्तस्य कुलवृद्धिश्च जायते ॥१०८॥
transliteration: evaṃ kṛte manuṣyasya śāpamokṣā prajāyate . putrotpattirbhavettasya kulavṛddhiśca jāyate.
separated_sandhi: evam kṛte manuṣyasya śāpamokṣā prajāyateputrotpattiḥ bhavet tasya kulavṛddhiḥ ca jāyate
english: When this is done, a person attains liberation from the curse. The birth of a son will occur for him, and his family (kula) will also prosper.

sanskrit: तथा ज्ञशुक्रजे दोषे पुत्राप्तिः शम्भुपूजनात् । जीवचन्द्रकृते विप्र मन्त्रयन्त्रौषधादितः ॥१०९॥
transliteration: tathā jñaśukraje doṣe putrāptiḥ śambhupūjanāt . jīvacandrakṛte vipra mantrayantrauṣadhāditaḥ.
separated_sandhi: tathā jñaśukraje doṣe putrāptiḥ śambhupūjanātjīvacandrakṛte vipra mantrayantrauṣadhāditaḥ
english: O brahmin (vipra), similarly, if there is a defect caused by Mercury and Venus, the attainment of a son is possible through the worship of Shambhu (Shiva). If the defect is caused by Jupiter and the Moon, it can be remedied by mantras, yantras, medicines, and similar means.

sanskrit: राहुजे कन्यकादानात् सूर्यजे हरिकीर्तनात् । गोदानात् केतुजे दोषे रुद्रजापात् कुजाऽर्किजे ॥११०॥
transliteration: rāhuje kanyakādānāt sūryaje harikīrtanāt . godānāt ketuje doṣe rudrajāpāt kujā'rkije.
separated_sandhi: rāhuje kanyakādānāt sūryaje harikīrtanātgodānāt ketuje doṣe rudrajāpāt kuja arkije
english: For problems caused by Rāhu, the remedy is the donation (dāna) of a maiden. For issues caused by the Sun (Sūrya), it is the chanting of Hari's glories (harikīrtana). For defects due to Ketu, it is the donation (dāna) of a cow. For afflictions by Mars (Kuja) and Saturn (Arkija), it is the recitation (jāpa) of Rudra's names.

sanskrit: सर्वदोषविनाशाय शुभसन्तानलब्धये । हरिवंशकथा भक्त्या श्रोतव्या विधिना द्विज ॥१११॥
transliteration: sarvadoṣavināśāya śubhasantānalabdhaye . harivaṃśakathā bhaktyā śrotavyā vidhinā dvija.
separated_sandhi: sarvadoṣavināśāya śubhasantānalabdhayeharivaṃśakathā bhaktyā śrotavyā vidhinā dvija
english: O twice-born (dvija)! For the destruction of all faults and for the attainment of auspicious progeny, the story of Hari's lineage (harivaṃśakathā) should be listened to with devotion (bhakti), according to the prescribed rules.

sanskrit: ग्रहाणां दोषशान्त्यर्थं तेषां पूजाविधिं वद । मानवानां हितार्थाय संक्षेपात् कृपया मुने ॥१॥
transliteration: grahāṇāṃ doṣaśāntyarthaṃ teṣāṃ pūjāvidhiṃ vada . mānavānāṃ hitārthāya saṃkṣepāt kṛpayā mune.
separated_sandhi: grahāṇām doṣaśāntyartham teṣām pūjāvidhim vadamānavānām hitārthāya saṃkṣepāt kṛpayā mune
english: O sage! For the welfare of human beings, please kindly tell us, in brief, the method of worship (pūjā) for the planets, so that their afflictions may be pacified.

sanskrit: ग्रहा सूर्यादयः पूर्वं मया प्रोक्ता द्विजोत्तम । जगत्यां सर्वजन्तूनां तदधीनं सुखाऽसुखम् ॥२॥
transliteration: grahā sūryādayaḥ pūrvaṃ mayā proktā dvijottama . jagatyāṃ sarvajantūnāṃ tadadhīnaṃ sukhā'sukham.
separated_sandhi: grahāḥ sūryādayaḥ pūrvam mayā proktāḥ dvijottamajagatyām sarvajantūnām tadadhīnam sukham asukham
english: O best among the twice-born (dvijottama), I have previously described the planets, beginning with the Sun (Sūrya). In this world, the happiness and misery of all living beings are dependent on them.

sanskrit: तस्मात् सुशान्तिकामो वा श्रीकामो वा सुचेतसा । वृष्टायायुः पुष्टिकामो वा तेषां यज्ञं समाचरेत् ॥३॥
transliteration: tasmāt suśāntikāmo vā śrīkāmo vā sucetasā . vṛṣṭāyāyuḥ puṣṭikāmo vā teṣāṃ yajñaṃ samācaret.
separated_sandhi: tasmāt suśāntikāmaḥ vā śrīkāmaḥ vā vṛṣṭāyuḥpuṣṭikāmaḥ vā sucetasā teṣām yajñam samācaret
english: Therefore, with a clear mind, one who desires excellent peace, or prosperity (śrī), or long life and nourishment, should perform a Vedic ritual (yajña) for these purposes.

sanskrit: ताभ्राच्च स्फटिकाद्रक्तचन्दनात् स्वर्णकादुभौ । रजतादयसः सीसात् कांस्यात् कार्याः क्रामद् ग्रहाः ॥४॥
transliteration: tābhrācca sphaṭikādraktacandanāt svarṇakādubhau . rajatādayasaḥ sīsāt kāṃsyāt kāryāḥ krāmad grahāḥ.
separated_sandhi: tāmrat ca sphaṭikāt raktacandanāt svarṇakāt ubhaurajatāt ayasaḥ sīsāt kāṃsyāt kāryāḥ krāmat grahāḥ
english: And from copper, from crystal, from red sandalwood, from gold (for two planets), from silver, from iron, from lead, and from bell metal, the moving planets should be made.

sanskrit: पूर्वोक्तैः स्वस्ववर्णैर्वा पटे लेख्या द्विजोत्तमैः । स्वस्वोक्तदिग्विभागेषु गन्द्याद्यैर्मण्डनेषु वा ॥५॥
transliteration: pūrvoktaiḥ svasvavarṇairvā paṭe lekhyā dvijottamaiḥ . svasvoktadigvibhāgeṣu gandyādyairmaṇḍaneṣu vā.
separated_sandhi: pūrvoktaiḥ svasvavarṇaiḥ vā paṭe lekhyā dvijottamaiḥsvasvoktadigvibhāgeṣu gandhādyaiḥ maṇḍaneṣu vā
english: Alternatively, these (planets) should be drawn on a cloth by excellent twice-born (Brahmins) using their respective colors, or in their assigned directional divisions, with decorations made from perfumes and similar substances.

sanskrit: पद्मासनः पद्महस्तः पद्मपत्रसमद्युतिः । सप्ताश्वरथसंस्थश्च द्विभुजश्च दिवाकरः ॥६॥
transliteration: padmāsanaḥ padmahastaḥ padmapatrasamadyutiḥ . saptāśvarathasaṃsthaśca dvibhujaśca divākaraḥ.
separated_sandhi: padmāsanaḥ padmahastaḥ padmapatrasamadyutiḥsaptāśvarathasaṃsthaḥ ca dvibhujaḥ ca divākaraḥ
english: The Sun (divākaraḥ) is seated in a lotus posture (padmāsana), holds a lotus in his hand, has a luster like a lotus leaf, is stationed in a chariot drawn by seven horses, and has two arms.

sanskrit: श्वेतः श्वेताम्बरो देवो दशाश्वः श्वेतभूषणः । गदाहस्तो द्विबाहुश्च विधातव्यो विधुर्द्विज ॥७॥
transliteration: śvetaḥ śvetāmbaro devo daśāśvaḥ śvetabhūṣaṇaḥ . gadāhasto dvibāhuśca vidhātavyo vidhurdvija.
separated_sandhi: śvetaḥ śvetāmbaraḥ devaḥ daśāśvaḥ śvetabhūṣaṇaḥgadāhastaḥ dvibāhuḥ ca vidhātavyaḥ vidhuḥ dvija
english: O twice-born (dvija), the Moon (vidhu) god should be conceived as white, clad in white garments, possessing ten horses, adorned with white ornaments, holding a mace in his hand, and having two arms.

sanskrit: रक्तमाल्याम्बरधरो शक्तिशूलगदाधरः । वरदस्तु चतुर्बाहुर्मङ्गलो मेषवाहनः ॥८॥
transliteration: raktamālyāmbaradharo śaktiśūlagadādharaḥ . varadastu caturbāhurmaṅgalo meṣavāhanaḥ.
separated_sandhi: raktamālyāmbaradharaḥ śaktiśūlagadādharaḥvaradaḥ tu caturbāhuḥ maṅgalaḥ meṣavāhanaḥ
english: Mangala (maṅgala) is one who wears red garlands and garments, holds a spear (śakti), a trident, and a mace, grants boons, has four arms, and has a ram as his vehicle.

sanskrit: पीतमाल्याम्बरधरः कर्णिकारसमद्युतिः । खड्गचर्मगदापाणिः सिंहस्थो वरदो बुधः ॥९॥
transliteration: pītamālyāmbaradharaḥ karṇikārasamadyutiḥ . khaḍgacarmagadāpāṇiḥ siṃhastho varado budhaḥ.
separated_sandhi: pītamālyāmbaradharaḥ karṇikārasamadyutiḥkhaḍgacarmagadāpāṇiḥ siṃhasthaḥ varadaḥ budhaḥ
english: Budha (budha) wears yellow garlands and garments, possesses a radiance like a karṇikāra flower, holds a sword, a shield, and a mace in his hands, is seated on a lion, and is a giver of boons.

sanskrit: गुरुशुक्रौ क्रमात् पीतश्वेतवर्णौ चतुर्भुजौ । दण्डिनौ वरदौ कार्यौ साक्षसूत्रकमण्डलू ॥१०॥
transliteration: guruśukrau kramāt pītaśvetavarṇau caturbhujau . daṇḍinau varadau kāryau sākṣasūtrakamaṇḍalū.
separated_sandhi: guruśukrau kramāt pītaśvetavarṇau caturbhujaudaṇḍinau varadau kāryau sākṣasūtrakamaṇḍalū
english: Guru (guru) and Shukra (śukra) should be depicted respectively as yellow and white in color, four-armed, holding staffs, granting boons, and equipped with rosaries and water pots (kamaṇḍalu).

sanskrit: इन्द्रनीलद्युतिः शूली वरदो गृध्रवाहनः । वाणवाणासनधरो विज्ञेयोऽर्कसुतो द्विज ॥११॥
transliteration: indranīladyutiḥ śūlī varado gṛdhravāhanaḥ . vāṇavāṇāsanadharo vijñeyo'rkasuto dvija.
separated_sandhi: indranīladyutiḥ śūlī varadaḥ gṛdhravāhanaḥvāṇavāṇāsanadharaḥ vijñeyaḥ arkasutaḥ dvija
english: O twice-born (dvija), the son of the sun (arkasuta) should be known as one who possesses the luster of a sapphire, wields a trident, bestows boons, rides a vulture, and holds an arrow and a bow.

sanskrit: करालवदनः खड्गचर्मशूली वरप्रदः । सिंहस्थो नीलवर्णश्च राहुरेवं प्रकल्प्यते ॥१२॥
transliteration: karālavadanaḥ khaḍgacarmaśūlī varapradaḥ . siṃhastho nīlavarṇaśca rāhurevaṃ prakalpyate.
separated_sandhi: karālavadanaḥ khaḍgacarmaśūlī varapradaḥsiṃhasthaḥ nīlavarṇaḥ ca rāhuḥ evam prakalpyate
english: Rahu is thus conceived as having a terrible face, holding a sword, a shield, and a trident, bestowing boons, mounted on a lion, and blue in color.

sanskrit: धूम्रा द्विबाहवः सर्वे गदिनो विकृताननाः । गृध्रासना नित्यं केतवः स्युर्वरप्रदा ॥१३॥
transliteration: dhūmrā dvibāhavaḥ sarve gadino vikṛtānanāḥ . gṛdhrāsanā nityaṃ ketavaḥ syurvarapradā.
separated_sandhi: dhūmrāḥ dvibāhavaḥ sarve gadinaḥ vikṛtānanāḥgṛdhrāsanāḥ nityam ketavaḥ syuḥ varapradāḥ
english: All the Ketus are smoky-colored, two-armed, mace-bearing, have distorted faces, and are always seated on vultures, bestowing boons.

sanskrit: सर्वे किरीटिनः कार्या ग्रहा लोकहितप्रदाः । स्वांगुलेनोच्छ्रिता विज्ञैः शतमष्टोत्तरं सदा ॥१४॥
transliteration: sarve kirīṭinaḥ kāryā grahā lokahitapradāḥ . svāṃgulenocchritā vijñaiḥ śatamaṣṭottaraṃ sadā.
separated_sandhi: sarve kirīṭinaḥ kāryāḥ grahāḥ lokahitapradāḥsvāṅgulena ucchritāḥ vijñaiḥ śatam aṣṭottaram sadā
english: All the planets (graha), which bestow welfare upon the world, should always be fashioned crowned, with a height of one hundred and eight units measured by one's own finger, as instructed by the wise.

sanskrit: यथावर्णं प्रदेयानि सुद्ष्पाणि वसनानि च । गन्धो दीपो बलिश्चैव धूपो देयश्च गुग्गुलुः ॥१५॥
transliteration: yathāvarṇaṃ pradeyāni sudṣpāṇi vasanāni ca . gandho dīpo baliścaiva dhūpo deyaśca gugguluḥ.
separated_sandhi: yathāvarṇam pradeyāni suduṣpāṇi vasanāni cagandhaḥ dīpaḥ baliḥ ca eva dhūpaḥ deyaḥ ca gugguluḥ
english: Difficult-to-obtain items and garments should be offered according to their respective colors. Fragrance, a lamp, a ritual offering (bali), and guggul incense should also be presented.

sanskrit: यस्य ग्रहस्य यद्द्रव्यमन्नं यस्य च यत् प्रियम् । तच्च तस्यै प्रदातव्यं भक्तियुक्तेन चेतसा ॥१६॥
transliteration: yasya grahasya yaddravyamannaṃ yasya ca yat priyam . tacca tasyai pradātavyaṃ bhaktiyuktena cetasā.
separated_sandhi: yasya grahasya yat dravyam annam yasya ca yat priyamtat ca tasyai pradātavyam bhaktiyuktena cetasā
english: Whatever material (dravya) and food are dear to a particular planet, that should be offered to it with a mind full of devotion (bhakti).

sanskrit: आकृष्णेन इमं देवा अग्निर्मूर्धा दिवः ककुत् । उद्बुध्यस्वेति मन्त्रांश्च जपेदथ बृहस्पते ॥१७॥
transliteration: ākṛṣṇena imaṃ devā agnirmūrdhā divaḥ kakut . udbudhyasveti mantrāṃśca japedatha bṛhaspate.
separated_sandhi: ā kṛṣṇena imam devā agniḥ mūrdhā divaḥ kakutudbudhyasva iti mantrān ca japet atha bṛhaspate
english: One should chant mantras (beginning with) 'ā kṛṣṇena', 'imaṃ devā', 'agnir mūrdhā divaḥ kakut', and 'udbudhyasva'; thereafter, (the mantras for) Bṛhaspati (Jupiter).

sanskrit: अन्नात् परिश्रुतश्चेति शन्नो देवीरभीष्टये । कया नश्चित्र इत्येवं केतु कृण्वन्निमांस्तथा ॥१८॥
transliteration: annāt pariśrutaśceti śanno devīrabhīṣṭaye . kayā naścitra ityevaṃ ketu kṛṇvannimāṃstathā.
separated_sandhi: annāt pariśrutaḥ ca iti śam naḥ devīḥ abhiṣṭayekayā naḥ citraḥ iti evam ketu kṛṇvan imān tathā
english: Also, (one should chant mantras like) 'annāt pariśrutaḥ', and 'śam no devīḥ abhiṣṭaye'. In this manner, (chant) 'kayā naś citraḥ', and 'ketu kṛṇvan'; these (mantras are to be chanted) similarly.

sanskrit: सप्त रुद्रा दिशो नन्दा नवचन्द्रा नृपास्तथा । त्रिपक्षा अष्टचन्द्राश्च सप्तचन्द्रास्तथैव च ॥१९॥
transliteration: sapta rudrā diśo nandā navacandrā nṛpāstathā . tripakṣā aṣṭacandrāśca saptacandrāstathaiva ca.
separated_sandhi: sapta rudrāḥ diśaḥ nandāḥ navacandrāḥ nṛpāḥ tathātripakṣāḥ aṣṭacandrāḥ ca saptacandrāḥ tathā eva ca
english: The specified numbers are seven (from Rudras), ten (from directions), nine (from Nandas), nineteen (from "nava-candra"), sixteen (from kings); and similarly, three (from fortnights), eighteen (from "aṣṭa-candra"), and seventeen (from "sapta-candra").

sanskrit: इमाः संख्याः सहस्रघ्ना जपसंख्याः प्रकीर्तिताः । क्रमादर्कादिखेटानां प्रीत्यर्थं द्विजपुङ्गव ॥२०॥
transliteration: imāḥ saṃkhyāḥ sahasraghnā japasaṃkhyāḥ prakīrtitāḥ . kramādarkādikheṭānāṃ prītyarthaṃ dvijapuṅgava.
separated_sandhi: imāḥ saṅkhyāḥ sahasraghnāḥ japa-saṅkhyāḥ prakīrtitāḥkramāt arka-ādi-kheṭānām prīty-artham dvijapuṅgava
english: O best among the twice-born (dvija), these numbers, when multiplied by a thousand, are declared as the recitation (japa) counts, in order, for the gratification of the Sun and other planets.

sanskrit: अर्कः पलाशः खदिरस्त्वपामार्गस्तु पिप्पलः । उदुम्बरः शमी दुर्वा कुशाश्च समिधः क्रमात् ॥२१॥
transliteration: arkaḥ palāśaḥ khadirastvapāmārgastu pippalaḥ . udumbaraḥ śamī durvā kuśāśca samidhaḥ kramāt.
separated_sandhi: arkaḥ palāśaḥ khadiraḥ tu apāmārgaḥ tu pippalaḥudumbaraḥ śamī durvā kuśāḥ ca samidhaḥ kramāt
english: The sacrificial twigs (samidh) are, in order: arka (Calotropis Gigantea), palāśa (Butea monosperma), khadira (Acacia catechu), apāmārga (Achyranthes aspera), pippala (Ficus religiosa), udumbara (Ficus racemosa), śamī (Prosopis cineraria), durvā (Cynodon dactylon), and kuśa (Desmostachya bipinnata).

sanskrit: होतव्या मधुसर्पिभ्यां दध्ना क्षीरेण वा युताः । एकैकस्य त्वष्ट शतमष्टाविंशतिरेव वा ॥२२॥
transliteration: hotavyā madhusarpibhyāṃ dadhnā kṣīreṇa vā yutāḥ . ekaikasya tvaṣṭa śatamaṣṭāviṃśatireva vā.
separated_sandhi: hotavyāḥ madhusarpibhyām dadhnā kṣīreṇa vā yutāḥeka-ekasya tu aṣṭa śatam aṣṭāviṃśatiḥ eva vā
english: They (the twigs) should be offered mixed with honey and ghee, or with curds, or with milk. For each (planet), the number (of offerings) should be either one hundred and eight, or twenty-eight.

sanskrit: गुडैदनं पायसं च हविष्यं क्षीरषाष्टिकम् । दध्योदनं हविश्चूर्णं मांसं चित्रान्नमेव च ॥२३॥
transliteration: guḍaidanaṃ pāyasaṃ ca haviṣyaṃ kṣīraṣāṣṭikam . dadhyodanaṃ haviścūrṇaṃ māṃsaṃ citrānnameva ca.
separated_sandhi: guḍa-odanam pāyasam ca haviṣyam kṣīra-ṣāṣṭikamdadhi-odanam havis-cūrṇam māṃsam citra-annam eva ca
english: Sweet rice (guḍa-odana), rice pudding, sacred food (haviṣya), milk and śāṣṭika rice, curd rice (dadhi-odana), powdered oblations, meat, and also various mixed rice dishes (citra-anna) are prescribed.

sanskrit: दद्याद् ग्रहक्रमादेवं विप्रेभ्यो भोजनं द्विज । शक्तितो वा यथालाभं देयं सत्कारपूर्वकम् ॥२४॥
transliteration: dadyād grahakramādevaṃ viprebhyo bhojanaṃ dvija . śaktito vā yathālābhaṃ deyaṃ satkārapūrvakam.
separated_sandhi: dadyāt graha-kramāt evam viprebhyaḥ bhojanam dvijaśaktitaḥ vā yathā-lābham deyam satkāra-pūrvakam
english: O twice-born (dvija), one should offer food to Brahmins in this manner, following the order of the planets. It should be given respectfully, either according to one's capacity (śakti) or what is available.

sanskrit: धेनुः शङ्खस्तथाऽनड्वान् हेम वासो हयः क्रमात् । कृष्णा गौरायसं छाग एता रव्यादिदक्षिणाः ॥२५॥
transliteration: dhenuḥ śaṅkhastathā'naḍvān hema vāso hayaḥ kramāt . kṛṣṇā gaurāyasaṃ chāga etā ravyādidakṣiṇāḥ.
separated_sandhi: dhenuḥ śaṅkhaḥ tathā anaḍvān hema vāsas hayaḥ kramātkṛṣṇā gauḥ āyasam chāga etāḥ ravi-ādi-dakṣiṇāḥ
english: A cow, a conch, an ox, gold, a garment, and a horse, followed by a black cow, iron, and a goat – these are the offerings (dakṣiṇā) for the Sun (Ravi) and the other planets, presented in their proper order (kramāt).

sanskrit: यस्य यश्च यदा दुःस्थः स तं यत्नेन पूजयेत् । एषां धात्रा वरो दत्तः पूजिताः पूजयिष्यथ ॥२६॥
transliteration: yasya yaśca yadā duḥsthaḥ sa taṃ yatnena pūjayet . eṣāṃ dhātrā varo dattaḥ pūjitāḥ pūjayiṣyatha.
separated_sandhi: yasya yaḥ ca yadā duḥsthaḥ sa tam yatnena pūjayeteṣām dhātrā varaḥ dattaḥ pūjitāḥ pūjayiṣyatha
english: Whenever a planet is ill-placed for someone, that person should diligently worship it. A boon (vara) was granted to these (planets) by the Creator (Dhātṛ): 'Those (planets) who are honored, you shall in turn bestow blessings (upon your devotees).'

sanskrit: मानवानां ग्रहाधीना उञ्छ्रायाः पतनानि च । भावाऽभावौ च जगतां तस्मात् पूज्यतमा ग्रहाः ॥२७॥
transliteration: mānavānāṃ grahādhīnā uñchrāyāḥ patanāni ca . bhāvā'bhāvau ca jagatāṃ tasmāt pūjyatamā grahāḥ.
separated_sandhi: mānavānām grahādīnāḥ uñchrāyāḥ patanāni ca bhāvaabhāvau ca jagatām tasmāt pūjyatamaḥ grahāḥ
english: The rises and falls of human beings, and the existence and non-existence (or prosperity and adversity) of the worlds, are dependent on the planets. Therefore, the planets are the most venerable.

sanskrit: अथाऽन्यत् सम्प्रवक्ष्यामि सुलग्ने सुग्रहेष्वपि । यदन्यकारणेनापि भवेज्जन्माऽशुभप्रदम् ॥१॥
transliteration: athā'nyat sampravakṣyāmi sulagne sugraheṣvapi . yadanyakāraṇenāpi bhavejjanmā'śubhapradam.
separated_sandhi: atha anyat sampravakṣyāmi sulagne sugraheṣu apiyat anyakāraṇena api bhavet janma aśubhapradaṃ
english: Now, I will explain another matter: how birth can become inauspicious even when the ascendant (lagna) is strong and the planets are well-placed, due to some other reason.

sanskrit: दर्शे कृष्णाचतुर्दश्यां विष्ट्यां सोदरभे तथा । पितृभे सूर्यसंक्रान्तौ पातेऽर्केन्दुग्रहे तथा ॥२॥
transliteration: darśe kṛṣṇācaturdaśyāṃ viṣṭyāṃ sodarabhe tathā . pitṛbhe sūryasaṃkrāntau pāte'rkendugrahe tathā.
separated_sandhi: darśe kṛṣṇācaturdaśyām viṣṭyām sodarabhe tathāpitṛbhe sūryasaṃkrāntau pāte arkendugrahe tathā
english: On the new moon day, on the fourteenth day of the dark fortnight, during the Viṣṭi (karaṇa) period, on a sibling's natal constellation, and also on the father's natal constellation, at the sun's ingress into a new zodiac sign, during the inauspicious Pāta yoga, and also during a solar or lunar eclipse.

sanskrit: व्यतीपातादिदुर्योगे गण्डान्ते त्रिविधेऽपि वा । यमघण्टेऽवभे दग्धयोगे त्रीतरजन्म च ॥३॥
transliteration: vyatīpātādiduryoge gaṇḍānte trividhe'pi vā . yamaghaṇṭe'vabhe dagdhayoge trītarajanma ca.
separated_sandhi: vyatīpāta ādi duryoge gaṇḍānte trividhe api vāyamaghaṇṭe avabhe dagdhayoge trītarajanma ca
english: During Vyatīpāta and other inauspicious yogas, at the threefold Gaṇḍānta (juncture of tithi, nakṣatra, and lagna), or in all three such ways; during Yamaghaṇṭa, on an inauspicious constellation, during Dagdhayoga, and at trītarajanma (a specific astrological combination).

sanskrit: प्रसवस्य त्रिकारेऽपि ज्ञेयं जन्माऽशुभप्रदम् । शान्त्या भवति कल्याणं तदुपायं च वच्म्यहम् ॥४॥
transliteration: prasavasya trikāre'pi jñeyaṃ janmā'śubhapradam . śāntyā bhavati kalyāṇaṃ tadupāyaṃ ca vacmyaham.
separated_sandhi: prasavasya trikāre api jñeyaṃ janma aśubhapradamśāntyā bhavati kalyāṇaṃ tat upāyaṃ ca vacmi aham
english: Even when a birth occurs under any of the three types of adverse circumstances (trikāra), it is considered inauspicious. However, through propitiatory rituals (śānti), auspiciousness and well-being (kalyāṇa) can be achieved. I shall now explain the methods for these remedies.

sanskrit: मैत्रेय दर्शजातानां मातापित्रोर्दरिद्रता । तद्दोषपरिहाराय शान्तिं कुर्याद् विचक्षणः ॥१॥
transliteration: maitreya darśajātānāṃ mātāpitrordaridratā . taddoṣaparihārāya śāntiṃ kuryād vicakṣaṇaḥ.
separated_sandhi: maitreya darśajātānāṃ mātāpitroḥ daridratātat doṣa parihārāya śāntiṃ kuryāt vicakṣaṇaḥ
english: O Maitreya, for children born with the *darśajāta* affliction (e.g., during the new moon), their parents face destitution. Therefore, a discerning person should perform propitiatory rituals (śānti) to alleviate this defect.

sanskrit: कलशस्थापनं कृत्वा प्रथमं विधिपूर्वकम् । उदुम्बरटाश्वत्थचूतानां पल्लवांस्तथा ॥२॥
transliteration: kalaśasthāpanaṃ kṛtvā prathamaṃ vidhipūrvakam . udumbaraṭāśvatthacūtānāṃ pallavāṃstathā.
separated_sandhi: kalaśasthāpanaṃ kṛtvā prathamaṃ vidhipūrvakamudumbaraṭāśvatthacūtānāṃ pallavān tathā
english: First, having duly performed the ceremonial installation of the sacred pot (kalaśa), one should then take the leaves (pallava) of the udumbara (cluster fig), aṭa (a specific tree), aśvattha (sacred fig), and cūta (mango) trees.

sanskrit: सनिम्बानां च मूलनि त्वचस्तत्र विनिक्षिपेत् । पंचरत्नानि निक्षिप्य वस्त्रयुग्मेन चेष्टयेत् ॥३॥
transliteration: sanimbānāṃ ca mūlani tvacastatra vinikṣipet . paṃcaratnāni nikṣipya vastrayugmena ceṣṭayet.
separated_sandhi: sanimbanāṃ ca mūlani tvacaḥ tatra vinikṣipetpañcaratnāni nikṣipya vastrayugmena ca ceṣṭayet
english: Additionally, the roots and barks of these trees (udumbara, aṭa, aśvattha, cūta) along with neem (nimba) should be placed inside. After depositing the five gems (pañcaratna), one should then ritualistically adorn it with a pair of cloths.

sanskrit: सर्वे समुद्र इति चाऽपोहिष्ठादित्र्यृचेन च । आमन्त्र्य कलशे तच्च स्थापयेद् वह्निकोणके ॥४॥
transliteration: sarve samudra iti cā'pohiṣṭhāditryṛcena ca . āmantrya kalaśe tacca sthāpayed vahnikoṇake.
separated_sandhi: sarve samudra iti ca āpaḥ hiṣṭhā ādi tri ṛcenaca āmantrya kalaśe tat ca sthāpayet vahnikoṇake
english: After invoking (the waters) with the (mantra) 'sarve samudra iti' and the three verses (mantras) beginning with 'āpo hiṣṭhā', one should then place that (water) in a pitcher in the southeast corner.

sanskrit: दर्शस्य देवयोश्चाऽथ चन्द्रभास्करयोः क्रमात् । प्रतिमां स्वर्णजां नित्यं राजतीं ताम्रजां तथा ॥५॥
transliteration: darśasya devayoścā'tha candrabhāskarayoḥ kramāt . pratimāṃ svarṇajāṃ nityaṃ rājatīṃ tāmrajāṃ tathā.
separated_sandhi: darśasya devayoḥ ca atha candrabhāskarayoḥ kramātpratimām svarṇajām nityam rājatīm tāmrajām tathā
english: Then, for the two deities of the new moon day (darśa) – the Moon and the Sun – one should prepare images made of gold (as the primary one), and similarly, in sequential order, images made of silver and copper.

sanskrit: आप्यायस्वेति मन्त्रेनऽ सविता पश्चात्तमेव च । उपचारैः समाराध्य ततो होमं समाचरेत् ॥६॥
transliteration: āpyāyasveti mantrena' savitā paścāttameva ca . upacāraiḥ samārādhya tato homaṃ samācaret.
separated_sandhi: āpyāyasva iti mantreṇa savitā paścāt tam evaca upacāraiḥ samārādhya tataḥ homam samācaret
english: Using the "mantra" 'āpyāyasva' (for the Moon), and subsequently (a "mantra" for) Savitā (the Sun), one should meticulously worship those very (deities/images) with ritual offerings (upacāra), and thereafter perform a fire sacrifice (homa).

sanskrit: समिधश्च चरुं विद्वान् क्रमेण जुहुयात् व्रती । भक्त्या सवितृमन्त्रेण सोमो धेनुश्च मन्त्रतः ॥७॥
transliteration: samidhaśca caruṃ vidvān krameṇa juhuyāt vratī . bhaktyā savitṛmantreṇa somo dhenuśca mantrataḥ.
separated_sandhi: samidhaḥ ca carum vidvān krameṇa juhuyāt vratībhaktyā savitṛmantreṇa somaḥ dhenuḥ ca mantrataḥ
english: The wise observer of a vow (vrati) should, in proper order, offer fire sticks (samidh) and cooked oblation (caru) (into the fire). This should be done with devotion (bhakti), using the Savitṛ "mantra" (for Savitā), and also (for) Soma and the cow, by means of (appropriate) "mantra"s.

sanskrit: अष्टोत्तरशतं वापि अष्टविंशतिरेव वा । अभिषेकं तथा कुर्यात् दम्पत्योश्च सुपुत्रयोः ॥८॥
transliteration: aṣṭottaraśataṃ vāpi aṣṭaviṃśatireva vā . abhiṣekaṃ tathā kuryāt dampatyośca suputrayoḥ.
separated_sandhi: aṣṭottaraśatam vā api aṣṭaviṃśatiḥ eva vāabhiṣekaṃ tathā kuryāt dampatyoḥ ca suputrayoḥ
english: One should perform the anointing (abhiṣeka) ritual, either 108 times or 28 times, for the couple and their well-behaved sons.

sanskrit: हिरण्यं रजतं चैव कृष्णधेनुश्च दक्षिणा । ब्राह्मणान् भोजयेत् शक्त्या ततः क्षेममवाप्नुयात् ॥९॥
transliteration: hiraṇyaṃ rajataṃ caiva kṛṣṇadhenuśca dakṣiṇā . brāhmaṇān bhojayet śaktyā tataḥ kṣemamavāpnuyāt.
separated_sandhi: hiraṇyaṃ rajataṃ ca eva kṛṣṇadhenuḥ ca dakṣiṇābrāhmaṇān bhojayet śaktyā tataḥ kṣemam avāpnuyāt
english: Gold, silver, and a black cow constitute the sacrificial fee (dakṣiṇā). One should feed Brahmins according to one's capacity (śakti), and thereafter, one will attain welfare.

sanskrit: कृष्णपक्षचतुर्दश्याः षड्भागेषु फलं क्रमात् । जन्म चेत् प्रथमे भागे तदा ज्ञेयं शुभं द्विज ॥१॥
transliteration: kṛṣṇapakṣacaturdaśyāḥ ṣaḍbhāgeṣu phalaṃ kramāt . janma cet prathame bhāge tadā jñeyaṃ śubhaṃ dvija.
separated_sandhi: kṛṣṇapakṣacaturdaśyāḥ ṣaḍbhāgeṣu phalaṃ kramātjanma cet prathame bhāge tadā jñeyaṃ śubhaṃ dvija
english: Regarding the results (phala) of the six divisions (ṣaḍbhāgeṣu) of the fourteenth day (caturdaśī) of the dark lunar fortnight (kṛṣṇapakṣa), consider them sequentially. O twice-born (dvija), if a birth occurs in the first division, then it should be understood as auspicious.

sanskrit: द्वितीये पितरं हन्ति मातरं च तृतीयके । चतुर्थे मातुलं चैव पञ्चमे वंशनाशनम् ॥२॥
transliteration: dvitīye pitaraṃ hanti mātaraṃ ca tṛtīyake . caturthe mātulaṃ caiva pañcame vaṃśanāśanam.
separated_sandhi: dvitīye pitaraṃ hanti mātaraṃ ca tṛtīyakecaturthe mātulaṃ ca eva pañcame vaṃśanāśanam
english: If birth occurs in the second division, it causes harm to the father; in the third, to the mother. In the fourth, it affects the maternal uncle, and in the fifth, it brings about the destruction of the lineage (vaṃśanāśanam).

sanskrit: षष्ठे तु धननाशः स्यादात्मनो नाश एव वा । तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं शान्तिं कुर्याद् प्रयत्नतः ॥३॥
transliteration: ṣaṣṭhe tu dhananāśaḥ syādātmano nāśa eva vā . taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ śāntiṃ kuryād prayatnataḥ.
separated_sandhi: ṣaṣṭhe tu dhananāśaḥ syāt ātmanaḥ nāśaḥ eva vātat doṣaparihārārthaṃ śāntiṃ kuryāt prayatnataḥ
english: If the sixth house is afflicted, there may be a loss of wealth or even a destruction of the self (ātman). Therefore, to avert this fault, one should diligently perform a propitiation ritual (śānti).

sanskrit: शिवस्य प्रतिमां कुर्यात् सौवर्णीं कर्षसम्मिताम् । तदर्धार्धमितां वाऽपि यथावित्तं मनोहराम् ॥४॥
transliteration: śivasya pratimāṃ kuryāt sauvarṇīṃ karṣasammitām . tadardhārdhamitāṃ vā'pi yathāvittaṃ manoharām.
separated_sandhi: śivasya pratimāṃ kuryāt sauvarṇīṃ karṣasammitāmtat ardhārdhamitāṃ vā api yathāvittaṃ manoharām
english: One should make a golden image of Shiva (Śiva). It should be equal in weight to one karṣa, or even one-fourth of a karṣa, depending on one's financial means, and it should be beautiful.

sanskrit: बालचन्द्रकिरीटाञ्च श्वेतमाल्याम्बरान्विताम् । त्रिनेत्रां च वृषासीनां वराभयकरामथ ॥५॥
transliteration: bālacandrakirīṭāñca śvetamālyāmbarānvitām . trinetrāṃ ca vṛṣāsīnāṃ varābhayakarāmatha.
separated_sandhi: bālacandrakirīṭām ca śvetamālyāmbarānvitāmtrinetrām ca vṛṣāsīnām varābhayakarām atha
english: The image should have a crescent moon as its crown, be adorned with white garlands and garments, possess three eyes, be seated on a bull, and have hands displaying the gestures of granting boons (vara mudrā) and dispelling fear (abhaya mudrā).

sanskrit: त्रयम्बकं चेति मन्त्रेण पूजां कुर्यादतन्द्रितः । आवाह्य वारुणैर्मन्त्रैराचार्यो मन्त्रतत्त्ववित् ॥६॥
transliteration: trayambakaṃ ceti mantreṇa pūjāṃ kuryādatandritaḥ . āvāhya vāruṇairmantrairācāryo mantratattvavit.
separated_sandhi: trayambakaṃ ca iti mantreṇa pūjāṃ kuryāt atandritaḥāvāhya vāruṇaiḥ mantraiḥ ācāryaḥ mantratattvavit
english: The preceptor (ācārya), who understands the essence of mantras (mantratattvavit), should diligently perform the worship (pūjā) using the Tryambakaṃ mantra, after invoking (the deity) with Vedic verses (mantra) associated with Varuṇa.

sanskrit: इमं मे वरुणे त्येवं तत्त्वा यामी त्यृचा पुनः । त्त्वन्न अग्ने इत्यनया सत्वं नो इत्यृचापि च ॥७॥
transliteration: imaṃ me varuṇe tyevaṃ tattvā yāmī tyṛcā punaḥ . ttvanna agne ityanayā satvaṃ no ityṛcāpi ca.
separated_sandhi: imaṃ me varuṇe iti evaṃ tattvā yāmī iti ṛcā punaḥtvam na agne iti anayā sa tvam naḥ iti ṛcā api ca
english: One should recite the hymn (starting with) 'Imaṃ me varuṇe', and again with the hymn (starting with) 'Tattvā yāmī'. Similarly, one should recite with (the hymn starting with) 'Tvaṃ na agne' and also with the hymn (starting with) 'Sa tvaṃ naḥ'.

sanskrit: आग्नेयं कुम्भमारभ्य पूजयेद् भक्तितः क्रमात् । आ नोभद्रेति सूक्तं च भद्रा अग्नेश्च सूक्तकम् ॥८॥
transliteration: āgneyaṃ kumbhamārabhya pūjayed bhaktitaḥ kramāt . ā nobhadreti sūktaṃ ca bhadrā agneśca sūktakam.
separated_sandhi: āgneyaṃ kumbham ārabhyā pūjayet bhaktitaḥ kramāt ānaḥ bhadrā iti sūktaṃ ca bhadrā agneḥ ca sūktakam
english: Beginning with the fire-pot (āgneya kumbha), one should worship sequentially with devotion (bhakti). One should recite the hymn (sūkta) 'Ā no bhadrāḥ' and also the hymn 'Bhadrā agneḥ'.

sanskrit: जप्त्वा पुरुषसूक्तं च कन्द्रुद्रेति तथा जपेत् । शङ्करस्याऽभिषेकं च ग्रहपूजां च कारयेत् ॥९॥
transliteration: japtvā puruṣasūktaṃ ca kandrudreti tathā japet . śaṅkarasyā'bhiṣekaṃ ca grahapūjāṃ ca kārayet.
separated_sandhi: japtvā puruṣasūktaṃ ca kam rudra iti tathā japetśaṅkarasya abhiṣekaṃ ca grahapūjāṃ ca kārayet
english: After chanting the Puruṣa Sūkta, one should similarly chant (the hymn starting with) 'Kaṃ rudra'. One should also perform the ceremonial bathing (abhiṣeka) of Shankara, and arrange for the worship of the planets (graha pūjā).

sanskrit: समिदाज्यचरूंश्चैव तिलमाषांश्च सर्पपान् । अश्वस्थल्पक्षपालासखादिराः समिधः शुभाः ॥१०॥
transliteration: samidājyacarūṃścaiva tilamāṣāṃśca sarpapān . aśvasthalpakṣapālāsakhādirāḥ samidhaḥ śubhāḥ.
separated_sandhi: samidh ājya carūn ca eva tilamāṣān ca sarpapānaśvasthalpakṣapalāsakhādirāḥ samidhaḥ śubhāḥ
english: Fuel sticks, clarified butter, and cooked oblations, indeed, as well as sesame, black gram, and mustard seeds (are prescribed). Auspicious fuel sticks are (from trees like) Aśvattha, Udumbara, Palāśa, and Khadira.

sanskrit: अष्टोत्तरशतं वह्नौ जुहुयाद् विधिपूर्वकम् । अष्टविंशतिसंख्या वा होमं कुर्यात् पृथक् पृथक् ॥११॥
transliteration: aṣṭottaraśataṃ vahnau juhuyād vidhipūrvakam . aṣṭaviṃśatisaṃkhyā vā homaṃ kuryāt pṛthak pṛthak.
separated_sandhi: aṣṭottaraśatam vahnau juhuyāt vidhipūrvakamaṣṭaviṃśatisaṃkhyā vā homam kuryāt pṛthak pṛthak
english: One should offer one hundred and eight (oblations) into the fire according to the prescribed rules. Alternatively, one should perform the Vedic fire ritual (homa) with twenty-eight oblations, each individually.

sanskrit: मन्त्रेण त्र्यम्बकेनाथ तिलान् व्याहृतिभिस्तथा । ग्रहहोमं च विधिवत् कुर्याद् क्षेमं ततो भवेत् ॥१२॥
transliteration: mantreṇa tryambakenātha tilān vyāhṛtibhistathā . grahahomaṃ ca vidhivat kuryād kṣemaṃ tato bhavet.
separated_sandhi: mantreṇa tryambakeṇa atha tilān vyāhṛtibhiḥ tathāgrahahomam ca vidhivat kuryāt kṣemam tataḥ bhavet
english: One should perform the planetary oblation (graha homa) using the Tryambaka mantra, as well as sesamum seeds and the Vyāhṛtis, all according to the prescribed method. From this, welfare will certainly result.

sanskrit: अभिषेकं च जातस्य तत्पित्रोश्चापि मन्त्रवित् । कुर्यात् ततो यथाशक्ति ब्राह्मणान् भोजयेत् सुधीः ॥१३॥
transliteration: abhiṣekaṃ ca jātasya tatpitroścāpi mantravit . kuryāt tato yathāśakti brāhmaṇān bhojayet sudhīḥ.
separated_sandhi: abhiṣekam ca jātasya tatpitroḥ ca api mantravitkuryāt tataḥ yathāśakti brāhmaṇān bhojayet sudhīḥ
english: And the expert in mantras (mantravit) should perform the ritual anointing for the newborn and for its parents as well. Thereafter, the wise person (sudhīḥ) should feed Brahmins according to his or her means.

sanskrit: अथाऽहं सम्प्रवक्ष्यामि भद्रायामवमे तथा । व्यातूपातादिदुर्योगे यमघण्टादिके च यत् ॥१॥
transliteration: athā'haṃ sampravakṣyāmi bhadrāyāmavame tathā . vyātūpātādiduryoge yamaghaṇṭādike ca yat.
separated_sandhi: atha aham sampravakṣyāmi bhadrāyām avametathā vyātūpātādiduryoge yamaghaṇṭādike ca yat
english: Now, I will clearly explain what is prescribed during the inauspicious karaṇa of Bhadrā, the intercalary tithi called Avama, and similarly during bad astrological combinations (duryoga) such as Vyātūpāta, and also during periods like Yamaghaṇṭa.

sanskrit: जन्माशुभफलं प्रोक्तं तस्य शान्तिविधिं द्विज । प्राप्ते प्रसूतिदुर्योगे शान्तिं कुर्याद् विचक्षणः ॥२॥
transliteration: janmāśubhaphalaṃ proktaṃ tasya śāntividhiṃ dvija . prāpte prasūtiduryoge śāntiṃ kuryād vicakṣaṇaḥ.
separated_sandhi: janmāśubhaphalam proktam tasya śāntividhim dvijaprāpte prasūtiduryoge śāntim kuryāt vicakṣaṇaḥ
english: O twice-born (dvija), the inauspicious results of birth have been declared. When a difficult birth (Yoga) occurs, a discerning person should perform the pacification ritual for it.

sanskrit: दैवज्ञैर्दर्शिते वाऽपि सुलग्ने सुदिने गृही । पूजनं देवतानां च ग्रहाणां यजनं तथा ॥३॥
transliteration: daivajñairdarśite vā'pi sulagne sudine gṛhī . pūjanaṃ devatānāṃ ca grahāṇāṃ yajanaṃ tathā.
separated_sandhi: daivajñaiḥ darśite vā api sulagne sudine gṛhīpūjanam devatānām ca grahāṇām yajanam tathā
english: Or, O householder, when astrologers indicate an auspicious ascendant (lagna) and a propitious day, one should perform the worship of deities and the propitiation of planets.

sanskrit: शङ्करस्याऽभिषेकं च घृतदीपं शिवालये । आयुर्वृद्धिकरं कुर्यादश्वत्थस्य प्रदक्षिणम् ॥४॥
transliteration: śaṅkarasyā'bhiṣekaṃ ca ghṛtadīpaṃ śivālaye . āyurvṛddhikaraṃ kuryādaśvatthasya pradakṣiṇam.
separated_sandhi: śaṅkarasya abhiṣekam ca ghṛtadīpam śivālayeāyuvṛddhikaram kuryāt aśvatthasya pradakṣiṇam
english: One should also perform an anointment (abhiṣeka) of Shankara (Shiva) and offer a ghee lamp in a Shiva temple. Furthermore, one should circumambulate the Ashvattha (Pipal) tree, as this increases longevity.

sanskrit: हवनं विष्णुमन्त्रेण स/तमष्टोत्तरं सुधीः । ब्राह्मणान् भोजयेत् शक्त्या ततः कल्याणमाप्नुयात् ॥५॥
transliteration: havanaṃ viṣṇumantreṇa sa/tamaṣṭottaraṃ sudhīḥ . brāhmaṇān bhojayet śaktyā tataḥ kalyāṇamāpnuyāt.
separated_sandhi: havanam viṣṇumantreṇa sahasram aṣṭottaram sudhīḥbrāhmaṇān bhojayet śaktyā tataḥ kalyāṇam āpnuyāt
english: A wise person (sudhīḥ) should perform a fire ritual (havana) 1008 times with a Vishnu mantra. He should feed Brahmins according to his capacity. Thereafter, he will attain auspiciousness.

sanskrit: अथ यद्येकनक्षत्रे भ्रात्रोर्वा पितृपुत्रयोः । प्रसूतिश्च तयोर्मृतुरथैवकस्य निश्चयः ॥१॥
transliteration: atha yadyekanakṣatre bhrātrorvā pitṛputrayoḥ . prasūtiśca tayormṛturathaivakasya niścayaḥ.
separated_sandhi: atha yadi ekanakṣatre bhrātroḥ vā pitṛputrayoḥprasūtiḥ ca tayoḥ mṛtuḥ atha ekasya niścayaḥ
english: Now, if two brothers or a father and son are born in the same lunar mansion (nakṣatra), and death is indicated for both of them, then the death of one is certain.

sanskrit: तत्र शान्तिं प्रवक्ष्यामि गर्गादिमुनिभाषितम् । सुदिने शुभनक्षत्रे चन्द्रताराबलान्विते ॥२॥
transliteration: tatra śāntiṃ pravakṣyāmi gargādimunibhāṣitam . sudine śubhanakṣatre candratārābalānvite.
separated_sandhi: tatra śāntim pravakṣyāmi gargādimunibhāṣitamsudine śubhanakṣatre candratārābalānvite
english: In that case, I will explain the propitiatory rite (śānti) as taught by sages beginning with Garga, which should be performed on an auspicious day, in a favorable lunar mansion (nakṣatra), and when the strength of the Moon and stars is present.

sanskrit: रिक्तावविष्टिविवर्ज्ये च समय शान्तिमाचरेत् । शनेरीशानदिग्भागे नक्षत्रप्रतिमां शुभाम् ॥३॥
transliteration: riktāvaviṣṭivivarjye ca samaya śāntimācaret . śanerīśānadigbhāge nakṣatrapratimāṃ śubhām.
separated_sandhi: riktāviṣṭivivarjye ca samaye śāntim ācaretśaneḥ īśānadigbhāge nakṣatrapratimām śubhām
english: One should perform the propitiatory rite (śānti) at an appropriate time, avoiding Rikta (tithi) and Viṣṭi (karaṇa). In the north-eastern direction of (the representation of) Saturn, one should (place) an auspicious idol of the lunar mansion (nakṣatra)...

sanskrit: तन्नक्षत्रोक्तमन्त्रेण पूजयेत् कलशोपरि । रक्तवस्त्रेण संछाद्य वस्त्रयुग्मेन वेष्टयेत् ॥४॥
transliteration: tannakṣatroktamantreṇa pūjayet kalaśopari . raktavastreṇa saṃchādya vastrayugmena veṣṭayet.
separated_sandhi: tannakṣatroktamantreṇa pūjayet kalaśa upariraktavastreṇa saṃchādya vastrayugmena veṣṭayet
english: One should worship (the idol) with the mantra (mantra) specified for that lunar mansion (nakṣatra), placing it above a pot. Having covered it completely with a red cloth, one should wrap it with a pair of clothes.

sanskrit: स्वस्वशाखोक्तमार्गेण कुर्यादग्निमुखं तथा । पुनस्तेनैव मन्त्रेण हुनदष्टोत्तरं शतम् ॥५॥
transliteration: svasvaśākhoktamārgeṇa kuryādagnimukhaṃ tathā . punastenaiva mantreṇa hunadaṣṭottaraṃ śatam.
separated_sandhi: svasvaśākhoktamārgeṇa kuryāt agnimukham tathāpunar tena eva mantreṇa hunet aṣṭottaram śatam
english: One should perform the fire ritual (agni mukham) according to the method prescribed in their own respective Vedic branch. Furthermore, oblations should be offered 108 times using that very mantra (mantra).

sanskrit: प्रत्येकं समिदन्नाज्यैः प्रायश्चित्तान्तमेव हि । अभिषेकं ततः कुर्यादाचार्यश्च द्वयोरपि ॥६॥
transliteration: pratyekaṃ samidannājyaiḥ prāyaścittāntameva hi . abhiṣekaṃ tataḥ kuryādācāryaśca dvayorapi.
separated_sandhi: pratyekam samidannājyaiḥ prāyaścittāntam eva hiabhiṣekam tataḥ kuryāt ācāryaḥ ca dvayoḥ api
english: Each one should offer oblations with firewood sticks (samidh), food (anna), and ghee (ājya) until the expiatory rite (prāyaścitta) is completed. Thereafter, the preceptor (ācārya) should perform the ritual anointing for both individuals.

sanskrit: ऋत्विग्भ्यो दक्षिणां दद्यादाचार्याय विशेषतः । ब्राह्मणान् भोजयेद् भक्त्या वित्तशाठ्यविवर्जितः ॥७॥
transliteration: ṛtvigbhyo dakṣiṇāṃ dadyādācāryāya viśeṣataḥ . brāhmaṇān bhojayed bhaktyā vittaśāṭhyavivarjitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: ṛtvigbhyaḥ dakṣiṇām dadyāt ācāryāya viśeṣataḥbrāhmaṇān bhojayet bhaktyā vittaśāṭhyavivarjitaḥ
english: One should give remuneration (dakṣiṇā) to the priests (ṛtvik), and especially to the preceptor (ācārya). Without any stinginess regarding wealth, one should feed Brahmins with devotion (bhakti).

sanskrit: घोराध्वांक्षीमहोदर्यो मन्दा मन्दाकिनी तथा । मिश्रा च राक्षसी सूर्यसंक्रान्तिः सूर्यवासरात् ॥१॥
transliteration: ghorādhvāṃkṣīmahodaryo mandā mandākinī tathā . miśrā ca rākṣasī sūryasaṃkrāntiḥ sūryavāsarāt.
separated_sandhi: ghorādhvāṅkṣīmahodaryau mandā mandākinī tathāmiśrā ca rākṣasī sūryasaṅkrāntiḥ sūryavāsarāt
english: Ghorādhvāṅkṣī and Mahodaryau, Mandā, Mandākinī, and Miśrā, as well as Rākṣasī, are the types of solar transits (Sūrya Saṅkrānti) that commence from a Sunday (Sūrya Vāsara).

sanskrit: संक्रान्तौ च नरो जातो भवेद् दारिद्र्य दुःखभाक् । शान्त्या सुखमवाप्नोति ततः शान्तिविधि ब्रुवे ॥२॥
transliteration: saṃkrāntau ca naro jāto bhaved dāridrya duḥkhabhāk . śāntyā sukhamavāpnoti tataḥ śāntividhi bruve.
separated_sandhi: saṃkrāntau ca naraḥ jātaḥ bhavet dāridryaduḥkhabhākśāntyā sukham avāpnoti tataḥ śāntividhim bruve
english: A person born during a transition (saṃkrānti) becomes subject to poverty and suffering. Through pacification, one obtains happiness. Therefore, I describe the pacification ritual (śāntividhi).

sanskrit: नवग्रहमखं कुर्यात् तस्य दोषोपशान्तये । गृहस्य पूर्वदिग्भागे गोमयेनोपलिप्य च ॥३॥
transliteration: navagrahamakhaṃ kuryāt tasya doṣopaśāntaye . gṛhasya pūrvadigbhāge gomayenopalipya ca.
separated_sandhi: navagrahamakham kuryāt tasya doṣopaśāntayegṛhasya pūrvadigbhāge gomayena upalipya ca
english: For the pacification of his faults, one should perform a nine-planet (navagraha) Vedic ritual (makha). And, in the eastern part of the house, having smeared (the ground) with cow dung...

sanskrit: स्वलंकृतप्रदेशे तु ब्रीहिराशिं प्रकल्पयेत् । पञ्चद्रोणमितं धान्यैस्तदर्धं तण्डुलैस्तथा ॥४॥
transliteration: svalaṃkṛtapradeśe tu brīhirāśiṃ prakalpayet . pañcadroṇamitaṃ dhānyaistadardhaṃ taṇḍulaistathā.
separated_sandhi: svalamkṛtapradeśe tu brīhirāśim prakalpayetpañcadroṇamitam dhānyaiḥ tat ardham taṇḍulaiḥ tathā
english: In a well-decorated place, one should arrange a heap of unhusked rice (brīhi), measuring five droṇas. Similarly, half of that quantity should be (a heap) of dehusked rice (taṇḍula).

sanskrit: तदर्धं च तिलैः कुर्याद्राशिं च द्विजसत्तम । पृथक् त्रितयराशौ तु लिखेदष्टदलं बुधैः ॥५॥
transliteration: tadardhaṃ ca tilaiḥ kuryādrāśiṃ ca dvijasattama . pṛthak tritayarāśau tu likhedaṣṭadalaṃ budhaiḥ.
separated_sandhi: tat ardham ca tilaiḥ kuryāt rāśim ca dvijasattamapṛthak tritayarāśau tu likhet aṣṭadalam budhaiḥ
english: And, O best among the twice-born (dvija), one should also make a heap of half that quantity with sesame seeds (tila). Then, separately, on each of the three heaps, the wise should draw an eight-petaled (aṣṭadala) design.

sanskrit: पुण्याहं वाचयित्वा तु आचार्यं वृणुयात् पुरा । धर्मज्ञं मन्त्रतत्त्वज्ञं शान्तिकर्मणि कोविदम् ॥६॥
transliteration: puṇyāhaṃ vācayitvā tu ācāryaṃ vṛṇuyāt purā . dharmajñaṃ mantratattvajñaṃ śāntikarmaṇi kovidam.
separated_sandhi: puṇyāham vācayitvā tu ācāryam vṛṇuyāt purādharmajñam mantratattvajñam śāntikarmaṇi kovidam
english: First, after proclaiming the auspicious day, one should select a preceptor (ācārya) who understands the natural law (dharma), knows the true essence of mantras, and is skilled in peace-making rituals.

sanskrit: राशिषु स्थापयेत् कुम्भानव्रणान् सुमनोहरान् । तीर्थोदकेन सम्पूर्य समृदौषधपल्लवम् ॥७॥
transliteration: rāśiṣu sthāpayet kumbhānavraṇān sumanoharān . tīrthodakena sampūrya samṛdauṣadhapallavam.
separated_sandhi: rāśiṣu sthāpayet kumbhān avraṇān sumanoharāntīrthodakena sampūrya samṛdauṣadhapallavam
english: One should place unblemished and very beautiful pots (kumbhas) in the zodiacal signs, filling them completely with water from sacred places (tīrtha), along with earth, medicinal herbs, and sprouts.

sanskrit: पंचगव्यं क्षिपेत्तत्र वस्त्रयुग्मेन वेष्टयेत् । कुम्भोपरि न्यसेत् पात्रं सूक्ष्मवस्त्रेण वेष्टितम् ॥८॥
transliteration: paṃcagavyaṃ kṣipettatra vastrayugmena veṣṭayet . kumbhopari nyaset pātraṃ sūkṣmavastreṇa veṣṭitam.
separated_sandhi: pañcagavyam kṣipet tatra vastrayugmena veṣṭayetkumbha upari nyaset pātram sūkṣmavastreṇa veṣṭitam
english: One should pour the five products of the cow (pañcagavya) into them. Then, one should wrap (each pot) with a pair of cloths. On top of the pot, a vessel, wrapped with a fine cloth, should be placed.

sanskrit: प्रतिमां स्थापयेत् तत्र साधिप्रत्यधिदैवताम् । अधिदैवं भवेत् सूर्यश्चन्द्रः प्रत्यधिदैवतम् ॥९॥
transliteration: pratimāṃ sthāpayet tatra sādhipratyadhidaivatām . adhidaivaṃ bhavet sūryaścandraḥ pratyadhidaivatam.
separated_sandhi: pratimām sthāpayet tatra sādhipratyadhidevatāmadhidevam bhavet sūryaḥ candraḥ pratyadhidevatam
english: There, one should place an idol along with its presiding deity (adhidevatā) and subsidiary deity (pratyadhidevatā). The Sun (sūrya) should be the presiding deity, and the Moon (candra) should be the subsidiary deity.

sanskrit: चन्द्रादित्याकृती पार्श्वे मध्ये संक्रान्तिमर्चयेत् । प्रतिमां पूजने पूर्वं वस्त्रयुग्मं निवेदयेत् ॥१०॥
transliteration: candrādityākṛtī pārśve madhye saṃkrāntimarcayet . pratimāṃ pūjane pūrvaṃ vastrayugmaṃ nivedayet.
separated_sandhi: candrādityākṛtī pārśve madhye saṃkrāntim arcayetpratimām pūjane pūrvam vastrayugmam nivedayet
english: One should worship the forms of the Moon and Sun on the sides, and the Saṃkrānti in the middle. Before the worship of the idol (pratimā), a pair of garments should be offered.

sanskrit: ततो व्याहृतिपूर्र्वेण तत्तन्मन्त्रेण पूजयेत् । त्रैयम्बकेण मन्त्रेण प्रधानप्रतिभां पूजयेत् ॥११॥
transliteration: tato vyāhṛtipūrrveṇa tattanmantreṇa pūjayet . traiyambakeṇa mantreṇa pradhānapratibhāṃ pūjayet.
separated_sandhi: tataḥ vyāhṛtipūrveṇa tattanmantreṇa pūjayettraiyambakeṇa mantreṇa pradhānapratimām pūjayet
english: Thereafter, one should worship with their respective sacred utterances (mantra), preceded by the Vyāhṛtis. The principal idol (pratimā) should be worshipped with the Trayambaka sacred utterance (mantra).

sanskrit: उत्सूर्य इति मन्त्रेण सूर्यपूजां समाचरेत् । आप्यायस्वेति मन्त्रेण चन्द्रपूजां समाचरेत् ॥१२॥
transliteration: utsūrya iti mantreṇa sūryapūjāṃ samācaret . āpyāyasveti mantreṇa candrapūjāṃ samācaret.
separated_sandhi: utsūrya iti mantreṇa sūryapūjām samācaretāpyāyasva iti mantreṇa candrapūjām samācaret
english: One should perform the worship of the Sun using the sacred utterance (mantra) 'Utsūrya' and the worship of the Moon using the sacred utterance (mantra) 'Āpyāyasva'.

sanskrit: उपचारैः षोडशभिर्यद्वा पञ्चोपचारकैः । मृत्युंजयन मन्त्रेण प्रधानप्रतिमां स्पृशन् ॥१३॥
transliteration: upacāraiḥ ṣoḍaśabhiryadvā pañcopacārakaiḥ . mṛtyuṃjayana mantreṇa pradhānapratimāṃ spṛśan.
separated_sandhi: upacāraiḥ ṣoḍaśabhiḥ yat vā pañca-upacārakaiḥmṛtyum jayan mantreṇa pradhāna pratimām spṛśan
english: One should touch the principal idol of the deity while chanting the death-conquering incantation (mantra), performing worship with either sixteen or five ritual offerings.

sanskrit: अष्टोत्तरसहस्रं चाऽप्यष्टोत्तरशतं जपेत् । अथाऽष्टाविंशतिं वापि जपेन्मन्त्रं स्वशक्तितः ॥१४॥
transliteration: aṣṭottarasahasraṃ cā'pyaṣṭottaraśataṃ japet . athā'ṣṭāviṃśatiṃ vāpi japenmantraṃ svaśaktitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: aṣṭottarasahasram ca api aṣṭottaraśatam japet athaaṣṭāviṃśatim vā api japet mantram svaśaktitaḥ
english: One should recite the sacred incantation (mantra) 1,008 times, or 108 times. Alternatively, one may also recite it 28 times, according to one's own capacity.

sanskrit: कुम्भेभ्यः पश्चिमे देशे स्थण्डिलेऽग्निं प्रकल्पयेत् । स्वगृह्योक्तविधानेन कारयेत् संस्कृतानलम् ॥१५॥
transliteration: kumbhebhyaḥ paścime deśe sthaṇḍile'gniṃ prakalpayet . svagṛhyoktavidhānena kārayet saṃskṛtānalam.
separated_sandhi: kumbhebhyaḥ paścime deśe sthaṇḍile agnim prakalpayetsva-gṛhya-ukta-vidhānena kārayet saṃskṛta-analam
english: To the west of the pots, on a ritually prepared ground, one should establish the fire. One should have the consecrated fire prepared according to the method prescribed in one's own Gṛhya-sūtra.

sanskrit: त्रयम्बकेन मन्त्रेण समिदाज्यचरून् हुनेत् । अष्टोत्तरसहस्रं वा अष्टोत्तरशतं यथा ॥१६॥
transliteration: trayambakena mantreṇa samidājyacarūn hunet . aṣṭottarasahasraṃ vā aṣṭottaraśataṃ yathā.
separated_sandhi: trayambakena mantreṇa samidājyacarūn hunetaṣṭottarasahasram vā aṣṭottaraśatam yathā
english: One should offer fuel sticks, clarified butter, and cooked oblations using the Tryambaka mantra, performing the offering either 1008 times or 108 times, as appropriate.

sanskrit: अष्टविंशतिमेवापि कुर्याद् होमं स्वशक्तितः । मृत्युंजयेन मन्त्रेण तिलहोमश्च कारयेत् ॥१७॥
transliteration: aṣṭaviṃśatimevāpi kuryād homaṃ svaśaktitaḥ . mṛtyuṃjayena mantreṇa tilahomaśca kārayet.
separated_sandhi: aṣṭaviṃśatim eva api kuryāt homam svaśaktitaḥmṛtyuñjayena mantreṇa tilahomaḥ ca kārayet
english: One should also perform the fire offering twenty-eight times, according to one's own capacity. Additionally, one should perform a sesame seed offering using the Mrityunjaya mantra.

sanskrit: ततः स्विष्टकृतं हुत्वाभिषेकं च कारयेत् । ब्रह्मणान् भोजयेत् पश्चादेवं शान्तिमवाप्नुयात् ॥१८॥
transliteration: tataḥ sviṣṭakṛtaṃ hutvābhiṣekaṃ ca kārayet . brahmaṇān bhojayet paścādevaṃ śāntimavāpnuyāt.
separated_sandhi: tataḥ sviṣṭakṛtam hutvā abhiṣekam ca kārayetbrāhmaṇān bhojayet paścāt evam śāntim avāpnuyāt
english: Then, after offering the sviṣṭakṛt oblation, one should also perform an anointing ritual. Subsequently, one should feed the Brahmins. In this way, one will attain peace.

sanskrit: सूर्येन्दुग्रहणे काले येषां जन्म भवेद् द्विज । व्याधिः कष्टं च दारिद्र्यं तेषां मृत्युभयं भवेत् ॥१॥
transliteration: sūryendugrahaṇe kāle yeṣāṃ janma bhaved dvija . vyādhiḥ kaṣṭaṃ ca dāridryaṃ teṣāṃ mṛtyubhayaṃ bhavet.
separated_sandhi: sūryendugrahaṇe kāle yeṣām janma bhavet dvijavyādhiḥ kaṣṭam ca dāridryam teṣām mṛtyubhayam bhavet
english: O twice-born (dvija), for those whose birth occurs during the time of a solar or lunar eclipse, disease, suffering, poverty, and fear of death will arise.

sanskrit: अतः शान्तिं प्रवक्ष्यामि जनानां हितकाङ्क्षया । सूर्यस्येन्दोश्च ग्रहेणं यस्मिनृक्षे प्रजायते ॥२॥
transliteration: ataḥ śāntiṃ pravakṣyāmi janānāṃ hitakāṅkṣayā . sūryasyendośca graheṇaṃ yasminṛkṣe prajāyate.
separated_sandhi: ataḥ śāntim pravakṣyāmi janānām hitakāṅkṣayāsūryasya indoḥ ca grahaṇam yasmin ṛkṣe prajāyate
english: Therefore, out of desire for the welfare of people, I shall describe the pacification (śānti) ritual for when the eclipse of the sun and moon occurs in a particular constellation (nakṣatra).

sanskrit: तन्नक्षत्रपते रूपं सुवर्णेन प्रकल्पयेत् । सूर्यग्रहे सूर्यरूपं सुवर्णेन स्वशक्तितः ॥३॥
transliteration: tannakṣatrapate rūpaṃ suvarṇena prakalpayet . sūryagrahe sūryarūpaṃ suvarṇena svaśaktitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: tat nakṣatrapate rūpam suvarṇena prakalpayetsūryagrahe sūryarūpam suvarṇena svaśaktitaḥ
english: One should fashion a form of the lord of that constellation (nakṣatra-pati) in gold. During a solar eclipse, one should fashion an image of the Sun in gold, according to one's capacity.

sanskrit: चन्द्रग्रहे चन्द्ररूपं रजतेन तथैव च । राहुरूपं प्रकुर्वीत सीसकेन विचक्षणः ॥४॥
transliteration: candragrahe candrarūpaṃ rajatena tathaiva ca . rāhurūpaṃ prakurvīta sīsakena vicakṣaṇaḥ.
separated_sandhi: candra-grahe candra-rūpam rajatena tathā evaca rāhu-rūpam prakurvīta sīsakena vicakṣaṇaḥ
english: During a lunar eclipse, a discerning person should create an image of the Moon using silver and, similarly, an image of Rahu using lead.

sanskrit: शुचौ देशे समं स्थानं गोमयेन प्रलेपयेत् । तत्र च स्थापयेद् वस्त्रं नूतनं सुमनोहरम् ॥५॥
transliteration: śucau deśe samaṃ sthānaṃ gomayena pralepayet . tatra ca sthāpayed vastraṃ nūtanaṃ sumanoharam.
separated_sandhi: śucau deśe samam sthānam gomayena pralepayettatra ca sthāpayet vastram nūtanam sumanoharam
english: In a pure place, one should plaster a level spot with cow dung. And there, one should place a new and very pleasing cloth.

sanskrit: त्रयाणामेव रूपाणां स्थापनं तत्र कारयेत् । सूर्यग्रहे प्रदातव्यं सूर्यप्रीतिकरं च यत् ॥६॥
transliteration: trayāṇāmeva rūpāṇāṃ sthāpanaṃ tatra kārayet . sūryagrahe pradātavyaṃ sūryaprītikaraṃ ca yat.
separated_sandhi: trayāṇām eva rūpāṇām sthāpanam tatra kārayetsūrya-grahe pradātavyam sūrya-prītikaram ca yat
english: The placement of these three images should be performed there. And whatever is pleasing to the Sun should be offered during a solar eclipse.

sanskrit: रक्ताक्षतं रक्तगन्धं रक्तमाल्याम्बरादिकम् । चन्द्रग्रहे प्रदातव्यं चन्द्रप्रीतिकरं च यत् ॥७॥
transliteration: raktākṣataṃ raktagandhaṃ raktamālyāmbarādikam . candragrahe pradātavyaṃ candraprītikaraṃ ca yat.
separated_sandhi: rakta-akṣatam rakta-gandham rakta-mālya-ambara-ādikamcandra-grahe pradātavyam candra-prītikaram ca yat
english: During a lunar eclipse, one should offer red rice grains, red fragrance, red garlands, garments, and so forth, as well as anything else that is pleasing to the Moon.

sanskrit: श्वेतगन्धं श्वेतपुष्पं श्वेतमाल्याम्बरादिकम् । राहवे च प्रदातव्यं कृष्णपुष्पाम्बरादिकम् ॥८॥
transliteration: śvetagandhaṃ śvetapuṣpaṃ śvetamālyāmbarādikam . rāhave ca pradātavyaṃ kṛṣṇapuṣpāmbarādikam.
separated_sandhi: śvetagandham śvetapuṣpam śvetamālya ambarādikamrāhave ca pradātavyam kṛṣṇapuṣpa ambarādikam
english: White perfumes, white flowers, white garlands, clothes, and similar items should be offered. And for Rahu, black flowers, clothes, and similar items should be offered.

sanskrit: दद्यान्नक्षत्रनाथाय श्वेतगन्धादिकं तथा । सूर्यं सम्पूजयेद्धीमानाकृष्णेति च मन्त्रतः ॥९॥
transliteration: dadyānnakṣatranāthāya śvetagandhādikaṃ tathā . sūryaṃ sampūjayeddhīmānākṛṣṇeti ca mantrataḥ.
separated_sandhi: dadyāt nakṣatranāthāya śvetagandha ādikam tathāsūryam sampūjayet dhīmān ākṛṣṇeti ca mantrataḥ
english: One should offer white perfumes and similar items to the lord of the constellation. And a wise person should worship the Sun with the mantra (mantra) 'ākṛṣṇeti'.

sanskrit: अथा चन्द्रं इमे देवा इति मन्त्रेण भक्तितः । दूर्वाभि पूजयेद्राहुं कया न इति मन्त्रतः ॥१०॥
transliteration: athā candraṃ ime devā iti mantreṇa bhaktitaḥ . dūrvābhi pūjayedrāhuṃ kayā na iti mantrataḥ.
separated_sandhi: atha candram ime devā iti mantreṇa bhaktitaḥdūrvābhiḥ pūjayet rāhum kayā na iti mantrataḥ
english: Then, with devotion (bhakti), one should worship the Moon using the mantra (mantra) 'ime devā'. With dūrvā grass, one should worship Rahu using the mantra (mantra) 'kayā na'.

sanskrit: सूर्येन्द्वोरर्कपालाशमिद्भिर्जुहुयात् क्रमात् । तथा च राहोः प्रीत्यर्थं दूर्वाभिर्द्विजसत्तम ॥११॥
transliteration: sūryendvorarkapālāśamidbhirjuhuyāt kramāt . tathā ca rāhoḥ prītyarthaṃ dūrvābhirdvijasattama.
separated_sandhi: sūryendvoḥ arkapālāśasamidbhiḥ juhuyāt kramāttathā ca rāhoḥ prītyartham dūrvābhiḥ dvijasattama
english: O best among Brahmins, one should offer oblations (yajña) for the Sun and Moon using arka and palāśa firewood, respectively. Likewise, for the appeasement of Rahu, one should offer oblations (yajña) with dūrvā grass.

sanskrit: ब्रह्मवृक्षसमिद्भिश्च भेशाय जुहुयात् पुनः । अभिषेकं ततः कुर्यात् जातस्य कलहोदकैः ॥१२॥
transliteration: brahmavṛkṣasamidbhiśca bheśāya juhuyāt punaḥ . abhiṣekaṃ tataḥ kuryāt jātasya kalahodakaiḥ.
separated_sandhi: brahmavṛkṣasamidbhiḥ ca bheśāya juhuyāt punaḥabhiṣekam tataḥ kuryāt jātasya kalaha udakaiḥ
english: And again, one should offer oblations (yajña) to the planetary lord of the constellation using firesticks of the Brahmavṛkṣa. Subsequently, one should perform a ritual bath (abhiṣeka) for the newborn with water from a jar.

sanskrit: आचार्यं पूजयेद्भक्त्या सुशान्तो विजितेन्द्रियः । ब्राह्मणान् भोजयेत्वा तु यथाशक्ति विसर्जयेत् ॥१३॥
transliteration: ācāryaṃ pūjayedbhaktyā suśānto vijitendriyaḥ . brāhmaṇān bhojayetvā tu yathāśakti visarjayet.
separated_sandhi: ācāryam pūjayet bhaktyā suśāntaḥ vijitendriyaḥbrāhmaṇān bhojayitvā tu yathāśakti visarjayet
english: Being tranquil and having mastered his senses, one should respectfully honor the preceptor with devotion (bhakti). Then, after feeding the Brahmins, one should dismiss them according to one's capacity.

sanskrit: एवं ग्रहणजातस्य शान्तिं कृत्वा विधानतः । सर्वविघ्नं विनिर्जित्वा सौभाग्यं लभते नरः ॥१४॥
transliteration: evaṃ grahaṇajātasya śāntiṃ kṛtvā vidhānataḥ . sarvavighnaṃ vinirjitvā saubhāgyaṃ labhate naraḥ.
separated_sandhi: evam grahaṇajātasya śāntim kṛtvā vidhānataḥsarvavighnam vinirjitvā saubhāgyam labhate naraḥ
english: Thus, a person who performs the propitiation for an eclipse according to the prescribed method, completely conquers all obstacles and attains good fortune.

sanskrit: तिथिनक्षत्रलग्नानां गण्डान्तं त्रिविधं स्मृतम् । जन्मयात्राविवाहादौ भवेत्तन्निधनप्रदम् ॥१॥
transliteration: tithinakṣatralagnānāṃ gaṇḍāntaṃ trividhaṃ smṛtam . janmayātrāvivāhādau bhavettannidhanapradam.
separated_sandhi: tithi nakṣatra lagnānām gaṇḍāntam trividham smṛtamjanma yātrā vivāha ādau bhavet tat nidhanapradam
english: The critical junction (gaṇḍānta) of the lunar day (tithi), constellation (nakṣatra), and ascendant (lagna) is considered to be of three types. At the time of birth, journey, marriage, or similar events, it can prove to be fatal.

sanskrit: पूर्णानन्दाख्ययोस्तिथ्योः सन्धौ नाडीचतुष्टयम् । अध ऊर्ध्वं च मैत्रेय तिथिगण्डान्तमुच्यते ॥२॥
transliteration: pūrṇānandākhyayostithyoḥ sandhau nāḍīcatuṣṭayam . adha ūrdhvaṃ ca maitreya tithigaṇḍāntamucyate.
separated_sandhi: pūrṇānandākhyayoḥ tithyoḥ sandhau nāḍīcatuṣṭayamadhaḥ ūrdhvam ca maitreya tithigaṇḍāntam ucyate
english: O Maitreya, the period of four nāḍīs (96 minutes) - two nāḍīs (48 minutes) preceding and two nāḍīs (48 minutes) succeeding - at the junction of the Pūrṇā and Nandā lunar days (tithi) is called tithi-gaṇḍānta.

sanskrit: रेवतीदास्रयोः साप्रमघयोः शाक्रमूलयोः । सन्धौ नक्षत्रगण्डान्तमेवं नाडीचतुष्टयम् ॥३॥
transliteration: revatīdāsrayoḥ sāpramaghayoḥ śākramūlayoḥ . sandhau nakṣatragaṇḍāntamevaṃ nāḍīcatuṣṭayam.
separated_sandhi: revatīdāsrayoḥ sāpramaghayoḥ śākramūlayoḥsandhau nakṣatragaṇḍāntam evam nāḍīcatuṣṭayam
english: Similarly, the period of four nāḍīs (96 minutes) - two nāḍīs preceding and two nāḍīs succeeding - at the junction of Revatī and Aśvinī (Dāśra) nakṣatras, Āśleṣā (Sārpa) and Maghā nakṣatras, and Jyeṣṭhā (Śakra) and Mūla nakṣatras, is called nakṣatra-gaṇḍānta.

sanskrit: मीनाजयोः कर्किहर्योर्लग्नयोरलिचापयोः । सन्धौ च लग्नगण्डान्तमधऊर्ध्व घटीमितम् ॥४॥
transliteration: mīnājayoḥ karkiharyorlagnayoralicāpayoḥ . sandhau ca lagnagaṇḍāntamadhaūrdhva ghaṭīmitam.
separated_sandhi: mīnājayoḥ karkiharyoḥ lagnayoḥ alicāpayoḥ sandhauca lagnagaṇḍāntam adhaḥ ūrdhvam ghaṭīmitam
english: At the junction of the ascendant (lagna) signs Mina and Aja (Pisces and Aries), Karki and Hari (Cancer and Leo), and Ali and Cāpa (Scorpio and Sagittarius), the lagna-gaṇḍānta is a period measured by one ghaṭī (24 minutes) - specifically, half a ghaṭī (12 minutes) preceding and half a ghaṭī (12 minutes) succeeding the junction.

sanskrit: एषु चाभुक्तमूलाख्यं महाविघ्नपदं स्मृतम् । इन्द्रराक्षसयोः सन्धौ पञ्चाष्टघटिकाः क्रमात् ॥५॥
transliteration: eṣu cābhuktamūlākhyaṃ mahāvighnapadaṃ smṛtam . indrarākṣasayoḥ sandhau pañcāṣṭaghaṭikāḥ kramāt.
separated_sandhi: eṣu ca abhuktamūlākhyaṃ mahāvighnapadaṃ smṛtamindrarākṣasayoḥ sandhau pañcāṣṭaghaṭikāḥ kramāt
english: Among these periods, that which is called "abhuktamūla" is regarded as a major source of impediments. At the conjunction point of the Indra (Jyeṣṭhā) and Rakṣasa (Mūla) constellations, it consists of five and eight "ghaṭikās" respectively.

sanskrit: अथ गण्डान्तजातस्य शिशोः शान्तिविधिं ब्रुवे । गण्डान्तकालजातस्य सूतकान्त्यदिने पिता ॥६॥
transliteration: atha gaṇḍāntajātasya śiśoḥ śāntividhiṃ bruve . gaṇḍāntakālajātasya sūtakāntyadine pitā.
separated_sandhi: atha gaṇḍāntajātasya śiśoḥ śāntividhiṃ bruvegaṇḍāntakālajātasya sūtakāntyadine pitā
english: Now, I will explain the ritual (śāntividhi) for appeasing the ill effects for a child born in the Gaṇḍānta period. The father should perform this ritual for the child born during the Gaṇḍānta period on the last day of the postnatal impurity (sūtaka).

sanskrit: शान्तिंशुभेऽह्नि वा कुर्यात् पश्येत् तावन्न तं शिशुम् । वृषभं तिथिगण्डान्ते नक्षत्रे धनुमेव च ॥७॥
transliteration: śāntiṃśubhe'hni vā kuryāt paśyet tāvanna taṃ śiśum . vṛṣabhaṃ tithigaṇḍānte nakṣatre dhanumeva ca.
separated_sandhi: śāntiṃ śubhe ahni vā kuryāt paśyet tāvat na taṃśiśum vṛṣabhaṃ tithigaṇḍānte nakṣatre dhanum eva ca
english: The father should perform the appeasement ritual (śānti) either on the last day of postnatal impurity (sūtaka) or on an auspicious day. Until that ritual is performed, he should not see that child. For a birth in the "tithigaṇḍānta" (lunar day junction), a bull is offered, and for a birth in the "nakṣatragaṇḍānta" (constellation junction), indeed a bow (is offered).

sanskrit: काञ्चनं लग्नगण्डान्ते दद्यात्तद्दोषप्रशान्तये । आद्यभागे प्रजातस्य पितुश्चाप्यभिषेचनम् ॥८॥
transliteration: kāñcanaṃ lagnagaṇḍānte dadyāttaddoṣapraśāntaye . ādyabhāge prajātasya pituścāpyabhiṣecanam.
separated_sandhi: kāñcanam lagnagaṇḍānte dadyāt taddoṣapraśāntayeādyabhāge prajātasya pituḥ ca api abhiṣecanam
english: One should donate gold at the end of the "lagna-gaṇḍānta" (the transitional period between a zodiac sign and a lunar mansion) for the pacification of its associated faults. Furthermore, if a child is born during the first part of this period, a purificatory bath should be performed for both the child and the father.

sanskrit: द्वितीये तु शिशोर्मातुरभिषेकं च कारयेत् । सुवर्णेन तदर्धेण यथावित्तं द्विजोत्तम । तिथिभेषादिरूपं च कृत्वा वस्त्रसमन्वितम् ॥९॥
transliteration: dvitīye tu śiśormāturabhiṣekaṃ ca kārayet . suvarṇena tadardheṇa yathāvittaṃ dvijottama . tithibheṣādirūpaṃ ca kṛtvā vastrasamanvitam.
separated_sandhi: dvitīye tu śiśoḥ mātuḥ abhiṣekamca kārayet suvarṇena tadardheṇayathāvittam dvijottamatithibheṣādirūpam ca kṛtvā vastrasamanvitam
english: However, if the child is born in the second part (of the "lagna-gaṇḍānta"), a purificatory bath should be performed for both the child and the mother. This ritual should be carried out with gold, or half its value, according to one's financial capacity, O best among the twice-born (dvija). Additionally, one should perform rituals related to the lunar day (tithi) and stellar mansion (nakshatra) as appropriate, accompanied by appropriate clothing (or offerings of clothing).

sanskrit: उपचारैर्यथाशक्ति कलहोपरि पूजयेत् । पूजान्ते समिदन्नज्यैर्होम। कुर्याद्यथाविधि ॥१०॥
transliteration: upacārairyathāśakti kalahopari pūjayet . pūjānte samidannajyairhoma. kuryādyathāvidhi.
separated_sandhi: upacāraiḥ yathāśakti kalahopari pūjayetpūjānte samidannājyaiḥ homaḥ kuryāt yathāvidhi
english: One should offer worship with appropriate services, according to one's capacity (śakti), for the cessation of discord (kalaha). At the conclusion of this worship (pūjā), a fire ritual (homa) should be performed according to prescribed rules, using sacred firewood (samidh), cooked food (anna), and clarified butter (ājya).

sanskrit: ब्राह्मणान् भोजयेत् पश्चादेवं दोषात्प्रमुच्यते । आयुरारोग्यमैश्वर्यं सम्प्राप्नोति दिने दिने ॥११॥
transliteration: brāhmaṇān bhojayet paścādevaṃ doṣātpramucyate . āyurārogyamaiśvaryaṃ samprāpnoti dine dine.
separated_sandhi: brāhmaṇān bhojayet paścāt evam doṣāt pramucyateāyuḥ ārogyam aiśvaryam samprāpnoti dine dine
english: Afterwards, one should feed Brahmins. In this way, one is freed from defects. One attains longevity, health, and prosperity day by day.

sanskrit: ज्येष्ठामूलमयोर्यस्मादधिपाविन्द्रराक्षसौ । महावैरात् तयोः सन्धिर्महादोषप्रदः स्मृतः ॥१॥
transliteration: jyeṣṭhāmūlamayoryasmādadhipāvindrarākṣasau . mahāvairāt tayoḥ sandhirmahādoṣapradaḥ smṛtaḥ.
separated_sandhi: jyeṣṭhāmūlamayoḥ yasmāt adhipau indrarākṣasaumahāvairāt tayoḥ sandhiḥ mahādoṣapradaḥ smṛtaḥ
english: Since Indra and Rakshasa are the ruling deities of the Jyeṣṭhā and Mūla lunar mansions, their conjunction is declared to be a cause of great harm due to their immense animosity.

sanskrit: अभुक्तमूलजं पुत्रं पुत्रीं वाऽपि परित्यजेत् । अथवाऽब्दाष्टकं तातस्तन्मुखं न विलोकयेत् ॥२॥
transliteration: abhuktamūlajaṃ putraṃ putrīṃ vā'pi parityajet . athavā'bdāṣṭakaṃ tātastanmukhaṃ na vilokayet.
separated_sandhi: abhuktamūlajam putram putrīm vā api parityajetathavā abdāṣṭakam tātaḥ tat mukham na vilokayet
english: One should abandon a son or even a daughter born in the inauspicious portion of the Mūla lunar mansion. Alternatively, the father should not look at that child's face for eight years.

sanskrit: तद्दोषपरिहारार्थमथ शान्तिविधिं ब्रुवे । तत्राऽदौ दोषबहुल्यान् मूलशान्तिर्निगद्यते ॥३॥
transliteration: taddoṣaparihārārthamatha śāntividhiṃ bruve . tatrā'dau doṣabahulyān mūlaśāntirnigadyate.
separated_sandhi: taddoṣaparihārārtham atha śāntividhim bruvetatra ādau doṣabahulyāt mūlaśāntiḥ nigadyate
english: Now, to remedy those defects, I shall describe the pacification ritual (śāntividhi). Among these, primarily due to the abundance of defects, the pacification (śānti) ritual for the Mūla constellation is declared.

sanskrit: जन्मतो द्वादशाहे वा तदृक्षे वा शुभे दिने । जातस्य वाऽष्टमे वर्षे शान्तिं कुर्याद् विधानतः ॥४॥
transliteration: janmato dvādaśāhe vā tadṛkṣe vā śubhe dine . jātasya vā'ṣṭame varṣe śāntiṃ kuryād vidhānataḥ.
separated_sandhi: janmataḥ dvādaśāhe vā tadṛkṣe vā śubhe dinejātasya vā aṣṭame varṣe śāntim kuryāt vidhānataḥ
english: One should perform the pacification (śānti) ritual according to the injunctions either on the twelfth day from birth, or on an auspicious day that coincides with the birth constellation (nakṣatra), or in the eighth year of the child.

sanskrit: सुसमे च शुभे स्थाने गोमयेनोपलेपिते । मण्डपं स्वगृहात् प्राच्यामुदीच्यां वा प्रकल्पयेत् ॥५॥
transliteration: susame ca śubhe sthāne gomayenopalepite . maṇḍapaṃ svagṛhāt prācyāmudīcyāṃ vā prakalpayet.
separated_sandhi: susame ca śubhe sthāne gomayena upalepitemaṇḍapam svagṛhāt prācyām udīcyām vā prakalpayet
english: In a very level, auspicious place, smeared with cow dung, one should construct a pavilion (maṇḍapa) either to the east or to the north of one's own house.

sanskrit: चतुर्द्वारसमायुक्तं तोरणाद्यैरलङ्कृतम् । कुण्डं ग्रहादियज्ञार्थं तद्बहिश्च प्रकल्पयेत् ॥६॥
transliteration: caturdvārasamāyuktaṃ toraṇādyairalaṅkṛtam . kuṇḍaṃ grahādiyajñārthaṃ tadbahiśca prakalpayet.
separated_sandhi: caturdvārasamāyuktam toraṇādyaiḥ alaṅkṛtam kuṇḍamgrahādiyajñārtham tat bahis ca prakalpayet
english: For the purpose of Vedic rituals (yajña) to the planets (graha) and other deities, one should construct a sacrificial pit (kuṇḍa). This pit should be equipped with four doors and adorned with archways (toraṇa) and the like. It should be established externally (to the main ritual area).

sanskrit: सुवर्णेन तदर्धेन तदर्धार्धेन वा पुनः । नक्षत्रदेवतारूपं कुर्याद् वित्तानुसारतः ॥७॥
transliteration: suvarṇena tadardhena tadardhārdhena vā punaḥ . nakṣatradevatārūpaṃ kuryād vittānusārataḥ.
separated_sandhi: suvarṇena tat ardhena tat ardha ardhena vā punaḥnakṣatradevatārūpam kuryāt vitta-anusārataḥ
english: One should create the image (rūpa) of the nakṣatra deity either with gold, or with half of that quantity, or with half of half of that quantity, in accordance with one's financial means (vitta).

sanskrit: श्यामवर्णं महोग्रं च द्विशिरस्कं वृकाननम् । खड्गचर्मधरं तद्वद् ध्येयं कुणपवाहनम् ॥८॥
transliteration: śyāmavarṇaṃ mahograṃ ca dviśiraskaṃ vṛkānanam . khaḍgacarmadharaṃ tadvad dhyeyaṃ kuṇapavāhanam.
separated_sandhi: śyāmavarṇam mahā ugram ca dviśiraskam vṛka ānanamkhaḍgacarmadharam tadvat dhyeyam kuṇapavāhanam
english: Similarly, the deity should be meditated upon (dhyāna) as dark-colored, exceedingly fierce, two-headed, wolf-faced, bearing a sword and a shield, and having a corpse as its vehicle.

sanskrit: सुवर्णस्य च मूल्यं वा स्थापयित्वा प्रपूजयेत् । सुवर्णं सर्वदैवत्यं यतः शास्त्रेषु निश्चितम् ॥९॥
transliteration: suvarṇasya ca mūlyaṃ vā sthāpayitvā prapūjayet . suvarṇaṃ sarvadaivatyaṃ yataḥ śāstreṣu niścitam.
separated_sandhi: suvarṇasya ca mūlyam vā sthāpayitvā prapūjayetsuvarṇam sarvadaivatyam yataḥ śāstreṣu niścitam
english: One should place either gold or its equivalent value and then worship it. This is because gold is considered to embody all deities, as is definitively stated in the scriptures.

sanskrit: आचार्यं वरयेत् पश्चात् स्वस्तिवाचनुपूर्वकम् । कलशस्थापनं कुर्यात् स्वगृह्योक्तविधानतः ॥१०॥
transliteration: ācāryaṃ varayet paścāt svastivācanupūrvakam . kalaśasthāpanaṃ kuryāt svagṛhyoktavidhānataḥ.
separated_sandhi: ācāryam varayet paścāt svastivācanupūrvakamkalaśasthāpanam kuryāt svagṛhyoktavidhānataḥ
english: Afterwards, one should select the preceptor, performing the "svastivācana" (invocation of welfare) first. Then, one should establish the ritual pitcher (kalaśa) according to the procedures described in one's own Gṛhyasūtra.

sanskrit: पञ्चगव्यादिकं क्षेप्यं कलशे तीर्थवारि च । शतौषध्यादिकं तत्र शतच्छिद्रघटे क्षिपेत् ॥११॥
transliteration: pañcagavyādikaṃ kṣepyaṃ kalaśe tīrthavāri ca . śatauṣadhyādikaṃ tatra śatacchidraghaṭe kṣipet.
separated_sandhi: pañcagavyādikam kṣepyam kalaśe tīrthavāri caśatauṣadhyādikam tatra śatacchidraghaṭe kṣipet
english: One should place "pañcagavya" (five products of the cow) and similar items, along with sacred water, into the ritual pitcher (kalaśa). Then, into a pot with a hundred holes, one should put the hundred medicinal herbs and other such things.

sanskrit: वंशपात्रं च संस्थाप्य तत्र वै पश्चिमामुखम् । अर्चेयेन्निरृतिं देवं शुक्लवस्त्राक्षतादिभिः ॥१२॥
transliteration: vaṃśapātraṃ ca saṃsthāpya tatra vai paścimāmukham . arceyennirṛtiṃ devaṃ śuklavastrākṣatādibhiḥ.
separated_sandhi: vaṃśapātram ca saṃsthāpya tatra vai paścimāmukhamarceyet nirṛtim devam śuklavastrākṣatādibhiḥ
english: Having placed a bamboo vessel there, facing west, one should worship the deity Nirṛti with white clothes, unbroken rice grains, and other similar offerings.

sanskrit: इन्द्रं तदधिदेवं च जलं प्रत्यधिदैवतम् । स्वस्वशाखोक्तमन्त्रेण प्रधानादीन्प्रपूजयेत् ॥१३॥
transliteration: indraṃ tadadhidevaṃ ca jalaṃ pratyadhidaivatam . svasvaśākhoktamantreṇa pradhānādīnprapūjayet.
separated_sandhi: indram tat adhidevam ca jalam pratyadhidaivatamsvasvaśākhoktamantreṇa pradhānādīn prapūjayet
english: With the (mantra) prescribed by one's own Vedic branch, one should worship Indra, who is its presiding deity, and water, which is its subsidiary deity, along with the main deities.

sanskrit: देवाधिदेवप्रीत्यर्थं होमं कुर्याद्यथाविधि । अष्टोत्तरं सहस्रं वा शतं वा नियतेन्द्रियः ॥१४॥
transliteration: devādhidevaprītyarthaṃ homaṃ kuryādyathāvidhi . aṣṭottaraṃ sahasraṃ vā śataṃ vā niyatendriyaḥ.
separated_sandhi: devādhideva prītyartham homam kuryāt yathāvidhiaṣṭottaram sahasram vā śatam vā niyatendriyaḥ
english: For the pleasure of the Supreme God, one whose senses are controlled should perform the oblation according to the prescribed procedure, either 1008 times or 100 times.

sanskrit: मृत्युप्रशमनार्थं च मन्त्रं त्रयम्बकं जपेत् । प्रार्थयेच्च ततो देवमभिषेकार्थमादरात् ॥१५॥
transliteration: mṛtyupraśamanārthaṃ ca mantraṃ trayambakaṃ japet . prārthayecca tato devamabhiṣekārthamādarāt.
separated_sandhi: mṛtyupraśamanārtham ca mantram trayambakam japet| prārthayet ca tataḥ devam abhiṣekārtham ādarāt
english: And for the purpose of alleviating death (mṛtyu) or danger of death, one should chant the Trayambaka mantra. Thereafter, one should respectfully pray to the deity for the consecration (abhiṣeka).

sanskrit: भद्रासनोपविष्टस्य सस्त्रीपुत्रस्य मन्त्रवित् । आचार्यो यजमानस्य कुर्यात् प्रीत्याभिषेचनम् ॥१६॥
transliteration: bhadrāsanopaviṣṭasya sastrīputrasya mantravit . ācāryo yajamānasya kuryāt prītyābhiṣecanam.
separated_sandhi: bhadrāsanopaviṣṭasya sastrīputrasya mantravit| ācāryaḥ yajamānasya kuryāt prītyā abhiṣecanam
english: The preceptor (ācārya), who is well-versed in mantras, should lovingly perform the consecration (abhiṣeka) for the patron (yajamāna) who is seated on an auspicious seat (bhadrāsana) along with his wife and son.

sanskrit: वस्त्रान्तरितकुम्भाभ्यां स्नापयेत्तदनन्तरम् । शुक्लाम्बरधरस्तद्वत् श्वेतगन्धानुलेपनः ॥१७॥
transliteration: vastrāntaritakumbhābhyāṃ snāpayettadanantaram . śuklāmbaradharastadvat śvetagandhānulepanaḥ.
separated_sandhi: vastrāntaritakumbhābhyām snāpayet tat anantaram| śuklāmbaradharaḥ tadvat śvetagandhānulepanaḥ
english: Thereafter, (the preceptor) should perform the ritual bathing for (the patron) using two pots covered with cloth. The patron should then, likewise, be wearing white garments and be smeared with white fragrant substances.

sanskrit: धेनुं पयस्विनीं दद्यादाचार्याय च शक्तितः । ऋत्विग्भ्यो दक्षिणां दद्याद् ब्राह्मणांश्चापि भोजयेत् ॥१८॥
transliteration: dhenuṃ payasvinīṃ dadyādācāryāya ca śaktitaḥ . ṛtvigbhyo dakṣiṇāṃ dadyād brāhmaṇāṃścāpi bhojayet.
separated_sandhi: dhenum payasvinīm dadyāt ācāryāya ca śaktitaḥṛtvigbhyaḥ dakṣiṇām dadyāt brāhmaṇān ca api bhojayet
english: One should offer a milking cow to the preceptor according to one's capacity, and provide fees to the officiating priests. One should also feed the brahmins.

sanskrit: यत्पापं यच्च मे दौःस्थ्यं सर्वगात्रेष्ववस्थितम् । तत्सर्वं भक्षयाज्य त्वं लक्ष्मीं पुष्टिं च वर्धय ॥१९॥
transliteration: yatpāpaṃ yacca me dauḥsthyaṃ sarvagātreṣvavasthitam . tatsarvaṃ bhakṣayājya tvaṃ lakṣmīṃ puṣṭiṃ ca vardhaya.
separated_sandhi: yat pāpam yat ca me dauḥsthyam sarvagātreṣu avasthitamtat sarvam bhakṣaya ājya tvam lakṣmīm puṣṭim ca vardhaya
english: O ghee, may you consume all that sin and misery of mine that resides in every part of my body. And may you enhance my prosperity (lakṣmī) and well-being.

sanskrit: अनेनैव तु मन्त्रेण सम्यगाज्यं विलोकयेत् । मूलगण्डोद्भवस्तैवं सर्पपापं प्रणश्यति ॥२०॥
transliteration: anenaiva tu mantreṇa samyagājyaṃ vilokayet . mūlagaṇḍodbhavastaivaṃ sarpapāpaṃ praṇaśyati.
separated_sandhi: anena eva tu mantreṇa samyak ājyam vilokayetmūlagaṇḍodbhavaḥ tathā evam sarpapāpam praṇaśyati
english: Indeed, one should properly consecrate the ghee with this very mantra. In this way, the "sarpa-pāpa" (serpent affliction) originating from a "mūla-gaṇḍa" (inauspicious astrological junction) is completely destroyed.

sanskrit: ज्येष्ठागण्डान्तजातस्तु पितुः स्वस्य च नाशकः । तस्य शान्तिविधिं वक्ष्ये सर्वविघ्नोपशान्तये ॥१॥
transliteration: jyeṣṭhāgaṇḍāntajātastu pituḥ svasya ca nāśakaḥ . tasya śāntividhiṃ vakṣye sarvavighnopaśāntaye.
separated_sandhi: jyeṣṭhāgaṇḍāntajātaḥ tu pituḥ svasya ca nāśakaḥtasya śāntividhim vakṣye sarvavighnopaśāntaye
english: Indeed, a child born in the "jyeṣṭhā-gaṇḍānta" (the inauspicious junction of the Jyeṣṭhā constellation) is destructive to both their father and themselves. Therefore, I will now explain the ritual for their appeasement, for the pacification of all obstacles.

sanskrit: मूलशान्तिसमं सर्वमात्रापि मण्डपादिकम् । इन्द्रोऽत्र देवता तद्वदधिदेवोऽनलस्तथा ॥२॥
transliteration: mūlaśāntisamaṃ sarvamātrāpi maṇḍapādikam . indro'tra devatā tadvadadhidevo'nalastathā.
separated_sandhi: mūlaśāntisamam sarvam mātrā api maṇḍapādikam |indraḥ atra devatā tatvat adhidevaḥ analaḥ tathā
english: All the arrangements, including the ritual pavilion (maṇḍapa) and so forth, should be made to the same extent as for a mūlaśānti ceremony. Here, Indra is the primary deity, and similarly, Agni (Anala) is the presiding deity (adhideva).

sanskrit: विज्ञेयं च तथा विप्र रक्षः प्रत्यधिदैवतम् । यथाशक्ति सुवर्णेन कुर्यादिन्द्रस्वरूपकम् ॥३॥
transliteration: vijñeyaṃ ca tathā vipra rakṣaḥ pratyadhidaivatam . yathāśakti suvarṇena kuryādindrasvarūpakam.
separated_sandhi: vijñeyam ca tathā vipra rakṣaḥ pratyadhidaivatam| yathāśakti suvarṇena kuryāt indrasvarūpakam
english: And, O brāhmaṇa (vipra), the Rākṣasa is to be known as the counter-presiding deity (pratyadhidaivatam). One should fashion an image of Indra according to one's capacity (yathāśakti) using gold.

sanskrit: वज्राङ्कुशधरं दिव्यं गजराजोपरिस्थितम् । शालितण्डुलसंयुक्तकुम्भस्योपरि पूजयेत् ॥४॥
transliteration: vajrāṅkuśadharaṃ divyaṃ gajarājoparisthitam . śālitaṇḍulasaṃyuktakumbhasyopari pūjayet.
separated_sandhi: vajrāṅkuśadharam divyam gajarājoparisthitam| śālitaṇḍulasaṃyuktakumbhasya upari pūjayet
english: One should worship (Indra's image), which is holding a thunderbolt (vajra) and a goad (aṅkuśa), which is divine, situated upon a royal elephant, and placed atop a pitcher (kumbha) filled with husked rice (śālitaṇḍula).

sanskrit: स्वस्वगृह्योक्तमन्त्रेण गन्धपुष्पाक्षतादिभिः । अभिषेकं च होमं च कुर्याद् ब्राह्मणभोजनम् ॥५॥
transliteration: svasvagṛhyoktamantreṇa gandhapuṣpākṣatādibhiḥ . abhiṣekaṃ ca homaṃ ca kuryād brāhmaṇabhojanam.
separated_sandhi: svasvagṛhyoktamantreṇa gandhapuṣpākṣatādibhiḥabhiṣekaṃ ca homaṃ ca kuryāt brāhmaṇabhojanam
english: One should perform an ablution (abhiṣeka) and a fire sacrifice (homa) with perfumes, flowers, unbroken rice, and other offerings, using the mantra prescribed in one's own Gṛhya-sūtra, and also arrange a meal for Brahmins.

sanskrit: इन्द्रसूक्तं जपेद् भक्त्या मन्त्रं मृत्युञ्जयं तथा । प्रार्थयेदिन्द्रदेवं च ततः शान्तिमवाप्नुयात् ॥६॥
transliteration: indrasūktaṃ japed bhaktyā mantraṃ mṛtyuñjayaṃ tathā . prārthayedindradevaṃ ca tataḥ śāntimavāpnuyāt.
separated_sandhi: indrasūktaṃ japet bhaktyā mantraṃ mṛtyuñjayaṃ tathāprārthayet indradevaṃ ca tataḥ śāntim avāpnuyāt
english: One should devotedly (bhaktyā) chant the Indra-sūkta and also the Mṛtyuñjaya mantra. One should pray to Lord Indra (Indra-deva), and then one will attain peace (śānti).

sanskrit: अथ वा शक्त्यभावे तु कुर्याद् गोदानमेव हि । यतः समस्तभूदानाद् गोदानमतिरिच्यते ॥७॥
transliteration: atha vā śaktyabhāve tu kuryād godānameva hi . yataḥ samastabhūdānād godānamatiricyate.
separated_sandhi: atha vā śaktyabhāve tu kuryāt godānam evahi yataḥ samastabhūdānāt godānam atiricyate
english: Alternatively, if there is a lack of means (śakti-abhāve), one should certainly perform the gift of a cow (go-dāna), because the gift of a cow (go-dāna) surpasses all gifts of land.

sanskrit: मूलेन्द्राहिमघागण्डजाते दद्याद् गवां त्रयम् । गोयुग्मं पौष्णदास्रोत्थे गण्डान्ते च द्विजन्मने ॥८॥
transliteration: mūlendrāhimaghāgaṇḍajāte dadyād gavāṃ trayam . goyugmaṃ pauṣṇadāsrotthe gaṇḍānte ca dvijanmane.
separated_sandhi: mūlendrāhimaghāgaṇḍajāte dadyāt gavām trayamgoyugmam pauṣṇadāsrautthe gaṇḍānte ca dvijanmane
english: When a child is born in the gaṇḍānta period of Mūla, Jyeṣṭhā, Aśleṣā, or Maghā nakṣatras, one should give three cows. If born in the gaṇḍānta period of Revatī or Aśvinī nakṣatras, one should give a pair of cows. These donations should be made to a Brahmin (dvija) at the time of the gaṇḍānta.

sanskrit: अन्यगण्डे च दुर्योगे गामेकां हि प्रदापयेत् । गोरभावे च विप्राय दद्यात् तन्मूल्यमेव हि ॥९॥
transliteration: anyagaṇḍe ca duryoge gāmekāṃ hi pradāpayet . gorabhāve ca viprāya dadyāt tanmūlyameva hi.
separated_sandhi: anyagande ca duryoge gām ekām hi pradāpayetgoḥ abhāve ca viprāya dadyāt tat mūlyam eva hi
english: And in other gaṇḍānta periods or in an unfavorable planetary combination (dur-yoga), one should indeed cause to be given one cow. And if cows are unavailable, one should indeed give their monetary value to a Brahmin (vipra).

sanskrit: ज्येष्ठनक्षत्रजा कन्या विनिहन्ति धवाग्रजम् । विशाखान्त्यपदोत्पन्ना कन्या देवरघातिनी ॥१०॥
transliteration: jyeṣṭhanakṣatrajā kanyā vinihanti dhavāgrajam . viśākhāntyapadotpannā kanyā devaraghātinī.
separated_sandhi: jyeṣṭhānakṣatrajā kanyā vinihanti dhavaagrajamviśākhāantya-pada-utpannā kanyā devaraghātinī
english: A girl born in Jyeṣṭhā nakṣatra causes the death of her husband's elder brother. A girl born in the last quarter (pada) of Viśākhā nakṣatra causes the death of her husband's younger brother.

sanskrit: तस्याः प्रदानकालेऽतो गोदानमपि कारयेत् । आश्लेषान्त्यत्रिपादोत्थौ मूलाद्यत्रिपदोद्भवौ ॥११॥
transliteration: tasyāḥ pradānakāle'to godānamapi kārayet . āśleṣāntyatripādotthau mūlādyatripadodbhavau.
separated_sandhi: tasyāḥ pradānakāle ataḥ godānam api kārayet |āśleṣāntyatripādotthau mūlādyatripadodbhavau
english: Therefore, at the time of her giving away (in marriage), one should also perform the offering of cows. (This applies to) those born in the last three quarters of Ashlesha (nakshatra) and the first three quarters of Mūla (nakshatra).

sanskrit: कन्यासुतौ हतः श्वश्रूं श्वशुरञ्च यथाक्रमम् । तयोर्विवाहकालेऽतः शान्तिं कुर्याद् विचक्षणः ॥१२॥
transliteration: kanyāsutau hataḥ śvaśrūṃ śvaśurañca yathākramam . tayorvivāhakāle'taḥ śāntiṃ kuryād vicakṣaṇaḥ.
separated_sandhi: kanyāsutau hataḥ śvaśrūm śvaśuram ca yathākramam| tayoḥ vivāhakāle ataḥ śāntim kuryāt vicakṣaṇaḥ
english: These bride and groom bring misfortune upon the mother-in-law and father-in-law respectively. Therefore, at the time of their marriage, a wise person should perform a pacification ritual (śānti).

sanskrit: तत्तदोषविनाशाय यथावित्तानुसारतः । धवाग्रजद्यभावे तु न दोषाय प्रजायते ॥१३॥
transliteration: tattadoṣavināśāya yathāvittānusārataḥ . dhavāgrajadyabhāve tu na doṣāya prajāyate.
separated_sandhi: tattaddoṣavināśāya yathāvittānusārataḥ| dhavāgrajābhāve tu na doṣāya prajāyate
english: For the destruction of those respective flaws, (the ritual should be performed) according to one's financial capacity. However, if there is no elder brother of the husband, then the flaw does not arise.

sanskrit: अथाऽन्यत् सम्प्रवक्ष्यामि जन्मदोषप्रदं द्विज । सुतत्र्ये सुताजन्म तत्त्रये सुतजन्म चेत् ॥१॥
transliteration: athā'nyat sampravakṣyāmi janmadoṣapradaṃ dvija . sutatrye sutājanma tattraye sutajanma cet.
separated_sandhi: atha anyat sampravakṣyāmi janmadoṣapradaṃdvija sutatrye sutājanma tattrye sutajanma cet
english: Now, O twice-born, I will explain another factor that causes natal defects. If a daughter is born after three sons, or if a son is born after three daughters, it is considered problematic.

sanskrit: तदाऽरिष्टभयं ज्ञेयं पितृमातृकुलद्वये । तत्र शान्तिविधिं कुर्याद् वित्तशाठ्यविवर्जितः ॥२॥
transliteration: tadā'riṣṭabhayaṃ jñeyaṃ pitṛmātṛkuladvaye . tatra śāntividhiṃ kuryād vittaśāṭhyavivarjitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: tadā ariṣṭabhayaṃ jñeyaṃ pitṛmātṛkuladvayetatra śāntividhiṃ kuryāt vittaśāṭhyavivarjitaḥ
english: Then, one should understand that there is a risk of misfortune for both the paternal and maternal families. In such a case, one must perform a ritual for appeasement, without any stinginess concerning wealth.

sanskrit: सूतकान्तेऽथ वा शुद्धे समये च शुभे दिने । आचार्यमृत्विजो वृत्वा ग्रहयज्ञपुरस्सरम् ॥३॥
