transliteration: sūtakānte'tha vā śuddhe samaye ca śubhe dine . ācāryamṛtvijo vṛtvā grahayajñapurassaram.
separated_sandhi: sūtakānte atha vā śuddhe samaye ca śubhe dineācāryam ṛtvijaḥ vṛtvā grahayajñapurassaram
english: At the end of the post-natal impurity period (sūtaka), or on an otherwise pure and auspicious time and day, having appointed the preceptor (ācārya) and other priests (ṛtvij), one should perform the ritual commencing with a planetary sacrifice (graha-yajña).

sanskrit: ब्रह्मविष्णु महेशेन्द्रप्रतिमाः स्वर्णजाः शुभाः । पूजयेद् धान्यराशिस्थकलशोपरि भक्तितः ॥४॥
transliteration: brahmaviṣṇu maheśendrapratimāḥ svarṇajāḥ śubhāḥ . pūjayed dhānyarāśisthakalaśopari bhaktitaḥ.
separated_sandhi: brahmaviṣṇumaheśendrapratimāḥ svarṇajāḥ śubhāḥpūjayet dhānyarāśisthakalaśopari bhaktitaḥ
english: One should devoutly (bhakti) worship the auspicious golden images of Brahmā, Viṣṇu, Maheśa (Śiva), and Indra. These images should be placed upon a pitcher, which is itself positioned on a heap of grain.

sanskrit: चत्वारि रुद्रसूक्तानि शान्तिसूक्तानि सर्वशः । विप्र एको जपेद् होमकाले च सुचिसंयतः ॥५॥
transliteration: catvāri rudrasūktāni śāntisūktāni sarvaśaḥ . vipra eko japed homakāle ca sucisaṃyataḥ.
separated_sandhi: catvāri rudrasūktāni śāntisūktāni sarvaśaḥvipraḥ ekaḥ japet homakāle ca sucisaṃyataḥ
english: One Brahmin, being pure and self-controlled, should chant the four Rudra-sūktas and all the Śānti-sūktas entirely at the time of the fire ritual (homa).

sanskrit: आचार्यो जुहुयात्तत्र समिदाज्यतिलांश्चरुम् । अष्टोत्तरं सहस्रं वा शतं वाऽष्टौ च विंशतिम् ॥६॥
transliteration: ācāryo juhuyāttatra samidājyatilāṃścarum . aṣṭottaraṃ sahasraṃ vā śataṃ vā'ṣṭau ca viṃśatim.
separated_sandhi: ācāryaḥ juhuyāt tatra samit ājya tilān ca carumaṣṭottaram sahasram vā śatam vā aṣṭau ca viṃśatim
english: The preceptor should offer fuel sticks (samit), clarified butter (ājya), sesame seeds, and cooked rice (caru) into the ritual fire. The number of these offerings should be 1008, or 100, or 28.

sanskrit: ब्रह्मादिसर्वदेवेभ्यः स्वस्वगृह्योक्तमन्त्रतः । ततः स्विष्टकृतं हुत्वा बलिं पूर्णाहुतिं पुनः ॥७॥
transliteration: brahmādisarvadevebhyaḥ svasvagṛhyoktamantrataḥ . tataḥ sviṣṭakṛtaṃ hutvā baliṃ pūrṇāhutiṃ punaḥ.
separated_sandhi: brahmādisarvadevebhyaḥ svasvagṛhyoktamantrataḥtataḥ sviṣṭakṛtam hutvā balim pūrṇāhutim punaḥ
english: To Brahmā and all other deities, using the mantras prescribed in one's own Gṛhya Sūtra, one should then offer the Sviṣṭakṛt offering. Afterwards, one should again offer the Bali oblation and the final offering (pūrṇāhuti).

sanskrit: अभिषेकं च जातस्य सकुटुम्बस्य कारयेत् । ऋत्विग्भ्यो दक्षिणां दद्याद् ब्राह्मणांश्चापि भोजयेत् ॥८॥
transliteration: abhiṣekaṃ ca jātasya sakuṭumbasya kārayet . ṛtvigbhyo dakṣiṇāṃ dadyād brāhmaṇāṃścāpi bhojayet.
separated_sandhi: abhiṣekam ca jātasya sakuṭumbasya kārayet ṛtvigbhyaḥdakṣiṇām dadyāt brāhmaṇān ca api bhojayet
english: One should perform the anointing (abhiṣeka) for the newborn child along with its family. One should give fees (dakṣiṇā) to the priests and also feed the Brahmins.

sanskrit: कांस्याज्यवीक्षणं कृत्वा दीनानाथांश्च तर्पयेत् । एवं शान्त्या च मैत्रेय सर्वारिष्टं विलीयते ॥९॥
transliteration: kāṃsyājyavīkṣaṇaṃ kṛtvā dīnānāthāṃśca tarpayet . evaṃ śāntyā ca maitreya sarvāriṣṭaṃ vilīyate.
separated_sandhi: kāṃsyājyavīkṣaṇam kṛtvā dīnānāthān ca tarpayetevam śāntyā ca maitreya sarvāriṣṭam vilīyate
english: Having performed the ritual of observing ghee in a bronze vessel, one should also satisfy the poor and helpless. O Maitreya, in this way, through propitiation, all misfortunes vanish.

sanskrit: अथाऽहं सम्प्रवक्ष्यामि विकारं प्रसवोद्भवम् । येनाऽरिष्टं समस्तस्य ग्रामस्य च कुलस्य च ॥१॥
transliteration: athā'haṃ sampravakṣyāmi vikāraṃ prasavodbhavam . yenā'riṣṭaṃ samastasya grāmasya ca kulasya ca.
separated_sandhi: atha aham sampravakṣyāmi vikāram prasavodbhavamyena ariṣṭam samastasya grāmasya ca kulasya ca
english: Now, I will thoroughly explain the abnormalities that arise from birth, which can bring misfortune (ariṣṭa) upon the entire village and family.

sanskrit: अत्यल्पे वाऽधिके काले प्रसवो यदि जायते । हीनाङ्गोवाऽधिकाङ्गो वा विशिरा द्विशिरास्तथा ॥२॥
transliteration: atyalpe vā'dhike kāle prasavo yadi jāyate . hīnāṅgovā'dhikāṅgo vā viśirā dviśirāstathā.
separated_sandhi: atyalpe vā adhike kāle prasavaḥ yadi jāyatehīnāṅgaḥ vā adhikāṅgaḥ vā viśirāḥ dviśirāḥ tathā
english: If birth occurs either too early or too late, or if the newborn has deficient limbs, or excessive limbs, or is headless, or two-headed, and so on (similarly, such abnormalities)...

sanskrit: नार्या पश्वाकृतिर्वापि पशुष्वपि नराकृतिः । प्रसवस्य विकारोऽयं विनाशायोपजायते ॥३॥
transliteration: nāryā paśvākṛtirvāpi paśuṣvapi narākṛtiḥ . prasavasya vikāro'yaṃ vināśāyopajāyate.
separated_sandhi: nāryā paśvākṛtiḥ vā api paśuṣu api narākṛtiḥprasavasya vikāraḥ ayam vināśāya upajāyate
english: Or if a woman gives birth to an animal-like form, or if an animal gives birth to a human-like form - this abnormality of birth occurs for ruin.

sanskrit: यस्य स्त्रियाः पशुनां वा विकाराः प्रसवोद्भवः । अनिष्टं भवने तस्य कुलेऽपि च महद् भवेत् ॥४॥
transliteration: yasya striyāḥ paśunāṃ vā vikārāḥ prasavodbhavaḥ . aniṣṭaṃ bhavane tasya kule'pi ca mahad bhavet.
separated_sandhi: yasya striyāḥ paśūnām vā vikārāḥ prasavodbhavaḥaniṣṭam bhavane tasya kule api ca mahat bhavet
english: If a woman or animals belonging to a person experience abnormalities or problems during childbirth, then great misfortune (aniṣṭa) may occur in that person's house and even in their family.

sanskrit: तद्दोषपरिहारार्थं शान्तिः कार्या प्रयत्नतः । स्त्री वा गौवंडवा वापि परित्याज्या हितार्थिना ॥५॥
transliteration: taddoṣaparihārārthaṃ śāntiḥ kāryā prayatnataḥ . strī vā gauvaṃḍavā vāpi parityājyā hitārthinā.
separated_sandhi: taddoṣaparihārārtham śāntiḥ kāryā prayatnataḥstrī vā gauḥ vaḍavā vā api parityājyā hitārthinā
english: To remedy that defect, a ritual of pacification (śānti) should be diligently performed. The woman, cow, or mare [involved] should also be abandoned by the one who desires his own welfare.

sanskrit: नार्याः पञ्चदशे वर्षे जन्मतः षोडशोऽपि वा । गर्भो वा प्रसवो वाऽपि न शुभाय प्रजायते ॥६॥
transliteration: nāryāḥ pañcadaśe varṣe janmataḥ ṣoḍaśo'pi vā . garbho vā prasavo vā'pi na śubhāya prajāyate.
separated_sandhi: nāryāḥ pañcadaśe varṣe janmataḥ ṣoḍaśaḥ api vāgarbhaḥ vā prasavaḥ vā api na śubhāya prajāyate
english: When a woman conceives or gives birth in her fifteenth or even sixteenth year from birth, it does not lead to auspiciousness (śubha).

sanskrit: सिंहराशिस्थितेऽर्क गौनक्रस्थे महिषी तथा । प्रसूता स्वामिनं हन्ति स्वयं चापि विनश्यति ॥७॥
transliteration: siṃharāśisthite'rka gaunakrasthe mahiṣī tathā . prasūtā svāminaṃ hanti svayaṃ cāpi vinaśyati.
separated_sandhi: siṃharāśisthite arke gonakrasthe mahiṣī tathāprasūtā svāminam hanti svayam ca api vinaśyati
english: When the Sun is situated in the Leo sign, and an indicator related to cattle is in the Capricorn sign, if a buffalo gives birth, it kills its owner and itself also perishes.

sanskrit: ब्राह्मणाय प्रदद्यात् तां शान्तिं वापि समाचरेत् । ब्रह्मविष्णुमहेशानां ग्रहाणां चैव पूजनम् ॥८॥
transliteration: brāhmaṇāya pradadyāt tāṃ śāntiṃ vāpi samācaret . brahmaviṣṇumaheśānāṃ grahāṇāṃ caiva pūjanam.
separated_sandhi: brāhmaṇāya pradadyāt tām śāntim vā api samācaretbrahmaviṣṇumaheśānām grahāṇām ca eva pūjanam
english: One should give that [buffalo or an equivalent] to a Brahmin, or perform a propitiatory rite (śānti). This includes the worship of Brahmā, Viṣṇu, and Maheśa (Śiva), as well as the planets.

sanskrit: सर्वं होमादिकं कर्म कुर्यात् त्रितरशान्तिवत् । ततो गृहो सुखी भूत्वा सर्वपापैः प्रमुच्यते ॥९॥
transliteration: sarvaṃ homādikaṃ karma kuryāt tritaraśāntivat . tato gṛho sukhī bhūtvā sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate.
separated_sandhi: sarvam homa ādikam karma kuryāt tritaraśāntivattataḥ gṛhī sukhī bhūtvā sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate
english: All rituals, starting with the fire sacrifice (homa), should be performed like a comprehensive propitiatory rite (śānti). Then, the householder (or master of the house) becomes happy and is completely freed from all sins.

sanskrit: एवं त्वरिष्टे सम्प्राप्ते नरः शान्तिं करोति यः । सर्वान् कामानवाप्नोति चिरजीवी सुखी च सः ॥१०॥
transliteration: evaṃ tvariṣṭe samprāpte naraḥ śāntiṃ karoti yaḥ . sarvān kāmānavāpnoti cirajīvī sukhī ca saḥ.
separated_sandhi: evam tu ariṣṭe samprāpte naraḥ śāntim karotiyaḥ sarvān kāmān avāpnoti cirajīvī sukhī ca saḥ
english: Thus, a person who performs propitiatory rites when misfortune (ariṣṭa) has arrived attains all desires, lives long, and is happy.

sanskrit: यच्छास्त्रं ब्रह्मणा प्रोक्तं नारदाय महात्मने । तदेव शौनकादिभ्यो नारदः प्राह सादरम् ॥१॥
transliteration: yacchāstraṃ brahmaṇā proktaṃ nāradāya mahātmane . tadeva śaunakādibhyo nāradaḥ prāha sādaram.
separated_sandhi: yat śāstram brahmaṇā proktam nāradāya mahātmanetat eva śaunakādibhyaḥ nāradaḥ prāha sādaram
english: That scripture, which was declared by Brahmā to the great-souled Nārada (mahātman), Nārada himself respectfully narrated to Śaunaka and others.

sanskrit: ततो मया यथा ज्ञातं तुभ्यमुक्तं तथा द्विज । नासूयकाय दातव्यं परनिन्दारताय वा ॥२॥
transliteration: tato mayā yathā jñātaṃ tubhyamuktaṃ tathā dvija . nāsūyakāya dātavyaṃ paranindāratāya vā.
separated_sandhi: tataḥ mayā yathā jñātam tubhyam uktam tathādvija na asūyakāya dātavyam paranindāratāya vā
english: Therefore, O twice-born (dvija), I have spoken to you what I have understood, exactly as it was known. This knowledge should not be given to an envious person or to one who is devoted to slandering others.

sanskrit: जडाय दुर्विनीताय नाज्ञाताय कदाचन । देयमेतत्सुरिलाय भक्ताय सत्यवादिने ॥३॥
transliteration: jaḍāya durvinītāya nājñātāya kadācana . deyametatsurilāya bhaktāya satyavādine.
separated_sandhi: jaḍāya durvinītāya na ajñātāya kadācanadeyam etat sūrilāya bhaktāya satyavādine
english: This (knowledge) should never be given to someone who is dull-witted, ill-behaved, or unknown. It should be imparted to a wise person, a devotee (bhakti), and one who speaks the truth.

sanskrit: मेधाविने विनीताय सम्यग् ज्ञातकुलाय च । पुण्यदं ज्यौतिषं शास्त्रमग्र्यं वेदाङ्गमुत्तमम् ॥४॥
transliteration: medhāvine vinītāya samyag jñātakulāya ca . puṇyadaṃ jyautiṣaṃ śāstramagryaṃ vedāṅgamuttamam.
separated_sandhi: medhāvīne vinītāya samyak jñātakulāya ca puṇyadamjyautiṣam śāstram agryam vedāṅgam uttamam
english: This astrological science, which bestows merit (puṇyada), is foremost, and an excellent limb of the Veda (vedāṅga), should be imparted to an intelligent and modest person, and to one of a well-known family.

sanskrit: जानाति कालमानं यो ग्रहर्क्षाणां च संस्थितिम् । होराशास्त्रमिदं सम्यक् स विजानाति नाऽपरः ॥५॥
transliteration: jānāti kālamānaṃ yo graharkṣāṇāṃ ca saṃsthitim . horāśāstramidaṃ samyak sa vijānāti nā'paraḥ.
separated_sandhi: jānāti kālamānam yaḥ graharṣāṇām ca saṃsthitimhorāśāstram idam samyak sa vijānāti na aparaḥ
english: Whoever knows the measure of time and the positions of planets and constellations, he truly understands this Hora science; no one else does.

sanskrit: होराशास्त्रार्थतत्त्वज्ञः सत्यवाग् विजितेन्द्रियः । शुभाऽशुभं फलं वक्ति सत्यं तद्वचनं भवेत् ॥६॥
transliteration: horāśāstrārthatattvajñaḥ satyavāg vijitendriyaḥ . śubhā'śubhaṃ phalaṃ vakti satyaṃ tadvacanaṃ bhavet.
separated_sandhi: horāśāstrārthatattvajñaḥ satyavāk vijitendriyaḥśubha aśubham phalaṃ vakti satyaṃ tat vacanaṃ bhavet
english: A person who truly understands the essence of astrological treatises (horāśāstra), speaks truthfully, and has controlled their senses, their pronouncements regarding auspicious and inauspicious outcomes will indeed come true.

sanskrit: ये सुशास्त्रं पठन्तीदं ये वा श‍ृण्वन्ति भक्तितः । तेषांमायुर्बलं वित्तं वृद्धिमेति यशः सदा ॥७॥
transliteration: ye suśāstraṃ paṭhantīdaṃ ye vā śa‍ृṇvanti bhaktitaḥ . teṣāṃmāyurbalaṃ vittaṃ vṛddhimeti yaśaḥ sadā.
separated_sandhi: ye suśāstraṃ paṭhanti idaṃ ye vā śṛṇvanti bhaktitaḥteṣām āyuḥ balaṃ vittaṃ vṛddhiṃ eti yaśaḥ sadā
english: For those who read this excellent treatise, or those who listen to it with devotion (bhakti), their longevity, strength, wealth, and fame will always increase.

sanskrit: इत्थं पराशरेणोक्तं होराशास्त्रं चमत्कृतम् । नवं नवजनप्रीत्यै विविधाध्यायसंयुतम् ॥८॥
transliteration: itthaṃ parāśareṇoktaṃ horāśāstraṃ camatkṛtam . navaṃ navajanaprītyai vividhādhyāyasaṃyutam.
separated_sandhi: itthaṃ parāśareṇa uktaṃ horāśāstraṃ camatkṛtaṃnavaṃ navajanaprītyai vividhādhyāyasaṃyutam
english: In this manner, this wonderful astrological treatise (horāśāstra) has been declared by Parāśara, a new and remarkable work, enriched with various chapters, for the delight of future generations.

sanskrit: श्रेष्ठं जगद्धितायेदं मैत्रेयाय द्विजन्मने । ततः प्रचरितं पृथ्व्यामादृतं सादरं जनैः ॥९॥
transliteration: śreṣṭhaṃ jagaddhitāyedaṃ maitreyāya dvijanmane . tataḥ pracaritaṃ pṛthvyāmādṛtaṃ sādaraṃ janaiḥ.
separated_sandhi: śreṣṭham jagat hitāya idam maitreyāya dvijanmane| tataḥ pracaritam pṛthvyām ādṛtam sādaram janaiḥ
english: This supreme treatise, for the benefit of the world, was imparted to Maitreya, the twice-born (dvijanman). Thereafter, it spread across the Earth and was respectfully received by people.

sanskrit: ग्रन्थेऽस्मिन् पृथगध्यायैर्विषया विनिवेशिताः । सृष्टिक्रमोऽवताराश्च गुणाः खेटस्य भस्य च ॥१०॥
transliteration: granthe'smin pṛthagadhyāyairviṣayā viniveśitāḥ . sṛṣṭikramo'vatārāśca guṇāḥ kheṭasya bhasya ca.
separated_sandhi: granthe asmin pṛthak adhyāyaiḥ viṣayāḥ viniveśitāḥ| sṛṣṭikramaḥ avatārāḥ ca guṇāḥ kheṭasya bhasya ca
english: In this treatise, various topics are systematically introduced through separate chapters. These include the process of creation (sṛṣṭikrama), divine incarnations (avatāra), and the characteristics of both planets and constellations.

sanskrit: विशेषलग्नं वर्गाश्च तद्विवेकश्च राशिदृक् । अरिष्टं तद्विभङ्गश्च विवेको भावजस्तथा ॥११॥
transliteration: viśeṣalagnaṃ vargāśca tadvivekaśca rāśidṛk . ariṣṭaṃ tadvibhaṅgaśca viveko bhāvajastathā.
separated_sandhi: viśeṣalagnam vargāḥ ca tat vivekaḥ ca rāśidṛk |ariṣṭam tat vibhaṅgaḥ ca vivekaḥ bhāvojaḥ tathā
english: Other topics include special ascendants (lagna), divisional charts (varga) and their analysis, sign aspects (rāśidṛk), indications of misfortune (ariṣṭa) and their cancellation, as well as the analysis of houses (bhāva).

sanskrit: भावानां च फलाध्यायो भावेशोत्थफलं तथा । अप्रकाशफलं स्पष्टखेटदृष्टिप्रसाधनम् ॥१२॥
transliteration: bhāvānāṃ ca phalādhyāyo bhāveśotthaphalaṃ tathā . aprakāśaphalaṃ spaṣṭakheṭadṛṣṭiprasādhanam.
separated_sandhi: bhāvānām ca phalādhyāyaḥ bhāveśotthaphalamtathā aprakāśaphalam spaṣṭakheṭadṛṣṭiprasādhanam
english: The chapter on the results of astrological houses (bhāva), and similarly, the results originating from the lords of those houses, along with obscure results, and the elucidation of clear planetary aspects (are discussed).

sanskrit: ततः स्पष्टबलाध्यायः इष्टकष्टप्रसाधनम् । पदं चोपपदं तद्वदर्गला त्वथ कारकाः ॥१३॥
transliteration: tataḥ spaṣṭabalādhyāyaḥ iṣṭakaṣṭaprasādhanam . padaṃ copapadaṃ tadvadargalā tvatha kārakāḥ.
separated_sandhi: tataḥ spaṣṭabalādhyāyaḥ iṣṭakaṣṭaprasādhanampadam ca upapadam tadvat argalā tu atha kārakāḥ
english: Thereafter, the chapter on planetary strength (bala), the elucidation of auspicious and inauspicious results, followed by the "pada" and "upapada" (astrological points), and similarly, the "argalā" (planetary intervention), and then the significators (kāraka) (are explained).

sanskrit: कारकांशफलं योगकारकाध्याय एव च । नाभसा विविधा योगाश्चन्द्रयोगोऽर्कयोगकः ॥१४॥
transliteration: kārakāṃśaphalaṃ yogakārakādhyāya eva ca . nābhasā vividhā yogāścandrayogo'rkayogakaḥ.
separated_sandhi: kārakāṃśaphalam yogakārakādhyāyaḥ eva canābhasāḥ vividhāḥ yogāḥ candrayogaḥ arkayogakaḥ
english: The results derived from the significator (kāraka) divisional charts, and indeed the chapter on "yogakārakas" (planets forming auspicious combinations); furthermore, various celestial combinations (nābhasa yoga), Moon's combinations, and Sun's combinations (are described).

sanskrit: राजयोगस्ततः प्रोक्तो राजसम्बन्धयोगकः । विशेषधनयोगाश्च योगा दारिद्र्यकारकाः ॥१५॥
transliteration: rājayogastataḥ prokto rājasambandhayogakaḥ . viśeṣadhanayogāśca yogā dāridryakārakāḥ.
separated_sandhi: rājayogaḥ tataḥ proktaḥ rājasambandhayogakaḥviśeṣadhanayogāḥ ca yogāḥ dāridryakārakāḥ
english: Subsequently, royal combinations (rājayoga) are described, as well as combinations related to royalty, special wealth-giving combinations, and combinations that cause poverty.

sanskrit: आयुर्मारकभेदाश्च ग्रहावस्थाः फलान्विताः । नानाविधदशाध्यायास्तत्फलाध्यायः संयुताः ॥१६॥
transliteration: āyurmārakabhedāśca grahāvasthāḥ phalānvitāḥ . nānāvidhadaśādhyāyāstatphalādhyāyaḥ saṃyutāḥ.
separated_sandhi: āyurmārakabhedāḥ ca grahāvasthāḥ phalānvitāḥnānāvidhadaśādhyāyāḥ tatphalādhyāyaḥ saṃyutāḥ
english: It also details the distinctions related to longevity (āyus) and death-inflicting planets (māraka), the states of planets along with their effects, and chapters on various types of planetary periods (daśā) including those on their specific results.

sanskrit: अन्तःप्रत्यन्तरप्राणसूक्ष्मसंज्ञाश्च तद्भिदाः । सूर्याद्यष्टकवर्गश्च त्रिकोणपरिशोधनम् ॥१७॥
transliteration: antaḥpratyantaraprāṇasūkṣmasaṃjñāśca tadbhidāḥ . sūryādyaṣṭakavargaśca trikoṇapariśodhanam.
separated_sandhi: antaḥpratyantaraprāṇasūkṣmasaṃjñāḥ ca tadbhidāḥsūryādyaṣṭakavargaḥ ca trikoṇapariśodhanam
english: This includes the nomenclature and divisions of Antara-daśā, Pratyantara-daśā, Prāṇa-daśā, and Sūkṣma-daśā. Also detailed are the Aṣṭakavarga system, starting with the Sun and other planets, and the purification of triplicity signs (trikoṇa-pariśodhana).

sanskrit: एकाधिपत्यसंशुद्धिस्ततः पिण्डप्रसाधनम् । ततश्चाऽष्टकवर्गाणां प्रस्फुटानि फलानि च ॥१८॥
transliteration: ekādhipatyasaṃśuddhistataḥ piṇḍaprasādhanam . tataścā'ṣṭakavargāṇāṃ prasphuṭāni phalāni ca.
separated_sandhi: ekādhipatyasaṃśuddhiḥ tataḥ piṇḍaprasādhanamtataḥ ca aṣṭakavargāṇām prasphuṭāni phalāni ca
english: First, the purification of single rulership. Then, the calculation of aggregate strengths. And thereafter, the distinct results of the aṣṭakavarga system are described.

sanskrit: ततोऽप्यष्टकवर्गायुःसाधनं च ततः परम् । समुदायाष्टवर्गोत्थफलाध्यायः परिस्फुटः ॥१९॥
transliteration: tato'pyaṣṭakavargāyuḥsādhanaṃ ca tataḥ param . samudāyāṣṭavargotthaphalādhyāyaḥ parisphuṭaḥ.
separated_sandhi: tataḥ api aṣṭakavargāyuḥsādhanam ca tataḥ paramsamudāyāṣṭavargotthaphalādhyāyaḥ parisphuṭaḥ
english: Then, also, the calculation of longevity based on the aṣṭakavarga system. And after that, there is an explicit chapter on the results derived from the aggregate aṣṭakavarga.

sanskrit: ग्रहरश्मिफलाध्यायः सुदर्शनफलं तथा । महापुरुषचिह्नानि महाभूतफलानि च ॥२०॥
transliteration: graharaśmiphalādhyāyaḥ sudarśanaphalaṃ tathā . mahāpuruṣacihnāni mahābhūtaphalāni ca.
separated_sandhi: graharaśmiphalaadhyāyaḥ sudarśanaphalamtathā mahāpuruṣacihnāni mahābhūtaphālāni ca
english: The chapter on the results of planetary rays and the results of the Sudarśana system. Similarly, it covers the auspicious marks of a great person (mahāpuruṣa) and the outcomes related to the great elements (mahābhūta).

sanskrit: गुणत्रयफलाध्यायस्ततोऽप्यज्ञातजन्मनाम् । जन्मलग्नादिविज्ञानं प्रव्रज्यालक्षणानि च ॥२१॥
transliteration: guṇatrayaphalādhyāyastato'pyajñātajanmanām . janmalagnādivijñānaṃ pravrajyālakṣaṇāni ca.
separated_sandhi: guṇatrayaphalādhyāyaḥ tataḥ api ajñātajanmanāmjanmalagnādivijñānam pravrajyālakṣaṇāni ca
english: This chapter covers the effects of the three natural qualities (guṇa). Afterwards, it also includes knowledge of the birth ascendant (lagna) and similar details for those whose birth is unknown, along with the characteristics of renunciation (pravrajyā).

sanskrit: स्त्रीणां च फलवैष्ट्यमङ्गलक्ष्मफलानि च । पूर्वपापोत्थशापोत्थयोगा वैपुत्र्यकारकाः ॥२२॥
transliteration: strīṇāṃ ca phalavaiṣṭyamaṅgalakṣmaphalāni ca . pūrvapāpotthaśāpotthayogā vaiputryakārakāḥ.
separated_sandhi: strīṇām ca phala-vaiṣṭyam aṅga-lakṣma-phalānica pūrvapāpotthaśāpotthayogāḥ vaiputryakārakāḥ
english: Also included are the specific results for women, the outcomes of misfortunes, and the effects of bodily marks. Furthermore, astrological combinations (yoga) that cause childlessness, arising from past sins and curses, are described.

sanskrit: सत्पुत्रप्राप्त्युपायाश्च सहैव प्रतिपादिताः । जन्मन्यनिष्टलग्नर्क्षतिथ्यादिप्रतिपादनम् ॥२३॥
transliteration: satputraprāptyupāyāśca sahaiva pratipāditāḥ . janmanyaniṣṭalagnarkṣatithyādipratipādanam.
separated_sandhi: satputraprāptyupāyāḥ ca saha eva pratipāditāḥjanmani aniṣṭa-lagnarkṣatithyādi-pratipādanam
english: Moreover, methods for obtaining virtuous sons are described together with these. Also, there is an exposition regarding inauspicious ascendants (lagna), constellations (nakṣatra), lunar days (tithi), and similar factors at the time of birth.

sanskrit: तत्तच्छान्तिविधिश्चैव संक्षेपेण प्रदर्शितः । प्रसवस्य विकाराश्च कथिताः शान्तिसंयुताः ॥२४॥
transliteration: tattacchāntividhiścaiva saṃkṣepeṇa pradarśitaḥ . prasavasya vikārāśca kathitāḥ śāntisaṃyutāḥ.
separated_sandhi: tat tat śāntividhiḥ ca eva saṃkṣepeṇa pradarśitaḥprasavasya vikārāḥ ca kathitāḥ śānti-saṃyutāḥ
english: Furthermore, methods for specific remedies have been briefly presented. Additionally, various birth-related disorders have been described, along with their corresponding propitiatory rites (śānti).

sanskrit: एवं जातकवर्येऽत्र निविष्टा विषयाः शतम् । विज्ञाय विबुधास्त्वेतान् प्राप्नुवन्तु यशः श्रियम् ॥२५॥
transliteration: evaṃ jātakavarye'tra niviṣṭā viṣayāḥ śatam . vijñāya vibudhāstvetān prāpnuvantu yaśaḥ śriyam.
separated_sandhi: evam jātaka-varye atra niviṣṭāḥ viṣayāḥ śatamvijñāya vibudhāḥ tu etān prāpnuvantu yaśaḥ śriyam
english: Thus, in this principal section concerning nativities, a hundred subjects have been presented. May the wise, by comprehending these, achieve fame and prosperity.
